name: Catalina Marketing
description: A trusted performance marketing partner and shopper intelligence leader since 1983, Catalina precisely targets in-store, TV and digital media to personalize the shopper journey. Powered by unrivaled real-time shopper data and AI-enhanced data science, we help retailers, CPG brands and agencies optimize every stage of media planning, execution, and measurement to deliver ~$6 billion in consumer value annually. Catalina has no higher priority than ensuring the privacy and security of the data entrusted to the company and maintaining consumer trust. Visit www.catalina.com to learn more about Catalina’s operations across the United States, Costa Rica and Europe.

name: Acosta
description: Acosta brings simplicity to retail salesThe formula for reaching consumers grows more complicated by the day. We act as a catalyst to boldly connect brands, retailers and consumers, fueling growth and building long-term value.

name: Bar and Bar
description: We’re a team of experienced formulators, makers, and entrepreneurs who knew we could excel with no-compromise haircare. Everything was either trapped in plastic bottles or offered mediocre performance—especially the bars. The few solid options out there? Full of fillers that left our hair and skin dull and lifeless. So, we made our own. No more lackluster lather. Salon-grade actives. Shining, bouncy hair. Zero bottles. It started in our showers for us, our families, our group chats. Then the word spread. Turns out we weren’t alone. No one was truly filling the gap for high-performance, bottle-free haircare that actually works. So here we are—sharing what we made for the people we love with everyone else. Salon results. Zero Bottles. Made by people who actually care. That’s Bar & Bar.

name: BioCell Technology, LLC
description: Patented BioCell Collagen® is a dietary ingredient that supports joint and skin health providing a naturally occurring matrix of Collagen Type II, Chondroitin Sulfate & Hyaluronic Acid.

name: Chobani
description: From the very first batch of yogurt that came off the line in Central New York in 2007, our mission has been to make high-quality, nutritious food accessible to all people, while elevating communities and making the world a healthier place. In short, we use food as a force for good. We believe people deserve food that is Delicious, Nutritious, Natural, and Accessible. We call it our DNNA. But our company doesn't just create high-quality, delicious food—we are on a journey to make a social and environmental impact. We believe good food has the power to improve bodies, families, communities, economies, and the environment. At Chobani, we work with thousands of talented colleagues from diverse backgrounds, support our local farmers, and are committed to making a positive impact on the places where we live and work. We prioritize giving back to our communities and beyond: working to eradicate child hunger; supporting immigrants, refugees, and members of underrepresented groups; honoring veterans and protecting the planet.

name: Chomps
description: Chomps is America's fastest-growing meat snack brand,* setting a new standard in snacking with a commitment to real ingredients and bold, satisfying flavors. With so much conflicting information surrounding food, we realized that people want to make the best choices, but aren’t sure what is truly good for them. We decided to eliminate the guesswork and created simple snacks made with high-quality real ingredients that are thoughtfully-sourced.That's why Chomps are made from 100% grass-fed, grass-finished beef and venison, along with antibiotic-free turkey. Each Chomps meat stick delivers 10-12 grams of high-quality protein without sugar, hormones, soy, dairy, artificial preservatives, artificial nitrates, or MSG. Seasoned with a blend of flavorful herbs and spices, Chomps provides a nutritious protein snack for the whole family. We prioritize thoughtful-sourcing, and every Chomps meat stick is free of the top 9 allergens. Discover a new standard in snacking at www.chomps.com.*Numerator, Shopper Metrics, Numerator L52 W/E 10/31/25

name: Cymbiotika
description: We believe that food is the best medicine, but modern diets often leave us lacking vital nutrients. That's where Cymbiotika comes in.Our story began with a need to fill nutritional gaps and provide our bodies with everything vital for optimal health.We recognized an alarming lack of transparency in the supplement industry, with products full of fillers, toxins and synthetic ingredients. We were reluctant to take supplements because we couldn't trust them.We don't want you to feel the way that we felt.After years of research, Cymbiotika has created the best supplements on earth. We combine scientific innovation with traditional Eastern medicine to design formulas that synergize with the body. Our supplements are sourced from only the highest quality plant-based ingredients and utilize the most advanced absorption technology.

name: Gimme Health Foods
description: Our Co-Founder's, Annie and Steve, created a seaweed brand to connect people to a traditional Korean food, and share the benefits of this miracle from the sea. Their vision led to the creation of the world's first USDA Certified Organic, non-GMO Project Verified seaweed snacks.Thanks to Annie and Steve, other seaweed manufacturers are following suit; helping to reduce the amount of chemicals in our oceans. And that's just the beginning. Watch this space for innovative ways Gimme's unlocking new possibilities and literally changing the seaweed game.

name: Guru Nanda, LLC
description: When I first came to the United States over two decades ago, I thought I knew everything about wellness. After all, I was a foreign medical expert and entrepreneur. How wrong I was. Soon, my crazy work hours, terrible diet, and constant stress took their toll. I was taken to the hospital for an apparent heart attack. In fact, it was a nervous breakdown.My doctor wanted to give me more pills. I say "more" pills, because I was already taking many for every aspect of my health, and they clearly weren't helping. Now, I am a firm supporter of Western medicine. I always listen to my doctors, and I hope you do also. But as I lay in my hospital bed, I realized that if I truly wanted to get well, I would have to heal not just my body, but my mind and my spirit.As soon as I could, I took a trip to India, where I was born and raised. There, I threw myself into the ancient Indian healing system of Ayurveda. In fact, I come from a long line of healers. My great-grandfather Lal Bihari Nanda was in his day one of the top Ayurvedic healers in the world. But when my family migrated from Pakistan to India, that knowledge was lost. So, in studying Ayurveda, I not only regained my health, but my birthright. And once I was well, I began to devote myself to helping others.I founded GuruNanda to bring the holistic, transformational benefits of Ayurveda to the whole world. The company's name is meant to be playful: As I healed through Ayurveda, I became the guru of my own wellness. And that's what I desire for you too.GuruNanda incorporates Ayurvedic values at every level, making top-quality, ethically sourced healing products available to all. My commitment to you is threefold: authenticity, quality, and good karma. I am honored to be part of your wellness journey.

name: Lifeway Foods, Inc.
description: Since 1986, Lifeway Foods has been a driving force in the natural foods industry, helping define the cultured foods space for forty years through innovation, intention, and flavor. Our diverse lineup is designed to fit seamlessly into everyday life. From our latest creations, like protein-packed Muscle Mates and smooth, cultured Kefir Butter, to our wide variety of Lifeway Kefir flavors, to kid-friendly Lifeway ProBugs, and versatile Lifeway Farmer Cheese, every product is crafted with live and active cultures to support digestion and is packed with nutrients like protein, calcium, and vitamin D. Through sustainable local farming, thoughtfully sourced ingredients, environmental stewardship, and global philanthropy, Lifeway Foods is committed to making a meaningful impact on the world, one healthy gut at a time. Stop by booth #743 and join the celebration of our 40th anniversary! We’ll have plenty of fun activities, interactive experiences, and Lifeway associates ready to share everything you need to know about the goodness of gut-health.

name: Lindt & Sprungli Chocolate
description: The story of Lindt & Sprüngli begins in 1845 when confectioner David Sprüngli-Schwarz and his son Rudolf Sprüngli-Ammann have a groundbreaking idea: Becoming the first to produce chocolate in solid form in the German-speaking area of Switzerland.The Lindt Chocolate Competence Foundation aims to safeguard Switzerland's leading position as a chocolate manufacturing country and reinforce and expand Swiss chocolate expertise. The core project of the foundation is the Lindt Home of Chocolate.The Lindt Cocoa Foundation has the declared purpose of working to achieve social and ecological sustainability in the cultivation, production and processing of cocoa and other raw materials used in chocolate production. Also, it supports the Lindt & Sprüngli Farming Program with additional fundings.

name: Natural Vitality, Neocell, Rainbow Light, Renew Life, NutraNext
description: Nutranext™ is a proudly family-owned company with deep roots in the health food industry and a legacy of pioneering innovation. Backed by the expertise of three generations, Scott and Michael Rudolph carry forward the pioneering spirit of Scott’s father, Arthur Rudolph, a trailblazer in the supplement industry, with the Nutranext™ family of brands.The Nutranext™ portfolio includes Rainbow Light®, Renew Life®, Natural Vitality®, and NeoCell®:•	Rainbow Light® is a pioneer in real-food-based multivitamins and has set the standard for food-first nutrition for more than four decades.•	Renew Life® has been a trusted name in digestive health for 30 years, with its Ultimate Flora™ probiotics and complementary fibers for gut wellness.*•	Natural Vitality CALM® is the number one magnesium supplement brand with both its powder and gummy formats.^•	NeoCell® is the #1 beauty supplement brand in the natural channel, offering a variety of formulas that support skin, hair, and nail health.*† Together, these brands reflect Nutranext’s enduring commitment to delivering effective, consumer-trusted solutions that support health-conscious living for generations to come.Nutranext™ is dedicated to delivering high-quality wellness products for a range of lifestyles, thoughtfully formulated with a reduced use of unnecessary extras. Their on-site quality control laboratory rigorously tests each batch to ensure consistency, safety, and integrity in every bottle. The company is committed to providing the best science-based nutritional supplements available today.^Natural Vitality® is the #1 Magnesium Powder and Gummy Brand in the Total US - Natural Channel SPINS L12W, L24W, L52W Data Ending 09/07/25.†NeoCell® is the #1 Beauty Supplement Brand in the Total US - Natural Channel SPINS L12W, L24W, L52W Data Ending 09/07/25.

name: Rio Mare
description: For those who refuse to compromise on taste, Rio Mare stands alone. Since 1965, we've perfected the art of transforming the ocean's finest catches into culinary masterpieces.It starts with our careful selection - only premium tuna loins make it into our signature pink cans. Hand-cleaned twice and preserved in fine olive oil, each cut delivers unmatched purity, rich flavor, and the tender texture that's made us Europe's #1 tuna brand.

name: Simple Mills, Inc.
description: Like most good things, our story begins in the kitchen. ?Katlin Smith's kitchen to be exact.Katlin had grown tired of looking at long ingredient lists on food labels and being unable to pronounce half of them. She thought there must be a better way. After all, muffins don't need 25 ingredients. So she decided to make her own.??It all started a while before that when Katlin ? like many people ? found herself working long hours, traveling a lot for work, and eating on the go. Which meant she was consuming a lot of processed foods. She wasn't feeling that great mentally or physically, and a friend suggested it might be her diet. Katlin had never really considered that what she was eating was having such an impact on her, but when she started reading those labels and changed her diet, sure enough, everything else changed too. It was an ah-ha moment for her: she realized just how much the food she was eating could transform the way she felt.??So Katlin got to work in her kitchen. She started with muffins made from natural, whole-food ingredients. Katlin would use her picky male friends with refined palates as an informal focus group for her products. She'd bring a batch of muffins over and always knew she had a winner when they would polish off three or four muffins in a row. Through lots of trial and error (it took 90 recipes!), she created the first three muffin mixes. Just like that, Simple Mills was born. In a home kitchen.

name: Starshot Ventures Studio
description: Established by founder and former CEO of Vital Proteins and backed by a team of highly successful consumer brand entrepreneurs and investors, Starshot Ventures Launch Pad – SVLP – is a venture creation studio that forges innovative brands meant to deliver on consumers' wellness needs.  We are seasoned leaders and well-respected brand builders on a mission to provide better wellness solutions for all. We lead with curiosity and chase bold ideas in the pursuit of helping others be their best.

name: Tetra Pak
description: We’re here to make food safe and available. It’s why we provide advanced food production systems. In collaboration with our customers and suppliers, driven by more than 24,000 dedicated employees worldwide, we protect food sustainably every day for hundreds of millions of people in more than 160 countries. Because we’re here to fulfill a purpose:We commit to making food safe and available, everywhere, and we promise to protect what’s good: food, people and the planet. More information about Tetra Pak is available at tetrapakusa.com

name: WISEcode
description: WISEcode brings clarity to the growing ultra-processed food (UPF) challenge in the U.S. food system by applying a sophisticated combination of nutrition science and AI across the world’s most comprehensive food database. This enables fast, transparent identification of UPFs and defensible verification of non-UPF products with real nuance for food makers and retailers. The WISEcode Non-UPF Verification program provides the food industry with a trusted standard that brands can quickly verify and display in-store and on-pack. Our free UPF Detector app helps shoppers make confident decisions in the aisle.

name: Zipline Logistics
description: Zipline Logistics is the ONLY third-party logistics solutions provider in North America exclusively servicing the consumer-packaged goods and retail. We unlock growth for brands, protect margins, and enhance customer experience through flawless on-time, in-full execution.

name: Catalina Crunch
description: OUR FOUNDER'S STORYLike many kids, mainstream snacks and cereals were a memorable part of my childhood. There's nothing I loved more than chocolate puffs for breakfast or a delicious sandwich cookie dunked in a glass of cold milk.Unfortunately, when I turned 17, I was diagnosed with T1 diabetes and had to give up many of my favorite snacks since they are typically loaded with sugar and empty carbs.I started eating low carb to help manage my blood sugar, but the few healthy options available tasted like cardboard. I got fed up! I wanted delicious snacks that would satisfy my cravings but weren't loaded with all the sugar and empty carbs.Combining nutritional science with culinary arts, we have created delicious, healthier products that help you achieve a better life. Eating our low carb cereals and snacks makes me feel like a kid again. I am so proud of what we've created and I can't wait to share our delicious snacks with you!Krishna KaliannanFounder & CEO, Catalina Crunch

name: Garden of Life, Nuun, Solgar, Vital Proteins
description: For Garden of Life, Empowering Extraordinary Health® is not just a mission statement to be used on our website or advertisements. The sole purpose of Garden of Life is and always will be to empower you, our consumers, with the tools necessary to achieve extraordinary health. And, at the same time, ensure that we are offering clean, traceable, clinically studied ingredients in the most sustainable way possible.Nuun, pronouiced like "Noon" began as the first company to separate electrolyte replacement from carbohydrates.  The result?  A healthy, hydrating beverage with all the extra sugar and additives.  #heckyea!  Over a decade later, Nuun Hydration is hydrating the planet one runner, surfer, mother, yogi, hula hooper at a time (the list goes on...)!Solgar® is the result of 75 year of commitment to quality, health, and well-being.  Our mission throughout the decades has remained the same: to create the finest nutritional supplements in small batches, made possible through tireless research, using only the finest raw materials.  When it comes to quality, Solgar® is The Gold Standard.At Vital Proteins, our mission is to empower everyone to live a full, vibrant life.  We help people feel better and live fuller lives by providing premium collagen-based products that seamlessly fit into people's lives to help them look, feel and move their best.

name: Goli Nutrition Inc.
description: Goli® Nutrition is B Corp Certified. Our journey began in 2019 when we set out to make nutrition fun, delicious and accessible for all. Through our Goli® For Good initiative, we partnered with Vitamin Angels, Eden Reforestation Projects, and other key organizations to help uplift communities and protect the environment.

name: OATLY
description: We are the world's original and largest oat drink company. For over 25 years, we have exclusively focused on developing expertise around oats: a global power crop with inherent properties suited for sustainability and human health. Our commitment to oats has resulted in core technical advancements that enabled us to unlock the breadth of the dairy portfolio, including alternatives to milks, ice cream, yogurt, cooking creams, and spreads. Headquartered in Malmö, Sweden, the Oatly brand is available in more than 20 countries globally.

name: Schwan's Consumer Brands
description: bibigo™ has been bringing authentic and adventurous Korean-inspired products to the culturally curious for over 60 years. From flavorful sauces to comforting dumplings and beyond this trending cuisine can transport consumers, we show up with an unwavering passion for food and confidence in the power of quality, care and commitment. That’s what makes bibigo™ Products simple to enjoy—and definitely worth sharing.

name: Youtheory
description: Youtheory was founded on the idea that supplements created with integrity, authenticity and quality inspire the ultimate sense of wellness. Youtheory means a commitment to a lifestyle that’s nourishing and empowering for everyone – no matter what stage of life.

name: Banc of California
description: Build with a bank that starts by understanding your business.When you're building a business, you need a bank with the strength, expertise and commitment to tailor solutions to your unique needs. At Banc of California, we deliver on all three: financial stability that instills confidence, industry expertise that provides a strategic edge, and premier relationship banking with personalized solutions designed to grow and manage your business. Banc of California — Where Relationships Matter.

name: Bonduelle
description: Bonduelle is a French family-run company that leads the world in ready-to-use vegetables. Founded in 1853 by Louis Bonduelle, our group feeds over 100 countries with healthy vegetables preserved using natural processes. Everything we do follows the values that have driven us since our company's creation and throughout our development.We offer a complete range of products under our Bonduelle, Ready Pac Foods®, Bistro®, brands. Offerings include fresh-prepared salads and fresh-cut vegetables, available from major retailers and distributors, including restaurant chains, across North America.

name: Boundless Network
description: Boundless is Your Merch Media Agency™ combining high-touch strategy and consultative service to deliver inspiring Branded Merchandise Experiences. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in Austin, Texas, we have a proud history of partnering with clients who are as passionate as we are to Create Brand Love™ with products that represent their unique brand and deliver meaningful ROI.

name: Brown Cow
description: Back in 1983, our co-founders Samuel Kaymen and Gary Hirshberg were running a non-profit organic farming school on a small New Hampshire farm. They were on a mission to help family farms survive, keep food and its production healthy, and help protect the environment.However, the school needed funding. They put the farm's seven cows to work (and all the helping hands they could wrangle) and began selling really good yogurt made without the use of toxic persistent pesticides or chemical fertilizers.Samuel and Gary did most of the work back then. They milked the cows, made the yogurt, and even made sales calls and deliveries.The yogurt was a hit. A big one. And Samuel and Gary realized that a successful organic company could make a bigger difference for family farms, people, and the planet than their school could. So, they decided to run with yogurt.

name: Built
description: BUILT is truly a standout among protein bars. With its exceptional nutritional profile and many delicious flavors, BUILT is the favorite protein bar of many discerning fitness trainers and fitness enthusiasts.In 2018 BUILT started in a humble kitchen, where BUILT bars were originally developed as a protein bar solution for an Olympic track athlete. As time went on the bars were sold to friends and family, and before too long, BUILT grew out of the kitchen and into a full-scale production facility. All BUILT products are manufactured in-house in American Fork, Utah. Over the years and even after rapid growth, BUILT stayed true to its original purpose - to provide a great-tasting protein bar alternative for fitness enthusiasts and health-conscious snackers.

name: Contek Life Science Co., Ltd
description: Traditional fermentation, modern quality discipline: nattiase® delivers nattokinase solutions designed for brands that care about consistency, documentation, and scale. From concept to commercial supply, nattiase® supports product developers across supplements and functional foods—backed by certified food safety systems (FSSC22000, ISO22000 and HACCP) and third-party credentials (Halal/Kosher).

name: Daabon Organic U.S.A., Inc.
description: Sustainable Food Solutions for a Better FutureDaabon is a leading provider of sustainable palm oil blends, offering high-quality solutions for key industries such as bakery, confectionery, frying, vegan meat analogs, and infant formula. As a superior alternative to sunflower and other oils, our products are designed to meet the highest standards of performance and sustainability.We are revolutionizing the palm oil industry through a 100% vertically integrated supply chain that prioritizes people and the planet. Committed to responsible sourcing and ethical farming, we uphold the highest certifications, including RSPO, ROC Gold, Kosher, Fair Trade USA, Non-GMO, Seed Oil Free and GFSI.

name: Dairy Management Inc.
description: Dairy Management Inc. is a non-profit organization whose mission is to drive trust and sales in dairy. We are funded by our 28,000 Dairy Farmers across the United States. We offer complimentary dairy expertise in consumer insights, innovation, marketing, product science & technology, nutrition, social responsibility and exports. We are showcasing dairy-based products from entrepreneurial organizations.

name: Drink Recess, Inc.
description: The idea for Recess was born out of increasingly stressful times, post 2016 election. The company started in 2018, with the goal of delivering products that are healthy forms of relaxation.

name: FABBRI USA 1905 LLC
description: SWEETNESS FOR OVER A CENTURY... ALL MADE IN ITALYThe year was 1905. In Portomaggiore, a young man named Gennaro Fabbri bought a grocery store with a wine cellar attached and transformed it into a distillery. The first products to bear the Fabbri label were a line of liqueurs, whose growing success led to the distillery being moved to a larger facility in Borgo Panigale in Bologna - a place which is to this day the beating heart of the company. Ten years later, in 1915, his wife Rachele invented the recipe for a product that is still unique and inimitable today: Amarena Fabbri, whose white and blue ceramic jar quickly became a symbol of sweetness and an icon of the company. But at the time, Gennaro and Rachele didn't realize they had just given birth to a unique sensation, an icon of sweetness and good taste that would be passed down from generation to generation until our present day. For over a century after that, Fabbri 1905 continued to introduce innovative products that quickly found their way into the history books of Italian food and beverages. Today, the company exports 1,300 products to over 100 countries and has ten international offices.Amarena Fabbri Wild Cherries are a symbol of goodness and quality. They are the perfect accompaniment to gelato and the finishing touch to make any dessert special. Perfect for cocktails and aperitifs, an exquisite pairing for cheese and meat boards. Fragola Fabbri, these Strawberries are the result of a delicate and complex process that enhances all the qualities of fresh fruit. The carefully selected berries, bathed in premium strawberry syrup, remain intact, firm, and juicy. Enjoy it with pies, ice cream, and yogurt, in cocktails, or straight from the jar.Zenzero Fabbri, Ginger root has conquered the taste buds of the entire world with its unique flavor and healthy qualities. Morsels of ginger bathed in fine turmeric syrup delight any palate with their fresh and pleasantly spicy taste.  The perfect ingredient for sweet and savory recipes, and of course for cocktails.

name: Flavor Full Foods Inc.
description: • SesaONE combines "Sesame" and "One," symbolizing the brand's ambition to be the world's number one sesame brand.• Since day one, SesaONE has stayed true to its philosophy: "Fresh Sesame, Original Flavor." We’re all about delivering pure, natural, and healthy sesame products that bring out the best in every bite.

name: Gatorade
description: The Gatorade Portfolio is a connected performance and wellness ecosystem built to fuel all athletes and exercisers. Bringing together Gatorade, Propel, Evolve and Muscle Milk, the Gatorade Portfolio is the most complete offering in the category today, with a broad range of personalized solutions at every stage of the athlete journey. This integrated system of brands is built on Gatorade's 61-year history of studying athletes and is fueling the future of athletic performance and wellness by delivering solutions across hydration, protein, energy and all-day nutrition to fuel consumers, no matter how or why they sweat.

name: Godshall's Quality Meats
description: Since 1945, Godshall's has been dedicated to supplying premium meat specialty items to family tables everywhere. From our humble origins as a local family butcher shop to an international supplier, we never ceased to pride ourselves on our quality, freshness, and taste. And it all starts on the farm–the land and the animals. The welfare of both is a responsibility we take to heart because we care deeply about the world we live in.

name: GoodPop
description: One scorching Austin, TX summer day back in 2009, University of Texas student Daniel Goetz needed something refreshing. Daniel couldn't think of any options other than the Austin summertime staple, the sno-cone. At the sno-cone stand, he asked, "What's in

name: Grüns Nutrition Inc.
description: I'm a dad to two darling sons. My wife Hannah and I do our best to shop for highly nutritious foods and teach healthy food choices. However, nutrition gaps are universal, no matter who you are.With Grüns, it can be easy.Simple, effective nutritionResponsible, precise dosingHighest quality, safe ingredientsI developed Grüns to be a constant in our life, supporting our family through every season. I'm hopeful that Grüns will be a constant in your house as well.

name: Grupo Bimbo, Sanissimo, Popcornopolis, Emmy’s Organics, Goldminer, Rustik Oven, San Luis Sourdough
description: Grupo Bimbo is the world’s largest baking company. Guided by their purpose of Nourishing a Better World, the company’s actions are designed to nourish both people and nature. Grupo Bimbo has set bold ambitions to bring better nutrition to consumers through diverse nutrients and simpler recipes, support their associates and serve the communities where they live and work, and become a zero-carbon champion.In the U.S., more than 20,000 associates operate approximately 50 manufacturing locations and over 12,500 distribution routes, delivering a portfolio of iconic brands that includes Arnold®, Artesano®, Bimbo®, Brownberry®, Emmy’s Organics®, Oroweat®, Sara Lee®, Sanissimo®, St. Pierre® and Thomas’®.

name: ITO EN (North America), Inc.
description: The founding of Japan Family Service, the origins of ITO EN, in 1964, was followed in 1966 by the establishment of the Frontier Tea Corporation, ITO EN's predecessor. At the time, tea was sold in a limited number of specialty stores, primarily by weight, and customers would have to visit these stores to buy their tea. To make tea more readily available for purchase, the company developed a method of packaging tea leaves in smaller quantities. Packaged tea made it possible to sell tea at supermarkets and grocery stores, eliminating customer complaints about the inconvenience of only being able to purchase tea at specialty stores. After the company name was changed to ITO EN in 1969, it became a driving influence on the tea industry with breakthrough methods for preserving the freshness of tea leaves. In 2001, ITO EN North America was founded to bring this idea to North America.

name: JonnyPops
description: JonnyPops are made in a peanut free facility, are gluten free, kosher, and come in a variety of organic and vegan options. From humble beginnings making frozen treats in their dorm room in 2012, to national sensation, JonnyPops' co-founders have perfected their small-batch recipes focused on high quality ingredients and innovation. What We Stand For: At the center of every JonnyPop is a kind deed because we believe sharing kindness, through actions big and small, makes the world a better place

name: Kodiak Cakes
description: Kodiak is a fast-growing CPG brand that’s disrupting the breakfast category with delicious-tasting, convenient, and better-for-you options. Located in the shadows of the Wasatch Mountains in Park City, Utah, we’re known for our whole grain, protein-packed flapjack & waffle mix, you know, the one with a bear on the box. And as we’ve continued to see consumers gravitate toward food made with high-quality ingredients, we’ve expanded our products to include oatmeal, frozen waffles, syrups, and more.We believe in the power of a real breakfast to fuel epic days and wilder lives. And as we continue to encourage folks to get outdoors and connect with nature, we come together as a community to help preserve grizzly bear and wildlife habitats. Because the more we get outdoors, the more we appreciate nature, and therefore more likely to help preserve it for future generations.

name: Link Snacks
description: Since I launched Lorissa's Kitchen in 2016 we've had a simple mission to bring better, healthier options to the meat snacks category using real ingredients you know and love. I believe we've delivered on that mission over these last 8 years. However, a couple of years ago my son developed a laundry list of food allergies and I knew it was time to take our mission to the next level. Lorissa's Kitchen (LK) is still committed to providing high quality, healthier snacks but now we're taking a huge step forward and ensuring all products are Certified Free From the Top 9 Allergens (milk, eggs, wheat, soy, peanuts, tree nuts, fish, shellfish & sesame).LK is the first, and only meat snack that's Certified Free from the Top 9 Allergens by MenuTrinfo.

name: Liquid I.V.
description: Liquid I.V.® is a functional hydration company based in Los Angeles, CA and acquired by Unilever in 2020. Liquid I.V.® is the #1 powdered hydration brand in America, delivering superior hydration than water alone through great-tasting, non-GMO electrolyte drink mixes. Liquid I.V.®’s formula is powered by LIV HYDRASCIENCE™, designed with an optimized ratio of electrolytes, essential vitamins, and clinically tested nutrients to turn ordinary water into extraordinary hydration.  Liquid I.V.® believes a healthier world for all begins with equitable access to clean and abundant water. To-date, Liquid I.V.® has donated over 67 million servings to people around the globe and has committed to donating a total of 150 million servings by 2032. Over 1% of the company’s revenue goes directly to its impact program.

name: Loacker, USA
description: Loacker is an Italian family company known for its delicious wafers, patisseries and chocolates ... made with only good ingredients since 1925.  For 100 years, Loacker has rebelliously stood by its commitment to quality and taste above all else. No shortcuts. No compromises.  Nature, quality, and love for things well done become delicious specialties of wafers and chocolate: since 1925, Loacker’s goodness has been a rebellious choice. Today, just like 100 years ago, Loacker bakes most products up in the mountains of the Italian Alps at over 1,000 meters above sea level. It’s not an easy choice, but it’s Loacker’s rebellious yet good attitude that has transformed it from a pastry shop in Bolzano (Italy), founded by Alfons Loacker, into a world-renowned brand whose products delight consumers in over 100 countries. The spirit remains the same: all in the name of goodness, even if it means making difficult choices—products made following the highest quality standards and modern processes, using only selected ingredients, without added flavorings, colors, or preservatives, and no GMOs (Non-GMO Project Verified). Loacker also follows sustainable business strategies that respect the environment and people. As a family-run company, they optimize resources across all sectors and maintain their commitment to social and environmental issues. It's these good choices, despite pressures to compromise, that has guided and sustained Loacker for 100 years.

name: Magtein
description: Magtein® is a breakthrough magnesium compound developed to support brain health, memory, focus, and cognitive longevity. Backed by over a decade of scientific research and an extensive patent portfolio, Magtein® effectively crosses the blood-brain barrier to raise magnesium levels in the brain. This patented ingredient holds the highest standards of quality, safety, and efficacy and has established global commercial success.

name: MALK Organics
description: At MALK, we make exceptionally high-quality, great-tasting plant-based milks. To us, ingredients are everything. Sounds obvious, but you'd be surprised how few seem to care. We don't just pay attention to our ingredients. We obsess over them. And we feel so confident about how good they are (and how good they taste), that we invite you to obsess over them, too.Here's what you'll find:   What they are — the best stuff possible.   What they're not — nothing artificial, no gums, oils or fillers.   How many we use — as few as we possibly can.   Why we choose them — because you would choose them, too. This level of ruthless integrity is what makes us the premium plant milk brand that we are, and consequently why we taste so good. We might cost a touch more, and we may be a touch harder to find,but we believe we're worth it. Because we believe you're worth it. So next time, before you grab-and-go with the first plant milk that catches your eye, do yourself a favor and turn it around first. Then grab a MALK and do the same. The difference will be simple to see. Andsimple is just how we like it.

name: Natural Factors
description: A BRAND LIKE NO OTHERFor over 60 years, Natural Factors has remained deeply committed to the natural health industry. Family-owned then, and still, the company has grown to become an important growth driver in the industry without compromising quality. Natural Factors is a fully integrated company, uniquely controlling every aspect of the product line to ensure the quality, safety, and efficacy of the products. This includes our own regenerative, organic farms, state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities, research and development, distribution, and everything in between.Over 1,000 acres of our own regenerative, certified organic farmsCommitted to natural channel retailers; no mass marketQuality certifications far exceed industry requirements and include the FDA's cGMPs, Canada's NNHPD and the Therapeutic Goods Administration of Australia (TGA), one of the most stringent standards in the worldAll products are third-party certified by ISURA® and tested for over 800 potential contaminantsB® Corp certified and committed to using business as a force for goodLearn more at naturalfactors.com!

name: New Chapter
description: A certified B Corporation, New Chapter® is a Vermont-based vitamin and supplement company with a deeply held mission to deliver the wisdom of Nature to nourish body, mind, soul, and Mother Earth. Since 1982, they’ve been guided by Nature: the ultimate source of good health. They take all of Nature’s wisdom and combine it with brilliant combos of the finest ingredients, the strongest science, and time-honored traditions like herbalism and fermentation. The result? Masterfully crafted formulas that work in harmony with your body. Follow Nature’s lead to better health!

name: Non-GMO Project
description: The Non-GMO Project, established in 2007, empowers eaters with transparency about their food through North America’s leading GMO avoidance verification. Expanding our commitment to create a retail food system that promotes and restores health in humans, communities, and the broader collective of life on Earth, we launched the Food Integrity Collective in 2024. This year, the Non-GMO Project introduces the Non-UPF Verified program, focused on identifying minimally processed foods. Together, these initiatives support brands in meeting the growing demand for informed choices, reinforcing trust and transparency. Just as the Non-GMO Project butterfly symbolizes conscious food choices, Non-UPF Verified guides consumers toward nourishing, less processed options, uniting three programs under one mission. Non-GMO Project, Food Integrity Collective, and Non-UPF Verified - Better with the butterfly.

name: Ocean's Halo
description: Ocean's Halo is a sustainability-driven food brand with more than 50 asian-inspired SKU's (including seaweeds, noodles, bowls, soups, sauces, salad dressings, and seasonings) that are all Organic, plant-based, and free from most top allergens. Ocean's Halo donates 1% of revenue to environmental organizations that promote ocean conservation for most products. Ocean's Halo's newest innovation is Trayless Seaweed Snacks, featuring a new packaging innovation that eliminates the plastic tray and fits 5x more product on shelf.

name: OMG Entertainment
description: Harnessing the Cleaning Power of Mother NatureOrange House was started by Dr. Lin, a PhD horticulturist with over 40 years of experience educating others on the dangers of environmental toxins. As a mom and a scientist, she was concerned about the harsh chemicals that were often used in the homes of friends and family. Assembling a team of top scientists, she got to work creating a plant-derived formula that could clean both naturally and effectively. And most importantly, it had to clean safely. So, this mother found Mother Nature's secret weapon: orange oil, which is a natural degreaser. She then combined orange oil with a molecular structure perfectly designed for fighting dirt and stains, leaving nothing but a clean, fresh scent. Orange House shows that wonderful things can happen when science and nature work together.

name: Once Upon a Farm
description: In 2015, Cassandra Curtis made the first Once Upon a Farm recipe in her kitchen. Frustrated with the lack of fresh options available in the baby food aisle, she was concerned about the quality of the food her kids were eating and wanted fresher, more nutritious options.By 2017, Cassandra Curtis and Ari Raz joined forces with co-founders John Foraker and Jennifer Garner - all on a mission to creating delicious and nutritious food for families while nurturing our children, each other and the earth in order to pass along a healthier and happier world for the next generation.

name: Organic Valley
description: In the heart of America's Midwest in 1988, a group of visionary family farmers stood at a crossroads. Faced with the decline of the family farm and the rise of industrial agriculture, they made a bold decision that would forever change the landscape of American farming. Led by George Siemon, these farmers united under a singular vision: to farm sustainably, in harmony with nature, and to provide their communities with healthy, organic food. This collective dream gave birth to Organic Valley, a farmer-owned cooperative that became a beacon of hope and innovation in agriculture.Organic Valley was founded on the principle that taking care of the land and animals leads to the best quality food. From the very beginning, the cooperative set stringent organic standards, which not only preserved the health of the environment but also ensured the wellbeing of consumers. Starting with a small group of dedicated farmers, Organic Valley began by selling organic vegetables, quickly expanding to dairy as the demand for clean, ethical products grew.Consumers could taste the difference in Organic Valley's products, and farmers across the country were inspired to join the movement. As the cooperative grew, so did its product range, encompassing everything from organic milk and cheese to eggs and meat, all produced without the use of synthetic hormones, antibiotics, or GMOs.  Over three decades later, Organic Valley remains true to its mission: to produce the highest quality organic food in a way that supports farmers, animals, and the planet.

name: PepsiCo, SMARTFOOD®, SUNCHIPS®, GOOD WARRIOR®, QUAKER®
description: From the fizz of our first soda to the flavors we craft today, we create smiles in every sip and bite. We make beloved foods and refreshing drinks, work with farmers around the world, and aim to drive positive impact for our business.

name: Power Crunch
description: Power Crunch is the original wafer protein bar that redefined the category with its light, crispy wafer and creamy layers. Each bar delivers 12-14g of protein from a blend with hydrolyzed whey protein, zero sugar alcohols, coming in a range of indulgent flavors. Perfect for fueling everyday wins - whether pre-workout, post-workout, or on the go snack - Power Crunch combines great taste with functional benefits, making it a standout in the better-for-you snack space.

name: Rambler Sparkling Water
description: Rambler started in 2018 by our 3 founders. They wanted a tasty and sustainable sparkling water that they could feel good about drinking. Rambler was created out of need for something different that is also locally made. The packaging was inspired by vintage "dad beer". Which allows Rambler to thrive in many environments, it's the sparkling water that looks like a beer and drinks like a beer.

name: RJW Logistics Group
description: RJW is a full-service, asset-based retail logistics company with decades of experience, servicing suppliers since 1981.  We are a retail consolidator with integrated programs for Walmart, Sam’s Club, Target, Kroger, Meijer, Dollar General, HEB, Wakefern, Ahold Delhaize, HyVee, Walgreens, and Bozzuto’s with additional programs for other top retailers including Publix, Kehe, UNFI, Amazon, Costco, C&S, SuperValu, Albertson’s, Weis Markets, Sprouts, Whole Foods,  and more. Our attention to detail, commitment to operational excellence, and industry and retailer expertise fuel suppliers with outcomes like 100% inventory accuracy, OTIF above 98%, and in-stocks above 99%. Our suppliers dominate their categories, gain market share, and drive sales because of the cost-savings solutions we provide.

name: Roots Farm Fresh
description: Our Sweet Potato Products (Fries, Toast, Croutons) are the most clean and crispy on Planet Earth.  While most (Fries, Toast, Croutons) are boiled, we only use steam to create our sweet potato (Fries, Toast, Croutons), which keeps them crispy on the outside and nutritious on the inside.  We make our products right near where our farmers grow them, and we work diligently to use all parts of the sweet potato to minimize any food waste.  Good for our Families & Good for the Planet.

name: Saint James Brands
description: Founded by the Ferolito family, Saint James Tea is a second-generation, family-owned and sustainably-packaged beverage brand. Named in honor of Father James Haggerty?an inspirational figure in founder John Ferolito's early career?Saint James Tea encourages you to uplift, inspire, and leave each place better than you found it. Whether it's doing everything we can to minimize our environmental impact or going out of the way to help a community member in need, the Saint James spirit is to always consider others.

name: Sammontana Gelati all'Italiana
description: Sammontana's journey began in 1946 in Empoli, when Romeo Bagnoli - a father of six - purchased the local Sammontana latteria, named after the farm that supplied its milk.  His eldest son, Renzo, soon transformed it into a cafe and gelateria, marking the beginning of Sammontana's gelato story.

name: Soft Gel Technologies, Inc.
description: We are a full-service contract manufacturer, specializing in providing marketers with premium quality dietary supplements in a soft gelatin capsule delivery system. SGTI is dedicated to the production and marketing of branded products and turnkey custom formulations exclusively to the nutraceutical industry. We are GMP-certified through the NPA and NSF, including GMP for Sport. Having an international sales team enables us to export our softgels throughout the world.

name: Solaray, Kal, Zhou, Heritage Store, Better Being
description: Nutraceutical, one of the largest manufacturers of nutritional supplements, has led the industry in innovation, quality products, and service to retailers and consumers since 1932.

name: Steak 'n Shake
description: In 1934, an old gas station in Illinois was converted into a hamburger stand and called Steak 'n Shake.Over the years, Steak 'n Shake adapted to the times and has established itself as America's leader in premium Steakburgers and milk shakesSteak 'n Shake has withstood the test of time and continues to deliver on our promise to constantly serve our patrons the highest quality burgers and shakes along with extending them great service at the lowest possible prices.

name: The Clearly Food and Beverage Company LLC
description: Back in 1987, more than 30 years ago at the Tillicum reservoir on Silver Star Road in the Monashee mountains overlooking Vernon, BC, a Canadian phenomenon was born. A local entrepreneur had the idea of mixing a little flavour to his crisp, cold mountain water, putting it into glass bottles and called it "Clearly Canadian". With a little help from the local bottling plant, he grew this little premium sparkling water brand into a sought-after favourite all around the world.As the 2000's passed, Clearly lost its mass distribution and in 2012 was bought by another sharp entrepreneur who restarted the brand with the same community vision. A self-created crowdfunding campaign managed to convince 14,000+ fans from 26 countries including every state in the US and every province in Canada pre-bought 40,000+ cases of Clearly. They then patiently waited as that cash infusion bought new bottling tools, ingredients, distribution, management, and 6 years later Clearly Canadian is back. And here to stay!

name: The Only Bean
description: Welcome to The Only Bean, the company that brings you healthy and delicious food products made from BEANS! We're on a mission to revolutionize the way you think about beans. We believe that beans are not just a boring side dish but a superfood that can be transformed into a variety of tasty and nutritious food products.Our flagship product are the Crunchy Roasted Edamame Bean snacks.  A high protein superfood snack that we've been popularizing for the past several years and is ready for the mainstream with its up to 14g of protein per serving.  Our beans are Certified Non-GMO, Gluten Free, Vegan Friendly, and Kosher.Our other line of product is a single-ingredient pasta made 100% from beans. Our pasta is Certified Non-GMO, USDA Organic, Gluten Free, Vegan Friendly and Kosher.

name: Trace Minerals
description: Trace Minerals was founded in 1972. For more than 50 years, we've been dedicated to researching date, harvesting minerals, promoting awareness, and formulating best-in-class products to fuel our mission to remineralize the world.

name: Uglies Kettle Chips
description: Uglies® Kettle Chips began in 2017 as a way to reduce the waste of perfectly good potatoes.

name: Violife
description: At Violife, we revolutionize dairy free indulgence. We transform every craving into a moment that actually means something around the quality and sustainability we ultimately deserve.We make great tasting dairy free cheese products, and more... All our 100% dairy free foods are free from: dairy, lactose, GMO, gluten, nuts and soy. So, you're guaranteed allergen-free eating!

name: 'ndulge
description: We believe in celebrating all of life's moments with joy, balance, and intention. We are on a mission to craft indulgent snacks that are exceptional in taste, thoughtfully made, and nourish the body and soul. Because we believe you shouldn't have to choose between treating yourself and embracing your health.We want to change the way the world views snacking—not as something to feel guilty about, but to savor life's sweetness without compromise.  We celebrate indulgence where wellness meets enjoyment, and every product we offer reflects that commitment. This means making products that are calorie efficient, minimize sugar, packed with protein, and promise exceptional taste.

name: 100 Coconuts
description: After building his name in tech with apps such as SongBooth, Gregory Lowe II took a leap into consumer packaged goods (CPG) by launching 100 Coconuts in 2019 ? marking it as the first Black-owned coconut water brand.Dedicated to his brand's taste, the founder traveled to Vietnam to find top-notch coconuts. The purpose behind his trip across the world was for 100 Coconuts to have a great taste and still have all of the health benefits. As a tequila connoisseur, Lowe II infusing tequila was a natural decision. The idea is to be healthy and tipsy simultaneously. On the other hand, the CBD product aims to help consumers focus, chill and relax while being hydrated.Among 100 Coconuts' investors is Michael Strahan, who Lowe II says he initially met during his early days in tech. The vision for 100 Coconuts is to hydrate our community in a healthy and thoughtful way while telling stories of authenticity through our content campaigns.

name: 100% PURE
description: 100% PURE was founded in 1999 with a mission to create the purest, most natural beauty products available. Driven by a passion for healthy living and clean ingredients, our founders set out to eliminate harmful chemicals from cosmetics. They were inspired by the lack of truly natural options in the beauty industry and saw an opportunity to create a brand that was both effective and eco-conscious. Since our inception, we've remained dedicated to using only the finest, plant-based ingredients, offering cruelty-free, toxin-free products that promote wellness and sustainability. Our journey continues with innovation rooted in purity.

name: 10000 Inc (Magic Mind)
description: Our founder developed a heart condition from excess caffeine and too much stress - and it turned out the two were related. He dove into the world of nootropics, adaptogens, and functional mushrooms and developed a new morning ritual drink fit for the 21st century. Over-caffeination is not optimal for creativity or productivity.  By using scientifically proven nootropics, adaptogens, and functional mushrooms, our product balances improved energy, improved cognition, and decreased stress to get customers dialed into their most productive flow-state, allowing their to-do lists to melt away.

name: 1882 SRL
description: For 140 years we have been creating emotions to taste, with a precise philosophy aimed at quality. We are a pastry shop and a contemporary bakery, but not only. Olivieri 1882 is now a brand recognized throughout Italy and abroad, present at retail, wholesale and online. Our store in Arzignano is a reference point for artisan pastry and interior design in the sector. Our ecommerce allows us to deliver our products directly to our loyal customers all over the world and in the United States in just two days. Our dealer network then distributes our packaged products all over the world, from UK to Australia. We are a contemporary pastry shop, with roots in tradition and always looking towards the future.

name: 1st Phorm International LLC.
description: 1ST PHORM was founded with the mission to help real people get real long term results. We set out on a mission to revolutionize the industry by building a community around our products where we could support each other on the struggle to their goals. We believe that with this we can help make the world a better place by empowering individuals to become the best versions of themselves. It all start with making the right choices in their nutrition and their daily habits. We are changing the world one person at a time by helping everyone be the example they want to see!

name: 21st Century Vitamins
description: At 21st Century Healthcare, we have well over 30 years of research, innovation and development in the dietary supplement industry and continue to drive growth within the marketplace as consumers needs change.We are transparent about our manufacturing processes, sourcing practices and testing procedures that provide our customers confidence as a brand they can trust.This is achieved through our UL certification and the strict Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) we follow at our state-of-the-art facilities in Tempe, Arizona which demonstrates our commitment to producing premium vitamins.This includes sourcing high-quality raw materials, conducting thorough testing throughout the manufacturing process and adhering to strict quality assurance protocols. By investing in these measures, we can guarantee that our customers are getting vitamins that meet their nutritional needs and are free from any contaminants or impurities.

name: 24Vegan
description: Our vegan journey began with awareness of the meat industry's abuse towards animals and the numerous benefits of a vegan diet. Animals are sentient beings and are just as capable of experiencing emotions such as pain, fear, and happiness. Meats contains saturated fat, cholesterol, and substances that many of us aren't aware of. In contrast, plant-based food has been associated with a decreased risk in cancer, diabetes, obesity, and heart disease. If that wasn't enough, vegans tend to live 10 years longer than those who eat meat. T

name: 2Fit Brands
description: 2FIT BRANDS is a women and minority-owned snack company that proudly presents a trio of vegan, keto-friendly, and certified gluten-free snacks. Differentiating from the norm, our products are free from sugar alcohols, refined sugars, and palm oil, prioritizing clean and sustainable snacks.

name: 3 Seasons Fruit LLC
description: We are US Branch of Thailand leading freeze dried manufacturer, specializing in freeze-dried fruits and vegetables in both pieces and powder forms. Using the finest locally sourced tropical raw materials, our products are 100% natural—free from additives, preservatives, and sugar.With 20 years of expertise in freeze-drying, we are certified by BRC A+, SMETA, ISO 22000, GHP, HACCP, HALAL, KOSHER, and meet EU & USDA Organic standards.Our freeze-dried fruit and vegetable pieces are perfect for snacks, with a retail shelf life of 18 months. They also serve as excellent ingredients for cereals, chocolates, and more.The powder form is ideal for food manufacturing applications, including popcorn, smoothies, ice cream, beverages, chocolate, and bakery products. Additionally, it can be used as a supplement in pharmaceutical formulations.

name: 49th Parallel Coffee Roasters
description: Our mission: Make Specialty Coffee Accessible to More People (In More Ways) by Crafting Exceptional Direct Trade Coffee, With Intention, that Inspires Curiosity.Drink Great CoffeeEstablished in 2004 in Vancouver, Canada, 49th Parallel Coffee Roasters specializes in sourcing and roasting high quality specialty coffee. As pioneers of direct trade sourcing in Canada, our direct partnerships with small farmers are central to our commitment to quality and sustainability. We roast all our coffees in small batches to highlight their unique qualities and characteristics.Exceptional QualityDirect Trade SourcedSmall Batch Roasted

name: 4Sisters Rice
description: To us, rice is not just rice – it is a part of our family's legacy.  We are 4 Sisters who grew up on our father's Louisiana rice farm, a farm founded back in 1964. Today, we share our own story with the launch of our retail rice brand, 4Sisters Rice. With 4Sisters, we envisioned the need to sustainably bring organic and natural rice products to consumers nationwide, while also improving the environment. We brought this idea to life by working with local suppliers and family farmers who share our vision of growing select rice varieties that consistently cook and taste the best. With full traceability from farm to table, we grow, harvest, dry, mill, package and sell our US grown rice on the shelves as 4Sisters Rice.

name: 4th & Heart
description: Ghee is the ultimate cooking fat, one that has unmatched health benefits without compromising flavor and function. Trusted for centuries and intentionally crafted, we're here to introduce ghee into your daily cooking routine. Our ghee is made from grass-fed, pasture-raised butter. We filter out the bad stuff and leave all the good: 100% butterfat that's lactose-free, supports your gut health, and maintains that rich, buttery taste you know and love.

name: 50/50 Foods, Inc
description: We realized that it was, unironically, impossible to assume everyone was going to turn into a vegetarian, so we came up with the radically practical idea to give consumers exactly what they say they want...meat, just less meat.

name: 7th Heaven Inc
description: Dreamy, delicious, creamy milk chocolate made without a drop of dairy! Meet 7th Heaven. Our plant-based milk chocolate is guaranteed to make you smile. 7th Heaven's chocolates are not just delicious, they're also ethically sourced - better for the planet and your conscience.   In 2013, vegan couple Daniel Bareket and Elya Adi missed milk chocolate so much they decided to create a new version of it - free of guilt and animal products. After two years of research and a whole lot of taste tests (no complaints there) the dream came true. 7th Heaven was born! Since then they have been making incredible chocolate bars to share with you!

name: 88 Acres
description: Nicole grew up on an 88 acre farm in North Brookfield Massachusetts where her passion for food began. When she met her husband Rob several years later, he had a severe allergic reaction from food cross contamination on their 4th date that landed him in the hospital and her in the kitchen.Nicole & Rob's personal journey beginning with a severe allergic reaction is one that has inspired 88 acres, a brand committed to delivering  delicious, safe, sustainable food options for  everyone with or without food allergies.

name: [PICKLES] by Evergreen and Market
description: [PICKLES]® by Evergreen & Market is an Atlanta-based, female-, minority-, veteran-, and family-owned specialty food brand redefining what pickled foods can be. Founded in 2020, the company combines global culinary inspiration with Southern craftsmanship to create bold, clean-ingredient pickled foods made entirely in-house.What began at local Georgia farmers' markets has grown into a nationally recognized brand stocked in retailers across the United States and Canada, featured in major media outlets, and celebrated for award-winning innovation.Every product is handcrafted using real produce, premium spices, and a proprietary vinegar-based trade blend designed for flavor, shelf stability, and accessibility. Most flavors contain no artificial colors or preservatives, many contain no added sugar, and sodium levels are significantly lower than traditional pickle products.The brand produces more than 35 gourmet varieties spanning classic pickles, pickled fruits, vegetables, and specialty items, including the internationally awarded Ghost Pickle and Flavor of Georgia–winning Banana Pickle.[PICKLES]® has earned recognition from outlets including AJC, Georgia Trend, Food Navigator USA, Channel 2 News, and Oprah Daily nominations, while exhibiting at major industry events such as the Fancy Food Show, AmericasMart Atlanta, Americas Food Show, and seasonal European-style markets.Driven by a mission to make bold flavors accessible while supporting farmers, community employment, and sustainable packaging practices, the company continues to expand nationally through retail partnerships, direct-to-consumer sales, and experiential market activations that have built a loyal community known as the “Pickle People.”Today, [PICKLES]® is positioned at the intersection of premium gifting, clean-ingredient snacking, and functional food culture — bringing heritage, storytelling, and innovation into every jar.📍 Atlanta, Georgia🌐 AtlantaPickles.com

name: A Dozen Cousins
description: Authentic meals and sides inspired by Creole, Caribbean and Latin American recipes.

name: A Greener World
description: A Greener World (AGW) is a nonprofit certifier offering certification, marketing, labeling, and technical services to farms, ranches and brands. Our family of trusted certifications includes Certified Animal Welfare Approved by AGW, Certified Grassfed by AGW, Certified Regenerative by AGW and Certified Non-GMO by AGW. Each program is designed to have positive and measurable impacts on the environment, society and animals, and to encourage truly sustainable farming practices. Get in touch through chat or set up a meeting if you’re interested in learning about AGW certification for your business.

name: A La Maison
description: We're a family-owned company on a mission to bring the natural beauty of Provence to the world through traditionally crafted soaps & skincare. We believe in using botanical oils, sophisticated scents, and gentle ingredients guided by EU quality standards, across our product lines. We'd love to show you more - come say hello!

name: A to Z Nutrition Int'l, Inc.
description: A to Z Nutrition Int’l Inc. is a manufacturer and international supplier of nutraceutical raw materials, with expertise in creatine monohydrate and sports nutrition ingredients. Our operations emphasize strict quality control, regulatory compliance, and supply chain reliability to meet the standards of global supplement and food manufacturers.

name: A&B Ingredients
description: A&B Ingredients is a leading provider of clean-label ingredient solutions from nature. We deliver functional solutions for food safety and quality, natural shelf life extension, health and wellness, and plant-based product development. Our commitment to ingredient innovation is supported by our R&D and analytical teams and in-house applications, microbiology, and antioxidant laboratories. Our goal is to create value for our customers and address the needs of today's food and beverage industry.

name: A-GAME Beverages
description: In 2016 A-GAME was born from the shared vision of two childhood friends raised in Central Florida, driven to combat dehydration in schools and provide vital support for athletes navigating the challenges of the Florida climate. Built on the pillars of wellness, natural flavors, and  uncompromising ingredient quality. Our unique blend of vitamins, sea salt, honey, and potassium guarantees optimal hydration and recovery. A-GAME represents a collective endeavor to make premium hydration accessible to everyone.

name: A-Sha Foods USA Co., Inc
description: Coming from a 100-year-old Taiwanese legacy in producing quality noodles, A-Sha Foods USA started in 2015, coupling technology with our heritage to start manufacturing foodthat is healthier and kinder to our bodies; food that is sustainable; and food thatlooks beyond our present ecosystem towards a future where non-perishable foods maybe the best alternative.We think being innovative is not just coming up with something new, it's also taking something old and breathing life into it and making others see it in a whole different light. As a food company, we are taking it upon ourselves to make ramen relevant again. We are taking what was once thought of as boring, cheap and a belly-stuffer and changing the game with branding and partnerships usually only utilized in the restaurant industry. Ramen doesn't have to be something just for broke and starving college students anymore, it can be a healthy choice instead of a last resort.A-Sha Foods is showing everybody a new way to noodle!

name: A.H.A. International Co., Ltd.
description: A.H.A International is an integrated global group with over 40 years of professional international trade experience and resources, focusing on international trade and EU-GMP-certified high-end pharmaceutical research, development, and manufacturing. AHAINT provide product development in dietary supplements and sports nutrition, along with professional OEM and ODM customization services for our clients.

name: AB World Foods
description: Patak's Foods is the world's leading producer of authentic and flavorful Indian food for the retail market. Patak's was founded in 1957 in England by the Pathak family. The family came to London as immigrants and began the business by creating spice blends using secret family recipes. They began selling spice pastes from their home, before eventually opening their own shop, using spices and other ingredients imported from Indian to ensure authenticity. Now owned and operated by AB World Foods, Patak's still works with the Pathak Family to ensure our products are the authentic Indian flavors that the world has come to know and love.

name: Abe's Vegan Muffins
description: About 20 years ago, we started a commercial bakery with the goal of spreading happiness, one delicious dessert at a time. The problem was my son Abe couldn't enjoy anything we made because he was born with an anaphylactic allergy to peanuts, tree nuts, and sesame. He was also severely allergic to eggs, dairy, soy, and seeds. Growing up with food allergies was rough. Abe, like millions of other kids, was isolated from friends and classmates during celebrations, snack, and lunch time. So, in a fit of inspiration, we set out to create an allergy-friendly treat not only Abe would love, but one that our family and friends would devour too...and to our surprise, we did it! Fast forward a few years and we're proud to offer an every day, "School-Friendly" option for the millions of parents, like us, who have kids with food allergies. Best of all, Abe's Vegan Muffins are an inclusive treat everyone loves to eat!

name: ABINOSA LIMITED.
description: Dr. Austin was founded by Kelly Mok, a medical school graduate with a passion for transforming maternal health. After years of working in the field, Kelly recognized a significant gap in prenatal care: traditional nutritional approaches offered a one-size-fits-all solution, failing to address the distinct and evolving needs of women across the five critical stages of their journey—preconception, first, second, and third trimesters, and postpartum.Driven to create a better standard, she collaborated with top-tier research laboratories to pioneer the groundbreaking "5-Stage Precision Nurturing System." This innovation led to the birth of Dr. Austin, a brand dedicated to providing dynamic, stage-specific wellness solutions.From its inception, Dr. Austin has been committed to the philosophy of "Pioneering Stage-Specific Wellness, Unleashing Every Woman's Radiance." This commitment quickly established us as a trusted choice in U.S. pharmacy chains. Today, our mission has expanded globally, bringing scientifically-backed, compassionate care to families in Singapore, New Zealand, China, and beyond.Our journey is inspired by every woman we serve, and we are dedicated to ensuring each one feels supported, nurtured, and empowered at every step.

name: Acai Roots
description: Founded in 2005, our mission was to share our love of açaí with the world and help people live a healthy lifestyle. Over a decade later, our commitment has remained true to making the best açaí on the planet. We continue to develop new products like our premium fruit bars, loaded with antioxidants and omega 3s, as well as our ready-to-eat half gallon container of sorbet—the first of its kind! Like all of our products, they're made right here in the US, and they always will be. Leading a healthy lifestyle and constantly preparing balanced meals and snacks is a challenge, so we strive to provide our customers with tasty products that are ready to go and packed with healthy ingredients. We believe that pure, wild-harvested, organic açaí with no added filler is the only way to truly enjoy this magnificent berry. Our products contain 100% organic Brazilian açaí, harvested in the Amazon using sustainable practices that keep Mother Nature intact.

name: Accobio (Wuxi) Biotech Inc.
