name: ACCU Vita Labs LLC
description: Accuracy isn’t just our practice, it’s our promiseAt ACCU Vita Laboratories, accuracy and expertise converge to redefine standards in dietary supplement testing. ACCU Vita Labs excels in analytical and microbiological method accuracy. Explore our unwavering commitment to quality and discover the reliability that sets us apart in every test we perform. Our commitment to scientific excellence and regulatory compliance delivers precise, comprehensive results, empowering clients to meet industry regulations and make informed decisions about their products.

name: Ace Synergy International Pte Ltd
description: Since 2006, Corniche has been exporting snacks and confectioneries to over 20 countries worldwide.

name: AceBiome
description: AceBiome is a global dietary supplement company based in South Korea specializing in weight management probiotics. The flagship probiotic strain of the company is Lactobacillus gasseri BNR17(“BNR17”), which is the first probiotic strain approved by the MFDS (Korea FDA) as a functional ingredient to help reduce body fat and intestinal health. The proprietary strain and its product BNRThin have won premier awards, including NutraIngredients Awards in weight management ingredients and probiotics products. Recently, the company has expanded its portfolio beyond probiotics to include joint health supplement and balm products under the "AnaParactin" brand. They incorporate Andrographolide named “ParActin,” a plant extract of Andrographis paniculata. AceBiome is seeking distribution partners globally.

name: ACETAIA TERRA DEL TUONO Srl Società Agricola
description: Terra del Tuono is an ancient vinegar factory, managed by the same family since 1892. Children have been succeeding their parents in its management. Today Tiziana and Massimo lead the Terra del Tuono's beautiful family. Their sons, Alberto and Roberto, have been increasingly involved in the Acetaia's affairs. Our Staff also includes many people inspired by the beauty of "black gold" and all passionate experts in the art of Balsamic Vinegar of Modena. We produce real specialties with Balsamic Vinegar of Modena, as well as the Traditional Balsamic Vinegar of Reggio Emilia and different Condiments. All our Vinegars and Condiments are of the highest quality, completely natural, without any dye, thickener, preservative, caramel or similar substances. The only ingredients of our Balsamic Vinegars of Modena PGI are cooked grape must and wine vinegar, long aged in barrels of different types of wood, in order to give our specialties a truly unique flavor.

name: Acetum
description: For nearly 80 years, the Mazzetti family has been perfecting the Italian craft of Balsamic Vinegar of Modena.From grandfather Felice, to his son Franco and his son Cesare, the Mazzetti's collective passion has grown through the years, and helped send our artfully crafted creations out onto the tables of discerning foodies in every corner of the world.To us, the story of every Mazzetti l'Originale bottle – from grape to barrel, and to the heart of your kitchen – is a tale worth sharing.

name: ACT Polyols Pvt Ltd
description: Founded in 2017 through the collaboration of three leading Pakistani business groups - Akhtar Group, Candyland, and Tapal Group. ACT Polyols (Pvt.) Limited is committed to advancing the future of food ingredients. Specializing in precision-formulated, non-GMO glucose syrups and plant-based proteins and starch derivatives designed to meet the demands of modern, clean-label, and health-focused global food systems.

name: Actual Veggies
description: In 2020 co-founder, Jason stopped eating meat for health reasons and was on a quest to find a healthier alternative to traditional burgers. He  quickly realized that the grocery aisles were full of imitation meats and veggie burgers but all were either highly processed, frozen, bland or loaded with preservatives. Not to mention they didn't even look appetizing! He was determined to create a better option full of fresh veggies and ingredients that were not only healthier, but filling, delicious and colorful. This was the spark that led to the creation of Actual Veggies and its line of chef-created, restaurant quality, ALL vegetable burgers.

name: Actus Nutrition
description: Actus Nutrition (formerly Milk Specialties Global) is a leading North American ingredients manufacturer and private label service provider. Actus specializies in whey proteins, milk proteins, caseins, caseinates and bioactive ingredients such as lactoferrin.

name: ACURE
description: Acure is a clean skincare company founded in 2010, that creates products for face, body, and hair that are proven to target specific concerns. Every product serves a purpose and is scientifically formulated for the skin and the planet. The company is also Climate Neutral Certified — having measured and fully offset their carbon footprint since 2022.

name: Adeka Corporation
description: ADEKA is a food‑tech innovator with a heritage that dates back to 1929, when we began producing margarine and set out on a mission to elevate the art and science of oil and fat processing.For nearly a century, we have continued to refine our technologies and pursue exceptional taste, supporting the global food industry with solutions that combine reliability, creativity, and advanced technical expertise.As a specialized intermediate‑material manufacturer, ADEKA provides high‑value food ingredients that empower our customers to develop products with superior functionality and flavor.Our plant‑based “DP series” embodies this commitment to innovation. By uniting ADEKA’s cutting‑edge oil and fat processing technologies with our proprietary ReTERA Technology*, the DP series achieves rich, dairy‑like natural flavors and depth—recreating the satisfying sensory experience typically associated with animal‑derived foods.* ReTERA: “Recreation Technology of Richness in Animal-based foods,” a unique platform that reproduces the richness, body, and complexity characteristic of animal-origin ingredients.

name: Advanced Nutraceuticals BV
description: "Advanced Nutris" is a leading partnership delivering cutting-edge nutraceutical solutions to major global brands. Advanced Nutris combines the expertise of two prominent partners to offer the highest quality nutraceuticals to a wide audience. They aim to elevate the standards of the industry by introducing new and exciting solutions that cater to the unique demands of their clients and consumers worldwide. The company prioritizes innovative research and development, quality control, and sustainability in all aspects of production.

name: Advanced Nutrition by Zahler
description: Zahler is a 3rd-generation family companyproudly continuing the work of legendary founder, Rachel Zahler, PhD. Growing from her inspiring, one-on-one consultation service, the Zahler family felt the need for better, more innovative and smarter nutritional solutions.When we elected to dive into the scientificresearch of raw ingredients and advancedformulations, it took painstaking, meticulousresearch and a solid understanding of the human body. More scientists, doctors and nutritionists were recruited, and the very first effective Zahler formula was created.

name: aēras water company
description: aēras delivers thoughtfully sourced natural Canadian still & sparkling water bottled exclusively in glass. We offer two sizes 330mL & 750mL.

name: AeriTek
description: Due North is a North American leader in self-contained retail refrigeration. Built on the strong legacies of QBD and Minus Forty, our brand unites decades of expertise to deliver reliable, energy-efficient merchandisers designed and manufactured in North America.We help retailers and brands keep products fresh, reduce waste, and lower energy costs. Our coolers and freezers combine proven reliability with innovation, including ENERGY STAR® certification, R-290 natural refrigerants, LED lighting, and advanced insulation technologies. This means products that are better for business and better for the environment.What sets Due North apart is our focus on performance and partnership. From premium engineering under the Minus Forty banner to cost-efficient, rugged solutions from QBD, we provide a full portfolio of merchandisers to meet the needs of any retail setting. With local manufacturing, responsive support, and shorter lead times, we deliver the confidence retailers need to keep their operations running smoothly.Our mission is simple: to set the standard in refrigeration by combining reliability, efficiency, and sustainability. At Due North, we don't just make refrigeration equipment—we create solutions that help our customers grow.

name: Aev oil
description: At Aevo, our mission is simple: to deliver the purest, highest-quality avocado oil, crafted from the heart of Ethiopia. We produce 100% pure, organic, cold-pressed avocado oil that preserves the natural essence of avocados, free from impurities like skin and seed. Our oil represents a perfect balance of cultural authenticity, innovation, and global quality standards.We are proud to be a Regenerative Certified Organic oil manufacturing company, committed not only to organic production but also to restoring soil health, supporting biodiversity, and strengthening farming communities.Our Commitment• Regenerative Certified Organic Manufacturing – We follow certified regenerative and organic farming principles that improve soil vitality, protect ecosystems, and promote long-term agricultural sustainability.• International Organic Certifications – Our production complies with globally recognized organic standards, including USDA Organic, EU Organic, and JAS Organic certifications.• 100% Cold-Pressed & Pure – Extracted from carefully selected avocados, ensuring premium quality, natural color, and nutritional integrity.• Full Traceability & Transparency – Every bottle is traceable to its origin, maintaining the highest standards of food safety and quality control.• Farmer Partnership & Fair Trade Commitment – We work closely with Ethiopian farmers, providing avocado plants, technical support, and fair pricing through long-term partnerships.• Women Empowerment – With 90% of our workforce being women, we actively promote gender equality, economic independence, and leadership opportunities in rural communities.• Zero-Waste & Circular Production – We repurpose avocado by-products into certified organic fertilizers and regenerate new trees from seeds, creating a sustainable closed-loop system.At Aevo, we do more than manufacture avocado oil — we build a regenerative ecosystem that supports farmers, empowers women, protects the environment, and delivers certified organic excellence to kitchens around the world.

name: AFI – Superfood Ingredients
description: AFI is a processor/exporter of seeds (quinoa, chia), grains, superfoods, cereals, pulses and much more!We are based in Peru with more than 21 years of experience catering to international markets. We are your reliable partner and source for all your Superfood ingredient needs.

name: AG Health
description: AG Health is a Korean health functional food company with over 60 years of tradition, and is the No. 1 company in the market share of eye health-related products in Korea.With the brand recognition and technological prowess that AG Health has had for a long time, it has specialized in beauty products, which are Korea's strengths, and launched the hair care brand 'Morefill' and inner beauty nutritional supplements.

name: Agencia Argentina de Inversiones y Comercio Internacional
AGQ Labs
description: At Natural Products Expo West, most brands, manufacturers, importers, and growers are asking the same questions:Are my raw ingredients safe?Is my finished product compliant?Can I trust my suppliers?Will my product pass retailer, EPA, FDA, USDA Organic, and California Proposition 65 requirements?AGQ Labs USA exists to answer those questions with defensible data.We are an ISO-17025 accredited analytical laboratory specializing in food, beverage, supplements, and agricultural products. We help companies prevent problems before they become violations, recalls, detentions, or lawsuits by building preventative testing programs at the raw ingredient, production, and finished product level.If you stop by our booth, here is how we can help you.Proposition 65 and Heavy Metal ComplianceMany brands at Expo West sell into California without realizing how aggressive Proposition 65 enforcement has become. Our lab provides ultra low detection heavy metal testing down to 0.01 ppm with arsenic speciation, expanded metals panels, and processing contaminant analysis such as acrylamide. We help brands build raw ingredient testing programs that prevent heavy metals from ever reaching finished products.Pesticide Residue Testing and Global MRL ComplianceFor brands sourcing fruits, vegetables, herbs, spices, grains, teas, botanicals, or supplements, pesticide residue testing is critical for retailer approval, export, organic confirmation, and supplier verification. AGQ screens over 1,000 active ingredients with detection limits down to 0.01 ppm and provides MRL summaries across countries so you immediately know if your product is compliant for global trade.USDA Organic Confirmation TestingMany organic brands assume their product is compliant because it is certified. Retailers and regulators do not assume, they test. Our organic confirmation packages screen 605 compounds, cover USDA banned substances, include Ethephon and Glyphosate, and verify organic integrity at trace levels. This is critical for importers, private label brands, and processors handling both organic and conventional products.Nutritional Labeling and FDA NLEA ComplianceIf you are launching a new product, reformulating, or updating labels, we provide complete nutritional analysis for FDA compliant Nutrition Facts panels including macronutrients, vitamins, minerals, sugars, fatty acids, and expanded nutritional profiles.FDA Detention and Import SupportImporters at Expo West often have products held at port due to pesticide or heavy metal concerns. AGQ provides full FDA detention management including sampling, testing, ITACS submission, and regulatory support to get products released quickly and correctly.Crop Nutritional Monitoring and Agronomy SupportFor growers and vertically integrated brands, our Crop Nutritional Monitoring program helps optimize soil, water, plant tissue, and fertigation programs to increase yield, quality, and sustainability while reducing fertilizer waste and environmental impact. This connects field practices directly to residue and contaminant outcomes in finished food products.Group Account Discounts for Multi Entity OperationsIf you manage multiple farms, packing houses, processors, or export facilities, our Group Account Program aggregates testing volume to reduce cost by 20 to 30 percent while keeping each entity’s data and billing completely independent. This is ideal for grower networks, cooperatives, and vertically integrated supply chains.BeSafer Data PlatformAll clients gain access to BeSafer, our online and mobile platform where you can track samples in real time, review exceedances, compare MRLs by country, analyze trends, and make data driven decisions across your supply chain. This is especially valuable for quality managers and compliance teams.If you are attending Expo West and you manufacture, import, grow, process, pack, or sell natural food products, AGQ Labs USA can help you:Prevent Proposition 65 violations before they happenVerify supplier and raw ingredient safetyConfirm organic integrityEnsure pesticide and heavy metal compliance for global marketsBuild defensible data for retailers, regulators, and auditors

name: AGRESTA SA
description: WE WERE FOUNDED AT 2012 AND WE WERE INSPIRED FROM THE DREAM TO OFFER QUALITY GREEK AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTS TO THE WORLD

name: AGRISICILIA SPA
description: Agrisicilia was founded in 1990 in the heart of Sicily with a clear vision: to transform the island's exceptional citrus fruits into products that preserve their natural goodness and tell the story of a land rich in sunshine, tradition, and passion. What began as a small local enterprise quickly grew into a recognized ambassador of Sicilian excellence, driven by a deep commitment to authenticity and quality.From the very beginning, our founders believed that food should express both heritage and innovation. By combining age-old artisanal techniques with modern production processes, Agrisicilia succeeded in creating jams and marmalades that retain the flavor, aroma, and color of freshly picked fruit. Each jar captures the essence of Sicily — the sweetness of its oranges, the intensity of its lemons, and the fragrance of its mandarins.Over the years, Agrisicilia has expanded beyond traditional recipes, introducing innovative product lines such as functional spreads and creative combinations like Pistichoc, Coffeedream, and Chococoffee — unique blends designed for modern consumers seeking both taste and well-being.Sustainability and transparency are integral to our identity. We work closely with local growers, ensuring fair practices and full traceability of raw materials. Every product is made with respect for the environment, using natural ingredients and recyclable packaging.Today, Agrisicilia exports to more than 40 countries and continues to embody the values that shaped its beginning: passion for quality, love for the Sicilian land, and dedication to sharing authentic Mediterranean flavors. From our family roots to the global market, we remain guided by one simple belief — that the true taste of Sicily should be experienced by everyone, everywhere.

name: Agro Farm LLC
description: Within our organization, we hold the conviction that everyone is entitled to a life of well-being, a harmonious environment, and genuine happiness.Agro Farm LLC is dedicated to offering a diverse selection of wholesome products, driven by our inventive spirit and unwavering dedication to the community. Our products symbolize an expedition into the soul of Sri Lanka, encapsulating the essence of our splendid island. By indulging in our offerings, you'll savor the exquisite tastes of our locale and immerse yourself in the cordiality and charm that define Sri Lankan culture.

name: AGRO POWER Jerky
description: Over the past 16 years Ben and Jordan built Q Mixers into a national category leader. From an idea to 80,000+ retail PODs and placement in tens of thousands of bars & restaurants, with Q Mixers we helped build a new beverage category. We are now building something even bigger and more impactful. AGRO POWER Jerky is a fundamentally new approach to protein snacks. More than 100,000,000 Americans consider themselves "meat reducers" – while still eating meat sometimes, they're trying to eat less meat, especially red meat. But at the same time they want to consume protein so they have the fuel to do everything they want to do. Plant-based foods should be part of the solution. However, they have not yet succeeded at retail or food service. That is because they 1. Don't taste good enough. 2. Don't provide enough health benefits 3. Don't compete on price and 4. Don't give consumers a reason to purchase (besides that they "should") So we are applying everything we've learned at Q Mixers to create snacks that consumers will want to buy rather than something they're told they "should". We think it's a game changer and we're excited to discuss it with you.

name: Agronic Food, (Pvt) Ltd.
description: Founded in 2009, Agronic Food Pvt. Ltd. is a leading Indian enterprise specializing in certified organic food ingredients.Headquartered in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, the company has established a strong global presence, exporting to over 31 countries worldwide. With over a decade of expertise, it has become a trusted name in cultivation, processing, and export.The business operates four modern processing centers, each equipped for cleaning, grading, packaging, and precision quality testing. With an annual production capacity that supports international demand, it provides a complete farm-to-shelf supply chain, ensuring consistency, scalability, and certified quality standards.Today, the company delivers a wide range of ingredients to leading brands worldwide, offering reliable documentation, transparent processes, and end-to-end supply solutions for the food, health, and wellness industries.Global certifications : BRC, HACCP, HALAL, Kosher, GFSI, NOP, COR, NPOP etc.,

name: Agropecuaria Produza S.A.
description: The history of Produza Foods is marked by vision, dedication and a genuine passion for offering health and nutrition to the world. Founded in the heart of Paraguay, the company began its journey in 2005 with a simple purpose: to cultivate high-quality chia to meet the growing demand for this superfood. Soon, the chia grown by Produza gained prominence, conquering not only the domestic market, but also opening the doors for export to Brazil.The turning point came in 2012, when the company invested in a processing plant that, in a short time, became a world reference in quality. This milestone not only guaranteed global recognition, but also sparked a new idea: why stop at chia seeds, when the byproducts of this superfood have so much to offer? Thus, in 2015, Produza Foods began a new phase, dedicated to exploring the nutritional potential of chia byproducts.The result of this hard work was the creation of highly healthy and innovative foods, such as OLICHIA, a unique combination of 50% chia oil and 50% olive oil. This product encapsulates the company's mission to combine flavor and nutrition in every drop.More than just a producer, Produza Foods has become an example of excellence, integrating everything from sustainable cultivation in the field to rigorous quality controls recognized by international laboratories. Today, as a family business that values ​​its roots and the producers themselves, Produza Foods is a reference in the healthy food market, offering products rich in Omega 3, fiber and protein, and bringing the best of Paraguay to the world.The story of Produza Foods continues to be written, with an eye on the future and an unwavering commitment to the health and well-being of its consumers. Each product is a reflection of its journey: authentic, nutritious and made with passion.

name: AGROSEVILLA
description: Agrosevilla began in 1977 as an olive cooperative, driven by a vision to share Andalusia's authentic flavors with the world. Over time, that vision grew into a leading agri-food company, managing every stage of production with care, sustainability, and traceability. Today, we unite over 4,500 farmers and 13 cooperatives, exporting Mediterranean excellence to more than 70 countries. Picky Farmer is our heritage reimagined brand, created to reinvent tradition through creativity and bold design. Each product reflects meticulous selection and honest ingredients—handpicked in southern Spain. Together, we honor heritage while shaping the future of good living through quality and connection.

name: AGROVIM SA
description: AGRO.VI.M S.A. is based in Kalamata, Messinia and was established in 1994, as a continuation of "A. Gyfteas SA" that existed since 1964.During the first years of its operation, the company was mainly processing olive oil from Kalamata region. Through a few strategic investments, the company increased its productivity, expanded its range of products and improved its international competitiveness remaining devoted to the original vision of its founders:  to offer high quality products and traditional flavors.Through the two generations commitment, AGRO.VI.M S.A has become a modern and efficient company in the sector of Olive Oil keeping alive the traditions and the know-how obtained from previous generations.  Despite all the changes and innovations that have been adopted by the company, its main orientation remains the necessity to meet the changing needs of customers and consumers.Today, the company offers an extensive range of high-quality Olive Oils, Olives & other agricultural products.All these years of its operation, Agrovim through strategic partnerships has managed to consolidate its presence in more than 50 countries and its products under the Brand ILIADA are positioned within the largest retail chains worldwide.AGRO.VI.M. S.A. products are constantly distinguished in International and Domestic competitions for their quality, taste and innovative packaging.

name: AGT Foods
description: AGT Foods is a leading manufacturer of plant-based ingredients for premium markets and food companies around the world. From our facilities in North Dakota and Saskatchewan, we produce nutritious, non-GMO, gluten-free and non-allergenic ingredient products, including pulse flours, proteins, fibres, V-6000™, deflavoured flours and crumb, as well as extruded products such as gluten-free pasta, texturized pulse protein (TPP) and more. We provide quality solutions for the global food marketplace.Learn more about our products:PulsePlus™ Ingredientswww.agtfoods.com/ingredientsVeggipasta • Veggicrumb • Veggimealwww.veggi.infoRetail Products • CLICwww.agtfoods.com/retail

name: AHG INTERNATIONAL CORP
description: We sale all kind of empty hard capsules.

name: Ahnima Group
description: Ahnima was founded in Brazil in 2021 from a deeply personal journey. Its founder grew up watching her father, a brilliant and creative man, gradually lose his cognitive abilities due to a neurodegenerative disease. Witnessing the progressive decline of memory, autonomy and identity transformed the way she saw the brain, health and time.For years, she searched for answers beyond conventional medicine; studying neuroscience, nutrition, epigenetics and natural compounds that support cognitive function and emotional balance. What started as a personal investigation became a life mission: creating accessible tools to protect the brain, enhance mental clarity and support conscious living.The turning point came with the idea of transforming functional ingredients into pleasurable daily rituals. Instead of pills and clinical formats, Ahnima was born through intelligent chocolate , combining premium cacao with nootropic mushrooms and bioactive ingredients to support focus, creativity, emotional balance and sustained energy.As the brand evolved, Ahnima expanded its vision to include functional beverages and immediate-action formats through its innovation lab, ZTX Labs. Together, they represent two complementary forces: instant mental ignition and cognitive nourishment.In a short time, Ahnima became a reference in bioinnovation within the Brazilian natural products market, receiving national and international recognition for its flagship cognitive performance product.Today, Ahnima carries a mission that goes far beyond food. It exists to honor the brain, protect mental health, and transform everyday consumption into a conscious act of care, presence and longevity, born from a personal story of love, loss and purpose.

name: AIPRIME NUTRITIONS PVT LTD.
description: AIPrime Nutritions has a vast experience spanning over decades. Our core expertise includes speciality food ingredients, unique dietary fibers and and low calorie Sweeteners.    Speciality Products-   Organic Vegetable Glycerin Organic MCT Oil Coconut  Organic Sunflower Lecithin   Organic Low Sugar Sweetener & Dietary Fiber- Organic Sweeteners Organic Soluble Fiber  Organic IMO syrup (reduced sweetener)  Organic Tapioca syrup Tapioca Maltodextrin

name: Air Products & Chemicals, Inc.
description: Whether you are looking to freeze/flash freeze with cryogenic gases, chill, package under a modified atmosphere (MAP), inert your oils or anything in-between, our Freshline® food solutions offer you high-purity gases (nitrogen and CO2) and equipment for international supply capability and, most importantly, unmatched industry experience, innovation and technical support to help you succeed. Air Products can help you determine the right equipment and cryogenic gases for your unique manufacturing processes. Reach out to us today at 1(800) 654-4567 to get started!

name: Aiya Matcha
description: Family owned and operated for over 135 years, Aiya is based in Nishio, Japan where the finest Matcha green tea has been grown for over 800 years. Aiya oversees all phases of the Matcha production process, from seed to bowl and is committed to providing high-quality organic and conventional Matcha to the world. All of Aiya's pure Matcha products are Non-GMO Project Verified, Gluten-Free, and Kosher certified. Aiya offers a wide range of retail products that fit any lifestyle, from pure Matcha tins and bags to convenient single-serving sticks. With a spotless product recall record of over 135 years, Aiya continually strives to improve product quality while providing exciting and innovative Matcha products to the market. Find us at booth #5439.

name: Ajinomoto North America, Inc.
description: Ajinomoto is a frozen food manufacturing company co-founded by the Japanese scientist who discovered umami. Our products bring the joy of a premium frozen food experience to busy parents, adventurous eaters and families looking for a taste of togetherness. Our new batch of health-forward products endeavor to let customers both eat well AND live well.

name: Ajumma Republic Co.,Ltd.
description: Ajumma Republic was officially established in 2016 with a mission to globalize Korean cuisine. The brand originated in 2014 with deep expertise in traditional Korean fermented sauces and condiments, to share the authentic flavors of Korea with the world in a modern, sustainable, and health-conscious way.Guided by this shared vision, Ajumma Republic has developed and exported a variety of Korean fermented products—such as gochujang, doenjang, and ssamjang—tailored to meet the tastes and lifestyles of global consumers. The brand blends tradition with innovation, making Korea's culinary heritage more accessible to people across borders and cultures.In response to the increasing demand from consumers who avoid alcohol for cultural, religious, or health reasons, Ajumma Republic recently launched its alcohol-free gochujang. This product retains the deep and complex flavor of traditional gochujang while removing the alcohol ingredient which serves as a preservative. It offers a safe and satisfying option for those following vegan or alcohol-free diets without compromising on authenticity.At its core, Ajumma Republic is driven by the belief that food is a universal language that can connect people and cultures. By preserving the value of traditional Korean fermented foods and making them easier to enjoy around the world, the brand is redefining what it means to share K-FOOD globally.Moving forward, we will continue to grow as a global brand that sets a new standard for K-FOOD—breaking down cultural and dietary barriers through deep market research and consumer-focused innovation.

name: Akash Agro Industries LLC
description: AKASH AGRO INDUSTRIES LLCAKASH AGRO INDUSTRIES is a globally established manufacturer and exporter of organic and conventional psyllium and specialty agricultural ingredients. Since beginning our journey in 1985, we have grown into a trusted partner for customers worldwide through consistent quality, advanced processing, and a customer-focused approach.Our Core Product Range•	Organic & Conventional Psyllium Seeds, Husk & Powder•	Organic & Conventional Chia Seeds•	Organic & Conventional Quinoa•	Organic Spices & HerbsAdvanced Manufacturing Capabilities (India)•	Fully integrated cleaning, sortex, milling, and powder processing facilities•	Steam sterilization capabilities•	Combination of pneumatic systems and skilled personnel for precise processing•	Clinically tested and quality-controlled products•	Large-scale bulk production capacityGlobal Supply Network•	Exporting to major markets worldwide including USA, Germany, UK, Italy, Japan, China, Mexico, Malaysia and more•	Ex-USA warehouse inventory available for immediate supply•	Customers can pick up goods directly from our USA warehouse•	Flexible logistics terms: Ex Works, FOB, CIF, and DDPCertifications & Compliance•	BRC (Grade A) Certified Facility•	Kosher & Halal Certified•	HACCP & GMP Certified•	USDA NOP & Canada Organic Compliant•	Compliant with ICH Q7 quality guidelines•	Full traceability and transparent documentationWe combine decades of expertise, advanced infrastructure, and global logistics strength to deliver reliable, high-quality ingredients to our partners worldwide. We look forward to building long-term, transparent relationships and supporting your requirements with consistency and integrity.

name: Aker BioMarine Antarctic
description: Aker BioMarine is an integrated biotechnology company – uniquely positioned to create value krill derived biotech products. The company is supplying biomarine ingredients through an optimized value chain from raw materials to customer.

name: Aki Foods Japan
description: Aki Foods Japan X OUR Best foods from Hokkaido This Year Aki Foods Japan collaborating with HOKKAIDO Prefecture!  〈Hokkaido Dining Kitchen Co., Ltd.〉Founded in 2009, we are one of leading manufactures of soup in Japan.  Our brand "uchi POTA" produces soups using vegetables from Hokkaido. When the founded, it heard about the struggles farmers faced with their produce, and its desire to do something about the situation led it to start producing processed soup. Our mission is to work with these producers to bring high-quality products to people all over the world.〈Baked Arles Co., Ltd.〉We are a Hokkaido-based Japanese confectionery company known for high-quality frozen cakes made with carefully selected ingredients. We focus on innovative product development and artisanal techniques, and engages in export and wholesale. We are FSSC 22000 certified and offer OEM services.〈North Mart Co., Ltd.〉We are dedicated to crafting a new legacy for Hokkaido. By blending premium Hokkaido ingredients with the timeless American tradition of butterscotch toffee, we have created something truly revolutionary. Infused with traditional Japanese ingredients, our "Crispy Toffee" offers a light, rhythmic crunch that does not stick to your teeth. Experience the perfect fusion of East and West in this sophisticated new treat.From Aki Foods JapanIntroducing Sui of Tokyo: The Essence of Nature's Bounty At Sui of Tokyo, we are proud to bring you the very essence of Japan's pristine natural beauty – our premium kelp products. Our brand is built upon the recognition that Japan's native kelp has become an increasingly rare and precious resource. The Rarity of Japanese Kelp: With the challenges of climate change and environmental shifts, the availability of Japanese kelp has become limited, making it a truly valuable commodity. Our commitment is to honor this scarcity by crafting the finest kelp products, preserving the legacy of Japan's coastal cuisine. A Superfood Rich in Nutrition: Japanese kelp is not just rare; it is also a nutritional powerhouse. Packed with essential minerals, vitamins, and antioxidants, it stands as a superfood champion. We believe in harnessing this nutritional treasure to benefit your health and well-being. The Benefits of Kelp Consumption: Incorporating kelp into your diet offers an array of benefits, including support for thyroid health, improved digestion, and enhanced immunity. Its umami-rich flavor also elevates the taste of your dishes. With Sui of Tokyo you can savor the distinctive flavors and nutritional excellence of Japanese kelp with every bite. Join us on a journey to discover the remarkable taste and health-enhancing qualities of our premium kelp products.Sui of Tokyo is not just a brand; it's a testament to the natural wonders of Japan and the goodness they can bring to your life. Experience the essence of Japan's coastal heritage with Sui of Tokyo.Yuzu products from TOKUSHIMA prefecture in Japan<>

name: aKrrush
description: If the Vikings enjoyed recovery drinks after their raids, it was probably something like åKrrush. Made in Norway using a zero-waste process that boosts bioavailability, åKrrush is an exceptionally efficient way to consume protein that would have impressed the über-optimized Vikings, who were so crafty they built double-ended longships that could reverse direction without wasting time turning around.The voyage to åKrrush began in 2018, when Lyme disease wrecked Norwegian founder Rune Sydengen's health, withering him down to a scant 86 pounds. He discovered the power of bone broth with CBD to nourish his body and regain his health."After being sick, I realized the importance of healthy food in rebuilding the body," he says. "The long-term view is medicine alone does not do the trick, but what you eat rebuilds your body long-term." He launched a line of CBD-infused foods in 2018. Legal and banking barriers got in the way. Sydengen moved toward bone broth without CBD, as the broth was the food in that line that had the greatest nutritional benefits. He launched  in the spring of 2021 through his company Identity International, headquartered in Seattle, Washington. It is manufactured in Norway, and in 2025 has been re-formulated and re-branded as aKRRUSH Bone Broth.

name: Al Dente Pasta Company
description: Our family has been making delicious, artisanal pasta since 1981, and our commitment to quality is evident in every bite. We use only the finest ingredients like 100% European wheat, durum wheat semolina, and real, cage-free eggs to create authentic pasta that cooks in just minutes. Al Dente crafts REAL pasta without fillers, legumes, gums, or artificial ingredients— ever. That’s why Al Dente has an unmistakably homemade taste and texture. That’s REAL Pasta Done Right.

name: AL's Real Goods
description: We believe great cookies are made with plenty of rich butter and tasty cane sugar. Classic flavors are classic for a reason, and we play them hard. We can't legally say that a cookie a day would keep the doctor away, but they sure do make us feel Real Good. Founder Aaron London was a Michelin Starred Chef and Restaurateur with 10 years of Michelin stars. After close to three decades, he left brick and mortar restaurants to prioritize his young family. His quest for getting excellent, premium tasty bites into people's mouths didn't lessen. In fact, it grew. Aaron began baking cookies with his young daughters, and then realized that he could bring his yummy little "real goods" into homes across the country by launching this little brand.

name: Alaffia
description: Alaffia is redefining everyday beauty through ethically sourced ingredients, transparent supply chains, and community impact. With a vertically integrated fair trade model in West Africa and a strong U.S. retail presence, Alaffia delivers clean, efficacious body and hair care that resonates with today’s conscious consumer. At Expo West, explore our newest innovations, hero SKUs, and retail-driving programs designed to accelerate velocity while staying true to our mission of empowerment and equity.

name: Alamance Foods
description: Alamance Foods (AFI), with headquarters in Burlington, started from humble North Carolina roots more than 100 years ago when R.W. Scott began selling the extra cream and butter that he churned primarily for his family. In 1927, his son Ralph H. Scott expanded the business and established Melville Dairy, which in 1959 became one of the first producers in the United States for a revolutionary new product at the time, aerosol whipped cream. The company later expanded its product line to include flavored drinks, freeze pops, and bottled water.

name: Albanese Confectionery Nutraceuticals
description: For over 40 years, the Albanese Family has been making the World's Best Gummies right here in the USA, and are now a part of the WBENC-Certified WBE.  It's not surprising to see how quickly our company and our World's Best Gummi brand has grown.  For years, we've had a simple recipe for success, putting flavor & texture first, always finding a better way, and never taking ourselves too seriously.

name: Alca Trading Corp
description: Launched in 2025, Farm to Pouch was created to deliver a truly distinctive tropical fruit experience. As a pilot concept from ALCA, it explores new ways to bring freshness, flavor, and convenience together in a modern format.Our mission is to encourage mindful and healthier eating by making premium tropical fruits easy to enjoy anywhere. Through innovative packaging and a focus on responsibility, Farm to Pouch transforms the journey of fruit from harvest to the consumer, offering a playful and practical way to savor nature's best.

name: Alec's Ice Cream
description: Alec's ice cream is named after the founder Alec Jaffe, who coupled his lifelong sweet tooth with his passion for sustainability to create the first regenerative ice cream. Alec's love for ice cream started in elementary school with a school project, paired with childhood adventures exploring his relatives' sustainable farmland. He didn't realize how defining those moments would be until years later, feeling uninspired and unsatisfied while scanning the freezer aisle. That's when Alec knew there had to be a better way. He perfected his signature recipe and set out to source the best ingredients the earth has to offer. The result? The first-ever regenerative organic A2 dairy ice cream—fully indulgent, better for you, and better for the planet.

name: ALGARROBOS ORGANICOS - PERU
description: We work with a purpose: to feed the world with healthy products that harness the power of Peruvian superfoods. We believe in a fair value chain, in which every producer, collaborator, and customer is part of the same positive impact: caring for the health of people and the world.

name: Alkemist Labs
description: Alkemist Labs, founded in 1997, is an established leader in botanical identity testing with expanded capabilities in phytochemical potency analysis. Because natural products are complex, testing them right takes more than a combination of different analytical techniques, it also requires the expertise to know when and how to apply those analytical techniques accurately. Our ISO/IEC 17025 flexible scope accreditation signifies that outside specialists have confirmed our expertise. Our Certificate of Analysis is transparent and comprehensive, including everything you need to reproduce the analysis, and defend the results to auditors.  We can also provide an easier to read,  consumer-friendly version should you choose to give your customers access to test results. Our testing expertise covers all herbs in commerce, including those in the hemp/CBD category. We are DEA registered, USDA listed, and have your identity testing results to you in three days.In addition to services such as identity verification by HPTLC and microscopy and potency testing by HPLC and GC, we can establish test methods for your finished product. Alkemist Labs also offers a catalog of reference materials to be used by your in-house laboratory. These critical tools for botanical identity verification, including the Alkemist Labs complete line of Composite Reference Botanicals (CRBs) and AHP-Verified Botanical Reference Materials (BRMs), all easily purchased through the Alkemist e-commerce section of the website.Full method transparency, personalized technical support, and unrivaled customer service are our hallmarks. With our undisputed expertise in this very specialized area of testing, we can help you in all aspects of ensuring that you know exactly what is in your products. Our support ranges from guiding you through selection of reference materials, to determining what tests are appropriate, to facilitating resolution if testing discrepancies arise, with the end result of your having confidence in your products, and the tools to demonstrate it to regulators and customers. Our four-day turnaround time for identity testing keeps your production schedule on track.Alkemist Lab’s mission is to bring transparency to all areas of natural products industry testing includes education tools designed to demystify testing and help companies obtain accurate results to support regulatory compliance and illustrate their quality commitment to consumers.

name: All G
description: We use precision fermentation to create bio-equivalent human and dairy milk proteins. Our technology delivers the same functional performance as milk proteins with higher purity and greater consistency, all without animals.Our next-generation ingredients are built for today’s most innovative products, spanning dietary supplements, infant and adult nutrition, functional foods, beauty, and skincare. More than a sustainability solution, they unlock better health outcomes, broader access, and faster product innovation.Our first ingredients launching in 2026 are bovine lactoferrin and human lactoferrin.Visit us at Expo West in the Australia Pavilion, Booth #2168

name: All-Fill
description: All-Fill Inc. is a leading manufacturer of precision packaging machinery, trusted by nutraceutical and dietary supplement producers as well as food, pharmaceutical, chemical, and other regulated industries worldwide. For more than 55 years, All-Fill has focused on simple, reliable designs that deliver exceptional accuracy, consistency, and ease of use—critical requirements for high-value powders, granules, liquids, and solid products.Designed and manufactured entirely under one roof, All-Fill equipment is built using high-quality materials and components to ensure hygienic operation, repeatable performance, and long-term reliability. Our solutions are engineered to minimize setup time, maintenance, and operator intervention while supporting fast changeovers, reduced downtime, and scalable production growth.All-Fill’s comprehensive product line includes auger fillers, vibratory fillers, cup fillers, piston fillers, checkweighers, vertical form fill and seal baggers, labelers, bottle unscramblers, and cappers. These systems are available as standalone machines or fully integrated packaging lines, allowing manufacturers to meet evolving production, compliance, and efficiency demands across a wide range of applications.www.All-Fill.com

name: Alldae Superfruit Soda
description: alldae was founded by friends in the coffee industry who wanted to support coffee producers. We're upcycling coffee fruit (called "cascara") into a lightly-caffeinated better for you soda made zero added sugar or Stevia--only using real fruit juice for sweetness. We're making a soda that isn't just better for you, but better for the world.

name: Allgot Co.,Ltd.
description: 2019.06  Foundation2020.03  Developing convenience food2022.03  Manufacturing frozen Kimbap2022.06  Participating global food exhibition in                 Korea2022.10  Exporting frozen Kimbap to Mexico2023.01  Certificated FSSC220002023.05  Exporting frozen Kimbap to USA2023.10  Participating global food ANUGA                 exhibition in Germany2023.12  Nominated Exporting K-Food Company by Ministry of Agriculture, Korea

name: Allied Old English, Inc.
description: ALLIED OLD ENGLISH WAS BORN IN 1951. We're a 3rd generation family owned company.  We are a family values organization that is involved in community outreach on many levels. Diversity has always been part of the company makeup.

name: AllSprouts
description: How AllSprouts Was Born. We're the Denhoeds—parents who were fed up with what was on the shelves. Our kids had allergies and gut issues, and the baby food options? Full of chemicals, pesticides, GMOs, ultra-processed, and nutritionally dead. So we created allsprouts: organic, sprouted, live, probiotic- and enzyme-active. Real nutrition babies can actually digest and absorb for maximum nourishment. It changed everything for our family—now it's here for yours.

name: ALLWELLO
description: From Our Family To Yours, Enjoy!AllWellO began with a nickname and a promise.The name “AllWellO” comes from a sweet mispronunciation of the word Abuelo, which means grandfather in Spanish. When Alberto’s granddaughter first tried to say Abuelo, it came out as AllWellO. We loved it. It was joyful, innocent, and full of love. Like any proud Abuelo, Alberto wants the very best for his family. The best ingredients. The best quality. The best care. That belief became the foundation of our company.We are a father-daughter team on a mission to bring the best in organic cold-pressed juices to all. Every bottle reflects how we cook at home and how we live our lives, with intention, integrity, and joy.We use a gentle cold-pressed process to honor the fruits and vegetables in every bottle and their vibrant flavors and natural nutrients. The result is juice that tastes as good as it makes you feel. Nothing artificial. Nothing unnecessary.Our juices and shots are shelf stable and thoughtfully packaged in glass bottles, giving families the convenience of pantry storage without compromising on quality. No refrigeration needed until opened. Just pure, organic goodness ready whenever you are.From functional wellness shots to full-size juices and smoothies, AllWellO is designed for busy families who want convenience without compromise. We believe healthy choices should be easy, delicious, and accessible.Our products are made with 100% USDA Organic fruits and vegetables. They are never from concentrate, with no added sugar and no preservatives. We are non-GMO, fair trade certified, and sustainably packaged because taking care of our planet matters just as much as taking care of our people.At AllWellO, wellness is not a trend. It is a family value. Every sip is made with love and meant to be shared.From our family to yours, enjoy.

name: Almond Board of California
description: Visit ABC's booth to sample innovative almond-powered products from A Little Nutty, BeeFree, and Lexington Bakes!A Little Nutty: Founded by Melissa Melsher, A Little Nutty is on a mission to create delicious, better-for-you snacks that don't compromise on taste. A Little Nutty creates bold, seriously crunchy grain-free almond flour crackers made with simple, real ingredients and absolutely nothing artificial. With almonds as the nutrient-dense foundation, A Little Nutty delivers exceptional flavor and satisfying crunch while supporting modern dietary needs—gluten-free, grain-free, vegan, and seed oil-free. Sampling: Sea Salt Grain-Free Almond Flour Crackers and Cheddar Flavored Grain-Free Almond Flour Crackers. BeeFree: Founded by Jennifer Wiese, BeeFree is a purpose-driven snack company founded on a promise to care, protect, and nourish. Using real, plant-based ingredients with no artificial fillers, BeeFree creates gluten-free snacks that fuel the body and soul. Beyond their products, the heartbeat of BeeFree is their commitment to supporting people with autism through meaningful employment and job training programs. Sampling: Warrior Snack Mixes including Clay's Chocolate Buzz and Hagen's Berry Bomb.Lexington Bakes: Founded by Lex Evan, Lexington Bakes is an award-winning eco-conscious luxury bakeshop serving classic American treats with No Naughty Ingredients® and a guiding principle of Radical Ingredient Transparency® to empower consumers, improve equitability, and inspire radical change in the food industry. Sampling: Vanilla Almond Chip Protein Cookie and Berry Blackout Protein Cookie. The Almond Board of California (ABC) offers new technical research, consumer data, educational sustainability materials, and insights around the endless opportunities and inspiration for almonds in current and future product R&D and culinary innovation. No matter the food & beverage industry function, ABC has an almond resource for you—whether you’re a food manufacturer, processor, research chef, food scientist, marketer, entrepreneur or more. ABC promotes natural, wholesome and quality almonds through a research-based approach to marketing, farming and production on behalf of more than 7,600 almond growers and processors in California.

name: ALO Drinks by SPI West Port, Inc.
description: Many years ago, the founders of ALO Drink wandered through the vibrant markets of Asia--from the crowded night markets of Taipei, the bustling streets of Seoul, to the tropical farms in the outskirts of Bangkok--to savor the diverse flavors of the continent. There, we discovered many hidden culinary gems, including one that piqued our curiosity—aloe vera infused drinks.  Fascinated by the refreshing and soothing properties of this extraordinary plant, we couldn't help but marvel at its potential to revolutionize the beverage industry back in the states.We launched ALO Drink 15 years ago driven by our passion to promote the natural goodness of the aloe vera plant to the West. Our commitment was to craft the finest aloe vera beverages in the world by using only the purest, all natural, non-GMO ingredients, including real aloe vera pulp and juice extracted straight from the leaf, not reconstituted from aloe vera powder.   With unwavering dedication and the support of our passionate team, ALO Drink soon found its place on the shelves of health-conscious individuals and discerning consumers. The captivating flavors and the promise of natural wellness resonated deeply with people from all walks of life, from busy professionals seeking a moment of tranquility to fitness enthusiasts searching for replenishment after a strenuous workout. As word spread about the goodness of aloe vera and our devotion to exquisite taste and natural ingredients, ALO Drink would become available not only on natural store shelves, but also in mainstream channels, including conventional grocery, drug, club, and convenience stores, across the country.Today, ALO Drink continues to thrive, grounded in the same founding principles that sparked its creation years ago. We remain the #1 ready-to-drink aloe vera beverage brand in U.S. grocery, mass, drug, and convenience, guided by our commitment to innovation, authenticity, and diversity.  We've also been proud to reaffirm this commitment in our expansion into new categories and product lines, including ALO Zero, our USDA organic certified, zero calorie, zero sugar line; Jen, our lineup of collagen-infused beverages, and Jenji, our newest line of luscious boba milk teas.

name: Aloe Jaumave
description: The company has been in business for more than 20 years, producing high quality aloe vera ingredients and juices

name: Alter Eco
description: Alter Eco was founded in 2005 with the goal of bringing delicious food to conscious consumers.  The company has always had a focus on fair trade, organic and sustainable products.  In 2009, the company was B-Corp certified and in 2010 became a carbon neutral company.  In 2013, we launched the first and only compostable truffle wrapper and in 2022 launched a new granola line.  We are also committed to supporting regenerative agriculture and work with our suppliers to educate and fund agriculture projects around the world.

name: Althea Farms
description: Our story began 6 decades ago on a cattle ranch on Petit Jean Mountain in AR with a recipe for a holiday pecan.  And every Christmas my grandmother, then my mother, then I would make this special pecan just in December. I started giving them as gifts when Tim and I first married in 1990 and it very quickly became a seasonal business as I raised my 5 kids. Fast forward to 2024, kids are grown and flown, Tim retires, we decide to move back to our home on the mountain where our kids spent countless summers and holidays, where weddings happened, and traditions rooted deeply. We don't sit still well and here we are!  That's the easy part of the story. The passion project of clean, safe ingredients is rooted in a passion project of sorts. We had mold in one of our homes. I got very sick and ultimately was diagnosed with a myriad of autoimmune issues including celiac in 1999 (I like to say I was gluten free before it was cool). Even worse was my kids were getting seriously ill despite not living in the mold any longer thus began a true journey to living strong and healthy and not just "living" with feeling bad. We quickly figured out after a trip to Paris that while gluten was a trigger, I could actually eat a little of it there without becoming horribly ill.  What was different in their food…farm to table, no factory farming, fewer pesticides and chemicals…ok so we buy from the farmers market as best we can.  But I still have flares, now what.  It didn't take long to dig deeper and figure out that glyphosate was probably at the root of most of the flare ups.  So I cut out not only gluten but corn, oats,  and rice and bought organic and things really began improving. I really missed oatmeal and granola so I tried many different brands of gluten free oats to find the one we now use in our granola.  It causes no issues for me or my kids.

name: Altist Co. Ltd.
description: Alternative food technology company began humbly with a mission to provide delicious, yet healthier protein for a finicky eating daughter. It has evolved to a manufacturing company to share with the world of this alternative protein.

name: Aluminate
description: Aluminate cans are the aluminum can the beverage industry’s been waiting for. Metallic, matte, gloss, and textured finishes are all possible on the same can. Aluminate digitally printed cans hold up to tunnel pasteurization and high-speed production. Industry-leading performance, lightning quick turn-around times, and no minimum order quantities ensure your beverage brand’s success with Aluminate cans. Printed in trusted partnership by Lagersmith.

name: Alvarado Street Bakery
description: Alvarado Street Bakery, located in Petaluma, CA, is a solar-powered bakery that prides itself on being an employee-owned and operated cooperative. With a commitment to quality and sustainability, our dedicated team of bakers sprout and harvest organic whole wheat every day, crafting a unique dough that forms the foundation of our delicious and nutritious breads and bagels. Since 1977, Alvarado Street Bakery has been a pioneer in producing wholesome, organic whole grain breads. You can find our sprouted baked goods in grocery stores and natural food stores across the country, where we continue to make a positive impact on people's lives through our commitment to healthy and sustainable baking practices.

name: Alvinesa Natural Ingredients S.A.
description: Alvinesa Natural Ingredients is a Spanish company and a pioneer in the circular economy, leading the development of sustainable, plant-based ingredients through advanced upcycling. We transform organic by-products from the wine and olive oil industries into high-value natural ingredients that support health and well-being.Our portfolio includes Hytolive, an olive extract standardized in hydroxytyrosol, and Vintera, a grape extract standardized in proanthocyanidins, monomers, and anthocyanins, both supported by clinical studies. In addition, we offer a broad range of polyphenols, natural grape color, natural tartaric acid, wine concentrate, and grapeseed oil.Committed to sustainability and innovation, Alvinesa serves the nutraceutical, food, beverage, and animal nutrition industries with science-backed, traceable, and responsibly sourced ingredients.

name: Alya Foods LLC
description: Alya Foods began its journey in 2011 in New York, founded by an Algerian immigrant entrepreneur with a passion for bringing the finest organic dates from the Sahara to the world. Our story is one of connection, tradition, and a commitment to quality.How It All Started:The idea behind Alya Foods was inspired by a deep respect for the rich history and culture of date cultivation in the Sahara region. For centuries, the Deglet Noor date has been a staple for Saharan nomads, offering a source of natural energy on long desert journeys. Recognizing the unique qualities of these dates, our founder sought to share this treasure with the world.Our Unique Journey:From the very beginning, Alya Foods was more than just a business—it was a mission to connect people with the pure and authentic flavors of the Sahara. We partnered with local families who have been growing dates for generations, ensuring that our products are not only of the highest quality but also ethically sourced.Our vertical integration, from farm to table, allows us to maintain control over every aspect of production. We work directly with farmers, overseeing the cultivation, harvesting, and packing processes to ensure that our dates are responsibly grown and handled with care. Our commitment to sustainability and social responsibility has been a guiding principle throughout our journey.Today, Alya Foods stands as a trusted name in the organic date industry, known for our dedication to quality, ethical practices, and the empowerment of local communities. Our story continues as we bring the flavors of the Sahara to tables around the world, one date at a time.

name: Ama Ona
description: Ama Ona originated from the Basque Country in Spain, where we grow all our Organic fruits, and turn them into Live vinegars, condiments and sauces

name: Amara
description: Our brand story is built on a passion for giving parents better options for feeding their children. It started with the belief that what children eat today defines how they think, feel, and grow for the rest of their lives. Frustrated by the lack of nutritious and convenient baby and toddler food in the market, Amara was founded to create organic, clean-label products with simple, wholesome ingredients—and absolutely no added sugar, preservatives, or artificial colors.The brand revolutionized baby food with its unique freeze-drying process, which locks in nutrients, flavors, and textures kids love while giving parents an easy, on-the-go solution. Amara's mission to support families goes beyond just food; it's about empowering parents to nourish their little ones with confidence, knowing they're giving them the very best start in life.Today, Amara continues to innovate with snacks like Smoothie Melts, Breakfast Oat Melts, and Organic Fruit Bites, all designed to meet the needs of growing children while fitting seamlessly into busy family lives. From the very first bite to every new milestone, Amara is there to fuel the next generation with love, care, and nutrition.

name: Amarumayu LLC
description: Amayu brand started on Jun 2020, bright idea of the peruvian AJE family founders in Peru of bringing value to this amazing Amazonian super fruits, so the indigenous communities instead of cutting them for farming or agriculture purpose. they help us preserve the amazon because they are the real amazonian guards,

name: Amazon Polpas Ind e Com de Polpas da Amazonia ltda
description: The origin of Amazon Polpas is an inspiring story of a family business that grew into a major industry.It all began with the patriarch of the Mota family, who worked with his truck unloading açaí at the famous Ver-O-Peso market in Belém. After his passing, his son took over and, in addition to transportation, began selling the açaí fruit.Through years of hard work, the business that started with a small truck soon became a small fleet. This was when the ambitious project of building their own açaí factory emerged. After selling the fleet of trucks and purchasing a property, the first Amazon Polpas plant was established in 2005.Over the years, the company expanded and established itself as a leading business, with a focus on quality and technological innovation. It now has 28 distribution centers throughout the country and two processing facilities, one in the state of Pará and another in the state of Amapá, the birthplace of açaí.The project, which originated from a humble family in the city of Castanhal, in the interior of Pará, began reaching the world in 2015, starting with the export of açaí to the United States, Europe, and Japan. As a result, the company expanded its product portfolio to meet the needs of its customers in both domestic and international markets.Today, Amazon Polpas has become one of the largest açaí industries in Brazil, continuing to grow and innovate while remaining true to its origins, its love for the Amazon, and its passion for açaí. The company has become a symbol of excellence in the sector, offering high-quality products that have earned the trust of consumers throughout the country.The history of this family-owned company, which began with the work of one man and evolved into an industry that is now considered one of the major references in the country, is a testament to the commitment and entrepreneurial spirit of this family.

name: Amcor
description: Amcor is a global leader in developing and producing responsible packaging for food, beverage, healthcare, home and personal care, and other products. Amcor works with leading companies around the world to protect their products and the people who rely on them, differentiate brands, and improve supply chains through a range of flexible and rigid packaging, specialty cartons and services. We are focused on making packaging that is increasingly light-weighted, recyclable and reusable, and made using an increasing amount of recycled content.

name: Amerasia LLC
description: we're passionate about the transformative power of medicinal plants, tonic, herbs, and powerful adaptogen for a high-vibration, holistic lifestyle.It's our purpose to help others by radiating love and light into their life. We want to empower people through the power of all things good in this universe -gratitude, truth, & fun - and to reconnect you with the natural healing gifts of the Earth.

name: American Food Ingredients, Inc.
description: For over 27 years, American Food Ingredients has been a reliable source for the highest quality dehydrated vegetables. We offer a complete line of dehydrated vegetables and select spices for industrial food processors. We are also proud to offer reprocessing services at our progressive processing facility in Oceanside, California. Throughout our successful years in business, we have built trust with both large and small customers. Let American Food Ingredients become your trusted dehydrated vegetable source through quality, reliability, competitive pricing, and outstanding customer service.

name: American Ingredients Inc
description: Our headquarters are nestled in Wood Dale, Illinois, a vibrant suburb located just outside of Chicago. We believe in fostering positive relationships through exceptional customer service. We offer raw ingredients, formulation support, and innovation for the food, animal, nutritional, and pharmaceutical industries.We have strategically positioned five 50,000-square-foot warehouses that boast state-of-the-art facilities and efficient logistics to cater to your ingredient needs with unparalleled convenience and reliability.With a proven track record of success, our dedicated team of experts is committed to providing tailored solutions to meet your specific requirements. With our extensive industry knowledge and resources, we strive to be your trusted partner in achieving success and growing in their respective industries.Quality ingredients and reliable support.

name: American Natural Processors
description: American Natural Processors (ANP) is a Midwest, family-run company focused on natural, chemical-free processing with full traceability from source to finished product. Our custom expeller-press systems mechanically extract oil from a wide range of crops—including soy, canola, sunflower, safflower, flaxseed, hemp, and algae. Oils can be cold-pressed or refined in our in-house RBD systems.Our state-of-the-art milling line also allows us to create high-quality protein ingredients. After oil removal, we concentrate the protein and mill it to a smooth, consistent texture. We offer custom milling for both raw agricultural products and finished food ingredients, ideal for bars, cereals, snacks, and beverages.Today, we partner with brands that value clean processing, transparency, and dependable technical expertise in organic and Non-GMO ingredient production.

name: AMLEY FOOD CORPORATION
description: Amley Food Corporation was established in year 2003. It is located in Villanueva, Misamis Oriental. We begun manufacturing dried fruits especially the Dried Mango. Because of the abundance of the Fresh Mango Raw Material in the area and also the demand of the market, the company decided to expand and produce more products out of mango.

name: Amy & Brian Naturals
description: Amy & Brian Coconut Water is never from concentrate, non-GMO, and brought to you from the freshest young coconuts in Thailand for a naturally sweet taste. Family owned and operated since 2001, we make it our goal to bring you the highest quality coconut water we can find. As an all natural beverage containing essential electrolytes such as potassium, magnesium, and calcium, Amy & Brian Coconut Water is great as an everyday drink. It's also a healthy alternative to sugary sodas and juices or a tasty choice if you're bored with plain water. There's nothing artificial about Amy & Brian and our refreshing best tasting coconut water is perfect before, during, or after a long day's workout, yoga session, or outdoor hike to keep you hydrated and refreshed.

name: Amylu Foods
description: Amylu learned traditional sausage making techniques while working side-by-side with her Grandpa Leon.  In 1992, she would go on to become the third-generation owner of the company he started. At that time, Amylu began research and development on crafting a line of healthy chicken sausages that were grounded in the Old-World artisan sausage-making. It wasn't easy, and it took her two years of experimentation in her kitchen before she was ready to introduce the Sausages by Amylu brand in 1994.Today, Amylu Foods offers a wide variety of high-quality, delicious Chicken Sausages, Chicken Burgers, and Chicken Meatballs.

name: Anchor Ingredients Co.
description: At Anchor Ingredients, our mission is to cultivate connectivity and quality throughout the entire food supply chain. We are committed to being the industry’s most customer-centric, innovative and transparent supply chain partner. Our extensive global network, coupled with our world-class logistics team and strategically located, coast-to-coast warehouse network, ensures that our diverse portfolio of premium ingredients is available to you exactly when you need them.

name: Ancient Nutrition
description: Ancient Nutrition began with a desire to harness history’s most powerful superfoods and provide them in forms that are easy to include in a modern lifestyle. But what started as a commitment to create powerful supplements — informed by ancient wisdom and backed by modern science — has grown into so much more. We asked why so many people lack the nutrition they got through diet alone just a few generations ago, and we found our answer: conventional farming. Conventional farming strips the soil of essential nutrients that used to make it into our food and releases greenhouse gasses into the atmosphere. It’s wasteful, it’s dangerous, and it’s harming our health by growing food that lacks optimal nutrition. There’s a better way. That’s why we’re leading the revolution of regenerative agriculture.Regenerative methods focus on sequestering carbon, encouraging biodiversity, and nurturing nutrient-rich soil. In turn, that soil grows nourishing ingredients filled with vitamins, minerals, antioxidants and compounds that feed good health. These methods result in the highest quality ingredients in the world — which we use whenever possible to create incredibly effective superfood supplements that deliver real results for your health. Through our work with pioneers like Rodale Institute, Regenerative Organic Certified®, B Corporation®, and others, we are developing groundbreaking research focused on regenerating the ecosystem, empowering farmers, and reversing climate change — and we’re sharing it with as many farmers as we can. The way we see it, it’s the circle of life. Regenerative agriculture helps us restore the earth and, in turn, transforms our health with real nutrient-rich food. Which brings us back to our ultimate goal: to save the world with superfoods. Join us.

name: Ancient Organics Ghee
description: Founded in 2008, Ancient Organics began in a home kitchen with a simple intention: to craft truly exceptional ghee. As demand grew, it became clear that the exquisite qualities of our ghee resonated deeply with those who tasted it. What started small soon evolved from a shared kitchen to our first dedicated production space in Berkeley, California. In 2024, we reached a new milestone with the launch of the world’s largest Certified Organic ghee facility in Newman, California, located in the heart of the Central Valley.We source exclusively from California’s Northern Coast and New Zealand. Our dairy partners are small scale, award winning producers committed to animal welfare, independent craftsmanship, and regenerative dairy practices.We honor ancient tradition through sustainable sourcing, slow kettle cooking, and artisanal filtering. These time honored methods create a ghee with remarkable depth of flavor, beautiful aroma, and signature golden appearance.Our commitment to quality and authenticity sets a high standard in the marketplace. Every detail matters. From texture to taste to presentation, we craft ghee that inspires loyalty and earns its place in kitchens around the world.We are deeply grateful to our AO fans whose continued support fuels our journey. We also honor the many individuals who have generously given their time and energy to help bring this vision to life.

name: anco CO., LTD.
description: The founder, who had been frail since childhood, explored various forms of medicine and traditional healing practices from around the world. At one point,  he realized that "we are made of what we eat." This insight inspired a journey to discover Japan's own superfoods, which eventually led to an encounter with a tea farmer in Uji, Kyoto, with over 300 years of history. In 2015, the founder launched a brand dedicated to beauty and wellness.

name: Andalucia Nuts
description: Nut processor that uses Old World style dry roasting method using all natural sea salt.  Organic nut processor, Kosher Certified.

name: Andean Valley Corporation
description: Andean Valley is a Bolivian company dedicated to processing, manufacturing and exporting Certified Organic and Regenerative Royal Quinoa grains and a line of more than 50 superfoods, premixes, gluten-free pastas and ready-to-eat products. Founded in 1998, Andean Valley promotes sustainable agricultural practices and supports local farming communities. It exports its products to more than 20 countries, guaranteeing organic production and fair trade standards. Our mission is to offer healthy foods based on organic and gluten-free Quinoa and contribute to the economic and social development of Bolivia.

name: Anderson Advanced Ingredients
description: Since our first novel sweetener patent in 1989, Anderson Advanced Ingredients has been providing clean label, natural solutions that turn R&D visions into reality. Legacy products MoisturLOK® and EnergySMART® lead our portfolio of industry leading brands such as FiberSMART®, allSWEET®, OligoSMART®, CherryPURE® and CeraLOK®. Manufacturers of functional foods, dietary supplements,  and beverages worldwide trust Anderson to elevate their brands above the competition and love working with our team.Sugar reduction innovation starts with Advanced Ingredients.  Over the last decade, we’ve taken things to the next level, revolutionizing low calorie ingredient solutions. FiberSMART® has been clearly established as the crème de la crème of fiber options in the marketplace outperforming anything else out there on an industrial scale. First to market in 2014, allSWEET® is the gold standard in allulose, backed by multiple published clinical trials with unmatched trust and know-how. With “best in class” ingredients, unparalleled supply chain support and a supplier relationship without the rigmarole, Anderson Advanced Ingredients is the partner you’ll wish you’d found sooner.

name: Anea Nutrition
description: We didn't set out to be just another supplement brand. We started with a single mission: to create a protein powder that felt good in your body, made from real, recognizable ingredients, and nothing more. That one product, built on the nutritional power of egg whites, quickly earned a following. Not because it was trendy, but because it worked. It felt better. It was better. And it proved something we've believed from the beginning: when you lead with quality and purpose, people notice. So we grew. Carefully. Thoughtfully. And always with the same standard in mind.

name: Aneto Natural USA, LLC
description: All Natural Aneto BrothWe cook our broth as we do at home, OVER LOW HEAT AND FOR MORE THAN 3 HOURS.Only with the best FRESH and NATURAL ingredientsOur FLAVOUR comes from how we cook everything, not from added flavoursBecause there is only one way to make 100% natural broths…AS IT IS MADE AT HOMEAS WE MAKE IT AT ANETO

name: Anne's Toum
description: Anne's Toum began on a tennis court in the 70's, where Anne met Maroun Berberi who had recently escaped the civil war ravaging his home city of Beirut, Lebanon.  Fast forward a few years and Anne and Maroun married.  Anne loved cooking, and Maroun missed the food of his homeland, so Anne learned to cook all of Maroun's favorite Lebanese foods, most importantly toum!  Maroun's mother taught Anne how to make their family-recipe toum on her first visit.  Maroun and Anne eventually had two children, Matt and Katia.  And when Katia was 4 years old, she began learning how to make toum with Anne too.  The blend of cultures enabled Anne and Katia to branch outside the original toum box in terms of application (garlic bread for Thanksgiving!), and flavor, when they began adding spices into the toum; spices that you would find daily in Lebanon, but not necessarily in the toum itself.  And their toum became a hit!  Strong enough to lend an honestly clean garlic flavor to your favorite foods, but tame enough to enjoy on a daily basis.  Sadly, Anne passed away unexpectedly in 2019.  So to honor Anne, and Katia's Lebanese heritage, we quit our jobs and started Anne's Toum as a way to share Katia's mom's, and her teta's (grandmother) spirit with the world through their family-recipe toum.  Since we started Anne's Toum in 2020, It's been a roller coaster of sadness and joy for Katia.  But, sharing her toum with the world has helped Katia feel close with her Mom and her Teta on a daily basis.  And that for us, is what food is all about.

name: AOI Matcha
description: AOI Matcha manufacturers the world's premium matcha tea. Using an approach that embraces our wholesome, rich, 110-year history of matcha, AOI has grown to become one of the world's leading matcha manufacturers. AOI possesses the supply capacity to provide matcha to foodservice and food manufacturing customers.

name: Aonic Inc.
description: Aonic is based in San Francisco and has raised a $5m pre-seed round. It has been founded by a team of seasoned industry experts with the mission to make healthy living achievable and enjoyable.

name: Apex Coco and Solar Energy Limited
