name: APIPHARMA
description: The company Apipharma d.o.o. was created from the traditional beekeeping and honey craft Apimarket, founded in 1974. Today, with a production facility located in Našice, Apipharma produces more than 70 different dietary supplements and cosmetic products.All raw materials come from a naturally preserved environment, and production is based on mechanical and galenic methods that preserve the original shape of the raw materials. With multi-award-winning products and quality systems such as ISO 9001, ISO 13485, ISO 22716, HACCP and cGMP, Apipharma is a reliable partner in preserving health in a natural way.

name: Apisnutri
description: ur founder is passionate about beekeeping and the power of healthy, natural food. He began his journey by producing and selling honey door-to-door. Today the company has grown and has been present throughout Brazil for over 20 years. Already started exporting to the United States. In addition to his own brand, he also acts as a private label for American companies.

name: Applegate Farms, LLC
description: At Applegate, we're on a mission to change the meat we eat. Since 1987, we've been committed to providing clean, delicious, and ethical food options that you can trust. It all started with a vision to offer better meat—free from antibiotics, added hormones, artificial ingredients, and chemical preservatives—because we believe food should be simple, natural, and wholesome.We partner with farmers who share our values, raising animals humanely with care and respect. From pasture-raised cattle to crate-free pigs, we set high standards for animal welfare because we know it leads to better-tasting, healthier food—and it's just the right thing to do.Sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. We work to support farming practices that protect the planet, like rotational grazing and organic agriculture, so we can leave the Earth better than we found it.Transparency matters to us, and we're proud to give you food that aligns with your values—whether you're packing school lunches or grilling with friends. When you choose Applegate, you're not just getting high-quality meats; you're supporting a better food system for animals, people, and the environment.Together, we're creating a future where ethical and sustainable meat isn't the exception but the norm. Let's make it happen, one bite at a time.

name: Aprikus
description: Manufacturer and Supplier of Organic Certified Essential Oils and Hydrosols, Rose Oil, Rose Water, Oregano Oil and Oregano Water. USDA Organic, BRC, Kosher Certified. 100% Pure, Unadulterated, Natural, Global Regulatory CompliantSingle Source, Single Origin Supplier from  Harvesting to Delivery

name: Aptar - Food Protection
description: Aptar – Food Protection is a leading innovator in premium packaging and processing solutions. By combining deep expertise in polymer science with a commitment to research and development, we continuously advance food safety and shelf-life extension.Introducing HALOPACK, our latest breakthrough in sustainable packaging—a recyclable fiber-based tray system that reduces plastic usage by 90% compared to traditional plastic trays. Made from renewable or recycled cardboard, HALOPACK is the first fully gas-tight cardboard MAP tray on the market. It creates an optimal microclimate inside the package to preserve food quality and extend freshness.For products that require breathability, HALOPACK also offers ventilated options to maintain peak freshness. Plus, sustainability is built into the design—its peelable plastic liner separates easily, ensuring the cardboard tray meets recycling standards with minimal waste.With HALOPACK, Aptar – Food Protection is redefining food packaging—offering a smarter, greener, and more efficient way to protect what matters most.

name: Aptean
description: Aptean is a global, award-winning provider of AI-powered, industry-specific software designed to help manufacturers and distributors thrive in complex, regulated and fast-moving markets.At the center of our innovation is AppCentral, our intelligent ecosystem built for Industry 5.0 — connecting ERP, supply chain, quality, transportation and asset management solutions into a single, unified platform. Powered by Aptean Intelligence, AppCentral embeds AI directly into workflows, workspaces and decision-making processes to help organizations move from reactive firefighting to proactive foresight,One Platform. One Partner. Built for Your Industry.Across Food & Beverage, Logistics and Life Sciences, Aptean delivers mission-critical software that connects operations end-to-end — from planning and production to fulfillment and financial performance.With AI-powered insights, predictive intelligence, intelligent workflows and role-based workspaces embedded directly into AppCentral, Aptean helps organizations:Ask questions in plain language and get instant answersForecast risks before they disrupt operationsAutomate cross-system processes in real timeEmpower every role with personalized insightsScale securely in the Microsoft CloudHeadquartered in Alpharetta, Georgia, Aptean serves customers worldwide with solutions designed to help businesses be Ready for What’s Next, Now®. name: AquaOmega
description: AquaOmega is driven by a deep passion for health and wellness, aiming to revolutionize the supplement industry through the remarkable power of Omega-3 fatty acids. Our journey began with a dedicated team recognizing the transformative potential of these essential nutrients.What sets AquaOmega apart is our commitment to direct sourcing. By taking control of the entire supply chain, we ensure the highest quality and potency of our products. We source fish oil directly from pristine oceans and cultivate algae in sustainable farms, maintaining full oversight from start to finish.Our focus is on creating high-potency products that truly make a difference. Backed by scientific studies, we develop formulations that address the prevalent issues of poor dietary habits and chronic diseases in today's world.Innovation is at the core of AquaOmega. We constantly push boundaries, exploring new extraction methods and conducting research to stay at the forefront of scientific advancements in Omega-3 supplementation.Quality and transparency are paramount. Our direct sourcing approach allows us to maintain control over ingredients, ensuring the highest standards of purity and efficacy. Rigorous third-party testing verifies the absence of contaminants and validates the potency of our Omega-3 fatty acids.We are dedicated to empowering individuals to take control of their health. Through education and information sharing, we aim to equip our community with the knowledge gained from our studies and research.AquaOmega's brand story is of passion, direct sourcing, high potency, innovation, and a steadfast commitment to exceptional products. Join us as we continue to redefine the possibilities of Omega-3 supplementation and empower individuals worldwide to embrace a healthier and more vibrant life.

name: Ardent Mills

Partnering with us can help grow value for you and our communities.Whether you’re reimagining classic snacks, or creating the next food craze, you need a supplier that can help you at scale, discover what's next from our team at Booth #753.Please message a member of our team to book a meeting.

name: Ardor

name: Arizona Nutritional Supplements

name: Arlington Valley Farms

We recently launched our patented STUFFED Snack'n Waffles as a product line extension, which is perfect for a sweet & savory grab-n-go breakfast. Our brand awareness in schools is what has now pulled us into the Retail/Grocery channel.

name: Arm & Hammer
description: With a proud 178-year history rooted in bicarbonate expertise, ARM & HAMMER™ is dedicated to meeting evolving consumer needs through innovative, specialized ingredients. We pride ourselves in our ability to formulate products without the use of unnecessary binders, fillers, excipients, and other unwanted ingredients. One of the staples of an Arthur

name: Arya International LLC
description: Established in 2017, Arya is an award-winning New Jersey-based brand making classic Indian comfort foods with a focus on clean ingredients, convenience and approachability. As a member of Asahi Soft Drinks, one of the world’s leading beverage companies, we uphold a legacy of quality, innovation, and craftsmanship.We are proud to showcase REFREZZ, a postbiotic wellness soda crafted for health-conscious consumers seeking natural ways to de-stress and support immune health. Built on over a century of fermentation expertise behind CALPICO® beverages, REFREZZ features proprietary postbiotics designed to help consumers feel balanced, relaxed, and resilient — all in a refreshing, great-tasting soda.Discover REFREZZ and experience a new way to refresh.

name: Asaichiban Co.,Ltd
description: MAMENOKA – Non-Sticky Fermented Soy Superfood with 40g Plant Protein (USDA Organic / Shelf-Stable)MAMENOKA is a unique Japanese fermented soybean made with patented low-string fermentation technology — delivering all the benefits of natto without the sticky texture.Each crunchy, shelf-stable granule provides 40g of plant-based protein per 100g and supports gut health and calcium absorption.✔ Ready-to-eat & versatile• Sprinkle on salads and poke bowls• Add to yogurt or cereal for a protein boost• Enjoy as a healthy snack• Perfect for camping and outdoor nutritionLightweight, nutrient-dense, and easy to use — designed for modern, health-conscious lifestyles.✔ Ideal for retail & ingredient applications• Plant-based protein category• Functional foods & gut health• Kids & senior nutrition• Sports & active lifestylesUSDA Organic & Non-GMO compliant.Made in Japan.Seeking U.S. distribution, retail, and formulation partners.

name: ASR Group - Tellus
description: At ASR Group® Professional, we take pride in helping our manufacturing and foodservice customers find the right sweetening solution. We proudly offer a spectrum of trusted sweetening solutions in the brands you know, use, and trust.  Domino® and C&H® Sugar have been trusted by consumers and culinary professionals for over a century, and Florida Crystals® offers an assortment of products made from sugarcane grown in the USA. We also offer a wide range of specialty sugars and sweeteners designed for the unique needs of our food, beverage, and pharmaceutical manufacturing customers.But our sweetening solutions are only the start.  We also offer rice products from Florida Crystals® and Tellus® plant fiber-based disposable tableware that is proudly made in the USA with U.S. and imported plant fibers. Tellus products are thoughtfully crafted with care and precision. Our plant-based compostable tableware helps reduce reliance on fossil fuels and waste into landfills.

name: AST Enzymes/Specialty Enzymes & Probiotics
description: AST Enzymes is a leading enzyme manufacturer providing healthcare professionals and consumers with enzyme and probiotics supplements to promote cardiovascular, joint, digestive and colon health.AST Enzymes' vegetarian supplements provide relief and maintain good health using quality, natural ingredients. The supplements are manufactured in GMP-certified facilities, and undergo third-party testing in ISO-17025 certified labs to ensure you receive the highest quality, activity, purity and safety.AST Enzyme blends are formulated by our expert enzymologist Vic Rathi, who has more than 35 years of experience in enzyme research, technical innovation and development of hundreds of efficacious formulas for the enzyme industry.

name: Atalanta Corporation
description: Welcome to our table! Transform your table from ordinary to extraordinary while you transport your family to a remote finca in La Mancha, Spain. A place where Manchega sheep roam the hills and the windswept scents of rosemary and lavender fill the air. Escape to Casa Flores!Launched in 2023 and inspired by Cubism, an art movement revolutionized by Spanish artist Pablo Picasso. Our tribute to his bold, geometric style offers a feast for your eyes and your table. Authentic and flavorful, our complex Manchego cheeses, goat milk cheeses, artisanal Marcona almonds and traditional Spanish meats bring the art of tapas to life. Enliven your culinary palette with the bright colors and sumptuous flavors of Spain. Let your table be your canvas with small plates that make big impressions.

name: ATH TACHA BROS. OE
description: Nicolas and Zisis Tachas, second generation cheese producers, keeping up a 40-year-old tradition, in 2001 established the company by the name: "Tachas Farm".In a modern cheese production plant combining traditional knowledge with education of cheese-making,  producing a wide range of dairy quality products.Tachas Farm collects the raw material (sheep, goat and cow milk) from the area around Olympus mountain in Central Greece – Thessalia. Each producer has been supplied by the company with a specific freezing tank, where milk is preserved  promptly in low temperatures after milking, until the moment of delivery by the company truck.

name: ATTITUDE
description: In your busy everyday life, finding clean products should never feel like a burden it should be a given. That’s why ATTITUDE® brings you peace of mind with clean, high-performing essentials that fit your lifestyle. Whether it’s for your skin, your home, or your family, every product is made to make your life a little easier, naturally. In a world full of empty claims and greenwashing, we offer you something different.We call it Conscious Chemistry: our unique approach that combines clean ingredients, in-house innovation, and rigorous standards to meet the needs of people who care about their health, their homes, and their planet.Our vision is to redefine what “clean” truly means, by proving that performance, transparency, and sustainability can and must  go hand in hand.

name: Aura Cacia
description: Who We AreAt Aura Cacia we are inspired by the power of positive change. In our own lives and in the lives of women everywhere. Our essential oils, skin care oils and more are made from simple and pure botanical ingredients to unlock nature’s ability to improve our well-being. We source our ingredients carefully and sustainably from the best sources around the world, then test every shipment of essential oil we receive to verify its purity and quality. OUR VALUES: We are committed to conducting all of our business in an ethical, socially responsible way and selling only pure, sustainably sourced essential oils of the highest quality.  QUALITY: From finding pure plants at the source, to testing them in the lab, to teaching you how to safely use essential oils for their true benefits, you know you can trust what’s on the label and in the bottle of every Aura Cacia Essential Oil.  When it comes to quality, Aura Cacia's dedication to delivering safe and effective products begins at the source and is verified in our labs.  Learn more about our quality story here.GIVING BACK: Since our beginnings in 1982,we’ve believed in spreading positive change together.  Positive change begins with the intention to make the world a better place for all.  Through intentional sourcing and product creation along with social giving, Aura Cacia is committed to the power of Positive Change.  Learn more about how you can join Aura Cacia in this endeavor here.

name: Aura Sciences
description: Aura Sciences was founded on a passion for excellence and innovation in nutraceutical manufacturing. With countless years of industry experience, we have built a highly capable and experienced team that has spent decades perfecting the craft of supplement manufacturing. We recognized a critical gap in the industry—a need for a manufacturing partner that prioritizes speed, precision, and regulatory compliance without compromising on quality. That's why we built a facility that combines cutting-edge technology, rigorous quality control, and unmatched industry expertise to produce supplements that stand out in the market. Today, we partner with growing and established supplement brands to create products that meet the highest standards of taste, stability, and efficacy.

name: Austrade, Inc.
description: Austrade Inc. is a leading North American supplier of Certified Organic and Non-GMO plant-based ingredients. We provide food and beverage manufacturers with innovative, next-generation solutions that optimize formulations and advance clean label initiatives—meeting evolving demands for nutrition, sustainability, and transparency.

name: Australia Pavilion – NSW Government
description: Investment NSW was founded in 2009, originally as New South Wales Department of Industry & Investment as a new government entity to help New South Wales (NSW) businesses find new export markets, attract local and international investment, and build a strong economy.

name: Australian Food and Pharmaceutical Industries
description: Australian Food and Pharmaceutical Industries (AFPI) was founded in 2015 with a mission to create a healthier, more sustainable alternative to conventional chewing gum. Our journey began with a clear vision: to replace plastic-based gum with a biodegradable, natural product that would not only benefit consumers but also contribute to reducing environmental waste.AFPI's founder, Dr. Sharif Sharifi, was inspired by the traditional use of mastic gum in Middle Eastern cultures, known for its natural health benefits. Recognizing the growing global demand for natural and sustainable products, Dr. Sharifi saw an opportunity to bring this ancient ingredient to modern markets. What started as a small-scale operation in Bomaderry, NSW, quickly grew into a full-fledged manufacturing company focused on innovation and eco-friendly production.One of AFPI's most significant milestones was the development of the world's first probiotic-infused natural chewing gum, combining health benefits with sustainability. This innovation aligned perfectly with global trends toward clean-label products, responsible consumption, and environmental consciousness.Over the years, AFPI has forged strong partnerships with leading research institutions like UNSW and ARC, collaborating on groundbreaking research to further enhance our product line. Our commitment to sustainability extends beyond our products—we've embraced a circular economy by repurposing machinery from global companies such as Pfizer and GSK to increase production capacity while reducing waste.Today, AFPI is proud to be a part of NSW Going Global and has received its FDA certification, positioning us for expansion into the U.S. market. Our journey, rooted in innovation, sustainability, and health, continues as we expand our reach through international exhibitions like Expo West and IFE UK, sharing our unique products with the world.

name: Australian Nutrition LLC
description: Founded in 2020, we are Australia's leading manufacturer and retailer of beef organ supplements. Our vertical integration means we can provide the highest quality, consistent supply and affordable prices

name: Australian Queen Bee Line Pty Ltd
description: Founded in 2005 by Charlie and Brenda Casido, we are a family-owned and operated apiculture business based in Orange, New South Wales, managing over 2,500 hives across central western NSW. What began with a single swarm of bees has grown into a vertically integrated operation. From hive to home, we produce pure raw honey, premium honeycomb, and breed over 20,000 queen bees each year - exporting these array of products to various countries in the world.

name: Avafina Organics
description: Avafina Organics is an organic plant-based food manufacturer and an innovative leader in health food production. We create premium, organic, plant-based foods rooted in purity and functionality. Our signature lines include Chiaviar™, a chia-based caviar alternative with seaweed and lemon, and Queen Cheese™, our clean-label cashew-based spreads crafted for modern consumers who want both flavor and integrity.We focus on simple, certified organic ingredients — no fillers, no gums, no preservatives — just real food designed to elevate everyday meals.Avafina is where innovation meets uncompromising quality. We’re building a new standard in functional plant-based foods — and we’re ready to scale.Welcome to Booth 1404

name: Avas Pet Palace, LLC
description: Ava’s Pet Palace is a teen-founded, family-run pet wellness brand creating organic and all-natural treats made with seven ingredients or less. Proudly sold in Erewhon and a KeHE Elevate brand, we bring clean, intentional pet treats to the natural aisle.

name: Avatar Natural Foods
description: At Cali Crumble, we believe every bite should capture the joy and warmth of the Golden State.With over 20 years as a pastry chef, beginning at 16 in NYC, I crafted this brand in 2024 to share the flavors and traditions that inspire me. Each cookie is made with quality ingredients for an authentic, unforgettable taste.

name: Avena Foods Limited
description: Avena is a specialty miller that provides food, pet food and nutraceutical manufacturers with sustainably grown and milled purity protocol oat and functional gluten-free pulse ingredients.Partnering for safe, healthy diets and a sustainable world.

name: AvoPro
description: AvoPro proudly sources its avocados mainly from the stunning Mt. Kenya region, known for being one of East Africa’s agricultural gems. The area's volcanic soil and perfect climate allow us to cultivate exceptional Hass organic avocados that consistently meet high-quality standards. Our dedication to quality is evident in our cold-press extraction method, which captures the pure essence of organic avocado oil while preserving its natural nutrients and ensuring it’s free of additives and contaminants.At AvoPro, we utilize advanced technology and strict quality controls in our state-of-the-art processing facilities to adhere to internationally recognized food safety standards. Our committed workforce oversees every production step, from handling raw materials to thoughtfully packaging the final product. We maintain complete traceability throughout our supply chain, enabling every bottle of AvoPro Avocado Oil to trace back to its source.Our supply model focuses on building strong partnerships with organic-certified smallholder farmers. Over 80% of the avocados we use come from these passionate farmers, supplemented by larger farms and prequalified independent growers. We empower our farmers by providing ongoing technical support to help them meet export market standards, increase yields, and maintain consistent quality. Our Fair for Life certification underscores our commitment to equitable pricing and stable market access for our partners.Currently, we collaborate with more than 8,000 smallholder farmers across Kenya and Tanzania, providing them with training, extension services, and a guaranteed offtake to access premium export markets. Our digital traceability system links each batch of exported oil to its farms, promoting transparency and accountability while enhancing farmers' incomes, which supports job creation and economic growth, particularly for youth and women in rural areas.Environmental stewardship is central to AvoPro’s mission. While avocado farming can be water-intensive and prone to monoculture practices, our decentralized production model thrives on small farms averaging just 2 to 4 acres. This approach reduces environmental pressure, improves working conditions, and increases local food availability compared to large industrial plantations. We also contribute to our community by providing free water through our social responsibility initiatives.AvoPro embraces a circular production model, viewing by-products from avocado oil extraction—such as peels, stones, and spent pulp—as valuable resources. We repurpose these materials into sustainable and commercially viable products, reducing waste and enhancing efficiency.By promoting sustainable farming practices such as intercropping, we encourage farmers to grow other crops alongside their avocados. This not only improves soil health but also diversifies crop options for household consumption and livestock feed, fostering resilience against monoculture challenges.As a result, AvoPro’s avocado oil is sourced from orchards that thrive on nutrient-rich, well-maintained soils, supporting both environmental sustainability and consistent product quality. Together, we’re building a brighter, more sustainable future for everyone involved!

name: AVRO Life Co
description: AVRO is a modern wellness brand built on calm-first performance.Formulated with naturally fermented PharmaGABA® and a Calm → Focus → Energy system, our drink mixes support clarity, focus and steady energy without stimulant culture. At the center of our system is naturally fermented PharmaGABA® from Kyoto, clinically studied to support relaxation and focus. With zero sugar and clean-label ingredients, each of our stacks is designed for daily use - supporting clarity, focus and calm.From deep work to competitive play, AVRO is designed as a simple ritual people return to.

name: AWT Labels & Packaging
description: AWT Labels & Packaging delivers innovative labeling, flexible packaging, lidding, and resealable solutions designed for brands that prioritize quality and sustainability. With expertise in eco-friendly materials and standout designs, we help natural product brands enhance shelf appeal while meeting their sustainability goals. Whether you need a small batch or large-scale production, our team has the capabilities to provide high-quality, customized solutions. Visit us to discover how AWT can elevate your packaging and reinforce your commitment to a greener future!

name: AX BEAUTY BRANDS GLOBAL LLC
description: NatureWell was born in 2014 from a simple idea: body care should feel good, work well, and fit real life. We saw too many products that were either overly clinical or overly complicated—so we created something different. NatureWell focuses on ingredient-forward formulas that are clean, gentle, and genuinely effective. The textures are soft, the scents are comforting, and the results are visible. Nothing is added unless it serves a purpose.Our products are designed for the daily routines that actually matter—your morning shower, your end-of-day reset, your in-between moments of care. NatureWell makes self-care accessible and effortless, without luxury markups or heavy claims. It's skincare for the body, made to be used and loved every day.

name: Ayoh
description: Founded by Molly Baz, 2x New York Times bestselling cookbook author and recipe developer, Ayoh developed an ultra-creamy mayo as a base and packs it to the brim with ingredients full of flavor & texture, like pickles, spices, herbs, and vinegar, to create a one-stop sauce for sandwich success.

name: Ayush Herbs Inc.
description: AYUSH HERBS : Wide range of products that are formulated using traditional Ayurvedic and Naturopathic principles combined with scientific research. Our supplements always undergo rigorous and repetitive quality control tests from seed to finished product. We believe this harmony between practitioners, plants, and the planet are what makes our products truly unique and results so reliable

name: Azuma Foods Int'l. USA
description: Our story starts in 1966 in Japan. A small business became a worldwide company making traditional and new age food products. Since Azuma Foods International Inc., U.S.A. was established in 1990, we have grown and manufactured original products for over 30 years in America.

name: B.T.R. NATION
description: My idea for B.T.R. NATION came at an unlikely time in an unlikely place: standing in front of a hospital vending machine. My parents were both diagnosed with rare forms of cancer. I became their primary caretaker, and we were constantly on-the-go between their chemo appointments, radiation, and doctors. We ate out of hospital vending machines and cafeteria food for over 3 years.My nutrition began to suffer. I was disgusted by the so-called "better-for-you options, high in sugar with ingredients I could barely pronounce. I craved a snack with a clean, transparent ingredient profile that was also low in sugar. I was done with sacrificing something. Low sugar but junk ingredients. Real ingredients, but absurdly high in sugar that spiked my blood glucose levels. No, thank you. I craved a snack that served a purpose. Not just better-for-you, ACTUALLY good-for-you, for your mind, body, and tastebuds.With my background in foods studies and biochemistry, I took to the kitchen. I started making protein packed bites boosted with plant-based, superfood ingredients like maca, almonds, and cordyceps. Easy to digest, no added sugar, gut-friendly. When I brought these snacks to the hospital, everyone loved them.When my parents passed away, I made it my mission to share these nourishing snacks with the world, to pass on their legacy, and to help fix our broken food system. By reducing just 20% of added sugar in pre-packaged foods we can eliminate millions of cardiovascular events and hundreds of thousands of cases of diabetes. Something needs to change, and we're going to make it happen...together.B.T.R. stands for "Be BOLD, TENACIOUS & RESILIENT," my parents' personal mantra. Their ethos is baked into every aspect of this company from the packaging to the recipes to our mission. Now B.T.R. NATION is reaching tens of thousands nationwide, and this is just the beginning. Thank you for joining us on this journey to make B.T.R. NATION a household name.

name: Baak To Wellness
description: At Baak Bone Broth, we believe true nourishment begins by going back to the origins — to the way food was meant to be made: slow, honest, and full of life.Our story began in 2023, when our founder, Alex, faced persistent gut health issues that left him feeling out of balance. After trying countless remedies, a friend suggested bone broth — a timeless tradition that transformed his well-being and reignited his vitality.That experience became the spark behind Baak: a mission to bring ancient nourishment back to modern life.Through Autoclave Sterilization Technology, our broth is gently preserved after 30 hours of slow cooking, locking in every nutrient and flavor while achieving a 2-year shelf life with no need for refrigeration.The result is pure, wellness — made with care, crafted with science, and rooted in love.Because at Baak, every sip is more than nourishment — it's a reminder that nature still knows best.

name: Bachan's, Inc
description: The recipe for Bachan's Japanese Barbecue Sauce has been passed down for generations. Bachan means grandmother in Japanese and our founder Justin Gill couldn't be more excited to share her authentic recipe with everyone.

name: Back Bar Project
description: Brand Highlight: Tepache SazonTepache Sazón was inspired by the vibrant food cultures across Mexico. From the bustling markets of Mexico City to the coastal towns of Yucatán and the highlands of Monterrey, each region offers its own distinctive flavors, especially when it comes to drinks like tepache. Traditionally made from fermented pineapple, tepache is a reflection of the people and places that create it. Each family, each town, has its own way of preparing it.his diversity highlights how food, like culture, is shaped by the land, the people, and the stories passed down through generations.Tepache Sazón is created by a Mexican team in San Pancho, Nayarit Mexico, bringing these authentic flavors of Mexico to the world. Crafted with natural ingredients, it stays true to the spirit of traditional tepache while supporting local communities. More than just a beverage, Tepache Sazón connects drinkers to the heart of Mexico, offering a taste of the rich and diverse cultures that inspired it with every sip.Brand Highlight: Giffard NA Liqueurs & SyrupsGiffard is renowned for its commitment to quality and taste. Our newest innovation, the Giffard Non-Alcoholic Liqueur range, delivers the same robust, authentic flavors as their alcoholic counterparts, ensuring that our customers never have to compromise on taste when choosing a non-alcoholic option. Whether you're crafting cocktails, mocktails, or simply enhancing your favorite beverages, Giffard Non-Alcoholic Liqueurs provide endless opportunities to get creative behind the bar for professionals and the at-home mixologist alike. Giffard Non-Alcoholic Liqueurs are ideal for everyone, whether you’re the designated driver or simply a mindful drinker looking for the highest quality non-alcoholic beverage offerings.Since 1885, five generations of the Giffard family have worked hard to provide the world with quality liqueurs and syrups. Produced in France's Loire Valley, Giffard improves cocktails with the uncompromised taste of whole, natural ingredients. Giffard Syrups are created specifically to enhance cocktail creation. Each syrup delivers consistent, true-to-nature flavors that are the signature of the Giffard family, providing the flavor intensity that brings cocktails to life.

name: Back to Nature
description: We got our start in a tiny health food store in California and helped plant the seeds of today’s natural foods movement before it was cool. Today we’re still living the good life, remaking America’s favorite snacks with honest-to-goodness ingredients. Radiating good vibes and a sunshine state of mind, we are committed to delivering super tasty snacks. That’s Back to Nature snacking all the way. Simple joys, no regrets, happy days.

name: Badger
description: Back in 1995, Bill and Katie started hand filling tins of the original Badger Balm in their kitchen. 25 years later, Badger makes nearly 100 products, has over 80 employees, and is sold in 15 countries. Still family owned and operated, the company is now led by second generation family owners and Collaborative Executive Officers Emily and Rebecca.

name: Bags Go Green
description: As a mother I want to leave the world a better place for my son and for all children.I was born in India and early in my career, worked for UNICEF where I met my husband.When we moved to the US thirty seven years ago, I parlayed my passion for good design into a home décor business.Travelling across our country, I saw that virtually all the shopping bags were plastic. I knew I could do better.I found my calling: to create strong bags made from fibers nature gave us, that would make consumers look good and feel good.Returning to my roots in India, I worked with a manufacturer who shared my passion and vision to create beautiful bags made from traditional materials and techniques, adapting them to the needs of the modern consumer.We’ve created reusable bags that are beautiful and sustainable, paying attention to detail and quality.I look forward to sharing them with you and your customers

name: Bala Enzyme, Inc
description: Founded by husband and wife doctors who have been practicing for over 20 years and have observed firsthand the beneficial effects of treatment in their patients,

name: Banza
description: Banza makes high-protein comfort foods, including pasta, pizza, waffles, mac & cheese and rice. Since 2014, Banza has been on a mission to inspire people to eat more chickpeas and other beans because of their positive impact on human and environmental health. Today, Banza is available in over 30,000 stores. For more information about Banza, please visit www.eatbanza.com or find us on Instagram and TikTok.

name: Baobab Foods
description: For us, everything starts with the majestic baobab tree and its fruit- a wild harvested tree crop and keystone species of the African Savannah. We work with a network of harvesting cooperatives in Southern Africa and process all baobab fruit at our HQ in South Africa. Our primary business has always been as a producer and supplier of baobab fruit powder in the B2B ingredient (food, beverage, supplements) space. We believe the supply chain of baobab is inspiring and important; a growing global market for baobab would have a profound impact on the lives of the communities we work with. We estimate that by 2030, the global baobab market could bring over $1B per year into Africa, much of that in the rural communities that harvest the fruit, as well as provide a perennial source of income and protect the baobab trees- a keystone species of the iconic African savannah.  In 2024, we launched our Baobab Superfruit Bites, a clean label, deliciously addictive fruit snack, to better tell the story of baobab with the world.  We will continue to add new product lines going forward, all centered around baobab fruit.

name: Baolingbao Biology Co., Ltd.
description: Baolingbao Biology Co., Ltd, a leading manufacture of corn-based health and good ingredients, is located in the center of North China Plain near the historical city Jinan in Shandong province of China. Baolingbao has been using innovative technology to transform maize and sugar into value-added ingredients for customers in the food, Dairy, Beverage, pharmaceutical, animal feed and cosmetics.Baolingbao was established in 1997 and listed in Chinese stock market in 2009. The initial product is IMO (Isomaltooligosaccharide) which is a good prebiotic fiber. Over the years, many new type products had been developed such like Sugar Substitute Sweetener Series (Allulose, Erythritol, Crystalline Fructose, Fructose Syrup, Trehalose), Prebiotics series ( IMO - Isomaltooligosaccharide, FOS-Fructooligosaccharide, GOS -Galactooligosaccharide, HMOS-Human milk oligosaccharide, Lactulose), Dietary fiber series (Soluble fibers, Resistant Dextrin, Resistant Starch, Polydextrose), Functional carbohydrate series (Glucuse Syrup, Dextrose, Corn Syrup Solids, Maltodextrin, Granulated powder products, Corn Starch and Modified starches), and DHA, etc. Today, Baolingbao produces a wide range of products for fields of foods and beverages, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics , feeds and Agricultural planting, etc. Always striving for higher quality, Baolingbao’s products are well accepted by customs.“Work for your health, Care for our health” is Baolingbao’s mission. Baolingbao is trying the best to learn cutting-edge technology, and then it adds the value to the products by the technology. That meets the wishes of cultivators. At the same time, Baolingbao provides the health products to the society.

name: Baoqing County Xinfeng Agricultural And Sideline
BAR-U-EAT
description: With BAR-U-EAT you're getting real people and real food. We live in the mountains of Colorado, we love to get outdoors, have fun and not take ourselves too seriously. Founded by childhood bestfriends Sam and Jason, and inspired from Sam's time working as a guid in iceland, we committed ourselves to making a bar with ingredients you can see, taste and know. We lightly roast oats, nuts, and seeds and combine them with a touch of salt to give you the perfect amount of savory. This is then balanced by the warm sweetness of medjool dates and local Steamboat Springs honey. The result — a deliciously sweet yet savory snack that tastes incredible, is both soft and crunchy, and comes sealed in plant-based compostable packaging. We're incredibly passionate about what we do and making sure it's at the highest level. We make all our bars and bites in our facility, just outside Steamboat Springs, Colorado. We're a value driven business focused on clean organic ingredients, free of any oils or preservatives, and sealed in compostable packaging. We aim to make health and wellness accessible, welcoming and fun for everyone. People say we're granola, we invite you to try BAR-U-EAT and get a taste of what Granola Life is all about.

name: Bari Olive Oil Company
description: With roots back to 1936, Bari is one of the oldest olive oil companies in the United States. Our founders were born in Bari, Italy and chose the name out of honor and respect for the homeland. Now, as fifth-generation family farmers, Bari continues the family tradition. Many of the olives used to create our high quality extra virgin olive oil are grown on our own family olive groves. The other olives are sourced from other local family farms to ensure quality and freshness. We are indeed proud that every drop of olive oil we produce is first-press, cold-press extra virgin olive oil.

name: Barilla
description: Barilla is a family business, not listed on the Stock Exchange, chaired by the brothers Guido, Luca and Paolo Barilla. It was founded by their great-grandfather Pietro Barilla, who opened a bakery in Parma in 1877. Today, Barilla is renowned in Italy and around the world for the quality of its food products. With its brands – Barilla, Mulino Bianco, Pan di Stelle, Gran Cereale, Harrys, Pavesi, Wasa, Filiz, Yemina, Misko, Voiello, Academia Barilla, First, Catelli, Lancia, Splendor, Back To Nature and Pasta Evangelists – it advocates tasty, hearty and wholesome nutrition, inspired by the Mediterranean Diet and the Italian lifestyle.

name: BARIS
description: During the summers in Bariloche, Patagonia, we spent our childhood days hand-picking wild raspberries. Those memories inspired us to pair this fascinating fruit with the best chocolate, seeking to create a delicious and healthy treat. The result was a sensational hit, and now we are committed to sharing it with people around the world.Marcos and Luca, two young Argentineans living in the US, founded BARIS in early 2023. After an investment from Talenti Gelato founders, who are our now also their mentors, they launched the product in early October 2023.

name: Bark Bistro Company
description: Once upon a time, in my own cozy kitchen at home with my dogs, I set out on a mission to create simple and wholesome peanut butter, made from 100% natural ingredients, crafted specifically for my dogs after realizing not all peanuts butters are created equally. Lots of OTC brands contain stabilizers, seeds oils, artificial sugars, and salts and I didn't want that in their peanut butters. This is how Buddy Budder was born - a brand that has over 25 fun and unique flavors exclusively for dogs. Each batch is manufactured by us using only the best natural ingredients we source for the most delicious peanut butters. Our goal is to provide pet parents with a guilt-free way to pamper their beloved companions, knowing they are giving them the best.

name: Barlean's
description: When he quit his job as a pipefitter and decided to become a full-time fisherman, Dave Barlean had no idea that he and his family would become manufacturers of some of America's best-selling Omega-3 supplements.It all started in the 1970s when Dave reconfigured a traditional canoe-style boat into a catamaran-style vessel and installed live fish tanks right onboard. His homemade innovation made it possible to separate endangered species from the commercial catch and, ultimately, revolutionized the reef netting industry. It also ensured that Dave's customers always got the freshest fish possible.Back at home, beloved matriarch Barb "Mom" Barlean, was busy raising four children and setting up a direct order system — an advanced telemarketing technique for the time — to deliver fresh salmon across the state within hours of being harvested.Dave and Barb's son grew up working in the family fishing business, but then struck out on his own. Soon, he became interested in a different source of Omega-3 fatty acids: flax oil. One day, he talked to his dad about a better way to press flaxseed. Dave put his mind to work, and soon invented a new type of press that treated the flaxseed more gently and pressed it without heat.The result was a smaller yield of oil from each pressing, but with a flavor that was superior to anything else on the market. People loved this new flaxseed oil, and a new family business was born.With a commitment to staying ahead of the innovation curve in providing the absolute highest quality product, Barlean's soon expanded their product line to include additional oils, green food concentrates and other premium supplements.Along the 35-year journey, Barlean's products have earned countless awards, and the company has been named both the #1 Health Food Store Brand and Manufacturer of the Year numerous times.

name: Bass Brushes Company
description: Finest Quality Hair, Body, and Skin Care Products and Accessories.

name: BATA FOOD LLC
description: BATA FOOD is an international supplier company specialized in organic and conventional food ingredients such as dried fruits, nuts, cacao, pulses, seeds, herbs, and superfoods with multiple offices around the world.BATA FOOD LLC is our US branch, importing organic food ingredients such as dried fruits, nuts and more in New Jersey.We source, process and trade organic and conventional food ingredients from all over the world, making sure that you’re getting the best quality at a fairest price.Bata Food companies are BRC, Organic and Kosher certified, FDA registered and member of a reputable organization INC. With our global network of offices and warehouses, and partner factories, we are your trusted source for safe and cost-effective wholesale bulk food ingredients.Our Featured ProductsHazelnuts (Whole / Diced / Flour / Paste)Dried MulberriesDried ApricotsDried FigsDried TomatoesPsyllium Husk PowderCoconut Derivatives (Oil / Flour / Milk Powder etc.)See Full Product RangeOur Certificates

name: Batch Foods
description: Our journey began in December 2023 when I was home from college during winter break and thinking about what direction to take with my career. Health and fitness have always been an important part of my life. I spent years in the gym and regularly bought protein powders, shakes, and snacks to fuel my workouts. At the same time, I realized that rice was always part of my daily routine.Rice is delicious and filling, but on its own it has limited nutritional value. For me, it also carries cultural meaning. As someone who is Persian, rice has always been central to family meals, traditions, and celebrations. It is the foundation of so many dishes I grew up eating. While it connects me to my background, I also recognized that it was not the most balanced carb source for someone who is health focused. I wanted to find a way to keep rice at the center of the meal while giving it more nutritional benefits.That thought led to an experiment. One evening in the kitchen with my dad, we cooked rice with collagen to see if the grains could absorb protein. We sent the sample to a lab and the results showed that the rice not only absorbed the protein but retained it at a high level. This discovery was exciting because it showed that rice could be transformed into something both familiar and functional.From that small experiment, the idea grew into a brand. What started in a family kitchen became a larger mission to improve a food that is eaten all over the world. On September 15th, 2025, we launched Batch.

name: Batory Foods
description: It all began with sugar—Batory Foods’ primary ingredient when we were founded in 1979. Through mergers and partnerships, Batory transformed itself into the broad-line national distributor it is today. Although we’re still known for our impressive selection of sweeteners, we’ve expanded to carry everything from dairy powders and proteins to fibers, oils and shortenings, starches and grains to fruit concentrates and savory sauces. We offer organic and non-GMO ingredients in various categories for clients catering to those market segments. Whether you’re manufacturing foods or beverages, co-packing or revitalizing a brand, we offer the ingredient selection you need.

name: BAY CITIES
description: Bay Cities is a full-service, vertically integrated designer and manufacturer of packaging, in-store displays, and e-commerce solutions that help brands stand out and drive sales at major retailers. Strategically headquartered near the Port of Long Beach, we provide end-to-end solutions, including in-house design, structural engineering, manufacturing, fulfillment, logistics, and nationwide distribution. Our national network and Midwest operations ensure seamless support for domestically produced suppliers.As a 100% employee-owned company, we take pride in delivering innovative, high-quality solutions with speed and precision. Sustainability is at our core—our corrugate is SFI™- and FSC™-certified, 100% recyclable, and made from 99% post-consumer waste. Additionally, our GHG emissions are lower than industry peers, reinforcing our commitment to eco-friendly manufacturing.

name: Bay State Milling Company
description: For 125 years, Bay State Milling has committed to providing healthy, responsibly sourced food ingredients. This mission has evolved across five generations of family ownership, with a focus on collaboration and relationships throughout the value chain. We offer a wide range of traditional and gluten-free flours, grains, seeds, and blends, working closely with dedicated suppliers to ensure quality and integration into their customers’ operations, resulting in wholesome foods for consumers.

name: BCFoods
description: At BCFoods, we help brands bring bold ideas to life. With over 40 years of global sourcing expertise, we deliver responsibly produced dehydrated vegetables, fruits, chiles, spices, and herbs that meet today’s demand for transparency, traceability, and real-ingredient simplicity.But we’re more than an ingredient supplier. Our vertically integrated platform offers value-added processing, custom blending, freeze-dried ingredients, co-manufacturing solutions, and 3PL services that help brands scale efficiently while maintaining quality and integrity.Whether you're crafting plant-forward snacks, functional foods, culinary-inspired flavors, or premium pantry staples, we provide the consistency and innovation that support your growth at every stage.From field to formulation, BCFoods partners with brands committed to creating products that are flavorful, authentic, and better for people and the planet.If you're shaping the future of natural foods, we’re here to help you make it real.

name: BDF Natural Ingredients
description: At BDF Natural Ingredients, biotechnology isn’t just our expertise, it’s our passion! For more than 25 years, we’ve been at the forefront of functional ingredient innovation, driving advancements in the food and nutraceutical industries. We believe in doing good – because who wants to just do business when you can do good business? We’re not just about making food ingredients; we’re also about making the world a better place (and yes, that includes being kind to our planet, people, and products).What Makes Us Stand Out? Hydrolyzed Marine Collagen - MSC CertifiedA premium wild-caught water-like collagen with high bioavailability, our marine collagen is trusted in the nutraceutical industry for its exceptional quality and functionality.

name: Be Amazing
description: BEAM is one of those words that has more to it than meets the eye. BEAM stands for Be Amazing. The best version of you is different for everyone. For Mike, one of our founders, the word BEAM has been life changing. BEAM happens to be the name of the cancer treatment that saved his life.

name: BE MOXE, LLC
description: MOXĒ began in 2020 with a simple idea: scent has the power to shift your state of mind. But too often, scent-based products were either overly synthetic or stuck in the "spa" aisle, out of touch with everyday life. We set out to change that.We built MOXĒ to bring clean, purposeful scent experiences into the moments that matter most...your morning routine, your afternoon reset, your travel bag, your bedside table. Every product we make is crafted in-house at our U.S. facility, giving us complete control over quality, consistency, and innovation. From energizing nasal inhalers to calming shower sprays, MOXĒ helps people breathe deeper, feel better, and live more intentionally—wherever life takes them.

name: Be Truffle
description: Sergio Brugnoli was the visionary founder of La Rustichella Truffles, and his legacy remains at the core of our company culture. In 1986, together with his wife Maria, he was able to realize his dream: creating the best truffle paté on the market using the highest quality ingredients.Sergio's goal was not only to create an amazing product, but he also wanted tosupport and work in a partnership with his customers, and he was proud and happy to offer his unique products to them.

name: Beacon Wellness Brands
description: Welcome to plusOne®, where we’re revolutionizing sexual wellness one intimate moment at a time. Our mission is clear: break down barriers and shatter outdated taboos by empowering intimate wellness for every body.Crafted by Beacon Wellness Brands, plusOne stands at the intersection of beauty, wellness, and empowerment. Our journey began with a vision to redefine intimacy, while making it accessible without compromising quality and experience.At plusOne, we’re not just selling products; we’re paving the way for a more inclusive and fulfilling sexual health discovery. By offering a range of beautiful, high-performance, and affordable essentials, we’re putting the power back in your hands – or wherever you prefer it to be.Gone are the days of feeling ashamed or uncertain. With plusOne, you can explore, indulge, and embrace your intimate wellness. Our products are thoughtfully designed to cater to every need and preference, ensuring that every body can discover and understand the holistic mind and body benefits of intimate wellness.Welcome to plusOne – where every moment is an opportunity for self-discovery.

name: BeanStalk Brands
description: Halcyon Health IQ started in 2019, with the idea of creating meatless foods that taste great to encourage more people to eat plant based. Inspired to create more a more sustainable food system, the team focused on protein foods that could replace meat.

name: BeanVIVO®
description: We're a minority-owned brand, from our early beginnings at local farmer's markets in San Diego, or working from our garage, our mission has been developing tasty and convenient ready-to-eat foods by combining one of nature's most nutritious ingredients – Legumes! We set out on a journey to craft specialty foods using legumes paired with other Latin and global flavors.

name: Bear Maple
description: Brian Bethke is an entrepreneur and business owner with over 15 years as Founder and CEO of Absara Audio LLC, which he successfully exited in 2020. During his tenure in the music industry, Brian built the brands Supro and Pigtronix, used worldwide by legendary musicians such as Joe Perry from Aerosmith, Robert Smith from The Cure, Lenny Kravitz, Billy Gibbons, Paul Simon, Bob Weir, Joe Walsh, Doug Wimbish, KT Tunstall, Richard Fortus of Guns n' Roses and many more. After the sale of Absara Audio LLC, Brian and his family moved to the Catskills as he embarked on a new journey to create a business with a positive impact on the environment, mind, body and spirit. It was walking through the woods with his daughter, that Brian uncovered the harmonious relationship between maple trees and ginseng.  Being fluent in Chinese and spending quite a bit of time in China while at Absara,  Brian was fully aware of the special functional health properties of ginseng, and thus his idea for Bear Maple was born.  Brian carefully began brewing high quality ginseng to craft a delicate flavor that is minimally processed and full of the mind and body benefits from the ginseng without any caffeine.  He then added maple water for a hint of sweetness plus the benefits of naturally occurring antioxidants, electrolytes and prebiotics. Bear Maple as a premium player in functional beverages catering to what consumers seek -  brain and body benefits without sugar and caffeine*Functional Ginseng*No Sugar Added*Naturally Sweetened with Maple Water*Non-GMO*Natural Energy*Mental Clarity & Focus*Mood Boosting*Vegan*Kosher

name: Bearded Brothers
description: Bearded Brothers began as a small, home-grown venture with two bearded brothers crafting organic snack bars in their garage. Their dedication paid off, landing them in REI stores and sparking rapid growth. Today, under new ownership, Bearded Brothers has expanded nationally, with products now available in Whole Foods, Costco's Southern region, and many other retailers across the country. Our commitment to high-quality, nourishing snacks continues as we grow!

name: Beast Bites
description: Beast Bites launched as one of the first brands on TikTok shop just over 3 years ago and quickly soared to become a fan-favorite. With one of the first ever Creatine Gummy formulations, Beast Bites helped to develop the category with these callouts: Taste, Convenience, Formulation & Swagger. With our 100k+ content creators & influencers, we are bringing our "A" game into Retailers in the USA and worldwide. Our Beast Bites Creatine Gummies continue to fall in the TOP 5 of all SKUs sold on TikTok shop!

name: Beautywww Inc.
description: Shoosha Truly Organic:  A New Vision in Skincare  Modern skincare teaches us to correct and suppress, even when it misunderstands and weakens our skin barrier. Shoosha respects skin as the body’s largest organ and first line of defence. We work with its protective intelligence, using pre-industrial, whole organic botanicalsrich in bioactive compounds that have evolved alongside us. Each formula is a bridgebetween the skin we inherit through generationsand the lives we live and create

name: Bedemco, Inc.
description: Find us at:Fresh Ideas Organic Marketplace, Booth F27 Southern California IFT Supplier's Night, Tabletop 2014RBedemco is a fourth-generation, family-owned business built on a long-standing passion for quality ingredients. With generations of experience importing dried fruit, nuts, and seeds, we’ve grown into a one-stop ingredient partner offering everything from freeze-dried and IQF products to sweetener alternatives, grains, proteins, flours, spices, cacao and chocolate, dairy, baking ingredients, oils, and more.INGREDIENTS OFFERED:Almond Flour, Almond Protein, Arrowroot Flour, Cassava Flour, Corn Starch, Chickpea name: Bee Harmony Honey
description: We love bees and all they do for us. Bees pollinate our fields, orchards and gardens to provide nearly one-third of the food we eat. But these pollinators face serious threats including pesticide use and habitat loss; their populations have seen drastic declines. As friends of nature and agents of change, we believe in actions that contribute to the greater good. That's why we created Beesponsible — a promise to embrace the deep connection that humans share with bees and take personal responsibility to help them. It's all about advocating for bee-loving practices, creating positive change and being in harmony with the environment. More than our mission, it's also a movement. From our premium, eco-friendly packaging to our educational website and activist-oriented social efforts, we're building a widespread community of advocates inspired to help keep bees of all kinds a thriving part of our world.Launched in 2017, Bee Harmony Honey gives us a platform to share with consumers this powerful message, while delighting the marketplace with unique and delicious honey varietals. We partner with trusted beekeepers who use responsible practices that respect the environment and bee welfare, then we hand-select our honey only from the finest barrels. From purity and quality testing to flavor grading, it meets stringent specifications to ensure a superior experience. Our panel of taste experts grade and select only the honey that receives an exceptional score for its flavor profile. We test every batch for ideal color, moisture and the absence of harmful residue. Additionally, all our honey is tested for purity via three different methods by a third-party lab. Backed by Barkman Honey, a family-owned company with beekeeping roots dating back to 1928, we couldn't be better positioned to take on the higher calling of Beesponsible. Throughout its history, Barkman Honey has led positive changes in the beekeeping and honey industries — raising the standards for beekeeping, honey safety, quality, purity and transparency. Beesponsible reflects this longstanding passion of challenging the status quo, and it powers our mission to promote responsible actions that will help keep bees around for the long haul.

name: BEE&YOU
description: Woman entrepreneur and Food Scientist Dr. Asli Samanci needed to find a solution to her son's weakened immune system. A pediatrician recommended that she try giving him propolis. She started producing propolis for the first time for her son, subsequently developed a patented propolis extraction method, and in 2013 started a business which is now a well-known global natural supplement and skincare brand: BEE&YOU.BEE&YOU is the largest propolis manufacturer and has a 110,000 square foot closed production area. It has branch offices in New Jersey, USA, and Amsterdam, Netherlands, and currently exports to 30 countries, including the USA, UK, Japan, South Korea, Germany, Austria, Netherlands, Africa, and Middle Eastern countries.BEE&YOU is available at CVS Pharmacy, Trader Joe's, Walgreen, GNC and over 2,500 stores nationwide in the US market. BEE&YOU has also won 66 awards from internationally recognized organizations for its innovative products, fair trade business model, and intellectual property rights. Some of these awards include:Delicious Living 2023 Beauty & Body Awards ? Consumer Choice ? GoldDelicious Living 2023 Beauty & Body Awards ? Retailer Choice - SilverSofi Awards by Summer Fancy Food Show (USA)Eco Excellence Award in Wellness Category by B Well Magazine (USA)Eco Excellence Award in Raw & Fermented Food Category by B Well Magazine (USA)SupplySide West Editor's Choice Award by Supply Side West (USA)Nutra Ingredients Award (USA)World Beekeeping Award by Apimondia (International)Natural & Organic Awards in 2 categories by Natural & Organic Products (UK)

name: Beefy's Own LLC
description: We were missing our favorite snack — so we brought it back. Cleaner than ever.In 2020, our family committed to prioritizing our health and cutting out anything unnatural from our home. Surprisingly, the hardest thing to replace was potato chips — our favorite snack. Everything on the market was fried in unstable oils or loaded with additives.So, we made our own.In 2022, we founded Beefy’s Own with a simple mission: to bring back chips made the old-school way — using real ingredients and beef tallow, the stable, nutrient-rich fat our grandparents relied on for its bold flavor and high-heat performance.What began as our home kitchen experiment is now a fast-growing snack brand, available in 250+ retailers across the U.S. with a 92% retail reorder rate. Our chips are hand-crafted in tallow for a richer, crispier bite — something olive and avocado oil just can’t deliver. And we keep it simple: no additives, no shortcuts.As a family-run brand, we’re committed to consistency, quality, and supporting our retail partners. We make the kind of chips your customers will taste once — and keep coming back for.

name: Beekeeper Coffee
description: We started Beekeeper Coffee as a way to build something together, something that represents the next level of our relationship. We are individuals with diverse backgrounds, but are closely connected through our common experiences.One of the most profound experiences we all share is building iconic brands such as Nike, Beats by Dre, Lobos 1707, Klutch Sports Group and the Cleveland Cavaliers. Our founding team has been connected for more than a decade, forming an authentic and unbreakable bond rooted in the self-made, hustle mentality.Now we are leveraging our expertise and our network to bring a new voice to coffee.We created a ready-to-drink coffee featuring the most popular flavors and will make them available in the places more relevant and authentic to youth culture. We offer cold brew coffee and lattes available in four flavors ? Double Black, Vanilla, Caramel and Mocha, all with a drop of honey.

name: Beetanicals
description: ABOUT TWENTY YEARS AGO I AGREED TO LET A CO-WORKER PUT A BEEHIVE ON MY FAMILY FARM. I DIDN'T PLAN TO BE RESPONSIBLE FOR IT, BUT WHEN LIFE EVENTS KEPT HIM FROM TENDING TO IT, I BECAME A BEEKEEPER. I FOUND BEE SCIENCE AND CULTURE FASCINATING, AND I SOON BEGAN RESEARCHING BEES AND ATTENDING WORKSHOPS AT THE OHIO STATE UNIVERSITY AGRICULTURAL CAMPUS. BEYOND ENJOYING THE SCIENCE, I FOUND THAT TENDING THE BEES GAVE ME TIME TO REFLECT. IT BECAME A CATHARTIC ACTIVITY. I ALSO CAME TO REALIZE HOW CONNECTED THE BEES' WORLD IS TO OURS - ANY CHANGES IN OUR ENVIRONMENT AFFECT THEIR ENVIRONMENT AS WELL. I BEGAN TO THINK ABOUT THE FOODS WE EAT, THE CHEMICALS WE USE, AND THE IMPACT THESE FACTORS HAVE ON BEES AND ON US. THAT'S WHEN THE IDEA HIT ME: I WANTED TO MAKE NATURAL SKIN CARE AND HAIR PRODUCTS USING HONEY, BEESWAX, PROPOLIS, AND OTHER INGREDIENTS THAT ARE GOOD FOR US AND OUR WORLD. THIS IS THE PHILOSOPHY BEHIND BEESSENTIAL. TODAY MY FAMILY AND I PRODUCE A FULL LINE OF NATURAL PRODUCTS - LIP BALM, SOAP, SHAMPOO, CONDITIONER, BODY WASH, FOAMING SOAPS, DEODORANTS AND CREAMS - THAT HELP OUR CUSTOMERS KEEP THEIR SKIN AND HAIR HEALTHY THE NATURAL WAY.

name: BeGOAT Clean Energy
description: BeGOAT is a true clean energy drink.   6 All-Natural Ingredients (no synthetic sweeteners)Plant BasedNon-GMOGluten-Free70mg AntioxidantsBe YOUR Greatest Of All-Time!

name: BEHAVE Candy
description: BEHAVE Candy got its start after Mayssa, our Founder, spent years in a diabetic household, resulting in sugar cravings that left her struggling to find balance between her favorite sweets and her health. After recognizing a gap in the market for low-sugar candy that still delivered great taste, Mayssa partnered with celebrity chefs to create a product that is redefining modern indulgence.

name: BEKIND Packaging
description: We create flexible packaging solutions that elevate your brand, enhance shelf appeal, and meet the unique needs of your industry. Driven by creativity and technology, we deliver custom packaging designed to help your brand stand out and grow in a competitive market. We don't just manufacture flexible packaging; we create tailored solutions designed to elevate your business!

name: Beleaf
description: Beleaf is paving the way for a greener, healthier future through its unwavering commitment to plant-based cuisine. We remain steadfast in our resolve to make the plant-based lifestyle an enriching, accessible, and joyous experience for all through delicious food that leaves a minimal carbon footprint on our planet.OUR PRODUCTS INCLUDE:Plant-Based ShrimpPlant-Based ScallopsPlant-Based Tuna SashimiPlant-Based Salmon SashimiPlant-Based EggPlant-Based Chicken DrumstickPlant-Based BaconPlant-Based Hot DogPlant-Based Jerky& much moreVisit BeleafVegan.com to learn more.

name: Belfiore Herbal LLC
description: Meet Our FounderZehra Murthy, PhD Molecular Biology and GeneticsBelfiore Herbal is led by our fearless female founder, Zehra Murthy who launched the brand at age 70 after a 40-year career as research scientist working in cell and molecular biology and genetics.Motivated to challenge the current buzzwords mis-used in skincare today she reverted to first principles of human biology: Healthy skin comes from proper cell division, healthy collagen production, and efficient dead cell removal supported all through vitamins delivered to the dermis in a non-comedogenic medium.We craft skin carethat builds cells.Blending the right botanicals with science-backed formulas, our all-natural ingredients help the body synthesize healthy skin cells reducing discoloration and wrinkles for beautiful results.Purposefully designed and formulated.Our vegan and botanical based ingredients are formulated to have the highest level of vitamin A, B, C, D and E derived from botanical sources. From lavender to aloe vera, sunflower and grapeseed oil, rosemary, marigold, oranges and carrots, we distill every essential oil and hydrosol, in our products. Our infused oils and blends are purposefully designed with high amounts of vitamins and antioxidants. Our Ghanian shea butter supports the women who create it. Explore Ingredients

name: Belgian Boys
description: Greg grew up in Belgium in the busy kitchen of his family's catering business, surrounded by the delicious food that transformed weddings and bar mitzvahs into joy-filled celebrations.When he came to the US as an adult, he and a friend (our original Skinny and Chubby) saw how happy the European snacks and treats hauled in suitcases made their friends—it felt like they'd found a way to offer the magic of those childhood celebrations into bite-sized portions, and they wanted to do more. They opened shop, making deliveries around NYC themselves in a Mini Cooper.Meanwhile Anouck, also from Belgium, had finished fashion school and was headed to NYC to start her career. On the plane, she met Greg. She loved that he was spreading joy with treats from their childhood and told him she'd help make "clothes" for his cookies and waffles. She dedicated herself to branding and packaging and, as the company grew, she left fashion to become Belgian Boys CEO.

name: BELITE
description: Belite began in 2013 when Natalia Sosa, newly diagnosed with Hashimoto's disease, rebuilt her cookies with gluten‑free flours. Her fitness‑driven boyfriend, Oscar Ocampos, requested added protein, so each batch balanced clean nutrition and workout fuel. Friends raved, weekend‑market orders exploded, and the couple reinvested every cent into better ovens, a certified gluten‑free kitchen, and nutritional analyses. What started as a kitchen fix is now Belite—honest, protein‑rich snacks proving that better health and great taste can share the same bite.

name: Bell Flavors & Fragrances, Inc.
description: Bell Flavors & Fragrances, Inc. is a leading supplier of flavors, fragrances, botanical extracts and ingredient specialties to the food and beverage industry, as well as the household care and personal care industries, offering over 110 years of exceptional customer service and experience. Bell has 11 manufacturing plants worldwide including the United States, Canada, Mexico, Colombia, Brazil, Germany, India, Singapore, and China, with operating sales offices in more than 60 countries.

name: Belle Aire Creations
description: Belle Aire Creations was founded in 1982. We deliver innovation and provide clear solutions to the complex technology, fragrance, flavor, and ingredient challenges our partners face. Our curiosity and drive to create science based intellectual property and technology pushes us to explore and cultivate emerging consumer lifestyle trends, as well as the science and emotion behind them. We strive to establish quality starting with our team members which ensures product excellence for our partners to collaborate and create for the future.

name: BelliWelli
description: At BelliWelli, we saw an opportunity to create a fiber supplement that was not only gut healthy, but contained added benefits, could be taken easily and tasted amazing. When we set out on a mission to revolutionize the fiber supplement industry, we enlisted the help of top GI doctors to help handpick our ingredients. Our formulas are surprisingly simple - all of our products contain clean, pure ingredients that are highly regarded for their benefits and impact on gut health (and taste delicious). It has never been easier to start looking and feeling your best, today.

name: Bellwether Farms
description: Founded in 1986 and family-owned and operated, Bellwether Farms first received rave reviews for its sheep's milk cheese and yogurt from farmers' markets and chefs in the San Francisco Bay area. Since sheep's milk is extremely high in nutrients and in many cases more readily digestible to those with lactose intolerance, Bellwether Farms was able to carve a niche for the brand and make sheep's milk cheeses and yogurts more mainstream and accessible. Coming up on its 35th anniversary, Bellwether Farms now makes America's number one sheep's milk yogurt, has loyal customers across the country and has secured distribution nationwide. But what still sets Bellwether Farms apart in the dairy case after all these years is a refreshingly simple approach that's been a commitment for the creamery since its inception.

name: BeLoved Health LLC
description: Beloved began with a moment of clarity in Sedona, Arizona, in 2018. Our founder, David Bentley, was introduced to shilajit on a trip that was supposed to be a simple getaway. Instead, it became a turning point. One taste, one shift in energy, one unmistakable sense of "this is what my body has been missing"—and a lifelong commitment began. Not just to shilajit, but to the deeper mission behind it: helping people remember what it feels like to feel good.That's the heart of Beloved.Most people don't realize they're living with imbalance. They assume exhaustion is normal, stress is inevitable, and burnout is just part of modern life. But when the body is starved of trace minerals—the spark plugs of cellular energy—everything from mood to metabolism to hormone balance takes a hit. We saw this everywhere: good people running on empty, blaming themselves for what was really a biological shortage.Shilajit changes that. It brings minerals, fulvic compounds, and mitochondrial cofactors back into the system in the form nature intended. But there was a problem: most people have never heard of shilajit, and many who have find the traditional resin form inconvenient, messy, or intimidating. Something so powerful shouldn't be so inaccessible.So we built Beloved to bridge that gap.We source our shilajit from above 11,000 feet in the pristine Altai Mountains—an elevation so untouched that the resin is naturally free from pollutants. We use a water-only purification method that preserves the integrity of the minerals and compounds. And we present it in clean, modern formats people can actually integrate into their daily routines.Beloved exists to hold space for people to align with their hearts, reclaim their energy, and pursue the life they came here to live. We are a wellness brand, yes—more than that, we are a community of people who believe that health is the foundation for creativity, purpose, and self-expression. Our work is rooted in integrity, guided by spirit, and powered by a deep love for human potential.You deserve to feel like yourself again. We're here to help you get there.

name: Belvoir Farm Drinks Ltd
description: At Belvoir Farm it’s simple: we’re all about the taste.Naturally delicious drinks, that’s what we're all about. Refreshingly real and reassuringly delicious, there’s artistry in our lightly sparkling drinks.  Each are made using simple ingredients, carefully selected with natural fruit juices, hand-picked flowers, and fresh spices. We’re true to nature and let the ingredients do the talking.Take the fresh flowers that go into our Elderflower Lemonade. They’re a faff to grow and you need shedloads to make just one bottle. But we’re sure you’ll agree, when you take that first sip, all the effort suddenly makes sense. Now proudly B-Corp Certified, we hold ourselves to the highest standards of social and environmental responsibility. We don’t cut corners. We don’t chase shortcuts. We do what’s right — for our consumers, our partners, and the planet.Pop by our booth to say hello and taste the difference for yourself

name: Bemyyouth, LLC
description: Bemyyouth is the exclusive U.S. partner for European wellness brands certified organic under both EU and USDA standards, focused on bringing clean-label, science-backed supplements to the U.S. market.Our curated portfolio includes Soulel, a multi-award-winning botanical supplement brand developed by an in-house herbalist with 20+ years of experience, supported by a team with 15+ years in certified organic sourcing. Soulel’s formulations are rooted in whole-plant, soil-first principles, with a strong focus on transparency, traceability, and functional relevance. One of the brand’s products has been selected as a 2026 NEXTY Awards finalist.We also represent NUTRIVORE, delivering certified organic, grass-fed, organ-based supplements designed to restore bioavailable nutrients often missing from modern diets, using whole-food sources without synthetic additives.We look forward to connecting at Natural Products Expo West 2026 — visit Bemyyouth at Booth #4552.

name: BENEO
description: BENEO offers plant-based functional ingredients for the food, feed & pharma industry that help improve the nutritional and technical properties of a wide variety of product applications while maintaining or improving taste and texture. BENEO's product portfolio includes: -Functional Fibers from chicory root (Orafti® Inulin and Oligofructose) as well as scFOS and Orafti® β-Fit, a wholegrain barley flour with heart-healthy beta-glucans. -Functional Carbohydrates from sugar beet (Isomalt and low glycemic Palatinose™ (isomaltulose) for sustained energy) -Functional Proteins from faba bean and rice-Functional Rice Ingredients (functional starches, flours, syrups and proteins). Our state-of-the-art production sites around the world ensure sustainable and high quality ingredients at all time. Some BENEO ingredients are also available in organic quality.

name: Bernard & Sons Maple Products
description: The Bernard family has been making pure maple syrup since the early 1800s, when our forefathers collected sap from the maple trees with hanging buckets, returned it to the sugar shack in horse-drawn wooden vats, and boiled it down to maple syrup in iron kettles that sat over an open fire.Much has changed since those early colonial days, but the lessons learned about how to make premium quality maple syrup have been carefully preserved and diligently handed down through our family to be used by the present-day 5th generation of Master Sugar Makers.Today, we're proud to offer a variety of maple products:100% pure maple syrup, maple butter, maple flakes, maple sugar, maple jelly, maple cookies, maple cones and maple candies.

name: BERO Brewing
description: Born in London, crafted in America, and savored worldwide, BERO is a premium non-alcoholic beer co-created by major global celebrity (TBA) and accomplished business executive John Herman. A lot of NA beers talk about themselves in terms of what they aren't: beer. In doing so, they've conditioned people to compromise on something they already know and lean into performance lifestyles anchored in physical activity. ​We know well-being is more holistic. BERO is launching in October of 2024, and our goal is to create a brand that balances discernment and pleasure in equal measure. BERO substitutes nothing in the pursuit of a life enriched. Which is why we crafted a beer to savor every moment. Whether you're swapping stories with friends, sitting front row at the show, or making your next big move, BERO will top-up the occasion with supreme taste and vivid clarity. You know the makings of a meaningful life – we're simply here to make it exceptional.

name: BERRY NUTS
description: it all started in our sister´s kitchen trying to make healthy granola and snacks options for her sons and daughters

name: Besha, Inc.
description: Besha was founded by Rebeca as a side project while she was working full-time as a commodities trader.
