Starting with limited resources and a clear vision to create a truly high-quality collagen supplement, what began as a small idea has grown into a nationally recognized premium brand.Besha has been named the top collagen supplement by independent consumer testing organization ConsumerLab, and has been recognized as a leading collagen brand by major publications including Forbes Health, Glamour, Brides, Verywell Health, among others. Besha specializes in clinically studied collagen peptides made in Germany, designed to support skin health, hair strength, nail growth, and joint flexibility from within.The company is committed to exceptional quality and transparency, with a mission to help people feel confident, healthy, and strong. At Besha, we believe true beauty comes from within.

name: Best in the West Brands
description: Best in the West operates two distinct consumer brands, each with a clear purpose and audience. Los Roast is our nationally marketed brand, focused on bold, flame-roasted New Mexico chile with a modern presentation and broad appeal across the U.S. Santa Fe Ole is our regionally focused brand, rooted in the Southwest and designed to reflect familiar flavors, traditions, and everyday uses of chile in the region. Together, the brands allow us to honor New Mexico’s chile heritage while serving both national and regional markets with clarity and intent.Los Roast offers premium, flame-roasted New Mexico green chile and red chile products made with clean, simple ingredients and no unnecessary additives. The line includes diced and chopped flame-roasted green chile in multiple heat levels, red chile purée, and specialty chile products designed for everyday cooking. Each product highlights authentic New Mexico flavor, consistent texture, and bold heat, delivering a true roasted profile that works in everything from breakfast dishes to sauces, soups, and entrées.

name: Better Balance
description: Better Balance was founded in 2020 in Madrid, Spain. We come from a big partner company, Sigma Alimentos, with a presence in 19 countries worldwide. We have more than 40 years of experience in the food industry. We love creating the best offer of plant-based products in the market. Our values are healthy, plant-based, and delicious food.

name: Better Earth, LLC
description: Founded in 2015, Better Earth began with a clear mission: to revolutionize compostable packaging and make sustainability goals achieveable within the foodservice industry.Recognizing the environmental challenges posed by traditional petroleum-based plastics and virgin wood fiber packaging, we set out to provide high-quality, eco-friendly alternatives.​Our journey led us to develop a comprehensive range of compostable products, including plates, bowls, trays, containers, cutlery, cups, and lids. These items are crafted from sustainable materials like bamboo, sugarcane, FSC Certified paper, and bio-based resins, offering viable options that reduce reliance on non-renewable resources.Committed to the principles of a circular economy, Better Earth ensures that our products not only perform exceptionally but also break down efficiently in commercial composting facilities. By partnering with farmers, chefs, composters, and other stakeholders, we actively contribute to strengthening this sustainable loop.Our passionate and diverse team, with expertise in packaging innovation and sustainability, is dedicated to driving positive change. We take pride in leading sustainability efforts across the entire value chain, from field to fork to field, and in supporting our customers to achieve their sustainability objectives.

name: Better Sour
description: We're Bella and Semira, Iranian Americans raised in Hawaiʻi and lifelong best friends. We've always believed that life is better sour—now we've created a product that proves it. Better Sour celebrates the journey of sour in irresistibly snackable gummy form, bringing you global flavors you might've been missing from the candy aisle. (Think pomegranate, guava, calamansi!)Better Sour combines our heritage and memories of childhood in the Hawaiian Islands with a celebration of culture through sour. As any Iranian will tell you, we're obsessed with sour. The flavor is central to our cuisine, from dried fruits and snacks to many of our savory dishes. In Hawaiʻi, too, sour is everywhere: strong culinary influences from the Asia-Pacific region are coupled with the Islands' host of tropical fruits and sour dried snacks.We're thrilled to be sharing these delicious flavors without all the junk! Our gummies are always 100% plant-based, with no more than 3g of sugar per bag. Of course our gummy candy is free from sugar alcohols, artificial colors and flavors.We can't wait for you to discover every flavor, founded by a lifetime of stories and discoveries between two best friends—though these days, we refer to ourselves as "Sour Seekers." Maybe after trying our gummies, you'll become one, too. ;)

name: Better Together Foods
description: Better Together Foods was founded in 2022 with a simple mission: to make sweet snacks that are actually better for you. Our journey began years earlier when our founder, Jiashu Du, was a food science student at the University of Minnesota. During his undergraduate capstone project, Jiashu and his classmates set out to create the healthiest sweet snack possible — one without refined sugar or seed oils, but still full of flavor and joy.That student idea became the foundation for Maple Pop!, our first product line: organic caramel popcorn naturally sweetened with maple syrup, baked instead of coated, and made with only five clean ingredients launched in November 2024. What started as a small kitchen experiment quickly evolved into a fast-growing snack brand now found in Sprouts, Erewhon, Safeway, New Seasons, and more.Our name, Better Together, reflects everything we stand for — better ingredients, better communities, and a belief that we can enjoy sweet treats and feel good about them.

name: BetterAlt
description: Growing up my mom used to say, "if you don't take care of your body, everything else in life will fail you". Over time, I came to revere her words. While training for the Ironman triathlon, I met my cofounder whose name also happened to be Akash. Turned out, his parents also were reaping the benefits of ayurvedic solutions for generations. We began to heed our parents' words, and began practicing their age-old traditions of ancient Ayurveda.Today with the kind of fast paced lives we lead, we are no strangers to problems ranging from stress, sleep, fatigue, low immunity to hair, skin, gut and weight issues. We soon realized that the answers of these modern issues lay with age old traditions of ancient Ayurveda. That's when taking care of our bodies with the natural power of Ayurveda became a priority for us, and taking it to others around us became a mission. And that's when BetterAlt was formed - a brand with a potent range of solutions that harnesses the secrets of Ayurvedic sages and weaves them into our modern lives that are full of these modern problems. When it comes to creating our products, we connect with farmers who are themselves disciples of Ayurveda. Each ingredient is methodically extracted, preserved for its healing properties, and secured for your body's benefit. With BetterAlt you can be sure to discover potent solutions tested with cutting edge technology and third party lab-testing to not only make sure they are extremely effective but also completely safe.We are all doing our best when it comes to our health and wellness, but for Akash and I that wasn't enough. We always did, always are, and always will find a way to turn our best into something better. We hope that you too choose BetterAlt in the search to find what's beyond your best.

name: Beyond Good
description: Beyond Good is redefining quality and sustainability standards in the chocolate industry. We’re on a mission to clean up the broken cocoa industry by sustaining the farmers and environment behind our products. We are the one of the only U.S.-sold chocolate brands producing its final product in Africa and are doing so with a high level of transparency and traceability. To achieve this, we ethically source the highest quality cocoa directly from our farmers and cut out the middlemen so farmers earn significantly more than the industry standard. Instead of chopping down forests to pave the way for additional plot land, the farmers we work with have been converting rice lands into new shaded areas where cocoa pods sprout alongside banana, jackfruit and citrus trees. The result is a beautiful canopy, a sustainable crop and a home for a lemur population that has borne the brunt of Madagascar’s disappearing forests.

name: Beyond Meat
description: Our plant-based meats are made with intention. We combine expert innovation with simple, non-GMO ingredients to deliver the meaty experience you crave without the compromise. Each of our products is a good source of protein, there's no cholesterol, no antibiotics and no hormones. A Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) study, reviewed by a panel of third-party specialists, was conducted by an international expert in food system sustainability and compared the environmental impact of Beyond Burger® 3.0. with an 80/20 ¼ lb. beef patty produced in the United States. The result? Producing a Beyond Burger® uses significantly less water, land and (non-renewable) energy – and it generates 10x less Greenhouse Gas Emissions (GHGE) than a beef patty.

name: Beyond Nature
description: Since 2013, farmers and consumers in the nut and fresh fruit industries have evolved around 10 years, and so has Beyond Nature. We have a peanuts manufacturing facility in Southern California, USA, and do distribution of varieties of nuts.

name: BF Suma Pharmaceuticals Inc.
description: Founded in 2006, BF Suma aims to improve quality of life by offering affordable products and services without compromising quality.

name: BFree Foods
description: When we opened our doors in 2011 our goal was to bring customers gluten and wheat free bread and bakery, right for their everyday needs and with quality and safety guaranteed. We believe that by making the most of the food we eat will help us lead healthier, longer lives and no one should be excluded from being able to do this. Our approach has always been to replace 'less with more' – more nutritious ingredients, more choice, and more taste. We challenge the norm, challenge the process, challenge the ingredients. We always aim to be innovative, thinking outside the box in everything we do. Eating is one of the great pleasures in life and it is at the center of good times with friends and family. Our team here at BFree are driven by a desire to help others create, innovate, live better and eat happy!

name: BGG
description: BGG has been producing market-leading quality ingredients for over 30 years.  BGG is the world’s largest or second largest producer of Astaxanthin, Tocotrienols, Bilberry, Apple Polyphenols and Licorice.  With facilities in Japan, Switzerland, USA and China, BGG supplies nearly all of the top brands in major markets around the world.  BGG’s largest market is Japan due to that market’s intense focus on quality and their admiration for the impeccable products BGG produces.

name: Bhuja Snacks
description: The Raniga family started the Majans snack food company in Fiji in the 1960s, selling their products from carts.  In 1984, the family established the company in Brisbane, Australia with the goal of providing a healthy snack alternative.  Bhuja Mix is a combination of wholesome ingredients from the West and exotic spices from the East. It's made from a blend of golden fried multigrain noodles, peas, peanuts, chickpeas, and sultanas.

name: Bia Diagnostics Laboratories
description: Bia Diagnostics is a leading ISO 17025 accredited food, beverage, and botanical testing laboratory. With over 40 years of diagnostics experience, we specialize in Food Allergen, GMO, Fermented Beverage, Microbiological, Chemical and Hemp testing. Focusing on these six critical sectors, our expert scientists are dedicated to working with you to ensure the most accurate and timely results, providing same-day analysis for most food allergens at no additional cost!

name: Bianchi Candle Brands
description: Nic Bianchi was 12-years old when he received a candle making kit for his birthday. He fell in love with the math and science that goes into making candles. Bianchi has used his passion to create Bianchi Candle Brands which includes Bianchi Candle Co, Market Street Candle Co., Yes You Candle, and Modena over the last 10 years. Bianchi's desire is to bring clean burning all natural candles, made in the USA. Bianchi Candle Brands is working to create a world where the products that your shoppers buy won't harm their health and well-being. This has been the driving force behind the continued growth of Bianchi Candle Brands.

name: Bianco DiNapoli
description: When Chris Bianco started the original Pizzeria Bianco in the back corner of a Phoenix grocery store in 1988, he had no idea that he would become a driving force in the artisanal pizza movement.  After winning three James Beard awards, and being featured in an episode on Chef's Table, Chris Bianco is becoming a household name.  In 1939, Rob DiNapoli's Grandfather, Frank DiNapoli, sold the first case of canned apricots from his cannery, Sun Garden Packing Company, and thus began a DiNapoli family tradition spanning 70 years… delivering California grown and processed fruits and vegetables for the world to enjoy. The family tradition continues with the Bianco DiNapoli line of premium organic California tomato products!

name: BIBS America, Inc.
description: BIBS is a premium Danish baby and toddler brand established in 1978. Our journey started with the iconic 'Colour' pacifier, which has been joined by many new designs and product categories. Today BIBS is present in over 80 markets across the globe and sold via more than 9000 points of distribution.

name: Biena Snacks
description: Before starting Biena in 2012, our founder, Poorvi Patodia felt like everywhere she looked, snacks primarily contained empty calories. Then she remembered eating crispy roasted chickpeas in her childhood. They were a family favorite, and packed with nutrients like protein and fiber. That's how the idea for Biena's first innovative snack line - roasted chickpeas - was born. Our passion at Biena has always been reinventing healthier snacks. From six different flavors of roasted chickpeas, to our latest marvel — Crispy Edamame Snacks. Biena is 100% plant-based, gluten free, and Non-GMO verified.  Biena is distributed nationally in stores such as Whole Foods Market, Sprouts, Target,  Walmart, Kroger, CVS and many more. You can also find our snacks on Amazon and bienasnacks.com.

name: Big Green Organic Food
description: In 2010, inspired by a question asked by the founder's wife, "why don't you use what you learned from college and graduate school to promote organic product?", we started to work closer with organic farms, producers and suppliers. Since 2017, we have collaborated with the University of Nebraska-Lincoln, where the founder earned a graduate degree, to research the functional characteristics of the organic ingredients we use. Our intent is to share the scientific research data with consumers and develop healthy and functional foods.

name: Big Mozz
description: Big Mozz began as a humble 10x10 pop-up at Brooklyn's iconic Smorgasburg, where we hand-stretched and hand-breaded fresh mozzarella sticks. As word spread about our oversized, flavor-packed Mozz Sticks, they went viral, earning a cult following at music festivals, restaurants, and arenas nationwide. In 2023, we took things to the next level, bringing our beloved mozzarella sticks to retailers across the country, so everyone can enjoy Big Mozz anytime, anywhere!

name: Big Tree Farms
description: We believe that food is at the heart of vibrant health for our bodies and our planet. After living in Indonesia and working in sustainable agriculture for several years, Ben and Blair - our founders - set out with the mission to produce good-for-you foods that support a better-for-you world. That's when they discovered the magic of Nira, the organic nectar of the coconut blossom, and Big Tree Farms was born in 2003.By using regenerative farming to harvest Nira we restore soils, stay true to ancient practices, and protect our natural resources. The hand-harvested, delicious nectar is then transformed into organic, fair-trade products like our Coconut Sugars and Coco Aminos that offer better alternatives to cane and soy.Today, with the support of our 19,000 farmer partners, we have blossomed into the world's largest and most sustainable coconut supply chain, and we remain committed to positively impacting our farmer communities, our health, and our planet.In harmony and balance!

name: Bigelow Tea
description: 100% family owned, the Bigelow Tea Company pioneered the specialty tea category 80 years ago with its flagship tea, “Constant Comment,”® an iconic black tea known for its unique, memorable blend of orange rind and sweet spice that changed the way Americans were drinking tea. Founded by a woman in 1945, the company continues to take pride in its heritage & successful growth from a one-product, entrepreneurial venture into America’s leading specialty tea company producing 2 billion tea bags annually. Under the leadership of 3rd generation president and CEO, Cindi Bigelow, Bigelow Tea has become a Certified B Corporation and is proud to announce its recent certification by the Women's Business Enterprise National Council (WBENC) which confirms that Bigelow Tea is a woman-owned and operated small business in the United States.The Bigelow Tea portfolio is comprised of more than 150 flavors which includes the Bigelow Tea signature line, Seasonal teas, steep by Bigelow Organic teas, Bigelow Benefits everyday wellness teas, and Bigelow Botanicals Cold Water Infusions.

name: Bighter Global, LLC
description: Bighter USA is a U.S.-based ingredient company specializing in nutraceutical, functional food, and sports nutrition ingredients. Headquartered in Irvine, California, we work closely with global manufacturing partners to provide high-quality, reliable, and scalable ingredient solutions to brands, formulators, and and manufacturers.Our portfolio covers a wide range of plant-based proteins, sweeteners, peptides, herbal extracts, vitamins, fibers, and specialty functional ingredients, with organic grades available for many key products. Core offerings include pea, chickpea, rice, pumpkin seed, mung bean, hemp, and fava bean proteins; natural sweeteners such as erythritol, monk fruit, stevia, and allulose; collagen and plant-based peptides; as well as sports nutrition ingredients like creatine, BCAAs, and HMB.In addition, Bighter USA supplies a comprehensive selection of botanical extracts (including turmeric, green tea, ashwagandha, elderberry, and grape seed), functional gums (xanthan gum and guar gum), probiotics, advanced specialty ingredients (such as PQQ, NAD+, NMNH, ergothioneine, fisetin, L-theanine, and nattokinase), and a full range of vitamins and fibers to support diverse formulation needs.At Bighter USA, we focus on quality consistency, supply chain transparency, and responsive service. Our team supports customers from ingredient selection and specification matching to commercial-scale supply, helping brands bring innovative, compliant, and market-ready products to life.📍 48 Waterworks Way, Irvine, CA📧 info@bighterusa.com📞 949-868-1616

name: Bikurim Food and Pastry ltd.
description: We were founded in 2009 as a bakery for breads and cakes. Five years ago we started developing the unique product line based on flax seeds and today we are proud to have a rich line of breads and crackers. Our mouth-watering Zero-Carb Bread comes in plain and T'hini flavors. With a remarkable eight-month shelf life, it's convenient and fresh. Packed with omega-3, dietary fibers, minerals, and vitamins, our bread offers unparalleled nutrition. It's ideal for ketogenic diets, athletes, and diabetics. Enjoy 29 grams of protein, 15.7 grams of fibers, and 0.9 milligrams of omega-3 per 100 grams. No added sugar, just pure goodness.

name: Bio Creative Labs
description: Bio Creative Labs was founded by Jason Freeman in 2002 with a mission to inspire conscious self-care by creating mindful beauty & wellness products to promote balance, purpose, and love. Based out of Southern California, Bio Creative Labs manages a retail line called Petal Fresh and professional line called Be Care Love, both focused on personal care products for hair, body, bath, and skin. Bio Creative Labs views beauty holistically and acknowledges that we must care for all parts of the self: mental, physical, emotional, and spiritual.Headquartered in Costa Mesa, but with a global footprint, Bio Creative Labs believes in staying nimble and innovative in a continuously evolving industry landscape. Our products are natural, good-for-you, cruelty-free, and vegan. We banned over 1600 harmful ingredients including sulfates and parabens to protect you and the planet.We are a mindful beauty company, grounded in the belief that true beauty starts from within. We believe that in order to look beautiful, one must first feel beautiful; we seek to help people understand their bodies’ needs and build a positive mindset while achieving personal and professional growth. And we don’t just say it, we mean it: our team’s development is at the core of what we do, providing opportunities for employees to participate in programs such as the Young Leadership Organization, a workshop designed to prepare future business leaders for success.

name: Bio Heart Nature SAC
description: In the heart of the Amazon, ancient pre-Inca cultures cultivated Sacha Inchi—a plant with unique nutritional power. Rediscovered in the 1970s and packed with Omega-3s, Vitamin E, protein, and antioxidants, this ancestral seed became a modern nutritional breakthrough.By the early 2000s, Diego Lopez and Jimmy Soto recognized Sacha Inchi's potential to lead a global plant-based omega movement. With deep experience in the supplement industry and a dedication to Peru's biodiversity, focusing their efforts to fund a company committed to bring Amazonian wellness to the world.The company took an innovative (then) approach from the start: a vertically integrated model powered by a close relation to a farmer-led cultivation network and an advanced processing facility. Collaborating with communities, they ensured Sacha Inchi's quality, traceability, and efficiency to meet global standards.Their mission is simple, to bring the wellness of the Amazon to the world—sustainably, ethically, and innovatively.Among their accomplishments they launched a local digital marketplace to introduce Sacha Inchi directly to Peruvian consumers—building a domestic success story before taking on the global stage.Now, Bio Heart Nature is preparing to go international. In 2026, the company will officially debut in the U.S. and other global markets starting at Expo West, launching the brand's innovative formats like plant-based softgels tailored to today's wellness lifestyles.Nearly 20 years in, Bio Heart Nature is no longer just a promising startup—it's a force. Family-owned, future-focused, and continues to set the standard in superfood nutrition, proudly sourcing it from the great Amazonian region in a sensible and responsible way.

name: Bio Nutrition, Inc.
description: Bio Nutrition, Inc. was founded by Robert LoMacchio, Steven Myers, and Lee Locke in 2010. Robert and Steven were life-long friends for almost 40 years until his unexpected passing in 2020. Their roots and passion for the industry date as far back as 1986. Steven has always had an interest in nature, herbs, vitamins, and supplements and helping others. So with his ongoing knowledge, dedication and passion for the industry Bio Nutrition was born. With many years' experience and both of us owning health food stores in the Industry Bio Nutrition, Inc. was started with the goal of treating all our retailers and consumers the way we wanted to be treated. We chose to make many different and unique formulas from weight loss to wellness formulations. Keeping competitive pricing and quality in mind we have brought some of the most innovative and best-selling products to the industry. Never forgetting customer service, good health and consumer satisfaction is our number one priority. We believe in a high level of detail, longevity, integrity, and reputation which sets us apart from others. We believe our very high standards in sourcing our raw materials and always trying to get the material from the area that is recommend sets us apart from the rest. Many industry leaders and distributors reach out to us to create new and trending products to be the first to market knowing they will receive only the finest and safest formulas. We help you keep your pulse on the market with new and innovative formulas. We care about your health and well-being and we will continue to base our new products on this premise while adjusting our current formulations on the most recent research. In our facility we follow all good manufacturing practices (GMP). We never forget our family roots and we believe that you are part of our family, too.

name: Bio-Botanica
description: Your Partner for Premium Botanical Extracts & Contract Manufacturing Services.Since 1972, Bio-Botanica has been a trusted U.S. manufacturer of premium botanical extracts and expertly crafted products.Our expertise spans decades, rooted in innovation, quality, and a deep commitment to our customers.Bio-Botanica® delivers first-class CDMO (Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization) solutions tailored to your needs. From product development to manufacturing and packaging, our process is designed to help you bring your vision to life.

name: BIO-CAT
description: Specializing in Custom Enzyme & Probiotic Solutions:Since 1988, BIO-CAT has been the specialty enzyme industry leader. Today they are also the leading Bacillus probiotic experts. BIO-CAT and BIO-CAT Microbials offer a carefully curated portfolio of natural, non-genetically engineered enzymes and microbials for custom enzyme solutions and probiotic product innovation. Enzymes: BIO-CAT focuses on complete customer service, providing only the highest quality enzymes to formulators, manufacturers and consumers. BIO-CAT’s exclusive relationship with the two top-tier Japanese enzyme manufacturers ensures only the highest quality enzymes available to all U.S. supplement manufacturers. Based in Virginia, BIO-CAT’s industry leading customer service is comprised of custom blending and formulating, just-in-time order replenishment, regulatory support and a top tier quality control lab.OPTIZIOME® Enzymes- BIO-CAT offers the most comprehensive portfolio of dietary enzymes. BIO-CAT will guide you through every step to ensure intelligent design, optimized performance, and differentiated enzyme product offerings. BIO-CAT has 80+ premium enzyme products with over 4,000 custom blends. Their industry leading portfolio also includes clinically supported customized blends offered under the OPTIZIOME® brand: P3 HYDROLYZER®, GluteAX®, Macro Digest, and Fructanase.Probiotics: BIO-CAT Microbials is proud of their continually expanding library of well-characterized Bacillus strains for Human Health, Animal Nutrition, and Crop Science. These probiotic strains are produced in a fully-integrated U.S. fermentation facility in Minnesota, and BIO-CAT Microbials plans to construct an additional 53,800 sq. ft. fermentation facility in Virginia. Both sites will be available to strategic partners for discovery and product development projects.OPTIBIOME® Probiotics- BIO-CAT Microbials specializes in the development and manufacture of microbial strains from the Bacillus genus of bacteria. Bacillus species form endospores which show high survivability, and stability in dietary supplements, foods, and the human gut. From concept to clinically substantiated claims, BIO-CAT Microbials will guide you through the steps of probiotic development to ensure intelligent design, optimized performance, and differentiated product offerings. OPTIBIOME® proprietary strains are grown in the USA. With over 2,000 proprietary strains to choose from, partner with BIO-CAT Microbials to add safe, stable, effective, and high-quality probiotics to your products. Reach out to learn more about BIO-CAT Microbials’ newest clinically tested probiotics, OPTIBIOME® BS50® and BV379.

name: Bioactive Honey Co.
description: At Bioactive Honey Co, we bring together tradition, innovation, and a commitment to excellence. Founded by Ben Brown, a third-generation beekeeper, our story is rooted in the heart of New South Wales, Australia, where Ben was born.With a legacy spanning over a century, starting with our first hives in 1918, we are proud to continue the family tradition as third-generation beekeepers, now overseeing over 2,000 hives.

name: Bioakso Sugar（Thailand）Co.,Ltd
description: Bioakso Sugar (Thailand) Co., Ltd. is a Thailand-based manufacturer of functional saccharide ingredients for food, beverage, dairy, and nutrition brands worldwide. We specialize in prebiotic solutions—including IMO (isomalto-oligosaccharides) and FOS (fructo-oligosaccharides)—designed to support modern product development focused on wellness, sugar reduction, and clean, consumer-friendly positioning.Backed by a traceable, non-GMO supply chain and deep know-how in carbohydrate processing, Bioakso delivers consistent quality, dependable supply, and strong technical support for customer R&D teams from formulation trials through commercial scale-up. Our new manufacturing facility in Prachinburi, Thailand is scheduled to be ready for production in April 2026, expanding our capability to serve partners with scalable capacity, reliable lead times, and export-ready standards.Bioakso’s portfolio also includes soluble dietary fibers (such as resistant dextrin and polydextrose), sugar-free alternatives (including allulose and erythritol), and selected classic sweeteners, enabling customers to build better-for-you products with confidence in performance, compliance, and long-term supply.

name: BioBag
description: Biobag comes from a profound driving force to do better as soon as we know better. We saw potential and necessity for change before most plastic manufacturers and transitioned very early on to becoming the Green Warrior that we are today. For over 25 years, we have been inventing products that make existing habits and behavior beneficial to the environment without comprehensive transformation.We bring to market compostable and biodegradable* products for waste management, food services, retail, grocery, households, industrial applications, agriculture, and any people or industry who like us, wants to do better by the environment.The overwhelming and confusing climate debate has left most of us not knowing how to actively change behavior for the better, but our motivation to do better has only grown stronger. As we move forward, we continue to invent and produce products that will make existing behavior and habits less harmful and more beneficial to us all.

name: BIOBOR HEALTH FOOD INC
description: Founded in 2015, Biobor is dedicated to balancing sweetness and nutrition with care, backed by rigorous scientific research.Biobor insists on using the world's best ingredients as the foundation of our formulations, ensuring each product is safe and trustworthy.Biobor prioritizes premium, scientifically proven ingredients, sourced from nature. Our products are free from artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, and sweeteners, providing consumers with only the highest quality in daily health and nutrition.From the careful selection of ingredients to the balanced nutrient combinations and the proven efficacy of each formula, Biobor takes pride in crafting products designed to meet the daily health needs of you and your family.

name: BioBottles
description: Finally, Sustainable Packaging That Doesn’t Leave Microplastics BehindYour customers care about what they put in their bodies. Now they care about what their packaging leaves behind.What It Is• A high performance supplement bottle engineered to reduce persistent microplastic residue• ASTM D9954 tested• Built specifically for nutraceutical brandsWhy It’s Different• Designed with end of life impact in mind• Backed by real testing, not marketing language• Created for brands that want credible environmental positioningWill It Cost More• Competitively priced at scale• Designed for real commercial use, not a niche experimentWill It Work• Compatible with existing filling lines• Maintains durability, shelf stability, and product protectionYour formula represents health. Your bottle should too.If you are ready to lead instead of react, let’s talk.

name: BioEmblem
description: BioEmblem was founded in 2018, as an answer to supplements that were low efficacy and using hard-to-absorb ingredients with a lot of junk fillers. The founders, Jacob and Fan, came from backgrounds in CPG consulting and product development and saw an opportunity for "better than the rest" products using high absorption forms and clean formulas. Jacob is a multi-sport athlete with a passion for fitness and views nutrition as a means for energy and recovery. Fan dealt with sports injuries and chronic inflammation for years and found certain foods and ingredients helped complement the results from medicine and physical therapy.

name: Bioenergy Life Science, Inc.
description: BLS-Branded Ingredients Built on Science, Crafted with Innovation For more than 30 years, we have been creating specialty, science-backed branded ingredients to help people perform, recover, look and feel their best at any age. We use advanced science and our proprietary core technology to deliver top-quality, specialty ingredients you can trust.

name: BioGrowing Co., Ltd.
description: BioGrowing Co., Ltd (BioGrowing) is a leading global provider of comprehensive probiotic solutions, specializing in the research, development, production, and sales of high-quality probiotic products. As a holding subsidiary of JuneYao Health (605388.SH), we are part of the esteemed JuneYao Group, which encompasses four A-share listed companies in China with a total market value of $20 billion.With over 20 years of dedicated experience in the probiotics field, BioGrowing has established a strong reputation for quality and reliability. BioGrowing maintains a repository of over 50,000 probiotic strains, each with independent intellectual property rights. Our products have been successfully exported to over 80 countries, including 22 out of the 27 EU member nations, positioning us as one of Asia’s foremost probiotic production bases. Notably, BioGrowing has been recognized by Lumina Intelligence as a top-ingredient supplier, ranking in the top 3 in the immunity probiotics and top 5 in digestion probiotics.Our research institute boasts a highly qualified team, with more than 80% holding PhDs and master’s degrees. This strong technical foundation enables us to continually innovate and develop probiotic applications that meet the evolving needs of consumers. In addition to our work in probiotics, BioGrowing has made significant strides in postbiotics research, exploring various functional applications such as oral health, fat reduction, antioxidant effects, uric acid reduction, kidney protection, and hypoglycemic regulation.At BioGrowing, our mission is to create lasting value while advancing human health. We are committed to sustainability and reducing our environmental footprint, evidenced by our ISO 14001 Environmental Management System certification and reducing carbon emissions by 580,000 kg each year.

name: BIOGRUND US, Inc.
description: Natural & Organic Functional Ingredient Blends for Clean Label ProductsEnhance your formulations with our premium clean-label ingredient solutions:Coatings – Free from TiO₂Capsule Filling & Tableting – Binders, lubricants, flow aids, and oil & moisture absorption—without SiO₂, MgSt, or other additivesPowder Engineering – Struggling with powder flowability or moisture-related issues? We provide tailored solutions to optimize your process.Colorings – Naturally vibrant and clean-labelSince 1999, we have specialized in the homogeneous blending of excipients and carriers, supporting the food supplement and pharmaceutical industries in the development, formulation, and production of solid oral dosage forms.Our innovative blends are ideal for tablets, capsules, coated tablets, powder blends, and gummies.BIOGRUND – Your Partner for Innovative Excipients & Coating SolutionsSince 1999, BIOGRUND has been a leading provider of ready-to-use excipient premixes for the pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, and cosmetic industries. Our innovative solutions simplify and optimize manufacturing processes, ensuring efficiency, consistency, and high-quality results.🔹 Our Expertise:✔ Film Coating Systems – Immediate, enteric, and sustained release coatings✔ Tableting & Capsule Filling – Binders, lubricants, flow aids, and moisture-control solutions✔ Coloring Solutions – High-quality pigment blends for vibrant, clean-label formulations✔ Powder Engineering – Custom premixes for improved flowability and process stabilityWith production and sales facilities in Germany, Switzerland, the USA, and Russia, we offer global support with a strong focus on customer-specific solutions. Our "easy, fast & reliable" approach ensures seamless integration into your production processes.🔹 Visit us to discover how BIOGRUND can optimize your formulations! 🚀

name: Biohm Technologies
description: Biohm Technologies specializes in the development of targeted microbiome products leveraging the company’s extensive dataset of bacterial and fungal populations in the gut, a departure from the industry's predominant focus on bacteria alone. Biohm’s data-driven methodology, called Symbiont™, is the basis for the creation of award-winning ingredients validated through clinical trials. The company’s flagship ingredient is Mycohsa™, the first data-powered probiotic blend clinically shown to break down digestive biofilms and support optimal levels of both bacteria and yeasts for gut health. Biohm Technologies also offers its state-of-the-art, comprehensive microbiome gut testing kits as a private label solution for brands in the health and wellness space.

name: BIOITALIA SRL
description: Bioitalia is a family business rooted in Southern Italy, where the Mediterranean diet isn't a trend — it's a way of life. Since the 1950s, we've evolved from regional wholesaler to organic producer, building one of Italy's first fully integrated organic supply chains. By 1999 we were certified organic, and today we export the products of the Mediterranean table to markets around the world.Our mission has always been the same: the cleanest ingredients, grown regeneratively, made with nothing to hide, at a price that doesn't punish you for eating well.

name: Biom Innovations, Inc.
description: Biom started with a simple idea:  To clean up the wipes industry. In a category crowded with harsh chemicals, wasteful packaging, and clunky design, we saw an opportunity to create something better. Founded in 2022, we set out to solve the unsexy problems of cleaning with products that are healthier for people, smarter for the planet, and designed to be proudly displayed - not hidden under the sink. Today, our refillable, biodegradable wipes system is changing the way people think about wipes - making them safer for people and the environment, simpler to use, and a whole lot better-looking.

name: Biosan Biotech Co., Ltd
description: Biosan Biotech Co., Ltd is a leading manufacturer of organic mushroom products with the history of over 30 years in China. We supply the top quality mushroom powders and extracts with many specifications and different mushroom varieties including Reishi，Lion's Mane，Chaga，Maitake，Shiitake，Turkey tail，Tremella，Cordyceps and Oyster mushroom, etc. We also provide the formulation development and the private labels for our customers. Biosan passed FSSC 22000 and HACCP,BRCGS and cGMP annually, and accepted the unannounced inspection of SGS and the China food administration agency. Most of our mushroom products certified with USDA organic, EU organic, Japan and China organic as well as Kosher check and Halal. Biosan is located in Lishui, China. Lishui is the top of eco-friendly city and the originally-growing region of many medicinal mushrooms in China.

name: BIOSTRIPS
description: In a world cluttered with pills, powders, and gummies, we asked: What if wellness could be effortless?We stripped away everything unnecessary: sugar, fillers, artificial ingredients, and wasteful packaging to create a precision-dosed,sugar-free vegan strip that dissolves in seconds for fast absorption and maximum efficiency

name: Biotic Ferments
description: Guided by advancements in fermentation and microbiome science, Biotic Ferments is optimizing the nourishing power of ancestral beverages for a new generation. Fermented from organic, regionally and regeneratively sourced whole-food ingredients, Biotic Kvass is the cutting edge of a thousand-year-old gut health tradition. Come learn about what the latest science teaches us about the importance of fermented foods, how to manage microbiome health with diet and the impact gut health has on the health of the body as a whole. Then taste the lineup of Biotic's raw, fermented kvass and learn how it's made.

name: BioVivo Science
description: BioVivo Science is shaping the future of botanical innovation with premium, science-driven botanical extracts and solutions proudly made in the USA. Operating from a state-of-the-art, cGMP-certified facility in Jeffersonville, Indiana, the company strengthens supply chain resilience through domestic production, vertical integration, and rigorous quality assurance. BioVivo Science’s expanding Made-in-USA portfolio includes natural caffeine from green tea, American ginseng, broccoli seed, saw palmetto, cranberry, stevia, sweetener blends, and custom botanical solutions. With precision extraction, concentration & purification, spray drying, granulation, blending, powder processing, and contract manufacturing capabilities, BioVivo Science delivers scalable, formulation-ready solutions for innovation-driven brands. Visit us at Expo West to explore U.S.-manufactured botanical innovations.

name: Birch Benders/Premier Protein
description: Co-founders Matt and Lizzi moved to Colorado, got married, and got cooking! They set out to create a company with a goal of combining quality, convenience, and incredible taste, with a diverse portfolio of products that appeal to everyone. Birch Benders has grown from a family-owned company to a delicious food brand across the grocery store. Enjoy Birch Benders' delicious creations!

name: BIRDMAN LIFE
description: After realizing the impact our food industry and consumption habits had on the world, we decided to provide cruelty-free alternatives for people to reach their nutritional goals.With this goal in mind, Birdman was created 8 years ago in Mexico. First vegan-protein to market, we quickly resonated with a growing audience of conscious consumers who need clean, nutritional and sustainable alternatives to reach their nutritional goals.

name: Bitte Inc.
description: BITTE was born from the idea that what's good for you shouldn't taste like a compromise.Inspired by tropical medicine and rooted in the ancient art of botanical bitters, BITTE reimagines functional wellness through the power of soursop — a rare, antioxidant-rich superfruit long celebrated for its full-body restorative and energizing properties. Traditionally used across tropical regions for everything from immune defense to digestive balance, soursop remains one of nature's most potent yet least accessible fruits. We created BITTE to change that — bringing this extraordinary ingredient into a modern, delicious ritual that everyone can enjoy.Each blend is nutritionist-formulated to support the body's key systems — gut, immunity, energy, and mind — combining clinically studied botanicals with the bioactive complexity of real soursop. The result: a new class of functional bitters that work gently yet effectively, providing 24/7 support for balance, calm, and clean energy.Smooth, lightly sweet, and refreshingly drinkable, BITTE turns an ancient bitter ritual into something people truly enjoy — a daily act of care that feels as good as it tastes.Because when your daily rituals taste good, health becomes effortless.

name: Black Bee Hot Sauce Co.
description: Long before Bee's kitchen was home to Black Bee Hot Sauce, it was home to hand-crafted meals made with love for friends and family.  A natural in the kitchen, Biambu "Bee" Garret (Founding Owner/CEO) has been cooking with heart—and organic herbs and vegetables from his garden—for decades.   He states.."After 30+ years in the music business, I was ready for a change and creating BBHS just happened organically".In the summer of 2021, he turned his focus from three-course meals for lucky guests to what makes any meal truly sing: the perfect dash of heat.  Unable to find options with deep, multi-dimensional flavor, unexpected herb, fruit, and spice combinations, and the sweet vibe of a home-cooked experience, he made his own.   Starting in his garden, he picked clusters of fresh herbs, simmered them with piquant vinegar, glassy wedges of onion, garlic, hand picked vine-ripened peppers, a few few secret spices, and Black Bee Hot Sauce was born.    The results are layered, flavorful, and surprising: in his first blend, the tropical sugars of pineapple and coconut marry with the earthy zing of ginger and the high-note heat of habanero to create a golden-hued hot sauce with complexity, balance, and tang you can't find anywhere else.  Food is about so much more than sustenance.  It's about culture, togetherness, and delight.  As a born-and-raised Californian, he keeps the energy in the kitchen mellow and light—every recipe benefits from laughter and good cheer.  His mission is to bring his signature, garden-fresh, nothing-like-it flavor to happy eaters everywhere, one bottle at a time.  With Black Bee Hot Sauce, tasting is believing.  After sampling the product, buyers for specialty markets have eagerly brought "heat you can eat" to their shelves, including Mollie Stones, Eureka Natural Foods and United Markets and the list continues to grow.   These stores are only the beginning.  Your support of this company is powerful and, like hot sauce on the perfect plate, can take something wonderful to the next level.   We truly appreciate each and every customer and we humbly thank you for being a part of the Black Bee story!

name: Blake's
description: Launched in 2018 to create better-for-you Allergy-Friendly Snacks.

name: Blanc Beauty
description: In 2019 I was using a giant tub of coconut oil from Costco to remove my makeup — and it worked beautifully. My skin had never looked better. It cleared my acne, nourished my skin, and left me glowing. But it was also messy and kept clogging our drains. I thought, "There has to be a better way." That thought became the seed of Blanc Beauty. After 6 years of closed doors, one finally opened and that's why we are here today. This is the first ever oil based flow pack makeup remover wipe.

name: BLDG Active
description: Founded in 2017 by Justin Gardner, who has 20 years in the wound care field. What started as a solution to surf rashes and injuries, turned into so much more.  Seeking to only have the best ingredients and results for families worldwide.

name: Blended Organics, Inc. dba Den and Ken
description: Our journey began in 2020 with the launch of Blended Naturals, a kids' juice brand that quickly grew to placement in more than 8,000 retail stores, including Kroger, ALDI, H-E-B, and Dollar Tree. You can still see that brand today at drinkblended.com. Blended Naturals was the first kids' juice to include real organic fruits and vegetables in every box, giving parents a cleaner, better option in the juice aisle.From this foundation, we saw a new opportunity to bring even more fun and excitement to kids' juice. While parents value organic, transparent ingredients, kids want bold flavors they can get excited about. That inspired the creation of Den&Ken, a brand designed to reimagine kids' juice with candy-inspired flavors that stand out from the traditional apple, grape, and fruit punch.Den&Ken offers flavors like Cotton Candy Cloudburst, Gummy Bear Blast, Rainbow Swirl Rush, and Sour Belt Smash — playful, imaginative tastes paired with organic ingredients and nothing artificial. Each juice box is USDA Organic, gluten free, low in calories, and made with real fruit plus added Vitamin C.Our team also produces all of Kroger's Simple Truth kids' juice boxes, distributed in 2,500 stores nationwide, ensuring we can deliver at scale with quality and consistency. Den&Ken is the next step in our mission: juice boxes that are playful for kids and trustworthy for families.

name: Blentech Corporation
description: Blentech, based in Sonoma County, designs and manufactures custom food processing equipment, systems, and software. We focus on creating durable, high-quality solutions that deliver functionality, sanitary design, and performance for decades. Our expertise in process engineering and automation, combined with patented manufacturing machinery and techniques, ensures superior processing technology and long-term value.

name: BLG
description: We offer carrageenan, konjac gum, agar-agar, pectin, citrus fiber, LBG, xanthan gum, gellan gum, curdlan, hydrocolloids.BLG Hydrocolloid Technology Research Center composed of experienced engineers and professional application scientific research personnel provides innovative product texture solutions and premium services for customers in food, beverage, daily chemical, pharmaceutical and other industries by using advanced production process and application solutions. We have established in-depth cooperation with admirable counterparts in the industry, large domestic and foreign scientific research institutions, and colleges and universities, aiming to explore and solve the problems that have plagued the progress of the industry for a long time, so that while improving product texture, hydrophilic colloids can greatly enrich human beings Life.

name: Blue Hour
description: After several years of groundwork, a sold-out beta and a rebrand, Blue Hour was founded in 2024 in New York with a commitment to removing barriers to becoming the best version of yourself, one tasty & easy breakfast at a time. The brand is inspired by that special time of the day just before sunrise, abuzz with possibility and the promise of a fresh start.Our founder Senem Yaman was compelled to solve a problem she experienced first hand: while working early mornings and late nights in a demanding job, skipping breakfast caused sluggishness and compromised her work performance. Turns out she wasn't alone; studies show a significant difference in productivity, focus, and energy levels between those who start the day with a healthy breakfast and those who don't. In this context, breakfast becomes a competitive advantage on the path to self-actualization.To us, it is simply unacceptable that so many are disadvantaged by something as basic as the lack of a nourishing start to the day - this is why we are deeply passionate about solving this problem. Blue Hour is our small contribution to leveling the playing field: a delicious, smart tool to set yourself up for success every morning.

name: Blue Label Packaging Company
description: Blue Label Packaging Company delivers premium custom labels and printed cans that help brands make an unforgettable first impression. With no minimums, a 5‑day turnaround, and a wide range of materials and finish options, we give you the tools to elevate your product on the shelf.We combine advanced printing technology with dedicated customer service to create packaging that stands out and stand up to real‑world use.

name: BLUE MONKEY
description: Blue Monkey Tropical Collection of beverages are all-natural, not from concentrate, made from single source juice with no preservatives or additives. Sustainably sourced and naturally non-gmo.

name: Blue Standard Inc.
description: We are founded on 20+ years of material science and innovative manufacutring processes with our roots in B2B, and fashion, we developed our proprietary materials using agricultural waste in a global effort to replace petroleum plastics, and other unsavory materials with healthier, safer, sustainable, and natural materials. We have a strong focus on children's toys, pet products, home and garden products, and agricultural products, where our materials can have the most profound and impactful out-comes on the products you and I use everyday.

name: Blue Zones Kitchen
description: The Blue Zones are regions of the world known for longevity, with high concentrations of centenarians living active, happy, vibrant lives. After the first decade of research, Dan Buettner published the first Blue Zones book in 2008 which has kicked off hundreds of articles, interviews, TED talks and speaking engagements. Some of the longevity principles discovered involve food, leading Buettner to publish Blue Zones Kitchen, a cookbook filled with culture, stories and recipes. Now we bring Blue Zones Kitchen to market with meals inspired by the recipes, ingredients and cultures of the blue zones.

name: Bluebonnet Nutrition Corp.
description: For 35 years, Bluebonnet has been a trusted leader in the health and wellness industry, dedicated to supporting healthier lives through high-quality nutritional supplements. 	At the core of our commitment to excellence is the way we product our products. Bluebonnet supplements are manufactured in our own NSF Certified,  cGMP-compliant facility, ensuring the highest standards of quality, safety, and consistency. From sourcing premium kosher, non-GMO ingredients to rigorous testing and quality control in our ANAB ISO/IEC 17025–accredited laboratory, we hold ourselves to the strictest industry standards.

name: Bluegrass Ingredients
description: Bluegrass helps established food manufacturers and entrepreneurs innovate and advance the flavor, form and function of their products and applications.Ingredients, Dairy, Flavor, Spray Drying, Dairy Powders, Innovation, Blending, Research and Development, and Product Development

name: BLUESEEDS
description: Blueseeds was established in 2016, creating Taiwan’s only fully integrated herb industry chain. We are committed to developing all-natural, high-quality products, offering a unique fragrance experience that connects production, environmental friendliness, and social contribution, creating a virtuous cycle together with our users.100% Botanical PurityWe believe that true beauty requires no synthetic intervention. Our formulations are governed by a radical standard: 0% artificial chemicals and 100% natural extracts. The Soapwort Revolution: We have replaced synthetic surfactants (SLS/SLES) with organic Soapwort, a prehistoric natural cleanser that is fully biodegradable, protecting both your skin and the ocean from endocrine disruptors.Natural FarmingOur herbs are grown in Taitung using Natural Farming. We intervene as little as possible—no fertilizers, no pesticides, and no weeding.Resilience in Bloom: By allowing plants to compete with nature and withstand the Pacific sea breeze, they develop higher bio-activity and more complex aromatic profiles.Zero-Pollution Ecosystem: This method restores soil health, sequesters carbon, and ensures that every harvest leaves the earth healthier than we found it.Visually Impaired FormulatorsFragrance is a language felt by the heart. Through our Me-Lab Project, we train and empower visually impaired formulators. Though they lack sight, our formulators possess an extraordinary, undistracted sense of smell. We are dedicated to providing a professional stage where they can master their craft, transforming their unique sensory gifts into a lifelong career with dignity.

name: Blueshift Nutrition
description: Blueshift started as the solution to a problem: Founder and CEO Paal Gisholt has five kids and decided he doesn't just want to be around for them – he wants to be skiing with them into his 90s! But after a visit to a longevity specialist left him choking down handfuls of supplement pills every day, he knew there had to be a better way. The result became Blueshift Superblends – the next generation of nutritional supplements. Blueshift Superblends are the most robust functional beverages on the market, delivering breakthrough formulations enabled by a proprietary, game-changing innovation in flavor technology. Our Superblends pack up to 10x more nutrients than supplement pills or gummies and address a range of 10+ consumer needs, from focus to sleep to recovery and more. We do all of this without added sugar or artificial flavors; instead we utilize real organic fruits and light levels of monk fruit and stevia to produce a “much-less-sweet” flavor profile. Our products are already trusted by leading retailers such as Sprouts, Fresh Thyme, Vitamin Shoppe, Harris Teeter, and Grove Collaborative, as well as top-tier hospitality partners like Hyatt, Marriott, and MGM Resorts. Winner of 15 Delicious Living Awards 2024-2026, more than any other supplement brand.

name: Blume Supply Inc.
description: Blume was founded in 2017, but Karen Danudjaja's superfood journey started in commercial realty — a culture built around coffee meetings, like many are. With drinks made entirely from espresso and syrups, it began affecting her digestion, sleep and hormone balance. There was nothing on the cafe menu that tasted great and actually did something good for your body. Then, when she turned to the wellness aisle for support, she found the messaging to be too clinical and confusing, and the products too expensive.That's where Blume was born--a simple way to enhance your daily rituals with functional ingredients that fill your cup. Blume is making health options no-compromise, accessible, and flavour first.

name: BNH
description: Over a decade ago, our founder experienced firsthand the limitations of modern medical treatments while supporting a family member battling cancer. This life-changing journey sparked a deep search for natural alternatives, drawing upon traditional remedies passed down through generations.  BioNatureHealth Inc. (BNH) was founded to bridge the gap between tradition and science, transforming time-tested wisdom into innovative modern health solutions.At BNH, our slogan is: "By Nature, be Healthy,”  Every product reflects our commitment to providing natural, effective health essentials crafted with carefully selected ingredients to seamlessly integrate into daily life. Whether it’s empowering vision, promoting better sleep, assisting digestion, supporting memory, increasing sexual intimacy, uplifting mood, or improving overall wellness, our natural health products are tailored to meet a variety of needs. We’re dedicated to empowering individuals to live healthier, fuller lives by providing solutions that are as effective as they are natural.Our products are designed to support wellness, addressing the root causes of health challenges. By combining the healing power of nature with cutting-edge biotechnology, we deliver fast-acting relief and lasting wellness. At BNH, “We offer staples, not just supplements,” because health essentials should be a natural part of daily life.

name: Bob Snail
description: Established in 2016, Bob Snail takes pride in being a standout manufacturer, crafting wholesome treats with no added sugar, preservatives, or colorants.Bob Snail treats showcase a simple blend – pure fruit and berries, free from added sugars or artificial additives. We're committed to delivering snacks that are both straightforward and nourishing.Our production adheres to the highest standards, certified in IFS and ISO 22000/ISO 9001. With a dedicated focus on excellence, we consistently refine production processes and expand capacity to meet our customers' needs.At the heart of our efforts is a mission to enhance happiness and well-being through clean and enjoyable nutrition. We welcome you to join us on this journey, contributing positively to well-being on a global scale.

name: Bob's Red Mill Natural Foods
description: Complete selection of stone ground natural, organic and kosher whole grain flours, cereals, meals, mixes, seeds, and beans. More than 50 Gluten-Free products.

name: Boba Beverage Innovations LLC
description: At Boba Beverage Innovations, we create simple, scalable ways for anyone to enjoy boba anytime, anywhere.From our patented boba straw that transforms any RTD drink into a boba experience, to our boba cup that makes it easy to mix and enjoy fresh boba creations, we're redefining what's possible in beverages.

name: Boba Tea Protein
description: Boba Tea Protein makes the healthiest boba tea in the most authentic way possible by using real ingredients to create authentic powdered blends that taste as delicious as they are wholesome.Each serving comes with 25g of grass-fed whey protein isolate, sweetened with zero-calorie natural sweeteners, and is made with real ingredients such as black tea, matcha, and real taro root, which not only capture a truly authentic taste, but also makes you feel like you’re consuming real food.What sets us apart:Deliciously authentic powdered beverages.Unique Asian-inspired SKU set.Successful DTC brand.25 grams of protein.2-4 grams of fat, 3-6 grams of carbs.Naturally sweetened with monk fruitNo added sugarNo artificial ingredientsWhat we're looking for:We're a successful DTC brands with millions of social impressions per month.We're now prepared to enter into retail mainly natural grocery retailers.Come on by, sip delicious boba, and let's chat!

name: Bobelo
description: Bobelo was founded in 2019 with a bold mission: to transform how we hydrate by blending wellness, sustainability, and flavor into a single, innovative experience. It all began when our founder envisioned a healthier, more environmentally friendly alternative to traditional sugary drinks. Inspired by the idea of "generosity in bubbles," Bobelo was born—a name that embodies our commitment to positive change and a healthier lifestyle.Our journey started with a simple yet powerful question: What if wellness could be both delicious and sustainable? With this in mind, we developed the world's first portable beverage system that uses self-carbonating packets to create fresh, bubbly drinks infused with vitamins, natural flavors, and no added sugars. The result is a refreshing, guilt-free drink that's as good for your body as it is for the planet.At the heart of Bobelo is the belief that small, positive choices can lead to big, meaningful changes. That's why we designed our product to reduce single-use plastic waste while providing a convenient alternative to sugary sodas. Our double-walled, insulated Bobelo bottles and reusable lids are not just functional but a symbol of our dedication to sustainability.In just a few years, Bobelo has grown into a community of like-minded individuals who prioritize health and wellness without compromising on taste or convenience. Our journey has been fueled by passion, innovation, and the support of customers who share our vision. From humble beginnings, Bobelo continues to redefine what it means to drink better—not just for ourselves but for the world we live in.Every Bobelo product carries the essence of our story: a dedication to positive change, one bubble at a time. We're proud to share this journey with you as we inspire healthier, more sustainable living for generations to come.

name: Bocon s.r.l.
description: In 1987, Luca and Donatella, a couple of entrepreneurs with a great food and wine culture, founded Bocon and started processing fresh spinach and selling it to major food manufacturers in Italy. Always keeping their philosophy of "starting from fresh", in 1992 they started producing frozen baked meals like "Pasqualina": a typical Italian savory pie filled with ricotta and spinach.In the following years, they expanded the product range, adding IQF Risotto and Gnocchi and they gained distribution under the Bocon brand and Private Labels.The story of Bocon changed again when the US market opened its door to their Gnocchi, which secured long-lasting relationships with major US retailers, that now trust Bocon for their Private Labels frozen meals.In 2022 Bocon decided to open its US office to improve its service to American customers and further expand its presence in the market while launching a new line of typical Italian products that take consumers on a culinary journey through the wonders of Italian cuisine.

name: BodyHealth
description: BodyHealth was born out of the needs of the largest integrative health clinic in the US.​Overseeing patients ranging from those with the most severe conditions all the way to Olympic athletes who must maintain peak performance, supplements were needed to fill the gaps in what existed that were both extremely safe and non-toxic, and at the same time extremely effective.​Every BodyHealth supplement is precisely formulated and tested, using only the highest quality and most effective ingredients.

name: Boiron
description: More than 90 years ago, twin brothers and pharmacists Jean and Henri Boiron set out to develop a way to prepare reliable homeopathic medicines for their patients. Today, as world leader in homeopathic medicines, we continue as an independent pharmaceutical laboratory that prides itself on quality manufacturing and responsible environmental practices. We are still operated by the Boiron family who continues to be passionate about integrating the benefits of homeopathic medicine into daily life. Our vision of health care puts people at its center and we are always looking for innovative ways to help improve the quality of their everyday lives. We are committed to educating the public on the many benefits homeopathy has to offer and the necessity of modern medicine to heal without harm.

name: Boka
description: Boka was started in 2015 by the former president of American Dental Accessories with the goal of taking a more mindful approach to oral care. Boka, loosely translated to "mouth," focuses on the ingredients and efficacy of each of its products. We stand for Science-Backed Wellness, Elevating the Everyday, and Creating Innovation for Good. We know that a healthy mouth is a crucial part of overall health.

name: Bollygood
description: Bollygood is a woman and minority-owned sparkling lemonade and limeade beverage brand bringing globally inspired citrus flavors and South Asian traditions into a fast-growing better-for-you segment. By reimagining the vibrant, refreshing taste of Nimbu Pani with real juice and clean-label ingredients, we meet the rising demand from shoppers for premium beverages that offer both cultural discovery and lighter refreshment. Bollygood delivers a distinctive flavor experience and a compelling point of difference for retailers seeking growth in the beverage set.

name: BOMBOM
description: Born in London in 2022, our brand redefines Korean sauce for the global table. From the very beginning, we set out to create something different—premium Korean flavors thoughtfully designed for North American and European markets. Every detail is intentional: balanced taste profiles, clean ingredients, and a refined, contemporary positioning that speaks to today’s global consumer.Our story quickly resonated beyond the kitchen. Featured in VOGUE and The Guardian, our sauce has been recognized by influential voices shaping international food and lifestyle culture. What began as a bold idea in London became part of a wider culinary conversation.Today, our products are trusted by leading retailers including Whole Foods Market UK, Ocado UK, Costco UK, and The Fresh Market across the Eastern United States. These partnerships reflect not only our quality standards, but also our readiness to scale within competitive global markets.We were honored with the Great Taste Award—one of the world’s most respected food accolades. Recognized for exceptional quality and simply delicious flavor, our sauce doesn’t just win awards; it wins customers.Premium Korean Sauce for Global Markets

name: Bon AppéSweet Chocolate & Beyond Milk Chocolate
description: We've created delicious date-sweetened chocolate that has zero added sugar, zero sugar alcohols, and zero stevia. All of our chocolate contains only 3-5 organic, Kosher, ethically-sourced, dairy-free, gluten-free ingredients. We were featuredon Shark Tank in January and the Sharks LOVED our chocolate. We offer everything from chocolate bars to chocolate syrup!

name: Bonafide Provisions
description: Bonafide Provisions was founded in 2011 by Sharon Brown, a Clinical Nutritionist, and her husband, Reb Brown, a chef, who used food as medicine to transform the health of her son and thousands of her nutrition clients across the country. At Bonafide Provisions, we believe that food can change lives and we are committed to making all Bonafide Provisions products the same way you would in your own kitchen – NO shortcuts, NO funky ingredients, ever. Our award-winning line of certified organic bone broths, cooking broths, paleo soups, and wellness cups to-go are made with only the highest quality ingredients to deliver delicious, wellness-promoting foods that you will love to eat!

name: BonBon NYC
description: The magical world of BonBon was founded in 2017 by friends Bobby, Leo and Selim to sweeten and revolutionize the US candy world; through a love for their homeland and its sweet and savory treats. On our journey since launching our Lower East Side retail location, community events and online efforts; we have become the bona fide destination for anyone with a sweet or savory tooth for Scandinavian treats.  We import all products ourselves from Sweden, this way we can always ensure quality and the highest standards as set by real-life Oompa Loompa's on site in Sweden and New York.

name: Bone Suckin’ Sauce
description: Bone Suckin’ Sauce® is a family-owned, clean-label condiment brand founded in Raleigh, North Carolina in 1992. What began as a Western North Carolina–style barbecue sauce has grown into a globally distributed portfolio of award-winning sauces, mustards, seasonings, and snacks.New for 2026, Bone Suckin’ Sauce® is introducing Eastern Vinegar BBQ Sauce—a tangy, pepper-forward, whole-hog–style sauce rooted in Eastern North Carolina barbecue tradition, bringing authentic regional flavor to modern retail and foodservice-adjacent sets.All products are made with simple, recognizable ingredients and are Non-GMO, Gluten Free, Kosher, and contain No High Fructose Corn Syrup. The brand is known for bold, balanced flavor profiles that drive strong repeat purchase across multiple retail channels.Today, Bone Suckin’ Sauce® is sold throughout the U.S. and exported to 80+ countries, with proven velocity in grocery, specialty, club, hardware, farm & ranch, and e-commerce channels. The company partners with retailers, distributors, and importers seeking a trusted U.S. brand with strong margins, scalable supply, and a compelling family-owned story.

name: Bonerge Lifescience(Hunan) Co., Ltd
description: Bonerge is an innovative manufacturer that provides comprehensive turn-key solutions within the fields of the Nutraceutical and Cosmeceutical ingredients industries.Our core focus lies in the discovery and development of ingredients for Ageless Energy, Healthspan and Longevity.1. Main Product Portfolio:• BeFisetin® Fisetin – The first fisetin ingredient to obtain SA-GRAS certification• StanYouth® Urolithin A – Supported by two human clinical studies• EquoYouth® S-Equol – 99% pure S-Equol with SA-GRAS certification• Bonerge‘s  Dihydroberberine – 54× higher bioavailability than standard berberine• QinMito® L-Ergothioneine – Mitochondrial antioxidant protection• Amuctive® Akkermansia – Gut health & metabolic support• NAD+/NMN/NADH Solutions – Energy metabolism & cellular rejuvenation• MitoSober® PQQ – Mitochondrial function support• GlucoVest® (Berberine + Black Ginger) – Metabolic health management2. Bonerge’s Two Innovative Delivery Systems:• WaterSoluble Nano-Lipid Carrier Technology• Self-Emulsifying Softgel System3. Featured Sample Applications at NPEW:• Water-soluble Fisetin• Water soluble Urolithin A• Softgel UrolithinA4. Cosmeceutical Actives:• Oil-soluble L-Ergothioneine• Oil-soluble Pro-Xylane• Oil-soluble Ectoin• Oil-soluble GHK-Cu Peptide• Oil-soluble PDRN

name: Bones Coffee Co.
description: Bones Coffee Company was founded in 2016 by a family who shared a love for Coffee, Art, and Music in Cape Coral, FL.  Literally, from the family dining room table, to the garage to now over 100,000 sq. ft. facility.  This passion for coffee led them to source beans from around the world and roast them in small batches, ensuring the highest quality and freshness.From the bold and colorful packaging designs to the catchy names of each blend, Bones Coffee Company is a true reflection of creativity and passion.

name: BONO USA, Inc.
description: Established in 1934, Bono is Sicily's largest producer of authentic extra virgin olive oil (EVOO). The family-owned company is based in Sciacca – located in the Val Di Mazara – a region coveted for its terroir and considered one of the best in the world to produce high-quality EVOO.

name: Boost Oxygen LLC
description: Boost Oxygen is an American company that has been in business since 2007.  Our product is a convenient source of supplemental oxygen that has countless applications.  Professional and amateur athletes use it during practice and during games, including teams like the Atlanta Falcons football team, the Islanders, Rangers, and other hockey teams, the Yankees, and dozens of other collegiate, high school, and recreational teams.  Senior citizens use it as a lightweight and handy source of supplemental oxygen, and sports enthusiasts ranging from skiers to hikers to golfers keep a canister on hand for to keep them at their best as they pursue their passion.  Available in all 50 states and over a fifty foreign countries, Boost Oxygen is the world's leading supplemental oxygen canister company. Boost Oxygen manufactures 100% natural and completely safe canisters of compressed Aviator's Breathing Oxygen (ABO) for consumer use.

name: Bordertown Retail
description: Since 1990, Bordertown is committed to creating brand growth and engagement through bold displays. Our displays are built to last, proven to perform, and deliver results. We support brands throughout the retail space, helping them grow into a well-known and trusted choice.Increase impulse sales up to 62.8% in 3 months in the with Bordertown's proven creative strategies.

name: Bosanet LLC
description: We offer quality products of better for you category, organic, gluten free, GMO free, offering a better alternative to conventional food products.

name: Botalife Plant Oils
description: Botalife began in 2005 with a simple mission: to close the gap between what consumers expect from natural products and what the market actually delivers.Founded by a pharmacist passionate about medicinal plants and supported by a family of dedicated farmers, Botalife was built on the belief that purity, traceability, and integrity should never be compromised. By combining pharmaceutical knowledge with hands-on farming experience, we created a brand rooted in both science and tradition.Today, Botalife is a family-owned wellness company offering 100% pure, clean-label oils — including organic oregano oil, organic black seed oil, castor oil, and premium essential oils. We focus on transparency, ethical sourcing, and full traceability from seed to bottle.Distributed from our New Jersey warehouse, we proudly support independent retailers across the U.S. and offer both branded and private label solutions.At Botalife, we believe natural products should be honest, effective, and rooted in real relationships — between people, plants, and the land.

name: Botanical Bottles
description: Botanical Bottles, formerly known as CosmeticPack, is a family-owned Company based in Seattle, that provides quality and affordable packaging solutions for Health, Beauty, Personal Care, and more.As a family of travelers, our company has existed under many names through the generations in a variety of places including The United Kingdoms, Ukraine, Bulgaria, India, and Thailand, and of course, The United States.At BotanicalBottles, we are packaging consultants and problem solvers. Don’t hesitate to ask for something you don’t see on our catalog, or request something unique and custom to your product.

name: Botticelli Foods
description: t all started with a dream sparked by a once in a lifetime opportunity.  In 2002, our founders, Joseph and Salvatore Asaro came across an opportunity to bring high-quality olive oil from the most exclusive regions in the Mediterranean to the tri-state market. This opportunity sparked the idea of creating an Italian food brand focused on flavor and quality products. Not knowing what to name their new brand, Joseph and Salvatore sat to brainstorm together, thinking of something meaningful and memorable. They wanted to pay tribute to their ancestors' livelihood, rooted in farming and cultivating in Sicily, Italy. Their ancestors put a lot of time and effort into creating art with their food, and because of this, their recipes survived the test of time. Inspired by these generations-old recipes, Joseph thought of names that have also lasted the test of time. Famed artist Sandro Botticelli came to mind. Thus, Botticelli was born, bridging the gap between the art of Italian fine arts and The Art of Italian Flavor.  After successfully launching their olive oil line and growing it across the tri-state a new opportunity flourished across the desks of Botticelli. The opportunity to venture into a new growing category - Pasta Sauce. They focused on ensuring the sauces were dedicated to tradition and authenticity, so they sourced these pasta sauces straight from Italy and perfected each to taste as homemade as the sauce they grew up with in their Nonna's kitchen. Inspired by the family recipes, the Pasta Sauce line was created and quickly grew to become their staple lineup.  In the beginning of 2020, Salvatore's son Joseph joined the Botticelli Team. Together they crafted a new dream for Botticelli that paid tribute to its history: A goal to have Botticelli provide every home across America with a full mealtime experience to make lasting memories with those they love. Joseph quickly helped Botticelli become a national brand recognized across countless homes in every state. While the company continues to grow rapidly, the goal remains the same-- to bring authentic Italian products made with quality ingredients to families across the world.

name: BOULDER CANYON
description: A leader in the better-for-you snack category, Boulder Canyon was founded as a family company in 1994. The founders wanted to use only select ingredients to make great tasting snacks.
