Boulder Canyon uses premium, North American grown potatoes and is the No. 1 Salty Brand in the Natural Channel.

name: Bovita Health
description: Bovita Health started with a commitment to harnessing nature's most powerful ingredients, beginning with premium colostrum to help people strengthen their gut health, immunity, and overall well-being.

name: Bragg Live Food Products, LLC
description: Paul Bragg realized it more than 100 years ago – that we share a deep natural desire towards "healthy". It was this forward-thinking realization — that our bodies naturally crave a healthy balance — that led Paul to create Bragg Live Foods, America's original health food company.It has evolved into a shared movement for healthier, happier lives. That begins with what we put into our bodies, then flows into other aspects of our lives.With an ever-expanding portfolio of ingredient-led products backed by a century of time-tested wisdom, Bragg remains passionately focused on helping each individual eat better, feel better, and enjoy a more healthful and vibrant life.

name: Brands of Britain
description: Brands of Britain, LLC is an exclusive U.S. importer for a select group of unique and innovative brands. We go to great lengths to source only the finest, all natural products. Our success over the years is due to carefully selecting brands that meet our high standards, delivering them to distributors, retailers and restaurants across the U.S., and backing them with full-service sales and promotional support.

name: Brause
description: We're a German US family-run business that aims to bring back honest, high quality delicious drinks. The recipes are inspired by century old drinks from Northern Europe and we tailored them to the American palate.

name: Bravo Teas & Herbs, Inc
description: Bravo Tea has remained a family business since its start in 2012. We believe in the power of natural remedies and have a strong belief in the protection of the natural world and the gifts that Mother Nature has to give us. We strive to promote a healthy planet while nurturing healthy people.

name: Brazi Bites
description: Brazi Bites was born in the kitchen of husband-and-wife duo Junea Rocha and Cameron MacMullin in 2010 to bring the Brazilian household staple Cheese Bread (Po de Queijo) to the U.S. market. They embarked on a journey to create a new category in frozen and spent the first few years tirelessly knocking on doors, introducing their delicious recipe to consumers one at a time through in-store sampling. In 2015 they appeared on Shark Tank, received multiple offers and massive exposure, which accelerated their growth and built a passionate following. Today, Brazi Bites has grown into a platform for Latin-inspired, better-for-you foods with multiple product lines distributed in over 17,000 stores across natural, conventional, and club channels.

name: Breads and Spreads LLC
description: In Spring 2019, Breads and Spreads began as a small 10'x10' booth setup at local farmers markets, presenting on Saturdays and Sundays at multiple locations throughout Southwest Florida providing "Better For You" Muffin Mixes shaped as Breads.Each week, I would conceptualize (4) separate recipes for muffins - 100% Gluten Free - and package them to be sold alongside complimenting Spreads. Examples of these flavors would range from "Everything Bagel Bread" paired with a Small Batch Veggie Cream Cheese to Cornbread with a Homemade Honey Butter our Dragonfruit Cobbler with Tropical Kiwi Spread. This was a way vir Breads and Spreads to differentiate ourselves from other vendors throughout the market that had the monopoly on traditional baked goods. Participating in these Farmers Markets year round gave us an advantage, with the ability to test out many flavors to all different segments of the population. Headquartered in Naples FL -- Naples is a resort town with many snow birds in addition to a vacation destination. Naples is a unique location, but it helped gain a sense of consistency because so many locals are avid consumers supporting small business. People had never seen anything like our stand, keeping it creative and methodically unveiling our flavor lineup a day before the market to our Instagram Following.Seeing as we provided new and rotating flavors each week; 4 "breads" and 4 matching "spreads", this allowed us to flex my creative muscle and test the Market.A lot of direct consumer feedback was given and this ultimately created the foundation of Breads and Spreads. Our lean, scrappy Business model enabled the ability to pivot quickly and remain lean to focus on perfecting the consumer's experience with my products, fine tuning anything that arose either on the spot or before the next farmer's market. We quickly became aware and grew to know our customer base. Ultimately the goal was to craft the perfect sweet treat without compromising taste. Five years and countless cookie trials later, CHEW.F.O. was born! CHEW.F.O. strives to deliver a satisfying, guilt free treat that can be enjoyed by choice rather than constraint.

name: brekki ready-to-eat oats
description: In a world where everyone is doing the absolute most, it's easy to forget to take care of yourself. brekki was created to solve that, drawing on Australian breakfast culture. Where food isn't an afterthought — it's an essential daily routine of preparing wholesome, healthy ingredients and thoughtfully enjoying the time to eat.

name: Brenntag Food & Nutrition
description: We’re your professional, trustworthy partner in all aspects of the Food & Nutrition. We’re proud of our broad global presence, combined with our strong local teams with knowledge in all industry segments.Quality assurance and sustainability drive us, as we simplify complexities in the industry for our customers. With a complete supplier and outstanding Food & Nutrition ingredient portfolio, and added services such as technical support, regulatory guidance and market insights, we provide flexible, end-to-end food solutions that always meet your needs.At our 31 Innovation & Application Centers worldwide, our experts combine know-how with innovation and creativity. We never stop learning, always keeping up to date with the latest market information, insights and concepts, building upon our expertise and focus.

name: Brenton Way
description: We are your future future peace of mind growth marketing agency helping Health, Wellness, CPG, & Ecommerce brands scale through unique campaign strategies.

name: Brevis LTD
description: Brevis is a leading player in the Balkan agricultural industry. Our company boasts a team of highly educated agronomists and specialists who take care of our products from seed for planting to shipment. We are a reliable supplier with certifications such as BRC, IFS, ISO, Kosher, Halal, FDA, and HACCP. Our focus is on sunflower inshells, sunflower kernels, pumpkin seeds, bird food, corn, and wheat. We strive to improve our production process, expand our range of products, and incorporate the latest technologies to meet clients' needs.

name: Brez
description: After years of drinking, we realized that alcohol isn't the social lubricant we thought it was. The confidence we experience only results in anxiety, and the 'fun' we have usually leads to unavoidable hangovers and regrets the next day.We knew there had to be a solution… something with euphoric, social, relieving, and exciting effects that didn't cause us to harm the ones we love. We couldn't find it, so we decided to create it — and if you're anything like us, we know you'll love it.BRĒZ was created by a small team of dreamers in sunny South Florida with years of experience in the hemp* industry. After partnering with an incredible mixologist who shared a similar passion, we made something incredible. It took a significant amount of iterations and small tweaks but we finally created the drink that truly made us feel the way we wanted alcohol to make us feel. (And it tastes incredible!)That being said, promise us that you'll tell us exactly what you think! It's flavor-forward with a bit of an herbaceous bite at the end. You'll feel the effects about 5-10 minutes after you start sipping, and they'll go away about 1 hour after you finish. A single can is gentle enough for your mom to try, but when stacked, you'll fly. Most feel the clear, social energy from the lion's mane first, followed by the calm relief of the hemp-extracts made federally legal by the 2018 Farm bill.We hope you'll join us on this wild ride. The support that we've already received since launching in early 2023 has already blown us away but your support will make it even sweeter. We can't wait for you to try it!

name: Brien Maple Sweets
description: Since 1956, Brien has mastered maple — transforming a complex, living ingredient into stable, high-performing solutions for manufacturers and premium, shelf-ready products for retail.Maple is volatile. We make it predictable.From bulk ingredients tailored to industrial processes to polished private label and branded retail programs, we deliver consistency, secured supply and technical expertise — directly from the source.Stable. Controlled. Ready to perform.

name: BrightLeaf Tea
description: Hoptonic INC was founded by two restaurant industry friends with a passion for agricultural sustainability and home brewing great teas. Wes and Brian set out to create a distinct and refreshing sparkling beverage made with zero calories, no sugar, and no strange sweeteners.

name: British Columbia Government
description: Trade and Invest BC works with international enterprises to help them build strong connections to the resources, skills and businesses that make British Columbia (B.C.) the natural place to work, live and invest.We are here to match sellers with buyers, investors with opportunities, and companies with talented employees, whether they’re selling products or services to the people of B.C. or working with our local communities to export products worldwide.Our experienced team of trade and investment professionals have access to a global network of representatives in China, Japan, Korea, Southeast Asia, Taiwan, India, Europe, Mexico and the United States.

name: BRO FOOD SUPPLIER
description: BRO FOOD SUPPLIER is a company with a decade of experience, a premium quality supplier founded with the mission of connecting Argentinian organic farmers with the international market. We supply agricultural products from Argentina’s Pampas and other regions under the USDA organic certification standards, in which sustainable production and supply chain traceability are guaranteed. From the beginning, the company has aimed to help producers adopt organic methods and tackle the challenges associated with this sustainable approach. Currently, our operations involve partnerships with more than 18,000 hectares under certified organic standards. Founded by two agricultural engineers with expertise in agribusiness and organic farming, BRO has cultivated a robust network of growers and international buyers focusing on the commercialization of key products within organic rotations, such as soybeans, peanuts, flint corn, sesame, sunflower, among others. Expertise, professionalism, integrity and work ethic are our core values.

name: Broadpro Bio-Tech Inc
description: Broadpro Bio-Tech Inc. is the subsidiary company of Acetar Bio-Tech Inc.

name: Brooklyn Biltong
description: Tender slices of air-dried steak made with 3 base ingredients: Grass-fed Beef | Apple Cider Vinegar | Salt Classic - 3 ingredientsGarlic - 4 ingredientsChili - 4 ingredientsPepper & Coriander - 5 ingredientsLemon & Pepper - 5 ingredientsIncredibly high in protein without the junk.Whole30 Approved, Keto Certified, Zero Sugar.Ability to scale, proven in Costco, launching in Target, on board all America Airline flights in the US, and we're just getting started.

name: Brooklyn Food & Beverage
description: New York City is widely considered one of the most diverse cities inthe world; with people, music, and FOOD from all over! After severalyears of cooking in some of the top restaurants in the city, FounderAlton But noticed that the non-alcoholic beverage pairings wereoften less than inspiring. New York City has some of the best Asiancuisine outside of Asia, only for the meals to be paired with thesame old sodas and soft drinks that every other restaurant in thecity carries.In 2020, Alton and his team made it their mission to change this;They launched Moshi, a sparkling beverage brand made withunique Asian ingredients to pair with the Asian cuisine we all knowand love.

name: Brother's Trading LLC
description: Dear Valued Customers,Thank you for visiting us at Natural Products Expo 2026.Our main booth is located in the North Hall, Booth #N1516.We invite you to stop by and explore our new ginger gummies and new ginger tea.We look forward to seeing you there.Best regards,Gem Gem

name: Brothers International
description: Brothers International Food Holdings, LLC is proud to have an expanded and diverse team comprised of Brothers Ingredients, Brothers All Natural, Dennick FruitSource, Hosh International, and Food Partners divisions. We are full-service direct importers, distributors, and suppliers of bulk packaged ingredients for the food and beverage industry. Brothers Ingredients provides premier, global sourcing for all your fruit ingredients needs, including exotic/tropical/super fruits in all forms including purees, concentrates, frozen, organic, juice, extracts, essences, etc. Brothers-All-Natural fruit crisps are a long-standing leader in the better-for-you snack market. Our unique freeze-dried process keeps fruit super crunchy and delicious without any additives! Visit brothersinternational.com or call (585)-343-3007 for more information or to request samples/pricing.

name: Brown Rice Cafe
description: At Brown Rice Café, we embarked on a journey rooted in a remote village of Nagano, Japan, where co-founder Kakeru Ueno traded city life for a life surrounded by centuries-old charcoal kilns and pristine mountain spring water.Together with co-founder Takeshi Goseki, we developed an artisanal process that transforms 100 % organic brown rice into a powder that evokes the aroma of coffee and the depth of fine chocolate.Our method harnesses the residual heat of a charcoal-fired kiln—free from electricity or gas—to roast each grain to perfection, then mills it slowly to preserve its natural aroma and integrity.What began as a humble experiment has grown into an invitation: to savor the full essence of brown rice, reimagined for the modern palate and inspired by timeless Japanese tradition.

name: Brust Beverage Company
description: As former athletes, we struggled to find a simple protein drink that could help us recover between training sessions and have the energy for classes – let alone one that tasted good. Everything on the market was the same: full of empty calories, complex ingredients, and chalky taste. So, we developed brüst – a protein drink that's made from high quality ingredients and delivers on great taste, giving you the healthy energy you need to conquer your day. brüst is simply a protein packed cold brew coffee that was crafted to help busy individuals power through their day and fuel up while on the go. We did a small scale beta test in 2018 in glass bottles and cold distribution. We did all the production ourselves, manually twisting on each cap. We delivered to each store ourselves as well, out of the trunks of our cars. After many demos we performed on weekends, we heard the positive feedback directly. This gave us teh confidence to scale up in 2019 in large production batches in Tetra Pak bottles.

name: Brutus Bone Broth
description: All natural, human grade bone broth for dogs.  Easy pour on nutrition to boost any existing diet. Woman founded, made in the USA.

name: BSCM FOODS CO., LTD.
description: BSCM Foods Co., Ltd., established in 2010 as a subsidiary of BSCM Group, expands the Group's business into value-added and healthy rice products.After years of R&D, we proudly offer innovative items such as Ready Rice, Rice Milk, and Rice-Essence Energy Drinks.Our mission is to modernize Thai rice, support the heritage of rice farming, and bring high-quality Thai rice products to the world.

name: BUB T LLC
description: BUBLUV is a woman- and minority-founded brand reimagining the boba experience. Each bottle is shelf-stable, clean-label, and built for today’s health-conscious consumer seeking a guilt-free way to enjoy bubble tea at home or on the-go.What sets BUBLUV apart:•	Just 0–1g of sugar per bottle•	Only 20–50 calories per serving•	Features low-carb jelly pearls•	Shelf-stable in a premium glass bottle•	No artificial ingredients•	Sweetened naturally with monk fruit and erythritol•	Brewed with loose leaf tea for authentic tasteWe’re currently available in 3 crave-worthy flavors:•	Black Milk Tea•	Matcha Soy Latte•	Passionfruit Oolong GuavaCome visit us at Booth N1538 (North Hall Level 200)!

name: Bubbies Ice Cream
description: Our founder, Keith Robbins, ﬁrst started slinging scoops for master crafter Pat Mitchell in upstate New York. He opened a scoop shop of his own in 1985 on the island of Oahu, a place where everybody has a smile on their face and sunshine in their hearts. He named it "Bubbies" after his grandmother. In his little scoop shop, Keith spent every waking minute exploring ice cream's delicious possibilities, crafting one delectable flavor at a time. All the while, he drew his inspiration from the surrounding utopia. It wasn't long after tasting mochi that he began perfecting it, too—and perfect it he did.In 2018, we moved from Hawaii to the Mainland for the space to bring mouthwatering mochi to the masses. All these years later, we're still following Keith's daring lead, making the best ice cream from the best ingredients we can find.

name: Buddha Teas, Living Wellness Partners, LLC
description: The founder of Buddha Teas, John Boyd, moved to the US from England, where tea is the drink of choice. Since his relocation, he commonly found that the US lacked the diversity and purity he was looking for. John wanted something healthy, organic, pure, with options geared towards people who are seeking relief from certain health issues. What the entire industry lacked, became a motivation for John. With a desire to create an expanded selection for tea lovers seeking also seeking purity, John became inspired to develop a tea company to fill the gap. He approached his longtime business partner, Nicholas Marier, with an idea to launch an unadulterated, healthy tea company. They teamed up, gathered an exceptional group of talent, and in 2006, Buddha Teas was born.

name: Buddy Biotics
description: We are a premium supplement company that initially catered to humans but recognized a gap in the pet industry. Our company was born out of our deep love for our own furry companions. We understand that a pet's health and vitality are integral to their happiness, which, in turn, profoundly affects you and your family.That's why every ingredient in our products is carefully selected based on scientific research and serves a specific purpose. We are dedicated to enhancing the lives of pets and are unwaveringly focused on delivering tangible results that bring joy to both pets and their owners.

name: Bueno Foods
description: High-quality, authentic Mexican/New Mexican food.  Family-owned and operated since 1951. Bueno does things the traditional way from stone-ground corn tortillas to flame-roasted chiles.    Try our Buenatural tortillas, and tamales and also introducing our new line of frozen stews!!

name: Bulk Superfood Wholesaler
description: Premium Nutrition from the Andes to Your Business! Discover the highest quality organic superfoods with Bulk Superfood Wholesaler — a premium wholesale supplier from Peru, offering 100% USDA Organic, Non-GMO, and Gluten-Free products for distributors and health food retailers across the United States.Our featured products:• Quinoa – grains, flakes, flour, powder, and puffs • Amaranth & Chia – nutrient-dense ancient supergrains • Maca – powder, red and black varieties for natural energy • Cacao – nibs, powder, beans, and more • Ginger & Turmeric – powerful antioxidants for flavor and wellness • Dried fruits – mango, pineapple, blueberries, golden berries • Other superfoods such as Brazil nuts, camu camu, and lucuma Available in bulk formats and ready for resale.Ideal for supermarkets, health stores, restaurants, and food manufacturers looking to offer nutritious, organic, and sustainably sourced products.Quality your customers can trust: full traceability, grown on over 3,000 organic hectares in Peru, supporting more than 1,400 small farmers.Grow your business with authentic, high-quality superfoods — contact us today! 📞 of life.

name: Bulletproof
description: In the early 2000s, Dave Asprey discovered the unique energy boost from a cup of yak-butter tea in Tibet. Unlike typical tea or coffee, this sparked his mission to replicate that body and brain energy back in the U.S. Using grass-fed butter and MCT oil, he created Bulletproof Coffee for sustained energy.In 2009, the recipe was shared on his blog, and with the click of a button, it ignited our journey into a brand focused on traditional and science-backed ingredients to help you feel your best.

name: Bundle x Joy
description: Latina-founded & Female-led petcare start-up.

name: Bunker Specialties
description: Bunker Specialties produces and supplies ingredients to the food and feed industries. By leveraging its farming expertise and processing assets in Argentina, it delivers quality products and customer service excellence.Vertical integration and global reach are at Bunker's core. We farm, process, export, trade, import and distribute agricultural specialty ingredients worldwide, including seeds, grains, legumes, dried fruits, nuts and spices - certified organic and conventional.Apart from direct exports, the sales effort is coupled with local distribution networks in the USA (New Jersey, California, Florida) and the EU (Rotterdam and Valencia). By controlling the entire supply chain, we guarantee full traceability, top quality and competitive prices.Contact us:info@bunkersp.comwww.bunkersp.com

name: Bunnie Cakes
description: Mariana Cortez, a mother of five, founded Bunnie Cakes Vegan Bakery in 2009 with the commitment to providing allergy-friendly options for families when couldn't find an alternative for her first son.For 15 years, Mariana has promised to use clean and safe ingredients, ensuring customers in the South Florida region always receive the highest quality products. In 2022 Mariana decided it was time to expand her business, and had the idea to create Bunnie Cakes Cupcake Batter, the first of its kind. A Ready to Bake batter that will redefine the way people bake.

name: Buono (Thailand) PCL
description: We manufacture and export a variety of frozen products, including gelato, sorbet, non-dairy desserts, novelties, and ready-to-eat meals.Our goal is to help global customers make healthier choices for themselves and their families by offering plant-based, vegan, vegetarian, non-GMO, and trans-fat-free products for everyone.Quality, safety, and traceability are at the center of our business. Our team is dedicated to rigorous R&D, production excellence, and a passion for quality in everything we do.Our Buono and Green & Sunny brands are beloved by global modern eaters looking to bring nutritious, delicious, and authentic Thai flavors to their tables. With our flexible and comprehensive production capabilities, Buono Group is a first-rate private label and co-packing partner for retailers, contract manufacturing customers, and foodservice operators.

name: Burnbrae Farms
description: On March 23, 1891 Joe Hudson signed the deed to a 100-acre farm he purchased in the village of Lyn, Ontario. He called it Burnbrae; 'burn' being the Scottish name for a stream and 'brae' the name for a hillside. A little over 50 years later, his grandsons Joe and Grant introduced egg-laying hens to the dairy farm by purchasing 50 baby chicks for a school project, setting in motion a legacy that continues to flourish. Today, Burnbrae Farms has been proudly suppling eggs and egg products to Canadians for over 80 years.

name: Bushbalm
description: The idea for Bushbalm came about by accident, like many great ideas do. During their honeymoon, one of the founders used an oil "down there" to freshen up, only to realize it had incredible skin benefits, sparking the concept behind the brand.Fast forward a number of years and countless hours of research, Bushbalm was born with a  mission to boost confidence. Today, Bushbalm brings face quality skincare to areas and skin concerns that have seemingly been ignored by the beauty industry. Think the likes of ingrown hairs, razor burn, dark spots, and more.

name: Buske Logistics
description: Buske Logistics is a Top 20 private warehousing 3PL serving Fortune 500 and emerging companies across 41 warehouses in North America. We provide 3PL solutions to many companies, including PepsiCo, Starbucks, Diageo, Beam Suntory, AB InBev, and many more.  Industries we serve:FoodBeverageCPGNutraceuticalsHealth and wellnessPet careServices:Custom contract logisticsWarehousingE-commerce fulfillmentValued-added logistics (e.g., retail displays, kitting, co-packing, etc.)Case pickContract transportation shuttles

name: BUYO Bioplastics
description: Our story starts from Earth and ends with Earth. We are a pioneer in transforming bio-residues from agriculture and food production into plastic alternatives which fully compost in Earth and leave behind no toxicity.A truly sustainable brand behind brands, BUYO offers tailor-made material solutions for a wide range of industries, from consumer goods, packaging to industrial manufacturing and medical. By turning waste into cutting edge bio-materials, we offer a turnkey solution for our customers to achieve strategic goals in:- Circular Economy and Waste Upcycling- Plastic and Environmental Footprint Reduction- Planet and People Protection

name: Byte'm LLC
description: Byte'm makes the world's first premium shelf-stable brownie bite. The company was founded by best friend's Jack and Jacob and the recipe is based off Jack's mom's legendary recipe. The brownies focus on taste and texture more akin to a premium bakery brownie and includes toppings like graham cracker and marshmallow on our s'mores that provide a novel consumer experience. Most exciting Byte'm sits at a premium mass pricepoint making it an accessible and affordable snack well below premium alternatives in fresh bakery and with a great shelf-life poised to turn brownies from a once in a while dessert to the next big sweet snack. Having launched just last Valentine's Day Byte'm now sits in more than 1,000 doors nationwide and has sold out numerous times. Make sure to stop by Booth 157 for some truly extraordinary brownies.

name: C.A.P.S. Inc
description: C.A.P.S. Inc. is the industry leader in its design and manufacturing services for providing injection molded dispensing closures and custom plastic packaging. Our line of patented closures, the Supplement Tops, provide an innovative and consumer friendly dispensing feature, as an alternative to the standard CT screw cap closure. C.A.P.S. Inc.’s Supplement Top is designed with a flip-top lid and large oval opening, which allows consumers an easier, more convenient way to dispense your products. The Supplement Tops are offered in 33mm, 38mm, 45mm and 53mm sizes with a variety of color, lining and custom embossing options.

name: Caboo Products
description: Caboo makes traditional paper unnecessary. We make tree-free household products from renewable bamboo. Our products include bath tissue, paper towels, facial tissue, napkins, baby wipes, pet wipes, and flushable wipes. Caboo is soft, strong, and saves trees. It’s up to us to save our butts.Founded in 2012.  Family owned and operated.

name: Cafe Spice
description: Pioneering restaurateur Sushil Malhotra and his son Sameer Malhotra had a vision in 2000: Let the bold flavors and tempting aromas of global cuisine power authentic, ready-to-heat-and-eat food for the soul. This commitment to clean and delicious meals is the essence of Cafe Spice, whose story spans decades. The company's heat-and-eat delicacies set the standard for ready-to-eat Indian cuisine by blending homage to a rich culinary history with new, modern tastes featuring the highest-quality natural and fine-dining ingredients. Every bite is satisfying and flavorful, and Cafe Spice features ABF chicken, gluten-free, plant-based, and vegetarian options. Meals are easily accessible across the United States because no matter where you are, there's always room for a little adventure.

name: CAL Marketing, Pty Ltd.
description: C.A.L Marketing stands for Courtney, Anthea and Lenka; a mother and her two daughters. We are a family business headquartered in sunny Sydney, Australia.Originally hailing from green and fertile Macedonia, Lenka and her family made their way down under in the early 1960's.Having grown up in the food industry; her family owned supermarkets and an import and export business, Lenka fast became a pioneer in the contemporary snacking industry in Australia.In 2000, Lenka founded C.A.L, launching with Australian household staple, Snappy Crackers in Woolworths.Since then, Lenka, along with her family, have dedicated their time to sourcing, producing and supplying innovative and indulgent snacks to a global market.

name: Calbee America, Inc.
description: Calbee was founded in Japan in 1949, and quickly grew to become the largest, most well-respected snack food company in the country. In 1970, we introduced Shrimp Chips to a brand-new audience in North America, and people couldn't get enough of their irresistibly savory flavors. Today, you can find many more exciting Calbee offerings in the US, which means there are lots of different ways to enjoy a uniquely delicious, better-for-you snack.

name: California Beverages LLC
description: This beverage creation is not only a manifestation of passion but also an experience designed to meet a specificdemand. Our founder, with nearly three decades of experience in the beverage and snack distribution industry,recognized the need for a refreshing beverage that did not employ inexpensive and potentially harmful ingredients such as corn syrup. Furthermore, it should not be priced at a premium, unlike organic iced teas.There was a demand for a beverage that would offer a refreshing experience at an affordable price; hence, California Life came to life.

name: California Label Products
description: California Label Products (CLP) is a dynamic, experienced label company that can provide you with the labels that you need to efficiently and effectively communicate your product’s branding, health benefits, or nutritional facts. At CLP, we have a myriad of production options at our disposal, for orders of 2,000 labels or 2,000,000 labels, including flexo-press, digital printing, laminating, die cutting, digital cutting, and foil stamping. We pride ourselves being able to evaluate our customers’ business needs and then develop the best choices to meet those requirements.

name: California Milk Advisory Board
description: The California Milk Advisory Board (CMAB), an instrumentality of the California Department of Food and Agriculture, is funded by the state's dairy farm families who lead the nation in sustainable dairy farming practices. With a vision to nourish the world with the wholesome goodness of Real California Milk, the CMAB's programs focus on increasing demand for California's sustainable dairy products in the state, across the U.S. and around the world through advertising, public relations, research, and retail and foodservice promotional programs. For more information and to connect with the CMAB, visit RealCaliforniaMilk.com, Facebook, YouTube, Twitter, Instagram and Pinterest.

name: California Natural Color
description: We are a supplier of fruit and vegetable concentrates, natural colors, and grape seed extract for the food, beverage, and nutraceutical industries. With the support of a strong supply chain beginning in vineyards and fields combined with state-of-the-art technologies for processing and packaging, we can offer unique product solutions. These capabilities and an unwavering commitment to quality resulted in California Natural Color becoming the world’s largest supplier of red anthocyanin colors.We use a variety of fruits and vegetables in our liquid & crystal colors, including red grapes, black carrot, purple sweet potato and other natural sources. We have the largest, most reliable supply of grapes in the world.We began as a supplier of grape juice concentrate nearly a quarter of a century ago. Today, California Natural Color, a division of E. & J. Gallo Winery, continues to grow and change the business of natural colors.

name: California Nutrition Corp.
description: California Nutrition Corp. started in 2011 by looking at the needs of customers to provide the best products available. We research and develop products by testing quality ingredients and how to maximize each ingredient to its' potential. Health is the most important value to us and with that mentality we continue to pursue for excellence.

name: California Walnut Board
description: The California Walnut Board (CWB) represents more than 4,600 California walnut growers and nearly 70 handlers, grown in multi-generational farmers’ family orchards. California walnuts, known for their excellent nutritional value and quality, are shipped around the world all year long, with more than 99% of the walnuts grown in the United States being from California. The CWB, established in 1948, promotes usage of walnuts in the United States through publicity and educational programs. The CWB also provides funding for walnut production, food safety and post-harvest research. To explore recipes and learn more about California walnut growers, industry information and health research, visit walnuts.org.

name: CALIWATER
description: Caliwater is an all-natural functional cactus water beverage founded by actress Vanessa Hudgens and health mogul, Oliver Trevena.  Sourced from the prickly pear cactus in the Sonoran Desert, Caliwater is rich in antioxidants, five naturally occurring electrolytes, vitamins and minerals.  Caliwater transcends the boundaries of mere hydration and provides numerous benefits for health and well-being including immunity support, digestion, and skin health. With a commitment to wellness and sustainability, Caliwater promotes a healthy lifestyle that is good for you– and the planet. Learn more atdrinkcaliwater.com

name: Caloy Oil
description: Caloy is the world’s top tree nut oil manufacturer, producing high-quality almond oil, walnut oil, pistachio oil, and hazelnut oil. We  supply nut oils for a wide range of cosmetic, pharmaceutical, food, and many other applications. Our commitment to quality extends to our sourcing practices, as we procure premium raw materials directly from local farmers and trusted suppliers. Through meticulous management of the entire production chain, we guarantee a consistent and dependable supply of pure, all-natural nut oils to meet the diverse needs of our valued customers.

name: Camille Rose
description: Janell Stephens, founder and CEO of Camille Rose, is, with her husband Johnny, a devoted parent of five children.  When her children were young, they struggled with skin sensitivities. Janell purchased drug store products hoping to break the cycle of itch, scratch and irritation.  She couldn't bear their discomfort but as she read the labels on these treatments, she felt uneasy. She did not want to slather her babies in steroid creams and petroleum-based gels. Janell sought the advice of an herbalist and started reading everything she could on skin conditioning and care.  She went into her kitchen as she believed that what goes on your body should be as good as what goes in it.  She developed nourishing treatments with food grade ingredients. Every ingredient was thoughtfully chosen for the benefit they bring.  She infused her creations with aloe vera, coconut milk, sweet almond milk, honey and castor oil.The more time Janell spent in the kitchen creating these salves the more passionate she became about natural food grade ingredients.  She loved the fragrance and the beautiful  feeling of naturals. Spending hours up to her elbows in moisturizing goodness she noticed her own skin became more radiant.  She saw as her children's scalps were conditioned and soothed their hair became shinier and thicker. She started using these products on herself and sharing them with friends and family. Her friends used to tease her when she'd bring them a new creation calling Janell  The Master Mixtress.  The name stuck.  Ultimately skin care for her own children lead to scalp care and body care and  what she is most well known for?natural hair care. Since 2011 what began as a home remedy has turned into Camille Rose, a thriving purpose-driven black woman owned business of healthy, gourmet- inspired personal care. Janell became a leader in the burgeoning natural hair care movement encouraging women  not to be held to a single standard of beauty but to embrace their own unique beauty.  She's also reached beyond her own kitchen to source global ingredients and chose the best to take into her growing collections.

name: Canadian Hemp Trade Alliance / Fire and Ice
description: Fire+Ice Functional Foods is a company that specializes in producing plant-based protein & dietary fibre powders, hulled hempseed, and Omega-rich 3&6 oils. With over 20 years of experience, our focus is on creating hemp and plant-based products that provide optimal plant-based nutrition for people who aim to lead healthy active lifestyles.  Our plant-based nutritional products are available as both raw bulk ingredients and retail ready CPG’s. We focus on food products made from hemp, flax and fababean crops grown in Western Canada. Our premier product, hulled hempseed, is a result of two decades of hemp breeding, cultivation, and processing expertise. We also offer cold-pressed hempseed oil, yellow hempseed oil manufactured from hulled hempseed, as well as various hemp proteins. Our 60% faba (fava) bean protein has one of the lowest carbon footprints of all protein sources and has a verified 5-log kill step. Additionally, new for 2026 we have redesigned retail products, milled Chia and milled flax products, and a BioActive 80% dietary fibre powder blend of upcycled hemp hulls plus psyllium husk powder.We are a family farm-owned business and take pride in supporting multigenerational family farms. Our vertically integrated ingredients supply chain starts with proprietary planting seed genetics. Our experienced farm producers adhere to sustainable farm-specific best management practices. We utilize state-of-the-art processing facilities to manufacture our ingredients.With Fire+Ice Functional Foods, you can be sure that you are getting high-quality, plant-based products that are good for both you and the environment. From our fields to your table, our mission is to provide optimal plant-based nutrition to help you lead a healthy and active lifestyle. Contact kevin@fireicefoods.com for more information. (www.fireicefoods.com)Come and also learn about our sister company, Fire+Ice Athletics. It is a CBD-based lifestyle brand that offers plant-based products for natural pain and inflammation relief. These products are specifically designed for people with active lifestyles who suffer from pain and inflammation. The Fire+Ice Athletic CBD line includes a range of products, such as CBD pain cream, CBD roll-on, high-potency CBD tinctures, and pharmaceutical-grade CBD pain patches. Our products are infused with Turmeric Curcumin, Arnica, Menthol, Camphor, MSM, Boswellia Serrata, plant essential oils and hemp-derived CBD isolate. Contact kevin@fireandiceathletics.com for more information.  (www.fireandiceathletics.com) River Valley Specialty Farms is a trusted supplier of Ready-to-Eat (RTE) hemp seed.  As both the grower & processor of RTE hemp, we ensure quality and consistency while offering competitive pricing, and prompt service.  River Valley is an early adopter of Gentle Processing: an innovative approach that ensures pathogen-free RTE ingredients.  The Gentle Processing™ method of pasteurization results in a certified, validated 5-log reduction in bacteria, making our hemp seed ideal for RTE food formulations.River Valley manages 3,000 acres in Central Manitoba, perfectly located to grow both organic & conventional hemp seed for bulk ingredient and private label manufacturing.  We continue to adhere to the highest food safety protocols, including GMP and GFSI standards.  All these benefits, and no middlemen, make us a value-added partner in your supply chain.  Contact us for more information!

name: CanPrev
description: CanPrev was founded in 2006, inspired by a deeply personal journey that turned a health crisis into a mission to empower others through natural medicine. Our founder faced the challenges of breast cancer, with her husband, Franco, by her side, they set out to create a company that would not only provide high-quality natural health products but also educate and empower individuals to take charge of their health. Having experienced the healing power of natural remedies firsthand, our founder envisioned a brand that would bridge the gap between patients and practitioners, making naturopathic medicine accessible to all.From day one, CanPrev has been committed to transparency, quality, and collaboration. Each product is carefully developed with a deep understanding of the root causes of health issues, ensuring that only the best ingredients make their way into our formulations. We take great pride in sourcing high-quality ingredients and maintaining rigorous standards for purity and potency, because we believe you deserve nothing less.Over the years, CanPrev has grown into a beloved name in the natural health community, with countless customers sharing their stories of transformation and wellness. Hearing how our products have positively impacted lives is incredibly rewarding and keeps us motivated every day.As we continue this journey, our vision remains clear: to inspire and empower you to reclaim your health through natural solutions. At CanPrev, we're not just a brand; we're a community dedicated to supporting each other in achieving better health and well-being together.

name: Capital Label Company
description: At Capital Label Company, we deliver precision, speed, and reliability for Food & Beverage brands that can’t afford delays. We create custom pressure-sensitive labels with advanced digital embellishment and flexible minimum order quantities for protein, dairy and ice cream, chocolate and confectionery, sauces and marinades, olive oil, baked goods, nutraceuticals, beer, and wine and spirits.With a 98.7% On-Time-In-Full rate and industry-leading quality standards, we keep production lines moving and supply chains on schedule. Our customer support team provides fast, knowledgeable answers and guidance every step of the way.From short runs to national and global distribution, Capital Label Company scales with your business, delivering consistent, premium quality across every SKU, market, and stage of growth. We don’t just meet deadlines; we set the standard for dependability, every time.

name: Caplansky’s Deli Mustard
description: Zane Caplansky started Caplansky's Delicatessen in 2008. Four generations of his family have served deli favorites to the people of Toronto as well as literally millions of visitors. In 2019, Zane started jarring and selling his famous mustards. In 2024, Caplansky's Deli tied with 2 other brands for as the top medal winners at the Wisconsin Worldwide Mustard Competition. Now with both retail and foodservice formats, Caplansky's Deli mustard in great stores and restaurants across Canada and the USA.

name: Captain Danny (Better For You Corporation)
description: Corn-free popcorn? Sounds crazy, right? That’s what we thought — until we made it... and fell in love. We’re three health-conscious siblings who grew up loving snacks, but not how they made us feel — bloated, heavy, and off. So we gave popcorn a better-for-you twist: 100% rice. Non-fried. Corn-free. The result? Light, crunchy, easy on your stomach — without losing that classic popcorn joy. And we’re just getting started. Our mission is to keep twisting classic snacks into feel-good favorites for everyone to enjoy. From our family to yours — enjoy the crunch.

name: Carbonaut
description: CARBONAUT IS ON A MISSION: to go where no low-net-carb meals have gone before.  Come and chat to us about why fiber is the unsung hero of low carb living. At Carbonaut, we’ve created a stellar range of low net carb, high fiber breads, bagels, buns, tortillas, pizza crusts, granolas, and now—finally—fully loaded plant-based wraps designed for today’s low carb consumer. Loaded and wrapped for takeoff, these are complete, crave-worthy wraps packed with out-of-this-world plant-based fillings. Savor five satisfying varieties with 23 to 26 grams of fiber—Philly Cheesesteak, Cheeseburger, Barbacoa, Loaded Nacho, and Thai Red Curry—each with only 8g to 10g net carbs per wrap.

name: Carbone Fine Food
description: Carbone Fine Food was born from the same commitment to exceptional quality that made Carbone restaurant a globally recognized name. Founded by Mario Carbone, Jeff Zalaznik, and Rich Torrisi, the brand was created to bring the restaurant's elevated Italian flavors into home kitchens. In 2020, they partnered with CPG veteran Eric Skae, who played a pivotal role in helping them create the brand and bring their jarred pasta sauces to life. Together, they made it possible for home cooks to enjoy the same high-quality, chef-driven flavors that have made Carbone famous.

name: Cargill
description: Transforming insights & ingredients into impactful solutions.At Cargill, we're innately curious. Intensely driven. And fueled by an unmatched depth of resources to solve your toughest formulation challenges. At booth #559, we'll be spotlighting unique solutions to four of the dominant formulation themes we're seeing: Sugar reduction, sodium reduction, protein content and cost management. Hear first-hand how we approached each challenge, taste marketable solutions and leave inspired. Bring us your biggest hurdles – we'll clear them together!

name: Caribbean Food Delights, Inc.
description: Caribbean Food Delights is the premier brand of Jamaican Patties in the US, if not the world. We manufacture our products using the highest quality ingredients and processes.  We are a minority-owned, family business in its second generation running since 1978! Our parents and founders of this company, Vincent and Jeanette HoSang, immigrated from Jamaica in the late 60s. They met in the Bronx, NY when Vincent was a milkman and Jeanette was pursuing a career in nursing. After getting married and starting a family, they decided to start their own business. They opened a mom-and-pop fried chicken store and then got the idea to serve Jamaican cuisine, including Jamaican patties. With hard work, determination, and a positive attitude, they created their American dream. This remarkable brand and company are just one of the results of that dream. Being tremendously blessed with the fruits of their labor, they have always believed in giving back to the community locally in addition to the Caribbean diaspora.

name: Carlino's
description: In the early 1900s, Grandfather Pasquale came to America, followed by his family, including his daughter-in-law, Angela Carlino, who was known and loved as the famous "Mama Carlino."Mama Carlino and her family opened their first family store in Ardmore, PA, in the 1980s, offering homemade pasta, sauces, and the freshest pastries and cookies. The business flourished and grew over the years to become one of the best-known artisan food businesses in the Philadelphia area, with two gourmet markets and a full catering service.Carlino's, now in its third generation of ownership, remains a frontrunner in artisan food production. Always striving to innovate, Carlino's responded to customer demand for bulk quantities of its most popular products by establishing Carlino's Manufacturing & Importing Co., a wholesale division of its beloved retail stores.Carlino's continues to grow and make strides in the wholesale market, focusing on sourcing the best ingredients and creating and sharing high-quality, clean-label products.

name: Carlson Laboratories, Inc.
description: ABOUT CARLSONWomen Founded, Owned, and Led by the Carlson Family Since 1965.Since 1965, Carlson has been a leader in the vitamin and supplement industry and has won numerous awards for freshness, potency, purity, and flavor. Carlson was founded by Pharmacist Susan Carlson and is still family-owned and female-led today by her two daughters. We take pride in providing families with the highest quality vitamins, minerals, omega-3s, kids' products and other nutritional supplements. The entire Carlson product line is recyclable and 100% plastic neutral, and Carlson is certified by the Women's Business Enterprise National Council (WBENC). For more information, visit carlsonlabs.com.

name: Carmichael's Honey LLC
description: I started the company in 2013 after returning to my home city from a 4 year stay out of state. I left home for treatment due to a severe drug addiction I'm 2009. It took me 2 years to complete a 1 year program, and stayed an additional 2 years to work at the treatment center. During this time my life was transformed and I met my wife back home and moved home and could not find work because of my history. I was raised on a farm and my job was to take care of the bees so I knew about honey. I started hand bottling honey and delivering it to local stores. 13 years later God has blessed us with over 6,000 POD's across the nation.

name: Carow Packaging
description: Carow Packaging opened for business in 1987. From the beginning, we have focused on building success for our clients with exceptional packaging and dispensing solutions. We use only the best materials and glass, the most precise instrumentation and tools, the finest machinery and have developed industry-leading innovations such as our EuroDrop® caps and droppers.We’re a premium supplier of caps, dropper pipettes, glass bottles, pumps and sprayers. But it’s our service-first culture that truly sets us apart. We produce and deliver products with urgency; as a U.S.-based provider, we pride ourselves on fast responses and quick turnaround times. We can even hold inventory in stock for immediate assembly.With our rich history, we have cemented our position as packaging experts. We know your industry. We know your regulations and requirements. And we understand the importance your packaging plays in the customer experience. The only thing more exciting than our history is our future—and the future successes we help our customers achieve.

name: Carozzi North America, Inc.
description: In 2010, the Vivo brand was born as an innovative response to the trend of having a healthier lifestyle. The brand today offers delicious products in multiple food categories: oatmeal, cereals, powdered juices, nectars, pasta, cookies, salted snacks, desserts, fruit pouches and sauces.

name: CartonCraft Inc.
description: CartonCraft Inc. is a leading packaging manufacturer with over 35 years of commitment to innovative, sustainable, high-quality packaging for natural and organic brands across food, beverage, beauty, wellness, personal care, and more. Certified SQF Level 3, ISO 13485, and FSC/SFI, we hold ourselves to the highest standards in quality and environmental responsibility.From folding cartons and rigid boxes to displays, flexible packaging, labels, paper bags, inserts, and storage solutions — we do it all, with an industry-leading 10-day turnaround time to keep your brand moving.

name: Casa Arte Sano
description: Founded in 2023, Casa Arte Sano, crafts healthy snacks with a touch of artisanal magic. Our passion for transforming superfoods into delicious guilt-free indulgence options is fueled by cultural heritage and authentic world traditions. Using natural ingredients and ethical practices, we offer flavorful, nutrition-packed treats that celebrate the essence of global cultures. Join us on this delightful journey and savor the goodness of Casa Arte Sano snacks.

name: Cata-Kor
description: Cata-Kor is a clinically driven longevity brand translating cellular health science into effective daily supplements.Founded after discovering the critical role NAD⁺ plays in energy and aging, Cata-Kor was built to make complex longevity science understandable and accessible.Our formulas focus on innovative, research-backed ingredients that support cellular energy, resilience, and healthy aging, with a commitment to clinical rigor, transparency, and rigorous quality standards.

name: Catalo Natural Health Sciences, Inc.
description: At CATALO, we believe that true wellness shines from the inside out. We aim to meet our customer's every need, and are committed to offering a wide range of supplements made from all-natural, premium and branded ingredients to provide essential nutrients for your body and overall wellbeing.Care:We treat your health as if it were our own, and we take no shortcuts. Our products are formulated by top health professionals following strict guidelines to deliver supplements of the highest quality.Vitality:We are proud to help your family stay fit and full of energy with our products for every health need. Only the best ingredients from nature go into our products. Longevity:We are here to support the lifelong wellness of you and your family, whatever your needs may be.  A strong foundation is the first step to a lifetime of fitness and happiness.

name: CatSpring Yaupon
description: We didn't set out to start a tea company—we set out to listen. To the land, to history, to the people around us. Yaupon has been growing underfoot for centuries, quietly thriving in the Texas landscape, once beloved by indigenous communities and forgotten in modern times. But we knew this resilient little leaf deserved a revival. So, we followed its lead—growing where we were planted, harvesting what was already here, and sharing its goodness with the world.

name: CAULIPOWER
description: CAULIPOWER uses the magic of veggies and the power of taste to reinvent America’s favorite comfort foods. CAULIPOWER's first innovation, cauliflower crust pizza, created a white-hot category in 2017. Today CAULIPOWER is the #1 cauliflower crust pizza and #1 gluten-free pizza in the U.S., and has even been featured as an answer on Jeopardy! In addition to stone-fired cauliflower crust pizzas, the CAULIPOWER family of innovative products now includes cauliflower & chickpea-coated all-natural chicken tenders, nuggets and bites, baked (never fried) cauliflower-crusted pizza bites, and more.

name: Causemedic
description: Our founder, Hugh, knows the difference potent CBD makes to people in pain. When topical after topical failed to relieve his mother's leg spasms, brought on by MS, he was determined to find another way. Working with engineers, he discovered the microencapsulation method to make topicals truly transformative.

name: CBL NATURAL FOODS
description: The CBL Natural Foods (Pvt) Ltd  has a history since 1989.  Our guiding principle behind the company was to give to the customer what nature would give in its own way. This paved the way for organic agriculture and its sustainable practices from its inception.Our state-of-the-art production facility utilizes cutting-edge technologies for extraction, sterilization, and packaging, ensuring the highest quality liquid coconut milk products in Tetra packs, cans, and aseptic packaging formats. Our commitment to quality and sustainability is reflected in our global certifications, including USDA Organic, EU Organic, JAS, KRAV, Naturland, Halal, Kosher, Fairtrade, ISO 22000, ISO 14001, IFS, BRC, and HACCPOur Products Organic Coconut Milk Tetra & Cans Organic Desiccated Coconut Organic Jack Fruit Organic Fruits (Canned, Dried, Dehydrated)

name: CCL Label
description: CCL Label, a division of CCL Industries, has grown from a small Canadian chemical manufacturing business founded in 1951 into the world's largest label and specialty packaging company. Originally named Connecticut Chemicals (Canada) Ltd., the company shifted away from contract manufacturing in the late 1970s and early 1980s—changing its name to CCL Industries in 1979 and listing on the Toronto Stock Exchange in 1980. Through the 1980s and 1990s, CCL expanded into labels and packaging, eventually selling off its original manufacturing operations entirely by 2006. Over the following decades, CCL accelerated its global growth through major acquisitions, including Purbrick (2010), Avery (2013), Worldmark (2015), Checkpoint Systems (2016), and Innovia Films (2016), greatly broadening its capabilities in labels, shrink sleeves, specialty films, and security/technology solutions. Today, CCL Label operates as the company's largest division, with a global footprint of over 200 facilities in 40+ countries, supplying label and packaging solutions to major brands across food and beverage, personal care, healthcare, and consumer goods.

name: CDA USA, Inc.
description: CDA USA is an American manufacture of high quality semi-automatic and fully automated liquid filling, capping, and labeling machines, as well as monoblocs. We are located in Richmond, VA and store all parts in our 25,000 ft² warehouse.We can custom make our machines to perfectly match your needs and our technician will come to install and set it up. We look forward to meeting you and doing live demos at Expo West 2025 in Anaheim, CA!

name: Cedar Valley
description: Cedar Valley is a Canadian food manufacturer of authentic pita chips made with 100% coconut oil. What began as a high school project has turned into a mission to share our family's original recipes, inspired by our heritage in the Beqaa Valley of Lebanon. After receiving a $3,000 grant from his high school, Ameen partnered with his mom, Surria, to bring her homemade Pita Chips to Canadians. From starting in their home kitchen to opening their own 12,000 square-foot production facility in Windsor, ON, their all-natural Pita Chips can now be found in over 2000 grocery stores across north america.

name: Cedar's
description: Our story began in the sunlit kitchens of the Mediterranean, where Hommus is spelled with an "O". Cedar's founder Abe Hanna lovingly perfected the way we make Hommus recipe there—in the old world. He made it the traditional way, with pure ingredients and a simple process. With every bite of Cedar's, you can be sure that you are tasting a piece of our authentic family recipe.

name: Celtic Sea Salt
description: Our founder, the Belgian-American food scientist, Jacques DeLangre, PhD, originated the natural sea salt industry in America and created the Celtic Sea Salt® Brand. Today many salt companies claim to be the original gourmet sea salt company, but go back no further than 2001 or 2002.Jacques wanted to bring the superior health and taste benefits of natural sea salt to his adopted land. Dr. DeLangre was also the first to write a book on the health benefits of natural sea salt. The book was translated into seven different languages.Jacques Delangre revived the traditional way sea salt was harvested, when his book became popular with several doctors. The supply could not keep up with the demand because the salt ponds take at least seven years to produce sea salt that meets our standards. To assure a sufficient supply of Celtic Sea Salt® that lives up to our brand promise, we've carefully expanded the areas where it is sourced.

name: Center for Food Safety
description: For more than 25 years, Center for Food Safety (CFS) has been at the forefront of organizing a powerful food movement that is fighting the industrial model and promoting organic, ecological, and sustainable alternatives. Our mission is to empower people, support farmers, and protect the earth from the harmful impacts of industrial agriculture. Through groundbreaking legal, scientific, and grassroots action, we protect and promote your right to safe food and the environment. CFS's successful legal cases collectively represent a landmark body of case law on food and agricultural issues. Join us in defending our food system!

name: Cento Fine Foods
description: When Alfred Ciccotelli, Sr. (Mr. C) began selling imported Italian food in the 1950s, he didn't view himself as a pioneer, but his goal was simple: to bring authentic Italian foods to local corner stores. Through his vision, hard work, and perseverance, he helped establish what is now one of the most popular food categories in America.Mr. C's journey began in his father's South Philadelphia grocery store. His teenage years were interrupted by World War II, where he served in the Pacific theater, rose to Staff Sergeant, and was honorably discharged in 1946. Upon his return, much had changed. His father had passed away, and the family store had closed. After working a few neighborhood jobs, he was approached by a Philadelphia wholesaler in 1950 that sold candy and tobacco. Within a year, he was promoted to sales manager and began introducing Italian specialties to local stores. However, as the owners refocused on candy and tobacco, they cut back on Italian foods.In 1962, Alanric Food Distributors was born. Although Mr. C lacked start-up resources, he had passion, sacrifice, and a strong belief that American consumers would embrace Italian foods. He built a line of Italian specialties, envisioning a premium brand that reflected the best of Italian culture. He only partnered with associates who shared his motto: "just treat people right."Mr. C's legacy was passed on to the next generation when his sons, Alfred Jr. and Rick, joined the business. Alfred Jr. took his father's vision further, expanding the Cento brand from local grocery stores to national distribution in all 50 states.Today, Mr. C's legacy lives on through Rick and his daughter Gina, who continue to lead the company. Alongside family members, they maintain the same work ethic and commitment to customer satisfaction that Mr. C instilled from the start.

name: CentrixIQ
description: Digital AI consultancy empowering manufacturers and CPG sales teams with intelligent business management technology solutions.

name: Century Systems
description: MANUFACTURER &  DISTRIBUTOR OF LIQUID VITAMINS AND MINERALS. HEALTH AND BEAUTY PRODUCTS INCLUDING THE CLEANER DETOX SYSTEM, VITAROL THE MULTI-VITAMIN YOU CAN FEEL,HEART MIRACLE, LOTION & OILS & WEIGHT LOSS MAINTENANCE

name: Cepham and Cypress Minerals
description: Cepham is NSF-certified manufacturer & distributor of herbal extracts, branded ingredients, and phytochemicals. With its diversified manufacturing bases in India and Africa, Cepham offers a vast array of ingredients. Our research center, Cepham Lifesciences, based in Fulton, MD is dedicated to carry out cutting edge research on life sciences and natural products. Our combined research team has several granted patents and has filed new ones to add to already strong IP portfolio of the company. Our science team authored several research papers and books on natural products which are published by renowned science and academic publication houses.Cepham herbal ingredients include a vast array of Indian Ayurvedic extracts & branded ingredients. We draw upon our research experience in the natural products and to find the most bioactive compounds in herbs. Our ethnobotanists travel the globe looking for the most promising and efficacious herbal solutions for human health goals.

name: Cerebelly, Inc.
description: Our founder has always been in love with the brain. Already a practicing neurosurgeon, she was inspired to go back to school and learn more about how the human brain grows, earning a PhD in Developmental Neurobiology at Stanford. Her mission to find a better treatment for pediatric brain cancer turned into a fascination with understanding the myriad of factors that go into optimal brain development. Becoming a mom at the same time led her to look at her work through a different lens: not only what switches occurred when brain development went wrong, but also what events have to go right to support optimal brain development.  She quickly came to realize that early life nutrition was a critical factor needed to best support the developmental changes rapidly occurring before her. A baby's brain doubles in size by its first year and reaches nearly 80% of development by the age of 5. This critical age window is when the most developmental foundations are forming in the brain, such as seeing, hearing, and memory. After years of development with a team of scientists, doctors, and nutritionists, Cerebelly was created as a natural extension to our founder's work — a first-of-its-kind food brand that satisfies parents, kids & growing brains alike. What you're feeding your child isn't just a tasty treat, it's years of trailblazing well beyond industry norms to provide 16 key brain-supporting nutrients needed for early development. Meticulously sourced, organic vegetable-first formulas with no added sugar, that undergo rigorous testing for heavy metals and harmful toxins every step of the way.

name: Certified Free From Allergens
description: Certified Free From Allergens emerged from decades of deep expertise in food allergy safety and allergen training across the food industry. Our team includes some of the nation's most recognized food allergy experts who have shaped industry standards through advocacy and leadership roles in food safety organizations. When manufacturers approached us to substantiate their allergen-free claims, we recognized the massive disconnect between marketing promises and consumer safety. Today, backed by ISO 17065 and ANAB international accreditation, we help brands gain retailer confidence to secure shelf space while bringing safe allergen-free products to stores everywhere so all families can find them.

name: Ceylon Exports & Trading Pvt Ltd
description: In 2022, Dulara, the founder of Nootz, was becoming more and more disappointed that the wealth of the island nation, Sri Lanka, for all its natural glory and hospitable smiles, was inadequately being taken to the world. Dulara, who started his entrepreneurial foray in 2018 with an acquisition and turnaround of a closing down factory in the Sri Lankan coconut triangle, partnered with Dutch Food Technology Scientists from a grant program – PUM, to take on a bolder and more time-pressing task – to bring the first, pure coconut smoothie – Nootz – to the world.Nootz combines just 3 vegan, organic ingredients from the Sri Lankan tropics. Combining coconut milk with endemic fruit in a novel sequence of technology, Nootz has managed to crack the code to bring you the freshness of home with the convenience of a creamy drink on-the-go.Nootz is currently listed in approximately 400 organic outlets in Germany including Denns Biomarkt and Bio Company. We are also listed in over 200 outlets in Japan including AEON. Furthermore, we sell in other markets such as Sri Lanka, bringing our total footprint to 1000 stores worldwide. We are now listed with Mementa Inc., our distributor in USA.We are driven by the purpose to shake up the value chain and build a fairer world. We make CIRCULARITY the center of everything we do.A. We purchase fruits during the season when the post harvest loss is highest, upwards of 30% as per UNIDO estimates, and keep it cold chain, making sure the farmer gets a fair value and food security of the country is maintained.B. Furthermore, our Nootz patent pending technological steps are the first of its kind, building R&D innovation jobs that share our age-old authentic ingredients in a novel way which the end market desires - vegan, organic and refreshing. This makes sure talent and higher paid jobs stay in the country.C. We are expanding a farmer collective that is sharing regenerative farming know-how, going a step further than organic and fair trade and increasing farmer yields and incomes whilst prioritizing ecosystem health.

name: Ceylon Plant Food (Pvt) Ltd
description: Ceylon Pant Food (pvt) Ltd is a manufacturer and exporter of premium quality value added products of coconut, Spices ,Fruits and Cashew . Sri Lanka, an island rich in coconut plantations and is one of the world's largest producers of coconut-based products. We closely work with our farming community of Sri Lanka to ensure sustainable supply of raw material. We produce high quality Virgin Coconut Oil, Coconut Milk, Desiccated Coconut, in different grades and cuts,  spices, dry fruits, Fruits in can/Jars  of  papaya, Mango, banana & Pineapple . Also, we are certified under Natuland , Fairtrade, Kosher and Halal. Our products are of Certified Organic and Natural standard.

name: Cha's Organics
description: Cha's Organics brings flavour to the table with healing foods sourced on fair terms, in partnership with regenerative organic growers, cultivating empowered and vibrant communities at home and abroad. Founded in 2006 by Chanaka and Marise, who come from opposite sides of the world and know firsthand about the importance of diversity and staying true to one's roots, Cha's Organics offers an array of organic, plant-based and gluten free products sourced from climate-friendly forest gardens, orchards and farms that promote traditional farming methods, biodiversity, improved soil health and resilient crops to feed resilient communities. Passionate about good food and making good things happen in the world, the people behind Cha's Organics look forward to creating a future where all food is traded fairly and grown in a way that protects the environment and the health of consumers and growers.

name: Changsha Comext Biotech Co.,Ltd
description: Come from Nature, for Better Life, Natural Ingredients Made by Comext.

name: CHANTHABURI GLOBAL FOODS.CO.,LTD.
description: **"Fruitura was founded in 2000 with a simple yet powerful idea: to make healthy, natural snacks accessible to everyone. Our journey began when we realized that many people struggle to incorporate healthy foods into their daily lives, especially with busy schedules. We wanted to create a product that was both nutritious and convenient – and freeze-dried fruit was the perfect solution.Driven by a passion for wholesome living and environmental sustainability, we set out to offer the purest fruit in its most natural form, without any additives or preservatives. From the very beginning, we've been committed to using eco-friendly packaging and sustainable practices to ensure that our products benefit both our customers and the planet.Today, Fruitura has grown from a small startup to a brand that is loved by health-conscious consumers around the world, and we continue to innovate to bring even more healthy, sustainable options to the market."**

name: Charbonneaux-Brabant SA
description: Charbonneaux Brabant is a family-owned Group (1797) based in France in the Champagne region with over a century of expertise in manufacturing condiments : mustards, vinegars, dip sauces, salad dressings and oils.The Group counts 11 factories (8 in France, 2 in Italy and 1 in UK). For more than 30 years, we have proudly established our presence in the United States, partnering with distributors such as Sysco, US Food Service, Foodmatch, and White Toque. We supply both under private label and through our own brands, Beaufor and Clovis, which are recognized for their authenticity and premium quality.Our savoir-faire combines tradition with innovation, allowing us to deliver products that are both authentic and perfectly suited to today’s consumers. From our renowned Moutarde de Dijon to our versatile vinegars and gourmet sauces, each item reflects the quality and craftsmanship that have made Charbonneaux Brabant a trusted name in French gastronomy.

name: CharcutNuvo Organic Sausages
description: At Charcutnuvo, we are more than just a sausage company; we are stewards of the land, champions of animal welfare, and pioneers of regenerative practices. For five generations, our family has crafted premium sausages, and now, we are committed to ensuring that our legacy continues to thrive sustainably for the sixth generation and beyond.Our journey begins with our dedication to sourcing the finest ingredients. We proudly partner with 100% grass-fed, grass-finished, certified regenerative organic farms that prioritize soil health, biodiversity, and responsible land management. By eliminating synthetic chemicals and supporting Holistic (Rotational) Grazing practices, we ensure the well-being of both the animals and the land they graze on.We believe in the power of collaboration. By working closely with sustainable farmers and ranchers, we bolster local economies and use resources responsibly while at the same time attacking climate change head on. Our commitment to never using added sugars and minimizing sodium levels reflects our dedication to providing cleaner options for our customers.Our Regenerative Organic Certified Line embodies our pledge to the environment and future generations. We take pride in our regenerative stewardship, which focuses on animal welfare and environmental sustainability. This pledge is not just a promise; it is a testament to our unwavering commitment to making a positive impact on the world.At Charcutnuvo, we honor our rich heritage of sausage-making expertise while embracing innovative practices that prioritize the health of our planet. Join us on our journey to create a better, more sustainable future—one delicious sausage at a time.

name: CHASTE JE WAY INDUSTRIAL CO., LTD.
description: VEGAN SELECT specializes in offering premium plant-based meat products, insisting on using gluten-free ingredients to ensure that every product provides a delicious eat experience. Since 1991, we have been relentlessly pursuing innovation and breakthroughs, making us one of the most popular brands in the plant-based meat industry.

name: Chaucer Foods, Inc.
description: As leaders in baked and freeze-dried sectors, we collaborate with major retail and foodservice brands worldwide, focusing on tailored and responsibly sourced ingredients to help their products stand out.

name: CHEE SENG OIL FACTORY PTE LTD
description: Established in 1943, Chee Seng Oil Factory Pte Ltd has a rich history rooted in the pursuit of excellence. Founded during a time of scarcity, Mr. Lim Tai Tin embarked on a journey that would transform the culinary landscape. In 1956, the company transitioned to producing Premium Pure Roasted Sesame Oil, setting a new standard for quality and flavours preservation.Pioneering the use of advanced machinery in Singapore's sesame oil production, Chee Seng's commitment to product aroma and purity has remained unwavering. Passed down through generations, the company, now under the stewardship of Mr. Lim's grandchildren, has evolved into a global market leader. Its Premium Pure Roasted Sesame Oil has garnered international acclaim, earning Gold Medals from the prestigious International Monde Selection for exceptional product quality and packaging design.Inspired by the founder's legacy of entrepreneurship and innovation, Chee Seng is dedicated to advancing high-quality sesame-based products and expanding its global footprint. In 2023, the company marked a new chapter by relocating to a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility, equipped with cutting-edge technology to enhance oil quality, capacity, productivity, and energy efficiency.Chee Seng is actively pursuing FSSC 22000 Certification by 2024 in its new manufacturing environment, reaffirming its commitment to food safety and quality.

name: Cheekbone Beauty Cosmetics INC
description: In January of 2015, Jenn Harper had the most vivid dream of little Indigenous girls covered in colorful lip glosses. That dream is what gave birth to Cheekbone Beauty, one of the first Canadian Indigenous-owned and founded cosmetics companies.After reconnecting with her Indigenous roots and learning about the effects of residential schools from her grandmother, Jenn set off on her mission to build Cheekbone Beauty and to create a space in the beauty industry where everyone, including Indigenous people, feel represented and seen.The brand officially began in a corner of Jenn's basement in 2016, started with only $500, while she still worked full-time in seafood sales. Cheekbone Beauty became officially incorporated in Canada, and officially founded in 2018. Headquartered in St. Catharines, Ontario, Canada, founder Jenn strives to ensure only the best quality colour cosmetics receive the Cheekbone name."Representation saves lives. This is the core of Cheekbone Beauty." - Jenn Harper.

name: Cheers
description: Our story began in 2014 at Princeton University when our founder, Brooks Powell, read about a natural plant extract called Dihydromyricetin (DHM). DHM had just been discovered to have anti-alcohol properties through animal studies published in the Journal of Neuroscience (this was the first of many, many studies on DHM's relationship to alcohol). Long story short, researchers found that when given DHM, rats showed significantly reduced signs of GABAa rebound – which is the primary reason people don't feel 100% the day after consuming alcohol. Brooks saw this groundbreaking study as an opportunity to test DHM's next-day efficacy on humans and worked with a patent team to conduct a human study. That study showed that participants felt an average of 50% better the next day after taking the formula, and led to the official launch of our first product, an After-Alcohol Aid (now known as Cheers Restore). After we secured a granted patent on our formula, Brooks appeared on Shark Tank, where the pitch was hijacked by Mark Cuban. Soon after that, we raised a funding round of $2.1m on significantly better terms from venture capital investors including NextView Ventures, Fitz Gate Ventures, and Founder Collective.

name: Cheesewich
description: Cheesewich? launched their first 3 original flavors in 2013. The concept was so simple and delicious, they took 2 slices of Wisconsins' Cheddar, Colby Jack or Pepper Jack classics and sandwiched them over 1 slice of premium salami. Within the last 5 years The Cheesewich Factory has added many additional Cheesewich flavors and has created completely new keto, gluten-free, and high-protein award winning products such as Double Play and Baconwich. Our first heat and serve product, Breakfast Taco, has taken off like hot cakes, no pun intended! While not gluten free it boasts 18g of protein and has only 270 calories. Scrambled eggs, Colby Jack cheese, 3 slices of uncured turkey bacon, and a flour tortilla make up our hearty Breakfast Taco, a satisfying and delicious grab 'n go meal! All products made with Proudly Wisconsin Cheese. Check out our newest products ? Mozzarella Cheese with Uncured Salami and Mozzarella Cheese with Uncured Pepperoni.

name: Chef Bobo – Friendly Grains, Ava Organics, Wowza
description: We create lasting brands that people trust by delivering the products they need and enjoy. Our purpose is to bring joy to people's lives through food.
