From allergen-free organic snacks to delectable treats, we strive to create products that make everyday occasions special.  Our passion means we're not set in our ways.  We love uncovering surprising spices and dreaming up new flavor combinations. And we constantly search the globe for inspiration, so we can create unique items that bring joy to people's lives every day.  We are committed to creating trustworthy brands that your entire family can enjoy.

name: Chef Hak's
description: From Our Home Kitchen To Yours:Created by Food Network personality and MasterChef star Sharone Hakman, Chef Hak’s is for food lovers that want home-cooked meals but could use an extra set of hands in the kitchen. Each one of our products started out as a tried-and-true weekly staple in Sharone’s busy household. Now, those same family favorites are available for everyone, bringing chef-crafted flavor and a little extra help into kitchens everywhere. We hope you’ll love them as much as we do.Our chef-curated organic food consists of ready-to-eat fully cooked meals, heat & eat proteins and veggie side dishes, frozen veggies and entrees, soups, BBQ sauces, salad dressings and more. Rooted in integrity, transparency, and mindful ingredient sourcing, Chef Hak's prioritizes quality and convenience in every product.

name: CHEF SEASONS
description: Chef Seasons began its flavorful journey in 2009 with a simple yet powerful vision: to transform everyday ingredients into extraordinary culinary experiences. Founded in Turkey, a land rich in cultural heritage and diverse flavors, we set out to bring this richness to tables around the world.Our story started with a commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation. From the very beginning, we embraced cutting-edge food safety standards and creative packaging solutions, earning recognition for our dedication to excellence. With passion as our driving force, we introduced unique spice blends and sauces that quickly gained international acclaim.As we grew, we stayed true to our roots while expanding globally. Chef Seasons became a trailblazer, exporting to over 45 countries and proudly earning 18 prestigious SIAL Innovation Awards and Sial For Change CSR Award, showcasing our ability to revolutionize the industry.Our inspiration comes from the people we serve and the cultures we celebrate. Whether it's a bold Superfood sauces or a delicate Longevity blends, each product reflects our belief in the power of flavor to connect people and create memorable moments.Sustainability is at the heart of our journey. From using 100% renewable energy in our production to planting thousands of trees annually, we prioritize caring for the planet as much as delighting taste buds.Today, Chef Seasons stands as a global brand with deep local roots, leading the industry with bold ideas and a dedication to making a difference. Every product we create tells a story of passion, purpose, and innovation.From our humble beginnings to becoming a trusted name in culinary innovation, we remain committed to crafting flavors that go beyond taste, leaving a meaningful impact on people's lives. At Chef Seasons, we don't just create products—we inspire experiences that bring joy, connection, and sustainability to the world.

name: Chemical Elixir Pty Ltd
description: "Founded in 2015, SimplyClean was joined by its new owners in 2024, who embraced the brand's mission and relocated from Sydney to the serene Northern Rivers of New South Wales."They were inspired by the natural beauty around us—a desire to live cleaner, healthier lives, closer to nature.It was here that they set out on a mission to continue and Expand bringing safe, natural cleaning products to Australian homes and now Overseas in countries like United States of America

name: Chengzhi Life Science Co., Ltd.
description: Chengzhi Life Science Co., Ltd. is dedicated to the research and industrial application of frontier synthetic biology technologies, establishing three major technical platforms: microbial fermentation, enzymatic catalysis, and high-efficiency separation and purification. It has complete intellectual property rights in the manufacturing and application of D-Ribose, and is an internationally leading innovative multinational enterprise.Jiangxi Chengzhi Bioengineering Co., Ltd. is a manufacturing base for the industrialization of life sciences, specializing in the industrialization of synthetic biology. It has established four core product lines: Ribose，Mannose，High-end functional amino acids and active peptides and SAMe. It is committed to becoming a core raw material supplier in the global field of life, health, and nutrition.

name: Cherry Central
description: From our farms to your table. Cherry Central is a farmer-owned cooperative that grows a variety of premium fruits for retailers worldwide.Our first products — mainly cherries and plums — were grown by five small Michigan farmers. Over the years, this passion grew into apples, cranberries, blueberries, and more. Today, hundreds of small family farms are providing high-quality, nutritious products to people all over the world.After developing a variety of popular consumer packaged goods for retail, including Indian Summer juices, Cherry Central had the desire to put their brands under one umbrella. This is when fruitHaven was born in 2021. From functional beverages to dried fruits, fruitHaven looks to continue to grow with additional product lines globally.

name: Chief Nutrition
description: We started in 2014 out of the need to find healthy products that one of our co-founders could take on a 96km mountainous hike called Kokoda. She is a Nutritionist and Exercise Physiologist so she has high standards and knows what to look for to fuel her body. Unfortunately, there was nothing that met those standards so we decided to build a brand to do so. Since then we have grown not only our product portfolio but our following from elite athletes to weekend warriors and the general public who are looking for products that "Big Food" don't have. Our brand is now well established in Australia with over 5000 retail outlets stocking the brand and we export to New Zealand, Hong Kong, Singapore, Thailand and the Middle East.

name: Chike Nutrition
description: Chike Nutrition was founded on the belief that the healthy decision should also be a delicious choice. Chike Protein Iced Coffee launched in 2016 as the original protein coffee and serves as a healthy alternative to sugary, coffeehouse drinks, and makes the perfect breakfast, pre-or post-workout snack, or anytime pick-me-up.

name: Childlife Essentials
description: ChildLife Essentials was founded in 2000 by Dr. Murray Clarke, a pioneering pediatric naturopath. Dr. Clarke recognized the need for high-quality, clean, and effective supplements specifically designed for infants and children. His journey began with a passion for helping children thrive by supporting their health through nutrition and natural remedies. With that vision in mind, ChildLife Essentials was born, offering a range of supplements that are gluten-free, non-GMO, and made with the highest standards of quality and care. Today, we continue to empower parents to nurture their children's well-being from infancy through childhood.

name: Chimeable
description: Chimeable is a product sampling company that helps brands generate authentic reviews on their product pages and retailer sites. Our members also create high-quality content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube—all at scale.

name: Chimes
description: It All Started in Java.Three of my grandparents have lived into their 90s, and what they ate made all the difference. They came from Asian cultures rich with ancient traditions, where food and medicine were synonymous. Meals were enjoyed with excited chatter of the healthful properties of each dish. Real ingredients, freshly harvested, made thoughtfully, with love and wisdom.The benefits of individual ingredients were cited and recited throughout childhood mealtimes, whether the invigorating ginger or the wholesome goji berry. Chimes was officially founded in 2003, but our recipes go way back to 1935 in Java, Indonesia when a young herbalist shared his new creations – a simple ginger chew made from fresh ginger, cane sugar and tapioca starch.The chews became an instant hit among villagers and visitors alike, both for their comforting effect and their remarkable, candy-like taste. Generations have passed but that same family still creates our ginger chews to this day. We create our recipes around ingredients trusted for their powerful effects. Ginger, for one, has been used throughout the ages for various health benefits. Since a hot cup of ginger tea isn't always convenient when we're go-go-going, we turned this humble rhizome into a mighty helpful mobile treat. And, with a warm, spicy scent and flavor, our ginger chews are as comforting as they are healing. Keep a few of your favorites handy for days when you need a little extra care!

name: China Chamber of Commerce for Import & Export of Medicines & Health Products
description: Established on May 22, 1989. It is a national, industrial and non-profit social organization voluntarily formed by various economic organizations engaged in the research and development, production, trade, investment and related activities of medicines and health products.

name: Chinova Bioworks
description: Chinova Bioworks is a Canadian biotechnology company specializing in sustainable, natural ingredient solutions for the food and beverage industries.Their innovative products include Chiber™, a clean-label preservative derived from white button mushrooms that enhances shelf life and freshness, and MycoKleer™, a mushroom-based clarifying agent offering a natural alternative to synthetic processing aids in beverages.Driven by a commitment to sustainability, health, and innovation, Chinova Bioworks addresses consumer demand for clean-label, environmentally friendly solutions.

name: Chlorella Industry Co., Ltd.
description: Chlorella Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1964 in Chikugo, Japan, inspired by the belief that chlorella could be a valuable natural food for supporting human health. Our founder, with a background in science and food manufacturing, was among the early pioneers who dedicated themselves to unlocking the potential of chlorella through careful research and cultivation.From our humble beginnings in Japan, we have spent decades perfecting the art of chlorella cultivation under strict quality standards. What started as a local initiative has grown into an internationally recognized brand, trusted for its commitment to safety, reliability, and the power of natural nutrition.Today, CHLORELLA CHIKUGO continues this journey - bringing the heritage of Japanese craftsmanship and scientific expertise to people around the world who seek sustainable, plant-based nutrition for daily wellness.

name: Chlorophyll Water
description: Chlorophyll Water is bottled at the mountain source, a preserved natural resource protected from all of the elements by a 1,500-acre forest. The purified mountain spring water in Chlorophyll Water is then distilled and refined through a three-part purification process, which is triple filtered (including carbon filtration), and then UV treated for purity and quality. Each bottle of Chlorophyll Water is then fortified with additional vitamin A, vitamin B12, vitamin C and vitamin D for enhanced nutrition.Health practitioners, nutritionists and yoga teachers have long been advocates of the many benefits of chlorophyll, but this past year, Chlorophyll Water has also gained mainstream popularity on social media with the hashtags #chlorophyll and #chlorophyllwater amassing over 1 billion mentions on Instagram and TikTok, with many social media users raving about the benefits of chlorophyll and sharing their personal results of drinking liquid chlorophyll and Chlorophyll Water ? everything from anti-aging to glowing and healthy skin, speeding up metabolism, immune boosting properties, weight loss, detoxification, and boosting energy!

name: Chocolove
description: At the foothills of the Rocky Mountains, Chocolove produces chocolate that delivers on quality, taste, and affordable luxury. The cold, dry mountain air helps craft the Chocolove taste and we are committed to delivering the highest quality chocolate both ethically and at a good price.Our certified source of cocoa beans is traceable to the farmer. Our non-GMO verified ingredients are another way to know where our ingredients come from and to show that we care to buy the very best. Great effort is made to deliver consistent great taste so you can feel great about eating Chocolove. That is why Chocolove consumers say, "I love Chocolove".

name: Chocxo
description: Truly indulgent. Lower sugar. Always organic.Three simple lines – that's the Chocxo promise. At Chocxo, we are passionate chocolatiers on a mission. We set out to make the most delicious chocolate and make it better for you and the planet.We source the best organic ingredients and create truly indulgent chocolates that are naturally lower in sugar (without artificial sweeteners or sugar substitutes). We are also committed to making chocolate the sustainable way. Our products are made with 100% Sustainable Cocoa and are Certified Plastic Neutral through a partnership with rePurpose Global.It's pretty simple, if you ask us. Better ingredients, that are sourced responsibly, make better tasting chocolate that is better for you and the planet.It's Simply Better Chocolate.

name: Chosen Foods, LLC
description: Founded in 2011, Chosen Foods is on a mission to do good in the world by being good for the world, replacing bad fats with the good fats of 100% pure avocado oil, across the kitchen pantry.

name: CHS Inc.
description: As a leader in U.S. sunflower, soybeans, canola, and other food ingredients, CHS Inc. has a depth of experience and expertise that goes beyond the field. Owned by North American farmers, our experts work closely with you to develop specific product attributes that meet the growing needs in world markets.  CHS is a leader in processing and supplying food ingredients, including sunflower, soy oil and soy flour, canola oil, and other grains. CHS Sunflower supplies ingredients to nationally known snack brands, serving more than one-half of the domestic kernel and inshell market. We also export sunflower products to Mexico and Canada, Europe, the Middle East, and the Pacific Rim. We buy direct from growers -- many our own members who grow sunflower seeds using our own CHS hybrid seed -- so we only provide the freshest and the finest. CHS offerings include confection sunflower 350-450 CPO and 450-650 CPO; bakery sunflower kernel; conoil sunflower kernel; and inshell sunflower 24/64, 22/64, 20/64, XT, XL10, and XL8.  We also offer striped inshell sunflower and sunflower chips for the bird seed market.CHS was the first sunflower processor to offer an additional measure of food safety with pasteurization for non-roasted sunflower products. Housed within the CHS roasting and packaging facility in Fargo, North Dakota, this industry-leading Log5 technology enables pasteurization without changing texture, taste or overall sensory characteristics of food products. Besides pasteurization, CHS also offers dry roasted & salted inshell as well as oil roasted kernel with or without salt, and we can vacuum package into bags or supersacks.Every day you have customers to satisfy, expectations to meet, and promises to deliver on. No one understands that better than CHS. Contact us to assist with your food ingredient needs.

name: Churn Foods
description: Michael created Churn in March 2020 after a lifelong passion for butter. The company was created to empower at-home kitchen chefs (like yourself) to cook like the pros. He hopes you melt Churn's Flavored Butter over fresh fish, meats, pasta and veggies for a Nobu-level masterpiece, and that the Maple & Cinnamon Butter brings extra warmth and comfort to your Sunday-morning pancake ritual.

name: Chuza
description: CHUZA Started in January 2020 because of a craving of having authentic spicy snack available, and the opportunity to share them with the world. We launched in the summer of 2021 and we are an authentic spicy snack brand.

name: Cibo Vita – Natures Garden
description: Cibo Vita, at the forefront of the smart-snacking movement, introduces Yoggies under its acclaimed flagship brand, Nature’s Garden. This innovative addition to Nature’s Garden’s product umbrella is reflective of its commitment to better-for-you snacking. Yoggies are crafted with a patented microencapsulation technology, ensuring 2 billion live probiotic cultures effectively reach the gut. These bites, nestled at the intersection of taste and wellness, boast a real fruit center with 3g of prebiotic fiber and are encased in a creamy yogurt coating, balancing taste, and wellness. Nature’s Garden, under Cibo Vita, is renowned for leading in the smart snacking domain, winning accolades like the Good Housekeeping Snack Food Award, Store Brands Award and Mindful Award. The company, led by CEO Emre Imamoglu and based in Totowa, NJ, is recognized for its wide range of products that cater to diverse dietary preferences, including vegan, gluten-free, Paleo, and Keto. Upholding high standards, Cibo Vita holds several certifications, including Vegan, Keto, RSPO, UTZ, Kosher, Organic, Paleo, and Gluten-Free, reflecting its commitment to quality, transparency, and innovation in healthy eating.

name: CII
description: CII is a privately held specialty ingredients manufacturer established to deliver innovations for better food and stronger communities. CII produces food particulates that add flavor, color and texture to numerous food applications as well as pre-blended mixes to create flavored swirl effects in bread products. CII’s diverse portfolio also includes texturized plant-based proteins and crisps as well as clusters, granola, panning capabilities, and ingredient heat treatment processing!

name: Cipriani Food
description: In 1931, Giuseppe Cipriani opened the doors of Harry's Bar in a former rope factory, set back from crowded St Mark's Square.For over 90 years, Harry's Bar has been one of the world's best-known restaurants, a historic establishment declared a national heritage site by the Ministry of Culture in 2001. It is an institution for the city of Venice and a meeting place for writers, artists, royalty, and ordinary people. Its cuisine, service, and atmosphere have made it unique and inimitable.Since 1931, four generations have worked to create the Cipriani brand around the world, bringing it to the United States, Mexico, South America, the United Kingdom, the Middle East, and China.Today, the venues, the majestic event rooms, and the Club Residences on Wall Street serve more than 1 million customers worldwide with the same passion and professionalism.

name: Ciranda
description: CIRANDA is the leading global supplier of certified organic, non-GMO and fair-trade ingredients with expertise in gluten-free flours and starches; syrups and sweeteners; cocoas and chocolates; oils and fats; coconut products and lecithin. The employee-owned company operates in Hudson, Wisconsin, with warehouses across North America for fast, responsive service.

name: Cirkul
description: Cirkul was founded in 2015 by two Dartmouth College athletes who wanted more convenient, fun, and flavorful hydration options. They aimed to create a product that makes drinking water enjoyable while promoting better health through hydration. Since then, Cirkul has grown rapidly, driven by a commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction. The company launched its first product, the Cirkul water bottle, through a successful crowdfunding campaign and quickly gained traction among health-conscious consumers.

name: Cisbra Agroindustrial
description: Cisbra Agroindustrial has over 30 years of experience in the whole grains market, delivering customized solutions to the food industry. Since 1992, the company has focused on quality, short lead times, adaptable packaging and particle sizes, in-house logistics, and reliable on-time delivery.Its portfolio includes grain blends, flakes, whole grain flours, cereals, ancient grains, premixes, gluten-free products, animal nutrition products, and flaxseed oil.For export, the company supplies hulled sesame seeds, natural sesame seeds, chia, quinoa, flaxseed, and flaxseed oil, ensuring quality, traceability, and tailored service.

name: CIUTI INTERNATIONAL COOKING OILS
description: Our origin goes back to the family's roots in Sicily, Italy where extra virgin olive oil is a staple in the Mediterranean diet. Ciuti began by using our family heritage to bring that authentic Italian extra virgin olive oil to the states.

name: Clapoti
description: Marie Perruchet is the founder of Clapoti, a premium clean beauty brand inspired by Korean spa traditions and designed for real, modern routines. Her path into beauty was anything but conventional. She began her career in journalism and strategy consulting, working across Europe, the United States, and Asia, where she learned to ask the right questions and translate complexity into clarity. Over time, she noticed a growing disconnect in beauty: plenty of promises, constant noise, and very little that truly fit into everyday life.Adopted from Korea and raised between cultures, Marie later returned to Asia as an adult. Immersing herself in Korean spa culture became a turning point. She discovered a philosophy centered on recovery, consistency, and respect for the body, care that was practical, repeatable, and effective, rather than performative.Clapoti was born from a simple insight: if recovery had a starting point, it would be the feet. Feet absorb travel, work, stress, and time, yet are largely ignored by traditional skincare. Clapoti began with foot masks formulated in Korea using 99% natural, bioactive botanicals such as green tea, perilla, ginger, hibiscus, and shea butter. The ritual then expanded naturally to face and eye care, following a “Feet → Face → Eyes” recovery approach.Marie often says Clapoti is not about pampering, but about maintenance. Built on honesty, efficacy, and repeat use, the brand reflects her belief that conscious beauty should fit real life and quietly do its job.Book a meeting with me at Expo West

name: Clean Brands
description: "The epitome of cool."Dillydoc was created by two sisters who grew up with a father who pushed us — consistently — to aim higher, think smarter, and do things with intention.That mindset shaped everything: our standards, our formulas, even our name.We discovered that "dilly" is an old word meaning remarkable, outstanding, something that stands apart — and that definition captured exactly what we wanted clean personal care to be. Not gimmicky. Not complicated. Just remarkably well made.So we built Dillydoc around a simple idea: Cool isn't just a look — it's a standard.And when we say cool, we mean it in every direction:clean, fresh, effective, conscious, modern.The epitome of cool — and yes, the epitome of freshness after using our products.

name: Clean Maple
description: Founded in 2023 among the maple groves of Vermont, Clean Maple was born from a simple yet powerful idea: what if skincare could be infused with the same life-giving water that flows through maple trees each spring? With that question, co-founders Elysa and Dan combined tradition and innovation — replacing ordinary water with organic maple sap water to create formulas rich in antioxidants, minerals, and natural humectants. The result is a skincare line that embodies the purity of the forest and the promise of truly clean hydration.

name: CLEAN ROOTS
description: Hey, this is Yeliz, founder of Clean Roots. I've always loved the feeling of a fresh, clean home—but I started questioning the products I was using. Were they safe? Was I unknowingly harming myself or the environment? I even resorted to wearing a gas mask once to avoid the chemicals, which made me realize just how concerning this issue was! Determined to find a better way, I explored various options and discovered that many so-called 'natural' products were neither truly natural nor as effective as they claimed.In 2024, I founded Clean Roots to bridge this gap. Our products are designed to be genuinely natural, effective, and certified organic by Ecogarantie, a respected EU organization. Clean Roots is about more than just cleaning; it's about creating a healthier, safer world, one home at a time. Join us in our journey to make every clean a clean you can trust.

name: Clean Simple Eats
description: Clean Simple Eats, a leading brand in the health and wellness industry, creates supplements that are undeniably clean, 100% delicious, and meant to be enjoyed every day. Founders Erika and JJ, a husband and wife duo, have made it their mission to help others discover the same inner confidence they gained through living a healthy lifestyle. All supplements are made with clean, all-natural ingredients and zero artificial sweeteners, flavors, or colors ensuring you're getting the highest-quality products on the market. Standards you trust, flavors you crave, and supplements you love. For more information, visit cleansimpleeats.com.

name: Cleanery
description: At Cleanery we are reinventing cleaning and personal care with a range of incredibly effective household cleaners and beautiful hand washes and personal care products - delivered as a powder that dissolves in water at home.Founded in New Zealand, the Cleanery story began with a school essay written in 1993 by our co-founder Mark Sorensen. In this essay he tells of the environmental damage caused by excessive packaging and plastic in consumer products. We are now solving these problems with our amazing science and engineering and a scalable inhouse manufacturing model.Cleanery products have 99% less waste and up to 99% less emissions than the traditional products we replace and, most importantly, our formulations really work. Cleanery is an easy change allowing consumers to reduce impact in the home and workplace with more effective products, that are affordable, and are safer for people while being fundamentally better for the planet.Cleanery is growing rapidly. We launched around a year ago and have a massive tribe of loyal customers and over 2,000 of the largest supermarkets across Australia and New Zealand selling our products. We're super excited to bring these products, and our knowledge of how to grow this new and exciting category, to the US in 2023!

name: Cleanlogic
description: At Cleanlogic, DEI&A has been integral to our brand purpose of "Inspiring all to achieve independence and success."Approximately 1 out of 4 Americans is considered disabled, and of this roughly 62 million individuals, only 35% are employed. Through the years, this has been a passion and motivator of our founders Isaac Shapiro and Mike Ghesser who have both been personally moved by family members with disabilities.Isaac's mom, Bea, became blind at the age of 7 and has experienced firsthand the staggering unemployment rate of 70% that persists among the blind and visually impaired communities.Mike's oldest daughter, Rosie, is both physically disabled and neurodiverse. His goal is to help change the future for Rosie and other disabled people by providing fulfilling, inspiring and pride-filled employment opportunities.From founding a brand that has always had accessible packaging via functional Braille, to establishing our own nonprofit fund, the Inspiration Foundation, Cleanlogic's "Purchase to Employ" initiative is aimed at lowering the unemployment rate among people with disabilities by creating inclusive, safe and fulfilling job opportunities for people with disabilities.

name: Clif
description: Mondelez International features global and local brands that will delight your taste buds! Discover our delicious brands: CLIF BAR, TATE'S BAKE SHOP, PERFECT SNACKS, and HU KITCHEN. Join us to experience the variety Mondelez has to offer!

name: Cliganic
description: Wellness isn't just for the 1%. From the very beginning, we set out to make nature-powered remedies accessible to the rest of us—formulating high quality products without the high price tag. Because everyone deserves to look and feel their best without wiping out their bank account.

name: Clio Snacks
description: What began as one father's mission to provide his family with delicious, nourishing snacks has sparked a whole new way to enjoy yogurt, inspired by his Ukrainian roots.

name: Clöud Café
description: Clöud Café was crafted by Olive, the Co-Founder and former CEO of The Crème Shop. Hailed as the Original K-Beauty Connoisseur, Olive is also a coffee & tea enthusiast, and aesthete.Clöud Café is created from Olive's deep-seated love for coffee & tea— working from sunrise to well past sunset + tirelessly preparing for countless meetings calls for a caffeinated beverage. During her many business trips to South Korea, Olive frequented various charming cafes— inspiring beautifully innovative drinks, crafted with unique ingredients.Olive is a firm believer in that wellness starts from within. What you consume, paired with your daily habits reflects physically. Premium crafted beverages and skin-loving Marine Collagen allows the drinker to stay caffeinated while looking and feeling their absolute best.Each unique (and scrumptious) brew is nurtured with wellness-boosting, aromatic blends to ensure your cup is always more than half full. We're with you as you power through slow mornings and live through nonstop days. We support real-time, in the moment living. Life is never perfectly balanced, but with a ritual in the present, you're one step there.

name: Cloud23
description: Driven by Brooklyn Peltz Beckham's passion for exploration in the kitchen, Cloud23 is a testament to the joy of discovery in cooking. His journey as a tastemaker infuses our sauces with soul and excitement that inspires adventure. We believe every meal should be an adventure inviting you to explore, taste, and celebrate a world of flavour in every bite.

name: Clover Sonoma
description: It all started in 1916 when the Petaluma Cooperative Creamery, a small creamery in our hometown, began bottling and distributing fresh, delicious Clover-branded dairy products. Soon thereafter, Clover products began showing up all over Northern California.In 1977, our founder Gene Benedetti and five partners acquired the wholesale distribution business from California Cooperative Creamery-formerly known as Petaluma Cooperative Creamery-and Stornetta's Dairy in Sonoma, CA. Over a century later, we're proud to continue calling Sonoma County home, providing the best California dairy possible for our family farms, community, and planet.

name: CM Premium Rice Co., Ltd.
description: Founded in 2016, our brand was born from a passion to share the richness of Thai cuisine with the world. Guided by our belief that every product should be "Always Impressive," we set out to create authentic Thai foods that honor tradition while meeting modern standards of quality and safety.Our journey continues with the same inspiration that started it all — to bring the best of Thailand to every table, and to ensure that every bite leaves a memorable and impressive experience.

name: CoAqua, NA Inc.
description: From the Rink to the Real DealThe CoAqua journey didn’t start in a boardroom; it started on the ice. Anthony (Tony) Cadieux II and Justin Bruckel met at 14, playing competitive hockey. As teammates in Junior A, they survived notorious 4:30 AM Saturday practices, building a bond based on showing up when others wouldn't. That grit led to Division I scholarships at Army West Point and St. Lawrence University, and it eventually became the foundation for their partnership.Years later, while traveling in Piha, New Zealand, Justin and his then-girlfriend Caroline discovered CoAqua in a local cooler. Back in the U.S., Justin surprised Caroline by shipping a case from New Zealand to stock his fridge. When Tony came to visit, Justin insisted he try it. Tony—a lifelong coconut water skeptic—took one sip and his mindset flipped. He looked at Justin and said, “Let’s do this.”The Evolution of a BrandWhat began in 2020 as a nights and weekends side hustle between two best friends quickly evolved. In 2022, they landed in Sprouts Farmers Market, the inflection point that pushed them to go all-in. By late 2024, they made the decision to buy out the original founder to fully own the brand’s future. They burned the old playbook, rebranded in record time, and even air-shipped pallets to the Expo floor at the last minute just to have something to show.No Beaches RequiredWhile coconut water is an established category often defined by predictable beach imagery, Tony and Justin took a contrarian approach. They purposefully designed a brand that doesn't look like traditional coconut water, leaning into a bold, urban-inspired positioning: No Beaches Required. Since the rebrand, velocities have climbed—up nearly 200% at some retailers—and the brand has added close to 1,500 new doors for the 2026 season. From their core line to their sparkling SKU, nicknamed "CRACKAQUA" by fans, they are simply focused on relentless execution.A Business Built on RelationshipsTony and Justin truly enjoy being on this earth, and they say all the time that CoAqua is Family, CoAqua is Friends, and CoAqua is Love. Look no further than the people who operate the company to see that in action. The business is a true family affair: Justin’s wife, Caroline, is the company’s graphic artist, and Tony’s wife, Tori, works in the business as well.This bond is the heartbeat of the brand. Tony was the best man in Justin's wedding, and he even officiated the ceremony for Caroline and Justin. CoAqua isn’t just a company; it’s a living part of their shared history.Hydrating with PurposeSuccess is measured by more than just shelf space. CoAqua is committed to helping eradicate generational poverty by donating 2% of revenue to Kids Dreams Matter.

name: COASLINK CORP
description: The TERRALAND brand was created in 2024. We are grateful for the gift of Mother Earth, and our selection of ingredients is all based on plant products produced in nature. We strive to strike a perfect balance between nutrition, taste, and texture, and commit to providing healthy food to consumers.

name: Coast to Coast Label
description: Coast to Coast Label is your local supplier for blank labels (you print) or printed labels (we do the printing for you).  Offering a wide range of materials and adhesives and the expertise to help you find the right label for your product.

name: Cob
description: When Jess' son was little, he faced a series of unexplained health issues that no doctor could solve. After months of tracking his meals, she discovered the cause — a severe corn allergy. Within weeks of removing corn from his diet, everything changed.She and her family went completely corn-free, but one thing she couldn’t replace was popcorn. After trying every grain imaginable, she found sorghum: tiny, delicious, and full of nutrients. Her whole family fell in love, and Cob was born. Meet Sorghum. Meet Cob. The Grain With Game.

name: coco5
description: Coco5 began in the locker room of a pro hockey team, where the head trainer knew coconut water was the key to top-tier hydration—if only it didn't taste so... coconutty. So he made something better. Coco5: Coconut water for people who don't like coconut water. It's clean, it's smooth, and it gets the job done—no hype needed. Just pure, effortless hydration.

name: Cocoba Pte Ltd
description: In 2009, Irvin Gunawan opened Irvin's Seafood Restaurant in Singapore. It quickly rose to popularity because of its great-tasting yet affordable fresh crab dishes, especially the signature Salted Egg Crab.In 2011, a relocation presented new challenges that ultimately sparked a creative turning point for the business. Irvin and his team of renowned chefs persevered by experimenting and crafting new and unique dishes. After spending hundreds of hours innovating, the Salted Egg Fish Skin and Salted Egg Potato Chips were finally born in 2014.This success led to significant expansion. In 2016, due to growing popularity, Irvin made the leap to open his first physical retail store in Vivocity. The brand continued its rapid growth, expanding overseas in 2017 to become an iconic global brand operating in over 10 countries. By 2020, IRVINS products had launched in popular supermarkets and convenience stores around the world. In 2021, the brand continued to innovate by collaborating with popular instant noodle brand NISSIN to release a series of salted egg instant noodle flavours.

name: Cocojune Products
description: Cocojune is a company run by friends who believe in an organic agriculture that is dreamily delicious. Cocojune was founded in 2018 and is known for their certified organic coconut yogurt and the use of plant-based ingredients.In 2018, they began culturing organic coconut with different strains of probiotic bacteria they had acquired from a Danish culture bank. The aim was to make the best tasting vegan yogurt, as well as ensuring it was earth-friendly and healthy too. It turned out to be a complex task- getting taste and texture just right. However, core concept was simple- only use a few, but, great ingredients grown in harmony with nature.Cocojune cultures the coconut slowly with some of the world's most researched probiotics giving it a mild tang and lots of probiotic fire-power.

name: Cocomels by Roses Brands
description: In 2009 it all started with a dream…from there, the Chief Candyman knew his calling was to deliver joy through candy. He spent months perfecting the now famous coconut milk caramels recipe, using family and friends to be his trusted taste testers. In 2010, Cocomels was introduced through a local Farmers Market in Boulder. The first step is always the most important!

name: Cocotana Coconut Products
description: Cocotana brand was founded in 2013 and the story behind the particular name is to do with the area called Katana where the factory is located. Since the factory produces all coconut based products, we combined the Coconut and area name Katana and formed 'COCOTANA'

name: Cocrystal Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Founded by distinguished scientists affiliated with national laboratories, we specialize in cocrystal technology - an advanced formulation method that significantly enhances the stability, solubility, and bioavailability of active ingredients.As an industry leader in cocrystal-based nutraceuticals, we offer a diverse range of premium active ingredients tailored for human nutrition, animal nutrition, and personal care.Our cocrystal technology platform empowers our products with unique properties, ensuring optimal nutrient performance and delivering tangible health benefits.

name: Codeage
description: Codeage is inspired by the founder's brother Christophe who beat all the odds when he was diagnosed 10 years ago with stage 4 brain cancer and given 6 months to live. He refused to accept his fate and went on a mission to find alternative ways to beat the disease even when the doctors told him there was nothing he could do and wouldn't live more than a year. 10 years later he is still alive, and considered a miracle in the community and hospital where he was treated. Christophe attributes this miracle to diet and this is what set the brothers on this passion for holistic nutrition and put them on a path to start Codeage which creates whole food health and wellness solutions to support individuals on their wellness journey. What sets us apart is our relentless dedication to create world class solutions with formulations backed by science and data with correct dosages, ingredients sourced individually from around the world and cutting edge technology.

name: Codipsa
description: CODIPSA was created in 1998. It started as a small cassava starch business and over time it became a referent company in the Paraguayan industry. It was conceived as a business project with a social focus, providing an alternative means for the generation of sustainable income for farming families in Paraguay, located in rural areas of lower economic development in the country. The first plant was opened in 1998, followed in the years after by three more plants, one of which is fully equipped with European technology, a modified starch production unit and a corn starch production plant. During the period 1998-2003, the company consolidated its brand in the Paraguayan market, becoming a referent in the field. 2004 marked the beginning of the internationalization of the company, and of the CODIPSA brand, with the first exports to the regional market (MERCOSUR). Currently, Codipsa is the leading exporter of native cassava starch throughout the American continent, besides being present in other continents such as Europe and Africa. As a natural consequence of entering into international markets, with high demanding parameters, Codipsa faced challenges related to continuous quality improvement. Its journey began in 2012 with the ISO 9001 certification, to later access the Kosher, FDA (Food and Drug Administration of USA), Gluten Free certification, and in 2016 to consolidate with the ISO 22 000. Codipsa understands that the commitment to the quality of its products and the services it offers to its customers must be constantly assessed in the search for improvement opportunities. We continue to write our history, day by day. We invite you to be part of it!

name: Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
description: Founded in Los Angeles in 1963, The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf is a modern global beverage house that inspires new possibilities through flavors and perspectives from around the world. With more than 1,060 locations in 24 countries and counting, we have deep ties to communities and cultures across the globe. Beginning with coffee and tea, we deliver on the classics we all love and offer exciting new twists using global ingredients. Through fresh preparations in our stores, ready-to-drink products, and at-home options, we enable people everywhere to drink and discover.

name: Colavita USA
description: Giovanni and Felice Colavita founded Colavita as a small olive mill in the village  of Sant'Elia a Pianisi in the Molise region of Italy in 1938. Passing through to the next generation, Giovanni's sons, Enrico and Leonardo Colavita, extended the family business and expanded to international markets starting with the USA. In 1979 they found in John Profaci their first foreign partner and started to distribute Colavita olive oil around the world. Today the traditions of the trusted family brand is continuing with the third generation of the family that is maintaining Colavita as one of the few family-owned international brands in the olive oil sector and one of the biggest importer and distributor company of Italian products in US. Alongside their Italian locations, the Colavita family proudly operates out of their USA headquarters in Edison, NJ and Dixon, CA.

name: Collective Arts
description: Founded in 2013, we fuse innovative beverages with the talents of emerging artists from around the world.  Our goal is to create a locally relevant, globally iconic lifestyle brand, focused on providing emerging artists with a platform to be discovered and shared.

name: Colombina Candy Co, INC
description: EverJoy is owned by Colombina which is a Global Food Company born in 1927 with presence in over 90 countries around the world.One of our strategic objetives is to conquer the mainstrem audience.Founded in 2024 and after 2 years of designing, researches and development EverJoy was born from a simple but bold idea: better-for-you treats should still bring joy. As parents and food lovers ourselves, we saw a gap in the market—treats that claimed to be healthier often lacked the fun, flavor, or trust-worthy ingredients we craved. So we set out to change that.At EverJoy, we believe that choosing natural doesn't mean giving up excitement. That's why we craft treats that's free from artificial flavors, colors, and preservatives—without ever compromising on taste. Inspired by the bright, nostalgic sweets and treats we grew up with, our products are reimagined with today's conscious consumer in mind.What started in our R&D lab with a few molds and a vision has now grown into a movement to bring joy—naturally—to every shelf. We're proud to be part of a new generation of clean-label confections, and we're just getting started.

name: Color Garden
description: 100% Plant Based Pure Natural Food Colors perfect for your favorite 🍪🍰🧁🍦🍩 and much more! Allergen Free, Gluten Free, Vegan. ❤️🧡💛💚💙

name: Color Labels And More
description: At Color Labels And More, we offer packaging and labelling solutions for your business. With on-demand label printing, you decide when and how to print.  We carry Epson, Antron, Afinia, Zebra, TSC, and Canon Label Printers.  We are the one stop shop for all your packaging needs, from boxes, pouches, bottles, and labels.  Call us anytime for your customized solution.

name: Comet
description: COMET is an award-winning food ingredients company based in London, Ontario, and Schaumburg, Illinois. COMET is the only company with the IP and expertise needed to create Arrabina, an FDA-recognized fiber with superior tolerance in the gut even at 4 or more servings daily and clinically proven prebiotic health benefits. Arrabina is gluten-free wheat fiber extract containing a natural blend of prebiotics including arabinoxylans, lignin and polyphenols. COMET's proprietary line of Arrabina dietary fibers are upcycled certified and can easily be added to any food and beverage application. For more information, visit comet-bio.com.

name: Commercial Bakeries Corp.
description: Commercial Bakeries Corp., headquartered in Toronto, Canada, is a producer of private label packaged cookies, emphasizing specialty, premium, better-for-you, and seasonal products. The company primarily serves retail and co-manufacturing channels, partnering with various retail grocery chains and brands across North America. In September 2023, Commercial Bakeries was acquired by Graham Partners, a private investment firm focused on advanced manufacturing companies. Following this acquisition, in December 2023, Shawn Warren, a seasoned industry executive with over 30 years of experience in packaged food products, was appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer to drive innovation and growth. In May 2024, Commercial Bakeries expanded its capabilities by acquiring Imagine Baking, Inc., a manufacturer specializing in gluten-free and organic crackers, cookies, biscuits, and brittle. This strategic move aims to capitalize on the growing trend towards private label baked snacks in the North American cookie and cracker market. Through these strategic initiatives, Commercial Bakeries Corp. is positioning itself for accelerated growth and innovation in the competitive baked goods industry.

name: Commercial Creamery Company
description: Commercial Creamery was founded in 1908 and is a leader in the dairy industry. We produce spray-dried Cheese and Dairy Powders in our plant in Southern Idaho. In addition to Cheese and Dairy Powders, we also produce Seasonings, Blends, Chunkettes, Avocado Powder, and Dairy Concentrates.

name: Compound Solutions, Inc.
description: Compound Solutions (CSI) is a trusted ingredient house supplying science-backed nutraceutical ingredients for dietary supplements, functional foods and beverages. Founded in 1998, CSI is known for innovation, fast collaboration and long-standing partnerships with global customers and suppliers.

name: Comvita Manuka Honey
description: Comvita has been beekeeping since 1974 and is the Gold Standard in Manuka Honey, offering sustainable, raw & wild Manuka Honey from the pristine forests of New Zealand. Manuka is a unique type of honey, considered to be nature's most powerful honey due to its naturally high unique plant compounds used for overall wellness, vitality, and gut health. Comvita's Harmony Plan program supports people and planet – and to date has planted over 7 million trees in New Zealand and saved over 60 million bees from extermination. Founded with a passion to heal and protect the world, Comvita is now the leader in Manuka Honey worldwide.

name: CON-CRĒT Creatine HCl
description: In 2002, Mark Faulkner was a co-founder of a forensic toxicology lab testing for Performance Enhancing Drugs.  He routinely heard from athletes they needed something safe, legal, and effective to help them perform optimally and provide strength, endurance and energy.  Vireo Systems was formed to study and test amino acid conjugations to fill this need. In 2003, Vireo made a fortuitous acid catalyst miscalculation on an amino acids batch which resulted in the molecule that would become Creatine HCl, CON-CRĒT and address this need for better cellular energy.

name: Conagra Brands
description: For more than 100 years, Conagra Brands has been making great food that brings people together. Founded in 1919 as Nebraska Consolidated Mills, the outfit was initially a collection of four milling companies. Milling remained the focus for the first half century. The 1970's saw a dramatic shift, as NCM changed its name to ConAgra Foods and became a publicly traded company. Mergers and acquisitions over the coming decades brought several beloved brands under the ConAgra banner: Banquet, Hunt's, Orville Redenbacher's, Reddi-wip, Slim Jim and many more. The creation of the Healthy Choice brand, the brainchild of the company's former CEO, reflected ConAgra's spirit of innovation. As American culture and eating habits changed, the company continued to meet customer and consumer needs. Brands evolved from regional favorites to national best-sellers to globally recognized icons. The mid-2010's saw major changes under current CEO Sean Connelly. The rebranded "Conagra Brands" moved its headquarters to downtown Chicago's historic Merchandise Mart. The addition of Birds Eye, Duncan Hines and Wish-Bone further solidified Conagra's industry-leading positions throughout the grocery aisles – both in-store and online. Today's portfolio of iconic and emerging brands reflects the ever-evolving tastes of consumers. Guided by an entrepreneurial spirit, Conagra Brands combines a rich heritage of making great food with a sharpened focus on innovation, positioning the company for continued growth throughout its second century.

name: Conmigo Brands LLC
description: In one corner stands PIPO PERICO, our fearless luchador parrot. He’s not just a hot sauce; he’s a high-flying revolution against boring food. Carrying the spirit of Lucha Libre, Pipo delivers a "Pepper Punch" of vinegar-forward heat that fights blandness with every swing of his wings. He is bold, loud, and designed to make your food sweat, happily. Authentic Mexican flavors, made in Mexico, with just the right amount of kick. On the open trail rides PACO JONES, the outlaw of the pantry. Born from the borderland,  Paco bridges two worlds with "Two Cultures, One Squeeze." He reinvents American staples with his bold Mexican Ketchup and BBQ, infusing any meal with the soul of real chiles and agave. Paco Jones provides condiments that taste like nothing else in the aisle but feel instantly familiar. Traditional Mexican flavors. Modern American Staples.

name: Connoisseur's Kitchen Inc
description: Spice Mantra Indian Cuisine was born from our family's shared love for authentic Indian cooking. From our mother's cherished recipes to every hand-ground spice and slow-simmered curry, cooking has always been a family passion. Each member of our family is involved, bringing their care, creativity, and dedication to preserving these traditions. Founded to honor the meals that shaped us, Spice Mantra shares the soul, warmth, and bold flavors of home-style Indian cuisine,crafted with love by a family who lives and breathes the joy of food.

name: CONSERVE ITALIA USA CORP
description: Cirio was founded in 1856; the founder, Francesco Cirio, was already working at the fruit and vegetable market of Porta Palazzo in Torino by the age of fourteen. He had extraordinary entrepreneurial capabilities, and was amongst the first in the world to be credited with developing technique of appertization (the inventor was Frenchman Nicolas Apperti). This method of preservation overcame the problem of exporting fruit and vegetables that was perishable by extending its "shelf life" and gave Cirio the ability to develop its global business, opening the first Cirio factory in Torino, and after the enormous success he achieved with peas, he extended the range to include various other food products, launching a thriving business that was capable of exporting throughout the world. In 1900 Cirio ("Società Generale delle Conserve Alimentari") was one of the largest and most prestigious food manufacturers in Europe. The Signorini family took over from the founder and kept the company until 1970, when it was sold to SME and then privatized. The Cirio brand was then bought by Conserve Italia, a European leader in the food preservation industry, in 2004. In many ways, this signalled a return to the origins of Francesco Cirio's passion for agriculture and his extraordinary commitment to innovation and agricultural and industrial research.At the same time, it is a move towards a future based on capability and entrepreneurial success, without ever forgetting the social commitment towards the producers and the consumers, who are still offered the best guarantee of natural products that are respected and responsibly safeguarded.

name: Consolidated Design West
description: We started in 1991 to provide high quality packaging products at affordable pricing.

name: Contract Packaging Association
description: CPA, The Association for Contract Packagers and Manufacturers, is the premier resource for the co-man/co-pack industry and the CPG brands and retailers they serve. CPA supports our member companies and the wider industry by increasing the awareness, relevance and value of external packaging and manufacturing services in a rapidly evolving consumer economy.CPA members are dedicated to helping produce products. As an external manufacturing resource, we drive the dynamic growth of the industry and serve as a solution provider to new, emerging, store and established brands. With a deep understanding of the packaging and manufacturing process, our members excel in bringing innovative products to market efficiently and effectively. By partnering with contract packagers and manufacturers, brands can tap into specialized expertise, access state-of-the-art facilities, and benefit from scalable production capabilities.CPA members are at the forefront of driving innovation and delivering quality solutions. With their industry-specific knowledge, they help brands navigate complex regulatory requirements, optimize production processes, and ensure consistent product quality.

name: Coombs Family Farms
description: Our family began working in maple over 150 years ago; I'm the seventh generation to work our family farm. When I was three, I was riding behind the tractor while dad and granddad tapped trees. Soon enough, I was working in the sugarbush myself. That's part of what it means to be a seventh-generation maple farmer. By choosing Coombs Family Farms products, you're helping to keep working farmland open and sowing the seeds for a healthier, more sustainable society. That's no drop in the bucket.

name: Cooper Farms
description: Cooper Farms is a diversified farm and food company that has been providing high quality products since 1938. Today, the Cooper family carries on the tradition started by Virgil and Virginia Cooper by providing quality turkey, pork, and egg products. As a fourth-generation family-owned company, Cooper Farms continues to build and strengthen relationships based on the values that have guided the family since the company was founded. We are constantly striving to maintain a flexible business model to consistently meet our customers’ needs.

name: Cooper Street Snacks
description: Established in 2011 in Birmingham, Michigan, Cooper Street is a woman-owned family business founded by Elaine alongside her sons, Max & Sam. Our journey began with a dedication to creating delicious snacks that prioritize wholesome ingredients without compromising on taste.Driven by a passion for healthy eating, our cookies and granola bakes are crafted from a 100-year-old family recipe, thoughtfully updated to meet the needs of today's health-conscious consumers. At Cooper Street, we blend tradition with innovation to deliver wholesome snacks both the body and soul can LOVE.

name: Copper Moon Coffee LLC
description: Family owned and operated by the Gutwein brothers since 2007, every area of our company is rooted in our family values of integrity, trust, and hospitality. Although we are growing with many employees, we want to put faces with our name. These are the leaders who care for you and your coffee every single day.

name: CORELIFE ORGANICS LLC
description: We produces and distribute Organic Sugar, Jaggery, Organic Molasses Tapioca Starch, Tapioca Syrup, FOS, IMO and Fox Nut across globe. We are one of pioneer manufacturer accredited with all kind of organic & food certification. Our presence in several countries helps in local distribution of ingredients with high logistic management.

name: Corn Next
description: Corn Next's journey began seven years ago when our CEO, Randy Zhang discovered most marine life were chocked by plastic which he committed to himself to find alternative product that could help save marine life and planet. As middle of the night in Salt Lake City, he finally found a solution which he assembled a team of A-list scientists in China who leading expertise in those fields of worked to create a material with the potential to eliminate disposable plastic products. After several years of extensive R&D and testing with universities and government offices in the USA, Corn Next is extremely proud to showcase products as sustainable and safe for both you and environments.

name: Coronilla S.A.
description: We started as a private label manufacturer and we launched our own brand in 2016.

name: COSMOS-standard
description: The COSMOS signature is a consumer guarantee for organic and natural cosmetics that you can trust. To date over 32,500 products in 81 countries carry our COSMOS ORGANIC or COSMOS NATURAL signature. Over 12,400 raw materials carry our COSMOS CERTIFIED signature. Over 11,000 raw materials carry our COSMOS APPROVED signature.The COSMOS-standard defines the criteria that companies must meet to ensure consumers that their products are genuine organic or natural cosmetics produced to the highest feasible sustainability practices.

name: Cotton High Tech, S.L.
description: Masmi Natural Cotton was born in 2006 in Barcelona to offer the most sustainable alternative in intimate hygiene, betting from the beginning, and against the current of the sector, to offer products made of organic cotton, grown without herbicides or pesticides.Masmi's products have been rapidly gaining an increasing presence, now reaching 48 countries, and achieving an international leadership position thanks to its healthy and sustainable approach that is improving the health of millions of women and, at the same time, avoiding the generation of thousands of tons of plastic waste polluting the planet.

name: Country Life Vitamins
description: Country Life was founded in 1971 as a family-run business with a mission to empower the greatness within the community through wellness education and trusted natural products. Decades later, Country Life® Vitamins is a leading source for wellness and education and a trusted shop for natural products that are ethically made with the highest quality raw ingredients and proud to be backed by the B-Corp standard. From multi-vitamins and minerals to fitness optimization and beauty supplementation, Country Life Vitamins celebrates inclusivity, and individuality and ultimately provides consumers with the tools and encouragement to power their greatness in all facets of life. While the Country Life family has grown over time, we are just as passionate as we were in the beginning.

name: Country Prime Meats
description: We produce products that we are proud to provide to our families. Our mission is to support humane animal treatment and create wholesome products using local, natural ingredients with no additives, hormones, or fillers. Country Prime Meats products are naturally smoked, high in protein, gluten, and lactose-free, have zero trans-fats, no added MSG, and contain no artificial colours or flavours. The products are further air-dried to ensure a moisture level guaranteeing them freshness for 18-months, making them a convenient snack that requires no refrigeration.

name: COURSE RECORD
description: COURSE RECORD™ was founded in 2024 to solve a simple frustration: when the beverage cart rolled around, golfers had only three choices — a beer, a sports drink with 35 grams of sugar, or an energy drink with 200 milligrams of caffeine. None supported performance, focus, or health. In 2025, people hate being unhealthy, and golfers deserve a better option.We built COURSE RECORD to deliver functional hydration designed for golf and aligned with today's health trends. Each can contains 5 grams of pure cane sugar (naturally sweetened with Stevia), 40 milligrams of green tea caffeine, and Asian Ginseng for calm, steady energy — not spikes or crashes. That's 1/7 the sugar and 6X the electrolytes of the leading sports drink, and 1/5 the caffeine of typical energy drinks. Paired with electrolytes, B-vitamins, and amino acids (L-Theanine, L-Tyrosine, L-Taurine), the formula fuels hydration, calm energy, and focus — the three things golfers need most.COURSE RECORD also delivers on six trends shaping functional beverages: clean ingredients, low sugar, low caffeine, max hydration, alternative energy sources, and enhanced mental performance. No other beverage combines them all, and no other brand is rewriting the rules of what belongs on a golf cart.We believe healthy golfers and health-conscious consumers deserve better fuel. COURSE RECORD isn't just a drink; it's a mindset. Progress is happiness, focus is the new flex, and the coolest thing you can do is keep getting better. From PGA Tour stops to weekend foursomes, COURSE RECORD is how today's go-getters live deliciously dialed in.In our first 10 months, COURSE RECORD expanded to golf clubs in 20 states, sponsored a PGA Tour event, launched nationwide sales, and became a featured brand on Amazon Prime. Our crushable flavors — Lemon Lime Birdie Time, Caddies' Golden Peach, and Club Twirling Blue Razz — have earned praise from professional golfers, social voices, and publications like MyGolfSpy, who wrote: "No crash. Just steady energy." With strong re-order rates — especially when paired with branded mini fridges — we are preparing for distributor partnerships and retail expansion into grocery and big box stores.

name: Cove Soda
description: Hi, we're John and Ryan 👋 Brothers and Co-founders of Cove SodaGrowing up, soda was a rare treat, enjoyed only on the most special of occasions. Tucked away in our most cherished memories of birthday parties, pizza nights, or an A on a test, soda was there.While we outgrew our soda fixation, deeming it forever unhealthy; the nostalgic craving lived on. Our guts were telling us not to walk away from those classic flavours we knew and loved. We asked ourselves, why can't soda be healthy?So, we took a sip down memory lane to create a soda that isn't meant for special occasions, rather, for everyone and everyday enjoyment. Enter Cove Soda, the first-ever, zero sugar functional soda made with 1 billion probiotics, and real organic ingredients.We're making way for a new generation of soda drinkers.

name: Covered Bridge Potato Chip Company
description: The Albright Family Potato Farm began more than 90 years ago when Covered Bridge Potato Chips President & Founder Ryan Albright's Great Grampy Aubrey planted his first potatoes. As young entrepreneurs, brothers Ryan and Matt Albright started their own potato brokerage company and by 2005, they purchased the family farm from their father Wayne. Today Albright Farm grows more than 500 acres of potatoes to keep our factory pipeline full. It is there that we can carry on an old family tradition with our delicious kettle cooked potato chips. Each batch is cooked with care like Great Grammy Lela made them on her wood fired pot belly stove. It was in 2009 that Covered Bridge Potato Chips was founded, and Ryan and Matt decided to take over separate parts of the business. As the natural salesman, Ryan began to pursue the new chip business and Matt chose to operate and grow the family potato farm. In the early days Ryan would load up his Toyota Corolla and drive anywhere and everywhere to get people to sample his chips. Through a lot of determination and passion he was able to grow the business, adding key players over the years to get us where we are today.

name: Coyotas
description: DIGNIFY THE TORTILLA. // Coyotas makes amazing organic tortillas with only four simple ingredients.

name: Craft Fusions
description: It all began with a beverage — as we sought out the team to bring our idea to life we assembled one team of beverage, infusion, supply chain and packaging experts under one roof. We vertically integrated the entire beverage supply chain to simplify entity management, making your path to market smooth and brand management even smoother.With our expert run facility in middle Tennessee, we are able to formulate, infuse, can, pack and store millions of cans every year. Craft Fusions has established relationships with all of the vendors needed to ensure every step of your growth can be accomplished with ease. Reach out to us today to see why so many have chosen the craft path to market.

name: Crafty Ramen
description: This is the story of how a husband-and-wife duo started in 2017 and transformed a humble 10-seat ramen shop into a national brand, now found in over 1,600 grocery stores across Canada with another 1,000 stores coming online in fall 2025. It's a story of resilience, reinvention, and the relentless pursuit of bringing real ramen to more people.Jared and Miki's journey began in 2017 in Guelph, ON, with a simple but bold idea: to serve handcrafted ramen inspired by their time in Japan. With Jared's Michelin-star culinary expertise and Miki's deep understanding of operations, Crafty Ramen quickly became a local favourite. But just as they expanded with a second location, the pandemic hit, forcing them to pivot overnight.Instead of shutting down, they rolled up their sleeves and hand-packed their first meal kits, bringing the Crafty experience into people's homes. What started as a survival move became an unexpected breakthrough, one that redefined how Canadians enjoy ramen. The demand skyrocketed, leading them to build a full e-commerce platform and ship ramen across the country.This relentless drive to innovate didn't stop there. The success of their meal kits led to the development of a frozen consumer-packaged goods (CPG) line, now stocked in grocery stores nationwide. From a tiny shop in Guelph to a category-defining brand, Crafty Ramen has rewritten the rules of what a restaurant can be.But at its core, this story isn't just about ramen; it's about taking risks, trusting your craft, and turning obstacles into opportunities. It's a love story between two founders, a love letter to the craft of ramen, and a testament to the power of perseverance.

name: Crane Wellness
description: Our parent company, Fine Japan, was founded in 1974 in Osaka, Japan and is still family owned today. We are fully vertically integrated and

name: Cravings by Chrissy Teigen
description: Cravings by Chrissy Teigen introduced its popular baking mixes through direct-to-consumer channels in fall 2022. After receiving enthusiastic feedback from customers seeking cleaner baking options, the brand expanded into retail in 2023. Cravings revitalizes the baking aisle with a fresh take on clean indulgence, offering decadent mixes that are Non-GMO, Kosher Dairy Certified, gluten-free, and free from artificial ingredients and preservatives. Inspired by Teigen's Asian heritage and her family's love for cooking together, Cravings features unique pancake and baking mixes. The brand is proudly certified as Women-Owned and Minority-Owned.

name: Created Co.
description: When you've worked in hospitality, it's always going to be part of who you are. We cut our teeth with entrepreneurs out to make their mark on the world and we're constantly inspired by the power and drive behind creators like you. From long hours to long days, we know what it takes to get up and running and — maybe even harder — to keep it going.That's why we look at you as colleagues, not clients. We're all part of a community out to connect and empower. We do it through quality-crafted mugs, through cutting-edge design, and through supporting the people around us.

name: CRISP POWER
description: Founded by Gilad Zilberberd in 2023

name: Crofters Food, Ltd.
description: Crofter's Organic is a Canadian company specializing in low sugar fruit spreads since 1989. Located in Parry Sound, Ontario in the heart of the Georgian Bay Biosphere, the abundance of clear waters and wildlife - including bears - are an everyday reminder of the impact taking care to support regenerative practices in agriculture and manufacturing can have on the planet.Made with clean organic ingredients, fewer calories and great taste, you can trust Crofter's to provide the best in nutrition for your family with more fruit and less sugar in every jar. Fruit is the most important ingredient and Crofter's takes care to choose the best tasting, nutritious varieties from growers in the best agricultural regions around the world, often supporting traditional farming economies and sustainability champions.  All Crofter's fruit spreads are 30 calories per serving with 1/3 less sugar than a traditional jam, certified organic and Non-GMO Project Verified, suitable for vegans, and naturally gluten free. Premium Spreads are Perfectly Sweetened® with organic fair trade cane sugar, while the Just Fruit® spreads are sweetened with organic apple juice concentrate for an all fruit option.

name: Cross Reach Inc.
description: Kagura Matcha bridges tradition and modern life, offering pure, sustainable tea that brings harmony and serenity to every cup.

name: CrossCountry Consulting
description: CrossCountry Consulting is a leading provider of specialized finance, operations, and technology advisory services. As trusted advisors and collaborative partners, we deliver integrated solutions that tackle complex business challenges, maximize value, and drive human centered transformation powered by data, AI, and leading technologies.The CrossCountry Consulting NetSuite Practice brings deep expertise in helping food and beverage companies scale efficiently. With extensive industry experience across manufacturing, inventory, costing, and compliance, CrossCountry enables growing brands to streamline operations, gain real-time insights, and build a flexible NetSuite platform that supports rapid growth and complexity.

name: Crown Maple
description: In 2010, Crown Maple created a new maple standard by introducing estate-produced, select quality maple syrup from their 800-acre organic maple farm in New York's Hudson Valley. Today, Crown Maple presents a unique & distinctive selection of maple products by pairing the best nature has to offer with artisan craftsmanship and state-of-the-art technology.

name: Crux Ingredients
description: Organic Bulk Ingredient Importer & SupplierWe are an organic bulk ingredient importer and supplier specializing in shelf-stable ingredients for food and beverage manufacturers. Our portfolio includes grains, legumes, pulses, coconut products, nuts and nut butters, seeds and seed butters, vanilla, oils and sweeteners, dried and freeze-dried fruits, fruit purées, gluten-free flours and starches, and plant-based proteins and powders.Core Ingredient Categories Include:Grains, Legumes & Pulses: Amaranth, Beans, Buckwheat, Millet, Oats, Quinoa, Rice, Sorghum, TeffCoconut Products: Coconut Aminos, Desiccated Coconut, Coconut Butter, Cream, Milk, Milk Powder, Flour, Nectar, Oil, Sugar (Sweetened & Unsweetened Toasted)Nuts & Nut Butters: Almond, Brazil Nut, Cashew, Hazelnut, Peanut, Pecan, Macadamia, Pistachio, Pine Nut, WalnutSeeds & Seed Butters: Chia, Flax, Hemp, Poppy, Pumpkin (Kernels, Inshell, Butter), Sesame, Sunflower, Tahini, WatermelonVanilla: Whole Beans, Ground Bean Powder, Extracts, Alcohol-Free FlavoringsOils & Sweeteners: Avocado, Coconut, Flaxseed, Olive, Sunflower Oils; Agave Nectar & Powder, Cane Sugar, Coconut Sugar & Nectar, Date PasteFruits: Dried, Freeze-Dried, and Purées including Apple, Banana, Blueberry, Cherry (Sweet & Tart), Cranberry, Date, Fig, Mango, Pineapple, Strawberry, and moreGluten-Free Flours & Starches: Almond, Cassava, Rice, Tapioca, Potato, Sunflower, Macadamia, Corn Starch, Psyllium Husk, Nutritional Yeast, Spices & SeasoningsPlant-Based Proteins & Powders: Pea, Hemp, Pumpkin, Chia, and Fruit PowdersValue-Added Services:Just-in-time inventory programs, sterilization, transportation, and warehousing solutions to support scalable supply chains.

name: Crystal and MyCHELLE
description: MyCHELLE: Honesty. Transparency. Authenticity. Founded in 2000 in Colorado, MyCHELLE has been a pioneer in clean skincare from the very beginning. We create science-driven formulas inspired by nature—designed to deliver real results for all skin types.Because we care about people, animals, and the planet, we strive to go above and beyond wherever possible. MyCHELLE is cruelty-free, Clean Label Certified, and we’ve been formulating reef-friendly sun care for over a decade.All MyCHELLE products are vegetarian, cruelty-free, and formulated without phthalates, parabens, petroleum, sulfates, ureas, artificial fragrances, or artificial colors.Crystal:Since its founding over 40 years ago, CRYSTALTM has been providing an effective mineral-based line, that’s vegan, and cruelty-free. The ingredients are non-toxic and the packaging’s eco-friendly.CRYSTALTM is committed to the safety, health, and welfare of both our customers and the environment. CRYSTALTM Deodorant is a recognized leader and innovator in mineral based hypoallergenic deodorant.

name: Crystal Geyser Alpine Spring Water
description: Crystal Geyser® Alpine Spring Water® was established in 1990 as an independent, family-owned and operated enterprise, with a core founding principle: bottling spring water at its source. That principle remains exactly the same today, and it's what separates us from most other U.S. bottled water companies.

name: Cue Candle Company
description: Cue Candles is a performance-driven home fragrance brand redefining the candle experience through patented OpenWick® Technology. Designed for a cleaner burn, extended life, and optimal fragrance throw, our candles are engineered to perform as beautifully as they look.From wellness-forward scents to modern lifestyle collections, Cue blends science, design, and scent to deliver consistent quality for today’s conscious consumer. We partner with leading retailers nationwide to bring innovation to the candle aisle.

name: Culture Foods Inc dba Sourmilk
description: Sourmilk is an NYC based organic, grass-fed, greek yogurt, specifically designed for your gut, with 15g of protein, 0g of added sugar and the equivalent probiotics as a supplement. Founded by two best friends who met at Stanford, Elan and Kiki are on a mission to heal America’s gut through real whole foods. We’ve sold over 8000 yogurts by hand to customers across NYC pre-retail by building a strong and loyal follower base across social media and in-person events. Since entering retail in November 2025, Sourmilk has seen high velocities (ranging from 50-100 units per week) with only 1 SKU across 35+ doors in New York City.

name: Culture Pop Soda
description: Founder/CEO Tom First & team began selling Culture Pop out of the back of his car - an ode to his beginnings in the beverage industry 30+ years ago when starting Nantucket Nectars by selling juice off of a boat in Nantucket Harbor. Gone are the days of sugary sodas and ultra-sweet diet replacements. The carbonated soda category is being redefined by First & team by using real, simple, natural ingredients that consumers are increasingly searching for in grocery aisles.

name: CUNSA INTERNATIONAL LLC
description: Cunsa was born in 2002 in response to the growing demand for healthy nutritional products in the Latin American market that local retailers could not satisfy. They were not experts in this category, and commercial and marketing logic was not the same as mass consumption or pharma. In addition, each country had its own nutritional law restricting the import of products. Cunsa launched operations to provide customers with a comprehensive and reliable solution to develop the category of food supplements and well-being in an efficient, profitable manner, adapted to their size and market. By trusting us for the development and sustained growth of the category, retailers can solely focus on their core business.

name: Cure Hydration
description: It all started with hydration.Exercise is supposed to make you feel great, but I would get headaches and nausea after a long run or bike ride. It turns out I was just dehydrated ? along with 75% of America. I tried to drink more water, but it was a struggle to drink enough. Even when I did, I still didn't feel my best.Then I found out that hydration is about not just drinking water. You also need to replace electrolytes lost through sweat, sleep, drinking alcohol and regular daily life. Water alone can't do that. When I looked at the electrolyte drinks out there, I was shocked. They were all neon-colored and full of sugar and artificial ingredients.So I decided to make my own ? an electrolyte drink mix with only plant-based, non-GMO ingredients that tastes as good as it feels. Because when it comes to our health, we shouldn't have to make trade-offs.

name: Custom Essence, Inc.
description: Custom Essence is a fragrance design house with access to cutting-edge technology, research, and the most extensive fragrance palette including naturals and exclusive aroma ingredients. We are a leader in the development of natural fragrances and have worked with some of the largest companies that are driving the market for natural personal care products. Nature is our inspiration, permeates our culture and defines our creativity. Our fragrance experts incorporate natural ingredients into our fragrance creations to reflect nature and add depth and complexity.Our perfumery expertise empowers us to create natural accords to replicate synthetic captives that hedonically compete with their synthetic counterparts.
