Custom Essence’s technical knowledge and know-how enable our perfumers to create natural products that range from fine fragrance and personal care to home fragrance and household cleaning to pet care products.To create and deliver natural fragrances that meet the ever-evolving and specific industry regulations, our fragrance and flavor creative team is well-versed in the latest compliance seals such as ISO 9235, ISO 16128, Prop 65, EWG, Made Safe, and Safer Choice.

name: Custom Flavors
description: Custom Flavors is a family-owned and operated flavor developer and manufacturer specializing in both liquid and powder flavors. We provide formulation support and high-quality ingredients for food, beverage, and supplement applications.With a strong focus on the better-for-you, health, and wellness space, our team designs flavor systems that address the challenges of today’s functional ingredients, including fibers, plant proteins, stimulants, supplements, and vitamins. These compounds often present off-notes and formulation constraints, and we work closely with customers to mask and modulate them while optimizing flavor performance and meeting regulatory requirements.Backed by extensive industry experience, a nationwide manufacturing footprint, and a collaborative, people-first culture, we partner with businesses of all sizes to develop organic, natural, and N&A flavor solutions consumers love and products can rely on.

name: Custom Label
description: Custom Label is a leading provider of custom packaging solutions, utilizing advanced digital and flexographic printing technologies to produce high-quality printed product labels. With production facilities located in Livermore, CA and Nashville, TN, we are well suited to support your unique logistical and production needs.  Our digital presses offer flexibility for short runs and intricate designs and multiple SKUs, ensuring vibrant colors and quick turnarounds, which are ideal for businesses seeking customized or seasonal packaging. For larger production runs, our flexographic presses provide cost-effective and consistent results. Serving a diverse clientele, including industries such as food and beverage, health and wellness, household products, wine and spirits, craft beverages, and cosmetics, Custom Label provides packaging to both startups and established brands, without compromising on quality or speed.

name: D&J ORGANIC FOOD CO.,LIMITED
description: Founded in 2008, D&J Organic Food Co., Ltd. is a trusted global supplier of premium organic products, including frozen vegetables, dehydrated vegetables, snacks, and condiments. We ensure strict quality control from farm to table, serving customers worldwide.

name: Dabble & Dollop
description: Stephanie Leshney founded Dabble & Dollop in 2019, after a 20+ year career in the natural ingredients industry.  At the time, there were no innovative, new brands addressing the 2-12 yr old market, and the ones that did were either wild cartoony synthetic junk or natural/clinical looking brands, stripped of anything resembling fun.  Dabble & Dollop creates products that parents love because of our ingredient purity and safety and kids love because the fruit-forward products can be mixed to create "bath recipes". Our infant/baby products are always made with less than 10 ingredients.

name: DACE CO., LTD
description: DACE is in fact a name of a yellow, small fish, but strong and extreme clever. It can swim upstream or wander in its own ocean. Dace was established with the same image, although maintained on a small scale but with good skills, good attitude, charisma, dynamism and kindness. We want to develop our business by offering a fair deal to all involved. At Dace we are an equal opportunity employer. In fact, both in the factory and in our office, more women than men are employed. We offer our farmers not only a good minimum price for their products and a plus if the margins are good, but we also support them technically and with the schooling of the children in their families. We want to build a sustainable system with all our partners in the chain, from the farmer to the staff to our customers. By adhering to the organic standards in the whole chain, we contribute to its sustainability. Our staff, our customers and our farmers work passionately at continuous improvements. We love what we do and we do what we love.

name: Daepyung Co.,Ltd
description: Way Back Into Nature - Daepyung is No.1 Stevia manufacturer and the biggest supplier in Korea since 1993. Daepyung is looking for new partners to strengthen global business territories. With its technical support based on over 30 years of experience in South Korea market, it will offer the highest quality product at competitive pricing.

name: Daesang America, Inc.
description: As a leading global Korean food brand, O'Food offers authentic condiments and ready-to-serve meals bursting with vibrant flavors. O'Food is a producer of Korean chili paste, better known as Gochujang. The Gochujang is produced in the province of Sunchang, renowned for its quality peppers, ideal climate, and reputation as the historical "Village of Gochujang."

name: DAILY HUG COFFEE ROASTERS INC
description: After trying countless brands and exploring every roast style, we finally discovered a true game‑changer: Air Roasting. From the very first sip, we knew this method delivered something entirely different  a smooth, bitterness‑free cup with a richer aroma and the pure taste of premium coffee beans, without the burnt or harsh aftertaste that often comes from conventional roasting.We now source 100% specialty‑grade Arabica beans from world‑renowned coffee regions including Colombia, Brazil, and Ethiopia. We partner only with trusted importers who prioritize fair trade principles, traceability, and sustainable farming practices. Our selections come from cleaner, more responsible farms producing coffee that is mold‑free, pesticide‑free, and naturally cleaner from seed to sip.The result?Small‑batch roasted coffee with purpose crafted for coffee lovers, home brewers, and anyone who values quality, ethics, and exceptional flavor in every mug.

name: Dainty Foods International
description: Dainty Foods has been sourcing ricefrom around the globe for over 140 years. Today our goal remains unchanged; we expertly choose a tasteful variety of rices to provide our customers with an easy to prepare and affordable meal component.Since 2015 the company is owned by the Marbour Group, a family owned and operated company.In 2024, we invested heavily in a new microwavable pouch line to serve the North American market.Our mission is to foster a simpler life beholding strong values, startingwith cooking for loved ones and maintaining a balanced diet. We can all contribute by making daily choices to keep it simpleWe believe in:• Simple ingredients - rice is a natural whole grain.• Delivering quality products and innovative solutions• Providing excellent customer service.

name: Dairy Farmers of America
description: Deliver value to our family farm-owners as a leading global dairy cooperative.

name: Daiwa by U.S Jaclean, Inc.
description: U.S. Jaclean, Inc. is one of the leading health and wellness massage chairs distributors in the United States since 1982.  Our mission: To improve the health and wellness of Americans through quality products that can be used from the comfort of home.

name: DakotaMB
description: DakotaMB is a family-owned business in America’s heartland that has partnered with some of the largest bakeries, snack producers and cereal manufacturers in the world. We don’t have a traditional product list. This makes us truly unique. We are one of the only, if not the only, supplier in the baking and snack industries that customizes almost everything that leaves our loading dock. We source exceptional ingredients, then mill, blend or toast them for commercial bakeries and food processors.

name: DAMM
description: Damm is a Spanish brewing company founded in Barcelona in 1876 by Alsatian immigrants, August Kuentzmann Damm and his wife Melanie, to create a beer suitable for the Mediterranean climate. Initially named "Strasburger beer," it was later renamed Estrella Damm in honor of the "star" symbol. Over time, the company expanded its production beyond beer to include other beverages and diversified into logistics, catering, and hospitality services, while maintaining a commitment to natural ingredients and international expansion.

name: Dan-O's Seasoning
description: Our story begins with our founder Dan Oliver was a hungry college student. His mother had given him some chicken thighs, and rather than cook it up plain, Dan began to experiment with different homemade seasoning blends. Eventually, Dan O made the first blend of what would later become Dan-O's. He'd spend the next 15 years experimenting with this blend to perfect it, and sharing it with friends and family. During 2013, Dan was working as a bartender and longing for a more stable lifestyle, he began searching for a million dollar idea to get out. While looking, he brought a piece of his signature leftover chicken to a bar regular, who after just one bite, proclaimed "Dan, this is the best chicken I've ever had, why aren't you selling this?" Thus Dan-O's was born in 2015, and after a year of product and brand development, the first bottle was sold in 2016.Dan started with only $8,000 and relied on trade shows, flea markets, and anywhere else he could get a table to sell his signature seasoning. But after the COVID-19 pandemic that all changed. With his main source of income gone, Dan had to come up with a way to move product fast, and that's when he pivoted to social media. Dan began to make TikTok recipes where he quickly grew a large social media following with his viral videos like parmesan crusted potatoes. Since then, Dan-O's has grown a large social media following that supports both Dan and the brand, with over 3.5 million followers on TikTok, and 172k followers on Instagram. Dan continues to develop new and exciting seasonings like Dan-O's Chipotle, Crunchy, and his latest, Cheesoning with plans for more on the horizon.

name: Dandies  Vegan Marshmallows
description: Established 2007. Still making awesome vegan marshmallows today!

name: Daoher Beverage Corporation
description: DaoHer BOBA is an innovative tea company based in San Mateo, CA, revolutionizing the way the world experiences tea. Specializing in ready-to-drink tea, we blend traditional Taiwanese flavors with modern convenience to create a fun, flavorful experience for everyone.

name: Dar Baklava
description: In 2011, Sherif Badawy, a pediatrician and avid marathon runner, moved from Egypt to the United States. While he quickly adapted to his new life, there was one thing that he missed dearly: quality baklava. What he found on store shelves was a far cry from the baklava he grew up loving—bulky pieces with too much dough, barely any nuts, and drenched in syrup. As someone with a sweet tooth and a commitment to health, Sherif knew baklava could be better, both in flavor and in nutrition.Determined to create a baklava that was both delicious and healthier, Sherif spent years researching, sampling, and refining his vision. His journey took him around the world, from tasting baklava in local bakeries to working with master baklava makers in Jordan, where he found the perfect inspiration: baklava that was packed with premium nuts, minimally sweetened, and portioned for guilt-free indulgence. This discovery sparked the beginning of Dar Baklava, a modern twist on a timeless treat with "No Sticky Fingers".Our dedication to health is at the core of Dar Baklava. That's why each bite of our baklava is made with 80% premium nuts, delivering more than just rich, indulgent flavor. Nuts like pistachios, cashews, and walnuts are nutritional powerhouses. They're loaded with protein, heart-healthy fats, and essential nutrients that support everything from gut health to brain function and glowing skin. Indulgence has never been this good for you.At Dar Baklava, simplicity and quality go hand in hand. Our products is made with just four to six natural ingredients, carefully chosen to deliver the best taste and nutrition. Unlike traditional baklava, we use minimal syrup to let the natural flavors shine. Through a meticulous draining process, we ensure that only the right amount of sweetness remains—enough to enhance the rich, nutty layers without overpowering them. By skipping the excess sugar and focusing on whole, real foods, Dar Baklava is proof that flavor doesn't have to come at the cost of your health.

name: Dare Foods Inc.
description: At Breton, we believe snacks should be as vibrant and wholesome as the world around us. That's why we've crafted a tasty veggie powered snack that fits seamlessly into your balanced lifestyle. Our first ingredients are vegetables you can see. Popped, never fried, to deliver a delicious and satisfying crunch with every bite. Made with no artificial flavors or preservatives, just wholesome goodness you can trust. Perfect for fueling up, lunch packing or sharing moments with loved ones. Welcome to snacking made better with Veggie Crisps!

name: Daring
description: Founded in Los Angeles in 2018, Daring Foods produces plant-based chicken aimed to provide a healthy food alternative. The company's products include vegan meat products that are dairy and egg-free.Like many of you, we were raised on chicken. It was a staple at our family meals, a standard in our school cafeterias, and a go-to at our favorite fast food chains. It was affordable, delicious, and absolutely everywhere. It turns out that there are certain compromises that have to occur to provide us with all that chicken. How the animals are raised, what they eat, the amount of animal waste that's generated. And it's not sustainable. It might seem hard to believe, but changing your chicken might just change a lot of things. For the better.As we've become aware of the health benefits of eating more plants and the troubling aspects of producing affordable animal chicken, we were inspired to make a plant chicken for chicken lovers. Our goal is to make plant chicken that tastes incredible and to encourage more people of all diet types to introduce plant-based chicken into their daily life.

name: DASAVENA FAMILY RECIPES
description: asavena has been a family recipe for more than 30 years, baked at home for family, neighbors and friends. After many requests to sell it, we carefully enhanced the family recipe and created Dasavena. It quickly became everyone's favorite breakfast, snack and topping.Since its inception, Dasavena has achieved significant milestones, being now present in high-end supermarket chain stores such as Superama, Walmart, City Market, Fresko, HEB, Chedraui Select, Soriana and Costco in Mexico, and Central Market of HEB in Texas, US.

name: Datacor
description: Datacor is a leading provider of industry-specific solutions that help process manufacturers, chemical distributors, and engineers grow, run, and elevate their business. Backed by deep industry experience and a commitment to continuous improvement, we go beyond software to act as true partners in solving complex process challenges. For those seeking greater visibility and control, Datacor is the trusted source for proven technology and expertise to achieve great outcomes, together.Swing by Booth 4662 to see how we’re driving efficiency and growth for brands like yours. Got questions? We’ve got answers (and solutions!).

name: Date Lady, Inc.
description: Colleen's love for dates started when she and her family journeyed to the Middle East. Largely unknown in the U.S., dates were everywhere. After a couple years of bringing home suitcases of dates and date syrup, they realized the only way they could have a running supply would be to create her own company. After a lot of determination, Date Lady was established in 2012.

name: Datefix
description: datefix energy packs are revolutionizing health and wellness with their radical simplicity and reinvention of the Medjool date, transforming this nutrient-rich wonder into an ingenious, pocket-sized fuel.Powered by 20g of metabolically efficient complex carbs, 2g of fiber, and 189mg of naturally occurring potassium, it creates a steady release of energy with just 80 calories. To further enhance the experience, these velvety smooth blends are infused with a touch of orange blossom water—a delicious source of antioxidants—and an array of aromatic spices. These energy packs are suitable before, during, or after any workout, any sport…even for a 3 pm pick-me-up. datefix is the only fuel your stomach will love.

name: Dave’s Killer Bread, Inc.
description: Our story began in 2005, at the Portland Farmers Market, when Dave Dahl and his nephew brought some loaves of bread to sell. They knew they had something killer and unique, but little did they know how much these products would shake up the bread aisle.For Dave, this was more than just taking a few loaves of bread to a local market. It marked the beginning of a new chapter in his life. Though he grew up in a family of bakers, his life took a different path. A path that led to prison for a total of 15 years. But during his last sentence, he had a pivotal moment of clarity where he realized he wanted to do more with his life. He was welcomed back to the small family bakery by his older brother, Glenn. Determined to prove his worth and make a positive impact, Dave worked tirelessly to bake breads that tasted unlike anything else on the market. Packed with seeds and grains, made with only the very best organic and non-GMO ingredients. That's how we still make bread today.

name: Davids Natural Toothpaste
description: Davids is redefining modern high performance oral care.According to SPINS data, Davids is the dollar growth leader in oral care for the natural channel.Davids started in 2011 with our founder Eric David Buss standing at the sink brushing his teeth and reading the ingredients label on his toothpaste. This led him on a 4 year mission to create a better, cleaner toothpaste using naturally sourced and naturally derived ingredients.Officially launching in 2015, Eric started in his kitchen, then a small industrial space where he mixed every batch of our fluoride free toothpaste and filled every tube by hand. Fast forward to today and Davids has grown into a full line of oral care products including toothpaste, floss, mouthwash, oil pulling, toothbrushes, and tongue scrapers.Powered by our proprietary Hydroxi™ formula using the highest quality, SCCS tested and approved nano hydroxyapatite, our oral care products are designed to help remineralize enamel, reduce sensitivity, and support a healthier mouth without fluoride, sulfates, or harmful artificial ingredients.Davids leading products are EWG VERIFIED™ and made in the USA using USA origin ingredients with a focus on sustainability and reducing single use plastics. Our toothpaste comes in recyclable metal tubes that stand out on shelf with a clean, modern aesthetic.We are not just another fluoride free toothpaste brand. Davids is a science driven, mission led company committed to raising the standard of what oral care can be.Healthy mouth. Healthy you.

name: Day Out Snacks
description: I started rolling out protein balls in 2018 working as a busy pharmacist with very limited time to prepare healthy meals and snacks. For years, I struggled to find packaged snacks that met my nutritional needs. I tried to turn a blind eye to the ingredients that were in 99% of the packaged foods I was consuming including gums, emulsifiers, questionable oils, and artificial preservatives but I kept coming back to the same question: why can't these snacks just be made with REAL food? Eventually it caught up to me. I had no energy, trouble concentrating, and would often find myself skipping workouts which I used to look forward to. I realized how much of an impact our food choices have on how we feel and ultimately how we live our lives. I knew I had to create my own alternative; something that could provide the nutrition my body needed and was actually good for me. Portion size was also a big problem. After trying hundreds of protein bars over the years, I can honestly say that at least half of them went to waste because I didn't finish the entire bar at once. I could never understand why every bar came in a "one-size-fits-all" package, when everyone's nutritional needs are so different. It was me and my mixing bowl against the world. I turned to my kitchen cabinets and started rolling out nutrient-rich protein balls. By leaving out the junk and fillers, these protein-packed bites kept me full and energized for hours…satisfying both my nutritional needs and sweet tooth at the same time. Each protein ball is designed to be bite-size, providing the perfect balance of macronutrients. The idea to sell them in resealable packs is to allow for flexibility in portion size and ultimately reduce food waste. All of our recipes were crafted in a kitchen (not in a lab!). Being mindful of dietary requirements and the growing responsibility towards sustainability, we craft all of our products with 100% plant-based ingredients and our entire line is gluten free, dairy free, soy free, non-GMO, and vegan.

name: DAY-LEE FOODS
description: For over 40 years, Day-Lee Foods, a wholly owned subsidiary of Japan’s NH Foods Group, has been dedicated to sharing the joy of eating with our customers. We produce and distribute frozen food products that consistently deliver restaurant-quality taste and experience. Our national brands, Crazy Cuizine and Day-Lee Pride, anchor our portfolio and reflect our commitment to quality and consistency. Complementing our branded business, we also operate in the foodservice and co-packing sectors, delivering high-quality products and dependable manufacturing solutions nationwide.

name: Daytrip
description: In 2019, we founded our company on the belief that we all need more day trips. More impulsive adventures, good times, and memorable experiences. Because now is all we really have anyway, we believe in seizing the moment. Doing that is easier when you're happier, and happier is healthier. We use the uplifting power of plants in all our functional food and beverage products – seltzer, soda, and gummies – to help you get there. By infusing our products with botanical terpenes, naturally occurring aromatic compounds selected to elevate mood and promote calm without fatigue, we're spreading the "Daytrip Effect."

name: De Angelis USA Corp (Sfoglini Pasta)
description: In 2012, Sfoglini opened its doors Brooklyn, NY with a dream to build on the rich history of pasta making in New York and bring a superior, American produced pasta to the USA. With a mix of unique pasta designs, quality organic wheats and ingenuity, Sfoglini offered an interesting blend of shapes and flavors that stands out in the grocery aisle and on the dinner plate. Sfoglini sailed their operations up the river to New York's Hudson Valley in 2018 to a new 40,000 sq.ft. facility where Sfoglini pasta is now dreamt up, produced, packaged and shipped. Our name is inspired by the tradition of the Italian Sfogline who perfected the art of pasta making using centuries-old techniques they shared with their families and communities. Over time, their role evolved into a more professional craft and the sfogline passed their skills down through generations. At Sfoglini, we continue to honor these traditions through our innovations in shape artistry. The perfect shape enhances a meal by improving texture, sauce adherence, cooking consistency and visual appeal.With Sfoglini, it's not just a meal, it's an experience!

name: De La Calle Tepache
description: De La Calle's Tepache came to be through a series of kismet and deep love for food, culture, and travel. Entrepreneur Alex Matthews was drawn to Mexico City through his passion for food, architecture, travel and design. After venturing away from the city's more well known neighborhoods of Condesa, Roma, and Polanco, he found himself deep in the heart of the city's produce and meat markets. There, his first encounter with Tepache left him nothing short of enchanted. Refreshing and flavorful, he was astonished to find there were hundreds and hundreds of variations of this ancient Mexican beverage that existed in the tepacherias and street food stalls throughout the city. Through friends and colleagues, Alex was introduced to Rafael Martin Del Campo, a native-born Mexican who had learned how to make Tepache from his grandmother, but also studied culinary arts and food science technology. Call it fate or destiny, but Rafael's passion for fermentation and love of his cultural heritage made him the perfect partner in developing De La Calle's proprietary large scale fermentation processes. Together, they studied every variation of Tepache they could get their hands on, working hard to adapt versions that would honor both the authenticity of this ancient drink but also celebrate the innovative nature of culinary arts. Our Tepache recipes marry together traditional and modern ingredients in a quest to create something that is deeply drinkable and happy to be healthy!

name: De Silva Brothers & Company
description: We are an importer, bulk supplier and manufacturer providing R&D, co-packing and private label services for spices, seasonings and other dry ingredients. SQF Certified

name: De Soi, Inc
description: Katy Perry and Morgan McLachlan, co-founders of De Soi, first crossed paths in early 2020, both pregnant and seeking a way to unwind—without the alcohol. As creative professionals and busy moms with a shared love of spritzes, they dreamed of crafting a drink that was both bubbly and delicious, but wouldn’t get in the way of early mornings or long nights. They wanted to create something that blended their passion for plants and better-for-you ingredients with bold flavors and feel-good adaptogens. In 2022, they launched De Soi: a line of non-alcoholic apéritifs designed for moments you want to savor, whether you're enjoying a lively dinner with friends or raising a glass to yourself. A drink made for pleasure without the proof.

name: DEFI SNACKS LLC
description: As a passionate Ukrainian immigrant with a love for fitness and wholesome food, I founded DEFI Snacks to share my heritage and vision with the world. Growing up in Ukraine, I cherished buckwheat—a nutrient-rich, gluten-free staple revered for its versatility and health benefits. Determined to introduce this superfood to a global audience, I dreamed of creating a snack that married my cultural roots with my active lifestyle as a dedicated CrossFitter.As a CrossFit enthusiast, I stayed active and didn't obsess over calorie counting, but was frustrated by the snack market's reliance on sugar substitutes and lack of truly nutritious options. I craved a snack that delivered bold flavor and functional nutrition without artificial sweeteners or empty calories—something that could fuel her workouts and satisfy my sweet tooth. Traditional snacks fell short, either compromising on taste or packing in ingredients that didn't align with her health-conscious values.Inspired to fill this gap, I set out to craft a revolutionary snack. I combined my beloved buckwheat with high-quality, protein-packed chocolate, creating a gluten-free, grain-free treat that delivers 25–26 grams of protein per bag. DEFI Snacks was born—a bold fusion of indulgence and nutrition, free from sugar substitutes and designed for active individuals who want guilt-free satisfaction. My mission was clear: to empower people with a snack that celebrates heritage, fuels performance, and redefines healthy indulgence, one delicious bite at a time.

name: Del Real Foods
description: IT ALL STARTED WITH A SINGLE PIGBack in 1957, a young entrepreneur named Jesus Cardenas journeyed from his home in Jalisco, Mexico to the farmlands of southern California. With his wife, Luz, their children, and his American dream of starting his own family farm, Jesus traded in his bucket of tools for a pig. And Del Real Foods was born.Today, Del Real Foods makes tamales, carnitas, salsas, and other recipes inspired by the Cardenas' native Jalisco—all created by hand with fresh ingredients and nothing artificial. Delicious, slow-cooked meats and homemade sauces that taste like you cooked them yourself are now available at your local grocery store and ready to serve in minutes.

name: Delallo Foods
description: The George DeLallo Company is a family-owned and operated manufacturer and brand located in Jeannette, PA, since 1950. Pioneers of the olive bar concept, DeLallo is the olive and antipasti expert and category leader. Their specialty Italian grocery line includes a vast collection of over 350 gourmet ingredients: Italian pasta (gluten-free, organic whole-wheat varieties), gnocchi, 100% Italian extra virgin olive oil, pasta sauces, pesto, jarred peppers, bruschettas and a signature pizza dough kit.

name: DelGrosso Foods
description: America's Oldest Family-owned producer of pasta sauce.  We offer DelGrosso Organic sauces, including Alfredo Sauce, pasta sauces and pizza sauce.  Our specialty brand, La Famiglia DelGrosso, offers recipes created by individual family members, including pasta sauces and pizza sauce made from whole peeled imported Italian plum tomatoes, as well as our sweet & smoky sloppy joe sauce, the #2 brand in its category!

name: Delicius Rizzoli S.p.A.
description: Delicius was founded in 1974 in Parma, Italy, and has developed, produced and sold preserved fish products ever since. Over the years, it has grown from a family business to an Italian market leader, building its identity with high quality products.

name: DeLine Box Company
description: DeLine Box & Display is a family-owned, corrugated packaging manufacturer specializing in custom retail displays, club-store packaging, and high-graphic corrugated solutions for CPG brands.We help brands win at retail with fast domestic production, digital & flexo printing, and 100% recycled and post consumer recycled packaging options. From Costco trays and pallet displays to e-commerce shippers and promotional packaging, our in house design team will create structure and graphics that help you sell more product in big box retailers.We also offer fulfillment and warehousing in addition to our packaging offerings. Visit us at Booth 4499C to see how our packaging can improve your speed-to-market and elevate your brand on shelf. Email custompackaging@delinebox.com to set up a personalized meeting with one of our sales reps.

name: DELIZIE DI CALABRIA
description: A proud family-owned Italian leader in premium Calabrian food preserves since 1989. Our name «Delizie» means 'delicacies'A promise of joy,  intense flavor and uncompromising quality in every product we craft.

name: Della Rice (Specialty Rice Inc.)
description: DELLA RICE, THE NICEST RICE!Arkansas-Grown Since 1986. Reimagined for What’s Next.Founded in 1986 in Brinkley, Arkansas, Della Rice has spent nearly four decades crafting premium specialty rice rooted in farming tradition. Today, the company is proudly owned and operated by Stephen and Micah Hilsdon: lifelong members of the Brinkley community with deep roots in the rice industry and an unwavering commitment to preserving local jobs and supporting growers.Della works directly with farmers to ensure fair, competitive pricing and long-term partnerships that strengthen rural communities. As part of its next chapter, the company is investing heavily in regenerative rice practices designed to improve soil health, conserve water, and reduce environmental impact - protecting the land for future generations.At this year's Expo West, Della Rice debuts its full brand relaunch, celebrating our evolution into a vertically integrated, family-owned company committed to cleaner regenerative rice farming and built for today’s natural marketplace:• A brand-new regenerative rice line• A reintroduced and strengthened organic collection• Updated packaging across the entire portfolioDella is currently available through KeHE Nationwide, expanding in select UNFI regions, with continued national growth underway.Visit us at Natural Products Expo West in the North Hall, Booth N1901, where our chef will be cooking rotating dishes all week long, including risotto and a preview of a few other rice tricks up our sleeves!The future of rice is here... rooted in tradition, built for growth, and sustained for our families.Love, Della, The Nicest Rice.

name: Demeter Association Inc.
description: Demeter is the official certifier for the highest and oldest standards in organic, regenerative agriculture: Biodynamic. Originally founded in Germany in 1928, today it is an international federation with 63 member-countries and over 7,000 farmers worldwide. Demeter USA certifies all Biodynamic® farms and products in America, including food, wine, honey, consumer-packaged goods, supplements, cosmetics, textiles, seeds and compost.At the heart of Biodynamic farming is a deep reverence for nature, and a recognition that everything in nature is interconnected and interacting. The Biodynamic Method views each farm as its own unique, living ecosystem, and it strives to create a balanced, harmonic system in which fertility is generated from within and pests are subdued naturally.Biodynamic farmers read the land’s inherent tendencies, they nurture wild species as well as cultivated ones, they integrate animals thoughtfully and humanely, they rely on compost, cover-crops and crop rotations to promote soil health, and they choose diverse and regionally adapted seeds. These practices empower farmers to align with nature, and they create abundant farm systems that are regenerative and resilient. The Demeter label represents the highest standards in organic, regenerative agriculture and in gentle processing techniques. It is a promise to consumers that the product is grown in a responsible relationship with nature, and that it is among the most vital, flavorful, and nourishing products available on the market today.

name: Desert Creek / TreeHive
description: We've come a long way from our founder delivering honey before school in his grandfather's 1988 pickup. Now, 20 years later, with the help of an incredible team, Desert Creek has become one of the nation's largest beekeeping and honey companies. Driven by passion for real honey and sustainable beekeeping, Desert Creek is one of the only remaining companies fully integrated in raising, packaging, researching, and educating on bees. This dedication to our legacy ensures that we will always be beekeepers first.Our honey is raw, unfiltered, and straight from the hive. With innovative varieties such as Honey +, Honest Raw Honey, Texas Style Hot Honey, and more, Desert Creek leads the way in bringing real honey to everyone. We also are proud to introduce the Tree Hive brand - bringing innovative, functional breakfast syrups and pancake mixes to the market. Stop by our booth and sample our products, grab some giveaways, and see our live beehive!

name: Desert Dust
description: Founded by Rick Marino in the Coachella Valley, Desert Dust was born from the belief that great flavor starts with great local ingredients. Every blend features locally sourced, dehydrated California dates as a natural sweetener, paired with carefully selected spices to create dynamic, memorable flavor. The result is a clean-label seasoning line that is premium, approachable, and deeply rooted in the California desertTrust The Dust.

name: Desi Fresh Foods, LLC
description: Desi Fresh Foods, LLC (DFF - www.desifreshfoods.com )  based in Farmingdale, NY, is a manufacturer & seller of "cultured" dairy products like Yogurt (Conventional Swiss Style), Dahi, Greek, Labneh, Yogurt Drinks and Yogurt Smoothies, Lassi, Paneer Cheese, Dips & Sour Cream.  DFF helps consumers of refrigerated South Asian food to celebrate life through Indian food and boasts the two #1 brands of Indian style yogurt / dahi – Desi Natural & Noga.  A combination of strong Asian Indian population growth + the rising popularity of South Asian food within the general population, represents a big opportunity for Desi Fresh Foods and our partners to drive incremental category growth and profit.

name: deSIAM Cuisine (THAILAND) Co.,Ltd.
description: SIAM is a family business founded in 2008 by Marisa, Hervé and Chana, to offer food enthusiasts a choice of genuine Thai ingredients and cooking solutions. SIAM gives you the ability to put together luscious Thai food. From the Land of Smiles to putting a smile on your face from the comfort of your kitchen, SIAM promises unforgettable moments around Thai food.

name: Designer Protein, LLC
description: Designer Wellness has been an innovation led brand since 1993. Our goal is to deliver healthful convenience that makes lives better.

name: Devansoy
description: Devansoy is your Number One Oat & Soy Solution.  We produce liquid and powder plant-based protein ingredients.

name: Dewey’s Bakery
description: Since 1930, Dewey's has been a beloved local bakery brand in Winston-Salem North Carolina, creating delicious, unique, and high quality sweet and savory treats that reflect Southern flavors and traditions. Dewey's has helped generations of families celebrate birthdays, Holidays and life milestones with their scrumptious bakery favorites.

name: DFX Powerball
description: At DFXPowerball, we build tools that make training smarter, recovery faster, and performance better. As the original creators of the Powerball Gyro, we deliver powerful gyroscopic resistance in the palm of your hand.For over 30 years, athletes, trainers, medical professionals, gamers, and musicians have trusted Powerball Gyros to strengthen hands, wrists, and forearms, improve mobility, and support recovery. You create the resistance, and the faster you spin, the stronger it becomes, powered entirely by you.Compact, precise, and built for real-world performance, Powerball Gyros are trusted worldwide across fitness, wellness, and rehabilitation communities. DFXPowerball remains the official distributor of the original Powerball Gyro, continuing a legacy of innovation, quality, and performance.

name: Diamond Crystal Salt Co.
description: Diamond Crystal Salt Co. places great importance on tradition and quality. Our Kosher Salt Flakes are produced in the same facilities our founders used since 1886 and are uniquely crafted to enhance their natural properties. We pay attention to the little things and focus on maintaining the values that generations before us have established.  The core of our brand heritage is our Diamond Crystal Salt Co. Kosher Salt Flakes which appear as a staple in many culinary schools, and are faithfully used by high-profile chefs and cookbook authors. Diamond Crystal Salt Co. Kosher Salt Flakes stand out from the rest as an additive free product that is produced without any form of mechanical compaction. The carefully crafted crystal shape contributes to the many functions our Salt Flakes offer including seasoning control, strong adherence to food surfaces, and a salty burst when bit into. They even contain 53% less sodium by volume compared to table salt.  While we are beloved by restaurant professionals, Diamond Crystal Salt Co. products are now available for home chefs that are carrying on their own culinary traditions while crafting new recipes to share with family and friends.

name: Diamond Foods
description: Since 1912, when we were founded by a group of walnuts growers, Diamond of California has offered fresh, exceptional quality and great tasting culinary nuts for every occasion.  From whole or chopped to sliced and slivered, we offer a wide range of commodities and sizes for both inshell and kernels.

name: DIPASA USA, INC.
description: Dipasa USA is a prominent importer, manufacturer, and distributor specializing in sesame ingredients, agave nectar, and sesame products. With a strong reputation in the industry, we have consistently supplied bulk, food service, and private label retail products, along with offering reliable co-packing services. At Dipasa, we prioritize the safety and quality of our ingredients, providing customers with peace of mind. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our SQF and NOP Organic certifications, as well as our Kosher and Non-GMO verification certification. We take pride in delivering superior ingredients and excellent service for our customers.

name: Dirty Supplements
description: The Dirty Story Dirty Supplements, powered by Uprooted Extracts LLC, exists because we believe in the edge that nature can provide the human mind and body. But unlocking that edge means not cutting corners. That's why all our mushrooms are grown and processed ourselves, creating a full-spectrum mushroom extract from the fruiting bodies and mycelium. Finally, it means ensuring that we're leading with efficacy to benefit your body.

name: Distribution bobba inc.
description: Bobba's journey started with a love for traditional bubble tea and a vision to innovate for the North American audience. What we saw in the market was a modern version of bubble tea that often contained over 60 grams of sugar and an array of artificial ingredients. This sparked our mission to create something healthier and all-natural. We became a world-first in the bubble tea industry by developing a premium product that not only uses popping boba instead of the conventional tapioca but also significantly reduces sugar content to just 12-15 grams per serving. What sets us apart even further is our packaging; Bobba is the first and, to this day, the only bubble tea brand to offer a premium glass bottled version. This commitment to quality and innovation reflects in every bottle of Bobba – less sugar, completely natural, and a uniquely enjoyable experience.

name: Ditsch USA
description: Since 1919 Ditsch has been delighting consumers when Master Baker Wilhelm Ditsch founded a bakery in Mainz, Germany. Ditsch brought this Pretzel Passion to the U.S. where you can experience the joy and pleasure of an authentic German style pretzel. Our pretzels are perfect for all occasions from snacking to being part of meals, parties, events, family gatherings, or enjoying them on the go!

name: DIVERSIFIED AVOCADO PRODUCTS INC
description: Thanks to a great business vision, in 1957 Grupo Alejandrina set itself the goal of producing avocados that offered all the characteristics of export quality, and this is how the Mexican Hass avocado was born, grown in the lands of Uruapan, Michoac·n; Place that has the best environment of altitude and soil characteristics that allow its cultivation all year round. This initiative managed to cross borders the Mexican Hass avocado and Uruapan was given the designation of "Cradle and World Capital of Avocado".With this same vision, Grupo Alejandrina joined efforts growing vertically to integrate several companies that supported the export quality demanded by the United States market in the 90s; so packing and processing companies of avocado, as well as the inputs required by the process, joined this production chain, being the first to cross the border into the United States with trucks loaded with Mexican Hass avocado, complying with all export certifications that endorse the group as the best in the market.

name: Dixie Grace's Boiled Peanuts
description: More than a peanut, an experience. Dixie Grace's Boiled Peanuts brings a time-honored global tradition to modern snacking with boiled peanuts made from only 4 organic ingredients. Vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO, and packed with 7g of plant protein, we're redefining what a satisfying snack can be.

name: DO IT Organic
description: DO IT Organic is a leading organic food company active in the supply chain of 100% organic food ingredients and organic consumer products. As a specialist in organic food ingredients with over 30 years of experience in the industry, we partner globally with producers to source a wide portfolio of only the highest-quality organic products.Our mission is to change the entire food chain to 100% organic food ingredients, which is why we work together with a network of organic farmers on local projects.

name: Do the right thing snacks
description: Three food founders (Rap Snacks, Zapps, and Snacklins) teamed up to bring healthier snacking options to the masses. With self owned manufacturing we decided to launch a better for you brand that uses high quality fresh ingredients

name: Dolca Sugar
description: Every parent knows the guilt.You're trying to do right by your family. Cut the sugar. Read the labels. Make better choices.But then your daughter asks you to bake cookies. Your son wants his favorite pancakes. And suddenly you're staring at a bag of sugar wondering: Am I a bad parent if I say yes?That's where Dolca began.In 2022, a Southern California dad—a food product developer by trade, a father by calling—hit a wall. He wanted to lower his family's sugar intake without turning every meal into a negotiation. Without swapping real flavor for chemical aftertaste. Without becoming the parent who says "no" to every birthday cake and holiday tradition.The "healthy sugar" options on the market? They failed his kids' taste test. The zero-calorie sweeteners? They tasted like regret. The "natural alternatives"? They turned his wife's recipes into science experiments.So he spent three years in his kitchen, running trials, testing formulas, refusing to compromise.The breakthrough came when he stopped trying to replace sugar and started trying to improve it. What if you could keep real cane sugar—the taste, the texture, the way it caramelizes and dissolves—but make it work harder for your body?Dolca Slim was born: 75% cane sugar, 25% prebiotic fiber. One ingredient does the sweetening. The other does the supporting. Together, they give you the same sweetness with 25% less sugar per serving, while feeding your gut microbiome with every spoonful.No chemical aftertaste. No failed recipes. No guilt.Just sugar, reimagined.Today, Dolca helps thousands of families bake, sweeten, and enjoy—without choosing between health and happiness. Because wellness shouldn't mean sacrifice. It should mean smarter ingredients that let you say "yes" more often.Dolca Slim: Real cane sugar + soluble fiber. 1:1 usage. 25% less sugar. Zero compromises.Dolca Panela: Unrefined cane sugar the way it's been made for generations—evaporated cane juice with its molasses and minerals intact. Depth of flavor. Touch of nourishment. Pure tradition.This is sugar for real life. For real families. For the moments that matter.Welcome to Dolca.

name: Dole Packaged Foods, LLC
description: In 1899 James Dole arrived in Hawaii with $1000 in his pocket, a Harvard degree in business and horticulture and a love of farming. He began by growing pineapples. After harvesting the world's sweetest, juiciest pineapples, he started shipping them back to mainland USA. To enable as many people as possible to enjoy this delicious fruit, he developed a technique for canning them. He wanted to make the sunshine and taste of Hawaiian pineapples available for everyone. This is how he built the Company: on a reputation of quality. And it remains true to this day. For more than 120 years, Dole's mission has been to deliver high-quality products with positive impact on people, planet and prosperity. We envision a world where good nutrition and wellness fuels prosperity for both people and planet. And this begins with harnessing the goodness of the earth.

name: DongFang Bridge Paraguay SA
description: Nutritiva Store began in May 2017 with a simple vision: to meet the growing demand for truly healthy products. What started as a bridge between customers and suppliers of exclusive wellness foods soon grew into something greater.Guided by passion and purpose, we became food creators, opening our own production center in San Lorenzo. There, we craft nourishing, low-calorie favorites—savory pies, wholesome snacks, and a variety of desserts—all made without sugar or refined flours.What started as a small dream has grown into a unique journey of health, flavor, and innovation—so more people can enjoy food that truly fuels their lives.

name: Dongguan Poly Smarts Packaging Co., Ltd.
DONGHWACNF CO., LTD
description: Since our establishment in 2008, BOBMOOS has been dedicated to delivering the richness of Korean traditional food culture to the global market. With substantial investment in product development and great efforts in overseas expansion, we achieved an annual sales turnover of 100 million USD last year. Currently, our export network spans 26 countries, including the United States, Canada, and regions across Asia (Japan, China, Hong Kong, Singapore, Taiwan, Philippines, Thailand, Mongolia), Europe (Italy, Netherlands, France, Germany, Austria, Belgium, Denmark, Luxembourg, Poland, Spain), as well as the UK, Australia, Mexico, and Russia.As our brand recognition grew globally, we began to reflect on the rising well-being trends and posed a fundamental question: How can we enhance the image of Korean food as both delicious and healthy? The answer, we found, lies in the ingredients.This led to the development of our Tteokbokki Snack with natural ingredients—a product that retains the authentic flavor of Korea's beloved street food while offering a cleaner, healthier formulation. It represents our first step toward merging tradition with wellness. We strongly believe this innovation will help broaden the appeal of K-food, particularly in health-conscious markets like North America.Participating in Natural Products Expo West is a strategic move to share our commitment to clean, natural ingredients with a global audience. It is also an opportunity to connect with like-minded partners who value sustainability, health, and cultural authenticity. We are excited to showcase how Korean food can be both flavorful and good for you—and to lead the next wave of K-food innovation in the global natural food industry.

name: Dongwon
description: In the heart of culinary passion and a commitment to wellness, Vivid was born from the vision of transforming traditional Korean food into a celebration of health and flavor. Our journey began with a simple yet powerful idea: to provide the public with healthier Korean food options that cater to diverse dietary needs, embracing the growing demand for mindful eating.Inspired by the vibrant tapestry of Korean cuisine, we embarked on a mission to reimagine classic dishes, introducing vegan-friendly, low-carb, low-calorie, and sugar-free alternatives without compromising the authentic and bold flavors that make Korean food truly exceptional. Vivid is not just a brand; it's a culinary revolution, a fusion of tradition and innovation, where taste meets nourishment.Our chefs, dedicated artisans of flavor, meticulously craft each dish with passion and precision. Every roll, every bite, is a testament to our commitment to quality and the belief that healthy eating should be an indulgent experience. We source the finest ingredients, from crisp vegetables to premium grains, ensuring that every Vivid creation is a symphony of taste, texture, and nutritional goodness.But Vivid is more than just a purveyor of healthy Korean cuisine; it's a community-driven endeavor. We are here to inspire individuals to make mindful choices, to savor the joy of eating well, and to create shared moments of connection around the table. Our brand is a celebration of life, health, and the vibrant spirit that makes Korean food a global sensation.As we continue to grow, our story unfolds with each person who embraces a Vivid lifestyle – a journey marked by flavorful exploration, conscious choices, and a deep appreciation for the harmonious blend of tradition and innovation. Join us on this culinary adventure, where every dish tells a story of well-being, and every bite is a step towards a healthier, more vibrant life. This is Vivid – where health meets flavor, and every meal is a masterpiece.

name: DoorDash
description: DoorDash (NASDAQ: DASH) is a technology company that connects consumers with their favorite local businesses in more than 30 countries across the globe. Founded in 2013, DoorDash builds products and services to help businesses innovate, grow, and reach more customers. DoorDash is your door to more: the local commerce platform dedicated to enabling merchants to thrive in the convenience economy, giving consumers access to more of their communities, and providing work that empowers.

name: Dorot Gardens
description: Kayco is a family-owned company that is the merger of Kedem Foods, Kenover Marketing and B&W Foods, made to incorporate all of our food products. Kayco is unique in its capability to handle a multi-brand portfolio that includes competing products- creating added value for the customers while maintaining a competitive edge. We have a robust market presence in every key market.

name: Doughlicious - The London Dough Co USA
description: Craving the world’s most irresistible cookie dough? Welcome to Doughlicious! From whipping up treats in her kitchen to becoming London’s cookie queen, Kathryn Bricken turned her American baking magic into a sweet success story. Her legendary homemade cookies, crafted with clean, premium ingredients and free from artificial nasties, sparked such a frenzy among friends—who begged for her secret dough to bake at home—that she knew she had to share her creation with the world. Combining the finest ethically sourced ingredients with her entrepreneurial spirit, this dough-obsessed mum launched Doughlicious The London Dough Co in 2017, transforming her passion for bringing people together through wholesome, indulgent treats into a delicious reality.

name: Dr Ginger's Healthcare Products LLC
description: Look, Dr. Ginger Price might be a rockstar in the cosmetic dentistry world (with 35+ years running her own dental office), and she might be one of the most loved dentists in general too, but we want you to look at that smile.Seriously. Grab a color meter and test her teeth and it'll read: "perfect white." Not, off-white, not mother of pearl, not vanilla, but *BAM* shiny bright perfect white.She is obsessed with oral care and she knows a thing or two about keeping teeth clean, bright, and healthy. And she's used her vast knowledge of oral care to craft the perfect oral care system using coconuts. Pretty incredible, we think.

name: Dr. Bronner's
description: Dr. Bronner's was founded in 1948 by Emanuel Bronner, a third-generation master soapmaker from a German-Jewish soapmaking family. He used the labels on his superb ecological soaps to spread his message that we must realize our transcendent unity across religious & ethnic divides or perish: "We are All-One or None!" Dr. Bronner used all of his profits to further his mission and support various sustainable projects and causes. Still family-owned and run, Dr. Bronner's honors the vision of our founder by continuing to make socially and environmentally responsible products of the highest quality, and dedicating our profits to help make a better world.

name: Dr. In The Kitchen / Flackers
description: At Flackers, we embarked on a journey to reimagine snacking. Our story begins with a passion for wholesome ingredients that fuel and nourish. Flackers were originally developed by a doctor in Minneapolis, as a healthy snack for clients experiencing a variety of dietary challenges. After gaining notoriety within the gluten-free community, Flackers made their grocery store debut in 2008 and can now be found in over 3000 stores nationwide. More than decade later, co-founder and CEO Donn Kelly remains dedicated to crafting nutrient-rich, plant-based snacks that make it easier for everyone to live the healthy lifestyle they deserve. We manage our own manufacturing and are a collaborative member of the rich and thriving food entrepreneurial community in the Midwest.

name: Dr. Kellyann
description: At Dr. Kellyann, we believe that health is the foundation of happiness, and that true transformation starts from within. Guided by the expertise of Dr. Kellyann Petrucci, a pioneering naturopathic physician and weight-loss specialist for over 25 years, our mission is clear: to empower you to become the healthiest, strongest, and most vibrant version of yourself.Dr. Kellyann has dedicated her career to unlocking the power of nature’s most nourishing foods, creating collagen-rich formulas and lifestyle plans that are easy to follow. Her innovative approach has helped millions shed stubborn belly fat, calm digestive issues, and achieve radiant, youthful skin—all while nourishing the body at its deepest cellular levels.Rooted in science and backed by decades of experience, Dr. Kellyann products and programs have revolutionized health and wellness, making it accessible and achievable for everyone. Whether you’re looking to lose weight, support your gut health, or enhance your natural beauty, Dr. Kellyann’s tools are designed to help everyone thrive.More than a brand, Dr. Kellyann is a movement. A promise to remind you that you deserve to feel beautiful, strong, and alive—because when you feel good in your body, the magic will happen.Welcome to the Dr. Kellyann family, where vibrant health meets lasting results.

name: Dr. Mercola | NHP LLP
description: Dr. Mercola founded Mercola.com in 1997 to share his own health experiences, spread vital health information and promote natural ways to achieve optimal health. He aims to ignite a transformation of the fatally flawed health care system in the U.S., and to empower people to take control of their health with regenerative practices and informed consent principles.

name: Dr. Pharm USA Inc.
description: Dr Pharm USA provides global-leading Solid Dosage Manufacturing Machinery, offering tailored solutions for complex needs

name: Dr. Praeger's
description: Tasty Meet VeggieAt Dr. Praeger's we believe that veggies were meant to be enjoyed, not by hiding what makes them good, but by making them incredibly flavorful and crave-able. We offer delicious options for kids and adults to enjoy at mealtime and snack time that just happen to be made from veggies.Try a Little EasierDr. Praeger's makes it super easy to love veggies. You don't have to compromise on taste or spend time you don't have on shopping, planning and prep. If Dr. Praeger's is in your freezer, a quick, convenient and veggie-ful meal or snack is just minutes away.Born from a MissionDr. Praeger's was founded over 30 years ago by two heart surgeons who saw their patients struggle to eat better. They knew that healthier options would only do people good if they were delicious enough for everyone to enjoy. Today, we continue to craft the food adults and kids alike love that just happens to be made with veggies.

name: Dr. Squatch
description: Inspired by a love of natural products, our founder Jack began creating his own natural soap in his garage. He also knew there must be other guys out there who wanted better products with natural ingredients and manly scents. With that, Dr. Squatch was born! Millions of happy customers later, the Dr. Squatch mission remains the same - to raise the bar for natural products and change the way men approach their personal care.

name: Dr. Wellnosh
description: Dr Wellnosh began the way most meaningful ideas do, out of frustration. In the summer of 2023, I found myself having the same conversation over and over with my partner, who is a holistic health coach and a mom of four. We were both asking why it was so hard to find a snack that actually tasted good, delivered real protein, and wasn't made with seed oils, fillers, or empty calories. She struggled to find clean, functional options she felt good giving to her kids or recommending to clients, and I was watching my GLP-1 patients struggle to get enough real protein and consistent nourishment throughout the day. We were seeing the same problem from two different angles, and it became clear that the solution we needed didn't exist.That's how Smart Protein Chips were born. We wanted a chip that people genuinely enjoyed but that also served a purpose. No fake protein, no fillers, no seed oils, no misleading claims, just clean fuel that supports wellness. We chose fava beans as our base because they're one of the cleanest and most sustainable plant protein sources. We use avocado oil instead of seed oils. And we formulated each bag to provide 15g of real, usable protein with balanced macros that actually make a nutritional difference.What started in 2023 as a simple idea has grown into a purpose-driven brand for real families, real patients, and anyone who wants snacks that align with how they're trying to live: active, health-conscious, on the go, or simply wanting to feel better in their bodies. Dr Wellnosh is about creating clean, functional, satisfying snacks.Expo West marks an exciting chapter for us. We're here to show that chips don't have to be empty calories they can be smart, protein-packed, and genuinely supportive of wellness. Smart Protein Chips are the standard we wished existed and decided to create.

name: Dr. Woods Products, LLC
description: Dr. Woods began in 2007 with the goal of blending organic fair trade shea butter with Olive oil, Hemp oil and Coconut oil to create the perfect soap that would moisturize the skin with each and every cleanse.  Dr. Woods formed long lasting relationships with Shea Butter Cooperatives in Ghana, Senegal, Nigeria and Burkina Faso that provided economic opportunity for those areas while providing the finest quality Shea Butter and Black Soap for our Dr. Woods products.  Dr. Woods was the first to liquify Raw Black soap into a user friendly body care product.

name: Dr.Bee's Honeyland Canada
description: Founded in 1996 by Dr. Ron Lin (PhD Bee Science, SFU), our products are created by a team who understands bees better than anyone and what their hive treasures can do for human health. Ron experienced the true potential of honey bee products when his mother-in-law was recovering from surgery. Ron produced honey, bee propolis, and royal jelly as a supportive recovery treatment and after including it into her diet, his mother-in-law's health improved dramatically. To this day, Ron's unwavering passion and commitment to innovation serve as the driving force behind the brand, crafting premium, all-natural honey bee products that promote health and happiness in everyone's life.Our flagship product, Ice Honey, was born from this goal. This internationally award-winning glacier white honey boasts a velvety smooth texture and a delicate sweetness. Originating from the nectar of wildflowers found downstream of the Canadian Rocky Mountains, it is a 3-time winner of the gold award at the Honey London Quality Awards. It was also crowned as one of the top honeys at the bi-yearly international bee congress, Apimonda, in 2019. Using a gentle cold extraction method, it retains its natural taste and aroma resulting in a pleasantly complex taste profile. To ensure authenticity and a high quality standard, Dr. Bee's Ice Honey is 3rd party lab tested by Intertek. Intertek is a global leader in honey analysis and tests for adulteration and over 300 different pesticides, herbicides, and antibiotics.

name: Dragon Herbs
description: Founded in 1996 by Ron and Yanlin Teeguarden, Dragon Herbs emerged from their lifelong dedication to discovering and delivering the world's finest herbs and superfoods. Their journey began in 1993 with major herbal projects, leading to the creation of Dragon Herbs.Ron, a Master Herbalist with over forty years of experience, has studied herbalism across Asia and America. He promotes the "art of glowing health" and has authored several books on tonic herbalism. Yanlin, the CEO, oversees all operations, ensuring the highest quality products.Together, they built Dragon Herbs into a beacon of quality, enhancing health and vitality through traditional Chinese herbal medicine.

name: Dress It Up Dressing
description: We believe the best flavor comes from the simplest recipes — where the ingredients can really shine. With pure ingredients and outstanding flavor, Dress It Up Dressing raises the standard of quality in the salad dressing set for customers seeking convenience without compromise.Our unique and premium products challenge category stalwarts by bringing award-winning flavor without the shortcuts: no seed oils, no excess sugar, no gums or thickeners, and no water. We use only pure, recognizable ingredients — including 100% olive oil, fresh garlic, Dijon mustard, and balsamic vinegar — to create a dressing that reflects modern consumer's preferences and tastes.14 years ago, founder Sophia Maroon began sharing her homemade dressings with neighbors and friends, who shared it with their friends, until a local Whole Foods caught wind and asked to stock it in their store. Now, Dress It Up Dressing is being delivered to neighborhoods and grocery stores all over the country.When a recipe works, you don’t rewrite it.

name: Drippy Dip
description: We started Drippy with a simple frustration: cheese dips should be better than this.Too many options on the shelf were packed with artificial dyes, questionable oils, and ingredients you wouldn't use at home—yet still called themselves "cheese." The flavor never lived up to the promise, and the ingredients definitely didn't.So we set out to fix it.Drippy is built on one non-negotiable: real cheese comes first. No seed oils. No artificial dyes or flavors. No shortcuts. Just real ingredients, made the right way, for people who actually care about what they're eating—but still want food that's fun.We didn't want to reinvent cheese dips. We wanted to make them honest.The kind you'd proudly serve at a party. The kind you keep stocked for weeknights. The kind that makes chips, veggies, pretzels, mac and cheese—honestly, everything—taste better.Drippy is bold, a little nostalgic, and completely unapologetic about flavor. It's here for game days and dinner upgrades. For indulgence without the regret. For people who read labels but still want to drip their chip.Because when food is made right, you don't need gimmicks.You just need real cheese.

name: Drizzilicious, Natural Endurance, & Smart Fries by Snack Innovations
description: Opening first in 2009 we developed a love for better-for-you snacks, especially rice cakes.  Since mom handed us our first rice cake covered in peanut butter, we knew there was an element missing! We built on that wisdom and added a drizzle of intelligence. We enhanced them even further with quinoa, chia, and flax. Then expertly popped them to create a delicious 21 pieces/90 calories snack for the whole family to enjoy!

name: Dropi
description: Dropi offers cold processed, clean cod liver oil made exclusively from freshly sourced Atlantic Cod, free from additives and artificial ingredients. Discover the purest Extra Virgin Cod Liver Oil from Iceland.

name: Dropout Companies
description: We saw a frozen category that hadn't evolved in decades and a generation of shoppers who wanted cleaner, high-protein, convenient food that actually tastes great.Jams launched first in Walmart, quickly becoming one of the fastest-growing frozen brands in the country. Our sandwiches use real fruit jelly, no seed oils, no high fructose corn syrup, and pack 10 grams of protein per serving. What started as a small team rethinking a childhood favorite has turned into a national movement to make food nostalgic, clean, and cool again.

name: Dropps
description: Messy lives. Clean conscience. That’s the idea behind Dropps: We believe the products people rely on every day to clean their homes should deliver powerful performance without compromising human or environmental health. Dropps creates high-performance laundry detergents, laundry additives, and dishwasher detergents pods designed to clean as effectively as leading conventional brands while using thoughtfully sourced, safer ingredients. With more than 30 years of expertise developing biobased cleaning technology, our formulas tackle tough stains, odors, and everyday messes while reducing unnecessary additives and plastic packaging. Dropps products feature USDA Certified Biobased content and are Cradle to Cradle Material Health Certified and Leaping Bunny cruelty-free. As a Public Benefit Corporation and certified B Corp, we’re proving that effective cleaning and responsible chemistry can go hand in hand—delivering solutions for messy lives and a clean conscience.   dropps.com | @dropps

name: DrTung’s Products, Inc.
description: As the #1 Brand in Oral Care Tools (SPINS*), DrTung’s elevates everyday oral care into something smarter, cleaner, and more connected. We believe a healthy mouth is the gateway to whole-body wellness, and our holistic approach reflects that philosophy.Rooted in Ayurvedic principles and guided by both nature and science, our thoughtfully crafted, biocompatible products are designed to work with your body—not against it. From our signature Floss and iconic Tongue Cleaner to our Herbal Toothpowder Tabs, these essentials turn your daily oral care ritual into a simple, effective act of self-care. Clinical studies, industry rankings, and glowing product reviews consistently validate their intelligent function, superior design, and proven performance.As a proudly cruelty-free company, ethics aren’t optional—they’re foundational. We do not tolerate child labor, animal testing, or “Forever Chemicals” in our products. Clean ingredients and responsible sourcing are part of our promise.Sustainability is more than a buzzword for us. Over the past two years, we’ve reduced single-use plastic by 90% across our packaging and products. FSC-certified paperboard, along with recyclable, reusable, and biodegradable materials, are thoughtfully integrated into our packaging and design choices to minimize environmental impact without compromising quality.At DrTung’s, we’re creating a cleaner, kinder, and more effective way to care for your mouth—because oral care should feel good, do good, and make a lasting difference.

name: Drumroll Snacks
description: Hassan Safieddine and Ryan Brothers are millennials who were introduced as cubicle neighbors in their corporate finance office. This dreary space was about all they thought they shared in common. Unbeknownst, it was the exact opposite:  Each was a former professional athlete (Basketball for Hassan & Snowboarding for Ryan), lived health-conscious lifestyles, and regularly snacked on the same high protein / low sugar bars.While their coworkers often started the day with doughy, soft donuts - this dynamic duo attempted to stay true to their love of health by substituting with protein bars based on bakery classics such as Maple Glazed Donut, Sprinkled Donut & Birthday Cake.  Like clockwork, the time would strike 2:45 pm and they'd have to throw wads of paper at one another to keep awake. They always got hit hard with the afternoon sugar crash and lack of energy.  As their friendship blossomed, conversations changed from the weather to deep questions of purpose, as the discus what they were doing in their finance careers, and why they gave up donuts for highly processed bars that had almost as much sugar and none of the satisfaction that real confectionary treats always delivered.A few cups of coffee later and [what would become] Drumroll Snacks was born. The dream was clear, recreate the classic donuts we all grew up with - only healthy.The challenge was to not compromise on the fluffy texture, cakey consistency, or glaze-y finish.After hundreds of recipe fails, a small round cakey perfection drenched in melted chocolate glaze was created?

name: DryWater Inc.
description: I started DryWater as a result of my own health struggles and frustrations. Despite having what I thought was the perfect diet and an active lifestyle, I was having health issues – triggered by a relentless cycle of headaches, fatigue, and depression caused by chronic dehydration. In the beginning, DryWater was solely for my own consumption, a solution born out of necessity. But my vision expanded, and I realized that what I had created could benefit so many others who were struggling with similar issues. Today, DryWater is not just for me; it's for all. I continue to incorporate it into my daily routine, a true testament to its effectiveness and a reminder of why I started this journey in the first place. To be properly hydrated is to feel alive; it's addicting, and yet so many overlook it every day. After 3 years and 49 iterations, we're proud to share the cleanest, most complete, and nourishing hydration powder on earth.

name: DTO Law
description: DTO Law is a boutique law firm with offices in California and New York.  The firm has a heavy emphasis on the defense of CPG companies, including in false advertising class actions.

name: Dufour Pastry Kitchens
description: Women-owned and Bronx based, Dufour Pastry Kitchens has produced award-winning frozen pastry doughs and ready-to-bake tart shells for over 40 years. Dufour Pastry Kitchens has maintained its reputation for developing both traditional and trend-setting products to suit the needs of chefs, caterers, and home cooks who won't settle for less than the best. Dufour works behind the scenes to save you time and labor with absolutely no compromise. The distinctive and unwavering quality of Dufour's products has earned the reputation as "The Chef's Secret Source."

name: DURUKAN SEKERLEME SAN. TIC. A.S
description: At Magical Moods, we believe candy should bring a smile, not just with taste but with the story behind it. We create organic sweets that are playful, colorful, and full of natural goodness—treats that everyone, from kids to adults, can enjoy with peace of mind.Our journey began with a simple idea: to turn the magic of nature into delightful confections. Every product we make is crafted with certified organic ingredients and carries both USDA and EU certifications. Free from artificial additives, preservatives, or synthetic flavors, our candies celebrate authentic taste while staying true to clean-label values.But the magic doesn't stop at what's inside. We care about how our products are shared, wrapped, and enjoyed. From lollipops with eco-friendly paper sticks to bonbons, chewy candies, and coated delights, our portfolio offers something for every sweet moment. All of our packaging is made from recyclable materials and designed to reflect the purity and playfulness of our recipes—with soft natural tones, cheerful icons, and clear certification labels that make choosing Magical Moods easy and transparent.What makes us special is the balance we bring: indulgence that feels joyful yet responsible, simple yet creative, fun yet mindful. We want our candies to spark happy moments while also standing for values that matter today—authenticity, inclusivity, and sustainability.At Magical Moods, every treat is more than just a sweet—it's a little piece of magic inspired by nature. And we're excited to share that magic with you.

name: E LABELS INC
description: We are a family ran business serving the industry for 25 years. The printing industry has always been a passion of CEO Carlos, driving him to work hard, innovate, and build a company dedicated to quality and efficiency. What sets us apart from local competitors is our ability to complete orders within 24 hours. At the heart of everything we do is our commitment to delivering excellence—one label at a time.

name: E&E Foods
description: 49th Star was re-founded in 2025. Originally owned by our Canadian parent company, 49th Star was revived by E&E Foods, and launched many more products under the 49th Star trademark.

name: E. Formella & Sons
description: Back in the early 1900s, Enrico Formella journeyed to America from his native Sicily. Like many others, he dreamed of a better life in America along with his new wife Rosina, whom he married on the ocean voyage to the land of freedom. Enrico and Rosina brought with them the rich traditions and tastes of Old World Sicily. After several successful business ventures, Enrico and Rosina began sharing their special family recipe of Giardiniera ("jar-di-nair-ah") with their new friends and neighbors. Word soon spread around their south side Chicago neighborhood that E.Formella & Sons giardiniera was indeed special!Over 100 Years and three generations later, E. Formella & Sons proudly uses the same Old World attitude in all of our fine products.  Randy and Kathy Formella continue on with the family tradition of E. Formella & Sons, Inc. from the company's Countryside, IL headquarters. We invite you to enjoy the taste of Italy!

name: Eagle Flexible Packaging
description: For over 30 years, Eagle Flexible Packaging has been a leading supplier of sustainable, high-quality flexible packaging solutions. With decades of expertise combined with cutting-edge technology, we deliver packaging that protects your products, enhances your brand, and drives your market success.From rollstock to preformed pouches, our products are manufactured with exceptional quality and sustainability in mind. Our team partners closely with you to create innovative, functional, and visually impactful packaging tailored to your unique needs.Proudly serving a range of markets – from consumer brands to medical and healthcare sectors – Eagle is inspiring the future of packaging through purpose and possibility. Together, we will bring your solutions to market with greater speed, efficiency, and confidence, all while ensuring strict compliance with FDA regulations and SQF standards.

name: Eat Just, Inc.
description: Eat Just is a food technology company with a mission to build a healthier, safer, and more sustainable food system. The company is known as the maker of Just Egg, the category-defining plant-based egg that has sold the equivalent of over 600 million eggs and is available nationally at major retailers including Whole Foods, Sprouts, Walmart, Kroger, Target, and H-E-B, and Just Meat, a plant-based chicken six years in the making that outperforms conventional chicken in independent taste tests. Eat Just has been recognized globally for innovation and impact, including Fast Company’s “Most Innovative Companies,” CNBC’s “Disruptor 50,” and being named a World Economic Forum Technology Pioneer.

name: eatiful
description: Eatiful is an organic, ready-to-eat food brand on a mission to bring The joy of simple to everyday meals.We create clean-label, shelf-stable comfort foods that make eating well effortless - whether at home, at work, or on the go. Our portfolio currently includes a range of certified organic, ready-to-eat soups, meals and wholesome grain-based bowls made with thoughtfully selected ingredients and no artificial additives or preservatives.Designed for today’s convenience-driven, health-conscious lifestyles, Eatiful products require minimal preparation while delivering the warmth and satisfaction of homemade meals - making them a perfect fit for busy consumers seeking simple, nourishing options without compromise.As we continue to grow in the U.S. market, we are expanding into other exciting categories, including organic pasta meals and ready-to-eat oats. Each year, Eatiful is committed to introducing an innovative new product designed to compete as a NEXTY Awards finalist — bringing fresh ideas and elevated simplicity to the natural foods space.

name: EATNUF PTE. LTD.
