description: EATNUF seed butters feature bold flavors and clean ingredients, from pumpkin seed to black sesame. Inspired by “enough,” we deliver the right balance of taste, nutrition, and quality in every spoonful.

name: ECLAIRE HEALTH
description: Eclaire Health is a U.S.-based contract manufacturer specializing in double-layer candy bars, caramels, seasoned snacks, and coated products. We also have a full line of custom caramels, layers, and fillings designed to elevate your finished products. Our facility is equipped for scale and innovation, delivering retail-ready products with USDA Organic, Non-GMO Project Verified, GFCO and Kosher certifications.  Our in-house R&D team moves quickly from concept to commercialization to help our partners win at retail. If you’re looking for a strategic manufacturing partner, not just a co-packer, Eclaire Health is built to execute.  Reach out today at sales@eclairehealth.com

name: ECOANDINO SAC
description: Since 1998, Ecoandino has been dedicated to promoting organic superfoods from the Andean and Amazonian regions of central Peru. With our processing plant in Concepción, Junín, Ecoandino fosters local employment by working in partnership with small-scale farmers, adhering to the principles of organic agriculture, fair trade, and social responsibility.

name: Ecolife Innovations LLC.
description: Following their successful launch in the UK in retailers such as Boots and Superdrug, Diso is now launching globally, and is exclusively available through our distribution company in the US.

name: ECOTRADING YVA PY S.A
description: Ecotrading Yva Py S.A. is a women-led origin and export company based in Paraguay, specialized in chia seeds and soybeans, both organic and conventional. We operate directly at origin, managing sourcing, processing, and export with a strong focus on clarity, responsibility, and long-term partnerships.Ecotrading works closely with small and medium-scale farmers, combining responsible sourcing with strict operational control. All shipments are supported by third-party laboratory analysis, lot-based traceability, and food safety systems aligned with international and U.S. regulatory expectations.At Expo West, we seek to connect with mission-driven brands, ingredient buyers, and partners who value reliability, transparency, and long-term collaboration.

name: Ecourage
description: Refill, Reimagined.Ecourage is a sustainable-packaging technology company developing a smart refill infrastructure that enables brands, retailers, and hospitality operators to eliminate single-use packaging at scale. Through a combination of advanced dispensing hardware, NFC connectivity, and digital engagement tools, Ecourage makes refilling simple, hygienic, traceable, and economically viable helping businesses meet sustainability goals while improving customer experience and operational efficiency.At Ecourage, we believe that refilling shouldn’t be a niche behavior. It should be an easy, intuitive, and convenient option for consumers around the world. To achieve that, we are building a modern refill ecosystem: intelligent dispensing systems, cloud-based product tracking, consumer engagement, and a platform that makes circular packaging practical for both emerging and established brands.

name: Edacious
description: Edacious enables a new standard for food quality by providing verified food data and clear interpretation. We unite ISO 17025 accredited lab testing with advanced software to measure nutritional quality with rigor and translate it into evidence so partners across the food system can act with confidence.Our all-in-one system helps brands, producers, and retailers move beyond fragmented data to understand not just what is in their food, but what it means and how it compares to the market. By integrating primary lab data with automated FDA claim guidance, retail benchmarking, and contaminant safety analysis, Edacious enables partners to turn nutrition into a strategic asset.Quality, Verified.

name: Eden Foods
description: Eden Foods began in southern Michigan in the late 1960s amongst friends sourcing natural food. They were youths, motivated by study of the worldwide phenomenon known as macrobiotics: the centering of one's eating around whole grain and seasonal local plant foods that are not adulterated by toxic chemicals or nutrient depleted.The Eden co-op grew into a natural food store offering whole grains, beans, soyfoods, sea vegetables, miso, cereals, unrefined vegetable oils, seed and nut butters, and the like. It expanded adding a cafeteria, bakery, and books which became known as the Eden Deli. It was one of very few places in the U.S.A. where you could get natural, organic, macrobiotic food.In 1972 Eden opened its first warehouse and established relations with artisan Japanese traditional food makers. Imports of sea vegetables, teas, miso, shoyu, umeboshi plums, kuzu root starch, rice vinegar, rice bran pickles, mirin, etc. followed. This solidified Eden as an important natural food source for the United States and Canada.Eden Foods is the oldest natural and organic food company in North America, and the largest remaining independent manufacturer of dry grocery, organic food. We are the major purveyor of Japanese traditional, macrobiotic foods.Over 94% of Eden foods are sold by natural food stores, co-ops, and supermarkets via traditional natural and grocery distribution channels. Web site, employee, and wholesale sales make up the remainder.

name: Edible Garden
description: At Edible Garden, our mission is to provide you with Farm to Function innovation that delivers clean, transparent, and sustainably produced solutions consumers trust.

name: Edward & Sons Trading Co., Inc.
description: All Edward & Sons brands exemplify a guiding principle of the company: to offer health-aware consumers "Convenience Without Compromise"®.

name: EggLife Foods, Inc
description: Egglife Foods was hatched in 2019 when our founder Peggy Johns couldn't find delicious low-carb, protein-packed health foods to meet her needs.Surprised by the lack of options but fueled by the clear need in the market, she discovered how to replace flour with eggs in a variety of foods right in her kitchen, leading to our debut product: egglife egg white wraps.What began with our revolutionary egglife® EGG WHITE WRAPS in six craveable flavors has evolved into an innovative protein-packed product portfolio. We're giving consumers an even more convenient way to enjoy our signature egglife® EGG WHITE WRAPS with our ready-to-eat egglife GRAB & GO line for nutrition on the move — and turning the pasta category on its head with egglife POWER PASTA™ — offering 2X more protein and 90% less carbs than traditional refrigerated pasta.At Egglife Foods, we're not just creating products, we're pioneering a new approach to healthy eating, debunking the idea that good-for-you food can’t taste good.  Through patented technology used in our manufacturing process, all Egglife products are "sneaky healthy" — protein-packed and low in carbs, while never sacrificing taste. It's good-for-you food, deliciously disguised.

name: Eggs Unlimited
description: Eggs Unlimited, world’s largest leading suppliers of shell eggs and products, leverages over 300 years of combined experience. We Sell Organic Eggs, Cage Free Eggs, Conventional Eggs, and Free Range Eggs in Truckloads or more. We also sell egg products such as liquid eggs, dried eggs (powdered eggs). We help companies understand key market dynamics, statistics, and trends so they can make better decisions; Diversify their supply-chains, mitigate market risk, and rise to any challenge along the way of ensuring timely delivery. Our dedicated team excels in purchasing, sales, data, logistics, and accounting, providing a significant market advantage. With a diversified presence globally and domestically we form a solid foundation. Clients trust us for expert advice and accurate market insight. We make life easy for businesses with stress-free experiences, delivering eggs anywhere, in a timely manner.Order your wholesale eggs nowContact us at eusales@eggsunimited.com

name: Egmont Honey
description: It began in 2008.A beehive may seem like an unusual present, but for committed conservationist Toby Annabell, it was perfect. Gifted by his son James, this hive sparked a passion for authentic Mānuka Honey and ethical beekeeping.This passion fuelled the growth of that single hive into 100, then 1,000, and eventually the 4,000 that are now nestled into the native bush of the Annabell's South Taranaki farm. Dense, rich honey flows straight to our purpose-built factory right here in New Plymouth, Taranaki.Just like any good hive, our factory has its own worker bees. Our amazing team oversees the filling and labelling of up to 15,000 honey jars per day. It's bottled here, and shipped everywhere; with our honey now being exported to over 20 countries, people all over the world are enjoying the West Coast on their toast.Despite the wild growth of Egmont Honey, the founding Annabell duo are still fiercely hands on, with James as CEO and Toby as Operations Director.

name: EKANG NUTRA INC.
description: Ekang Nutra Inc. is a leading player in the global health and wellness industry, offering a comprehensive suite of services that encompass research, development, production, and sales. Specializing in dietary supplements, natural nutritional products, and health foods, Ekang is dedicated to delivering premium-quality products that support a healthier lifestyle.As a trusted partner, Ekang provides customized OEM/ODM private label services and brand management solutions, ensuring flexibility and innovation tailored to your business needs. By leveraging an extensive network of global health resources, Ekang creates end-to-end supply chain solutions that empower brands to succeed in the competitive wellness market.Ekang’s commitment to excellence is evident in its rigorous standards. With a rich pool of raw material suppliers from over 100 regions worldwide, the company ensures the highest quality ingredients for its products. Ekang’s state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and R&D laboratories in the United States strictly follow FDA production standards and utilize advanced equipment for versatile production needs.Further distinguishing itself, Ekang excels in logistics and customs clearance, delivering seamless global operations that save time and enhance efficiency. Whether you are a growing brand or an established industry leader, Ekang Pharmaceuticals is the partner you can rely on to navigate the complexities of the global nutrition supply chain and drive your business forward.

name: El Nacho
description: After years of hard work developing another Tortilla Chip Brand and finding out that there it was a dead end road with no further opportunities to grow we decided to make our own, with the same passion and respect for the product we create, El Nacho Chip was born.

name: Element Food Solutions
description: Element Food Solutions is a dry blend products supplier with diversified, better-for-you ingredients and packaging solutions provider for the food industry.  Our commercialization expertise in handling specialty dry blend ingredients provides, focused,customer solutions-based execution.   We bring world class manufacturing while partnering to deliver on-trend products and packaging.Gluten-free and Allergan-segregated processing options.SQF-certified facilities.

name: Elements Truffles
description: HOW THE INNER VOICE LEAD US TO A SWEET SPOT: Once upon time, we were traders on Wall Street. Everything was going well, but there was only one problem. A sense of purpose was missing.Without much of a plan, Alak finally gave in to her inner voice and quit her job. White boarding sessions began over a cup of steaming hot chocolate - our constant. We were passionate about doing something in wellness and food. And one aspect that kept popping up was Ayurveda.Unlike many health trends that had emerged and vanished, Ayurveda had been around for over 5000 years! It stood the test of time. Turmeric, Ayurveda's poster child, was walking the ramps all over, but Ayurveda was still patiently waiting for her moment.We knew that we had to dress her up in a bar of chocolate and present it to the world.Looking back, Ayurveda was so deeply rooted in our ecosystem growing up. However, we barely valued it. Over the last 16 years, as we grew in our meditation practice, our eating habits started to align with Ayurveda. A somewhat unvalued science that was culturally integrated in our lifestyle growing up was now gently navigating us back to our roots.Alak got busy in the kitchen, while Kushal became the official taste tester. One day, against the resistance from every cell of her body, he signed them up for a local market in Williamsburg. "We were sold out in the first few hours. And we knew we were up to something."

name: Elevate Organic
description: Founded in 2025 by a team of natural products industry veterans, Elevate Organic was built on decades of collective experience and a shared vision to reimagine what clean, evidence-based nutrition could be.Our founders bring together over 100 years of combined expertise, having helped shape respected brands such as Garden of Life and Ancient Nutrition. Along the way, we've witnessed both the transformative power of nutrition and the challenges companies face when scaling while staying true to their purpose.With Elevate Organic, we set out to do it differently — to build a company fully aligned with our deepest values. Guided by regenerative and organic farmers, ingredient innovators, and medical professionals, we're creating a future where real food meets real science to drive real change.With Elevate Organic, we're building something different — a company fully aligned with our deepest values. Guided by regenerative and organic farmers, ingredient innovators, and medical professionals, we're creating a future where real food meets real science to drive real change.

name: eleven TLC, A Wellness Co.
description: We are a pioneering Atlanta-based wellness beverage company founded with a passion for crafting delicious functional beverages. Our journey began with our inaugural retail store opening at Ponce City Market on January 11, 2020. Since then, we have dedicated ourselves to perfecting our craft, continuously refining our products to achieve the perfect balance of taste and wellness.Driven by our commitment to excellence, we take pride in the feedback we receive from our valued customers who enthusiastically endorse the delightful flavors we create. Equally important, our medical partners have been impressed with our ability to eliminate harmful substances and skillfully incorporate the nourishing benefits of adaptogens, herbs, and botanicals into our beverages.At our core, we strive to be at the forefront of the functional beverage market, constantly seeking innovative ways to enhance the well-being of our consumers. Through our relentless pursuit of quality and wholesome ingredients, we aim to offer an extraordinary beverage experience that leaves a lasting, positive impact on our customer's lives.

name: Elizabeth's Food Co.
description: Elizabeth’s Foods is an organic snack company founded by a fourth-generation baker, specializing in oven-baked croutons and modern pantry staples made with avocado oil and no seed oils.Manufacturing since 1987, we have produced premium croutons and baked snacks for leading food brands. Today, we are launching our own retail line — bringing generational baking expertise to the modern natural aisle.Our products include:• Organic croutons made with avocado oil• No-seed-oil baked snacks• High-protein and better-for-you innovations• Clean-label pantry staples• Cauliflower-based baked crispsElizabeth’s elevates a largely commoditized category with organic ingredients, real bread baking methods, and distinct packaging designed for strong shelf presence.In addition to our retail line, we offer custom recipe development and co-manufacturing services, specializing in organic, high-protein, and no-seed-oil baked snack solutions.Manufacturing since 1987.Rooted in tradition. Ready for now.

name: Ellenos
description: Father and son team Con and Alex Apostolopoulos were making their handcrafted Greek yogurt in Australia when Yvonne, a flight attendant from America, dropped in for a taste. After one spoonful, she was hooked. She flew home and raved to her husband, Bob, and they hatched a plan.It took nearly ten years (and tens of thousands of miles of travel, coordination, and logistics), but eventually, Con and Alex moved to Seattle to team up with Yvonne and Bob. The result was a brand-new yogurt company that combined the Apostolopoulos’ Greek yogurt recipe and handcrafted process with local ingredients and distinctly Pacific Northwest flavors.Ellenos was first introduced to the world as a scoop shop in Seattle’s historic Pike Place Market in 2013. Over time, word spread, and we earned a devoted following. But yogurt this good demands a wider audience, and after partnering with Whole Foods Market, Ellenos yogurt is now available in grocery stores across the United States.

name: ELOS
description: The beverage aisle is louder than ever-but it's also more extreme.Energy drinks push intensity. Functional sodas chase trends. Protein shakes solve one problem but often feel heavy and situational. Water stays clean, but passive. In the middle, there's a growing gap for people who want something better: hydration that supports how they feel, move, and recover-without overstimulation or compromise.ELOS was created to fill that gap.We started with a simple question: Why does energy have to feel so aggressive? Most functional drinks rely on caffeine, sugar, or stimulants that create spikes and crashes. They're built for moments, not for everyday life. At the same time, consumers-especially those focused on metabolic health, GLP-1 journeys, and higher-protein lifestyles-are looking for products that support performance and recovery without adding excess calories or heaviness.ELOS takes a different approach. Instead of stimulation, we focus on support. By pairing hydration with magnesium glycinate-a highly absorbable, gentle form of magnesium-and essential electrolytes, ELOS helps support steady energy, muscle function, and recovery. Magnesium plays a role in protein synthesis, muscle relaxation, and cellular energy production-making hydration more functional, not just refreshing.Every detail of ELOS is designed for repeatability: clean ingredients, elevated flavors, and a format that fits naturally into daily routines. It's the kind of drink you can reach for alongside protein-forward meals, after movement, or throughout the day-without jitters, crashes, or digestive discomfort.ELOS isn't here to replace protein drinks, compete with energy beverages, or chase the latest trend. It's here to redefine value-add water-creating a new standard for hydration that supports balance, recovery, and everyday performance.

name: eMarketring Association
description: Get interviewed at Expo West, or contribute an interview later. The eMarketing Association is an inclusive community and hub of thinkers and doers from marketing, sales, operations, tech, and investment professions that foster a culture of innovation and leadership development. We bring together thought leaders and subject matter experts across the marketing ecosystem and the cross-functional teams they work with to solve the challenges facing companies today.We connect decision makers with solutions providers through podcasts, interactive panels, roundtable discussions,and live events. We’re industry agnostic and provide the platform to deliver answers to the audience who is looking for results.

name: Embocaps & Geltech
description: Companies that want the best choose EMBOCAPS® Empty Hard Capsules. Established in 1973, EMBOCAPS® is a publicly traded company and the world’s third-largest capsule manufacturer, with the same ownership since inception—delivering long-term stability, transparency, and accountability. As a fully vertically integrated supplier, EMBOCAPS® supports all major global markets with industry-benchmark filling performance, a transparent supply chain, and use of clean raw materials. EMBOCAPS® Fair Trade Capsules is the right choice for companies committed to ethical sourcing.EMBOCAPS® offers capsule sizes 000 through 5 in a broad range of shell compositions and functional solutions designed to support formulation performance and brand differentiation. Aurora capsules provide a wide selection of vibrant colors without synthetic dyes or titanium dioxide, making them ideal for clean-label and natural supplement positioning. Available in both gelatin and HPMC, Aurora capsules help brands stand out while meeting growing consumer demand for transparency—visit our booth to see actual samples.For targeted and delayed release applications, EMBOCAPS® AP60 capsules are engineered to remain intact longer in acidic environments for minimum 60 minutes without the need for banding or coating. This HPMC-based solution is ideal for probiotics, enzymes, acid-sensitive ingredients, and other specialty formulations.EMBOCAPS® LP+ features a precision-engineered, tighter cap-to-body fit that enhances capsule integrity while maintaining excellent filling performance, and is available in gelatin or HPMC with custom colors and printing options.To support vegetarian and vegan product lines, the EMBOCAPS® VG Collection includes multiple HPMC solutions: VG Pro (conventional HPMC), VG Alpha (100% HPMC), AP60 (acid-protection delayed release), and Aurora HPMC capsules using natural colors—giving brands flexibility to meet both functional and lifestyle-driven market demands.EMBOCAPS®  Flex, EMBOCAPS® AP60 (Acid Protection), EMBOCAPS® Gelatin, EMBOCAPS® VG PRO (HPMC), EMBOCAPS® Aurora (Natural Color)

name: Emerald Labs
description: In today's fast-changing world, it brings me great joy to be able to say that we are still family owned and operated since our very beginnings in 1996.Emerald Labs is at least in part a "byproduct" of my upbringing, my own personal experiences with ill-health at a young age and the positive effects that the natural food industry has had on my own life for well over thirty-five years.In 1996, I established my own G.M.P. facility where we began contract manufacturing nutritional supplements and powders for others.  As standard practice, most nutritional supplements on the market today contain an array of additives such as magnesium stearate, silicon dioxide, crosscarmellose sodium, microcrystalline cellulose and/or stearic acid. Each of these additives can be found on product labels listed under "other ingredients". While these ingredients do functionally speed up the manufacturing processes and modify the natural behaviors of raw material powders, they are NOT generally in the product to provide ANY benefit to a consumer's health.I was determined to do something different, so, in 2001, I started what would eventually become Emerald Labs, "the Additive-Free Company"®. Shortly thereafter, I asked my brother, Robert, to join me and oversee the contract manufacturing side of the business.Each Emerald Labs product we produce includes ONLY active, nutritive ingredients. The only "other ingredient" you'll ever see listed on our formulas is "capsule". In addition to extensive 3rd party testing, we also have our own "in-house" laboratory where we test all incoming ingredients and outgoing products. To this day, I still personally choose each of our raw material suppliers.Over the last 20+ years, our company has grown, but our values have never changed. We are committed to making products that I feel personally confident sharing with my own loved ones…and that means that we are, and will always be, committed to QUALITY from beginning to end.From Our Family to Yours, we want to sincerely thank you for your interest in Emerald Labs and allowing us to share our passion for nutrition with you.Yours in good health,Rick Simpson, C.E.O.

name: Emidates For Dates L.L.C
description: Building iconic lifestyle food brands with dates as core ingredient. Elevating the traditional consumption and commercializing next-generation of date-based products.

name: Emilia Foods
description: Via Emilia is named after the historic trade route that has been one of Italy's oldest and most renowned, used for centuries to transport food from city to city, crossing Italy from side to side. That's who we are: starting from the heart of Emilia Romagna we aim to bring the essence of Italy to houses worldwide, from our table to yours.  For us, this means not only the good and famous foods of our country but also our rich traditions, artisanal craftsmanship, quality crops, and raw material sourcing. We are committed to maintaining the highest standards in production  through a careful selection of our partners, incorporating innovation, and catering to diverse dietary needs with our Gourmet, Organic and Better-For-You lines.

name: EMIRELLI
description: Emirelli is a California-based international trading company, supplying authentic and traditional products to the U.S. and European markets.

name: Emmi Equator RTD Coffee LLC
description: COFFEE CAN BE A FORCE FOR GOODThat realization inspired our founders Brooke and Helen to roast and sell coffee themselves from a Marin County garage in 1995. Coffee can be roasted better, brewed better and, most importantly, it can be sourced in a way that makes lives better. That garage became Equator Coffees and marked the beginning of a high-impact coffee company focused on quality, sustainability and social responsibility.

name: Empacadora de Aguacate San Jose
description: AvoOlio was born as a proposal for innovation in field work in Mexico. AVOCADO OIL DE MEXICO S. DE R.L. DE C.V. is a member of the APEAM, A.C., or the Association of Producers and Packers Exporters of Avocado in Mexico.The company focuses on the generation of productive projects that benefit the entire value chain in the industry, including producers, packers, marketers and the consumer.AvoOlio is currently engaged in the export of fresh avocados, and also, is an excellent avocado oil processor.The purpose of AvoOlio is to procure the future of the Michoacan countryside, and to promote the development of the community through continuous improvement programs, allowing them to generate income in a sustainable manner.

name: Empire Eagle Food Co., Ltd
description: Pop!A burst of flavor.An explosion of fruitiness.Delightful Boba Joy and a true Taiwan experience.BOBA CHiC's popping boba creations are as unpredictable as the are wonderfully flavorful.A cheeky wink to those who delight in our authentic flavors and our deep roots in Taiwan bubble tea culture.An appreciative nod to others who delight in our authentic flavors and our deep roots in Taiwan bubble teaculture.BOBA CHiC is creating excitement wherever we go.We create. We inspire. We delight bubble tea lovers across the world with our premium and inspired products.A classy popping experience with bursts of flavor.Pop!BOBA CHiC

name: Empress
description: Empress--Supplements supporting women's hormone health from menarche to menopause through natural herbal medicine. Sheena Jongeneel, L.Ac. and TCM practitioner, is the founder and CEO of Empress, a women's wellness and hormone health supplement line formulated for specific life stages. As a licensed acupuncturist with 19 years of clinical experience, Sheena brings evidence-based traditional herbs to market—translating her extensive clinical expertise into carefully formulated CPG products developed in partnership with an MD.The catalyst for Empress came when her daughter experienced debilitating cramps during her first period. As both a mother and a practitioner, Sheena realized there were no products on the market addressing the entire women's journey from menarche to menopause with natural solutions. Determined to fill this gap, Sheena set out to make the traditional herbal solutions she'd been successfully prescribing for nearly two decades accessible to all women—addressing PMS, perimenopause, menopause, hormonal acne, and cycle irregularity.Currently pursuing her Doctorate in Women's Reproductive Health, Sheena is on a mission to reconnect women with time-tested natural solutions and ensure every woman knows she has options for hormonal health beyond "just deal with it."

name: EncapSolutions
description: EncapSolutions is an Australian natural health company exhibiting at Expo West with SkinSync®, our proprietary 72-hour dermal patch platform. Our hemp-based pain relief patches combine ultra-pure CBD with certified organic botanicals in a convenient “stick & forget” format that delivers consistent, long-lasting support. Already live in U.S. retail and D2C, SkinSync® offers strong margin potential, repeat purchase behaviour, and clear differentiation from conventional 8–12 hour patches. We’re actively seeking retail and distribution partners to scale nationwide — visit our booth to discover a next-generation wellness patch designed for today’s natural health consumer.

name: Enova Science
description: Enova Science is a private label dietary and nutritional supplement contract manufacturer located in Southwest Florida. Our mission is to provide our clients with successful, cutting edge and effective products. Our honest and transparent, solution-driven approach to the entire product development and manufacturing process offers a refreshing alternative to industry standards.Enova Science was started in 2009 with the mission of offering cutting-edge, first-to-market, unique nutritionals. Since inception, we have been perfecting our product development, sourcing, and manufacturing processes to help offer our customers a strong competitive advantage over other competitors in the dietary and nutritional supplement space.With over 17 independent production rooms, 2 pharmacy operations, and in excess of 5,000 kilograms of powder and liquid blending capacity, Enova Science is uniquely positioned to service orders of all sizes and form factors from 1,000 units to over 100,000 units. We are experts in the entire product development cycle from concept and design to development and feasibility to efficient manufacturing and on-time delivery. We also offer unique, industry-leading sensory panel data to our customers to ensure that they receive the absolute best tasting products in the industry.

name: Enterobiome Inc.
description: Enterobiome specializes in next-generation probiotics, with a strong focus on Akkermansia muciniphila and Faecalibacterium prausnitzii. Scientific research has demonstrated that these bacterial species, key members of the human gut microbiota, are causally linked to various incurable diseases. Globally, A. muciniphila is gaining recognition as a next-generation probiotic, with commercial products increasingly entering the market.Enterobiome has achieved GRAS (Generally Recognized As Safe) status, secured the first regulatory approval in South Korea, and marked the first case with a functional claim for respiratory health. Building on this foundation, Enterobiome launched Flouren, its first commercialized product, designed to harness Akkermansia’s proven benefits through cutting-edge microbiome science.With Flouren, Enterobiome is actively seeking retail partners as well as OEM/ODM collaborations to expand global reach. Our mission is to combine rigorous clinical validation with sustainable innovation, creating products that promote healthier living and reflect our commitment to both people and the planet.FLOUREN was founded to harness cutting-edge microbiome science, focusing on Akkermansia's proven benefits. With a strong scientific foundation and rigorous clinical validation, we create innovative, sustainable products that promote healthier living and reflect our commitment to people and the planet.

name: Enzymedica, Inc.
description: We're a brand for people who love food—and for those who want to love food again. Founded in 1998 at the SOHO Expo in Orlando, Florida, we are hopeful that with enzymes, food can feel fun again—but there's more to it. Digestive happiness is more than cheat meals and treats. It's a day free from digestive issues—a meal eaten away from home without a second thought. By taking away discomfort, we make room for joy!

name: Enzymeking Biotechnology
description: Enzymeking Biotechnology Company Limited. specializes in manufacture, supply, and research bio enzymes,  which are applied at health supplements, scientific research, and foods & cosmetics industries.We dedicate our business on manufacturing and developing various natural bio enzymes. With proven extraction and purification technology, our global activities are directed toward supplying high purity natural bio enzymes to our customers. Our customers are from Asia, America and Europe, includes pharmaceutical and health supplement companies, research institutions, bio chemical companies and foods & cosmetics manufacturers.Enzymeking Biotechnology possess 70,000 square feet manufacturing facilities complied with ISO22000 and GMP requirements. Our 100,000 grade sanitized facilities is so far the highest standard in the bio-enzyme raw material industry. We cooperate with our customers's customized requirements and deliver enzymes worldwide in a timely fashion. With solid quality control system in place, we ensure to provide our customers reliable, consistent and cost effective bio enzymes .We believe in long-term relationship and win win business cooperation. We respect our partners, share business resources and strive to achieve the long term busisness perpective. We welcome you to share your thoughts, ideas and proposals about bio enzyme business with us.

name: EO Products
description: Founded in 1995, we make consciously crafted, timeless self-care rituals using pure essential oils. All made with love, and without synthetic ingredients. Responsibility We're a family-owned B Corp built on honoring the well-being of all people and our planet. Our products are designed, developed and manufactured in Marin County, California, in a zero-waste, solar-powered facility.

name: Eoas Organics (Pvt) Ltd
description: For over 40 years EOAS Organics has been specialising in supplying sustainable and ethically sourced natural ingredients and extracts for the organic food and beverage, flavour and fragrance and aromatherapy sectors. The company can trace its roots to 1885 starting off as a small cinnamon bark oil distiller and a trader in Kosgoda Sri Lanka. EOAS product portfolio includes Organic Spices and Herbs, Spice Oleoresins, Essential oils, CO2 extracts, Coconut products and nutraceutical ingredients. We believe in buying spices, herbs and coconuts directly from smallholder organisations whenever possible. We take great pride in improving and uplifting the livelihood of the smallholder farmers, ours employees and the communities we operate in while ensuring farm to fork traceability. EOAS currently exports to more than 50 countries globally.

name: ePac Flexible Packaging
description: ePac revolutionizes the packaging industry by creating the World's First Global Connected Flexible Packaging Network. Locally produced custom printed packaging allows brands large and small to order to demand with competitive pricing and fast turnaround times. Brands that partner with ePac can boost consumer engagement and decrease their environmental impact.

name: Epicurean Butter
description: John and Janey Hubschman, husband and wife, took their culinary and customer service skills to the butter business in 2004. They wanted to establish a product that could help at-home chefs create flavorful meals. John was formerly the executive chef at the Denver Chop House, with 20 years of experience. He still works with Epicurean Butter in product development.

name: Epson America, Inc.
description: Epson is a global technology leader dedicated to becoming indispensable to society by connecting people, things and information with its original efficient, compact and precision technologies. The company is focused on driving innovations and exceeding customer expectations in inkjet, visual communications, wearables and robotics. Epson is proud of its contributions to realizing a sustainable society and its ongoing efforts to realizing the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals.Led by the Japan-based Seiko Epson Corporation, the worldwide Epson Group generates annual sales of more than JPY 1 trillion. global.epson.com/Epson America, Inc., based in Los Alamitos, Calif., is Epson’s regional headquarters for the U.S., Canada, and Latin America. To learn more about Epson, please visit: epson.com. You may also connect with Epson America on Facebook (facebook.com/Epson), Twitter (twitter.com/EpsonAmerica), YouTube (youtube.com/user/EpsonTV/), and Instagram (instagram.com/EpsonAmerica).

name: Erie Foods International, Inc.
description: ERIE Foods Intl, Inc has been in the milk protein business since 1938 manufacturing/supplying a variety of high protein dairy ingredients including Caseins, Calcium Caseinates, Sodium Caseinates, Milk Protein Isolate, Milk Protein Concentrates, and high Protein Dairy Crisps.

name: ESPAR SRL.
description: ESPAR is your trusted partner for sourcing premium agricultural products from Argentina and South America, specializing in beans (black, white, and red), chickpeas, chia, flaxseed, quinoa, and sesame. We deliver consistent quality, freshness, and responsible sourcing practices tailored to U.S. buyers and international markets. With proven export experience and a commitment to long-term partnerships and fair trade, ESPAR provides reliable supply solutions to meet your product specifications and delivery requirements. Partner with ESPAR to bring the best of South American agriculture to your business.

name: Essential Formulas®
description: Essential Formulas® – Exclusive North American distributor of award-winning Dr. Ohhira's Probiotics® supplements, Cosmeceuticals, and high quality vegan/vegetarian plant seed oils, along with Award-winning Reg´Activ® Formulas, brings the science of bacteria into the 21st century.Essential Formulas Incorporated (EFI), renowned for recognizing and forging new frontiers in the probiotic health arena 15 years ago with the introduction of Dr. Ohhira's Probiotics®, has once again redefined the genre with the launch of Reg´Activ® Formulas, containing the patented, glutathione-boosting probiotic Lactobacillus fermentum ME-3. Like no other supplements before them, Dr. Ohhira's and Reg´Activ® bestow the body with the tools needed to create and maintain a healthy microbiome and produce and recycle the human body's most important antioxidant: glutathione.  EFI underscores that Dr. Ohhira's Probiotics® and Reg´Activ® are not rival products. On the contrary, they are extremely synergetic but with differing commitments and capabilities. The similarity between these groundbreaking formulations is the decades of science backing their validity and health restorative effects. Dr. Ohhira Probiotics® is the final amalgamation of probiotics, prebiotics, postbiotic metabolites and other bioactive nutrients created during the fermentation process. Dr. Ohhira's is the leading product to "remodel the digestive tract." A properly functioning digestive tract is critical for optimal functioning of the immune system and overall good health.  ME-3 is proven to produce glutathione naturally in the human body. Working as a glutathione activating agent via three different mechanisms, Reg´Activ® is set to impact the future of preventative health on a cellular level.

name: Essential Oxygen
description: Essential Oxygen, the top selling natural mouthwash brand, harnesses the power of oxygen to deliver premium oral care, first aid and household cleaning solutions. Its effective, biodegradable formulas provide a deep clean while being truly safe for people, pets and the planet. Essential Oxygen is proudly organic, non GMO, non toxic, vegan, gluten free, women owned and a certified B Corp.

name: Esti Foods
description: Coming from a European company with more than 45 years of experience in the Mediterranean food industry at Esti Foods we first observed before we acted. Our expertise allowed us to notice that those options often require  the consumer to  comprise on quality, flavor, nutritional benefits and pricing.

name: ESW Beauty
description: Our founder, Elina Sofia Wang, struggled with stomach ulcers throughout her teenage years, sparking a wellness journey in her early twenties. She shifted her dietary choices to whole foods and healthier alternatives and also made switches with her beauty routine, opting for clean skincare. Through these lifestyle changes, she encountered a gap in the market—a lack of skincare with both clean, effective formulas and a focus on healthier ingredients.With nearly a decade of experience in the beauty industry working for her family business, Elina established her brand with a clear mission. She aspires to create sustainably-made skincare featuring non-toxic ingredients, with vegan and cruelty-free formulations, all inspired by the foods & beverages that aided her in her wellness journey.

name: Eurofins
description: Eurofins Scientific is a leading international group of laboratories providing and unparalleled range of testing and support services to the pharmaceutical, food, environmental and consumer products industries and to governments.

name: European Fine Foods LP Division of BLM GmbH&Co.KG
description: Our group offers a broad portfolio.In the U.S., we started with ambient private labelproducts such as pasta, risotto, pesto, and oliveoil.

name: Everblue
description: Our founder Renee Stuart created Everblue in 2021 to address an all too familiar problem; natural hair care was expensive, hard to find and usually didn't perform as well as their chemically packed alternatives.Working with New Zealand's most experienced chemists and formulation team she developed the affordable-luxe range you'll find packaged in an alluring sky blue. We've carefully crafted every product from clean, non-toxic ingredients without compromising on quality or performance. Because we believe you deserve the best.Along the way, we met some incredible women who inspired our four collections: Aspire, Empower, Mindful & Fearless. These words drive our team every day, and our goal is to inspire you through these collections, our community and our ambassadors' stories and their shared knowledge.From becoming 120% Climate Positive and locally producing near our Auckland HQ, to designing recyclable bottles, we are committed to making a positive impact. Our products are PETA-certified vegan and cruelty-free, and our company is proudly diverse, woman-led and focused on the wellbeing of our team. Every choice we make reflects our #feelgood ethos, because great hair care should feel as good as it performs.

name: Evergreen
description: Evergreen is a clean-label brand reinventing frozen breakfast — creating morning favorites that are crave worthy first and quietly nutritious behind the scenes. Made with 100% whole grains, real veggies, avocado oil, plus naturally occurring fiber and protein, Evergreen products never contain seed oils, artificial flavors, or preservatives.At Expo West, Evergreen will officially debut its expansion beyond waffles with the launch of Thick & Fluffy Pancakes and the category’s first clean-label Protein Pancake and Protein Waffle line — made with Greek yogurt and egg whites, never protein powders or isolates. The brand will also host two VIP breakfasts in collaboration with leading better-for-you partners, offering attendees an early taste of its newest innovations.Founded by Emily Groden in 2018, Evergreen began with a mission to upgrade frozen waffles and has since grown into a nationally distributed brand available in 8,500+ stores nationwide.

name: Every Body Eat®
description: Our Co-Founder, Trish Thomas was diagnosed with Hashimoto's disease while pregnant with her first son 16 years ago.  After struggling to find food that both she and her family could enjoy together, after meeting Nichole at their children's school book fair back in 2018, they decided to start a food company that made delicious food people with or without food allergens could enjoy together. Nichole's family has dairy and gluten allergens as well and with her background with Frito Lay they created Whole & Free Foods, LLC back in November 2018. We launched our first product in late 2019, servicing a handful of retailers in the Evanston, IL community.

name: Every Day Sunshine Inc./DBA KASÉ Japanese Cooking
description: KASÉ Japanese cooking brings authentic, chef-quality Japanese flavors into everyday home cooking — simply and naturally. Our Mission: Naturally supporting beauty and wellness through traditional ingredients of Japan.We currently offer two products: an all-natural Ginger Ale and a Dashi Soy Sauce with natural umami. We aim to create more easy-to-use Japanese cooking products for American homes.All-natural. No additives. Real Japanese essentials.Brand Story: KASÉ was founded by childhood friends Reika Alexander, the owner of EN Japanese Brasserie, and Kanae Koike.After graduating from music college in London, Reika decided to help her brother, Bunkei Yo, expand his restaurant brand, EN, which has more than 100 locations throughout Japan. As the founder of EN Japanese Brasserie in New York, Reika played a pivotal role in introducing authentic Japanese cuisine to America at a time when most New Yorkers’ understanding of Japanese cuisine extended little beyond sushi and sukiyaki. She helped cultivate a deeper appreciation for traditional Japanese cuisine within the American restaurant industry. EN was beloved for over 20 years before closing its doors in 2024.Kanae was raised by parents who owned a restaurant, nurturing her passion for food and hospitality from an early age. After graduating from university, she worked under Uichi Yamamoto, contributing to the movement that helped establish café culture in Tokyo. After moving to the United States, she became a founding member of Dean & DeLuca Japan and later worked as a corporate buyer, building a career centered on food culture and culinary development.United by their shared passion for food, Reika and Kanae founded KASÉ Japanese Cooking with the mission of bringing authentic Japanese food culture into the everyday kitchens of American homes.

name: Every Man Jack
description: One of the original Men’s care clean brands focused on using Naturally Derived Ingredients and making sustainably minded choices, Every Man Jack inspires men to take care of themselves and the world around them. Founded over 15 years ago by Ritch Viola, Every Man Jack was born at the base of Mt. Tamalpais in Marin County, CA, the epicenter of clean, active, and outdoor-focused lifestyles.Every Man Jack strives to make the cleanest, most effective, and affordable men’s care products. It’s everything you need and nothing you don’t. We strive to use as many Naturally Derived and plant- based ingredients as possible, while still delivering exceptional performance. No parabens. No phthalates. No dyes. No GMOs. And never tested on animals. Our bottles are made with 50% PCR, and we are always striving to do more.

name: Everyday Dose
description: Everyday Dose started with a simple idea: create a coffee that helps you feel good all day, without the crash or jitters. Today, with over 1.5 million customers served, we know our blend of real coffee, functional mushrooms, protein, and adaptogens delivers clean, sustained energy while supporting focus, physical health, digestion, and overall balance.With multiple varieties and roasts, plus our new high-protein Coffee+, Everyday Dose is a daily ritual designed to support both body and mind no extra steps required.

name: EVERYDAY FOR FUTURE
description: We were born as contract manufacturer, specialised in natural and organic formulation. We took inspiration from the movement Fridays for Future, which was strongly asking the world to commit to sustainability to defeat climate change. We wanted to do our part by offering natural and sustainable products to take care of the planet, animals, and people every day. Everyday for Future was born to provide consumers with accessible, high-quality solutions for daily skincare and makeup routines.

name: Everything Branding LLC
description: Everything Branding is an award-winning, full-funnel marketing partner helping CPG brands grow awareness, retail demand, and revenue. By integrating PR, paid media, email marketing, affiliate partnerships, and AI visibility strategies, we help brands stand out on crowded shelves, earn meaningful media coverage, and convert discovery into sales across retail, Amazon, and DTC channels.Whether launching a new product, expanding distribution, or scaling an established brand, our approach turns visibility into measurable growth.We partner with ambitious CPG brands. Let’s connect.

name: Evie's Snacks
description: These irresistible Texas pecans are inspired by beloved recipes from Evie's childhood - brought to life with a modern spin. Even better? Our pecans are sourced from family farms in South Texas, where we carry on Evie's dad's tradition of tending and replenishing the soil to produce the best tasting pecans you’ve ever had.

name: EVIL Snacks
description: In 2021, Evil Snacks was born from a simple desire: to create Sinfully Wholesome Snacks that satisfy both the taste buds and the conscience. We, like many others, love snacking, but the guilt that often follows was a downer. Healthier options were lacking the indulgent satisfaction we craved.Our quest for a guilt-free indulgence led us to a game-changer: the oyster mushroom. Packed with natural umami and nutrients, it became the hero ingredient we were searching for. No need for excessive seasoning or extreme processing – just the raw, flavorful goodness of this incredible mushroom. Join us on a journey of guilt-free snacking with Evil Snacks, where sinfully wholesome meets irresistibly indulgent.

name: Evoria Health
description: Evoria Health is a wellness brand built on the belief that science should simplify daily supplementation, not complicate it. Our clinically designed daily system replaces complex supplement stacks with a clear, structured approach to daily support.Evoria focuses on bioavailability, meaningful dosing, and ingredients selected to work together as a system. Each formula is developed at clinically studied levels with advanced delivery methods to support cellular function, energy, focus, and recovery from morning to night.Visit us at Booth #2723 to learn more about the Evoria system.

name: Exceedient Foods
description: Exceedient Foods, headquartered in Sacramento, CA, is the innovation arm of Farmers' Rice Cooperative (FRC), a grower-owned co-op comprising over 500 California rice farmers. Specializing in gluten-free rice ingredients, we provide manufacturers, wholesalers, and distributors worldwide with high-quality rice flour, breadings, and extruded snack ingredients like crisps, puffs, and curls.At Exceedient, we blend research and development expertise with collaboration to reimagine familiar ingredients, offering innovative and impactful products that redefine the essence of good food. Leveraging our vertically integrated model and the collective strength of FRC's growers, we ensure unparalleled product integrity, consistency, and ingredient origin transparency from cultivation to final product. Join us in crafting a flavorful, sustainable future together with the highest quality ingredients for every snack, bite, treat, and meal.

name: Excellentia International
description: Excellentia International is a key producer and supplier of essential oils, aroma chemicals, and other liquid botanical extracts.  Our focus is on high-quality Natural and Certified Organic ingredients to service the flavor, fragrance, food and beverage industries.

name: Explorer Cold Brew
description: Explorer was founded by LGBT adventurer Cason Crane during the early days of the pandemic in 2020. He was craving a choice of caffeine levels that was missing from cold brew, and didn't want to sacrifice quality in order to get that. So he started Explorer so that customers could pick their preferred energy level and still enjoy delicious, high quality coffee  and tea - any way they want.

name: Export-Import Bank of the U.S.
description: EXIM can help protect your business while you compete for sales around the world. Our invoice insurance to protects small businesses against the risk of nonpayment by international customers. With this coverage, you can confidently offer open account terms without requiring upfront cash or expensive letters of credit—making it easier to close deals worldwide! Interested in chatting with an export expert? Connect with us through this portal or learn more at grow.exim.gov/ExpoWest

name: Eybna Technologies
description: Eybna is a technology company and a terpene manufacturer, redefining how functional ingredients are discovered and commercialized. Our BNA™ AI-Platform combines in-silico modeling, in-vitro validation, and machine learning to engineer receptor-specific botanical formulations with measurable biological effects. These power our Botanical Neuromodulating Functional Ingredients, validated through EEG and real-world consumer studies. With BUUZ®, our ready-to-drink CPG brand, we prove our science translates to shelf-ready products. Eybna is building the data-driven future of functional botanical ingredients.

name: F.LLI Sacla S.p.A.
description: Established in Asti in 1923 under the name of SALPA (Stabilimento Astese Lavorazione Prodotti Alimentari) the Company's aim was to capture the bounty of the fertile region of Piedmont, North West Italy, in which it is still based today, to preserve it through the year for wholesale trade. Today Saclà offers a range of products such as Pesto, Alfredo and Pasta Sauces which are in demand, not only in its domestic market, but the world over. All of its products are made in Italy using the finest, freshly picked vegetables and traditional recipes, and there is an uncompromising regard for quality.

name: Fabalish
description: Fabalish is at the forefront of the emerging trend for "real" plant-based foods, and was founded to provide healthy and delicious options for consumers craving to eat better and cleaner. Out with the highly processed, lab-engineered foods loaded with artificial preservatives and additives. Our products are made with organic and simple ingredients, and feature a healthier, plant-based, veggie-packed, allergen-friendly twist on classics such as falafel, condiments, and brownies.It all began with a life-changing health journey for our founder, Jessica, who healed herself through clean, plant-based foods. Food is life, and we're on a mission to fix our food system.

name: Fage USA Dairy Industry, Inc.
description: FAGE has been made by the same Greek family for nearly a century. Our family, the Filippou's, proudly open a small dairy shop in Athens, Greece in 1926. Greece falls in love with our deliciously rich and creamy FAGE yogurt. The third generation of our family begins making FAGE in beautiful upstate New York in the 2000's and is still family owned today. We continue to be passionate about sharing the finest dairy products with food lovers around the globe.

name: Fairy Tale Cotton Candy
description: Fairy Tale Cotton Candy was founded in 2013 by Meg and Steve Shearer, two creative entrepreneurs who owned and operated a small chocolate retail operation and store for over 20 years. In an effort to boost sales in the summer, Meg & Steve acquired cotton candy machines and got to work developing a line of all natural cotton candy flavors like apple and banana. Through research they discovered that no company was innovating cotton candy! Being the creatives they are, they set out on a mission to change the world of cotton candy. We are the inventor of Pickle Cotton Candy (#1 best selling flavor!), were the first to develop a line of spicy flavors, and are at the forefront of flavor trend innovation. Fairy Tale Cotton Candy is family owned and operated our of our manufacturing facility in Des Moines, Iowa. Our goal is to delight and surprise each and every customer who tries our products.

name: Family Foods International
description: With such a strong passion for yummy scrumptious desserts, a lot of baking and sweets are just not the same without condensed milk. It felt like a tough life for us vegans at that time but we're not letting that get us down ! Since we've got loads of delicious coconut milk right here, why not create a veganized version with our already amazing coconut milk ? And so with lots of trials and yummy tastings ( 2 years and 29 versions to be exact ! ), it really did happen.

name: Farbest Brands, Div. of Farbest-Tallman Foods Corporation
description: Farbest Brands offers ingredients for the food, beverage, and dietary supplement industries.  Please stop by our booth to see our array of fine quality products.

name: Farm Creek Meats LLC
description: At Farm Creek Meats, our story starts with two ranchers that wanted to change how we snack in America! We saw firsthand the power of U.S. agriculture and the value of knowing exactly where your food comes from.As lifelong believers in clean eating and honest sourcing, we recognized a growing gap in the snack food aisle, too many meat snacks were filled with mystery meats, preservatives, or imported ingredients. We knew consumers from athletes to busy parents to outdoor adventurers deserved better!That's why we set out to create something different.High Protein. Clean Fuel. Raised Right.Our mission is simple: to craft high protein snacks using 100% American-raised bison and elk, with nothing artificial ever! Each product we make reflects a commitment to quality, transparency, and nutritional integrity.By raising our own animals and keeping production in our own USDA facility, we not only ensure superior taste and freshness, we also help strengthen rural economies, reduce supply chain gaps, and bring more resilience to the American food system.Every Farm Creek Meats Bison Stick is:Made with 100% premium bisonPacked with 21g of clean proteinOnly 70–90 caloriesFree from gluten, and artificial preservatives.We believe in fueling strong bodies with clean food, and doing it the right way, from the ground up.

name: Farm Kawakami
description: It all started after my child was born, with the desire to feed him safe fruit that was grown without herbicides or chemical fertilizers.

name: Farm's Elite
description: Farm’s Elite is a one of the fastest-growing privately-owned edible oils companies in the U.S., driven by quality, innovation, and efficiency.Through its premier global bulk production and distribution capabilities, and private label services, Farm’s Elite offers its customers and partners a comprehensive, diversified suite of premium-quality oil solutions.Farm’s Elite Ranked in 2025 in the Top 1% of Inc. 5000’s List of Fastest- Growing Private Companies in America. The Company earned a spot as the 3rd fastest-growing company in the Food & Beverage category, and 50th overall.

name: Farmer Bob
description: Farmer Bob® was built from the roots of a family who has been farming for decades. Bob is a third-generation farmer, carrying forward the values, skills, and respect for the land that were passed down through his family — even though the farm he operates today is not the same family farm his grandparents worked.After years of farming and berry growing in the Pacific Northwest, Bob saw firsthand how much perfectly good fruit gets overlooked or under-valued — not because it lacks flavor or nutrition, but because it doesn’t fit the strict specs of the fresh market. Rather than let that fruit go to waste, he decided to turn that challenge into an opportunity.Farmer Bob® was created to make simple, real foods rooted in better farming practices. Our signature frozen fruit snacks — Beyond Berries™ — blend berry purée with naturally sweet dates to create seedless, bite-sized frozen pieces with no added sugar, and nothing artificial.We believe:🥇 Better food comes from real ingredients🌎 Upcycling and smart farming can reduce waste🤝 Transparency and simplicity matter💙 Food brands can still come from real farmersFarmer Bob® is here to reconnect eaters to the people and practices behind their food — and to shape a better food system, one berry at a time.Healthy soil. Healthy plants. Healthy people.

name: FarmWell
description: Farmwell began with a dream from the Ramstad’s—to build a farm that grew something truly special. For Ron, it was the chance to combine his lifelong dream of owning a farm with his experience creating simple, organic food. The goal? To grow something with real benefits that could make a lasting impact, from the ground up.They discovered the Aronia berry & knew they had found what they were looking for. A natural antioxidant powerhouse berry & not-too-sweet flavor.So, the Ramstad’s planted 25,000 Aronia berry bushes by hand, building their Regenerative Organic Certified® from the ground up.In 2025, Farmwell was launched to carry that care beyond the field—transforming thoughtfully grown ingredients into refreshing antioxidant hydration designed for everyday life.

name: Fatworks
description: When the world thought we were crazy, we bucked the anti-fat trend and pioneered the first national brand of Pasture-Raised cooking fats. Fat had been maligned and marginalized for decades, but we knew the science was wrong. As the original anti-seed oil "Defenders of Fat," we've spent 15 years championing what study after study now confirms: real fat is not only natural but essential for a healthy lifestyle. Fatworks is a husband and wife team of David and Mieke Cole, with a mission to restore nutrient-rich, traditional animal fats to their rightful place in kitchens and homes. Fatworks was born in 2011 when we recognized that lifestyles like Paleo and Keto needed a fat brand they could trust. From the start, we've partnered with farmers committed to ethical practices, sustainability, and humane treatment of animals. By sourcing premium-quality, organic, and pasture-raised animal fats, we've created a line of minimally processed, pure fats that reflect ancestral wisdom while meeting modern standards of excellence. Education, transparency, and craftsmanship have driven us from day one. Our perfected wet-rendering process ensures every jar of Fatworks delivers exceptional purity, flavor, and nutritional benefits. Whether you're frying, roasting, baking, or crafting candles and skincare, our fats elevate your creations and inspire healthier, more flavorful living. What began as a small idea has grown into a community-driven brand beloved by chefs, food enthusiasts, and wellness advocates. As Paleo-friendly pioneers, we take pride in helping people rediscover the joy of cooking with fats that nourish both body and planet. Our story is one of revival, resilience, and passion—a testament to the belief that traditional wisdom and modern values can coexist beautifully. At Fatworks, we're not just making fats; we're redefining them, one Fat-tastic jar at a time.

name: Fearless Eggs
description: a good egg comes from Aegis Foods, an employee owned company that is dedicated to food safety. While generally available to restaurants, pasteurized shell eggs should be a choice for consumers with compromised immune systems, those caring for people in the home or for people who want to cook or enjoy eggs without worrying about salmonella. a good egg liberates kitchens!

name: Felicia-Andriani
description: We’re not just making pasta! We’re crafting a happier, healthier you with every twist and twirl! Sprouting from the rich soils of Gravina in 2009, Felicia isn’t just about pasta; it’s a celebration of life’s vibrant mosaic—wellbeing, flavor, harmony. Our pantry is a tapestry of the earth’s finest offerings—organic, gluten-free, and kissed by the Italian sun. Think spirulina, oats, buckwheat, brown rice, and a symphony of legumes. Crafted in Italy’s pristine allergen-free facility, with our very own multigrain mill, we’re masters of our craft from seed to supper. Vigilant quality checks? Just part of our recipe for trust. With Felicia, every plate is a promise of purity.

name: FENAGRI
description: Founded in 1998, the National Federation of the Agri-Food Industry (FENAGRI) is the leading network of agri-food entrepreneurs in Morocco. It brings together the entire agri-food ecosystem and serves as a recognized interlocutor with public institutions, financial partners, and national and international stakeholders.FENAGRI is a professional association representing the Moroccan agri-food industry. It coordinates its activities with around twenty sector-specific professional associations, as well as directly affiliated agro-industrial companies.As part of its mission to promote Moroccan agri-food companies in international markets, FENAGRI is organizing the official Moroccan participation at Natural Products Expo West this year, reinforcing Morocco’s presence in the global natural and organic products market.

name: Fenchem Inc
description: Established in 1995, Fenchem has grown into a globally recognized leader in distributing and manufacturing premium ingredients. We proudly serve a wide range of industries, including Human Nutrition, Food & Beverage, Personal & Home care, Animal nutrition, Performance Materials, and Agricultural Chemicals.

name: Fermelanta, Inc.
description: Fermelanta develops microbial cell-factories to produce natural ingredients through sustainable, and scalable fermentation. Our technology enables the efficient biosynthesis of natural molecules such as flavonoids, carotenoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, for supplements, natural "flavors & fragrance", pigments, and personal care products at scale. Our platform offers a cost-effective solution to strengthen natural supply chains while reducing environmental impact compared to plant extraction or chemical synthesis. Independently, or in collaboration, Fermelanta helps to meet the growing global demands of key active ingredients.

name: Fermenteria
description: I first tasted hard water kefir when I was in Nicaragua where I was livingas an expat in 2021. I immediately fell in love with it. It was a beautifully socialdrink but didn't seem to give me the alcohol headache that I was so fa-miliar with. I have lots of negative reactions to alcohol.  Additionally, while the "functional beverage" category seemed to be saturated, I often questioned the functionality of what I saw on the shelves.  I wanted to create something that was backed by science that our consumers could believe in. I, with our team, spent the next 2 years figuring out how tomake this recipe in a way that was commercially viable. It was a lot ofhurdles to overcome, especially because we couldn't find anyone elsein the US making hard water kefir. There just wasn't anyone else to ask.  In addition to the hard water kefir, we also brew non-aloholic water kefir so you can enjoy Fermenteria all day, any time!  Now, we brew Fermenteria water kefir in our own brewery in eastside downtown San Antonio where we also have a very cool taproom and community space.  We also have an in-house lab where we propogate our own cultures, yeast, and test each batch to make sure it's packaged fully alive!  We are totally bootstrapped and growing regionally in only Central Texas and Southern California at the moment, but we hope that the word gets out on water kefir and it becomes a household name!

name: Fever-Tree
description: We started with the idea that, if æ of your drink is the mixer, then you should use the best. We work with only the best naturally sourced ingredients from around the world and no artificial flavorings or sweeteners to create mixers that do justice to the world's finest spirits.It all began in 2003 with a meeting of minds and one simple premise: if three quarters of your G&T is the tonic, wouldn't you want it to be the best?From the very beginning, our co-founders, Charles and Tim, approached their business in a different way - there would be no compromise at Fever-Tree. Flavour and quality were of the utmost importance. This mindset led them on an 18-month adventure from the archives of the British Library to facing the wrong end of a Kalashnikov in the Democratic Republic of Congo and concluded with the launch of our Premium Indian Tonic Water in 2005, with the belief we still operate by today?Innovation remains at the heart of Fever-Tree. Our story is about going to the ends of the earth in pursuit of the best and, the most exciting thing is, we've only just scratched the surface.

name: Fèz Grand Cru by Casablanca Green (SARL)
FiberBlisss
description: I started FiberBlisss out of personal necessity.As someone living with diabetes, I was constantly searching for products that supported my digestion and cravings—without spiking my blood sugar or tasting like medicine. Most fiber supplements were either gritty, packed with sugar, or loaded with artificial ingredients I couldn't pronounce.I wanted something different.Something clean. Something functional. Something that actually tasted good.So I worked with nutritionists and formulators to create FiberBlisss—a fruit-powered, fiber-rich powder made with real ingredients, no added sugar, and no artificial sweeteners. Each scoop is designed to help you feel full, beat bloating, and support your gut—without compromising your lifestyle or your taste buds.I created this for myself, and now I'm proud to share it with anyone looking for a better way to feel good every day.

name: Fiddyment Farms
description: The Fiddyment's are pioneers in the American pistachio industry. David was one of the very first to plant pistachios in California. Their first orchard started in Roseville, California and has expanded to more than 700+ acres in Central California. More than 5o years later, Fiddyment Farms continues to take pride in the quality of pistachios they produce and offer fresh, great tasting California grown pistachios.  Fiddyment Farms was recently acquired by Horizon Nut Company, home of "the true family farmer", a kindred group of 50+ grower owners (including the Fiddyment family) helping get your crop from farm to table. True hands-in-the-dirt people.

name: Fidelity Fulfilment US
description: Fidelity Fulfilment is a global 3PL partner offering omnichannel warehousing and order fulfilment services. With our own international hubs in the UK, the EU, and the US and a unified technology platform, we combine precise operations with hands-on support to keep fulfilment simple, scalable, and seamless across borders.We have extensive experience supporting natural product brands, including food, supplements, and personal care. From compliance and batch tracking to shelf-life management and careful handling, we understand the specific requirements that natural products demand.

name: Field Theory Foods
description: Field Theory's founder John Strohfus is a third-generation farmer who has been involved in agriculture his entire life. He became Minnesota's first hemp grower in 2016 and has developed a trusted network of Regenerative Agriculture focused growers for hempseed and many other specialty crops such as sunflower, buckwheat, oats, wheat, and kernza.John is an industry advocate for Regenerative Farming, bringing some of the first ever Regen Verified products to market under the Soil Carbon Initiative (Soil Carbon Initiative) verification program.Field Theory is founded by a farmer and we understand how excellent food is created. Quality starts on the farm, seed to shelf. Send us a message and let's explore how we can power your brand with our innovative ingredients."

name: Fifth Third Bank, National Association
description: Fifth Third Bank has the expertise, leadership and innovative technologies to help your organization succeed in a rapidly changing global marketplace. Our list of firsts is extensive, and it’s one that continues to expand as we explore the intersection of tech-driven innovation, dedicated people and focused community impact.The Food, Beverage and Wellness industry faces unique challenges that can be especially complex to navigate. Fifth Third Bank has a designated team of experienced professionals with the resources to understand the nuances of your business cycle and provide best-in-class financial solutions and advice to power production, distribution and packaging. Whether you need counsel for a specific challenge or an end-to-end strategy to reach your financial goals, our relationship team is ready to help.

name: Fiji Water
description: Earth's Finest Water is known for its iconic square bottle, unique mineral profile, and soft, smooth taste — all of which are rooted in its unique source. First introduced almost 30 years ago, FIJI Water brought natural artesian water from the remote Yaqara Valley in Fiji to the global stage. In 2004, the brand joined what is now known as The Wonderful Company, ushering in a new era of purposeful innovation and marketing excellence – all while preserving the pure, consistent taste consumers know and trust.  That commitment to consistency is rooted in the water's extraordinary journey.  On a remote Pacific island, 1,600 miles from the nearest continent, tropical rain is filtered through volcanic rock, slowly gathering natural minerals and electrolytes. The water collects in a natural artesian aquifer, deep below the Earth's surface, shielded from external elements. Natural pressure forces the water toward the surface, where it's bottled at the source, untouched by man… until you unscrew the cap. Since 2007, the FIJI Water Foundation has supported environmental conservation and improved the lives of native Fijians, investing more than FJD $35 million in community development, access to safe water, education, health & wellness, and environmental sustainability.

name: FILLO'S Americas Made
description: Founded in 2016 by Cuban-Panamanian Americans, Daniel and Antonio Caballero, FILLO'S remixes Latin American staples to fit an on-the-go lifestyle.

name: Fine Italian Food
description: The Mantova organization has the honor and the commitment to continue more than 100 years of tradition and holding an unparalleled experience in the production of quality olive oils. Mantova is continually building a successful premium quality leadership position in the international Italian food market.

name: Fire and Smoke Society LLC
description: The two Owners,  Brian and Scott,  purchased the best Charcoal Grill company in the USA, PK Grills.  As they sold these grills into Specialty BBQ, they noticed that there was this growing interest in unique and innovative Spices and Sauces appearing on the shelves in these stores , " Hey why cant we do this but make it available across the country"  So that is what they did, providing high quality, all natural products in bright colorful packaging with unique and quirky names to all the retailers across North America.  Each product is unique,  innovative and adds great flavor to all types of dishes, whether it is in your kitchen or cooked on a grill.We are welcoming retailers and consumers to our Fire and Smoke Society in record numbers,  becoming the fastest growing brand in the seasoning category across the USA

name: Fire Department Coffee
description: Inspired by coffee's vital role in keeping firefighters alert during demanding shifts, Fire Department Coffee was created in 2016 by Luke Schneider, an active firefighter and retired Navy veteran. We are run by active and retired firefighters. Our mission extends beyond just providing premium coffee. We are committed to giving back to our fellow brothers and sisters who put their lives on the line for others every day.

name: Firehook
description: Firehook Crackers are celebrated for their signature crunch and distinct flavor which is indicative of the company's commitment to quality organic ingredients and meticulous craftsmanship. Equally irresistible on their own or paired with accompaniments, Firehook Crackers elevate your favorite cheese, charcuterie, dips and spreads.

name: Fireman's Brew, Inc
description: Founded by retired Los Angeles County Fire Captain Rick Brandelli, Firemans Brew Coffee is a premium, mission-driven coffee brand dedicated to honoring and supporting the firefighting community. With 38 years of distinguished service, Captain Brandelli earned multiple Valor commendations for his bravery and unwavering commitment. After retiring, he sought a new way to give back to the brotherhood he served so proudly. That mission became Firemans Brew Coffee—a brand built on courage, camaraderie, and community.

name: First Business Bank
description: Known for quick decisions and a respectful approach, First Business Bank prioritizes competitive pricing, flexible options, and industry-leading client service. With specialized industry experience, our Accounts Receivable Financing and SBA Lending experts help businesses get the funding they need to carry out strategic goals. For more information, visit firstbusiness.bank. Member FDIC

name: First Canned Food (Thai) Co., Ltd.
description: KULA's journey began with a simple yet powerful spark: the unforgettable taste of Thailand's purest aloe vera.From the nutrient-rich heart of Central Thailand comes our aloe—thick, crisp, and bursting with freshness. We've taken this natural wonder and bottled it as "pure, refreshing joy" for the world to enjoy. Our mission is to energize your day with drinks that are as healthy as they are delicious, sparking passion in every sip. KULA is more than just juice; it is a lifestyle, an emblem of happiness, and a celebration of the spirit.

name: First Gen Food & Beverage Inc
description: In 2022, I realized that there wasn't an authentic Mexican aguas frescas drink in a can. The ones out there either use horrible ingredients that I can't pronounce and the other uses apple juice. I felt like the people in my community deserve to have a drink in the convenience of a can that actually tastes like they do at home or on the street corners. The Hispanic community always has people making things that don't represent our culture well so I decided to make it myself.

name: First Light Foods
description: We are a collective of passionate farmers and foodies. We started with pasture-raised Venison, then we went about inventing 100% grass-fed Wagyu beef.We believe in quality over quantity and promise to produce and provide you with the best meat you'll ever taste, nutrient dense organ capsules for the energy to live life to the max and food your dog will love you for.Honoring every animal by not just using all of it but using it in the very best way. A consciously farmed approach that shows respect for our animals and the environment.It's about doing what's right, day after day. Generation after generation.

name: First Priority Manufacturing
description: First Priority Manufacturing, a leading U.S.-based vitamin manufacturer established in 2000.
