Located in Ferndale, Washington, between Seattle and Vancouver, British Columbia, we specialize in producing high-quality nutritional supplements, including vitamins, dietary supplements, bulk capsules, tablets, powders, and daily packets for both human and pet consumption.Our Services:Custom Formulations: Collaborate with our experienced team to develop unique supplement formulas tailored to your brand's needs.Private Label Manufacturing: Launch your own line of vitamins with our private labeling services, ensuring your brand stands out in the market.Bulk Manufacturing: Benefit from our capacity to handle large-scale production runs, providing flexibility and efficiency for your business.Animal Nutrition: We also offer specialized formulations for pet supplements, catering to the growing demand in the pet care industry.Why Choose Us:Quality Assurance: Our facility is NSF CGMP Certified, ensuring adherence to the highest manufacturing standards.Environmental Commitment: Situated in the pristine Pacific Northwest, we are dedicated to producing healthful products while respecting our environment. Customer-Centric Approach: As a privately held company, we prioritize personalized service, understanding your unique needs and delivering solutions that align with your business goals.Explore our virtual booth to learn more about our services, view product samples, and discuss how we can support your supplement manufacturing needs. Our team is ready to assist you in creating products that your customers can trust and enjoy.

name: Fishbowl
description: Fishbowl is the industry’s most flexible inventory management solution that gives warehousing and manufacturing companies end-to-end visibility into their workflows, integrations, and operations, all in a single platform. Operating in two global regions, North America and Asia Pacific, Fishbowl enables customers across hundreds of industries to make better, more strategic, timely business decisions thanks to real-time inventory insights and control. Offering both on-premises and cloud-based solutions, Fishbowl customers can view and manage inventory from anywhere, anytime. To learn more about how Fishbowl helps companies master their inventory and reach operational efficiency, visit fishbowlinventory.com.

name: Fit Bagel
description: The Fit Bagel began in 2024 with a simple idea — to make eating healthy easy and enjoyable. Frustrated by limited options for balanced, all-natural meals, we set out to create a bagel that fits your macros, fuels your day, and supports a healthier lifestyle without sacrificing flavor.

name: Fit Butters
description: Fit Butters was created by a husband and wife in 2020 from a 2-bedroom 1,000 sqft apartment during the heart of COVID. Ryan, an entrepreneur, and Danielle, a nurse, realized what they created by accident was so good that others had to try it.Fit Butters started small and continues to be small with a three-person team who work tirelessly to get their products into the hands of the consumer. Many trials and tribulation lead Fit Butters to distribution into the most well-respected retailers in the country including Walmart, Publix, Kroger, Meijer, Food Lion, Food City and more.With over 40 flavors, including many all-naturally flavored and sweetened spreads, Fit Butters is one of the most innovative, unique and consumed nut butters in the category today. Fit Butters is also the only nut butter brand with authentic flavor collaborations with Post (Fruity and Cocoa PEBBLES) and Kraft (JET-PUFFED).It started as an idea that turned into a massive following through hard work, hustle and humility. Fit Butters provides better-for-you dessert inspired nut butter spreads without all extra sugar or oils. Fit Butters are made with only dry-roasted nuts, a flavored whey or plant-based protein, coconut oil and real toppings. Low Sugar.BIG FLAVOR.

name: Fit&Recovery Co.,Ltd
description: Our company possesses special technology that allows for Ultra-fine grinding down to 20μ at sub-zero temperatures.Using this technology, we grind brown rice to provide starch- free, gluten-free products.

name: Flair Packaging
description: Market Driven & Customer Focused Since 1992Flair Packaging Corporation is a privately held, fully integrated manufacturer focused on comprehensive solutions and support for your packaging needs, no matter your size or budget. Complete with GFSI-recognized FSSC 22000 certification of our food safety management system, Flair's products are FDA, USDA, CFIA & Health Canada compliant for safe solutions you can rely on.

name: Flash Energy Company
description: Flash Energy Drink was created to solve a persistent problem in the energy category: products that deliver short-term stimulation at the expense of crashes, jitters, and artificial ingredient profiles. As consumers became more ingredient-aware and performance-focused, the gap between what people wanted and what legacy energy drinks offered became increasingly clear.Flash Energy was built as a modern alternative, combining natural caffeine, functional ingredients, and bold, approachable flavors to deliver clean, sustained energy without compromise. Every formulation decision is guided by repeat purchase, transparency, and real-world performance, not hype or over-stimulation.Designed for today’s health-conscious consumer, Flash Energy bridges the space between performance and lifestyle, making it relevant across retail, fitness, and everyday use occasions. The brand is focused on disciplined growth, product integrity, and long-term category relevance as the energy market continues to evolve toward better-for-you solutions.

name: Flash Sales Inc.
description: Z!NGHA's premium double nasal inhalers draw inspiration from the time-honored traditions of ancient Chinese aromatherapy, a healing practice that dates back thousands of years. Rooted in the wisdom of classical Chinese medicine, aromatic herbs and essential oils were historically used to balance energy, stimulate the senses, and promote physical and emotional well-being.One of Z!NGHA's founding partners, together with his wife—whose heritage is Taiwanese—recognized the power of these ancient remedies and saw an opportunity to modernize and share them with the world. Leveraging her deep knowledge of essential oils and their therapeutic properties, they developed a line of dual-chamber nasal inhalers infused with menthol and carefully selected essential oils. Each blend is crafted to evoke specific states of being: Surge, Boost, Bliss, and Calm.Designed for today's fast-paced lifestyle, Z!NGHA's sleek inhalers deliver a refreshing, dual-nostril experience that invigorates the senses and honors the holistic principles of ancient Chinese wellness. After all, why inhale through one nostril when you have two?

name: Flavorganics, LLC
description: Flavorganics' journey started one hundred years ago in 1922 as its parent company was a supplier to the food and cosmetic industries. Through four generations of flavor craft, Flavorganics was created by Julie Weisman (third generation of family), as a line of organic extracts. They are packed in amber glass with colorful labeling to pop on the shelf! Julie developed the first organic vanilla available in commercial quantities. She has served on the NOSB and OTA, helping shape policy as well as been active on the vanilla subcommittee of FEMA and serving on the board of women in flavor and fragrance.All Flavorganics extracts are tested in our laboratories for uniformity and quality and from our beginning one hundred years ago we have created relationships with our growers and curers at origin and suppliers, many of which we still work with today.Through the years our classic flavors were developed that have withstood the test of time.

name: Flavourit Snacks
description: Flavourit started as a project to create value added to the fresh fruit we grow. However we immediately identified a very important segment which cares about not only healthy snacks but flavouful snacks. Therefore we decided to name our brand Flavourit, so that it can remind you of our main goal that is deliver you flavorful favorit snack.

name: Flax4Life
description: For over 25 years, Flax4Life has been creating better-for-you baked goods made with wholesome flax, combining great taste, high-quality ingredients, and the confidence that comes from trusting a dedicated, experienced manufacturer. Founded in 2001, our story began after a family member’s long health battle revealed a diagnosis of Celiac Disease (gluten intolerance) and other food sensitivities not only for himself, but also helped us discover this across generations of the family through awareness.  From that point on, our mission was to create safe, satisfying baked goods that not only tasted delicious but also offered nutritious value to your diet. Not just empty calories. Today, Flax4Life offers a wide variety of Gluten-Free and Allergy-Friendly baked goods, including: Brownies, Muffins, Cookies, Granola, No Sugar Line, and our latest line of Top 14 Free Allergen, Vegan Muffins and Brownies.  Every product is made to deliver both flavor and function, with plant-based protein, fiber, and Omega 3 from our main ingredient, FLAX, to help support balanced nutrition and sustained energy. Our recipes are crafted so everyone can enjoy baked goods without feeling left out.As a company, we believe caring for people also means caring for the planet. That is why we are committed to using a closed-loop system 100% post-consumer recycled packaging. By choosing PCR packaging, we help reduce waste, support a closed-loop recycling system, and lessen our environmental footprint while keeping our products fresh and safe.Quality and safety have guided us for more than two decades. All Flax4Life products are made in our SQF-certified facility and held to the highest food safety standards with the help of our hardworking and dedicated team. After 25 years, our purpose remains the same. To make baked goods you can feel good about sharing with the people you love.

name: Flex
description: The Key To Every Owner’s Dream. Flex empowers business owners with a new approach to finance, combining smarter credit, streamlined banking, and integrated payments into one modern platform.

name: Flock Foods
description: High Protein. Low Carb. Chicken Snacks.

name: Flourish
description: In 2018, Andrew Maida was just 23 years old. He'd dropped out of university and had declined to enter his father's business. With a future that would put most young adults into a tailspin, Andrew's resilience and entrepreneurship began to shine through. His journey began with precarious housing and lots of toaster waffles smothered in sugary spreads. While working late nights and early mornings, he soon realized that his sugar laden start to the day wasn't setting him up for success. Tired of feeling sluggish and constantly hungry, Andrew reached out to his brother, a chef, who had the capabilities to create a breakfast option that wasn't frozen or from a box.  After many trials and errors, they came up with the perfect pancake recipe: high in protein, high in fiber and high in flavor, but minus the sugar—literally, zero grams of added sugar. Since then, Flourish has gone on to serve more than two million pancakes to North Americans. Today Flourish makes breakfasts that deliver a daily dose of enjoyment and pack a serious nutritional punch. Flourish makes high-protein, low-sugar breakfast options that taste flippin' delicious – meaning you get to satisfy your cravings without sacrificing your long-term success.

name: Flowspace
description: Flowspace is a modern fulfillment provider that combines powerful technology with expert fulfillment operations to deliver seamless and scalable execution that moves with your business.

name: FLUIT VITAMIN WATER - VITAMME SA
description: FLUIT was founded in 2021 in Paraguay, but the inspiration behind our brand began years earlier with a personal health crisis. Fabiana, one of our founders, was suddenly hospitalized with symptoms that doctors struggled to understand. After numerous evaluations, a specialist finally identified the root cause: heavy metal intoxication. The diagnosis came with strict medical orders—she could not consume beverages containing chemicals, artificial additives, fluoride, or any compound that could burden her recovery.As she tried to adapt her lifestyle, a frustrating reality became clear: there were virtually no ready-to-drink options that met her needs. Even products marketed as "healthy" contained additives, spike your insulin levels, have artificial ingredients, or unclear formulations. In restaurants, stores, gyms, and on-the-go environments, she found nothing she could safely consume. What began as a medical restriction quickly revealed a much larger problem—a lack of truly clean, functional beverages accessible to everyday consumers.This gap sparked the creation of FLUIT. We set out to craft a vitamin water that combined clean-label principles, real functionality, and refreshing taste, using pure mineral water from a protected aquifer in Paraguay and high-quality, bioavailable ingredients. Our goal was simple: to make hydration that supports wellness without compromising on transparency, safety, or flavor.As FLUIT grew locally, we discovered that Fabiana's experience resonated widely. Consumers were increasingly seeking beverages with fewer chemicals, less sugar, clearer ingredient lists, and functional benefits they could trust. FLUIT quickly became known for delivering on those expectations.Today, we are looking to expand internationally with the same purpose that inspired our beginning:to offer clean, functional hydration that fits modern lifestyles and meets the standards of consumers who prioritize health and transparency.From Paraguay to the world, our journey is driven by authenticity, resilience, and the belief that better hydration leads to better living—and everyone deserves access to it.

name: Fly by Jing
description: Where highly charged flavors meet 100% real ingredients. Fly By Jing is the first premium Chinese food company that brings thoughtfully-crafted pantry staples to the modern kitchen. Developed by Jing Gao, a chef, entrepreneur and renowned expert on Chinese cuisine, we're on a mission to bring uncensored Chinese flavors to the table. Following its launch on Kickstarter as the highest-funded craft food project on the platform, Fly By Jing has seen viral organic growth from a devoted fan base and has been featured in The New York Times, Fast Company, Fortune, WSJ, Saveur, Esquire and more, which have described the company as revolutionizing Chinese food and heralding a new era of flavor.

name: FNB VIETNAM SERVICE JOINT STOCK COMPANY
description: Hapii Coffee – Where Coffee Lovers Gather!Hapii Coffee is a passionate and dynamic team with a deep love for Vietnamese coffee. We were born and raised in regions rich in coffee-growing traditions across Vietnam.Our mission is to elevate the value of Vietnamese coffee through sustainable farming practices, carefully selecting only the ripest, highest-quality coffee cherries to deliver beans with exceptional flavor and character. Each coffee bean embodies the dedication, hard work, and craftsmanship of our farmers, roasters, and experienced team members who are fully committed to their craft.

name: Folkland Foods
description: Folkland Foods is born out of a 4th generation family business, built around potatoes!  Our grandfather and his brother had built a small regional potato chip brand based at our home farm, using our farm's own potatoes.  That business was sold in 2008 before we were able to be involved, so Colt and I (Zack) have always wanted to start our own vertically integrated brand on the farm and live up to our grandfather's legacy.  We had also been looking for the better part of 10 years for a way to transition our entire farm to organic and regenerative practices.  One of the biggest opportunities we had seen  in that decade of talking about brands was frozen potatoes. So we settled on organic french fries as our first product when we formally started the brand in January 2024.  Our third founder Brian, brough the manufacturing and operational expertise; originating in his days working for our grandfather.  We started immediately putting together plans for a production facility, designing the brand, formulating the products.We knew nothing about french fries, but set out with a goal: make the best tasting, cleanest ingredient lists, most authentically mission-driven business that was humanly possible.  We came up with products that are wildly different than your standard frozen fries, and that delivered with an ingredient list that is only ingredients that you can find in your own kitchen- cooked in olive oil and tossed in real herbs and spices.We got our facility running in April of 2025, landed on shelf in June of 2025, and as of today are in over 900 stores.   After a very tight few years, we are ready to bring our fries to every customer who wants them!

name: Food Earth – Fazlani
description: Food Earth: India's Flavors, Made EffortlessFood is one of life's greatest connectors, and nowhere is this more evident than in India. At Food Earth, we're here to share India's vibrant flavors with the world, fueled by founder Iqbal Fazlani's dream of bringing authentic Indian cuisine to tables everywhere. Since our launch in 2019, we've made it our mission to deliver deliciously convenient, quality-driven products with a commitment to innovation.From the start, we wanted to make genuine Indian food as easy as it is delicious. Our global launch introduced meals in microwave-friendly trays, taking the hassle out of meal prep without compromising on taste or quality. Our products include a range that is organic and preservative-free, so they're as clean as they are convenient—perfect for anyone looking to nourish themselves quickly, yet mindfully.Today, Food Earth is on shelves across eight countries, including the USA, Australia, and Canada We've proudly carved out space in top retail chains like Kroger and Albertsons-Safeway. Our range has expanded into exciting categories—ready-to-eat meals, simmer sauces, marinades, dips, and soups amongst others — each crafted to capture India's bold flavors in a global-friendly way, making over 500000+ customers happy across the world.With Food Earth, authentic Indian flavors are now just a pantry away. From quick meals to snack upgrades, we bring you the clean, nourishing taste of India in a way that's effortless yet impactful. Many of our offerings are vegan, organic, and preservative-free, so every bite is as good as it tastes.At the heart of Food Earth is the joy of feeding culturally curious souls around the globe. We invite you to explore our range—taste the essence of India with convenience, every time.

name: Food for Life
description: Food For Life Baking Company is a family owned and operated "specialty goods bakery".  Our passion is natural foods.  Food For Life Baking Co. originated in Glendale, California in the back of a small neighborhood natural foods store known as Foods For Life Natural Foods in 1950.We were the first wholesale bakery in the United States specializing in natural foods and developed the first sprouted grain breads on the market with The Live Grain Difference!™Our mission was to produce only the highest quality baked goods from the finest natural ingredients for optimum health and nutrition.  At a time most commercial bakeries were offering the public only highly refined white breads, we took on a whole new direction to make what nature intended, better!We achieved this through our exclusive sprouting techniques.  As with any good product, word spread quickly, and we began to develop quite a loyal following for the products we produced.  In the early days, customers would drive from many miles away to experience the unique flavor and a nutritionally superior quality of the "Original" Flourless 7-Sprouted Grains bread.  For over 60 years, we've been serving the healthy conscious consumer with sprouted grain and all-natural bakery products with the same quality customers have come to expect!Today, after more than 3 generations and over 60 different bread products, our family still maintains the original baking techniques used to make truly authentic flavorful sprouted grain breads; plus, the foresight and intuition to pioneer other naturally crafted specialty baked goods such as our world-famous Ezekiel 4:9® Bread.  Behind Food For Life products are countless hours of research and development where we've developed exclusive baking processes to ensure proper moisture levels, texture and maximum flavor without losing vital nutrients and important natural fiber.  No conditioners, additives, artificial flavors, colors or preservatives are used.We offer Breads, Buns, English Muffins, Tortillas, Pita Breads and Cereals among others.  Each line includes products specifically developed to meet particular dietary requirements.  Special categories include Organic, flourless, sprouted grain, low Glycemic, high fiber, gluten-free, low sodium, unsweetened, diary-free, low fat and fat-free baked goods.

name: Food Specialties Trading, LLC
description: Since 1889, four generations of vinegar innovators.

name: FoodChain ID
description: FoodChain ID is your trusted source for actionable industry insights and solutions.Over 30,000 food, beverage, ingredient, dietary supplement and cosmetic companies across the global supply chain rely on us as their trusted partner for integrated food safety, quality and sustainability services.Since 1996, we have steadily and purposefully strengthened our offerings to meet the growing and changing needs of our clients. Today, we are proud to offer the collective intelligence of the most knowledgeable experts in the industry in a broad range of fields:Product Certifications ( Food Safety, Sustainability, Organic & Vegan).Product Development( Receipt & Specification & Formulation for PLM)Supplement Compliance.Regulatory Compliance ( Library, Compliance Analysis & Translation of Regulations).Non GMO Project & Certification.Testing (GMO,Food Contaminant & Gluten Free).Packaging ( Compliance & Sustainability)We continue to transform the industry with innovative products that make it more efficient to connect and use external and internal data. These data-driven solutions help you manage your entire portfolio of products throughout their life cycles to ensure they remain compliant, transparent and safe. At the same time, our insightful and responsive team goes above and beyond to understand your priorities, goals, and challenges, in order to assemble the right resources for your specific needs.We are committed to providing you with the unmatched support needed to navigate your industry, as well as the demands of an increasingly complex and evolving global market. Count on FoodChain ID for the timely, accurate information essential to your success. Learn more at foodchainid.com

name: FOODMatch (Divina)
description: More than twenty years ago, the owner and his wife were wandering through an ancient,  olive grove on a Greek island in the Ionian Sea. Somehow, while exploring the craggy slope, they managed to lose their sense of direction. they knew they weren't hopelessly lost, so  they paused to get their bearings and rest beneath the beautiful trees. Their thoughts turned to the antiquity of the trees, some of which locals had told them were planted by the Venetians.They found our way back up the hills to their host's home and at that moment, Phil became determined to find a way to share and recreate a true Mediterranean experience for others back home. What better way than to introduce the wonderful regional specialties of the Mediterranean to the American table?

name: Foodtech Solutions (Thailand) Co.,Ltd
description: We love & sell Organic & Fairtraide Rice!With the Farmers of our Cooperative we focus on:• increasing soil fertility• restoring the ecological balance• lowering input cost• increasing productivity• sharing knowledge about Good Organic Agricultural Practice• develop fair and mutually beneficial longterm relationsFor our Customers we produce, mill and export:• Jasmine Rice and focus on the most Premium Hom Mali which has a superb aroma and melting mouth feel.• We also produce Premium Red Jasmine and Black Jasmine. These are the most pleasant varieties to eat of all whole grain rice varieites. The high content of Autocyans is considered beneficial by many.• Our farmers grow Glutinous (Sticky) rice and we can grow it in larger quantites on demand. • Our Qualitites are for normal consumption or in baby food quality.• We pack in jumbo bags or any smaller packaging, down to 1 lbs consumer packs.Please talk to us, we love to serve our poducts to you.Ananya and Bruno Fischersales.th@fts.bio

name: Forager Project
description: Reinventing dairy with plants, not cows.

name: FORCE FACTOR
description: Founded at Harvard in 2009 and based in Boston's Innovation District, Force Factor is an award-winning global health company committed to bringing you powerful, safe, and effective formulas backed by groundbreaking scientific research.As the #1 Superfoods brand in America, Force Factor makes the highest-quality health, wellness, & performance supplements accessible to everyone.We believe everyone should have access to safe, affordable supplements. That's why we create formulas in a variety of convenient and great-tasting forms that fit your lifestyle and deliver benefits you'll love.Today, Force Factor products are conveniently available at many national and international retailers, and e-commerce stores. We want you to be able to buy our products wherever and whenever you prefer to shop.

name: Forecast Coffee
description: Since 1971, Tony's Coffee has been the Pacific Northwest's original craft roaster. From the beginning at Tony's Coffeehouse in Bellingham, WA, we roasted our coffee in small batches, selecting the best beans we could find from around the world. In 2002, we became one of the first coffee roasters in the country to source organic, fair trade, shade grown coffee from farmer-owned cooperatives. As a result, Tony's has contributed nearly $3M to Community Development projects in coffee growing communities around the world through social premiums. In 2004, we became members of the US Roasters Guild and, in 2012, we became a founding member of World Coffee Research, whose work help ensures the future of sustainable coffee production.In 2020, Tony's became one of the country's first Carbon Neutral roasteries! In 2021, Tony's was named Macro Roaster of the Year by Roast Magazine. In the last 5-10 years, Tony's been building our retail presence beyond the Pacific Northwest, all while remaining  independently owned!We are grateful to our longtime and new customers who value delicious coffee that has a positive impact on communities and the environment.

name: Fortis Solutions Group
description: Fortis Solutions Group delivers differentiated packaging solutions designed to provide our customers with a competitive edge in the marketplace. We stand out through industry-leading lead times, exceptional quality control, advanced color management, and a solutions-driven approach.Our extensive product portfolio leverages cutting-edge flexographic, letterpress, offset, and digital printing technologies. Key offerings include pressure-sensitive and shrink sleeve labels, multi-ply coupon and flexible packaging printing, extended booklet labels, pouches, folding cartons, label applicators, and variable data printing.Headquartered in Virginia Beach, VA, Fortis Solutions Group operates a robust network of manufacturing and sales facilities across the United States and Canada, with locations in:United States: Catoosa, OK; Cordova, TN; Decatur, AL; Ellington, CT; Flowery Branch, GA; High Point, NC; Lewisville, TX; Marietta, GA; Merced, CA; Montgomery, IL; Napa, CA; Norfolk, VA; Novi, MI; Orem, UT; Paso Robles, CA; Santa Fe Springs, CA; Somersworth, NH; and West Chester, OH.Canada: St-Hubert, Quebec.To learn more, visit us at www.fortissolutionsgroup.com.

name: Four Sigmatic
description: Four Sigmatic was founded in 2012 by Tero Isokauppila, whose strong conviction of the healing powers of mushrooms led to a lifelong pursuit of sharing their benefits with the world.Four Sigmatic is a Finnish affair with deep roots that stretch back to the 17th century. Its generational journey began during the second World War when food staples were scarce, and coffee was brewed from chaga out of pure necessity. That fungi-fueled home brew was brimming with superfoods and eventually became the formula that set the foundation for Four Sigmatic.

name: Frankly So
description: So many "healthy" options force a tradeoff between taste and nutrition, or require routines that don't match real life. We believed there was room for something better—something genuinely satisfying, nourishing, and easy.Founded in 2025, Frankly So grew out of Harvest B, an Australian protein manufacturing company launched in 2021 by an American entrepreneur and an Australian VC. Harvest B's expertise in clean, high-protein ingredient systems gave us a foundation few snack brands start with: the ability to create crunchy, craveable textures using short, simple ingredient lists and meaningful protein. That technical backbone unlocked a new expression of protein snacking—light, crisp, flavour-forward, and designed for everyday use.Our team came together with a shared belief that food should support people, not ask them to work harder to achieve their goals. We wanted to create products that deliver both pleasure and purpose: snacks and toppers that taste great, feel good, and fit seamlessly into the way people actually live. The food should do the work—so they don't have to.Using Harvest B's protein technology, we developed a versatile, shelf-stable protein crisp that carries flavour beautifully and stays crunchy. From there, we built a brand voice designed to be smart, direct, and refreshingly clear—because nourishment shouldn't come with confusion or compromise.Today, Frankly So represents a modern, balanced approach to eating. We focus on creating high-protein foods that people genuinely enjoy—crunchy, satisfying, flavour-led products that make better eating feel obvious and attainable.Our journey is just beginning, but our commitment is constant: to bring great flavour, meaningful nutrition, and everyday ease to the modern consumer.

name: Fratelli Polli S.r.l.
description: Polli S.p.A. has been active in the sector of preserved food since 1872 on both national and international markets.Polli produces typical Mediterranean and Italian vegetables in oil, in vinegar, sweet/sour, brine, sauces for pasta, Pesto's, olives, Antipasti in oil.Today, the Polli group operates 4 high-tech factories in Italy and Spain.Polli holds the leadership in Italy's private label manufacturing.Polli is certified and guided by 3 leading business standards: IFS, BRC and ISO and offers a complete range of products to satisfy consumer needs defined by current culinary trends.

name: Freestyle Snacks
description: Freestyle Snacks was born out of the pandemic when olive bars, along with the rest of the world, shut down. With no where else to turn but the traditional olive aisle, our founder Nikki was disappointed with the options on shelf. The taste of these legacy products was bland, mushy, and watery and they were extremely inconvenient to eat with the messy bring getting everywhere. Now with Freestyle Snacks, we've reimagined olives as we know them to bring together high quality, delicious marinated olives from Greece with easy, liquid-free packaging. Finally, olive lovers can get their savory fix anytime & anywhere.

name: French Squirrel
description: For as long as she can remember, Sydney has always been passionate about food and cooking. In an attempt to rediscover her love for food after falling trap to the often-obsessive health food world, she began her food blog,@sydney_kw in 2018. In 2020, we started French Squirrel Berets to provide real ingredient snacks to the world. Sydney is a Certified Hormone Specialist, specializing in blood sugar management and female health through a nutrition perspective. After experiencing hormone imbalances, she discovered a natural and holistic approach to heal her hormones.

name: Fresh 'n Nova
description: "My grandfather, Andreas, was a very famous chef in the restaurant of a renowned hotel. As a young boy, my grandfather's kitchen was my playground; a safe environment that piqued my natural curiosity for experimenting with recipes.I recall anxiously awaiting him to pick me up and take me to his restaurant. It was so much fun with him. We spent hours together, cooking and preparing dishes from authentic recipes. He was a health-conscious individual at a time when few people paid attention to nutrition. He used only organic, non-GMO, low sodium, minimally processed foods with low or no sugar.He gave me his precious recipe book a few days before he passed away and by doing so, I received a mission; to create food that not only tastes good, but also meets high nutritional standards. This mission inspired me to open a gourmet restaurant in the south of France which was rewarded by prestigious food guides.When I moved to the United States, I was presented with the opportunity to pursue the art of designing food, which has allowed me to integrate heart, art, and soul into the process of recreating the delicious, authentic, and healthy recipes that my grandfather passed on to me.Today, I live in Pasadena, California and create my food lines in my own kitchen and then have them made in our state of the art production facility. This is where my grandfather's special recipes serve as the inspiration for foods like several varieties of delicious hummos, the smoked eggplant babaghanouj, and garlic spreads."-Rodrigue Kurkjian, owner

name: Fresh Bell Co., Ltd
description: Freshbell: A Story of Nutritious Food and Uncompromised TasteWith a shared passion for delicious, nutritious meals that didn’t sacrifice taste for health benefits, Freshbell believes that eating well shouldn’t come at the expense of enjoying a flavorful meal. Maintaining a farm-to-table approach, it is our commitment to provide snacks, and beverages for those seeking convenient, healthy food options on the go.Here at Freshbell,We focus on the meals that nourish the body while delighting the taste buds.We have ensured the highest quality of nutrient-dense.We desire to make a positive impact on community.We respect the sustainable agriculture and ethical farming practices

name: Fresh Fizz Sodas
description: Fresh Fizz Sodas is the product of a collaboration between husband and wife team Yoni and Rebecca Schwartz.Yoni loves mixing up drinks and tinkering in the kitchen, and originally planned to start a canned cocktail business. While waiting for New York State to approve the necessary alcohol manufacturing licenses, he started making cocktail-inspired sodas and sharing them with friends and family.Our commitment to using only real food ingredients and no processed sugars comes from Rebecca's interest in maintaining a clean and healthy lifestyle for the whole family. We saw an opportunity to bring these clean-label sodas to market and Fresh Fizz was born!

name: Fresh Victor
description: Our founder Ken Mackenzie grew up in a household where there was always activity - family gatherings, celebrations and any reason to get together with friends and family to eat and drink.  He started his career in the tequila business and would tour the country doing demos and making drinks.  But it took a lot of prep time to make the drinks, from sourcing the ingredients, squeezing fresh citrus juices, making agave syrup, chopping and adding herbs, muddling, tasting and most of all, creating absolute consistency.  At one demo, an audience member noted that a particular craft cocktail took over 6 minutes to make.  That was Ken's A-Ha moment for creating Fresh Victor:  to take the work out so people can experience the enjoyment and get back to the party.Launched on March 3,  2017, Fresh Victor created a new category of fresh, cold-pressed juice mixers with 9 unique combinations using clean ingredients.  All natural.  No preservatives. Gluten free.  Kosher.  Non-GMO.  Mixers for delicious craft cocktails and amazing mocktails.  Every. Single. Time.

name: Fresh Vintage Farms
description: Fresh Vintage Farms was founded in 2019 by husband and wife Tommy and Tara Tickenoff. As third generation almond farmers, their connection to farmers and sustainable farming practices led them to create Fresh Vintage Farms.

name: Fresh Wave by OMI Industries
description: For over 30 years, OMI Industries has used simple science to harness the power of plants as natural odor removers.  Our proprietary blend of plant oils tackles the toughest smells without dangerous side effects.  We can remove odors from wastewater treatments plants as well as odors in your home.

name: FreshFresh
description: Did FreshFresh set out to revolutionize the pet food industry? Not exactly. We simply wanted to feed our dogs the food they deserve – legitimately fresh food of the highest quality. Real meats, vegetables and fruits – the kind you can actually see. We weren’t going to play by the ‘fresh’ pet food industry rules: highly processed and filled with preservatives for long refrigerated shelf life. Or frozen food that requires thawing, but still sold as ‘fresh’. Or even shelf-stable offerings marketed as ‘fresh’. That’s why we doubled down on fresh and created FreshFresh – human food, made for pets, and crafted by chefs, veterinarians and animal nutritionists in a USDA environment. It’s food that’s actually fresh without compromise.Our FreshFresh team has more than a century of combined experience revolutionizing fresh human food – building fresh food companies that have generated billions in lifetime sales across organic, natural, grass-fed and sous vide products for humans. So when we say we understand what truly fresh means, we mean it. Our secret? We use the same sous vide method perfected for human food – slow, gentle cooking that locks in nutrients and flavor. It’s a simple philosophy: if frozen and shelf-stable isn’t good enough for you, it’s not good enough for your four-legged family members. Your dog will taste �the difference in every bowl.

name: FreshPure Waters
description: We started this company with the purist of intentions: eliminate single-use plastic water bottles by providing a superior refillable bulk water option for consumers.We spent years mastering the science of water and filtration to bring you three of the purest, tastiest, most thirst-quenchingly awesome waters you'll ever find (all in one machine).

name: Freshwater Farm Australia
description: At Freshwater Farm we pride ourselves on using only the best natural ingredients in our range of luxury body care products. Many of our ingredients are grown locally on our family farm on the East Coast of Australia.All of our products are produced in our Sydney manufacturing plant and are 100% Australian made, never tested on animals, cruelty free and vegan friendly, excluding our Manuka Honey ranges.Freshwater Farm products are sold nationally in Whole Foods and Sprouts, as well as Erewhon, Wegmans, Fresh Thyme, Gelson's, Mothers Markets, The Healthy Edge Retail Group, Lassen's, and other leading natural retailers. Our distribution partners include KeHE, UNFI, Threshold Enterprises, and Purity Life (Canada).

name: FrieslandCampina Ingredients
description: FrieslandCampina Ingredients is a leader in proteins and prebiotics, providing innovative, nutritious ingredients to address health and well-being challenges worldwide. Its drive is to get the right ingredients to customers - so they can create highly nutritious and specialized applications that help their consumers get the most out of life, always.FrieslandCampina Ingredients operates globally across the Early Life Nutrition, Active, Performance, Medical and Cell Nutrition market segments. The company has regional sales offices in the Netherlands, the United States, Singapore, China and Brazil.

name: Frontier Co-op
description: General Brand Story: Since 1976, Frontier Co-op® has been showing the world that Doing Good, Works. Now more than 50,000 member-owners strong, we're still dedicated to sourcing the highest quality spices, herbs and botanical products for our Frontier Co-op, Simply Organic®, and Aura Cacia® brands — all while creating life-changingopportunities for our growers, employees and their families. We're driven by a simplepurpose: to do good by our people and planet. And to create a stronger companybuilt on a commitment to quality and sustainability. At Frontier Co-op, we believe that Doing Good, Works. Every grower communitywe invest in creates a steady supply of quality products, year after year. And everyemployee we empower puts their passion into products they believe in — makinga difference our customers can see, smell, taste and feel. It's a win for our people,our products and our Co-op.Frontier Co-op: We are Frontier Co-op. 50,000member owners strong and a powerful force of good in the world. As an ethically committed herb and spice brand with a broad culinary and wellness portfolio, we are united by our mission to put people and planet before profits.Simply Organic: We are Simply Organic. The original, all-organic spice brand that lives upto the promise of our name in all thatwe cultivate and bring to the table.We believe in nourishing lives andpreserving the Earth for generationsto come, all through inherently betterfood. Pure and simple.Aura Cacia: When it comes to pure essential oils, it all begins at the botanical source.Aura Cacia is committed to deliveringessential oils from all over the worldwith integrity and botanical authority.

name: Froot Thief
description: Founded in 2021, by a group of ambitious entrepreneurs, with big plans to change children's snacking habits. With confectionery sales at $36.9 billion and rising, The Froot Thief is set to steal sales back from sugar laden snacks and become a national hero for health

name: Frozen One
description: Frozen One was born from a simple frustration: why do high-protein, better-for-you products have to taste like a compromise? As two young, fitness-conscious gym-goers, we were tired of chalky protein bars, sugary shakes, and constantly searching for something that combined real indulgence with real nutrition. When we couldn't find it, we decided to make it.We created Frozen One to be the first protein ice cream that truly delivers on both fronts: clean, high-quality protein that actually tastes and feels like the ice cream you know and love. Each pint packs a whopping 40 grams of protein, only 390–430 calories, and just a fraction of the sugar and fat found in traditional ice cream. No artificial sweeteners or flavors, no gluten—just an all-natural pint with the kind of ingredient label you'd be proud to share.We launched locally in Austin, TX in early 2025 and saw immediate momentum. From fitness studios to corporate office pop-ups, people were drawn to Frozen One not just because of what was in it—but also because of what wasn't. We're not asking anyone to sacrifice flavor, texture, or joy. Frozen One captures the indulgence of everyone's favorite dessert while packing the macros of a protein shake.This seemingly unthinkable combination has fueled our growing community of fans who care about what they eat—but still want to enjoy the foods they love.

name: Fruga
description: This is FRUGA. Miami's original fruit super soda, made with natural ingredientes, real fruit, prebiotics, vitamins, and antioxidants.We didn't reinvent soda. We just made it real.

name: Fruit d'Or
description: A leader in berry processing, Fruit d’Or ranks first worldwide for growing organic cranberries, and second as an organic wild blueberry processor.Through its nutraceuticals segment, Fruit d’Or offers effective, pure nutraceutical ingredients for the supplement, cosmetics and functional food industries. Our products, sourced from the finest cranberries and wild blueberries on the market, retain the full properties and potency that nature has bestowed upon them.

name: Fruit Fly Ninja BV
description: Super Ninja was born out of a moment every consumer recognizes: pests taking over when you least expect it - and no solution truly working. In 2014, our founder Ferdinand found himself with a serious knee injury, unable to escape a growing fruit fly problem. What started as frustration quickly became a realization: the market was full of products that were either ineffective, overly chemical, or unsustainable. Instead of settling, Ferdinand decided to rethink pest control from the ground up. With a background in mechanical engineering, he approached the problem like an engineer, not a traditional pesticide company. His goal was simple but ambitious: create a solution that actually works, without compromising on safety or sustainability. The result was the Fruit Fly Ninja - our first product, and a breakthrough. By combining the right mix of 100% natural ingredients with a smart, innovative design, it proved to be up to eight times more effective than the most commonly used alternative at the time. No toxins. No unnecesary complexity. Just proven performance. Design plays a crucial role in everything we do. Our traps are made from recycled and recyclable materials and designed to be intuitive and consumer-friendly - because effective pest control should fit seamlessly into everyday life. Today, Super Ninja stands for a new standard in pest control: effective, sustainable and thoughtfully designed. Guided by Dutch pragmatism and hands-on mindset, we believe sustainability should never come at the cost of results. For retailers and customers alike, Super Ninja offers a mordern alternative - one that delivers real control while moving the category toward a more responsible future. This is our mission: making sustainable pest control the standard.

name: Fruit Tarind
description: Empacados US LLC is a mexican company with + 50 years being expert in the commercialization and production of quality, healthy and gourmet products, with sales over 50 millions annually and our factory is located in Nuevo Leon, Mx. Near to the border of Laredo Tx.With a team of +350 employees we work tiressly looking for selected ingredients around the world in order to provide to our customers the best experience in their kitchens, grills and business.

name: FRUITI LLC
description: FRUITI LLC is a contract manufacturer of freeze-dried FRUIT Melts.FRUITI melt is a novel form of functional food and nutritional supplements, made of fruit purees and juices, using a patent-pending freeze-drying manufacturing process. FRUITI melt dissolves immediately after putting into the mouth. It is a perfect delivery form for kids, seniors and all that enjoys tasty, natural, clean and healthy supplements. FRUITI is manufactured under low temperature to preserve natural nutrients and active ingredients.The FRUITI Melt Advantages:Comparing to Gummy and other supplement forms, FRUITI has many advantages:Low SugarLow MoistureLong Shelf-lifeLow CarbohydratesNo Added Sugars or Sugar AlcoholsIdeal for Heat Sensitive Ingredients, e.g. ProbioticsIdeal for Water Sensitive Ingredients, e.g. Vitamin C

name: FST Logistics
description: As a third-party supply chain partner, we combine the power to scale with the accountability, partnership, and care your brand deserves. Rooted in Midwestern values and driven by a hands-on ownership mindset, FST is the premier temperature‑controlled 3PL helping emerging CPG brands scale with precision to become category leaders. As an employee‑owned company, we deliver end‑to‑end logistics support backed by expert teams, advanced strategies, and a commitment to protecting product integrity at every touchpoint. Your success is our success.

name: Fuel Up
description: We are here to change the rules of the game and set the bar of quality and transparency so high that not only fitness and bodybuilding enthusiasts use sports nutrition, but everyone who is oriented towards a healthy lifestyle makes it a daily meal.

name: FUJIAN COMHONY BIOTECHNOLOGY CO., LTD
description: Fujian Comhony is specialized in fermentated and semi-fermented APIs and Dietary Supplements Ingredient's production. Main products including Mupirocin, Mupirocin calcium, Fusidic acid, Sodium Fusidate, from dermatological line; Amikacin sulfate, Daptomycin, Dalbavancin from advance antibiotics line. In Dietary Supplement line, we have PQQ disodium salt. All commercial products are approved by EDQM and registered in US FDA. Holding CEPs, Written confirmations, US-DMF, NSF-GMP, GRAS, ISO, FSSC, etc.

name: Fujian Xianzhilou Nutra-Industry Co., LTD.
description: GanoHerb is a renowned leader in the production and manufacturing of premium medicinal mushroom products, with a strong focus on organic Reishi mushrooms. We pride ourselves on being fully involved in every step of the process, from the cultivation of mushroom strains to the final finished products. This comprehensive full industry chain approach ensures the highest quality, purity, and sustainability for our customers worldwide.Organic Reishi from strains to Finished ProductsAt GanoHerb, we control every aspect of our organic Reishi production. From the selection of top-quality mushroom strains, to organic farming practices on our own certified farms, we ensure that each product is grown under strict organic guidelines. Our mushrooms are cultivated without the use of synthetic chemicals, pesticides, or fertilizers, which guarantees a natural and clean final product.21 Years of Organic CertificationWe are proud to have maintained 21 consecutive years of certification in four international organic standards (China, the European Union, the United States, and Japan). This long-standing commitment to organic farming practices ensures that our organic Reishi products are not only safe and effective but also meet the rigorous requirements of global markets.From Farm to Finished ProductOur self-owned organic farms and advanced production facilities allow us to maintain full traceability of our products throughout the entire process. We oversee everything—from mushroom cultivation, extraction, quality control, to packaging—ensuring that each product meets the highest industry standards.Research and Development ExcellenceIn addition to our robust production processes, our dedicated R&D team works closely with clients to customize formulas and create innovative health solutions. This allows us to offer tailored products, from supplements to functional beverages, that meet specific consumer needs and trends.Quality Assurance and Global ReachAt GanoHerb, we uphold strict quality control measures at every stage of production. All products undergo thorough testing to ensure safety, efficacy, and consistency. As a result, we are trusted by clients across North America, Europe, and Asia, with a reputation for delivering premium products to the global market.We invite you to explore our wide range of organic Reishi mushroom products at the Anaheim Exhibition and learn more about our commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation.

name: Full Circle (FC Brands LLC)
description: IT ALL STARTED AT A THANKSGIVING DINNER. A rational problem solver, a visionary designer, a confident connector and an eco-conscious leader with a single vision: to totally transform the way people think about the products they use every day. Since its launch in 2009, Full Circle Home has grown from 10 cleaning tools to a brand with collections in cleaning, composting, storage, gadgets and hydration that help support a healthy and balanced lifestyle. From dish brushes to compost bins and glass water bottles, Full Circle creates products that inform and inspire better choices

name: FUNDODAI, Inc.
description: In March 2019, our company celebrated its 150th anniversary since beginning soy sauce production.In 1869 (Meiji 2), we transitioned our business from money changing and sake brewing—activities we had pursued since the late Sengoku period—to soy sauce production.Moving forward, we aspire to remain a seasoning manufacturer deeply rooted in our community, preserving its distinctive "flavor." Furthermore, we aim to develop this 'flavor' into a "regional food culture" and continue to be a company that shares it from Japan to the world.

name: Futamura
description: Futamura is a global leader in sustainable packaging solutions, specializing in cellulose and compostable materials. With a commitment to innovation and environmental responsibility, Futamura produces high-performance films that meet the demands of modern businesses while protecting the planet.NatureFlex™, Futamura’s flagship product, is a compostable film made from renewable wood pulp. Designed for eco-conscious brands, it combines exceptional functionality with sustainability, offering a versatile and biodegradable alternative for a wide range of packaging applications.

name: FutureCeuticals
description: FutureCeuticals is a leader in the research, development, and manufacture of plant-based powders and extracts for the functional food, beverage, and dietary supplement markets. We develop clinically researched, specialty-branded and custom-blended fruit and vegetable powders. Our organic, plant-based solutions deliver proven nutritional benefits, helping the body perform at its best. By bringing nature and science together, we empower our partners to develop innovative, evidence-based health and wellness for natural and specialty food and beverage brands worldwide. As part of the Van Drunen Family of Companies, we offer a trusted, global network that makes a difference in the lives of major brands every day by delivering innovative fruit, vegetable, herb, and grain-based ingredient solutions.

name: FutureCeuticals
description: At FutureCeuticals, we develop clinically researched, specialty-branded and custom-blended fruit and vegetable powders. Our plant-based solutions deliver proven nutritional benefits, helping the body perform at its best. By bringing nature and science together, we empower our partners to develop innovative, evidence-based health and wellness products for the natural and specialty industry worldwide. At the expo, we will exclusively feature CognatiQ®, for natural brain performance. CognatiQ (also known as NeuroFactor®) is a patented coffee fruit extract clinically shown to impact our functional intelligence by improving decisiveness, accuracy, and cognitive control. CognatiQ® is the only clinically validated brain‑health ingredient made from whole coffee fruit. It delivers patented benefits that enhance working memory and cognitive performance both quickly and over time.  CognatiQ naturally boosts Brain-Derived Neurotrophic Factor (BDNF), a key neuroprotein that drives brain cell growth and connectivity. Clinical brain imaging work shows CognatiQ activates brain regions linked to decision-making, accuracy, focus, and cognitive control.

name: Fuzhou Rixing Aquatic Food Co., Ltd.
description: By the blue coast of Lianjiang, Fujian, the "Hometown of Abalones in China", the name " Captain Jiang" has long been closely linked to high-quality abalones. Behind this well-known brand in the aquatic industry at home and abroad lies the perseverance and pioneering spirit of a coastal fisherman who has deeply cultivated the blue sea for 30 years, as well as a legendary journey of building a "big industry" from a "single abalone" with ingenuity. Jiang Mingfu, the helmsman of the brand, was affectionately known as "Jiang Captain" in the industry not only because he used to run boats and fish at sea all year round in his early years, but also because he always adhered to the belief of "standing at the forefront like a captain and riding the wind and waves" in the ups and downs of the business world. This also became the simplest origin of the brand name.

name: FYK Inc
description: We founded Gheelish in 2023 after realizing there wasnt a brand dedicated to highlighting how great ghee is on snacks. I cold emailed the CEO of Sprouts, got a meeting, got on the innovation center and now in the snack aisle. We want to tell our story to the rest of the retail world.

name: Fytexia
description: Our life science company specializes in developing scientifically supported ingredients for dietary supplements.We enable our partners to create health products that are effective, differentiated, and deliver measurable consumer benefits. Our ingredients are backed by rigorous research, a solid scientific foundation, and a deep commitment to innovation and quality.Our portfolio is strategically focused on key health areas that meet today’s most pressing consumer needs: Metabolic Health, Immune Health, Digestive Health & Healthy Ageing & Vitality.Driven by a belief in the power of nature backed by science, we are committed to delivering high-quality nutraceutical solutions that support better health outcomes and improve quality of life.

name: Fz Organic Food BV
description: Fz is an Organic Pioneer since 1983.

name: G.O.A.T. Fuel
description: G.O.A.T. Fuel ® ("greatest of all time") was created by Pro Football Hall of Famer, Jerry Rice and his family. It is a premium sports energy beverage and lifestyle brand focused on bringing health-forward, innovative products and a G.O.A.T. mindset to consumers. We believe the term G.O.A.T. shouldn't be reserved only just for athletes but anyone striving to be great.

name: Gaia Herbs
description: The Gaia Herbs FarmWe're stewards of 270+ acres of Regenerative Organic Certified™ land in Western North Carolina, where we grow and harvest over 5 million plants and 45 types of herbs each year.Anything we don't grow ourselves, we source from partners around the world who share our high standards.Crafted by Experts with CareOur team of experts including herbalists, farmers, sourcing partners, scientists, and doctors are dedicated to crafting the finest herbal supplements on earth.Healthy Plants Start with Healthy SoilWe nurture healthy herbs from the ground up by growing quality seeds in nutrient-rich soil, preserving the whole plant profile, and ensuring traceable, sustainable, and residue-free herbs.Meticulous from Soil to SupplementFrom our Farm to our on-site ISO-certified laboratory to our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility, we oversee every step from soil to supplement, ensuring only the highest-quality supplements for your wellness.The Finest Herbal Supplements on EarthWe use only the best parts of the plant & ensure our products are free of heavy metals, pesticides, and chemicals. Our supplements are made with organic, non-GMO ingredients when available, and packaged in glass jars for quality and sustainability.Deeply Rooted in SustainabilityWe believe that planetary health is the foundation of personal health and prioritize the wellness of people and planet in all our business decisions.Through efforts like sustainable sourcing, regenerative agriculture, fair trade practices, organic produce donations, and putting people before profits, we demonstrate our commitment to sustainability of our planet, our people, and our business.

name: Galam
description: Galam is a leading ingredients manufacturer for sugar reduction, offering GOFOS™ (sc-FOS) and Frutose (Crystalline fructose)—natural, clean, functional solutions for various food and beverage applications.Galam is recognized as the world’s largest manufacturer of fructo-oligosaccharides. Founded in 1940, Galam operates production sites in Europe and the Middle East and also has a US distribution center. Renowned for supplying high-quality functional ingredients, the company maintains a commitment to research-driven innovation, sustainability, and consistent product excellence.

name: Galen Foods
description: As BGC, we have started our adventure by inheriting the experience of our family who had been into agriculture and food business for over 30 years, adding an innovative approach. In the year of 2009, we carried our agricultural activity to the industrial scene with our factory where the end product is produced. We rely on the tradition but did not skip the future trends. We discovered new tastes bleding our local flavours with a modern touch.

name: Galvanina
description: Galvanina has an ancient and fascinating history. Situated on the slopes of Paradise Hill, where ancient Roman baths once stood, Galvanina takes its name from the eponymous mineral water spring. It is here that a centuries-long journey began through the territory of Rimini. Today Galvanina is present in over 50 countries in the world with its certified quality products: organic drinks, cold teas, mineral waters, sparkling drinks and mixers.

name: GARCIA DE LA CRUZ ORGANIC EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL
description: * More than 150 years of experience* 5 th Generation family owned* 25 years of commercial expertise worldwide

name: Garcoa
description: Garcoa Inc. is a leading CPG brand accelerator and solutions provider specializing in the development of high-performance private and controlled label programs. As a strategic innovation partner, Garcoa transforms market data into retail-ready realities by overseeing R&D, regulatory, and supply chain coordination. The company’s integrated model pairs its creative and strategic expertise with technical manufacturing power. The organization helps facilitate a reliable, sustainable, and scalable path to market, ensuring that every product-from initial concept to final filling-meets the highest standards of excellence and innovation.

name: Garden of Life
description: For Garden of Life, Empowering Extraordinary Health® is not just a mission statement to be used on our website or advertisements. The sole purpose of Garden of Life is and always will be to empower you, our consumers, with the tools necessary to achieve extraordinary health. And, at the same time, ensure that we are offering clean, traceable, clinically studied ingredients in the most sustainable way possible.

name: Garrett Brands, LLC
description: It all started in Chicago in 1949 with a small kitchen, delicious family recipes and a women with big dreams of running her own business. Today, we are still a proud, woman-owned business with a strong commitment to high-quality snacks and supporting our communities through our social impact programs. Garrett fans have come to know us as "the true original" gourmet popcorn. That's why we still make our Garrett Popcorn recipes in batches, handcrafted from scratch using real ingredients to create our uniquely delicious taste experience. I invite you to try our beloved Garrett Popcorn, now conveniently available for fans to enjoy anytime, anywhere. From our kitchen to your table. Happy Snacking!

name: Gather Brands
description: About Gather BrandsGather Brands is a full-service boutique sales agency dedicated to supporting women- and minority-owned CPG companies. We operate as an extension of your team — true brand representatives who are always just a call, text, or email away. From collaborating on clear, compelling retail presentations to securing distributor partnerships and driving shelf placement, our goal is simple: get your products into the hands of consumers and set your brand up for long-term growth.We’re thrilled to celebrate our 5th year at Expo, featuring our signature co-op booth, designed to give emerging brands the opportunity to showcase at this flagship industry event.Stop by to meet the founders behind these incredible brands:Kollo TeaJolene CoffeeRosy SoilLük BeautifoodEdenesqueGutsiRIVO Ice CreamWellaThunderbird BarsWe can’t wait to connect and introduce you to this inspiring community of founders!

name: GDS - GROW DIETARY SUPPLEMENTS DO BRASIL
Gelato Festival
description: Gelato Festival is the culmination of 16 years of International gelato chef competitions experience, neatly packaged in a delicious take home pint!

name: GELITA
description: GELITA offers a holistic range of collagen proteins, including collagen peptides with proven body-stimulating capabilities, tailor-made gelatins, and non- or partially water-soluble collagens. This extensive product range, combined with significant experience in developing solutions for various applications, makes GELITA the first choice for many customers. In today's market, where consumer demands for natural, healthy, non-allergenic ingredients are increasing, GELITA's collagen proteins meet these requirements perfectly. They are food products (e.g., no E-number) and possess unique technical and physiological properties.

name: Gelner Gida AS
description: JELYAP JELATIN, a GELNER brand, is one of the manufacturers of powder and Leaf gelatin, a special product that has only a few MANUFACTURERS in the world and is the ONLY producer with Halal and Kosher certificates. GELNER is a BIO TECHNOLOGY company of UYGUNER DERİ; a reputable company with 85 years of experience in the leather industry, with strong capital and Know-How. GELNER manufactures and carries out R&D works for many Collagen and Derivative Bio Technological products, mainly Halal Edible food gelatin, Pharmaceutical Bovine gelatin, Leaf Gelatin with its unique facility established in Balıkesir Gönen Organized Industrial Zone.

name: Gelprime
description: Founded in 2019, with an industrial facility located in Ibiporã, Paraná, Gelprime stands out in the production, commercialization, and distribution of bovine-origin gelatin and hydrolyzed collagen, following the most rigorous national and international quality standards to serve the food and pharmaceutical markets.Operating in a vertically integrated manner, Gelprime encompasses all stages of the supply chain (farm > slaughterhouse > tanneries > gelatin and hydrolyzed collagen production > distribution), ensuring full control over the process, origin, and traceability.Gelprime processes exclusively raw materials from its own and certified tanneries of its group, responsible for about 50% of the supply of the national market, ensuring the origin, traceability, and delivery availability of its products to customers.Since 2025, the company has had MBRF as a strategic partner, holding a 50% equity stake, further strengthening its structure, innovation capacity, and growth prospects.

name: Genesis Manufacturing LLC
description: FDA Registered & cGMP FACILITYGenesis Manufacturing is your full-service contract partner for nutraceutical powder supplements. From ingredient sourcing and blending to filling, packaging, and shipping—we handle it all.Fast turnarounds. Reliable quality. Seamless fulfillment.Whether you're launching a new product or scaling an existing line, we help bring your vision to life.

name: Genius Gourmet
description: We started Genius Gourmet because we were tired of the protein snacks in the market that tasted like rubber or chalk. We wanted to make protein snacks without sugar that tasted like candy.

name: Genova Pharma LLC>
description: Welcome to Genova Pharma LLC at Booth 3447!At Genova Pharma LLC, we are your trusted partner for contract manufacturing and packaging in the nutraceutical, dietary supplement, and pharmaceutical industries. With a commitment to quality, innovation, and efficiency, we offer custom formulations, large-scale production, and a variety of packaging solutions to help bring your products to market seamlessly. Our state-of-the-art, GMP-compliant facilities ensure that every product meets the highest industry standards.From capsules, tablets, and powders to liquids and gummies, we provide flexible manufacturing solutions tailored to your brand’s needs. Our comprehensive packaging services include Bottles, Blisters, and more, ensuring your products are both functional and visually appealing. Plus, our expertise in regulatory compliance allows you to scale with confidence.📍 Visit us at Booth #3447 to meet our team and explore how Genova Pharma LLC can help take your brand to the next level. Let’s create something exceptional together!

name: Germinal Organic Inc / Il Mangiar Sano Spa SB
description: Germinal Organic's offerings are made in Italy and exclusively marketed in the United States. The product range includes cookies and snack bars made with premium flours and sought-after ingredients such as quinoa, chia seeds, and turmeric. It's a carefully curated selection of products, all certified as organic, gluten-free, non-GMO, and vegan.

name: Giacobazzi A e Figli Srl
description: Giacobazzi is rooted in the heart of "Lambrusco Land": the vineyards and the Company headquarter are locatedin the province of Modena, in Emilia Romagna region.Since generations, the Giacobazzi family took good care of its farms and vineyards trying their best toconsistently improve the quality of their wines. A passion that the led the family to take Lambrusco beyondItalian borders, introducing its wines in several different countries and significantly contributing to bringLambrusco to the status of Italian best-selling wine all over the world.Through the years, the winery introduced some of the most renowned Italian sparkling wines including Prosecco,Moscato and Pignoletto

name: Giant Snacks
description: •	Family-owned and operated for nearly two decades, Giants Snacks is headquartered near the edge of Wahpeton, North Dakota. Working alongside our farmers, we prioritize customer-service and "the best of the best quality".  Giants Snacks' history travels all the way back to 1958 when sunflowers were first brought to the Red River Valley of North Dakota. After a continuation of dabbling into the sunflower seed industry for many years, It wasn't until 1995 that Giants Snacks developed our own Sunflower Seeds and started selling from store to store out of the trunk of our cars.  Many years later we are now from Coast to Coast as well as International.  "Over 20 Years ago the Schuler Family had a vision to develop snacks that are Bigger, Healthier, and More Flavorful than all the rest."  We Believe we have Succeeded.

name: Giesen Group LTD
description: The Giesen story began in 1981 when three brothers—Theo, Alex, and Marcel—set out on a journey that took them around the world before ultimately finding their home in New Zealand. Drawn to the unique landscape of Marlborough, they knew it was the perfect place to cultivate grapes.What started as a simple vineyard soon flourished into something far beyond their expectations: an internationally renowned, award-winning winery celebrated for its innovation and ingenuity. Now, four decades later, Giesen continues to build on its legacy of passion and craftsmanship, creating wines that elevate every occasion.In recent years, Giesen Group has achieved remarkable success in the non-alcoholic wine category, emerging as industry leaders in New Zealand. Today, Giesen Wines embodies the perfect blend of tradition and innovation. Giesen's unwavering commitment to enhancing the beauty of traditional wine through continuous innovation positions them as New Zealand's most forward-thinking winery, creating a future where wine is both reimagined and refined—celebrated not just locally, but around the world.

name: Gifted Breads
description: Gifted Breads started out of my personal journey with celiac disease. Over 15 years ago, I was diagnosed and quickly realized how difficult it was to find high-quality gluten-free bread. Like many others, I was frustrated with the limited options available, which were often filled with unnecessary additives and lacked flavor. I wanted to ensure that people like me could still enjoy the simple pleasure of breaking bread with loved ones. While the gluten-free industry had advanced in many areas, bread remained underdeveloped. That's when I decided to take matters into my own hands and create bread that tasted, smelled, and felt like real bread, restoring the joy of sharing meals with family and friends.Years of research, immersing myself in books and exploring the science behind ingredients, led to the birth of Gifted Breads in 2019.From the beginning, it was important that our products went beyond just being gluten-free. That's why every loaf we bake is made from whole grain ingredients, contains no refined sugar or oils, and is free from dairy, nuts, soy, artificial preservatives, and seed oils. We source only the finest ingredients, making our bread a nutritious, safe, and delicious option for a wide range of dietary needs.As I connected with customers, I realized there was an even greater need—people weren't just looking for gluten-free bread, they wanted clean, health-conscious options. After many months of research, we're proud to be launching a gluten-free and vegan line in November 2024, designed for those who seek both quality and plant-based alternatives.At Gifted Breads, our products are crafted with care and frozen fresh to preserve their flavor, so they always taste like they've just come out of the oven. As a minority- and women-owned business, I'm incredibly proud of our journey. What started as a personal mission has grown into a community-driven brand, dedicated to ensuring that everyone, regardless of dietary restrictions, can enjoy breaking bread together.

name: GILA café
description: GILA® Coffee started in 2004 by two friends passionate about their Mexican roots and a dream of creating new coffee experiences. Both had contact with the wonderful world of coffee from different angles: one had worked at a finca and the other launched a very successful coffee brand. However, they genuinely felt that a great coffee with a strong social mission was missing in the market and at this point they decided to launch GILA Coffee, a brand that will allow them to continue creating and perfectioning in the world of coffee while sharing their cultural values and helping local communities thrive.

name: Gilad&Gilad
description: Gilad&Gilad (G&G) was founded in 2000 in Israel by the husband-and-wife neuroscientist team, Gad M. Gilad, Ph.D. and Varda H. Gilad, after their discovery of the robust neuroprotective properties of agmatine in 1994 and following extensive scientific research to characterize the molecular mechanism of agmatine in sustaining the nervous system's ability to withstand injury and disease. G&G develops and markets its exclusive Agmaceutical® line of products containing G-Agmatine®. G-Agmatine®, the Company's proprietary brand of the highest quality agmatine, has been shown to maintain, protect and preserve healthy nerve functions in animals and people. The Company's core products are marketed worldwide to consumers facing all types of challenges to nervous system proper functions. AgmaSet® (a dietary supplement) and AgmaVet® (for animals) are the Company's first-of-their-kind products superior to existing therapeutics for sustaining resilient nerve functions. The products are backed by human clinical trials and validated by substantial scientific research. In addition, the Company holds a patent (issued in 2017) that protects the use of high dose G-Agmatine® regimens for neuroprotection in dietary supplements, nutraceuticals and food (including medical foods), and a recent, 2023, patent protecting agmatine compositions for maintaining proper joint health.

name: Gillco Ingredients, an Azelis Company
description: At Gillco, an Azelis Company, we have redefined the concept of wholesale ingredient distribution. We have partnered with some of the most reputable and innovative ingredient manufacturers in the world to put together an incredible line of healthy, natural, and functional ingredients. The best part is that we know how to use them. Our sales force is technically trained on all of our ingredients and they are chock full of ideas on how you can make your food or beverage product better. Add to that our extraordinary customer service and you have an ingredient distributor unlike any other.

name: Gilly Loco
description: Gilly Loco is a family-owned snack brand founded by a brother-and-sister team on a mission to reinvent tortilla chips — and prove that working with family isn’t impossible. Frustrated by the widespread use of industrial seed oils, they created tortilla chips cooked exclusively in 100% coconut oil — completely seed oil free. Made with just five simple ingredients — corn, coconut oil, sea salt, water, and lime — Gilly Loco delivers bold flavor and exceptional crunch. The brand also offers gourmet salsas ranging from traditional restaurant-style to bold Ghost Pepper, crafted to pair perfectly with their amazing chips for crave-worthy, better-for-you snacking.

name: Gingerbug
description: Founded on an organic farm, Gingerbug produces a lineup of prebiotic, organic ginger sodas, made with whole food ingredients. At Gingerbug, we are proud to boast a 100% clean label, made with real food and no natural flavors. Our ginger flavor comes strictly from the organic ginger juice that is in each and every can we produce.

name: Giovanni Cosmetics, Inc.
description: Giovanni® was the first full-range, salon-inspired hair care brand in natural product stores, and today is the #1 selling hair care line in the United States Natural Products Industry according to SPINS®. Giovanni® has been bridging the gap between natural and salon-quality since 1979. Family and Veteran owned, vegan friendly, recyclable packaging and plant-based innovative formulas have propelled Giovanni® to become the Hair Care Brand of the Entertainment Industry. In 2024 alone, Giovanni® has been supporting celebrity stylists backstage on over 70 television and movie productions.

name: GIUSTI BALSAMIC VINEGAR
description: Giusti is known as the oldest producer of Balsamic Vinegar of Modena in Italy. Founded in Modena in 1605, the production of Balsamico remained a private affair for centuries, made by families for personal consumption and as prestigious gifts. The "Acetaia," or ageing room, was considered a valuable family asset, and the master vinegar maker was typically a family member initiated into the craft from a young age. This ancient tradition continues today, passed down through generations. Now in its 17th generation, the Giusti family is led by Claudio Stefani Giusti, who combines innovation and modernity with a deep respect for tradition.Giusti's production is rooted in an ancient recipe written by the ancestor Giuseppe in 1863. Today, the range includes DOP Traditional Balsamic Vinegars, an Historical Collection of 5 IGP products, Reserves, new sweet and sour flavored dressings, organic products, and gourmet and mixology offerings.Giusti is also renowned for its dedication to hospitality, welcoming thousands of visitors each year to Casa Giusti, a historic hamlet surrounded by Modena's countryside. Guests can explore the family museum, the ancient aging rooms, and enjoy a tasting of the famous "black gold." In addition to Casa Giusti, flagship boutiques in Modena, Bologna, Milan, and Florence offer immersive experiences for high-quality Balsamic Vinegar.Today, Giusti's products are distributed worldwide, featured in exclusive hotels, restaurants, and fine food shops. The brand is actively involved in both national and international events, maintaining a close on- and offline community. Among these initiatives is Giusti Day, celebrated on May 16th, the company's anniversary, chosen in honor of its founding year, 1605.

name: Givaudan Flavors Corporation
