description: Powered by innovation and creativity, Givaudan Taste & Wellbeing aims to shape the future of food by becoming the co-creation partner of choice to its clients. Built on its global leadership position in flavours and taste, the Company goes beyond to create food experiences that do good and feel good, for body, mind, and planet. With an expanded portfolio of products across flavours, taste, functional and nutritional solutions, and a deep knowledge of the food ecosystem, Givaudan’s passion is to collaborate with clients and partners to develop game-changing innovations in food and beverage. Let’s imagine together the future of food.

name: Glanbia - Ingredients Divisions
description: At this year's Expo West , Glanbia is focused on showing Weight Management Ingredient Solutions for the GLP-1 era. The conversation is shifting. Consumers are no longer just chasing a number on the scale. Increasingly, weight loss is viewed through the lens of Metabolic Health. Stop by to see our range of solutions to address this trend.  Through our Dairy Nutrition and Health & Nutrition divisions, Glanbia is a partner in delivering better nutrition to our customers and their consumers with innovative ingredient and service-based nutrition solutions. With 3,200 employees, 19 Innovation & Collaboration Centers, and 25 manufacturing facilities worldwide, we’re designed and built to innovate, develop, produce, and deliver distinctive bioactive ingredients, dairy & plant-based proteins, custom premix solutions, micronutrients, flavors by Foodarom and Flavor Producers, plant-based solutions, bakery ingredients, functionally optimized nutrient technologies, edible films, and cheese. Our market and consumer insights, broad portfolio of nutritional and functional ingredients, R&D innovation and application expertise, robust and dependable supply chains, and our global footprint of state-of-the-art processing facilities can help address any product or nutritional challenge in foods, beverages, or supplements. We bring it all together for you and deliver better nutrition.

name: Glanbia Performance Nutrition
description: At Glanbia, we believe in healthier lifestyles. Our purpose is to deliver better nutrition for every step of life’s journey. From sourcing pure, natural ingredients to creating smarter, next-gen products, we focus on getting our products into the hands of our consumers and customers. Our values are at the heart of our culture, and they inspire us to grow and perform at the highest level. Lead by our brands Optimum Nutrition, think!, Isopure and Amazing Grass

name: Glimmer Wish
description: Glimmer Wish is Clean & Fun Beauty. We create selfcare products with clean ingredients in innovative and adorable designs. Our one-of-a-kind Mermaid and Unicorn lines include shampoo, conditioner, body wash, brushes, and cosmetic bags. Mom's love our clean ingredients (toxic free) and kids love our fun designs.

name: Global Agro Commodities LLC
description: Global Basmati Rice & Edible Oil Leader | Ready to Drive U.S. Category Growth!We invite you to visit us at N2203 in North Halls Level 2 to learn more & connect with us! Alternatively text us at 214-727-2545 to schedule meeting with us while at Expo West.In 2019 & 2015, America bestowed upon our work, leadership, group and recognized our entrepreneurship caliber and contribution to US manufacturing & exports with The Presidential E-Star Award & E-Award for Excellence respectively. It's a highest federal honor, recognizing our outstanding contribution to the U.S. economy, to growers, & to various stakeholders in five areas of significant impact including innovations through our initiative and work in “From U.S. Farms to World Market Program”.Those five areas of Impact are: Innovation, Measurable Impact, Sustainable Impact, Job Creation & Economic Growth.Also have been privileged and honored to be able to serve our country as an International Trade Advisor to the U.S. Congress through involvement in ITAC 9 since January of 2020.In our contribution & impact journey, our efforts continue with innovation and dynamism. Now we are able to offer unique healthy ingredients for the health and well being of People & Planet under our Global Grocery Supply Platform and through our investments and work on both sides of the ocean.Plant based food has been accepted and proven by the Global Community as good for Planet & People and am proud to be part of this journey and many more to celebrate in the direction of increasing human energy, human potential and staying ahead of time while saving time. After all it is all about "Capitalizing on Time & Energy"! while bringing goodness for People & Planet.With our deep rooted growing, manufacturing, supply chain & distribution capabilities, we have been able to bring healthy ingredients in a most effortless manner from farm to kitchen globally.Starting 2025, as part of our new initiative, we are introducing a platform with unique offerings of impactful brands for access to marketplace with direct sourcing opportunity as well ready to drive U.S. Category growth for a US retailer.We are also investing more in our processing facility in US offering from farm to market value chain to the marketplace and consumers. Our high protein rich Chickpeas (Garbanzo Beans) grown in Montana are also getting attention from high demand for Protein rich ingredients such as Chickpeas.Many U.S. retailers are capitalizing on our offerings and platform and we invite you to share your priorities and let us work to empower your journey. We again invite you to visit us at Natural Products Expo West 2026 in Anaheim, California. We are exhibiting in North Halls Level 2 Booth N2203 of Anaheim Convention Center.

name: Global Healing
description: At Global Healing, our journey began in 1998 with Dr. Group's mission to revolutionize wellness. Frustrated by the lack of quality supplements, he founded our family and veteran-owned company in Houston. For over 2 decades, we've set the standard for clean label products, never compromising with toxic additives, artificial ingredients, or fillers. Our start as a wellness clinic continues to drive our commitment to our customers.

name: Global Organics, Ltd.
description: Global Organics® is a leading global supplier of premium organic ingredients, partnering with the world’s top certified producers to deliver quality, reliability, and scale.With over 30 years of industry expertise, we supply a broad portfolio including: Organic Sugars, Syrups, Chocolate, Cocoa, Coconut Products, Fruit Pureés, Maltodextrin, Caramel, Vanilla, and Soluble Coffee.Our strategically located warehouses across North America and our advanced international supply chain ensure dependable, on-time delivery. Backed by rigorous quality assurance, comprehensive food safety certifications, and a commitment to ethical sourcing, we support food and beverage manufacturers and wholesalers with consistency and confidence.

name: Global Palate
description: At Global Palate, we bridge the gap between global demand and farm-level authenticity. As a trusted sourcing partner, we specialize in delivering high-quality, certified organic ingredients to brands, manufacturers, and food innovators worldwide.From partnering with ethical growers to ensuring every batch meets international standards, our approach is rooted in transparency, traceability, and trust. With a strong global network and rigorous quality systems, we make sourcing seamless-so you can focus on creating exceptional products for your consumers.

name: GloryBee
description: GloryBee is the premier honey supplier dedicated to authenticity, purity and sustainability 100% of our honey is third-party true source certified. Celebrating 50 years, we are excited to announce our state-of-the-art honey processing and packaging facilities including our High Speed Bottling Line with capabilities of packaging plastic or glass ranging from a 12-ounce bear to a 48-ounce bottle. We are the first honey packer to become B-Corp certified!

name: GloryLand Food USA
description: GloryLand Food is a whole food company specializing in the development, production, and international distribution of scientifically innovative, technologically advanced gluten-free and additive-free rice and whole grain noodles.

name: GluCorp
description: At Vision for an Organic World, we believe in carefully monitoring everything — from farms to the table — to ensure quality and safety. We take responsibility not just for our consumers, but also for our partners, stakeholders, and the planet. We proudly produce Organic Rice Syrup, Tapioca Syrup, Oat syrup, Maltodextrin, Syrup Solids

name: GMP Laboratories of America, Inc.
description: GMP Laboratories of America, Inc. is a custom formulator and contract manufacturer of high quality nutritional supplements and vitamins. The company offers a complete range of manufacturing and packaging services.

name: Gnosis by Lesaffre
description: We have one goal: to raise the standard of human healthWe partner with nutraceutical, pharmaceutical, and functional food & beverage brands to create next-gen health products. By combining nature’s intelligence with scientific excellence, we’re raising the bar in human health.We draw on our focused research and development capabilities, rigorous quality and regulatory standards, and extensive clinical validation procedures so that we can effectively collaborate with nutraceutical and pharmaceutical brands to develop game-changing products that help their customers thrive. We relentlessly explore the potential of microbial biotransformation–an untapped, transformative resource–to develop natural, sustainable, and efficacious solutions.

name: Go A Little Nuts!
description: Founded in 1962, 'Go a Little Nuts' has its roots in the Crain Family Walnut Legacy, a lineage that's been at the forefront of walnut cultivation for over 60 years. Originating along the vibrant Sacramento River in California, our family's story is intertwined with the 'Red' Crain of California brand, a symbol of excellence in the world of English Walnuts.In 2022, commemorating six decades of expertise, we expanded our horizon into the retail market. This pivotal step was more than a business expansion; it was a leap towards realizing a vision where healthy and tasty snacking converge. Our entry into retail is our commitment to fostering a culture where making nourishing choices is the norm, not the exception.Our journey is marked by a dedication to nurturing, precision, and a celebration of each harvest. From the growth of each sapling to the final product, every walnut is a testament to our dedication and craftsmanship. As the world gravitates towards conscious eating, recognizing the nutritional value of walnuts, we respond by offering products that meet this growing demand with unmatched quality.We take pride in our process, which is steeped in love, tradition, and an unwavering commitment to quality. Each stage, from our sun-drenched Californian orchards to your table, is a chapter in our story of quality, tradition, and innovation.As 'Go a Little Nuts', we're more than just a brand; we are a legacy. We invite you to join our family, to taste the legacy in each walnut, and to be part of a journey that's about more than just snacking. It's about embracing a healthier, tastier, and more conscious lifestyle. Welcome to our world, where every walnut is a piece of our history, and every bite is an invitation to be part of something bigger.

name: Go Energy Foods, Inc.
description: Changing the Flavor of Healthy!Jacqueline and her co-founder met working long hours as a sales team for a local Utah company.  They would bring snacks from home or buy snacks from vendors, and YUCK!  Either they tasted terrible if they were good for you, OR they just weren't good for you.They began looking into the healthy snack market.  They tried every brand they could find. There really wasn't much out there that tasted good and hit all their qualifications for being healthy.  Some were dairy-free, some non-GMO, some had low-glycemic sweeteners, some were gluten-free, some were organic.   But nothing seemed to contain most of the qualities they were looking for, and if it did, it didn't taste good.In 2017 Jacqueline co-founded E3 ENERGY CUBES Inc. with a mission to "Change the Flavor of Healthy" by creating good clean foods for any lifestyle. After consulting food scientists, chefs, and nutritionists, they were unsatisfied, so they went into the kitchen themselves. They sourced only the finest ingredients, and E3 ENERGY CUBES were born.Later in 2020, Norris Cole, two-time NBA Champion for the Miami Heat joined the company as an investor.We think you'll love them as much as we do.FINALLY, Healthy Tastes Good!

name: Gold Coast Ingredients, Inc.
description: Gold Coast Ingredients supplies the food and nutraceutical industry with a wide range of flavorings and certified colors, including Organic and Kosher products in both liquid and dry forms.

name: GOLD FOODS USA LLC
description: We are a multinational company based in the US, founded in 2014, with a mission to provide safety stock to our business partners. With a global network, we ensure traceability and trust by managing much of our production through sister companies in South America, including Bolivia, Paraguay, and Argentina.In addition to our South American operations, we work with trusted suppliers from around the world, including India and Uganda, offering a diverse and reliable range of products to meet our partners' needs.CHIA SEEDS, SESAME SEEDS, QUINOA, PULSES , PEANUTS, BRAZIL NUTS

name: Gold Kili Trading Enterprise (S) Pte Ltd
description: Born in Singapore, Gold Kili blends tradition with innovation to deliver premium instant beverages loved worldwide. With decades of expertise, we craft authentic flavors using quality ingredients, bringing comfort, wellness, and taste to every cup, anytime, anywhere.

name: Golden Lead Trading Co.
description: From our roots in Hong Kong and China, we’ve grown from a local label printing company to now manufacturing and supplying printing and packaging around the world, and we are just getting started.

name: Golding Farms Foods
description: We invite you to visit our booth to sample our NEW Eggo Breakfast Syrups, Newman’s Own Sauces, and additional featured products.At Golding, we're blending what's next, where we create great-tasting, high quality products that we feel everyone deserves access to. We develop a strategic partnership with our retail and foodservice customers through dependable supply, proactive innovation, and then execution it takes to help them grow.

name: GoMacro
description: In 2003, Amelia Kirchoff was diagnosed with breast cancer. After speaking with her daughter, Jola, Amelia decided to fight the cancer with a plant-based macrobiotic diet in addition to a local lumpectomy. In the face of adversity, Jola and Amelia came together, fought the cancer, and Amelia won. During her battle with cancer, Amelia created the MacroBarÆ recipe in her kitchen on the Wisconsin family farm. In the years following, Amelia and Jola began spreading the power of a balanced, plant-based lifestyle through GoMacro's healthy and delicious MacroBars.Since the brand's launch in 2004, GoMacroÆ has grown from selling MacroBars in local food co-ops, to making plant-based nutrition bars accessible nationwide. GoMacro is headquartered in Viola, Wisconsin, where MacroBars are produced with certified, high-quality ingredients. The success of GoMacro has only fueled Jola and Amelia's passion for spreading awareness to the world about the benefits of balanced, plant-based living. Today, Jola runs the business and when Amelia is not tending to the farm, she is working with the innovations team to develop the newest GoMacro recipes.

name: Gomix Jumex
description: Bringing you the peak of flavorful goodness since 1980.Since our earliest days, we've been beverage pioneers in creating delicious, good-for-you, all-natural superfoods. Today more than ever, we believe that nature holds the ingredients to make our purpose possible - bringing natural goodness and health to people.We hope you'll continue to enjoy our innovations for smarter, healthier, and better-for-you nutrition, as we all work together to care for our planet.

name: Good Culture
description: Jesse, our founder, learned he had an auto immune disease and was able to overcome it using real food. It was then Jesse and Co-Founder, Anders, realized that food had the power to heal. They saw the opportunity to bring healing foods into people's lives and knew that cottage cheese was a perfect place to start. They noticed that as much as cottage cheese was tied to healthy lifestyle and trends, most brands in the supermarket were loaded with artificial and unnecessary ingredients. So they set out to craft cottage cheese using nothing but real foods, simple ingredients with the steadfast belief that food can heal.

name: Good Eat'n
description: Chris Paul switched to a plant-based diet in 2019.  He soon discovered he could not find any snacks that delivered a comparable taste to his childhood favorites...so he created his own solution.  Better for you snacks with new twists on beloved taste profiles.  Addictive tastes and textures with broad consumer appeal.

name: GOOD GOOD
description: After a long day of berry picking in the Icelandic countryside, our CEO's diabetic aunt couldn't enjoy the jam they created. Gardar searched the shelves and only found jams that contained either high sugar content or artificial sweeteners with no fruit. Gardar worked hard to create what seemed impossible—a natural, low-calorie jam that tasted amazing. After more than 100 trials and countless pots cleaned, GOOD GOOD was born.

name: Good Grains
description: Good Grains was founded in 2025 out of a simple, heartfelt mission: to give families—starting with our own—the clean, nourishing foods they deserve. As a parent of a three-year-old and a six-year-old, I found myself constantly searching for snacks and cereals that I could feel proud to serve, ones that were organic, wholesome, and truly better-for-you. Too often, I came up short.That frustration turned into inspiration. Good Grains was born from my passion for feeding our children—and our bodies—the right stuff. We started with organic puffed grains because they're pure, simple, and naturally delicious. From day one, our goal has been to make food that parents can trust, kids will love, and that helps families everywhere live healthier, fuller lives.Good Grains isn't just about what's inside the bag or box—it's about creating a movement where better-for-you becomes the everyday choice, not the exception.

name: GOOD IDEA Inc
description: GOOD IDEA began with a discovery in Sweden by Dr. Elin Östman, a PhD in Applied Nutrition. Over more than two decades, she explored the natural properties of food that support metabolism and help balance blood sugar levels. Her work bridges rigorous academic research with real‑world functional food innovation, much of it conducted within the world‑leading food research center at Lund University in Sweden, specializing in food concepts and their effect on metabolic health.Through this extensive research, Dr. Östman identified that pairing a blend of five essential amino acids with chromium picolinate could help lower post‑meal blood sugar levels. This breakthrough ultimately led to the development of the GOOD IDEA patented blend—clinically proven in a gold‑standard randomized controlled trial to reduce post‑meal blood sugar by an average of 25%.Today, that science is delivered through a crisp, refreshing sparkling water crafted in five Swedish‑inspired flavors. Enjoyed by drinking 1/3 of the can before your meal and the rest with your food, GOOD IDEA offers a simple and scientifically grounded way to help reduce post‑meal blood sugar and support everyday metabolic health.

name: Good Now Foods
description: Your partner for sales management & retail growth!  We work with a variety of natural, clean ingredient food, beverage, non-food, supplement, HABA, and pet products to help them grow in the retail market.

name: Good Source Foods, Inc.
description: Introducing Dubai Crunch, a Better For You Dubai style chocolate snack bite with 100% natural ingredients!Dubai Crunch is the first Gluten-Free, Vegan snack bite to incorporate this delicious chocolate into a healthy, hunger satisfying form. Each serving has 4 grams of Complete Protein and Fiber! Our new .75oz single serving is the perfect addition to a lunchbox or backpack. Stop by our booth and you'll discover your new favorite snack!Here's to Our Health! - The Good Source Team

name: Goodie Girl Tribeca LLC
description: Goodie Girl founder Shira Berk has always met life with a bit of an edge and a whole lot of energy. After leaving a career in the music industry, Shira shifted her creative focus to the kitchen, making great tasting treats at her small Goodie Girl café in Tribeca. A self-trained baker, with bold instincts for all things "alternative," Shira spent countless hours blending bagsful of crazy flour to create her ridiculously delicious cookies using all natural, better-for-you ingredients. The cookies were a big hit at the café…not to mention with Shira's kids, their friends and their parents too! And that is how Goodie Girl cookies was born!​

name: GOODLES
description: Our story begins where we were born: Santa Cruz, California. A little weirdness, a lot of joy, 100% gooder - a brand like GOODLES could only come from here. And we're out to share that feeling with everyone, one little noodle at a time. For us, it's the little things that have the biggest impact - those moments of weirdly joyful magic that we all can create in the world: the big-belly-laugh, petting-a-doggie, roller-skating-unicorn stuff that makes us just feel…gooder.These moments are everywhere, making a tastier, weirder, happier world. At GOODLES, we're out to celebrate everybody who makes them happen!

name: Goodness Ingredients dba The Nutty Gourmet
description: Our family has been farming walnuts in California's Central Valley for four generations. We live out here among the orchards where we work, play and celebrate together – the way our mom intended years ago. That's why Nutty Gourmet is just like us - a vibrant, lively bunch of bold flavors that will satisfy your nut cravings and step up your entertaining. And while we like to have fun, we have a serious side too. We're seriously in awe of the health benefits of walnuts. Did you know they are high in ALA Omega-3 and good for your heart? We're also serious about sustainable farming - from generating our own renewable energy, to precision irrigation that gets the most from every drop.   We tend to the orchards so you can tend to the snacking. So grab a bag or jar and join us in celebrating the amazing walnut and help shape healthier snacking for decades to come. — The Martella Family

name: GoodSam Foods
description: At GoodSAM, we believe Small Farms are the foundation of a better food system — one rooted in healthy land, responsible sourcing, and shared prosperity. Founded in 2019 by Heather K. Terry, GoodSAM is a B Corp–certified food brand building transparent supply chains that connect farmers and consumers more directly.Through direct trade relationships with smallholder farmers and indigenous communities around the world, we source premium coffee, cacao, fruits, and nuts grown with regenerative, soil-first practices. By removing unnecessary middle steps and reinvesting back into farming communities, we help create long-term value across the entire supply chain — from the soil to the shelf. GoodSAM’s portfolio of better-for-you snacks is designed to deliver exceptional taste while advancing a more responsible way of doing business. Every product reflects our commitment to organic and non-GMO ingredients, ethical sourcing, and measurable impact. We believe the future of food is built through collaboration — where farmers, brands, and consumers work together to create a system that is better for people and the planet.

name: GoodSport Nutrition
description: Our Founder created GoodSport for competitive athletes like her son who lacked a natural sports drink option proven to provide elite-level hydration.  GoodSport provides rapid and long-lasting hydration and improves performance with 3x the electrolytes and 33% less sugar than traditional sports drinks.  GoodSport, Naturally Powerful Hydration.

name: GoodVice
description: Now in North Hall! Booth #N1853. GoodVice came to be in 2025 as a big idea to help Americans close their daily fiber gap, a move that stands to decrease all cause mortality by 40%. It was dreamed up by the founders of one.bio, fiber innovators, to make fiber accessible in a new way.

name: GORGIE
description: Looking at the energy drink category and how large it was enabled Michelle, GORGIE's founder, to create a drink that was actually good for you. In 2022, the idea was formulated, and in January of 2023, we launched in Whole Foods! We wanted a place where health and wellness met without sacraficing our need for energy.

name: Gotham Greens
description: Gotham Greens is an indoor farming company and a fresh food brand on a mission to transform the way we approach our food system, putting people and the planet at the forefront. Gotham Greens produces and delivers long-lasting and delicious leafy greens, herbs, salad dressings, dips, and cooking sauces all year round to retail, restaurant, and foodservice customers. A Certified B Corporation™, Gotham Greens sustainably grows high-quality produce using up to 95% less water and 97% less land than conventional farming through its national network of climate-controlled, high-tech greenhouses across America, including locations in New York, Illinois, Rhode Island, Maryland, Virginia, Colorado, California, Texas and Georgia. Since its launch in 2011, Gotham Greens has grown from a single urban rooftop greenhouse in Brooklyn, N.Y., to one of the largest hydroponic leafy green producers in North America. Gotham Greens products are available in more than 6,500 locations nationwide. For more information, visit gothamgreens.com.

name: Gourmend Foods
description: Gourmend began in Ketan's kitchen, shortly after he was diagnosed with IBS and prescribed a low FODMAP diet. Determined not to sacrifice flavor, Ketan dove into research—exploring lesser-known plant parts and preserving seasonal finds from local farmers markets. He began freezing ingredients like green garlic scapes and scallion tops to cook with year-round, and developed his own spice blends and broths that didn't trigger symptoms.When he realized he could recreate everything he loved to eat—with better ingredients and no digestive issues—he knew he had something worth sharing. Gourmend launched with a single product in the summer of 2020: Garlic Scape Powder, a natural, low FODMAP alternative to garlic that quickly developed a cult following. The success of that first product led to the launch of Organic Chicken Bone Broth, and the product line has grown from there, grounded in the same mission: clean, gut-friendly cooking without compromise.

name: Gourmet Nut
description: Gourmet Nut® started in 2010 as a small online site with the purpose of creating healthier snacks. As foodies around the world came to trust and love our quality products at reasonable prices, we've grown to where we are today: a collection of brands with a wide variety of products. Our 3 leading brands are: Power Up Trail Mix, Modern Mill Salad Toppers, and Simple Slices Apple Chips.

name: Goya Foods
description: Founded in 1936, Goya Foods, Inc. is the largest Hispanic-owned food company in the United States and the premier source for authentic Latin cuisine. Combined with authentic ingredients, robust seasonings, and convenient preparation, Goya provides consumers with over 2,500 high-quality and affordable food products from the Caribbean, Mexico, Spain, Central and South America.Goya has fostered a longstanding history in leading the culinary culture of Latin cuisine in the United States while solidifying its position as an iconic symbol beginning in New York City. The company's commitment to excellence is the cornerstone of Goya's popular credo, "If It's Goya, It Has To Be Good". The result of this simple, yet deeply resonant pledge is the evolution of Goya Foods as a leader in the Latin American food industry and a trusted American brand.

name: GR7
description: Green Ritual 7 (GR7) is a wellness brand rooted in whole food green nutrition and daily practice. Our products are intentionally formulated to fit naturally into everyday routines.GR7 offers organic ceremonial grade matcha and functional greens designed to support energy, focus, and balance, seven days a week.Visit us at Booth #1555 to experience the GR7 green ritual.

name: Grain Millers, Inc.
description: Grain Millers is a leading manufacturer of organic and conventional whole-grain ingredients used in cereals, breads, bars and many other products around the world. As one of the world’s largest specialty millers, our legacy is built on being more than just an ingredient supplier; we are a proactive partner. We offer a full line of organic and conventional whole grain products such as gluten-free oats & oat fiber, wheat, barley, rye, triticale, conventional and Non-GMO corn and soybeans, flax, stabilized whole wheat flour, hydrocolloids, and sweeteners. Each of these products can be custom milled to meet your needs within the fast-moving functional food and nutraceutical markets. Our on-site blending and retail packaging facilities provide a retail-ready product for distribution direct to store shelves. We want to help you bring people good food.

name: Grain Trust
description: Grain Trust was founded to bring our vision of clean, convenient, and quality rice to shoppers around the country.  Our family has been in the rice business for over 30 years.  We know the industry from the ground up.  Grain Trust allows us to bring that knowledge and quality to your kitchen.

name: GrainOn Co., Ltd
description: After the coronavirus outbreak, dependence on delivery food has increased, and people are having difficulty digesting food due to irregular eating habits. To solve these difficulties, we developed an enzyme product that combines the nutrition of ancient grains with the fermentation technology of modern science.

name: Grainwell Puffed Grains
description: Grainwell Puffed Grains is a privately owned ingredient, inclusion, and finished goods manufacturer serving the food industry primarily.  Our 105k sf facility in Dyersville, IA manufactures a variety of single ingredient, whole grain, clean label, RTE, puffed items derived from ancient grains such as quinoa, amaranth, sorghum, millet, oats, khorasan, buckwheat, and millet in addition to contemporary grains such as rice, corn, and wheat.  We have also added puffed chickpeas.  Our puffed grains and legumes can be milled or ground into highly functional, RTE, pre-gelatinized flours.The primary finished goods categories Grainwell currently serves are granola, nutritional bars, cereal, snack / mix, toddler, bakery, and pasta categories.Grainwell’s certifications include SQF, Organic, Gluten Free, non-GMO, and Kosher.  The facility is split down the middle for full segregation of gluten free and gluten friendly processing, warehousing, and shipping.  One side is Top 9 allergen free and the other side utilizes only wheat.  All products are processed through a validated kill step, offering a 5-log micro reduction.Grainwell offers a variety of packaging options from bulk pack for ingredients and inclusions (multi-wall bags, Gaylord totes, bag-in-box, supersacks) to CPG retail packaging in VFFS pillow packs. Grainwell currently serves mostly CPGs and their brands, but we are also approaching grocery retailers with our ability to supply private label puffed cereal and approaching select pet food and foodservice operators as well.  Our current account base is incredibly sticky due to good relationships, product satisfaction, responsive customer service, and quality assurance.

name: Grandy Organics
description: Since 1979, Grandy Organics has been committed to creating delicious organic products, never using artificial ingredients, making and using renewable energy, building strong personal connections and relationships, having fun and keeping it real.  Grandy Organics products are made in our Solar-Powered Bakery in Hiram, Maine, USA where we are proud to be our town's largest employer.  Best known as REAL GRANOLAS, we believe in living a natural, healthy and intentional lifestyle that nourishes people, the planet and our community.  At Grandy Organics, our core values reflect everything we do, from the way we source our ingredients to the policies we establish for our team.  This is the reason we're still giving out "high fives" and "peace signs" to our families, friends and customers – the ideals that inspired our journey are still essential to keeping us on course in the years ahead.

name: Granvita
description: At Granvita, we believe a moment is never just a passing second.It’s where time, place, and your presence meet.It’s that magical instant where life truly happens.Where you are fully there: caring, breathing, choosing.At Granvita, we believe true well-being happens when you’re present.When you inhabit your breakfast. Your pause. Your night. Your snack.That’s why we create food that not only nourishes the body,but celebrates real life—not found on calendars or in achievements,but in the simple instants that hold you.For us, a moment is the place where life actually unfolds.That’s where the magic lives.And that’s exactly where we want to be.Granvita. We nourish every moment. And that moment… is you.

name: Grasslands Brokerage & Consulting Ltd
description: Grasslands is a Canadian-based global supplier and agribusiness specializing in the sourcing, marketing, and distribution of organic and specialty crops, with Organic Khorasan as a cornerstone of our portfolio. Founded with deep roots in agriculture, our expertise spans farm-to-market supply chains, value-added processing, and international trade, serving partners across North America and global food manufacturing markets.Alongside our organic grain programs, we supply premium Canadian Saskatoon berry ingredients, bringing this nutrient-dense, prairie-grown fruit to domestic and international partners. We also offer value-added faba bean ingredients, including faba flour, faba protein, and faba butter, supporting innovation across plant-based, bakery, and functional food applications.We are committed to building strong, long-term relationships with farmers, processors, and buyers, ensuring transparency, consistency, and quality at every stage. Through disciplined execution and a partner-focused approach, we connect producers with global markets and support sustainable growth across the agricultural supply chain.

name: Great Lakes Gold
description: Great Lakes Gold was established when our family recognized a need to provide 100% all natural, expeller pressed soybean oil that foodservice operators, manufacturers, and private label partners can count on. Our journey is rooted in one core belief: pure ingredients create impressive results.

name: Great Lakes International Trading, Inc
description: Great Lakes International Trading: 40 Years of Sourcing the ExtraordinaryFounded in 1983 in the heart of Traverse City, Michigan, Great Lakes International Trading began with a simple butambitious mission: to find what others couldn't. Started by brothers Verne and George Powell, the company was built on afoundation of "special requests"—successfully sourcing difficult, rare, or unusual items for clients who needed a partnerwith a global reach.For over 40 years, we have evolved into a premier, full-service import and export company specializing in high-qualitydried fruits, edible seeds, and shelled nuts. While the industry has changed, our core philosophy has remained the same:we thrive on the challenge of the unique. Our journey has been defined by the fulfillment of those "impossible" requests,turning them into long-standing partnerships and a diverse product catalog that spans the globe.Today, Great Lakes International Trading continues to bridge the gap between global growers and specialized markets.Whether you are looking for staple ingredients or a hard-to-find specialty item, you can count on our decades of expertiseand our dedication to the Powell brothers' original vision of excellence. Whatever your fruit and nut needs, we bring theworld to your doorstep.

name: GREATER THAN – Hydration For Her
description: GREATER THAN didn't appear overnight. We began in 2010 as the bold hydrationchoice for elite athletes — a coconut water–based breakthrough built forperformance.But destiny had other plans. Women — specifically nursing mothers, the originallife-givers — discovered our formula and transformed it into something morepowerful. Through their wisdom, passion, and honesty, our purpose evolved fromfueling competition to fueling creation.Now, GREATER THAN stands reborn. No longer defined by a single stage of life,but devoted to every stage of womanhood — from the spark of girlhood to thestrength of motherhood to the grace of menopause.

name: Green Boy Group
description: Green Boy Group is a global distributor of plant-based, NON-GMO, and Organic food ingredients, supplying food manufacturers across North America, Europe, Southeast Asia, Australia, and Japan since 2016.--Key Products (100% Plant-Based and NON-GMO): PROTEINS; STARCHES; SWEETENERS & SYRUPS; FIBERS; GUMS; FLOURS; OILS; SEEDS & MORE.Key Services: Ingredient Sourcing; Ingredient Processing; Warehousing; Shipping & Logistics; Product Formulation.

name: Green Fox Companies
description: The story of Green Fox Companies began in 2023 when Ben and Ellie Fox, driven by passion for sustainable agriculture, decided to transform their 6,000 acre jointly owned farm, Rookie Farmers, into a land of innovation. Located in the heart of Central Minnesota, they embarked on a journey that would revolutionize the way they think about food and sustainable living. They started by using regenerative farming practices growing industrial hemp, a versatile crop that would become the cornerstone of their next adventure – Green Fox Companies, where the crops are processed and packaged into various products.Our Goods Division specializes in the processing of nutritious and sustainable crops, including hemp hearts, hemp seed oil, flax, flax seed oil, millet, sunflowers, and camelina. These crops are regeneratively grown and harvested to ensure the highest quality, reflecting our commitment to excellence and sustainability. Our company's line of Goods is designed to meet the growing demand for healthy and eco-friendly consumer goods and foods.On the Products side of things, we are utilizing the stalk of the hemp plant to create sustainable building materials (i.e. insulation, insulative panels and hempcrete), animal bedding and composting materials. This innovative material not only provides excellent insulative properties but also absorbs CO2 during its entire lifecycle, making it a carbon-negative sustainable option with multiple uses. True to our zero-waste philosophy, Green Fox Companies ensures that every co-product from their hemp processing is repurposed. Today, Green Fox stands as a testament to the power of innovative thinking and sustainable practices. From farm-to-shelf consumer goods to eco-friendly building materials and products, we have created a holistic model of sustainability that continues to inspire and evolve.As our team looks to the future, we remain committed to our original vision: nurturing the land, nourishing our community, and pioneering new ways to live in harmony with the planet. Green Fox isn't just a business; it's a movement, growing stronger with each passing season, rooted in the rich soil of Rookie Farmers and branching out to touch lives far beyond its borders.

name: Green Girl Bakeshop
description: Green Girl Bakeshop makes delicious, plant-based, allergy-friendly ice cream sandwiches and gelato. Our treats are made with clean, simple, superfood ingredients that taste amazing and are accessible to everyone. Whether you have dietary restrictions or are simply looking for a healthier alternative, our sweet treats are the perfect choice. Key Attributes: Plant-Based, Allergy-Friendly, Organic & Vegan Certified, Dairy Free, Soy Free, Gluten & Grain Free, Clean Label Ingredients, No Refined Sugar, Paleo

name: Green Gourmand Foods Inc.
description: Our company was started by Stacy Bacher. Stacy has grown up a vegan and has family members with severe tree nut and peanut allergens and through her educational journey Stacy has been developing plant-based and allergen-friendly recipes for the past 15 years. She attended the Natural Gourmet Institute in New York and then went on to helping restaurants create more vegan-forward menu options before starting her own business. With her husband, Shane, they have started a company with the mission of provide delicious safe snacks for anyone with food allergies or dietary restrictions without compromise to taste or ingredients.

name: Green Source Organics
description: Welcome to Green Source Organics, a trusted supplier of organic botanical and nutritional ingredients for the nutraceutical, functional food, and animal nutrition industries.We specialize in high-quality organic ingredients, including fruit and vegetable powders, fibers, and plant oils—sustainably sourced and supported with full documentation and traceability.Green Source Organics also supplies Green Lipped Mussel Powder for animal nutrition applications, offering manufacturers a consistent and reliable ingredient source.Explore our ingredient portfolio and learn how we support formulation, sourcing, and product development from concept to scale.

name: GREEN TEA COMPANY LIMITED
description: Established in 1997, Ranong began as a humble journey to bring the wellness traditions of Thailand to life. Inspired by the rich heritage of Thai herbs, the brand was born from a passion to create products that not only nurture health but also celebrate the natural beauty of our land.Ranong first introduced a line of herbal teas aimed at promoting wellness during a time when herbal remedies were not yet widely embraced. This bold beginning marked the start of a mission to combine traditional Thai wisdom with modern production practices.The launch of our signature "Mulberry Tea" marked a turning point. With its proven health benefits, such as reducing cholesterol and regulating blood sugar, the product resonated deeply with consumers and helped position Ranong as a pioneer in herbal wellness products. By 1999, the official establishment of Green Tea Co., Ltd. signified our commitment to crafting premium, health-focused beverages for both domestic and global audiences.Ranong's global expansion began in 2002 with exports to Malaysia, followed by the introduction of instant ginger tea in 2006. This innovative product earned us the prestigious Thailand's Prime Minister's Award, reinforcing our dedication to quality and innovation.As Ranong continued to evolve, the brand embraced a modern vision while staying true to its roots. By the late 2000s, certifications such as the Thailand Trusted Mark and BRC accreditation helped us expand into Europe, the UK, and Asia. By 2015, we were honored with the Best Thai Brand award, cementing our place as a global leader in herbal teas.Today, with a state-of-the-art facility in Chonburi launched in 2024, Ranong is poised for an exciting future. Our focus remains on sustainability, innovation, and delivering authentic, health-inspired beverages to the world.Ranong's story is one of passion, perseverance, and purpose—a journey that began with a vision and continues to create connections and inspire wellness, one sip at a time.

name: Greenair, Inc.
description: Custom Diffusion Development. Organic & Earth Friendly. No. 1 manufacturer of essential oil diffusers.Greenair Custom Diffusion Development: Collaboration with brands to create award winning diffusion devices. Diffusion delivery systems for:◼︎ Air care Pest control Pet care Disinfecting Odor neutralization◼︎ Air care: Plug ins, electric diffusers for single and multiple fragrances, smart and analog, and passive and non-passive.◼︎ Pest Control: Solutions to protect people and pets from insects combined with air care fragrances - electric and portable diffusers.◼︎ Pet care: Using natural essential oils to provide air care solutions to relieve stress and anxiety.◼︎ Disinfecting: Fogging devices, air sanitization products for EPA registered natural disinfectants (like HOCL)◼︎ Fully turn key, Product design, Manufacturing, Quality Control◼︎ Mass market, Direct to Consumer, DRTV Specialty, Luxury brands, MLMGreenair Inc. is a company focused on wellness.We are experts in aroma diffuser technology. We recognize the natural benefits that essential oils provide, and one of the best ways to enjoy their remedial qualities is with a diffuser. GreenAir diffusers fill the air and your senses with the beneficial aromas of essential oils through a variety of technologies: ultrasonic, atomizing, and fan diffusion. We specialize in designing and supplying beautiful diffusers with convenient features to meet all of your business needs. Consumer demand and market expansion has helped the essential oil market thrive in recent years. Widespread interest in essential oil remedies and aromatherapy exploded on the scene about a decade ago. And it’s not slowing down. More than ever, people want to fill their lives with natural products and solutions rather than synthetic alternatives.

name: Greenberg Traurig, LLP
description: About Greenberg Traurig’s Food, Beverage & Agribusiness Practice: GT’s Global Food & Beverage Group leverages its deep experience representing some of the most significant participants in the food, beverage, dietary supplement and products industries. The team is ranked in Chambers & Partners, and was named by Law360 “Food & Beverage Practice Group of the Year.” They represent clients on a broad range of matters in the sector, including those involving corporate, regulatory, environmental, finance, intellectual property, labor and employment, litigation, real estate, restructuring, and tax matters.

name: GreenBlue
description: With projects like the Sustainable Packaging Coalition and How2Recycle, GreenBlue is on a mission to accelerate the transition to a regenerative, just, and sustainable materials economy.

name: Greenridge Naturals
description: Founded in 2008 by brothers Michael and Sebastian Madej, Greenridge was born from the desire to produce all-natural, artisanal meat and cheeses in a uniquely European style. Inspired by their Polish and Italian roots, Greenridge gets back to basics with high-quality, clean label, all-natural deli meats, sausages, and snack sticks that are hand-trimmed, naturally smoked, and delivered fresh from our headquarters in Chicago. We celebrate the flavors and culinary traditions of our heritage using artisanal methods and sourcing premium ingredients. Our meat is regionally sourced and we import our spices directly from Europe, which we then mix in-house to create our signature blends for each cut of meat, totalling over 100 different products.We are on a mission to provide premium, natural meats and cheeses that both nourish and taste delicious. We care how food  is made and are passionate about delivering the highest quality products to give our customers a choice when it matters what they feed themselves, their friends and their family. From what we put in, and more importantly, what we keep out, we are dedicated to crafting all-natural, clean label meats with all of the good stuff and none of the bad. As a local, family-owned brand, we pride ourselves on the relationship we build with each customer. We ensure that every retailer we work with receives dedicated attention and tailor-made solutions to support their business. We can seamlessly collaborate on custom orders year-round, guaranteeing a fresh and flavorful experience for both retailers and their customers. Experience the Greenridge difference.

name: GreenSeed External Manufacturing
description: GreenSeed External Manufacturing is a full-service contract manufacturing and strategic sourcing partner dedicated to bringing high-quality natural and better-for-you products to market. We specialize in external manufacturing solutions for emerging and established brands, providing end-to-end support from supplier identification and product development through commercialization and scale.

name: Grey Dog Media
description: We make exceptional marketing effortless. From bringing your brand story to life to engaging your audience and driving measurable results, our team delivers strategic, high-impact creative across every platform. Services include print and brand publishing, video and motion graphics, food and lifestyle photography, recipe development, social media, web design, and more — all tailored to elevate your brand and connect where it matters most.

name: Groundwork Coffee LLC
description: People tend to celebrate success at the finish line, but at Groundwork, we know good things come to those who put in the work. We understand the struggles, the effort, the failures, and small wins and losses along the way - we live it every day.Coffee is a constant through-line in all of our lives. It's the reason an artist can pull an all-nighter. It's the reason students can wake up early to get a few extra hours of studying in. It's the thing that emboldens our community to apply for jobs, survive breakups, and take care of children through sleepless nights. It's the push to work harder, to do better, and to get up and go each day.When you love what you do, you don't stop, no matter how hard it gets. People put in the work, and so do we.Our Certified Organic coffee must meet rigorous standards of quality. We're deeply involved in the long process of getting coffee to your cup, and we never settle for anything less than the best coffee possible. Choosing organic affects much more than what you put in your body. Clean products mean clean environments for farmers at origin—from the land they live to the water they drink. We inspire people to choose better coffee, and inspire the coffee industry to do better as a whole.We opened doors to our very first cafe in Venice Beach in 1990 with a humble goal to source and share the very best organic coffee with our community. Demand grew quickly, and we started roasting 24/7 out of our tiny café on Rose Avenue to keep up.30 years later, thanks to neighbors & friends we've been fortunate enough to serve, we have cafés all along the West Coast, a growing line of cold brew coffees, and two very busy roasteries in Los Angeles and Portland. We've  been profoundly lucky to see the development of dozens of new organic coffee farms around the world, including the first Regenerative Organic Certified(TM) Coffee farms, and are proud to continue sharing their exceptional coffees.

name: Groward Group UAB
description: The company was founded in 2012 . After establishing a solid foundation in the grain and poultry sectors during its first five years, Groward Group transitioned into an international player in 2017.The company’s mission is to drive progressive and sustainable farming by combining traditional agricultural values with modern innovation. The company provides high-quality products that comply with EU regulations and ensure animal health and well-being.One of the main facilities of Groward Group is Baltic Egg Production, a factory specializing in egg products. It played a vital role throughout the process, collaborating with the State Food and Veterinary Service and the USDA to ensure that both the country and the company meet all the stringent US requirements for egg products. Currently, the company not only ensures the high quality of its exported products but has also secured the trust of US consumers.

name: Growers Agri Pte Ltd
description: Founded in Singapore in 2023, Growers Agri Pte Ltd is built on a deep commitment to quality, trust, and long-term partnerships. What began as a focus on premium rice has grown into a regional agrifood platform spanning Southeast Asia.At the heart of our business is contract farming. We work closely with farmers across Vietnam, Thailand, and Cambodia, overseeing cultivation, harvesting, and processing to ensure every grain meets our strict quality standards. This hands-on approach allows us to maintain consistency, traceability, and reliability—values that have earned the confidence of our partners and customers over the years.As consumer needs evolve, so do we. Expanding beyond rice, Growers Agri now produces instant noodles and rice noodles in Indonesia and Vietnam, applying the same discipline and care that define our rice operations. Across every product category, our focus remains unchanged: responsibly sourced ingredients, dependable supply, and uncompromising standards.Today, Growers Agri stands as a trusted agrifood partner—connecting farms to markets and delivering quality food products that families and businesses can rely on, one harvest at a time.

name: Grupo SAMA
description: Grupo SAMA, founded in the late 1990s by beekeeper Samuel Lima Araújo in Oeiras, Piauí, Brazil, began with SAMEL, pioneering beekeeping in the Northeast. By the mid-2000s, it became Brazil's top honey exporter and the world's leading organic honey supplier.Now encompassing SAMEL, S&A Honey, Lamberhoney, and Agroindústria Botão de Sola, with operations in Piauí, São Paulo, and nationwide expansion, Grupo SAMA employs over 200 professionals. Committed to sustainability, we use organic, pesticide-free beekeeping and farmer training.

name: Gruppo Milo SPA
description: Casa Milo is an Italian company founded in 1870 in Puglia, specializing in the production of fresh and dry bronze-drawn pasta and bakery products. With over 150 years of experience, the company combines industrial expertise, controlled supply chains, and certified quality standards to ensure efficiency, food safety, and production continuity. Active in both the Italian and international retail markets, Casa Milo is a reliable partner for food retail and private label, with a strong focus on innovation and sustainability.

name: Guangdong Trace Elements Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
description: We started the brand in China in th year of 2012. Founded on the belief that nature holds the key to optimal health, our health supplement brand embarked on a mission to harness the power of nature's bounty and blend it with scientific precision. Rooted in a rich heritage of traditional remedies, we set out to revolutionize wellness by creating pure, potent, and effective supplements. Today, we proudly stand as a trusted partner in the journey towards better health, empowering individuals worldwide to achieve their wellness goals through our meticulously crafted, ethically sourced, and scientifically validated products.

name: GUANGZHOU LIANYI BIOTECHNOLOGY COMPANY LIMITED
description: We supply superior quality and attractive price traditional and ethnic foodstuffs with best customer service to our worldwide customers.With the expertise of our best quality food production on our abundance of selected top raw materials , the products of " MIYATA " brand are categorized as one of the highest standard foods in Asian Japanese - Chinese ingredients.Product liability insurance protects your business against third-party bodily injury and property damage claims. It's a key policy for retailers, manufacturers, and other business partners

name: Guests on Earth Sustainable Goods Incorporated
description: Jackie Prince founded the brand while working from home during the pandemic. Taking care of two small children, Jackie was constantly cleaning up after her family and REALLY not enjoying the experience.From the toxic chemicals to the ugly single-use plastic bottles uninspired design, Jackie set out to transform cleaning into a wellness activity.

name: Guillermo's
description: Guillermo Rodriguez, the most lovable sidekick in late-night television history, is officially stepping out from behind Jimmy Kimmel’s desk and into the refrigerated section of grocery stores with the launch of Guillermo’s Salsa.Made fresh. Made bold. Made by a guy who once slept in his car and now has his name on the lid.Guillermo's mission is to bring the American Dream to the table.Guillermo's Salsa is made with 8 fresh ingredients. No preservatives, sugar, or tomato paste. Cold pressed, blended, and packed - Guillermo's Salsa is the best!Currently available in all Costco warehouses in the Northeast and Southeast starting week of 3/9.

name: Guinness
description: On December 31st, 1759 our founder, Arthur Guinness signed a 9,000 year least at St. James Gate Brewery in Ireland, the home of our brand. If that is not belief, we don't know what is! Arthur was a visionary, and believed in creating the highest quality product in ways that lifted up his employees and those that enjoyed it. Its led us to make bold choices throughout our history, but has also encouraged our brand to think consumer first, providing options and ways to enjoy that are meant to appeal to all beer drinkers. The journey to launching Guinness 0.0 has drawn on Guinness's proud 261-year history of innovation and brewing brilliance dating from 1759. A commitment to retaining the distinct character and taste of Guinness was central to the four-year process led by the technical and innovation teams at St. James's Gate, the Home of Guinness. The resulting product is a stout that is unmistakably Guinness, just without the alcohol, featuring the same dark, ruby red liquid and creamy head, hints of chocolate and coffee, smoothly balanced with bitter, sweet and roasted notes.

name: Guinness Steak Cuts
description: Born from a collaboration between Sidari Brands and Guinness, Guinness Steak Cuts brings culinary craft and world-class flavor into one of the fastest-growing snack categories. Each cut starts with premium steak, is marinated in a blend featuring Guinness 0.0, then slow-cooked to preserve unmatched tenderness and unlock rich, roasted depth. The result is a modern, elevated take on a classic—offering a true steak experience in snack form.Our three flavors—Original, Coffee, and Chocolate—draw inspiration from the signature notes and character of a Guinness pint. Original captures the essence of tender, seasoned Irish pot roast, Coffee layers in a bold, rich edge, while Chocolate finishes with a hint of warmth and smooth complexity.Each one pairs perfectly with a pint—or on its own as a delicious, protein-packed snack.

name: Guittard Chocolate
description: As the oldest continuously family-owned and operated chocolate company in the United States, Guittard Chocolate Company, now under the fourth and fifth generation of family management, continues to grow with the same innovative spirit and commitment to sustainability that has made it one of the world’s most respected makers and suppliers of premium chocolate over the past 150+ years. For more information, please visit us online at www.Guittard.com or @GuittardChocolate.

name: Guizhou Gui Tea Group Co., Ltd.
description: Founded in 2010, Gui Tea Group began focusing on the matcha industry in 2016. We are committed to producing "clean tea" with quality standards that meet EU export requirements. As a nationally recognized leading agricultural enterprise, we're the largest matcha producer in China and the largest tea producer in Guizhou Province. Our company's business encompasses several key segments, including matcha plus+, premium teas, EU-standard matcha, and base teas. Gui Tea Group is a modern tea enterprise integrating tea cultivation, tea scientific research, production, global marketing, and tea tourism.

name: GummyWorks, LLC
description: GummyWorks is a U.S.–based gummy supplement manufacturer built to help brands bring high-quality products to market with confidence. Based in West Palm Beach, Florida, we offer end-to-end gummy manufacturing solutions—from formulation and production to packaging and fulfillment—all under one roof.We were founded on a simple belief: great gummy supplements require precision, transparency, and partners who can scale. That's why we focus on doing the fundamentals exceptionally well—investing in compliant systems, reliable processes, and experienced teams that treat every product as if it were our own.Our FDA-registered, cGMP-certified facility is designed for consistency and growth, supporting both emerging brands and established leaders in the wellness space. Whether launching a first SKU or expanding a national portfolio, our clients rely on us for operational excellence, clear communication, and dependable execution.At GummyWorks, manufacturing isn't just about making gummies—it's about enabling brands to grow, innovate, and succeed. We're proud to be the partner behind products consumers trust.

name: Gutzy Organic
description: gutzy EMERGED FROM A VERY CHALLENGING TIME IN MY LIFE.Struggles with my business led to stress and a series of health issues. Things had to change! After seeing a naturalist in NYC, I discovered the transformative power of plant-based nutrition and the importance of gut health.I dove headfirst into research and transformed my diet with loads of wholesome & colorful plant-based foods rich in fiber.  Within weeks, the results were mind-blowing: boundless energy and radiant skin!The biggest secret? Prebiotics.These plant-based fibers are like superheroes for your gut, feeding the good bacteria and kicking the butts of the bad ones.Realizing how crucial they are, I made it my mission to bring wellness to the world through organic gut health snacks.Gutzy isn't just a snack; it's the symbol of resilience and the power of gut health to live vibrant lives.WHEN PEOPLE ASK ME WHAT'S IN OUR NAME, I SAY EVERYTHING.gutzy founder,DAVID ISTIER

name: Guzen Development Inc.
description: Guzen Development was founded in 2006 to aid in strategically sourcing raw material of nutritional supplements and healthy foods for customers. Exclusively represents manufacturers of high-quality, research-based products such as type II collagen and proteoglycan, mushroom powders and also supplies a wide range of fermented plant-based proteins that are all sourced and produced in India. We sell to nutraceutical, food and pharmaceutical manufacturers seeking to include research-based ingredients.

name: Gym Weed
description: Our team has trailblazed the functionalbeverage category, building brands likeMuscle Milk and Fast Twitch.We were sick of beverages thatdelivered caffeine and other stimulantsthat leave you with crazy jitters and acrash. We canned athletic focus with ourplant-powered adaptogens, third partytested to be free of all banned andillegal substances.

name: HAEDAMSOL CO.,LTD
description: Since our founding in 2004, our company has produced a variety of seasoned lavers made from domestic raw materials.We have continued to improve through dedication and research to find a healthy taste. With the ultimate goal of providing healthy, hygienic flavors to customers, we will grow into a more reliable and trustworthy company.

name: Hahn's Bakery
description: For over 25 years, the Hahn family has used only the finest ingredients to create "old world" cakes and pastries. From your first taste of our German Coffee cakes, you'll know why customers ask for us by name. Using our world famous recipes, each batch of our baked goods are prepared under the personal supervision of a family member. We hope your friends and family enjoy eating our delicious baked goods, as much as our family enjoys baking them for you.

name: Haider Corp.
description: This is a brand-new brand!  We have had other beverages since 2006, but saw the need for a soda with positive health benefits.

name: HAINAN NICEPAL INDUSTRY CO.,LTD.
description: Hainan Nicepal Industrial Co.,Ltd was established in the 1990s, has a 38,000 square meters factory building area. 2 fruit&vegetable powder work line,6 quick-quick-frozen fruit pulp and concentrated juice production lines  and 1 desiccated coconut product production line.Main products are fruit&vegetable powder, NFC frozen fruit and vegetable juice and Frozen juice concentrate.NICEPAL series of products are widely usded in beverage,baking, catering, cold drinks, snack food,dairy,health care products,ice cream and other fields.

name: Hainan Zhongxin Chemical Co., Ltd.
description: ZXCHEM is a global supply platform specializing in functional ingredients, specialty chemicals, and industrial materials.With integrated manufacturing, sourcing, and logistics capabilities, ZXCHEM supports international brands and manufacturers with stable quality, scalable supply, and system-level solutions.ZXCHEM USA operates as the North American business and service hub, providing local communication, market support, and supply coordination for global customers.

name: Haldiram's
description: What began in a small kitchen in Bikaner, Rajasthan has grown into a global phenomenon. Haldiram has been synonymous with authenticity, quality, and innovation for over seven decades, bringing families together with every bite.

name: Hampton Farms
description: In the last 100 years, Hampton Farms has grown from a small family business to a family of businesses, and together we’ve made Hampton Farms the leading roaster of in-shell peanuts in the United States. We remain committed to providing America’s finest nut-based food products.Over the years, we have carefully cultivated relationships with farmers to ensure our products’ quality from seed to shelf. Headquartered in Severn, North Carolina and in conjunction with our other plants in Edenton, NC, Franklin, VA, Springfield, MA, Lubbock, TX, Portales, NM, Madera, CA & Woodland, CA; we roast, pack, and market finished nut products direct to customers nationwide. We operate with full vertical integration that ensures premier quality at every stage.Our ingredient division is simply the best in the business and proudly serves the bakery, dairy & confectionery industries.  Peanuts & tree nuts are our passion and we aim to deliver high quality ingredients to be used in your finished products.  We offer bulk, nut butters, dry roasting, oil roasting & granulation and serve as your one stop nut shop for all your needs.

name: Hanamaruki Foods Inc.
description: In 1918, we started our journey to manufacture fermented seasoning 'miso', which is indispensable seasoning in Japan.  We are in the business over 106 years with 4th generation president and with corporate philosophy of "valuing materials and craftsmanship," and has primarily operated in the miso manufacturing industry. We continue to strive not only to manufacture safe and reliable products but also to constantly challenge new initiatives.  some of our great inventions, Liquid shio koji and koji powder, are game changers in a food industry. Our Liquid shio koji is a functional seasoning to improve qualities of foods. Thanks to the active enzymes in the liquid, Liquid shio koji has several functionalities such as an tenderizing effect, flavor enhancement, water retention, masking effect, and salt reduction. LSK tenderize meats and fishes and improve cooking yields which provides juicier and better texture of meats and fishes, also LSK enhance a flavor with Umami and the other amino acids.  Moreover the active enzymes break down protein to amino acids which also enhances tastes and helps to reduce the amount of salt in dishes without sacrificing a taste quality. All benefits are  naturally given by the fermentation and enzymic activity.

name: Handian Nutrition Co., Ltd.
description: Handian produces nutritious foods, dietary supplements, and other high-quality health products.Our company developed effervescent tablets, chewable tablets, powders, gummies, and more.We already have a formidable daily nutritional manufacturing capacity. It has many automated production lines. They are for mixing, making tablets, making gummies, and packaging.With multiple automated production lines, we have achieved impressive daily production capacities of up to 600,000 bags of powder, 900,000 tablets, and 16 tons of gummies.

name: Handok Healthcare Inc.
description: Handok Healthcare: Bringing Nature’s Solutions to Life Through ScienceHandok Healthcare is a specialized company dedicated to the scientific research and development of superior naturally derived ingredients. We deliver health products with verified safety and efficacy, built on a foundation of rigorous quality management systems and continuous R&D investment. We are committed to supporting our customers’ healthier lifestyles.From the beginning we have been utilizing naturally sourced and clinically proven ingredients, leveraging proprietary Japanese technology to ensure the highest quality. With 39+ clinical studies and more ongoing, Theravalues strives to further build our valued customers’ confidence in our products based on scientific evidence.Theracurmin® - Confidence in Evidence42X more bioavailable than raw curcumin33 Clinical EvidencesTheracurmin® was created in order to combat the low bioavailability and absorption rates that curcumin has. Using Proprietary Particle Reduction technology, particles of curcumin are made to optimum size to be more easily absorbed by the human body.Theracurmin Super® - First In Its Class85X more bioavailable than raw curcumin6 Clinical EvidencesTheracurmin Super® is a new generation of curcumin with superior bioavailability, which underwent Amorphous Conversion Technology (ACT). This converts rigid curcumin crystals into an amorphous, or dispersed, structure that allows for easy absorption.

name: Hangzhou Huili Capsules Co., Ltd
description: Wecaps-A China factory specialized in empty capsules manufacturer, included gelatin and HPMC capsules.New choice, be better!

name: Hangzhou Levinthal Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
description: Hangzhou Levinthal Biotechnology Co., Ltd. established in September 2021, is an AI-driven technology company specializing in protein design. We research protein co-evolution patterns through our proprietary "AI Algorithms + Wet-Lab Validation" framework, enabling industrialized AI-powered protein design for broader applications in production and daily life.Our services span multiple sectors including: Synthetic Biology, Novel Therapeutics, Health Foods, Animal Nutrition, Environmental Solutions, Functional Skincare.Key Products:Natural sweetener: Rebaudioside M, BrazzeinNatural cryoprotectant: Antifreeze proteins (AFPs)High-performance antibody tool enzymes: IdeZ, IdeS, PNGase F, SialidaseMoving forward, we are committed to expanding our product line with a range of high-value ingredients recognized for superior performance and market validation, driving their strategic adoption across the food, pharmaceutical, and industrial sectors.

name: Hansford Biotech Co., Ltd.
description: Hansford Biotech: Pioneering the Future of Intelligent, Customized Supplementation Solutions Hansford Biotech is a health innovation company specializing in advanced nutrition technologies and tailor-made solutions. Rooted in scientific integrity and driven by a vision for smarter wellness, we create premium nutritional formulations designed to work in harmony with the human body — and with your brand’s unique needs. We believe effective supplementation shouldn’t be complicated, or one-size-fits-all. That’s why Hansford Biotech focuses on developing technologies that optimize absorption, improve usability, and offer flexible customization options for brands, distributors, and healthcare partners. From functional concepts to finished product solutions, we help you meet the diverse demands of modern, health-conscious consumers. By challenging outdated assumptions around bioavailability and supplement delivery, we’ve created a science-first, customer-driven path to better health outcomes — combining innovation with convenience and personalization. Core Principles of Hansford Biotech’s Innovation: 1. Science-based formulations aligned with the body’s natural processes 2. Advanced delivery systems that enhance nutrient absorption and minimize waste 3. Customized solution development tailored to specific health needs, brand goals, and market demands 4. Human-centric product design for intuitive, enjoyable daily use 5. Integrity and transparency throughout every stage — from lab to consumer 6. Relentless innovation guided by scientific purpose and customer value At Hansford Biotech, we don’t just make supplements — we build exclusive, evidence-based wellness solutions for brands ready to lead the future of personalized health.

name: Hapinest LLC
description: Hapinest began with a simple belief: that play is more than fun—it's essential to how kids grow, connect, and discover the world around them. As parents, we wanted to create toys that encouraged imagination, creativity, and togetherness, not just screen time.That belief became our foundation, and along the way, Hapinest grew into an award-winning toy brand loved by families everywhere. But as our own kids grew, so did our understanding of what it means to raise happy, healthy children. We realized that joy doesn't just come from what they play with—it comes from what fuels them, too.In 2025, we expanded Hapinest into the better-for-you kids snack space, creating real fruit and veggie snacks that bring the same sense of fun and discovery to healthy eating. Designed in playful shapes and powered by real ingredients, our snacks make it easy for parents to say yes—and for kids to smile with every bite.Because at Hapinest, we believe that happy, healthy growth starts with the simple things: imagination, nourishment, and moments shared together.

name: Happy Coffee
description: Looking to provide more light within the coffee category, we aim to make as many people happy as possible!

name: HAPPY LAB
description: Happy-Lab is a story of passion, tradition and the pursuit of happiness.Emilio had been in the gourmet gastronomy sector for 25 years when he met Josep and discovered his aromatic herb workshop in the Pyrenees.Josep, a city kid, had long ago moved to the mountains to devote himself to creating his own infusions. In his laboratory, surrounded by recipes, he taught Emilio the secrets of the perfect formula with leaves, flowers of unparalleled aromas and spices from distant lands.It was then, in the midst of calm conversations and steaming cups of tea, that they discovered that Josep's wisdom and love for plants were perfectly complemented by Emilio's experience and knowledge of gourmet products.So they decided to embark on a new project together.

name: Happy Marmalades
description: Artisanal Fruit Spreads100% natural #NoSugar #WomenOwned #MadeinMexicoSpread Happiness! 👇

name: Happy Munch Factory, Inc.
description: Happy Munch was founded by savvy munchers in Vancouver who were looking to innovate the snacking experience. From day one, our snacking philosophy has been to generate smiles from our tasty snacks using only real ingredients. We believe that quality ingredients can generate life's sweetest moments. We're turning the tables on snacking by encouraging all the munchers out there to always find reasons to smile - one bite (or a few) at a time.

name: Happy Nuts / Happy Curves
description: Introducing Happy Innovations.  A brand house featuring the personal care brands - Happy Nuts® & Happy Curves®.Happy Nuts® was founded in 2019 and has quickly grown to be a dominant force on Amazon and Ecommerce.   Natural & clean formulas designed to combat odor, sweat, chafing, and aide in hair removal.Happy Curves® was founded in 2023, and quickly rose to an impressive mass retail position.  With over 28,000 TDP, this brand is growing its national retail assortment of all-over deodorant, intimate washes, chafe solutions, and sweat protection.

name: HAPPY NUTS DAY
description: HAPPY NUTS DAY was founded in 2013 in Chiba, Japan, when a group of skater friends received surplus peanuts that were considered unsellable. Inspired to reduce waste and highlight the true flavor of Japanese peanuts, we began roasting, hand-selecting, and crafting artisanal peanut butter. What started in a small kitchen has grown into a brand rooted in community, sustainability, and a passion for bringing Japanese craftsmanship to everyday food.

name: Happy Snacks
description: We were originally founded in 1981, but reinvented our product line in 2017. Our brand of functional, plant based snacks are Non-GMO, nut and peanut free, and free of egg, milk and soy. Importantly, our cookies are fortified with essential vitamins and minerals, unique to the category. Our family oriented grab & go impulse items are targeted to people wanting a "conscious indulgent" snacking option with a hint of nostalgia. Our brand addresses white space demand and leads the category in sales velocity nationwide. There is no comparable product.

name: HARIO USA
description: For over 100 years, we have been making products that customers cherish.HARIO has been planning, manufacturing and selling heatproof glass since its very inception (1921) — and is the only manufacturer with a heatproof glass factory in Japan.Initially, we manufactured and sold laboratory glassware. But in 1948, we began making coffee siphons by taking advantage of the properties of heatproof glass and our refined glass processing techniques.We later expanded into a wide range of popular home products made from various materials. Since the 1980s, we've been producing industrial glass for automotive light lenses. We also offer items for coffee and tea (black, Japanese and herbal), as well as microwave-safe cooking utensils and other kitchenware.In the next 100 years, we want to continue enhancing the lives of everyone who loves HARIO and keep creating products that people consider their favorites.

name: Harken
description: Harken Sweets is the brainchild of Katie Lefkowitz, former inaugural COO of CAULIPOWER, who was inspired by reinventing frozen food with the power of superfoods. She has combined this learning with a family-famous date caramel recipe,  and seeks to similarly disrupt the candy category with the power of a new superfood - the date fruit. Her background in life sciences has enabled her to develop never-before-seen formulations, and also drives her passion for making better-for-you products accessible and desirable to all: "When It comes to healthy eating, my philosophy has always been: Don't restrict, Replace. People won't swap their Snickers for a salad; they will swap it for a Harken bar. I firmly believe that the only way to support the better-for-you agenda of preventing diet-related chronic illness is to offer healthier alternatives to  classic indulgences that don't sacrifice on taste."

name: Harmless Harvest
description: The heart of our story: the coconut. Our founders searched the world (ok, most of it) for the very best coconut water. They found it in Thailand, inside a small coconut called the Nam Hom, a name that aptly means "fragrant ones." We launched our first product, organic coconut water, at Whole Foods Market in 2011.

name: Haroutine
