description: Rooted in Korea's rich history of innovation and beauty expertise, Haroutine embodies the best of K-Health—a blend of science, tradition, and meticulous craftsmanship. Our commitment to excellence is inspired by South Korea's advanced clinical testing and research methods. Haroutine began in 2021 in the USA as a sister brand to the South Korean brand which shares our name.

name: Harris Spice
description: At Harris Spice, our mission is to source and distribute the finest spices and herbs, in a safe, secure and sustainable manner. The spices and herbs we process – be it for our retail, food service or industrial customers – meet the highest standards established by the industry. As the only global spice company, we are truly vertically integrated and understand that food is a serious business. In fact, at Harris, we think of spice as more than a commodity, but a commitment to quality and service.• We are committed to sourcing as sustainably as possible so that farming communities grow with our success.• Our origin spice processing facilities share a common philosophy of the highest Food Safety standards in processing – be it cleaning, sterilization, milling, packaging or shipping.• Our presence in the US as a purveyor of fine seasoning blends and distributor of quality spices give us a strategic advantage of being a truly end-to-end supplier.

name: Harry's Famous Sauce
description: The Open Food Company was born from a simple question: what if a food company had nothing to hide and everything to share? Founded in 2024 by actor and entrepreneur Harry Hamlin and food industry veteran Chef Renée Guilbault, we're the first open-source consumer packaged goods company, proving that radical transparency and real ingredients can transform an industry built on obscurity.  With an unwavering commitment to: transparency + nutrition + bold flavors + community partners - we’re not just creating products—we’re igniting a movement toward better convenient food for all. Our first brand, Harry’s Famous Sauce delivers delicious, chef-crafted sauces made with real, nutritious ingredients for easy meals worth savoring.We hardwired purpose into our business model, committing 50% of net profits to fighting hunger through partnerships with LA Regional Food Bank, Project Angel Food, Food Bank for NYC, and The Open Door Food Pantry.  In a world where everyday meals have become a compromise between convenience and health, we're building the future of food: delicious, nutritious, transparent, and designed to nourish both bodies and communities. Good from the source. Good for your table. Good for the world.Watch a short video About Us for more details:https://harrysfamous.com/pages/about

name: Haskalife/Prairie Life Ltd
description: Haskalife was founded in 2023, inspired by both science and personal loss. After losing my mother and sister to cancer within a 2 year timespan, I became deeply aware of how much we take health for granted—and how reactive our nutrition system often is. I began asking a different question: what would it look like to nourish health proactively, every day, using foods that are both powerful and real?That question led me to the haskap berry. Naturally rich in anthocyanins and grown in Canada, haskap stood out not as a trend ingredient, but as a whole food with extraordinary potential. From there, Haskalife was built as an Anthocyanin-First Nutrition™ platform—treating anthocyanins as a primary nutrient and designing everything around their daily, consistent use.From the beginning, I knew this couldn't be just another product brand. We built Haskalife by vertically integrating berry processing, upcycling, and clinical validation to honor the whole fruit and reduce waste. Every part of the berry has value, and every decision—from sourcing to formulation—reflects a belief in transparency, sustainability, and evidence-led nutrition.What started as a deeply personal journey evolved into a mission: to make anthocyanins a daily ritual that supports long-term health, performance, and vitality. Haskalife bridges agriculture, food science, and nutrition to create clean-label products and ingredients that people can trust—and that partners can build with.Haskalife exists because I believe better health outcomes come from better systems, not quick fixes. This brand is both a legacy and a forward-looking platform—rooted in care, science, and the conviction that food, done right, can truly love you back.

name: Hatch Chile Co.
description: Our company was founded in Albuquerque in 1987, and we are proud of our native roots and our ties to New Mexico. We believe that the green chile peppers grown in Southern New Mexico are a treasure, and most of the HATCH Select branded green chiles are sourced from local chile growers near the Village of Hatch and throughout Southern New Mexico.

name: Hawaiian Soda Co.
description: Founded in 2020 in Honolulu, HI, Hawaiian Soda Co is bringing a taste of aloha to the world. We aim to bring a taste of the islands to the world by offering real fruit juice sodas free from added sugar, preservatives, and artificial ingredients. Discover our Hawaiian-style sodas: Sparkling Passion Orange Guava, Sparkling Lilikoi Lychee, Sparkling Pineapple Citrus, Sparkling Mango Sunset, and Sparkling Grapefruit Blush.

name: Hddes Extracts Pvt Ltd
description: HDDES GROUP is a collection of companies that revolves in a corporate environment with hierarchy driven by a family based in the tropical paradise of Sri Lanka, since1982. HDDES takes great pride in being one of the few companies that manufacture and exports Organic and Conventional Spices, Essential oils, Oleoresins, Herbal Extracts, Floral Extracts, Hydrolates, Natural Aromatic Chemicals, Coconut based products & Instant Tea. Thus promoting the true Sri Lankan identity to the entire world whilst overcoming barriers of traditional business stereotypes to achieve various business dimensions in areas such as world-renowned Flavour and Fragrance Houses, Pharmaceutical and Nutraceutical Companies, Food and Beverages industries and Aromatherapy industries.

name: Health Thru Nutrition
description: With over 40 years of manufacturing experience, utilizing scientifically supported data and practices, Health Thru Nutrition strives to provide the best quality nutrition products on the market.Good Manufacturing Practices certifications from both the National Sanitation Foundation (NSF) and the Natural Products Association (NPA) assure our customers that all products are of the highest quality and purity as well as manufactured in a safe and sanitary environment.  Furthermore, we perform exhaustive in-house and third party testing to ensure our products not only retain their beneficial nutrient levels up to the date of expiration, but are also free from microbiological bacteria and heavy metals.  Our team is here to answer any of your product-related questions as well as to provide you with current health information to assist you in reaching your goals.  We look forward to working with you and living healthier lives together!

name: HealthAid America, Inc.
description: HealthAid America founded back in 1993 by the visionary Dr's. J. & J. MoraMarco, both esteemed doctors of Oriental Medicine, HealthAid has grown to become a trusted name in the healthcare industry.Though our American branch is based in California, the heart and soul of our organization lie in the UK, where it all began. With over 40 years of experience in the field, we have gained unparalleled expertise and built an impeccable reputation for delivering high-quality products that promote health and vitality.What sets us apart is our commitment to innovation and excellence. Through rigorous research and development, we have crafted a diverse range of supplements and healthcare products that cater to various health needs. Today, HealthAid proudly serves over 60 countries worldwide, with our products trusted by thousands of independent health food stores and pharmacies.

name: HEALTHIFE LLC
description: We Healthife LLC,13+years experiences professional manufacturer of herbal extract & health supplements in China with ISO22000,FSSC22000,HACCP,GMP,FDA,KOSHER,HALAL and NOP/EU ORGANIC certificated,Star products (stable stock in US warehouse):1. Organic Herbs Powders (Organic Siberian Ginseng Powder, Organic Nettle Powder, Organic Dandelion Powder,Organic Burdock Powder,Organic Schisandra Berry Powder,Organic Astragalus Root Powder,Organic Panax Ginseng Powder)2. Organic Mushroom Powders ( Organic Reishi Mushroom Powder, Organic Shiitake Powder, Organic Maiitake Powder,Organic Chaga Powder, Organic Lion's Mane Mushroom powder ,Organic Trametes versicolor Powder,OrganicCordyceps Militaris Powder)3. Beef Organs (Beef liver powder, Beef Heart Powder, Beef Kidney Powder, Beef Pancreas Powder, Beef Spleen Powder, Beef Thymus Powder )4. Anti-Aging Ingredients:Wheat germ extract,Spermidine 1%Nervonic AcidNigella sativa extract,10% thymoquinoneDihydroquercetinOlive Leaf Extract,10%Hydroxytyrosol;  20%OleuropeinApigeninFisetinPterostilbeneNicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotid(NAD)NMNPS（Sunflower/Soybean)PhycocyaninMelatoninVitamin K1Vitamin K2 MK-7Vitamin K2 MK-4 MCCPQQHyaluronic AcidL-GlutathioneGenisteinQuercetin Dihydrate powderEriocitrin & NeoeriocitrinMore detail welcome visit our below:Email: sales06@focusherb.comWhatsapp: +86 13609260206Website: www.focusherb.com

name: HealthVerve USA
description: Healthee  was founded in 2009 with a clear purpose: to make nutritious, convenient foods and beverages that fit seamlessly into modern life. Our Founder brings the best ingredients and culture from Healthy Lifestyle in Asia to meet with the West Modern Healthy Lifestyle. We set out to develop food and drinks that wouldn't just be easy to grab on the go but would also truly nourish the body.These initial offerings reflected our commitment to integrity, purity, and health—a foundation we continue to build on today. Our portfolio has since expanded, and we're proud to now offer functional coffees and teas, bringing the same dedication to quality and nutritional value to every new product.At Healthee, every ingredient is chosen with your wellness in mind. From our first sip to our latest innovation, we have always aimed to deliver the best of nature's ingredients in every product. Today, we remain committed to supporting balanced, healthy lifestyles with foods and beverages designed to help you feel and live your best, even on your busiest days.

name: Healthy Earth LLC
description: The makers of Healthy Earth Snacks® are a proud family with 35 years of expertise in providing the world's finest gourmet nuts and dried fruits.

name: Healthy Food Ingredients
description: Healthy Food Ingredients is an on-trend specialty ingredient supplier, offering a full portfolio of ingredients including non-GMO, organic and gluten-free pulses, grains, seeds, flax and expeller oils, with unique processing capabilities for milling, flaking and blending and consumer-ready products.  We are dedicated to delivering safe, healthy, premium-quality ingredients in partnership with our diverse grower network.

name: Hearthy Foods Inc.
description: Hearthy Foods is a gluten-free, clean ingredient, halal wellness brand. We specialize in high-quality products and affordable prices.  We want wellness for everyone. Leading seller of creatine, collagen, gelatin, agar agar, whey protein, and bone broth.

name: Heavenly Organics
description: Company founded in 2005 looking to give the farmers in India living in a war/conflict zone, an opportunity to work and have a better life; education for their kids.

name: HEBEI GUANGXIANG PHARMACEUTICAL CO.,LTD.
description: Hebei Guangxiang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is located in the East of Jingliu Road, West of Cangzhou Lingang Economic and Technological Development Zone, Cangzhou City, Hebei Province, China, covering an area of more than 667,000m2. It specializes in manufacturing Food additives and Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients such as Caffeine, Theophylline, Aminophylline, Nifedipine, Pentoxifylline and Theobromine, etc.

name: HEBEI HUAHENG BIOLOGICAL TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD
description: "Hebei Huaheng Biological Technology Co., Ltd. was established in 2011, it is located in Jizhou, Hebei Province. Hebei Huaheng is a high-tech enterprise based on research and development and guided by sustainable development.  Our core advantage is focused on the research and development, production, and sales of amino acid series products. Our products cover amino acids, food grade chelates of amino acids, and feed grade complexes. At the same time, we act as agents for the sale of vitamins, sweeteners, and other products. The company's series of products cover multiple fields such as food additives, feed additives, health product raw materials, pharmaceutical intermediates, and active pharmaceutical ingredients.Our company has established a scientific and standardized enterprise management system based on international advanced management experience, and has passed FSSC22000 & ISO22000 food safety system certification, ISO22000 quality management system certification, as well as international certifications such as KOSHER, HALAL, FAMI-QS, BRC, food grade GMP, and EU REACH.Our company has modern factory buildings and advanced production equipment. The production workshop is designed and built according to GMP standards, and can engage in OEM cooperation, with sterile amino acid production conditions. At the same time, our company has a sound quality assurance system and a high-quality production and management team, ensuring that we provide stable and high-quality products to the market.  We sincerely look forward to cooperating with friends from all walks of life at home and abroad, providing high-quality products and services to every customer, and becoming one of the best suppliers in the world."

name: HEBEI YUWEI BIOTECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD.
description: Hebei Yuwei was established in 2010, has a global marketing system. Our products are widelyused in various industries including food, beverages, health products, animal nutrition andgreen agriculture. We uphold technology innovation with a mission focused on green,environmental protetable development. With the strategic goal of building a diversified healthindustry, we are committed to becoming a global leader in the fields of functional sugar,healthcare, and functional ingredients. In addition, we provide high-guglity inositol, D-mannose, D-Chiro-Inositol and other nutritional function ingredients. We offer comprehensivesolutions to meet the ever-changing market demands.

name: Heirloom Coffee Roasters
description: A journey spanning generationsSustainability beyond traditional certificationsFounded in 2021 by third-generation coffee roaster and co-founder Hovik Azadkhanian, Heirloom is on a quest to save the future of coffee. By 2050, the world will likely not be able to produce specialty-grade coffee because of climate change, soil degradation, mass erosion, and habitat destruction.We believe that our generation is coffee's last hope. To ensure a safe future for specialty coffee, regenerative agriculture is the key. Heirloom only sources coffee from Regenerative Organic Certified® farms, which prioritize soil health, animal welfare, and transparent fairness for farmers, farmworkers, and all those involved in the supply chain.Brand new, award-winning roasting styleHeirloom is not only pioneering sustainability in coffee, but we're also changing the conversation around taste. After years of testing and formulation, Heirloom created a unique roasting method known as the Culinary Roast™.The Culinary Roast™ is a proprietary roasting process developed at the Heirloom Coffee Roastery. It's a hyper-focused roasting style that uses micro-adjusting techniques to achieve a harmonious balance of sweetness and body in every roast. By emulating elevated culinary styles, we deliver an outstanding sensory experience. Drawing parallels from fine dining, the Culinary Roast™ presents layers of flavors and textures, highlighting the inherent qualities of the coffee bean and delivering a cup that is sweet, complex, and bright.Within the first year of launching our brand, Heirloom received five Golden Bean awards for taste and quality and won the prestigious Good Food Award, emerging victorious against 1,700 coffees in a blind tasting.Heirloom continues to roast its exceptional coffee in a state-of-the-art roastery in Oakland, CA, leading the way in the regenerative coffee movement.

name: Helaina
description: Helaina™ is an innovation company using precision fermentation to create human bioactive compounds as ingredients for food and supplements for the first time. Helaina is focused on the components of human colostrum, the first milk produced by mothers. The company’s replicated human bioactive proteins precisely mirror their native counterparts for optimal absorption and effectiveness. This is a new approach to wellness with human-equivalent proteins as nutrients.effera™ human lactoferrin is Helaina’s first ingredient. Lactoferrin is an iron-regulating protein that sequesters and releases iron, which translates into benefits such as: ●	Supporting a balanced immune and inflammatory response*●	Supporting oxygen delivery to the muscles*●	Supporting a healthy gut function and microbiome*effera™ human lactoferrin has potential applications across women’s health, active nutrition and healthy aging.In 2024, Helaina conducted and published its first gold-standard clinical study published in The International Journal of Toxicology—a randomized, double-blind controlled study to measure the body’s response to effera™. This was the first-ever study to compare the immune impact of lactoferrin on the body, comparing bovine lactoferrin to human lactoferrin as effera™, which established the benefits of using human proteins. The results of the study showed that participants taking bovine lactoferrin produced antibodies against the protein, suggesting an immunogenic response against bovine lactoferrin. Meanwhile, participants taking effera™, at both a high and low-doses, produced no antibodies against the protein, suggesting better tolerability of the ingredientIn addition, prior published findings in Nutrients evaluated the digestibility of bovine vs. effera™ human lactoferrin vs. human breast milk lactoferrin. The research indicated that effera™ survives digestion and has similar peptide release to lactoferrin in human breast milk. Both effera™ and breast milk lactoferrin remain structurally intact during digestion, whereas bovine lactoferrin breaks down in digestion very quickly. These findings indicate that effera™ is more similar to human lactoferrin vs. bovine lactoferrin regarding protein survival and peptide profiles, suggesting that it could better replicate the benefits of human lactoferrin compared to bovine lactoferrin.effera™ is a versatile ingredient, allowing for easy integration into diverse product formats such as dietary supplements, functional foods and nutritional beverages. With exceptional purity, stability, and attributes such as non-GMO, and vegan, effera™ is a perfect fit for manufacturers seeking safe, efficacious ingredients.

name: Hempress & Harper Hygienics
description: Hempress was founded in 2019 by two young college women; Marilyn & McKenna, to create a solution in period and personal care that aligned with the natural rhythms of the body and the earth. They spent 2+ years on R&D and 4+ years building the company to create the most sustainable disposable products and the first of their kind with hemp fiber. Guided by purpose and sustainability, every endeavor we undertake reflects our core values.

name: Henan Zhongda Hengyuan Biotechnology Stock Co. Ltd
description: Henan Zhongda Hengyuan Biotechnology Stock Co., Ltd. was established in 1993. We are a professional manufacturer specializing in innovative food color and sweetener technologies in China. Zhongda’s colors and sweeteners products are supported by an international network of R&D, production, and distribution, with a significant sales and marketing presence in over 30 countries. We provide our customers with comprehensive market research, technical support, and customer service, helping them meet the growing demands of today’s health-conscious and informed consumers.Our Core Competencies:Vertical Integration: We collaborate directly with original farmers to reduce costs and maintain high-quality standards.Advanced Extraction & Application: Utilizing our proprietary know-how and extraction technologies, we enhance color brightness and stability, producing products such as heat-stable blue, bright red, and stable yellow.Cutting-Edge Technology Development: We continuously improve our technologies to enhance product stability and extend shelf life.Certifications & Credentials:We hold internationally recognized certifications including: FSSC 22000, ISO 22000, ISO 9001, Kosher, Halal, ISO 14001, and Sedex. Additionally, our Allulose products are certified organic, self-grass, and non-GMO.

name: Henri Willig Cheese
description: For more than 50 years our family-owned company has been making cheese and promoting Dutch cheese culture. It all started with Henri Willig and his passion for cheese. That's how our family company came to life: Henri Willig. And that's how our cheeses became world-famous. Nature is good to us, and we're good to nature.

name: Henrietta Said
description: Henrietta Said is a new brand from Charlotte-based manufacturer Truly Good Foods. Launched in Summer 2023, Henrietta Said is a line of wing-flavored peanuts that are scandalously spicy. The brand was created from the concept of a vegan chicken wing and the desire to take a familiar ingredient everyone knows and loves (peanuts) and experiment with unique and exciting flavors. We're repositioning peanuts to a whole new generation with fun, innovative flavors.

name: Heraclea Food Co., Inc
description: Heraclea's story started back in November 2021, born from the ambitious vision of Berk and Sena, a couple deeply entrenched in the corporate world as lawyers. As attorneys, they realized the limitations of their potential to build bridges between nations, create a unique product from scratch, and significantly improve people's livelihoods. On top of that, having spent over a decade in the States, Berk never encountered the distinctive taste of the olive oil his mother used during his childhood in the Aegean.It was this longing for authenticity and a desire for meaningful impact that inspired the transformation of Berk's family hobby into a profitable enterprise. Despite initial resistance from his family (except for his father), Berk knew this was his destiny. So, he embarked on a journey to Spain, immersed himself in olive oil courses, devoured books on agriculture and production, and meticulously constructed Heraclea's business plan. Heraclea, named after the ancient Greek city which symbolized resilience, strength, and unity, is more than an olive oil producer. It represents the couple's determination to introduce the world to the most flavorful, unique olive oil they knew - the olive oil of their homeland.The brand's ethos is deeply rooted in community and sustainability. Heraclea's presence in the Aegean region has brought jobs to the local village and instigated community projects like road building. Their commitment to enhancing the local community's livelihood is as robust as their dedication to producing high-quality, sustainable olive oil.The validation of their vision and relentless efforts came when they won six international awards for their first batch of olive oil production. It was a testament to their unwavering commitment to quality and taste. The partnership with PCC Community Markets, bringing Heraclea to their 16 stores, and the subsequent interest from other retailers, signaled the growing appetite for their exceptional product and inspiring story.Now, Heraclea stands as a testament to their journey fueled by a passion for quality, sustainability, and community - the hallmarks of their brand. The Heraclea story is a narrative of transition, perseverance, and the ultimate realization of a unique vision.

name: Herb Green Health Biotech Co., Ltd.
description: We're a GMP herb extract factory since 1989. We have passed new GMP certification in 2014，we also equipped with HACCP/HALAL/KOSHER/ISO/Organic certification. In past 29 years , we have produced 500+ kinds of herb extract, so we have rich experice of extract production.Besides, our R&D Center can help customers develop new kind of health ingredient. Our unique pesticide residue removal technology has registed patent. The low pesticide residue ginseng extract is our main product, which is very popular in USA and Europe.Welcome to learn more about our products.Brand Produts:Longevity SupportCLEAN-GINSENG® Rare Ginsenoside Rg3, Rh2, CKSafDemoTM Saffron ExtractBrocVitaTM Broccoli Glucoraphanin & SulforaphaneGanoAllinTM Ganoderma Lucidum TriterpenesGLP-1 Pathway SupportBerbervive GLP-1TM Berberine HCl (GRAS)Disugar® Mulberry Leaf ExtractMitolgnite Black Ginger ExtractAM06 Akkermansia Muciniphila (GRAS) with 22 patents, 8 functional validation, 2 toxicology safety studies, 1 human clinicalNext-Generation DeliveryPHosGen TM NAD+ Pro powered by BioProdEX TM TechnologyCristelle TM Technology

name: Herbal Roots
description: We are Jennifer, Heather, and Emily - Sisters and co-founders of Herbal Roots. We have always shared a passion for using herbal supplements and home remedies. We found a problem in the supplements world, in that we had a hard time finding supplements that are 100% pure, that used the whole herb and that didn't add unnecessary ingredients like fillers, sugar, additives and binders.In 2017 we took it upon ourselves to take our passion for herbal remedies and create a product line of the purest supplements possible. Fueled by the need for pure, whole supplements we took a giant leap and Herbal Roots was born.We are continually motivated to release new supplements by the countless success stories that we receive on how our supplements have positively changed a person's life. These testimonials are why we do what we do! We are focused on sustainable wellness practices and revitalizing a relationship with the plant world. Producing the highest quality products is our number 1 priority! We are excited to share our passion and to provide you with drug-free natural alternatives for promoting overall health.

name: Herbaland Naturals, Inc.
description: We are a Canadian, family-owned and operated natural health and wellness brand established in 2009. Our vision was to create the tastiest, most sustainable and nutritious gummies globally. We are now: the #1 gummy manufacturer in Canada, producing over 70 million pouches per year, exporting to over 40 different countries globally. Today, Herbaland's purpose remains: to bring health and wellness to everyone by making it fun, nutritious and earth-friendly.

name: Herbion Naturals
description: Herbion Naturals began its journey in the early 1980s. Founded by a small, dedicated group of people who believed in wellness through nature, we started with a humble vision – to provide natural solutions for everyday health concerns. We sourced scientifically proven ingredients, drawing inspiration from Eastern and Western herbal traditions, to create natural health & wellness remedies. Today, Herbion Naturals offers a wide range of health & wellness products, staying true to its founding principles of offering effective and natural healthcare solutions.

name: Herbs, Etc.
description: Herbs, Etc. has been widely recognized within the natural health industry asa leading   manufacturer of high quality, potent liquid herbal medicinessince 1976.The Herbs, Etc. family of products features a line of Fast-Acting Liquid Herbal Softgels, a line of Professional Strength Classic Liquid Herbal Extracts, (130 single extract and formulas) as well as a line of Professional Strength Alcohol Free Liquid Herbal Extracts.

name: Heritage Kulfi
description: I grew up in a traditional South Asian household where food and in particular desserts were an inseparable part of daily life and identity. These culinary treats left a strong imprint on me and as I began to shape my own identity as both a native New Yorker and of South Asian decent, I yearned to better understand and connect with the same ingredients and foods I grew up with it. With my personal fondness of ice cream and having run a frozen distribution company for several years, I established Heritage Kulfi in 2020 to bring forth creative and authentic interpretations of these decadent ingredients. I spent over a year creating each flavor profile, designing all my own packaging, and learning commercial ice cream making. I am very proud of the flavors we offer and the amazing response I continue to receive from our customers as we grow nationwide.

name: Hey!Hunger
description: Hey!Hunger was founded in 2023, inspired by my personal health journey and a desire to create nutritious, sustainable, and flavorful plant-based foods. After moving to the U.S. at 19, my diet shifted from wholesome, low-processed Indian meals to heavily processed, animal-protein-heavy foods. By my late 30s, I faced high cholesterol, prediabetes, and hypertension. My mother's terminal cancer deepened my resolve to return to the nutrient-dense, plant-based eating of my childhood.Combining my professional expertise in scaling products and operations at companies like Apple and Visa with my passion for health and sustainability, I launched Hey!Hunger to offer ultra low-processed nutburgers inspired by traditional Indian recipes. With bold flavors, organic ingredients, and eco-conscious practices, Hey!Hunger aims to revolutionize plant-based eating while giving back to the community and promoting a healthier, more sustainable world.

name: Heyday Canning Co.
description: Heyday was co-founded by Jaime Tulley and Kat Kavner, two CPG veterans who started off as coworkers back in 2012 and have been best friends ever since. Jaime and Kat worked together as counterparts representing very different sides of the business (R&D and Ops for Jaime; Marketing and Innovation Strategy for Kat). They quickly bonded over their shared love for delicious home cooking and passion for using food as way to make the world a healthier and more sustainable place. They always knew they wanted to combine forces to start a dream brand of their own, and decided to jump in with both feet with they had their lightbulb moment in 2020 to reinvent the canned food aisle.

name: HeyNu LLC
description: With her personal health journey, Kay became meticulous about ingredients.So she started making her own protein balls in her kitchen. She experimented with plant-based recipes, avoiding common allergens where she could, and trying different flavor combinations. Through trial and error, she landed on the ingredients and taste she felt good about.Those homemade protein balls were just the beginning of HeyNu - our nutrition brand. Our mission became clear: create extra-yummy snacks with purposeful ingredients that fit into real life - workdays, travel days, and everything in between. We started with HEYBAR, our line of delicious protein bars and with more products on the way!Here's to fuel you'll look forward to!

name: heywell
description: heywell is made by beverage industry experts with over 25 combined years of creating brands consumers love. As a certified Women Owned Business, heywell prioritizes working with other diverse-owned companies and gives 1% of sales to non-profits advocating for inclusion.

name: High Level Science
description: High Level Science is redefining the $327B global supplement market with clinically backed, medical-grade formulations built for real-world performance and long-term health.The company is co-founded by Ashley Parker Angel and Dr. David Rizik, bringing together two worlds that rarely converge at this level. Their partnership represents a combination of medical authority and cultural influence that cannot be replicated — uniting elite clinical expertise with real-world performance in a way no other brand can match.Ashley Parker Angel is a multi-platinum recording artist and Broadway performer who has sold over 10 million albums and has appeared in more than 2,000 performances as a lead in Wicked and Hairspray, two of the most successful shows in Broadway history. He is also the star of two #1 primetime television series on ABC and MTV, making him one of the few figures in wellness with both global entertainment reach and real-world success. For decades, Ashley has trained with the best coaches in music, fitness, and performance, learning how to optimize the human body under extreme physical and mental demands while competing and winning at the highest levels of entertainment.Dr. David Rizik is a world-renowned master interventional cardiologist and clinical researcher who has spent his career on the front lines of cardiovascular medicine. His work spans thousands of procedures, extensive published research, and leadership in advancing preventative and performance-based heart health. His impact extends beyond the clinic; his medical education and public health work have earned him three Emmy® Awards for excellence in broadcast health communication.Together, they created High Level Science to bridge the gap between what medicine knows and what high-performance humans need. With a science-first foundation, celebrity-driven brand reach, and GNC-led national retail distribution, High Level Science is built to become a category-defining platform across preventative health, performance, and longevity.

name: Hikari Miso International, Inc.
description: BRINGING NATURE’S BEST TO YOUHigh in the mountains of Nagano, Japan, where clean water flows freely and the air stays cool year‑round, Hikari Miso has been quietly crafting miso in harmony with nature for generations.Our story is rooted in the Japanese spirit of itadakimasu—a simple phrase spoken before a meal, expressing gratitude for nature, for those who grow and prepare our food, and for the nourishment it provides. This deep respect for food and its origins guides how we work, how we care for the earth, and how we serve our communities around the world.Our distinctive miso is made in Nagano, a region internationally recognized for its ideal miso‑making environment. Pure water, clean air, and a cool climate allow miso to ferment slowly and naturally, developing its rich flavor and character over time. Rather than rushing the process, we honor time‑tested methods that let nature do the work, just as it has for generations.By staying true to these traditions—while sharing them globally—Hikari Miso brings an authentic taste of Japan to modern kitchens worldwide. Each bowl reflects patience, balance, and respect for nature, offering simple, nourishing comfort that transcends culture and borders.

name: Hiker Coffee
description: Blazing the trail from Eau Claire (French for "clear water"), Wisconsin, the city we love and call home. And, just like our hometown's namesake river, we always strive to clear away any BS ingredients that muddy your cup.Like any journey, we start with covering the basics—a batch of the cleanest organic beans roasted in our own facility. From light to dark, we craft perfect roasts free from any hidden nasties that might keep you from following your stoke on whatever adventure you take.For us, it's personal. We've battled environmental mold toxicity, hitting us both with different autoimmune conditions. We changed the things we put in our bodies—starting with our morning ritual, creating a healthy, toxin-free, transparent brand top-to-bottom. Our packaging is compostable. Our organic flavored coffee is free from seed oils that can create internal inflammation, making it harder for your body to recover–allowing you to spend your time doing the things you love!Our coffees are ready to go with you wherever your trail leads and are created with sustainability in mind—for you and the planet. Only good stuff ahead!

name: Himalaya Nakchews LLC
description: NakChews is a premium pet treat brand specializing in high-quality, natural dog chews designed to promote dental health, and long-lasting enjoyment. We focus on safe, carefully sourced ingredients and durable products that pet owners can trust and dogs genuinely love.In addition to our branded products, NakChews offers private label manufacturing and wholesale distribution services. We partner with retailers, distributors, and growing pet brands to deliver customized solutions from tailored packaging and branding to bulk supply at competitive pricing. Our streamlined production process ensures consistency, reliability, and scalable fulfillment to meet your business needs.

name: Himalaya Wellness
description: Himalaya Wellness blends cutting-edge science with time-honored, holistic traditions to create plant and nutrient-based solutions that support your well-being. Explore a wide range of supplements, oral care, and personal care for the whole family.-	Over 90 years of Ayurvedic expertise-	Family-owned, and now in over 100 countries-	Comprehensive testing for purity and safety-	Sourced from responsible farms and wildcrafters-	Plant-powered, Non-GMO products-	Vegan oral care products-	A commitment to quality, ethics, and sustainability

name: Himalayan Chandra
description: Ketan C. Mehta, MD and Nina Mehta, founded NeilMed® Pharmaceuticals, Inc. in January 2000 from Dr. Mehta's medical office and in a short span, we have over 500 employees. NeilMed® is the largest manufacturer and supplier of LVLP (Large Volume Low Pressure) saline nasal irrigation systems in the world.The NeilMed® brand of products help alleviate common nasal and sinus symptoms in a simple, safe, effective and affordable way. The company supplies millions of products to end users through various trade channels. Our headquarters & manufacturing facility is based in Santa Rosa, California, USA. In addition to our USA headquarters, we also supply and have offices in multiple countries worldwide. Our unique business model has been a very strict vertical integration, for achieving precision and fast execution at all levels. NeilMed® prides itself in being part of the small community of Santa Rosa, located in the heart of Sonoma County's wine country in Northern California.Our flagship products are NeilMed® SINUS RINSE™ and NeilMed® NasaFlo® Neti Pot. These products are available in most stores in the USA, Canada, and several other countries around the world. There are currently over 40 different products for nasal and sinus care, and all are OTC (over the counter). With an extremely dedicated small team of loyal, and hard working leadership group, NeilMed® continues to formulate innovative ideas to market. Additional diversification plans include the introduction of surgical devices for hospitals and emergency rooms. NeilMed® supports medical research in several countries and educating health care professionals and consumers. We believe in excellent 24 hour customer service, helping local communities, and donating for natural disasters.

name: Hint, Inc.
description: Inspiring and empowering daily hydration for nearly 21 years, Hint offers the #1 unsweetened flavored still water.WE BELIEVE: ​The key to true enduring wellness is through enjoyment – if you love to do something, you do it more.​WE EXIST: ​To remove the friction between what feels good and what’s good for you, challenging the notion that wellness requires sacrifice.​WHAT WE DO: ​We make daily hydration possible through craveable, mouth-watering water.

name: HIPPEAS®
description: HIPPEAS® is on a mission to shake up snacking! HIPPEAS® snacks are packed with plant protein & fiber to keep you keepin' on. Plus, they are non-GMO, certified gluten-free, vegan and totally delicious!

name: HIT THE TEA
description: Founded in 2017, our journey began with a deep appreciation for Korea's rich tea culture and the desire to share the unique flavor and health benefits of Korean organic matcha with the world. Recognizing the growing demand for sustainable and high-quality products, we partnered with dedicated local farmers who cultivate matcha using traditional, eco-friendly methods. From these strong roots, we began crafting a range of innovative matcha-based products designed to fit modern lifestyles while preserving the essence of tradition.What started as a small venture with a big vision has now grown into a global effort to connect people with the vibrant heritage of Korean tea. Each product we create reflects our commitment to wellness, sustainability, and authenticity. Our goal is to inspire healthier choices and foster meaningful connections, one cup of matcha at a time. Whether through our premium powders, snacks, or beverages, we invite you to experience the harmony and tradition of Korean matcha.

name: Hive to Table Honey Farms
description: Raymond Fischer who kept bees as a hobby and extracted honey in the family kitchen started the Fischer Honey company. The business grew from the kitchen, to the basement, to the garage, to the first honey plant in the late 30's. Today it is one of the best known honeys in the South Eastern United States. Kelley's honey was started in 2006 with an eye to use Texas honey for the people of Texas. We own our own bee hives, so we can control our quality. Today it is one of the best known brands, with the best known quality of 100% Raw and Unfiltered Honey. Jamie's Hive To Table was launched in 2016 with the idea of bringing the best honey and honeycomb available in America to consumers that may not have access to this type of product and quality. The concept of putting a piece of honeycomb into a squeezable bottle was pioneered by Jamie's Hive To Table. In 2017, Jamie's Hive To Table launched an exquisite line of Infused honeys. With infused flavors such as Lemon, Vanilla Bean, Cinnamon and Sea Salt. Truly a one of a kind.

name: Hiyo
description: Hiyo is a USDA organic certified social tonic mindfully crafted with adaptogens and nootropics to celebrate life never wasted. Each can of Hiyo produces a delightful sensation that we like to call “the float,” which comes from all-natural functional ingredients like ashwagandha, L-theanine, lion’s mane, lemon balm, passion flower, and ginger. Hiyo is available in four refreshing, fruit-forward flavors: Peach Mango, Watermelon Lime, Blackberry Lemon, and Strawberry Guava.As a brand, we’re on a mission to change the way the world drinks by creating a movement to unwind in a healthy way. With just 30 calories and 0% ABV per can, people no longer need to choose whether they want to feel good or prioritize their health. Delivering in both taste and functionality, Hiyo is a non-alcoholic option that is inspiring more solace on the sofa, more wellness in the workday, more presence at parties, and ultimately, a happier, healthier you.

name: HNSS Sales & Marketing
description: Campoverde's story begins with a family deeply rooted in agriculture and a passion for bringing the very best of nature to the table. Founded in 1940 by the Matosantos family, the brand was built on a simple truth: great food starts with great ingredients. Over three generations, this belief has guided our journey and shaped Campoverde into a trusted name in premium frozen fruit.From the beginning, our mission was to provide families with access to fresh, high-quality produce year-round. We partnered directly with growers across the world, carefully selecting Grade A fruit harvested at peak ripeness. As freezing technology evolved, so did our vision. We embraced innovative preservation methods that lock in freshness, flavor, and nutrients at their highest point, ensuring that every Campoverde product delivers the taste of just-picked fruit, no matter the season.What began as a small, family-led effort has grown into an international brand with a presence in over 16 countries across four continents. Yet our values remain unchanged. We continue to champion authentic flavor, honest ingredients, and the belief that healthy choices should be both accessible and delicious.Today, Campoverde offers a diverse portfolio; from single-fruit favorites to fruit & veggie blends, plantains, and innovative frozen treats all crafted with the same dedication to quality that started our journey more than eight decades ago. Our brand is built on consistency, convenience, and a deep respect for the land and the families we serve.Campoverde's story is one of tradition, innovation, and a commitment to creating foods that bring nourishment, joy, and real fruit goodness to every home. And after all these years, we're still guided by the same purpose, to share nature's best, simply and beautifully.

name: Hodo
description: Founded in 2004, Hodo began with a single obsession: make plant-based foods that taste incredible using only the best ingredients. What started as a single farmer’s market stall in the San Francisco Bay Area has grown into an award-winning, artisan tofu and plant-based food company making products found in thousands of retail stores and restaurants across the country. Our tofu and yuba are made from organic, non-GMO soybeans and designed to be protein-rich, nutrient-dense, and naturally gluten-free. Inspired by global flavors and created in convenient, ready-to-eat formats, Hodo makes delicious easy—bringing bold taste and real nourishment to everyday meals.

name: HOL Health Club
description: After spending years as investment bankers in NYC, Nolan and Mackenzie decided it was time to make a pivot toward something they were more passionate about.Rewind to early 2024, after returning from an amazing trip to Asia they quickly realized the food culture in the US was off. Many locals in the Asian countries they visited would go to the market for every meal they cooked, always using fresh (and unprocessed) ingredients. Given this wasn't as readily available at home, Nolan & Mackenzie decided they were going to switch their eating to being whole food-based, as close to the way those in Asia ate as possible. They immediately saw benefits by way of increased energy, improved digestion, overall improvement in wellbeing, and much more.When seeking an on the go snack, whether pre/post workout, a grab-n-go breakfast, or a meal replacement, they could not find options that were all natural, whole food-based and also contained adequate protein and other desired macros, especially when looking for a protein bar. After looking and looking, but not finding anything suitable, they decided it was time to make one themselves.Fast forward to mid-2025, they are excited to announce the launch of HOL Health Club, the all natural, whole food, 20g protein bar. Perfect for post workout, as well as a breakfast on-the-go and many more occasions. No seed oils, no preservatives, no artificial sweeteners, no natural flavors, no additives, no nonsense.They are on a mission to change the way people think about eating healthy. It doesn't have to be hard, and it can even be enjoyable.HOL Health Club is much more than just a protein bar company, and there's a lot in the works to build a community of health-minded people, whether you've been in the health world for your whole life or are just starting your health journey, HOL Health Club is the place for you.

name: Hola Mija LLC
description: Hola Mija Chips is a Los Angeles-based, Latino-owned snack brand redefining tortilla chips through tradition and ingredient integrity. We are proud to be among the early pioneers bringing beef tallow-fried tortilla chips to the modern natural food space. Made from traditional nixtamalized corn and crafted for exceptional crunch and flavor, our chips deliver a clean-label alternative to conventional seed-oil snacks. Rooted in heritage and driven by quality, Hola Mija Chips celebrates culture, craftsmanship, and better-for-you indulgence.

name: HoldOn Bags
description: In 2021, I gave birth to my first child. Like all parents do, I began to think about what my son's  future would look like. As I watched him take his first steps and explore the world, I became more concerned about what condition the world would be in as he grew up.I was humbled to find out just how much our everyday choices - like packing a snack baggie or taking out the trash - could impact the planet. Americans alone throw away 100 billion plastic bags a year, which adds to the 10 million tons of plastic in our oceans annually. And all of this plastic takes centuries to decompose, contributing to climate change and endangering wildlife. That's not the kind of world I want for generations to come. HoldOn was born from the simple idea that there has to be a greener way to go about our daily chores. We created plant-based, sustainable bags so you never have to sacrifice convenience to care for the planet. That's how we HoldOn to a brighter future. We were founded in 2021 and launched the business in May 2022.

name: Holle USA LLC
description: Holle has been a pioneer in biodynamic baby food since 1934 and stands for the highest organic quality. As the first Demeter manufacturer, we focus on a holistic approach, take responsibility for people and nature and live our guiding principle “Sustainable from the start”. We pursue the goal of giving children a healthy childhood and a future fit for grandchildren.Today, we are an internationally active company, represented in over 50 countries, with a range of over 90 high-quality products. We have made it our mission to provide infants and young children in the USA with EU-certified organic products – and to do so as sustainably as possible.

name: HOLY CAP
description: HOLY CAP is on a mission to raise the standard of pet nutrition. We use functional mushrooms, whole foods, and clean proteins to support long-term health from the inside out. Our principle is simple. Prevention isn't just better than cure. It is everything.

name: HONDA SHOTEN CO.,LTD
description: We were founded in 1913 and have been making soba noodles in Shimane Prefecture for generations.

name: Honey Australia
description: oney Australia is a family-owned company that has grown significantly over the years. It started in Mudgee, NSW, in the 1990s and has since expanded its product development, manufacturing, and distribution capabilities. The company produces and distributes Australian-made honey and bee products, including selected honeys from New Zealand, known for its high-grade antibacterial Manuka honey.Honey Australia prides itself on its commitment to quality and innovation. The company has recently been accredited with Australia Certified Organic (ACO) and now supplies 100% natural and pure organic honey. They have developed exclusive supply agreements with selected honey producers to bring the best products to Australian consumers.The brand story emphasizes Honey Australia's dedication to ethical practices, sustainability, and supporting local beekeepers. They aim to provide better everyday value for shoppers, innovative product offerings, and a strong connection to the community.Honey Australia also has a retail outlet called Mudgee Honey Haven, located in central west NSW, which showcases their products and serves as a hub for honey enthusiasts.

name: Honey Blossom, LLC
description: Honey Blossom is a 4th generation Beekeeping family sharing itslove for Honey with the World. We're a proud GoTexan Small Business and offer the widest selection of Honeys in North America. All our Honeys are Single-Origin, Non-GMO and we have Organic options as well.

name: Honey Droplet New Zealand Ltd
description: Since 1972, we've been crafting the world's first 100% solid honey lozenges. Manuka Honey Droplets are a unique and delicious way to experience the many health benefits of natural honey. We take pride in using only high-quality, natural ingredients, certified Manuka Honey UMF?10+ and UMF?15+, and ensuring purity and safety in all our products.

name: Honey Stinger
description: Honey Stinger was founded in 2001 in Steamboat Springs, Colorado. Honey Stinger is the brand behind the original Energy Waffle, and creates great-tasting sports nutrition to fuel athletes of all kinds.

name: HONEYGREEN (Hispamiel S.A)
description: Honeygreen+ is a natural ingredients supplier and product development consulting firm specializing in beehive products. We provide ingredients to the retail sector, pharmaceutical, food supplements, food industry, and cosmetics industries. At HoneyGreen, we work with natural and organic ingredients as a source of value to discover healthy alternatives that positively impact consumer health and nutrition and the care of our environment. The main products are: honey, pollen, honeycomb, royal jelly, propolis & agave.We’re the ally of the companies that consider nature, and the precious ingredients it provides, as a source of value and distinction.-More than 30 years of experience in natural ingredients.-6.5 million kilos of natural ingredients supplied per year-Carefully approved partners from all over the world+3.000 samples analyzed per year, we work with high-quality standards.

name: HONMA Co.,Ltd
description: Honma's history officially began in 1906, but its story can be traced all the way back to 1874. At the time, a man named Onuma was selling confections to the army. He had heard about the popularity of a new product from Tokyo called "anpan". This simple bun of sweet bread and a sweet bean paste filling was even rumored to be a favorite of the emperor, and it quickly took Tokyo by storm. Onuma developed his own recipe for this new snack, inspired by geppei (traditional mooncakes). Onuma went on to share his recipe with many people including the founder of Honma, Yosaburo Homma.Yosaburo Homma has established his shop called "Oharaya Honma Shoten" in the village of Tsukisamu, Hokkaido and begins selling "Tsukisamu Anpan" made with Onuma's recipe. Now Sapporo has grown, and the Toyohira ward has absorbed Tsukisamu, but at the time, Tsukisamu was mostly notable as the home of the 25th regiment of army infantry. In this tiny town, they quietly made delicious anpan and became very popular among the local soldiers.In 1911, the army in Tsukisamu was tasked with building a road from that town to nearby Hiragishi. While they worked, the city government gave each worker five anpan a day from the seven anpan shops in Tsukisamu to help with the work, earning this new road the name "Anpan Road". Soon after, due to Japan's involvement in the wars, all seven of these local shops closed including Honma's. Only Honma was able to reopen in 1946 after the end of the wars and thus became the only "Tsukisamu Anpan" shop in Tsukisamu that continues to pass down the original delicious recipe for generations to this day.

name: HOPWTR
description: HOPWTR was founded in 2020 in Venice, CA by Nick Taranto and Jordan Bass. They were two dads working crazy hours, trying to adult, and still have some fun. They craved a cold beer after a long day, but knew they couldn't keep up if they had to deal with hangovers or feeling weighed down. What could they crack open on Monday, Tuesday, or Wednesday that was refreshing and helped them unwind? The answer was HOPWTR.With HOPWTR they can still aim high, take action, and feel present doing whatever they're doing: taking in a view on a hike, toasting to another year around the sun, nailing a work presentation, enjoying every moment of a family meal. Raise a can or two with them, won't ya?

name: Horizon Family Brands
description: Horizon Family Brands is a leading, better-for-you, food and beverage innovator. The Horizon Family Brands portfolio includes Horizon Organic, a pioneer in organic dairy committed to delivering innovative, nourishing dairy that growing families can rely on.; Maple Hill Creamery, a 100% grass-fed organic dairy brand deeply rooted in regenerative farming and transparency; and Wallaby, known for its rich, creamy Australian-style yogurts made with organic milk and live active cultures. Together, the portfolio reflects a shared commitment to quality ingredients, responsible farming practices and great taste. The mission of Horizon Family Brands is to inspire healthier living through innovation wellness brands, which nourishes our collective potential for good. Horizon Family Brands continues to see opportunities to do things differently, pushing our food system forward. The company operates from the belief that to make high-quality food, it has to nourish a happy, healthy future for farmers, families, animals and the land.

name: Hormbles Chormbles
description: After building one of thefastest growing nutrition barbrands, Jared realized there wasno product out there that trulyoffered the taste and texture ofa candy bar while being guiltfree.Hormbles Chormbles was createdto offer consumers anopportunity to lower their sugarintake and increase protein,without sacrificing their lovefor candy.

name: Host Defense Mushrooms
description: Host Defense® Mushrooms™ was founded by renowned mycologist Paul Stamets with the goal of building a bridge between people and fungi. They began as a direct-to-store manufacturer of mushroom supplements more than 10 years ago and are now the industry leader and the #1 best-selling mushroom supplement brand in the U.S.ꝉ Always at the cutting edge of mycological research, they continuously strive to find new and innovative ways to make mushroom mycelium more accessible. Offering multiple delivery formats is one way they work to offer convenience and ease-of-use to any supplement regime. Host Defense mycelium-based products are currently available in capsules, extracts, powders, drink mixes, and more! Additionally, their MycoBotanicals® line is expertly formulated using organically-grown mushroom mycelium and herbs, fusing contemporary science with the innate intelligence of nature. Their mushroom mycelium and fruit bodies are verified for identity and composition by independent labs that use internationally recognized testing methods, and are certified organic, non-GMO, vegan, and gluten-free. And, all of their product development and formulation is based on scientifically validated data to ensure the quality and safety of their supplements.ꝉ Source: SPINS scan Natural / Natural Products Supermarkets > $2MM /Total US – Natural Channel / Mushrooms Ingredient Report / 52 Wks 3/26/2023

name: HOTPOT QUEEN
description: I'm Jia, the founder of Hot Pot Queen. Five months after I was born, my mother, He Yongzhi, opened her tiny hotpot restaurant "Little Swan" in Chongqing, China, which lead her to invent the famous Yuan Yang Hotpot (the pot that divides the broth in two). This invention influenced the way millions of people enjoy hotpot worldwide, therefore she's regarded as the "Hotpot Queen", hence our brand's name. As the second generation of women entrepreneur in my family business, I wish to carry her legacy and bring the boldest of Sichuan flavor to American table.

name: House Foods Holding USA Inc.
description: Franklin Farms began in 1981 on–you guessed it–an actual mushroom farm in Franklin, Connecticut. Since introducing our vegetable-based burgers, Franklin Farms has been bringing exciting yet good-for-you meatless meals from field to table.  Now, we've crafted a range of health-conscious plant-based products that span day parts, meal types, and taste profiles. We start with the flavor-forward, high-quality, plant proteins. Then we mix them, splice them, mingle them, and dice them. And we don't genetically engineer them. From quick bite to sit-down dinner, Franklin Farms makes cooking with and eating plant-based proteins easy and delicious. Grow your plant-based horizons with Franklin Farms.

name: House of Joy
description: Modern Cantonese Dim Sum for the Next GenerationHouse of Joy brings the spirit of the Dim Sum house to your home. With authentic Cantonese recipes and premium, clean ingredients, you can delight in a fresh take on tradition that’s uniquely comforting, soulful, and made with gratitude to spark connection and joy.

name: HowGood
description: HowGood is an independent research company and SaaS data platform with the world's largest database on food product sustainability. With more than 90,000 on-farm emissions factors for food ingredients, HowGood helps leading brands, retailers, suppliers and restaurants to measure, manage, and communicate their environmental and social impact.

name: HPM Global Inc.
description: HPM Global is a leading flexible packaging manufacturer for food, specialized in both retort and non-retort packaging. Our products are supplied to world class top-tier customers in more than 40 countries in the world. HPM manufacturing facilities have been BRC packaging certified with grade AA for the past 4 years, on top of being triple ISO certified for Quality, environment, health & safety ( ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001). Further to that, we are also providing machinery solutions based on the clients' request.

name: HPS Food & Ingredients
description: HPS Food & Ingredients is a specialty food ingredient manufacturer offering high protein powders, seeds, grains and oil produced from North American processed faba bean, hemp, oats and flax. HPS is unique in that it is vertically integrated and is involved with all stages of ingredient production that includes: breeding, variety development, pedigreed seed replication, dryland and irrigated grain production, and bulk ingredient processing. Let us help you with your ingredient needs.

name: HRBL Wellness LLC
description: HRBL Wellness was founded in August 2025. The founders are of South Asian Heritage and have a deep appreciation for the therapeutic power of Ayurvedic herbs and botanicals which have improved wellness among people. Having experienced these benefits first-hand, the founders want to share the power of these botanicals with broader markets through functional beverages for daily wellness.

name: hrbvor herbal teas
description: @hrbvor ("herbivore") we believe in the power of herbs to elevate your state and delight your senses.Our RTD Still & Sparkling Organic Herbal Teas are lightly sweetened with Prebiotic Raw Agave and enhanced with Inland Sea Minerals for hydration.REVIVE | White Peony, Hibiscus & Mint | for sustained nourishing energy.FOCUS | Holy Basil, Guayusa & Sage | for enhancing mental clarity. CALM | Lemongrass, Chamomile & Passionflower | for easing tension & stress.Hrbvor began in the hills of St Maarten, where our Founder Zahira learned as a child to grow and steep herbs for daily wellness.  Rooted in the  wisdom and refreshing flavors of her Caribbean herbal traditions, hrbvor is more than iced tea. It's a return to the garden. A sip of something real.As a proudly woman-owned brand giving 1%fortheplanet, hrbvor is committed to full-circle sustainability, down to composting our herbs after brewing to nourish the soil for future growth.Join us on a herbal journey to elevate people & planet @hrbvor

name: HTBA (HealthTech Bio Actives, S.L.U.)
description: HTBA is a science-based global leader 🔬🌍 in the manufacturing and commercialization of citrus flavonoids 🍊 and active forms of vitamin B12 💊 for the pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, food and beverage, and animal nutrition sectors.For over 40 years ⏳, the company has pioneered the development of high-quality, naturally derived ingredients 🌿 that support the health of people and animals 🧑‍⚕️🐾, while protecting the environment 🌱♻️Headquartered in Barcelona 🇪🇸, HTBA produces ingredients of unsurpassed quality at its state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Murcia, Spain 🏭. With ideation centers in Spain and its North American operations center in Ohio 🇺🇸, the company is well-positioned to respond quickly to global consumer demand 🌎📈Today, HTBA delivers cutting-edge products 🚀 to more than 60 countries worldwide 🌐, fulfilling its mission to unlock the power of nature 🌿✨ and generate a measurable impact on well-being 💚

name: HTT Packaging & Design
description: HTT Packaging & Design provides private label manufacturing services which specializes in sachet and stickpack. We provide turnkey solutions in food, nutritional and medical device industry.

name: HU Kitchen
description: Our story begins in 2012, when years of inspiration and effort come to life for three family members.Co-founders and family members Jordan Brown, Jason Karp, and Jessica Karp are inspired by both early wellness pioneers and their own personal health journeys. This brings to life Hu Kitchen, their paleo-inspired fast-casual restaurant in New York City – a unique concept channeling unwavering ingredient simplicity into unbeatable taste. Hu Kitchen is where the Hu food philosophy started and where the decadent, indulgent chocolate line began.

name: Hub Group
description: Hub Group creates innovative, end-to-end supply chain solutions tailored to your unique business needs. From activating comprehensive technology for added visibility and efficiency, to leveraging strong third-party relationships and the industry’s second-largest private intermodal fleet, we provide access to the right support and the right end-to-end supply chain solutions, at the right time. We work with you to personalize our offerings to meet your needs. And with a single point of contact, a robust lineup of tech-enabled assets and strong third-party relationships, you’ll be on the receiving end of innovative, new ideas that drive long-term potential.

name: Hubei Mingda Plastics Products Co., Ltd.
Hudson River Foods
description: Brand Owner Ians Foods, Dancing Deer, Cherrybrook Kitchen, European Gourmet Bakery, Hodgson Mill and Co-ManufacturingDry BlendingBakery Cookie, Brownie, Pie, GranolaIQF Frying Beef, Chicken, Turnkey and Fish, Onion, Potato, Plant Proteins

name: Huerta Campo Rico S.L.
description: The company was founded in 1999 with the mission of making traditional dishes from the south of Spain available for busy workers with no time to cook at home. The idea was for our products to taste like your grandma's food and that they would be ready to eat with no effort. Now, our mission has evolved and we are trying to make eating healthy as easy as possible. All our products are vegan and made with natural ingredients so that most people can enjoy them. But most importantly, they are made with love and respect for the product.We source our ingredients locally. This allows us to obtain the highest quality ingredients right as they are ready to be consumed, which gives our product superior quality and taste.Quality and food safety is of utmost importance to us, and we want for everyone to be able to enjoy our dishes. That is why we follow some of the most strict food safety standards, we only make Gluten-Free and Vegan products, all of our products are non-GMO, and we make Halal and Kosher dishes. Our products do not contain any of the Big 9 Food Allergens.

name: huez haus seoul
description: huez is a next generation feminine care brand designed for real life not just periods.Our SUPER DRY pads are designed for medium to heavy flow days.They dry up to 2x faster to help reduce surface dampness during heat movement and long wear.For everyday comfort, our SUPER SOFT pantyliners are made with 100 percent certified organic cotton that touches the skin.Light breathable and gentle, they are designed to feel barely there for daily use.huez products are also up to 65 to 75 percent biodegradable, offering a more responsible alternative without compromising performance.Built for real life movement.Designed to stay dry when you need protection and soft when you need comfort.

name: Huisong Pharmaceuticals
description: Founded in 1998, Huisong Pharmaceuticals specializes in R&D and manufacturing of 800+ premium-quality natural ingredients for world-leading companies in pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, food & beverage, and personal care industries. With more than 25 years of experience in natural ingredients innovation, Huisong Pharmaceuticals brings an extensive portfolio of products such as nutraceutical ingredients, fruit & vegetable ingredients, medicinal herbs, pharmaceutical drugs, TCM prescription granules, active pharmaceutical ingredients (API), and many other natural products

name: Human Touch
description: For over 45 years, Human Touch has constructed the wellness landscape, building a rich portfolio of high-performance massage chairs, ergonomic zero gravity recliners, and targeted massage products that rejuvenate the mind and body – no matter where the day may take you.

name: Humble Brands, Inc.
description: Jeff Shardell spent nearly a decade at Google before doing what most people only talk about — he walked away. Jeff traded Silicon Valley for storm chasing across the central plains, eventually landing in Taos, New Mexico. Living on the road, chasing tornadoes, life got simple fast — and it raised a question he couldn't shake: why is the stuff we put on our bodies every day so unnecessarily complicated? He started mixing batches in his Taos kitchen. Four ingredients. A formula that actually worked. Friends and family tried it, loved it, and Humble was born.Actor and film producer Jason Momoa discovered Humble the way most of our customers do - he tried it and it just worked. He loved the simplicity, the scents, and the fact that it delivered without compromise. Now an equity partner and champion of a plastic-free world, Jason is a huge part of our paperboard product lines and co-created his own signature scent, Rockrose & Cedar.No aluminum, no parabens, no synthetic fragrance, no alcohol, no dyes — Nothing Bad®. Read our ingredient list and you'll see what we mean when we say: All Humble. No Hype.A decade later, Humble reaches millions of consumers at Whole Foods, Sprouts, Natural Grocers, and Amazon still proudly based in Taos. This year we're bringing a new scent architecture to shelf  - 11 essential oil blends across three intention-based categories with a five-point intensity scale built to simplify discovery and drive conversion. Come sample the full lineup of deodorant, soap, and lip balm.

name: Humble Potato Chips
description: We have spent our entire working careers helping feed Canadians with snacks, an incredibly rewarding journey.We shifted to a more sustainable lifestyle – consuming more organic food, being more choiceful at home of the products we purchased. We even started working for Natural & Organic food companies.When our son Wilder was born, we became even more aware of the painfully slow adoption of sustainable food and the impact of plastic packaging in grocery. We were compelled to start an organic snack brand with values that respected both the health of people and the planet. So we have launched Humble Potato Chips, the only certified organic potato chip company in North America. In addition we support the removal of 2 times the amount of plastic waste on our planet than we use, allowing us to be certified PLASTIC NEGATIVE!And that's our Humble beginning :)

name: Humboldt Made: Jersey Scoops & Matka
description: Humboldt Made is a community of Makers, Artisans, Entrepreneurs, Farmers and local Leaders who drive sustainable ideas and change across the Redwood Coast economy. At Expo West 2026 come visit some of our unique brands.Jersey ScoopsCow to Cone Ice Cream made with milk from the Foggy Bottoms Boys dairy. 12 flavors available for wholesale with several offered with local collaborator ingredients from the north coast of California and lactose free!MatkaFrom grandma’s cookbook with a farm fresh California vibe. Our pierogi are made with whole food ingredients, local produce from Northern California and a whole lot of love. We have 3 flavors available for wholesale, fully cooked and frozen Polish dumplings.

name: Humboldt Made: Ohana Organics
description: Humboldt Made is a community of Makers, Artisans, Entrepreneurs, Farmers and local Leaders who drive sustainable ideas and change across the Redwood Coast economy. At Expo West 2026 come visit some of our unique brands.'Ohana OrganicsʻOhana Organics is a woman-owned, family skincare line rooted in Aloha and the healing power of plants. Our founder was born and raised in Hawaiʻi, and that island way of life, deep respect for nature, community, and intentional living, continues to shape everything we do. Founded over 25 years ago in Humboldt County, California, our story began with a small garden, traditional herbal wisdom, and a simple belief: what we put on our skin should be as thoughtful and nourishing as what we put in our bodies.What started as herbal creations made for family and community has grown into a small-batch skincare company committed to quality, sustainability, and integrity. Today, we craft organic skin, body, and tattoo care using botanicals grown in our own certified organic garden, blended with thoughtfully selected ingredients to support healthy, radiant skin.From garden to skin—real ingredients for real people, handcrafted with Aloha.

name: Humboldt Made: Shroomworks & HumYum
description: Humboldt Made is a community of Makers, Artisans, Entrepreneurs, Farmers and local Leaders who drive sustainable ideas and change across the Redwood Coast economy. At Expo West 2026 come visit some of our unique brands.ShroomworksShroomworks makes organic wellness shots that are infused with functional mushrooms. Our shots support focus, energy, and immunity using nature based ingredients with bright, approachable flavors.

name: Humboldt Made: Shroomworks & Nonna Lena's
description: Humboldt Made is a community of Makers, Artisans, Entrepreneurs, Farmers and local Leaders who drive sustainable ideas and change across the Redwood Coast economy. At Expo West 2026 come visit some of our unique brands.ShroomworksShroomworks makes organic wellness shots that are infused with functional mushrooms. Our shots support focus, energy, and immunity using nature based ingredients with bright, approachable flavors.Nonna Lena's Sicilian Style PestoAt Nonna Lena’s, we create bold, garlic-forward products made in small batches using all-natural, minimal ingredients. Come by our booth to sample our signature Sicilian style pesto.

name: HUMEAL CO LTD
description: Humeal was founded in 2021 in South Korea with a simple belief: that food should be honest, nourishing, and made with respect for both people and the planet. Our journey began with a small team of innovators, researchers, and food lovers who were frustrated by overly processed plant alternatives that were neither truly nutritious nor clean. We wanted to create something better—using real ingredients, whole grains, and natural processes that preserve what nature intended.We developed our proprietary SSP™ (Super Short Process) technology to maximize nutrient retention while minimizing processing steps, allowing soy, oats, and grains to remain close to their original form. By using the whole ingredient—including elements often discarded like oat and soybean hulls—we naturally increase dietary fiber, micronutrients, and plant-based proteins in our products.What started as a local project with a handful of prototypes soon grew into a movement. Our early success in the Korean market opened doors to the U.S., Canada, Europe, and Southeast Asia, where customers resonated with our clean-label approach and authentic nutritional integrity.Today, Humeal is proud to produce a wide range of plant-based ingredients and finished products that are cruelty-free, sustainable, and transparently made. We are not just offering alternatives to dairy or processed powders—we are redefining what plant-based nutrition can and should be. Our mission remains rooted in that original belief from 2021: to support healthier lifestyles and a kinder global food future, one bowl, one cup, and one consumer at a time.

name: Humex North America
description: Humex S.A.,  is a family owned & operated company founded in 1986, with headquarters based in the coastal city of Tarragona, Spain.   Additional offices are located in Germany and the United States, and our products are sold in more than 55,000 Grocery, Hardware, Home & Drug Stores, in more than 60 countries.  We are the specialists in the moisture absorbing category and we continue to develop innovative & unique products that improve functionality to help customers easily & effectively control moisture and odor issues.

name: Humphreys
description: We've spent more than 150 years creating products that enrich the skin. We start with wild harvested witch hazel for the good of your skin and the planet, and we distill it to capture its most pure and potent essence.Then we carefully select botanicals and other skin-loving ingredients to offer a garden full of scents and benefits for your skin and senses.

name: Hunan Delore Natural Product Co.,Ltd(Uniarea LLC)
description: UNIAREALLC (UAA for short) is located in California, USA, specializing in the R&D, production and sales ofplant - based natural ingredients for health care products , and OEM service is available . UAA has the richvariety of brand raw materials to meet the diversified procurement needs of customers ; UAA providesprofessional services by offering a large number of clinical trial system evaluation reports of plant extractsto match the most suitable health materials for customers; UAA has advanced production facilities tomeet the processing needs of granulation, microencapsulation, premixing, capsules, tablets etc.UAA closely follows the development trend of the Internet , with mining customers ' deep-seated needsas the center, customization of special needs as the guidance, to provide customers with optimal solutionsto maximize customer interests.

name: HUNDY!
description: Our story begins with our cofounders realizing that those frozen treats we used to have as kids, and that kids still eat today, are frozen sugar, water, artificial flavoring, and food coloring. Where's the nutrition in that? Non-existent. Even the healthier alternatives that emerged in the frozen popsicle category contain preservatives that many can't pronounce and fruit juice that contains high amounts of sugar. We knew we could achieve a fruit pop that was comprised of 100% fruit only, working with high-integrity farmers and sources to get the highest quality organic fruit seasonably, and creating a process that led to an outcome that consists of what we've been telling ourselves ever since we achieved the final product — this is what the fruit pop always should have been! Founded in 2022, we are so excited to continue the next step of our journey which is bringing HUNDY! to the world. Keeping our product 100% fruit = keeping it HUNDY!

name: Huxley
description: You know the feeling?reaching the summit yet craving something more? That's precisely where we found ourselves, deep in the corporate 9 to 5 grind, dreaming of more. In 2023, we decided to turn those dreams into reality. Bootstrapped and caffeinated, we launched Huxley, driven by the bold ambition to reshape the world, one sip at a time. We looked at the energy drink market saturated with artificial, sugar-laden, and overly-caffeinated options and saw the opportunity for radical transformation.Created for those demanding a better energy drink, Huxley offers a taste of the future. Our revolution begins with Cascara Superfruit, the often overlooked husk of the coffee bean which is typically discarded after harvest.
