An Oregon State University study highlighted a staggering fact: approximately 58 billion pounds of Cascara Superfruit rot in landfills each year, generating 14.2 million metric tons of CO2e, equivalent to the emissions from 3 million passenger cars annually. We saw not waste, but potential and seized the opportunity to craft an energy drink that's a force for good for both our bodies and our planet.Our innovative approach upcycles Cascara Superfruit, tapping its rich source of caffeine, antioxidants and its subtle fruity flavor. Each can includes 90 milligrams of plant-based caffeine, equivalent to one cup of coffee, providing a balanced energy boost without overstimulationQuality ingredients define us. Our drinks blend real fruit juice with only 5 grams of organic cane sugar for a delicious drink free from artificial ingredients. Since caffeine dehydrates the body, we've added 100 milligrams of electrolytes to boost hydration levels and include 75 milligrams of L-theanine to enhance focus and help reduce the crash.Join us on this journey with Huxley, as we look to disrupt the energy drink category. Huxley is not just an energy drink; it's ?A Taste Of Adventure.?

name: HVA CEYLON
description: HVA Ceylon is a premium importer, distributor, and brand partner of natural food ingredients. With deep roots in sustainable sourcing and long-standing relationships with ethical growers and processors, we bring exceptional quality coconut products, teas, spices, and botanicals to North America’s natural products market.By importing directly from the source and leveraging our own warehousing and distribution capabilities, we deliver unmatched value to our customers. With strategically located warehouses in Los Angeles and New York, we offer a diverse range of products for the North American market with no minimum order requirements and convenient door-to-door delivery.Our Products Include: Organic Coconut Milk/ Cream, RBD and Virgin Coconut Oil, Coconut Sugar, Coconut Butter/ Creamed Coconut, Coconut Aminos, Range of teas from around the world, Botanicals and Spices. CoconutTea Botanicals Spices

name: Hybrid Brandz
description: Brand empowerment from imagination to shelfHybrid Brandz transforms vision into reality for brand owners, CPGs /FMCGs, retailers, and designers to bring ideas to life across every touchpoint. Hybrid Brandz empowers brands with artwork management, 3D software and consultancy services for brand activations that optimize brand management with creativity, flexibility and speed. With AI-powered solutions for compliancy, brand owners receive clear collaboration, detailed reporting, and compliant, error-free packaging artwork in a stress-free workflow.

name: HydraDNA
description: HydraDNA™ began with a simple yet powerful vision: to inspire people to Do Nothing Average. Founded in 2024, our journey started with the idea that what you put into your body should empower you to reach your fullest potential, not hold you back.We noticed a gap in the beverage market—products that were either packed with unnecessary ingredients or failed to deliver on promises. Determined to create something better, we set out to craft drinks that combined clean, purposeful ingredients with exceptional flavor. HydraDNA™ was born to bridge that gap, offering beverages that align with active, driven lifestyles without compromising on quality.The name HydraDNA™ reflects our dual focus: hydration and the belief that striving for greatness is embedded in everyone's DNA. From our collagen-infused beverages to our performance drinks, each product is designed to fuel ambition, performance, and balance.What started as an idea has grown into a movement. The Do Nothing Average philosophy extends beyond our drinks, inspiring a community of individuals to break free from mediocrity and live boldly. It's not just about hydration; it's about empowering people to conquer challenges, pursue their goals, and leave a lasting impact.From the beginning, we've been guided by a commitment to clean ingredients, innovation, and connecting with a like-minded community. As we continue to grow, our mission remains the same: to provide products that fuel potential and inspire greatness in every sip.This is just the beginning of our story, and we're proud to have you as part of it. Together, we're proving that excellence isn't just a goal—it's a way of life.

name: Hyundai C-Square
description: Hyundai Corporation Group, a leading global enterprise from South Korea, is spearheading the expansion of premium health ingredients through its strategic partnership with Bereum, the pioneer of postbiotics.Leveraging our robust global network and Korea's advanced biotechnology, we specialize in delivering high-concentration, science-backed postbiotics (EF-2001, beLP1) to the North American market. Our collaboration with Bereum, which has led microbiome and Biological Response Modifier (BRM) research since the 1980s, ensures the highest standards of safety and efficacy.Operating from state-of-the-art R&D and manufacturing facilities in Wonju, South Korea, we provide a stable B2B supply chain to the health supplement and functional food industries. We are committed to fostering global health and vitality by bridging world-class Korean innovation with leading manufacturers in North America.

name: i'm nutrients
description: I’m Nutrients is a fast-growing Australian born kids’ supplement brand, now building momentum in U.S. natural retail and DTC. We’re bringing a differentiated, clinically-researched, clean-label solution to a category that continues to outperform in natural.Retailers are responding to our line because we deliver:• Premium, research-backed ingredients at meaningful doses• Kid-approved formats that drive compliance and repeat purchase• Strong margin structure with premium SRPs• Clear shelf segmentation (calm, picky eating, DHA, iron)

name: Ibotta Performance Network
description: Ibotta is the driving force behind the future of performance marketing as the provider  of the largest digital promotions network in North America — the Ibotta Performance Network — which includes the Ibotta cash back rewards app.

name: Ice Cream For Bears
description: I founded Ice Cream For Bears in 2021 on the belief that the future of food lies in the past. This means that to be healthy we should try to eat foods that our bodies have evolved to process – foods that have been available to humans for thousands of years. Easier said than done… the modern food system has become incredibly complex and hard to navigate. Grocery shelves today are overrun by poorly sourced and overly processed foods which are creating health crises in our communities. Ice Cream For Bears is on a mission to make food wild again by removing processed foods from packaged foods while supporting the most sustainable practices in food and agriculture. We aim to provide an indulgent and ancestrally consistent ice cream experience that is good for humans, good for animals, and good for Earth.I began making ice cream while I was a student in St. Louis - selling at farmers markets and local retailers until we got a break with Sprouts two years later!

name: ICHOOSE GLOBAL INC
description: Born from over a decade of dedication to the clean eating movement, Ichoose is passionate about sustainable living and "plant-based" eating. We are committed to exploring and sharing the benefits of natural, organic foods, ensuring a balanced, healthy future for all.

name: ICL Food Specialties
description: With over 80 years of expertise in the food and beverage industry, ICL Food Specialties is committed to helping you meet consumer demands today while tackling the food challenges of tomorrow. We’re driven by a passion for empowering your success—whether you’re developing new products, expanding into new markets, or seeking innovative ways to elevate food quality and accessibility.Our creative food ingredient portfolio is crafted to deliver exceptional consumer experiences. From enhancing product stability and improving texture to reducing sodium and retaining moisture, we offer a broad range of ingredient solutions across key segments, including Beverages, Bakery, Dairy & Dairy Alternatives, Meat, Poultry, Seafood, and Alternative Proteins.At ICL Food Specialties, we invest in the future of food to fuel your growth. Let’s make an impact, together.

name: Icon Foods
description: Icon Foods was founded in 1999 by Thom King. With 20+ years of experience, our proprietary manufacturing processes, secure supply chain, and quality control standards assure you reliability throughout the entire process, from ideation to delivery.What can we do for you?Icon Foods is focused on customer satisfaction. Our purpose is to deliver exceptional, clean label, all natural, healthy sweetening solutions. Natural sweeteners are intuitive to us. Helping food companies deliver innovative, naturally sweetened products is our duty. Knowing how to use sweeteners singly or synergistically to replace sugar and/or reduce calories is instinctive, whether in bars, beverages, confections or desserts. We partner with food scientists to deliver cost-efficient, innovative, great-tasting foods that will keep consumers coming back for more.All sweeteners are not alike. Some are derived from the stevia plant, some monk fruit, fructose, erythritol, xylitol, but that’s their only commonality. Multiple compounds within the stevia leaves – steviol glycosides, monk fruit – mogroside V – have characteristics ranging from sweet to bitter. Isolating the purest, best-tasting components in a controlled environment is half the challenge. The method used to extract these compounds significantly impacts flavor and quality. Sourcing, processing methods and ratios of glycosides vary widely among suppliers.

name: IFC SOLUTIONS
description: IFC Solutions is a family owned business specializing in natural and organic ingredients for the food, beverage, personal care, and nutraceutical industries. Our diverse product lines include colors, lecithins, and anti-stick agents. Additionally, we also offer toll blending services out of our NJ based facility.We offer made to order products, with quick turn-arounds and low MOQs.

name: Ignite Brands (Oilogic)
description: We are the moms behind Oilogic, and we are on a mission to make this crazy, overwhelming, unbelievable journey of motherhood a little easier. As moms, we try to make safe, smart and logical choices for our kiddos. But when they aren't feeling well, logic can go out the window - turning us from nurturing, kind mommies to stressed out, exhausted MOMsters!And from one too many desperate nights, feeling like our only option to care for our fussy baby was with harsh chemicals and mildly effective treatments, our idea of Oilogic was born…That is when we discovered the power of Essential Oils and how to use them to care for our little ones. However, we got overwhelmed quickly with how to use Essential Oils - we were Product Development and Marketing professionals by trade and we STILL struggled with how to blend them correctly, and dilute them properly. PLUS, we struggled to find the time to figure it all out! So when we were unable find an easier, more mom-friendly solution, we thought "Hey, we can do this ourselves!" From there, we took our 15 years of professional personal care experience and put it to work! First, we took these precious, powerful oils and developed our own concentrated blends. Then we enlisted the partnership of experts in both the natural and baby care industries to perfect them. Finally, we conveniently packaged them for busy Moms (and fellow MOMsters), like you and me!We're proud to be Certified SHEowns, a mark designed to recognize and highlight companies that are equally or majority-owned by women.With Oilogic, you can easily and affordably tap into the power of natural Essential Oils and don't have to worry about harsh chemicals and other yucky stuff, allowing you to feel good, while your little one feels better.  With Oilogic, you can go back to doing what you do best - loving and nurturing your sweet baby.

name: IMA Financial Inc
description: IMA is a leader in providing insurance and risk management solutions tailored to dietary supplement and pharmaceutical operations. We work with a broad spectrum of industry participants spanning innovation, manufacturing, testing, and distribution.IMA delivers consultative, forward-looking support that strengthens your operational resilience. Our solutions anticipate emerging risks and help you improve decision-making across your scientific, regulatory, and commercial activities.MITIGATING RISK THROUGH STRATEGIC SOLUTIONS:Expertise in ProtectionDedicated Claims Management and CoordinationSpecialized Risk Control and Training ProgramsValue-Added Resource Support

name: IMAG Organics
description: Blue green was born in 2012 with the vision and vocation of innovation led us to create a universe of sensible, conscious and responsible indulgences, where you can experience healthy choices and enjoyment without the one impinging on the other.

name: Imlak'esh Organics
description: Imlak’esh Organics is a sustainable, intentional company that specializes in the import and distribution of superfoods ethically sourced from small-scale organic farmers around the world.

name: immi
description: We're the Kevins and we founded immi because we love ramen. We grew up as first-generation immigrants working alongside our families in the farms and markets of Taiwan and Thailand where growing Asian produce and serving noodles were a part of our everyday lives. We started immi to help our families and people around the world better manage their health conditions arising from poor nutrition and unhealthy diets.At immi, we're reimagining our favorite Asian American foods with added nutrition, high-quality ingredients, and the authentic Asian flavors we fondly remember from our childhoods.

name: Impact Brands
description: Our journey began with a simple yet profound vision: to transform a billion lives through exceptional wellness solutions. In an industry often compromised by synthetic shortcuts and profit-driven formulations, a passionate group of health professionals came together with an unwavering commitment to raise the bar.We understood that nature holds the most powerful solutions for human and animal wellness. This insight drove us to explore the world's most potent bioactive compounds, from wild-caught Alaskan fish to rare marine algae and medicinal mushrooms. But we knew that ingredients alone weren't enough – the magic lies in the synergy of perfectly balanced formulations backed by scientific research.What truly sets IMPACT BRANDS apart is our uncompromising approach. Every decision, from sourcing to formulation, is guided by three core principles: premium quality, scientific validation, and environmental responsibility. We carefully select each ingredient, ensuring it meets our rigorous standards for purity and potency. Our formulations undergo extensive testing to verify their therapeutic benefits, and we package our products using eco-conscious materials.Our commitment extends beyond creating superior supplements. We believe in nurturing both people and planet, which is why we've partnered with Vitamin Angels to provide essential nutrients to underserved mothers and young children worldwide. Every purchase helps build healthier communities and brighter futures.Today, IMPACT BRANDS offers a comprehensive range of evidence-based solutions – from full-spectrum supplements and organic skincare to fitness nutrition and premium pet wellness products. But we're more than just a wellness company. We're a community of dedicated professionals united by the belief that everyone deserves access to pure, powerful, and proven health solutions.Our story continues to evolve, but our mission remains constant: to create positive change through better health, one person – and pet – at a time. At IMPACT BRANDS, we believe that true wellness should be accessible, sustainable, and transformative.

name: Impact Products, LLC
description: We are passionate about having a positive impact on our planet and the people in it. Our company name "Impact", and our slogan "your life. your world." implies to Impact your life and Impact Your World. Impact Your Life: The core staples of baking are flour, sweeteners, and salt. Our innovative flour, our zero calorie natural sweeteners, and our ancient mineral sea salts are great options for consumers who want to reduce their carbohydrate intake, maintain lower sugar levels, and use natural ingredient. Impact Your World: Through our packaging materials and our partnerships with companies that have social and environmental initiatives, we can all have a positive Impact on our beautiful planet. Each purchase is helping plant trees, rescue plastics that litter our oceans, and reduce carbon emissions.Impact Products is a company that is focused and driven by providing natural alternatives to processed flours, sugars, and salts, and with each purchase contributing to have a positive impact in the world.

name: In The Raw - Cumberland Packing
description: Founded in 1970, In The Raw® is a family of sweeteners known for simple ingredients, honest sourcing, and unmistakable craft. Best known for the iconic Sugar In The Raw® packet, the brand offers a growing portfolio of natural and alternative sweeteners. In The Raw is committed to doing less, so what matters most can shine. Visit www.InTheRaw.com to learn more.

name: Incap USA
description: At 2Mixed, we’re redefining what functional beverages can be.Our journey began with a simple question: Why do so many wellness and energy drinks lose their power before you even open them? Traditional pre-mixed formulas degrade over time, compromising both taste and effectiveness. We set out to change that — by delivering freshness and function, right when you need it.That’s where INCAP comes in — the patented dosing cap technology. Instead of mixing ingredients in advance, INCAP stores them separately from the liquid and only releases them when you twist and press. This means the active ingredients stay protected from light, moisture, and oxygen — ensuring maximum potency, zero preservatives, and an exceptional experience in every shot.To create the perfect formulations, we partnered with Symrise, a global leader in natural health ingredients. Together, we developed clean, science-backed recipes using only the best plant-based extracts, vitamins, and functional compounds — no fillers, no artificial additives.Every 2Mixed Shot is made in Germany, using high-precision filling lines and top-tier production standards. Whether you’re an athlete, a busy professional, or someone simply looking for a better, smarter way to fuel your day — 2Mixed delivers.

name: Incredifulls
description: AN AMERICAN DREAM YEARS IN THE BAKING A young man's culinary dream kicks off a promising career in London. But it's in New York City that Chef Andrea Meggiato finally finds the lovely ingredient that would forever change his life, future wife Michelle. And ultimately, how joy is shared around the table. Our secret dough has grown–and now The Pizza Cupcake is incredifulls: same premium ingredients, same people, more all-day incredible flavors to share around the table.

name: Incrediwear
description: Incrediwear products increase circulation to reduce inflammation & swelling, relieve pain, restore mobility, and accelerate recovery. Unlike compression products, Incrediwear products do not need to compress to work.Our proprietary fabric is embedded with semiconductor elements. When the elements are activated by body heat, they emit negative ions and infrared waves. Negative ions aid in cellular function and infrared waves create cellular vibrations, leading to increased circulation.The improved cell function and increased circulation of blood and lymph helps transport oxygen and nutrients to the affected area, resulting in reduced pain, swelling, and faster healing.

name: Indigo Wild/Zum
description: Since 1996, we've poured passion for aromatherapy, natural ingredients, and essential oils into our premium line of plant-based Zum products for body and home. It started in Kansas City with the Zum Bar, a moisture packed, good-smelling goat's milk soap and since then, Zum has grown to be an aromatic mainstay in bathrooms and homes. Zum products strip down to plant-based basics, and are made from real ingredients and handcrafted essential oil blends. With more than 35 scent blends, you can create your own at-home or on-the-go aromatherapy to suit any mood.

name: Indus Biotech Limited
description: Enabling healthy living through "Kinder" & "Gentler" healthcare products.Since 1995, Indus Biotech has pioneered the art of deriving science-based healthcare products from food chain raw materials. We achieve this through our revolutionary technology Natrusolate® to design best in class products to address the health continuum.With 222 global patents, 92 peer reviewed publications and 253 pre-clinical studies we are leading innovation in areas like optimising hormonal health, body composition, blood sugar management, cognition and healthy aging. Our ingredients are designed for dietary supplements, nutraceuticals, pharmaceuticals, functional foods and beverages and medical nutrition.

name: INDUSTRIA LOJANA DE ESPECERIAS ILE C A
description: We are a company that provides food solutions to add great flavor to many different gastronomic presentations. Our product lines include spices, seasonings, herbs, sauces, pastes, essences and other ingredients that enhances food’s flavor.We are a company that provides food solutions to add great flavor to many different gastronomic presentations. Our product lines include spices, seasonings, herbs, sauces, pastes, essences and other ingredients that enhances food’s flavor.

name: Infusd Nutrition
description: Infusd is an industry leader recognized for its groundbreaking technology that enables the effortless water-solubility of fat-soluble and insoluble nutrients. Symrise is a leading global supplier of flavors, natural ingredients, and health actives within food, beverage, and supplement industries. By combining Infusd's innovative technology with Symrise's robust taste expertise, application development, and supply infrastructure, we transform science-backed ingredients into water-soluble, stable, delicious solutions. Through this partnership, we’re reimagining difficult-to-formulate ingredients into diverse, custom, and consumer-ready formats, including:•	Ready-to-drink (RTD) functional beverages•	Functional shots •	Stick packs•	Gummies•	Ready-to-mix (RTM) powdersDiscover our advanced solutions and explore an exciting product lineup developed with our proprietary ingredient technology at Booth 3080 in Hall C.

name: INGENIO SAN ISIDRO
description: We were one of the first sugar mills in South America to produce organic sugar. Training with the best practices and coping with the most demanding international rules we began and grew in this product development that meets the consuming growing demand which is irreversible among the population in the five continents. Free from toxic and chemical substances, and from transgenics, our organic sugar has quality certificates that position it between the most competitive in the world.

name: Ingredients Matter, LLC
description: Ingredients Matter was created by the Breazeale family in 2018, leveraging almost 80 years of soapmaking wisdom and expertise.Shocked and dismayed to see mainstream sustainable laundry brands label their petroleum-derived ingredients and packaging as "sustainable," we knew we could do better for families wanting to prioritize their health and safety.As we imagined and reimagined what a laundry soap could do, we discovered a chain reaction of choosing better meant creating a wholly better product for a space that desperately needs one.

name: Ingrilli Citrus, Inc.
description: It all started in 1880, when Giuseppe Ingrilli began selling produce every Saturday at the Messina fresh market in Northern Sicily. He would travel 50 miles each way to sell the produce and to provide for his family. At the market, he noticed that lemons were particularly popular, so he decided to plant some lemon trees and start selling those as well.Now, after five generations and many years of sharing high-quality citrus juice with the world, Ingrilli® is proud to offer its products under the family name directly here in North America.

name: Inis International CO., LTD.
description: Finding wholesome and proper food in pure nature is our principle and belief. From now into the future, we will provide you with healthful foods that reflect nature itself

name: Inka Foods
description: Inka Crops, founded in 2000, strives to promote the unique gastronomy of the Peruvian culture. At Inka Crops, we have a passion to provide a cultural snacking experience. Now, 22 years later, Inka Crops has conquered numerous markets worldwide, offering a wide range of alternative snacks, both healthy and tasty. Our products are one of a kind because of their Peruvian origin and the high-quality standards in the processes and ingredients.

name: Inked Bread Co.
description: We started in 2016 when we noticed that most commercial breads contained unappealing ingredients and that there was nothing exciting or differentiated in the bread aisle. We like to say that other breads are boring but Inked Organics is not. We observed that most competitor breads are made from ingredients that are difficult to pronounce. At Inked Organics, we like to say "Do you know where your bread comes from? We do."

name: Inmar Intelligence
description: We make businesses smarter to improve consumers’ lives. As a trusted partner to brands, retailers, and advertisers for over 40 years, Inmar delivers end-to-end Martech solutions that integrate personalized media and incentives to drive measurable results. We enhance consumer engagement by leveraging exclusive data, creator content, and proprietary MomentsAI targeting to connect with consumers during their most receptive moments across digital and social channels. Powered by exclusive data and technology, we optimize the performance of Retail Media Networks across onsite, offsite, and in-store media to deliver measurable outcomes. Our media and incentives solutions drive value at scale, helping shoppers save billions through relevant advertising and offers.

name: Inna Organic Co., Ltd.
description: INNA ORGANIC is a certified organic skincare brand from Taiwan, blending ethical sourcing, advanced R&D, and essential-oil-infused rituals. EWG Verified, COSMOS Organic certified, cruelty-free, vegan friendly, and committed to giving back—-pledging 1% to support children's education. Must-try: our signature Face Mask Series, featuring seven essential-oil-infused variants inspired by the chakra system. Each mask is thoughtfully formulated to address different skin needs while supporting emotional balance-turning skincare into a ritual that cares not only for the skin, but also for the heart and mind.

name: INNER MONGOLIA CROWN STAR FOOD INDUSTRIES CO.,LTD.
INNOBIO USA Inc.
description: As a strategically established, wholly-owned subsidiary of INNOBIO Corporation Limited, INNOBIO USA Inc. serves as the comprehensive hub for our North American operations. Our core responsibilities span the full supply chain—from the sales of premium dietary supplement ingredients and strategic brand promotion to business collaborations, warehousing, and logistics.By leveraging INNOBIO’s patented Microencapsulation Technology, we specialize in a diverse portfolio of high-performance ingredients, including Synnovo® amino acids and peptides, DurOmega® functional lipids, MariGuard™ natural carotenoids, AstaGuard® astaxanthin, LocVita® vitamins and minerals, and DuraLipo™ liposomal products. Beyond ingredients, we provide tailored application solutions such as gummies, tablets, ready-to-drink (RTD) formulations, sustained-release technologies, humidity-resistant coatings, and custom premixes.Quality and integrity are at our core; all products undergo rigorous certification to meet the highest safety standards, while our eco-friendly production practices underscore a deep commitment to sustainability. To ensure seamless customer satisfaction, INNOBIO USA Inc. operates dedicated warehousing on both the East and West coasts, offering efficient Delivery Duty Paid (DDP) services and responsive localized support.

name: Innova Market Insights
description: Innova Market Insights is a global leader in market intelligence for the food, beverage, beauty, and personal care sectors. Established for 30+ years, we work with leading consumer packaged goods companies around the world. Helping them to understand how fast-moving markets are evolving and what’s next. Our Insights 360° approach covers all the angles. From what’s driving consumers and categories to the latest product, ingredient, flavor, and packaging trends. With insights that extend from macro to granular and global to local. Our customers partner with us to find new opportunities for innovation, expand into new markets and turn ideas into winning products.  Innova: Insights partner for innovationINSPIRE INNNOVATIONDRIVE GROWTH

name: Innovative Labs
description: Our Innovation Is Your Next Success StoryWe are a trusted contract manufacturer specializing in liquid wellness and supplements products, supporting brands from early-stage concept through full-scale commercialization. Our capabilities include formulation support, pilot production, batching, filling, and packaging, all backed by disciplined quality systems and regulatory compliance.We stand out on being a responsive, transparent partner—working cross-functionally to solve challenges, meet timelines, and scale reliably. Whether launching a new product or optimizing an existing one, our team brings technical expertise, operational flexibility, and a commitment to long-term partnerships.With experience across a wide range of liquid / gel formats, we help brands move faster, reduce risk, and bring high-quality products to market with confidence.

name: Insignia International
description: The Flagship journey began in 2012 with the merging of multiple companies within Creo Capital Partners portfolio. Through years of hard work, determination, and collaboration with great partners, Flagship has grown into a global, diversified food business serving virtually every major U.S. retailer and consistently growing its base of innovative, good-for-you, and bold food products. Today, Flagship markets multiple brands in the premium, value, and Hispanic food categories and operates ten facilities across the U.S.

name: Inspired Functional Brands, Inc.
description: At Wild Calf, we believe your coffee should work as hard as you do and taste delicious. That’s why we created a lactose-free, decadent latte that blends real dairy, 8g of protein, in indulgent café flavors—all made with clean ingredients sourced from American family farms. Crafted for busy, health-conscious lives, our ready-to-drink latte delivers energy, satiety, and digestive comfort—no compromises, no unnecessary additives. Real dairy. Real protein. Zero lactose. Coffee that powers your day, naturally.

name: Instant Power Corporation
description: Instant Power's Eco Clog Preventer is formulated with naturally derived components to prevent drain clogs. Simply integrate our family-safe, eco-friendly, yet powerful solution into your cleaning routine to prevent drains from ever becoming a problem. Just use twice a month for clear, happy drains. Finally, a drain cleaner you can love.• Easy + cost efficient method to clean & maintain your drains• Uses enzymes instead of harsh chemicals• Safe for family, pets & planet• Cruelty & toxin-free• Water-friendly microbial blend

name: Institute of Food Technologists (IFT)
description: Since 1939, the Institute of Food Technologists (IFT) has served as the voice of the global food science community. IFT advocates for science, technology, and research to address the world’s greatest food challenges, guiding our community of more than 200,000. IFT convenes professionals from around the world – from producers and product developers to innovators and researchers across food, nutrition, and public health – with a shared mission to help create a global food supply that is sustainable, safe, nutritious, and accessible to all. IFT provides its growing community spanning academia, industry, and government with the resources, connections, and opportunities necessary to stay ahead of a rapidly evolving food system as IFT helps feed the minds that feed the world. For more information, please visit ift.org.

name: Integrated Plastics Packaging
description: Integrated Plastics Packaging, based in Dubai, UAE, is a global supplier of flexible packaging, including stand up pouches, spouted pouches and roll stock, for markets ranging from food, beverage, personal care and pharmaceuticals. We provide exceptional graphics utilizing rotogravure printing. We provide laminations to enhance our customers product shelf life using aluminum foil, metalized films or clear high barrier coated films. We are committed to sustainability and offer fully recyclable packages using mono material polyethylene films; we also offer packages with Post Consumer Recycle content up to 50%

name: Intelligent Blends
description: Intelligent Blends, your Single Serve Copacker With 70 years combined of formulation expertise in multiple formats our cutting-edge R&D Lab innovatesbeverage solutions, creating groundbreakingproducts that exceed customer expectations.Through precise R&D, we incorporate advancedfood science and adhere to stringent foodregulations, offering customized blends and flavorsthat align with your brand’s vision. Intelligent Blendsprovides turnkey solutions with 50+ coffees, teas,cocoas, ciders, and 1,000+ flavors and ingredients,empowering businesses to craft unique, high-qualityproducts. Intelligent Blends: Your innovation partnerin a dynamic market.

name: InterHealth Select Co
description: Innovator of premium quality Omega-3 fish oils and powder for wellness at all ages for humans and pets.

name: International Nut and Dried Fruit Council
description: The International Nut and Dried Fruit Council (INC) brings together the global nut and dried fruit industry to create business opportunities, share knowledge, and build lasting connections. With more than 950 member companies across 85 countries, the INC drives collaboration and supports the sector’s growth.Its mission is to drive sustainable and innovative growth in the consumption and supply of nuts and dried fruit worldwide by highlighting their health benefits and natural goodness. As the leading source of information on health, nutrition, market trends, and quality standards, the INC helps members stay updated and informed. It also creates long-term value by advocating for increased consumption and open market access, advancing sustainability initiatives, and leading efforts to secure a health claim for nuts and update dietary guidelines—guiding and strengthening the industry as a whole.

name: International Snack Company, LLC dba Nomad
description: During the pandemic, Paul brought Dan a snack from a startup he'd helped launch. Dan, a trained chef, wasn't impressed but an idea was born.They saw an opportunity: snacks had gone flavorless, and popcorn was the perfect platform — light, versatile, and able to carry salty and sweet flavors.Over 18 months, they refined recipes and branding before launching Nomad in 2024. Soon after, Ramen popcorn won Most Innovative New Product and Pad Thai popcorn earned Small Business Innovator of the Year.Today, Nomad leads a flavor revolution, turning popcorn into a platform for global taste discovery.

name: Iris + Arlo
description: It started in 2022 when our founder Lara Emond learned that traditional menstrual products contain up to 30 chemicals, including PFAS, endocrine disruptors, and even carcinogens. Plus, they can take up to 800 years to decompose and the average menstruator will use up to 15,000 products in their lifetime.  But what shook her most is that 42 percent of Americans can not afford these essential products. So she created Iris and Arlo, a modern, impact driven brand offering: - Safe, non-toxic products- Biodegradable and compostable pads and tampons that break down in ~150 days- Stunning, user-centric design- A commitment to end period poverty by giving products back- And free education resources for allConcretely, Iris + Arlo offers innovative products such as: - Organic and biodegradable tampons and pads - Reusables - Wellness + Education tools

name: IRIS USA INC.
description: Born in a region that was deeply affected by the Tohoku Earthquake of 2011, our brand carries a mission of recovery and renewal. By sharing the rich flavors of rice grown primarily in the Tohoku area, we help support and revitalize the local communities that cultivate it. Through fresh ideas in packaging, size, and sales style, we aim to make rice fit modern lifestyles and inspire people to enjoy it more often. And as Japan's food culture continues to evolve, we're excited to bring its warmth and creativity to tables around the world.

name: Isadora
description: Isadora brand started in México with refried beans in a pouch in 2004 and revolutioned the industry of beans. After almost 14 years we entered into the US market and since 2022 growth the line to Mexican Food and ready to eat Rice.

name: ISIK ORGANIC CO.
description: ISIK Organic exports +20000 mt (40 Million lbs) of organic products to more than 40 countries every year. Our company has adopted the principle of long-term partnership planning with social and fair trade projects and models that provide full traceability from field to final product. Işık Tarım works for healthy products and healthy generations by respecting its customers, employees, farmers, business partners, and nature through organic agriculture and sustainable soil and farming practices.

name: iSpice Foods
description: Our leadership has been supplying spices to the US food industry for over 35 years.  We saw a need a new player with fresh ideas, and started in 2017.  We have built one of the largest spice bottling operations in North America, with over a million square feet in 3 states and 25 bottling lines.

name: It’s That Simple
description: After a gut-related health scare, Bryan Guadagno turned a more discerning focus to his diet and removed processed, high carbohydrate foods.While Bryan was able to find comparable, convenient low-carb replacements for many of his favorite foods, he struggled to find a low-carb pasta that allowed him to enjoy the sensory experience of conventional pasta.So he decided to create a better-for-you pasta brand. One that's Skinny:•Skinny on calories (4.5 calories per serving)•Skinny on empty carbs (a healthy serving of fiber means zero net carbs)•Skinny on ingredients (5 all-natural, plant-based non-GMO ingredients)

name: Italpizza USA, Inc.
description: Founded in 1991 by Cristian Pederzini in Modena, Emilia Romagna—a region renowned for its passion and excellence in food and automotive—Italpizza was born from a bold ambition: to establish a top brand for premium Italian frozen pizzas worldwide. We initially focused on private label production, but in 2015, we launched our first branded pizza, 10x15, which quickly skyrocketed to become Italy's best-selling pizza. Now, almost 30 years later, we've hit the big time: Italpizza is Italy's number one pizza brand, serving up mouthwatering goodness and rocking the taste buds of pizza lovers in nearly 60 countries around the globe!

name: IVC
description: For over 70 years, we’ve partnered with leading retailers and brands to create innovative, high-quality products that consumers trust. IVC is a full-service Global Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) specializing in vitamins and supplements. Whether you’re launching a new supplement or scaling a national product line, our team brings deep expertise, global capabilities, and a passion for wellness to every step of the journey.

name: Jackson's Food Company
description: When our son Jackson was diagnosed with a rare autoimmune disorder, our top priority was to find ways to ease his symptoms. After much trial and error, we discovered that a high-fat, low-carb diet—with an emphasis on coconut oil and other premium fats—greatly improved both his health and quality of life.Our whole family adopted this way of eating—but boy, did we miss snack foods! So we set out to make our own. We began cooking locally-grown, thinly-sliced sweet potatoes low and slow in coconut oil on our stovetop. The results were delicious!The sweet potato chips were too good not to share with you and your family, so we started Jackson's. His legacy lives on through our company and the snacks he inspired, and we couldn't be more proud to bring them to you.

name: Jaju Pierogi LLC
description: Jaju Pierogi was founded by two sisters using their grandfather's, or Jaju's (dziadziu), recipes. Growing up around the family's Polish deli, they were used to having pierogi always in the freezer. When they went to college and had their first roommates, their mom would still bring by the family pierogi, and they started hearing, "Hey, where you get those?" They realized that high quality pierogi were hard to come by in the grocery store. They took their grandfather's handwritten recipes and went to work on the kitchen table, making their first batches and sampling them out to friends. In 2016, we went to our first farmers market, and in 2017, we went full time with the business. Without brokers or investment, we have grown to 2000 doors. But, we're still on the ground, doing events and grassroots marketing across the country to spread that pierogi gospel!

name: Jakemans, Blue Iron
description: Jakemans Throat & Chest has a rich heritage dating back to 1907, when it was founded by Alfred and Albert Jakeman in Boston, England. Originally starting as a small, family-run business, Jakemans quickly gained a reputation for producing high-quality, soothing lozenges made with natural ingredients. From the beginning, the brand focused on using menthol and essential oils to create flavors that not only provided relief for sore throats and coughs but also delivered a pleasant taste experience.Jakemans' lozenges became popular for their comforting, effective qualities, growing a loyal following over the years. Despite changing ownership over time, Jakemans has stayed true to its roots, maintaining its commitment to traditional production methods and quality ingredients. Today, Jakemans remains a trusted name, known for its authentic, soothing products crafted to provide both relief and satisfaction.This dedication to tradition and quality has allowed Jakemans to thrive for over a century, establishing itself as a reliable, comforting choice for those seeking natural relief from throat and chest discomfort.

name: Jam Packd (Jam Packed Jams LLC)
description: Husband-and-wife team from Minneapolis, MN. We created Jam Packd Jams, the first-to-market functional fruit spread made with organic berries, 8 g of collagen protein, 6-7 g of prebiotic fiber, 21 plant-derived micronutrients, and no added sugar.

name: JANNIS S.A.
description: JANNIS S.A. was founded in 1965, in Thessaloniki. Our company was one of the first large-scale producers of Sesame bars in Greece. Jannis products were made in cauldrons by craftsmen with absolute care, as they embedded tradition in the manufacturing process. Since then, our company has grown its product range to meet our customers' changing tastes and lifestyles. We offer a wide range of Sesame bars, Nut bars, Nougat bars, Greek style delights, and Coconut sticks. With our clientele growing internationally, we adjusted to the international market dynamics. Throughout all these years, the company has evolved by investing in technology and creating state of the art manufacturing facilities. Yet, Jannis still values the expertise of its personnel and highly invests in it. The secret behind our success remains the product quality for the well-being of our customers. We employ the best practice quality control measures, throughoutthe whole process, to ensure that our products are of the highest standards. With more than half a century of dynamic and steadily growing presence, Jannis is the market leader in Greek traditional confectionery and our products are enjoyed by customers around the world. Jannis products are much more than energy bars, gluten free choices or options suitable for vegetarians. We use the finest ingredients that make a natural and healthy snack, yet they leave a delicious flavor in the mouth! Our products are offered in a variety of packaging and they are ideal for snacking on the go. They are an excellent choice in retail, hotels, coffee shops, vending machines, delicatessen shops, schools, airports and much more.

name: JANS Enterprise Corp.
description: Jans Food Company, a well established name in the industry engaged in the manufacturing, distributing and supplying a widespread array of fruit juices, biscuits and snacks. Jans Food Company has managed to gain a formidable position in the industry in a span of 12 years. Our dedication to quality is proven through intensive programs of food safety, well-established production and transportation technologies, supported with never ending research and innovation.

name: Japan Gold USA
description: We are a trusted source for authentic Japanese culinary treasures, importing premium products through our parent company, MUSO in Osaka, Japan—founded in 1953 and an early pioneer of the natural products movement.Our Brands include "MUSO", "Muso From Japan" and "Ohsawa". We have a stand-up pouch Miso that is shelf stable.Organic Soy SauceOrganic TamariOrganic MirinBlack Garlic CondimentsMisoShelf Stable MisoVinegarUmeboshiOrganic Shio KojiOrganic Shoyu KojiYuzu KoshoYuzu JuiceWasabiKarashi MustardFurikakeSenbei Rice CrackersJapanese SnacksMuso From Japan - brandOhsawa - brandMUSO - brandFounded1953Website: www.japangoldusa.comCategoriesCENTER STORE GOODS, CONDIMENTS & DRESSINGS, OILS & VINEGARS, SNACKS, SPICES & SEASONINGSing the United States and beyond

name: Japan Mint USA
description: We founded Japan Mint USA after relying on Japan Mint throughout our professional tennis careers in Europe. When we moved to the United States, we were surprised to find that the mint-based crème we trusted—made with Japanese peppermint (Mentha arvensis) and known for its light, fast-absorbing relief—was not available. Rather than recreate it, we chose to preserve it by sourcing and distributing the original Japan Mint product for the U.S. market. Japan Mint USA exists to carry forward a legacy of natural care, made modern and accessible.

name: Japan Seiko Glass Co., Ltd
description: Since 1895, Japan Seiko Glass has manufactured high-quality, ultra-clear glass bottles and jars in Japan. Using 100% in-house cullet and low-iron sand, we offer 200+ shapes from 30ml~750ml. MOQ starts at 1,000 pcs, with global exports to over 15 countries.

name: JAS Live Free, Inc.
description: JAS was founded in 2022 after a transformative journey that began 10 years before, when co-founder Cecilia Rios Murrieta, immersed in the cultural vibrancy of Oaxaca, Mexico, started her own mezcal company. Her experience there, working closely with local farmers to champion mezcal as a premium spirit, nurtured a deep appreciation for authentic, culturally enriched beverages.The idea for JAS, which stands for 'Juntos A Saborear' (Savoring Together), took shape as Cecilia transitioned to a sober lifestyle in 2018, leading her to envision a line of celebratory beverages that were both alcohol-free and culturally significant. In 2022, Cecilia teamed up with Jaymee Mandeville, who brought her extensive expertise in beverage marketing to the venture. Together, they crafted beverages that marry traditional Latin flavors with functional ingredients, ensuring each beverage is not only delicious but also supports well-being.At JAS we are committed to crafting drinks that are inclusive, joyous, and health-conscious, allowing everyone to partake in celebrations in a meaningful way. Each JAS drink is a testament to our dedication to quality, innovation, and the celebration of heritage, letting us share a piece of our culture in every sip.

name: Jayone Foods, Inc.
description: 1999, our founders began a small tofu factory in Southern California. With a laser-point focus on maintaining authentic Korean flavors through top-notch foods under the leadership of CEO Lee Seung Hoon, Jayone has expanded beyond its humble roots to be the global manufacturer and distributor it is today.

name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
description: We build ice creams completely from scratch using a unique recipe honed and perfected over more than 20 years by our founder, Jeni Britton. Our ice creams have a uniquely smooth texture and buttercream body, with bright flavor and clean finish. We're here to set new standards for ice cream classics and to create our own. At Jeni's, you'll find flavors inspired by our curiosities—art, history, pop culture, and beyond—that simply don't exist anywhere else.

name: Jennies Macaroons
description: Jennies Coconut Macaroons, Bites, and Bars are an exceptional choice for consumers seeking delicious, moist, and indulgent snacks that align with a healthier lifestyle. Our products are thoughtfully crafted to meet the growing demand for Organic, Plant-Based, and Gluten-Free options, ensuring they cater to today’s health-conscious consumer. Each item is individually wrapped, providing convenient grab-and-go options and effortless portion control.Our packaging is vibrant and eye-catching, designed to immediately attract consumer attention. When displayed together, our product assortment creates visually striking end caps that not only enhance shelf presence but also drive significant impulse purchases.Please visit us in our booth to sample a large selection of our DELICIOUS products!

name: Jensen Plant-Based Brands
description: In 1958 Reggie Jensen founded his food company with passion and grit for selling high-quality foods to restaurants in San Diego. Today, we've perfected our craft, and remain committed to strict quality standard for the highest-quality products. And, we are innovating with on-trend, new products that meet evolving consumer needs. Since 2019, Jensen has transferred it's food making know-how to plant-based protein products, offering a variety of natural and great tasting foods for healthier eating.

name: Jesse & Ben's
description: We're Jesse and Ben, two restaurant guys who believe fries should taste amazing and be better for you. When our cult-favorite hand-cut fries turned out even better frozen, we saw the frozen aisle for what it was: boring, outdated, and full of junk. So we set out to shake up 'big potato' with clean, craveable fries made for people who want better.

name: JESUS NAVARRO S.A (CARMENCITA)
description: Carmencita was established in 1923 and was the first Spanish company to bottle spices in glass jars. Today, we can proudly say that Carmencita is the leading Spanish brand on the spice market, creating its own blends.Carmencita's R&D Department is especially committed to health as an essential part of food and gastronomy. This means that Carmencita's products are in a constant state of evolution, often anticipating the demands and needs of society.Today, the third generation is at the head of the company, which is currently building a new factory that will be the most modern in Europe. Carmencita has been exporting its products since 1940, and we are now present in more than 75 countries across five continents.

name: JFC International, Inc.
description: We are the number one Asian food and beverage supplier in North America with more than 90 years of experience. We supply more than 10,000 items to over 12,000 customers. JFC is the one stop supplier of quality, quick and easy, healthy Asian foods.

name: Jiangsu Biodep Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
description: Biodep is a probiotic company focuses on the research and production of probiotic strains, finished dosage forms OEM, solutions for health and wellness etc. Our products and applications include Lactobacillus, Bifidobacterium, Akkermansia, Lactic acid ferment lysate, Probiotic coffee, Probiotic drops, Probiotic capsules, Probiotic tablets, Postbiotic drinks, Pets probiotics etc.

name: Jiangsu Ciinuo Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
description: Jiangsu Ciinuo Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd established in 2019. It is a new subsidiary Factory of Ciisen Group, engaged in the research, development, production, sale and service of dietary supplements.We can provide solutions of different formulation for health care industry with a series of advanced equipments and new techonlogy. Ciisen pharmaceutical covers an area of 20000㎡, with a total investment of 160 million yuan, has built a 100,000 class purification workshop of 14,000 square meters, and has the production capacity of medicine, health food and cosmetics. With tablets, hard capsules,softgel, oral liquid, powder, gummy, effervescent tablet etc. more than 20 imported production lines.

name: JIANGSU GUOTAI INTERNATIONAL GROUP GUOMAO CO LTD
description: 1. Top Exporting and trading public company from China.Stock code: 002091 in China Shenzhen Stock market.2. Focusing on innovative raw material for food and health industry.3. Supporting medium and small size buyer: 0ffer low MOQ and Provide financial support.4. Serious on quality control and on time delivery.

name: Jiangsu Yichao Health Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Jiangsu Yichao Health Technology Co., Ltd.，as a contract manufacturer specializing in the dietary supplement industry. Yichao offer multi-format supplement solutions including nutritious gummies, soft capsules, tablets, liquid beverage, etc.

name: JIANGXI HENGDING FOOD CO.,LTD
description: Jiangxi Hengding Food Co., Ltd. is located in Fengcheng High-tech Industrial Park, Jiangxi Province, mainly engaged in rice and grain coarse grain deep processing. Since its inception in 2006, adhering to the enterprise spirit of "perseverance, standing on top of the sky", independent innovation, pioneering and enterprising, the company has now developed into a national key leading enterprise of agricultural industrialization with more than 500 employees and an area of more than 500 acres, a national high-tech enterprise, a national specialized new small giant enterprise, and a demonstration enterprise of scientific and technological innovation.The company has established a modern enterprise management system, and now has a syrup division, a plant fat powder division, a rice protein division, and a light milk division. The company can produce 200,000 tons of rice syrup per year, 160,000 tons of plant fat powder, enzymatic grain powder, etc., rice protein powder, rice protein peptide, grain coarse grain powder, etc. more than 20,000 tons, around the rice deep processing to make bigger, do specialized, refined, the company has formed a rice syrup, rice protein powder, rice protein peptides, vegetable fat powder, light granary milk and other products in depth development pattern. The company's series of products have been sold to 34 provinces, municipalities and autonomous regions across the country, and exported to Southeast Asia, Africa, the Middle East and Europe and the United States.The company has passed ISO22000 food safety management system certification, halal certification, Kosher certification, BRC certification (British Retailers Association), organic product certification and other system certification; There is a "Jiangxi Province Rice By-product High Value Utilization Engineering Research Center", the development of grain deep processing, the company is one of the national standard setters of fructose syrup.In 2020, the company invested in the new "Jiangxi Hengding Biological Food Industrial Park", which aims to extend the company's upstream and downstream industrial chains, form a modern rice deep processing biological food industrial park integrating base planting, agricultural product processing, biological food manufacturing, product experience, and factory tourism, and truly realize the integrated development of primary, secondary and tertiary industries. In 2021, the first phase of Jiangxi Hengding Biological Food Industrial Park was officially put into operation.Hengding Company is determined to be a "respected enterprise", respect talents, care for employees, respect customers, strict quality. There is no best, only better, Hengding people have never stopped moving forward, perseverance in their efforts, the belief of standing tall in the sky, on the road to success, Hengding will devote themselves to you and create a better future hand in hand!

name: Jilin Tianzheng Biotechnology Co., Ltd
description: Jilin Tianzheng Biotechnology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise that has long been focused on the pharmaceutical and big health industry. The company is mainly engaged in the R&D, production, service and sales of bone collagen series products, including bone gelatin and bone collagen peptides. It has production lines with an annual output of 10,000 tons of bone gelatin, 1,500 tons of bone collagen peptides and 35,000 tons of bone-derived calcium hydrogen phosphate. The products it manufactures, such as gelatin for capsules, food additive gelatin, collagen peptides and bone-derived calcium hydrogen phosphate, are sold both at home and abroad, which can fully meet people's diversified needs in health, nutrition and daily applications.

name: Jinjiang Little Newton Food Industry Co.,Ltd
JINXIANG JINXIYUAN FOOD CO.,LTD
description: "JINXIANG JINXIYUAN FOOD CO.,LTD is leading manufacturer of dehydrated vegetables in China,annual production capacity has reached 25000 tons.Major products include: dehydrated garic, carrot, red green bell pepper(paprika),green bell pepper, tomato,onion, ginger,horseradish,potato,cabbage,potato, beetroot etc.Factory has been approved by BRC grade A,ISO9001,ISO22000, HACCP, HALAL,KOSHER,SEDEX,SMETA.GAP and FDA, mainly exporting to Russia, USA, Ukraine, Poland, UK, Latvia, Indonesia, Turkey, Switzerland, Colombia, Brazil,Bulgaria, Vietnam, Hungary, France, Italy, Malaysia etc."

name: Jirisancheorum Corp.
description: After returning to farming, he began manufacturing sesame oil and perilla oil in 2012, and began to transparently, pure and conveniently convey the true taste and value of Korean sesame seeds and perilla seeds rooted in nature and rural areas to consumers.

name: JIUHUA HUAYUAN
description: Jiuhua Huayuan Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise dedicated to the R&D, production, and sales of medicine and dietary supplements.It is one of the top 100 TCM enterprises in China and was designated as a national-level "Little Giant" enterprise(a recognition for highly specialized, refined, unique, and innovative firms)  in 2024. Rooted in China's rich heritage of herbal medicine and powered by modern science, we provide standardized, high-efficacy, and safe products for global dietary supplements and drug distributors.

name: JIYA ORGANIC INC
description: We founded the farm organic in 2019 as we begin our journey into our certified products. Our ambition is to revolutionize the landscape of the Organic & nutritious food industry. We aim to achieve this by sourcing ingredients in their natural state and rejuvenating Mother Earth with its sacred soil. We advocate for a sector that is not only healthy and environmentally conscious but also socially responsible. Our company's goal is to establish itself as a beacon of trustworthiness, authenticity, and inventive exploration in the organic realm. We are dedicated to delivering homemade flavours and aromas to people around the world.

name: Jocko Fuel, LLC
description: You show up every day, even when it's hard – because you know there's no shortcut. You're on The Path - a personal journey to get stronger, smarter, healthier – better. Nobody said it would be easy. One thing is certain: you need the right fuel.JOCKO FUEL delivers clean, high-performance nutrition designed for athletes and anyone committed to being their best selves. Co-founded by retired Navy SEAL Commander Jocko Willink, our products are made with proven, high-quality ingredients—free from artificial sweeteners, colors, and preservatives. No shortcuts, no compromises—just clean fuel to help you train harder, recover faster, and perform at your best.  CLEAN FUEL. BUILT DIFFERENT.

name: Joe's Syrup LLC
description: Our StoryJoe Meinhardt is the founder and owner of Joe's Organic Syrup. His journey in the organic coffee syrup business is one of passion and perseverance. He began his career in the coffee business with Coffee Bean International out of Portland, Oregon in 1988. In 2007 disaster struck and he lost his wife to cancer. He was left to raise two young children alone and needed flexible hours to be there for them.Ever the entrepreneur, Joe began repairing coffee roasting and brewing equipment and also teaching others how to roast and blend coffee. In 2008, Joe had a customer ask him to formulate and produce some coffee syrups for his chain of coffee stores in Salem. Joe was intrigued by the request but also knew he did not want to produce a syrup that had artificial sweeteners, dyes or preservatives.With the assistance of his ten-year-old son, Joel, they began experimenting with All Natural recipes in their kitchen! Within a few months they were selling a line of Premium Natural coffee syrups. Inspired by increasing sales, Joe began to build his own processing plant from scratch. (A man of many talents, Joe is also an accomplished engineer and electrician.)The plant was up and running by 2013. By now Joe had a line of twelve All Natural syrup flavors, and his list of customers was growing, so Joe decided it was time to pursue the process to be Certified Organic. He completed the complex certification Process in June of 2013. Today Joe's Organic Syrup has a variety of 22 flavors.We are a family business and our employees are part of our family. Joe makes sure we all maintain his high standards. We take pride in our syrup and taste-test every batch to make sure it's not just Certified Organic, but also certified delicious.

name: JoinBrands
description: JoinBrands is a leading creator marketplace that connects brands and agencies with 500,000+ vetted creators across TikTok, Instagram, Amazon, YouTube, and more. Trusted by over 40,000 brands, we make it easy to recruit creators, launch campaigns, and build long-term affiliate partnerships that drive real sales and brand awareness. With simple campaign setup and seamless creator management, JoinBrands helps you scale high-quality content and creator relationships faster than ever.

name: JOJO's Chocolate
description: My mom, Jodie Jones, bravely battled cancer for 7 years. One of her greatest triumphs was creating dark chocolate snacks that satisfied sugar cravings with more protein and less sugar. Sharing these treats brought her joy and became her way of spreading love. We are now on a mission to spread love and these delicious snacks through her story.- Sterling, Jojo’s co-founder and son

name: Joolies Superfruit, LLC
description: Hi! We're Joolies. Growing for nearly two decades, our family farm includes over 1,000 acres of date palms and a 100,000 square foot facility nestled in the heart of Coachella, Southern California. One of the greatest places on earth to grow dates. Our farm started out supplying dates alongside other growers, distributing through traditional channels. We saw a staleness in what consumer products were being offered and decided we wanted to take control of the entire journey of the date, guaranteeing quality of care from first pick off the tree through packing. Each medjool is hand-picked under the golden sunshine--thus we've dubbed medjool dates Palm Tree Candy. We're here to celebrate the California Superfruit with unforgettable, vibrant packaging that makes you smile.

name: Joseph Farms
description: Joseph Gallo Farms – A Legacy of QualitySince 1946, Joseph Gallo Farms has built a legacy of sustainable farming. That dedication and heritage inspired award-winning Joseph Farms cheese, made with milk from cows not treated with artificial hormones including rBST. To this day Joseph Farms remains the longest standing artificial hormone free cheese brand, a testament to our ongoing commitment to our consumers' health.Each serving naturally contains 0g Lactose.Joseph Gallo Farms, maker of Joseph Farms Cheese, has been honored countless times with gold medals and awards as one of the nation's finest providers of high-quality milk and premium cheese.Joseph Farms is constantly expanding in North America and Mexico to meet unprecedented demand. Our cheese can be found in most retail chains, from the biggest to the smallest. Demand for our cheese is also growing intercontinentally in Europe, Asia, Latin America, North Africa, and a number of other developing markets.

name: Jovial & Bionaturae
description: Jovial Foods, Inc. was founded by a husband and wife team who have always been passionate about food, farming, and traditions. Carla and Rodolfo were both born into families of talented home cooks, and food was at the center of their childhoods. They also have a love of the past, and focus their product lines around ancient grain ingredients and traditional food preparation during manufacturing.Once Carla and Rodolfo had children, they discovered their daughter had gluten sensitivity. Carla and Rodolfo soon suspected that changes in wheat and other varieties of plants over the years were contributing to the increasing number of children with food intolerances. Looking to the past for answers, they discovered a nearly extinct ancient grain called einkorn, nature's original wheat. In einkorn, Carla and Rodolfo found a wheat their daughter could flourish with. They realized they had to bring einkorn back to help other families. They both were professionals in the organic food industry, so they established the jovial brand to help address the many issues faced by those with food sensitivities. Jovial is all about family, feeling good, celebrating life, and showing love with good food. Jovial is a small, family-owned company and promises to stay that way.

name: Joyburst
description: We believe you shouldn't have to choose between great taste and a healthy lifestyle. That's why we've spent decades creating a collection of flavorful, better-for-you beverages. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, our drinks deliver bold flavors and nourishing benefits to uplift your day.The 2022 Super Bowl LVI commercial launched the new line of naturally caffeinated and sugar-free sparkling energy drinks. Better-for-you beverages proved to be a hit- and shortly after, Renew Hydration beverages were added to the line-up.

name: Joybyte
description: Joybyte ignites explosive results with transformative influencer marketing. We’re the secret weapon for brands such as Jackson’s Chips, Idahoan Foods, Baja Gold, and Eggland’s Best, unlocking the power of niche audiences and authentic engagement through our customized talent pool and data-driven, always-on strategy. As the fastest-growing TikTok Shop agency, we seamlessly bridge influencers with commerce to drive real revenue. Our focus on micro-influencers fosters community-building and aligns perfectly with your customer journey, optimizing KPIs for true social growth. Visit joybyte.com to learn more.

name: Joyride's Kitchen
description: After years of building trust with pet parents through innovative dog products, we saw a growing need for healthier, safer, and more transparent nutrition options. Too many pet foods on the market were filled with fillers, questionable sourcing, or lacked veterinary input.We set out to change that by creating a line of vet-formulated and approved, all-natural recipes made and sourced in the USA. Every batch is crafted with care to support dogs' long-term health and happiness, while giving pet parents peace of mind. What started as a passion project to raise the standard of pet nutrition has grown into Joyride's Kitchen—a brand dedicated to nourishing pets like family.

name: JPG Resources/Culinex
description: At JPG and CuliNEX, we're here to bring your innovation to life.  We help companies envision their best future, create their products, and commercialize and scale to win in the market.  We're the only team with the breadth to take you from idea to production, and can also happy to help in pinpoint needs.  Talk to our team of seasoned professionals to learn more about how we will help you find success in this competitive industry.Areas of specialization include:Clean labelProtein and Fiber boosted productsOrganic and natural ingredientsFunctional ingredientsAllergen sensitivitiesUpcycled and sustainable ingredients

name: JUGO SUPERFOODS
description: JUGO was founded in 2023 by Orange County CA natives, Jason and Diana.  Diana is first generation American Argentine and much of the branding was inspired by her South American roots.  Jason and Diana understand that with the demands of today's fast-paced lifestyle, it can be challenging to ensure that our diets are meeting our nutritional needs. Enter a gummy vitamin that provides a convenient way to consume more superfoods, so you can tackle the day and still have time to enjoy your friends, family, and nature.  We're proud to say that JUGO is the FIRST line of superfood gummy vitamins, backed by extensive research and collaboration with expert formulators. We strongly believe in the power of superfoods to fuel our bodies and minds, and we encourage our JUGO community to get outside and do what you love with the power of superfoods!

name: Juicybite
description: JuicyBite started with a simple question: why isn't America — the capital of fitness culture — offering the kind of high-protein, convenient chicken breast products that revolutionized diets in Korea?Back when I was a private equity consultant at Alvarez & Marsal, I took a trip back to my motherland, South Korea, and saw shelves lined with single-serve, ready-to-eat chicken breasts. These weren't the dry, bland chicken breasts we're used to — they were juicy, flavorful, and packed with protein. This one product had reshaped how Koreans approached fitness and nutrition, fueling the rise of protein culture you see today in shows like Physical 100.I dug deeper and realized that major Korean RTE (ready-to-eat) chicken brands had tried to enter the U.S. market, but all struggled due to manufacturing barriers. With my background in operations and manufacturing consulting, I knew this was a solvable problem — so I quit my job, partnered with the right teams, and launched Korkio in 2023: the first Korean-influenced RTE chicken breast company in the U.S.After dominating niche Asian markets and becoming a best-seller on platforms like Weee!, we've now rebranded as JuicyBite to bring our mission to the mainstream: making clean, delicious protein as easy as tearing open a pouch.This is just the beginning.

name: Juni
description: Jay and Radhi's upbringing in India, where tea is a beloved social and familial tradition, inspired their journey to create Juni, a tea company infused with adaptogens for added functional benefits. Their shared passion for tea stems from deeply personal experiences: Jay fondly recalls daily tea moments with his mother after school, a cherished time of love and presence amidst their busy lives. For Radhi, tea symbolizes post-meal gatherings with her family, filled with laughter and comfort, fostering a strong sense of connection and warmth. Driven by these joyful memories and a desire to extend this sense of togetherness to others, Jay and Radhi founded Juni. Their vision was not only to offer a high-quality tea experience but also to incorporate nourishing ingredients that promote calmness and balance in everyday life. The name "Juni," derived from "Just you and I," encapsulates their belief in the power of shared moments and genuine interactions. It serves as a reminder of the importance of human connection in a world often filled with hustle and bustle. Juni is crafted to not only provide a refreshing taste but also to evoke a sense of calm and vitality, enhancing one's day with a burst of brightness and positivity. By blending tradition with innovation, Jay and Radhi hope to introduce a new generation to the timeless joy and benefits of tea while honoring the cultural heritage that inspired them.

name: Jus-Rol
description: JusRol is the fastest growing brand in the Refrigerated Dough category! JusRol launched in the US just 4 years ago and we’re now sold nationwide in 16,500 stores from coast to coast. Our portfolio consists of ready to bake doughs from puff pastry to pizza and pie crust. Our products help  you charm family and friends with impressive dishes and desserts that disappear right before your eyes. Our dough comes rolled on parchment paper so all you have to do is unroll it onto a baking tray no cleanup needed! And our flowpack packaging is lightweight and easy to open so all you have to worry about is what amazing recipe to make.

name: Just 1 Label
description: Just 1 Label specializes in producing high quality, custom labels, using advanced digital printing technology to achieve vibrant and durable results. We offer a personalized approach, working closely with your team across various industries to create labels that perfectly match your branding. Here at Just 1 Label, we focus on delivering excellent customer service with a standard 10 day turn around while executing the quality you would expect from your label provider.

name: Just About Foods
description: We inspire a healthier lifestyle in people around the world with a spotlight on creating innovative, tasty, and top level of quality accessible natural food products.​​Through our brand and manufacturing capabilities we seek to generate abundance and prosperity to our team, business partners, communities and shareholders.​

name: Just Date
description: At Just Date, we believe you can have your cake, your cookies and your energy too. By using only organic dates (and nothing else) to replace refined sugar in pantry staples, our products help people enjoy the foods they love with simple, nutrient-dense ingredients that taste as good as they feel. Our products include:* Organic Just Date Syrup and Date-Sweetened Pomegranate Syrup * 3-ingredient Organic Date-Sweetened Dark Chocolate Chips* 4-ingredient Organic, Dairy-Free Date-Sweetened Milk Chocolate Chips* 100% Organic Date SugarWith Just Date, sweet never felt so good.

name: Just Ice Tea
description: JUST ICE Tea is an organic, real-brewed, ready-to-drink tea line from the creators of Honest Tea. Available in premium glass and recently launched in cans, JUST ICE Tea is served in several varieties of Fair Trade Certified, Just Sweet Enough (TM) and unsweetened teas made with clean, easily recognizable ingredients.

name: Just Ingredients, Inc.
description: Karalynne Call, mom of six and Founder of Just Ingredients, began her health journey nearly 15 years ago while battling suicidal depression. By sharing her story on her Instagram account, @just.ingredients, she helped countless others begin their own health and healing journeys. Now with nearly one million followers, she continues to inspire people to make healthier product choices, educating on the ingredients they're putting in and on their bodies. Inspired by her struggle to find safe personal care and nutritional products for herself and her family, Karalynne created her own line of health and beauty products free of toxins and artificial ingredients. Today, Just Ingredients continues to provide clean, safe, and accessible products, while teaching that healing is possible. We're committed to educating our customers and followers that ingredients matter, and what you put in and on your body can and should be nourishing. We apply this standard to each and every one of our products.

name: Just Made Foods
description: While living in the tropics, our founders, Walter & Norka Nimocks, encountered a remarkable variety of nutritious tropical fruits. A few years later, they returned to the U.S. with a passion for sharing the secrets of the tropics.

name: JUST SPREAD LLC
description: We remember our grandparents making real food in their kitchens... simple, healthy, and delicious foods. They only used essential ingredients, and didn't have to worry about GMOs, artificial colors, artificial flavors, preservatives, high-fructose corn syrup...the list goes on and on. As parents of young children, we've always had to worry about the foods we are serving our children. We've been frustrated and confused by ingredient lists we can't even pronounce, and products which contain little of the ingredient that is being advertised. So, we decided to do something about it. With great care and passion, we developed Just Spread, a brand that offers simple, healthy, and delicious spreadable foods… Made with only essential ingredients and nothing more.

name: Justin's
description: At Justin’s, we’re crafting delicious, real food products made with high-quality, mindfully-sourced ingredients that contribute to our world in a positive and meaningful way.

name: JUXX Natural Juice
description: Juxx started in Brazil in 2007 inspired to introduce Cranberry Juice in a more tailored formulation for Latin Americans and became the most popular healthy juice in the Brazilian market with distribution throughout the country.Following the success of Cranberry, Juxx launched products with special ingredients to add more benefits and more value to their formulations, such as grape seed extract, fiber, Beta Glucan and others.Since 2022, Juxx has been working with copackers in the US to start a national distribution of its products.In addition to the natural and healthy formulations, Juxx is recognized for its very tasty products, being successful in all demonstrations and tasting events.

name: K-town Bulgogi
description: Founded in 2022, K-town Bulgogi® is a female minority-owned and family-owned small business that emerged during a time of profound change in the food industry. We recognized the growing need for convenient, high-quality at-home meal kits and frozen foods and stepped in with passion and dedication.Our mission is to bring the authentic flavors of Korean BBQ Bulgogi to American households. Using the freshest ingredients and proudly made in the USA, we support local farmers and cater to various dietary needs with our Traditional Beef Bulgogi, Halal Bulgogi, and Vegan Shiitake Mushroom Bulgogi.K-town Bulgogi® is about more than just food; it's about creating memorable dining experiences and uniting people around the dinner table. Our commitment is to deliver the Korean BBQ experience at home, conveniently and affordably.Through the love and care we pour into every product, we aim to bring joy and delicious Bulgogi-inspired meals to your home. Join us on this flavorful journey and enjoy K-town Bulgogi®!

name: K.R.S. Spicy Food Co., Ltd.
description: Thai farmers are some of the lowest paid farmers in the world.
