So we're on a mission to empower them to live better lives, create positive change in their communities and invest in their futures. We do this through our two Fairtrade collectives, which grow the freshest ingredients for you to enjoy in our authentic Thai products. By working directly with Thai farming families, we have the privilege of bringing the real taste and soul of Thailand to your kitchen.

name: Kabrita
description: About KabritaKabrita provides gentle goat milk–based nutrition designed to support gentle digestion and comfort. We offer parents a modern alternative to traditional cow’s milk formula, combining naturally gentle ingredients with rigorous European standards and scientific rigor.Live Book Signing: Thursday 11 am-12 pm with Chief Medical Advisor, Pediatrician Dr. Ari BrownOur MissionWe champion a better infant feeding experience by providing gentle nutrition that supports comfort for babies and their parents.Our VisionWe aim to be the most trusted goat milk brand globally, recognized for our leadership in digestive health.

name: KACE Tea, LLC
description: KACE began with a craving for authentic Asian tea and community. Our co-founder Ash grew up in Taiwan, where tea was an everyday staple that brought people together. Whether it's through boba runs or business meetings over tea-- tea created space that allowed people to connect. After moving to the U.S., she couldn't find fruit teas that captured the craft and quality of the Taiwanese-style iced teas she loved—freshly brewed tea shaken with real fruit juice. So she started making her own in her San Francisco apartment, serving them at dinner parties to friends and guests. The response was electric.Inspired by the community that tea creates, Ash teamed up with her partner Kyle, and together they brought their Taiwanese and Filipino roots to life through KACE—a fruit tea brand reimagining tea culture in the U.S. We launched in November 2023 through e-commerce and quickly began partnering with Good Stuff Distributors, a leading independent DSD in Northern California in January of 2024. Today (May 2025), KACE is sold in select Whole Foods stores in California, and we're expanding into Raley's and World Market in June 2025 with more expansion on the horizon.What makes KACE unique is our blend of cultural heritage and boundary-pushing branding. With an art and culture forward identity, we bring tea into unexpected spaces—fashion shows, chef tastings, DJ sets, and creative gatherings. We're carving out a new identity for tea in America, one rooted in culture, connection, and a strong community of tea lovers who believe tea isn't just a beverage—it's an experience.

name: KacePack Limited
description: KacePack™ exists to push the boundaries of safe, sustainable, and creative packaging for regulated and emerging industries. From cannabis and F&B, to eCommerce, and wellness — we deliver tailored solutions that help modern brands stand out and scale responsibly.We offer packaging options that incorporate recyclable, compostable, and lower-impact materials — including coal-free glass and molded fiber — to help brands meet evolving environmental goals. Our approach balances sustainability with performance, manufacturability, and aesthetic shelf appeal.KacePack™ has shipped over 100 million units of packaging to businesses across North America, Europe, and Australia. With a global team and a network of certified partner factories, we bring high-quality, shelf-ready packaging to companies of all sizes.

name: Kamut International
description: From 36 kernels and a legend of discovery in an Egyptian tomb, KAMUT® brand wheat is an ancient grain, guaranteed under the KAMUT brand, to never be hybridized or genetically modified and always organically grown. Prized for its nutrition, ease of digestibility, sweet nutty-buttery taste and firm texture, today it can be found throughout the world in products including breads, pasta, pizza, cereals, snacks, pastries, crackers, beer, green foods, and cereal drinks.

name: Kanaiya Exports Pvt. Ltd.
description: Kanaiya Exports Private Limited is an Indian manufacturer and exporter of agricultural products, backed by a group legacy of over six decades in agri-commodities. Rooted in India’s spice trade, we are known for consistent quality, reliability, and long-term partnerships across global markets.Our core portfolio includes psyllium and a range of nutritional ingredients. We supply psyllium husk and husk powder in customized grades for food, bakery, and nutraceutical applications, including gluten-free and fibre-enrichment formulations, and for digestive health solutions in pet and equine nutrition. We also offer flax, chia, amaranth, and quinoa, widely used across bakery and functional food applications.In addition, we provide a broad range of spices and seeds including cumin, coriander, fennel, fenugreek, sesame, ajwain, dill, celery, cardamom, nigella, and turmeric.Kanaiya Exports operates with a strong focus on traceability, compliance, and sustainability, supported by modern processing facilities and close farmer relationships. Our quality systems align with international standards including BRC, and we support customers with organic certifications and documentation to meet global regulatory requirements.

name: Karma Water
description: Nutrients in premixed drinks deteriorate over time. But Karma’s patented, protective PushCap guarantees that our proprietary blend of active ingredients is delivered at optimal potency. Just peel, push & shake to transform water into wellness. Available product lines:Karma Probiotic WaterKarma Energy WaterKarma Stick Packs *NEW*#BelieveInKarma

name: Kartago Dates
description: Kartago Dates was founded with a singular vision: to offer healthier, more sustainable alternatives to refined sugars by harnessing the power of nature's sweetest fruit—dates. Our journey began in 2014 , when our founder, driven by a deep commitment to promoting healthier lifestyles and sustainable food practices, identified a growing need in the market for natural, low-glycemic sweeteners. The idea for Kartago Dates was born from a desire to create an organic, nutrient-dense product that would help people make better choices without sacrificing taste.Starting with a small but passionate team, we sourced the finest dates from the Horchani family in Tunisia, known for their exceptional quality and rich history of cultivation. We believed that dates, packed with fiber, antioxidants, and essential minerals, could be more than just a fruit—they could be transformed into a powerful, healthy alternative to sugar.Our journey wasn't without challenges, but our determination to bring this vision to life fueled our success. Over the years, we expanded our product offerings, introducing a range of date-based sweeteners, including date sugar, date syrup, date puree, and date paste. Each product was crafted with the goal of providing natural sweetness without the negative health impacts of traditional sugars.Today, Kartago Dates stands at the forefront of the alternative sweetener market, offering businesses and consumers a line of products that are not only delicious and versatile but also aligned with a commitment to health, sustainability, and ethical sourcing. We're proud of our journey and the impact we've made in helping people make better choices, one sweet bite at a time.

name: Katayama USA
description: Established in 1999, Katayama Foods is a Sino-Japanese venture that upholds the meticulous standards of its Japanese management team. Our commitment to excellence is unwavering, as demonstrated by the high quality of our products. In 2018, we expanded our operations by establishing a US subsidiary to better serve the American market. Our mission is to nourish thousands of US families with wholesome, affordable foods

name: Kates Real Food
description: At Kate's Real Food, we're here to fuel your adventures with real, organic snacks made for active lifestyles. Born in the Rocky Mountains, our bars are crafted with simple, wholesome ingredients—organic oats, honey, and nut butters—that give you the energy to tackle whatever comes your way. Whether you're hitting the trail, climbing a mountain, or just powering through a busy day, our bars are designed to keep you going strong.We care about more than just flavor. Every bar reflects our commitment to sustainability and healthy living. We use only organic, responsibly sourced ingredients because we believe what's good for you should also be good for the planet. By choosing Kate's Real Food, you're not just grabbing a snack—you're choosing real food made with purpose.Whether you're conquering a summit or a work deadline, Kate's Real Food is there to power you through. Every bite is packed with the nutrients you need and the flavor you crave, so you can keep moving, exploring, and living life to the fullest.

name: Katie's Pizza and Pasta
description: Katie's Pizza and Pasta a family owned and operated restaurant group in STL with 4 locations. During Covid shut downs in 2020 we pivoted to selling frozen pizzas to keep our 150 employees working. We never laid anyone off during that time. After Covid we reopened our restaurants and built a manufacturing facility to continue the business. It has been a huge success. We are now in 3000+ grocery stores across the USA in just a year with incredible feedback and sales. Experience the perfect blend of innovation, inspiration, and integrity at Katie's Pizza and Pasta - a place where tradition meets creativity for an unforgettable dining experience.

name: KC Sunshine's Cookies
description: I've always been somewhat of a nerd when it comes to research.  This passion for knowledge has led me down some interesting paths.  In 2008, I was diagnosed with a genetic heart condition called Hypertrophic Obstructive Cardiomyopathy.  My research led me to have open heart surgery at the Cleveland Clinic with their world-renowned surgeon.  After a short recovery, I pursued and completed my doctorate in Curriculum and Instruction.  I then developed and implemented a social and emotional learning program for schools. But, suddenly the Pandemic shuttered schools in 2020, and I found I had more time at home to pursue my love of baking.  I have always had a passion for making desserts. The sweet tooth gene seems to have been passed down, as my mother and grandmother were bakers of all things sweet.  I even recall pulling my little red wagon down the sidewalk as a little girl, peddling mangoes from a neighbor's tree so that I could raise enough cash to buy candy for my friends and me.  Even though my heart surgery was successful, I discovered that a whole-food, plant-based diet alleviated many of my symptoms from this incurable disease. I had been dairy-free for several years. However, I was still using eggs in my baked goods--until my soon-to-be five-year-old granddaughter requested that I make her birthday cake without eggs so that her little sister and mom could enjoy her cake.  This was the defining moment of my baking career:  Only Vegan bakes from now on!  Using my lifelong research experience, passion for baking, and curated Vegan, gluten-free, ethical, and all-natural ingredients, I have created products everyone can indulge in and satisfy sweet tooth cravings without compromising the rich, delicious flavors. We officially launched KC Sunshine's Cookies in late 2023, after several years of developing formulas for our allergen-friendly, "clean," and gourmet cookie line.

name: Kcosera Inc
description: ust as we aim to improve the daily lives ofour consumers and proudly receive their support, we want to strive toreciprocate that encouragement by sharing and giving back to those in need ofsome relief and assistance. Throughout the year (although periods and projectsmay vary), we intend to commit time and effort to continuously research andeducate ourselves to better help others through giving back. By empowering andreinforcing goodness as a society, we all can better manifest our desiredreality for a better tomorrow.

name: Kea Wellness
description: Kea Wellness was created to make wellbeing simple, enjoyable, and real.We saw a gap in the wellness market. Functional products often felt clinical or inconvenient, while indulgent products lacked meaningful nutrition. Collagen powders didn't fit naturally into daily routines, and coffee creamers were filled with seed oils, fillers, and artificial ingredients. Wellness had become unnecessarily complicated.Kea Wellness was born from a simple belief: wellbeing should be built into the rituals you already love. We created the first liquid collagen creamer and latte, designed to blend seamlessly into your morning coffee while delivering real functional benefits—without sacrificing taste or quality.Our formulas start with real California milk, paired with collagen and minimal, high-quality ingredients you can recognize and trust. Every product is thoughtfully crafted to support everyday wellbeing while elevating a familiar ritual into something intentional and nourishing.Kea Wellness is for the modern wellness seeker—those who value simplicity, transparency, and quality in everything they consume.Real ingredients. Elevated rituals.

name: Kefir Lab
description: We have learned that the key to good health starts from the gut, and Probiotics are essential for our health and well-being. So we were challenged to create Real Probiotics in its most bioavailable form, instead of taking synthetic pills. The result is everything we believe probiotics should be – delicious and functional, with the highest strain diversity and maximum benefits for our biome.

name: KEFIRKULT
description: In 2014, co-founder Hudson was plagued by gut health issues…AND current options weren’t effective for him. After trying everything, his mother sent him kefir cultures to tinker with...using his pharmaceutical background he worked for 4 years to create real food that was fun to eat, powerful & effective at healing his gut. That special formula became KEFIRKULT - concentrated, spoonable high-CFU kefir made with just 2 ingredients and 0 sugar...tangy, fizzy, and alive!KEFIRKULT launched in Canada in 2019, and after catching on and expanding across the country, launched in the USA in 2024.  The mission of KEFIRKULT is to make gut health accessible to everyone by creating real tasty food, high in probiotics, low in sugar and minimally processed.

name: KeHE
description: KeHE is a full-service distributor of natural, organic, and specialty and multicultural products to natural food stores and retailers nationwide.At KeHE Distributors, we’re all about goodness. Our mission to Serve and feed America is fueled by an obsession with natural & organic, specialty, and fresh products. These delight consumers and deliver stellar growth for our customers and suppliers. At KeHE, we’re not content with just plain good; we aspire to next-level goodness, in all aspects of our operations, because where KeHE goes, goodness follows.  With more than 8,000 employee-owners and a 19-distribution center network across North America, KeHE is one of the largest and most respected pure-play grocery and natural distributors in the nation.  We back that up with our large distribution network and advanced performance metrics that assure goodness follows to each supplier and retail partner.  We’re passionate about innovation. By combining consumer insights, market data, and a curated item assortment with product knowledge and merchandising expertise, we deliver actionable data-backed solutions to keep our partners relevant, fresh and ahead of the pack.

name: Keicha Matcha
description: Keicha Grows Your Matcha Work with Japan’s leading Manufacturer of superior quality matcha for your products. Keicha Tea World has one of the largest Matcha production capacities in Japan with partner factories in both Kagoshima, the largest organic Matcha farming region, and Kyoto, where world-renowned premium matcha is produced. With a history spanning over 80 years, Keicha Tea World has strong relationships with farmers throughout Japan and state of the art manufacturing technology.  Keicha’s organic and non-organic matcha is a flavorful, versatile, and nutritious option for beverages, supplements, and food.  Matcha’s potential health benefits include EGCG catechins (antioxidants), stress-reducing L-theanine, caffeine without the jitters, and detoxing chlorophyll. Offering bulk distribution and extensive private label services. Packaging options include but are not limited to retail tins, bags and single-serve packets.  We ship from our Los Angeles warehouse.  Contact Keicha Tea World for info and samples.  Organic, Non-GMO, Kosher, FSSC 22000 certified.

name: Kelsi's
description: Kelsi's began in a raw food kitchen, where our co-founder Kelsi Petersen taught raw food classes with her mom throughout high school. Without fail, her students were always blown away by one recipe in particular - Brownie Batter Bites. For years, they bought them from Kelsi whenever she was willing to make them.Our rich, fudgy chocolate bites are made entirely from whole food ingredients. No gluten, dairy, or junk—a treat that truly makes you feel good and tastes amazing.After seeing how much these bites meant to people—how they helped folks stay on track, curb cravings, and enjoy something indulgent without any compromises —Kelsi knew it was time to share them with a wider audience. Kelsi launched our brand in 2019 just as her mom, her biggest cheerleader, was diagnosed with ALS. We now donate 5% of profits to ALS research and support in her honor.

name: Kenny's Candy & Confections
description: With over 35 years of experience in the private-label & co-manufacturing, we live and breathe excellence in all aspects of production. Our dedicated regulatory & quality teams monitor each production run and work closely with certifying bodies to ensure your product is shelf ready.

name: Kerry, Inc.
description: From a small dairy company in the southwest of Ireland to a global organisation, the journey of Kerry is a story of a belief in innovation and a commitment to excellence.We have over 50 years of experience in taste, nutrition, and food science. Our portfolio spans food, beverage, biotechnology, pharma and proactive health. Throughout our journey, we’ve stayed close to our from food heritage, while drawing on expertise and inspiration from all over the world.

name: Kessho LLC
description: KESSHŌ Craft Chocolate is an Austin-based bean-to-bar maker founded by Liang Wang and Mark Huetsch to fuse single-origin cacao with evocative Asian flavors. Our Japanese name, meaning "crystal," salutes both chocolate's shimmering micro-structure and the rewards of painstaking craft. Every stage—from selecting organically farmed beans through transparent partners such as Kokoa Kamili and Uncommon Cacao to roasting, conching, and molding in our Texas workshop—is guided by care, sustainability, and respect for growers.Liang, a Beijing native trained in Tokyo patisseries, and Mark, a Midwesterner who studied computer science and Chinese language at Stanford, first teamed up in 2009 to open Pantry's Best bakery in Beijing. Ten years of re-imagining Western desserts with matcha, yuzu, oolong, and black sesame ignited their obsession with fine chocolate. In 2018 they began crafting bars from scratch, swiftly earning International Chocolate Awards and Academy of Chocolate medals for bars, bonbons, and silky nama truffles.After the pandemic the duo relocated to Austin, drawn by its experimental food scene and supportive maker community. From this home they host tasting classes, partner with coffee roasters and breweries, and publish the cost breakdown of every bar, believing informed indulgence tastes better. Their mission now stretches beyond chocolate: they also churn artisan gelato that reimagines Western classics through the same Asian prism, relying on grass-fed dairy from central Texas ranches. Flavors such as boba tea, black sesame butter cup, ceremonial matcha, and lychee-rose echo the profiles of their award-winning bars.Today KESSHŌ channels its experience into limited-batch treats that tell stories. Each bar pairs a single-origin cacao—Tanzanian, Guatemalan, or beyond—with an Asian accent like Japanese yuzu or Sichuan pepper, while every gelato scoop honors the terroir of both bean and pasture. Hand-painted packaging blends watercolor washes with brush strokes inspired by classical Chinese *shanshui*, inviting you to travel through landscapes of taste. We believe craft sweets are bridges: uplifting farmers through transparent premiums, honoring Asian culinary heritage, and sharing joy bite by bite or spoonful by spoonful.

name: Ketone Labs
description: Discover the Clean Energy of KetonesIn 2013 we were introduced to the concept of being able to exogenously harness the energy of Beta Hydroxybutyrate (BHB), the most powerful energy molecule the body produces when it enters a catabolic state of ketosis through glucose deprivation.After studying BHB we concluded that exogenous BHB could be produced to be externally ingested in an anabolic fed state, despite normal glucose levels, and utilized by the body for numerous benefits.  We now believed exogenous BHB could play a major, long-term role in human nutrition in aiding certain morbidities to an ever-growing sicker human population. Throughout the past decade, a topic that's been impossible to avoid in the world of nutrition is the keto diet. As its popularity has surged, its use has successfully rescued many dieters from metabolic distress and dysfunction.

name: Ketone-IQ
description: Vetted by olympians, doctors, and nutrition experts alike, Ketone-IQ is a fast-acting, long-lasting boost of natural energy - "an immediate lift in calm, cognitive energy. It's like the energy of coffee with the calmness of meditation. There's nothing like it."Made of marathoners, Stanford grads, seasoned CPG leaders, and PhDs in metabolism, our team is deeply active and rooted in the community of endurance sports and health and wellness. We're committed to making elite energy for your everyday. No matter your journey, Ketone-IQ gets you off the starting line and across the finish.

name: Kevala
description: Our passion is to offer genuine pure ingredients, we sometimes need to go in search of them in other countries, as they are not always available at home in the US. For example, our Organic Raw Honey is harvested in the tropical forest of Oaxaca, where we make sure that the bee habitat is respected and protected. Our Organic Olive Oil is truly Mediterranean, picked and cold pressed following ancient Tunisian traditions.Wherever the source may be, more than 90% of our products are bottled in the US always complying with both the FDA and USDA's high quality standards. We hope you enjoy Kevala's line of products as much as we enjoy bringing them to you.

name: Kevin's Natural Foods
description: Kevin's Natural Foods is a line of healthy entrées, sauces and sides on a mission to make clean eating not only taste delicious, but also seamlessly fit into any lifestyle. Co-founded by Kevin McCray, who battled a severe auto-immune disorder for years and found that nothing helped consistently until he discovered a paleo-friendly diet— Kevin's Natural Foods was born from his desire to help others eat healthier. Kevin's flavorful, sous-vide entrées and signature Paleo, Keto and Gluten-Free certified sauces allow home chefs to prepare delicious meals in five minutes. With strict nutritious standards, entrees and sauces contain zero refined sugar, artificial ingredients, grains, soy, antibiotics or hormones. Kevin's products are available on the shelves of coveted grocery retailers nationwide. A true market disruptor, Kevin's Natural Foods is the first clean refrigerated entrée brand and challenges the notion that proper nutrition can't be as delicious as it is healthy.

name: KEWPIE
description: Kewpie was born in Japan in 1919, when founder Toichiro Nakashima set out to create a nutritious, delicious mayonnaise inspired by what he had tasted in the United States. As a visionary in the food industry, Nakashima believed that good food could improve people's lives—and he aimed to craft a mayo that would be richer, smoother, and more flavorful than anything else on the market.Using only egg yolks (instead of whole eggs) and a signature blend of vinegars, Kewpie introduced Japan's first mayonnaise in 1925. Its bold umami flavor and creamy texture quickly won over home cooks and chefs alike. Over the years, Kewpie became more than just a condiment—it became a beloved staple in Japanese kitchens, known for quality, care, and a little joy in every squeeze.Today, over 100 years later, Kewpie continues to spread that same passion for flavor around the world.

name: Keychain
description: Keychain is the world's largest platform for CPG manufacturing, connecting retailers and brands with vetted manufacturing partners.

name: Kh Roberts
description: At KH Roberts, we craft future flavours that bring delight and imagination to the world. As one of Asia's leading creators of aromas and tastes, we push the boundaries of science and imagination, always discovering, always innovating to deliver tastes of the future.Underlining more than half a century of flavour creation experience is KH Roberts' world-class research, innovation, and manufacturing expertise. We bring to our customers crafted aromas and tastes that are novel, authentic, and delightful.We simply make it taste better.Founded and born in Asia in 1968, KH Roberts brings flavour imaginations and experiences to millions of consumers around the world. For more than 50 years, we breathe Asia, we live the world. We partner the best the world has to offer and serve our diverse customers, from private labels to global consumer brands, reaching into segments like Foods & Beverages, Health and Nutrition and Pharmaceuticals.

name: Khloud
description: Khloud is building an approachable platform of delicious, protein-packed, family-friendly snacks with real ingredients consumers can trust (and pronounce!).

name: Khong Guan Corporation
description: Headquartered near San Francisco, California, Khong Guan Corp. and its subsidiary, King Wai Trading, have proudly served wholesale and retail customers for over two decades.  Our mission is to provide a diverse selection of high-quality Asian products.  We source items throughout Asia, meticulously searching for products we believe our customers will appreciate.  We handle the sourcing so you don't have to, and we even offer convenient delivery.

name: KIDFRESH
description: KIDFRESH, THE BRAND OF KIDS’ FAVORITE FOODS WITH HIDDEN VEGGIES IN EVERY BITE, has been heating up the frozen aisle. With continuous revenue growth, Kidfresh is delighting families nationwide with its better-for-you products like Chicken Meatballs, Wagon Wheels Mac & Cheese, and new Easy Combo Meals that kids love to eat and parents love to serve.

name: KidStar Nutrients
description: After one of my children at the age of 2 was diagnosed with a serious case of iron deficiency, I wanted to find a supplement that was effective, easy to take, and without side effects. But I quickly realized there is a lack of quality kids supplements on the market. Supplements that are marketed as "healthy" are full of sugar, sucralose, soy, fillers, titanium dioxide, and harmful artificial ingredients. I saw that there really was a need for clean, healthy, sugar-free supplements.With over a decade of experience in the natural health industry, managing supply chains, sourcing ingredients, and developing natural health products, I knew that supplements can be formulated and manufactured free of unnecessary fillers, sweeteners, and preservatives. By founding KidStar Nutrients, I wanted to create nutrients so delicious kids would ask for them, and so healthy that parents would feel great giving them to their kids.At KidStar, we have formulated a range of clean nutrients for children and families—in particular, the BioFe products, our flagship product line. Iron deficiency is the number one nutrient deficiency in Canada and worldwide—and BioFe is designed to address this deficiency. BioFe is available in unflavoured drops, tasty chewables, and liquid, so that anyone in the family can take their iron easily.We launched our products to market with health food stores and our e-commerce website mere days before the province was placed into lockdown in March 2020, in response to the pandemic. We believed so strongly in our product line and what we had to offer the marketplace in terms of clean, effective nutritional supplements for kids and families, that we were determined to be successful. Four years on, we continue to deliver on our mission to deliver the cleanest nutrients without harmful additives.

name: KIIMA
description: The story of KIIMA begins long before its creation, in the minds of its founders, Samuel and Jenny. For several years, they grappled with a fundamental question: what is our personal contribution in the face of the climate emergency? This reflection prompted them to seek a concrete solution, accessible to all those who, like them, desire to play an active daily role for  the planet. Their quest for an answer led them to the birth of KIIMA, an idea turned into reality. It embodies individual and collective commitment to the fight against climate change with refillable skincare, offering everyone the opportunity to make a real difference in the world around us. KIIMA is the story of the transformation of this vision into action, from a deep desire for change to a project that unites and inspires.

name: KIKKOMAN SALES USA, INC.
description: Established 1635, oldest documented brand in the world.  Kikkoman is run by the 19th generation of descendants of the founding families. Kikkoman Soy Sauce is made using a centuries old brewing process.

name: Kilcoy Nutrition
description: Kilcoy Nutrition is a range of beef liver spray-dried powders for use in human and pet nutritional products. Kilcoy Nutrition is the result of a specialised spray drying technology that processes our premium beef organs into a ​super-fine powder, versatile in various applications and product formulations. Beef organs are the most nutrient-dense component of the animal, and when converted to the spray-dried form, can be beneficial for use in human and pet nutrition.​

name: Kimino Drinks Inc.
description: We harvest throughout Japan's countryside using traditional methods that conserve and support the natural environment. These farms belong to the next generation to care for and share from. We are grateful to support small family-owned farms and protect natural farming while aspiring to apply these techniques to our farms.

name: Kimnori USA, Inc.
description: Kimnori Seaweed is more than just a brand; it's a healthy lifestyle choice for individuals and families around the world. Whether you're looking for a nutritious snack on the go, a flavorful addition to your meals, or a way to put seaweed into your diet, Kimnori offers a delicious, high-quality solution that supports both your health and the environment.

name: KIND Snacks
description: Founded in 2004, we've had a vision for a kinder and healthier world. A world in which people never have to choose between tastes good, feels good, and does good when it comes to their snacking.

name: Kindling Provisions
description: Founded in 2024, we wanted to create snacks that get your fire started! We were tired of nutrient deficient snacks that lacked sustenance to keep us adventuring. One day, our Founder, Cameron Smith, was asked by his daughter to put pretzels in her lunch for school. He felt bad because he knew that pretzels were essentially just white flour and artificial flavors. He decided he wanted to put more nutrient dense ingredients into snacks and pretzels were the perfect place to start. After co-founding and selling Kodiak Cakes to Private Equity, Cameron didn't take long to get the itch to get back into creator/founder mode in order to add Protein and Whole Grains into another part of the store that desperately needs healthier options. Soon after getting a minimum viable product, he reached out to his Head of Marketing from Kodiak Cakes to see if he was interested in joining him to create a brand, perfect the product, and recruit a killer team of ambassadors and retailers to help us launch the product in market. The name Kindling comes from our hope to be the Kindling to your personal fire. Every great adventure is fueled by  the right nutrients and we hope our snacks help you play more, adventure longer, and Feed Your Flame! Why the fox? Well, that is a funny story actually. Swing by our booth so we can tell you more!

name: King Arthur Baking Company
description: King Arthur Baking Company has been sharing the joy of baking since 1790. A certified B Corp and 100% employee-owned, King Arthur Baking is the ultimate baking resource, providing the highest quality ingredients for the most delicious baked goods while inspiring connections and community through baking. King Arthur's superior flours and mixes are available in supermarkets nationwide. Visit KingArthurBaking.com for more specialty baking items, mixes, gluten-free products, recipes, and more. Follow King Arthur Baking Company on Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube.

name: King Cheese
description: I am Vic Aghchikian, the CEO of King Cheese, and I am thrilled to share my journey in the cheese industry while embracing my new adventure in the City of Upland. For the past 25 years, I have dedicated my professional life to the art and science of cheese-making, a passion that has not only shaped my career but also allowed me to connect with people who appreciate the rich flavors and traditions surrounding this beloved dairy product.As the CEO of King Cheese, I have had the honor of leading a talented team of individuals who share my passion for quality and innovation. Together, we have built a brand that not only stands for exceptional cheese, but sustainable practices, and community engagement. I believe that cheese-making goes beyond just creating a product; it is about fostering relationships with local farmers, suppliers, and customers. This commitment to collaboration has allowed us to build a reputation for excellence that I am incredibly proud of.

name: KING KUNG HEALTH FOOD CO.,LTD.
description: King Kung Health Food Co., Ltd. established in April of 2000, began with vegetable drink. Gradually, we expanded our scale to offer OEM and ODM service to domestic and international factories, and subsequently created Taiwan instant powdered beverages and tea bags, including Lotus Root Almond Drink, Burdock Drink, Ginger Drink, Longan Drink, Jujube Drink, Vegetable Drink, Smoked Plum Drink, Five Green Juice, Agar Fungus Drink, various tea drinks and Nutritional Diet and so on.

name: King's Cupboard
description: It all began in 1990 with the founder's grandmother's fudge sauce recipe. Using fresh, clean ingredients, the company founders enhanced the original recipe and began producing Bittersweet Chocolate Sauce in their home kitchen. Living in a small town in the mountains of Montana, they were inspired to make products that were fresh, clean and pure - free from preservatives, thickeners, emulsifiers, and artificial colors and flavors. They took samples to a food show and came home with orders, necessitating a move to a local commercial kitchen. After successfully launching a clean-label cream caramel sauce, they built a larger facility where they could produce at a scale that enabled them to keep up with orders. As sales grew, they expanded their facility once again.

name: KINJIRUSHI Co., Ltd.
description: Kinjirushi Brand StoryKinjirushi's journey began in 1929 in Nagoya, Japan, with a simple yet ambitious vision: to bring the authentic taste and health benefits of wasabi to the world. At a time when wasabi was considered a rare and delicate ingredient, our founder pioneered innovative processing techniques that made wasabi more accessible while preserving its natural aroma and flavor. This marked the birth of a brand committed to quality and authenticity.In 1952, Kinjirushi Wasabi Co., Ltd. was officially established, expanding from traditional Japanese markets to global foodservice and retail. Over the decades, we have grown into a trusted name in the food industry, supplying premium wasabi products to more than 60 countries. Our portfolio evolved beyond wasabi to include ginger, yuzu, and other Japanese flavors, reflecting our dedication to enriching culinary experiences worldwide.What makes our story unique is our relentless pursuit of innovation. From developing advanced freezing technology to maintain freshness, to researching wasabi's functional properties for health and wellness, we have consistently pushed boundaries. Today, Kinjirushi stands as a symbol of Japanese heritage and craftsmanship, blending tradition with modern technology.Our mission remains unchanged: to share the true essence of wasabi and Japanese flavors with the world, while promoting health, sustainability, and cultural appreciation. Every product we create carries the spirit of our origin—authenticity, quality, and a passion for excellence.

name: KinOmega BioPharm, Inc.
description: KinOmega is the cGMP certified leading global manufacturer of highly concentrated and ultra-pure Omega-3 EPA/DHA with Drug Master File (DMF No. 26570) and the FIRST China Omega-3 producer to hold the COS/CEP (R0-CEP-2014-064-Rev00) for real pharmaceutical grade purity, has strong R&D and technique background in Omega-3 with the support of our latest generation of SPD and unique Multi-Step Molecular Distillation Purification technology and patented Enzymatic Process , we are very strong and competitive on the highly concentrated EE, TG, TGN and FFA, which are IFOS 5 Star Certified for high purity level and low oxidation level.

name: Kipster
description: Kipster produces delicious Certified Humane and low carbon eggs at our revolutionary farm in Indiana.Our eggs are round. Our chickens reduce food waste by turning surpluses of agriculture and food processing into nutritious eggs. That way, we can spare land and natural resources. Circular farming, from feed to fertilizer. We built the solar-powered farms around the natural instincts and needs of our hens. The hen houses are equipped with daylight-filled, enriched indoor and outdoor gardens. No male chicks are killed and no beaks are trimmed. To see how we care for the chickens, watch the 24/7 livestream on our website or tour the farm's visitor center. People want to know where their food comes from, and we embrace that.

name: KIRICI KURU MEYVA VE GIDA TEKS.TUR.SAN VE TIC.A.S
description: Since 2009, we have been manufacturing and exporting foods such as Organic Dried Figs, Dried Apricots and Hazelnuts to 4 different continents of the world.

name: KIRIKA Corporation
description: Established in May 2016, our mission is to introduce, distribute and share with the U.S. the most exciting, inspiring, tastiest and best Japanese products.  I am excited to be sharing my home country's, Japan, finest produce. I am passionate about food and wish to build a bridge between the U.S. and Japan, one product at a time.

name: Kirk’s Family of Natural Brands
description: Kirk's Family of Natural Brands is one of America's oldest, continuously operated soap makers and we proudly carry on our family's soap-making traditions. Our family of brands has grown over the past 25 years and brings Kirk's, The Grandpa Soap Company, and SoF Body Care all under one roof with a growing portfolio of over 80+ innovative body care products.

name: Kitchen & Love
description: We wanted food to be not only good for you, but readily available to all regardless of their families income. We normalized everyday gourmet into everyday groceries. We have been in the food industry almost 40 years and focus on ways to improve everyday wants and needs with better for you ingredients.

name: Kittylamb
description: Kittylamb was founded in 2022 by Kat who was told to be medicated for life after suffering from a chronic illness. She naively believed a "brownie" was a brownie or a piece of "bread" was just bread. After doing her own ingredient exploration, she realized she wasn't sick; she'd been fooled into feeding her body chemicals. In a way, her body was rejecting these foods and she just didn't understand how to listen to it. With a new outlook on food, Kat knew she wanted to take a stance against the scary big food industry. While Kat grew up scratch baking with her Grandmas, she also spent many years baking the nostalgic box mixes. In recent years, Kat had switched to making everything entirely from scratch. But as many people can relate, life can't always wait for the time of scratch-made. One night a few summers ago, Kat's Dad requested brownies at 10:00pm with an impromptu of guests around. Picture the last 45 seconds of any chopped episode. Scrambling to grab a kitchen scale, the chocolate bars to melt, the sugars, the chocolate chips, etc. In the midst of all of this she thought there has to be a way to proportion all of this out. Like all of it. So she began testing and Kittylamb was born about a year later. A nickname her Dad used to call her when she was little.Kittylamb is revolutionizing the baking mix industry. Knocking boring baking mixes out of the way. It's exciting to see a change in such a stale category. Especially, a change that's bringing nostalgia back but with clean ingredients.

name: KKOKDAM Inc.
description: KKOKDAM was founded in 2016 in Korea with one simple question: "What if a cup of tea could feel like receiving flowers?" Our founder began working directly with local growers to carefully select edible blossoms such as chrysanthemum, Siberian chrysanthemum, mugwort flowers and bridal wreath. Each flower is gently dried to preserve its natural color, aroma, and shape, then hand-crafted into premium whole-blossom teas and beautifully designed gift sets.In Korea, giving flowers and sharing tea are both intimate ways of expressing care. KKOKDAM brings these two traditions together. When our teas bloom in hot water, the flower opens slowly in the glass like a small bouquet, turning an ordinary moment into a quiet, memorable ritual. Many of our blends are naturally caffeine-free, making them suitable for evening relaxation and for customers who seek a gentle, mindful alternative to coffee.As we expand globally, we stay committed to small-batch production, thoughtful sourcing, and design that respects both the farmer and the final recipient. Every detail—from the way each blossom is handled to the way our boxes open like a gift—is meant to deliver calm, beauty, and a sense of being genuinely cared for. At Natural Products Expo West 2026, we are honored to introduce KKOKDAM's Korean flower teas to buyers and partners who share our love of meaningful, aesthetically inspiring beverages.

name: Klar Labs
description: Klar started as a personal solution to a common problem. I was juggling countless supplements to stay focused and energized while battling artificial sweeteners, processed ingredients, and the lack of true functionality in most energy drinks. I wanted something simpler, healthier, and more effective—without compromising taste.I was stuck in a cycle of drinking too much coffee, dealing with crashes, jitters, and even unsafe heart rates. To break free, I began experimenting with combining caffeine and cognitive-enhancing nootropics to maximize benefits while reducing caffeine intake and avoiding the dreaded crash. I also realized how critical hydration is to both energy and focus. Dehydration often contributed to my midday slumps, so I made sure Klar included electrolytes to support sustained energy and recovery.Klar is the result of my mission to streamline wellness, combining caffeine, nootropics, and hydration into one delicious drink mix. It's designed to help people feel their best, stay productive, and live a healthier, more balanced lifestyle. Klar isn't just a drink—it's a smarter way to fuel your energy and focus.

name: Klean Freak
description: Being a world traveler and adventurer, baby wipes were just not cutting it on keeping me feeling refreshed and clean while on the go.  It left a sticky film, smelled like a baby wipe (not a good thing in many peoples book) and the packaging made the wipes typically dry out. Klean Freak wipes are made out of wood pulp and plant fibers making them 100% biodegradable. High quality/natural ingredients leave a smooth, clean, moisturized finish on your skin.  Add in some essential oils to give an amazing smell and you have the perfect little refresher in a pouch for on the go.  Sealed so it gives it a 3 year guarantee no drying out.  We think thats pretty cool.  Our product is sold in thousands of stores all over the US and 15 other countries and that is just the start for us.

name: Knotty Pretzels
description: Knotty Pretzels is proudly rooted in Atlanta, Georgia and owned by two childhood best friends, Sean & Casey. Our small-batch pretzels are crafted from a cherished McSweeney family recipe developed by Sean's Grandmother – "Mom Mom". Our small Batch process brings All – Natural seasonings inside and outside the pretzel enhancing our delicious flavors. Inside every bag, you'll discover Sean and Casey's entrepreneurial passion for delivering the perfectly seasoned pretzel. So, seize a bag of Knotty Pretzels for any occasion be it a party, sporting event, or casual snacking session. Cheers!!

name: Koala Eco
description: Brought together by a love of nature and a shared passion for the environment, co-founders Jessica and Paul's story spans the densely urban surroundings of New York City, the untamed landscape of rural Western Australia and a leafy beachside suburb in Sydney, Australia, where they now live with their two sons, Emerson and Arthur.A health scare during their younger son's infancy spurred the couple to reassess the products they were using at home. Unable to find brands that were truly natural and safe, yet powerful, and convinced there were many people like them looking to make more natural product choices, Paul and Jessica decided to create their own. They designed a range of cleaning and care products to deliver the performance of conventional brands using plant-based ingredients while offering an unmatched sensorial experience. Koala Eco was born. Koala Eco harnesses the wild power of nature and merges it with science, marrying powerful Australian botanicals and plant-derived ingredients with research-backed evidence. Developed in collaboration with specialist chemists, each formula works as well or better than the chemical alternative and each product is unexpectedly beautiful to use.Jessica and Paul are on a mission to bring truly natural products into the mainstream.Koala Eco lives its purpose through every detail of its design. This includes aspects you would expect from a sustainable brand, such as 100% recycled and recyclable packaging and sustainable ingredient sourcing. Beyond this, Jessica and Paul believe that today's brands and businesses have a responsibility to go further than merely 'do no harm'. Through Koala Eco, they actively seek to 'do good', balancingprofit with purpose. Since the launch of the brand, Koala Eco has supported "1% for the Planet", the WWF and local organisations that strive to protect Koalas and their natural habitat. Looking ahead, work is underway to develop and support programmes that help people restore a connection with nature in their lives, driven by a growing body of data in ecopsychology. This is the real work of the brand and the reason that Jessica & Paul are so driven to share the Koala Eco message.

name: KOCHI ICE CO., LTD.
description: Founded in 1988 in Kochi Prefecture, Japan, Kochi Ice has been dedicated to creating authentic, high-quality ice cream, sherbet, and yuzu-based products that capture the natural blessings of our land. Using carefully selected local ingredients—especially fragrant yuzu and seasonal fruits—we combine traditional Japanese craftsmanship with modern techniques to deliver refreshing flavors and uncompromising quality.Today, Kochi Ice proudly exports to 27 countries, with a lineup of more than 30 flavors of ice creams and sherbets, as well as premium yuzu and pomelo beverages. From luxury hotels and restaurants to family tables around the world, our mission remains the same: to share the authentic taste of Japan and bring joy with every scoop and sip.

name: Koia
description: We specialize in plant protein, but not that chalky stuff. Our shakes are sweet without all the sugar, creamy without the dairy, and serves up a variety of nutrients without sacrificing deliciousness.So forget everything you think you know about plant protein and get ready to shake, sip, and savor the true (and tasty) power of plants.

name: Koko & Karma
description: I created the concept of the range back in 2018. I saw the explosion in popularity of coconut water and knew it would make the ideal base to carry functional ingredients into the body in a ready-to-drink range. After a whirlwind launch into the Chinese, Australian, and NZ markets within a year of launching, I was ready to take on the United States, knowing I had a proven product range that remained ethically sourced and carefully created. This is where Koko & Karma was born.

name: Kolsvart AB
description: Started 2012 when we wanted to open the best café in our hometown of Malmö, Sweden. Our guests loved the coffee but the dream quickly became a financial nightmare. We were wandering in the dark and ironically, "kolsvart" means pitch black in Swedish.But out of the darkness a new dream was born. We took our passion for pure and natural flavors and created Kolsvart the confectionary company. It started with traditional Swedish licorice but quickly became so much more.

name: Kombucha Culture US LLC
description: Kombucha Culture was born in Costa Rica, where "Pura Vida" is more than a phrase... it's a way of life. Our brews are crafted from the region's finest organic fruits, roots, and plants, honoring local farmers while preserving traditional practices. With sleek black cans that stand out on shelves, we blend pure, vibrant flavors into kombucha that celebrates both health and joy. More than just a beverage, Kombucha Culture is an invitation to live boldly, savor the moment, and share in a community that values authenticity, adventure, and wellbeing. From our origins in Costa Rica to communities worldwide, we're here to refresh your outlook one sip at a time.

name: Koops
description: THE MUSTARD AMERICA RELISHES.SPREADING THE LOVE FOR OVER 125 YEARSKoops' isn't your ordinary mustard. It's extraordinary mustard. With 14 bold flavors that can satisfy any appetite, it makes good food great and great food amazing.THE FINEST INGREDIENTSThere's no complicated additives on the back of our bottles. No hard to pronounce chemicals or scary sounding preservatives. Just quality ingredients like mustard seed, vinegar and water.SIMPLE PROCESSINGPeter Koops started his mustard business over 125 years ago with a hand crank mustard mill and incredible recipes. And while we've updated the manufacturing process with the times, we've stayed true to the bold flavor and simplicity of his original recipes.ORGANIC PRODUCTSWe like to think our mustards make everything you spread them on a little better. Well, now your favorite mustard makes the planet a little better too. Sustainably farmed, these organic varieties have all the flavor and texture of the mustard you love.

name: Kooshy Croutons
description: Bread has always been the #1 food in our family. Growing up, our mom called croutons "salad training wheels." We were obsessed with them, but let's be real – the ones in store looked like they've been stuck on the shelf since 1985. So in 2020, we decided to change that and started making our own (way better, way cleaner) croutons. Say goodbye to that enriched white flour stuff! Then in 2024, we launched Panko Breadcrumbs because so many of our favorite recipes used them and the options on shelf were super stale (sorry, had to) with long, messy ingredient lines!

name: Kor Shots
description: After relocating from his native France to sunny Malibu, California, our founder Jordan Retamar saw an opportunity to provide the most potent, nutritious and vibrant shots to people everywhere that allowed them to mix and match their way to better health. What began as a simple line of ginger and turmeric shots has since evolved into an ever-growing collection of nutritional boosts featuring the best organic and functional ingredients.We take pride in creating and manufacturing our own juice blends, just like we've been doing since day one—never watering down or sweetening up our shots ever. And we take pride in responsibly sourcing all our ingredients, building relationships with our community of vendors and, above all else, providing our customers with the highest quality products and experiences so they can continue to shake, shoot and feel their way to everyday health, every day.

name: Korea Ginseng Corp.
description: Established in 1899, Korea Ginseng Corp. (KGC) is the world’s leading producer of premium Korean Red Ginseng. For over 120 years, we have combined a century of tradition with state-of-the-art science to provide the highest-quality wellness solutions. Our flagship brand, JungKwanJang is recognized globally as the gold standard for quality, safety, and efficacy in the herbal supplement industry.

name: KOYANAGI FARM
description: Our company, which was originally intended to be founded by the first Hirohei, was founded in 1954 as a rice shop by my niece's grandmother and grandfather.Cherishing the rice grown in the region, they continued to provide guidance on rice cultivation, supplying fertilizers and pesticides, and teaching cultivation methods. Times have changed, but by producing rice, they have taken on the role of passing on the region's rice-growing culture to the future.Commitment to quality: We pursue the balance of sweetness and texture that differs for each variety, and are constantly conducting research in pursuit of even better quality.Contribution to the local community and innovation: We aim to lead and contribute to local agriculture with our new management philosophy, and have been awarded the Chunichi Agriculture Award as young farmers in Nakano City, Nagano Prefecture.Passing on to the next generation: We want to utilize the blessings of Nagano Prefecture, which has the highest life expectancy in Japan, to contribute to people's health and welfare through safe and secure food.High quality standards: Our rice meets extremely high quality standards, having been selected as rice presented to the Imperial Household.Providing specially cultivated rice: We mainly produce "specially cultivated rice" in which the nitrogen content of pesticides and chemical fertilizers is reduced to 50% or less compared to conventional levels in Nagano Prefecture. This reduces the burden on the environment while providing consumers with a safe product.Innovative fertilizer: We use high-quality domestic fertilizer and employ unique, painstaking cultivation methods, such as varying the amount, timing, and type for each rice field.Research and Improvement: We constantly research the best cultivation methods for each variety, striving to achieve a balance of sweetness and texture to achieve high-quality flavor.

name: Krack'd Snacks
description: Mini Snack bars for Major Cravings!<1g Sugar, High Fiber, Keto-Friendly, Plant-based, Gluten-FreeTop 12 selling Snack Bar at Erewhon. Moving over 20 units/SKU/Store/Week.Placement: Checkout Stand and/or Refrigerated Bars (shelf stable for 12 months but moves well in reefer set)Come find out what the hype is about!!

name: Krueger & Salecker
description: We build machines that get products in good shape. Since 1948.We are an industry-independent molding specialist and one of the leading manufacturers in this field.Our machines can process paste-like, pourable and gel-like mixtures.Krüger&Salecker technology is used worldwide to get food products, chemical and pharmaceutical goods in perfect shape. Our technologies meet the most exacting demands.

name: Kuli Kuli Foods
description: A Peace Corps volunteer had a dream to use nourishing superfoods to create a sustainable business with women in West Africa.Kuli Kuli was started by Lisa Curtis, a Peace Corp volunteer, who discovered the incredible nutrition powerhouse known as moringa, while serving in Niger. Before leaving Africa, Lisa promised the villagers that she would do her best to continue to support them half a world away. Once home in the US, Lisa set out to introduce Americans to the power of moringa, which had been so critical to sustaining her while she was in Niger. She also wanted to give back to the people that had supported her abroad and made sourcing from small, women operated farms a pilar of Kuli Kuli's DNA. Fast forward to 2025... Kuli Kuli is proud to be a women led, B Corp that has purchased over $6.4 million worth of moringa from small farms in Africa and India, supported 3,797 livelihoods, offsets 300 million kg of carbon annually through tree planting, and diverted180,000 plastic water bottles annually through our recycled packaging. And, we're just getting started!

name: KULKAO
description: We're manufacturer chocolate products from Origin Peru, suppliers of ingredientes, chocolate and private label service.Our Cacao Facility it's certifier Organic, Kosher OU, Halal and it's allergen free, at located in same Peruvian Amazon in Huánuco Tingo Maria.Our products:1. Derivatives cacao. (powder, butter, nibs, liquor)2. Organic chocolate products 55% to 100%.3. Private Label Services

name: Kura Klub LLC
description: Kura Klub reimagines tea rituals for modern routines, combining ancestral herbal knowledge with high quality functional blends that support energy, metabolism, beauty, and rest throughout the day.We use whole leaf herbs in biodegradable premium tea bags, ensuring both quality and a more conscious experience. Our teas turn simple daily moments into rituals that restore balance and support body and mind while making wellness feel natural and enjoyable.

name: Kyowa Hakko USA
description: Kyowa Hakko is an international health ingredients manufacturer and has become a world leader in the development, manufacturing and marketing of pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals and food products.

name: L Cell Longevity Food Supplements
description: L Cell Longevity is a science-based company, established in cooperation with European epigenetics scientists from UCL and Vilnius University.We develop and sell longevity dietary supplements, focusing on NAD+ activation, senotherapy, autophagy modulation and antioxidants:NAD+ formulaSenolytic formulaGLP-1 formulaAnti-Aging 30 days setSingle pure ingredient supplements: NMN, Berberine, Resveratrol, Fisetin, Apigenin, Spermidine, Betaine, GlyNAC, CaAKG, Magnesium, Creatine, Collagen, Akkermansia and otherL Cell Longevity delivers only the purest ingredients:Formulated by Epigenetic Scientists From rare-to-find to most popular SKUsClean-label at science-backed dosagesWe are already one of the best selling longevity brands in Europe and are rapidly expanding worldwide.All our products are third-party tested and produced in GMP & ISO22000-certified European facilities.

name: La Cabaña Food Distributing, inc.
description: La Cabaña Food began in 1997 as a small family venture, cooking traditional salsas from our home kitchen with one simple goal — to share the rich, authentic flavors we grew up with. What started as a passion for homemade taste has grown into a trusted, full-scale food manufacturing company proudly serving both retail and foodservice partners across the West Coast.Family-owned and operated, we've built our success on the same values that started it all: quality, consistency, and integrity. Every salsa and sauce we produce reflects our commitment to authenticity — blending time-honored recipes with modern manufacturing standards to deliver freshness, flavor, and reliability at scale.

name: LA LUCKY IMPORT EXPORT INC.
description: LA Lucky was established in 1989 and is owned by George Nguyen and Kim Thi Le. With a background in the Asian food and beverage industry for three generations. George has a simple but clear goal: to ensure that retailers in America can access a full range of Asian food products. Over the years, George's strong leadership and focus on quality have helped LA Lucky grow into one of the largest and most trusted Asian food wholesalers and distributors in the industry.George believes that it's important to truly understand what customers need. He has made this main focus of LA Lucky's success. His commitment to providing the right products at the right time ,maintaining open communication, and always aiming for customer satisfaction has helped LA Lucky form long-lasting relationships with both suppliers and retailers.

name: La Monarca Bakery
description: We created La Monarca Bakery, inspired by the pan dulce and pastries we grew up enjoying in our hometown in Mexico.All our products are made with top quality fresh ingredients, without preservatives, artificial colors or flavors.We donate 1% of our proceeds to our non-profit partner, ECOLIFE Conservation, to support their programs to protect and preserve the monarch butterfly.We hope you enjoy the sweet flavors of Mexico!

name: LA NOGALERA USA, INC.
description: La Nogalera is a leading Pecan company specializing in the production, processing, and global distribution of premium pecans. Established in 1985, the company has over 35 years of expertise in the pecan industry, making it a key player in meeting the growing global demand for high-quality nuts. With facilities located in Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua, Guadalajara, Jalisco, and a warehouse in El Paso, Texas, La Nogalera operates at an international scale.Our company offers a wide range of pecan products, including halves, pieces, roasted, glazed, and organic options, catering to diverse customer needs. Our advanced processing technology and stringent quality control systems ensure that every product meets the highest food safety and quality standards. This commitment has enabled La Nogalera to export to more than 25 countries, establishing a strong presence in international markets.La Nogalera’s mission extends beyond just delivering pecans; we aim to maintain sustainable practices while fostering relationships with customers and partners worldwide. By leveraging innovation and maintaining a customer-centric approach, our company continues to grow as a trusted name in the pecan industry.

name: La Preferida
description: Our story began in 1920s when the Henry Steinbarth (a Bavarian butcher) immigrated to Chicago. Recognizing the  demand for authentic Mexican meat products within the Hispanic community, he saw an opportunity. Using his background in crafting high-quality European meats, he was able to transition into Mexican staples that honored tradition and authenticity. In 1949, he launched the La Preferida brand (meaning "The Preferred") with the first packaged chorizo in the United States. It quickly became a household favorite in the local community. Over the decades, La Preferida expanded to include more than 200 unique items, from traditional staples like refried beans and Spanish rice to new organic and low-sodium options, catering to a wide range of dietary preferences.Through the years, La Preferida's dedication to quality and consistency has made it a trusted brand in kitchens across the country. Now in its fourth generation, the family remains committed to its mission of El Corazón de tu Cocina—The Heart of Your Kitchen—keeping the core values of flavor, family, and authenticity at the forefront of their business. Every product is crafted to bring the tastes and heritage of Mexican cuisine to home cooks, making it easy for anyone to share and enjoy the rich, comforting flavors of Mexico.In addition to providing high-quality ingredients, La Preferida takes pride in its enduring relationships with both consumers and partners, reinforcing their role as a staple brand within the Hispanic community and beyond. As La Preferida celebrates its 75th anniversary, the company looks toward the future with a commitment to sustainability, innovation, and the same passion for authentic flavor that has defined the brand since day one. For La Preferida, it's more than just food; it's about honoring heritage and bringing people together around the table.

name: La Rossi
description: La Rossi Pizza is a Brooklyn-born frozen pizza brand rooted in Italian tradition. Founded by Martina, Stefano, and Bianca, the company combines farm-sourced ingredients, artisanal techniques, and authentic Italian expertise to craft exceptional pizza. Made with an organic, crispy multigrain crust and a short, clean label, La Rossi Pizza offers high-quality, versatile products that are ready in minutes and easy to enjoy at home—without compromise.

name: La Tourangelle
description: La Tourangelle is a French-American family owned & operated culinary oil maker. Started in 1867 in Bourgueil, France, we continue to produce oils using traditional practices in Saumur, France and Woodland, California.From sourcing the best quality ingredients to small-batch production, our products are rooted in artisan know-how. We believe in making products that are authentic, delicious, and sustainable. Through regenerative farming, artisan production methods and recyclable packaging, we want to empower people to cook like they care.

name: LAC Global (Singapore) Pte. Ltd.
description: Meet the founder of LAC - Ms. Cynthia Poa. Ms. Cynthia Poa was born into a family who wanted her to be a medical doctor.However, at the age of 19 while she was out volunteering in healthcare work, she wondered if there was a better way to help more people. As she believed in "prevention is better than cure," she began to think whether medical study was her ideal path. Instead of treating an illness, why not try to prevent it?With that, Ms. Cynthia resolutely gave up her plan to pursue medical study and turned to the field of nutrition and self-care. In few years following, she opened more than 20 stores in Singapore, with annual sales reaching millions of dollars, and helping thousands of people.With in-depth study of nutrition science, she discovered that oxidative stress was the root of many human diseases. With that realisation, she turned her focus to more in-depth research and exploration in the field of antioxidation, in pursuit of the most powerful antioxidant to most improve people's immune system and overall health and well-being. She later founded LAC - Leader in Antioxidative Control™, a homegrown Singapore brand that pioneers in the field of antioxidation in 1997.Over the past 30 years, Ms. Cynthia has continued her in-depth research and exploration in the field of antioxidation. Her mission – to help people improve their health so they can always function at their best and lead a quality life.

name: Lactalis (Brand: Oui)
description: Oui's brand story begins in 2017 and is a blend of French heritage and modern mindfulness. It centers on the idea of returning to a slower way of making and eating food, moving away from the mass-produced textures that dominate the American yogurt aisle. By leveraging design and experience, Oui was created as a rich creamy yogurt crafted for 16 hours using whole milk and real fruit and served in a glass pot. While the glass pot sets us apart from the competitive set, disrupts at shelf, and cues premium, we are more than just the glass pot. The Oui brand is positioned to curate an experience, elevate everyday moments and invites consumers to slow down and enjoy a moment for themselves.

name: Lady Bird Soda
description: Lady Bird Soda is the story of three Texans' thirst for flavorful adventure and their hope to share it with others. Our co-founders united in 2022 over a shared passion – to feature the diverse and delicious flavors that make their home state so special.‍Our hometown of Austin is a city that embraces health without pretension and pleasure without guilt. That's our north star. We're for the people who want a better-for-you beverage that doesn't taste like a compromise. Who celebrate movement and music and essential parts of life. Who believe in taking care of their bodies and their community. We are Austin in a can – crisp, refreshing, balanced, and free.

name: Lago USA, Inc.
description: It has been over 50 years since Lago opened its doors in 1968. Our production facilities are located in the Veneto region of Italy, a territory dedicated to agricultural and artisanal activities for centuries. Lago products meet the highest quality standards and are made using premium, clean Ingredients. Wafers represent our core business to this day. Artisanal knowhow and modern technology allow us to offer the quality and taste that "Made in Italy" is known for. Today Lago products are sold in over 80 countries worldwide.

name: Laird Superfood
description: Pioneering big wave surfer Laird Hamilton wanted a coffee that could keep up with him and demanding days out on the waves. He began experimenting, adding healthy plant-based fats and other real-food ingredients like coconuts to his morning cup. His wife, Gabby Reece, a professional athlete and health advocate, agreed that he had finally perfected a recipe that not only provided sustained energy, but tasted incredible.This founding spirit still flows through every product Laird Superfood makes. From your day's first cup to your last snack, we believe everything you put in your body should help you become the best version of yourself.

name: Lakewood Organic Juice Company
description: Established in the 1930s by Fred Fuhrman as a small fresh fruit business in Miami.?Fred's son, Thomas, took over from his father in the late 1970s, and established in marketing Lakewood's trademark Fresh PressedÆ shelf stable juices.?Innovator in natural, organic, no preservatives, and no-sugar added shelf stable juices.?Pioneered the concept of combining fruits and vegetables for innovative juice blends.?Strive to be the leader in the organic beverage category to provide healthier choices, delivering only the best that nature has to offer through sustainable processes that enhance communities and farmers around the world.

name: Lantic Maple
description: We are part of the Lantic family, which is 100% Canadian owned and operated, and has been in the sweetener business for over 130 years. Headquartered in Quebec, The Maple Treat Corporation was formed in 2017 to reflect the unity of bringing four family-run maple businesses under one roof – Decacer, LB Maple Treat, Great Northern Maple Products and Highland Sugarworks.Each one of these businesses was owned by local families with an entrepreneurial spirit that pushed them to offer the best maple products on the market. The Maple Treat Corp. is honoured to build on the journey of dreams and determination of these families by continuing to put premium-quality maple syrup into the hands of consumers around the world.

name: Lanxess Corporation
description: Looking to safeguard the quality and shelf-life of your beverage and eliminate chilled chain distribution needs? LANXESS Corporation offers two technologies, Velcorin® and Nagardo®, which provide microbiological protection in a variety of beverages.

name: LaPierre Maple Farms
description: Hello Maple is the new, vibrant face of Canadian organic maple syrup, crafted at Lapierre Maple Farm in Milan, Quebec, the largest organic maple farm in Canada with roughly 225,000 tapped trees each year.Behind Hello Maple is a team that has spent decades perfecting every step, from sustainably managing the sugarbush to transforming pure maple sap into rich, golden syrup. Certified organic by USDA and Ecocert Canada, and kosher certified by the Montreal Jewish Community Council, Hello Maple delivers clean label, 100 percent pure maple syrup you can trust. As part of the Lapierre family, world leader in maple equipment, Hello Maple blends cutting edge technology with traditional wood fired expertise to create a flavor that is naturally sweet, complex and memorable.From breakfast tables to gourmet recipes, retail shelves and private label projects, Hello Maple brings authentic Canadian energy, quality and credibility to every bottle.

name: Larimar Beverages, Corp.
description: Larimar was founded by siblings Kashish and Ananya Jagtiani, who grew up immersed in their family's food and beverage distribution business, established in the 1980s and serving markets across Africa. That legacy gave them firsthand insight into consumer tastes, supply chains, and the importance of delivering quality with consistency.With Larimar, they set out to create something different: a beverage brand that blends flavor, wellness, and responsibility. Their vision was to craft drinks that not only taste refreshing but also reflect a conscious way of living, grounded in authenticity and inspired by the natural world. Guided by the motto "Feel-good sparkling drinks for every occasion," Larimar offers both non-alcoholic and alcoholic collections, ensuring there is always a place for their drinks at the table.The inspiration came from St. Barth, a Caribbean island known for its turquoise waters, vibrant culture, and commitment to protecting its natural beauty. Larimar takes its name from a rare blue stone found only in the region, symbolizing clarity, balance, and connection to the sea. This philosophy continues to guide the brand's journey and the choices it makes.Sustainability is a key focus. Larimar has already taken steps such as using fully recyclable cans, supporting local beach cleanups, and sponsoring a St. Barth surf athlete who reflects the brand's ocean-centered values. Looking ahead, Larimar aims to deepen its impact through partnerships with marine conservation organizations, ensuring the waters that inspired the brand are preserved for generations to come.Every can also tells a story. To capture the island's essence visually, Larimar collaborated with local St. Barth artist Karolina Karlsson, whose hand-drawn illustration celebrate the island's natural landscapes and community spirit. It ensures that each product reflects not just a flavor, but a sense of place.At its core, Larimar is about rethinking how beverages fit into modern life. By combining heritage with innovation, Larimar delivers more than just refreshment, it creates an experience rooted in culture, wellness, and responsibility. With every sip, Larimar invites you to feel good, wherever you are.

name: LASSO Foods LLC
description: LASSO exists to make familiar foods feel good again.We believe the best snacks are the ones people actually want to eat. The ones that feel indulgent, nostalgic, and easy to reach for, while still aligning with how people want to eat today.We craft better-for-you gelatin cups that pair crave-worthy, throwback flavors with clean ingredients and thoughtful macros. Using grass-fed gelatin and carefully balanced formulations, LASSO delivers dessert-level fun in a format that feels familiar, elevated, and intentionally made.

name: Lasso Labs
description: Lasso is transforming our food system with a breakthrough technology that converts simple ingredients into premium food products. Developed by Harvard scientists, Lasso’s innovative technology “spins” fibers, leveraging centrifugal force to restructure simple ingredients into nutritionally advantaged, affordable food products. With 1,000+ ingredient combinations and vast parameters to control fiber thickness, composition, arrangement, density, and moisture content, Lasso gives food producers the adaptability to navigate shifting supply chains, evolving consumer preferences, and global food trends— setting a new standard for the future of food production. Learn more at www.lassolabs.com.

name: LATCO International
description: LATCO International is one of the largest sesame seed producers and exporters in Bolivia.We have more than 20 years of experience.We have organic certifications for NOP, EU, JAS, TOS (Taiwan) and USCOEA (Canada).

name: LAURETANA SPA
description: The source of Lauretana water was discovered in 1964 in Graglia (BI) by Teresio Rossello who  brought a sample of water to analyze and the answer he received from the Technical Institute Quintino Sella from Biella is still remembered "This water is simply exceptional!". The following and more extensive exams from the Chemistry Institute of the University of Turin confirm the exceptional purity and lightness of Lauretana water.The first plant was built at about 850 meters high not far from the source, to maintain the original purity of the water unaltered. The bottling activity started in 1965 and it is sold under the name Lauretana, chosen in honor to the black Madonna from Loreto, worshipped in the near Graglia Shrine. From that moment on, the Firm has grown exponentially, from a small local reality into a top brand one in the international panorama in the Food&Beverage sector.

name: Layn Natural Ingredients
description: Layn Natural Ingredients is a global innovator in botanical extracts, plant-based sweeteners, and polyphenol-rich functional ingredients, helping brands create healthier, better-tasting products across nutraceutical, food, beverage, and pet & animal nutrition applications.Layn is debuting its NAD solution, following NMN, to expand its cellular energy platform. Featured innovations include Galacan® (a next-gen beta-glucan for immune and whole-body wellness), SophorOx® (a clinically supported solution for oxidative stress reduction), and SteviUp® M2 (a revolutionary Reb M with superior solubility and cleaner taste). Layn will also highlight its global leadership in tea extracts, instant teas, and natural sweeteners such as monk fruit and stevia.Backed by manufacturer-direct vertical integration, advanced extraction technologies, and continuous R&D, Layn delivers clean-label, plant-based solutions for evolving consumer demands.

name: LDC – Louis Dreyfus Company
description: Louis Dreyfus Company (LDC) is a leading merchant and processor of agricultural goods, founded in 1851. We leverage our global reach and extensive asset network to serve our customers and consumers around the world.Visit us at booth #3487 to learn more about our pea protein isolates, designed to meet the evolving needs of food and beverage manufacturers seeking clean‑label, plant‑based solutions without compromise on taste or functionality. Our pea proteins offer high protein content, are non‑allergenic, non‑GMO, and deliver a very clean taste with a creamy mouthfeel and excellent water solubility. This makes them highly versatile across a wide range of applications, including dairy alternatives, beverages, nutritional products, and other plant‑based food formulations. At LDC, you benefit from our upstream integration. Our peas are sourced from North American farmers, with full traceability, enabled by our engagement across the entire value chain. This allows us to deliver consistent quality, reliability of supply, and solutions tailored to customer needs. We also offer organic options, supporting brands looking to serve premium and conscious consumers.  For more information, visit www.ldc.com.
