name: LE VIE DEL TARTUFO USA INC.
description: The company was born from Gio vannino'sdesire to transform his great passion f orhunting and trading Truffles into a business.In 1980, Giovannino Cecchini founded thecompany Tartufi Jimmy together with his wif e Daniela. From the beginning, the dedication tohis passion has been the driving f orce of thecompany's growth.At the beginning, the c ompany's core businessis entirely dedicated to the tr ading of freshtruffles. Thanks to his skills, Gio vanninocreates a net o f more than 400 Truffle Hunter sthroughout Italy and this allo ws him to ha vethe best available fresh truffles all year round.Over the years, the customers' demand leads thecompany to invest and to create a laboratory inorder to produce preserved truffle products. Thisis crucial, as the company starts to have the firstcontacts with other countries and it is in thismoment that Andrea, the oldest child, joins TartufiJimmy's team.With Andrea's vision the company starts to investinto fairs abroad and this generates an exponentialincrease of customers and a consequentialcompany growth in all its departments.At the time of the company's greatest growth, thelast piece to complete the puzzle is Silvia, thesecond child of the family, focusing and dedicatingherself to the commercial relations with foreigncountries.Nowadays, the company has become one of themost important truffle companies in the world andcontinues to grow, taking one step after anothertowards the goal of bringing Truffle on tables allover the world.

name: Le Zette
description: We're fixing gut health the ancestral way. We make gut-friendly A2, high protein sheep yogurt dips, dressings and desserts - damn good dairy you can digest!!We operate out of 60+ independent retailers in SoCal (throughputs of 1.5-15 SKUs per week per store) and 8+ farmer’s markets. We are breaking into regional retail - launched Lassen’s in Q4-25, have been approved by and are entering Gelson’s, Mother’s Markets and Jimbo’s in Q1-26 (serviced by GFI, Hi Touch and Clemson). We also service a few coffee shops and restaurants in LA in private label (Little Lunch, Pijja Palace and Cafe Aime Leon Dore). We plan to launch into the East Coast with Pop Up Grocer, Eataly and Union Market in Q3-26.We are a family, women-, and AAPI owned small batch creamery in Los Angeles making made-to-order sheep yogurt goods. We work with the leading american sheep geneticist to source our milk, use all organic dry ingredients and never add artificial preservatives. We package in recyclable glass and paper, and run a jar return program out of our farmers markets.

name: Leaven Foods, Inc.
description: Leaven Foods began in 2023 in San Diego when founder and microbiologist Cameron Martino set out to make sourdough as easy as instant yeast. Starting in a backyard lab and partnering with leading bakers, Cameron captured the living wild yeast and lactic-acid bacteria of true sourdough in a dry, concentrated format. Today, Leaven's instant sourdough cultures help home bakers, restaurants, and large producers bake naturally fermented bread and pizza with consistent results, no feeding or maintenance required.

name: Lebby Snacks
description: Lebby Snacks was founded in 2016 with a simple but bold vision: to bring the time-honored tradition of Mediterranean roasted chickpeas to modern snacking. Our story begins with childhood memories of street vendors selling slow-roasted chickpeas—an artisanal recipe cherished for over 500 years. Inspired by this heritage, our founders set out to share that authentic experience with today's consumers, reimagined in indulgent, better-for-you flavors.

name: Legendary Foods, LLC
description: Before there was Legendary Foods, there was Quest Nutrition.And before Quest Nutrition, there was Shannan and Ron Penna. Two people who were very serious about health and nutrition, loved food, and weren't willing to make nutritional compromises.In 2009, they found themselves frustrated and dissatisfied with the market of protein bars. At the time, most were made with low-quality ingredients, incorrect nutrition labels, and many with more sugar than candy bars. To make matters worse, every bar felt boring, unoriginal, bland, and tasteless.Fed up with the compromises, Shannan set out to create the perfect protein bar in her own kitchen.After many months of relentlessly testing hundreds of recipes, she finally had a bar made of high-quality ingredients with incredible taste. In addition - this wasn't your ordinary protein bar - her recipes were very high protein and were full of inclusions such as zero-sugar chocolate chunks and almond pieces. What started in a household kitchen grew into the #2 fastest growing business in the Inc. 5000. As founder and CEO of Quest Nutrition from the very start, Ron created a strong company that grew to over $400,000,000 in revenue with about 1,400 team members. Quest manufactured its own products in Los Angeles within its almost 750,000 square feet of production and warehousing facilities.In 2019, the Simply Good Foods Company acquired Quest Nutrition for $1Billion.While this is typically the happy ending to the story...in this case, it's just the beginning.Wanting to take things to the next level, Ron founded and started Legendary Foods – to serve an even greater purpose.Just as Quest Nutrition ended up changing more than just the protein bar space, Legendary Foods is changing the way people eat in many food categories. With a mission to re-build the world's favorite junk food into healthy and delicious options, Legendary takes the snacks we all love and re-imagines them with incredible high protein nutrition. Whether it's delicious baked goods, mouthwatering crunchy chips, or the new products (that you'll see soon) – everything is on the table.Learn more at: https://www.eatlegendary.com/blogs/about-us/legendary-foods-quest-nutrition

name: Legurme
description: About Yayla AgroYayla Agro is a leading company in the rice, pulses, and value-added food sectors in Türkiye, with 30 years of strong experience. The company has solidified its position in the industry through its high production capacity and advanced technology, producing 1 million tons annually at its Ankara and Mersin factories. In Türkiye, Yayla Agro reaches over 60,000 sales points through 81 provinces, 9 EDT, and 56 packaged product dealers. Additionally, Legurme, the brand representing the company internationally, continues to grow in global markets.As a publicly listed company, Yayla Agro emphasizes innovation, quality, and sustainability, offering value-added products that meet the evolving needs of consumers. The company’s new factory in Niğde, covering 160,000 m² of closed area, will focus on producing functional foods, plant-based products, healthy snacks, and gluten-free options, in line with market trends.Yayla Agro operates with a focus on entrepreneurship, dynamism, and continuous innovation, and is committed to global growth. With its high production capacity, advanced R&D, and sustainability investments, the company aims to further strengthen its leadership position in the industry.

name: Leisure Hydration
description: For our founders, brothers Steve & Alex Michaelsen, quality hydration was a nonnegotiable in their lives as division 1 college athletes.But it wasn't until they left the world of competitive sports that they realized the impact hydration had on everyday life— beyond physical activity. Staying hydrated meant less stress, fewer headaches, more focus, and a clearer mind.But a one-stop solution to their everyday dehydration didn't exist. So they got to work...Enter Leisure, a functional, natural, and tasty way to hydrate—without artificial colors, sweeteners, or flavors. Packed with carefully-sourced, feel-good nutrients that help to naturally boost your mood and reduce stress, Leisure aims to make you feel like the best version of yourself at the crack of a can.

name: Lemonati
description: Started in 2016 in Austin TX creating wine based spiked seltzers. We always created the best tasting products in the category up and till 2023 when we were purchased. Since then we have expanded our reach into Spiked Seltzers, Spirited Ready-To-Drink Cocktails and Non-Alcoholic beverages for kids and adults. The highest level of product certifications. Committed to transparency, responsibility, and sustainability. LFG!

name: Lemongrass Farms
description: Lemongrass Farms is dedicated to providing the most enjoyable user experience in the entire insect repellent category. Introducing the purest bug spray ever made, TREK. TREK is formulated with the purest essential oils on the planet, sourced from BERJE', who is known for supplying the most renowned perfumeries in the world. TREK is considered a "unicorn" in the industry by being the first water-based, cosmetic-grade, all-natural bug spray. TREK is free of greasy "junk" carrier oils (seed oils such as soybean, corn, walnut, etc.), synthetic fragrances, and mystery ingredients. It's also enhanced with plant-based moisturizers that are often found in premium cosmetics and beauty products. TREK is the first bug spray that nourishes your body's largest organ, your skin! It's "The Bug Spray You Love To Use". Proceeds support building habitats for bees and butterflies, via The Bee and Butterfly Habitat Fund. Lemongrass Farms is a family business that launched in 2023 and quickly gained mass retail adoption and acknowledgement from NIQ's Consumer 360 event in Los Angeles, where we were fortunate enough to win 2nd Place for "Best New Brand of 2023". In late 2023, we also won "Best Label in the World" in the personal care category at the AWA international printing awards in Amsterdam. Considering their forward-thinking and keen ability for identifying CPG packaging trends, receiving this award from an entirely European judge panel was very special to us. Thanks to NIQ data and the accolades we've received, we've never been more confident that consumers are ready and eager for a new sub-category of all-natural insect repellents that are safe, effective, and enjoyable to use. This launch (Jan 2023) has been an incredible journey so far!The only oils in TREK are the world's finest essential oils, thanks to a proprietary manufacturing process. Consumers are quickly realizing just how good bug spray can be! We will be in over 5,000 retail locations in 2024 with the addition of a national Whole Foods programLemongrass Farms is dedicated to providing the most enjoyable user experience in the entire insect repellent category. Introducing the purest bug spray ever made, TREK.

name: Lemur International, Inc.
description: Founded in 1996, Lemur International Inc. processes all of its imported products in Richmond, California, servicing wholesale B2B clients throughout the U.S. spanning the food & beverage, cosmetic, nutraceutical, and aromatherapy industries.We customize products for every client and adhere to the best hand-crafted processing and extraction methods, while supporting sustainable farming practices on the world's second-largest island nation, located off the southeast coast of Africa. Our flagship product, Certified Organic Vanilla, is derived from Madagascar Bourbon Vanilla Beans, renowned for their smooth, complex flavor and rich aroma, making it the preferred choice for top chefs, bakers, confectioners, and ice cream manufacturers who demand premium quality. Our Madagascar Ceylon Cinnamon stands apart from the hot or spicy taste of ordinary (cassia) cinnamon with its sweet and delicate taste. Our Pure Raw Honey is imported from the protected forest of the Madagascar highlands, benefiting buyers from specialty restaurants to granola manufacturers. Madagascar has long been an unrivaled source for essential oils and we import numerous Certified Organic Essential Oils from the region including Basil, Turmeric, Cinnamon Bark, Foraha (calophyllum inophyllum), Geranium, Ginger, Ravintsara and Ylang-Ylang (cananga odorata).Manufacturer of Organic / Conventional Extracts, Concentrates,  and Flavors (Liquid & Powders).

name: Lentiful
description: Hiya, we're Ben and Brooke Bacon. Like millions of other Americans, we've been on a journey these past few years to eat more plant-based foods. (Even with our last name Bacon!) Our journey has led us to fall in love with lentils. Yes, lentils!! High protein, high fiber, slow digesting carbs that help us feel fuller for longer. With one of the lowest carbon footprints of any food out there, which we dig. But with 4 kids, 2 dogs and endless meetings and activities, we don't always have the time to make lentils. So we created Lentiful, the ultimate hack for plant-based eating. Perfect for those busy workdays when we just want to eat something healthy, tasty and fast!

name: LesserEvil, LLC
description: We're focused on being the best version of ourselves and contributing to a more wholesome world ? beyond just snacks. It wasn't always easy, but our mission was always clear: use the company to build our people, minimize our footprint, and delight our customers with clean, organic snacks at a great value.We were founded in 2005 and started by simply living up to our name. Our snacks were a better alternative to the big name snacks out there, and our slogans ("Snack like a kid again") spoke to the inner child. But let's be honest? the snacks weren't really healthy!In 2011, our inner child grew up...just a little. We opened up our own factory to give ourselves control of our destiny, and pivoted to low-fat, low-calorie, real ingredients. We also threw a bunch of new snacks at the wall to see what would stick (which made a real crumbly mess).In 2014, we were no longer content to be merely healthy-ish, we found our calling to make the world a little less evil by offering people truly better-for-you snacks made from premium organic ingredients. We reigned in our scope to focus on quality, and on making the tastiest, healthiest popcorn ever.Today: the lightbulb-going-off, popcorn-kernel-exploding moment: snacking as a vessel for mindfulness. Using simple, sustainable acts to make clean snacks that inspire connection, to our own bodies and to those around us. We've perfected the art of popcorn? now we're on a mission to refresh the entire snack world with treats that make us feel as fantastic as they taste!

name: Letz Go Nutrition
description: Let'z Go Nutrition was founded by Jonathan Joseph, a former CPG, retail executive, and Kellogg marketing alum, out of a need for healthier alternatives to sugary drinks. Having struggled with dehydration and weight, Jonathan's health took a turn during the pandemic when he was hospitalized due to an electrolyte imbalance. Jonathan soon began a strict nutritional regimen, lost weight, and converted to a clean, healthier, active lifestyle. Frustrated by the lack of low-calorie, low-sugar, and clean drink options, he set out to create a solution that supported weight management, sugar control, and electrolyte balance—thus, Let'z Go Nutrition was born.Let'z Go offers sugar-free, clean hydration and energy drinks with immune-boosting ingredients that are not only healthy but also affordable and great-tasting. Ingredients are Non-GMO, Gluten free, dairy free, vegan, plant-based, and sustainable-sourced. After sampling the products at local events, the response was overwhelming. Thousands of others shared his challenges and were looking for clean, great-tasting alternatives to the sugary, artificial drinks on the market. Let'z Go quickly gained popularity on Amazon and has rapidly expanded into retail across Natural, Grocery, Mass, and Specialty accounts.Supported by A-list celebrities Mark Wahlberg and rapper Joyner Lucas, Let'z Go continues to grow. The brand now helps thousands of consumers meet their weight loss, dietary, and nutritional goals with products that are free from artificial ingredients, sweeteners, and colors. Let'z Go has outperformed competitors in taste tests and has convinced many to make the switch away from sugar and fake-sugar (sucralose, allulose, aspartame, ace-k, erythritol, and more). Using a proprietary blend of plant-based Stevia with No aftertaste, all products are 100% Naturally sweetened, and the electrolyte products are not salty like many others in the category.With national accounts like Walmart, Target, and CVS taking notice, the brand is poised for significant growth. Let'z Go is also backing the movement to ban harmful ingredients like red dye 40, supporting RFK's initiative, and providing healthier alternatives to millions of Americans.By participating in Expo West, Let'z Go is positioning itself as a leader in the healthier beverage movement and aims to improve the lives of millions by offering better options for hydration and energy.

name: Levels
description: In 2016 we noticed that most other protein powders were severely outdated: all-black canisters, synthetic style branding, an old-school meathead feel, and ingredients many consumers would rather avoid (sucralose, dyes, artificial flavors, fillers, and so forth). As we saw it, there was an opportunity to engage and create value in an area that customers were gravitating towards.Levels was founded in an apartment. It was launched with less than $10k in capital. It was run as a one-man shop until it hit multiple millions in revenue.  Since then, growth has been purely organic — the right ingredients, the right packaging, and the right price. No celebrities, no multimillion-dollar marketing fund, just an authentically good product.Levels has now grown to $20m+ brand while continuing to rank top 3-5 in whey category share on Amazon, all while staying profitable.

name: LEVL Beverages Inc.
description: USDA Organic – nothing artificialAll-Natural Electrolytes – clean hydration + faster recoveryFunctional Adaptogens – support mind + body balance0g Added Sugar | 25 Calories – feel good hydration A HEALTHIER WAY TO HYDRATEGrowing up, my life revolved around sports. Like most athletes, I wanted something more exciting than water and loved the big hydration brands—fully believing they were good for me.Playing basketball in college and then professionally overseas, I became more intentional about what I put into my body and started reading labels. I couldn’t believe what I’d been drinking for years: artificial dyes, unnecessary additives, processed electrolytes, and massive amounts of sugar—I realized the only thing “good” was the marketing.Tired of searching for a better option, a longtime friend and I decided to create the drink we wanted to buy as consumers. We hired a formulator and spent over two years obsessing over functional ingredients and trying to make it taste great without adding sugar.Our first product, LEVL Hydration, is USDA Organic and made with pure water, real fruit juice, functional adaptogens, and all-natural electrolytes.-Matthew Kemper, Founder

name: Libré
description: Libré was created for women who juggle busy lives, changing energy, and shifting hormones: from perimenopause to menopause and everything in between. We believe wellness shouldn't feel complicated or overwhelming. Our products are thoughtfully formulated to fit seamlessly into your morning routine, supporting energy, balance, and vitality when you need it most.At Libré, we combine science-backed ingredients with a women-first perspective, because every stage of life deserves care, confidence, and a little freedom to feel your best. We're here to help women reclaim their mornings, their energy, and their sense of balance - one simple, effective supplement at a time.

name: LIDYA GRAIN TARIM URUNLERI SAN. TIC. LTD. STI.
description: Lidya Fgrain is a well-established and trusted participant in the organic grains, pulses, and seeds trade, serving international B2B markets. As a company operating at the forefront of the organic sector, we recognize the responsibility that comes with being part of a sustainable food system and act accordingly in every stage of our operations.Driven by expertise, integrity, and a strong commitment to organic principles, Lidya Fgrain supplies high-quality organic products that meet EU organic regulations, food safety standards, and customer-specific requirements. Our operations are built on transparent sourcing, reliable supply chains, and close cooperation with certified growers, processors, and logistics partners.Our core objective is to contribute to a more sustainable world by promoting environmentally responsible agriculture and long-term value creation. We strongly believe in long-term partnerships with our customers and stakeholders. By understanding each customer’s specific needs, we provide tailored solutions, consistent quality, and dependable service.At Lidya Fgrain, every customer deserves expertise, trust, and premium organic products—and this principle guides everything we do.

name: LIFEAID BEVERAGE COMPANY
description: The FITAID team is made of passionate people who are uncompromising in their approach to create and share the power of clean performance supplement blends. FITAID will NEVER use any artificial sweeteners or chemically derived caffeine sources. Over a decade later, FITAID and its parent company LIFEAID now make over 20 specially-formulated blends in both ready-to-drink and powder forms. The company's products can be found online, in thousands of gyms globally, and in fine retailers nationwide such as, Whole Foods, Sprouts and more.

name: Lifecykel Labs LLC
description: What began as a sustainability project between Australian co-founders Julian Mitchell and Ryan Creed – collecting waste coffee grounds to grow mushrooms – quickly evolved into something much more powerful.It sparked a discovery: functional mushrooms like lion’s mane, reishi, and cordyceps could be transformed into potent liquid extracts, offering a natural addition to daily wellness. By harnessing the intelligence of mushrooms, they uncovered a natural way to elevate human health, performance, and longevity.In the spirit of regeneration, Lifecykel was born – a name inspired by the full life cycle of the mushroom, and the Scandinavian approach to balanced, healthy living.The mission: to unlock the intelligence of mushrooms, not only for sustainability, but for human vitality. Circularity was both method and mindset.The priority: Bio-intelligence R&D. Their first hire was a scientist, laying the foundation for research-led innovation into the health-enhancing potential of mushrooms.As the movement grew, so did the vision and the reach. The company expanded into the United States with a state-of-the-art facility in Peshtigo, Wisconsin, where all products are now formulated, manufactured, and shipped. Today, Lifecykel is trusted by hundreds of thousands of customers, pro athletes, elite trainers, and high performers across the globe.

name: LifeSeasons, Inc.
description: LifeSeasons was founded on the idea that nature has provided us with all the ingredients necessary to nourish and restore our health, and that science could prove it. With this in mind, we go to the pantry of nature and team up with the best doctors in the world to formulate thoughtful, synergistic formulas using evidence-based ingredients and clinical dosages. We continue to innovate and provide natural solutions for health concerns in growing categories such as: brain health, mental health, and women's health. Our role at LifeSeasons is to support the body's own innate healing force so you can live life to its fullest.

name: LIL BUCKS, LLC
description: After discovering the potential of an underutilized superfood while living in Australia, Chicago-native Emily Griffith founded Lil Bucks, the buckwheat company with a mission to offer innovative buckwheat snack and breakfast products, while promoting a more nutritious diet and soil health in North America.

name: Lil' Gourmets, LLC
description: Lil' Gourmets is a fresh baby food brand grounded in the latest in infant nutrition research. Our mission is to deliver essential nutrients today, while inspiring healthy & adventurous eating for life.Lil’ Gourmets offers peace of mind to time-strapped parents in the form of guilt-free, fresh & organic, globally inspired meals that provide 100% of a baby’s daily veggies – with no added salt or sugar. Their line of veggie-first pouches can be found in the refrigerated baby aisle coolers at Whole Foods Market and Walmart. For more information, please visit lilgourmets.com.

name: Lily of The Desert
description: Early in his career, our visionary owner and CEO, Don Lovelace, realized he had a passion for sharing the holistic benefits of aloe vera with consumers. His commitment to wellness has also translated into building a company synonymous with excellence, innovation, and integrity. Founded in 1971.

name: LIMBUA Deutschland GmbH
description: LIMBUA MACADAMIA NUTS & MoreGerman-Kenyan Fair-Macadamia producer in cooperation with more than 9.000 contract smallholders LIMBUA produces and sellsMacadamia Nuts,Macadamia OilMacadamia ButterAvocado OilDried Mangoin cooperation with more than 9.000 organically certified smallholders. Without any middle men, the German-Kenyan company enters the international market and assures a competitive price-performance ratio as well as a high product quality due to the fresh produce that has been sourced directly from the farm.Cultivation on organic mixed farmsGrown free of chemical pesticides in mixed cultures, the kernels, avocados and mangoes comply with the high standards of quality and health conscious consumers. At the same time, value creation is left on site and the standard of living of the rural population is improved.Local production in KenyaBy now, LIMBUA comprises four decentralized, modern production facilities, which are located close to the farmers. The self-developed manufacturing processes enable a high quality standard. This has created over 700 jobs in the countryside, offering women in particular the opportunity to generate an income and experience self-empowerment.Multiple certifiedOn the way from the farm to the packaged product, all products are subjected to multiple quality controls. LIMBUA is, among other certifications, IFS-certified, so you can be sure that all LIMBUA macadamia nuts comply with the highest food quality and safety requirements.Extended portfolio: Avocado Oil and Dried MangoesIn order to bring more fair products from the farmers to the market, LIMBUA is continuously developing ideas: the company has established two new business lines with the production of avocado oil and dried mango. The avocados and mangos are purchased from the same smallholders as the macadamia nuts. All three products are grown on mixed, certified organic farms, which has a positive impact on biodiversity and boosts the company’s resilience in the face of climate change.100% traceabilityBesides the certified quality, LIMBUA also guarantees absolute transparency. Our self-developed digital system allows 100% traceability of the products from farm to packaging. This creates a high level of transparency and trust: for the smallholders and, of course, the demanding quality customers worldwide.LIMBUA is sustainable - Ecologically, economically and socially.

name: Linear Bar
description: We were tired of choosing between health and convenience.Like many health-conscious individuals, our founder saw a frustrating gap: protein bars were either clean but flavorless, or delicious and packed with artificial junk. This dilemma sparked the creation of Linear Bar—an organic protein powerhouse that doubles as a guilt-free treat.With 20 grams of protein, zero seed oils, and no artificial sweeteners, Linear Bar is crafted to fuel your workouts, energize your workdays, and satisfy your cravings—all without compromise.Despite our passion for organic whole foods, we found that truly clean, convenient snacks were hard to come by. Too often, we were forced to choose between preservative-loaded convenience foods or bland "healthy" options that didn't satisfy.The turning point came during yet another frustrating search for a clean protein bar. The options were disheartening: endure the chemical aftertaste of conventional bars, or sacrifice taste for better ingredients. We asked ourselves: Why not have both?In 2022, we set out with a bold but simple mission: create a protein bar that combines the indulgence of a candy bar with the integrity of premium nutrition. We committed to cutting out the usual industry compromises—no seed oils, no artificial sweeteners, no fillers—just clean, organic ingredients with exceptional flavor.The result? Linear Bar: a protein bar that redefines the category. Every bar is thoughtfully crafted with complex flavor profiles that deliver long-lasting energy and satisfaction. Whether you're crushing a workout or tackling back-to-back meetings, Linear Bar supports your goals without sacrificing taste or quality.This isn't just another protein bar. It's proof that you can have it all: clean ingredients, great taste, and real nutrition—in one convenient package.

name: Linoy Boutique
description: At Linoy Boutique, we create more than just candles, we craft experiences. Using organic soy wax, natural ingredients, our handcrafted candles, wax creations, and natural home fragrances are designed to bring warmth, light, and elegance into every space. From bespoke party favors to curated workshops, we blend artistry, scent, and personalization to make every moment memorable.Committed to sustainability, we embrace eco-friendly practices by utilizing organic and recycled materials. Our creations not only stand out for their uniqueness but also embody a conscious approach to craftsmanship. Each piece tells a story of love, creativity, and environmental responsibility, with exciting ideas continually fueling our creativity.

name: LiquaDry Inc.
description: Rooted in Nature. Powered by Innovation.For over 25 years, LiquaDry, Inc. has been a trusted pioneer in plant-based nutrition, delivering premium-quality superfood powders with superior bioavailability and bioactive characteristics. Our mission is simple: to retain the beneficial, heat-sensitive properties provided by Mother Nature through gentle, careful processing.In 1999, we introduced BioActive Dehydration, our proprietary low-temperature dehydration process that transforms fresh juice into powder while preserving its natural integrity. This innovative technology minimizes heat exposure, ensuring vibrant color, fresh flavor, aroma, and delicate nutrients remain as nature intended.We are the farmers and harvesters of our greens, ensuring complete control from seed to powder. Our greens include:Alfalfa, Barley Grass, Oat Grass, Buckwheat, and Wheatgrass.Certifications You Can Trust:✔ USDA Organic✔ Kosher✔ Halal✔ Non-GMO✔ Gluten-FreeAt LiquaDry, we produce safe, high-quality botanicals you can trust. Our passion is crafting products that offer Honest Nutrition—natural, convenient, and effective. We believe everyone deserves access to active, plant-based nutrition because your body deserves the best.

name: Liquid Death Mountain Water
description: We're trying to make health and sustainability 50 times more fun. We try to not take ourselves too seriously.Liquid Death first launched in 2019 as a water company, but we've grown to become a healthy beverage company and lifestyle brand, with a full lineup including: unflavored water (still and sparkling), sparkling flavored waters, and teas. We only use aluminum cans which are infinitely recyclable, unlike traditional plastic bottles which largely end up in landfills. We're also partners with non-profits like 5Gyres, PangeaSeed and The Thirst Project, which help fight plastic pollution and provide safe drinking water to communities around the world.From Mike Cessario (Founder & CEO): We're trying to make health and sustainability 50 times more fun. Typically, all the most fun, hilarious marketing over the last 30 years is all for junk food — alcohol, energy drinks, candy. Like, what are the funniest campaign most people remember? It's Bud Light, Snickers, Carls Jr., whereas healthy food doesn't really ever market in that fun, irreverent, youth culture way. If you can make people laugh, they will have a deeper connection with your brand, regardless of the functional differences of your liquid.

name: Liquid Intelligence Ltd
description: aēlo was created to give people a clean, elevated way to celebrate without sacrificing health, clarity, or performance. Born in British Columbia, it blends culinary craft with modern wellness to redefine what a cocktail can be.

name: Liquid Remedy
description: Liquid Remedy is the real deal kombucha: small-batch brewed the old school way for 30 days. The result is a delicious, sparkling kombucha that’s packed with all the goodness and none of the sugar.

name: Liquid Youth
description: In the vibrant heart of Southern Florida, Liquid Youth™ was born from a vision to redefine the collagen market. Founded in 2024 by a group of beverage industry veterans, we saw an opportunity to challenge the norm. We saw an untapped potential in the existing collagen beverages market as the beverages just didn't taste good—they were bland and tasteless but also were underdosed in collagen. Determined to change that, Liquid Youth™ was created, blending expertise and passion to develop collagen peptide beverages that optimize health and have delicious flavors that inspire and invigorate.

name: Lishui Mingyuan Food Co., Ltd.
description: We are a very professional Matcha producer located in Zhejiang province, with more than 8 years experience of focusing only on Matcha product, we became one of the main Matcha supplier in Chinese local market. Our products are widely used in ceremonial drinks, ice cream, milk tea and dessert, including Italian Gelato, Hey Tea etc. We are developing exportation market as a strategy since 2024, and already supplied to many good customers. Most of our customers use our products for high quality food products.

name: Little Bee of Connecticut, LLC
description: In 2014, Little Bee of Connecticut was born from a simple, sweet suggestion by our 9-year-old daughter, the original Little Bee. What began as a backyard beekeeping hobby quickly grew into a family passion and, soon after, a purpose.From those first hives, we discovered not only the magic of honeybees, but a calling to create something meaningful - products that are pure, natural, and good for people and the planet. Word spread quickly, and what started at local craft markets evolved into a widely recognized natural CPG brand. Today, Little Bee of Connecticut offers a line of thoughtfully made products—hand-rolled pure beeswax candles and beeswax and honey-based apothecary —delivering nature's goodness to customers across the country.Still family-run, still rooted in sustainability, and still inspired by that original spark from our Little Bee, we remain committed to keeping things simple, natural, and kind—just like the bees.

name: Little Lad's Popcorn
description: For over 25 years Little Lad's Popcorn has been made in small towns in New England by down to earth folks who love good food.

name: Little Latke
description: I saw an opportunity to take the beloved latke beyond its seasonal roots. Inspired by the craze of  my mother's homemade recipe, I recognized a clear gap in the market—a convenient, everyday way to enjoy a potato latke. I got right to work in my kitchen at home trialing recipes, and finally landed on a version that I felt confident bringing to market. Little Latke was officially founded in 2023 and launched online November 2024. We have hit the shelves of 60 retailers organically in the first 6 months of business and I cannot wait to see what this year holds for the brand as we graduate from our small production facility in Chicago to a dedicated manufacturer.

name: Little Sesame
description: Our founders, Nick and Ronen first met working in 2010 working in some of the top restaurants in New York City.  In 2016, they launched a cozy 500‑sq‑ft hummus pop-up in Washington, D.C., after testing over 20 tahini varieties to perfect their recipe.  Little Sesame is more than a hummus brand —it's a vision in motion: chef-rooted, purpose-led, and community-first. From humble pop-up beginnings to a national footprint, we continue to champion flavor, sustainability, and joyful connection—one freshly spun tub of hummus at a time.

name: Little Yellow Elephant Inc
description: Yelophant is a pioneering global food-tech company on a mission to reinvent family breakfasts worldwide. We fuse nutritional science with culinary creativity to deliver solutions that are both profoundly healthy and genuinely delicious, turning the most important meal of the day into a moment of joy and nourishment for the next generation. Founded in Los Angeles in 2025, our deep, research-driven insights into children's developmental needs have rapidly established us as a benchmark in the juvenile nutrition sector. Our product innovation translates science into superior taste and texture. Our flagship products include the Butter Flavored Pancake, Mozzarella Cheese Bun, and Antibiotic-Free Chicken Steak.This scalable success is powered by our two modern production facilities in China, which operate at full capacity. Utilizing advanced manufacturing protocols and a rigorous commitment to sustainable practices, we ensure a reliable, high-quality supply chain ready for global demand. Our initial launch in the U.S. market has been met with enthusiastic reception, with products quickly gaining shelf space in select regional retailers and online platforms. Early feedback highlights their unique combination of clean-label ingredients, child-approved flavors, and unparalleled convenience—a trifecta that is reshaping breakfast expectations in the U.S.Driven by our vision to nurture the future through intelligent nutrition, yelophant stands at the intersection of expertise and genuine care. We are not just selling products; we are promoting a lifestyle of wellness and happiness. As we expand our footprint, we remain dedicated to being the trusted partner for families everywhere, delivering peace of mind, one delicious breakfast at a time.

name: Little Zing Danish Mustard
description: I started Little Zing to honor a cherished family tradition and carry on its incredible legacy. The recipe, created by my Great Grandma Helle in 1923, was passed down through generations and became a family treasure. My late father continued the tradition by making the mustard and gifting it to clients, who absolutely loved it. Inspired by the joy it brought to so many, I wanted to share Little Zing with the world.I began at farmers markets, where the mustard quickly gained a loyal following. People loved its bold, saucy flavor and versatility—it became a household staple for everything from sandwiches to charcuterie boards, veggies, and pizza. The overwhelming response and word-of-mouth helped Little Zing grow beyond what I imagined.Today, we're proud to be in 40 stores, and we're just getting started. Our mission is to bring Little Zing to even more tables, sharing its unique blend of sweetness and bold horseradish kick with food lovers everywhere. Each bottle is crafted with the same care and tradition my family has cherished for over 100 years.Staying true to our roots is essential. Little Zing remains a small-batch, high-quality product made with simple, all-natural ingredients. It's more than just mustard; it's about connecting people to tradition, innovation, and unforgettable flavor.From drizzling on open-faced sandwiches to adding zing to recipes, Little Zing transforms everyday meals into something extraordinary. It's a privilege to carry this family tradition forward and share it with families everywhere.Thank you for joining this journey—your support keeps this legacy alive!

name: LiveMore Superfoods
description: The LiveMore family has been in the fruit business for 80 years. These decades of experience has allowed us to find the highest quality farms, farmers and partners to help us thrive and succeed. Over time we have made countless relationships and partnerships that will last a lifetime. We have studied the fruit business for generations to ensure that we have created the best quality products for our community.

name: Living Tree Foods
description: Living Tree Foods has been winning over vegan skeptics since 2020. Born from an unlikely pair - Emily, a lifelong vegan, and Kyle, who previously worked on a dairy farm - we started selling our delicious plant-based products at farmers' markets and are now sold in grocery chains all across Canada. We've made a name for ourselves in Canada as having mind-blowingly tasty dairy-free products, and now have our sights set on the USA! Our ravioli is a real crowd pleaser and will satisfy the whole family, from picky toddlers to hungry husbands.Why are we called Living Tree Foods? Our two founders, Emily and Kyle, met in law school. In the practice of law, the 'living tree' doctrine means that the way we interpret the world around us and the way we behave within it should adapt to changing times and information. With more and more evidence coming out all the time about the health benefits of a plant-based diet, and the increasing concern for animals' interests and rights, there is no better way to embody this principle than to work plant-based foods into our diet.

name: LivReal
description: LivReal is a clean, sparkling energy drink made with real squeezed fruit, green tea caffeine, and no fake flavorings or high-intensity sweeteners . Light, crisp, and refreshing like sparkling water, it delivers smooth, steady energy without the syrupy sweetness or chemical aftertaste of traditional energy drinks. Just real ingredients and real energy.We believe 'living real" looks different for everyone, and our goal is to support each person’s version of a full, meaningful life. We create energy products made with real ingredients to provide a healthier, more honest way to fuel everyday moments - whether that’s playing tennis, getting through a long workday, being there for family, or making time for the things that matter most. LivReal exists to support people as they live their real life, on their own terms.

name: LIVS
description: LIVS Gummies is a young and dynamic international company with headquarters located in Weston, Florida and partners around the world in countries such as Mexico, Peru, Brazil, Ecuador, Chile, Russia and the Netherlands.LIVS Gummies was established on 2018 to develop and bring to market delicious, premium gummy vitamins that are manufactured and packaged with the highest operating standards and lean best practices.

name: Local Culture Ferments
description: Local Culture had humble beginnings in 2018 by wanting to create a healthy and nutritious side dish for ourselves and our families. Starting out as a Farmer's Market side hustle, we quickly saw that it could become something bigger. With our dedication to sustainability, we decided to grow our business keeping our core values of high standards, integrity and transparency intact.  To this day we continue to compost 100% of our facility food waste, never ferment in plastic and package in glass jars. We are the only certified organic ferment company distributed nationwide that ferments in stainless steel tanks instead of the plastic alternative. We understand that ferments leach toxins out of plastics, and it is important to us that we deliver the highest quality product to the people. It's more of a commitment, but worth it for us to ensure we aren't passing any toxins to your gut or any compromises to your health.

name: Local Hive Honey
description: By sourcing 100% American Honey, we also support the American Beekeepers who pollinate Local Farms from Coast to Coast and produce nearly $20 Billion of Fruits, Nuts, and Crops every year. Without Bees, there would be no Local Food and no "Farm to Table."

name: Lochhead Vanilla Company
description: Lochhead Vanillas is a 4th Generation family owned producer of super premium vanilla extracts and flavors. We source vanilla beans from the major growing regions and extract these via our proprietary cold extracted process. Come check out our award winning vanillas and request samples to test in your application.

name: Lokal Choice Real Coconut Water
description: Our coconut water is sourced from the Ben Tre Province in Southern Vietnam, straight from the Mekong Delta, where the soil is super alluvial and full of healthy vitamins & minerals.Our products are 100% REAL, No Added Sugar & Never from Concentrate. We have 3 delicious flavors; Pink Original, Acai Berry & Watermelon. We use 8.4oz aluminum cans for maximum sustainability.We believe that true health starts from within. It all began with a simple yet powerful idea: to create a beverage that's not only delicious but also promotes healthy living for people everywhere. As someone who is deeply passionate about healthy living, I saw an opportunity to offer a cleaner, more suitable ‘Choice’ to the sugary, artificial drinks that dominate the market today.Coconut Water Is Nature's Gift- Pure, hydrating, packed with electrolytes and essential nutrients. But not all coconut water is created equal. That's why we founded Lōkal Chōice REAL Coconut Water: to provide the world with a beverage that is as clean and natural as it gets. We're committed to sourcing our coconuts sustainably, ensuring every sip of our Coconut Water supports a healthier lifestyle and a healthier planet.Our Mission Is Simple, to inspire people everywhere to adopt a cleaner, healthier, and more sustainable lifestyle. We believe in transparency, quality, and the power of nature to nourish and heal. By offering a ‘Choice’ that's 100% natural, free from artificial additives and preservatives, we're taking a stand for what's REAL, pure, and good for you.

name: Lola's Fine Hot Sauce
description: Lola's Fine Sauces is a generational family recipe hot sauce company.  Our sauces come from our 'Lola', Dr. Carmelita Shah and use the worlds hottest peppers in the right amount to get the flavor without all of the heat.  Our sauces are: Clean LabelAll Natural100% plant basedNon-GMO Project VerifiedLow Sodium Keto FriendlyMade in the USABe sure to check out our premium salsa line up including our Cherry Jalapeno.  Selected as the best fruit salsa of 2024 by Better Homes and Garden.  New this year at Expo - Lola's Hot Honey & Spicy Ketchup.  Stop by and see how we can work with you.  Open to special orders.

name: Lone River
description: Lone River was founded by Katie Beal Brown. She wanted to introduce America to the taste and tradition of Far West Texas, where her family has been ranching for over 100 years. Katie has always been inspired by the beautiful landscape and delicious drinks of the region. One of the most storied is Ranch Water, a simple yet beloved cocktail, made with tequila, lime and soda water, that symbolizes the spirit of Texas hospitality and community.When Lone River launched its first product Ranch Water Hard Seltzer in 2020, Katie pioneered the tequila inspired flavor space in hard seltzer and disrupted the category. Today, Lone River's awarding-winning drinks are available nationwide. Lone River is a brand that embodies the essence of the West — with its authenticity, grit and unpretentious charm.

name: LONG SON JOINT STOCK COMPANY
description: Established since 2002, through the years, Long Son has become the largest cashew processor in Vietnam operating in 10 big factories (companies) spreading the country: Binh Phuoc Province, Khanh Hoa Province, Phu Yen Province, Ninh Thuan Province, Gia Lai Province, Long An Province, Binh Duong Province, Dong Nai Province and Ho Chi Minh City.Long Son has set up and run the first ever Export Processing Zone Enterprise of the Vietnam cashew industry, besides its overseas companies in America, Mozambique, Cote D'Ivore and Togo.With the philosophy, not just business but a partnership to grow together, Long Son has enjoyed very much support from our customers worldwide. Long Son product has been exporting to over 40 countries in the world as a high quality brand. More and more international super markets and roasters buy cashews from Long Son for its quality, performance and food safety.

name: Long Weekend
description: Long Weekend is a journey of discovery and reconnection, bringing global flavors to your table with a comforting warmth that feels like home. We stand for Universal Comfort—offering soups that not only introduce you to the world's diverse cultures but also provide a soothing, familiar experience that transcends borders. In our fast paced lives, we believe in the power of food to slow things down, allowing you a moment to reconnect with yourself.Our soups start as humble freeze-dried packets, but by adding hot water, they transform into something extraordinary—a meal that's rich in flavor and filled with comfort. Our focus on authentic global flavors, coupled with the warmth of a homemade meal, sets us apart as a brand that truly understands what it means to nourish the soul.

name: Longevity by Nature, Inc.
description: Longevity by Nature, a distinguished nutritional supplement manufacturer based in California, prides itself on harnessing the purest raw materials sourced directly from nature. Committed to enhancing the well-being and longevity of individuals, the company offers a range of branded products designed to promote joint health, encourage healthy aging, and support overall beauty and vitality.

name: Lonza Capsules & Health Ingredients
description: Lonza Capsules & Health Ingredients is the preferred global partner to the nutrition, pharmaceutical, and biotech markets. We work to prevent illness and enable a healthier world by supporting our customers to deliver new and innovative offerings that help treat a wide range of diseases and conditions. We achieve this by combining technological insight with world-class manufacturing, scientific expertise, and process excellence, enabling our customers to commercialize their discoveries and innovations in the healthcare sector.Our industry-leading capsules and encapsulation technologies, formulation know-how, and science-backed ingredients combined with our customer-focused services, provide unique and innovative solutions for nutraceutical companies.

name: Loonen
description: When I was pregnant with my daughter, I became acutely aware of what I was putting in and on my body. I focused on avoiding toxins and plastics, and there seemed to be thoughtful alternatives in nearly every category - from food to personal care to home cleaning. But when it came to water, things got murky.I couldn’t make sense of what was actually in our tap water, and the more I learned about bottled water, the worse it got. What started as an effort to protect my growing family quickly became an urgency to create something better. That’s how Loonen was born.We’re here to lead with purity and transparency and hope to play a small part in shaping better health outcomes for generations to come.- Clara Sieg, Co-Founder

name: Loopini
description: Loopini launched in January 2025 after over a year of R&D, born from my Italian origins and the deep connection I've always had with food through family. Growing up, pizza wasn't just a meal, it was a moment of joy, love, and togetherness. I wanted to reinvent that tradition for today's health-conscious world: the same passion and flavor, but packed with protein, fiber, and fewer calories. Made in Italy. Designed for everyday wellness.

name: Lorissa’s Kitchen
description: Since I launched Lorissa's Kitchen in 2016 we've had a simple mission to bring better, healthier options to the meat snacks category using real ingredients you know and love. I believe we've delivered on that mission over these last 8 years. However, a couple of years ago my son developed a laundry list of food allergies and I knew it was time to take our mission to the next level. Lorissa's Kitchen (LK) is still committed to providing high quality, healthier snacks but now we're taking a huge step forward and ensuring all products are Certified Free From the Top 9 Allergens (milk, eggs, wheat, soy, peanuts, tree nuts, fish, shellfish & sesame).LK is the first, and only meat snack that's Certified Free from the Top 9 Allergens by MenuTrinfo.

name: Los Angeles Salt Company
description: At LA SALT CO, our journey began with a legacy spanning over 40 years in the salt and ingredients industry. Growing up immersed in the world of raw materials, we gained firsthand knowledge of what makes an ingredient truly effective. This passion for understanding the science behind products laid the foundation for our company.In 2018, as Los Angeles' largest distributor of salts, we saw an increasing demand for specialty salts like Himalayan and Dead Sea salts. To meet this need, we launched LA SALT CO to service businesses with bulk specialty salts. However, when the COVID-19 pandemic hit, it significantly impacted our start. During this challenging time, we shifted our focus to retail packaging, allowing us to expand into new markets.As we worked to grow our business, our personal lives inspired a deeper mission. Despite the sunshine in Los Angeles, the daily grind and stressors were taking a toll on us. We discovered the transformative benefits of magnesium-rich salt baths and saw firsthand how they improved our mood, energy, and overall well-being. This experience became the catalyst for creating a full bath and body line.We set out to share the benefits of these incredible salts with others, crafting safe, non-toxic, vegan, and cruelty-free products powered by the mineral-rich salts of the earth. From sourcing to formulating and packaging, every step is handled in-house at our Los Angeles facility, ensuring quality and transparency in everything we create.Today, LA SALT CO offers a range of products designed to help you rest, reset, and feel your best. Whether it's through soothing salt baths or nourishing skincare, our mission is to bring you the same health and happiness these products have brought to us.Much love,Jaza & Sana

name: Lotte Int'l America Corp
description: Lotte International America Corp. is the United States branch of Lotte International, the global trading and business development arm of the Lotte Group. Serving as a strategic export and distribution hub in North America, we specialize in bringing Lotte’s world-class snacks, beverages, ice cream, and food products to the U.S. market. From confectionery and frozen treats to ready-to-drink beverages and specialty foods, Lotte International America Corp. manages sourcing, export operations, and market distribution to ensure consistent quality, reliable supply, and strong retail partnerships across the United States. As the U.S. export base for Lotte Group companies, we connect globally trusted brands with American consumers — expanding market reach while delivering the taste, innovation, and quality that define Lotte worldwide.

name: Lotus Foods
description: In 1995, we began importing black rice, calling it Forbidden Rice® after the Forbidden City, the Chinese Imperial palace. We wanted to share our love affair with heirloom rice with American consumers. If they loved the exciting colors and tastes of rice from around the world as much as we did, we could help preserve rice biodiversity, increase farm incomes, and improve sustainability. It worked!Today, our supplier community brings you the highest quality organic rice and rice noodles, while promoting human and environmental welfare.

name: Lotus Sustainables.
description: Our founders, Jen and Farzan, dreamed of a world free of plastic bags and in 2017 created Lotus Sustainables to enhance everyday experiences and protect the planet they love. Based in Carlsbad, California, Lotus soon blossomed into a certified B Corp with a mission driven team committed to using business as a force for good. We exist to prove that life without plastic can actually be easier. And that makes life better.

name: Lovebird Cereal
description: After the birth of my daughter, I left my big food job on a mission to clean up breakfast.

name: Lovingly Made Ingredients
description: Lovingly Made Ingredients is an ingredient manufacturing company based in Calgary, Alberta.  We produce amazing textured plant-based proteins & Crisps from Peas, Hemp, Fava and soon Oat’s to create unique properties for use in a variety of industries including meat analogues, bakery, snacks and cereals. Our aim is to use local resources and produce great tasting food ingredients in the most sustainable way possible.

name: LQC INC.
description: The CocoGoods Co. story began in 2015 when Duy Cu traveled from Vietnam to Boston to attend the University of Massachusetts College MBA program. During his studies, Duy decided to bring the family's coconut business to the US. Even before graduating, he began to strategize US-based business operations for Luong Quoi Coconut, LTD. (LQC). Through much hard work and perseverance, Duy built a team of believers in his and his family's mission to serve the global marketplace with the best coconut products. The LQC US team has since developed a highly successful go-to-market program that includes the CocoGoods Co. brand.We pride ourselves on social responsibility and incorporate it into our company's mission. The CocoGoods Co. brand strives to deliver the best coconut products on the market while reinvesting profits in our employees, communities, education, housing, and a sustainable environment. CocoGoods Co. has made a significant investment in a solar energy project that produces more than enough energy to power the entire LQC VN plant operation.Our team includes US and VN employees, along with strategic partners in the US. As we grow, we will continue to deliver on the family promise of growing, manufacturing, and delivering exceptional coconut products from the tree to the family table. Duy, with his wife Milo and son Minh by his side, along with the CocoGoods Co. team, believes that it is important to respect nature's gift and that the coconut is not just a fruit, but an entire ecosystem that supports communities and the world. We take pride in bringing the goodness of life to everyone!

name: Luba Libations, Inc
description: At Luba Libations, we believe that celebration doesn't need a special occasion—it lives in the everyday moments. The idea for Luba was born when co-founders Christiana and Nic noticed a gap in the beverage world: zero-proof cocktails that weren't just second-best alternatives, but delicious, complex, and crafted with intention.They knew exactly where to turn for inspiration: Christiana's grandmother, Luba. Vibrant and full of energy, Luba has always embodied unapologetic joy. She doesn't wait for permission to celebrate—she raises a glass on her own terms, savoring life's small rituals with elegance and confidence. That spirit lives at the heart of everything we create.Our mission was clear: no artificial colors, no synthetic additives, no shortcuts.Luba Libations is more than a drink—it's a mindset. Whether you're winding down, catching up, or kicking off something new, our beverages are here to elevate your moment. With Luba as our living muse, we've created drinks that are as bold and unique as the people who enjoy them. She reminds us daily that life is meant to be savored—whatever your pace, whatever your path.So here's to the joy of being present. To claiming your space at the table. To making every sip meaningful. Whether you drink or don't, celebrate big or small, you're invited to raise a glass—your way.Welcome to Luba Libations. Joyfully alcohol-free. Made for the moment.

name: Lucky Foods
description: Our journey is built on the foundation of family, a celebration of our culture through food, and the pursuit of the American dream. In the 1970s, we began as a small restaurant in the heart of Oregon, committed to serving delicious and wholesome meals crafted from fresh, local ingredients.Over the past five decades, we have evolved from those humble beginnings into a respected international brand, renowned for our unwavering commitment to quality and authenticity. Today, we proudly offer a diverse array of Asian-inspired products that beautifully blend traditional flavors with modern culinary practices.Despite our remarkable growth, our core values remain unchanged. We ensure that every product embodies our promise of delivering wholesome, high-quality offerings made from simple and clean ingredients.We believe that good food has the extraordinary power to bring people together, creating cherished moments and connections. We are grateful to our loyal customers and community for being integral to our continued success. We hope to bring you a lucky day with our delicious food.

name: Lucky Reishi LLC
description: Glow Beauty Fuel was launched in 2022 for people like us who are looking for a high-protein, low-sugar bar that is a great source of collagen. As women who appreciate healthy, quality food, we found the protein bar section lacking, and challenged ourselves to do better.

name: Luker Chocolate
description: We are a B4B family-owned chocolate manufacturer with over 120 years of expertise, providing premium chocolate ingredients and finished products for brands. We deliver a superior taste by using Single Origin Cacao Fino de Aroma. We guarantee sustainability, transparency, reliable supply, and consistency by integrating the entire value chain, from the first seed to the final product.

name: Lulu Plantain Chips
description: Lulu Plantain Chips began with two parents, two daughters, four packed bags, and a vision to share the flavors of our homeland with new communities. Our father saw in the plantain a fruit that carried both tradition and possibility. He dreamed of turning it into something greater than a side dish: a snack that could connect people, cultures, and generations.From that vision, Lulu was born. What started as a family project has grown into a company that remains proudly Hispanic, family-owned, and deeply connected to its roots. Today, Lulu works hand in hand with more than 8,000 smallholder farmers across Latin America and employs over 1,000 collaborators who share our passion for creating snacks that matter. For us, plantain chips are not just a product; they represent livelihoods, opportunities, and a way of honoring where we come from.Our products reflect this purpose. Every bag of Lulu Plantain Chips is made with real plantains and simple recipes that celebrate authentic flavor. From our original salted strips to sweet plantains, tostones, cassava chips, and seasonal innovations, we craft snacks that families can enjoy with confidence. Each variety carries the same dedication to quality, tradition, and the joy of gathering.Over the past two decades, Lulu has found its way onto tables across the United States, in Costco, Sam's Club, BJ's, schools, and local supermarkets. Yet no matter where our chips are enjoyed, they always carry the same essence: a family's dream to create something meaningful, built on values of authenticity, community, and care.For us, Lulu is more than a snack. It is a bridge between cultures, a livelihood for thousands, and proof that one vision, carried with purpose, can bring people together, one bag at a time.

name: LUNA BAY
description: Luna Bay was founded by Bridget Connelly, our CEO, in 2018 while she was enjoying hard kombucha in southern California. She wanted to create unique flavors using a premium yerba mate tea and take it back to her family and friends in her hometown, Chicago.

name: Lunar Lifts Nutrition
description: Having launched in February of 2024, the idea of Lunar Lifts Nutrition had been many years in the making. As the daughter of Taiwanese immigrants who owned boba shops growing up, the wonders of boba and Asian flavors have always been extremely prevalent in my life growing up. After picking up powerlifting and competing for my college team, fitness grew to become a huge part of my life. While finishing up my undergraduate degree during the pandemic, I started craving my daily boba teas, but wanted to stay on track with my fitness goals. With a lot of extra time quarantining at home, I took unflavored whey protein, and began working backwards from my mother's milk tea recipes to create high protein bubble tea with clean ingredients. From there, the idea of Lunar Lifts Nutrition was born! I wanted to create high protein, clean-ingredient versions of my favorite boba flavors, and disrupt the protein industry by bringing in the wonders of Asian flavors. Now, you no longer have to force down the same chalky boring protein shakes, and hitting your fitness goals is actually an enjoyable experience! With boba booming in popularity this past decade, we are able to bring people great tasting protein in unique flavor profiles they'll love.

name: Lýsi Omega-3
description: The story of Lýsi is one of vision and innovation. It began when brothers Tryggvi and Thordur Olafsson first founded Lýsi and started producing fish oil on the shores of Iceland in 1938. Lýsi was then, as it is now, a pioneer of fish oil production.Within its first two decades, Lýsi became Iceland's largest producer of cod liver oil. Key markets during this period included the USA and the UK. Despite demand for cod liver oil decreasing post 1950 and well into the sixties and seventies, Lýsi maintained profitability. The early focus on R&D,production methods and consumer-oriented products secured this profit.Now a third generation family business, the pioneering Lýsi spirit was taken to another level when Katrin Petursdottir became Managing Director in 1999. The granddaughter of one of the foundingbrothers, Tryggvi Olafsson, Katrin has built upon the market-leading know-how of Lýsi through key relationships with the University of Iceland and Matis, the Icelandic Food and Biotech R&D. She has also overseen the development of state-of-the-art production facilities in 2005 and 2012.Lýsi's success is also founded on exemplary marketing and sales. To put this in perspective, Lýsi owns an 11% market share of global fish oil production and we produce more cod liver oil than any othercompany worldwide.A constant focus on the properties and usage of marine lipids, and effective business partnerships focusing on innovation and distribution have made Lýsi what we are today – The World Leading FishOil Producer From Iceland.

name: M.A.D. Foods
description: Thierry and Amy Farges jump-started the food revolution in the '80s as wild mushroom importers and distributors to the restaurant and foodservice industry.  We pivoted to retail with a huge hit, Black Truffle Butter.  Thierry adapted his Dordogne grand-mère's recipes, rich in full-fat butters and truffles, to the American thirst for adventurous flavors.  As author of a cookbook and La Varenne graduate, Amy handles recipe development and marketing.  They share boisterous family meals, rich in flavor and conversation, as part of their heritage.

name: M.D. Science Lab
description: For over 25 years, MD Science Lab—makers of trusted wellness brands like Swiss Navy®, Happy Lube®, and Bioxgenic®—has been at the forefront of health innovation. Today, we are proud to launch our most groundbreaking venture yet: GoThryve, the first brand fully dedicated to clear, carbonated and a 25g protein in a can.GoThryve is more than a drink—it's a wellness breakthrough that reimagines how protein is delivered to a health-conscious, performance-driven, and refreshment-seeking audience.The name Thryve embodies our belief that true wellness goes beyond nutrition—it's about growing, developing, and succeeding vigorously, flourishing in both health and happiness. That's why we created GoThryve: to help people not just get stronger, but truly thrive in every aspect of life.Each can delivers 25g of pure whey protein isolate in a light, sparkling, fruit-forward beverage that's:Clear, clean, and carbonatedZero sugar, zero heavinessGluten- & lactose-freeSustainably packaged in recyclable aluminumWith twice the shelf life of traditional proteins and a format that's universally appealing, GoThryve empowers consumers to sip boldly, live fully, and fuel their best selves—anytime, anywhere.Feel the Power – GoThryve.

name: M2 Ingredients
description: Our founders, Sandra Carter (M.A. MPH, Ph.D.), a health and wellness expert with a PhD in preventative medicine, and Steve Farrar, a mycologist with over 30 years experience growing mushrooms, both have a deep-rooted passion for mushrooms. Om grows 11 species of mushrooms in our Certified 100% Organic, BRCGS AA rated Carlsbad, California facility.

name: MA-HA VIRTUE LLC
description: In the year 2022 what began as a serendipitous encounter on a playground in Alamo, California, between Raha Jamalian-Hershey and her founding partners Mahsa and Tanja, has now evolved into a global phenomenon set to dominate luxury lifestyle markets worldwide

name: MAAN DATES
description: MAAN Dates is powered by Royal Dates Group. With over 20 years of expertise, Royal Dates Group is a global leader in premium dates and date-based ingredients. Our carefully crafted portfolio including date paste, date syrup, chopped dates and date powder – delivers exceptional flavor and nutrition. Committed to quality, sustainability, and innovation, we proudly supply leading food manufacturers worldwide.

name: Maazah
description: Food has always been the way we preserve our rich heritage. Growing up in a first-gen, Afghan-American, immigrant household, Mom and (our aunties) were always cooking for our huge family. They bestowed upon us cherished cooking techniques, treasured secrets of our culinary heritage, and an obsession with flavor. Then…came the Magic Recipe. Our mom's ingenious spin on a homemade batch of traditional cilantro chutney changed our lives for good. After thousands of test batches, we decided to share the joy (and utter deliciousness) of our family's magic green sauce with the world.We built and bottled our emerging business by hand. Handcrafting our chutney sauces and gaining a beloved community at local farmers markets and co-ops across our home state.Then scaled it into the nation's favorite new condiment. No need to "cook" cook today. With just a squeeze, our flavorful Afghan-style sauces transform any dish into an extraordinary meal.

name: Mabi Artisanal Tea
description: Mabi Artisanal Tea's brand story is a celebration of Caribbean heritage and wellness innovation, perfectly aligning with the values and audience of Expo West. For over two centuries, Mauby—the core botanical in Mabi's cold-brew teas—has nourished Caribbean communities, cherished by pirates, merchants, and elders for its cooling, restorative properties and deep-rooted tradition. In the late 1990s, naturopathic visionary Dr. Marie Roberte Laurent revitalized this tradition, creating natural wellness blends grounded in ancestral wisdom and ethical sourcing. Today, Mabi Artisanal Tea harnesses her expertise, using sustainably sourced Mauby bark and fruits from women-led cooperatives in Haiti, infusing each batch with purpose, people, and product integrity. At its heart, Mabi democratizes wellness, offering clean-label, functional teas crafted to support clean energy, holistic hydration, and antioxidant protection—without caffeine crashes or artificial stimulants. Mabi's mission resonates with Expo West's ethos: fostering authentic connections, sustainability, and transparent innovation across the natural and organic products sector. Every sip is packed with Caribbean flavor and functional benefits, helping to boost immunity, energize mind and body, and promote stress relief. Behind each bottle stands a proud, black-owned business devoted to community empowerment, socioeconomic uplift, and servant leadership—embodied in partnerships that help Haitian women farmers thrive.As Expo West unites industry leaders, retailers, and passionate innovators in search of breakthrough natural products, Mabi stands out for its blend of heritage-rich storytelling, scientific rigor, and clean functional ingredients. With powerful adaptogens, superior antioxidant capacities, and a commitment to people and planet, Mabi invites Expo West attendees to discover a beverage that honors tradition while embracing the future of global wellness. Through transformative hydration and bold cultural identity, Mabi Artisanal Tea delivers more than refreshment—it brings a legacy of resilience and community to the heart of the natural and organic industry.Live Stronger, Naturally—with Mabi.

name: Machu Picchu Foods
description: We manufacture high-quality cocoa ingredients, chocolates, and snacks for private labels that captivate the international market. With a track record of over 30 years, our products have earned widespread recognition and can be found in over 40 countries across the globe.

name: Made Uncommon
description: UP-UP Chocolate is the fastest growing brand within the Made Uncommon portfolio, built on radical transparency, full traceability and a human-first supply chain.UP-UP works exclusively with cocoa from a single estate in Casenare in Colombia, creating full supply chain transparency from farm to finished bar. The farm is independently verified child labour free.Positioned boldly with the line “Great chocolate. No downside.” UP-UP challenges conventional cocoa sourcing while delivering commercially proven flavours including Plain Milk, Salted Caramel, Sweet Orange or Dark Cherry.UP-UP exists to demonstrate that fairness, transparency and exceptional taste can scale and it is rapidly gaining traction across modern retail as consumers demand greater accountability from the brands they buy.___________Made Uncommon Limited is a UK-based chocolate group with its own manufacturing facility, bringing together six premium brands under one vertically integrated structure.By combining design-led creativity, ethical sourcing and in-house UK production, the group serves distinct audiences across the modern chocolate market, from premium gifting to disruptive plant-based innovation and values-driven craft.The portfolio includes:COCO Chocolatier The original flagship brand. A premium, art-inspired chocolate brand stocked in leading retailers including Selfridges, Liberty, The Conran Shop and Anthropologie. Now a certified B Corp , COCO blends single-origin Colombian cocoa with collaborations from internationally recognised artists, creating a design-led confectionery experience.UP-UP Chocolate The group’s fastest growing brand. Single-estate Colombian cocoa, verified child labour free supply chain, fully traceable from origin to Edinburgh — and built on a mission to remove exploitation from chocolate.Otherly A playful, inclusive oat m*lk chocolate brand made with 100% plant-based ingredients . Certified B Corp and built around “the Otherly way” — celebrating difference and individuality — Otherly brings colour, positivity and contemporary energy to the plant-based category.Love Cocoa A purpose-led premium brand with accessible luxury positioning, strong gifting formats and a modern London sensibility, appealing to ethically minded mainstream consumers.H!P Chocolate A disruptive yet polished oat milk chocolate brand focused on bold flavours and plant-based innovation, designed to drive penetration within the mainstream grocery channel.Seed & Bean An ethics-first craft chocolate brand rooted in organic and fairly traded principles, known for flavour experimentation and values-led credibility.

name: Madly Hadley
description: After years of being a plant-based chef I decided to bring some of my favorite recipes to more people and founded Madly Hadley in 2018. People have been loving my Dairy-Free Parmesan Cheese and Plant-Based Bacon Bits. They are the perfect topping to add bold flavor to any dish.

name: Maestro Kitchen
description: Maestro Kitchen was born out of a dream—and a need to build something real together as a family. In 2021, our family moved from Mexico to California with little more than a strong work ethic, a deep love for food, and the desire to create a better future for our two children, Sebastián (9) and Nico (7).We began making our Chile Crunch in our home kitchen in Topanga, inspired by a cherished recipe passed down from Alfonso's mother. What started as a family favorite soon grew beyond our circle. Friends and neighbors kept asking for more jars, telling us they had never tasted anything like it. That's when we realized we had something truly special.We founded Maestro Kitchen in 2022 with one mission: to bring bold, authentic Mexican flavor to tables across America—starting with our handcrafted Chile Crunch. Every jar is made in small batches using olive oil, premium chiles, and no preservatives or additives. We don't cut corners, because we believe good food speaks for itself.At the heart of it all is our family. Maestro Kitchen grew around our dining table, with Sebastián and Nico helping label jars and pack orders. We've expanded from local farmers markets to stores across California and online platforms like Amazon. Yet, no matter how much we grow, we never lose sight of why we started: to offer people something flavorful, made with love, and truly different.We believe the kitchen table is the most important place in the home—the place for real connections, deep conversations, and shared moments with friends and family. If we can create a product that brings more of those "sobremesa" moments, that's what matters most.Today, Maestro Kitchen reflects our heritage, resilience, and passion for sharing culture through food. Above all, we aim to give our customers the best experience with their own food. We're just getting started—and can't wait for you to taste what's next.

name: Maeve Chocolate
description: Meet Maeve.We’re a bold little chocolate company born in Seattle, led by a mother-daughter duo and inspired by an Irish warrior queen with a serious sweet tooth.Our truffle bars and bonbons are crafted with care in a carbon-neutral factory, so your chocolate habit can do right by the planet and the people who grow the beans. We work with cocoa farmers in Peru, Ghana, Tanzania, Ecuador, and the Dominican Republic, and donate 10% of net profits to initiatives that support their communities.With imaginative flavors, whimsically wild packaging (yes, that is a hypnotized bear in a bonnet), and a deep love for everyday magic, Maeve is the kind of chocolate you can feel great about gifting to yourself.

name: Magic Chocolate, Inc.
description: Magic Chocolate was founded in 2024 by Maestrani Schokoladen, a 173-year-old Swiss chocolate maker and the producer of the world's first organic chocolate, and Joe Whinney, organic and fair-trade pioneer, founder and former CEO of Theo Chocolate. Maestrani and Joe worked with Dr. Bronner's to create and produce Dr. Bronner's All-One Magic Chocolate line. Dr. Bronner's realized to truly scale demand for regenerative organic cocoa and showcase the benefits of regenerative organic agriculture, their chocolate line needed someone at the helm that is fully dedicated to the chocolate business. Magic exists to set the highest possible standard for the chocolate inducts."The world does not need any more chocolate. It needs the right chocolate," said Joe Whinney. "We are not compromising on quality, pleasure of experience or the supply chain, and the only reason we committed to building Magic Chocolate is to radically improve the benefit of everyone who touches our product."

name: Magiktea
