description: Palo azul means "blue stick", and it gets its name because the bark of the plant is used to brew an incredible blue tea that is rich in fluorescent polyphenols which give it its blue color. These polyphenols also make it a powerful antioxidant & anti-inflammatory...so palo azul has been used as a traditional remedy for over 500 years in Central America to promote the health of the kidneys, liver, diabetes, arthritis, sciatica, gout, and urinary tract infections. Palo azul tea is also alkaline, 0 caffeine, 0 sugar, 0 calories and it has a smooth, earthy, refreshing flavor with bright undertones.Our family started Magiktea in 2020 to share this extraordinary tea with others so that everyone can enjoy mother nature's most magical tea. We've been doing demos at 200+ health markets across the U.S. (e.g. Erewhon, Bristol Farms, Gelsons, Lassens, Lazy Acres, Clark's Nutrition, Chamberlins, Earth Origins) and people love that it's beautiful, natural and healthy! We also exhibited at Expo West 2023 and debuted our biodegradable palo azul tea bags and people loved that they're more convenient to prepare and they're better for the environment.Our palo azul is USDA Certified Organic and all our packaging is made from post-consumer recycled material in order to reduce carbon emissions and plastic waste.

name: Magnum Coffee Roastery
description: Magnum Coffee Roastery is family-owned and headed by a true coffee connoisseur. Our owner, affectionately known as "The Big Bean," has been creating a buzz in the industry for over twenty-five years. His heavily caffeinated approach brings energy to our customers and an unmatched passion to the daily grind at the office. And under his guidance we have become one of the leading private label coffee suppliers in the country. Like many college students, The Big Bean developed a taste for coffee during late night study sessions at college. This led to his pursuit of a career in the emerging specialty and wholesale coffee business, and even a Master's thesis on the emerging specialty coffee industry. You could say that we could see the coffee specialization boom brewing long ago, and we've been on the forefront of the industry ever since.Our first business endeavors involved co-packing for other coffee roasters, but we quickly moved to roasting and packing of our own coffees. Applying our vast knowledge of and passion for the coffee industry, we have become experts in creating custom coffee packaging and other private label programs.

name: Magos Chips
description: MAGOS was born from a simple challenge—making a healthy food that brings people together, no matter their diet. Our team came together with vastly different dietary needs—some avoided carbs, others needed high protein, some wanted food for adventures, some wanted an easy option for their toddlers, and many had food allergies.Made from whole eggs, free from common allergens and seed oils, MAGOS is designed for ultimate inclusivity. Whether you're exploring the outdoors, powering through a busy day, or packing lunch for your kids, MAGOS delivers real food with real benefits.Because the best food is the kind everyone can enjoy.

name: Maine Crisp Company
description: Karen Getz was an award winning cheese maker working with her husband on their organic dairy farm in Vermont and with her celiac intolerance couldnt find a gluten free cracker that she thought was as good as her cheese. In 2015 she was traveling with her husband in the northernmost part of Maine and came about the Bouchard's 6th generation buckwheat farm. That was the beginning of her education into buckwheat and its amazing qualities as a gluten and grain free seed that is part of the rhubarb family. Her journey of making Maine Crisps began from her kitchen to a commercial space to an 1800 square foot plant and to our current 18,000 square foot state of the art plant in mid Maine where we are one of our towns leading employers.

name: Maison Maxine
description: Maison Maxine is a red wine spritzer crafted for a new generation of women. Our spritzers are made with Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon from our parent estate vineyard, and we add only three whole ingredients and carbonate it to make a slightly sweet, sparkling spritzer. Our spritzer is 5% ABV, and 5% of profits are donated to animals in need.

name: Maizly
description: Our founders, Tim and Marcel have found a way, using non-GMO corn, to develop a nutritious plant-based milk alternative that has a mouth-feel like dairy milk, and a smooth, round, natural taste so as not to impact on the underlying taste of whatever you add it to. A delicious flavored range and a custard have also been perfected..From thousands of different corn variants, Maïzly has identified the specific corn variant that not only provides a catalyst for the mouth-feel and look of dairy milk, but also for the unique characteristic of a complementary taste profile. Unlike the enzymatic process used for producing oat milk, there is no waste of either water or ingredients during the entire production process, adding to Maïzly's positive sustainability impact and cost competitiveness. The corn variant identified also has favorable properties when used in the flavored range, whereby unlike other plant-based milks, the flavor remains vibrant throughout the shelf-life. "Maïzly" is a registered trademark in all major economic centers around the world.The genesis of the Maïzly Infant Formula arose through personal travel experiences in Sub-Saharan Africa, where Tim and Marcel recognized the need for an affordable lactose-free infant formula that would be available in single serving and premixed sachets. In addition to the CODEX compliant formulas being developed, Maïzly has introduced the F100 and F75 formulas necessary for treating acute malnutrition in infants.

name: Majama
description: Always in search of the next tasty treat, our founder Riwa was surprised by how hard it was to find a delicious dessert made from pure, clean ingredients.It all started when she was studying in London and realized how consuming processed foods, gluten and dairy were harming her health. When she cut those ingredients out of my diet, my dessert cravings soared.Being in London, she had plenty of healthy dessert options but somehow, they just weren't satisfying enough.So she began experimenting, creating recipe after recipe in my kitchen. She shared her creations with family and friends and, much to their surprise, they loved it! They were convinced that natural foods, when done correctly, could taste just as good, if not better.It was that element of surprise that Majama aims to recreate time and time again. Using natural ingredients to reimagine flavours we all know and love, we are inspired to bring you joy.

name: Make Time Wellness, Inc.
description: Make Time was started by 2 women who care. Emma & Helen first connected while working on a beauty line togetherduring Covid. Through countless Zooms and endless days, we shared the common challenge of trying to make time forourselves while caring for our families and committing to our brain health journeys. Emma was unable to find anydigestible information about brain health, and Helen couldn't find a single supplement that supports women's brain, andbody. Why was no one talking to women about their brains? It was time to turn our frustration into a global conversation.

name: Malai
description: Founded in 2015 by Pooja Bavishi, Malai is a Brooklyn-based company revolutionizing the ice cream experience by using vibrant South Asian spices and ingredients as a nod to Pooja's first generation Indian-American upbringing. Malai's ice creams are innovative and celebrated for their robust flavors and creamy textures, offering an indulgence that is both nostalgic and unique. Malai's treats are always eggless, sometimes vegan, and come in a variety of delightful forms: ice cream, kulfi pops, ice cream cakes, and ice cream sandos. From scoop shops in NYC, DC and Philly, to nationwide shipping and select grocery store availability across the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic, Malai is making its mark.

name: Malama Mushrooms
description: Mālama first fruited in 2015 as a small farm in Kona, Hawaii when founder (& funguy) Benjamin produced his first Hawaii-grown mushrooms in an underground lava-formed cave. Ben was fascinated by the world of fungi and wanted to make his exploration of the world of mushrooms his job. Unfortunately, no one was hiring for 'enthusiastic mushroom guy' so he knew he had to create the job himself. Fast forward to today, he has wrangled in his family & friends to help him on his mushroom mission of creating & sharing high-quality fung-tional superfood mushroom products that integrate easily into your daily routine and to support your overall health & wellness. Every dollar supports their non-profit, the Hawaii Fungi Project; a citizen-science organization devoted to studying & preserving the native mushrooms of Hawaii. Only 7% of fungi species has been discovered, what potential benefits could be found in the remaining 93% undiscovered species? Benjamin intends to find out!

name: Malee Intenational Co.,Ltd
description: Malee Group Public Company Limited was established in 1978, as a manufacturer and distributor of canned food and canned fruits. After growing over time, the Company expanded its production capacity by building a factory in 1981. Now we are currently manufacturing and distributing canned fruits and UHT and pasteurized fruit juices under the "Malee" brand, distributing and marketing UHT and pasteurized milk under the brand " Farm Chokchai" as well as other beverages. In addition, the Company also engages in Contract Manufacturing Business (CMG) in which the Company produces beverage products under contracts for domestic and international customers.

name: Malt Products Corporation
description: Your choice for Natural & Organic products. Malt, Molasses, Agave, Bagel Best, Rice Syrup,Glucose,Invert,Oat Extract, Topioca, Honey. Locations in Noth America & Europe

name: Mama Torrez Salsa
description: The Mama Torrez Salsa Company, founded in 2017 in Spokane, Washington, was inspired by treasured family recipes brought to America all the way from Leon, Mexico. Passionate fans who discovered the fresh made salsas, coleslaw and chips at local farmers markets and craft fairs helped grow the brand into a regional favorite gradually stocked in grocery stores across Washington, Idaho, Oregon and Montana.

name: MAMA's Foods
description: Back in 2010, somewhere in the southern Balkans, there were three friends, all comfortably sitting in an old, traditional and well known restaurant in Skopje. In front of these three big gourmands was a rich dining table on which you could find absolutely everything that a hungry eye could wish for: salads, appetizers, pepper spreads, cheeses, few kinds of meet, Rakia and wine. Completely mesmerized by the different types of pepper spreads such as ajvar, lutenica, pindzur, dried and chopped peppers, etc.., they weren't aware that precisely these most delicious meals will be the reason for their loud discussion which followed. All of a sudden, Petar's statement disturbed the calm and homely atmosphere in the restaurant: "the ajvar is ingenious i swear. Only my mother's is better than this one!" Whether he said it intentionally or was provoked by the hot pepper, we do not know, but the dice was cast! The next one to speak up was Boban who, with a full mouth, claimed that his mother added a special spice in the Ajvar and that hers was the most delicious one in the world. Not to be left out, Kalin tried to convince his friends that the secret to any successful Ajvar is not in the spice but in the love that his mother gave while preparing it. This being said and without any specific conclusion, the three gourmands decided to take a trip around Macedonia to look for and find the best mother's homemade Ajvar, to personally discover how the secret recipe of this wonderful traditional delicacy is made. From many collected Ajvar's, from different areas across Europe, they have found the perfect MAMA'S recipe. Well, the rest is history. Now, MAMA'S represents a fusion of seductive flavors, layered with many years of tradition and a touch of love. Our mission is to please the refined tastes of all great food lovers around the world.MAMA'S wishes you the best moments to be created with our roasted pepper products! MAMA's Knows Best!

name: Manchester Farms
description: Bill Odom graduated from Clemson University with a degree in Poultry Science.  Out of college he went to work for Campbell Soup.  He helped them improve their program naturally and they wanted to promote him to New Jersey in the corporate office.  He asked how long the hunting season is and they said "two weeks" and he said "thank you for your time."  Bill is an avid quail hunter and applied the natural husbandry program to raising quail to train his hunting dogs.  He was quite successful in this such that he had too many quail.  The neighbors said "if you dress them, we will buy them".  So in the back yard on a picnic table hatched Manchester Farms.  He started out selling retail but then the chefs caught wind of the first commercially produced quail and started supporting our farm.  Fifty years later we are still supported by tops chefs and retailers across the country.  We are the only SQF Level 2, Animal Welfare Certified quail farm in the US.  Our quail eggs are antibiotic free, Halal and Kosher.  Quail and quail eggs are rich in nutrition.  Multi demographics love quail:  healthy conscious, children, pets, elderly, ethnic and foodies love quail and quail eggs.  Quail eggs are very on trend and seeing tremendous growth right now as well.

name: Manchiee De Coco Products
description: Manchiee De Coco Products established in 2012 with the purpose of providing high quality edible coconut products to the export market

name: Mancuso Vincenzo & C. srl
description: It was 1920 when the Mancuso the Mancuso family began selling their ice cream in the States. Here the founder Salvatore Mancuso, with his ice cream cart, conquers the Americans. In 1950, his son Vincenzo decides to move from Sicily to England. It is precisely here that the first small ice crema industry was born. The family returns to Sicily, in 1980,  where Mancuso Vincenzo & C. srl was born. The sons Salvatore, Antonio and Rosario carry on the family business, developing a solid company, famous throughout the world for the irresistible goodness of its products and the high quality of raw materials used.

name: Mane, Inc.
description: MANE Inc is a leading authority in the world of flavors, dedicated to solving taste challenges with creativity and expertise. As flavor experts, we specialize in crafting innovative flavors, natural colors, seasonings, and high-quality ingredients to elevate your culinary experiences. Our commitment to excellence ensures that every product we create resonates with the distinct tastes and preferences of our clients.

name: Manfredi Barbera e figli SPA
description: "Manfredi Barbera & Figli S.p.A.", founded in Sicily in 1894 by Lorenzo Barbera, is today one of the most internationally renowned olive-mills. Love for their land and passion merge with the most advanced technology to create unique products with exclusive Packaging that have become true ambassadors of Sicilian quality worldwide. Today the company is the beating heart of the Manfredi Barbera Group, controlling the other six companies, each of which has its own specific operating area.

name: Manitoba Harvest Hemp Foods
description: We’re Hemp’s Biggest FansManitoba Harvest’s mission to transform consumer health starts simply and sustainably: with hemp. Since 1998, we’ve grown our portfolio of hemp products with a dedication to quality, sustainability, and consumer wellness that has positioned the company as the global leader in hemp foods.

name: Manitoba Milling Company
description: Manitoba Flax is the consumer brand of Pizzey Ingredients, a leading flaxseed supplier. Manitoba Flax is a WBENC-certified Women Owned Enterprise, bringing the goodness of flaxseed from the Pizzey family's Canadian farm to consumers. Manitoba Flax offers two flavors of Flax Milk, both of which are unsweetened and contain 3,000 mg of ALA Omega 3, plant protein and fiber in each serving. Manitoba Flax also offers Premium Flax Powder and Coarsely Milled Flaxseed. All of our products are Non GMO Project Verified, Kosher, and free from all major allergens.

name: Manukora Manuka Honey
description: More than a decade ago, Mike, our founder, met Bryce Hooton one of New Zealand's founding beekeepers who knew all about making honey in harmony with Nature; he is blind and so lives his life by the sound of the bees.Bryce passed his incredible knowledge on toMike, and with that, he developed the Art of Ethical Beekeeping and founded Manukora.The desire of bringing this miracle of Nature to the world propelled Mike on an incredible journey that continues today, with every jar of Manukora that arrives in our customers hands.Established in New Zealand in 2015, we have invested heavily in unique beekeeping practices that prioritize the health of bees and their environments. The result of this is the best tasting honey on the planet referred to as, "Honey With Superpowers™".  This creamy caramel super honey contains unique antioxidants, prebiotics, and a special compound called 'MGO'. Manukora® is the leading brand within the fast-growing US Manuka category, with operations in both New Zealand and the United States. We believe that our customers should know exactly where their honey has come from and that is why each Manukora product has its own unique QR code so it can be tracked right back to its source. Here you can ;Meet the master beekeeper that produced the honey;Discover the remote location in New Zealand where your honey was harvested;Receive your own authenticity report;View comprehensive third party testing for your batchCertificates and food safety programs are super important to us. Below are some of our most highly regarded- B Corp® Certified- Manukora Ethical Beekeeping Standard- Non-GMO Project Verified- Detox Project Glyphosate Residue-free- SQF certified- QR Trace Technology on every product linking to source + third party testing.

name: Mapeks Gida
description: The majority of Türkiye's sunny and fertile lands, where the most delicious varieties of fruit and vegetables are grown, are located in Anatolia (Asia Minor). These lands are encircled by the Mediterranean Sea (to the South), the Aegean Sea (to the West), and the Black Sea (to the North). These regions, which were home to ancient civilizations, are located in this country which forms a natural bridge connecting Asia and Europe.With over 2 decades of its' experience Mapeks' facilities, which are equipped with the state-of-the-art technology and located in Afyon, Uşak, Bilecik and Malatya, label it as a leading producer of organic and conventional fruit and vegetables and as a leading constant supplier to customers around the world.

name: Mara Renewables
description: Mara Renewables improves health and wellbeing through the production of precision fermentation derived omega-3 DHA. Headquartered in Canada, Mara delivers premium, fish-free Omega-3 from microalgae for health-conscious businesses seeking sustainable solutions across the supplements, food and beverage, infant formula and animal nutrition sectors seeking healthier, more sustainable solutions. Our products promote healthier living while preserving marine ecosystems, by combining cutting-edge science, with a commitment to accessibility and enjoyable consumption for all.

name: Maria & Ricardo's
description: The company was founded in 1989 by cousins, Maria and Ricardo. who were one of the first of their time to believe that the best tasting tortillas came from using all natural ingredients resulting with the cleanest recipe possible.  While Maria and Ricardo are no longer part of the company, it has always remained in the hands of Mexican families who have a passion for delicious, real and simple tortillas and Mexican foods. Today, the company is owned and operated under the leadership of the Montemayor, who have a long  history of manufacturing high quality and delicious tortillas. Their passion for bringing Mexico's vibrant food culture to the U.S. market is evident in every package of Maria & Ricardo's tortillas.

name: Mariani
description: When it comes to the family behind the Mariani Packing Company, the desire to make high-quality and delicious dried fruit is in our DNA.  Five generations and more than a century in, this family-owned and operated California based company remains committed to our mission to produce the best-quality dried fruit so that families around the world can eat a little healthier – clean and simple. To do so relies on real, long-lasting relationships, built on trust and over time, with farmers, customers, partners, consumers, and Mother Nature herself.The Mariani family has a passion for driving industry innovation because we care about the products we produce – it’s what we feed our own families, and we value the trust that families everywhere put in our brand to fuel their lives.

name: Marich Confectionery
description: Marinus van Dam's journey began in Holland during World War II, where at just 15 years old, he took a job at a local candy factory to support his family. His daily task was to scrape candy from the factory floors across its four levels. Marinus's exceptional curiosity and work ethic impressed management, leading to his selection for Candy Technology School, funded by the company—an unusual opportunity in 1945.This educational path continued, allowing Marinus to master every facet of candy production, from handcrafted chocolates to jellies, caramels, taffy, nougats, gums, mints, and licorices. In 1957, seeking the American dream, Marinus left for the United States, initially working for a small confectionery in Ohio before moving to California to join a larger company. His tenure there contributed significantly to its growth, establishing it as one of the nation's premier confectionery firms.After decades of employment, Marinus embarked on entrepreneurship in 1983, co-founding Marich Confectionery Company with partners. At Marich, Marinus instilled a foundational ethos: understanding every aspect of the business from the ground up. This meant starting with menial tasks like cleaning and gradually mastering candy making. His philosophy, rooted in traditional Dutch values, emphasized the necessity of knowing how to maintain cleanliness and operate equipment—skills essential for effective leadership.Marinus passed on his expertise to his children, who joined him in the family business. They too began with humble responsibilities, learning not only the art of candy making but also practical skills such as welding, electrical work, and equipment installation—critical for sustaining operations in a family enterprise.Reflecting on their journey, Marinus's children recognize the universal challenges and rewards of family businesses. Their father's legacy lives on in Marich Confectionery, a testament to his perseverance, innovation, and dedication to quality—a sweet success story shaped by resilience and a passion for craftsmanship.

name: Marimix Company, Inc.
description: Marimix was founded in 1993 by Mari Fassett, a 4th-generation Japanese American who graduated college with a big bite from the entrepreneur bug. Inspired by the wildly addictive concoctions that Mari had been making since childhood, the original Marimix was a pioneer for specialty snacks.30 years later, Crunch-Baked Snackmix makes it renewed debut in 2022 leading a meaningful evolution for Marimix towards better-for-you innovation. For Mari, a proud mother of three brilliant daughters, the future of Marimix reflects her personal growth as a business leader and a grateful survivor of a brain aneurysm in 2017. "In the journey to recovery, and through the strength of my family," says Mari, "I felt an opportunity…a responsibility…to champion everyday wellness for myself, and for our customers." Marimix is proud to be:•	A woman & minority-owned business•	A 30-year member of the Orange, California business community•	The exclusive manufacturer of all Marimix products

name: MARIN FOOD USA Inc.
description: Marinfood is a food producer that produces and sells various food products including margarine, cheese and hotcakes. Since founding in 1957, it has served clients for 60 years. Besides industrial products for schools, hotels, restaurants, cafes and other food producers, it recently has earned clientele for home products for retail stores.

name: Marina Del Rey Foods, Frankie's Organic Foods
Marine Resources Development Co., Ltd
description: 'I think I must have fish sauce running through my veins. My late grandfather established his fish sauce company over 100 years ago, and some of my earliest memories are of playing among mounds of fish and vats of the pungent sauce. Later I remember him walking me around his shop, proudly explaining how he made such a fine product.'Over the years many fish sauce brands have come onto the market, and yet somehow none have quite matched my grandfather's achievement.Megachef Fish Sauce is the attempt to capture that wonderful taste once again. However, this is a new generation of fish sauce : blending past practices with modern requirements. The traditional methods have been followed in order to obtain an authentic taste, but modern food technologies have been applied to create the healthiest of condiments with the cleanest of flavours.Bhas Nithipitikarn, Managing Director

name: Marroquin Organic International
description: Marroquin stands out as a pioneer in the organic market with over 30 years of experience, offering a curated portfolio of high-quality organic ingredients with full traceability. Our agile, multinational distribution network ensures quick delivery across North America, Canada and parts of South America, backed by exclusive partnerships and a commitment to long-term relationships.

name: MARTINOROSSI
description: MartinoRossi is an Italian company specialised in the production of semi-finished products, plant-based and protein ingredients from cereals and legumes. All products are gluten-free, allergen-free and non-GMO, developed to the highest standards of quality, food safety and functionality, with a focus on versatility, performance and clean-label formulations.For the food industry, MartinoRossi offers flours, semi-finished products, functional and clean-label ingredients, as well as plant-based and protein solutions, developed in collaboration with clients to meet specific application needs.MartinoRossi also serves retail and professional channels through its brands. Beamy provides plant-based legume products free from gluten, soy and allergens, rich in protein and fibre. Goodly offers gluten-free oats, granola, plant-based protein powders and allergen-free sweet mixes. Mr.Beans transforms Italian legumes into savoury snacks, sweet bars and spreads. Mais Corvino is an exclusive black corn variety available as flour and in finished products such as pasta, biscuits, snacks and beer, all strictly gluten-free. For professional kitchens and catering, MartinoRossi Professionalprovides a wide range of flours, gluten-free mixes and plant-based preparations designed for modern culinary applications.With a strong focus on innovation, sustainability and customer collaboration, MartinoRossi delivers reliable, high-performance solutions that help shape the plant-based and functional food of tomorrow.

name: Marukai Corporation
description: Dean & Co. was born from a passion for creating food that supports a healthy, active, and natural lifestyle. Using simple, additive-free ingredients like fruits and spices, we craft delicious, honest foods that connect people with nature — and with each other — through everyday meals.

name: Marukan Vinegar U.S.A., Inc.
description: Home of The World's Finest Rice Vinegar™, Marukan produces premium, seasoned, unseasoned and organic rice vinegars, apple cider vinegars and ponzu soy dressings using traditional, centuries-old methods perfected in Japan to give Marukan its unique and legendary flavor. Marukan Vinegar (U.S.A.) Inc., is a division of Marukan Vinegar Co., Ltd., founded in 1649 in Kiyosu, Japan. A family-owned company for ten generations, Marukan has perfected the slow-brewing of rice vinegar and offers Genuine Brewed and Organic varieties that are free of sugar and salt and Seasoned Gourmet, Lite Seasoned, and Organic Seasoned products for that sweet and tangy taste. Marukan Rice Vinegar is most popularly used in salads, sauces, sushi and pickling.

name: Mary's Gone Crackers
description: The first Mary's Gone Crackers® seed was planted the day Mary discovered the power to create amazingly appetizing, gluten-free snacks using wholesome ingredients. The popularity of her tantalizingly tasty crackers quickly spread far beyond her home kitchen—inspiring her to leave behind a successful career to take a chance on her true passion. We continue to build on Mary's original ingenuity by baking fabulously flavorful, seed-crafted snacks for you to crunch, top, dip, share and love.

name: MASA Chips
description: Our MASA chips are corn-based tortilla chips fried in beef tallow. They were the first snack we launched, and the one that started it all!It all began when Steven and Seth were hanging out, and Seth was eating tortilla chips fried in seed oils. Steven started ranting about how unhealthy seed oils are and how there weren't any good-tasting, seed oil-free chips on the market. They joked about starting a business to fix that problem-then in 2022 they decided to actually do it. The goal: to create a real, nourishing tortilla chip that didn't compromise on flavor or crunch. And just like that, MASA was born.Our Vandy Crisps are our potato-based chip, fried in beef tallow. Vandy started because, since day one, our MASA customers have asked us to make a potato chip in a similar style. We rose to meet the demand.

name: Mason Dixie Foods
description: Ayeshah Abuelhiga missed the comfort food she ate growing up – made with fresh ingredients, from scratch, like she learned from her immigrant parents who taught her about cooking clean. No one in fast food cared about the quality of ingredients, so she decided to change that by opening a restaurant in 2014. The restaurant had mile-long lines, sold-out daily, and expanded across the DC metro region.Retailers took notice. They wanted better for their customers too. So Mason Dixie launched a frozen biscuit line into grocery in 2015 and expanded into frozen breakfast sandwiches - just like the ones served at her restaurant - in 2021.Our products can now be found in 9000+ grocery and hospitality locations nationwide.

name: Mason Vitamins
description: Since 1967, Mason Natural has produced quality vitamins and supplements under cGMPs (current Good Manufacturing Practices) and adhering to US guidelines. For Better Health, Better You!

name: Master Martini
description: A global leader in premium bakery ingredients, Master Martini specializes in high-quality vegetable fats, compound, chocolate, margarine and more. We operate at the intersection of tradition and technology, focusing on superior raw materials and sustainable manufacturing. Through a culture of care and transparency, we transform market insights into world-class products that help our customers succeed.

name: MASTER SWEETENER
description: Master Sweetener offers a wide range of products, including Organic Rrown Rice syrups, Rice Syrup Solids and Maltodextrin, Also produce Organic Tapioc Syrups, Solid and Maltodextrin. Our products are made with high-quality ingredients and are designed to meet the needs of our customers. Our company has over 10 years of experience in the rice industry. They produce traceable, sustainable, and premium-quality glucose syrup that meets international standards.

name: Matcha Star
description: Matcha Star is designed to create perfectly foamy drinks — no batteries, cords, or power required!Our stainless steel spring coil effortlessly whips up big, fluffy foam in seconds, making it ideal for matcha lattes, iced coffees, frothy hot chocolate, and more.Crafted from durable, food-grade ABS and stainless steel, Matcha Star is built for everyday use while delivering consistently smooth, clump-free results.Locally designed and made in Los Angeles, Matcha Star celebrates sustainability, quality, and versatility. Perfect Foam Every Time: Achieve cafe-quality foam for matcha, milk, or any favorite drink.Eco-Friendly Design: No batteries or electricity required.Premium Materials: Food-grade ABS and stainless steel Locally Made: Designed and produced in Los AngelesVersatile: Great for matcha, coffee, hot chocolate, and beyond.Product Description: Length: 10 inchesCoil Base Width: 2 inchesHandle Width: 7/8 inchElevate Your Beverages with Matcha Star!

name: Matcha Village Inc
description: Riching is a professional supplier of premium matcha and tea products based in China. We are dedicated to providing high-quality organic matcha and related products to customers worldwide, including Organic Ceremonial Grade Matcha, Organic Premium Grade Matcha, Organic Culinary Grade Matcha, as well as Matcha Bamboo Whisk Sets, Matcha Latte Powder, Hojicha, Genmaicha, and Jasmine Matcha Powder.Custom ServicesWe offer OEM services and custom packaging solutions, supporting private labeling and bulk wholesale to meet the diverse needs of our B2B clients.Exports and CustomersRiching Matcha exports to over 30 countries, including North America, Europe, Australia, New Zealand, Mexico, and Brazil. Our customers include tea shops, health food stores, supermarkets, cafes, Asian restaurants, and food ingredient importers. We are trusted and recognized by B2B partners globally.

name: Matco Foods Limited
description: Matco Foods is a leading publicly traded agribusiness in South Asia, specializing in convenient packaged consumer goods and high-quality ingredients. Our product range primarily includes Basmati rice, 1121 Basmati Rice, Organic Brown and White Rice, as well as Organic and Conventional Rice Syrups, Brown Rice Syrup, Rice Proteins, Sweeteners, Corn Starch, Maltodextrin, and Dextrose Monohydrate. We also offer Himalayan pink salt, seasonings, spices, gluten-free flour, and various functional ingredients.All of our products are non-GMO and free from artificial ingredients. Matco Foods is certified organic by Control Union, USDA, and EU standards, and holds additional certifications from KOSHER, HACCP, BRC, and ISO.Our Products Include:•	Basmati Rice / Organic Brown Rice•	1121 Basmati Rice / Organic 1121 Basmati RiceSuper Kernel Basmati Rice •	Brown Rice / Organic Brown Rice•	Long Grain Rice•	Organic Rice Syrups•	Rice Syrup•	Brown Rice Syrup•	Rice Protein•	Sweeteners•	Tapioca Syrup•	Corn Starch•	Tapioca Starch•	Maltodextrin•	Dextrose Monohydrate•	Seasoning•	Pink Salt•	Spices•	Recipe Mixes•	Ginger & Garlic Powder & Pastes

name: Matter
description: Matter was created to close the gap between people’s desire to live more sustainably and the everyday products available to them. We design compostable household and foodservice products that combine performance, style, convenience, and a thoughtful end of life. Our entire product catalog—including storage bags, waste bags, cups, tabletop items, cutlery, and straws—is third‑party certified compostable. Guided by the belief that what products are made from and where they go next truly matter, we’re working to make regenerative, circular solutions more accessible in real kitchens, retail environments, and foodservice operations.

name: Mavericks Snacks
description: Mavericks was created for families who love snacks but want to feel better about the ones they bring home. We grew up on the classics, and we didn’t want to give those flavors up. We just wanted them made with a little more intention.Being a Maverick isn’t about being loud for the sake of it. It’s about questioning the default, raising your standards, and choosing better, even when the easy option is right there. So we set out to reinvent everyday snacks with thoughtful ingredients, familiar flavors, and standards that actually make sense for today's families.

name: MaxiNutrition
description: MaxiNutrition was founded in the UK in 1992 on the belief that athletes deserved better — better science, better ingredients, and better results. We were the first UK sports nutrition brand to screen products for banned substances, setting a new gold standard for clean, trustworthy supplementation. Today, we combine decades of expertise with cutting-edge research to power the next generation of athletes.Acquired by the Kruger Group in 2017, MaxiNutrition reformulated all of its products to win on taste, and establish itself as a premier sports nutrition brand, expanding across the EU.Today, we are expanding into the US with best in class protein bars and hydration mixes!

name: Maybliss
description: Maybliss was born end of 2022 and out of personal necessity. As someone who struggled for years to stay consistent with my supplements while traveling, I found the existing solutions frustrating—messy, unreliable, and often made from cheap, toxic materials. Determined to create something better, I spent four years and 47 prototypes developing a system that truly worked. What began as a personal problem evolved into a mission: to design a pill organizer that supports wellness, feels intentional, and brings more care into the everyday routine. BlissPod is made from premium, toxin-free materials and built to last a lifetime—offering a cleaner, more sustainable alternative to traditional plastic pillboxes. At Maybliss, we believe wellness should never come at the expense of your health or the planet.

name: McCormick Corporation
description: Best known today for its iconic red-cap spices that line grocery store shelves and home pantries, McCormick had humble beginnings. Founder Willoughby McCormick started the company in the basement of a Baltimore home in 1889, and went door-to-door selling the company's spices and extracts. Once the flavors of McCormick caught on, the company moved into more suitable Baltimore headquarters. From there, the company continued to expand rapidly, and has yet to slow down.

name: Meaningful Mantras
description: At Meaningful Mantras, we believe that every breath should be a reminder of well-being. Our mission is to create clean, healthy, and truly natural scents for your home—without chemicals or synthetic fragrances. We carefully craft each candle and product to offer you a peaceful, nourishing atmosphere that supports your body, mind, and spirit. Our commitment to purity ensures that every moment spent in your space is an invitation to pause, breathe deeply, and embrace calm.Meaningful Mantras was born out of a desire to bring more balance and wellness into everyday life. As a small business with a big heart, we set out to create a line of candles and home fragrances that are as clean and pure as the air you breathe. Tired of the harsh, synthetic fragrances that flood the market, we decided to take a different approach—one that honors nature and your health.We source only the finest natural ingredients, from essential oils to sustainable wax, to craft our scents. No chemicals, no artificial additives—just the power of nature in every candle. Each of our products is made with care and intention, designed to create a calming, rejuvenating atmosphere that helps you connect with yourself and the space around you. Whether you're unwinding after a long day or setting the mood for a peaceful evening, Meaningful Mantras is here to support you on your journey to a healthier, more mindful home.Join us in creating a space filled with clean, uplifting scents that are not only good for your home but also good for you. It's time to let your space speak the language of well-being. and Positivity.

name: Meati
description: Though Tyler Huggins and Justin Whiteley grew up in different parts of the country, they shared a passion for science, the environment, and addressing humanity's most pressing challenges that would bring them together in 2015 as Ph.D. students in Colorado. Within months of beginning to collaboratively research mushroom root (aka mycelium), they knew they had a nature-based tool for taking on many global issues. Over beers at a Boulder brewery in April 2016, they decided to start a company that would guide fungi's miraculous biotechnological power toward efficiently meeting humanity's needs. When their deeper investigation of crafting protein from mushroom roots crossed paths with growing public alarm about the food system, their big ambitions had finally found a home: Eat Meati?, a company that would provide delicious, nutritious, and Earth-friendly nutrition to everyone.

name: Meatwell
description: We are a family-owned business, producing high quality, culinary crafted meat for over two generations. We, like most American households, believe that meat protein should be the cornerstone of every wholesome meal. However, like most families with busy schedules, we struggle to find the time to prepare meats for the entire family to enjoy. In the past few years, we made it our goal to create a line of proteins that are nutritious, satisfying, delicious and ready in minutes! Cheers to your health! Meatwell my friends!

name: Medase Cocktails
description: MEDASE, a premium ready-to-drink zero-proof cocktail brand redefining how people celebrate, connect, and unwind—without alcohol.  MEDASE is a sophisticated, inclusive option for modern consumers who want the ritual and taste of a cocktail with none of the compromise.

name: Medex Trade d.o.o
description: IN LOVE with bees. DEDICATED to improving the lives of people. COMMITTED to creating a world friendly to bees and people.Medex is a family company which has been passionately connected to bees for 70 years. As pioneers of apitherapy we are improving the lives of people with natural, efficient and innovative food supplements based on bee products and other gifts of an intact nature.We are upgrading the traditional use of bee products with clinically supported innovations – from nature to laboratories and then to people! By realising our sustainable mission we are co-creating a world that is friendly to indispensable bees, which are responsible for a third of global food production, and to people – all people, not just a few.

name: Medifoods Thailand
description: Jasgo is born from a passion for Thai Jasmine Rice—one of the finest and most fragrant rice varieties in the world. The name "Jasgo" represents the perfect blend of our heritage and modern convenience, combining "Jasmine Rice" with "Go," symbolizing our commitment to making healthy, delicious rice-based products that fit seamlessly into busy lifestyles.Our journey began over 50 years ago with a deep-rooted commitment to sustainable farming and community support. As an integrated "Farm to Fork" company, we have worked closely with local farmers, ensuring that every grain of rice is grown organically, without chemicals, and with the utmost care for the environment. Our dedication to sustainability not only protects the health of our consumers but also uplifts farming communities by providing fair trade opportunities and empowering them to grow with us.In 2025, we launched Jasgo as a response to the evolving needs of modern consumers who seek convenience without compromising on health, taste, and authenticity. Thai Jasmine Rice is renowned for its delicate fragrance, soft texture, and naturally delicious flavor. At Jasgo, we take this exceptional grain and transform it into fun, functional, and plant-based products that can be enjoyed anytime, anywhere. Whether you're at home, at work, or on the go, our products are designed to bring the authentic taste of Thailand to your table effortlessly.Our mission is to offer healthy, convenient, and chemical-free rice-based solutions that align with today's fast-paced lifestyles. Every product we create is vegan, packed with functional benefits, and crafted with care to preserve the authentic flavors that make Thai cuisine so special.Jasgo is more than just a brand; it's a celebration of tradition, innovation, and well-being. We invite you to join us on this exciting journey as we continue to create delicious, sustainable, and wholesome rice-based products that bring joy and nourishment to people around the world.

name: MEDOLIO SA
description: Medolio was founded with a clear vision: to bring the finest Greek Extra Virgin Olive Oil and table olives to tables worldwide, combining exceptional quality with authenticity and tradition. As a member of one of the largest and most respected business groups in Greece's food industry, Medolio benefits from extensive expertise, advanced technological infrastructure, and a long-standing presence in global markets. This foundation provides the stability and credibility necessary to support large-scale exports and professional partnerships across demanding international markets.What truly distinguishes Medolio is our hands-on approach and close connection to the source. We work directly with carefully selected olive groves, overseeing the harvest and collaborating closely with local farmers to ensure only the best olives are brought to our mills. Our team is present at the olive mills, supervising every stage of the pressing process to guarantee that the natural flavors, aromas, and nutritional value of the olives are preserved. This engagement from grove to mill ensures traceability, quality, and consistency in every bottle of olive oil and every jar of table olives we produce.Our commitment goes beyond quality; it reflects the values we uphold as a company. Sustainability, respect for traditional practices, and ethical production are at the core of everything we do. By integrating modern technology with time-honored methods, we are able to produce products that honor Greek heritage while meeting the expectations of contemporary global consumers.Through this dedication, Medolio has become a trusted partner for chefs, retailers, and consumers alike. Each product we create tells the story of Greece's rich olive cultivation, its landscape, and its people. Our mission is not only to nourish but also to inspire, bringing the genuine taste of Greek olives and olive oil to every table, every time.

name: Meelunie America
description: Meelunie is a global supplier of plant-based ingredients; Starches, Proteins, and Sweeteners. Our product range covers a wide variety of food, animal nutrition, and industrial applications, and includes trusted brands such as Windmill, Pet Focused Promill, and our Fava Bean House of Proteins alongside an ever-growing assortment of organic products. Products include Organic and Conventional Tapioca, Rice, Non-GMO IP Corn Syrups. A truly global company, we have offices spread over five continents and export to over 100 countries. But our added value goes far beyond that of a supplier. From risk management to multi-sourcing, and quality assurance to tailor-made supply chains, we can draw on 150 years of experience to develop comprehensive solutions designed to meet your specific needs.

name: Mega Prime Foods Inc.
description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wE8LGX3bGsYMega Prime Foods Inc. (MPFI) is more than just a food company—it's a celebration of Filipino pride and excellence. As it marks its 50th year of legacy in 2025, MPFI remains dedicated to uplifting lives and bringing pride to Filipinos around the world. With a mission to deliver world-class brands that resonate globally, including Mega Sardines, Philippines' number 1 sardine brand, the company upholds its core values: God-centeredness, compassion (malasakit), innovation, customer mindfulness, and unwavering integrity.MPFI's diverse product portfolio features well-loved household names such as Mega Tuna, Mega Mackerel, Mega Prime fruits and vegetables, Primo Sparkling Juice, and Jimm's Coffee Mix.Continuing to expand its reach, MPFI proudly exports to countries like China and Australia, as well as regions across Europe and the Americas, ensuring Filipino products are enjoyed worldwide. With its steadfast commitment to quality and innovation, MPFI enriches lives and showcases Filipino excellence on the global stage.

name: MegaFood
description: MegaFood was born to put the power of plants to work to revitalize the health of people and the planet. That mission has guided over fifty years of scientific inquiry and technical expertise to deliver the most effective plant-powered vitamins and minerals available today. Every one of our products is rigorously researched, carefully developed, and thoroughly tested to deliver the benefits we promise. Ingredient effects and sources are scrupulously studied and vetted before production begins in our best-in-class manufacturing facilities. All products are then verified to meet our industry-setting standards in certified laboratories. Every step of this carefully coordinated process ensures the purity and potency that can safeguard and support the well-being of the customers we serve.That goal extends to maintaining the B Corporation status that certifies our commitment to making a positive impact on the full circle of resources that sustain us all. From the healthy soil that nurtures our nutrient-dense natural ingredients to the wider world we support by donating at least 1% of our profits to environmental causes—we work daily to create the plant-powered supplements that can serve both people and the planet best.

name: MegaMex Foods LLC
description: The HERDEZ brand was first launched in Mexico in the 1950's.  In 2009, Herdez Del Fuerte partnered with Hormel Foods in the United States to create MegaMex Foods.   The HERDEZ brand allows consumers to experience the real flavor of Mexico at home with authentic salsas and sauces.  The HERDEZ brand is the #1 selling salsa in Mexico.

name: Mehrotra Consumer Products Pvt. ltd.
description: Mehrotra Consumer Products Pvt. Ltd. was established in 2012. Organic Tattva is Mehrotra Consumer Product Pvt. Ltd.'s own brand of organic everyday grocery products for the Indian and International household.Currently working exclusively with over 9000 farmers in 6 Indian states across 12000 Hectare of agricultural land for Pulses, Wheat, Rice, Spices and Oilseeds. We are growing our coverage to more certified Organic farmers with a target of directly working with more than 25000 farmers in the next 2 years. We adhere to the stringent rules laid down by APEDA, Ministry of Agriculture. We are certified Organic as per USDA-NOP, India Organic – NPOP and European Union standards. We export international quality products to markets across USA, Middle East and Asia.In the domestic market, our products reach over 7000 stores across India and all Modern Retail stores and Ecommerce platforms.We have a highly automated 200,000 sq. ft. processing plant built to global quality & hygiene standards .

name: Mekhala Living Inc
description: Mekhala Co-founders Daphne & Diane grew up in a food-loving home in multicultural Singapore, where a scrumptious, home cooked meal meant 'I Love You'. Frustrated with the artificial additives and preservatives, and the high amounts of sugar in most Asian store-bought products, the duo developed a range of clean, flavorful, and easy-to-use Asian-inspired products for the time-pressed modern cook. Using beautiful ingredients sourced from local farmers, our female-led Thai team manufactures Mekhala's products in our very own facility in Chiang Mai ensuring top quality control.Asian & women founded & run, Mekhala is an equal opportunity company. We are committed to empowering women and youths in our local community via proper employment benefits and internship opportunities with a local charity Schools of Hope.

name: Meli Wraps
description: In 2016 Meli Wraps was born out of a deep love for our oceans and the planet we all share. Melia Foster, the owner and Co founder of Meli Wraps, started the company with her childhood friend Nicole Galchutt as a means to reduce plastic waste locally, and some day globally. As a mom, Melia wanted her children and their children to be able to enjoy the beautiful beaches she had always known. Melia's love for her family, the ocean, and wildlife of the world led her to create a business that would reduce single use plastic, support local beekeepers (and bees!), and provide local jobs in Hawaii.

name: MELISSA KIKIZAS S.A
description: The journey of Melissa pasta to your plate begins from the Greek land. In the field where the selection of the durum wheat takes place. We always care to choose the best, because we know that this is the basis for the high quality and taste that we want to offer you. For this reason, we created the Melissa Wheat Academy. Having long-term partnerships with the local producers, we ensure that they will continue to cultivate the land with care and with the most modern agricultural practices. This care continues even after the harvest in June, when the grains of the wheat are milled to the finest semolina. Then, in our pasta factory, we create all the different pasta shapes that are then packaged to reach every corner of the world. This is the journey filled with care from Melissa to the plate of every pasta lover. So that everyone can enjoy a flavorful experience that arises from pure and carefully selected ingredients from the Greek land, to discover a range of options that suit their own needs. An exciting journey that can fill your table with classic flavors, modern and innovative proposals, and choices of high nutritional value. From yesterday, to tomorrow and forever.MELISSA

name: Melograno Cocktails
description: Founders– Reza and Shiva Mortazavi, a husband and wife team based in San Diego – were inspired and influenced by the current trending industry to create a product they have yet to see, so they took a creators approach. One that aligned with their values and wellness philosophy vs. a mass manufacturer's approach - chasing flavors and copy and paste design.Both my husband and I have true entrepreneurial spirits. We always knew we wanted to create a brand together and build something from the ground up. During our travels, at friends/family gatherings and even at upscale events, we noticed your classic offerings: the staple canned seltzers, beers or mixed cocktails. We wanted to create something that was intentionally different from the rest. Something that you could hold in your hand that exuded luxury and design…and that tasted delicious. Why can't a canned cocktail do both?We knew that if we created something with outstanding package design, more complex and flavorful options and quality ingredients we could elevate the image of the entire RTD category.  And early feedback is indicating that we did just that. We have complementary skills…Reza would describe me as a serial entrepreneur with a curiosity and creativity that is endless - and creating a new product like this, you get to engage your senses in product development. We both really enjoyed this phase. Lots of tastings and liquid development sessions!! Reza is truly a leader in all things operations and raising funding - business is his passion. We worked together on every aspect of building the business learning about the manufacturing, sourcing and logistics, state laws and regulations - all of it new and exciting to learn and master. We decided on San Diego because San Diego is home. I grew up in San Diego for the last 30 years.Melograno means "Pomegranate" in Italian and our travels around the world inspired us when creating Melograno. Italy holds such a special place in mine and Reza's heart.

name: Melona Ice Cream
description: The brand was founded in Korea originally before opening the US branch in 2016. Honeydew was an expensive fruit that most people didn't have access to. We wanted Koreans to try the great flavors of the fruit, and made ice cream with honeydew flavor. It became an instant hit and has been a bestseller ever since.

name: Melting Forest
description: Melting Forest is your portal to holistic well-being, rooted in the world of functional mushrooms. Our founders, deeply immersed in holistic health, discovered the power of these mushrooms for stress relief and energy enhancement. We crafted mushroom-infused gummies and Energy Drinks and D-Stress drinks as natural, holistic solutions. Our commitment extends to sustainability, ensuring we provide the best while caring for the environment.Melting Forest opens the door to a balanced and harmonious lifestyle, harnessing nature's gifts for your well-being.

name: MEM Fairway Inc
description: With over 25 years of experience, MEM Fairway Inc. specializes in marketing a wide range of nuts, seeds, dried fruits, and other specialty commodities from top producers around the world, bringing them to you all year round. Our mission is to provide high-quality customer service to all our customers and vendors with promptness, courtesy, and intelligence. We strive to be an essential source of relevant product and market information for our partners, facilitating a streamlined and hassle-free transaction from start to finish.Our brand MMMM Good Foods opened its doors in May 2024 with a single mission: to bring you the freshest and best-tasting nuts and dried fruit, straight from the orchards to your hands. With 25 years of working in the bulk sector, its founder has the ability to choose the best farms dedicated to cultivating the perfect products. Their favorite nut? Pistachios! And it was natural that this is the first product the brand launched. Dedicated to sourcing the biggest and best roasted pistachios and freshest kernels from the Golden State, we bring to you mmmm Pistachios!

name: MERIT FOOD PRODUCTS CO., LTD
description: Founded in 1993, our brand began with organic canned coconut milk. Over the years, we have expanded into coconut water, coconut oil, coconut flour, coconut flakes, as well as canned curry pastes and sauces, while maintaining our commitment to quality, food safety, and organic standards.

name: Meriwether Farms
description: We all remember during COVID when there were various grocery stores that couldn't provide food, specifically meat, on the shelves. The founder of the company was so alarmed by this, that she left a career in Washington, DC in order to prioritize protecting Americans' access to healthy and wholesome food. The founder took an operational and multigenerational family-run farm, and with her connections and resources, brought the beef raised there directly to consumers. The company owns a 14,000 square foot state of the art processing facility in which all the beef is humanely harvested, cut and packaged. Unlike other direct to consumer beef companies, who outsource a lot of the supply chain, Meriwether controls the whole chain, making it immune to various market fluctuations, supply chain interruptions, and other instances that can simply put small food producers out of business. This also ensures that Meriwether Farms' customers feel truly confident that they know where their beef is coming from.

name: MEURISSE CHOCOLATES (represented by AMEICO U.S.)
description: Founded in 1845, Meurisse is the oldest Belgium Chocolate company in existence.

name: Mexilink - Zambos and Nutrissimo
description: We are a professional multicultural team developing successful brands with passion, creativity and efficiency through strategic planning, profound knowledge and deep relationships with consumers, distributors, retailers and partner brands ensuring excellent US market execution.

name: Mezete Food Production
description: At Mèzete, we have a "Passion for Food"; an expression of our heritage and culture.  Our Authentic, Middle Eastern Cuisine is a profound culinary experience, and we are on a mission to share it with the world.  Mèzete Middle Eastern Food is not just a form of sustenance, but a meaningful experience meant to be savored.  Whether it be Mèzete velvety Hummus drizzled with extra virgin olive oil; a comforting bowl of Mèzete Adas Aromatic Lentil Soup with a squeeze of lemon juice; or delicious falafel wrap enhanced with Mèzete Tahini Sauce – Our Food is a flavorful, authentic, truly Middle Eastern experience.     While we have spent over 90 years manufacturing the highest quality food products in Jordan – in the heart of the Middle East,  the Mèzete brand was born in 2020 to bring our Founder's vision to life and to share the healthy and delicious cuisine of our region with the world.     Since we started just 3 years ago, we have reached consumers in 45+ countries and we're excited to share the authentic taste of the Middle East; from our part of the world to yours!

name: Mezzetta & Jeff’s Garden
description: We're a family-owned company 90 years in the making and we're on a mission - to bring a little happiness to everyday life through handed-down recipes & unforgettable flavors.

name: Mianyang Shengshi Health Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Mianyang Shengshi Health Technology Co., Ltd. is a synthetic biology platform and direct manufacturer specializing in API project incubation and scale-up. Founded in 2020, we focus on anti-aging and general health, with core expertise in (chiral) special amino acids, nucleic acid polypeptides, and anti-aging factors.We provide end-to-end solutions—from raw material R&D and manufacturing to OEM/ODM services—serving functional health foods, medical cosmetics, pharmaceutical intermediates, and APIs.

name: Michele's Granola
description: At Michele's Granola, we believe real food, made in a real way, is better for the health of our customers and the planet, and it tastes better, too.We're feeding the greater good by putting real, wholesome, and delicious food back into people's pantries. Our bakery crafts handmade granola cereal with natural and organic ingredients and a high ratio of mix-ins, baked into irresistible crispy clusters.At Expo West 2026, we're debuting our new extension: Michele's Breakfast Nook! We've baked familiar breakfast classics into crispy granola clusters that are cozy and craveable, crafted with whole grains, simple ingredients, and a price-friendly mindset. Visit us for a sample!

name: MicroDried
description: MicroDried, a Wyckoff Farms Company, delivers premium shelf-stable dried fruit, vegetable, and dairy ingredients to the world’s leading food and beverage brands. With more than 50 clean-label ingredient offerings including whole pieces, fragments, powders, and now shelf stable cheese and yogurt formats, MicroDried delivers superior flavor, color, nutrition, and functionality to snacks, beverages, bakery, dairy, cereal, pet, and performance nutrition products. Our proprietary REV™ low-temperature drying technology preserves the integrity of the raw ingredient and locks in nutrients, flavor, and color that supports clean-label formulations. The shelf-stable nature of MicroDried ingredients make them the ideal sustainability solution by reducing cold chain costs without compromising quality. Backed by Wyckoff Farms’ vertically integrated U.S. supply chain, global export capabilities, and robust food-safety certifications, MicroDried is the trusted partner for brands seeking innovation, reliability, and ingredient integrity.Think Big. Elevate Every Bite.

name: Microfarmtory,LLC
description: Microfarmtory is a precision fermentation company dedicated to the R&D and commercialization of innovative products. Centered on synthetic biology technology, it provides customers with high-value nutritional health products and food ingredients.Its flagship product — Farmtory® Brazzein, a high-intensity sweetener with a sweetness of 1,000–2,000 times that of sucrose, features zero sugar, zero calories, a pure taste, and excellent acid and heat resistance. It is perfectly adaptable to a wide range of applications, including beverages, catering, confectionery, snacks, and bakery products.The product obtained the U.S. SELF-GRAS certification in March 2025, laying a solid foundation for its commercial application.

name: Mid-Day Squares
description: Mid-Day Squares is on a mission to reinvent indulgence with feel-good treats you can enjoy every day. What started as a homemade recipe in a condo kitchen has grown into a brand loved by millions, now available in thousands of stores across North America. Built on real ingredients, bold creativity, and a promise to keep it honest with their community, Mid-Day Squares makes convenient chocolate bars that deliver nostalgic flavor to power your afternoon and beyond.

name: Mid-States Specialty Eggs LLC
description: Founded in 2008, Mid-States Specialty Eggs was created by Marion Hostetler and family friend Dale Shrock in order "to produce a healthy product for the consumer in a way that supports our family farms." Today Marion and Dale are joined with other farmer-owners on the board of directors. Together, they guide the company that serves more than 750 family farms across the U.S. Mid-States Specialty Eggs is 100 percent employee-owned, as stock has been sold to employees since 2015. "As owners of this organization we all look at it as being part of our life mission, part of our calling here on earth, to create an environment for farmers to thrive," shares Dale. Our organization provides high-quality eggs and egg products with in-shell free range, pasture-raised, organic, regeneratively farmed, and even heirloom eggs.

name: Midlands Apiaries – Manuka Honey
description: Founded in 2006, Midlands Apiaries is the largest privately-owned Manuka Honey manufacturer in New Zealand. We provide a full service when it comes to honey, producing and packing some of the most popular New Zealand honey products. We have a world class operation, producing some of the world's best honeys from our pristine lands and forests. We can guide you along the process, from blend specification to label design. We can also help you develop your brand. We can provide honey in both jars, single-serve convenience items and also in large format for ingredient use such as pails, drums and IBCs. Innovation is at the forefront of what we do, and we have many different types of specialty Honey products in our portfolio, including Manuka Honey Lozenges, Single-Serve Manuka Honey Snap Packs, Wellness Manuka Honey Gummies, Manuka Honey Crystal Sachets, and Flavored Native New Zealand Honey.

name: Mighty Spark Food Co.
description: What started as a booth at the Minneapolis Farmers Market has exploded into a fan-favorite brand, available coast to coast. Founder Nick Beste had a vision to provide healthy protein that tastes delicious, and as importantly, use the small yet Mighty business to Spark change. Today, Mighty Spark empowers consumers to eat healthy with delicious chicken snacks, without sacrificing flavor, and sparks change through its meal donations.

name: Migung365 Co., Ltd.
description: We began in South Korea in 2010 under the name Migung365.By focusing on real product efficacy rather than advertising hype, we became the #1 gut-health brand in Korea, surpassing 100 million servings sold and earning an exceptional 4.9/5 customer rating.Through more than 200,000 customer reviews, we learned something simple but profound.Among eating, sleeping, and digesting, healthy and satisfying digestion has the greatest power to change a person's day, mood, and life. And we wanted to share that impact with more people around the world.Today, we are taking the world by Spell.Spell is built on proven Korean wellness principles, redesigned through the lens of modern American gut health needs offering the clarity, relief, and lightness of a true daily reset, one single packet at a time.At Spell, we don't include fillers or other unnecessary ingredients you typically find in popular over the counter gut health supplements. Every formula is clean, gentle, and easy to incorporate into everyday life.It's not magic.It's Spell.

name: MiLa
description: Milà is one of the largest digitally native frozen Asian food brands in the U.S., bringing restaurant-quality Chinese and East Asian meals into modern homes. Founded as Seattle restaurant Xiao Chi Jie, Milà offers chef-crafted soup dumplings, rice bowls, and bao made with authentic ingredients.Premium Asian Food - Appetizers and Meals

name: Milkadamia
description: We've started our journey at our family-owned farms nestled near the Eastern coast of Australia in the very region where the macadamia tree originated. That's where we discovered the power of regenerative farming and made it our life's purpose to create food that made our soils and ecosystems thrive.Milkadamia was created to become a little billboard on every kitchen table to offer a huge flavorsome step forward for our planet with our uniquely delicious, healthy, and regeneratively farmed milk.

name: Mill Creek Botanicals
description: Since 1975, Mill Creek Botanicals has been dedicated to delivering superior hair and skin care products designed with one clear goal: harnessing nature's power to bring you the best results. We source the most effective and proven natural ingredients, carefully combining them into innovative formulas that nourish and rejuvenate your body.

name: Mill Rock Packaging
description: Mill Rock Packaging offers design, development and manufacturing of single-face lamination, paperboard folding cartons, tray forming, manuals and inserts.

name: Milton’s
description: Milton's believes that everyone should experience the joy of eating well without having to choose between delicious and better-for-you, which is why they're committed to creating trustworthy craft foods with premium ingredients. From Gluten Free Crackers with a light and airy chip-like texture to thin and crispy Cauliflower Crust Pizzas to Gourmet Crackers that are baked to perfection, there's a Milton's product for every occasion!

name: MINAMI FOODS
description: Minami Foods was established in 1981 in Hirono, Iwate Prefecture, with a mission to revitalize a rural community facing depopulation and economic decline. Surrounded by mountains and the sea, Hirono is rich in natural resources, including high-quality soybeans. Recognizing the region's potential, the company set out to create jobs and industries that would support local farmers and enhance the community's value.The decision to produce yuba, a traditional Japanese delicacy made from soybeans, was intentional. Unlike tofu, yuba requires a meticulous and time-intensive process, but this adds significant value to the raw materials. The yuba is naturally air-dried, preserving its delicate texture and enhancing its flavor. Minami Foods further innovated by combining yuba with nutrient-rich seaweed sourced from the Sanriku coast, creating a unique soup that harmonizes the flavors of the mountains and the sea. This product showcases Iwate's natural bounty while reflecting Japan's culinary traditions.Minami Foods takes pride in producing yuba soup without chemical additives or preservatives, ensuring that every product is safe, healthy, and delicious. This commitment to quality and natural ingredients has earned widespread recognition across Japan. Beyond products, the company's factory has become a cornerstone of the local community. It provides inclusive employment opportunities for parents balancing childcare and individuals with disabilities, fostering a supportive work environment that benefits the entire region.Through its international expansion, Minami Foods aims to share not only the unique taste of yuba but also the Japanese philosophy of hara hachibu—eating in moderation. Inspired by shojin ryori (traditional Buddhist cuisine), this concept emphasizes mindful consumption and gratitude, encouraging people to savor food in harmony with nature. By promoting this cultural value alongside Japan's celebrated UMAMI, Minami Foods seeks to offer more than a meal—it provides a meaningful connection to the beauty and simplicity of Japanese culture.Minami Foods remains dedicated to preserving the blessings of Iwate's nature while sharing them with the world, blending tradition with innovation to ensure that these timeless values endure for generations to come.

name: Minch Global Trade Inc
description: The Journey of Green People: Nurturing Health from NatureIn the fast-paced rhythm of modern life, the balance between work and family often leads to stress and sleepless nights. For our founder, this became a personal struggle—plagued by anxiety and poor sleep quality. Seeking relief, she turned to magnesium supplements, known for their calming effects, but found the market flooded with inconsistent and low-quality options.Frustrated yet driven, she set out to create something better—natural, effective, and trustworthy. Along this journey, she discovered the power of plant nutrients and met professionals who shared her vision. Together, they built a dedicated and expert team, giving rise to Green People, a brand rooted in holistic wellness and a people-first philosophy.Green People began with a mission: to deliver high-quality, plant-based magnesium supplements that support relaxation and well-being. From magnesium glycinate gummies to magnesium complex capsules and liquid drops, every product is thoughtfully crafted for consistent potency and purity.As our journey evolved, so did our offerings. Green People expanded to include a range of plant-based extracts like rhodiola rosea for stress, shilajit for vitality, and milk thistle for liver health—each selected for its natural healing properties and grounded in scientific research.Today, Green People is trusted by those who value gentle yet powerful wellness solutions. Like leaves drawing nourishment from the earth, we believe people thrive best when supported by nature's gifts. We extract the primal essence of plants to replenish your body with the green vitality it craves.Guided by integrity, environmental respect, and a passion for better health, Green People continues to innovate and grow. Join us as we walk the path of natural wellness—one rooted in balance, harmony, and care for both people and the planet.

name: Mindel-Food GmbH
description: The company Mindel-Food GmbH is a contract or toll manufacturer in the field of food production. We specialize in the development, production and packaging of food supplements and dietary foods in the form of powder, tablets and capsules. We procure raw materials, which we offer to interested customers. Our stock includes more than 350 different raw materials. We also fill native foodstuffs into the packaging requested by the customer, e.g. cardboard boxes, sachets, stand-up pouches, tubular bags, PET cans, etc.The knowledge of how to combine the individual ingredients into a high-quality formulation that also produces the desired sensory properties of the mixture, combined with many years of experience in the technological process-ability of the formulations, is our most important core competence.

name: Ming Chyi Biotechnology, Ltd. (MCB)
description: MCB Group, a Taiwan-based global manufacturer of premium nutritional powder ingredients, has further streamlined its operations into a full CDMO private-label provider, showcasing a range of trend-driven branded ingredients and turnkey total solutions at Natural Products Expo West 2026

name: Minnesota Pavilion
description: Come discover food innovation from the Great State of Minnesota. The Minnesota Pavilion showcases 12 brands from Minnesota exhibiting why Minnesota is a national leader in innovation and incubation for consumer packaged goods. From cutting-edge food R&D and strong co-manufacturing networks to supportive funding, talent, and infrastructure, Minnesota helps brands grow faster and smarter. Visitors will discover how the state’s collaborative ecosystem, high quality of life, and thriving food industry make Minnesota not only a great place to build a food business, but also a great place to live and work.

name: Minor Figures
description: Founded by three friends with a shared coffee obsession back in 2014, Minor Figures has since grown into a global brand with a range of innovative, barista standard beverages. Our products can be found in the kitchens of coffee lovers and on the bar at specialty coffee shops all over the world.

name: Minsley, Inc.
description: Being an individual who eats grains, rices and legumes almost everyday, TJ Song, founder and owner of Minsley sought tasty & convenient products but nothing existed in the marketplace.He decided to create a cooked rice, grains and legume business, and the first state-of-the-art manufacturing facility was completed in November, 2005.

name: Mira International Foods, Inc.
description: My gut and I have had… let's call it a "complicated" relationship. After one too many post-snack regrets (I'm looking at you, late-night nachos), I decided to take matters into my own hands.The mission? To create a snack that doesn't just taste amazing but also makes you feel amazing. A snack that says, "Hey, I got you!" instead of, "Good luck with that." And thus, Yogut was born: a freeze-dried yogurt snack packed with 5 billion probiotics per serving and more personality than your average snack aisle contender.

name: Miracle Noodle
description: Miracle Noodle was founded by Dr. Jonathan Carp, a physician passionate about promoting health and wellness through innovative  dietary solutions. Inspired by his travels to Asia, Dr. Carp discovered the remarkable konjac plant, a centuries-old ingredient in traditional Japanese cuisine known for its health benefits and versatility.Recognizing its potential as a low-calorie, high-fiber alternative to conventional pasta, Dr.Carp introduced Miracle Noodle to the Western market. The brand quickly gained popularity for providing a satisfying, guilt-free pasta experience, helping consumers enjoy their favorite meals while supporting their wellness goals.Building on this success, the brand has introduced egg white noodles, a high-protein, low-calorie innovation that expands its product offerings beyond konjac-based solutions.Reflecting its mission to offer a broader range of health-conscious products that cater to the diverse needs of its customers. From konjac staples to protein-packed innovations, Miracle Noodle continues to stay true to its roots in natural, traditional ingredients while embracing modern health trends.

name: Miron Violetglass USA, Inc.
description: MIRON’s violet glass is biophotonic glass packaging. Its unique properties filter light to both protect and revitalize natural products, drastically extending their shelf life.

name: Mishima Foods USA
description: Mishima Foods is a leading Furikake company from Japan over 35 years in US. We have facilities in Japan and China and an extensive network of facilities all over the world. Our mission is to enrich the world though good Japanese/Asian food. Mishima is in national grocery chains and have brought customers success with our extensive item lineup from staple to gourmet.

name: Miss Jones Baking Co.
description: Baking has always been a passion of mine. As I became busier with my career, I had trouble fitting baking into my schedule without some extra shortcuts in the kitchen.
