I tried every baking mix and frosting on the market but none of them even compared to the taste of homemade, nor had ingredients I recognized or could pronounce.I knew there had to be other people out there who needed the convenience of a mix or ready-made frosting, but didn't want to serve something that tasted bland or artificial. I decided to create a new kind of baking company where delicious and organic aren't oxymorons, where you actually feel good about what you're serving to those you love

name: Mission Meats
description: Since 2015, Mission Meats has stayed true to one guiding purpose: Do good. Be good. Make good, clean meat snacks. What began as a mission to create better-for-you snacks has grown into a trusted, fast-growing brand in the clean protein category, known for integrity, taste, and performance.We believe that clean, responsibly sourced protein should not be complicated. Every Mission Meats product starts with premium, grass fed, free range or antibiotic free raised meats and simple, high-quality ingredients with no fillers, nitrates, or artificial flavors. The result is a snack that consumers feel good about buying and retailers are proud to carry.Our product line is built to meet a variety of shopper needs and retail categories. The Mission Kids line features kid specific formulated Beef and Turkey Sticks designed for families seeking clean-label, better-for-you snacks in convenient, kid-friendly portions. For consumers looking for the highest ingredient integrity, we offer the industry's first 100% Certified Organic Beef Sticks on the market — a standout option in the growing organic protein segment. And for everyday shoppers and active lifestyles, our flagship 1 oz. Meat Sticks continue to deliver the ideal balance of flavor, function, and clean protein that keeps customers coming back.Mission Meats offers retailers a proven, values-driven partner. We are committed to providing exceptional products, outstanding service, and a brand story that resonates on every shelf. Because at Mission Meats, doing good tastes great, and it sells.

name: Mitsubishi International Food Ingredients, Inc.
description: Mitsubishi International Food Ingredients, Inc is a leading supplier of functional ingredients for the food, beverage and nutraceutical industries in North America and around the world.

name: Mixed Nuts, Inc
description: Since 1986, Mixed Nuts Inc. has been processing, dry roasting, and packaging a full line of nuts, seeds, and dried fruits in Los Angeles, California. All of our products are rigorously inspected and carefully chosen from only the finest suppliers. All domestic raw nuts are brought directly from growers. Our imported products are all brought from the main source in their country of origin.Our own in-house state of the art roasting and packaging provides the flexibility and consistency to provide a vast variety of products. Our well known Premium Orchard brand, as well as many popular private label brands, upholding our high standards of quality and freshness makes us a superior, direct, and single-source competitive supplier.  All products are sold both in bulk and retail packages (3 oz. to 32 oz. resealable, stand-up pouches). Packaging is fully automated and bags are flushed with nitrogen gas for extended shelf life.Our Premium Orchard brand has been a vital component to the success of Mixed Nuts Inc. Specifically, we are well known for our dry roasting and flavoring for a variety of mixes. From our best selling pumpkin seeds to our healthy and delicious trail mixes, our products abide by top standards of quality, consistency, and specialty. We continuously strive to improve production and offer superior quality, while maintaining the highest standards in food quality and safety. We are Kosher and HACCP certified. We have also been inspected and certified by third party reputable agencies. Quality is our primary commitment. We guarantee freshness and proudly represent all our products.

name: Mixed-Up Cocktail Co
description: Mixed-Up Cocktail Co makes full-flavored all-natural cocktails using only the good stuff - premium spirits, juice, and a kiss of agave nectar.

name: Miyasaka Brewing Company Limited
description: Masumi's journey began in 1662 when the Miyasaka family, former samurai who served the lords of Suwa, transformed their swords into sake barrels. After years of turmoil during Japan's Warring States period, they chose a path of craftsmanship over conflict. The brewery quickly gained recognition—Matsudaira Tadateru, sixth son of the first Tokugawa Shogun, loved our sake so much he always kept it by his side.Our most inspiring chapter unfolded in 1919, when the brewery faced potential closure after struggling through decades of hardship. Young president Masaru Miyasaka refused to give up, declaring "the only way we can survive is to make the best damn sake in Japan." He appointed an equally young brewer, Chisato Kubota, as master brewer, and together they embarked on annual pilgrimages across Japan to learn from the nation's greatest sake makers. Years of harsh criticism and painstaking trial and error slowly transformed their craft.Their determination paid off spectacularly. In 1943, Masumi won first place at the National Sake Competition. Then in 1946, our fermentation tanks yielded an extraordinary discovery: Brewing Association Yeast Number Seven. This exceptional yeast caught the attention of Dr. Shoichi Yamada from the National Brewing Institute, and it soon became the favorite of brewers nationwide—today it remains the most widely used sake yeast in the world.As Japan's economy grew, we built our second brewery in the mountain village of Fujimi at 1,000 meters elevation, chosen for its pristine alpine environment. In 1999, we became among the first sake makers to exhibit at Vinexpo in Bordeaux, France, bringing Japanese sake to the global stage.Today, we've returned to our roots, using only our proprietary strains of Number Seven Yeast to produce high-quality, food-friendly sake while continuing our tradition of innovation. For over 360 years, each generation has honored tradition while fearlessly pursuing the future—from samurai roots to tables around the world.

name: MNML Laundry
description: MNML is all about keeping life simple, intentional, and a little bit daring. Stylish, sophisticated, and natural, our products transform your laundry routine into an experience. From high-performance pods and detergent sheets to liquids, scent boosters, and eco-friendly laundry essentials, MNML combines natural cleaning power with functional fragrances and neuroscience-backed scents that elevate every wash.It’s more than clean clothes - it’s dreamy laundry days, wellbeing in every wash, and a movement that rewrites the rules of home care. MNML is the scent of revolution, the thrill of simplicity, and the audacity to make laundry feel like an adventure. Buckle up, because MNML is rewriting the rules, one load at a time.mnmllife.co  |  @mnml.life_studio

name: MOA FOODTECH
description: Spanish biotechnology startup that uses Artificial Intelligence and biomass fermentation to transform agri-food byproducts into high-value ingredients.

name: Mochi Foods LLC
description: Mochi Foods was founded in 2015 as a woman-owned, family-run business rooted in our deep love for food, culture, and connection. Our journey began in Hawaii, where food is more than just a meal—it's a celebration of family, tradition, and community. Growing up surrounded by the flavors and stories passed down through generations, we saw an opportunity to reimagine one of our favorite ingredients—mochi—and share its chewy, joyful texture with a wider audience.What started in our family kitchen with a few hand-packed bags of mochi donut mix quickly turned into something much bigger. With no outside investors or flashy backing—just grit, heart, and the unwavering support of each other—we introduced the very first mochi donut mix to the U.S. market. We believed there was something special in the blend of tradition and innovation, and that belief fueled us to keep going, even when the path wasn't easy.From that humble beginning, Mochi Foods has grown into one of the fastest-growing artisan baking brands in the country. Today, we proudly supply mochi donut, pancake, and corn dog mixes to thousands of cafes, bakeries, and home bakers across the U.S. and beyond. But no matter how much we grow, we'll always stay true to our roots—family first, quality always, and a mission to make mochi accessible to all.We're here not just to sell mixes, but to share a feeling—of joy, creativity, and togetherness. Whether it's your first time trying mochi or your hundredth, we hope our products bring a little more magic to your kitchen, just like they have in ours.

name: Mojave Mallows
description: I was a girl scout so I grew up on s'mores. I also gravitate to the outdoors, including everything from enjoying nature to practicing sustainability and buying organic products. And while there are tons of great chocolates and cookies on the market, I couldn't find a single clean, organic marshmallow to recreate my childhood staple. So I started playing with local date and agave syrups until I perfected my own recipe.  A few months later my sister joined the company and together we have grown this company beyond what we thought possible.

name: MOLINO NICOLI
description: For five generations, the Nicoli family has combined tradition with technological expertise to become a premier international partner for cereal-based products. We take pride in showcasing the strength of Italian food through our "Better-for-You" philosophy.Discover Vitabella, our certified Organic and Gluten-Free range, made with the finest non-GMO ingredients. We look forward to introducing you to our newest offerings, including our high-protein snacks and indulgent treats designed for the health-conscious consumer.

name: Momofuku Goods
description: Momofuku was founded in 2004 by chef David Chang with the opening of Noodle Bar in New York City. What started as a small, scrappy restaurant grew into a larger culinary movement—one that challenged the status quo and redefined what American food could look and taste like.Credited by The New York Times with "the rise of contemporary Asian-American cuisine," Momofuku has built a legacy grounded in hospitality, creativity, and bold flavor. Our restaurants now span NYC, Los Angeles, and Las Vegas, each one different but rooted in the same desire to serve people thoughtful, delicious food.In 2019, we launched Momofuku Goods to bring that same restaurant mindset to home kitchens across the country. At the time, we realized that the ingredients we relied on every day in our restaurants—things like umami-rich soy sauce or high-quality chili oil—weren't easily available to most home cooks. So we decided to make them ourselves.That idea has now grown into a full pantry line, all created by chefs and tested by home cooks.  We design every product to be simple, versatile, and packed with flavor—just like the ones we use in our restaurants.We believe that cooking at home should be just as exciting as eating out. Our goal is to redefine the American pantry: one that reflects who we are, where we came from, and where we're going.Twenty-plus years after our first restaurant opened in NYC, that original Momofuku mindset still drives everything we do: cook with intention, take risks, and share what we love with as many people as possible.-

name: Mon mon
description: Mon Mon Sauce is rooted in the legacy of my mom — a Korean woman whose food brought people together and helped shape the flavors of old Lahaina. In the 1990s, my mom owned a small restaurant in Lahaina that was known for one thing everyone talked about: her shoyu chicken plate lunch made with her own Kalbi sauce. It was bold, comforting, and unforgettable. Locals still remember those flavors — the sweetness, the smokiness, and the Korean-style depth she brought to island plate lunch favorites.Those flavors are my childhood. They are the taste of home.In 2016, inspired by the recipes I grew up watching her make, I started preparing small batches of kimchi and kalbi for friends, neighbors, and the Maui community. I didn't know it then, but it was the beginning of something bigger — the beginning of carrying her legacy forward.When my mom passed in 2019, everything changed. I felt a deep responsibility to keep her recipes alive, not just for myself, but for everyone who remembered the food she made and the love she put into it. I decided to bring her Kalbi recipe to the market so the community — and eventually the world — could enjoy real Korean BBQ at home, made with clean, organic ingredients and the same heart she cooked with.Today, Mon Mon Sauce is more than a product.It's my mom's story.It's Korean heritage.It's the nostalgic flavors of old Lahaina restaurants.It's the belief that food connects us, heals us, and keeps our loved ones close.Every bottle is crafted with organic, clean ingredients — blending my mom's Korean recipes with the memories and spirit of Lahaina. Mon Mon Sauce honors her legacy by giving families everywhere the chance to taste the flavors we grew up with, right from their own home.From her plate lunches in the 90s to our bottles today — this is how her love lives on.

name: Monarca Food Solutions
description: When you think of tortilla chips you're likely thinking about gathering with friends and family, belly full, tastes that take you to a fun and exciting time. That's exactly what Chicas Chips are and even more!​Chicas began with our founder, Irlanda Montes and her love for family, gathering, and great food. Irlanda was born in Ecuador and came to Southern California as a young girl. Memories of her mother's "famous" salsa and homemade chips captivated her entrepreneurial spirit and in 2011 she decided to embark on a journey of sharing her mother's recipes with the world. With no money or experience in the food industry, but with her family by her side, she knew she had all she needed. In the early years of the brand, Irlanda's three sisters joined alongside her to help make chips in the kitchen. Everyday was filled with love, laughter and the smell of great chips in the air. In Ecuador nobody calls each other by their name. Every girl is Chica, so all day long you would hear "Chica this..Chica that".After about a year, all the sisters moved onto other ventures, and Irlanda decided that her chips needed a new name.CHICAS! Named after the her sisters and all the wonderful memories they created that year.

name: Monk Fruit Corp
description: Monk Fruit Corp is the recognized industry leader and is known for providing the best quality and widest variety of bulk monk fruit ingredient products on the market, in both liquid and powder forms. Monk Fruit Corp. is the only company in the world solely focused on the growing, processing and distributing of monk fruit ingredients.We lead the market with in-house expertise spanning the entire monk fruit value chain, including plant breeding, seedling cultivation, agronomy, raw material supply, processing, and sales.As the world’s leading monk fruit company, we have an estimated market share of around 50% of the global monk fruit ingredient market which is about twice the market share of our nearest competitor. Our monk fruit juice concentrates and monk fruit extract powders are used in thousands of foods and beverages worldwide to reduce sugar and improve taste.

name: Montalbano USA
description: Montalbano was founded in 1965 by a group of artisans that were working and growing mainly as co-packers for bigger industry players. In the late 90s was bought from the present property and started his journey to became a well recognized brand in the Italian market and subsequently started to export to US, Europe and Asia, following the export vocation of the property. After getting all the quality certifications needed to excel in the world industry, Montalbano then was pioneer in Italy in the market of Organic products, gluten free and vegan. In recent years Montalbano has obtained also the "Non GMO project verified" certification, to testify its vocation to healthy and safe foods.

name: Monte's Fine Foods
description: We deliver superior, gourmet, consciously-produced Italian-American food products without pretension.We bring creativity and passion to our customer experience, building Monte’s not just as a CPG company, but as a lifestyle brand. Through our products, brand, and experience, we keep the 120 year old Monte family legacy alive.Not just a sauce company, but a cultural platform.

name: Monterey NUTRA
description: At Monterey Nutra, science and innovation guide our unbiased approach to product development. We ensure optimal mushroom growth and maintain strict purity and potency standards through rigorous research and testing.We offer a range of mushroom powders and extracts, including mycelium, fruiting bodies, and full spectrum blends; we also can meet your exact specifications with custom blends. Contact us to explore how functional mushrooms can enhance your products and meet customer wellness and sustainability expectations.

name: Moo Elixir Inc.
description: Growing up, we were raised on mainstream American ideas—believing everything we were taught was normal. We followed the standard American diet, used everyday skincare products, and never thought much about it. But over time, we started to realize that many of these habits were actually damaging our health. The skincare products we used were filled with toxic chemicals, and the food we were eating was harming our bodies on a cellular level. Eventually, we became fed up with it.That's when Moo Elixir was born. Miranda, who was working in a dermatology office at the time, began noticing that even the "high-end" skincare products were packed with harmful ingredients. Concerned about her health—and the health of others—she started looking for healthier alternatives. Around the same time, Brian made the decision to ditch all skincare products and started using tallow instead. Over time, he noticed a remarkable change: his skin became hydrated but not greasy, and his complexion improved.Inspired by these results, Miranda began experimenting with tallow-based skincare formulations in her kitchen. After a lot of trial and error, she created a collection of balms and creams that were both effective and nourishing. But while these homemade products were great, we knew we wanted to take things further. We didn't just want to make tallow-based skincare in our kitchen—we wanted to create a luxurious line that combined the power of tallow with other botanicals and plant-based ingredients. So, we partnered with a state-of-the-art lab and an industry-leading chemist to bring our vision to life. Together, we developed a collection of clean, luxurious, and truly innovative tallow-based skincare products—ones that not only promote health and healing but are unlike anything else on the market. Moo Elixir is the result of our commitment to clean beauty, cutting-edge formulations, and the belief that skincare should always be as nourishing as it is effective.

name: Mooala Brands
description: A kitchen creation that we brought from our kitchen to yours. Jeff, our Founder and CEO, was diagnosed with lactose intolerance in his 30s and was shocked that the almond milks on the shelf were packed with sugars and sketchy ingredients - like carrageenan and rape seed oil.Jeff began tinkering around in his kitchen, using clean ingredients like organic almonds to make an almond milk that HE wanted to drink. He nailed it - with consistency, quality and taste - and then he bottled it up so he could share it with the world.(Of course the full story is much more comprehensive, but we like to keep our storytelling short, simple and to the point.)Today, Mooala is known for being a leading organic brand in the growing alt-dairy category, making a suite of alt-dairy milks made from almonds, oats, bananas and coconuts. We have been ranked as a top beverage by Good Housekeeping and the #1 healthiest plant-based milk by Eat This, Not That! No matter which beverage you choose, we are always dairy free, always organic, and always great-tasting.

name: Mooney Farms
description: Built on a foundation of family values, quality, and integrity, Bella Sun Luci® meaning “beautiful sunlight” is America’s number one brand of sun-dried tomatoes. Three generations of our family work at Mooney Farms, carrying on a tradition of using premium ingredients to create a line of healthy, Mediterranean-inspired products for today’s consumer. At Mooney Farms, we believe that simple, fresh ingredients are all you need for an extraordinary meal.

name: Moonshot Beverages
description: We sought out to create a functional powdered drink mixer for every day use. What we ended up creating is a fun and energetic brand that you can take anywhere. The colors embrace the light heartedness of life. The straw brings back nostalgia of a certain candy you may have had as a kid. And the ingredients fuel your body with quality ingredients.

name: Mooski
description: The product was inspired by my mom's muesli (Swiss-style overnight oats) recipe. My mom was born and raised in Switzerland and was also a competitive skier. Her breakfast of choice, like many other skiers in Switzerland - was muesli - because its tasty, fresh and nutrient dense. The perfect fuel before a ski practice. Well, after spending my whole career working for bar brands (RXBAR and Clio Snacks), I came up with the idea of taking my mom's muesli recipe and transforming it into bar form - using chocolate as a vehicle to hold together and maintain the soft oat texture. When it came time to name the brand I went with "Mooski" - a play on the words "muesli" and "ski", which are a nod to the Swiss culture and skiing community where the product has its roots. I launched the product back in 2022 in San Diego and we are now sold in over 500 stores nationwide. We look forward to bringing our fridge-fresh granola bars to more stores and people for years to come!

name: Moquin Press
description: Moquin Press has been at the forefront of packaging innovation for decades. With deep industry experience, advanced technology, and a focus on progress, we partner with brands to overcome supply challenges and accelerate speed to market. Everything we do is designed to help our customers stay ahead.We combine speed, precision, and partnership in everything we do. Whether it’s quick turnarounds, flexible production runs, or solving design challenges others won’t touch, our team brings focus and practical creativity to every project.

name: Moranbong Co., Ltd.
description: It is with great pride that Moranbong officially embarks on its expansion into the North American market. Since the launch of "Nama Pack Jang Yakiniku Sauce" in 1979, Moranbong has been bridging the culinary traditions of the Korean Peninsula with Japanese dining culture. Guided by our commitment to delivering new value to our customers, we have developed a diverse range of products that meet the evolving needs of modern dining.

name: Morehouse Foods
description: In 1898, Mr. Morehouse started selling quality handcrafted mustard to his local community with the promise of quality and consistency in every jar. This dedication to excellence brought Morehouse to Los Angeles, where a horseradish line was soon introduced.Through the years and across five generations of family ownership, Morehouse Foods has remained true to its roots,  building strong, lasting relationships with suppliers who share their commitment. This isn't just a business; it's a family tradition where trust and integrity are the main ingredients.Today, Morehouse Foods blends time-honored recipes with modern innovation, creating new flavors and organic options that cater to today's evolving tastes. Expanding manufacturing to food service, bulk, retail and private labeling, Morehouse is still a family business at heart, with a passion for our craft and a belief that good taste truly runs in the family.

name: Moreira Dana DBA One Trick Pony
description: Peanut butter made with just Organic Argentinian peanuts and salt. In custom inverted jars to combat natural oil separation.

name: Morinaga America, Inc. – Chargel
description: Launched in 2022 by Morinaga America, Inc. which is the makers of HI-CHEW, a candy brand that is rapidly gaining popularity today. Chargel Gel Drinks are the first of its kind in the U.S. market. Gel Drinks are a food category that have exploded in popularity among active individuals in Japan as an on-the-go product for athletes at all levels. Chargel saw an opportunity in the United States to introduce this fresh, unexpected take on energy. Despite having launched just over a year ago, Chargel has achieved significant recognition from the athletic community. Chargel has been declared the official gel sponsor of prestigious athletic events such as the San Francisco Marathon and the Honolulu Marathon among others. The brand's value has been recognized by athletes at all levels, from beginners to Olympians, and top-ranked global athletes. Additionally, Chargel has prioritized its mission to support student-athletes, leading the brand to become a key sponsor of UCLA and UC Berkeley athletics. Chargel also supports the National Interscholastic Cycling Association (NICA), a nationwide student mountain biking organization. Chargel Gel Drinks have been developed for the lifestyle of elite and serious athletes, but its functionality also fits into a busy, active lifestyle. It can be used for you and your entire family, including children.

name: Morinaga Nutritional Foods, Inc. / Mori-Nu Silken Tofu
description: Morinaga Nutritional Foods, Inc. is driven by a philosophy of creating a new food culture that supports better health and a stronger society. Since 1985, we have been committed to delivering high-quality products, including soy-based offerings for both retail and foodservice markets. To learn more about our company and products, please visit www.morinu.com.

name: Morinaga Nutritional Foods, Inc. / Probiotics
description: Morinaga is a leading global probiotic and postbiotic supplier from Japan, with over 100 years of research and innovation rooted in probiotics and HRB—a unique group of beneficial bacteria naturally residing in the human gut.Discover our comprehensive portfolio of clinically researched biotic ingredients designed to support digestive health, immune function, healthy infant development, and beyond. Our ingredients are highly stable, well-certified (GRAS, FSSC22000, Halal, and Kosher), and formulation-friendly, making them easy to integrate into dietary supplements, functional foods, and infant nutrition products.By partnering with Morinaga, you gain access to deep scientific expertise, proven quality, and a long-term commitment to evidence-based innovation—helping you deliver trusted products that support a healthier, more sustainable future.

name: MOSH
description: Born out of personal experience and conviction, MOSH is committed to empowering consumers with nutritious and delicious snacks for their brain-health and happiness routine. We have both seen a family member slowly lose his mind to Alzheimer's. Our hope is to help save other families from enduring the same experience. That's why we launched MOSH—a mission-driven, brain health and wellness company, providing the tools and products for a "mindstyle" lifestyle.Two-thirds of Alzheimer's patients are female, yet funding for women's research trails far behind. MOSH exists to close that gap by elevating the conversation around brain health through research, education, advocacy, and nutrition.We created a protein bar that tastes delicious, satisfies completely and nourishes your brain to thrive so you can stay in control of your everyday health. Every MOSH bar features 7 brain-fueling nootropics, adaptogens, and superfoods with 12-13g of muscle building protein, 6-8g of gut-healthy fiber, 3g net carbs and ONLY 1g of sugar - all with zero added sugar. MOSH bars are keto-friendly, non-GMO, gluten free and soy-free. So, whether you are on-the-go, at the office or just living your best life, MOSH protein bars will your brain + body fit, fueled and feeling good.

name: Mountain Meadow Herbs / Cap Express
description: With 25 years in the supplement industry, Mountain Meadow Herbs is a leading supplement brand known for a variety of natural health solutions for women, moms and families!

name: MOWI USA
description: MOWI's journey began in 1964 with a small group of passionate visionaries who were united by their love for the ocean and a bold idea: to bring the best seafood to the world's tables. From these humble beginnings, MOWI has grown into a global leader in salmon farming, fulfilling one-fifth of the world's demand for farm-raised Atlantic salmon.​MOWI is more than just a name; it's a promise of quality and a testament to our enduring pioneering spirit. Every piece of MOWI salmon is a product of our passion and expertise, making it a trusted choice for consumers who seek the very best.

name: MRM
description: MRM was founded in 1996Before MRM Nutrition, our founders were searching for something deeper. Early entrepreneurial ventures and adventures were exciting, but ultimately led to the realization that we needed a more fulfilling purpose.A transformative decision was made: to rededicate our mission to helping others through nutrition. This pivot led us down a new path of formal education in dietetics and hands-on work in clinical studies. For years, we immersed ourselves in understanding global dietary needs, laying the groundwork for what would become MRM Nutrition.

name: Mrs. Meyer's Clean Day and method
Mrs. Taste
description: The result of blending tradition and innovation, the Mrs Taste brand, which emerged in 2013, is a young company that aims to meet the needs of people with specific dietary requirements, offering both flavor and health.

name: MTH innovation group LLC
description: Exoticcao was born from Giuliana's transformative journey into the heart of the Peruvian jungle, where cacao is a sacred heritage. After experiencing the pure and magical flavor of this unique cacao, Giuliana knew she had to share it with the world.More than just a product, Exoticcao offers a ritual—a moment of pause and reconnection. Each cacao bean is carefully selected to retain its purest essence, with rich flavors and aromas that bring the serenity of the jungle into every bite.With each taste, Exoticcao provides more than just cacao; it offers a moment of mental clarity, inner peace, and renewed strength to face the challenges of the day. Giuliana's dream was to give everyone the chance to experience the freedom of letting go of stress, being fully present, and savoring the now.Exoticcao invites you to embrace this transformative experience, where each bite becomes a journey to yourself—one that brings focus, calm, and energy to your everyday life.

name: MTN WTR
description: Founded in 2017, MTN WTR was born from a vision to share the majesty of Japan's most iconic natural wonder, Mt. Fuji, with the world. Inspired by the sacred mountain's pristine beauty and cultural significance, we embarked on a journey to become the first Japanese water brand in the US. Our mission is to deliver the unparalleled purity and refreshing taste of water naturally filtered through the volcanic rocks of Mt. Fuji, direct from Narusawa Village at its base. MTN WTR is not just a testament to our commitment to sustainability and minimal environmental impact; it's an invitation to experience the essence of Mt. Fuji's natural wonder with every sip. Through MTN WTR, we bring a piece of Japan's heritage and the refreshing purity of its most revered peak to the US, marking a new chapter in the appreciation of natural, sustainably sourced water.

name: MUD\WTR
description: MUD\WTR started in 2018 with a mission to change the relationship people have with coffee. Its flagship product, :rise Cacao, did just that, leading the company to 20x growth from 2019 to 2022, over 130 million servings consumed and one million unique customers. MUD\WTR pioneered the coffee alternative category and remains the leader in the space, and it has become one of the country's fastest-growing private companies according to the Inc. 5000 ranking. Today, MUD\WTR's mission is to create healthy minds through healthy habits, and it does so through a range of functional drink blends and a robust offering of habit-supporting content.

name: Multiple Organics, Inc.
description: Multiple Organics is a wholesale organic ingredient supplier with over 100 years of combined experience in every step of the organic food cycle, advising and supporting from farm to market. We specialize in sourcing organic ingredients from around the world and wholesale in bulk to the US and Canada with a focus on safety._x000D__x000D_

name: Muscle Milk
description: Muscle Milk® Protein Shakes are formulated with high-quality, complete protein from real, ultrafiltered milk to support your daily routine – whether running to work or catching a workout class. No artificial flavors, artificial sweeteners or added colors. Muscle Milk Pro Series 14oz delivers 42g Protein to support healthy muscles.

name: MUSH
description: Ashley Thompson co-founded MUSH in 2015 with the conviction that easy, delicious, and nutritious food can elevate the world in powerful ways. Early in life, Ashley's sister was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes. The experience left an indelible mark on her, and she cultivated a strong belief that better outcomes begin with better food. She began her career as a trading analyst, and like many others in finance, started each day with a run. Ashley soon realized that even on Wall Street, it was hard to access nutritious food and would bring her own 'Mush' to work, inspired by her favorite "hack" as a kid: cereal and oatmeal soaked in milk. She had discovered a white space that was equal parts healthy, delicious, and convenient. She quit her job and got to work.The company has grown rapidly from its early days when Ashley would sell small handmade batches at local farmers markets in San Diego. Today, MUSH is the leading brand in its category, powered by a small but mighty team of passionate individuals who love to help others feel, think, and do better.

name: Mutti USA Inc.
description: Since 1899, the Mutti family has shared their passion for everything that goes into their 100% Italian tomatoes – the sun, soil, rain and the heart of their people in Parma, Italy.The Mutti story is marked by many milestones in innovation, such as a patented processing method to better preserve the tomato's texture and fresh flavor, packaging innovation like the company's tomato paste in a thimble-topped tube, and innovations such as polpa, finely chopped tomatoes introduced in 1971 that tastes so fresh, you can enjoy it straight from the can. The most important factor in the company's success? A single-minded focus on quality — making Mutti Italy and Europe's #1 tomato brand

name: Mutual Trading Co. Inc.
description: MUTUAL TRADING COMPANY INC. is the premier Japanese food, alcohol beverage, and restaurant supply specialist. We are the Japanese food authority – true to the heart in upholding genuine Japanese cuisine traditions, and progressive in exploring new ways to provide innovative products and services. Mutual Trading imports, exports, distributes and manufactures the top brands for our retailer and foodservice customers.Our motto is: Bringing the Flavors of Japan to the People of the World

name: My Better Batch
description: Hi, I'm Lindsay, founder of My Better Batch. There I was, a newly single Mom at 40, standing in the baking aisle with a looming school bake sale. Everything on the shelves promised convenience but nothing tasted homemade. Everyone was going to know…it came from a box (Gasp!)That's when I decided to start My Better Batch, because simplifying life's sweetest moments makes them even sweeter.I believe that the joy of creating treats that taste homemade should be accessible to everyone – the working parents, career gunners, college students, and anyone else with a full plate and a hungry stomach.My Better Batch is for busy people who love baking and love people through baking. So go on – take the shortcut. Your secret is safe with me!

name: My Cooking Box
description: My Cooking Box, a woman-owned Italian brand founded by Chiara, brings the joy of Italian cooking to homes everywhere with ready-to-cook kits and premium Italian ingredients. In 2025, the brand launched Bellycious, a LOW FODMAP, gluten- and lactose-free line that lets everyone enjoy Italian food, even with a sensitive belly. Today, My Cooking Box is available in over 3,000 stores across the U.S. and Canada.Meet Bellycious: meals that love your gutGut-friendly formulation – specially designed to support digestive healthGluten-free & lactose-free – perfect for sensitive dietsRich in fiber – helps maintain healthy digestionEnhanced with probiotics – promotes a balanced gut microbiome

name: My Local, Co.
description: Local, Raw, Unprocessed Honey: My Local Co. started in 2010, founded by childhood best friends with a shared love for farming and the Pacific Northwest. What began as a small backyard beekeeping and sweetcorn hobby on a fifth-generation family farm has grown into a full-fledged business. Today, that same hands-on approach fuels a network of like-minded beekeepers and farmers producing regional raw honey, and chef-inspired hot honey—now sold across the western U.S., with expanding distribution throughout the Pacific Northwest, Northern California, Southern California, Rocky Mountains and the Midwest.Now available: My Local - PNW, NorCal, SoCal, Rocky Mtn, Midwest and Hot Honey

name: My Neighbors, Co.
description: My Neighbor’s began as a mother’s quest for a simple, effective, and truly natural skincare solution. When Harri Magaldi was on maternity leave from her fast-paced Wall Street job, inspiration struck when her 8-month-old daughter, Wilhelmina's, delicate skin started to get easily irritated. Unwilling to rely on commercial creams filled with synthetic ingredients, Harri turned to tallow, an ancient remedy used for centuries to nourish and heal the skin. She learned to render it herself, sourcing only the highest-quality grass-fed and finished suet from regenerative farms like Kinderhook Farm.What began as a simple balm for her daughter soon became a beloved staple among friends and family. As word spread, My Neighbor’s was born in May 2024. With a commitment to using only the purest ingredients—tallow, organic oils, and botanicals—My Neighbor’s also offers vegan-friendly formulations. The brand quickly resonated with those seeking a return to ancestral, whole-ingredient, transparent skincare. Each product is hand-crafted in-house, honoring the integrity of traditional skincare while supporting local agriculture.In just 20 months since launch, My Neighbor’s has grown to be stocked in 297 doors, including cafes, boutique shops, and national retailers such as Raleys & HERGS, Anthropologie, and Terrain. This is proof that the simplest, time-honored traditions are often the most powerful.

name: MY PHUONG FOOD COMPANY LIMITED
description: My husband and I were born and raised under the shade of coconut trees. The coconut tree was once the pillar of our house, the roof, our food and water, and it holds countless childhood memories. During my time studying and living in the tourist city of Da Nang, Vietnam, I had the chance to try baked coconut cracker for the first time. I found them interesting and unique, which evoked many childhood memories. The question I asked myself was, 'As people from a coconut-growing region, why not make coconut cracker?' With my experience in food production and after researching the market, I saw great potential. We decided to start our business by producing coconut cracker.

name: MyForest Foods
description: MyBacon is made from organic oyster mushroom mycelium, grown in indoor vertical farms, harvested in slabs and sliced (just like pork belly), not extruded, pressed or shaped. Made from 5 simple ingredients (Organic Oyster Mushroom Mycelium, Organic Coconut Oil, Organic Sugar, Natural Flavor and Salt). It’s the true bacon experience taste, texture sizzle and aroma of the real deal!

name: MYOJO USA
description: We are a Japanese noodle manufacturing company producing freshly crafted authentic Japanese ramen, yakisoba, udon, soup base, gyoza/wonton wrappers for restaurants and supermarkets since 1991. Created with the same care and precision bestowed upon all Japanese art, Myojo noodles are crafted to showcase authenticity, outstanding taste, and unparalleled quality. With our delicious flavors and irresistible meals made fresh from your freezer, life is noodiful with Myojo.

name: N.A. Trading Company
description: We were founded in 1986 when when our founders had moved to the United States from Thailand to search for opportunity. They found their way into food, and began the mission to share authentic Southeast Asian cuisine with more families across the country.

name: Nagano Brewery Wholesaler
description: Our company is a wholesaler that handles not only alcoholic beverages, but also soft drinks, seasonings, processed foods, etc. We do business with approximately 4,000 stores in the prefecture, including mass retailers (supermarkets), convenience stores, general liquor stores, and roadside stations.

name: Naked Life
description: Life is full of moments worth celebrating. Whether big or small, milestones or everyday wins, these moments deserve to feel special. And for years, their celebrations have come with an alcoholic beverage in hand. But nowadays, more and more people are choosing to drink outside the status quo. They want to champion these life moments in a way that suits their lifestyle, without compromising what's important to them. And we're here to help them do just that. With out non-alc cocktails, you can toast to any occasion on your own terms. We artfully distill botanicals and quality ingredients to recreate the unmistakable flavors you know and love, without the alcohol. And since we're all about embracing nakedness, our ingredients have nothing to hide like excess sugar or calories. Already recognized in Australia for being more true-to-taste and affordable than other non-alc options, we're excited to bring naked Life to the US.

name: Nana's Harvest
description: Six years ago, we started with a simple belief: that nature knows best.Our roots go deeper — we've been farming organically in Thailand and shipping thai young coconuts to the U.S. for over a decade. But something always felt wrong.People overseas were drinking what they thought was coconut water — shelf-stable, heat-treated, and stripped of everything that makes the real thing so good. Worse, they were filling their bodies with neon sports drinks and chemical electrolyte powders, thinking it was healthy.That didn't sit right with us.So we asked: What if we bottled the real thing?Fresh. Fragrant. Alive.Just like how we drink it here — straight from the farm, no shortcuts, no fake stuff.That's how Nanas Harvest was born. A mission to share the best coconut water in the world the way it's meant to be tasted: raw, refrigerated, and full of life.

name: Nancy's Probiotic Foods
description: In 1960, newly married and fresh out of college, Chuck and Sue Kesey opened the doors to Springfield Creamery. A small, humble creamery, it soon became clear that a niche product was needed, and in 1970 Nancy's Yogurt, the first yogurt in the U.S. to contain live probiotics, was launched.From there the colorful story has evolved over half a century. Springfield Creamery, located in Eugene, Oregon is still family owned and operated by the Kesey family, now three generations strong. Offering a full line of organic and natural dairy products, Nancy's Probiotic Foods is distributed nationally throughout the U.S., and are considered esteemed pioneers in probiotic foods. After nearly six decades, there are bound to be some good stories, some that might surprise you - we invite you to check them out on our site (NancysYogurt.com). In the meantime, we would all agree, it is amazing what can be achieved when one stays true to the principles of creating genuinely healthy foods and investing in their community.

name: Nanjing Yida Biotechnology Co. , Ltd.
description: Sunway Group, established in 2010 in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, is a comprehensive and professional chemical group. We own three subsidiaries—Nanjing Jiayi Sunway Chemical Co., Ltd., Nanjing Yida Biotechnology Co., Ltd., and Nanjing Jieda Daily Chemical Technology Co., Ltd.—along with two state-of-the-art laboraetories. We own 3 brands: SUNWAY & YDAWAY & JIEDA .Sunway Group has formed three major business segments into a leading supplier in food additives, feed additives, and daily chemical raw materials.

name: Narra
description: Narra exists to refresh your daily siptual with Asian-inspired oat milk lattes powered with tea for smooth and balanced energy, with no refined sugars, zero artificial ingredients, dairy-free, and is Non-GMO Project Verified.

name: Natalie’s / Perricone Farms
description: The story of Natalie's begins in an orange grove with a mother pulling her daughter in a red wagon. Marygrace Sexton's husband, Bobby Sexton, a fourth-generation Florida citrus grower, dreamed of producing fresh squeezed juice but was too busy running the family's packing house to pursue it. Marygrace knew the superior qualities of Florida citrus firsthand. Though she had exclusive access to the country's best citrus, she didn't have the same access to fresh juice, unless she squeezed it herself or purchased it from a roadside stand. With the world's best fruit at her fingertips, she was determined to bring her husband's idea to fruition. Surrounded by the bounty of her husband's groves, she made good on the idea that was first intended to supply her own family with fresh, clean label juice. However, it soon blossomed into a family-operated, women-owned business that produces some of the finest juices on the market. That was over 30 years ago now. Driven by the same family values from which the company originated, Natalie's Orchid Island Juice Company (named after Marygrace Sexton's oldest daughter, Natalie), is focused on high-quality, minimally processed juice, squeezed fresh each week. With a commitment to uncompromising quality & honest transparency, Natalie's goes to great lengths for authentic freshness. Human hands select the finest fruits & vegetables. Each order is handcrafted in small batches & pasteurized at the minimum time & temperature to ensure the quality & freshness of each ingredient. Life is complicated enough. Natalie's keeps it simple, which is why there are minimal ingredients in each juice. No preservatives. No artificial ingredients. No GMOs. Nothing to deter you from the optimal health that lives within each bottle of Natalie's juice. It's Authentic. It's Clean. It's The Natalie's Way.

name: Nate's Honey
description: At Nate's Honey, we don't make honey. Bees make honey. Our job is just to get it to you just as nature intended. So we do as little to it as possible and then bottle it up. Honey should be real. And that's what you get with Nate's Honey - 100% pure, raw & unfiltered. At the center of Nate's Honey is our commitment to producing the highest-quality product possible. But we are also committed to a higher calling: serving God by serving you and helping you and your family live healthy and abundant lives. We can think of no sweeter purpose or passion than that. Learn more at nateshoney.com.

name: Native Vanilla
description: Native Vanilla manufactures sustainably sourced high quality vanilla products and flavors for retail, industrial and private label industries.We strive to minimize intermediaries wherever possible to provide our customers with true Farm-to-Table products.Our products are enjoyed by consumers and the food industry for their unparalleled flavor.

name: NATURA AEROPACK CORPORATION
description: We are a vertically integrated coconut ingredients manufacturer specializing in high-quality MCT oil, MCT powder, and coconut oil for nutrition and wellness brands.Our 100% coconut-based ingredients are sustainable, traceable, and designed to deliver quick energy, gut health support, and cognitive performance benefits.We also provide coconut-derived personal care ingredients and offer flexible ODM and tolling services for brand owners and formulators.

name: Naturade
description: The Naturade story starts with Kareem Cook and Claude Tellis when they were college friends at Duke University and realized they had so many people in their families with diet related illnesses like diabetes. 10 years later, they decided to make their mutual concern their business and launched a business called Healthy Body Products after moving to LA and seeing a 40% child obesity rate. They realized something needed to be done so they founded a healthy vending machine company. Battling the major soft drink companies, they successfully co-led a movement that got the laws changed in LA banning junk food in schools and were awarded the contract for every public school in LA. For their efforts, they were invited by President Clinton and Gov Huckabee to meet and discuss how they did it. Realizing that they had to think bigger to really affect change on a global scale, in 2012 they bought Naturade, a nutritional company that was founded in 1926. Believing that everyone should have access to quality food regardless of income, location, or race, they've led Naturade in a mission to bring Whole Foods quality products to a Walmart consumer.

name: NATURAL FOOD ARGENTINA
description: I was born and raised in the city of Rosario located in the province of Santa Fe, Argentina. Though, both my parents were originally from the province of San Juan, Argentina. Growing up, my parents taught me about San Juan and spent most of my holidays there. San Juan amazed me, from a very young age, with its mountains, heat, sun, and, specially, its vast vineyards. In 2014, while living in Rosario, an oppotunity of combining the things that captivited me from San Juan, appeared: purchasing a family-owned vineyard and its raisin processing plant. I shared my vision with friends, family, and partners and, with their support, in 2015 NATURAL FOOD ARGENTINA was established. Raisin manufacturing was an unknown field for us at the beginning. However, with the kind support from colleages and former employees, we began to widen our knowledge and started looking for ways to improve the raisins we offered and how to grow in the industry. We visited Turkey, a leader in raisin manufacturing, and were to meet with colleages that furthered our knowledge on both harvesting and processing. In addition to it, we purchased a processing line  and shipped to San Juan. With the new knowledge and processing line, the raisins we started to offer were finally up-to-part with the ones of key players in the industry, for which we had the potential to expand. Through trade shows, such as expo west, we have been able to meet big clients and reach into new markets, as well as to establish connections with colleages all over the world. This way we became the first company to bring the california-developed Dried On The Vine method to Argentina. At the moment, we're Argentina's biggest integrated raisin manufacturing company. Each year we partner with more local producers and share our knowledge on how to improve the quality of the raisins that are grown and harvested in San Juan.

name: Natural Green Technology Inc
description: Natural Green Tech (NGT) specializes in innovative, eco-friendly packaging solutions for businesses. We provide customized packaging that enhances sales, reduces costs, and boosts productivity for our valued customers.

name: Natural Health & Beauty Quest Inc & TePe
Natural Heaven
description: Come to our booth to try our pasta, rices & more made from Hearts of Palm + join us for the LAUNCH of our own brand! We are the largest producers of Hearts of Palm in the world! Such a versatile vegetable!PRIVATE LABEL I FOOD SERVICE I OWN BRAND

name: Natural Path/Silver Wings
description: •	DOCTOR DEVELOPED* colloidal silver, silver / herbal blends, silver nasal rinse and silver / herbal topical skincare.•	STRONG IMMUNE SUPPORT- 5-50x more silver particles than other silver brands with only 10 PPM. •	BETTER VALUE – Higher strength = less doses to consume = more economical•	SAFE & EASY ASSIMILATION- Unparalleled small silver particle size. Made from naturally occurring elemental silver mineral which has a true amber color. It's non-GMO, gluten-free, and allergen-free.•	HIGHEST QUALITY / ULTRA PURITY- Pharmaceutical grade deionized pure water with ultra-fine (only 1-3 nanometers) pharmaceutical grade colloidal silver particles for optimal quality, integrity and protection earning 12 esteemed awards.  •	INDEPENDENT LAB TESTED & VERIFIED-  UL cGMP certified and FDA inspected. Qualified third-party laboratories verify PPM, silver particle size, stability, pH, etc. •	VALIDATED- Backed by clinical, laboratory, university research and in-vitro studies.•	COLLOIDAL SILVER EXPERTS- Natural Path / Silver Wings is the oldest family-owned and operated colloidal silver manufacturer in the U.S. (since 1994). Silver Wings is the silver specialist! The only comprehensive colloidal silver brand offering varying strengths, herbal blend formulas, silver nasal rinse, and silver skincare. •	GIVING BACK- Silver Wings continues to support over 15 nonprofit humanitarian organizations locally, nationally and internationally.  Silver Wings is the ultimate immune support with silver's legacy used by generations around the world for over 2,400 years. Your seasonal and year-round wellness starts right here!*Dr. Mark Smith, ND, PhD, MD (MA) & Liz Smith, RN

name: Natural Stacks
description: Roy is a lifelong athlete who started researching natural ways to improve brain health and performance after watching his Grandfather suffer from cognitive decline. He was uncomfortable with the "one-size-fits-all" proprietary blends. Roy is on a mission to build better brains and founded Natural Stacks in 2013.

name: Natural Sweeteners
description: Natural Sweeteners is a woman owned business dedicated to delivering natural, better-for-you sweetening solutions. Our mission is to help brands reduce sugar without compromising on taste or quality. We offer a portfolio of clean label, natural sweeteners including our proprietary Super Stevia and Super Sugar. We are US based and offer reliable, alternative supply chain options for your natural sweetening ingredients. We provide expert product development and technical support.

name: NaturalBoom
description: NaturalBoom is the creator of the world’s first Mental Drink – a revolutionary line of functional beverages designed to deliver clean mental energy through natural nootropics and vitamin B5, with minimal calories and zero artificial additives.Crafted in Italy with premium natural ingredients, our portfolio includes unique flavor profiles like Green Tea & Ginger, Elderflower & Lemon, and Raspberry & Chili Pepper. Each 250ml can supports focus, reduces mental fatigue, and fits seamlessly into modern lifestyles – from work and study sessions to workouts and social moments.We’re expanding across international markets to bring NaturalBoom to coffee shops, gourmet retailers, foodservice operators and e-commerce platforms.

name: Naturalin Bio-Resources Co Ltd
description: Naturalin was founded in 2006. We manufacture plant extracts and natural ingredients for the nutrition, food and beverage, personal care, hygiene, animal feed and agriculture industries. We are committed to providing the best services and products all the way from raw materials, plant extracts and their application solutions. We believe that the top quality natural ingredients come from the finest raw materials and the best quality control in manufacturing process.Naturalin specialises in customised application.We supply natural ingredients in the forms designed for your application. We believe that our innovative research expertise and experienced manufacturing teams can bring your products into the future. Naturalin is a member of Quality Standards Drafting Committee for China Botanical Extracts Industry.We are at the forefront of plant extracts industry, providing our clients customised natural ingredients and innovative application solutions to meet the market demands.

name: NaturaNectar
description: Today, NaturaNectar enjoys developing best-in-class bee propolis supplements and ingredients from raw materials harvested in Brazil. It all started back in 2008 when founding partners J.L. Paes-Leme and Alessandro Esteves met to design and create the ideas behind what NaturaNectar offers today. Alessandro was a local businessman who was in love with the honeybees and had just discovered the botanical origin of the Brazilian Red Propolis during a scientific expedition with researchers at the University of São Paulo. At the same time, J.L. was wrapping up a successful career in the financial services world and was looking forward to the next chapter of his life with more purpose and impact in the world."It was one of the many trips I have done from Miami to Sao Paulo, Brazil. As a senior executive of one of the largest financial services multinational companies, in charge of Brazil at the time, I was very used to this trip. Flight attendants already knew me by name... This trip was different though. It was to explore my exit strategy from the company that gave me a 21-year exciting career. I felt it was time to do something fundamentally different with my life, something that could make a great impact on people's lives. I was on my way to explore the potential business opportunity of what we call NaturaNectar and PhenolicFactory today. As I crossed the Equator line flying over South America, I started to type in a few basic caveats that Alessandro and I would have to agree upon before we could do any business together:- Be conscious of the many needs of "our neighbors", especially the ones closest to us. - A strong desire to have a portion of the company's profits directed to charity.- Absolutely conduct our business with the highest degree of integrity, ethics, and respect.- Pledge to learn to appreciate and value each other's strengths and help one another bridge our gaps.When I presented this to him, his face could not hide how aligned our thoughts were... and so it all began!"   J.L. Paes-Leme, Founder/CEO

name: Nature Farm
description: Nature Farm was founded in 2010 as a very small, family-scale business in Cheongdo, South Korea, a region widely recognized for producing premium persimmons. What began as a modest operation focused on local fruit has steadily grown into one of Korea's leading exporters of dried persimmon products.Today, Nature Farm supplies a wide range of persimmon-based products—including soft-dried persimmons, semi-dried persimmons, and frozen persimmons—to approximately 15 countries worldwide, including Japan, the United States, Taiwan, Indonesia, Singapore, and other global markets.Building on our deep expertise in persimmon processing, we have expanded beyond a single fruit category to offer OEM and ODM services for other dried and frozen fruit products. Our core strength lies in soft-drying technology, where texture, flavor, and natural sweetness are carefully balanced through controlled processing.As we continue to grow, Nature Farm remains focused on one goal: to set a global benchmark in the soft-dried fruit category by delivering products that are honest, thoughtfully made, and trusted by partners around the world.

name: Nature Pearls Private Limited
description: Started in the year 2014 with the top management possessing more than 26 years of rich experience in Rice Industry, Nature Pearl started with exporting Organic Rice from India, and today with sustainable & farmer oriented approach has become the one of the Top Organic rice exporter in India. Nature Pearls seizes the next level of global growth in multiple organic food products like Ready to eat Gourmet Meals, Flours, Spices, Pulses & other grains and more. The organic food venture has also had the privilege to establish organic seed production in its projects, which notably helped, improved the yields of the organic crops too. Since its inception in 2014, Nature Pearls is on constant rise which can be seen through ever rising revenues. Nature Pearls is a pool of Enthusiastic and dynamic young professionals which keeps company on an upward trajectory. Customer Portfolios are steadily on rise and new customers are added every year. Approximate change of customer from last year to this year is around 25% increase. In future prospects, we want to move from specialized organic rice company to diversified Organic food company. For that we have to build additional infrastructure, develop new potential markets, Investment for scaling up the operations, support from the government for growing multi ingredients value added products under organic certification.

name: Nature's Answer
description: Nature’s Answer® is a global, family-owned supplement brand with over 54 years of expertise in premium botanical wellness. Sold in more than 180 countries, we offer a broad portfolio across immune, respiratory, digestive, dental, protein, and whole-body health.Our mission is simple:To empower everyone to take charge of their health with trusted, high-quality supplements.

name: Nature's Earthly Choice
description: Nature's Earthly ChoiceConceived in 2005, we continue to search for healthy foods to expand our line of wholesome grains to bring you new and delicious items. We are always bringing you the best tasting and healthiest selections from around the globe.We are passionate about the products we create and are committed to delivering you the best tasting, highest quality products to support your healthy lifestyle.

name: Nature's Eats
description: Great nuts run in our family.Our family got started in the nut business when my grandfather bought a small pecan shelling company in downtown San Antonio. Since then and for three generations we've traveled the world, partnering with the best growers and farms to deliver you the most delicious premium grade natural nuts, snacks and baking ingredients you'll find anywhere.

name: Nature's Flavors
description: We Dream in Flavors! Crafted with passion, rooted in nature. We bring you natural and organic ingredients to inspire your culinary adventures. From flavorings, fragrances, syrups & sweeteners, ingredients & enhancers, beverages & mixes, to coffee beans. Flavors for every industry: we partner with a wide array of industries, providing innovative flavor solutions that enhance products and delight consumers. From food and beverage to health and wellness, our natural and organic flavors are crafted to meet the unique needs of each category.Check us out at www.naturesflavors.com

name: Nature's Fusions Nutri
description: Our story is unconventional.  We are a Family-Owned Company. In 2009 our sister was diagnosed with cancer and our family began the long road of holistic healing. We found a wealth of information along the way, some good and some not.Our founder, who is gay, vegan, autistic, and bipolar, created Nature's Fusions from nothing by filling essential oil bottles drop by drop and giving them away to friends and family. He had a passion for plants, a love of medical research, and a simple desire to make the world around him a better place.Since then we've grown into offering multiple brands. Nature's Fusions Essential Oils, ProHemp, and Nutri Supplements. We've expanded our mission to include helping all people Live Better Longer through providing the best science-backed supplements and herbal products in the world.

name: Nature's Pantry
description: Founded by myself Brian Lizama a dedicated father of four, Nature's Pantry was born from a desire to offer the healthiest options for my children/family and extending that commitment to families worldwide. I started my career as a leader in the Life Insurance/Financial Planning industry for 12 years. I built a successful insurance company from scratch helping hire and train over 300 agents, ultimately as a Sr Vice President.  From 2011 to 2023  I saw the rapid decline of the overall health of the everyday American. With diseases like diabetes, high blood pressure, obesity, cancer and mental health issues going from around 2 of every 10 adults in their 30s-40s having these conditions, to around 5 or 6 of every 10 having these conditions ages 30-40.  This was alarming and made me look at my own health habits in 2023. After being overweight at 206lbs being 5'5" all my 20s and early 30s I decided to really key in on eating healthier and losing at least 20 lbs over a year period. At this point I learned about intermittent fasting, water fasting and the whole food/carnivore diet. My first month I lost 10 lbs, then repeating again I lost 10 more lbs, shocked that I wanted to lose 20lbs in a year yeet doing it in 2 months. I kept going and got all the way down to 159 by the end of the year. I felt more energetic, healthier and stronger then I ever felt my whole life. I concluded it's 80% of what we eat that causes us to have health issues/ being overweight. Thought this period of time I found out about the many health benefits of using an all natural unprocessed sea salt with minerals to add to your water as an electrolyte. Doing research I found that the highest quality and mineral infused salt came from Britanny France and that's when my journey started to actually get into the CPG industry. I realized there was a need in the market for this and many more healthy options. Today we operate as a family business.

name: Nature’s Path Family of Organic Brands
description: Nature's Path Organic Foods is North America's largest organic breakfast and snack food company and produces USDA and Canadian Certified Organic and Non-GMO Project Verified breakfast and snack foods sold in grocery and natural food stores in over 50 countries around the world. Committed to the triple bottom line -- socially responsible, environmentally sustainable and financially viable, Nature's Path works diligently to support communities and champion the cause of people and planet. Brands include Nature's Path, Love Crunch, Que Pasa, EnviroKidz, Love Child Organics, and Anita's Organic Mill. Founded in 1985, Nature's Path is headquartered in Richmond, British Columbia and employs hundreds of valued team members at its four facilities in Canada and the United States.

name: Nature's Truth/Piping Rock
description: The story of Nature's Truth begins with its founders, a family of 2nd and 3rd generation vitamin innovators who utilized their decades of knowledge and expertise to create a brand that people could truly feel good about using.Our company was born out of a passion for healthy living and a dedication to sharing our unique wellness solutions with the world. Our teams of scientists and nutritionists develop formulas that are both effective and safe, using only responsibly sourced ingredients from trusted suppliers.

name: Nature's Way
description: Nature's Way is renowned as the highest quality provider of therapeutic dosage natural medicines and nutritional supplements in the industry since 1969. We incorporate FDA pharmaceutical quality standards in all facets of our business. This includes raw material evaluation and supplier selection, laboratory analytics across the entire spectrum of quality, purity, potency and efficacy measures, Quality Assurance and Quality Control checkpoints, and strict manufacturing standards to FDA GMP’s (verified good manufacturing practices).

name: Naturepedic
description: Story + PurposeOUR STORY STARTED SMALL … NEWBORN BABY SMALL.Naturepedic was founded in 2003, when Board Certified Environmental Engineer Barry Cik went crib mattress shopping for his first grandchild and couldn't find a single option made without questionable chemicals, harmful waterproofing, potential allergens and hazardous flame retardants. He knew his family and families everywhere deserved better ¬ and thus, Naturepedic was born. Barry, along with his sons, Jeff and Jason, still run the business, now offering certified organic mattresses and accessories for babies, kids and adults.

name: NaturesPlus
description: The idea for Natural Organics—and its flagship brand, NaturesPlus—took root when the late Gerald Kessler, who had worked in the pharma industry, came to see conventional medicines as a salve that only masked affliction without addressing its root causes. He realized that, unlike the isolated compounds found in most pharmaceuticals, botanicals contain many phytonutrients that work much better together. He described this gap as "the difference between knowledge and wisdom." This insight resulted in the establishment of Natural Organics in 1972. Today, we continue in Mr. Kessler's footsteps by continuing to produce innovative products that not only meet our customers' needs…but far exceed them. Mr. Kessler thought of Natural Organics as a family, and this concept has always been at the core of our company—when we say we treat our employees like family, we mean it! We currently employ about 400 people at our main manufacturing base in Melville, New York and a satellite location in Reno, Nevada; our products are available in more than 100 countries around the world.

name: NBF DISTRIBUTIONS INC
description: NBF is a 100% Mexican company based in Jalisco, with over 15 years of experience. We specialize in the production and distribution of organic and natural products, both nationally and internationally. We are passionate about nature, using ingredients like avocado, agave, and coconut to promote health and well-being. Our mission goes beyond quality products; we ensure our supply chain meets the highest environmental standards, ensuring sustainability at every step.

name: NBPure
description: Nbpure is a family business owned and led by women. For 20+ years, we've formulated, manufactured, and distributed premium supplements from our Arizona USA facility. If you ask Owner Danna Pratte, nbpure represents a decades long journey to better herself, her family, and her community. We started with digestive health products like the extremely popular MagO7 colon cleanse. Now, we offer dozens of supplements across wellness, performance, and beauty. We're actively launching new products!

name: Nello
description: In 2021, we found ourselves stressed out. Using excessive caffeine to keep energy levels high, the health consequences began to take their toll. We knew we needed a change. We wanted a healthy, effective, & non-drowsy way to help manage occasional stress in a tasty drink mix that we could drink while working or relaxing after a long day. Things haven't stopped with just Supercalm. We've always believed good health should mean feeling more like yourself, not less. Supplements of all kinds should enhance your natural state of being, not leave you feeling altered. Most of the supplements out there have proprietary blends, "fairy dusted" ingredients, & lack clinical research to support their claims. We wanted formulas that optimized us for every part of life's adventures whether we needed to calm down or needed a healthy pick-me-up. With no fillers, no added sugars, non-GMO, vegan & no proprietary blends.'

name: Neon Tiger HK Ltd
description: We founded Neon Tiger in late 2022 because we could not find suitable sodas for ourselves and our families. The origins of Neon Tiger are rooted in many summer afternoons spent sipping on delicious homemade sodas crafted by Else Berman, the mother of our co-founder Jessica, from tropical Asian fruits, botanical syrups and soda water. Simple and healthy, we wondered why most ready-to-drink sodas are unhealthy and never taste as great. It turns out that two types of sodas dominate the market; Traditional high sugar sodas made from artificial ingredients, and  "zero sugar" sodas which use essences and artificial sweeteners that taste poor and have questionable health benefits. The opportunity to create a soda using real ingredients that you can find in your kitchen was roaring in our minds... Neon Tiger Real Fruit Sodas are low sugar, low calorie alternatives to soft drinks made from real Asian fruit juice, carbonated water and a touch of cane sugar. We prioritize natural sweetness from fruit and cane, and avoid fake sweeteners. Our sweet spot? Real sugar, in moderation.The Soda REALvolution!We are proud to offer a delicious, healthier soda for the entire family made from real ingredients. Enjoy a Neon Tiger on its own or as the perfect mixer with your favourite spirit. Drink Real. Drink Better.Neon Tiger is a Hong Kong brand. We have gained rapid traction since launch, and are expanding into other Asian countries and have plans to launch in the US, hence our interest in Expo West.

name: NestFresh & New Barn Organics
description: We're firm believers: happy hens make the finest eggs. Letting our feathered friends roam outdoors means they get to peck, scratch, dust bathe, and just be themselves, living their birdy best lives!

name: NESTOS SA
description: It all started 45 years ago when Yiannis Efstathiadisintroduced to the market the first Roasted and Peeled Peppers. From his very early steps in life he was offering with passion food products in the classic small streets region in the city of Thessaloniki. When the market needs for peeled roasted peppers emerged Yiannis took the opportunity to set up his small handmade production site. Few months later he was proud to present his first crop production of 700 tins and 100 jars for the local market which was hungry for much more. Soon after, the first export came and nowadays the 2ndgeneration family driven company NESTOS S.A. exports its products all over the world.

name: Neuro Gum & Mints
description: Founded in 2015 by college friends Ryan Chen and Kent Yoshimura, Neuro was born out of the need for quick, convenient and reliable source of energy.  With Kent's background in neuroscience and Ryan's in chemistry, they put their heads together to create an all-natural gum and mint packed with scientifically backed ingredients that boost energy and focus.

name: New Acai Amazonas
description: At New Acai Amazonas, we’re committed to bringing nature’s best ingredients to your business. Our business, which was initially established as an Acai Berry supplier, has expanded and grown into a one-stop shop for healthy ingredient solutions.- Acai Powders - Freeze Dried Powders- Spray Dried Powders- Vibe Acai America- Superfoods

name: NEW LANKA GLOBAL EXPORT PVT LTD
description: MY NAME: AMILA - AMROSHAN - ROAMRO

name: New Mexico Department of Agriculture
description: NMDA promotes a fair marketplace, food protection, marketing, and economic development; supports the beneficial use and conservation of natural resources; and works cooperatively with the public and private sectors, 1913

name: New Target, Inc.
description: New Target, Inc. is a full-service digital agency empowering organic food and beverage brands to connect with customers, drive sales, and build loyal followings. We blend strategic marketing, creative design, web development, hosting, and branding expertise into cohesive online experiences that make your products shine. Whether you need an engaging chatbot, an e-commerce platform or an impactful digital marketing campaign, we tailor solutions that celebrate your flavors—and keep fans coming back for more. We are the digital agency for brands you know & love.

name: New Wave Enviro
description: New Wave Enviro Products Inc., founded in 1993, is an employee-owned company based in Colorado. We focus on providing environmentally responsible products that encourage sustainable living. Our product range includes reusable BPA-free water bottles, stainless steel lunchboxes, and water filtration systems designed to reduce plastic waste and promote eco-friendly practices.New Wave Enviro is committed to using safe materials and developing practical solutions that make it easier for consumers to live more sustainably. Our flagship products are the 10 Stage Plus drinking water filter, which provides long-lasting, on-demand clean water, and Shower Filters that reduce the toxic chlorine in Shower Water.  Our line of reusable water bottles and lunch containers support the reduction of single-use plastic waste.New Wave Enviros mission is to create a greener future by offering alternatives that combine convenience, quality, and sustainability.

name: Nexcel Oils
description: Nexcel Oils (formerly Nexcel Natural Ingredients) is a supplier of Non GMO and Organic Oils.  Nexcel Oils specializes in, but is not limited to, Soybean Oil, Canola Oil, High Oleic Sunflower Oil, High Oleic Safflower Oil and Avocado Oil.  Nexcel Oils  has blending capabilities and can blend custom blends for their customers.  Nexcel Oils supplies oils in tankers, totes and drums.All Nexcel Oils are Non GMO verified and the organic oils are certified by QAI.

name: NEXIRA
description: Founded in 1895, Nexira has been a key innovator in the food, health and nutrition industries. Nexira is dedicated to providing only the best natural and organic plant-based ingredients.Our portfolio of products includes high-quality plant extract powders, antioxidants, soluble dietary fibers, texturizing ingredients and active botanical extracts.As we celebrate Nexira’s 130th anniversary, we look back with immense pride at the journey that has brought us to our position as a global leader in acacia fiber and natural plant-based ingredients. This milestone is not just a reflection of our long-standing presence in the industry, but also a testament to the passion, innovation, and shared commitment that have defined our story. It marks the resilience of a family-owned business that has remained independent while evolving with the times.

name: NextFoods Inc., GoodBelly, Cheribundi
description: We make the journey to better health feel as good as the results.

name: Nic Nac Naturals
description: Of all the functional ingredients, nicotine may be one the most effective and impactful. Unfortunately its reputation has been tarnished by terrible delivery methods. Nic Nac was created to rebrand nicotine and provide the singular best nicotine alternative. Nic Nac employees a patented delivery method free of smoke, pH adjusters, artificial sweeteners, and any artificial ingredients, and instead is made with xylitol and real essential oils.

name: Nick's Sticks
description: Nick's Sticks, a Castleray company, has its roots firmly planted in the fertile soils of the rural Midwest. Founded in 2011, Nick's Sticks was born out of a desire to provide quality, protein-rich, meat snacks – Naturally. Handcrafted locally in small batches, we have been able to craft a snack stick that is better for you and your family, without sacrificing flavor or taste. Try one and we think you will agree.
