As a pioneer in the grass-fed feed and nutrient-dense food movements, we are passionate about producing only the highest-quality food products, using the highest quality ingredients, or as we like to say, "All of the goodness – none of the garbage."Cattle thrive on lush, green grass, sunshine, and free-range living. Poultry grow and thrive best in a free-range atmosphere. This is the way nature had intended for them to grow. It also captures our approach as well. That is why we only use grass-fed free-range beef in our products, and free-range chicken and turkey. Straightforward, uncomplicated foods that nourish your body and soul.

name: Nielsen-Massey Vanillas
description: For over 117 years, Nielsen-Massey has set the standard for excellence in the vanilla industry, proudly family-owned and operated through generations. Our journey began with a profound love and respect for the world's #1 flavor, and today, that passion continues to drive us. Our expertise and dedication have earned us a strong reputation, enabling us to source consistently high-quality beans and offer a versatile range of products. At Nielsen-Massey, we bring the world's finest vanilla from bean to bottle, making every taste a testament to our legacy of excellence.

name: Nihon Yakken North America, Inc.
description: Our brand story begins with the name Nihon Yakken, born from a simple yet powerful conviction: to serve our customers' health through safe, trusted Japanese herbs and foods. This purpose anchors everything we do. In 2023, Nihon Yakken North America, Inc. was establised as a 100% subsidiary to bring our legacy to American households and health-minded communities. Our flagship product is Golden Aojiru, a 100% young barley grass powder that embodies Japan's reputation for vitality. It's as easy to drink as matcha, with a smooth, approachable taste that encourages daily use. In Japan, our brand, Golden Aojiru, tops the charts as a trusted wellness staple; in North America, we are dedicated to delivering the same trusted quality. By bridging centuries of wisdom with modern science, we provide a convenient, enjoyable foundation for daily health, helping American families feel their best—today and for years to come.

name: Niman Ranch
description: Niman Ranch and our network of U.S. family farmers and ranchers raise livestock humanely and sustainably, with respect for the animals, the land, and the people who care for them. Every step we take results in meat of premium quality, celebrated for its exceptional taste and rich, natural flavor.

name: Nimco Corporation
description: Since 1962, NiMCO continues as the leading independent manufacturer of form fill and seal equipment for Gable-Top cartons. With over 2000 installations in more than 60 countries, NiMCO continues to build on this long standing reputation as the premier Gable-Top Packaging Machinery manufacturer of reliable and affordable form, fill, and seal machinery systems. Filling a variety of products in gable-top cartons. NiMCO offers a comprehensive product line of gable top carton fillers, ranging from manual top and bottom carton sealers to high speed units with spout applicators and carton sterilization systems. NiMCO’s liquid filling machines fill gable top cartons from 120 ml to 5 L for food and non-food liquids. NiMCO machines combine reliable mechanical operations with the latest in electronics to ensure leak proof seals and consistent trouble free production output.NiMCO machines work with all the major carton companies. CategoriesPackaging•  Biodegradable Packaging•  Packaging Material•  Paper ProductsRaw Ingredients•  Fruits & VegetablesAdult Beverages•  Liquor & Spirits•  Wine•  Cocktail MixesBaking & Cooking Ingredients•  Baking & Cooking MixesBeverages•  Coffee•  Flavored & Enhanced Water•  Fruit Flavored Drinks•  Tea & Infusions•  WaterDairy & Eggs•  Eggnog•  Eggs•  MilkDairy Alternatives•  MilkDried Beans, Rice & Grains•  Dried Beans•  Dried Grains•  Other Dried Goods•  RiceJuice•  Fruit Juice•  Fruit Punch•  Juice Blends•  Lemonade & Lemon Juice•  Limeade & Lime Juice•  Nectars•  Vegetable JuiceSoups & Canned Goods•  Soup MixesBakery•  Cookies

name: NIMEKS ORGANICS
description: processor, and exporter of Nuts, Dried Fruits and Pulses, since 1985- A yearly production capacity of more than 16.000 tons- Has exclusive contracts with over 1.500 organic farms.

name: Ningbo Herb Pharma Corp. DBA Best Global Nutrition Inc.
description: Ningbo Herb Pharma Corp. (hereinafter referred to as "Ningbo Herb''), is a cultivator and manufacturer high-tech company located in Ningbo, China since 1956. Best Global Nutrition Inc., located in California, is Ningbo Herb’s US branch and has two FDA approved warehouses in CA&NJ. Ningbo Herb strictly follows GMP standard and has a Food and Food Additive production license, which has passed the HACCP, CQC, ISO 9001:2008, NSF cGMP, QS, OU Kosher, and Halal. We are specialized in Curcumin, Huperzine-A, Berberine HCl, Bilberry extract, Resveratrol, Quercetin and Grape seed extract which are widely used in Health products, food supplements and cosmetics.

name: Nixie Beverage Company
description: Nixie, founded by Nicole Bernard Dawes — the founder of Late July Organic Snacks — is the one of the fastest-growing sparkling water brands in the natural market and now introduces a new line of Organic Zero Sugar Soda. All of its zero-sugar beverages are packaged in environmentally-friendly BPA-free cans, crafted with USDA Certified Organic ingredients, purified using reverse osmosis filtration to remove toxic forever-chemicals, sodium, fluoride, and other impurities, and free from calories and artificial sweeteners. All Nixie beverages are USDA Certified Organic, Non-GMO Project Verified, vegan, gluten-free, and kosher. Nixie can be found in over 11,000 retailers nationwide!

name: NMG PHARM LLC
description: MegaGold, founded in California, USA, is a premium health and wellness brand specializing in pharmaceutical-grade fish oil supplements.We focus on delivering high-concentration, high-potency, EPA-rich omega-3 formulations designed to provide clinically supported health benefits. Committed to scientific excellence, we develop highly absorbable supplements that enhance well-being while upholding the highest standards of trust and transparency.

name: Nobazul
description: Nobazul, is integrated by passionate and committed team in the making and commercializing Agave Syrup from its true origin to the most demanding global markets. Through our more than 20 million Blue Agave plants, we have perfect traceability at every stage of the making process, from planting to delivering the product, sweetening, nourishing, and improving the lives of customers and consumers in more than 27 countries.  We support our customers in developing their Agave Syrup brands, as well as we have a wide range of bulk presentations to use Agave Syrup as an ingredient in their formulations.  We have more than 17 national and international certifications (food safety, social, environmental, organic, cultural, among others) that support us as a reliable company with the highest quality standards to satisfy the needs of each of our customers. Let's spread together the nobleness of the Agave to the world!

name: NOBS
description: In 2022, NOBS was started because standard toothpaste wasn't working for us.One co-founder is a dentist with geographic tongue who couldn't tolerate most formulas. Another dealt with lifelong tooth sensitivity and never found a toothpaste that actually helped. The common thread was irritation, bloated ingredient lists, and products that promised a lot but delivered very little.Nano hydroxyapatite changed the conversation. It's the same mineral teeth are made of and has been used globally for enamel support for decades. But when we tried existing options, the experience fell short. The formulas were overbuilt, the tablets tasted bad, and the performance didn't justify the hype.So we built our own.With backgrounds in dentistry and chemistry, we stripped toothpaste down to what actually matters. A fluoride-free formula with 5% nano hydroxyapatite. No SLS. No unnecessary fillers. Tablets instead of tubes so we could remove preservatives, cut plastic waste, and keep the formula waterless and stable.That became NOBS Toothpaste Tablets. Effective, gentle, and easy to use every day.From there, the rest followed naturally. A kids toothpaste safe from the first tooth. Floss designed to remove more biofilm. An alcohol-free mouthwash that supports the oral microbiome. Whitening strips that stay comfortable on sensitive teeth.Every NOBS product follows the same rule: if it doesn't improve performance, safety, or the daily experience, it doesn't belong. Oral care should be simple, effective, and something you trust enough to use twice a day.

name: NOH FOODS OF HAWAII
description: The Original Asian Fusion for over 60 years, NOH Foods of Hawaii has made it our mission to create delicious and authentic, simple-to-prepare Asian & Pacific-rim cuisine.  Family-owned company from the 50th state of Hawaii, many of our delectable dishes are Hawaiian inspired ~ there is always a feel good, "just right" comfort feeling when you cook and dine on the various dishes prepared with NOH Foods products.Started back in 1963 when my parents, Edwin and Miriam Noh opened the first Korean restaurant in Honolulu, HI – Arirang.  An important staple at any Korean restaurant is Kim Chee (a traditional side dish made from salted and fermented vegetables). However, to make Kim Chee requires much labor and time – peeling, chopping and preparing of the various ingredients.  To save time, money and labor, my father began dehydrating these ingredients and developed a ready-to-use Kim Chee mix. The kitchen staff only had to add a scoop of this mix to the prepared cabbage and the Kim Chee was ready! That initial Kim Chee mix became the first of many NOH Foods products! This was soon followed by a variety of sauces and seasonings reflective of the many races and cultures which make up the Hawaiian Islands - Japanese Teriyaki, Chinese Char Siu, Filipino Adobo, Portuguese Vinha D'alhos, Hawaiian Haupia and many more.With today's busy lifestyles it can be difficult to find time to make satisfying and healthy meals for your family.  It is our greatest enjoyment to know that generations of families rely on NOH Foods as a staple in their homes and on their dining tables – it's like an old friend in the kitchen! To this day, the products of NOH Foods of Hawaii can be found across the United States, Canada, Europe, Mexico and throughout the Asia-Pacific region! It continues to be our mission and our commitment to provide Easy to use, Simple and Delicious products! We are proud to say that our products contain NO added MSG.We invite you to discover the wonderful products and recipes of NOH Foods of Hawaii!Mahalo (Thank you)

name: Noodle lovers
description: 1. A Journey Rooted in a Single Passion: Noodles and SaucesNoodleLovers began in 1993 with dried noodle manufacturing and launched its own brand in 1996.For over 30 years, we have remained dedicated to one craft—creating authentic Korean noodle dishes.2. Built on Pure Ingredients and Honest CookingWe believe great noodles begin with great ingredients.From premium flour to mineral-rich underground rock water, everything is carefully selected and prepared in-house to ensure purity and natural flavor.3. Craftsmanship Inspired by TraditionOur signature texture is achieved by blending two traditional Korean methods—hand-pulled stretching and pin-pressed kneading—creating a balance of chewiness and smoothness that defines NoodleLovers noodles.4. Made Entirely Under One RoofIn our integrated facility in Jincheon, Korea, we develop and produce every component—noodles, sauces, and toppings—in the same place.This unified production ensures consistency, quality, and food safety at every step, backed by ISO-certified global standards.5. Innovation Guided by CuriosityOur R&D team continuously explores trends and collaborates with chefs to create both traditional and modern flavors, expanding how Korean noodles can be enjoyed worldwide.6. From a Korean Favorite to a Global FavoriteWhat started as a local favorite is now reaching global tables.Through our international expansion, we aim to share the heart of Korean noodle culture with the world—one bowl at a time.

name: Nora Snacks
description: Nora Snacks, an esteemed North American company, was born out of a deep-rooted passion for seaweed snacks and a desire to share its delectable flavors with the snack-loving community. The founders of Nora, avid travelers themselves, couldn't resist the allure of crunchy seaweed treats during their trips to Thailand, Korea, Japan, and China. Their suitcases were often stuffed with these savory delights, yet they still yearned for more to satiate their cravings. It was then that the idea struck them: rather than keeping this umami goodness to themselves, they should launch Nora and bring their favorite seaweed snacks to the discerning and adventurous palates of North America.Seaweed, a staple in Asian cuisine for centuries, has captivated taste buds with its remarkable flavors and exceptional health benefits. As sushi and other Asian cuisines have gained widespread popularity worldwide, seaweed has emerged as one of the fastest-growing food categories. In ancient times, the harvesting of Pyropia, commonly known as red seaweed (referred to as "gim" in Korea and "nori" in Japan), was a treasured practice, with its value even extending to being included in a bride's dowry. Over time, resourceful farmers and fishermen developed innovative methods to cultivate seaweed on bamboo stalks and nets, a tradition that endures to this day.

name: Nordic Naturals
description: Nordic Naturals, a leading manufacturer of fish oils and essential fatty acid blends, offers a complete line of award-winning omega oils for adults, children, and pets, all in natural triglyceride form. Nordic Naturals’ multi-patented processing technology delivers industry-leading purity, freshness, and taste. Recommended by doctors and health practitioners, Nordic Naturals is the brand chosen by research institutions and universities for clinical trials.

name: Norse Roots
description: Norse Roots is the first large scale manufacturer of beef tallow snacks and we are committed to offering premium seed-oil free Beef Tallow-fried salty snacks at a price that makes sense for both the consumer and the retailer. Our 6 kettle chip SKUs are found nationwide in Sprouts, Costco, Fresh Thyme, and HomeGoods, with more stores stocking us every day through KeHE and UNFI. We also have tortilla chip and pellet snacks on display and encourage anyone to come and sample them at our booth.

name: North Carolina
description: The EDPNC improves the economic well-being and quality of life for all North Carolinians by recruiting new businesses to the state, supporting existing employers, assisting companies with international trade, counseling small business and startups, and promoting North Carolina as a tourism destination.

name: North Coast Organic
description: Manzana Products Company's journey from a small fruit drying operation in 1922 to a globally recognized brand celebrating its centennial (and then some!) is truly remarkable. Through its evolution, the company has stayed true to its roots while embracing innovation and a commitment to quality. The transition from Oehlmann Evaporator to Manzana Products Company in 1945 not only marked a change in name but also reflected a deeper cultural acknowledgment by honoring the Latin American workforce that contributed to its success.The emphasis on using only whole US-grown certified organic apples and avoiding added sugars, preservatives, colorings, or flavorings underscores Manzana's dedication to providing healthier options for consumers. This commitment to quality and health aligns with evolving consumer preferences for more natural and transparently sourced products.The North Coast Organic Brand, a flagship of Manzana, epitomizes this dedication to health and quality. It has become synonymous with premium organic apple products that are not only delicious but also wholesome and nutritious. By continually innovating and staying attuned to consumer needs, Manzana has ensured its relevance and success for generations.Meet the team at booth #1710 to get up to date on all the exciting news to come! Here's to another extraordinary 100 years!

name: North Country Smokehouse
description: As one of America's few remaining, family-owned smokehouses, North Country's mission since 1912 is to hand craft premium, artisanal smoked meats through culinary excellence, exceptional animal care standards, and respect for the land.Located in the heart of New England, our authentic charcuterie features traditional cure recipes, using only the best hand-selected ingredients, and small batch smoking process over embers of local hardwoods.Available in organic, all-natural certified humane, and traditional varieties, our product line features smoked bacon, sausage, ham, deli meat, and poultry. Our recipes are crafted using old world, European techniques, resulting in the distinct taste we are well-known for today.Recognized for our innovative approach to flavor, North Country Smokehouse partners with respected Chefs to develop signature recipes that enhance menus nationwide.Voted America's Top 10 Best Bacons by Men's Journal, New England's Best Meat by Yankee Magazine, and The Best Smoked Bacon in America by Food & Wine, North Country has been noted for balancing time honored tradition with modern day food trends.Available through upscale retailers, discerning distributors, and with custom crafted recipes in restaurants, hotels, and resorts across the country, North Country Smokehouse has been providing customers with better choices at the table for more than a century.

name: Nourish Cold Pressed Juice
description: Our founder, Francine Covelli, grew up in a close-knit Italian-Irish family. The garden, cooking together and gathering around the kitchen table were the essence of family life. Nourish was inspired by her family's passion for farm to table foods, the importance of fresh ingredients and the value of eating well, both for enjoyment and nourishment. Francine's organic garden is the focal point of Nourish HQ. Nourish Cold Pressed Juice is pressed straight from her farm in Kennett Square, PA and where you can find her team handcrafting their immune-boosting beverages that inspire the local community.  But, we are not just a beverage maker - Nourish is a lifestyle. When you drink our functional beverages you have the power to support your immune system, reduce inflammation, increase antioxidants, hydrate your skin, improve gut health, detox, and balance hormones & brain chemistry to improve your mental health. When you purchase our juice, you also become part of a collective global community taking action through our commitments to giving back.

name: Novi Connect
description: Novi is the data infrastructure platform that gets your CPG products recommended by AI. As consumers increasingly turn to LLMs like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude to decide what to buy, the brands that win are the ones whose product data those systems trust and understand.Novi optimizes your SKU-level product data and trust signals so AI shopping systems can accurately select, rank, and recommend your products, then distributes that verified data across key retail partnerships to create consistent, high-authority signals across every channel AI looks at.Brands using Novi have seen up to 257% increases in AI product selection, improved rankings from 8th to 3rd, and up to 80% gains in AI visibility, often within the first 2 weeks.We work at the product level because AI recommends products, not brands. Whether a shopper is asking ChatGPT for the best organic pasta sauce under $8 or Gemini for a clean moisturizer for sensitive skin, Novi makes sure your product is in the answer.

name: Novolex
description: PlantCarton packaging for all your liquid beverage products – juice, plant-based milk, dairy, cream, liquid eggs, and more.Our NEW SmartPour packaging featuring an easy-to-pour and resealable closure, making it the ideal container for pourable, dry ingredients like premium cereals, crackers, snacks, baking ingredients, pet food, powders or formulas, and powdered laundry or dish detergents.Paper packaging - where the paper is made from trees grown in forests where sustainable forestry practices are used.

name: NOW Foods
description: NOW® founder Elwood Richard believed that high-quality health products should be affordable for everyone, a principle that the Richard family has upheld for nearly six decades. As one of the largest independent, family- and employee-owned manufacturers of natural products in the U.S. natural channel, with over 1,500 products in its catalog including dietary supplements, personal care, essential oils, sports nutrition,  and foods, the company remains dedicated to its mission to provide value in products and services that empower people to lead healthier lives.  NOW’s highly regarded in-house ISO 17025 accredited laboratories conduct more than 31,000 quality tests every month. The accreditation process involved a thorough assessment and review of the lab’s quality management system and competence. NOW operates two cutting-edge manufacturing facilities in Bloomingdale, Illinois, a distribution facility in nearby Roselle, a manufacturing and distribution center in Sparks, Nevada, and a manufacturing facility in Ontario, Canada. Its newest manufacturing building in Bloomingdale, as well as their facility in Sparks, Nevada, are LEED Silver certified, the most widely used green building rating system in the world and an international symbol of excellence.

name: Nowhere Bakery
description: Nowhere Bakery began as a culinary love letter between myself and my husband Maurizio. My history of food intolerances and digestive sensitivity and Maurizio's no-holds-barred sweet tooth left us frustrated by the lack of treats we could share together. Dozens of batter-filled nights later, my gluten-free, dairy-free twist on the classic Chocolate Chip Cookie was such a hit with friends, family and Maurizio that Nowhere Bakery wasofficially born.

name: NoWhere Foods
description: NoWhere Foods began where most good stories do - on our public lands. Family-owned and operated, NoWhere was founded by two brothers who grew up on our public lands. These formative experiences led us to start NoWhere Foods, where we are working to reconnect people to the places they love through food. Our line of Heirloom and Ancestral Beverages aim to reconnect people to these places all while improving the health of you and our diverse American agricultural history.

name: NP Nutra
description: At NP Nutra®, we are passionate about health and this is the driving force behind our success. We research, source and supply only pure, potent ingredients. We care about every aspect of the business: the environment, the farmers, our manufacturing partners, our customers and the consumers who seek better health. Our mission is to provide you with the quality ingredients you need to develop successful, healthy products.

name: NSI Group, LLC
description: Natural Sourcing International (NSI Group) is a leading private label food supplier based in Los Angeles, California. We are specialized in offering sustainable and responsibly produced superfoods, baking ingredients, food supplements and healthy snacks for retailers in the North American market.Our team of experts sources premium products globally, while honoring nature's miracles, embracing innovation, and ensuring trusted quality from origin. At NSI, we're committed to nourishing lives and supporting regeneration of nature through our products for a more sustainable future. Join us in our mission to "make sustainable available to all".

name: Nucicer
description: NuCicer is unleashing the full potential of chickpeas to deliver high-impact ingredients for food brands and climate-smart crops for growers. With an all-natural, solvent-free chickpea ingredient portfolio including high-protein flour, low-fat flour and simply milled 60% protein powder, NuCicer enables brands to improve flavor and texture and eliminate the need for heavily processed protein isolates.

name: NuernbergMesse North America
description: The origin of BIOFACH: "Bio" refers to organic in German, and "Fach" means "specialist" or "trade," so the name reflects its focus on organic expertise. While the BIOFACH brand launched in Germany and now has a strong presence in the organic industry globally, it is relatively unknown to US businesses focusing solely on the US market. We are excited to be launching BIOFACH AMERICA, part of the BIOFACH WORLD brand. While there have been organic sections of tradeshows in the past, BIOFACH AMERICA will be the first wholly organic tradeshow in the US.

name: NuLiv Science USA, Inc.
description: NuLiv Lifesytle supplements are science based and made with 100% natural ingredients. They are the supplements medical professionals should recommend to their patients. We invite you to give these products a try.

name: Nulixir, Inc.
description: Nulixir is a platform technology company helping functional beverage brands create products that deliver real, noticeable results. Founded from research in cancer therapeutics and advanced delivery science, Nulixir applies the rigor of pharmaceutical research to food-safe, natural ingredients. Using sustainable materials, we solve the challenges that limit efficacy, stability, and sensory experience across beverage formats.At the core of Nulixir’s innovation is Nusomes™, a patented encapsulation technology that enhances ingredient bioavailability, stability, and solubility while masking negative flavor profiles. This allows beverage brands to formulate with meaningful doses of functional ingredients that maintain performance, taste, and shelf life from production through consumption.Beyond ingredient technology, Nulixir operates its own beverage production facility, allowing the team to support partners beyond formulation alone. By combining technology, manufacturing, and operational expertise, Nulixir helps brands navigate scale up, production, and logistics more seamlessly, creating a more efficient and turnkey path to market.Nulixir works closely with some of the fastest growing functional beverage brands to help them differentiate in a crowded market. By overcoming challenges such as ingredient degradation, poor absorption, and formulation constraints, the technology enables higher efficacy, faster onset, and true “feel it” effects without sacrificing scalability or sensory quality.Backed by more than 60 global patents and clinically validated branded ingredients, Nulixir partners with brands to redefine what functional beverages can deliver, turning functional claims into consistent, real world performance consumers can trust.

name: Numerator
description: Numerator is a data and tech company bringing speed and scale to market research. Numerator blends first-party data from over 1 million US households with advanced technology to provide 360-degree consumer understanding for the market research industry that has been slow to change. 80 of the top 100 CPG brands’ manufacturers are Numerator clients.

name: Numi Organic Tea
description: Numi Organic Tea was founded by a brother and sister in 1999. Inspired by a Dry Desert Lime called Numi they drank as children In Iraq. Numi uses premium fuller leaf teas and pure herbs, fruits, flowers and spices in its tea bags without the use of oils or "natural" flavorings. To date, Numi has contributed more than $1 million in Fair Trade Premiums for tea farmers. Numi's Fair Trade and Fair Labor commitments have helped sponsor schools, hospitals, community centers, road construction, and other improvements for living standards in its tea-growing communities. Through plant-based wrappers and sustainable packaging, carbon neutrality, and regenerative organic agriculture, Numi strives to create lasting positive impacts on the planet and each other.

name: NURA USA
description: Join NURA at Expo West to explore our innovative offerings! Our team is ready to discuss GLP-1 nutritional support solutions, including YESTEIN® Yeast Protein, Akkermansia, Collagen, Berberine, and more. In addition, we offer clinically backed products in categories like, emotional and cognitive wellness products, and advanced biotic blends.

name: Nuritas
description: Come see us at booth #4392 and see how you can use our ingredients in food, beverage and supplement products to address the growing consumer demand for muscle health, longevity, energy, sleep and more!At Nuritas, our goal is to provide the hero ingredients inside everyday products. Ingredients are the foundation of any food, but many currently in use were created decades ago, primarily for taste and cost. They often don’t align with modern consumer demands for health and nutrition. We aim to change that by using AI to create new, functional ingredients that support well-being while remaining cost-effective and sustainable.PeptiStrong™, Nuritas’ patented flagship peptide derived from fava beans, supports muscle generation and repair, has achieved FDA-approved GRAS (Generally Recognized as Safe) status in the U.S. and is already integrated into consumer products across multiple continents. It has been validated by three human clinical trials, demonstrating benefits like improved strength, faster recovery, and sustained energy.

name: Nurture Life
description: Founded in 2015, Nurture Life is a parent-led kids food brand on a mission to build a healthier kids food aisle—starting with frozen. Created by parents and designed with registered dietitians and chefs, Nurture Life delivers nutritionally balanced, chef-crafted meals and snacks made with real ingredients and minimal processing.Nurture Life is best known for creating food that grows with families, serving babies through elementary-age kids with age-appropriate nutrition and kid-approved flavors. Seeing a critical gap after purees, the brand created a new category with Finger Foods to support self-feeding and early development—followed by complete Kids Meals designed for busy families who want better options without compromise.All Nurture Life products are thoughtfully developed with balanced nutrition at the core, featuring vegetables in every meal, high-quality proteins, and no artificial ingredients. Select frozen lines are Clean Label Project Certified, reflecting the brand’s commitment to ingredient integrity and transparency.With a proven DTC foundation and a loyal national customer base, Nurture Life is now thoughtfully expanding into retail to meet families where they already shop. The brand partners with retailers to bring differentiated, high-velocity kids solutions to one of the most underserved segments in the frozen aisle—helping modern parents serve real food, made easy.

name: NuStef Baking Ltd.
description: Reko® Pizzelles are an Italian-style waffle cookie, that are created through a precise process using an authentic multi-generational recipe from Italy's Abruzzo region and baked in small batches on cast iron griddles resulting in naturally flavored, low-calorie waffle cookies that are available in traditional and seasonal flavors. Reko pizzelles are naturally flavored and baked in a peanut-free facility, with no preservatives, artificial colors or flavors and 0g trans fat, resulting in crisp, delicate treats that are addictively delicious!™ New to Reko, introducing tea fusions™ waffle cookies, real fruit and tea infused cookies that are light and crispy in 4 fusion flavors including Chai Apple, Early Grey & Passion Fruit, Black Tea & Currant, and White Tea & Peach. Leverages growing tea consumption trends to elevate snacking experiences. Kii Naturals® Artisan Crisps are double baked and hand-crafted, made in small batches using authentic wholesome ingredients, delivering a satisfying crunch and delightful burst of flavor from fruits, nuts, and seeds. These crisps are free from preservatives, GMOs, or trans fats, making them perfect for charcuterie boards and a multitude of snacking occasions. Announcing the newest launch of Kii Naturals™, Fruit & Fire™ Snack Crisps, revolutionizing the snacking experience with an exciting blend of sweet fruit and spicy flavors. Crafted with precision and passion, these double baked crisps offer an irresistible crunch that promises to delight the adventurous snacker. From Cherry Chipotle to Chili Lime Coconut, and Hot Honey Apricot to Mango Habanero, Fruit & Fire™ Snack Crisps bring an array of unique combinations formulated across three different heat levels... where sweet meets heat, these crisps tantalize the taste buds with each mouthwatering mix of flavors.

name: Nutiva
description: We Believe a Bright Future is Rooted in Healthy Food. Since 1999, we've invested in programs that spark change in the food industry by supporting regenerative farming practices to create healthier communities. Every Nutiva product purchased helps to actively support organizations, co-ops and groups within and beyond our international supply networks along three pillars of change: empowering farmers, combating climate change, and furthering food education. In 2021, Coconut Secret joined the Nutiva family of sustainable, innovative products that lead the plant-basedand organic culinary space. Coconut Secret established itself as the leader in the soy-free Asian sauces category with its introduction of the first soy-free, gluten-free, lower-sodium soy sauce replacement, made from only two ingredients: organic coconut tree sap and mineral-rich sea salt. Coconut Aminosgave consumers a first-of-its-kind product and the brand continues to evolve, becoming the clean eater's culinary companion; delivering Asian-inspired tastes in a range offlavorful, clean sauces and marinades including its newest launch, Organic Chef Inspired Asian Sauces.

name: nutpods
description: nutpods dairy-free creamer is one of the fastest-growing plant-based brands in the U.S. and is a standout in the natural foods industry. Introduced in May 2015, nutpods' signature almond and coconut blend creamers are best sellers in their category on Amazon and are now available at many of America's largest grocery chains including Kroger, Walmart, Target, Publix and Wegmans. The nutpods brand has developed a cult-like following amongst health-conscious consumers living a dairy-free, plant-based lifestyle, and has become an integral part of wellness programs like Whole30. nutpods was born out of founder Madeline Haydon's personal need for a dairy-free coffee creamer. Her inability to find a plant-based, high-quality alternative to half and half lead her to create nutpods in her own kitchen. After discovering her personal creamer appealed to other people, Haydon decided to commercialize the recipe and launched nutpods in 2015, laying the foundation for what has become a leading U.S. brand in the plant-based movement.

name: Nutra Agri
description: We Nutra-Agri Ingredients have core expertise in supplying Reduced Sugar Sweetening Solutions, Soluble Dietary Fiber from Tapioca to top food and beverage companies. List as below - 1.	Prebiotic Soluble Fiber from Tapioca2.	Reduced Sugar Sweetener :-IMO syrup (Prebiotic Sweetener))  Reduced Sugar Syrups from TapiocaTapioca MaltodextrinAllulose3.	Other speciality Products :-Organic Sunflower LecithinOrganic Vegetable Glycerin Organic MCT Oil Coconut  Organic Castor Oil4. Plant Based Proteinsfrom Faba Beanfrom Pea and PumpkinVisit www.nutra-agri.com for more details

name: Nutra Food Ingredients, LLC
description: We've been formulating, testing, and manufacturing high quality supplements for the global nutrition industry since 2004. NutraCollagen®  is the culmination of well over a decade spent developing customized ingredients and unique processes with one goal in mind: providing individuals a clear path toward better health through true innovation and unmatched quality standards. The difference is clear. When you try any of our numerous products, you will experience the best tasting, highest performing, superior quality supplements on the planet

name: NuTrail
description: We won't sugar coat it: our granola is nuts.At NuTrail®, we meticulously craft the best high-quality, low-sugar experiences. We provide the best tasting products without the added sugar to give people satisfying and nutritious food options to support their health journey.

name: Nutraland USA, Inc.
description: Nutraland USA is a leading supplier of plant-based, science-backed ingredients for the dietary supplement and functional food and beverage industries. Headquartered in Irvine, California, we bridge the gap between nature and science by providing innovative, clean-label, and sustainable solutions that embody our "Good for your health; Good for the Earth" philosophy. Our portfolio is anchored by breakthrough branded ingredients, including Somato® Tomato Fruit Extract, the world’s first whole-food derived phytomelatonin from tomatoes; Vegadelight®, a sustainable vegan Vitamin D3 sourced from reindeer lichen; and Miricell™, an award-winning rice germ extract rich in spermidine. Supported by a world-class Scientific Advisory Board and a BRCGS Grade A+ certified manufacturing facility, we offer a robust supply chain characterized by quality, transparency, and clinical validation. Nutraland USA serves as a strategic extension of your team, providing the formulation support and essential building blocks for brands looking to lead the next generation of natural health and wellness innovation.

name: NutraPak USA, an Icelandirect Company
description: Icelandirect is a U.S.-based contract manufacturer serving the vitamin, nutraceutical, and supplement industries. We deliver sustainable, innovative solutions from concept to completion, helping brands bring high-quality products to market quickly and efficiently. We specialize in custom blended formulations, offer a broad range of white label and private label products, manufacture human-grade pet supplements, and source premium bulk raw ingredients — with a focus on superior quality omega oils. Our team is committed to exceeding expectations through excellence, attention to detail, and forward-thinking strategies. We partner with clients from product development through final delivery, ensuring each project is executed to meet both regulatory and brand goals. We offer a variety of product forms, including liquids, softgels, powders, capsules, tablets, gummies, and more. Packaging options include glass and plastic bottles, cartons, tubs, pouches, stick packs, and sachets, with numerous closure, pump, and seal styles available. Located in Clifton, New Jersey, our 100,000 sq. ft. manufacturing facility is FDA Registered, NSF GMP Certified, and USDA Organic Certified. We are proud members of the Global Organization for EPA and DHA Omega-3s (GOED), Friend of the Sea (FOS), Marine Stewardship Council (MSC), and National Animal Supplement Council (NASC).

name: NutraStar
description: The company was started in 2010 with the mission to manufacture supplements that help improve the lives of our customers and consumers that rely on them through a quality focused, customer first approach.

name: Nutrastrips
description: The future of supplementation is here, and it’s on your tongue. Our state of the art Oral Dissolving Film strips have revolutionized the way people supplement.

name: Nutri-Nation Functional Foods
description: Nutri-Nation is a co-packer and custom manufacturer of nutritional food bars. Our facilities are SQF, Organic, RSPO, kosher and Gluten-Free Certified. Our in-house product development team creates delicious custom and private label protein, fruit & nut, low sugar and various styles of extruded and slab-formed bars.

name: NutriBiotic
description: Our unwavering commitment for over 42 years has been, and continues to be, to empower individuals like you to achieve healthier, happier lives. We understand your well-being is of utmost importance, and that's why we bring you innovative, high-quality nutritional supplements and personal care products that truly make a difference.

name: Nutrient Innovations Inc.
description: Reliable Ingredients.  Stronger Partnerships.Global sourcing, stocked inventory, and manufacturing-aware support.About Nutrient InnovationsNutrient Innovations exists to help supplement manufacturers make the most informed ingredient purchasing decisions.For more than 20 years, we have worked alongside supplement brands and contract manufacturers to expand access to a broader range of expertly vetted ingredients. Our role is not to push a single solution, but to provide the clarity and perspective customers need to choose raw materials that align with their formulation goals, supply chain realities, and commercial constraints. Our MissionTo help supplement manufacturers make better ingredient decisions with sourcing intelligence and formulation insight.Our Role in the IndustryThe nutraceutical industry operates within constant changes. Cost, quality, availability, regulatory requirements, and market timing rarely align perfectly. Nutrient Innovations works within that reality, helping customers navigate complexity with confidence.By combining intelligent raw ingredient sourcing with formulation insight and market perspective, we help brands and contract manufacturers evaluate options across a wide range of price points, specifications, and use cases. Whether a product calls for a time-tested, cost-effective ingredient or a more specialized solution, our focus remains the same: expanding access and supporting informed decision-making.What We BringNutrient Innovations maintains a broad portfolio of wholesale supplement ingredients, including vitamins, minerals, botanicals, probiotics, postbiotics, enzymes, amino acids, specialty nutraceuticals, and organic ingredients. Our global sourcing network and long-standing raw material supplier relationships allow us to present reliable options that customers may not be able to source easily on their own.Beyond sourcing, we provide practical insight into how ingredient sourcing affects formulation, manufacturing, compliance, and commercial viability. This perspective helps supply chain and product development teams weigh tradeoffs, manage risk, and move forward with clarity.How We WorkWe approach our work as a partner, not just another ingredient supplier. That means listening carefully, understanding constraints, and offering options grounded in both opportunity and practicality. We recognize that better products are built through thoughtful planning and well-informed choices, supported by clear information and reliable access.

name: NUTRILATINO AÇAÍ
description: Nutrilatino's story began in 2012, in the heart of the Amazon, when the company was founded with the goal of sharing the purest expression of açaí with the world. Inspired by the richness of the Amazonian ecosystem, we focused from the very beginning on delivering products that preserve the forest's authentic qualities. Over the years, we have expanded our production capabilities, strengthened our commitment to organic cultivation, and embraced responsible and sustainable practices. What started as a local vision has grown into a global journey, always rooted in the tradition, purity, and vitality of the Amazon. Today, Nutrilatino continues to bring the world's best açaí to international markets while staying true to the values that shaped our origins.

name: NutriPea
description: For the past 45 years, we've specialized in the manufacture of food-grade protein isolates, starches and fibers. Headquartered in the Canadian Prairies, NutriPea is proud to provide our partners with high-quality functional food ingredients derived from yellow peas grown right here in Canada. From small local food processors to large multinational food companies, we value our relationship with each and every one of our customers, and we are committed to continually improving our processes to provide you with the highest quality plant-based ingredients.

name: NutriScience Innovations, LLC
description: NutriScience is a leading global ingredient developer and supplier, delivering science-backed, high-efficacy ingredients that power the next generation of health and wellness products for human and animal kind.Our ingredients are perfect for dietary supplements & nutraceuticals, animal health, functional food & beverages, and personal care products. We support clean label and transparency initiatives with ingredients that are vegan, allergen-free, gluten-free, organic, non-GMO certified, Kosher and Halal. Many of our ingredients are suitable for use in: Stick packs & sachets RTD & Instant BeveragesCapsulesTabletsSoftgelsChews GummiesCandiesDelayed ReleaseTopicalsWe'd love to help make your formulation a success! Contact sales@nutriscienceusa.com for more information.

name: Nutrition Worthy, LLC DBA Alive & Well Kombucha
description: I met Shyler, my future wife, in 2009. She had been newly diagnosed with Celiac Disease and found kombucha as a daily remedy for digestive wellness. Since that time, Shyler has achieved a Master's in Functional Nutrition and has dedicated her career to helping other individuals and companies with nutrition guidance.When I met Shyler, I was a bar manager and a novice cocktail enthusiast. I spent the next 10 years creating and working in recognized bar programs and also on behalf of different spirit brands.Shyler and I decided that our skills and expertise could unite to create a better-tasting functional beverage in the form of kombucha. Unfortunately, my father passed from alcoholism a few years ago, providing extra motivation. Growing up in the alcohol industry, it is more meaningful than ever that we have created a delicious, healthy beverage that can take the place of a beer or a cocktail when the consumer is taking a break from alcohol or choosing to abstain from alcohol completely.Shyler and I launched Alive & Well Kombucha in May of 2023, and we have been overwhelmed with positive feedback from both category fans and skeptics. Everyone agrees that our flavor profiles are much less vinegary and acidic than any other kombucha previously tried. We promote health by broadening the functional beverage category and creating new everyday kombucha drinkers.

name: Nuts For Cheese
description: Founded in 2015, Nuts For Cheese? started with an inspired chef who has an unparalleled passion to spread positive, sustainable change through food. What started as a solo venture has grown into a dedicated team of 33 employees helping to craft a line of award-winning artisanal and versatile dairy-free cheeses and butters that are now available across Canada and the United States. Nuts For Cheese? aims to elevate how consumers enjoy cheese as a world class manufacturer of chef-made, organic, plant-based dairy products.

name: NXT USA
description: Ready to elevate your product offerings? Unlock your product’s potential with our unique, clinically validated, award-winning branded ingredients that empower manufacturers to meet emerging consumer demands in the leading categories of women’s health, digestive support, active nutrition & healthy aging.The founders of NXT USA previously co-founded NattoPharma, which introduced the world to vitamin K2 MenaQ-7, a breakthrough benefiting bone & heart health globally. Now we are committed to drive our mission forward: to power products that not only reflect global health trends but also make a real difference.Our 4 proprietary, evidence-based hero ingredients help supplement finished product brands lead health categories and succeed the world over.* XEYA MODERN SHATAVARI: The formulator’s Shatavari (Asparagus racemosus) is for brands that want a market-leading 15% shatavarins extract that delivers clinical efficacy at a market-leading 50–100 mg/day—allowing smaller formats like gummies, better cost-in-use, and clear claims architecture.Xeya Modern Shatavari is for today’s modern women who seek low-dose, clinically validated support for hormonal resilience, reproductive support, and peri/menopause comfort.Two gold standard published studies, on reproductive-age women aged 20-35 and on perimenopausal women aged 40-50, show Xeya is a true hormonal adaptogen. Xeya:+ Supports healthy hormone balance to promote mood, energy, and menstrual comfort.+ Supports menstrual cycle regularity and consistent monthly cycles.+ Supports reproductive health, specifically healthy ovarian function and normal follicular development.+ Eases menopausal transition with fewer hot flashes and improved mental clarity.+ Supports metabolic resilience in women experiencing hormonal fluctuations.* DIGEXIN: The digestive solution built for the GLP-1 era, Digexin has been studied in actual GLP-1 users for digestive support—not just assumed to apply to them. GLP-1 users are actively looking for digestive support—and very few ingredients can say they were tested in that population. Benefits were confirmed and third-party validated starting in as little as 7 days.In only 7 days, Digexin delivers worry-free regularity in these 3 ways:+ Hydrates and lubricates the GI tract for ease in transit.+ Cuts cortisol and potentiates serotonin receptors for synergistic effects on mood.+ An optibiotic—it activates the microbiome you already have, instead of adding unwieldy fiber or fickle probiotics.* TAMAFLEX: Our flagship ingredient provides joint comfort starting in only 5 days. TamaFlex’s low-dose, fast-acting, clinically validated tamarind seed + turmeric solution delivers rapid, measurable improvements in comfort, function, and cartilage biomarkers. This is simply the best joint-health ingredient on the market today.* BluNAD BOOSTER: Healthy aging today is led by NAD+ precursors like NR and NMN that reinvigorate declining NAD+ levels, help power mitochondria, and repair DNA.BluNAD Booster boasts a published 2025 human study showing superior efficacy compared to NR. That’s because the natural, plant-based BluNAD Booster not only increases levels of NAD+ but also—uniquely—acts on CD38 enzymatic pathways to actually preserve NAD+ levels. Natural activation, smarter preservation. It’s a whole new game in differentiated longevity and healthy aging products.A hallmark of NXT USA’s ingredients is our comprehensive science that delivers strong claims that sell supplements. We call it The Four Pillars of Validation:1. Patient Responses: Validated questionnaires measure consumer confidence. “I feel the difference.”2. Physician Assessments. Expert eyes confirm visible health improvements. “I see it working.”3. Biomarker Analysis. Objective measurements of the ingredient’s effectiveness. “Here is the data.”4. Physical Measurements. Physical, measurable results that show it’s working. “This changes lives.”

name: Nyle Dehydrators
description: Nyle Dehydrators provides advanced, energy-efficient heat pump drying solutions for commercial and industrial applications. Our systems maximize yield, preserve quality, and reduce energy costs while supporting a greener future. Proudly made in the USA, we help businesses “Out Dry the Competition."

name: O Positiv Health
description: Brianna Bitton was dealing with monthly brutal PMS symptoms with no relief in sight–surely in the thousands of years that women had existed, someone could have come up with an answer?It took far more work than it should have: reading through decades of clinical research on botanicals and vitamins, conferencing with her entrepreneur brother Bobby, and flying around the world to formulate the world's first-ever PMS vitamin: FLO. And from there, O Positiv Health was built to address the overlooked health issues that affect countless women, like menopause (MENO) and vaginal health (URO).  Our portfolio of science-backed supplements now includes over 24 products, we have over 1.3 MILLION  customers, and O Positiv Health is now available at Target nationwide!

name: O'blossom
description: O'Blossom was created with a clear purpose: to transform the wellness space by combining clinical science with natural supplementation. The brand was born out of a frustration with ineffective products and unclear labeling in the supplement industry. Our founders believed that people deserve to feel real, visible results from what they put into their bodies. From day one, we have committed to using only clinically studied ingredients and triple-testing every batch to ensure purity, potency, and clarity.By owning the entire manufacturing process and focusing on innovation, we have developed a premium line of products that address real needs such as skin health, stress relief, digestion, metabolism, and cellular wellness. Since launching in the United States, our brand has grown steadily by staying true to our core values: quality, integrity, and results you can feel. O'Blossom continues to lead the way in next-generation supplements that support people in becoming their best selves, every day.

name: O’Doughs Gluten Free
description: O'Doughs is a gluten-free bakery founded in North York, Toronto, ON in 2006. O'Doughs makes a variety of baked goods, including breads, buns, bagels, and muffins in our dedicated GF and Allergen Friendly facility. O'Doughs prides itself in providing GF and Vegan consumers with unique, high-quality, great tasting products!

name: Oakridge Dairy
description: Moozy is a brand born from a simple question on our fifth-generation dairy farm: why does one of the most delicious, indulgent, and naturally nutritious drinks on earth look so outdated on the shelf? For over 100 years, our family has produced incredible milk — rich, clean, and packed with nutrients — but as the beverage world evolved, we watched milk fall behind.Drinks got cooler. Packaging got bolder. Consumers shifted to products that felt modern, convenient, and exciting. Meanwhile, milk stayed the same, even though it delivers more natural benefits than almost anything else in the cooler. We knew there was a gap. And we knew we could fill it.So in 2025, we decided to launch something completely new.We took our farm's best milk and built a brand designed for today's world. Bold. Modern. Premium. We chose gold as our signature color because it reflects what's inside — real value, real quality, and real nutrition. Then we put that milk into a sleek aluminum can that immediately stops people and makes them say, "Wait… that's milk?"This is where Moozy begins.We're launching with a mission: to revolutionize milk and make it cool. Moozy delivers indulgent flavor with clean ingredients and the natural power of milk's nutrients — all in a format that fits the way people live now. No clutter. No gimmicks. Just incredibly good milk presented in a completely new way.We're here to disrupt the category from day one.This is Moozy.A new way to drink milk.A new story for the dairy aisle.And we're just getting started.

name: Oars + Alps
description: We support guys who want more from life and less in their products. We put a "+" in everything we do, asking more from our skincare so you don’t have to.Our innovative, travel-friendly formulas pack multiple benefits in one so an investment in yourself doesn’t have to take away from everything else that matters. The 2 men who inspired our company were an avid rower and a keen skier. Every product we make celebrates their adventure, ambition, and grit (have you tried our award-winning Superfoliant Bar Soap?). Whether your next peak starts in the boardroom or base camp, we're glad you're here.

name: OASIS Family Co., Ltd
description: Our brand was founded in 2021 with a simple belief: great food should be good for people, farmers, and the planet. We started by working closely with small-scale farming communities in Thailand, supporting them in transitioning to organic practices and building sustainable livelihoods.From the beginning, our journey has been rooted in trust, long-term relationships, and respect for nature. What started as a small initiative to produce organic rice has grown into a mission-driven brand that connects farming communities to global markets—while staying true to our core values of sustainability, transparency, and care for the people behind the product.Today, we continue to work side by side with farmers to cultivate high-quality organic rice and share the story of responsible farming with the world.

name: Oats Overnight
description: Since 2016, Oats Overnight has been making breakfast better. Known for their high-protein oatmeal shakes, which blend convenience, nutrition, and great taste. Each recipe is made with real food ingredients - no artificial flavors, sweeteners, or preservatives and Oats Overnight customers are involved in every step of the flavor development process.

name: Ocean Root
description: Ocean Roots is a Texas-grown company rooted in the age-old wisdom of grandmothers and the healing power of nature. Our journey started back in 2021 with many ideas and have come down to what we currently offer. Passionate about quality and tradition, we handcraft culinary blends and body care products using real herbs, natural salts, and nourishing botanicals. Our Inspiration Inspired by the age-old adages and remedies passed down through generations, we believe in the power of nature and simplicity. We believe that what we put on and, in our bodies, matters-that flavor, wellness, and self-care should come from the earth, not a laboratory. Our products honor culture, community, and craftsmanship, blending sustainability with soul.

name: Ocean's Balance
description: Ocean’s Balance is a leading producer of premium organic sea vegetables, offering a cohesive, retail-ready collection designed to elevate any shelf. Our lineup includes Organic Dulse seaweed, Kombu, Wakame, Sea Lettuce, Asco, Kelp, and Irish Moss — sustainably harvested and carefully processed for exceptional quality, flavor, and performance.We are also one of the largest suppliers of tropical varieties of seaweed including Organic Sea Moss powder and wildcrafted Caribbean Sea Moss, serving both branded retail and bulk ingredient customers nationwide.At Ocean’s Balance, we provide solutions.Solutions for clean labeling.Solutions for innovative formulations.Solutions featuring carbon-negative, ocean-grown ingredients that support both people and planet.With advanced processing capabilities, we can mill sea vegetables into customized particle sizes tailored for food & beverage, pet food, dietary supplements, nutraceuticals, and cosmetic applications.Interested in Furikake, we have several delicious house blends available! Whether you're seeking retail placement, private label partnerships, or bulk seaweed ingredients supply, visit us to explore show specials and collaboration opportunities.

name: OceanBlue Omega
description: Good Things Come In Omega-3s: The wellness landscape is changing. No longer an industry fixated on the elite and upwardly mobile, pursuing ‘wellness’ in 2026 is now everyone’s business. But you don’t need ‘biohacking’ or a sprawling collection of tech gadgets to be involved.OceanBlue wants you to master the basics. The fact is, upwards of 50,000 studies show the benefits of Omega-3s; whether on your heart, brain, joints, mood, pregnancy health, or otherwise. And yet—90% of American adults aren’t hitting the daily recommendation of 500mg. All of OceanBlue’s formulas exceed this benchmark—with potencies as high as 2100mg—to deliver results our customers will actually feel.OceanBlue promises you purity, potency, and palatable prices. Catchy alliteration aside, our parent company, KD Pharma Group, has been manufacturing Omega-3s since 1981—so you know we transcend wellness trends.Elite Omega-3s and Ocean Conservation:It’s our view that you can’t have one without the other. While our mission is to provide potent, pure and palatably priced Omega-3s to anyone with a body, this lofty pursuit is impossible if our oceans aren’t protected.As our name suggests, we’re indebted to our oceans—a sentiment shared by two of our partners, 4Ocean and Friend of the Sea. 4Ocean has removed millions of pounds of plastic from the ocean, making real, measurable progress in the fight against marine pollution. Working with them means we’re giving back to the very resource that provides us with life-sustaining nutrition. On the wildlife side, OceanBlue is proud to be a certified Friend of the Sea company, the ultimate standard for products and services that respect and protect the marine environment.Protecting marine ecosystems isn’t just a cause for us—it’s a responsibility that allows us to keep delivering elite omega-3 nutrition to Americans. To us? Wellness is as easy as 1, 2, Omega-3.

name: OCM Globe, Inc.
description: We were established in 2015 with the company headquartered in City of Industry, CA.

name: Octonuts
description: It seems nutty, but the octopus is actually the perfect mascot for our mission because we are constantly learning, curious, and hungry for more. Octonuts launched in 2021 to offer the tastiest nut products on the market. Founded by third generation nut processors behind Pearl Crop, a multi-capacity nut processor with four state of the art facilities located in California's central valley.

name: Ode Health (by Empirical Health)
description: Ode Health creates functional mushroom supplements in a distinctive Honey Pearl format - a compelling alternative to powders, capsules, and tinctures.Our Honey Pearls combine whole certified organic fruiting body mushrooms with raw organic honey, forming small, palatable pearls that are easy to take, shelf-stable, and designed for strong consumer compliance. The format offers a clear point of difference for wholesale and retail partners in an increasingly crowded mushroom category.Ode is founded by Dr Simon Feeney (TCM), a lifelong herbal medicine practitioner whose work bridges traditional knowledge and modern wellness. Over the past two decades, Simon has studied under a Buddhist monk from Myanmar and travelled extensively throughout Southeast Asia, helping to preserve ancient herbal manuscripts and traditional medicinal knowledge that is rapidly disappearing.This deep respect for traditional practice underpins everything we do - from formulation philosophy to format choice.At Expo West, we invite distributors and wholesale partners to experience the Honey Pearls firsthand, sample the range, and speak directly with Dr Simon Feeney about the thinking, tradition, and innovation behind the product.Visit our stand to taste the difference and explore a truly differentiated mushroom offering.

name: ODW Logistics
description: ODW Logistics is a national 3PL, integrated logistics provider with over 50 years of experience scaling supply chains through a holistic strategy, solution design and cutting-edge technology. With over 28 facilities spanning 9 million square-feet, ODW operate as an extension of your business to control cost, create efficiencies and pursue continuous improvement. Our Managed Transportation and Retail Consolidation programs work tirelessly to drive retailer compliance reduce charge backs by 90% while at the same time reducing freight costs by 30%.

name: Odyssey Wellness
description: Our Founder Scott Frohman started adding mushroom powders to his Coffee in 2020. He loved the functionality it provided but it tasted like dirt. This is when he set out to create a sparkling beverage with functional mushrooms Lions Mane & Cordyceps (without the taste). Odyssey was founded in 2021. The first energy drink infused with mushroom extracts, our mission has always been to create functional beverages that are potent, organic, sustainable, fun, loved by the whole planet, and most importantly — delicious.

name: Oegg Inc.
description: **The Story of Oegg: A Journey of Flavor, Nutrition, and Convenience**In a world where busy schedules often leave little room for healthy eating, Oegg was born out of a simple yet powerful idea: to make nutritious, delicious food accessible to everyone, anytime, anywhere. Our story begins with a passion for quality, a commitment to health, and a vision to redefine the way people enjoy quail eggs.

name: Off the Shelf Reps, Ltd.
description: Over thirty years ago, I wanted to create a new paradigm for what it meant to be a working mother. I refused to accept the compromise of work versus family. My office was in the basement, where I could be close to my kids and they could experience what we did. My husband Saxton and I put in long hours, and along with the help of friends and family, we grew our business while raising our children. Parenting in the same realm as a home-based business clarified our values. As we were encouraging creative thinking, open-ended play, and meaningful communication in our young children, we were also infusing them into the products we developed.

name: OGGI Foods
description: OGGI Foods is the only gluten-free pizza that delivers the authentic Italian pizza experience. With rising air pockets and the taste and chew of traditional pizza, you would never guess it's gluten-free. OGGI's award winning gluten-free, frozen pizzas, pizza crusts and pinsas are made with clean ingredients and the same quality you would expect from a family with roots in Naples, Italy.! - Our Secret is in the Crust!

name: Ohana Organics
description: ʻOhana Organics is a woman-owned, family skincare line rooted in Aloha and the healing power of plants. Our founder Tara was born and raised in Hawaiʻi, and that island way of life, deep respect for nature, community, and intentional living, continues to shape everything we do. Founded over 25 years ago in Humboldt County, California, our story began with a small garden, traditional herbal wisdom, and not being able to find any quality products for her daughters, she went to the kitchen and started to formulate.  Believing that what we put on our skin should be as thoughtful and nourishing as what we put in our bodies.What started as herbal creations made for family and community has grown into a small-batch skincare company committed to quality, sustainability, and integrity. Today, we craft organic skin, body, and tattoo care using botanicals grown in our own certified organic garden, blended with thoughtfully selected ingredients to support healthy, radiant skin for the whole 'Ohana (family)From garden to skin—real ingredients for real people, handcrafted with Aloha.

name: OHO GROUP UAB
description: The first idea of producing breakfast cereals had been taken from Kellogg's factory, one of the owners came to US, visited Kellogg's factory and brought same idea of production to Lithuania market.

name: oHy
description: We are beverage entrepreneurs who saw an opportunity to create the next generation of sparkling water. It starts the moment the hydrogen-infused smoothness hits your mouth. Oh... Hi. That's different. That's hydrogen, baby—nature's best antioxidant. High drinkability with low acidity. All the bubbles with none of the bloat. Plus, magnesium to keep you feeling calm and confident. The next generation of sparkling water has arrived. Say hi to a better bubble!

name: Oishii Farm Corp
description: Revolutionizing the agriculture industry:We are the world's largest indoor vertical strawberry farm, striving to change the produce industry and raise the standard of fresh fruit in America.Oishii was started with the goal of introducing Japanese fruit culture to the US. Traditionally in Japan, fresh, clean, delicious fruit means there is a special occasion to celebrate. The Omakase Berry, Koyo Berry and the Nikko Berry have made this goal come to life. Through visionary innovation and new-wave techniques, we've reinvented the capabilities of traditional agriculture.

name: OKO FOOD INC
description: I've been a chef for more than twenty years, cooking all over the world, from private yachts to professional kitchens. Through all those experiences, my goal has always been the same: to bring people joy through food that also makes them feel good. Over time, I started creating vegetable blends for my own use in the kitchen because they helped me make meals that were full of flavor and nutrition, but also simple and quick to prepare. They became something I relied on every day, a quiet staple that made it easy to serve soups, sauces, dips, and spreads that were both healthy and comforting.In 2019, my longtime boss, Diane von Fürstenberg, had health challenges, and I used these same blends to support her recovery. They helped her eat more vegetables in a way that was easy and enjoyable. She was the one who encouraged me to share them more widely. Together we decided to bring them to market, but we wanted to do it without compromise. We wanted the exact blends we used in our kitchens, not a diluted store version filled with stabilizers or additives.What followed was a long period of development and refinement. Many food scientists told us we would need to change the formula or add ingredients that would make the process easier. I didn't want to do that. I wanted OKO to stay true to its purpose: real food, made simply and cleanly, that actually helps people eat better and enjoy it.After years of work and persistence, we finally achieved what we set out to do. In May 2024, OKO was officially launched. Our products are fresh, organic vegetable blends designed to make everyday cooking easier, healthier, and more joyful. They come from the same place I started as a chef: a love of real food and a belief that good health and good taste should always go hand in hand.

name: Olam Food Ingredients (ofi)
description: ofi is a global leader in naturally good food and beverage ingredients, partnering with brands to create products that are delicious, nutritious, and responsibly sourced. With deep expertise across cocoa, coffee, dairy, nuts, and spices, we bring together the best of nature with advanced formulation and application capabilities to help customers meet the evolving expectations of today’s health-conscious consumers.At Natural Products Expo West, ofi showcases the full strength of our Food & Beverage Solutions business. We go beyond supplying ingredients — we help customers solve formulation challenges, elevate sensory experiences, and accelerate innovation from concept to commercialization. Our teams work side‑by‑side with customers to deliver clean‑label functionality, improved nutrition, and breakthrough taste and texture across a wide range of applications.ofi serves a broad spectrum of categories across the natural products landscape, including snacking, bakery, confectionery, beverages, dairy and dairy alternatives, savory, and nutrition & wellness. Our global sourcing networks and farmer partnerships ensure consistent, traceable, high‑quality ingredients, while our application experts help translate those ingredients into products consumers love. From indulgent cocoa creations to protein‑rich nut solutions, from aromatic spices to functional dairy ingredients, our portfolio is built to support the next generation of natural, better‑for‑you foods.This year at Expo West, we’re highlighting new cross‑category concepts that demonstrate the power of our integrated portfolio. These prototypes combine multiple ofi ingredients — cocoa with nuts, spices with dairy, coffee with plant‑based formats — to show how our solutions can elevate taste, nutrition, and sustainability all at once. Each concept is designed to inspire customers with what’s possible when nature’s best ingredients meet thoughtful formulation and consumer‑led insight.Our global network of Customer Solutions Centers plays a central role in this co‑creation approach. These centers allow customers to collaborate directly with our chefs, food scientists, and category experts to rapidly prototype, test, and refine new ideas. By combining deep ingredient knowledge with real‑time application development, we help brands move faster, reduce risk, and bring differentiated products to market with confidence.ofi is proud to be part of the Natural Products Expo West community, where innovation, sustainability, and trend-forward ideas come together. We’re here to partner with brands of all sizes — from emerging startups to global leaders — to build the future of natural food and beverage with ingredients and solutions that are good for people, good for the planet, and great for business.

name: Olbas Herbal Remedies
description: Expertly formulated in Switzerland over a century ago, Olbas Herbal Remedies are designed to comfort and soothe in many ways. Some of the Olbas Remedies are OTC remedies recognized to provide fast, effective relief from cold symptoms, as well as minor aches and pains. Other Olbas Remedies support your body nutritionally, helping to enhance the immune system. The essential oils in Olbas have a rich history of aromatherapy usage dating back to the ancient Egyptians and Chinese. That's why they provide the POWER to Breathe!

name: Ole
description: In late Spring 2020, we were thirsty.Our local quest for a refreshing ready-to-drink margarita and paloma was inspired by the desire for a tropical escape in the midst of a challenging season staying home. At the time, we struggled to find local options that tasted like the real deal without being full of sugar and artificial flavours. We knew then that the only way to satisfy our craving for a crisp and refreshing tequila cocktail was to craft one ourselves using premium ingredients! Our journey to create something totally unique was also driven by other margarita and paloma lovers who were feeling the same way. By combining the vision of a premium cocktail brand with a year-long adventure of perfecting recipes, Olé Cocktails Co. was born!Perfectly balanced and crafted with care, our cocktails are made with premium quality blue weber agave tequila from Jalisco, México, real fruit juices, organic agave nectar, and a delectable pinch of sea salt. Irresistible taste with no artificial colours, flavours, or sweeteners. Just one sip will leave you with a crisp, clean finish and a light sparkle.

name: Oleo-Fats, Incorporated
description: The Cocopure Story: From Simple Purity to Kitchen EssentialThe journey of Cocopure began not in a boardroom, but with a simple, profound appreciation for a single, powerful ingredient: the coconut. We saw beyond the popular trends and recognized its essential nature—a source of incredible purity, natural goodness, and unmatched versatility.Our story officially took root in 2019 with a clear goal: to bring the highest quality, most honest coconut products to every kitchen. We started by perfecting the basics, focusing on our range of refined coconut oils—products that had to be sustainably sourced and prepared with complete transparency. We believe the foundation of healthy eating should be pure, simple, and trustworthy.But we also knew the coconut could offer so much more. Since our beginning in 2019, we have been dedicated to innovation, expanding our line to show the true flexibility of this remarkable fruit. This led us to develop our groundbreaking vegan butter and other specialty foods, all anchored by the rich, wholesome power of the coconut.Today, Cocopure stands for more than just a product line; it's a commitment. It's our promise to you that every jar, bottle, and package is a blend of sustainable practices, pure ingredients, and conscious preparation. We make healthy, conscious eating simple, delicious, and accessible, ensuring that whether you're using our essential organic oil or our innovative vegan butter, you're enriching your life and your kitchen with the very best of nature.

name: Olio Roi di Boeri Franco
description: The history of the Roi family begins in 1887 when Giuseppe, the great-grandfather "Pepin u Roi", built the first oil mill using the wood and stones of our valley. It is the beginning of a long journey that reaches today, up to Paolo, who with his father spends all his time and passion in the family oil mill.More than 100 years have passed since Giuseppe, in which we have changed, we have grown, always maintaining a close link with our past. This way of being has led us today to work with 42 countries around the world.We strive every day to highlight the high quality Italian and Taggiasca with our products, from oils to sauces, through olives and the most special creations.

name: Olivarez Chico Honey
description: Our grandfather began tending bees in 1965, learning from the pioneers of the trade in Northern California. He passed his knowledge down to his son Ray Jr., who built a thriving business raising queens and package bees for beekeepers and honey producers across the country.We grew up in the family business, building bee boxes, maintaining hives and driving bee trucks in the almond orchards as soon as we could see over the dashboard and reach the pedals. We followed our dad out to the yards as he cared for the bees, and we learned firsthand how important it is to keep them happy and healthy.Though our parents' business was all about the bees, when you raise honeybees, honey comes with the territory. One of our jobs as kids was to fill jars, and year after year, we saw that well-cared-for bees made not only more honey but better honey.Chico Honey Company grew out of that experience. We care for our own bees, and we still fill every jar ourselves, so we know that the honey we produce is the best it can possibly be. Our father taught us that, just as his father taught him. We can't imagine doing things any other way.

name: Olivea
description: Olivea crafts high phenolic olive oils and supplements for health & longevity.The brand was built with a mission to change the way we approach heart health after our founder lost her father to a sudden heart attack at just 56 years old. The experience led to a deep dive into supporting vascular health by natural means.That journey uncovered the powerful science behind hydroxytyrosol, the key antioxidant polyphenol in olive oil, backed by EFSA-authorized health claims for protecting LDL cholesterol from oxidative damage. Despite its benefits, hydroxytyrosol was virtually unknown in the U.S. market.Founded in 2023, Olivea became the first olive oil brand built entirely around this science—offering clinically aligned, polyphenol-rich products designed to support heart, brain, and vascular health through simple, daily rituals.Our line includes:Ultra High-Phenolic EVOO (1000+ mg/kg): Bold and peppery, ideal as a wellness shot or finishing oil.High Phenolic EVOO (500+ mg/kg): Smooth, versatile, and crafted for cooking and daily use.Daily Polyphenol Supplement: A cap-in-cap formula delivering 20mg of hydroxytyrosol per capsule—4x EFSA's recommended minimum—for targeted cardiovascular support.At Olivea, we're redefining what olive oil can do—merging the timeless tradition of the Mediterranean diet with modern clinical research. Our products are crafted in small batches using early-harvest Greek olives, and we're proud to be a Miami-based, female-founded brand committed to purity, transparency, and health.We believe longevity doesn't come from hacks—it comes from habits. And Olivea is here to make the world's most powerful habit taste good, feel easy, and deliver real results.

name: Oliver Inc.
