description: High-end printing and packaging;folding cartons; graphic and structural design, prepress, full-color printing plus windowing/diecutting/foil stamping capabilities; soy inks, recyclable stocks, flexible manufacturing.  Mock-up abilities.

name: Olivia's Crouton Co., Inc.
description: Olivia's Croutons was created in April of 1991. Our son David was almost two and daughter Olivia was three. We started in our own kitchen with the Butter & Garlic flavor, sold in brown bags, hand stamped with rubber stamps. So much has changed…From our home kitchen, to our 2000 square feet in Hinesburg, to our 5000 square feet on the farm, to our new 36,000 square foot facility in Brandon Vermont.  We have positioned ourselves to be able to make lots and lots of croutons. With a dedicated Gluten Free kitchen, high volume bread line, and new product development options. We are excited for what our future holds.I still love what I do, making a product that people love to eat and one that is unique to the market place. I pride myself on being an honest, hard- working, uncomplicated person. It is only logical that we would produce a wholesome, all natural, uncomplicated product. As a family, we enjoy these tasty treats and we hope you and your customers will like them too. Enjoy! Francie

name: Olizzi Olive Oils
description: Olizzi was founded in 2020 with a clear but ambitious goal: to introduce the world to high-quality Turkish extra virgin olive oil and redefine how it is experienced in modern life.The brand was born from a deep personal connection to food and olive oil. Growing up in a Mediterranean household, olive oil was never just an ingredient—it was part of daily life. The founder's mother, a food engineer, emphasized natural, high-quality fats in cooking, while the founder's father, a surgeon, often spoke about olive oil as part of a balanced and healthy diet. Despite this cultural proximity, it became clear over time that Turkish olive oil—despite Türkiye being one of the world's top producers—was largely absent from premium global markets.This gap became impossible to ignore while living and working internationally, particularly in the United States. After extensive research, sensory training, and close collaboration with producers, Olizzi was created to represent Turkish olive oil with the quality, transparency, and confidence it deserves.From the beginning, quality was non-negotiable. Olizzi oils are 100% Turkish origin, cold pressed, and approved through professional sensory analysis to ensure superior standards. The brand launched simultaneously in Türkiye and the USA and quickly gained traction, including placement at Erewhon in Los Angeles—an important milestone that validated Olizzi's positioning in the premium segment.Today, Olizzi operates across the USA, UAE, Türkiye, Japan, and South Korea. Olizzi Premium Organic remains the brand's flagship and best-performing product, while Olizzi Baby Organic has become a trusted choice among Mediterranean families for its smooth, gentle profile.Olizzi continues to grow with a simple belief: great olive oil should be honest, expertly evaluated, and thoughtfully designed for how people actually live and eat today.

name: Olyra
description: Olyra was born from a simple but powerful idea: what if the wisdom of the ancient Greeks could fuel your modern morning? The name itself says it all - Olyra is the Ancient Greek word for spelt, one of the four grains that formed the cornerstone of a balanced Greek diet over 2,600 years ago.Founder and CEO Yannis Varellas is the fifth generation of a flour mill family business in Thrace, Greece - a legacy of over a century of farming, harvesting grains naturally, and grinding them in a traditional stone mill. When Yannis attended Expo West in 2014 and witnessed the growing movement toward ancient grains and healthy snacking, something clicked. He saw an opportunity to take his family's century-old craft and channel it into something the modern world was hungry for.Working alongside the University of Thessaloniki and a community of local small farmers, Yannis set out to create a breakfast snack rooted in Ancient Greek wisdom. The result was Olyra: organic, Non-GMO breakfast biscuits made from simple ingredients, with no artificial flavors and no shortcuts.Since launching our first Crunchy Breakfast Biscuits in 2018, we've never stopped innovating - introducing Crème Breakfast Biscuits, Fruit & Grain Bars, and most recently, Fig Bars. We saw a gap in the market: consumers wanted energy-packed, on-the-go breakfast bars with fewer, natural ingredients and less sugar - and we built exactly that.Because at Olyra, we believe Aristotle had it right: the key to a good life is balance. And for us, it starts with what's in your breakfast.

name: Olyxir LLC
description: Frustrated with the tea bag, I set out on a mission to create a healthful, more sustainable, convenient, easy to use alternative.

name: OMG Bubble Tea
description: Our RTD Bubble Tea is more than just a beverage—it's a story of innovation and perseverance. The idea began with Jonas, who envisioned creating a ready-to-drink bubble tea, and Ieva, a talented beverage developer, brought it to life in her home kitchen during the height of COVID. Balancing motherhood and product development during her baby's nap times, Ieva crafted OMG Bubble Tea, while she and Jonas collaborated remotely for a year before meeting in person post-launch. Despite a slow start, we pioneered this unique product and packaging type globally, overcoming countless challenges with unwavering belief in its potential to grow.

name: Once Again Nut Butter
description: Once Again Nut Butter, 100% employee-owned and made wildly good since 1976, produces organic and natural spreads and snacks for retail, industrial, and foodservice customers. Headquartered in rural upstate New York, the company manufactures its products in state-of-the-art, SQF certified facilities, with its peanut butters made in a dedicated facility separate from its tree nut and seed butters. Recent innovations include organic and gluten-free graham sandwiches and crackers for the snack aisle, new high-protein squeeze packs and peanut protein powders to support active lifestyles, and a new chocolate cashew butter to satisfy sweet tooth cravings. Recognized as a leader in responsible business practices, all of its products are verified through partnerships with SedEx and How Good, and part of the brand’s Honest in Trade sustainability program. Visit OnceAgain.com and follow @OnceAgainNutButter on social media.

name: Once Upon A Coconut
description: Once Upon A Coconut is a premium coconut water brand redefining modern hydration. Sourced from young green coconuts in Vietnam, our beverages deliver naturally refreshing hydration with no added sugars or artificial ingredients. Available in bold flavors like Pure, Pineapple, Watermelon, Blueberry, and Chocolate, our lineup spans single-serve and multi-pack formats for retail, convenience, and foodservice. With nationwide distribution, a fast-growing fan base, and a purpose-driven mission that gives back, Once Upon A Coconut brings flavor, function, and impact to every shelf.

name: One Degree Organic Foods
description: One Degree Organic Foods was founded by one small family with one big idea. Our name echoes our commitment to total food transparency. Our source code technology traces every ingredient so you can meet all the farmers that grew the ingredients. We travel to farms, co-ops and processing operations around the world to ensure every ingredient we source for our family-friendly foods meet the highest standards of organic, plant-based, and sustainable farming practices. We work with small farmers and producers who use sustainable plant-based methods passed down over generations.

name: One World Foods
description: Our Brands: Brandt Beef Tallow and Value Added, Baja Vida Snacks, and our newest addition, American Jerky Company.Brandt Beef is a multi-generational family ranch started in 1945 in Southern California, three generations of the Brandt Family have proudly raised Holstein cattle with care, consistency, and integrity. From day one, we've done things differently—never outsourcing, always prioritizing animal welfare above all, sustainability, and transparency. By growing our own feed and committing to a 100% vegetarian diet without hormones or antibiotics, we produce beef that's truly natural. Our hands-on approach and single-breed focus ensure unmatched quality in every cut.What sets us apart? A relentless commitment to doing what's right—for our animals, our land, our people, and the families we feed.Brandt Beef is a multi-generational family ranch started in 1945 in Southern California, three generations of the Brandt Family have proudly raised Holstein cattle with care, consistency, and integrity. From day one, we've done things differently—never outsourcing, always prioritizing animal welfare above all, sustainability, and transparency. By growing our own feed and committing to a 100% vegetarian diet without hormones or antibiotics, we produce beef that's truly natural. Our hands-on approach and single-breed focus ensure unmatched quality in every cut.What sets us apart? A relentless commitment to doing what's right—for our animals, our land, our people, and the families we feed.Brandt Beef is a multi-generational family ranch started in 1945 in Southern California, three generations of the Brandt Family have proudly raised Holstein cattle with care, consistency, and integrity. From day one, we've done things differently—never outsourcing, always prioritizing animal welfare above all, sustainability, and transparency. By growing our own feed and committing to a 100% vegetarian diet without hormones or antibiotics, we produce beef that's truly natural. Our hands-on approach and single-breed focus ensure unmatched quality in every cut.What sets us apart? A relentless commitment to doing what's right—for our animals, our land, our people, and the families we feed.

name: Onego Bio
description: Onego Bio is a Finnish-U.S. food ingredient company on a mission to create a more resilient food system through its product Bioalbumen®—the first non-animal egg protein with an amino acid sequence identical to the natural protein. Made through precision fermentation, Bioalbumen® matches the taste, nutrition, and functionality of the main protein from traditional eggs with an environmental impact around 90% smaller. Its unmatched versatility makes it ideal across a wide range of applications, while providing greater cost and supply stability for food manufacturers. Onego Bio was selected the Winner of Fast Company’s 2023 World Changing Ideas awards and is a co-founder of two industry associations: Precision Fermentation Alliance and Food Fermentation Europe. Learn more at www.onego.bio.

name: Oolie
description: As the largest pasture raised organic egg provider in the US, our farms produce eggs that are smaller than the USDA size standards.  To create a fully-circular use for all size eggs, HBF Foods was created.  We built a state-of-the-art facility to produce naturally-delicious, high-protein, ready-to-eat egg products.  The deliciously nutritious products include hard-boiled eggs, deviled eggs and a revolutionary line of smooth, creamy, sweet and savory, upcycled egg-based dips, yogurts, smoothies, and dressings.  To complete the loop, we have partnered with experts who take our eggshell 'waste' and separate the collagen from the shell to be further used in health & beauty aid products and other products, such as soil ammendments.  In this manner, we strive to be the most intentional stewards of our natural resources and the most trusted partner to our customers.  We are proud to also be a Certified B Corporation.

name: OoMee (Aqua Theon)
description: Our company was founded by Alissa Miky in 2019. She is a Japanese social entrepreneur, the youngest awardee of Forbes Japan's 2019 List of 100 Women, and an award-winning news commentator.  Her most recent venture, Misaky.Tokyo, was featured in Forbes, the Today Show, Martha Stewart and has 1.4 million TikTok followers. After moving to the U.S. and finding success with Misaky.Tokyo, a luxury seaweed candy company, Alissa felt that American diet had taken its toll on her body and mind. She gained 40 pounds, faced some difficult health diagnoses, and was constantly tired.In search of a solution, she looked back to Japan, where food is seen as medicine and seaweed has been promoting good health for millennia. She identified a range of marine plants that promote physical and mental health and formulated OoMee. She is thrilled to share these treasures of the sea with you, and hope they make you say, "Ooo mee! I feel good!"

name: Open Water
description: During their childhood, Nicole and Jess spent their summers body surfing in the ocean and enjoying watersports at the lake, taking the pristine waters and plastic-free beaches for granted. However, as humans, we now face a future where our seas are overrun with plastic. Nicole & Jess identified a  significant contributor to this issue is plastic bottled water, which remains incredibly popular despite the availability of reusable bottles and refill stations.To address this problem, Nicole and Jess devised a practical solution. In 2014, they founded Open Water, a bottled water company with a difference. Their mission is to eliminate 1 billion plastic bottles within the next 5 years. Open Water stands as a testament to their determination to make a positive impact on our environment and change the way we think about our plastic consumption.

name: OPPULAND CORPORATION
description: Oppuland Nutrition is a leading vitamin and supplement company headquartered in Bayside, New York. Committed to enhancing health and wellness, we specialize in providing products and services rooted in foundational medical therapy. Our mission is to harness the power of natural resources of exceptional quality to create supplements that are easily absorbed by the body, promoting optimal health and vitality.

name: Orange House
description: Orange House was started by Dr. Lin, a PhD horticulturist with over 40 years of experience educating others on the dangers of environmental toxins. As a mom and a scientist, she was concerned about the harsh chemicals that were often used in the homes of friends and family. Assembling a team of top scientists, she got to work creating a plant-derived formula that could clean both naturally and effectively. And most importantly, it had to clean safely. So, this mother found Mother Nature's secret weapon: orange oil, which is a natural degreaser. She then combined orange oil with a molecular structure perfectly designed for fighting dirt and stains, leaving nothing but a clean, fresh scent. Orange House shows that wonderful things can happen when science and nature work together.

name: Orbitel International Corp.
description: O's Bubble aim to redefine the experience of enjoying bubble tea, emphasizing convenience and creativity. We are dedicated to spreading the joy of boba globally, sharing the irresistible essence of this Taiwanese delight. Equipped with state-of-the-art technology, O's Bubble holds a prominent position as an innovative leader in the industry. Our unwavering commitment to diversity shines through our expansive product range, including frozen instant boba, ambient instant boba, canned boba beverages, boba ice cream, and more. We take great pride in leading the way in innovation and providing unmatched variety. The skilled team at O's Bubble leverages cutting-edge food technology to create an array of distinctive and diverse products. Our offerings serve as your portable boba shop, ensuring instant boba enjoyment with utmost ease.

name: Orgain
description: Our founder Andrew Abraham, M.D. created Orgain with one simple goal in mind -- to put the power of good, clean nutrition in the hands of people everywhere.After beating cancer at an early age, Andrew devoted himself to medicine. But his passion to find better nutrition inspired him to leave his practice to create foods and beverages based on the belief that real nutrition has the power to make a real difference in people's lives.Today, Andrew's relentlessly high standards for nutrition, quality, and taste go into everything we create at Orgain.That means we go the extra mile to hand-select Organic and high-quality ingredients to maximize nutrition whenever we can. Our group of culinary nutritionists make sure everything is as delicious as it is clean. And we continue to create more accessible and inclusive options for everyone, including products for adults and kids, that span dairy-based to plant-based, and more.

name: Organic by Nature, Inc.
description: We specialize in organic greens, organic vegan proteins, meal replacements, superfoods, and herbal and botanical nutraceuticals.From a single signature product to a complete supplement line, we support brands at every step to deliver consistently high-quality results. We work with everyone from family-owned businesses to large-scale corporations, offering the same personalized, hands-on approach to every client.

name: Organic Traditions
description: Empowering You to Live a Healthier Life Fueled by Superfoods Welcome to Organic Traditions. For over 25 years, we’ve been superfood pioneers. Today, we continue to grow while staying true to the same belief that started it all: real food can give you superpowers. Our mission is to make superfoods super simple, so you can live, feel, and be your best every day. Each ingredient we use is sustainably sourced from trusted global growers, third-party tested for purity, and obsessively quality-checked to meet the highest standards, because we know caring for our planet and supporting farmers is good for everyone. We have over 100 carefully curated Certified Organic products including functional blends, greens powders, adaptogenic herbs, and pantry staples, and we’re always developing more to help you reach your wellness goals. Whether you're crushing a morning workout, powering through deadlines, or just want to feel great in your own skin, we've got the goods to fuel your routine. Together, let's make superfoods a daily, doable and delicious part of feeling great.

name: Organic Yug
description: Bulk Exporter for Organic Spices and herbs

name: Organic-California LLC
description: Dubai chocolate with Manuka honey, kataifi pastry, and pistachios is an exquisite combination of smooth chocolate, crispy kataifi, and rich nutty flavor. Natural Manuka honey adds a gentle sweetness and depth, creating a perfectly balanced taste with unique texture and aroma.

name: Organoleaf
description: Organoleaf is an NSF-certified nutraceutical manufacturer based in Orlando, Florida, that was founded in 2020, we are dedicated to bringing professional-grade formulations into an enjoyable, convenient gummy format. With deep roots in the practitioner space, we're the trusted gummy partner for leading practitioner brands and platforms, specializing in sugar-free gummies made with clinically studied ingredients and Allulose, the most physician-approved sugar substitute. Through rigorous lot-by-lot testing and a proprietary stability database, we ensure transparency, ingredient integrity, and consistent label claims—delivering true nutraceutical quality, not "candy vitamins." This has been our passion and vision for over the years, and it continues to drive everything we do.

name: Organza, Inc.
description: Organza seeks to challenge everything we have been taught to think about our bodies. We see a world where information is not only accessible, but valuable. Your body should not be a mystery. Here we yell from our guts, no more whispering behind your hand.

name: Orgenetics, Inc.
description: For over 15 years, Orgenetics remains dedicated to being your innovation partner in clean label nutrition. We are proud to be a woman & family owned + run organization!Orgenetics is a pioneer in offering high quality and all-natural ingredients from vertically integrated and sustainable supply chains:• Orgen®/RGen™ Family | (Organic/Plant Based Vitamins & Minerals)• OrMiū™ Family | Organic Whole Mushroom Powders and Blends from California standardized for high levels of B-Glucans• A3™ Aronia Family | Organic Aronia Juice and Fruit powders from the US• Orai™ Family | Organic Blackcurrant and Kiwi Fruit extracts from New Zealand• Raiā™ Family | All Natural New Zealand Polyphenol Powders and Extracts• AimSlim™ | All-Natural Appetite Suppressant• Alanzeebium™ | For Female Libido & Hormone BalanceOur ingredients can be best used for: Supplements, Snacks, Food, Sports Nutrition, Beverages, and overall Healthy Living

name: Originates, Inc.
description: COLLAGEN | OMEGA 3 OILS | MUSHROOMS | GELATIN | MINERALSOriginates is a B2B ingredient supplier specializing in functional ingredients for food, supplements, pharma, pet nutrition, and personal care. Our U.S. based operation and distribution network ensures an efficient supply chain with fast ingredient delivery and local inventory availability. We are proud to present the following pillars of our business: COLLAGEN•	GelcoPep® - Bovine Collagen Peptides by Gelco •	GelcoPepBeauty® - Bovine Collagens Peptides by Gelco •	BDF Naturlagen® - WILD CAUGHT Marine Collagens Peptides by BDF Ingredients•	CollaGem® - Farm Rised Marine Collagen by MCB Biotechnology•	CollaGEM®V – Plant-based Biommimetic Collagen Peptides (Vegan Friendly)OMEGA 3 & FISH OILS•	EssentiOmega® - High-quality fish oil concentrates with 50–65% total EPA+DHA, by Naturmega, distributed by Originates. •	EssentiOmega® Nova - Ultra-refined omega-3 concentrates ranging from 65% to 75% total EPA+DHA, by Naturmega, distributed by Originates. •	Algalis® - Plant-based omega-3s delivering sustainable, fresh DHA for all life stages, by Naturmega, distributed by Originates. •	Ruby-O™ - Advanced Omega 3 Phospholipid Technology Platform. Where innovation meets excellenceMUSHROOMS•	Reishi bioactive powders - Immune-boosting supplement powder•	Lions Mane bioactive powders - Ready-to-mix nootropics supplements.MINERALSBisglycinatesMagnesiumZincIronChromiumGlycinatesMagnesiumZincSeleniumGELATIN•	Bovine, Porcine & Marine Gelatin - Excellent gelling, thickening, stabilizing, and binding properties

name: ORYZAE Inc.
description: ORYZAE was founded in 2018 in Japan with a vision to share the cultural and health benefits of fermentation with the global community. The journey began with a simple idea: to use rice koji, a traditional Japanese ingredient, to create better alternatives for modern food. From our early experiments in small kitchens, we grew into a food innovation company committed to sustainability and wellness.One of the turning points came when we introduced sugar-free granola and koji-based sweeteners, products that resonated strongly with health-conscious consumers, especially young families and women seeking natural, functional foods. What started as a local initiative has expanded globally, with growing traction in the U.S. market through collaborations with partners and retailers.Our story is about bridging tradition and innovation—honoring Japan's fermentation heritage while creating next-generation food solutions that meet modern health and sustainability needs.

name: Orzax
description: Since the beginning, a profound observation has underscored our mission: the prevalence of chronic diseases, fatigue, and cognitive impairment. Yet, amidst these challenges, there exists a cohort dedicated to nurturing their health and vitality. It sparked a realization: the pursuit of a healthy life is not merely about longevity but about cherishing moments with loved ones and optimizing personal well-being.Driven by this vision, we endeavored to harness the synergies of nature, science, and technology. Inspired by the inherent health properties of the natural world, we embarked on a journey to craft premium health solutions that embody excellence and efficacy.Collaboration of our founders, a doctor, a pharmacist and an engineer, led to the establishment of Orzax. Since those formative days, our brand has evolved into a beacon of innovation and integrity in the health and wellness sector. With a steadfast commitment to quality and a diverse portfolio of products, we continue to empower individuals to embrace vitality and thrive in every aspect of life.

name: Oshi
description: Oshi was founded with a simple but ambitious idea: if plants can be transformed into meat that looks and tastes real, why shouldn't seafood be next?Our founders, longtime entrepreneurs in food innovation, saw a growing gap in the market. Seafood is one of the most beloved and nutritionally valued proteins in the world—yet it's also one of the most problematic. Overfishing, mercury contamination, antibiotics, and microplastics are pushing consumers to question what they're really eating. At the same time, plant-based alternatives lacked the texture, flakiness, and culinary performance that seafood lovers expect.Oshi set out to solve that challenge head-on. After years of R&D, we created the world's first plant-based salmon fillet that looks, cooks, and flakes like real salmon. Crafted from clean, plant-based ingredients, Oshi delivers the rich taste, protein, and Omega-3s consumers want—without the downsides of conventional seafood.From day one, Oshi was designed for the real world: for retail freezers, restaurant kitchens, and home cooks who want a premium seafood experience with none of the compromise. Today, Oshi is helping retailers, chefs, and consumers reimagine what seafood can be—opening the door to a more sustainable, scalable, and delicious future for the category.

name: Osulloc
description: Osulloc is an organic Korean tea brand, and we have garnered a prestigious reputation as the ultimate choice for gifting, with our premium tea selections serving as tasteful tokens of appreciation and luxury. Osulloc, Korea's preeminent tea brand, stands at the forefront of cultivating organic tea leaves on the idyllic Jeju Island in South Korea. Our founder began cultivating the rock covered island in 1979. His vision was to transform the land into a beautiful tea farm and revive the disappearing Korean tea tradition. It took many years to harness the natural environment and make the barren island green and fertile. Since the 1980s, Osulloc's refined offerings have been winning the hearts of tea enthusiasts. Over the years, we have broadened our spectrum, introducing an array of blended and powdered teas, including intriguing variations such as kombucha and milk teas. This strategic diversification allows us to cater to a wider audience across various age groups and demographics. Today, Osulloc stands as the go-to brand for gifting premium teas, bolstered by our firm commitment to wellness and uncompromising quality.

name: Otafuku Foods, Inc.
description: The history of Otafuku Foods, Inc. goes back to 1922 when Sasaki Shoten opened for business as a sake and soy sauce wholesale/retail store in Hiroshima, Japan.The rice vinegar brewery started operations in 1938, and the company lost everything when the atomic bomb hit the city of Hiroshima. Vinegar production had to be restarted from scratch after the war.

name: Oterra, LLC
description: FIS by Oterra supplies natural and artificial colors, natural pigments, fruit and vegetable powders, and natural extracts to help brands visually delight consumers and stand out on store shelves. Our offerings are designed to support emerging and high-growth brands with competitive minimum order quantities, short lead times, and custom blends, all while leveraging Oterra's extensive portfolio and capabilities.

name: Our Home
description: Our Home is made up of our portfolio of delicious snack brands – Food Should Taste Good, Popchips, You Need This, Real Food From the Ground Up, RW Garcia, Good Health Snacks, Sonoma Creamery, Pop Secret, and ParmCrisps. We nourish families and communities by getting snacks into the hands of those who want and need them most.

name: OURVITA BRAVEIY
description: Ourvita is the largest Europe-based food supplements CDMO, with over 3,000 team members worldwide, including 120+ R&D specialists, and 15 manufacturing sites across Europe, the UK, USA and China. We support customers from innovation through to commercial-scale manufacturing, with a highly customer-centric approach.We’ll be attending Expo West alongside our China-based business, Braveiy, a full-scale dietary supplements contract manufacturer offering end-to-end services from R&D and formulation through to production, packaging and delivery. Braveiy supports a wide range of dosage forms including softgels, tablets, capsules, powders, beverages and effervescent tablets, with strong expertise in weight management, immunity, joint health, and men’s and women’s health.

name: Overseas Food Trading LTD
description: Le Chic Pâtissier started in New York by the Overseas Food Trading team. This group of expats embodies French sensibilities with a love for pastries and snacks made from classic recipes and the finest ingredients. Wishing to bring specialty sweets into American homes, they created a brand through which they would share their love for the classic European foods they grew up with. From the famous macaron that is seen all over Paris, to the classic brioche that originated in western France, we bring traditional recipes of Europe's most beloved foods right into your home.

name: Owl's Brew
description: Owls Brew was born out of a need for a clean boozy beverage you can trust. Our co-founders Jennie and Maria had the idea to start using fresh brewed tea and botanicals as a base for delicious cocktails and launched our non-alc cocktail mixer in 2018. In 2020 we launched Boozy Tea as a sparkling hard tea seltzer. In 2026 we are relaunching the non-alc cocktail mixer as a 4pk to be sold in retail.

name: Oxyfresh
description: Oxyfresh started the way all great things start: we had an idea. An idea to do pet care differently ... better.  As far back as 1991, you could find us on the shelves of vet offices. Fast forward to today, we've made the Inc 5000 List for fastest growing companies in America for the last three years.We are made in the USA/Cruelty Free/Leaping Bunny certified and based in the Pacific Northwest (2 FDA regulated manufacturing facilities with 1 centrally located warehouse in Texas). We pride ourselves on using only 100% non-toxic ingredients that matter to not only the pets health, but are safe for the pet parent and the household. We're crazy pet people. We're the people that wear matching outfits with our furry best friends and carry our cats in backpacks, yep ... that's us.We understand that pets are family, and we know you want the best for them. At Oxyfresh, we've spent the last 30+ years creating Damn Good Pet Care. We're all about making it easy for busy pet parents to prioritize their pets' health and happiness. We specialize in innovative pet dental, pet odor, and pet wellness products that actually work—because your best friend deserves nothing less.That's why we're committed to making the safest pet care using the best of science and nature. We're not here to sell you fluff - we're here to give you products that actually work. Our motto? "Pet care without the bullsh*t." We're proud to be a 3x Inc. 5000 brand and featured by BuzzFeed, Apple+, Modern Dog, and Modern Cat—but our favorite recognition? The thousands of five-star reviews from pet lovers who've seen the difference.When you expect the golden standard, you choose us because we're committed to making a real difference—one wag, purr, and goofy antic at a time.

name: Ozean International Inc
description: Embrace the momentWe believe that every moment counts. Whether you're hitting the gym, working at the office, or exploring the outdoors, our products are designed to fit perfectly into your life. With NAYAD, you'll be ready for whatever comes next.Quality without compromiseEveryone deserves high quality without the high price tag. NAYAD's products offer exceptional durability and style at an affordable price.Gear up for lifeFrom our best-selling stainless steel water bottle to thoughtfully designed drinkware, our products are built to last—keeping you refreshed and ready for anything.United in diversityWe celebrate inclusivity, bringing together a community that values quality and practicality. Whether it's our stainless steel water bottle or other products, NAYAD is designed for everyone, no matter your lifestyle.

name: P.R. Packagings Limited
description: A one stop packaging manufacturer of PRIMARY, SECONDARY AND TERTIARY PACKAGING- Lamitubes (ABL, PBL), Folding boxes, Rigid boxes, Corrugated boxesLOW MOQs. Any customization. Sepcializations like hot foil, emboss, deboss, special texture, soft touch and more!

name: PACHA Sourdough Buckwheat
description: PACHA is redefining bread with a radically simple formula: organic sprouted buckwheat and sea salt. Our certified organic, gluten-free, allergen-free sourdough loaves, English muffins, and first-ever Sourdough Buckwheat Tortillas are made without gums, binders, fillers, or preservatives — just real food that performs.But PACHA is more than a clean-label bakery brand. We are building a regenerative supply chain around buckwheat — a soil-restoring cover crop that improves biodiversity, reduces synthetic inputs, and strengthens farm resilience. To date, we have helped transition over 1,200 organic acres to verified regenerative practices.PACHA is nationally distributed at Whole Foods, Sprouts, and select Albertsons regions, with a strong customer  over $1.3M raised via crowdfunding to fuel expansion. Our certified home-compostable packaging reinforces our commitment to closing the loop from soil to shelf.We’re proving that bread can be better for bodies, retailers, and the planet — all at once.

name: Pachamama Coffee Cooperative
description: Pachamama's founders came together with a vision to revolutionize the coffee industry: to empower farmers to be more than commodity producers. Today, they retain 100% ownership and governance through the cooperative business model. Our owners are Cocla in Peru, Prodecoop in Nicaragua, Manos Campesinas in Guatemala, La Union Regional in Mexico and Ocfcu in Ethiopia. They elect a representative on the Board of Directors with one vote for each cooperative that owns Pachamama Coffee.This business model changes the narrative for coffee farmers, they set their own prices for coffee and all profits made from the business are allocated back to the cooperatives, turning coffee farmers from price takers to price setters

name: Pacific Fruit Peru
description: Pacific Fruit, established in 2015 in Peru, is a family owned business committed to sharing the rich flavors of Peruvian fruits with the world. Drawing upon ancient agricultural wisdom, the company prioritizes the cultivation and preservation of high-quality fruits, handpicking them at peak ripeness. Their unique approach blends traditional techniques with modern technology, ensuring that essential taste, texture, and aroma are maintained.With a commitment to quality, Pacific Fruit employs advanced aseptic processing techniques that enable their fruit pulps to be stored without refrigeration and free of preservatives. This innovative method allows consumers around the globe to easily enjoy the authentic flavors of Peru.Dedicated to sustainability and uplifting local farmers, Pacific Fruit views each product as a story that honors cultural heritage and nature. The brand represents a journey that unites people through the joy of pure, delicious fruit, inviting everyone to explore the adventure of the Pacific and relish the fruits of their labor.

name: Pacific Popcorn
description: Pacific Popcorn was founded in 2023 by our family as an extension of Jaspen's Inc., a Pacific Northwest–based snack food manufacturer established in 2014. After years of producing high-quality snacks for other brands in our SQF-certified facility, we were inspired to create a brand of our own—one rooted in our family's adventures and love for the Pacific Northwest and Pacific Coast. Those travels shaped our bold, adventurous flavors, each tied to real places and shared experiences. Built on thoughtful manufacturing, clean ingredients, and a spirit of exploration, Pacific Popcorn is made to bring people together—wherever the journey leads.

name: Pacific Ridge Corp/Sonic Milling Systems
description: From the heartlands of the Western Canada, we proudly manufacture both B2B ingredients plant-based concentrates and powders and the finest Private Brand milks and creamers for retailers in North America.  We offer plant-based milk in ESL gable top cartons in organic or conventional as well as clean ingredients or fortified.  We pride ourselves on innovation and   are meeting consumer trends with high protein plant-based beverages. The team behind our products aspires to be a pioneering leader in the plant-based industry, leveraging innovative technology and scalable solutions that drive sustainable growth, create positive environmental impact, and deliver socially responsible returns to our farming partners, customers, and shareholders.

name: Pacific Southwest Container
description: Founded as a small family business in 1973, Pacific Southwest Container, LLC started with one factory serving local businesses in Modesto, California. Three generations later, we have grown to be one of the largest privately held packaging companies in the United States. With more than 1,000 team members and four locations, we create packaging that ranges from high-volume to high-touch, from standard to sophisticated. Our history of bringing capabilities and services in-house allows us to provide unmatched quality and speed to market. We remain committed to investing in innovation, our people, and our craft.Packaging is a craft; one we’ve mastered over five decades. Our heritage, experience, and willingness to invest in our customers are why some of the world’s largest brands trust PSC to solve their most complex packaging challenges. It’s also why many of the local businesses who were with us at the start are still with us today.Our four company values are 360° Health, Teamwork, Quality, and Sustainability.Our ongoing mission at PSC is to be more than just a box™, which consists of 3 critical components:1.	Be the best manufacturing company to work for. By creating a culture of servant leadership and investing in the 360° Health & development of our team members, we will be more than just an employer.2.	Be the best manufacturing company to work with. By continuously investing in quality, innovation, and sustainability, we will be more than just a supplier.3.	Be a force for good. By supporting local educational and charitable organizations that align with our values, we will be more than just a corporation.

name: Pacific Spice Company, Inc.
description: Since 1966, Pacific Spice Company has stayed true to our original mission to bring high quality spices, herbs, and seasonings to the U.S. food industry. We source globally and process domestically, manufacturing a full line of spices, herbs and seasonings with a keen focus on food safety and quality.As a full-service spice company, we expertly source top quality ingredients from around the world while maintaining our rigorous standards of safety and quality by processing and manufacturing in our modern facility in the United States.We are trusted partners, applying our experience and expertise to every step of the process, providing customized solutions to our customers and developing innovative new blends and flavors in our onsite research and development laboratory and test kitchen.We take great pride knowing that our products have enhanced the flavor of food consumed by millions of people.

name: Pack Plus Converting
description: Pack Plus Converting has been one of the leading flexible packaging suppliers in the industry for the past two decades, offering a wide variety of high-quality packaging materials for the specialty coffee and tea industries. Over the years, Pack Plus has built a thriving business on the principles of quality, value, selection and service. We have established an extensive product line that is consistently evolving with the trends of the market. Coupled with our knowledgeable staff that is trained to help customers pinpoint their ideal package, we help growing businesses like yours with affordable packaging solutions that are both effective and efficient.Here at Pack Plus, you'll find a broad selection of flexible packaging products designed to meet every customer's needs. We offer preformed bags that range from a sample pack size of 1oz to a high-capacity size of 40lbs. We also offer roll stock film in various web sizes to work with most form, fill, and seal machines.Complete package customization of both size and color to match your specific needs is also available. Read more about our process here and please feel free to consult one of our friendly associates for further details.We take pride in the fact that Pack Plus has been the ultimate resource for many coffee roasters and tea processors when it comes to specialty packaging. Our wide selection allows for greater flexibility that ensures our customers, regardless of size, find exactly what they're looking for.

name: Packaging Options USA
description: Exceptional products come in diverse forms, and we have the perfect packaging solutions to match. Explore our comprehensive range of packaging options designed to captivate consumers and maintain the quality of your food, beverage, health, and pet food products. Whether you need packaging for gourmet snacks, refreshing beverages, health supplements, or premium pet food, Packaging Options USA offers customized solutions that align with your brand's unique needs and creative vision.

name: PAGMAT GIDA A.Ş.
description: The Pagmat Story: From Roots to Global RecognitionIn 1979, two visionary businessmen planted the seeds of Pagmat in the fertile lands of Türkiye, a region renowned for its abundance of high-quality dried fruits. What began as a small operation in a prime grape-growing area has blossomed into a globally respected name in the dried fruit industry, driven by an enduring commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation.Pagmat's story is deeply rooted in its connection to the land. Specializing in raisins from the start, the company leveraged its proximity to Türkiye's bountiful vineyards to deliver exceptional products to the market. Over time, Pagmat broadened its horizons, introducing a diverse range of dried fruits, including apricots, figs, mulberries, prunes, and dates. With an eye on evolving consumer needs, the company also developed innovative formats like fruit pastes and diced products, perfectly suited for breakfast, bakery, and confectionery applications.As Pagmat grew, it sought to bring its expertise directly to consumers. This vision gave birth to Otamon, Pagmat's retail brand, which offers carefully selected dried fruits and unique blends for health-conscious individuals and families. Otamon embodies Pagmat's mission of delivering healthy, natural foods from the field to the table. With a focus on both quality and practicality, Otamon products are designed to make nutritious snacking simple and enjoyable for people around the world.This dedication to excellence has earned Pagmat the trust of some of the world's most renowned brands. By consistently delivering on its promise of quality—supported by both conventional and organic certifications—Pagmat has solidified its reputation as a reliable partner in the global market.Today, as Pagmat celebrates over 45 years of success, it continues to lead with a spirit of innovation and a focus on sustainability. Whether through its industrial offerings or its retail brand Otamon, Pagmat remains dedicated to bringing the finest dried fruits to consumers, ensuring its legacy as a trusted leader in the industry.

name: Painterland Sisters
description: Painterland Sisters is a woman-owned, family-owned and farmer-owned Icelandic-style skyr yogurt brand. Co-founded by Hayley and Stephanie Painter, their mission is to connect consumers with the direct source of their food while restoring the health of the land, communities, and people through the use of organic regenerative agriculture practices. With their simply yummy and nutrient-dense yogurt using milk sourced from their 4th generation organic family farm and others like it in the area, Painterland Sisters is dedicated to supporting farmers and providing consumers with a nutrient dense, simply yummy yogurt.

name: Paisley Farm
description: Found in 1945, Paisley Farm began as a way to bring great farm fresh flavor to the table but with the added benefit of convenience. Jarred vegetables that would be ready to serve, on demand and compliment any main course.

name: PakTech
description: PakTech. Leading the Way in Sustainable PackagingPakTech is revolutionizing sustainable secondary packaging with innovative, 100% recycled, and fully recyclable multipack handles. Designed for brands committed to sustainability, our handles are made from 100%  recycled plastic HDPE, diverting plastic waste from landfills and transforming into durable, functional packaging solutions.As an Association of Plastic Recyclers (APR) recognized company, PakTech ensures its handles meet the highest standards for recyclability. Our latest Near-Infrared (NIR) sortable handles are engineered for improved detection in recycling facilities, reinforcing our dedication to a fully circular economy.Why Brands Choose PakTech:✔ 100% Recycled & Recyclable – Every handle is crafted from recycled HDPE and can be recycled again.✔ NIR Sortable for Circularity – Our newest handles are designed for maximum recovery in sorting systems.✔ Minimalist & Functional Design – Securely snaps onto products while allowing your branding to shine.✔ Industry-Proven Performance – Used by major CPG brands, retailers, and small businesses worldwide for over 30 years.✔ Applicator Solutions – From small-scale to high-speed automation, PakTech handle applicators streamline packaging efficiency and grow with you as you scale.Since 1991, PakTech has been a family-owned leader in sustainable secondary packaging, operating out of Eugene, Oregon. Our mission is to reduce, reuse, and recycle—helping brands take meaningful steps toward sustainability while ensuring a premium consumer experience.Visit PakTech at Booth 5001Stop by our booth to see how our innovative solutions can enhance your packaging sustainability. Let’s work together to accelerate progress toward a truly circular economy.

name: Palermo’s
description: Palermo Villa, Inc. is one of the most recognized frozen pizza manufacturers in the United States, known for its innovation and the quality of its branded and private label products. The family-owned company was founded in 1964 and is located in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Palermo’s growing portfolio of branded pizzas includes Palermo’s® Pizza, Screamin’ Sicilian™, Urban Pie Pizza Co.™, and  Connie’s® Pizza.

name: PalletTrader
description: PalletTrader is a leading digital marketplace and pallet management console, connecting buyers and suppliers with innovative solutions. We’re revolutionizing pallet management with both a comprehensive marketplace and tailored managed services. Our approach combines the best people, efficient processes, and advanced technology to streamline operations, enhance visibility, reduce total cost of ownership, and optimize your pallet supply chain.

name: Pan's
description: It all started during a trip to visit my extended family in Malaysia back in 2008. They served me a snack that I loved, and when I realized it was a mushroom I knew I had something special to share with the world. This snack used shiitake mushrooms and provided a delicious umami flavor and soft chewy texture that was unlike any vegetarian snack I'd ever had. I started importing this snack that they made and selling Pan's Mushroom Jerky part-time. When we had enough traction, I decided to quit my full time job and start producing Pan's and focusing on growing our retail and online sales. Today, we make Pan's products in Portland Oregon and we're available in over 2,500 stores across the country. We've gotten fantastic organic press from publications like The Wall Street Journal, Today, Food & Wine, and we were featured on Shark Tank twice during season 12.

name: Panama Blue Water
description: Panama Blue Water is a Rainforest Spring Water that was founded in 2003.It is an exceptionally pure, natural spring water that is bottled at the source at the top of a secluded, virgin rainforest, which is right next to a protected national park in Panama called Chagres.

name: Panera CPG
description: With over 50 years of experience in coffee farming, we've traveled the world to exotic places to source only the best quality Organic coffees that are grown and roasted with a transparent process we oversee at every step. Java Trading has travelled around the world to source quality coffees that are distinct by destination so you can experience the best sustainably grown coffees processed with care from seed-to-cup.

name: Panito Gıda Dış Ticaret Sanayi LTD ŞTİ
description: Smarter Snacks were created to prove that healthy can be seriously tasty. Born in Eskişehir, Türkiye and powered by Panito Food's 20+ years of manufacturing expertise, we started with a single hero—our Protein Pancake—then expanded into Protein Waffle, Protein Puff, and Protein Hot-Iced Coffee to support active, on-the-go lifestyles.All products are made under one roof in our high-standard facility where we manage the entire process in-house—from raw-material selection and mixing to baking, cooling, and packaging. Owning the line allows us to implement strict quality controls, hygienic design, and full traceability, delivering consistent taste and texture, batch after batch.Our recipes focus on functional nutrition and clean labels: high protein and fiber, no preservatives, and ingredient lists designed for transparency and trust. Each product is crafted to be a practical, delicious alternative that helps consumers maintain balanced eating without compromise.From our home base in Türkiye, our brands now reach customers across Europe, North & South America, the MENA region, and Asia, supported by a growing network of retail and distribution partners. As we scale, our commitment remains the same: innovate responsibly, keep flavor first, and make better choices easy to enjoy—anytime, anywhere.This is how we build a global snacking brand from Türkiye: pairing engineering-grade production with chef-level taste, so that choosing better never feels like a sacrifice.

name: Panos Brands
description: PANOS BRANDS -Panos Brands are built on brands that are Premium, Authentic, Natural, Organic, and Specialty.  Our collection of brands speaks directly to sustained trends in categories such as organic, ethnic, gluten-free, vegetarian, restricted diets, and gourmet foods. Our products allow exploration of new flavors and cuisines while providing healthy options for meal preparation.2026 NEXTY Award Finalist for KA.ME Spicy Chili Ponzu Sauce Design!KA•ME means turtle in Japanese and is a symbol of longevity and the respect for traditions in our approach to Asian food. For over 50 years, we have explored the cuisines of Asia, seeking authentic foods, flavors and meal solutions from China, Japan and Korea to Thailand, Vietnam and beyond. KA•ME offers an extensive range of fresh-cooked and dry noodles, condiments, rice crackers, meal kits, and easy-to-prepare products, selected from the finest ingredients and recipes that Asia has to offer. Enjoy simple and delicious restaurant quality Asian meals at home, with KA•ME, the Key to Asian Made Easy.Tessemae's Organic - Founded by Tesse, a mother of three active boys, developed a homemade salad dressing recipe using only real ingredients to ensure her children ate healthily. Rejecting artificial options, she crafted a delicious and clean alternative. Committed to providing consumers with tasty, innovative, and wholesome products, Tessemae’s offers a healthier choice beyond artificial ingredients. At Tessemae’s, we live for fresh, natural ingredients meets our obsession with mouthwatering flavor. We’re all about keeping it real, crafting products that are as wholesome as they are tasty. Join us on our mission to redefine clean eating, one delicious bite at a time.The Santa Barbara Smokehouse - With our emphasis on tradition and craft rather than mass production, we proudly produce a very delicate but distinctive tasting smoked salmon that cannot be achieved using conventional modern smoking methods. Unlike high volume manufacturers who typically burn woodchips on hot plates, our smokehouse burns full logs of oak, applewood and other select woods in an open fire kiln, as it was historically done in Scotland. We are one of the few remaining smokehouses in the world that employ this traditional method of smoking. Our smoked salmon represents the highest level of quality, taste and texture and we are proud and honored that the world’s premier hotels, airlines, finest restaurants, exclusive resorts and retailers use and enjoy our products. Our retail brand, Cambridge House®, uses only the highest quality Atlantic salmon. Fresh fillets are hand-cured with our proprietary blend of Pacific Sea salt and brown sugar and artfully smoked in our open-fire smoker. Specially selected woods and herbs give each product its distinctive, signature flavor. These fine, smoked salmon delicacies are all natural and ready to eat — with no artificial preservatives. Walden Farms began creating low-fat, low-calorie dressings in 1972 before introducing calorie-free dressings in 1998. Since then, Walden Farms has expanded its calorie-free platform throughout numerous categories, including salad dressings, syrups, coffee creamers, spreads, sauces, and condiments. Walden Farms provides ‘better-for-you’ products that allow consumers to continue enjoying their favorite foods without sacrificing taste, and while still achieving their health and wellness goals. Walden Farms’ unique attributes meet demands of today’s consumers seeking ‘better-for-you’ choices, including consumers focused on weight control, diabetic management and fitness.MI-DEL has been satisfying the appetites of kids and adults alike for over 70 years who want cookies that SIMPLY TASTE DELICIOUS! Back in 1947 Samuel MI-DEL developed for his family wondrous, simple, wholesome, great tasting cookies that are still sought after today! As a pioneer in the Gluten-Free cookie category, MI-DEL is a brand consumers know, trust and love to share with their family, for everyone to enjoy with no compromise on taste or texture. MI-DEL Pie Crusts are the ONLY great tasting gluten-free, ready-made pie crusts that are allergen safe and non-GMO verified on the market!Amore offers authentic, made in Italy, locally sourced non-GMO products that provide BIG & Bold flavors. Amore is culinary inspired, using the finest high quality Italian ingredients, harvested at their peak. Amore’s Italian cooking pastes are imported and packaged in a unique squeeze tube that makes gourmet cooking flavorful and convenient. With a range of premium double concentrated cooking pastes, such as Tomato Paste, Herb Paste, Anchovy Paste, and Garlic Paste to name a few. Amore ready-to-eat vegetables also source the finest Italian ingredients and a proprietary fresh cooking process for over 30 years!Andrew & Everett uses the highest-quality milk from humanely raised cows, of farms in America’s heartland, giving you creamy, delicious, and nutritious cheese free from added hormones, antibiotics, and preservatives. Our Cheese is crafted in small batches, ensuring only the freshest cheese at shelf. We specialize in artisanal “farm to table” cheese.Sesmark for over 35 years, has baked simple clean ingredient crackers that are free of trans fats, hydrogenated oils, cholesterol, and preservatives. Our long heritage making gourmet style crackers is your guarantee that these delicious products are perfect for dipping, serving with cheese, or savoring just as they are. They add a snappy crunch and a subtle, but distinctive flavor that complements, without overpowering. Sesmark crackers are an excellent gluten-free alternative for health–conscious consumers, including people following a gluten-free lifestyle. Simply made with Non-GMO Verified ingredients give these crackers a light and delicate flavor with a superior ingredient panel. It’s crunch time!Chatfield’s is a natural line of baking ingredients, providing discerning consumers with health-conscious products. We develop and market these high-quality ingredients that can be used with ease in your favorite recipes. Our ‘clean-label’ philosophy allows consumers to quickly understand what they are eating. Chatfield’s offers a full line of products, including Carob Chips, Cocoa Powder, Carob Powder and Date Sugar.

name: Papa Mountain
description: Papa Mountain is the ONLY clean-label grain-free bread roll in the category with fully baked, heat-and-eat rolls ready in minutes. Each SKU delivers 6g of protein per serving across all four flavors, combining powerful nutritionals with real, simple ingredients. Non-GMO Project Verified, GFCO Certified Gluten-Free, OU-D Kosher — we don’t just claim clean label, we prove it. Think outside the grain.

name: PaperChef, Inc.
description: PaperChef originated in 2009 as a start up brand in Toronto, CA.  The brand quickly became the leading premium parchment brand in CA.  Expansion of the brand into the United States followed and in 2020 the company moved to LaVergne, TN.  Today, PaperChef can be found in many top retailers, and grocery stores throughout North America.

name: Paradise Fruits North America, Inc.
description: Quality with Tradition – Made in GermanyFor over 140 years, the Jahncke Group has been shaping the future of fruit processing with expertise, passion, and reliability.At Paradise Fruits Solutions, we develop and manufacture premium, tailor-made fruit-based ingredients – including granulates, pastes, snacks, and drops – for the bakery, confectionery, ice cream, and snacking industries. Each product is crafted to meet specific texture, flavor, and functional needs.With Paradise Fruits Health, we take nutritional supplements to a new level — deliciously. Using our proprietary fruit matrix, we transform essential nutrients into enjoyable fruit gummies, combining real fruit taste with added vitamins, minerals, botanicals and more. Whether in cubes, domes, or bears – it’s smart snacking with a purpose.One group, two divisions, one goal:Better ingredients that deliver real value – from taste to healthFor more information on our products visit our website: www.paradisefruits.comOr email us at: info@paradisefruits.com

name: Paragon Fruits, Inc
description: nochtli delivers Recovery and Hydration powered by all natural SuperiorFruitÒ juices and purees.  Our formulas help you recover, re-hydrate, and provide immune support with naturally occurring antioxidants, electrolytes, and essential minerals.After intense exercise or an extra late-night on the town we have you covered with all-natural recovery.  We are proud to offer Hydration Powders to get you ready, Sports Drinks to keep you going, and Recovery options to get you ready for the next roundCrafted as a convenient Liquid and Powder Daily Supplement, nochtli offers a clean label you can trust. A proud minority owned brand available in Canada & USA, we bring plant-powered nutrition in full size and travel size options—delivering refreshing taste and functional benefits in every sipnochtli SuperiorFruit products are packed with all-natural fruit and vegetable juices and purées. Why change what Mother Nature has already perfectedWe believe in having a simple label, and when you enjoy nochtli, you are getting a supplement with integrity, because what you put in your body matters.As nature intended:No added colors or artificial flavorsNo added water or non-functional "fillers"No added sugars, syrups or sweetenersGluten free supplementNon-dairy supplementFree of nuts and soyKosher certifiedNon-GMO

name: Paragon Laboratories
description: Paragon Laboratories is an NPA & NSF GMP certified custom manufacturer of nutritional supplements.  We manufacture tablets, capsules and powders.  Paragon offers an analytical laboratory, formulation design and packaging services.

name: Paramount Coffee
description: Since 1935, Paramount Coffee has poured passion and expertise into crafting exceptional coffee you can smell, taste, and savor in every cup. We deliver premium quality, precision roasting, and authentic relationships with our customers and farmers worldwide. As a 100% employee-owned company, each employee shareholder is personally invested to produce the finest coffee, and this commitment is reflected in our certifications including Safe Quality Foods Program (SQF), USDA Organic, Fair Trade, Rainforest Alliance, and STAR-K Kosher. Our roasters are true artisans, creating superior blends that unlock the distinct flavors and aromas of each bean. We meet our diverse customers’ needs by offering responsibly sourced coffee, including farm-direct, in a wide range of formats -- from bagged coffee to K-cups -- in traditional and premium roasts, cold brew, espresso, and an assortment of flavors and blends. Our farm-direct coffees are proudly served by coffee shops, restaurants, and convenience stores, and our products are also available on shelves at grocery, club, and specialty retailers, as well as online. In addition, we can develop customized private-label and licensed blends.

name: Paramount Global
description: As a global leader in packaging distribution and supply chain management, we seamlessly blend packaging, transportation, and warehousing solutions to meet our customers’ unique needs. Our commitment to providing exceptional customer service has made us a trusted supplier in the packaging industry.

name: Paranice
description: Indulgence can be healthy, and we’re here to prove it. At Paranice, we’re revolutionizing the way people think about food, breaking stereotypes with products that are not only delicious but also good for you. As leaders in the Colombian health food market, we blend bold innovation with a playful and irreverent spirit to create snacks that nourish the body and delight the soul. Our creations are a true celebration of quality and flavor. We’ve mastered the art of indulgence with Nut-Based Spreads that are keto, plant-based, and free from sugar alcohols— pure indulgence with a clean label—, our Chunky Sugar-Free GranOLA, that brings a new kind of crunch to healthy snacking, and our Pancake & Waffle Mixes made from whole grain oats. At the heart of everything, our high-quality raw materials— Fine Oat Flour, Fine Almond Flour, and Old Fashioned Gluten Free Rolled Oats—lay the foundation for products that are as pure as they are versatile.Every bite is crafted to inspire, excite, and redefine what it means to eat well. 💜✨

name: Parissa Laboratories, Inc.
description: 100% natural ingredients. Leaping Bunny Certified. Sustainable packaging. Woman-owned and operated since 1983. Body positivity is at the heart of Parissa. We want to empower everyone to feel positive in their own skin – whether they remove their hair.We aim to inspire everyone to be themselves.Inspired by the trailblazing attitude of founder Azar Moayeri, all Parissa waxes are non-toxic for professional or at-home use. An innovator in her own right, Azar was the first female Chemical Engineer to graduate from the University of Edinburgh. After this accomplishment, Azar returned to her native Iran to work as a Senior Project Manager at NIOC. As the lead of an all-male team, she initiated and completed many successful projects. In Canada, Azar embraced the opportunity to start a new life and created a home-based business that could support herfamily.

name: Partake Foods
description: Partake Foods is a mission-driven brand dedicated to creating delicious, allergy-friendly snacks. Founded by a mom on a mission to find better options for her daughter with food allergies, Partake offers cookies and graham crackers that are free from the top 9 allergens, as well as gluten-free, vegan, and non-GMO.Available in over 17,000 retailers nationwide, Partake is committed to making snack time more inclusive — because everyone deserves a seat at the table. Through thoughtful ingredient selection and joyful branding, we’re redefining what allergy-friendly snacking can taste like.

name: Partner Foods Group
description: Partner Foods Group is an importing, sales, marketing and distribution company. We represent specialty, health and organic products on an exclusive basis in the US. Our sales Team calls upon retail buyers direct, and we sell our products through a national network of distributors and wholesalers. We represent Monari Federzoni Vinegars, Monini Olive oils, Finn Crisp crispbreads, Felix Lingonberries, Davids Kosher Salt, Janes Krazy Seasonings, Evolution Himalayan salt products and Roka crackers.

name: Passion Joy LLC
description: Living in California continues to shape my approach to wellness, quality, and everyday choices. It was here, four years ago, that I discovered passion fruit for the first time and was instantly captivated by its unique flavor—bright, refreshing, and perfectly balanced between sweet and sour. I was also amazed by the many benefits passion fruit offers, which inspired me to learn more about this incredible fruit and its natural properties.At the same time, I was becoming more intentional about what my family and I consumed each day. As a mother, I wanted a beverage that felt joyful and refreshing, yet clean, organic, and mindful of sugar. I searched for drinks that aligned with those values, but found very few options that combined exciting flavor, organic ingredients, and a truly guilt-free experience. That realization inspired me to create something different.I envisioned a drink built around passion fruit that I could enjoy myself and confidently share with my family. From the beginning, my goal was not only to highlight the fruit's vibrant taste, but also to preserve as many of its natural benefits as possible. I wanted a soda that allowed people to enjoy the goodness of passion fruit while drinking it—a beverage that delivered flavor and function together. Passion fruit is a natural powerhouse, and my mission was to reflect that energy in every sip.The company was established in 2023 in California, a state known for setting wellness and lifestyle trends that influence the world. Inspired by this environment, my mission was to create something proudly made in the United States—an organic, thoughtfully crafted soda that represents quality, transparency, and innovation. Passion Joy is an organic, low-sugar, guilt-free soda, made without artificial ingredients and designed to fit seamlessly into everyday life. Lightly sparkling and carefully crafted, it offers a modern alternative to traditional soda.What started as a personal discovery has grown into a brand rooted in intention, transparency, and pride. Made in the USA and inspired by California, Passion Joy is created for families, shared moments, and everyday enjoyment—bringing the spirit of passion fruit into a soda.

name: Pasta Armando
description: De Matteis Agroalimentare is one of the largest Italian Producers of durum wheat pasta, committed to improving the whole production chain from wheat field to the finished product.The factory is situated in Campania, at the foot of the Appennine Mountains near places where the largest fields of durum wheat can be found: Irpinia, Apulia and Basilicata.Like a small number of Italian pasta factories, De Matteis follows a wheat-pasta integrated production cycle. Having a mill on our premises allows us to have total control over the raw material and so the quality of the product.At our quality control laboratory inside the mill, we select the best wheat and make sure it meets our strict standards of quality. This is how premium Italian pasta is produced.De Matteis Agroalimentare was founded in 1993 by two entrepreneurial families operating the Construction business for more than 50 years.The commitment and dedication of the families lead what was initially just a mill with a small pasta factory to become one of the major players in the pasta sector, with a growth rate still unmatched in the field.We launched the Pasta Armando brand in 2020 after extensive market research on what consumers seek in terms of ingredients, performance and corporate responsibility.  It is the first Italian pasta to offer 100% Italian durum from our local supply chain, carefully extruded through bronze die, slow-dried and with a certification of zero pesticides and zero glyphosate.  Pasta Armando is the future of Italian premium pasta in America!

name: Pasta Garofalo
description: Founded in 1789, Garofalo pasta is synonymous with excellence and passion for pasta. Our philosophy is based on centuries of artisanal experience and a constant commitment to achieving absolute quality. Every step of production, from selecting the semolina to packaging, is carefully controlled to ensure maximum flavor and perfection in every cut. With over 80 shapes and 3 product lines (durum wheat semolina, high protein, and gluten-free), Garofalo meets every consumer's needs while always ensuring complete transparency in quality. Our packaging, which reveals even the smallest imperfections of the pasta, reflects our commitment to authentic quality. Garofalo is more than just pasta; it’s a culinary journey of passion, precision, and taste.As the #1 imported pasta brand in the USA, Garofalo delivers a product that speaks for itself, grounded in a dedication to excellence and a passion for creating exceptional food experiences. At the heart of our pasta lies a perfect balance of tradition and innovation. We take pride in transforming the rich heritage of Gragnano into a modern masterpiece. With every strand of Garofalo pasta, we combine time-honored methods with the highest contemporary standards, ensuring that each bite offers a refined taste experience that elevates every meal. Garofalo’s unmistakable identity is celebrated not only in Italy but around the world. Our commitment to quality is unwavering, driven by a team of experts who pour their knowledge, care, and dedication into every batch.

name: PASTA PICCININI
description: Pasta Piccinini Inc is a family company specializing in the production and distribution of high-quality pasta inspired by Italian culinary tradition. With a strong focus on carefully selected ingredients and artisanal production methods, the company blends authenticity with innovation to deliver products known for their genuine flavor and perfect texture.

name: Pastabilities by The Pasta Shoppe
description: Pastabilities aims to bring back the joy of pasta by delivering healthier and great tasting pasta rooted in traditional taste, ingredients, and techniques. Since 1994, we’ve been crafting pasta designed for the health and happiness of our customers.

name: Pastaio Usa Inc
description: Our company was founded in 1980 in Brescia in Italy and starting suppling little stores with our hand made gnocchi , little by little we become the largest producer of Gnocchi around the world . after 40 years we are ready  to open a totally domestic factory in Allenwood PA to serve directly from PA all the United States .

name: Pastene
description: Founded in 1874 in a pushcart in the North End of Boston.  Still private, family-owned business, led by the founders' descendants – fifth-generation family members

name: PASTIFICIO DI BARI TARALL'ORO SRL
description: The first brand is TARALL'ORO. It exalted the values ​​that our company transmits: passion, dedication and professionalism. But in 2019 we launched the new Di Bari brand with the arrival of the third generation.

name: Patatas Torres
description: TORRES started its beginnings in 1969 with Manuel Torres and his wife, Ángeles Medel opening their potato chip stand in Premiá de Mar (Spain).Shortly after, the business started growing and Manuel and Juan, the couple's children, decided to expand the business and move the production of the potato chips to Premià de Dalt, keeping the stand open.The traditional, handcrafted process employed by the Torres family generates popularity among their potato chips because of their quality. In 1995, in order to attend to the increasing demands, they decided to move to bigger facilities in Dosrius.Over the years Torres has been growing and becoming more and more popular, to start operating internationally with Dutch market to be the first foreign place to sell Torres chips.In 2016 we renewed and extended our production facilities. We use the latest technology and high-tech machinery.We are located just 35km far from the Port of Barcelona. Our production facility is based in the Industrial Park El Pedregar(Montmeló).Due to the new facilities we ensure a growing production capacity for the next few years.

name: PAXCEL PKG
description: Pacxel builds on Korpack's storied legacy with a bold new approach. We provide advanced packaging solutions for a diverse range of sectors, including food, snacks, confectioneries, and pharmaceuticals. Our commitment to quality and our team of experts ensure that we deliver products that are not only exceptional but also perfectly tailored to meet our clients' unique needs.

name: PB Leiner
description: Explore the functional and health benefits of PB Leiner’s premium quality gelatin and collagen peptides made from fish, pork and beef. Our high-quality collagen peptides are an active health-promoting ingredient. These pure proteins (bovine - porcine - fish collagen) are a sought-after ingredient in beauty applications, sports nutrition, food supplements, and patient recovery foods. Our gelatins provide a clean label and multifunctional solution to the ​most diverse food preparations in the FMCG and food service sectors as well as pharmaceutical products and applications

name: Peace Coffee
description: Our company was founded by a non-profit in 1996, as an early model for what Fair Trade might look like.  We named one of our early roasts "Guatemalan Peace Coffee" as a celebration of the 1996 Guatemalan Peace Accords, and the name stuck.  To this day, we remain committed to fair trade, organic, specialty coffee - and our commitment to our supply chain and our Minneapolis community have resulted in being awarded a B Corp "Best for the World" in the Community category for the fourth consecutive time.  We're starry-eyed dreamers who believe in bicycle power, being nice, and bringing neighbors, farmers, and the community together. We believe that collaboration works wonders, and that passion, honesty, and a really great cup of coffee can make the world a better place. And when that coffee is sustainably grown and freshly roasted to bring out the best in every bean, well, that's when the real magic happens.

name: Peak Protein
description: Introducing Peak Protein: a journey that began with a simple desire for true nourishment. In a world of heavily processed bars and artificial ingredients, a group of health enthusiasts embarked on a mission to redefine what a protein bar should be. Their vision? A delicious, nutritious protein bar crafted exclusively from nature's bounty.Peak Protein's story is one of authenticity and dedication. A team of foodies, athletes, and wellness advocates united to craft a bar that mirrors their values. They sourced the world's finest grass-fed whey protein from southern Ireland, honoring the harmony between wholesome nutrition, sustainable practices and superior quality protein. Every chosen element is a testament to their commitment – real, pure, and free from unpronounceable ingredients.With each bite of a Peak Protein bar, you taste the culmination of this journey. The first bite, an introduction to flavor beyond compare. As the taste evolves, you're reminded that it's not just a bar – it's a promise to your body. No artificial additives, no stomach-churning fillers. Just pure goodness, crafted to elevate your energy, power your adventures, and make your taste buds dance with delight.Peak Protein is more than just a bar; it's proof that nutrition never compromises taste. It's the fruit of unrelenting dedication, relentless pursuit of quality, and profound respect for body and nature. With every wrapper peeled back, you're met with the affirmation that better choices are possible.Peak Protein: Where delicious and nutritious unite.

name: PEAKAPOP
description: With more than 15 years of experience as the head of a prominent European snacks brand in the nuts and dried fruits market, both in Turkey and Germany, Emre Tekinalp is the founder and CEO of PeaKaPop. This experience has given him insights into the snack market and the importance of providing healthy and delicious snack options.Following the birth of his two children and efforts to offer them nutritious snacks, EMRE TEKINALP made the decision to establish his own brand that exclusively employs clean ingredients.

name: Pearson Ranch Elk & Bison Jerky, LLC
description: High in the mountains of New Mexico is where our fifth-generation ranch is located and where we raise bison, elk and cattle on mountain pastures. Pearson Ranch was established in 1959 by Ken & Sue Pearson. This family ranch grew with the generations and eventually became an outfitting ranch which naturally transitioned into a jerky business established by Marvin Cromwell. In 2000 our jerky, snack sticks, and summer sausages were being offered exclusively in Bass Pro and Cabela's stores nationwide. In 2012 Marvin established the wholesale and distribution of our brand under Pearson Ranch Elk & Bison Jerky where we have grown year after year since. Our entire line of exotic snack sticks, jerky and summer sausages are made in a USDA inspected plant. Our meats combined with NATURAL ingredients result in delicious, savory, gourmet meat snacks that are:High in Protein & Low in FatFree of MSG & GlutenNO added Nitrites or Nitrates0g TOTAL SugarsThis year we are proud to announce that we are part of New@KeHE featuring our delicious snack sticks!

name: Pecana
description: I am a third generation pecan grower-- my family has been growing pecans since the 80s and what started out a small farm in the southwest has grown to be an operation that now provides pecans all over the world. We want everyone to see how the pecan shines in milk form.

name: Pedon, S.P.A.
description: Pedon is a family-owned Italian company, born in 1984, global leader in legume-, cereal- and seed-based product solutions.

name: Peepers by PeeperSpecs
description: Peepers is a 4th generation, family-run company that began with a quest to find eyewear that unleashed confidence in every customer. From our exclusive hand-crafted design, dedication to quality, and thoughtful customer experience, our family’s legacy is committed to pursuing the beauty of self-expression, one pair of Peepers at a time.

name: Peerless Coffee & Tea
