description: From our humble beginnings on Washington Street in 1924 to our current Oakland headquarters that span an entire block on Oak Street, we are proud of our Oakland roots and our commitment to the community. Peerless sources and carefully roasts the world's finest graded Arabica beans. To achieve this ambitious objective, founder John Vukasin pioneered farm-direct relationships in premier high elevation growing regions, generations before today's most notable craft roasters. Some of today's 18 farm direct relationships, from Ethiopia to Costa Rica, have lasted over 40 years. Our current third-generation ownership, with the dynamic brother & sister team of George and Kristina at the helm, understands, like their grandfather before them, that each varietal of coffee bean needs the same extensive knowledge, decades of experience and an artisan's demand for excellence, in order to reach perfection – just like fine wines. Roasting and blending exceptional coffee isn't just a business. It's a labor of love, and the family legacy.Besides a separate training/cupping/sample roasting room, our retail store was recently updated to have all remodeling grounded in our historically deep commitment to sustainability. All the walls and display areas are crafted from reclaimed wood and metal. Organic Certification – since 1980 • Kosher Certification – since 1990 • Fair Trade Certification – since 2000 • Alameda County's Green Business Certification – since 2000 • SQF Certification– since 2021

name: People Science
description: Founded by the pioneers of decentralized clinical trials, People Science is a clinical research company transforming how alternative, functional, and natural health products are studied. Our proprietary platform, Chloe, integrates participant-first design with regulatory-grade science, making clinical research faster, transparent, and affordable to meet the growing demand for scientifically supported wellness products, bridging the gap between traditional science and the future of wellness.

name: Peppertux
description: We get it... You LOVE pistachios and so do we! That's why we spent countless hours shopping for pistachios but were shocked to not find a single pistachio butter alternative on the shelves! Fast forward 3 years, our pistachio spreads are now sold across thousands of locations, from large chains to small independents across the US along with multiple countries globally! Like that wasn't enough, we recently launched an amazing new line of pistachio "coffee", determined to make you go "WOW" with every sip. All that flavor and still no chemicals, preservatives, soy, palm-oil and anything that a six year old can't pronounce.  We'd be thrilled to have you on this journey, so come along and taste our amazing flavors today!

name: Perfect Companion Group Co., Ltd.
description: ete believes ice cream should be more than just a treat. Our goal is simple: to share joy by searching for the freshest, best ingredients.Every flavor shows our careful process, made with true love and care. Our story is a strong, heartfelt commitment to delivering happiness, refreshment, and a perfect taste, all sourced from real Thai ingredients.

name: Perfect Delights
description: Perfect Delights is a global premium dried fruit brand with over 50 years of experience.Based in Aydın, Turkey, the company produces organic and conventional dried fruits such as figs, apricots, mangoes, dates, strawberries, cherries, and prunes.Perfect Delights exports more than 1,000 containers annually and sells in major markets including Walmart and Amazon.The brand focuses on healthy, convenient, and high-quality snack options for global consumers.

name: Perfect Snacks
description: in 2004, Perfect Bar was born in our family kitchen on wheels (13 kids, a family bus and a love of whole foods), andwe gambled it all on the unconventional idea of putting a protein bar in the fridge.

name: PerfectShaker
description: We make custom shakers easy!PerfectShaker is the world's most perfect shaker cup. Fully customizable to help grow your brand and also available in many different designs for wholesale.Visit www.PerfectShaker.com for more details!

name: Perla Foods USA Corp.
description: Table Foods is a brand owned by Perla holding, the European leader in crafting fresh antipasti –truly Italian-style snacks, along with a rich assortment of hummus and salads.

name: Peruvian Nature
description: Peruvian Nature*, with over 20 years of experience in the market, offers *Superfoods* native to Peru to both local and international markets. Our products are known for being 100% natural, gluten free, lactose free and no additives, we also offer organic products.Our main products are: Maca, Lucuma, Camu Camu, Golden Berry, Blueberry, Sweet Potato,.We have certifications that guarantee the quality of our production plant, as well as of our products. Finally, our work is carried out according to well-defined structure that monitors the entire value chain, from the farmers in our fields to the workers at the plant taking into account environmental concerns.We believe in doing things well and consciously. Conscious of the work we carry out and of the process this entails, of that which surrounds us, and of the consequences of what we do. This way of thinking and acting forms the foundation of everything we do at Peruvian Nature.Our reasoning is simple. We can explain. It is the result of working in a respectful way and investing love and passion in everything we do, however small it may be. Because when you work this way, the results are impressive. Not only for you, but for the people and the environment that surrounds you.

name: Petit Pot
description: Founded by a Michelin-star trained French pastry chef named Max, Petit Pot is bringing decadent and delicious French desserts like pot de creme and rice pudding to American homes across the country. All of our products are made using fresh, organic ingredients and traditional French methods, just like if you were to make it in your own home.

name: PETRUZ AÇAÍ
description: With time and dedication, a seed can become a beautiful tree. This is how the Petruz Fruity Group grew and today it has become a tree with more than 3 decades of history, and its fruits are promoting its ideas, bringing FLAVOR, HEALTH AND ENERGY to an ever-increasing number of people, in the most diverse parts of the world.

name: PGP International, Inc.
description: At PGP International, we are experts in the science of extrusion and masters in the art of developing texture solutions. We can take proteins, like soy and pea, or natural wholesome grains like sorghum and quinoa, and provide them with unique textures in various shapes and sizes; we tailor solutions to meet customer needs.According to recent Innova research, consumers are becoming more proactive in seeking out different approaches to healthy eating. While snacking is becoming more prevalent, there is a movement towards healthy indulgence and better-for-you confectionery: a focus on natural, nutritious ingredients coupled with an enjoyable eating experience.Texture is an important part of any eating experience thanks to its ability to engage with multiple senses and evoke different emotional responses. Interesting textures can enhance the eating experience and boost enjoyment.With consumers showing a strong preference for natural ingredients and clean label, PGP International is pleased to showcase how their range of extruded protein and wholesome grain crisps can bring a unique texture experience to better-for-you confectionery and nutritional bar solutions.If you're visiting the show, book an appointment or just come along to Hall A, Booth 990 to talk to us and try our delicious and innovative crisps in applications:

name: PGS360
description: PGS360 is a leading provider of supply chain and logistics solutions with 37 years of experience. We specialize in data-driven services and take pride in our ability to tackle even the most difficult supply chain challenges. Our multi-warehouse fulfillment and assembly network, with facilities in California, Texas, New Jersey and Canada, ensures efficient and streamlined operations for our customers.

name: pH-D Feminine Health, LLC
description: At pH-D Feminine Health, we’re here to help you take control of your feminine wellness with products that are safe, science-backed, and thoughtfully designed to support your unique needs. We’re proud to offer the #1 doctor-recommended boric acid suppositories for vaginal odor alongside a complete line of products tailored to promote confidence and comfort. From daily freshness to menopause care, our mission is to provide effective solutions for every stage of life. Together, we’re empowering women to feel their best and breaking barriers to normalize feminine wellness conversations.

name: Pharma Tech Industries
description: Pharma Tech Industries (PTI) is redefining what fast, flexible, and scalable packaging looks like for natural, wellness, and nutrition brands.At Expo West 2026, we’re showcasing how PTI helps emerging and established brands get to market faster, scale smarter, and protect product integrity — without sacrificing quality or compliance.Why Visit PTI at Expo West?Natural products demand precision, speed, and adaptability. PTI delivers all three.We specialize in high-speed, GMP-compliant packaging solutions for powder-based products, including:Dry powder filling into bottles, jars, sachets, stick packs, and gusset bagsEffervescence manufacturing and packagingFlexible batch sizes designed to support brand growth from launch through scaleReliable turnaround times that keep pace with today’s fast-moving natural marketWhether you’re launching a new supplement, expanding a product line, or looking for a more responsive CDMO partner, PTI is built to move at your speed.What Makes PTI DifferentNimble by design – Fast decision-making, quick changeovers, and scalable capacityCommercially minded partnership – We think beyond packaging to help brands win in-marketProven quality & compliance – Robust GMP systems aligned with regulatory expectationsGrowth-focused mindset – From pilot runs to national rollouts, we grow with youWho Should Stop ByNatural & organic supplement brandsFunctional nutrition and wellness innovatorsBrands frustrated with slow, inflexible contract packagersTeams preparing for scale, reformulation, or line extensionsLet’s Talk GrowthStop by our booth, 4888 to meet the PTI team and learn how a high-speed, customer-first contract manufacturing partner can help you shorten timelines, reduce risk, and confidently scale your brand.PTI: Fast. Flexible. Built for Growth.

name: Pharmachem Innovations
description: For more than 45 years, the Pharmachem name has been synonymous with innovation in the nutraceuticals industry.  Our capabilities include a portfolio of clinically studied branded ingredients, innovative delivery systems, formulation, and custom manufacturing services. We’re known in the industry for being the “go to” company for innovative nutraceutical solutions. Our ingredients and formulas are sold around the world and have helped hundreds of customers grow their businesses, embodying our motto "We Make Ingredients Work!"

name: Phil's
description: Phil's was founded in 2024 to push sustainability in the personal care industry forward.  We believe the burden of sustainability and preservation of our planet's health should fall on the shoulders of the brand and not the consumer, so we created a brand with a revolutionary at-home compostable packaging that allows the consumer to use everyday personal care formulas that are effective and easy to use without compromise.  All formulas are clinically-proven and certified cruelty-free and in at-home compostable packaging that performs like plastic but breaks down in 52 weeks in natural environments - no fancy recycling or composting necessary.

name: Philippine Brand
description: Profood International Corporation is the largest Philippine-based dried mango producer and the standard bearer of world-class processed fruit products from the Philippine islands.Since its inception in 1980, Profood International Corporation has remained steadfast in its commitment to produce excellence.  This strict adherence to superior quality has earned recognition from industry partners worldwide.

name: Philosopher Foods
description: As a philosophy major at Haverford, I thought about how to solve the massive problems facing our planet and wrote my thesis on environmental ethics. As an activist, I engaged these problems through environmental non-profits. As a foodie, I experimented with sprouting to make food more delicious, nutritious, and digestible.In 2012, I made my first batch of sprouted almond butter. It was by far the most delicious almond butter I'd ever tasted! I shared some with my housemates, who told me: "dude, this is the best almond butter ever! You need to make this a business."I founded Philosopher Foods on Earth Day 2013 for two main reasons:To teach people about the delicious importance of sprouted food, andTo create an economic engine for regenerative organic farming, which promotes the health of all Life, not just the pursuit of financial profit.What started as the first Certified Cottage Food operation in our home kitchen in Davis, California, organically grew first to the back of a local restaurant, then to a commercial kitchen in Berkeley, and finally into our own production facility in Santa Cruz since 2015!

name: PHOENIX
description: PHOENIX is a sixth-generation, family-owned, packaging provider of injection molded plastic closures. Led by Co-Presidents, Alby and Giles Miller, PHOENIX has become a world leader in packaging innovation, providing closures and technologies across multiple markets for over 135 years.More than 150 patents and billions of packages later, the company stays ahead of industry changes and challenges. They continue to be future-focused by expanding into new markets, supporting unique customization options, and developing new technologies.PHOENIX has hundreds of stock plastic caps and an extensive staff of designers and engineers that can create a custom closure that will put the finishing touch on your brand’s packaging. They believe in building a partnership with their customers; To ensure they feel supported, PHOENIX has a technical services team and offers personalized customer service.

name: Phoenix Bean
description: Jenny's Tofu was born out of a deep love for tofu.  Owner Jenny Yang was born and raised in Taiwan, where tofu is a staple of everyday meals. She discovered Phoenix Bean, a local tofu supplier that reminded her of the comforting taste of home that she missed when she came to Chicago to earn a graduate degree.  When she realized her adopted Midwest home is the nation's largest soybean producer, she set out to change the way her friends and neighbors thought about this wholesome, sustainable protein source grown right in their own backyards.So, in 2006 Jenny acquired Phoenix Bean Tofu and created the Jenny's Tofu label. Since then, she has significantly expanded the line of tofu products, prepared salads, and soymilks, while remaining committed to the authenticity and artistry of handcrafted, small batch tofu made by a team of expert tofu makers. We now produce two types of soy milk, ten varieties of tofu, from extra soft to extra firm tofu, baked, fried, smoked, and noodles, and seven flavors of prepared tofu salads. Jenny has expanded the distribution of Jenny's Tofu to not only include her local community but nationwide with the help of Sprouts Farmers Market and Whole Foods Market.

name: PhoLicious LLC
description: Bringing Real Asian Flavor HomeAt PhoLicious, we’re redefining what instant meals can be. Our goal is simple — to bring you authentic, restaurant-quality Asian cuisine that’s fast, flavorful, and made with real ingredients you can feel good about.From our award-winning Pho to our Premium Ramen and bold new Pad Thai Stir-Fry Bowls, each dish is crafted with care and inspired by the flavors we grew up loving. Every bowl delivers real depth, comfort, and satisfaction, all ready in just minutes.We’re proud to be a Shark Tank brand built on passion, family, and flavor. PhoLicious isn’t just another instant meal, it’s a way to experience authentic Asian comfort food anytime, anywhere.Real flavor. Real ingredients. Real love, in every bowl.

name: PHUC THINH EXPORT IMPORT INVESTMENT CORPORATION
pi00a
description: Our journey began in August 2023, born out of a passion for great food and a deep commitment to social change. Our co-founder, Melody, has been perfecting the art of Neapolitan pizza since 2011 and previously owned a pizzeria in San Francisco with the same mission of creating job opportunities for the Deaf community. This experience laid the foundation for our current venture, ensuring that our pizzas not only taste exceptional but also serve a greater purpose.As a Deaf and CODA (Child of Deaf Adults) family-owned business, we specialize in crafting frozen traditional and Asian-inspired Neapolitan pizzas that tantalize the taste buds and warm the heart. Our pizzas are designed to deliver restaurant-quality flavor and are ready to enjoy in just 5-10 minutes, providing both convenience and gourmet taste.Our inspiration stems from a desire to make a tangible difference in the lives of the Deaf community. With 55% of the Deaf population facing unemployment or underemployment, we saw an urgent need for action. Our mission is to create not just job opportunities, but also pathways for career advancement and personal growth within the Deaf community.Every pizza we produce is a testament to our values of inclusivity, empowerment, and excellence. We take pride in offering delicious, high-quality products while championing the incredible talents and potential of Deaf individuals. Join us in savoring our unique pizzas and supporting a cause that truly matters.

name: Pickle Juice
description: A Mission Born from Necessity!In 2001, a groundbreaking solution to a persistent problem was born: Pickle Juice®. Unlike anything else on the market, our proprietary recipe was developed with a singular purpose in mind—to stop muscle cramps and prevent dehydration caused by intense heat and physical exertion. This mission stemmed from a deep understanding of the challenges faced by athletes, military personnel, workers in strenuous or hot environments, and anyone who suffers from debilitating night-time leg cramps.

name: Piggy Paint
description: Melanie Hurley started Piggy Paint when her daughters were 2 & 4 years old. She loved painting nails, but always worried about her girls putting their hands in their mouths after she painted their nails with other kid polishes. Plus, the strong smell left her with headaches. One day when they were painting nails over a foam plate, a glob of solvent-based polish dropped onto the plate. Shortly after, the polish began to bubble and "ate" through the plate. This got her concerned about the chemicals in "kid" polishes. She began looking for a safer alternative and couldn't find any. She was an elementary teacher with no business experience, but figured if she was looking for a Non-toxic, worry-free nail polish for her kids, then lots of other parents must be too. And drumroll please…Piggy Paint was born! Piggy Paint is Non-toxic & Odorless – plus, it's Cruelty-free & Vegan.  This Premium Water-Based formula dries Hard (& doesn't wash or peel off).  Enjoy a Rainbow of FUN colors that are free of ALL harsh, smelly chemicals!

name: Piko Provisions
description: Piko Provisions was founded in 2020 in Hawaiʻi, rooted in a deep love for our ʻohana and the desire to nourish future generations. As a sixth-generation farmer and a new dad, our founder sought to combine tradition and innovation to address a meaningful need: nutrient-dense baby foods made with local ingredients that honor Hawaiʻi's unique agricultural heritage.The options for baby food often lacked cultural connection, quality, and transparency. Inspired by the values of aloha ʻāina—love and respect for the land—and a vision for a more just and sustainable food system, Piko Provisions was born.Building on six generations of agricultural stewardship, our founder was driven to support Hawaiʻi's farming community by sourcing as many ingredients locally as possible. This not only uplifts local economies but also helps preserve traditional crops and farming practices. We believe that feeding keiki is about more than nutrition—it's about providing a connection to the land, culture, and the values of sustainability and equity.Today, Piko Provisions continues to grow, bringing wholesome, minimally processed baby foods to families near and far. We remain steadfast in our mission to craft products that celebrate the unique flavors of Hawaiʻi while prioritizing the health of our keiki, our communities, and our ʻāina. Our journey is a blend of tradition, innovation, and a commitment to building a better future for the next generation, one bite at a time.

name: Pioneer Pastures
description: We started Pioneer Pastures with a simple but urgent question:What if milk could do good again?As parents, we were shocked to learn what passes for "nutrition" in most schools. More than a billion cartons of chocolate milk are handed out each year, many packed with ingredients kids simply don't need. We later discovered the difference between A1 and A2 proteins, and how a genetic mutation in cows had quietly reshaped what ends up in our glass.Together, these discoveries opened our eyes: milk still had incredible potential. It just needed to be made right again.We set out to create milk that fuels daily life: cleaner, easier to digest, and genuinely nourishing.We wanted to build a dairy brand that fits naturally into real routines and keeps people steady through the day, whether they're growing kids, busy parents, athletes, or anyone who believes health should feel simple.We start with cows that naturally produce only the A2 protein. Then we use ultrafiltration to boost protein, reduce sugar, and remove lactose. And we keep things clean. No seed oils, no artificial sweeteners, no unnecessary additives.The result is more than just better milk. It's everyday fuel: simple, trusted nutrition that works with your body, not against it.

name: PIPCORN/PIP'S
description: Pipcorn Heirloom Snacks is a Better-For-You Salty Snacks brand elevating everyday snacks with its staple ingredient, heirloom corn, to deliver irresistibly great tasting snacks you can feel good about eating. Pipcorn offers 6 product lines, including Cheese Balls, Twists, Fries, Crunchies, Corn Dippers, and of course, Mini Popcorn. Our family of Pipcorn products include only 100% real, Non-GMO ingredients, and offer less fat and calories than traditional salty snacks.

name: PIRQ
description: Inspired by her mom's love for turmeric, founder Minal Bhakta created and launched an indulgent line of dairy-free shakes and powders that deliver plant protein with the amazing benefits of superfoods in a convenient and delicious way. Adding to our incredible line-up, we introduced electrolyte hydration mixes with the anti-inflammatory benefits of curcumin from turmeric with zero sugar.

name: Pisqueya
description: Pisqueya was born from purpose in 2019, inspired by my family's Dominican restaurant, the oldest in NYC. After a devastating fire in 2011 destroyed our only source of income, I sold my belongings—including my NYC apartment—to help rebuild. This moment sparked my mission: to reclaim and elevate Caribbean representation in the food world. With limited resources and bold determination, I launched Pisqueya—a clean-label brand of sauces and seasonings rooted in heritage, resilience, and sabor. Pisqueya is more than food; it's a cultural legacy carried forward with courage, creativity, and a deep love for our roots.

name: Pixie
description: In 2016, Amber English and Benjamin Moore, a brother-sister duo from midwest Missouri, founded Pixie Cup with a dream to end period poverty. Amber's global travels after graduate school opened her eyes to a universal struggle: women missing school and work due to lack of affordable period products. Even in regions with better access, the environmental toll of disposable products was staggering. Determined to make a difference, Amber teamed up with her business-savvy brother Benjamin to create a solution—menstrual cups that reduce waste to nearly zero and last up to 10 years. With proper care, they can be sanitized with just boiling water, making them accessible worldwide.Amber and Benjamin built Pixie Cup into a force for change, later expanding their vision with patented Pixie Discs featuring a trademarked "removes like a tampon"™ stem. Both cups and discs empower users with easy, sustainable alternatives to traditional products, replacing thousands of tampons and cutting down waste significantly. Through the Buy One Give One program, every cup sold means a cup donated to a woman in need, helping her live free from the constraints of period poverty. Partnering with leading nonprofits, Pixie Cup has distributed products globally, ensuring women and girls can thrive.Amber and Benjamin's heart to serve drives Pixie Cup's mission: empower others, give back, and live free. They're making sustainable period care a reality for all, one product at a time.

name: PKN
description: PKN Founder, Laura Shenkar, was working in Central Texas to preserve freshwater ecosystems and observed the economic struggles of pecan farmers. Pecan halves fetch a premium price, but farmers were seldom able to monetize leftover pecan pieces.With the launch of PKN non-dairy milks and creamers, we have created a new revenue stream for pecan farmers and created opportunity to support their transition to sustainable farming operations.  Alt-milk and traditional dairy consumers can now enjoy rich, delicious, real pecan milk products without adding to the environmental impact of other milks.

name: Placer.ai
description: Organizations rely on Placer to analyze consumer behavior, understand market trends, and optimize critical business decisions.

name: Planet Oat
description: HP Hood began testing oat milk in 2013, and launched the Planet Oat brand in 2018.

name: Plant Ahead
description: In 2022, we fell in love with plant based dairy alternatives. In essence they're perfect, a cruelty free and sustainable solution for today's food climate. And then, in 2022 (3 days later), after trying all the 'alternatives', we realized that although we stood with the values of the products, we couldn't quite get behind the taste. We questioned whether we could have both or if life was just an endless game of compromise - on our ethics or on our food. Could we create something that obliterated the compromise? Could we create something that added value and didn't just oversaturate an already overpopulated market? Could we innovate? Today, we know what we didn't in 2022, that the answer to all these questions is a resounding yes. We call ourselves Plant Ahead because we are ahead in every sense. Constantly expanding with new, never before seen products, exceeding expectations of taste and texture, all while being cruelty-free, sustainable and accessible to folks with a wide range of diets. Here's the deal: show us a brand that does all that and more and we'll rebrand to Plant In-line.

name: Plant People
description: It all started in 2017 when we went on a hike together. To our great surprise, both of us had experienced traumatic spinal surgeries. Even more surprising, both of us had used mushrooms, herbs and cannabis instead of pharmaceuticals as part of our post-surgery recoveries. Pharmaceuticals made us feel "off" with nasty side effects and, at times, be worse than the problem they were solving.So, we explored the beneficial effects of natural remedies. It became a joint passion – this is where we planted the seeds from which Plant People was born.

name: Plant Up
description: I moved to Canada a couple years ago from India, a country known for its rich cultural and culinary traditions. While I was pleasantly surprised to see how diverse Toronto was, I was also shocked to see the lack of diversity on the store shelves. Food is so much more than boring burgers and nuggets. Beyond nourishment, it connects us with each other, our cultures and histories. Thats when I started Plant Up, a company that celebrates global cultures through food and makes it convenient and affordable for people to practise a conscious and plant-forward lifestyle. We started sales in early 2023 and by mid 2024 we have reached 1,000 stores across Canada and are looking to make our way to US in 2025. At Expo we intend to launch our line of Frozen products and our line of high-protein, functional snacks.

name: Plantain Republic S.A
description: TROPICMAX is a 100% Ecuadorian brand that was created on May 4, 2005 as a result of a venture in 2003 by the partners and brothers Luis and Enrique Villacreses Sierra, in the city of New York where they began with the distribution of Exotic plantain Chips, they found a great opportunity to name their product and when they saw the growth of their sales, established the brand TROPICMAX thus initiating the story with only three products. As a factory, was founded on September 25, 2009 by brothers Luis and Enrique Villacreses with the objective of developing their own products and expand its international market, is a company dedicated to the processing and marketing of plantain products, committed to continuous improvement of its processes and activities, to meet the requirements of its customers and offer safe products according to the specified quality standards, within the current legal standards compatible with a responsible environmental management, a safe working environment. The company manufactures Exotic Plantain Chips 100% Natural, Gluten Free, Cholesterol Free, Saturated Fat Free, Non Genetically Modified, no artificial colors, no preservatives.

name: Planted Ventures, LLC featuring Tattooed Chef brand
description: Sprouted from decades of manufacturing expertise.A family business, Planted Ventures specializes in fully vertical frozen vegetable food manufacturing and co-packing with a heavy emphasis to grow and source the freshest produce in the market. We grow, source, innovate and manufacture all in-house, ensuring the quality and integrity of each product. Currently producing private-label commodity and value-added vegetable products for some of the biggest retailers in the world, Planted Ventures is also the new owner of the Tattooed Chef brand of products, offering unique, delicious, better-for-you foods, with an all-inclusive approach

name: PlantFusion
description: Phil Vigeant and Greg Cooper founded the PlantFusion Brand in 2009. Phil grew up in the natural products industry, working in his family owned and operated natural products store in New Jersey.  Greg, a 40-year veteran of the Natural Food Industry, began his career working the floors of his family's health food stores. They were two health "foodies" frustrated by their inability to find a simple protein shake that wasn't full of allergens (e.g. soy, gluten and dairy), empty fillers, or overly processed ingredients like whey protein. They wanted authentic, 100% plant-based, nutrient-dense, allergen-free products that delight the senses. Phil and Greg began traveling the world to find the cleanest farming practices, the best growing conditions, and the healthiest varieties of plants for our blends. Every transparent detail counts as they are intimately involved in selecting each ingredient and crafting every formula to deliver Complete Nourishment.  We understand intuitively that the right nutritional profile has the power to do more than fill us with calories, but make life more complete, balanced, and nourished. With breakthrough products and a growing awareness around what used to be obscure nutritional concerns, people began to take notice and PlantFusion was born.

name: Planture Inc
description: Planture Inc. delivers circular ingredient solutions across multiple markets, connecting ingredient producers with the food and pet food manufacturers across the globe.  We combine value-added concepts with dependable supply chain execution, ensuring you receive high-quality ingredients exactly where you want them and when you need them.Our portfolio includes plant-based sweeteners, starches, modified starches, proteins, and fibers. In addition to supporting your current formulations, we focus on the ingredients of the future, offering innovative solutions derived from crops such as algae, peas, and lentils to help drive next-generation product development.With a global sourcing network spanning over 100 countries, the Planture team brings in-depth market knowledge and regional expertise. We help customers navigate supply dynamics, diversify sourcing strategies, and secure reliable contract programs that create long-term stability and competitive advantage.Quality is central to everything we do. Fully certified and aligned with food and pet food production standards, we ensure every ingredient meets your specifications. Through strategically positioned inventory across the U.S., we provide just-in-time delivery to your facilities, backed by total care from origin to doorstep. Whether sourcing locally or from international partners, we manage the process to deliver the right product, with the right quality, on time.At Planture Inc., we are committed to building long-term partnerships by looking beyond simply supplying ingredients. We work alongside our customers to strengthen and streamline their supply chains, delivering plant-based ingredient solutions that support innovation, efficiency, and growth.

name: PLEZi
description: PLEZi was built for lips, but not for lip service. We're not here to say you need ingredients you don't or convince you that more is always better. We're here to deliver chuggable hydration, made harder working by ingredients that have a real purpose. We believe that we perform at our best when we're actually having fun, a stance shared by our co-founders, former First Lady Michelle Obama, four-time NBA Champion Stephen Curry, and culinary expert, Ayesha Curry. This belief is so central to who we are, it's literally in our name. PLEZi is hard-hitting hydration for high performers who grind with a grin. Who chase greatness with love for the game. Who bring hustle and humor to every rep, race, and run. Because joy works hard, but PLEZi works harder.

name: PLT Health Solutions
description: PLT Health Solutions is a discoverer, developer, and marketer of high-quality, scientifically-supported ingredient solutions for the natural products, and food & beverage markets. Our goal is to bring innovative and impactful solutions that help our consumer products customers develop new concepts, new products and grow successful brands. An important part of our ability to serve our customers is our network of global strategic partnerships. Our partners are some of the world’s most innovative people, and we help bring them and their companies to market via proprietary ingredient brands with the type of support services that are required by leading consumer products companies. This dual role of solution provider to health & wellness consumer companies and commercialization partner for international ingredient suppliers is one of the things that make us unique in the industry.

name: Pod Organics Pty Ltd
description: Pod Organics is inspired by nature and made with love. It's the result of a lifelong search for natural products that could truly nourish and nurture the most precious, sensitive skin while still feeling like the little touch of luxury we all love.Mother–daughter duo Kerrie and Lauren share over 25 years' experience in skincare, cosmetics and wellness. Pod Organics was born from their shared passion to make a real difference in the lives of Mums and for the environment.The brand began with one simple belief: every Mum deserves pure, honest skincare she can trust from pregnancy through postpartum and beyond. After discovering how many "natural" pregnancy and baby products still contained hidden toxins and harsh chemicals, Kerrie and Lauren set out to create something better, skincare that is truly safe, truly effective, and truly kind.Pod Organics is the culmination of a two-generation quest to find gentle, natural solutions that soothe, calm and care for sensitive skin conditions."Throughout my life, I have experienced several skin and health conditions and now my little ones have developed similar skin concerns. As a mum, I understand how important it is to know what you are putting in and on you and your baby."— Laurenin 2020, working alongside award-winning formulators, innovators and manufacturers, they spent their two years refining every idea, ingredient and formula. The result is a considered range that ticks all the boxes for new mums: safe, non-toxic, pure, natural, luxurious, multi-purpose and affordable.Every product is enriched with vitamins, antioxidants and Australian native botanicals to restore, protect and comfort even the most delicate skin. Each formula is 100% vegan, cruelty-free and made with integrity so you can feel confident that what you're using is pure and natural.Pod Organics is more than skincare. It's a community of mothers, experts and nurturers who believe in doing better for our bodies, our babies and our planet.

name: Polar Beverages, Inc.
description: In the early 1880s, in Worcester, Massachusetts, Dennis Crowley crafted what he considered to be the world's best-tasting bubble recipe. The savvy bartender thought these 'modern' carbonated beverages would help grow his burgeoning whiskey business. But then, as the Prohibition movement gained momentum in New England, Crowley fatefully decided to focus on his sparkling seltzer waters. Polar Seltzer remains owned and operated by the Crowley family four generations later. Polar Beverages Inc. is now the largest independent bottling company in the United States, comprised of their own family of brands – including Polar Seltzer, Adirondack, Clear & Sparkling, O Water and Frannie's – along with strong brand partnerships for bottling, private-label manufacturing and distribution for both regional and national brand partners. Today, Polar Beverages produces and distributes from three locations, Worcester, Massachusetts; Albany, New York; and Fitzgerald, Georgia.

name: Polk A Dot
description: We were founded during the covid lockdown in order to provide psychological and physical wellbeing to those in need during the difficult times faced universally during the pandemic.

name: POM Wonderful, LLC
description: POM Wonderful, the nation's largest pomegranate producer, controls the entire tree to bottle process to ensure POM Wonderful Pomegranate Juice and POM Tea are antioxidant-rich, all-natural and delicious.

name: Pomi' USA
description: Pomì is part of Consorzio Casalasco del Pomodoro,a cooperative of 800 farmers that cultivatesover 11,000 hectares between Cremona, Parma,Mantua and Piacenza, in Northern Italy.In 1984 Pomì made its way to tables in the United States, bringing the unique flavors the Italiansun gives to its crops.Today, Pomì is synonymous with Italian quality, controlled supply chain, traceability,and sustainability.

name: Pop and Bottle, Inc.
description: Pop & Bottle began with two great friends - Jash and Blair - who bonded over their love of coffee and endless quest to find coffee products that met their quality and health standards. Soon, they found themselves blending homemade almond milk and cold brew coffee in their own kitchens, and Pop & Bottle was born (founded in 2015). To this day, Jash and Blair remain committed to continually innovating coffee drinks that are free of dairy and refined sugar, made from simple whole foods, and taste better than you ever imagined.

name: Pop Daddy Snacks
description: Pop Daddy Snacks was started by Mark in his basement in Highland, Michigan in 2013. Mark began making popcorn after learning about the chemicals used in microwave popcorn and the disease "popcorn lung". He gave away his popcorn for free for two years before his wife and children encouraged him to sell it.

name: Poppy & Pout
description: We've been making our all-natural lip balms by hand in Idaho since 2014. We started with a formula inspired by nature, poured it by hand into the most beautiful tube we could dream up, and it's been true love ever since!

name: Pork King Good
description: Pork King Good was founded in 2018 by a woman who lost over 100 lbs by giving up sugar and carbs. As a pork rind consumer herself because of their natural lack of carbs, she was unimpressed with what existed on the market at the time and knew that she had an opportunity to reinvent the legacy snack to deliver all of the flavors of traditional potato chips, without the carbs!Since then, Pork King Good has become the category leader for dollar and sales unit growth with their 16 flavors of award-winning, gluten free, melt-in-your-mouth chicharrones. But the pork buck doesn't stop there! The brand continued to break barriers with their best-selling Pork Rind Crumbs, a zero carb and gluten free substitute for traditional breadcrumbs and panko, not to mention their brand new frozen  Chicken Puggets, a first-of-their-kind Pork Rind Breaded Premium White Meat Chicken Nugget!Through relentless innovation, Pork King Good has redefined the role of pork rinds in the CPG industry and has shattered category limitations, transforming a well-known snack into a versatile ingredient that crosses multiple grocery store aisles.

name: PORTA
description: PORTA was founded in 2021 by Cosimo Mammoliti who was raised by Italian immigrants who fled war-torn Italy looking for a better life in Canada.When coming to Canada, one thing they couldn't leave behind was the comforting food and the unique traditions centred around the kitchen table in Italy. Cosi and his family have shared these traditions at his twelve restaurants, bakeries and shops across North America, presenting his unique approach to Italian dining to millions of satisfied loyal customers.But he wanted to get this quality of food into more homes, so, his next adventure is to take the food he loves and share it more broadly as a delivery and CPG business. What was once only found in tucked-away restaurants is now more broadly available to everyone.PORTA uses the highest quality ingredients, combined with time-honoured techniques to make delicious pizza, pasta, risotto, dessert and pastries. Our dishes are handmade by chefs, who flash freeze the food to protect its rich flavours and make it easy for you to store.

name: Portland Bee Balm
description: Portland Bee Balm is an independent all-natural lip balm company that started in 2011 in Brad's garage with wax from his backyard beehives.  He began making lip balms for his wife and friends, then began approaching Portland-area stores to help expand his reach to other natural enthusiasts.  14 years later, we've now become a national brand, but we've never lost site of our craft and our customers. Our core values have been a driving force for the work we do and how we want to operate daily. We have asked questions, listened to feedback, and have always been open to better ways of doing business. We source our ingredients and packaging locally and form lasting relationships with suppliers we trust. We have taken this same long-term, holistic approach in building our team and culture. Each team member is essential to achieving the goals we share.  Today, we are expanding beyond lip balm into other body care products.  We can't wait to show you what's next!

name: Portland Pet Food Company
description: Portland Pet Food Company (PPFC) was founded by Katie McCarron in 2014 for her family's senior Standard Poodle, Rosie, who struggled with eating and was ailing. Katie began cooking fresh, human-grade meals with 11 simple ingredients, and Rosie lived another 2½ years to age 16. PPFC manufactures human-grade, shelf-stable pet meals and dog biscuits in the United States made with 11 or fewer ingredients that are all sourced & grown in the US. Over the past 10 years, PPFC has grown to be available in over 5,500 retail locations in 4 countries.

name: POSHI
description: Founded in 2020, we are a leading innovator company committed to providing all-natural snacks and ingredients to customers across retail, food service, and e-commerce. Our diverse portfolio features 100% shelf-stable, steamed, and marinated premium vegetables, seamlessly blending taste, quality, and convenience for everyday life — offering a lifestyle choice for those who value their time and health without compromising on taste.

name: Possmei International Co., Ltd.
description: Popping Jacky was born in 2025 from the passion and innovation of Possmei, a leading expert in bubble tea ingredients since its founding. With years of experience supplying premium tea, fruit syrups, pearls, and toppings to shops around the world, Possmei took the next step — bringing the bubble tea experience straight to the hands of everyday consumers.Inspired by the Possmei founder's original vision to share Taiwan's bubble tea culture with the world, Popping Jacky represents a bold new chapter: a ready-to-drink bubble tea-style beverage that's bursting with flavor, fun, and convenience.Unlike traditional bubble tea made fresh in stores, Popping Jacky offers a unique way to enjoy the signature combination of tea, juice, and popping boba — anytime, anywhere. It's crafted without preservatives, with fewer additives, and packed with the refreshing taste people love.Popping Jacky isn't just a drink — it's a joyful reminder that good taste and fun should be within reach for everyone.

name: Pratt Industries - Sustainable Corrugated Packaging Solutions
description: At Pratt Industries, we understand that for snack and beverage brands, every step of the supply chain is critical. That’s why we don’t just supply boxes. We deliver sustainable corrugated packaging solutions customized to protect, ship and display your products while streamlining your operations. Recognizing that your packaging is also a vital touchpoint for your customers, we also use our exceptional print capabilities to create high-graphic, retail-ready solutions that act as an extension of your to drive impulse buys on the shelf and in the aisle.We understand the unique needs of natural products producers, from high-volume beverage runs to seasonal snack launches, and the increasing focus on achieving meaningful sustainability goals. As the world’s largest privately-held 100% recycled paper and packaging company, we are able to help you meet these goals by offering custom recovery programs that create a circular journey for your packaging. Our vertically Integrated network, spanning from our six recycled paper mills to our box plants and recycling centers, ensures a stable supply chain and partner who genuinely understands your business from production to retail. Work with a partner dedicated to your process, bottom line and sustainable future. To learn more, visit the links below.

name: Precious Cat Inc.
description: Dr. Bruce Elsey is a Feline-Only Veterinarian whose Denver area "Cat Clinic" sees about 8,000 cats every year.  Dr. Elsey, along with his wife Kathy, founded the company in 1987 with a vision to help support pets and people in need.Inappropriate elimination is the number one behavioral reason cats are abused and surrendered to shelters. Dr. Elsey's goal is to help keep cats in their homes and using the litter box. Dr. Elsey provides shelter kits and thousands of pallets of free litter to shelters and rescue groups across the country free of charge. When Dr. Elsey's wife and co-founder Kathy Elsey was diagnosed with multiple myeloma, the Elseys chose to utilize their corporate success to benefit a philanthropic cause: a commitment to cure human cancer.  Dr. Elsey's Fund to Cure Cancer in support of the Multiple Myeloma Research Foundation (MMRF) has provided more than $15 million dollars in funding since inception.

name: Preferred Brands Int'l
description: We know our customers have adventurous palates, but they also care about what they put into their bodies. We care deeply about that, too, which is why for over 30 years we use authentic Indian recipes to make our entrees with real ingredients like cumin, turmeric, ginger, legumes and hearty vegetables. Every Tasty Bite product is all-natural and/or 100% organic, and Non-GMO Certified.

name: Prepara
description: We are a design-driven kitchenware brand on a mission to make cooking smarter, faster, and more enjoyable. Born in 2007 from a team of product designers, engineers, and food lovers, we're obsessed with rethinking everyday kitchen tools—not just to look better, but to work better.

name: PRES
description: PRÉS was born to fill the gap for those craving a ready-made solution that blends exceptional coffee-forward taste, real functionality, and thoughtful design.PRÉS is the first-ever cold brew + protein RTD clean label natural beverage Inspired by consumers hacking their coffee with protein, PRÉS delivers what they've been missing-real coffee, high-quality protein, and a cleaner alternative at a time when people are seeking to avoid overly processed options.PRÉS is:Specialty Coffee: Made with Real Cold Brew & 100% Arabica Coffee BeansIncludes 20 grams of Complete ProteinOnly 1 gram of Sugar - a Hint of Natural Sweetness.  No sucralose & no erythritolClean Label - Non-GMO formula with Natural Flavors.  No artificial sweeteners or carrageenan.120-150mg of Caffeine - Providing the same boost as 1.2 - 1.5 cups of cold brew coffee100 Calories - Maximizing Flavor and Function without "empty" CaloriesTastes Great - Rich, Bold, & SmoothSimply Pure - No gluten, no soy, no nuts, & no seed oilsShelf Stable - Easy to stock, reduces waste, and ensures there's always a fresh, ready-to-go optionConvenient Ready-to-Drink Shelf Stable Recyclable Carton Bottle with Reusable Twist Cap

name: Pressed
description: Like our products, our roots are simple. Our story begins with three friends, who loved to travel and explore the world, bonded over a shared belief that fundamental nutrition is the cornerstone of health and wellness. A vibrant, healthy lifestyle begins with real, nutrient-rich food.These friends soon came to the realization that access to quality nutrition is often limited. How could others enjoy the benefits of wholesome ingredients in a world of overly processed foods? The answer was obvious. Pave the way for plant-forward living by making real, healthy food accessible to everyone. This would be our ongoing mission.Pressed began in 2010. Our company started small — really small. Our first location was a 25 square-foot "juice closet" in Los Angeles. Soon we included a food truck in Malibu. But it wasn't long before our vitamin-rich blends caught on and our mission gained momentum.Today, Pressed continues to grow with stores throughout the US along with online and wholesale distribution. You may also notice that our name has evolved from "Pressed Juicery" to simply "Pressed." That's because we are also evolving. Now in addition to our signature cold-pressed juices, we offer an array of wholesome plant-based foods to keep you nourished throughout the day. It's all part of our ongoing mission to make plant-forward living as convenient and delicious as possible.

name: Prestige Maple Products Inc.
description: At the begining, we were doing only maple syrup in bulk. In 2018,  we had a request from one of our customer to produce bottle of maple syrup for him, so we began with a small line to do few pallet, few truck load. We added a sales representant to our team and after that addition, international market was our objective. And we did it, now we export in more than 48 countries around the world. We are proud of what we did in 6 years.

name: PrestoLabels & Packaging
description: Prestolabels.com is a short - medium high quality label manufacturer.  Benefits include 100 label minimum, NO plate charges, NO die charges (no matter shape or size) and instant online quoting.  We utilize durable UV inks and offer one of the most competitive high quality label products in the market.  Again, NO plate and NO die charges! Call us today to make your product stand out and more cost effective!

name: Pretium Packaging
description: Alpha Packaging manufactures high-quality PET, HDPE and NatureWorks PLA bottles and jars for the pharmaceutical, nutritional, personal care and niche food and beverage markets, as well as plastic bottles with up to 100% post-consumer content.

name: Pretty Tasty Tea
description: Established in 2023, Pretty Tasty Tea blossomed from a shared vision of redefining beauty and wellness. Founded by a team of passionate CPG veterans, our journey began with a simple yet profound idea: to bridge the gap between the beauty and functional beverage industries. Fueled by a desire to empower women aged 18 and above who cherish their skincare and beauty rituals, we set out to create a product that marries indulgence with purpose. Our slim iridescent cans house refreshing Raspberry and Peach Teas, each enriched with 10 grams of purified collagen peptides. This infusion is our ode to the natural essence of beauty, an elixir that radiates from within. Pretty Tasty Tea is more than a product; it's a celebration of confidence, vitality, and the journey towards self-love. Join us as we embark on this exciting adventure, shaping a future where beauty is an inside-out affair.

name: Prime Safety US Inc
description: At Halt, we are dedicated to shaping the future of fire safety with visionary solutions that anticipate and meet the evolving needs of our global community. Our growth plan is centered on continuous innovation, expanding into new markets, and enhancing our product range to include the latest advancements in fire suppression technology. By investing in sustainable practices and comprehensive safety education, we aim to not only protect lives and properties but also to lead the charge towards a safer, more secure future

name: Primex Group of Companies Philippines
description: Primex Coco Product produces desiccated coconut(fine, medium, extra fine, chips, shred, flakes, toasted DC, sweetened toasted dc, and sweetened dc)and coconut milk powder. Prime Xynergies Food Corp produces banana chips while our New Davao Oil Mill produces coconut oil. We have organic and non-organic products and our plant facilities are located in Candelaria Quezon and Davao Del Sur.

name: Prinova US
description: Your single source for functional and branded ingredients, sports nutrition  manufacturing solutions and customized product development services.Backed by an immense product portfolio of ingredients, deep technical expertise, integrated global manufacturing solutions and cutting-edge product development services, Prinova is the experienced partner you need.

name: Priority Plastics
description: Denver based manufacturer of both HDPE canisters and clear plastic food grade PET jars. Priority Plastics is committed to sustainability standards by light-weighting our products, employing multi-layer technology and using recyclable resins. Over 350 stock itemsSizes from 12 ounces to 1 gallonSnap lids and threaded closures, including tamper evident caps. Custom tooling available.

name: ProAmpac
description: At ProAmpac, our culture is key to our long-term success. We strive to be authentic as we live out the heritage of our small business culture. We value the connections we've created, and our employees feel empowered in their shared efforts to innovate successfully. ProAmpac was founded in 2015 on the idea that a focus on material science will drive innovative and sustainable solutions for our customers, supported by our five core values – Integrity, Intensity, Innovation, Involvement, Impact –  that foster a culture of speed, simplicity, and self-confidence.

name: Probiotical
description: Probiotical was founded in 1985 and has been driving innovation in the probiotics industry ever since. A sister company of ALCE Microbiologic Laboratory, the Italian leader in lactic acid bacteria for the dairy sector, Probiotical operates the first facility worldwide dedicated exclusively to the production of probiotic microorganisms for the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries.Positioned at the high end of the market, Probiotical partners with leading global pharmaceutical and nutraceutical companies.We offer a broad portfolio of scientifically documented probiotic strains as allergen-free, lyophilized, and microencapsulated raw materials. In addition, we develop finished probiotic food supplements with guaranteed stability and efficacy throughout the entire shelf life.Our finished products are available under our own brands or as private label solutions, covering more than 20 health functionalities.With a global presence, Probiotical is the partner of choice for companies seeking high-quality, customized, safe, and stable probiotic solutions with proven efficacy.www.probiotical.com

name: Prodeca SA
description: State-owned company created in 1986 as part of the Regional Ministry of Climate Action, Food and Rural Agenda (Regional Government of Catalonia). According to the Articles of Association, "the aim of the company is to promote Catalan agri-food and forestry products in Catalonia and the rest of Spain, and support the exportation of those products to markets with a demand; exportation, promotion and support for campaigns to standardise these products and, in general, all measures directly or indirectly related to the stated purposes, as well as the provision of technical, accounting and economic services to agricultural companies, both in the productive sector and in the agri-food and forestry industry."(AGREEMENT GOV/144/2015 of 1 September 2015 authorising amendment of the PRODECA Articles of Association and approving the full text)Since Prodeca was set up, the Catalan agri-food sector has opened up hugely (over 1,200% in the last 30 years), partly due to international factors such as joining the European Union, globalisation and the capacity for innovation and entrepreneurship in the sector, but also because of Prodeca, which is the only agency of its kind in the whole of Spain.

name: Productos Sane de Chapala
description: SANE Foods was born from a family tradition sparked by the founder's wife, who created a bold and flavorful sangrita to pair with tequila. What started as a homemade recipe grew into a passion for crafting innovative, high-quality food products. Today, we honor those roots by developing and co-packing premium sauces, dips, and mixers with creativity, care, and purpose — helping brands bring unforgettable flavors to life.

name: Proliant Health and Biologicals
description: ImmunoLin, the world’s first serum derived bovine immunoglobulin, is backed by more than 45 human clinical studies-arguably the most clinically backed raw ingredient you will see while attending Expo West. Previously only available by prescription as a medical food indicated for the nutritional dietary management of patients with IBS-D and HIV-Enteropathy, its safety is second to none as noted by its certified GRAS status from the FDA, along with no adverse events reported by consumers or clinical trial patients since its launch in 2013. ImmunoLin also has no food or drug interactions making it safe to blend with other raw ingredients for new products as well as adding it to other supplement or food products.

name: Promise Gluten Free
description: Promise Gluten Free was launched in April 2019 and is now the most loved brand by consumers across all markets.  Our delicious Gluten Free range was born out of our passion to bring the best of bakery for everyone to enjoy. We live up to our Promise of baking the most delicious and nutritious Gluten Free breads. Our craft bakers have perfected Gluten Free baking, bringing you the simple pleasure of soft, tasty nutritious breads, oozing with freshness, that are also high in fibre, low in fat and sugar.

name: Promised Land Dairy
description: Promised Land® Dairy was founded in 1987 on a small farm in Floresville, TX. Today, though we've grown, we're proud to uphold the same trusted values and traditions. We continue to produce the richest, creamiest milk sourced from farms with high standards of cow care and humane treatment.

name: PROMIXX Inc
description: Embarking on a journey of transformation, we set out to revolutionize the mixer and shaker bottle landscape in 2012, by turning inefficiency into remarkable solutions.It all started when PROMiXX founder, Joe Faulkner-Edwards – seasoned athlete and health and fitness journalist – learned how nutrition impacts performance. Not only on the track, but in everyday life too.But Joe did more than empathize with customer dissatisfaction, he made it his mission to fix it. Because a premium solution to preparing and mixing supplements was needed to help build healthy habits and create lasting change.Tackling the problem head on, he analyzed where industry-standard products were failing, and developed a better solution. It wasn't easy and didn't happen overnight but once he made his discovery, it was surprising that no one else had thought of it before.Our Vortex Mixing Technology was born and became a literal gamechanger.But that was merely the start. What other aspects could be analyzed, overhauled and improved? Joe brought on designer Matt Blofeld and before long, PROMiXX was reaching new heights.Thanks to their considered design, beautiful aesthetic and premium functionality, our shaker bottles and mixers allowed more people to optimize their health and performance. All thanks to better experiences with the food and health supplements in their daily routine.With further research, we soon realized there were other areas that were underserving customers. Sparking our desire to improve and excel. Which is why we're always looking ahead, constantly searching for new ways to refine and innovate. For us, good enough isn't good enough.Through methodical thinking and a passion for excellence, we've redefined what it means to mix and shake with efficiency and style.

name: Pronativ
description: Founded 2021, our pursuit of cleaner protein began. We couldn't help but notice that most protein products seemed to contain a lot of nasty stuff, like fillers, artificial ingredients, colorants, dyes, and more. We also knew that a lot of protein powders were made by using harsh heat and chemical-extraction processes. And who wants to put that into their body? We knew from our background and expertise in the dairy industry that not all products are created equal. So, we asked ourselves: why isn't there a truly clean protein powder out there for people who care about what they put in their bodies? We knew there had to be a better way to create a clean, simple, and effective protein powder that could fuel any kind of performance needs, didn't cut corners or compromise on quality, and had data and science to back it up. So, we got to work. Lucky for us, we weren't starting from scratch. Our parent company, Lactalis American Group, has been creating high quality dairy proteins for more than 20 years, including beloved brands like siggi's, Stonyfield Organic, and more. And for just as long, it has been pioneering the development of native whey protein. Through our work, we figured out how to capture the essence of the protein by sourcing it directly from farm-fresh milk. Then we used our proprietary cold-filtration process to create a protein powder without the use of any damaging chemicals or heat. And that's how we came together to create UP2U with a line of clean protein products for people who care about what goes into their bodies.

name: Proper Good inc.
description: Proper Good was founded in 2020 by sibling duo Christopher and Jennifer Jane with a simple mission: to create higher-quality, affordable ready meals. At the time, the shelf-stable aisle was filled with outdated canned options lacking in flavor, texture, and modern nutrition. So, Proper Good launched with four soups sold direct-to-consumer - and quickly expanded into a full range of meal occasions.After a successful appearance on Shark Tank, the team kicked off a national retail rollout featuring shelf-stable meals for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Every Proper Good meal is made in the USA, and the company is proudly headquartered in Austin, TX.To date, we've donated tens of thousands of meals to food banks, and sold millions of meals both online and in major retailers. Our goal? To lead the next generation of shelf-stable meals - with quality, convenience, and care at the core.

name: Proper Syrup
description: Our brand came to life in 2021 and began because we saw a need for a higher quality and beautiful coffee syrup option.

name: Proper Wild, Inc.
description: We're a team of engineers, designers, athletes and foodies based in New York City that really care about what we put into our bodies. That's why all Proper Wild products are made with clean plant-based ingredients. We hate the preservatives and artificial sweeteners that you find in other stuff!

name: ProTab Laboratories, Inc.
description: ProTab Laboratories offers complete all-in-one manufacturing services adhering to all (GMP) standards beginning with technical support to finished product. We will meet or exceed your product specifications for all tablet, capsule, & powder formulations.

name: PROTEIN CANDY
description: You love candy. But let’s be honest, your old candy doesn’t love you back.We’re on a mission to change that. In 2021 we started our mission to bring protein to the candy aisle. After years of recipe testing we created a candy with the flavors you love and the fuel you need.Protein Candy is the first candy to help you snack strong. We dropped the sugar, kept the flavor, and added 14g of protein to each bag. Your snack game has never been stronger.

name: Protein Now!
description: The way people live has changed.Days move faster. Schedules are packed. Nutrition has to work harder to keep up. Yet as life accelerates, the importance of protein has never been clearer. It supports strength, energy, metabolic health, and how people feel day to day. With evolving diets, increased health awareness, and the rise of GLP-1 medications, protein is no longer optional. It is essential.The problem is not knowing protein matters.The problem is fitting it into real life.Shakes take time. Powders require prep. Refrigeration and cleanup get in the way. Too often, protein becomes something people plan to do later and later never comes.Protein Now! was created to change that.Built for modern routines, Protein Now! reimagines how protein fits into everyday life. Each shot delivers 21 grams of clean, easy-to-digest protein with zero sugar, zero fat, and less than one carb. No mixing. No refrigeration. No interruption. Just protein, exactly when you need it, so you can keep moving.Today's world is more compact, more mobile, and constantly in motion. Protein Now! was designed to match that reality. Whether it is a busy morning, a long workday, travel, or everything in between, Protein Now! makes consistency simple.This brand is not about shortcuts or trends. It is about raising the standard for how protein is delivered and consumed. Clean formulas. Smart simplicity. Nutrition that works with real life, not against it.Protein Now! exists so protein is no longer something you have to think about.It is just something you do.

name: Protein Pints
description: From childhood friends to founders, Paul and Mike always knew they wanted to create something together. Driven by a shared passion for fitness, nutrition, and the desire to eat ice cream every day like when they were kids, they combined the best of both worlds to create Protein Pints: a delicious, protein ice cream.Together they embarked on a journey to create a product that would satisfy their cravings without compromising their health goals. Ice Cream with protein-packed nutrition, natural ingredients, low in sugar, and an unbeatable taste. Following countless hours of research, development, and collegiate pitch competitions, Protein Pints was perfected and ready to be shared with the world in five delicious flavors.Our mission is simple: We are helping people enjoy their protein. We want to provide everyone from athletes to everyday health-conscious individuals with a dessert that not only tastes amazing but also supports their nutritional goals. Today, Protein Pints is redefining what it means to enjoy functional ice cream, guilt free, and they're just getting started.

name: Protein2o
description: Protein2o has built its legacy on refreshing the way you recover, but we’re no longer just the world’s leading clear protein water—we’re the future of functional fueling. This year, we are proud to introduce P2X – Advanced Hydration and Performance Fuel, our elite line of products engineered specifically for those who push their limits further and demand more from their protein drinks. By bridging the gap between everyday wellness and high-intensity performance, Protein2o now offers a comprehensive ecosystem of products designed for every stage of your journey. From our signature lower-calorie clear whey protein isolate drinks to the cutting-edge, high-octane science of the P2X line, we are committed to providing clean, innovative, and effective fuel that helps you go beyond your personal best.

name: PSA (The Agave Sweetener Company)
description: We are the sweet arm of Grupo PSA — specialists in the production and distribution of premium organic agave sweeteners.We are 100% vertically integrated, from our own blue agave fields to the production and global distribution of the highest-quality agave products. This allows us to ensure full traceability, consistency, and excellence at every step of the process.Our signature brand, More Agave, is a farm-to-table, vegan agave syrup enriched with naturally occurring prebiotic fiber, created to support better choices in a healthier lifestyle.Feel confident in every drop, knowing you are choosing pure, unaltered ingredients — sustainably crafted and bottled at the source in Mexico, where agave has been cultivated for 5 generations.

name: PT Organics Ltd
description: Perfect parents? Rare as pumpkin trees! We're all making it up as we go, which is why we are big fans of Wholesome Hacks. Whether it's our handy snacks or our parenting tips & tricks – we've got your back. Just ask our furry friend, Peter Rabbit! Our snacks are made just the way they should be, from real, organic food with absolutely no nasties.  They are additive-free and of course, toddler-approved.

name: Pulmuone, Nasoya, Wildwood
description: Pulmuone was founded in 1981 by farmer Won Kyung as a local produce shop in South Korea. Mr. Won believed in the profound harmony of nature, people, and the food we eat – thoughtfully grown to nourish and honor the richness of our planet and community. With that commitment, Pulmuone continues to innovate, drawing from our authentic, Asian heritage and contemporary palates to bring you delicious food you can feel proud to serve your family.

name: PuraVida Foods Inc.
description: PuraVida™ is where flavor meets innovation.** We combine chef-crafted recipes, fire roasting, and our proprietary Cryo Crafted™ freezing method to create craveable, nutrient-rich foods that are better for you and better for the planet—without sacrificing taste or convenience.From our first sold-out launch to nationwide shelves, we’ve stayed true to one belief: food can be clean, globally inspired, ethically sourced, and absolutely delicious. Our minimally processed creations are trend-forward, easy to prepare, and made with vibrant, all-natural ingredients so you can feel proud serving them to family and friends.

name: Pure Anatolia LLC
description: Pure Anatolia was created to share the rich flavors and natural abundance of the Anatolian region with the world. With deep agricultural roots and a passion for clean, traceable ingredients, we work alongside over 1,000 dedicated farmers to craft organic and natural products that are honest, nourishing, and sustainably made. From dried fruits and juices to pulses and frozen vegetables, everything we offer reflects our commitment to quality, transparency, and care. From nature, with love.

name: Pure Food by Estée
description: In 2015, Estee Kafra, celebrity baker and cookbook author established Pure Food by Estee because her followers were telling her that they did not have access to better for you, allergy free baking ingredients. She set out on a mission to provide every baker with the choice to use healthier ingredients and the firm belief that pure ingredients help bakers create magic in the kitchen.

name: Pure Ground Ingredients
description: What started with family tea business in 1980 has now transformed into organic ingredient supplier since 1999. We are a U.S.-based spice and ingredient manufacturer specializing in custom blends, milling, and food safety–driven processing. From whole spices to finished blends, we partner with brands to create long term value with true value and true integrity.

name: Pure Indian Foods
description: Husband and wife team, Sandeep and Nalini Agarwal, founded Pure Indian Foods in the U.S. in 2008, yet the family ghee-making business stretches back all the way to 1889. Today, Pure Indian Foods features a diverse selection of curated, ethically-sourced organic Indian & Asian grocery products. Their product lines include grassfed organic ghee, organic spices and herbs, curry sauces, condiments, cold-pressed virgin oils, personal care items, and an ever-growing selection of Ayurvedic products.

name: Pure Ocean
description: Pure Ocean Balance is pleased to debut its first product line at Natural Products Expo West! Visit us in The Arena, Booth 106.Sustainably sourced from the pristine waters of the Norwegian Sea, Pure Ocean Balance is building a single‑origin mineral platform that transforms bitterns—the concentrated solution remaining after sea salt crystallization—into clean, highly absorbable supplements for women 50+.In 2012, Oregon‑born founder Michal Bietz moved with her Norwegian husband and their children to Gossen, an island off Norway’s west coast that his family has called home for generations. Inspired by the purity of the ocean and the tidal rhythms that shaped their days, she began making sea salt in her kitchen. Early batches quickly caught the attention of local chefs, leading her to found a modern saltworks and revive Norway’s long‑dormant salt‑making industry. Since 2014, the company has supplied one of the world’s finest sea salts—supported by Certificates of Analysis—to retailers, artisan producers, and Michelin‑starred chefs across Europe and the United States, earning a reputation for purity, traceability, and consistency.Today, that saltworks underpins a scalable, single‑origin mineral platform. In collaboration with scientists at the University of Palermo, Pure Ocean Balance has developed a process to recover and refine magnesium, potassium, and calcium from these bitterns, producing ultra-pure, cGMP‑manufactured, third‑party tested supplements: gentle, highly absorbable magnesium and pure electrolytes with no fillers, sugar, flavors, or sweeteners; labels that you don’t have to decode. Each product features transparent labeling and scannable Certificates of Analysis published quarterly.Michal is building a company grounded in focus, purpose, and balance—with time to enjoy this phase of her life. When she’s not in the lab, she’s often in nature or in the kitchen, surrounded by good food, family, and friends.

name: Purearth Supplies Inc.
description: Purearth Supplies provides premium organic fruit powders, mushroom powders, and botanical extracts to food and beverage brands across the U.S. With local CA inventory, flexible small-batch supply, and a focus on clean-label and functional ingredients, we help brands create high-quality, innovative, and natural products.

name: Puredia
description: Orofill™, your trusted companion for women's health and beauty by the Hugh Group. With 30 years of expertise, we understand the unique and evolving needs of women, so we continuously strive to develop products that offer personalized solutions and have remained dedicated to creating the next generation of anti-aging products while emphasizing natural body wellness.

name: Purely Elizabeth
description: Purely Elizabeth is committed to making the most delicious foods using the highest-quality natural and organic ingredients -just simple, pure and nutrient-rich. We offer a variety of good-for-you baking mixes and ancient grain granolas sweetened with coconut sugar.  We will be introducing new skus at Expo West. Products are certified vegan, certified gluten free, free of refined sugar and NON-GMO certified. Meet us @ www.purelyelizabeth.com

name: PureWine Inc
description: PureWine Inc. is a privately held company founded in 2014 by a father and son team, Dr. David Meadows and his son Derek.Both father and son suffered from wine headaches and experienced allergic reactions to red, white, rosé and sparkling wines.But, like true scientists, they didn't suffer in silence — they set out to understand the problem and to solve it. Together, father and son spent two years in the laboratory looking for a solution to the side effects of wine. The 'Eureka moment' came one day in the lab when David and Derek found the precise means to selectively remove histamines and sulfites without otherwise changing the chemistry of wine."We could see that our filtration was working, but when we tried that big, bold Cab and it was every bit as delicious as it was in the tasting room in Napa, we knew we had it," says David."That's when we toasted each other – To Your Health! – and that's our motto today at PureWine," adds Derek. In 2016, the duo launched the first PureWine product, The Wand™, for a glass of wine, followed in mid-2018 by The Wave™ for a bottle of wine.

name: Purity Coffee
description: Purity Coffee is a leading brand in health-focused specialty coffee, dedicated to producing the highest quality, lab-tested organic coffees optimized for human health. Every step of our process—from sourcing and roasting to packaging—is driven by science and designed to maximize antioxidant levels, minimize harmful compounds like mold and mycotoxins, and support overall wellness.Our lineup includes whole bean and ground coffees, single-serve sachets, cold brew, and 5 lb bags, all crafted to deliver exceptional flavor alongside meaningful health benefits. With third-party testing, regenerative organic sourcing, and an unwavering commitment to quality, Purity Coffee offers a new standard for what coffee should be.

name: PurSustenance LLC , Doing Biz as Smart People Fuel
description: As a MD, Professor, Cherry Farmer, and Athlete I employ my unique skill set to positively impact the Health & Performance of People, Small Farm Ecosystems & Our Planet.Smart People Fuel  scientifically curates Tart Cherry, Beet, Matcha, & Maple Super-Foods, supporting People's ability to Focus, Feel & Perform their best! By design, our drink concentrates use 94% less plastic & carbon than plastic bottled beverages minimizing our impact on mother earth.
