Real Food taste & versatility curated in science, yielding enduring results.

name: PWR^UP
description: PWR-UP is building the next-generation functional indulgence platform — a novel collagen protein innovation engineered to replace high-sugar snacks, shakes, energy drinks, protein bars, baked goods, spreads, and dips with one superior solution.We are not entering a category. We are collapsing multiple categories into one scalable platform.PWR-UP sits at the intersection of protein, energy, hydration, and ingestible beauty — four of the fastest-growing sectors in consumer health — and delivers them in a single, versatile format consumers instantly understand. The most common reaction from buyers and consumers alike:“This should have always existed.”

name: Pyure
description: Established in 2008, Pyure is the fastest-growing independent organic sweetener company in the U.S. and a leader in sugar reduction innovation. Through years of innovation, Pyure has evolved from a stevia brand to a pioneer of the sugar-free revolution. Pyure has listened to our customers and purposefully released products that they've wanted from us. From stevia blends, to breakfast syrups, hazelnut spread, and most recently our Brownie and Cookie Mix.

name: Q Mixers
description: We're called Q because we questioned why the mixer wasn't as good as the spirit. It took one lackluster gin and tonic that was ruined by flat, sweet, aritificial tonic, for our found Jordan to create the answer. The solution is simple. We use premium ingredients, a hint of sweetness and max carbonation. Your favorite spirit deserves Q.

name: QAD Redzone
description: QAD Redzone is the #1 connected workforce solution in manufacturing enabling frontline teams to achieve company goals around productivity, quality, throughput and engagement. Redzone is helping more than 1500 plants worldwide achieve remarkable productivity improvements in just 90 days. Unlock the power of your frontline teams and win more shifts.

name: Qimei Organic
description: Qimei Organic Farms is a vertically integrated supplier of organic and conventional botanical and plant-based ingredients for food, dietary supplement, nutraceutical, and pet nutrition brands.We own and operate our farms and processing facilities, providing full traceability from cultivation to finished ingredient. Our ingredients are produced with consistent specifications, validated kill steps, and strict heavy-metal and microbiological controls.With U.S. inventory and long-term supply stability, Qimei Organic Farms supports brands that need reliable, scalable supply chains.Product PortfolioOrganic & conventional vegetable powders: Beet, carrot, spinach, ginger, barley grass, wheat grass, kale, alfalfa, and moreOrganic & conventional fruit powders: Strawberry, blueberry, cranberry, raspberry, pineapple, apple, banana, pomegranate, passion fruit, and moreOrganic & conventional plant protein powders: Hemp seed protein, pumpkin seed protein, rice protein, mung bean protein, and moreOrganic & conventional mushroom powders: Maitake, lion’s mane, shiitake, cordyceps, reishi, turkey tail, and moreIf traceability, consistency, and supply security matter, let’s talk.

name: QINGDAO SHUNXIN PACKING PRODUCTS CO.,LTD
description: Qingdao Shunxin Packing Products Co., Ltd. is a professional food packaging manufacturer with over 23 years of rich experience, located in Qingdao, China. We specialize in producing a wide range of high-quality, environmentally friendly packaging solutions, including various food packaging bags, films, paper boxes, and labels.                     We are experts in variety  printing technologies with gravure, flexo, and digital printing .  and passed BRC (Class A), ISO9001, and IQNET certify.           With an annual production capacity of 3,000 tons, mainly export to  US, UK, Europe, Australia, Japan, Southeast Asia, and major cities in China and got high reputation.

name: Qingdao Wantuming Biological Products Co., Ltd.
Qingdao Yifengyuan Packaging Co.,LTD
description: YFY Packaging is an advanced flexible food packaging manufacturer with over 30 years of industry experience. Headquartered in Qingdao, Shandong, China, we provide purposeful and high-performance packaging solutions across a wide range of food applications. Our capabilities integrate packaging design, mold development, production, and sales, allowing us to support brands with end-to-end service.We understand the impact that the right packaging partner can have on your business. That’s why we take time to deeply understand your needs and develop solutions that preserve products, elevate shelf presence, and enhance the overall consumer experience. With strong technical expertise, innovative R&D, and first-class facilities, we transform creative ideas into effective, sustainable packaging that helps your brand grow.

name: Qingdao Yiqing Biotechnology Co.,Ltd.
description: Qingdao Yiqing is the earliest BRC & C-GMP certified capsule factory in China, currently with 40 billion annual production capacity. NOP Organic Pullulan capsule, high filling rate HPMC capsule and Halal Gelatin capsule is our strongest product range.

name: QT Dog LLC
description: Back in the Summer of 1997, two gentlemen found themselves in possession of a 40' foot container of very fancy and whimsical dog collars. It was decided that they would take a booth at the 1997 Fall H.H. Backer show in Chicago and test the waters of the Pet Supply business. They set up in a ten foot booth in the very back corner of the hall in the New Exhibitor Section. The collars were very unique and there was nothing like them anywhere else in the hall. Folks really liked them and many orders were taken. It was soon evident that the industry was super hungry for new and different items. Taking a casual stroll around the show there was booth after booth all selling the same thing. Sensing an opportunity it was decided that they would jump into the Pet Business with both feet and thus QT Dog, LLC was born, QT being short for "cutie". Their mission being to bring new and innovative pet items to market. Over the next 25 years, the company introduced and helped pioneer many items that have become mainstays of the industry. QT Dog invented the entire Deer Antler Chew business from scratch and were the first distributor friendly importer of Yak Cheese from Nepal. They are the largest importer of Water Buffalo treats and chews into the states. They were an early player in the decorative elevated feeding station category and the Barstool single adjustable feeder still sells tens of thousands a year. Their Brake-Fast slow feed bowl was the first to market and is one of their top five sellers year over year. Starting from a two man operation based out of a spare bedroom, QT Dog now works out of a 30,000 square foot warehouse located in South Dallas, Texas.

name: Quadra
description: We know delivering exceptional supplement, food & beverage solutions requires a fresh approach that goes beyond just sourcing high-quality ingredients; it takes strong industry intelligence and a powerhouse team of people from R&D and technical expertise to smart logistics and regulatory support. From concept development to final implementation, we are committed to being your trusted distribution partner every step of the way.

name: Qualia Life Sciences
description: Neurohacker Collective was founded in 2015. We are best known for pioneering nootropic supplements to support brain health. But beyond brain health, Neurohacker Collective aims to optimize all body systems that directly impact mental well-being. Neurohacker Collective is one of the first major wellness startups to premise their entire product lineup on complexity systems science (a novel groundbreaking approach to health and nutrition emphasized on our website and podcast, Collective Insights). We believe that complexity science is the best model to support human health and we use complexity science as the basis for formulation design & testing. Our product lineup has expanded into a variety of offerings for health needs such as sleep, healthy-aging, stress, energy, vision, skin, and metabolic function.OUR VALUES & APPROACHNature First: We are the only company utilizing complexity systems science, meaning our formulas work with nature to restore and elevate rather than override.*Top Scientists and MDs: Top scientists in complex-systems modeling, neurobiology, organic chemistry, PhD and MD advisors contribute to product ideation, formulation and testing.Research-backed Formulations: All our ingredients are chosen based on a strong empirical basis. We combine 3rd party and internal studies to inform efficacy and safety.*Purity, Potency & Bioavailability: We take great care to use potent, high-purity, and bioavailable forms of each ingredient that are vegan, gluten-free and non-GMO.*Full Transparency: We are 100% transparent. No proprietary blends. Meaningful Amounts: We include meaningful and studied amounts of each ingredient for their intended purpose in every product.*Real Results: Thousands of customers since 2016 have attested to the quality and results from taking Qualia.*

name: Qualicoco Ltda
description: The QualiCoco was founded in 1992 in Southern Brazil to meet the growing demand for high-quality coconut products with an entrepreneurial vision. The business quickly expanded and became a national reference in natural foods. Today, we combine innovation, purpose, and global expansion to take the best of Brazilian coconut to the world.

name: Queen Street Bakery
description: Queen Street Bakery was founded in 2018 on the principles of using real, all-natural ingredients to make Bread with Benefits. We grew our brand across Canada, becoming a staple for healthy bakery products at retailer across the country. In 2021 we entered the US market and began our journey to bring our products to more customers. as of Fall 2024 we can now be found nationally in Whole Foods Market, Wegmans, Harris Teeter, Meijer, Bristol Farms, Spartan Nash, Roche Bros, and many more.Through the use of innovative like Chia, Millet, and Sorghum flour, our products offer many nutritional benefits and are packed full of flavour. Having just 1 of our Supefood Bagels a day will provide you with all your Omega-3's, 9g of Fiber, and 6g of Protein; giving you real energy to start your day.

name: QuickBox Fulfillment
description: QuickBox Fulfillment is the go-to 3PL for growing natural product brands that are obsessed with quality, passionate about enhancing the consumer experience, and intentional about cost-efficiency.We are proactive about finding opportunities for cost savings, supply chain optimization, and elevating your brand. (Ask us how we saved AS Beauty $500K in postage.)Our executive team brings 100+ years of operations experience, and our full team serves as a true extension of your business. Whether you are shipping DTC or to TikTok consumers, Amazon, big box retailers, boutiques, med spas, or via subscription boxes, QuickBox simplifies operational complexities so you can stay focused on building your brand.

name: Quinn
description: As a mom of three boys, a Virgo, and a certified neurotic, Kristy knows how hard it is to find snacks that actually nail it. Since founding the company in 2010, just days after her son Quinn was born (yes, that Quinn), she's worked tirelessly to craft a better snack experience that is crazy high in quality, big on flavor, irresistibly filling, ALL while fulfilling its responsibility to our planet by challenging norms and improving farming practices. Kristy started Quinn because she cares, believing any step in the right direction, no matter how small, is a good thing.

name: Quinta de Jugais
description: Quinta de Jugais' journey started with a simple passion: the richness of flavors from Serra da Estrela. That is our passion, that on daily basis has led our dream of being able to take people our region's charm through traditional products with an authentic taste.

name: Quip
description: In a world fizzing with fake health claims and tired, tasteless wellness drinks, Quip was born to disrupt, delight, and deliver. Not from a lab, but from a craving—one for something that didn't make you choose between performance and pleasure.We're not your gym bro's chalky shake or your influencer's mystery tonic. We're Quip, the world's first carbonated protein soda. Packed with fizz, flavor, and function, we're here to fuel bodies, boost vibes, and crack a few jokes while we're at it.Powered by clean protein, bold citrus and berry flavors, and unapologetic flair, Quip is what happens when the Jester raids the protein aisle and the Hero refuses to sip mediocrity. Every can is a mic drop of bold taste, clean ingredients, and zero compromise.We don't preach kale and cold plunges. We celebrate flavor and flex. Quip is for the ones who take the hustle seriously—but not themselves. The ones who deadlift irony and sip rebellion. The ones who want more from a drink than hydration—they want identity.So whether you're crushing PRs, clocking in Zoom hours, or vibing on the beach with "Tropic Like It's Hot," Quip is your sidekick. Your comic book in a can. Your smug little jester crown saying: yeah, I lift—and I laugh.This isn't just soda. It's soda you'll kill for (figuratively, of course). This is functional fizz with flair. This is Quip.

name: Raan, Nothing But Cotton Wipes
description: At raan, we believe better is possible, so we made the first unbleached 100% cotton wipe, with 99% purified water and just five clean ingredients. Nothing extra. Nothing hidden.We’re proudly women-founded and women-led, committed to transparency, integrity, and purpose. EWG Verified and awarded the National Eczema Association Seal of Acceptance, designed for sensitive skin, everyday use. Made in the USA.

name: Radius Packaging
description: When Robert Schoeneck started his first blow molding company with his brother-in-law in 1959, it was one of only a few blow molding operations in the United States. In 1972, he founded Schoeneck Containers on his own, focusing on advancing blow molding and plastic packaging technology for his customers. Ever since, our company has continued to evolve as an industry leader. In 2022, we rebranded as Radius Packaging to better encapsulate our complete 360-degree approach to packaging solutions.Radius has sustained 52 years of growth through a customer-centric culture, consultative approaches, and strategic investments. Our diverse process technologies, stock molds, and custom design expertise enable us to meet the varied needs of our customers. Our top markets include Home Care, Professional Cleaning, Food, Specialty Beverage, and Nutraceuticals.

name: Radixir
description: EssenZen was born from a simple belief: skincare should be fun, feel amazing, and still be truly safe for your skin and overall health. As a pharmacist and cosmetic chemist, I've spent years studying ingredients, formulations, and the hidden toxins often used in everyday beauty products. What I saw inspired me to create something different—something cleaner, brighter, and more authentic for the younger generation.While working in my lab, I envisioned a line that didn't follow the typical "earthy and beige" aesthetic of natural skincare. I wanted to prove that you can have playful packaging, vibrant scents, luxurious textures, and still be 100% committed to clean beauty. EssenZen became that vision brought to life: a brand where fresh, fun, and clean come together in perfect harmony.Every product starts with intention. We use exotic butters, nourishing oils, potent botanicals, and gentle actives—all selected for their safety, performance, and skin-loving benefits. And just as importantly, we leave out everything that shouldn't be there: endocrine disruptors, phthalates, parabens, sulfates, and synthetic toxins. Every formula reflects my scientific background, my passion for natural ingredients, and my dedication to creating products families can trust.But EssenZen is more than skincare—it's an experience. It's the joy of opening a fruit-shaped hand cream, the comfort of a naturally scented body lotion, the confidence of using a deodorant that works without irritation, and the refreshing lift of a hydrating face mist. It's the excitement of discovering a brand that feels youthful and modern while staying rooted in honesty and transparency.EssenZen was created for those who want products that match their personality: bold, colorful, energetic, and real. For those who want clean beauty that doesn't feel boring or complicated. For those who want to care for their skin without sacrificing their health.At EssenZen, we believe self-care should feel good, smell good, and be good for you—every single day. That is the heart of our brand, and the promise behind every bottle we create.

name: Raduno
description: Raduno is the first wellness brand built on functional extra virgin olive oil, delivering functional mushrooms and hemp through food, not pills or powders.We start with premium organic extra virgin olive oil that's naturally high in polyphenols to support heart health and fight inflammation. As one of the world's oldest remedies, it delivers wellness through the most trusted fat on earth.We blend time-tested ingredients from across the world into this olive oil to create Raduno Super Oil. Whether it's Lion's Mane extract for clarity and focus, Reishi extract for dreamland drifting, or hemp for relief and sustained slumber, Raduno's line of wellness products help you rest, recover, and feel your best - naturally.

name: Raised Gluten Free
description: It shouldn’t be a struggle to find high-quality, gluten-free food. Keeping your body healthy and safe shouldn’t have to mean sacrificing delicious desserts that soothe the soul. That’s where Raised Gluten Free comes in. This women-owned business brings to market the ultimate comfort food for those with food allergies: Sweet and savory pies! Made in small batches at our certified gluten-free bakery. The artisan products deliver indulgence that’s free of peanuts, contain many vegan options, Kosher Pareve, and Non-GMO Project Verified.

name: Raitong Organics Farm Co., Ltd.
description: Raitong Organics is a regenerative organic food company from Thailand transforming premium jasmine rice into modern wellness and family nutrition products.Working directly with small-scale farming communities since 2007, we produce certified organic rice, functional wholegrain innovations, gluten-free foods, and clean-label kids nutrition under a fully integrated supply chain.Our portfolio includes:Premium Organic Hom Mali Jasmine RiceFunctional & Low GI Rice Innovation (Preview)Gluten-Free Rice Pasta & IngredientsKieren’s Organic Kids FoodsReady-to-eat Organic RiceWe welcome partnerships with distributors, retailers, and private label innovators seeking sustainable, plant-based food solutions.Visit us to explore regenerative rice innovation for modern families.

name: Raja Foods LLC
description: in 1990 two brothers came to Chicago from India and had a passion to bring the foods and tastes of their Indian upbring to the US market.  They sold to retailers around the US as well as started their own 50+ retail chain, Patel Brothers to support one of the largest growing population segments.

name: RAMA FOODS CO.,LTD.
description: 1977 marked the establishment of Rama Foods Co., Ltd as a pioneer in Thailand's dried fruit industry. With a steadfast dedication to delivering exceptional products worldwide. Implementing a comprehensive total quality management system to guarantees meticulous attention to detail at every stage, from production all the way to the hands of our valued customers.Later on, we expanded our processing capabilities to encompass air-dried and freeze-dried ingredients, further enhancing our product offerings. This expansion allowed us to diversify our range of dried fruits and preserved food, providing our customers with even more options to choose from. By continuously expanding our processing line, we strive to meet the evolving demands and preferences of our valued customers.

name: Ramen Bae
description: Ramen Bae makes protein ramen and real-ingredient toppings that turn instant noodles into a more flavorful, nutritious, and customizable experience. After building a cult following of 300k+ DTC customers (nearly $20mm in revenue in 3 years!), we're ready to bring our products to retail.

name: Rare Breed Pet Treats
description: At Link Snacks we’re dog people. And we believe our dogs deserve the best human-grade treats crafted specially for them.That’s why we created Rare Breed™—a real meat dog treat that’s human-grade, made with only 3 ingredients, and uses American-sourced beef & pork.No fillers. No fake junk. Just real meat with flaxseed and vinegar, in both beef and pork varieties. High in protein and crafted specifically for our dogs.Because our dogs aren’t just pets—they’re family.

name: Raw Love Sunscreen
description: Founder Jenna Davis ( me :) ) combined her past studies in marine biology, chemistry and years of research and trials and developed an eco-consciousbiodegradable, moisturizing mineral sunscreen. I started this in my kitchen while working on a boat in Maui . I could not find one mineral  sunscreen that went on without a white cast, had organic ingredients and in sustainable packaging- so I Made my own!  I would pull my wagon of home made sunscreen along the beach teaching tourists about sunscreen health for them and the environment! I worked farmers markets and sold it on the beach... Fast forward I worked hard and saved up and became the first FDA regulated sunscreen to emerge from Hawaii . I was the first sunscreen out of Hawaii to get into Whole Foods and now in over 600 stores, a full line and even voted the best all natural sunscreen by Rolling stone magazine!

name: RAWGA Inc.
description: Animal raw materials account for 99.9% of the world's W12 trillion collagen market. Since collagen is defined as animal collagen, it is generally extracted from animal materials. Collagen accounts for 30% of our body's total protein. Then, the elephant, the largest herbivore on Earth, developed plant-based collagen with the question of how to produce collagen.Animal collagen is extracted from cattle, pigs, chickens, and fish, and each material has problems such as mad cow disease, pig cholera, chicken bird flu, microplastics in fish, and heavy metal contamination. Even all animal collagen has a fishy taste that is difficult to eat, so it is difficult to consume without synthetic additives, so synthetic additives that are not beneficial to health are also consumed. It also causes environmental problems such as carbon, water use, and land use caused by livestock breeding.We spent six years of research pursuing the safety and health of intake for individuals and developing environmentally sustainable vegetable collagen. To create vegetable collagen that is not in the world, we establish an organic farm that minimizes damage to nature to grow organic hibiscus, which is the basis of collagen extraction. We extract collagen from organic hibiscus, make safe and fishless vegetable collagen raw materials, and use them for commercialization and our own brand business. By donating these profits back to farmers on organic farms and investing in research, we have vertically integrated the sustainable plant-based value chain.Vegetable collagen raw materials won the 2022 SIAL PARIS raw material grand prix, supplying raw materials to famous brands such as Korea and the United States. In addition, the brand "PLANT" ranked first in collagen search based on Korean search sites, is thriving in department stores and online sites, and has also entered Amazon in the United States.

name: RD Global Products
description: shelf stable ingredients: pepper purées, garlic, onion, tomatillo

name: REBBL, Humm Kombucha
description: REBBL is a company created in 2011 as a solution to support vulnerable communities and help end human trafficking. The dream was to create delicious, organic, functional drinks that can help build schools, provide jobs, reunite families, and nourish the world.…and that's exactly what we did.Every drink we create is done with people and the planet in mind. At REBBL, we don't just put our money where our mouth is… we put our entire business there.Our Ingredients -- Every single functional ingredient and adaptogen is used in levels with proven benefits. If we can't use an ingredient at meaningful, efficacious levels, we won't use it at all. We listen to customer feedback to continue innovating delicious new flavors that are as beneficial as they are enjoyable.Our Grower Partners -- Through ethical, impact sourcing practices we develop community, prevent worker exploitation and work to ensure families receive fair wages. We proudly support Not For Sale's work of protecting and preserving the Amazonian rainforest and native peoples' right to protected land. Historically, we've sourced ingredients from these regions to support their local economy and communities.Our Commitment -- We are committed to creating a future without human trafficking in partnership with Not For Sale. We have always, and will always donate a percentage of net sales to support Not For Sale in providing shelter, education, healthcare, legal services, and other direct relief for survivors of human trafficking and exploitation.For the people, for the planet.Everything we create is driven by the desire to empower people, and lead by example when it comes to environmental responsibility.

name: RebornBiotech
description: Reborn Biotech is a professional manufacturer of bovine collagen peptides with a 133,000-square-meter factory. Following HACCP standards, we have five advanced bioactive peptide workshops with an annual capacity of 15,000 MT. Meanwhile, a 20,000 MT demonstration base is under construction to further expand our production capabilities.We hold certifications including FSSC 22000, ISO, HALAL, and Kosher, and collaborate closely with leading universities and research institutions in the USA, Japan, and China. Our globally leading R&D capabilities support a complete integration of research, production, and sales, ensuring we deliver the highest quality products.With 17 years of experience exporting to the USA, our products are widely recognized and highly praised by customers worldwide.

name: Recoup Beverage, Inc.
description: The origins of recoup goes all the way back to Siwat's (our founders) childhood healthcare experience. He spent the first few years of my life in the hospital and by the time he was twelve he had undergone 10 major surgeries. It was his mother's ginger-based remedies that played a big part in his recovery and the memories of these home remedies are what eventually inspired recoup.  In the years to come he would pursue a degree in applied physiology and he would find myself working in the same hospital where he grew up, working with children with heart & lung disease.  During this time, he discovered numerous studies using a dose of 2 tsp of ginger to promote muscle recovery, digestion, and immunity.  From there, he started working on the first version of recoup in the kitchen of his tiny Manhattan studio.  Together with my co-founder Susan, they developed the final product knowing that we wanted to build a business that could thrive and a brand that could connect with people through our mission of "Helping people feel better and live well through modern plant-powered remedies"

name: Red Oak Commodities
description: In 1891, the Doens family began turning local Dutch wheat into flour at a classic windmill in a little town called Ijzendijke. 100 years later, the company was poised at the forefront of the organic food movement in Europe, becoming a leading importer and supplier of specialty and organic ingredients. Today, we are proud to continue their involvement in the organic and specialty markets through Red Oak Commodities. Founded in 2021, Red Oak is the legacy of the Doens family's commitment to supplying high integrity ingredients sourced from around the world.With experience sourcing from over 50 countries, we are subject matter experts in our markets. Our operational expertise means that our products get to where they need to be, when they need to be there. And our world-class food safety, regulatory, and assurance programs means that our products are what we say they are. Connect with us to learn how our expertise can become your solution.

name: Red River Foods
description: Red River Foods is a leading global supplier of ethically sourced nuts, seeds, dried fruit, and specialty snacks. We provide quality ingredients to some of the biggest brands in the bakery, confectionery, cereal, dairy, and snack food industries, ensuring they are:Regenerative Organic Certified®USDA OrganicFairtrade CertifiedFair Trade CertidiedKosher CertifiedBRCGS CertifiedWith over 50 products from 40 countries, your support helps us foster environmental consciousness and uplift local communities. Our teams on the ground work directly with farmers—improving yields and the livelihoods of thousands—and our global processing facilities maintain the highest quality food safety and labor standards.We believe that the better we do as a business, the larger the impact we can have on the world around us and future generations to come.

name: RED SAKURA FOOD CO., LTD.
description: Red Sakura have good factory with managerial skills and organizational capabilities which specialize in making Butter crispy cake, Pineapple cake, Pineapple Sun cake, Sun cake, Rusks, Taro & Sweet Potato Cake, Taro Mochi Cake and in Taiwan. Our Hello kitty cookie, Noodle, Popsicles, Boba Tea, Red Beam Mochi Cake are authorized by Sanrio which sell all over the world also engaged in OEM products for famous brands.

name: Red's All Natural
description: The Red's StoryIt all started 15 years ago, on a Taco Tuesday, when we often had a waiting list of guests vying to try one of my wife Paige's famed burritos.  I decided then to start a food company and name it after our loyal and trusted dog, Red.Since then, we've grown beyond burritos to breakfast sandwiches and more, yet our commitment to crafting delicious food using the highest quality ingredients has never wavered.  That's because we know we aren't just feeding our own families but yours, too

name: REDEFINE NUTRITION dba REDEFINE FOODS
description: Our first snack item was launched in 2019 and inspired by my kids to make a great tasting healthy alternative to your childhood favorite snacks.

name: Redmond Life
description: FROM THE HEART OF UTAHMany years ago, a vast inland sea existed in central Utah. As the Sundance Sea receded, it left behind a rich deposit of minerals perfectly balanced by nature. This treasure, the origin of Redmond salt, was preserved in its crystallized state by a blanket of volcanic ash. It comes to you in the same unpolluted and unrefined state it exists underground.Since 1958Our story began with salt and clay. It's born from the earth, rooted in Utah's natural landscape, and shaped by our mission to elevate living. Over the years, we've grown to serve communities and customers from all walks of life, connected by shared values: simplicity, care, and a deep respect for what's real.  Redmond has been mining salt for over 67 years.  At the beginning of that journey, few could have imagined the many ways something as simple as sat would awaken us as humans.We are the makers of Real Salt, Re-Lyte Hydration, Re-Lyte Immunity, Re-Lyte Kids, Re-Lyte Energy, Re-Lyte Pre-workout, Real Salt seasonings, Facial Mud, Clay, Earthpaste, Leaf Microhydroxyapatite Toothpaste, and more!

name: Redneck Sunscreen LLC
description: The founders of Redneck Sunscreen are tired of watching people get scorched by that big yellow thing called the sun. So they decided to create a sun care company that would entertain and educate people about the dangers of ultraviolet light exposure.  Redneck Sunscreen SPF 50 Sport is made in the U.S.A and available in lotion and spray. Your Mullet Is Not Enough.

name: Reel Paper
description: Reel is on a mission to change the paper industry. We are creating products that are better for the planet and still deliver premium quality.  Reel's use of bamboo over traditional wood fiber reduces the number of trees that get turned into toilet paper every year. Less deforestation means lower greenhouse gas emissions, which in turn means less contribution to global warming. Bamboo emits less carbon when harvested & doesn't need to be replanted. This paired with plastic-free packaging, adds up to better environmental benefits than other paper products. Reel's bamboo toilet paper puts a premium on both comfort and durability. With 3-ply softness and incredible strength, it's very comparable to traditional toilet paper. 10K 5 star reviews! As a company, Reel takes a holistic view of its overall environmental impact, and is taking steps to reduce the impact of not only product production but also transportation. Reel works with non-profit partner Carbonfund.org to track carbon emissions and the transportation of products, ensuring their emissions are offset with projects that support the fight climate change. Reel Paper's Co-founder and CEO, Livio Bisterzo, is a creative entrepreneur with a passion for healthy living, consumer products. Reel Paper co-founder and CMO, Derin Oyekan, grew up in Lagos, Nigeria. His early life experiences inspired the multi-faceted giveback that we provide with every sale of our 100% bamboo toilet paper.

name: Regina Foods Nikolaos Kourantidis
description: We are a Greek company specializing in the production and distribution of high-quality traditional food products such as honey, jams, sesame bars (pasteli), and Greek delights. Since 1958, we have operated with consistency, care, and responsibility toward our customers. With over six decades of experience, we have become a trusted name in both the Greek and international food markets.We work exclusively with carefully selected raw materials sourced from trusted Greek producers, ensuring purity, authenticity, and superior taste in every product.

name: Regina Pasta
description: •Established in 1986 .  - gradually grew to be the sole Semolina Milling producer and take immense pride in our expansive 140,000-square-foot facility. This facility operates with the dedication of a formidable team of 1,500 employees, enabling us to produce over 10,000 tons of pasta each month. Our production caters to our branded products and valued partners' private label requirements.• We have established ourselves as the preferred pasta choice in the MENA region. As our business has been expanding into Europe and the USA in recent years, our sales have been on a consistent upward trajectory, marked by year-over-year growth. At the same time, we forge valuable partnerships with prominent industry players.

name: Registrar Corp
description: Registrar Corp is the world’s largest regulatory compliance company serving the global food and beverage industry. With offices in 21 countries and trusted by more than 26,000 food and beverage companies across 190 countries, Registrar Corp helps manufacturers, brand owners, importers, and exporters navigate the complexities of U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) regulations with clarity and confidence. As the largest regulatory compliance partner in the market, Registrar Corp enables safe, compliant practices and assures uninterrupted access to the U.S. food and beverage market for businesses of all sizes. The U.S. has one of the world’s most detailed and tightly enforced regulatory systems for food and beverages. Following these regulations affects everything from product safety and labeling to managing supply chains, workforce practices, and required documentation. Registrar Corp helps ease these regulatory challenges, allowing food and beverage companies to concentrate on delivering quality, expanding their business, and driving innovation. Supporting U.S.-Based Food and Beverage Companies For U.S.-based manufacturers, processors, packers, and importers, FDA compliance is a daily operational responsibility. Registrar Corp supports companies across critical areas including FDA facility registration and maintenance, food labeling compliance, inspection preparedness, documentation requirements, and recall readiness. As regulations evolve, Registrar Corp’s regulatory experts provide timely guidance to help organizations remain aligned with FDA expectations. Registrar Corp offers targeted online training for food and beverage compliance, helping organizations develop expertise and strengthen food safety systems. Courses include PCQI, HACCP, FSVP, and SQF, all available online for flexibility and minimal disruption. In addition, Registrar Corp provides workforce training for frontline employees, ensuring that food safety plans are consistently and correctly executed on the production floor. This practical training reinforces hygiene practices, preventive control execution, documentation accuracy, and accountability, thereby helping companies reduce risk and strengthen food safety culture at every level of the organization. Enabling Non-U.S. Suppliers to Access the U.S. Market For non-U.S. manufacturers exporting food and beverage products to the United States, FDA compliance can be complex and unfamiliar. Registrar Corp supports foreign suppliers through FDA facility registration, Prior Notice submission guidance, and ongoing regulatory advisory services. Registrar Corp also serves as the U.S. Agent for thousands of foreign facilities, acting as the official liaison between the FDA and the manufacturer for inspections, compliance communications, and emergency response. The Most Complete Solution for Shelf-Stable Packaged Foods Registrar Corp provides the most complete regulatory and food safety solution available for shelf-stable packaged food producers. Through the acquisition of TechniCAL, the world’s leading independent Process Authority for shelf-stable foods, Registrar Corp combines deep scientific expertise with global regulatory leadership. Together, we help manufacturers confidently bring shelf-stable products to market, manage complex FDA requirements, and protect brand integrity. Trusted Scale, Expertise, and Confidence Registrar Corp is the leading partner for regulatory compliance in the food and beverage industry. By combining extensive FDA knowledge, worldwide reach, innovative technologies, and thorough training, Registrar Corp helps companies confidently manage compliance challenges. This support safeguards food safety, protects brand reputation, and maintains business operations, enabling food and beverage companies to focus on growth and innovation.

name: Releef Direct Solutions
description: Our company was founded after seeing family and friends struggle with everyday pain and discomfort—issues that often go underserved by traditional wellness products. With over 40 years of manufacturing experience behind us, we set out to create practical, effective solutions that people could use as part of their daily routine—and that retailers could confidently bring to market.That mission led to the development of two distinct product lines, each built around clear consumer needs and strong retail performance. Our topical line includes targeted formats such as patches, roll-ons, creams, and oils, designed for convenience, consistency, and repeat purchase. These products are formulated with thoughtful ingredients and packaged for clarity, making them easy for shoppers to understand and trust.We also developed a line of infused insoles designed to support foot comfort and everyday mobility. Each SKU is formulated with specific infusions to address common concerns such as sore feet, circulation, and heel care. These insoles offer retailers a functional, high-margin accessory that fits naturally into footwear, wellness, and lifestyle categories.Across both lines, we focus on dependable manufacturing, scalable production, and retail-ready execution. Our goal is to deliver wellness solutions that resonate with consumers while supporting strong sell-through, category growth, and long-term partnerships.We welcome conversations with retailers and distributors interested in carrying or expanding our product lines. Reach out to learn more about assortment options, distribution opportunities, and how we can work together.

name: Reliable Products Inc
description: Reliable Products | PureFarms Organic Inc is a minority-owned and family-owned company established in 2003, built on a foundation of ethical business practices, long-term relationships, consistent product quality, and reliable supply without interruptions. We are dedicated to exceeding customer expectations, offering bakery and food ingredients to major food manufacturers as a direct source for their ingredient needs. Over the years, we have consistently provided top-quality products at competitive prices.We believe that staying ahead in the volatile ingredient business requires accurate market intelligence. We provide regular market updates to support our customers, enabling them to make informed decisions and remain competitive. Our management team, representing three generations of ingredient product knowledge and technical and ingredient manufacturing expertise, is committed to delivering exceptional value.Our facility has the most advanced seed cleaning and mixing technologies, ensuring that our products are meticulously examined and monitored from the farm level to the final customer. We are involved in every step of the supply chain, allowing us to trace ingredients back to our farmer groups. Reliable Products facility is GMP, HACCP, SQF Edition 9, Kosher, and Organic Certified, and we rigorously implement ABA, AIB, and ASTA quality guidelines and food safety standards. We adhere to GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices), GAP (Good Agriculture Practices), EU and US Food Safety Standards, including FSMA / FSVP. Additionally, we are a US-FDA Registered Food Facility and Custom bonded operations.Reliable Products | PureFarms Organic offers a swift 24-hour turnaround on any order size, with conveniently located warehouses near your food facility. We provide custom blending capabilities, including custom seeds and grain mixes like Everything Bagel Blend, 7 Grain, 5 Grain, and 21 Grain, all tailored to customer specifications. Our roasting/toasting capabilities allow us to work flexibly with our customers from concept and R&D through to final product delivery. Our team at Reliable Products collaborates with the R&D and Product development team from the initial concept and trials through full-scale production runs.

name: Reliance Packaging Inc
description: Reliance Packaging Inc. (RPI) provides custom printed packaging and integrated 3PL fulfillment services for growing CPG brands. We specialize in print corrugated boxes, folding cartons, retail-ready displays (PDQs), shelve displays and low-MOQ custom packaging with fast turnarounds and in-house structural design. Through our sister company, PriorityPak.com, we offer DTC, B2B, Amazon FBA/FBM, and TikTok Shop fulfillment, plus warehousing, kitting, pick and pack -  delivering a seamless packaging-to-fulfillment solution under one ownership group. Certified to handle packaged goods!

name: Reliance Vitamin
description: Reliance is the manufacturing partner you need for premium quality dietary supplements, scientifically-formulated with the finest ingredients.Whether you are looking for expert custom formulation for dietary supplements, high-volume production, or a comprehensive on-trend stock portfolio to choose from, Reliance has a program to elevate your private brand.

name: Rello Corporation
description: Rello was born from a simple but powerful idea: protein should be as clean as it is effective. Founded in 2025 by a team of former professional athletes and CPG operators, Rello set out to reinvent performance nutrition — eliminating seed oils, artificial fillers, and fake sweeteners from a category that had lost its integrity.We partnered with cutting-edge technology to create the first fully soluble, shelf-stable creatine shake, and paired it with clean, functional protein bars made from grass-fed tallow, collagen, and honey. Every product is designed for real life — fueling recovery, performance, and everyday wellness with ingredients you can trust.Rooted in community and transparency, Rello stands for Really Clean Protein — nutrition made better, for people who demand better.

name: Remedy Organics
description: Remedy Organics is a line of 100% Plant-Based wellness shakes and shots designed to Unleash Your Body's Natural Healing Power. Our 12 oz shakes are protein-packed, nutrient-dense, superfood charged and delicious and are available in a variety of flavors. They contain 8g – 20 g of Plant-Based protein to fuel your life and are packed with prebiotics to support digestive and immune health and adaptogens for strength, energy and mental clarity.  Remedy Organics was created by Certified Holistic Nutritionist and Founder, Cindy Kasindorf.  Inspired by her lifelong passion for health and wellness, Cindy was intrigued by ancient wisdom and would always turn to natural remedies instead of a medicine cabinet for healing and prevention.  She continues to be inspired by Hippocrates' quote– "Let food be they medicine, and medicine be they food." All Remedy shakes are certified Organic, Non-GMO, Gluten-Free and Dairy Free.

name: Renuka Agri Foods PLC
description: Cocomi Bio's story is one of family, passion, and a deep connection to nature that spans over a century. It all began more than 100 years ago on the lush family lands of Sri Lanka, where their great-grandmother cultivated coconuts, tea, and spices with care and respect for the earth. This legacy of nurturing the land and valuing natural goodness became the foundation on which Cocomi Bio was built.In 2013, the family's heritage took a new and inspiring turn when their father—a doctor with a vision for healthier living—decided to dedicate himself fully to organic farming. Driven by a belief that what we eat and how we produce it directly impacts our wellbeing and the planet, he transformed the family's coconut plantations into Sri Lanka's largest certified organic coconut farm. What began as a small family endeavor has since grown into a sustainable enterprise that supports over 2,000 traditional farming families across the island.Cocomi Bio's journey is not just about producing coconut-based products—it's about preserving a way of life rooted in respect for people and nature. Their philosophy of "from our family farm to your table" captures their commitment to full traceability and authenticity. Every coconut is nurtured, harvested, and processed within hours to preserve its freshness and natural goodness.Beyond farming, Cocomi Bio has become a symbol of innovation in sustainability. Their operations use coconut shells as fuel, harvest rainwater, and recycle waste through biological treatment systems—ensuring that every part of the process contributes back to the environment. Their biodiverse farms, where coconut palms grow alongside other plants and wildlife, embody their belief in working with nature rather than against it.Today, Cocomi Bio stands as a proud Sri Lankan brand sharing the purest organic coconut products—virgin oils, milk, flour, and natural snacks—with the world. From its humble beginnings on a family farm to becoming a global advocate for organic living, Cocomi Bio's journey remains an inspiring blend of heritage, innovation, and heartfelt dedication to a healthier planet and community.

name: Renzo's Vitamins
description: Science-made, dad-perfected, kid-approved vitamins with all the good stuff and none of the sugar.

name: Repsly Inc
description: Repsly provides retail execution software built to drive CPG sales.Repsly’s powerful manager’s dashboard equips teams with the data they need to uncover opportunities at retail, and the tools they need to deploy their team to take the right action in the store. Repsly’s best-in-class mobile app empowers retail execution specialists to have the biggest possible impact on sales, while equipping reps with the customizable data collection tools they need to report real-time insights from the field. Repsly is the only retail execution solution to centralize brands’ sales, field activity, and in-store data, connecting store-level activities with their impact on sales. More than 650 field teams in over 80 countries drive execution and sales in the field with Repsly.

name: Repurpose
description: Welcome to a world where sustainable choices naturally fit into modern life. Sustainability is all we do. It's who we are and who we've always been.Since 2010, we've designed the best plant-based, nontoxic essentials for people who value the planet (& convenience).

name: Resource Label Group
description: Resource Label Group is a leading full-service provider of custom label and packaging solutions with a national footprint and a local partner approach. We offer innovative, sustainable materials and printing technologies — including pressure sensitive labels, shrink sleeves, flexible packaging, and eco-friendly stocks like recycled, compostable, and FSC-certified options — tailored for brands across food, beverage, nutraceutical, personal care, and more. Backed by expertise, advanced capabilities, and a coast-to-coast network, we help brands communicate their story and meet market demands with creative, high-quality packaging solutions.

name: Retro Snacks Inc.
description: Flings was born after a last-minute camping trip where we found ourselves unprepared—and hungry. With no better options, we grabbed a box of Pop-Tarts and joked about how someone should really make a version that tastes better and actually fuels you. That joke turned into an idea we couldn't shake. Back home, we hit the kitchen with a mission: reinvent the classic toaster pastry with more protein, less sugar, and ingredients we could be proud of. What started as a craving for something better became Flings—a modern take on a nostalgic snack, made for people who want both flavor and function.

name: REVEL Bars
description: The BEAR founder read an article in January 2009 about how bears had moved into cities to forage from behind junk food joints and bins. These 'city bears' were 30% fatter than their wild bear friends eating salmon and wild berries. They were also 30% less active and sadly all dead by the age of 10, whilst over 60% of the wild bears lived on healthily. The story resonated with us, as we found that people and families were always growling about how hard it was to get fruit into their diets. We promised to search the world for healthy snack alternatives to processed foods! And so BEAR was born!

name: Revere Flexpak
description: Awesome Flexible Packaging and labels to get you noticed!  Manufactured and supplied by our 80 year, 4th generation family-owned and managed business - from our own factory or overseas-sourced from qualified, certified suppliers.  We provide home and industrial compostable films, recyclable constructions, as well as ultra-high barrier and high barrier laminations for roll films, bags and pouches.  Come say "hello" and let's talk about how we can help you!

name: Reviva Labs
description: Reviva Labs creates safe, effective natural skin care treatments that produce visible results. It's why skin care enthusiasts have fallen in love with our skin care over the last 50 years and why Reviva has become the natural skin care trusted for generations. Cruelty free and without harmful ingredients, our products combine the best of nature and science – from brightening and hydrating to anti-aging and revitalizing – and everything in between – Reviva has it covered.

name: Revive Collagen
description: Revive Collagen launched as a result of Samantha Faiers; the founder suffering from hormonal and postpartum acne after the birth of her second child. After discovering the lack of ingestible collagen options in the marketplace and two years of development in the UK's top research lab, Revive Collagen quickly became the most sought-after collagen brand in Europe, selling one box every minute.  Revive Collagen is a luxury ready-to-drink collagen brand specifically developed to enhancebeauty from within. Launched in August 2020 and proudly British with quality at its core; Revive Collagenoffers uniquely formulated, ready-to-drink collagen which delivers real results to the hair, skin and nailswithin 6-8 weeks.Revive Collagen is available in the UK at Holland & Barrett, Boots, Sephora, Look Fantastic. US retailers including Saks.com and CVS.

name: Revol Cares
description: In 2015, while in her final year of a Fashion Design & Technology Degree, Sara Jonsdottir created a collection of Period-Proof Underwear aiming to breakdown the taboo around menstruation.  Her goal was to offer new solutions and revolutionize the menstrual product industry; an industry that hadn't seen any significant developments since the late 1980s.  Sara has always been a strong believer in change and knew then that she wanted to make an impact using her design skills as "? a channel for advocating change in equality amongst race, gender, and sexual orientation."  Sara draws much of her inspiration and vision from her unquestioningly feminist homeland, Iceland.After overwhelming demand for her innovative undies, Sara left her career in the garment industry to launch Revol Cares.  Today with her husband Mayo Santos, they have taken these life-changing products to an international market.REVOL Cares is a sustainable leak proof underwear company that is Making Periods Better, with a vision to change the lives of 100 million menstruators!  Our patent pending leak proof undies completely transform how people experience periods - or any leaks for that matter.We feature re-usable leak proof solutions in various styles for menstruators, post-partum and post-surgical flow management, and those with light incontinence.  Our products provide people with a revolutionary, safe, and dignified way to move through life while easily managing their natural flow and leaks, without worry.Unlike disposable pads, tampons, and undergarments, our products are washable and re-usable for up to four years, dramatically reducing individual costs and landfill waste.  No need to carry pads or tampons with you throughout the day; or worse, try to find them once it's too late!  No need to wear a cup or tampon with our undies as they provide leak proof protection for 12 hours, day or night. REVOL Cares Essentials products are recognized by the Society of Obstetricians and Gynaecologists of Canada through the SOGC Brand Recognition Program.  As a social enterprise, we rely on the experts and third-party testing, meeting and exceeding standards for recognition and certifications in areas of safety, efficacy, sustainability, accessibility and affordability.

name: Rhema Health Products Limited
description: Custom and Private Label GMP manufacturer with over 35 years experience in Dietary Supplement and Functional Food production. We specialize in formulations in key growth categories such as Electrolytes, Effervscents, Greens, Vegan Proteins, Pre and Pro Biotics and More!  We produce powders, capsules and chewable tablets. Quality is a primary tenet and we maintain certifications including; NSF, NSF for Sport, FDA, SQF2, HAACP, Site Licence for Canada.  We are able to produce products that are certified organic, non-GMO, gluten-free and other claims.  Trust Rhema for exceptional Quality, great Service, and fair Prices!

name: Rhythm Renew
description: Rhythm began in 2024 with the need to regulate our own hormones and seeing the gap in the grocer/food space. Most products are made for men and by men so we tested different formulations, manufactures and co packing facilities until we reached the right formula and partners. So far the product has been tested across 1000 women and all have shown results through Ux testing.

name: Ribbonwire Ranch
description: Ribbonwire Ranch is a family-owned operation on historic Texas Panhandle land, once part of the legendary XIT Ranch. We are dedicated to producing premium organic beef with a focus on sustainability, land conservation, and animal welfare.Founded in 2008, Ribbonwire Ranch is owned and operated by Doug Lathem and Chad Schoonover, along with their wives and children. Our cattle are raised on our ranch from birth to finish, meaning every beef stick comes exclusively from our herd. Nourished by native prairie grasses and feed grown right on our ranch, our cattle produce the highest quality organic beef on the market today.At Ribbonwire Ranch, we believe in a program with no smoke and mirrors, so a consumer can feel confident in what they are buying. Our organic beef sticks aren’t just a product, they’re part of a story as unique as their flavor.To learn more about our story you can visit our website at https://www.ribbonwire.com

name: RIBUS, Inc.
description: Founded in 1992 as a functional ingredient manufacturing company, RIBUS Inc. supplies natural and organic plant-based ingredients to companies around the world. As the Original Clean Label Ingredient Company™, RIBUS produces non-GMO, natural, organic, vegan, kosher and gluten-free ingredients for the food, beverage, pet and dietary supplement sectors.

name: Richardson Nutritional Center
description: RNC upholds the enduring legacy of Dr. John A. Richardson, MD, who courageously championed the utilization of vitamin therapy to help his patients. We genuinely care about you and your health, and our family promises to provide the best-sourced premium products available.

name: Rico's Burritos
description: Rico’s Burritos strives to be the best restaurant quality burrito in not only the Denver Metro area but in the country. Our ingredients are the finest in the industry and we have a staff that has the same passion and spirit as our founder Rick Garcia. Our goal is to provide you with an unsurpassed unique eating experience each and every time you bite into one of our delicious burritos. We are devoted to creating food that capitalizes on our attention to quality and authenticity. Please enjoy our bold flavors.

name: RidgeCrest Herbals
description: RidgeCrest Herbals traces its beginnings to a line of natural botanical formulas developed for chiropractors, naturopaths, and other health professionals in the 1980s. Although these formulas were remarkably effective, the original company, Natural Alternatives, struggled to survive. Paul Warnock and Clyde St. Clair came to the rescue, recognizing an opportunity to expand into health food stores and reach a wider audience. Paul and Clyde launched their expansion in 1993, incorporated in 1994, and re-branded as RidgeCrest Herbals in 1996. Their hard work and passion for helping people find natural alternatives paid off, and by 1998, ClearLungs® was the #1 natural lung formula in the US market. Today, RidgeCrest Herbals is led by Matt Warnock, Paul's son, who is now the owner, Will Christensen, CEO, and Melissa Kenney, CFO. These days we are growing our roots outwards a lot and you can read more about our team in our annual RCHerbals Almanac (free at our booth!). RidgeCrest Herbals is an award-winning developer and manufacturer of safe and effective natural botanical formulas for various specific health needs. A pioneer in the eclectic herbal tradition since the 1980s, RidgeCrest Herbals develops botanical formulations containing ingredients from Chinese, European, Native American, Ayurvedic, and other natural disciplines. RidgeCrest Herbals has more than 20 products today, each sold primarily through natural product retail locations and online, including the #1 best-selling natural product in the US that targets lung and respiratory health, ClearLungs®. We invite anyone interested in learning more about our company and products to sign up for our newsletter, follow us on social media, or call us at 1-800-242-4649.

name: Righteous Felon Craft Jerky
description: What began as a small-time passion in the late 1990s has evolved into a legendary jerky brand that revolutionized the snack industry. Our story starts in Chester County, Pennsylvania, where three ambitious friends discovered something extraordinary: a recipe that would change everything.What started in school hallways and back alleys soon became a movement. What others saw as a simple snack, we saw as an art form. Through determination, creativity, and an unwavering commitment to flavor, Righteous Felon emerged as more than just a jerky brand – we became a cultural phenomenon.By 2006, our reputation had grown from local legend to national sensation. We weren't just making jerky; we were crafting an experience that captured the imagination of everyone from movie stars to professional athletes. Our products became more than a snack – they were a statement.The journey wasn't always smooth. We've faced challenges, defied expectations, and remained true to our core belief: jerky is more than just dried meat. It's a culinary adventure, a rebellion against bland, uninspired snacking.We refused to compromise our vision or our commitment to quality. Righteous Felon has always been about one thing: delivering an uncompromising, bold flavor experience that breaks all the rules.Today, when you open a bag of Righteous Felon jerky, you're not just enjoying a snack. You're becoming part of a legacy. A story of innovation, rebellion, and unfiltered flavor that began with three friends and a dream.Righteous Felon: Unapologetically Delicious.The rewrite maintains the brand's playful, rebellious spirit while presenting the story in a more professional and marketable way. It removes the explicit references to illegal activities while keeping the humorous, slightly exaggerated narrative style that seems core to the brand's identity. The language is more polished and aims to create a sense of mystique and excitement around the brand's origin story.

name: Rill Foods
description: Rill Foods is a second-generation family business based in the heart of Central Washington. It all began in 1985 when Ninon, just 25 years old, bought a small grocery and café in Thorp. Her made-from-scratch soups quickly became local favorites, drawing in regulars from miles around.But there was a problem: customers didn't just want a bowl of soup—they wanted to take it home. They asked for recipes, to-go containers, anything to bring the flavors with them. That need sparked an idea. In 1995, Ninon packaged up two of her soups and brought them to a local fair. They sold out, and Rill's Specialty Foods was born.From hand-weighing ingredients to rebuilding after a fire, we've faced our share of challenges. But we've stayed focused on what matters: crafting hearty, flavorful soups that taste homemade—because they are. Today, we hand-pack every mix and use high-quality ingredients from Northwest farmers and co-ops whenever we can.We've grown from a small-town café to shipping over 200,000 packages a year, but our mission is the same: to make it easy to enjoy a comforting, satisfying meal. Each soup is named after a real place in the Northwest and includes a short story inside, connecting you to the land that inspired it.From our kitchen in Thorp to your table—thanks for being part of our story.

name: RIND Snacks
description: Founder Matt Weiss drew inspiration for RIND Snacks from his great-grandmother, Helen Seitner, a health food pioneer who sold natural whole foods and bulk produce from her "Stay-Well" health shop in Flint, Michigan in the 1920s. "Great-Grandma Helen preached the value of 'roots, rinds, seeds and stems' well before kale was cool," notes Matt. Her advice to never let the most nutritious part of food go to waste, particularly fruit rinds (known for their concentrated health benefits), planted the seed for Weiss to launch his own health food business nearly a century later. For Weiss, RIND Snacks represents his great-grandmother's passion for both personal health and environmental sustainability. Matt launched RIND in 2017, initially as a 'side hustle' from his 20 year career as an investment professional in NYC.  Before long, RIND took off and in 2020 Matt joined up with his brother-in-law Ben to become full-time entrepreneurs leaving a life of high finance for fruit snacks.

name: RINGA
description: After spending almost 20 years in the start-up CPG industry as an operator helping other entrepreneurs build, scale and in some instances exit their brands - the inspiration for RINGA came during a trip to Baja MX when founder Stephanie McGregor was introduced to Moringa Oleifera, one of nature's most nutrient dense and climate friendly plants.  After learning more about how Moringa is a potential solution to some of the most pressing challenges in our food system such as combatting the rise of chronic health conditions and climate change - RINGA's first line of products, 'holistic hydration' were developed to provide consumers with high quality products with real function and real ingredients that don't rely on added sugar, sugar substitutes, sugar alcohols or natural flavors.   The brand is committed to crafting products using organic, non-GMO and regenerative ingredients and is proud to be a 1% for the planet member, plant powered (vegan), allergen free and woman founded and led.  RINGA.  It's for life.

name: Rip Van Inc.
description: Rip and Marco, our co-founders, began Rip Van with a mission:  to improve people's lives by inventing a delicious and low sugar snacks.Beginning with a stroopwafel sold on the grounds of Brown University, Rip and Marco built portfolio of great tasting snacks with far less sugar than national brands.Now, a dozen years later, Rip Van snacks are nationally distributed in over 12,000 locations, and are among the most popular snacks on Amazon.

name: Rise Wellness
description: Protein Pop is a clear, non-carbonated drink that delivers 20g of protein in every serving—40% of the daily requirement! It’s refreshing chilled or over ice. Protein Pop is highly satiating and helps build and maintain lean muscle. Get your POP of protein today!20g of clear protein in each 12 oz. can0g of sugar80 - 90 caloriesGluten free, lactose free, kosher, all natural12-month shelf lifeMade in the USA

name: Rishi Tea & Botanicals
description: Rishi Tea was founded on the commitment to set the standard for quality and expand the awareness of tea and its rich, inspirational tradition. We offer premium tea and botanicals imported directly from gardens across the world.

name: Rising Star
description: We got started in 2021 as Magnolia Star because retail buyers of some of the biggest grocers in the country asked our founders - the co-CEOs of Kinders - to make baking products. Being BBQ guys they demurred, but they spun up a brand as a side project to meet that customer need, and recently, started building a team to turn that single product line into a brand that redefines baking similarly to how Kinders redefined BBQ. Now, we've renamed ourselves Rising Star (to reflect a nationwide brand vs. a more Southern one) and we are expanding from Club into Natural and Retail, and growing from Extracts and Pastes into Baking Mixes as well. As a result of this rebrand we don't have fully refreshed assets (or an email suffix) - but we will soon!

name: Riso Gallo
description: Riso Gallo was founded in Genoa and started to process imported paddy rice in 1856. Then the factory was transferred to Robbio, in the heart of the Italian rice growing region.In 1940 since illiteracy was still widespread, the company used to identify the different varieties of rice by using images on animals. The cockerel associated with best quality rice became the symbol of the company itself.Riso Gallo is one of the bggest rice producers in Europe, spreading the products in more than 80 countries in the world.

name: Ritter Sport
description: Ritter Sport is a family-owned company founded in 1912 in Stuttgart, Germany, and today our colorful square chocolate bars are enjoyed in more than 100 countries worldwide. Guided by a commitment to quality, sustainability, and bold flavors, every bar is crafted with the highest standards—from responsibly sourced cocoa to innovative packaging.In July 2024, we established a U.S. subsidiary to grow the love of Ritter Sport in the United States. We're excited to bring our iconic squares to chocolate lovers across the country, making great chocolate accessible, sustainable, and fun.

name: River Valley Specialty Farms / Canadian Hemp Trade Alliance
description: River Valley Specialty Farms is a trusted supplier of Ready-to-Eat (RTE) hemp seed. As both the grower & processor of RTE hemp, we ensure quality and consistency while offering competitive pricing, and prompt service. River Valley is an early adopter of Gentle Processing: an innovative approach that ensures pathogen-free RTE ingredients. The Gentle Processing™ method of pasteurization results in a certified, validated 5-log reduction in bacteria, making our hemp seed ideal for RTE food formulations.River Valley manages 3,000 acres in Central Manitoba, perfectly located to grow both organic & conventional hemp seed for bulk ingredient and private label manufacturing. We continue to adhere to the highest food safety protocols, including GMP and GFSI standards. All these benefits, and no middlemen, make us a value-added partner in your supply chain. Contact us for more information!

name: Riverside Natural Foods, Inc.
description: From the beginning, our founders set out to make snacks for everyone. We knew we wanted to focus on what's truly good for people and the planet, which meant thinking through every element of our business. What started as a mission to create delicious snacks free of common allergens, became a pursuit of so much more. in 2012, we set up a dedicated nut-free facility and sourced pure, uncontaminated, organic, certified gluten-free oats. We became a Certified B-Corp, upholding a triple bottom line promise. We established healthy grower relationships, our Zero Wastes commitment and 100% sustainable packaging action plan? all of which have manifested themselves in our many certifications.We're still on the journey, but we're committed to a thoughtful pursuit each step of the way.

name: ROAR Organic
description: Will update at a later time.

name: ROAST FOODS
description: WE STARETED RESEARSCHING PLANT- BASED SEEDS AND ANCIENT GRAINS FROM WHICH SNACKS COULD BE MADE IN MODERN AVTAR.THIS HOW ROAST FOOD WAS BORN.

name: Robust International Inc
description: Headquartered in Singapore with offices in more than 20 countries worldwide, Robust International has a vast global operational network that gives us the ability and scale to serve and satisfy all of our clients across the continents. The group’s strong focus and major presence in Asia, Africa and Europe gives us complete control over the procurement and sourcing of necessary raw materials in order to ensure that we always offer the highest level of service and efficient distribution to our global customer base.

name: Rodelle Inc
description: The Rodelle story began in 1936 when a food chemist from France left the city lights of Paris to settle in Denver, Colorado. Shortly thereafter, upon realizing that the United States lacked a high-quality pure vanilla extract supplier, two business partners decided to mine their knowledge and connections to produce their own premium vanilla stateside. That decision led to the founding of Rodelle Laboratories, which soon revolutionized the world of gourmet flavorings and baking ingredients.The chateau depicted in the Rodelle logo is both a nod to the French culture that ignited our passion for premium ingredients as well as a visual that conveys the sense of belonging and nostalgia associated with enjoying amazing food in the company of loved ones… at home.Today, Rodelle is dedicated to making a lasting impact by:- Continuing to foster relationships with vanilla farmers to improve their quality of life- Ensuring product and supply chain transparency so consumers can make informed purchasing decisions- Delivering a line of culinary products designed to delight those who love cooking and baking, from the novice bakers to the seasoned pros

name: Roelmi HPC USA
description: At ROELMI HPC, we transcend industry standards, paving the way for innovation and excellence in the world of well-being and beyond.We strongly focus our activity on the research, design and production of innovative actives and functional ingredients to offer sustainable solutions through an ethical and responsible choice. At ROELMI HPC, we are a catalyst for change, symbolizing paramount progress in the world of personal care and nutraceuticals - strictly focused on an approach directed towards environmental preservation, biodiversity safeguarding and the use of renewable sources.BIOTECH: Advanced research for transformative solutions that utilize precision microbial fermentations to revalue the by-products of Italian industry value chains and utilize them to contribute to environment preservation.BOTANICALS: The synergy between science and nature, harnessing the rich botanical diversity of the Dolomites and Mediterranean region to create premium extracts for health and wellness.As the North American sales branch, ROELMI HPC USA is able to provide a 360° support from technical, regulatory and formulation standpoints. Flexibility and reactivity, along with a deep knowledge of the local market allow us to assist customers from the very selection of the ingredient up to the product launch.

name: ROKUBEI Co., Ltd
description: Our company is a wholesale and retail Japanese tea company that has inherited the tradition of a family business founded in 1818. With a wide procurement network throughout Japan, we deliver fresh, high-quality products directly from producers and factories, reflecting our customers' needs to the fullest extent possible, based on the spirit of "ichigo ichie" (a once-in-a-lifetime encounter). We also offer OEM contract manufacturing for small lots with short delivery times. Recently, we have been focusing on single-origin products, primarily from organic farms and limited varieties from all over Japan.

name: Rondi's Kitchen
description: In 1980, even before the organic industry began, necessity inspired me to develop and pioneer the first organic baby foods.  I founded Healthy Times organic baby foods and pioneered the first organic baby foods on the market. My mission was to give children a healthy start. I started with a teething biscuit. After my pediatrician asked me where to get the biscuit my baby was chewing on, I decided to make them available to moms. I found a bakery who would make my biscuits, using my recipe and went to the first show (Natural Products Expo). The biscuits went nationwide! From there my vision was to fill in the baby section with the first healthy, organic option for moms. I created organic baby cereal, jar baby foods, baby's first cookie, toddler cookies, puffed snacks/cereals for toddlers. I also created baby care products under Baby's Herbal Garden that consisted of natural shampoo, bath, lotion, conditioner and oil.  The line was the first natural baby care line.  I sold the lines in the US nationwide, Canada, Singapore, South Korea, Hong Kong, Indonesia, & China. After my children grew up, I began cooking for my dogs. I then realized my dogs are just like babies. It was important to keep them healthy and stay away from products that could contain harmful pesticides or chemicals. I created a high quality pancake mix out of organic ingredients that are good for them. I use the same sources as I did for baby food knowing how clean the ingredients are. Making organic pancakes for my dogs is not only fun, but rewarding seeing them enjoy them and knowing how healthy they are. Quick & Easy too. I also discovered that there are no treats on the market that are tender enough for puppies, small dogs & seniors. I developed Lilly's Littles (named after my picky little girl Shihtzu) that are tender to eat and contain the best organic ingredients. I will continue creating organic, healthy foods for my dogs and am excited to share them with dog parents worldwide.

name: Root and Splendor
description: Root & Splendor is a woman-owned and operated home care brand redefining clean through proven performance, uncompromising ingredient safety, and intentional sustainability. Our premium laundry detergent and stain remover are powered by a 5-enzyme system and third-party lab tested to deliver serious cleaning at the micro-fiber level - with just one tablespoon per load. Made with transparent, 100% plant-based ingredients and no synthetic fragrance or fillers, and paired with low-waste packaging and sustainable formulas, Root & Splendor proves that plant-based can outperform conventional cleaners. Now carried in 500+ stores nationwide, we’re clean that performs - done right.

name: rootberry
description: rootberry started because one friend planted a seed with another. The seed was an idea. An idea that health began with food and that food could be delicious and nutritious. That idea became a bunch of talented people. That bunch set out to humbly set the table with tasty, healthy and easy foods that everyone would enjoy. And they did it. With a love of learning, a desire to share joy and the goal to find healthy, they created rootberry - and an array of real food, that's really good and good for you. Whether you're vegan, vegetarian or just want to eat less meat and processed foods, rootberry creates ways for more people to eat more plants more often. And as is true in life and love, it is the seeds we plant and nurture daily that truly make a difference in our own and other's lives. And that's the real idea of rootberry – to act purposefully every day knowing "from the roots come the fruits." Rootberry launch June 2021.

name: Rootsy Inc.
description: Rootsy is more than just a waffle brand — it's a reflection of my roots, my passion for wellness, and a commitment to making healthy eating simple, delicious, and meaningful. I'm Michelle Correa, a certified nutrition coach and trainer originally from Colombia. After more than a decade helping others improve their health, I moved to the U.S. with my husband Esteban in search of new opportunities and a deeper purpose. Rootsy was born from our shared dream: to bring the power of real, nourishing ingredients to everyday food.Our signature waffles are made with cassava — a naturally gluten-free root vegetable rich in fiber, minerals, and cultural heritage. Cassava has been a staple in Latin America for centuries, and through Rootsy, we honor that tradition while embracing modern, mindful eating. After testing seven different recipes in our home kitchen, we created a waffle that's clean, nutrient-dense, and truly satisfying: just simple ingredients, no seed oils, no added sugar, and nothing to hide.We launched Rootsy in 2023, cooking in a small commercial kitchen in Florida and working directly with a local distributor who believed in our mission.
