From those humble beginnings, we've grown quickly — expanding across Florida, partnering with a trusted co-packer, and building momentum with key retail partners.As of this month, Rootsy is officially available in all Fresh Thyme locations, and we are now onboarded with both KeHE and UNFI, opening the door to national distribution. We're also launching in Central Market and preparing for rollout with new retail partners on the West Coast.Rootsy is proudly Latina-founded and built on resilience, purpose, and deep cultural connection. More than a product, we're creating a movement that reconnects people with their roots, their health, and the power of simplicity. With every waffle, we aim to inspire better choices, elevate everyday wellness, and celebrate the beauty of returning to what's natural and real.

name: Rosotix
description: Midday energy is broken. Most busy professionals hit a 3PM crash — tired, distracted, and a little hungry. The default fix? More coffee, tea, or sweet energy drinks. These options feel repetitive and unsatisfying. Today's working professional is burned out on mindless caffeine!At Gobbi, we're more than just a drink—we're redefining what it means to energize and nourish your body. Launched in November 2025, our brand was born out of the desire for something different: a comforting, savory alternative to traditional coffee and tea. By combining the rich, satisfying flavors of broths with the natural benefits of tea such as caffeine + L-theanine, we've created a drink that's as satisfying as it is energizing.What makes Gobbi special is our innovation. We're offering a bold, new take on hot beverages that fuels both body and mind. Gobbi is the perfect pick-me-up when you're a little hungry, a little tired, and need something nourishing. We're on a mission to help busy professionals, wellness enthusiasts, and productivity hackers be the best versions of themselves using clean, wholesome ingredients that taste as good as they make you feel. Our innovative single-serving powdered packets, just like tea packets, make it easy to enjoy a nourishing, savory drink anytime, anywhere.Beyond the product, Gobbi is about community. Our journey began with a personal story—a busy professional craving something fulfilling and nourishing. Today, it's about building a tribe of like-minded individuals who value wellness, performance, and the power of comfort in their daily routines.

name: Rousselot, Inc
description: Rousselot is the global leader of collagen-based solutions* for the food, health and nutrition, biomedical and pharmaceutical sectors. Working in partnership with our global customer-base, we deliver advanced ingredient solutions that enable innovation, excite today’s consumers, and contribute to public health. Through our state-of-the-art operations, extensive technical expertise and sustained scientific research, we help our customers achieve their goals, create world-class products, and we “Reach further together”. Rousselot is Darling Ingredients' health brand.

name: Rovagnati North America LLC
description: Rovagnati was founded in 1943 by Paolo Rovagnati. Paolo Rovagnati was the main source of inspiration for innovation in products and processes for many decades and he led his Company to become one of the most trustworthy food companies in Italy. Driven by his passion, Paolo Rovagnati, crafted a line of salumi so distinctive that it has not been altered for decades. ROVAGNATI is still to these days a 100% family-owned Italian company: Loyalty, Courage,Teamwork, Foresight, Commitment, Simpleness are the family values that drive our work andpush us to strive for excellence.

name: Royal Ingredients Group - Royal Natural Foods
Rudi's Bakery
description: The year is 1976. The place is Boulder, Colorado. And the vibe is impossibly groovy.It's in this setting that our founder, Sheldon Romer, opens a small bakery named after Rudi Swami Rudrananda, a 20th century spiritual leader. (Boulder in the 70s, am I right?)The shop's vision was simple: When you combine the best-possible ingredients with traditional expertise, you'll have craveable, nourishing baked staples that keep customers coming back again … and again and again and again.

name: Rumiano Cheese Company
description: Rumiano Cheese Company is a 105 year old, family owned cheese company in Northern California specializing in highly nutritious, organic, pasture raised and grazed dairy. We exist to ensure the success local organic dairy farms in northern, CA.

name: Runamok
description: Ranked "BEST OVERALL MAPLE SYRUP" by the editors of Food & Wine.Runamok is a family-owned, Vermont-based maple producer innovating maple syrup for the breakfast table and beyond. We offer a unique line of pure, barrel-aged, smoked, and infused syrups made with the highest quality ingredients, elegant packaging, and a commitment to environmental and social responsibility.Founded in 2016, Runamok quickly captured the attention of the food world. Our syrups have been featured in Oprah’s Favorite Things, Saveur, Food & Wine, and more. As our reputation grew, so did our product offerings. In addition to our signature maple syrups, we introduced maple-based cocktail mixers and bitters, as well as innovative products like our one-of-a-kind Sparkle Syrup.Today, Runamok is recognized as the nation’s leading premium maple brand, available in over 2,100 stores across the U.S. and internationally, as well as online. While we continue to innovate and expand our offerings, our commitment to quality and creativity remains at the heart of everything we do.

name: Rustic Bakery
description: Carol LeValley & Josh Harris started Rustic Bakery on a whim in 2005. The couple found their passion for baking in a simple sourdough flatbread cracker that Carol would whip up for friends. They stopped at the San Francisco Ferry Building outlet of Cowgirl Creamery, and mentioned to owners Sue Conley and Peggy Smith that their cheeses deserved artisan crackers. The Cowgirls bit, literally, into a sourdough flatbread and immediately placed an order for 50 cases.  The first flatbread crackers were produced in a commercial bakery space behind a wine bar which was quickly taken over and turned into a cafe where Carol and Josh served coffee, baked goods and salads accompanied with flatbread crackers.

name: Ryder System, Inc.
description: Whether you’re an emerging or established brand, we pride ourselves on offering customized, state-of-the-art, sustainable co-packaging and co-manufacturing solutions. From building and producing to delivering the finished product and everything in between, we have strategically placed facilities across North America. This distinct approach allows speed to market for products, cuts down on costs, and gives you real time accessibility to your products.

name: Ryutsu Service Co., Ltd.
description: As the fourth-generation tea master, I began exploring tea marketing while backpacking around the world as a student. People in many countries told me that powder tea was easier  to enjoy , which inspire me to pursue matcha, the King of Tea, since our funding in 1989. Today, I practice the sixth-sector model-both farming and selling the matcha I grow. With unique production methods and sustainable cultivation  under solar panels aligned with the SDG's, I create matcha that carries tradition into the future.

name: Saanroo/Pharmako
description: Introduced new ingredients for appetite suppression, testosterone boosting and healthy blood sugar, backed by human clinical trials.

name: Sabico Food Corp
description: We start the business with partners as food experts with our goal: Must be good Food

name: Sabinsa
description: Sabinsa, established in 1988, is a global leader in developing and supplying high-quality herbal extracts, cosmeceuticals, probiotics, and specialty fine chemicals. Renowned for seamlessly blending cutting-edge scientific innovation with time-honored Ayurvedic wisdom, Sabinsa’s mission is to provide evidence-based natural products for human functional nutrition and well-being. For over 35 years, the company has introduced more than 130 standardized botanical extracts, each backed by rigorous clinical research conducted in collaboration with prestigious institutions and published in respected scientific journals. With a commitment to excellence, Sabinsa is part of the Sami-Sabinsa Group, which employs over 1,800 professionals across 27 state-of-the-art manufacturing, R&D, and distribution facilities worldwide.Sabinsa’s mission is to be a responsible biotechnology based research, manufacturing and marketing company supplying the finest raw materials to provide innovative solutions to the dietary supplement, cosmetic, specialty chemical and pharmaceutical industries. Sabinsa's specialized services include custom product development, technical support and testing lab facilities, assistance in clinical evaluation and protocol implementation. At our Utah, USA NSF GMP fully Halal plant, we have contract manufacturing services to help you develop tablets, bi-layer tablets, capsules as well as intermediary services such as milling, blending, roll compacting, and granulation. Sabinsa has established marketing offices in the USA, Australia, China, Europe, Japan, South Korea and South Africa.Presently Sabinsa currently owns over 120 USA & International patents, and has 100 pending patent applications worldwide. The company also has many recognized trademarked ingredients such as BioPerine®, Boswellin®, Citrin®, Curcumin C3 Complex®, DigeZyme®, ForsLean®, LactoSpore®, SelenoForce®, and Selenium SeLECT®.

name: Sabinsa Wellness
description: Sabinsa Wellness turns breakthrough science into groundbreaking products. Three brands are united by philosophy of offering clinically tested Ayurvedic herbs; America's Finest Inc. focuses on ingredient-specific benefits, Sanutra Wellness addresses condition-specific formulations, and Nature's Formulary offers clinically-substantiated traditional Ayurvedic supplements. Sabinsa Wellness focuses on science, tradition, and quality–delivering transformative wellness solutions that enrich lives.  As the consumer products division of Sabinsa—a global leader in standardized herbal extracts and nutraceuticals. It operates three specialized brands that deliver targeted wellness solutions: Building on Sabinsa's 30+ years of botanical expertise and clinical research.America’s Finest Inc. (AFI)America’s Finest Inc. (AFI) creates science-backed dietary supplements using traditional ingredients known for their long-standing health benefits. Each product is thoughtfully developed to maximize consumer benefit, drawing on the natural power of time-honored ingredients and the support of modern research. The brand is committed to delivering high-quality solutions that empower individuals to take a proactive approach to long-term health. For more information, visit afisupplements.com.Sanutra Wellness Sanutra Wellness offers a focused line of condition-specific dietary supplements designed to support targeted areas of health and wellness. With a portfolio of six thoughtfully formulated products, Sanutra Wellness combines trusted ingredients with scientific rigor to deliver effective solutions that help individuals address their unique health needs. Sanutra Wellness is a brand under America’s Finest Inc. (AFI), expanding its mission to provide high-quality, purpose-driven wellness products. For more information, visit afisupplements.com.About Nature’s FormularyWith over 32 years of experience, Nature’s Formulary is one of the most trusted Ayurvedic supplement companies in the United States. The brand is committed to supporting long-term wellness through high-quality, vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO supplements made with 100% natural ingredients. Rooted in the belief that true health comes from balance and harmony with nature, Nature’s Formulary integrates the principles of Ayurveda into every product. The brand is equally committed to environmental and ethical practices through its ongoing social responsibility initiatives. Learn more at naturesformulary.com.

name: Safe Catch
description: Our tuna is traceable from catch to can and we only buy from captains whose fish come from managed and sustainable tuna stocks. Using our proprietary technology, we are able to test every single fish for its mercury content. If it doesn't meet our purity standards we don't buy it.  It still may be a good tuna, but it's not a Safe Catch tuna.Other canned tunas lose flavor and Omega 3s due to machine processing. We hand pack pure, raw tuna steaks to retain maximum nutrients and then slow cook them to perfection.

name: Safflower Technologies International
description: Safflower Technologies International(STI) is your source for identity preserved non-GMO  quality specialty ingredients marketing new and superior products of safflower, hemp, flax, sunflowers, pulses, specialty cereal grains that preserve the varietal integrity from the farmer's field, to our elevators, all the way to the end user. 40 years of established conventional plant breeding programs, organic availability, all natural, GMO free options, facilities in multiple states, grown in the USA.

name: Saffron Road
description: Founded in 2010 by Adnan Durrani, a pioneer in the organic food sector, Saffron Road was created to meet the growing demand for superior, better-for-you food options. Our mission is to innovate culinary experiences by offering premium-quality entrées that are better for the environment, farmers, animals, and your health—without compromising on taste.Our name, inspired by the legendary Silk Road, reflects our commitment to uniting diverse cultures through ethical consumerism and clean foods. We collaborate with passionate chefs who honor authentic recipes and traditional cooking methods to deliver genuine flavors.At Saffron Road, we believe in lifting others up and leaving a positive impact on the planet. We are eager to discover new foods, flavors, and ingredients, continually learning about different cultures and people.Join us on our Journey to Better™ as we inspire and elevate your palate with our ethical food adventures. Discover your direct route to the world's greatest cuisines with Saffron Road.

name: Saiga Foods
description: Hi! We are a women & minority-owned Asian food brand that makes it really easy for anyone to enjoy chef-quality Asian flavors in less than 5 minutes. We currently have 2 products available, frozen Brisket Pho and Chicken Pho.We wanted to honor our Vietnamese heritage with a pho that's clean-tasting yet bursting with authentic flavor. Our broth is simmered for 24+ hours to produce rich, tasty bone broth that is rich in collagen and nutrients. We formulated our recipe keeping the modern health-conscious consumer in mind so our products are all-natural, MSG-free, gluten-free and preservative-free. Cultural cuisine is a white space opportunity and we're the first clean-label, chef-quality Pho products on the market. Most instant pho products available contain little nutrients, high in sodium and contain MSG. In addition, most current pho kits require you to do additional prep (adding your own meat, garnishes etc. Our product requires zero prep! Each package comes ready-to-eat with broth, noodles, meat and garnishes. It only takes 5 mins in the microwave or stovetop to prepare. It is a complete restaurant-quality bowl of Pho ready at your convenience.At Saiga Foods, our mission is to pay homage to the iconic childhood flavors we grew up with, while reimagining them for the modern lifestyle and diet. We hope that you will help us with our mission!

name: Saite S.R.L.
description: SAITE. S.R.L., was legally organized as a Limited Liability Company on May 7, 1987 - represented by Mr Dionicio Huayllani Marca- dedicated to the production, processing and marketing from organic farming products. SAITE SRL, as a food processing company, has the following certifications: FSSC 22000 Certification Scheme, FSSC 22000 Certificate issued by TÜV Rheiland, FDA Certificate (United States Food and Drug Administration), USDA (Organic Production under NOP-USDA) USCOEA (United States-Canada Organic Equivalence Arrangement), Regutalion (EU) 2018/848, certified by CERES GmbH, Law 10.831 Organic products certified IBD / Brazil, China Organic Standard GB/T 19630 certified by WIT Assessment Co. Ltd, Kosher Certification, Halal Product Certificate and Sedex/Member. Certifications that guarantee the food safety, quality and origin of our products from Bolivia.

name: Saltverk
description: High-minerality, sustainable sea salt from Iceland- Natural high-minerality sea salt with nothing added and nothing taken away- Produced using 100% renewable geothermal energy- Industry-low heavy metals, third-party tested- Used by top chefs and Michelin starred restaurants worldwide- The Climate Label certified by the Change Climate Project with continual investment in climate-forward projects to reduce future emissions and offset current footprint- One of the top three sea salt brands selling on Amazon- Kosher Certified- Flavors are deeply connected with Icelandic customs, culture and traditions- Uses pristine seawater from one of the purest fjords in Iceland - Hand-harvested using an artisanal, sustainable and environmentally friendly method dating from the 17th century

name: Samasta Foods Private Limited
description: Like every good thing, Samasta Foods also started with the ideato do something for the world. Samasta Foods is a certified organic food company that only puts forward the purest and completely unadulterated food in the market. We, at SamastaFoods, not only manufacture and supply 100% pure and certified organic food to our clients, we do this keeping quality and accessibility our focus areas. We're a one-stop-shop, healthy food manufacturing company with everything under one roof – Ready to Cook food, Ready to Eat, Protein Bars and much more.With our team of procurement masters, production experts, recipe maestros, we make an end to end organic food brand for our clients to sell to direct customers. We offer more than 200 organic food products, in bulk as well as consumer packs. Our journey started as an idea which soon became the core of our very existence.

name: SAMIYA (SAMIYAMEALS SA)
description: SAMIYA was born from the deep desire of our hearts of sharing our tropical flavors, through the manufacturing of processed food products made from plantains coming from Ecuador – the middle of the world!Our history dates back to 2007 as a family business passionate about the countryside and its traditional food products. Since our very beginnings, we have offered our products internationally by selling under the name of renowned brands owned by our clients. Following our hearts in 2017, we jumped-off the cliff and founded SAMIYA in the pursuit of getting closer to you and turning your everyday moments into delightful experiences topped with amazing flavors!

name: Sammy Piquant
description: We were founded in 2021 during Covid, as a non-drinker our founder struggled to socialise once the lockdowns lifted and decided to meet a growing market demand of people who want amazing sophisticated flavours without compromising their health

name: Samroiyod Corp., Ltd.
description: Thailand is the land of many tropical fruits. Tropical fruits are popular for people all around the world. Fruits are delicious, healthy, feeling fresh & happiness when eating. We are manufacturer in Thailand of various products: Canned fruit / Pineapple juice concentrate / Dehydrated fruits / Frozen fruits. We export products to all around the world. Our company established since 1978. Our special products are Organic products & Fairtrade products. We get certified international standard: BRC / IFS / HACCP / HALAL / KOSHER

name: Samyang Corporation
description: With a century of experience, Samyang Corporation is a leading food ingredient manufacturer. We provide a range of products from basic commodities like sucrose, flour, starch, starch sweeteners, and edible oil to specialized ingredients. Our sugar reduction toolbox includes Nexweet® Allulose and Fiberest® Resistant Dextrin, and our dietary fiber offerings include Kestose (short-chain Fructooligosaccharide), Galactooligosaccharides, Isomaltooligosaccharide, Polydextrose, and more.Samyang Corporation is committed to delivering exceptional results for our customers by providing expert technical services, including new product development, product renewal, quality improvement, and regulatory advice. We aim to create greater customer synergy through our world-class technology and services.

name: San Diablo Artisan Churros
description: Since 2016, San Diablo Artisan Churros has handmade literally millions of fresh churros on our mission to fill lives with happiness one churro at a time at 8,000+ weddings, corporate parties, festivals and sporting events and with 35,000 churro-making kits sold worldwide.In 2024, we launched our new frozen Take & Bake churros so that everyone can have the highest quality churros on demand. You can find our retail churro packs in Super Targets, Associated Foods, Harmons, Gelson's and Bristol Farms and our food service churro offerings for restaurants, theme parks and sporting venues wanting a premium churro offering.  In 2025, we launched crunchy gourmet churro bits called Itty Bitty Churros as an irresistible snack for retail and convenience stores as well as toppings and inclusions for restaurants, quick serve dessert shops and food manufacturers.

name: San Miguel Foods
description: San Miguel Foods was founded in 1971 as a family-owned business in the heart of Mexico, San Miguel de Allende, a city known for its vibrant culture and rich culinary heritage. Our journey began with a passion for crafting high-quality, authentic Mexican food, using fresh, natural ingredients to bring the flavors of Mexico to the world. Over three generations, we have grown into a trusted global brand, combining tradition with innovation to create ready-to-eat meals that are as convenient as they are delicious, staying true to our mission to make food that people love and feel good about.

name: San-J International
description: San-J is a manufacturer of premium tamari soy sauce that first began in Japan in 1804.  Started importing to the US in the 70's and in 1987 built a factory in Henrico, VA.  Henrico was chosen based on the convenient  location and climate similar to Mie Japan where it started.  SInce then the factory underwent and expansion due to consumer demands and makes Asian cooking sauce, Splash Umami Tamari and a No Soy Tamari.

name: Santevia Water Systems
description: Santevia wasn't born in a boardroom it started with a genuine need. Because wellness should always feel simple.When founder David struggled with his health, his wife Yvonne spent months researching natural solutions, eventually discovering something that changed everything: mineralized water. What began as a personal health breakthrough expanded when they both noticed additionalbenefits like renewed energy, mental clarity,and a daily sense of vitality.Through this discovery, it became clear that water today often lacks what our bodies truly need to thrive. Most treated water is safe, but it loses the essential minerals that naturally hydrate and support wellness. Santevia was created to bring water back to its purest form, restoring essential minerals through a science-backed method inspired by how water filters through rock and earth in nature.As our research and understanding deepened, so did our purpose. Mineralized water isn't just refreshing, it's a simple but powerful way to gently energize, naturally nourish every cell, and unlock the potential to feel your best.This potential is why we exist. Because this isn't just filtered water, it's water designed to help you live fully.

name: Santini Foods, Inc.
description: Santini Foods is a direct manufacturer of Sweetened Condensed Milk, both conventional and organic, along with Organic Evaporated Milk in retail and food service sizes.  We produce chocolate and Caramel syrups in our label as well as multiple private labels, both conventional and organic.  We bottle XV Olive oil and Avocado Oil as well.We import many items from Italy and Southeast Asia, including Pesto, Truffle Oil, Fresh Squeezed Sicilian Blood Orange Juice , Sriracha, Sambol, and Sweet Chili Sauce

name: Sauer Brands
description: From the pure-flavoring extracts first introduced by Conrad Frederick Sauer in the 19th century at CF Sauer Products to the branded and private label spices, mixes, sauces and more that define our brand today, Sauer Brands, Inc. continues to innovate and grow. We source globally and then conceive and produce our quality products right here in the USA.

name: Sauz
description: We're Troy and Winston. We founded Sauz because we love pasta. Winston grew up cooking alongside his Italian family in the kitchen of his grandmother. Food, particularly pasta, was part of his family (and cultural) identity.When in college, we would often cook pasta - a quick and easy meal - for both ourselves and friends.After semester or so of college pasta, we'd grown tired of boring, bland and archaic sauces. As two Gen-Z founders looking to innovate, we wondered why every single sauce on-shelf was the same; lackluster aesthetics, no vibrancy and without any unique flavors.Somebody had to spice it up. So we did.

name: Savannah Bee Company
description: Education, Stewardship and LoveYou'll notice our name doesn't contain the word "honey"—our mission has always been about the bees.This year, we celebrated our 20th anniversary. From day one to today, everything we do at Savannah Bee Co. is so bees can continue their sacred work of building hives, pollinating flowers, powering our food supply, and spreading beauty. We understand that climate change, pesticides, and other threats to the bees' fragile ecosystems also affect humanity, and we believe healthy bees make for a healthy planet. Saving the bees remains our highest priority.Of course, we're committed to bringing our customers the most delicious honey sourced from beekeepers around the world, most of whom we know by name. These beekeepers share our passion for saving the bees, and each of their carefully-tended hives promotes a healthy bee population and a better environment. More beekeepers means more bees, and we have helped develop and sustain a beekeeping culture in the Caribbean by providing equipment, marketing, and education to aspiring apiarists.We believe our greatest impact is in education. The Bee Cause Project has provided 800 grants in schools across the country and beyond, introducing children to the science of bees and giving them a hands-on connection between these magnificent pollinators and their own lives. We also encourage higher education in our own community, donating proceeds from our Peace Honey to the Frank Callen Boys & Girls Club, an organization that helps guide local students into college.With each jar of honey, bee-powered beauty product, and cultivated hive, we're working to save the bees. And with every purchase from Savannah Bee Company -you are too.

name: Save the Bee
description: Founded in 2012, Save the Bee® is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit working to protect the pollinators that sustain our food system, environment, and health.At Expo West, we’re bringing the story to life.Our booth features live honey bees in a working observation hive and the Bee Impact Wall, a visual map of how pollination connects fruits, vegetables, nuts, oils, livestock feed, fibers, and final consumer products across the natural products industry. It’s a firsthand look at the invisible system that powers nearly every aisle at the show.Bees pollinate roughly 75 percent of the crops that keep us fed and healthy. They support forage for livestock, fiber for clothing, and countless ingredients brands rely on every day. Yet commercial beekeepers are losing colonies at alarming rates due to disease, habitat loss, and environmental stress.Save the Bee funds bee and hive health research, restores pollinator habitat on working lands, and supports education and beekeeper resilience nationwide. Our work goes beyond honey to the full role bees play in sustaining food systems and biodiversity.We work directly with farmers, researchers, and food brands through our Save the Bee licensing and collaboration program. Partners integrate real pollinator impact into products, packaging, and storytelling while funding research, habitat restoration, and on-the-ground solutions.At Expo West, we’re here to educate, connect, and collaborate.Come see the bees.Explore your pollination footprint.Start a conversation about how your brand can help protect the system that feeds us.Our story is still being written—by every partner, donor, and company that joins the movement to Save the Bee®. Read more about why we're coming to Expo Westhttps://www.savethebee.org

name: SAVIA INT'L CO.,LTD.
description: The success of the aloe vera drink market relies on brand and product differentiation. SAVIA Aloe Vera Drink stands out through strong brand loyalty, unique flavor, product quality and intuitive design. SAVIA consistently sought after by consumers and keep the design & brand story for over 15 years. SAVIA aloe vera drink with Korean pear flavor has been received positive feedback in the European market. SAVIA positions itself in the global market by offering premium aloe vera drinks that appeal to health-conscious consumers. The brand focuses on consistent quality, reliable service, and adapting to local preferences.

name: Saxco International
description: Visit Saxco International at Natural Products Expo West to source aluminum, glass and PET packaging solutions for your food and beverage brand.For more than 90 years, Saxco has been a leading full-service packaging partner for thousands of brands across every food and beverage category — including functional beverages, RTDs, beer, wine, spirits and non-alcoholic drinks, sauces, condiments, specialty foods and more.We specialize in:Aluminum cans and bottles (blank, sleeved, digitally printed and direct printed cans, in standard, sleek, slim and specialty formats)Glass bottles and jars (stock and custom molds)Custom mold development and package designCustom corrugate packagingAs a preferred distributor for the nation’s largest can manufacturers and many global glass producers, Saxco provides secure supply chain access, competitive and transparent pricing, and flexible purchasing options. We help brands reduce freight costs, improve inventory, free up cash flow, and scale with confidence by leveraging our nationwide network of more than 20 strategically located warehouses.Our regional sales managers, dedicated customer success personnel and in-house graphics team bring deep category expertise and hands-on support — from initial packaging selection through commercialization and national rollout. Whether you need in-stock packaging for speed to market or fully customized, branded solutions, Saxco delivers exemplary service and reliable execution at every stage of growth.Stop by our booth to explore end-to-end packaging solutions built to help your brand scale and stand out.

name: SBY Matcha
description: SBY Matcha is one of China’s premier producers of high-quality matcha, backed by 20,000 acres of ecologically managed tea gardens. With over 30 years of expertise in traditional Japanese matcha techniques, we focus on scientific management and careful selection of tea tree varieties.Our specialty lies in producing premium to high-end matcha, ultra-fine green tea powders, and developing innovative matcha products. Each batch undergoes strict quality and safety standards to ensure unparalleled excellence.

name: SC Global Coco Products, Inc.
description: SC Global Coco Products, Inc. is a family-owned Coconut producing company based in the Philippines. We sell certified organic coconut oil from Baybay, Leyte; certified by Ecocert.  We also produce FFL and ROC certified coconut oil that has passed BRC standards.  Our company is committed to growing with our farmers and providing the best service to our customers.

name: Scent Fill
description: Scent Fill began with you in mind. Our founder, Mark Callison, was sending his daughter Alyssa a care package while she was away at college when she asked him to include some plug in air fresheners to make her dorm feel fresh and welcoming. Like any parent, he wanted her space to feel safe, cozy, and like home.While looking for options, Mark was surprised to find that most plug in air fresheners contained only trace amounts of essential oils. That fell short of the cleaner, healthier ingredients he wanted for his daughter — and that families like yours deserve.While other home and personal care products had moved toward more natural alternatives, plug ins were still behind. Mark knew you needed a better option and set out to make it happen.Determined to raise the standard, Mark invested in extensive research, rigorous testing, and partnered with top perfumers. After countless trials, Scent Fill launched in 2017 as a family-owned and operated brand, proudly introducing the first 100% natural plug in air freshener. In 2023, the story came full circle when Alyssa joined the business, working alongside her dad to help guide the next chapter of Scent Fill.

name: Scott's Honey LLC
description: Scott's Honey was born from a simple belief: honey should be pure, honest, and exactly as nature made it. Our story begins across the Atlantic in the rolling hills of Wales, where Hilltop Honey grew from a small, passion-driven startup into the United Kingdom's second largest honey brand. Built on transparency, sustainable practices, and a commitment to exceptional quality, Hilltop earned the trust of millions of households—and reshaped expectations for what honey could and should be.As demand for real, responsibly sourced honey grew, so did the opportunity to share that philosophy beyond the UK. Scott's Honey represents the next chapter of that journey. Created to bring Hilltop's values and standards to the United States, Scott's is rooted in the same principles that fueled our rise overseas: authenticity, craftsmanship, and an unshakeable dedication to doing right by consumers, beekeepers, and the planet.From day one, we made a promise—to offer honey that is never diluted, never adulterated, and always traceable. Each batch undergoes rigorous testing and is sourced from trusted beekeepers who share our respect for pollinators and biodiversity. Whether the honey comes from the wildflower fields of the U.S., the sun-soaked landscapes of South America, or the vibrant floral regions across Europe, we ensure it meets the high standards that defined Hilltop's success.Scott's Honey isn't just a product; it's a continuation of a mission that started with a single beekeeper and a belief in better honey. As we grow across America, we bring with us the innovation, transparency, and sustainability practices that made Hilltop a household name.Our story is still unfolding—but its heart remains unchanged: real honey, responsibly sourced, delivered with integrity.Scott's Honey—nature's goodness, now proudly shared with America

name: Scratch Food Group
description: Scratch was founded with a simple but powerful idea: to make plant-based food that everyone can enjoy. Our founder, Brian Lee, started Scratch out of a passion for food, sustainability, and creating options that would truly resonate with a wide audience.What began as a small-scale operation has since grown into a brand that partners with major retailers and food service providers across the nation, with a mission to make plant-based eating accessible and exciting.Our journey began when Brian recognized a gap in the market—many plant-based products were difficult to find, didn't taste good and were too expensive. As someone who had spent years in corporate America, Brian knew how to build a business and saw an opportunity to merge his expertise in sales and marketing with his love for innovative food.By combining cultural integrity with culinary excellence, we began crafting high-quality products like our unique seasoning blends, plant-based frying mixes, pancake mixes, and baking goods.Scratch's story is rooted in overcoming challenges. Brian's journey from humble beginnings to launching a company that's now thriving in retail and food service reflects resilience, passion, and the belief that you can build a brand that not only changes the industry but also empowers communities.Our diverse product line, inspired by American roots as well as global flavors, is a reflection of our commitment to making plant-based food accessible to all, regardless of background or dietary preference.Today, Scratch is more than just a food brand; it's a movement to bring exciting, flavorful, and culturally diverse plant-based options to the masses.We are proud of the journey that got us here and are excited for the future, as we continue to expand our reach and help people embrace the benefits of plant-based eating in a way that feels delicious, natural, and effortless.

name: Scyavuru
description: Established in 2005, by the will of partners Rosario Tortorici andNino Tornambè, Scyavuru is an Italian company located in a sceniccitrus grove on the picturesque southern coast of Sicily, in Ribera.The company derives its name from the ancient Sicilian dialectword "sciavuru", which means "perfume" or "aroma" and mainlyproduces spreads, jams and pestos. The aim that the company setsitself is to exploit the raw materials it produces within its own companiesin order to create and place the highest quality products on themarket

name: SDS Spices (PVt) Ltd
description: SDS Spices is one of Sri Lanka’s most established spice exporters, with roots in Ceylon cinnamon exports dating back generations. Specializing in premium cinnamon, pepper, cloves, and nutmeg, SDS supplies global markets through internationally certified facilities, combining heritage sourcing with modern quality standards.Building on this legacy, SDS developed Sweet Wood™ — the world’s first clinically studied Ceylon Cinnamon wellness shot. Powered by proprietary AquaFX™ solvent-free extraction technology, Sweet Wood transforms premium Sri Lankan cinnamon into a high-antioxidant, functional 60 ml shot designed to support healthy metabolic function.*By bridging traditional spice expertise with contemporary nutraceutical innovation, SDS and Sweet Wood represent the evolution of cinnamon — from commodity ingredient to science-backed functional wellness solution.*These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Sea Witch Botanicals
description: The inception of Sea Witch Botanicals was driven by a profound realization concerning the pervasive presence of synthetic chemicals in everyday products. Our Founder, Alesia, experienced firsthand the adverse effects of these substances during her tenure at a soap supply company, where synthetic fragrances were a primary component. The frequent headaches and general malaise among colleagues prompted her to investigate the ingredients more deeply.Alesia's research uncovered that many synthetic fragrances contain plastics and endocrine disruptors—substances known to interfere with hormonal systems. This discovery ignited a mission: to educate consumers about the true impact of synthetic fragrances and other petroleum-derived chemicals often marketed as safe.This commitment extends beyond personal well-being to environmental health. As Alesia often states, "What goes on our skin, travels through our bodies, and goes into our waterways." This understanding underscores our dedication to protecting aquatic ecosystems through education and by providing natural home and body products.Over the past eleven years, Sea Witch Botanicals has grown into a trusted resource for individuals seeking healthier alternatives as a purpose-driven company committed to crafting high-quality, all-natural, and ethically sourced home and body care products. Founded on principles of environmental stewardship and transparent ingredient sourcing, we offer a sustainable alternative to conventional goods.Our product line features a diverse range of botanical-based solutions, including household cleaners, personal care items, and aromatic delights, all formulated without harsh chemicals, synthetic fragrances, or harmful additives. Each product is meticulously handcrafted with a focus on efficacy, purity, and minimal environmental impact.At Sea Witch Botanicals, we believe that businesses have a responsibility to contribute positively to the planet and its inhabitants. We are dedicated to promoting conscious consumerism by providing products that are not only effective but also align with our values of sustainability, cruelty-free practices, and community well-being.  We are proud and honored to be a certified B Corporation and a dedicated member of 1% for the Planet, solidifying our commitment to environmental and social responsibility. We continually strive to innovate and expand our offerings, ensuring that every item reflects our unwavering commitment to a healthier home and a healthier Earth. We are enthusiastic about the opportunity to share these products with an even broader audience.

name: Seapoint Farms
description: Here at Seapoint Farms, we offer natural, high-quality, healthy, and great-tasting food. Our motto is Enjoy Life... Eat Well and we truly believe it!We specialize in a variety of edamame products from dry roasted, to fire roasted, to frozen, to organic. Our edamame pasta only contains one ingredient, organic edamame! We also offer lentil snacks.What goes in your body is important to us, and that's why we only use simple and clean ingredients. All of our products are NON-GMO Verified, vegetarian, and most of our products are gluten-free, vegan, and Kosher!

name: Season Brand
description: Season Premium Sardines is a 100-year-old premium sardine brand, established in 1921. The Season® brand was first distributed to grocery stores in New York and New Jersey and has grown into a staple to consumers across the country. Season is known for its sustainably-caught and carefully hand-packed sardines, using traditional canning methods and high-quality ingredients. Today, Season has over 40+ SKUs in 6 Canned Fish segments (Sardines, Tuna, Mackerel, Anchovies, Seaweed Caviar and Kippers).

name: SEASON34
description: Nearly 40 percent of a woman's lifetime is spent navigating hormone shifts, yet most products still treat menopause as a single symptom—or ignore it entirely. Seeing this gap, serial wellness entrepreneur Irene Rojas Stanbury and her mother, Dr. Maria Guadalupe Stanbury, a physician-researcher with 40 years in women's metabolic health, set out to rewrite the playbook.In early 2024 they began a year-long R&D sprint, pairing Irene's $23 million direct-to-consumer track record with Dr. Maria's clinical insight. Their goal was bold but clear: build the first brand engineered to address all 34 documented menopause symptoms with drug- and hormone-free precision. The result is SEASON34, debuting at this show as a turnkey opportunity for retailers and healthcare partners eager to serve an underserved $6 billion U.S. category poised for double-digit growth.Launching with nine patent-pending formulas—including a menopause-specific synbiotic, hormonal balance blend, and targeted solutions for sleep, cognition, metabolism, and more—SEASON34 offers an integrative system that women can personalize through quizzes, symptom tracking, and 1-to-1 coaching. Every ingredient is clinically dosed, third-party tested, and packed in two-year-shelf-life, refill-ready packaging.But SEASON34 is more than capsules in a bottle. It is a stigma-free ecosystem built on three pillars:Science without compromise — gold-standard actives, transparent labels, and ongoing clinical trials. Compassion in every touchpoint — education, coaching, and community that turn confusion into confidence. Seamless integration — subscription models, an app, and retailer-ready merchandising that fit effortlessly into modern lifestyles. By treating menopause as a powerful season of renewal rather than decline, SEASON34 invites partners to elevate an entire generation's well-being—and capture meaningful, repeatable revenue—in one decisive move. Join us as we turn a long-overlooked life stage into a vibrant, profitable, and dignified new market.

name: Seely Mint
description: My Family has been raising peppermint and spearmint for the tea and oil since 1943.  Today, I raise it the same way my parents and grandparents did.  I produce mints oils with a unique Terroir that is unmatched.  I use these oils to hand make my mint confections right on the farm.  One pint of my pure heirloom black mitcham peppermint oil makes 41,200 of my mint patties!I started the confectionary side the fall of 2007.  The year I lost $100,000 raising mint.  Big Buyers had pushed the price of oil down so low many mint farmers quit.  I decided to start selling mint confections at the Farmer's market in Portland Oregon.  By 2009 Seely Mint was in Whole Foods Markets.

name: Segev Food International, Inc.
description: Our sister company was founded in 1987  and is a privately owned company with a solid history in the food industry.In 1996 we opened our US office to provide our customers the best service. Segev Food has a very broad platform of products that it specializes in ranging from cold-pressed oils to fruit concentrates, food solutions, and food ingredients.

name: Sego Lily Skincare, LLC
description: Regenerative Beauty from Montana's Yellowstone ValleySego Lily Skincare is pioneering the regenerative beauty movement by transforming grass-finished tallow—a nutrient-dense byproduct traditionally landfilled—into premium, bio-identical skincare. Sourced exclusively from a USDA certified organic, regenerative ranch in Montana, every jar creates a new revenue stream for sustainable ranchers while delivering clinical-grade results free from water, fillers, and synthetic ingredients.The Sego Lily Difference:Our proprietary micro-aeration process preserves fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E, and K while creating a serum-like texture that absorbs deeply into the skin barrier. Unlike conventional skincare built on water and preservatives, Sego Lily's tallow-based formulations share a 50% fatty acid profile match with human skin cell membranes—delivering bio-identical nutrition where synthetic ingredients cannot.Product Line:Ageless Tallow Butter — Anti-aging with organic Argan and Hibiscus oilsRenewal Tallow Butter — Daily conditioning for all skin typesMoxie Intensive Moisture — Heavy-duty relief for severely dry, stubborn skinBaby & Mom Pure Butter — Unscented, edible-grade tallow for sensitive skinNatural Tallow Deodorant — Aluminum-free, effective protectionWhy Buyers Choose Sego Lily:✓ 100% grass-finished, USDA certified organic sourcing✓ Transparent supply chain—ranch to jar traceability✓ Violet glass packaging preserves potency✓ Water-free, filler-free formulations✓ Montana Made certified✓ Wholesale-ready with strong DTC foundationCurrent Distribution: Boutique retailers, airport gift shops, and growing e-commerce presence. Featured in Cosmoprof North America's Beauty Vanities 2026.

name: Semear Group S.R.L.
description: We are a company with extensive experience serving the Chia, Soy, Corn and Wheat demand of the most demanding customers in the world. The excellent weather and soil conditions of Santa Cruz allows us to undertake an intensive high yield and quality production to offer a constant supply.

name: Sempio Foods
description: Sempio was established in 1946, with its name standing as the oldest registered brand in Korea. Since the beginning, the company has been dedicating itself to manufacturing fermented food products – mainly soy based sauces – which are essential in the field of Korean cuisine. The quality and taste of the products are what gained our reputation as the country's number one household brand.Remaining faithful to the philosophy of its founder, "I will never produce or sell products that my family would not eat," Sempio puts special emphasis on food safety and health. This led Sempio to a number of quality and safety certification, most of them qualified for the first time in this field.Sempio seeks to contribute better values to a tastier and healthier lifestyle. For this the company established Korea's first R&D center that specializes in fermentation and actively collaborates with influential professionals in this area.Internationally, we export to over 76 countries throughout the globe, with branch offices strategically placed in the most influential countries in the culinary field: the United States, China and Spain. From these branches we maintain close relationship with local chefs to research ways to promote a more dynamic food culture.Our mission is to continue exploring knowledge on different food cultures, in order to develop products that would help expand everybody's culinary horizons.

name: Sencha Naturals
description: Sencha Naturals opens the door to premium Japanese matcha—without the intimidation. We craft approachable and accessible matcha products that make it easy to enjoy quali-tea in everyday moments. Thoughtfully sourced and made for all.

name: Send Bars
description: Founded in May 2021We're a team of athletes who were convinced there was a better solution to healthy on-the-go. When we couldn't find adventure food that met our standards, we created SEND Bars.Chock full of superfoods, functional mushrooms, adaptogens and greens specifically designed to help you perform and recover better. Made with the highest quality ingredients. Produced in small batches to ensure freshness and bioavailability.

name: Sennari Co.,Ltd.
description: Sennari Co., Ltd. was founded in Hiroshima in 1927, rooted in a commitment to authenticity, craftsmanship, and natural quality. For nearly a century, we have adhered to the traditional static fermentation method passed down through generations, using organically grown rice and pure spring water. Over a decade ago, we relocated our brewery to a location blessed with exceptionally soft, mineral-balanced water. Since the 1990s, we have positioned ourselves as pioneers of all-natural, additive-free products and later introduced certified-organic offerings in response to customer demand. Though small in scale, we remain dedicated to producing high-quality vinegar and seasonings from the heart, while supporting local farmers and communities through close collaboration and sustainable practices.

name: Sentry Manufacturing, Inc.
description: Since 1986, Sentry Manufacturing has been a premier cGMP-certified contract maker of custom vitamins, tablets, capsules, powders, and other dietary supplements from their state-of-the-art 150,000 sq ft facility in Miami Lakes, FL. With deep industry expertise and rigorous quality checks on every batch, they turn your product ideas into high-quality supplements you can trust because great health starts with great manufacturing and a passion for excellence!

name: SEORAKSAN GREEN FOOD CO.
description: Masua was founded in 2014 with the belief that a truly good meal begins with sincerity, honesty, and care.Rooted in the food culture of Korea's Gangwon region, Masua takes its name from a local dialect meaning "delicious"—a word spoken when tasting food made with genuine effort and trust. It reflects the moment when food becomes more than nourishment and turns into a shared feeling.The brand began its journey with a simple goal: to bring wholesome, well-prepared meals to everyday tables using ingredients that people can trust. From the start, Masua focused on selecting high-quality raw materials grown in the clean mountain regions of Gangwon, valuing both their natural flavor and their origin. Rather than pursuing complexity, the brand emphasized balance, simplicity, and respect for traditional food-making methods.As lifestyles became faster and meals more convenient, Masua evolved to meet modern needs without compromising its core values. By combining traditional know-how with thoughtful processing, Masua creates foods that are easy to prepare yet rich in authenticity and comfort. Every product reflects the brand's commitment to quality, safety, and consistency.Today, Masua continues to grow as a brand that connects tradition with contemporary life. Whether enjoyed at home or shared across borders, Masua's products aim to deliver the warmth of a carefully prepared meal—one that carries the heart of its origin and fits naturally into daily life. Through each offering, Masua invites consumers to experience honest food, made with care, and served with sincerity.

name: Seppic, Inc.
description: An Air Liquide Healthcare company, subsidiary of the Air Liquide group, Seppic has been designing, manufacturing, and marketing unique ingredients in beauty care, dietary supplements, pharmaceuticals, animal health, performance materials, for over 80 years. These ingredients are used by consumers, patients, and professionals.Worldwide, a vast team of talented women and men serve customers for health, well-being, and beauty of all.At Seppic, our vision is to help everyone enjoy a healthy life in a healthy environment.Concerning the Dietary supplements activity, we offer active and functional ingredients for formulation that are dedicated to dietary supplements and that meet the expectations of customers and consumers.Our ingredients target Beauty From Within, Women’s Health, Sport Nutrition, Hydration, Healthy Aging and Gut Health segments.Whether for skincare or sports recovery, all of our active ingredients meet the highest demands in terms of quality, compliance with regulations, and scientifically proven efficacy.We also know how galenic forms can be a lever of differentiation for our customers. This is why our formulation solutions, including coating agents, functional excipients for tablets, capsules and sticks, etc., are dedicated to dietary supplements and designed to meet each of their

name: Serenity Kids
description: Looking for baby food that meets your high standards? Serenity Kids has you covered. Sparked by Serenity and Joe Carr's desire for healthier food for their baby, Della, the duo created premium products of the highest nutritional, ethical, and taste standards. When they began looking for baby foods, they were outraged by how much sugar and how little nutrition was available, so they made their own! Serenity Kids offers pouches high in protein & fat, grain-free puffs, and A2 whole milk formula that focuses on high-quality, nutrient-dense, whole food ingredients without any antibiotics, industrial seed oils, GMOs, preservatives, or major allergens. All of Serenity Kids' products are third-party tested for heavy metals through Clean Label Project and have received Purity & Pesticide Free Awards. Serenity Kids is on a mission to make children healthier by offering nutrient-dense foods that taste great to kids and are convenient for parents.

name: SESAJAL
description: We transform the best from the field into healthy vegetable oils, oilseeds, non-seed oils and spreads, grown and processed with the maximum integrity and respect for the environment Today’s consumers are choosing oils that are cleaner, simpler and closer to nature. This shift has positioned our portfolio of non-seed oils as a preferred choice for health-focused cooking.Come and discover our new non-seed oil solutions

name: Setsuro Tech Inc.
description: Setsuro Tech Inc. is a biotechnology startup originating from Tokushima University, Japan.We provide precision breeding and genome engineering services that accelerate the development of cells, microorganisms, plants, and livestock for industrial applications.Our proprietary RNA-guided nuclease technology enables rapid and accurate genetic modification, including multi-copy knock-in and stable expression in cultured cells such as CHO.In addition, we offer scientific yeast isolation and screening services, identifying wild yeast strains from natural environments and selecting those suitable for brewing and other industrial uses.By harnessing the latent power of living organisms, we create practical biological solutions for diverse industries.

name: Seven Sundays
description: We make Sunday-inspired breakfast that brings people together, made with the very best ingredients. Founded in 2011 with a bike and a stall at the local farmers market, Hannah had the crazy desire to flip the breakfast aisle on its head. Seven Sundays is a proud woman-founded, family-run, B Corp breakfast company sold nationwide.

name: SG Systems Global
description: Paperless GMP Electronic Batch Manufacturing Records!With SG Systems, ALL handwritten records are eliminated!•	Direct Integration to Your Scale: Batch data is captured directly from your scale with formula step/QA prompts, ensuring batch accuracy!•	Streamlined ERP Communication: No more manual data entry—batch data is sent directly to your ERP.•	Enhanced Compliance: Support for up to two electronic signatures per 21 CFR for regulatory peace of mind.Would you like to see it in action? I’d be happy to arrange a one-hour demo. Our system supports additional processes like:•	Bulk Weighing•	QMS/SQC/NCR/CAPA•	Warehouse ManagementFor a closer look at how SG Systems can transform your operations, visit our website at www.sgsystemsglobal.com.Looking forward to connecting and discussing how we can help you streamline your production!

name: Shady Maple Farms
description: We are a 100 year old cooperative that does business all over the world.  Our Shady Maple Farms brand is the number 1 brand in the category, in the natural segment.  Come see us and find out why.

name: Shan Foods
description: The journey of Shan's remarkable success starts from 1981 when the dream of one man became a reality.A visionary entrepreneur, an avowed humanist and a committed philanthropist, Mr. Sikander Sultan, Chairman, Shan Foods (Pvt.) Ltd, helped pave the way to success by pioneering in the spice business with a single room operation.Initially, recipe mixes were only shared within the broader family but in a very short span of time they gained popularity and orders started pouring in from friends, acquaintances and general consumers. Overtime, the company prospered and Mr. Sultan decided to launch his very own brand, "SHAN" and since then there has been no turning back!Today, Shan is a powerful global brand that has presence in over 70 countries across 5 continents.

name: SHANDONG JIANYUAN BIOENGINEERING CO., LTD.
description: Shandong Jianyuan Bioengineering Co., Ltd. integrates production, processing and trade. We have passed ISO9001，HACCP，KOSHER，SHC HALAL，MUI HALAL, BRC, Non-GMO, ORGANIC certificate. The main businesses are R&D, production and sale of pea, chickpea, mung bean, fava bean and other plant proteins, TVP, starches and derived products, dietary fibers and medical protein, R&D and promotion of biological engineering technology and instruments, R&D, production and sale of nutrition foods ( tablets, powders and capsules),instant foods, solid beverages and candy products and health consultation and services.

name: SHANDONG JINDU TALIN FOODS CO.,LTD
description: Shandong Jindu Talin Foods co.,ltd,is one of the largrst pea products factories in China.It was established in 1990.The company uses peas imported from Canada,the United States and Russia as rew materials to extract pea protien Isolate,pea starch,pea fiber and Longkou Vermicelli.We have registered capital of ￥180 millions,over 500 employees,and annual capacity of processing 8000 tons of 80%-85% pea protein isolate,7000 tons of 55% pea protein concentrate,21000 tons of pea starch,10000 tons of vermicelli,and 2000 tons of pea fiber.Our company takes the lead in the industry passed ISO9001、HACCP、KOSHER、HALAL、NOP、EOS and Leading industrialization enterprises in Shandong Province etc.Now we export products to USA,Japan,Indonesia,Malaysia,Mid-East,Russia,France,Bazil,UK,Germany,Canada and more than other 20 countries.We will with more quality products and personalized service achieve win-win cooperation with you and jointly to human health.

name: Shandong Longzen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
description: Established in 2020, Longzen is a subsidiary and manufacturing site of Medinoah, which provides integrated and customized solutions throughout active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) discovery, development and manufacturing.With a dedicated R&D and production team, Longzen supplies 300+ API and/or pharmaceutical intermediates that meet high standards for multiple applications.In Longzen, we always ensure highest quality in all our products. ·Fully integrated process and upstream in key raw materials ·Production capability: ALA 400 MT/year; R-ALA 100 MT/year  ·Certified GMP ·Unmatched impurity profile on the market ·A dedicated R&D group with 30+ years of experience for customized needsAlpha Lipoic acid is an anti-radical substance. It can effectively enhance the body's immune system, protect it from damage of free radical, restore and improve the body's ability to build muscle and lose fat. It can also improve insulin sensitivity, and boost the activity of other antioxidants.Alpha Lipoic acid comes in two forms, designated as 〝R-lipoic acid”and“S-lipoic acid”, where R-form is the more bioavailable and more absorbable. Lipoic acid is not very stable. It has a tendency to polymerize with exposure to heat, light, and moisture. This issue can be solved by stabilizing lipoic acid (same as R-lipoic acid) with sodium, tromethamine etc. and other formulation technologies.

name: Shandong Tianjiao Biotech Co.,Ltd
description: Company estanlished in 2004, focusing on the development and production of high-quality human nutritional raw materials. The product range includes DHA Powder, MCT Oil Powder, Hydrolyzed Oat Powder, Fiber Creamer, Non-Dairy Creamer, and HoReCa ingredients, which are available in over 50countries worldwide.

name: Shandong ZhongMin Traditional Chinese Medicine Co.,
Shanghai Finice Commodity Co., Ltd.
description: Founded in 2005 which is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the production of various laundry sheets &color catcher sheets. With 100 million sheets per year Rapidly growing sales of the XISI cleaning sheet series in the global market, the Shanghai XISI factory expanded the factory scale to 30,000 square meters of dust-free workshops in 2012, and continuously introduced the world's most advanced automated production equipment, with a complete equipment production chain, Annual production capacity  reach up 300 million pieces/year . And in 2013, the floor cleaning, toilet cleaning, kitchen oil cleaning and color absorbing film series products independently developed

name: Shanghai Yaoshenfeng Biotechnology Co., Ltd
description: Our aim is to become your one stop partner for nutritional supple-ments, building a long term relationship with customers and suppli-ers. The company was established in 2023 in Shanghai, China andis located in a 20,000m2 brand new state of the art production site.The facility specialises in the production and supply of tablets, softgels, vegetarian softgel, hard gelatin and vegetarian capsules,effervescents and powders. Cost effective blister and pot packingare also available on site.

name: Shenzhen Hygieia Biotech Co., Ltd
description: Shenzhen Hygieia Biotech Co., Ltd. (referred to as “Hygieia”) was founded in 2019. It is a national high-tech enterprise and specialized new enterprise with synthetic biology as its core, integrating the entire chain of “bacterial design, enzyme engineering, fermentation process, purification process, and compliance declaration”. The company has built a Zymevolver @ strain evolution platform and enzyme engineering platform, which covers 500+standardized biological enzyme libraries for oxidation-reduction, transamination, hydroxylation, methylation, decarboxylation, etc. It can quickly respond to the biosynthetic needs of high-value natural product small molecules.Our main product inculding Nicotinamide Mononucleotide (NMN), Nicotinamide Riboside chloride, NR, NRHM, NAD+, Coenzyme PQQ, Q10, Ergothioneine, Ca AKG ,D- Chiro- Inositol.etc.

name: SHIMBARA Tea Factory CO., LTD.
description: "I want people to drink truly delicious tea." With that single-minded desire, the first Kazaemon transported tea harvested in Ei, the birthplace of Chiran tea, to the Osumi Peninsula. That passion has been passed down to us today.Kazaemon Tea Shop's idea of ​​truly delicious tea is one that has the "sweetness" that is characteristic of Kagoshima tea.We will continue to pursue tea with the "sweetness" that has continued from Kazaemon's time to the present day.

name: Shinan 1004 Seaweed Co., Ltd.
description: Shinan 1004 Seaweed Co., Ltd. is a leading provider of authentic, quality Korean seaweed. We are a one-stop-shop partner for all your seaweed needs! Our capabilities include traditional seasoned seaweed snacks, sushi nori, seaweed chips, and ready-to-eat seaweed salad.All of our facilities are certified internationally recognized food safety standards, and we are committed to providing the best quality products at the best value

name: ShineWater, LLC
description: Our owners, Rod Hildebrant and Matthew Meehan brought the brand to Michigan in 2019. ShineWater is committed to creating drinks that work for all lifestyles, budgets, and needs.  It's why we focus on essential benefits and why we offer choices that make sense for the whole family. We create bold flavored, all natural, vitamin rich, better for you options for the entire family. Our ShineWater Kid's Drink boxes are no exception. Kids love the bright flavors and parent's love that they are zero sugar, zero calorie, and a healthy option for their kids. Each box is loaded with vitamin D – that's why we call it Sunshine In A Box®!  We converted to tetra packages as a more eco-friendly packaging option that is easier for families to recycle.  All of our products are all natural with no added colors or flavors and are sweetened with all-natural stevia.  We believe that healthy starts from the inside and that small changes every day make a difference. Starting kids with great hydration habits at an early age helps them live better lives as they grow. Everyone deserves access to better choices and we are committed to keeping the ingredients real, fresh and fun!  The kids drink boxes come in 4 fantastic flavor combos: Grape Raspberry, Apple Berry, Strawberry Lemonade and Fruity Punch.  We believe in giving back to our communities. A percentage of all sales goes to our social partner One World Health. One World Health provide treatments for micro-nutrient deficiencies in families living in East Africa and Central America. ShineWater also shows up when it matters to our local communities in need with donations in communities devastated by catastrophic events.  As a 100% LGBTQ+ owned company, inclusion is in our DNA.  From welcoming all people to reaching all places, we're making better choices available to everyone, everywhere!

name: Shire's Naturals
description: Founded by Joshua Velasquez after navigating lactose intolerance and frustration with overly processed dairy alternatives, Shire’s Naturals creates dairy-free frozen comfort foods made with clean, simple ingredients. Using our own fermented dairy-free cheese, we craft high-quality meals rooted in craftsmanship, integrity, and real food, delivering comfort without conditions.

name: Shree Meldi Krupa LLC DBA SMK Global
Shubug
description: One night while we were outside late working around the clock on a project, we were getting eaten alive with nowhere to go to get protection. The wife of one of the Shubug founders happened to be a mosquito magnet and had the idea that the facility we were working on should carry "Off" for the guests who would frequent the place. Her husband responded "No way!! That stuff is horrible for you!" Well the conversation couldn't just end there; it led to some research which then led to some learning about essential oils that are healthy for humans, but unhealthy for bugs. The surprise and the happy accident, frankly, was we didn't just find healthy and effective natural oils, we also found stuff that is virtually unused by any of the available products on the market. What then started as just a small-batch intention to provide insect repellent for the locals who come to the facility, turned into a full-scale roll-out of a lifestyle brand who happens to make safe and effective insect repellent so you can play all day with a single spray.We believe in a brand-first approach to business so work started on the brand in 2021. Although it seems a little backwards to some, work on sourcing ingredients and product development started shortly thereafter. In the meantime we were already introducing the brand to major retailers. The response was positive with requests to sample the product which led to some rather challenging conversations. But once we explained how it makes sense to start with the "belief" of our future company and build our products into the "why" we want to exist as a brand in the first place - they always seemed willing to wait and see what we would eventually come up with. Now we have a line of products that were born into the belief that fun-havers of all kinds should have a healthy but effective go-to for protection against bugs. Everything that we make going forward will live into that story. ShubugÆ  Sad Bugs, Happy YouÆ.

name: Siam Oriental Food and Beverage Co.,Ltd.
description: Our Story – The Meaning Behind TAN TANIn the Thai language, the word "Tan" carries many meanings—one of which is "to eat." So when you say "Tan Tan," it playfully translates to "eat eat"—an inviting expression that perfectly fits a brand rooted in the joy of sharing food.Interestingly, "Tan" can also mean "dried" or "burned"—a fitting reference to our core products: dried fruits, which go through a careful drying process to preserve their natural taste and goodness.Our journey began in the bulk export business, supplying dried fruits to different corners of the world. But for a long time, our name remained unknown to the end consumer. It was one of our clients who opened our eyes to the power of branding, explaining that a strong brand identity helps build trust, recognition, and connection with consumers.That advice sparked a shift in our vision. We realized that a brand gives life to our story—it tells people who we are, what we stand for, and the quality we promise.And so, TAN TAN was born—not just a name, but a reflection of our roots, our products, and our passion for sharing goodness, one bite at a time.

name: Sichuan Sentaiyuan Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
description: In the heart of the Jinsha River, where it gently flows, the konjac thrives insunlight s embrace and a harmonious climate. Fertile soil and preserved ecosys-tems ensure this land's enduring enchantment, nurturing the konjac s uniqueessence for generations to come.

name: Sierra Nevada Cheese Co.
description: Sierra Nevada Cheese Companyis owned by Ben Gregersen and John Dundon. Ben's parents, Danish dairy farmers, immigrated to Sacramento and started several successful dairy companies. Ben and John met while working for Ben's father at Foothill Home Dairy. Ben studied cheesemaking in Denmark and Canada and worked in the same Danish cheese plant as his grandfather. John began in the dairy industry while in high school working for a local Mt. Shasta Creamery and later spent some time at Brown Cow mastering the art of yogurt.In 1997, Ben and John began making cheeses using traditional methods with the highest quality, rBSt-free milk available to sell at local farmers markets and natural foods stores. Demand grew quickly and Sierra Nevada relocated to Willows in Glenn County, a rural milkshed in the heart of Northern California.In an age of industrial manufacturing—and overprocessing—Sierra Nevada offers real cultured dairy products. We are inspired to create products with uncompromised flavor and quality, providing families with the wholesome goodness of authentic, farmhouse-style dairy foods. All of our products are made with traditional techniques and values. We allow the cultures to do the work in a time-activated process. We are committed to making simple products with simple ingredients—which means no added gums or stabilizers, artificial flavors or added sugars. You will be able to taste thedifference in our traditonal methods!

name: Siete Foods
description: Based in Austin, Texas, Siete Family Foods is a Mexican-American food brand, rooted in family, that makes delicious, heritage-inspired products. Siete is passionate about making foods with thoughtfully selected ingredients for more people to enjoy. Siete's offerings include tortillas, tortilla chips, potato chips, puff snacks, cookies, taco shells, beans, seasonings and sauces. Siete is on a mission to inspire inclusivity around the table because Juntos es Mejor!

name: Silesia Flavors, Inc.
description: Industry leader with a customized variety of flavor solutions for the food and beverage industry, offering our customers a differentiating edge on the market place with our in-depth product knowledge and flavor quality. Technical in essence, Silesia has become over its past 100 years of existence an expert in authentic, natural fruit flavors, flavors varieties, and flavors of origins in liquid, spray-dried and encapsulated format. Globally present with flavor creation, applications and operation facilities in Europe, Americas and Asia. Our American headquarters and manufacturing facility is strategically located near the Chicago area, in Hoffman Estates IL, with a dedicated team working in Analytics, Development, Applications, Sales, Marketing and Production.

name: Silver Biotics
description: Since the beginning, our focus has always been on quality and customer service while also offering affordable products. Our management team is committed to these values and takes great pride in being able to offer a product that can change people's lives for the better.We believe that strengthening one's physical well-being will further the ability to live a more balanced life, including mentally and spiritually, and essentially empower an active lifestyle with confidence. By combining the healing properties of nature and the power of science, Silver BioticsÆ develops products in an affordable way so that everyone has the ability to live life to it's fullest. Our goal is to help people achieve optimal wellness through our Silver BioticsÆ line of products. The core of our philosophy is to provide products that will assist the body to heal itself. We are constantly striving to develop new products and improve existing ones so that we can offer people the best possible silver solutions. We have a team of experts who are passionate about their work and are always looking for new ways to improve our products.We are grateful for the relationships we have built with our customers and are always looking to improve in order to provide the best possible experience. We understand that it is our customers who have allowed us to grow and prosper, and we will continue to work hard to earn your trust and business. Thank you for being part of our story!

name: Silver Hills Bakery
description: Carbonaut is the brainchild of our family owned bakeries, which have been serving up nourishing, healthy things since 1989. To bring the satisfaction of truly great bread to as many people as we possibly can, we've ventured into the low carb universe, brought all its elements into our kitchens, and created Carbonaut. We hope you enjoy what we're baking up for you, and that it helps you on your low carb journey.

name: SilverCeuticals LLC
description: Frustrated with the lack of science and validated research in our industry, we sought to create a brand backed by data that people can have confidence in.

name: Silvermill Natural Beverages Private Limited
description: Silvermill Group, founded in 1920 by Anthony Silva, is a leading Sri Lankan manufacturer of coconut-based products and spices. Starting with desiccated coconut, the company expanded into coconut milk, oil, and cream, later diversifying into spices like cinnamon, pepper, cloves, and nutmeg. With a focus on quality, sustainability, and innovation, Silvermill continues to be a major player in global markets while supporting local farmers.

name: Simple Foods
description: At Simple Foods, our main goal is to inspire food lovers worldwide. Together, we can make conscious consumer choices by buying 100% natural, sustainable, healthy, and delicious products! Our avocados are non-GMO and Kosher, and our safflower oil is non-GMO, USDA Organic, and Euro-Bio certified.

name: SIMPLi
description: There’s a difference between eating and being fed.  SIMPLi delivers Regenerative Organic Certified™ pantry staples with roots, cultivated in centuries-old fields and built for today’s health-conscious shopper.  Our heirloom beans, ancient grains, and single origin oils are naturally more nutrient dense because quality starts in the soil. Every batch is independently verified through 200+ ISO-certified lab tests, reinforcing trust, transparency, and premium positioning on shelf.  Founded in 2020 by Sarela Herrada and Matt Cohen, SIMPLi pairs deep agricultural heritage with operational rigor to scale regenerative products that meet rising consumer demand for clean, credible pantry staples.

name: Simply Desserts
description: Simply Desserts is redefining classic puddings and jels with a modern, better-for-you approach focused on real flavor, clean ingredients, and satisfying texture.Our dessert mixes are made with zero sugar, no artificial junk, and thoughtfully selected ingredients designed to deliver the indulgent taste consumers love without compromise. Plant-based, gluten-free certified, non-GMO verified, and nut-free, Simply Desserts is built to meet today’s diverse lifestyles and dietary needs.Innovation is at the core of everything we do. Launching at Expo West, Simply Desserts is unveiling its newest products, a plant-based Gelatin Alternative that delivers a true gel-like set without animal gelatin, and a 20g Protein Pudding line built for consumers who want protein in a dessert that still tastes indulgent. Together, these innovations reimagine classic dessert formats for today’s modern lifestyles.Whether enjoyed as a nostalgic pudding, a family-friendly jel, or a versatile base for creative recipes and frozen desserts, Simply Desserts proves that better-for-you desserts can still be delicious, indulgent, and fun.Healthy Never Tasted So Delicious.

name: Simply Gum
description: Started in 2014 by Caron Proschan, SIMPLY is a leader in natural gum, mints, and confections. Caron started SIMPLY after she discovered that regular chewing gum is made of a synthetic plastic base and filled with artificial ingredients. She started making batches of gum in her NYC apartment and sold the first Simply Gum products in local stores throughout Manhattan. Refreshingly normal ingredients...We're now expanding beyond gum & mints to become your new favorite go-to brand for sweet snacking. Instead of weird, throwaway ingredients, we use things like dates in our chocolates, real fruit in our gummies, and chicle (a tree sap) in our gum.

name: Simply Organic
