description: For over two decades, Simply Organic® has focused on bringing you organic ingredients you can feel good about — from our bottled single spices and herbs to our blends, extracts, seasoning mixes, simmer sauces, ﬁnishing salts, and more.Whether you’re hosting a feast, serving snacks to friends, or making a simple weeknight dinner, Simply Organic® makes it easy to bring the very best to your table.Always Organic. Simply Delicious

name: Simply Pop
description: Simply launched in 2001. Like our drinks, our story is simple. Simply juices taste amazing because they are made from amazing-tasting fruit, no artificial flavors, and non-GMO. At Simply, you'll find ingredients sourced from the grove, not created in the lab. Simply juices taste so refreshing and delicious because we never forget that nature is the most important part of our story. We work closely with our growers to ensure that our products always taste delicious. Because we're committed to delivering the gold standard year-round, we source our fruit and ingredients from around the world.

name: Simply So
description: We founded Simply So in 2024 to bring perfectly portioned, beautifully textured, ethically sourced, authentically delicious rice that's ready in just 3 minutes.

name: simplyFUEL
description: Come see the #1 selling protein balls in the country! simplyFUEL can be found in Costco, Sam's Club, and Pressed with more exciting launches planned for this year!

name: SimplyProtein
description: SimplyProtein creates approachable nutritious, plant-based snacks to fuel your lifestyle. We believe that simple ingredients and quality plant-based protein are a game-changer and should be accessible to everyone in their wellness journey.From our Crispy Bars to our new Restaurant-Style Tortilla Chips and family-friendly Dipped Bars, our snacks are packed with high protein, low sugar, no artificial sweeteners and zero nonsense—plus they're gluten-free.We believe there’s a healthier way to nourish people while hurting the planet less, and as a B-Corp certified brand, we're all about making snacking good for you and good for the planet.We believe there is more value in doing what's right than doing what is easy. We know that also means we won't always get it right, but we'll strive to make it right. We believe we all have to do our part. We know that means leading by example to inspire others to do theirs.We know that small things can make a big difference. We know we are only a snack bar company but dreaming of better is never ridiculous.

name: Sindan Organic Srl
description: SINDAN ORGANIC offers the international market products with high nutritional value, high quality products and with FSSC 22000, kosher, Fair Trade, NOP certifications. Among the products we offer are quinoa grains, quinoa flakes, extruded, precooked quinoa, flours, as well as chia seeds.

name: Singapore Food Manufacturers' Association
description: Established in 1967, the Singapore Food Manufacturers' Association (SFMA) is a professional and active trade association with more than 420 members.Today, SFMA organises no less than 60 industry activities annually such as, monthly capability building workshops, lead overseas tradeshows, study and trade missions, supermarket promotions, local consumer food shows, as well as inter and cross industry networking and business matching sessions.SFMA has also championed numerous industry initiatives which are aligned to the Food Manufacturing Industry Transformation Map, such as Food Innovation Product Award Competition, Singapore Food Gifts Initiative, the Singapore Food Expo & Asia Pacific Food Expo to help food manufacturers innovate, internationalise and create new channels for business growth.

name: SINGSONG FOOD CORP
description: Since the start of the pastes business in 1987, SINGSONG FOOD CORPORATION has continued to grow into a leader in the domestic pastes industry such as soy sauce, red pepper paste, and soybean paste after ceaseless research and efforts. Under the keynote of customer satisfaction and product innovation, Shinsong Food, which has been making all-out efforts in research and development, will do its best to provide products that add clean and clean taste to the abundance of a better table and traditional pastes that have been developed for many years.For the first time in the industry, our SINGSONG FOOD CORPORATION has developed natural (free, saccharin) products and functional products (low-salt soy sauce) for the elderly or children by lowering the salinity than regular soy sauce, and has achieved great achievements in raising the level of the market industry to the next level. In line with this, in order to advance corporate management based on the goal of quality management of producing the highest quality products, improving the quality of customer service, and creating a vibrant and stable working environment, we introduced various systems to actively collect customer requirements from the design stage through company-wide quality management education. As a result of establishing production management and information management systems, we not only obtained ISO 9001 (International Quality Standard) certification but also KS (Korean Standard) certification for the first time in the industry.Through all these quality management systems, the Korea Efficiency Association has been recognized for its technological prowess and corporate competitiveness by securing external competitiveness and improving the quality of in-house work through the Best Award in Quality Management Innovation (1997) and the selection of Labor-Management Excellent Enterprise (1998). In the future, Shinsong Food will not be satisfied with this and develop more technological skills and know-how through the integrated brand SINGSONG FOOD CORPORATION, becoming the best company in the domestic market.

name: SINMAS AUSTRALIA PTY. LIMITED
description: Our Brand StoryShary Australia began its journey in 2008, born from a simple yet powerful idea: to turn real fruits and vegetables into delicious, wholesome snacks that people can enjoy anytime, anywhere. With a deep-rooted passion for health, sustainability, and innovation, we started by growing our own produce and developing unique processing methods to retain natural flavours, colours, and nutrients—without any artificial nasties.From our humble beginnings on our family-owned farm in Chandler, Queensland, we've grown into a leading producer of plant-based, vegan, and gluten-free snacks, proudly sharing our products with customers across Japan, Hong Kong, Singapore, Dubai, and beyond.Driven by a love for clean, honest food, our team continues to push boundaries—creating new snack experiences that are as nourishing as they are tasty. Every Shary product reflects our mission to revolutionize snacking, offering a better choice for people and the planet.

name: Sirio Pharma/Best Formulations
description: Leading contract manufacturer of softgel in China since 1993, GMP certified either for drug or health food. The annual capacity is up to 4.5 billion softgels with 14 encapsulation machines. The high quality and favorable pricing is assured.

name: Sisters Coffee Company
description: Founded in 1989 in a small wood cabin, Winfield and Joy started roasting in 5lb batches and were the first roasters to the Central Oregon area. The business quickly grew and they bought a larger roaster within 6 months. For the first 20 years, our business was predominantly wholesale, since the retail space in the cabin was only 250 square feet.Today, we have the pleasure of serving guests in three cafes, and we roast 600,000 pounds a year. The business is run by Winfield and Joy's kids: Justin, Jared, and Jesse.

name: Skinny Mixes, LLC
description: Jordan's Skinny Mixes is the better-for-you flavoring and beverage enhancing company that transforms everyday routines into powerful "me-moments" for a guilt-free, more flavorful lifestyle. In 2009, Jordan Engelhardt noticed that liquor store shelves were packed with cocktail mixers loaded with sugar and empty calories. Determined to give her favorite cocktail recipes a healthier makeover, she grabbed some limes and got to work, knowing others would appreciate a delicious yet better-for-you cocktail option. Jordan's Skinny Mixes aims to elevate life's daily rituals, without sacrificing fun or flavor, offering a range of sugar-free products including Coffee Syrups, Water Enhancing Syrups, Cocktail Mixes, on-the-go Flavor Bursts and Sauces for enjoyment from morning till night.Today we are a small business that prides ourselves on providing the widest variety of delicious, better-for-you flavors to mix a little magic into your everyday. We create products for you because of you. Your passion, excitement & engagement is what inspires us every day. We're always listening – on social, in reviews, with customer service. We love the community you've helped us create and hearing your stories every day.

name: Skinny Pop
description: It all started with a neighborhood natural foods storeFresh out of school, Cynthia Tice knew she needed a job and that she had a passion for helping people eat better. So in 1978, she opened Center Foods in Philadelphia. Way before the rest of us were sipping green juice, Cynthia was raising awareness of better-for-you foods.In 2003, Cynthia hit a milestone birthday (don't ask which one) and decided to kick sugar for good. The only problem was chocolate, she just couldn't give it up. So in 2010, she made her own no sugar added chocolate and launched LILY'S.

name: SkinnyDipped
description: SkinnyDipped has evolved from its kitchen table origins to one of the buzziest female-founded companies in the United States. After a close family friend succumbed to a rare form of cancer at the age of eighteen, SkinnyDipped was founded in Seattle, WA, by Breezy Griffith (daughter) and Val Griffith (mother) and two of Breezy's best friends.They had always been a close family, but  were scattered here and there and like a lot of people, were busy. By the end of a bittersweet summer Breezy and Val knew one thing for sure: they wanted to spend more time together. So they started a business.That it would be centered around food was obvious. For Val & Breezy—family, friends, food and love are all tangled up. It gets a little messy sometimes like the way a kitchen is pleasantly chaotic when everyone's whizzing around in the middle of it whipping up something delicious. Together with Breezy's two best friends (Chrissy Haller and Lizzie Resta), they spent years perfecting SkinnyDipped almonds, the first in the line of balanced, healthy and insanely delicious snacks. We hope they give you and the ones you love as much happiness as they give us.

name: Skuny Bioscience Co., Ltd
description: Skuny Bioscience is the leading manufaturer of omega-3. We have always been committed to cutting-edge research and innovation in lipid bioinformatics, metabolism, molecular biology, enzymology, biofermentation and industrial biosynthesis, and have constructed a closed-loop core technology platform of MSET® Biological Preparation, SOB/SET® Quality Enhancement, BtBLife® Performance Improvement and VCFI-BRTTM Intelligent Production, which has formed a closed-loop full-chain scientific and technological system covering molecular design, quality optimization, performance improvement, and intelligent production system. Our MEGAFULLIFE® branded fish oil and ALGAFULLIFE® branded algal oil have been exported to over 80 countries and regions, including China, USA, Canada, Australia, Germany, Spain, South Korea, and New Zealand, etc. and widely used for food, nutrition and pharmaceutical products. Skuny Bioscience is dedicated to providing more effective solutions for human health and wellness.

name: Sky and Sol
description: Hi, I'm Max, the founder of Sky & Sol. My journey started with a personal transformation—after embracing animal-based nutrition, I experienced powerful healing and began to question what I was putting on my body, not just in it.What I found shocked me: most skincare products, even the "natural" ones, are filled with toxic chemicals and highly processed seed oils. That realization became painfully clear when I climbed Mount Kilimanjaro. For seven days under intense sun, I had no sunscreen I could trust—only products filled with ingredients I wouldn't dare eat, let alone apply to my skin.So I turned to something ancient and pure: tallow, a nutrient-dense fat once revered for its similarity to our skin's natural oils. Combining this ancestral wisdom with modern science, I created a tallow-based sunscreen that's safe, effective, and deeply nourishing—without compromising health.

name: SKY BARN
description: Earth's First Clean-Label, Barista-Grade Oat Milks. Froths and foams hot or cold with 8g protein per serving and no oils, gums, emulsifiers, or harmful additives.

name: Sky Organics
description: Experience sustainably-made botanical beauty. Our pure, potent, high-quality self-care essentials are derived from responsibly-sourced organic ingredients so you can care for the planet with the same intention you care for yourself​.

name: SKYBIO CO., LTD.
description: Crafted Through GenerationsA crispy harmony of seasonal ingredients and glutinous rice — rooted in Korean tradition, loved worldwide.Bougak is a traditional Korean snack made by lightly frying whole, seasonal ingredients delicately coated in glutinous rice paste.Rooted in four generations of family craftsmanship, our bougak has been reimagined by Oh Hee-sook, the 25th Food Master of Korea, together with Yoon Hyo-mi, the 14th Master of Korean Seafood Products. Since 1992, we have proudly carried this legacy forward.More than a snack, our bougak is a story of heritage, flavor, and pride.

name: SLAPP
description: Founded in Canada in 2013, DOSE was born in the kitchen of our Condo. The company grew exponentially in the last decade and after leading the growth of organic ginger shots in Canada, DOSE is ready for its American Chapter. ​Enters our American brand – ​Life moves fast; we get stuck in the race, losing track of what's real. That's why we created SLAPP—uniquely strong shots (cue face gymnastics) rooting you in the present, using Mother Nature's unapologetic power. Authenticity that hits, from ingredients grown in places where the earth still produces real flavor and nutrients. No artificial cr*p.​The bold power of Ginger – to fight your hardest mornings. ​​Cheers. ​Gen & Raph. ​

name: Smart Juices, LLC
description: Founder and CEO Murat Guzel grew up in Malatya, Turkey, a region known for its fresh apricots, cherries, and grapes. Upon moving to the US, he couldn't find premium quality fruit juices like back home — both organic and not-from-concentrate. So in 2007, Smart Juice was born.

name: SmartSolve
description: SmartSolve | Zero Waste Packaging SmartSolve is a zero waste packaging technology company located in Bowling Green, Ohio. In 2026, we are celebrating our 10-year anniversary and exhibiting at Natural Products Expo West for the very first time. 💧 🌍 ✨Our bold vision is simple: to make packaging no longer trash. We develop water-soluble paper, labels, and flexible packaging designed to eliminate waste at the source. Our materials are engineered to dissolve in water, helping brands move beyond traditional plastic and toward truly zero waste solutions.If a product is positioned as natural, organic, or clean, it only makes sense that the packaging aligns with those same values. Natural products deserve all-natural packaging. This January, we officially launched our newest innovation, PureNil™ 0 — the world’s first plastic-free, flushable, and printable flexible packaging material. Designed to replace conventional plastic-based films, PureNil™ 0 delivers performance while offering a radically different end-of-life solution.Our team would love to connect with you at the show and explore how zero waste packaging can support your brand.Schedule a time to meet with us at our booth here!

name: SmartSweets
description: Our founder, Tara, always had a love affair with candy. She started SmartSweets when she recognized she wanted to change her relationship with candy after experiencing the negative effects excess sugar has on our health. She tried to eat less sugar, but that only led her to crave candy even more, sparking her quest to Kick Sugar, Keep Candy! After spending months recipe testing in her kitchen with a gummy bear mould from Amazon, she innovated the first delicious candy - without all the sugar.

name: Smash Foods
description: Did you know that for a jam to be a jam it has to contain at least 55% sugar?! Wild, right?! Anna learned this back in 2018 as she was playing around in her kitchen trying to make a jam that was as nutritious as it was delicious. She wanted something that she could dollop generously onto overnight oats, swirl freely through yogurts, or just consume by the spoon. So, she teamed up with Steve, and Smash Foods was born in 2019 in Brooklyn, NY.

name: Smash Kitchen
description: Our mission is to fundamentally transform eating habits by making delicious, center-store pantry products affordable and accessible to everyone.  We started with condiments, bold clean-label staples made with clean ingredients that elevated everyday meals. Now we’re expanding across the kitchen with better-for-you essentials built on the same promise: real ingredients, real flavor, made for the way people actually cook.

name: Smile & Shine Essentials Inc.
description: At InoPro, we collaborate with experts to craft thoughtful whitening formulas developed with care and attention to detail. Each product is carefully reviewed to support a balanced, comfortable whitening experience.Whether you're brightening your smile for a special occasion or keeping it part of your daily care, InoPro offers peroxide-free options designed to fit naturally into your routine.

name: Smile Fruit Co.,Ltd.
description: We start our business since 2002. We're an expert of producing and exporting the vacuum fried fruit & vegetable snack based in Thailand with over 20 years experience. Our qualification is continuously ensure to reach the high global standard of BRC.

name: Smile tea/Kagoshima Seicha
description: 'Smile tea' offer organic cold-brewrd teas and matcha harvested in Kagoshima, Japan. Kagoshima Seicha founded was founded in 1881 in Kagoshima, Japan and is lead by the 10th-grade tea master. Our family-owned tea company has a long and rich history. We specialize in Japanese sencha green tea and have been serving tea for the past 140 years.

name: Smirk's, Ltd.
description: Organic Bulk Ingredient Importers & Suppliers of Coconut Products (Coconut Aminos, Desiccated Coconut, Coconut Butter, Coconut Cream, Coconut Milk, Coconut Flour, Coconut Milk Powder, Coconut Nectar, Coconut Oil, Coconut Sugar, Coconut Toasted Sweet & Unsweetened), Nuts & Nut Butters (Almonds, Brazil Nuts, Cashews, Hazelnuts, Peanuts, Pecans, Macadamia Nuts, Pistachios, Pine Nuts, Walnuts), Seeds & Seed Butters (Chia, Flax, Hemp, Poppy, Pumpkin Kernels/Pepitas, Pumpkin Butter, Pumpkin Butter, Pumpkin Inshell, Sesame, Sunflowers, Sunflower Butter, Tahini, Watermelon Kernels), Grains, Legumes & Pulses (Amaranth, Beans, Buckwheat, Millet, Oats, Quinoa, Rice, Sorghum, Teff), Vanilla (Whole Bean, Ground Bean Powder, Extract, Flavoring: Alcohol Free), Oils & Sweeteners (Almond Oil, Avocado Oil, Canola Oil, Coconut Oil, Flaxseed Oil, Olive Oil, Palm Oil, Sesame Oil, Sunflower Oil, Agave Nectar & Powder, Cane Sugar, Coconut Nectar, Coconut Sugar, Date Paste, Sugar & Syrup, Maple Sugar & Syrup), Dried Fruits, Freeze Dried Fruits, Fruit Purees (Apples, Apricots, Bananas, Blueberries, Cherries (Sweet & Tart/Sour), Cranberries, Dates, Figs, Golden Berries, Goji Berries, Mangoes, Papaya, Pineapples, Prunes, Raisins / Sultanas, Strawberries), Gluten Free Flours & Starches (Almond Flour, Arrowroot Powder/Starch, Cacao Butter, Nibs & Powder, Cassava Flour, Cashew Flour/Meal, Chia – Milled, Cinnamon, Corn Starch, Flax – Milled, Garlic – Dried, Himalayan Salt, Macadamia Nut Flour, Nutritional Yeast, Oats, Onion – Dried, Potato Starch, Psyllium Husk, Rice Flour, Sunflower – Milled, Tapioca Starch, Tigernut Flour), Plant Based Proteins & Powders (Fruit Powders, Lupin, Maca Powder, Almond Protein Powder, Cashew Protein Powder, Chia Protein Powder, Hemp Protein Powder, Pea Protein Powder, Pumpkin Protein Powder, Sacha Inchi, Protein Powder), Value Added Services (Blending, Retail & Food Service Packaging, Reconditioning, Roasting, Sterilization, Transportation, Warehousing.)

name: Smith Teamaker
description: Much like a modern restaurant, we exist to give classics new life. Everything handcrafted. By us. In house. Every ingredient is single-origin and sourced directly from gardens employing sustainable practices. We craft our blends in tiny batches at our tea atelier in Portland, Oregon. Because a tea's character varies from harvest to harvest, we never rely on recipes. Instead, we formulate our blends based on the season's crop to serve you the most delicious cup every time. In fact – in the spirit of total transparency – we publish a batch number on each carton of tea we produce so you can trace it back to origin. We provide tea solutions for every channel, daypart and occasion so you can serve your customers an exceptional experience. We look forward to collaborating with you.

name: Smolbol
description: Smolbol was born out of saudade - and a bit of rebellion.Smolbol was created by a team of Brazilians - all with deep roots in food, design, and international business. We grew up on a snack that was everywhere: crunchy on the outside, peanut in the center. Simple, satisfying, and full of personality. After moving to the U.S., we went looking for something like it and found two extremes.On one side: the classics ultra-processed, packed with additives, but full of flavor and nostalgia. On the other: the new wave of "clean" snacks virtuous on paper, but bland and joyless in practice.Smolbol doesn't fit either mold and that's by design. We set out to build something radically different: bold, crunchy, made with real ingredients and no gimmicks. Honest in label, loud in flavor, fun by nature.Radically different in its simplicity, Smolbol still delivers what American snackers crave most: bold flavor, satisfying crunch, and that snackable energy that keeps you coming back — without the junk.From our digital-first launch to growing retail footprint, Smolbol is leading a joyful rebellion in the snack aisle: loud, honest, and unapologetically simple.Smolbol. Just the good stuff.

name: Smood Sweets Inc
description: The current candy landscape forces consumers to choose between indulgence and health. Traditional candy delivers on taste but is packed with refined sugar and artificial ingredients, while "better-for-you" options often sacrifice the joy and nostalgia that make candy fun in the first place. We started Smood Sweets to change that. By using naturally sweet fruit as our foundation, we're creating a new generation of candy that brings back the nostalgic indulgence people love - without compromising on quality or wellness.

name: smul Group (Pty) Ltd
description: smul is a plant-based health and wellness brand that spans multiple product categories, built on values that customers can trust: health, taste, convenience, non-GMO ingredients, sustainability, avoiding refined sugars and artificial sweeteners, and using natural flavors and real ingredients.Our journey began with a frustration: the lack of truly healthy and delicious food options in the market. Too often, we found products that compromised on either nutrition or taste. Determined to change this, we set out to create a brand that delivers on both fronts, without sacrificing one for the other.We believe in making healthy eating effortless and enjoyable, revolutionizing wellness for our customers. With smul, every meal is a celebration of health and taste.Our wide range of products includes everything from breakfast options like ready-to-eat oatmeal and granola to dinner solutions with ready meals. We also offer protein bars, protein powders, trail mixes, and functional drinks, all designed to fit seamlessly into modern lifestyles. Whether you're a busy parent, an on-the-go professional, or a fitness enthusiast, our products are practical, functional, and above all, delicious.

name: Smurfit Westrock
description: Smurfit Westrock is the global leader of paper-based packaging solutions. With more than 100,000 employees, 500 converting operations and 63 mills across 40 countries, we are the sustainable paper and packaging partner of choice providing our customers with an expansive range of distinctive, innovative products. Learn more about how we’re creating the future of packaging together.

name: Snack Creations
description: Snack Creations is a global leader in healthy snack innovation – partnering with brands, manufacturers, and retailers to develop standout snack propositions that meet modern consumer demands.Through close collaboration, long-term innovation partnerships, and a trusted supply of premium, plant-based raw materials, we help our customers stay ahead in an ever-evolving market.With more than 60 years of manufacturing heritage – rooted in our origins as the snack division of Pasta Foods – we bring unmatched technical expertise, deep ingredient knowledge, and proprietary shape innovation. Combined with our extensive product range, we deliver world-class solutions that transform ideas into market-winning snacks. Try our latest ranges which include high protein, high fibre, vegetables and pulse based snacks.

name: Snack'in For You
description: At Snack'in For You, we've crafted snacks that not only deliver a great taste experience but are made with real ingredients! After tirelessly seeking better for you snacks that were boldly delicious, we simply created our own. Each Snack'in For You product is made with simple, better for you ingredients that you can pronounce and understand. You'll taste our dedication in the quality of each bite.

name: Snak-King LLC
description: In 1978, Snak King began with two employees. Working in a 1,200-square-foot facility, they made just one product - Pork Rinds. In 1979, Barry Levin, our CEO, became employee number three, right after graduating from college. Back then, his typical workday involved filling the fryers with oil, frying the rinds, boxing up the Pork Rind bags as they came off the line, delivering product to the company's one and only customer, and then balancing the books at night.After a few years, Barry acquired the company with a single goal--to make sure customers' needs were fully met by delivering the most consistent, high-quality product. This devotion to customer service and a willingness to say "yes" is what spurred Snak King's growth. When a company asked if Snak King could make Popcorn for them, the answer was "Yes!" (Even though they had only made Pork Rinds up to that point, Snak King quickly learned to make Popcorn.) The same story repeated itself for Caramel Corn, Cheese Puffs, and then Cheese Curls. The product portfolio grew. With each new snack item, the focus on quality never wavered. Our top-tier manufacturing facilities produce snacks with a wide range of flavor profiles that run the gamut from savory to sweet. Product offerings include Tortilla Chips, Potato Chips, Extruded Snacks (baked, fried, puffed, and curled), Pellet Snacks (veggie-flavored chips), Popcorn, Pork Rinds, Pork Cracklins, Popped Crisps, Nut Butter Snacks, Kettle Corn, Caramel Corn, and Nut Clusters (tree nut and peanut). Snak King produces salty snacks with numerous options to meet your needs or product requirements including organic, non-GMO, gluten-free, Kosher, ketogenic, whole grain, indulgent, or conventional.We want you to be our partner, not just our customer. Every relationship is important to Snak King, and we are committed to delivering the highest-quality products. From private label to co-manufacturing, we will help you bring your products to the shelves. Our top-tier facilities (with high-capacity lines) and our entrepreneurial spirit enable our versatile set of capabilities with one primary goal; to consistently deliver the highest quality products with food safety as our #1 priority.

name: Snakkidz
description: Snakkidz was founded in 2024 as a family business, born from a heartfelt realization that snack time could—and should—be better. As parents ourselves, we saw a glaring gap in the market: the snacks that excited our kids with fun, colorful packaging and playful mascots were often loaded with junk, while the healthier options, though well-intentioned, were clearly designed to appeal to parents, not kids. It felt like we were always forced to choose between what was good for our kids and what they actually wanted to eat.That's when the idea for Snakkidz was born. We set out to create a snack that bridged this divide—a product that parents could trust and kids would genuinely love. With a focus on organic, no seed oils, allergen-free recipes, and a commitment to ditching artificial additives, we crafted snacks that are as wholesome as they are delicious. But we didn't stop there. We made sure our packaging was vibrant, fun, and full of personality, because we believe healthy snacks should be just as exciting as the sugary alternatives.What started as a simple idea in our family kitchen has grown into a mission to redefine snack time for families everywhere. At Snakkidz, we're not just making snacks; we're creating moments of joy, one colorful, good-for-you bite at a time.

name: Sno Pac Foods, Inc.
description: Sno Pac Foods was established in 1943 by J. P. Gengler who believed that food and farming did not need to have added chemicals or pesticides. His concern was for both the health of the people who are eating his products, as well as being a good steward to the land we farm.

name: SNTO HOLDINGS GROUP LIMITED
description: SNTO Holdings Group Limited bridges innovative packaging technologies with practical applications worldwide. As a wholly-owned subsidiary of Suntown Technology Ltd. in Hong Kong, we are a leader in the global trade of high-performance composite packaging materials.Capitalising on our parent company's advanced materials science, manufacturing scale, and robust strategic network, SNTO serves as a critical link, connecting leading material manufacturers with dynamic packaging converters and brand owners across the globe. Our mission is to empower clients to enhance product value, ensure integrity, and engage consumers through superior packaging materials and visionary solutions.

name: So Good So You
description: The simplest version of our story: every choice matters. We believe that from what you put in your body to how you move in the world, each person can make a positive change, every day. So Good So You was founded on the idea that the products we buy and use are a direct connection to our larger community and a greater purpose. Everything we make and do is in service to that greater good.A reformed corporate retail leader, Rita left a big job at Target HQ in 2014 and started a little company, now So Good So You. She is an inspired plant-based foodie and is the innovation engine and knowledge-bank for functional foods and ingredients. An avid runner and yoga / fitness instructor, Rita loves building wellness communities around people and planet. The So Good So You brand is the community, and its products are the vehicle for creating connections. The goal? Do more good, together.

name: SOCKERBIT
description: SOCKERBIT, Swedish for "sugar cube," was founded in 2010 by Florence Baras and Stefan Ernberg, a couple who met working at a candy company in Europe. They fell in love and moved to the U.S., setting out to bring Sweden's lördagsgodis — the Saturday pick-and-mix ritual to an American audience.WE approach candy like design — curated, colorful, and obsessively sourced — focusing on quality and transparency by choosing clean ingredients free from high fructose corn syrup and artificial colors, and all non-GMO. We only source our candies through factories that meet the highest health standards in Europe.

name: SOHAO FD-TECH CO., LTD.
description: SOHAO FD-Tech Company is an automated and intelligent factory and specialized in freeze-drying many products according to our customer’s specific needs, and supplying to major foods companies domestically and globally. Our factory have been in accordance with the requirements of GMP establish a 100,000 purification plant and a ten thousand Lab and certified by third party BRC Grade A, FSSC22000, OU Kosher, Halal, ISO9001, HACCP, USDA Organic, BCS Organic. Some part of our products are freeze dried fruits and vegetables, as ingredients which are widely used in Cereal, Bakery, Instant Soups, Healty Snacks, Chocolate,Bar, Baby Foods, Healthy Products, Biological Products, Pet Foods, Drinks, Capsule. Mostly, we produce according to our customers' specifications. At the same time we can also process the Biological Products, Medical Products and other products. We believe in trust, quality products, innovation, and continuous improvement. Our major markets are China, North American market (US, Canada), EU, Japan, South Korea, ...

name: Sojo Industries
description: National technology company, specializing in food and beverage variety and multi-packing solutions with on-site mobile manufacturing capabilities for fast, efficient distribution.

name: SOK FARM CO., LTD
description: Soksanl was founded with a mission to harness local resources through a modern and sustainable development model. Soksanl is a pioneering enterprise in Vietnam specializing in the production, commercial development, and export of organic coconut flower nectar products, aligning with the rapidly growing global demand for plant-based and vegan lifestyles.Amid the increasing impacts of saltwater intrusion and climate change across the Mekong region, Soksanl has chosen coconut flower nectar as an effective adaptation solution. The coconut tree—naturally tolerant to salinity and capable of thriving under harsh climatic conditions—provides a resilient foundation for building a sustainable industry that is well suited to the ecological characteristics of Trà Vinh and the wider delta.Trà Vinh is home to more than 28,000 hectares of coconut plantations, where the traditional craft of harvesting coconut flower nectar has long been practiced by the Khmer community. Soksanl preserves and advances this heritage by developing an internationally certified organic production chain, ensuring stable livelihoods for farming households, increasing incomes, and safeguarding the long-term sustainability of the coconut-growing region. The strong partnership between the enterprise and local farmers forms the backbone of a transparent, responsible, and globally competitive coconut flower nectar industry.Alongside its economic and social contributions, Soksanl is committed to improving community health through organic products free from preservatives and rich in natural nutrients from coconut flowers. These products offer a wholesome choice amid the rising consumer demand for safe, plant-based foods.

name: Sol Simple, LLC
description: Will Burke, founder and CEO of Sol Simple, Sol Organica, and Burke Agro de Nicaragua, moved to Nicaragua in 1997 to teach English Literature classes at the American School in Managua.  There he met his wife, MarÌa.  Will and MarÌa later moved to Boulder to get their Master's Degrees at the University of Colorado and then went to Venezuela, where they taught at the American School of that country. During a trip back to Nicaragua to visit MarÌa's family, they noticed mangos on the ground everywhere, going to waste.  MarÌa and Will commented on the great opportunity that farmers would have if could sell their fruit abroad, transformed into finished products.  People in Boulder loved dried mango!Years later, when the situation in Venezuela worsened, Will and MarÌa decided to return to live in Nicaragua.  They started brainstorming about opportunities related to education. Will decided to seek support to educate farmers on how to access the US market in order to diversify their incomes and improve their livelihoods. As a result, in 2007, Will founded Burke Agro de Nicaragua, the fruit processing and agricultural development company, and Sol Simple, the retail and bulk dried fruit brand.Through many challenges, the dedication of farmers, technical assistance and training in quality organic production, Burke Agro / Sol Simple grew from working with 5 smallholder farmers to working with more than 1,200 mango, dragon fruit, banana, pineapple, coconut and passion fruit growers and became the first company in the world to successfully develop Regenerative Organic CertifiedÆ (ROC) fruit.Sol Organica was created and incorporated into the Sol Simple / Burke Agro family in 2018, becoming the processing and exporting company, while Burke Agro continues working with smallholder farmers.  As well as dried fruit, today Sol Organica processes fruit purees and juices, frozen fruit chunks, fruit powders and flours, and oils.Sol Simple is a vertically-integrated B Corp with a direct presence in each step in the supply chain, providing full traceability and transparency while elevating the positive environmental and social impact in the value chains that it develops.

name: Solely
description: Solely was born from a simple yet powerful idea: make real fruit more accessible to kids and families who lacked fresh, nutritious options. Too many were relying on cheap, processed snacks, so we set out to create a the best alternative—real fruit bites with the fewest possible ingredients, no added sugar, preservatives, or chemicals. That vision sparked a movement, transforming the way millions of families snack and creating jobs for over 1,000 people.Our Solely Fruit Jerky, Whole Fruit Gummies and gently Dried Fruit are the evolution of that first idea—pure, organic, and minimally processed, never with fillers or additives. We’ve built a network of Solely Certified Farms, working hand-in-hand with farmers to grow the cleanest, tastiest, organic produce. Through innovative processing methods, we preserve the taste and nutrition of whole ingredients without compromise.Transparency is at our core. Every ingredient is listed front and center because we believe food should be simple, honest, and nourishing. From seed to sale, we rethink every step to create better, cleaner, and more sustainable snacks. Because at Solely, we know there’s always a better way to eat well.

name: Solnuts Imports Inc
description: Monogolia Pine Nuts Grower & Processor Cedar 950 - 1200 ctsChinese Pine Nuts Grower & Processor Red 650 - 750 cts, Yunnan 950 - 1200 ctsChinese Pumpkin Seed Kernel (Pepitas) Processor AA, A+, AChinese Sunflower Seed Kernels

name: Something Sweet, Inc.
description: In November 2022, on the first anniversary of my dad's passing, our family started Something Sweet. Specializing in frozen, pre-portioned cookie dough, we launched with our signature brown butter cookies.Our mission is to build a high-quality, nostalgic, and convenient dessert brand for today's consumer. The frozen dessert market presents untapped opportunities. At Something Sweet, we're cultivating robust brand loyalty through innovative products, real ingredients, compelling storytelling, and a culture that cherishes nostalgia.

name: SOMOS Foods
description: We are three friends who grew up in Mexico eating chilaquiles, cooking tacos, and loving our mothers' home cooking. When we came to the United States, we enjoyed meeting up with friends at great Mexican restaurants, but we were disappointed with the options available for creating truly delicious Mexican meals at home. So we created a food brand that brings real Mexican flavors to ready-to-eat foods that make it easier than ever to make Mexican meals at home in under 5 minutes.  Salud! Miguel, Rodrigo, & Daniel

name: SONORA CORPORATION
description: What kind of story? Not finalized yet

name: SONPOWER Industries LLC / Simply Sunflower Oil
description: Simply Sunflower Oil was born on our family farm in Valley County, Nebraska, where our family has been farming for more than 120 years. Growing up on the land, Farmer Al learned the value of stewardship, sustainability, and innovation. "Farming has been around for thousands of years and there's exciting things ahead. I'm an innovator and determined to leave this earth better than I found it." - Farmer AlIn an effort to farm more responsibly, our family introduced sunflowers as a renewable crop and discovered their exceptional health benefits, including Vitamin E, antioxidants, beneficial fats, and no cholesterol or trans fats. That discovery led to producing sunflower oil directly from our harvest.Today, Simply Sunflower Oil is processed just miles from our farm in North Loup, Nebraska, supporting local jobs and our small-town community. Now available in over 1,200 stores across 29 states and beyond, each bottle reflects our family's commitment to quality, sustainability, and sharing a little Nebraska sunshine with kitchens everywhere.

name: Soom Foods
description: Sister-owned purveyor of tahini & tahini products used by award-winning chefs and home cooks.

name: Source Atlantique, Inc.
description: The If You Care brand was created in 1990 and started with unbleached coffee filters. Parchment Baking Paper and Baking Cups soon followed, both unbleached as well. We were early to the North American market offering brown chlorine-free paper products.In 2004, our Aluminum Foil made from 100% recycled aluminum was launched. This product featured a 95% energy savings compared to conventional aluminum foil. Then in 2007, Heavy Duty Aluminum Foil for grilling and barbecuing, also from 100% recycled aluminum, and waxed paper, from unbleached paper coated with soybean wax, were launched.If You Care embarked on an aggressive growth pattern beginning 2009, launching innovative and unique products every year such as 100% carbon neutral Firelighters, made from FSC certified wood and vegetable oil, Sandwich and Snack bags from unbleached greaseproof paper, sponge cloths and reusable paper towels from cellulose and Non-GMO cotton, Fair Trade Household Gloves among others. If You Care Laundry and Dish Detergents were also added to the range. In 2016, If You Care introduced Parchment Roasting Bags, our non-stick parchment roasting bags aimed to replace petroleum-based plastic ones.If You Care products are produced with a view to reducing the amount of waste in our waste streams. If possible, nothing should remain after the product has been used and properly disposed of. The packaging is made from unbleached recycled cardboard or paper which should be recycled again.

name: Source to Bottle LLC
description: Our journey started two decades ago when our founder embarked on a trip that would profoundly shape the trajectory of our company. Amidst the enchanting landscapes of Arequipa, Peru, he stumbled upon a revelation that would kindle our enthusiasm for excellence. Nestled in the middle of the majestic Andes mountains, at an elevation of 7,670 feet, lies a concealed oasis—a valley retreat amidst the heart of a desert expanse. Here, water flows organically from the rock walls, untouched by human hands, delivering a distinctive and elevated taste. That is when he first tried Socosani Mineral Water, a water known for its medicinal benefits and bottled in the same location and with the same processes since 1904.This encounter etched an indelible mark on our founder's memory's palate and wellness benefits, sowing the seeds of a profound vision.His professional journey led him through Procter & Gamble and Coca-Cola in different countries in Latin and North America, allowing him to savor mineral waters from different parts of the globe. In 2019, while navigating the grocery store aisles of Atlanta, Georgia, he was struck by a familiar sight—a limited selection of premium water options. The absence of diverse water sources became evident in the US market's vast canvas. There was a huge opportunity to bring water from new & explored origins worldwide, with a different mineral composition that adds to the taste options and supports consumer's natural health & wellness lifestyles.With a dedicated team of industry experts, we gave birth to Source to Bottle—a company with a dual purpose. Our mission is to unearth the world's finest waters, each possessing a unique story and essence, and to offer discerning connoisseurs like you not just exceptional but health-conscious choices.At Source to Bottle, we are fueled by a commitment to well-being. We are devoted to discovering the purest waters with quality and health benefits. Our commitment transcends the pursuit of excellence—it encompasses the celebration of wellness and the quest for both extraordinary and nourishing waters.

name: Source86
description: Source86 helps CPG brands and manufacturers source and import food ingredients from vetted partners around the world. We combine hands-on supplier development with disciplined documentation and quality coordination—supporting specs, COAs, traceability, and compliant shipments—so you can scale supply without scaling chaos. Our model is built around long-term partnerships, transparency, and dependable execution from origin to warehouse.

name: South 40 Snacks
description: We were founded in 2018 out of an obsession for the world's biggest and best in-shell sunflower seeds. This obsession turned into a business ? importing and distributing a unique varietal of highly differentiated in-shell seeds. It didn't take long for a rabid and hopelessly addicted community of seeders to discover South 40 ? people who enjoy cracking and spitting and passing the time eating our giant-sized seeds.Our sun is our mascot and we follow the sun and always honor the sun. Recently, we began a worldwide exploration to identify unique varietals, giant sizes, grades, origin stories, and more ? always the best of the best dried fruit, nuts, seeds and unique value add products. In 2023, this passion led us to expand our business, looking to additional snack categories that are ripe for reinvention. Enter our nut and fruit bars! During our travels to the Eastern Mediterranean and to West Africa, we discovered the most extraordinary nut and fruit bars which we launched in 2023. They are unlike any bars we've seen here in the states and so we began working with our partners in Greece and Ghana to import then exclusively for South 40 Snacks. At South 40, we say "What you See is What You Eat." All our products share a common ethos of simplicity and transparency - few ingredients and clear packaging that showcases the beautiful product. Just like the seeds, the nut bars have found rapid market adoption and broad national distribution. We expect similar results with our delicious fruit bars as well. Grown in Ghana and the Ivory Coast, these tropical fruit snacks have an amazing sustainability backstory. They are Produced with renewable energy resources whereby all fruit waste is transformed into energy, solar energy, and bio-gas to generate electricity and heat for the drying of the fresh fruit. Plus, all water used in production comes from rainwater that is collected and treated, and all wastewater is purified. How it is grown and produced is just as important as the quality experience we hope our customers enjoy every time.

name: South Chicago Packing
description: South Chicago Packing began as a meat packing operation over 120 years ago, but gradually transitioned into high-end specialty fats. Though we no longer pack meat, we appreciate our company's rich, historic past which is reflected in our name, South Chicago Packing. We are a 5TH Generation Family-owned business. We take pride in our Commitment To Excellence, Dedication To Customers, and Passion For All Things Culinary. Our Mission is to maintain this 120 year-old tradition.

name: Southern Champion Tray
description: You have worked hard to build a business and a brand that customers trust. Custom Paperboard packaging is a powerful way to ensure your quality product stands out and is remembered.At Southern Champion Tray™, we make the process seamless — Making Every Interaction Effortless™. As a first step, we collaborate with you to determine the level of customization you need by asking key questions:Do you need a custom print design on a stock catalog item or a completely unique structure?How will your packaging be used — does it need to withstand refrigeration or freezing?What type of environment will it be in? A fast-paced setting requiring minimal assembly?Once we understand your needs, our team guides you from concept to final packaging, delivering solutions that champion your business — with a team that champions you!

name: Southern Recipe Small Batch Pork Rinds
description: We've been perfecting our Southern Recipe Small Batch recipe for decades. And, only when it was good and ready did we share it with a community of consumers we knew could help us spread our biggest challenge to date: challenging not just the pork rind category, but also the snack food category. Our commitment to excellence has been passed from generation to generation, and it all began in 1955 when John Rudolph learned of an untapped market for pork rinds.Today, we're proud to have started a snacking revolution and called upon the snackers who won't stand for tiny, three-bite packs any longer. We set out to regain pork rind consumers whose parents and grandparents were fans of the rind themselves. Others may have once perceived pork rinds as an unhealthy, junk food, but we wanted to bring these undercover pork rind lovers home!We've lowered the sodium, removed the artificial colors, removed the MSG and cleaned up the ingredients statement for transparency like the pork rind category has never known. For us, there's only one way to go: forward.Be Big. Be Bold. Be Adventurous.

name: SOUTHERN SEAFOOD PRODUCTS CO.,LTD.
description: PlaNeat is 'Neat' from the origin.We believe that 'freshness is the heart of all sea products'.Our new creations of seafood delicacies are sea snacks and frozen seafood for real seafood lovers.Sourcing only from natural, local open water. Immediate processing after fresh catch. No preservatives, colorant, and flavouring. Keeping the wholesomeness from the sea intact for a seariously good taste and nutrient.

name: Sovany Beverage
description: Savor the Spirit of an Endless SummerSovány began with a simple craving in the heat of Las Vegas summer. Something refreshing but not just water - flavorful but not syrupy soda. Nothing on the shelf hit the mark. So the idea of blending sparkling water with organic fruit juice took hold. What began as a kitchen experiment became a small ritual, then a staple then an idea too good to keep at home.Sovány is crafted to capture the ease, the brightness, the carefree energy of summer. One sip and the world feels a bit lighter.

name: Sovereign Silver & Sovereign Copper
description: Sovereign Silver, the leader in Hydrosol Technology, is a family-owned business in Sarasota Florida, established in 1999. We are committed to the principles of Health Freedom and Health Sovereignty, which means helping to educate people on the ways they can take control of their own health and wellbeing. Freedom and sovereignty come with responsibility and require active participation to achieve and retain. As the market leader of silver and copper-based dietary supplements and topical products, we manufacture Sovereign Silver, Sovereign Copper, and Argentyn23 Bio-Active Mineral Hydrosols and Homeopathic  Gels.  Sovereign Silver, the company's retail brand, is proud to be the #1-selling silver dietary supplement in North America with 63% market share in the natural products retail space.

name: SP spa
description: IO CHEF was created in 2022 in response to the growing demand for making Italian risotto easier to prepare and quicker to enjoy. For this reason, IO CHEF — which includes "Ready to Cook" and "Ready to Eat" products — perfectly meets the needs of the global market.

name: Spack International Inc
description: We produce certified organic plant based oils that support leading food, supplement and cosmetic manufacturers in producing high quality products.With 4 production locations we are one of the founders and leaders in the organic vegetable oil industry.Your Bulk Supplier for Non-GMO and Certified Organic: high oleic sunflower oil, canola oil, flax seed oil, virgin coconut oil, refined coconut oil and palm oil.Our products are USDA and EU Certified Organic, OU Kosher Certified and Non-GMO Project Certified.Distribution throughout the USA and Canada.

name: SPADE
description: Zero Sugar, Zero Calories, All-Natural.Magnesium and Potassium Electrolytes.Best tasting zero sugar all natural soda.Upgrade Your Soda.

name: Spate
description: Spate is an AI-powered market research platform that uncovers the next big consumer trends by analyzing over 900 billion search signals, 150 million TikTok posts, and 50 million Instagram posts globally. It provides actionable insights to help brands refine their marketing strategies, craft social media content, and plan research and development. With Spate, brands can differentiate between fleeting and lasting trends, measure competition, and understand consumer needs for better positioning and messaging.

name: Specialty Food Association
description: The Specialty Food Association (SFA) was founded in 1952 and is the not-for-profit trade association of the $219-billion specialty food industry.Representing more than 4,400 businesses worldwide, SFA champions industry participation and success for a diverse community of makers, buyers, importers, distributors, and service providers by producing events, programs, and year-round resources and education.SFA owns and operates the Summer Fancy Food Show, Winter FancyFaire*, and the sofi™ Awards, which have honored excellence in specialty food and beverage annually since 1972. Connect with SFA on LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook.Join us at the 2026 Summer Show (June 28-30 in NYC) and Winter FancyFaire* 2027 (January 17-19 in San Francisco).Learn more at SpecialtyFood.com.

name: Specnova
description: We are dedicated to supplying best-in-class ingredients that provide profound clinically backed benefits to help brands compete, grow and succeed. From discovery to clinical study, our pioneering approach to transforming nature’s extraordinary ingredients into branded raw materials offers you a competitive advantage and a cache for product innovation. Advanced Branded Ingredients Made with Purpose & Backed by Science—Designed to maximize quality, efficacy and your operational efficiency, our pure ingredients feature advanced processing technologies and delivery systems that preserve the integrity of plant actives and improve bioavailability at smaller doses, with validation from human clinical studies.

name: Spectrum Fruits. Inc
description: Spectrum Fruits is a technical marketer of premium ingredients covering a broad spectrum of fruits for 30+ years. Whether you need multiple loads or a drum, custom blends or R&D, we have ingredients, knowledge, facilities, and connections to get concepts or products to market.We strive to be the best fruit partner for all our customers. Industry knows us for quality ingredients & quality service.Whether you are looking for Fruit Juices, Purees, Concentrates, or Powders Spectrum Fruits is your one stop fruit shop with a global reach!We are proud to offer Organic and Conventional products that are :- USDA/FDA Certified- Organic Certified- Kosher Certified- Allergen Free

name: Speed Labs
description: Speed Labs was created by elite athletes who wanted to get more out of their day. Our gum and gummies were formulated to help you get more out of your workouts, stay focused and energized at work, stay alert on your adventures, keep up with your kids, and so much more. Our products provide caffeine, taurine, and b-vitamins in a light and portable format to keep you going without the inconvenience of liquids. So throw some energy gum or gummies in your pocket and take on the day!

name: Spicekick
description: OVERVIEWSPICEKICK® makes it easy to get healthy, homemade meals on the table in 20 minutes or less with our crave-worthy, gluten-free seasoning mixes made without added sugar or fillers. Health-conscious home cooks simply follow the recipe on the back of every pack to combine Spicekick seasonings, a protein, and vegetable for a satisfying meal in minutes. SPICEKICK® seasonings are now sold in 100 retail stores in Indiana and the Midwest and nationwide through Amazon and spicekick.com.OUR STORYOn one late-summer weeknight of 2019, I was cooking dinner for my family using a basic taco seasoning packet because my daughters loved it. I was amazed how it was ready in 15 minutes and all I had to add was meat and water. What I didn't feel great about were the fillers, sugar, and other mystery ingredients in it. I thought there had to be a better way. That is when the idea hit me for Dash Dinners, what would be renamed and rebranded two years later as Spicekick.Most spice blends on the market, even the "natural" ones, list sugar and salt as the first two ingredients, but not mine! I knew that I could create my own spice mixes with wholesome ingredients I use at home with more herbs and spices, fruits and vegetables, no added sugar, and just a touch of sea salt. I wouldn't rely on artificial coloring or flavoring, preservatives, or fillers.Within a week, I began my quest by converting a popular recipe for Shredded Chicken Tacos from my first cookbook but using only dried ingredients to flavor it. I cooked a batch and sampled it to my girlfriends as we were sitting around the pool that late afternoon while watching our kids swim.I explained to them how it worked. They tasted it and very seriously responded with, "I'd buy that."I set off to make 20 spice kit samples presented in hand-taped parchment pouches with the recipe stapled to the back and distributed it to my mom friends and neighbors. One of my friends, a busy anesthesiologist and mom texted me, "I need to buy 10 packets right away." Within weeks, I created three more flavors—Stir Fry Lettuce Wraps, Chili, and Curry—which all originated from my previous recipes, but in the dried spice kit form.That's when I knew it was time to get proof of concept, so I applied to be a vendor at the farmers market.

name: Spiceology
description: Founded in 2013, Spiceology is at the heart of the kitchen for all who love food and the fastest-growing spice company in the United States, according to the Inc. 5000 list for six years in a row. Spiceology is home to chef-created, never-before-tasted flavors and over 300 ingredients and blends that are ground fresh and shipped fresh. Bestsellers like Greek Freak and Smoky Honey Habanero have become pantry and counter staples in both professional and home cook kitchens around the world. Spiceology's ingredients and blends can be found in the aisles of retailers large and small, in the pantries of hundreds of thousands of home cooks, and in the kitchens of some of the world's greatest chefs.

name: Spicewalla Brand LLC
description: Five-time James Beard–nominated chef Meherwan Irani founded Spicewalla in 2017, 9 years after opening his first restaurant in Asheville, NC, Chai Pani, which was named Outstanding Restaurant by the James Beard Foundation in 2022 and has revolutionized the perception of Indian food in America. With Spicewalla, he and his team of chefs, creators, and enthusiasts are on a quest to help home cooks and professional chefs harness the power of fresh and high-quality spices to become better cooks. Spicewalla offers 250+ small-batch spices and 60+ exclusive blends freshly roasted and packed by hand in Asheville, NC. Taste & believe!

name: Spicin Foods
description: Spicin Foods has been crafting one-of-a-kind sauces, marinades, and salsas for palettes of all preferences for more than 20 years. As a leading manufacturer in the development and production of food goods, we use the Micro-Batch™ process to ensure a premium quality product each time. We not only develop our own signature brands, but we also provide best-in-class co-packing and private label services for partners around the world.

name: Spongelle LLC
description: Spongellé® is a family-owned brand delivering elevated, all-in-one beauty treatments since 2013. Our Body Wash Infused Buffers®, award-winning Proprietary Delivery System, high-quality ingredients, and sought-after custom-blended fragrances catapulted us as a category leader in self-care.Today, we apply that same ingenuity to all of our cruelty-free, vegan products to reimagine what's new and next in all-over body hydration, eau de toilettes, at-home pedicures, and revolutionary home-scenting diffusers.

name: Sports Research
description: Since 1980, Sports Research has been a family-owned company driven by a legacy of health. Starting with the breakthrough of its flagship product, Sweet Sweat, Sports Research has expanded to offer a diverse range of science-backed wellness solutions for all generations. At the heart of Sports Research is a commitment to quality, sourcing only the finest ingredients and materials from around the world. Many of these ingredients are backed by rigorous scientific research, reflecting the brand's dedication to efficacy and innovation. Sports Research empowers individuals to live their best lives with products they can trust. Discover the difference wisdom and quality makes by exploring the full product lineup at sportsresearch.com.

name: Spray-Tek, LLC
description: Spray-Tek, LLC is a leading independent provider of specialty spray drying, microencapsulation, and ingredient processing solutions serving the food, beverage, nutritional, nutraceutical, pet, natural, organic, and beauty & personal care industries.Founded in Middlesex, New Jersey in 1980, Spray-Tek expanded its operations with the opening of its Bethlehem, Pennsylvania facility in 2002. The company offers a broad range of spray drying and related ingredient processing capabilities, supporting customers from formulation development through commercial-scale production.Spray-Tek serves as an integral supplier and long-term partner to both emerging and established brands, helping bring innovative, high-quality natural products to market with consistent performance and scalability.

name: Spring Creek Quail Farms
description: Spring Creek Quail Farms began in 2002 in the picturesque landscape of Saint Anns, Ontario, under the care of Aaron Oosterhoff's uncle, Clarence. Aaron, a farm boy at heart, spent his childhood collecting quail eggs, feeding the birds, and packaging the eggs. Though he pursued a career as an electrician, the call of the farm life never left him.In 2016, after starting a family with his wife, Lyndsay, Aaron felt the pull of his roots and returned to the farm that shaped his early years. With his uncle contemplating retirement, Aaron seized the opportunity and proposed a partnership. It wasn't an easy road. Aaron vividly recalls a freezing February in 2017, knee-deep in mud, determined to build new barns despite the unforgiving weather. But that's the kind of grit and dedication Aaron brings to everything he does.By 2018, Aaron's uncle had full confidence in his nephew and passed the torch completely. Aaron's vision was ambitious: he wanted to bring quail eggs to the mainstream, making them a staple in kitchens across North America. What started as a small farm supplying a handful of specialty stores soon transformed. By 2019, Spring Creek quail eggs were proudly displayed in 130 Metro Ontario stores. The real breakthrough came in 2021 when they landed on Costco shelves in Ontario and Quebec—a monumental achievement.But Aaron wasn't done. He saw untapped potential in hard-cooked and pickled quail eggs. By 2023, these innovative products were in stores, further solidifying Spring Creek's reputation for quality and creativity. Today, their quail eggs can be found in about 3,000 stores across North America.Aaron's journey is a testament to resilience, innovation, and passion. He's not just running a farm; he's building a legacy, one that honors his family's roots while pushing the boundaries of what quail farming can achieve. For those looking to partner with a brand that embodies dedication, quality, and forward-thinking, Spring Creek Quail Farms and Aaron Oosterhoff are leading the way.

name: Spring Sunrise Natural Foods
description: Founded in 1992, Spring Sunrise is a family-owned enterprise. We are stewards of a practical, time-honored tradition; refining butter into its highest quality state - ghee! Our journey began with a profound appreciation for the wisdom of multiple cultures and generations past, and a respect for the gifts of nature. Our founders, John and Christina Revolinski, moved to Fairfield, Iowa, in 1980 and started a home food business in 1992 to supplement John's earnings at a local non-profit. When 12-year-old Donald came home from school with a watercolor he titled, "A Spring Sunrise," the business became "Spring Sunrise Natural Foods."  On April 18, 2018 the company moved into the new production facility they built just outside of town. Son, Donald, joined the company as a managing partner.

name: Sprout Living
description: Sprout Living creates real food–based nutrition made with organic, thoughtfully sourced ingredients—no gums, fillers, artificial or "natural" flavors—so people can fuel their everyday routines with products that taste good, digest well and fit seamlessly into real life.Organic Epic Protein PowdersSuperfood PowdersWhole Food Vitamins D, DK and CColorfuel HydrationProbiotic Almonds

name: SPS Commerce
description: SPS Commerce provides intelligent solutions to help trading partners connect, orchestrate and optimize how they work together in getting the right product, to the right place, at just the right time - every time.

name: Square
description: Square helps businesses turn transactions into connections and businesses into neighborhood favorites.In 2009, Square started with a simple invention – the first mobile card reader, which changed how the entire financial system thinks about small businesses. Square has since grown into a global business platform helping millions of sellers of all sizes participate and thrive in their communities.Whether independently run or a global chain, Square understands that sellers succeed when they have the freedom to focus on the experiences that keep customers coming back. From point of sale and payments to online commerce, staff management, banking, and more, Square brings together the tools sellers need to run and grow on one intelligent platform. For more information, visit [squareup.com].

name: Sri Sri Tattva
description: Sri Sri Tattva, founded under the inspiration of Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar, comes with a goal of promoting health and wellness worldwide through the science of Ayurveda. A global conglomerate offering products and services in multiple categories including Ayurvedic Supplements, Food, and Personal Care. Established by committed individuals with nearly four decades of experience, Sri Sri Tattva comes with a 360-degree approach towards health and wellness including a College of Ayurveda Science and Research, a state-of-the-art Hospital, inspired Doctors and Therapists, Panchakarma Wellness Centers, Spas and Clinics. Our manufacturing facilities are driven by technology and stringent control systems and a widely growing national and international presence. Sri Sri Tattva's manufacturing facilities have earned certifications such as WHO cGMP COPP certificate, AYUSH Premium Mark Certification, ISO 22000:2008, HACCP, EU Organic and ANMAT GMP to name a few.

name: St. Charles Trading, Inc.
description: At St. Charles Trading, we offer a comprehensive, turnkey supply chain solution to streamline your operations and drive cost savings. With eight strategically located warehouses, 4,000+ ingredients, custom blending, and no minimum order quantities (MOQ), we provide the flexibility to scale quickly and efficiently.Our industry-leading certifications—SQF and WBENC—ensure the highest quality standards, while our dedicated logistics and top-tier documentation teams guarantee smooth, hassle-free operations. Whether you need R&D support, sampling, formulation, or simply looking for ways to optimize costs, our industry experts are ready to assist at every step. Utilizing our 4,000+ ingredients, knowledge, and experience, we take a custom-tailored approach to solving your unique challenges, offering you the flexibility and expertise to meet your goals.

name: St. Dalfour USA
description: Our artisanal recipe was created after the turn of the 19th century.We craft our fruit spreads south of Bordeaux, amid the renowned terroir dubbed "the Garden of France". We use only 100% fruit with vineyard-ripened grape 'must' as a natural sweetener.

name: Stahlbush Island Farms
description: Bill and Karla Chambers started Stahlbush Island Farms in 1985 with two crops, a piece of land, a passion for good food, and a commitment to sustainable agriculture. Today, the couple still manages the farm every day. In the 1980s, we grew the business by supplying two markets with the strictest safety standards: Japan and the baby food industry. Today, we have a robust food safety program as a result. Our products consistently exceed the industry's toughest food safety standards.In addition to compliance with state and federal regulations, Stahlbush Island Farms invites independent, third-party inspection of our food safety, sanitation, and documentation procedures. Stahlbush is proud to consistently score in the Excellent range for food safety audits completed by NSF International.We set a goal of donating a million servings of food annually, and we meet that goal every year. Our food donations benefit food banks, school lunch programs, community organizations, and activities promoting healthy nutrition.

name: Stamford Sport Brands LLC
description: Launched in 2024 and created by beverage industry veteran Michael Fedele, Throne SPORT COFFEE offers a proprietary Coffee PLUS+ formula designed to help you get going and keep going with 150mg of Natural Caffeine, Natural Flavors & Sweeteners, 100% Daily B Vitamins, Electrolytes & BCAAs, perfect for a pre-game boost. Throne SPORT COFFEE's lead investor, #2 shareholder and marketing face is none other than Patrick Mahomes, 3x Champion & MVP Quarterback for Kansas City. Unlike traditional energy drinks or sugary coffee shop beverages, Throne SPORT COFFEE caters specifically to the health-conscious consumer by providing a better-for-you alternative that supports an active lifestyle. The line is currently available at 5,000+ doors coast-to-coast.

name: Stampede Culinary Partners / Bone Brewhouse
description: STAMPEDE CULINARY PARTNERS - North America's Leading Sous Vide ManufacturerAt Stampede, we pride ourselves on being the premier sous vide manufacturer in North America. We are committed to innovation and excellence, offering both protein and plant based solutions to our valued customers.Our dedicated R&D team, along with our culinary experts, stays a step ahead of the market to ensure your menu and flavor developments align and capitalize on industry trends.Stampede consistently exceeds customer expectations to help drive strong brand differentiation through proprietary flavor profiles.Featured Brand:  Bone BrewhouseHigh protein wellness on the go with our instant bone broths!At Bone Brewhouse, we’ve been brothing since 2015, and have mastered the timeless tradition of slow-simmered, flavorful bone broths. Loaded with protein, amino acids and a whole-food source of collagen, our instant chicken bone broths are the perfect companion for busy lives.  10 to 15g of protein, 2g of fibre and 0g of sugar per serving.  Just add hot water, stir and enjoy!  Sip daily. Live well.

name: Starboard Bio New Zealand
description: Starboard Bio Limited aim to produce and supply the finest quality animal sourced pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, life science and functional food raw materials.We produce freeze dried organs, glands and specialty tissues for supplement manufacture and export thousands of kilograms of these into the USA each week.We guarantee the product integrity, authenticity and traceability of our grass fed, free range ingredients. Animals are processed in state-of-the-art facilities within New Zealand to the highest food safety standards.

name: START International
description: START International and Zinga Labels assist food manufacturers and food service providers in the United States and around the world. With literally thousands of applications, START International's label and tape dispensing solutions have improved productivity and profitability for companies in many different industries since 1981. Have a unique application or material? We will test and certify your materials on our machines for free. Peeling labels by hand? Let us show you how to inexpensively speed up your hand labeling process 100%.Need assistance with your labels or packaging? Zinga Labels (a division of START) provides many different types of custom labels, custom pouches and bags, folded paperboard boxes/sleeves, and many other unique labeling/packaging solutions. It is not uncommon for customers to spend too much money and time with incorrect materials or unnecessary printing and labeling processes. Our "Label Guru" has advised and assisted numerous food manufacturers, chain stores/markets, and food service providers. Reach out directly to labelguru@zingalabels.com.

name: Startup CPG, Inc.
description: Startup CPG is the biggest community in the world for emerging brands. Our community comprises over twenty-five thousand slack members, the #1 globally ranked podcast in CPG, 100+ events per year across all major cities and trade shows, and world-class resources and award programs to help brands grow and shine. It’s free — join today!

name: StarWalker Organic Farms
description: StarWalker Organic Farms is a third-generation farm, deeply rooted in sustainability. As one of the first organic farms in California, we've spent decades prioritizing soil health, biodiversity, and ethical animal husbandry. Recognizing the need for truly regenerative protein, we expanded our vision, becoming not just the farmers, but also the brand and the processors, ensuring full transparency from healthy soil to nutritious food.Our journey began with a bold idea: What if protein could heal both people and the planet? Our commitment is simple yet profound- raise animals with respect, nourish the land, and bring the cleanest, highest-quality Regenerative Organic Certified™ beef and pork to market. By integrating every step of the process, from pasture to processing in our own USDA facility, we uphold the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and integrity.Today, we are proud to be the first Regenerative Organic Certified™ pork producers in the world and among the first for beef. But our story isn't just about us, it's about a movement. We're raising the standard for what food should be, partnering with like-minded farmers, retailers, and chefs who share our values, while educating consumers on the power of real, regenerative food.As we continue to grow, our mission remains the same: restore the land, respect the animals, and nourish people with food that truly makes a difference. Because real food starts with real farming.

name: Starwest Botanicals
description: Strong Global Supply Chain NetworkAt Starwest Botanicals, we are passionate about providing our customers with the best natural products available. We are committed to sustainability and ethical sourcing practices, and we strive to create a positive impact on the planet and the communities we serve.Our collection of herbs and spices consists of over 500 varieties, providing a vast array of flavors and aromas to choose from. We also offer more than 50 types of tea, each with its unique taste and properties.Our products are sourced from over 50 countries worldwide, ensuring that we provide the best quality ingredients to our customers.

name: Stellar Snacks, LLC
description: Stellar Snacks, LLC was founded by Mother and Daughter duo Elisabeth and Gina Galvin in 2019 in order to provide the creative and better for you snacks that they were looking for, but couldn't find.  In 4 short years, Stellar Snacks is among the fastest growing snacks companies in the world.

name: STEP/Saskatchewan Trade and Export Partnership
description: STEP is the export promotion agency for the province of Saskatchewan in the prairies of Western Canada. Saskatchewan companies offer food ingredients and natural and specialty products derived from food grown in Canada. STEP's booth will include companies featuring natural and organic products including pulses, oilseeds, and cereals, plant proteins, flours, flax products, hemp products, faba products, edible oils, oat milk, and healthy oat snacks.

name: Stiebs
description: Stiebs began in 2005 as a company focused solely on processing pomegranates for Industrial juice and concentrates but we have evolved into a full-service private label and co-manufacturer of a wide range of fruit and vegetable products. Today we not only offer everything from locally grown California fruit to Citrus and Vegetable products for industrial/ingredient sales to California manufactured IQF Fruit/Vegetable cubes, Acai and smoothie bowls, frozen pops/sachets, savory entrees/side dishes and more for use in the CPG/retail and Foodservice markets.

name: Stoked LLC.
description: A family of beekeepers come together to bring honey the remote corners of the world to you. Started in 2019 Stoked has been a Reid family passion project from the start. Stoked grew out  our passion to produce premium wholesome honey for our family, we now serve customers all over the world. We seek to deepen our connection to our craft and our customers through sustainable beekeeping and quality honey production.

name: Stone & Skillet
description: Stone & Skillet was born in 2013 in a Boston apartment, where we followed our passion and created a recipe for a better English muffin. Shaping dough on a granite stone countertop and griddling it to perfection on a cast-iron skillet felt like the heart of what we wanted to build — a product rooted in craft, care, and community. Named for those very tools, Stone & Skillet has grown from a dream shared among friends and family into a beloved artisanal brand. Today, our hand-griddled English muffins are crafted with love in every batch and shared with customers, chefs, and retailers across the country.

name: Stonehenge Organics
description: Stonehenge Organics is a fourth-generation family farm, located in the heart of southern Saskatchewan, that has been producing and exporting premium quality certified organic ingredients globally for over 20 years. We specialize in providing the finest quality ROC, Non-GMO, Gluten-Free, Organic and Kosher certified pulses, oilseeds and cereals. This includes lentils, peas, flax, and oats. With the addition of our on-farm processing facility we are in full control of safety and quality assurance throughout the supply chain.
