The facility is third-party audited, GFSI certified and FSMA compliant. We offer infrared color sorting and x-ray technology to provide additional food safety confidence. Our premium quality organic ingredients are preferred by leading companies around the world. Being the farmer, processor and exporter, we offer you ease of mind with our high quality, safe and fully traceable ingredients.

name: Stratum Nutrition
description: Stratum Nutrition, a tenacious company with humble Midwestern roots, is built on innovation and sustainability, providing world-class nutritional ingredients for both humans and pets across a broad range of condition-specific categories. Our extensive portfolio of research-backed ingredients, trusted by consumers worldwide, is complemented by a growing selection of distributed ingredients from manufacturing partners who share ourcommitment to quality, safety, efficacy, and environmental responsibility. Our dedication to delivering top-tier ingredient solutions is unmatched, rooted in the same steadfast values that have guided us from the beginning and continue to drive our success.

name: Straus Family Creamery
description: Based in Northern California, Straus Family Creamery became the first 100% certified organic creamery in the United States when it launched in 1994. Today, it is known for its commitment to sustaining family farms, protecting the environment, mitigating climate change, and crafting the highest quality premium organic dairy products. Its line of all organic, minimally processed milks and cream, slowly-cultured European-style and Greek yogurts, super premium ice creams, European-style butters, sour cream, and kefir is made with organic milk supplied by family farms in California’s Marin and Sonoma Counties.

name: Strengthening Organic Systems, LLC
description: Strengthening Organic Systems (SOS) is an advisory firm dedicated to services that will continue to assure authenticity of organic products, protect organic businesses from organic fraud, and maintain consumer confidence in the USDA organic seal.

name: Stroop Club
description: We immigrated from The Netherlands to the United States in 2015, after winning the Greencard lottery. Without a network, friends or job lined up in the US, we decided to bring our traditional Dutch coffee snack to the US. We figured bringing cookies would be the easiest way to make new friends and that building our own business would get us fastest acclimatized to the US climate. We started off with the smallest investments and most personal direct consumer feedback, baking live on Farmers' Markets in Austin. 2 Years later we started packaging the products and a year later distributing them. Along the way researching more into food business and systems, we realized how damaging it is for our plant and we pivoted to be all organic and plant based. To become a leading example in sustainability we also turned to better packaging materials and work with minorities and women where we can. Even further down the road, we even spend our time and money on the non profit Caribbean Reef Guardians for who we also work as dive instructors.

name: Stryve Foods
description: After retiring from the NFL, Stryve's co-founder Gabe Carimi committed to a healthier diet and found that many high protein snacks were full of sugar and preservatives. Gabe launched Stryve and partnered with our CBO, Chief BILTONG Officer, Warren Pala. Born and raised in Johannesburg, South Africa, Warren has been eating biltong since before he had teeth and has been making it himself for nearly 30 years. Together, they perfected the recipe, built a state of the art 50,000 Sq ft Biltong facility, and began to disrupt the meat snack category with our high-protein, zero sugar Biltong snacks!

name: Sturdy Sauce
description: Sturdy Sauce was born from a simple, yet powerful desire: to live healthier, stronger, and better lives. Founded by health enthusiasts Chad and Barney, we embarked on a mission to create sauces that aren't just delicious, but also packed with high-protein goodness to fuel our families and our everyday adventures. Our proprietary blend of high-quality proteins ensures that every drop of Sturdy Sauce empowers our customers to make healthy living not just a goal, but a way of life.From our kitchen to your table, we're committed to excellence in every bottle. Sturdy Sauce is for the fitness fanatic, the culinary explorer, and the parent who simply wants to make better food choices for their family.

name: Stuzzi Hot Sauce
description: Nearly a decade ago, winemakers Carla and Richard Betts fell in love with the aroma and taste of a rare Italian dried pepper. In 2020, they set out from their home in Amsterdam and journeyed across the Alps. Taking the sage advice of their contemporaries in the food world, they stopped in Austria for a meal prepared by acclaimed chefs, Ethel Hoon and Jakob Zeller of Restaurant Klösterle.Together they decided they would embark on this journey together, to utilize this heirloom varietal of pepper, creating by-hand in the Italian Alps, with the intent of being versatile and approachable to elevate any and all cuisine Stuzzi comes into contact with.

name: STYLE NUTS CORP
description: Started in 2022 to develop new flavor nuts to US

name: Styx Naturcosmetic GmbH
description: For more than 50 years STYX Natucosmetic has drawn from the rich experience of our ancestors. According to the traditional herb ology,  STYX  uses  its knowledge  to produce high-quality, natural care products. By using the  latest  scientific  findings  and  procedures  in  their new  laboratory,  STYX is  able  to  optimize  further,  all the familiar effects and benefits of essential oils on your skin. STYX processes not only fresh herbal extracts, and also cold pressed vegetable oils from organic agriculture

name: Success Imports USA
description: Background: Cindy Lin, a visionary entrepreneur, was born in 1977 in China. She embarked on her educational journey in a Chinese high school and later pursued two years of college in her homeland. Her life took a transformative turn when her family decided to immigrate to New York, bringing with them a wealth of cultural experiences and a passion for authentic Chinese cuisine.Entrepreneurial Spirit: Cindy's entrepreneurial journey began with a humble start. She opened her first business, a 99-cent grocery store, which was not only a reflection of her determination but also her commitment to providing affordable essentials to her community. Over time, she managed to expand her business, establishing 12 successful stores and gaining invaluable insights into the world of retail.Venturing into Importing: Through her experiences in the grocery business, Cindy developed a keen interest in importing foods. She recognized the potential for introducing authentic Asian flavors to American consumers. Eager to make a significant impact, she made it her mission to become a leader in bringing Chinese foods into America.Success Import USA: Around 2018, Cindy formally launched "Success Import USA," a company dedicated to bridging the gap between Chinese culinary traditions and American palates. Under her leadership, Success Import USA became the first company to successfully introduce renowned brands like CuiHong, Galanlang, and others into the American grocery market, forever altering the landscape of Asian cuisine accessibility in the United States. Success Import USA became the first USDA-permitted importer of chicken meat from China.A Sweet Endeavor: In 2021, Cindy took her business acumen to new heights by formally contracting manufacturing to create Yausen pastries. This venture expanded her reach into the world of delicious Asian pastries, further solidifying her position as a pioneer in the Chinese import food industry.Cindy Lin's remarkable journey from a Chinese high school student to a trailblazing entrepreneur showcases her relentless determination and unwavering commitment to bringing the rich flavors of China to the American market. With her vision, leadership, and dedication, she continues to be a driving force in shaping the culinary landscape of the United States.

name: SuckerPunch Pickles
description: SuckerPunch is redefining on-the-go snacking with our clean-ingredient pickle pouches, packed with bold flavor, unbeatable crunch, and premium quality. We're not just making pickles - we're creating better-for-you snacks that punch above their weight. From our convenient snack pouches to our bold electrolyte infused pickle juice shots (perfect for athletes or anyone who sweats), everything we make is crafted with health, flavor, and function in mind. Our jars stand out just as much as our pouches and shots. Made with premium ingredients and crafted for maximum flavor impact, these pickles deliver that signature SuckerPunch crunch and boldness you crave. Perfect for sharing, savoring, or adding a punch of flavor to any meal!

name: Sucotond (Guangzhou) Health Biotechnology Co., Ltd
description: Company IntroductionSucotond (Guangzhou) Health Biotechnology Co., Ltd. is a modern comprehensive ODM factory and its main business is dietary supplements, providing customers with one-stop product solutions, covering from product concept conception to market promotion, including market analysis, formula research and development, brand customization and packaging design, production and packaging, quality control, and product distribution.  Sucotond attaches great importance to innovation research and quality management, having a high-education R&D team, an outstanding production and quality management team, and receiving high praise. The factory enjoys an excellent reputation in the industry.Our main product contains creatine gummies and magnesium gummies. Creatine gummies are the first in the country to obtain NSF/ANSI 173 certifiedcertification. The process is mature and stable, and it has a delicate taste with various different flavors. Magnesium gummies combines magnesium with complenentary nutrients and develop as a reference formula. It has good texture and delicious taste.Sucotond places product quality first, strictly controlling every link from raw material procurement to product distribution. Factory has passed multiple global high-standard system certifications, including BRCGS, NSF, ISO22000, as well as HACCP, FDA certifications, meeting the needs of customers from different countries and platforms. The products are sold in many countries and regions such as Europe, Southeast Asia, New Zealand and Australia, serving peers on platforms such as Amazon, TikTok and Shopee.

name: Sugimoto Tea Company
description: "Delicious tea over beautiful tea – just like people, it's what's on the inside that truly counts. That's why we defy conventional standards and commit to deep-steamed tea with a high-temperature roasting." - Hiroyuki Sugimoto Since its establishment in 1946, Sugimoto Tea Company has been dedicated to crafting tea loved by everyday tea drinkers from all walks of life. Our specialty lies in fukamushi, or deep-steamed tea, sourced directly from the local Kanaya region of Shizuoka prefecture. Due to the long steaming process, these tea leaves become finer and may not look like your typical green tea. However, this longer steaming process results in less bitterness and accentuates the tea leaf's natural sweetness and umami. One of the final steps in the tea making process called hi-ire, is performed to dry the leaves resulting in the finished product. The Sugimoto family's signature hi-ire employs a remarkably high temperature that would burn ordinary tea leaves. However, Hiroyuki Sugimoto knew that the finest tea leaves grown in the frigid environment of Shizuoka's mountainous terroir can withstand these high temperatures. In order to carefully select these leaves, the cooperation of local farmers is crucial. Since our establishment, Sugimoto Tea Company has always worked closely with Japanese farmers, cultivating long-lasting relationships built on mutual trust and respect. This allows us to obtain the highest quality leaves necessary to withstand our  signature hi-ire. This final indispensable step is what makes our tea so exceptional.Within the world of Japanese tea, conventional wisdom dictates that the appearance of the leaf must be maintained through a moderate use of heat. However, Sugimoto Tea Company goes against the grain in pursuit of teas that our customers will love and drink every day. So, as you hold your teacup to your lips, please enjoy the profound aroma of the Sugimoto family's remarkable deep-steamed teas.

name: SUKU VITAMINS
description: SUKU Vitamins' started when Founder and CEO, Ju Young Yoo, studied Naturopathic Medicine at the CCNM. During patient trials, Ju Young was met with mixed results when experimenting with different supplements and immediately noticed that many of his patients struggled to follow their supplement regime. In fact, statistics show that 40% of adults and 50% of kids have difficulty swallowing pills. Additionally, 10% of people stop taking their pills altogether, or they experience what is known as pill fatigue. Although gummy vitamins were gaining popularity at the time, they were packed with hidden, unhealthy ingredients, such as sugar, sugar-alcohols, and gelatin. Ju Young saw a significant void in the industry for clean, healthy, and chewable products that addressed both health and beauty concerns.

name: Summer Fresh Salads, Inc.
description: Summer Fresh Salads, founded in 1991, is an industry trailblazer in the food landscape and is known for shaping the fresh, gourmet food category as we know it today.  Susan Niczowski, founder & president, started in her mother's kitchen using family recipes and some fresh ingredients from the local grocery store, making the very first batch of Summer Fresh hummus.

name: Summit Rx Inc
description: Summit Rx Inc is a full-service nutraceutical manufacturing partner specializing in high-quality vitamins and supplements that help brands bring great-tasting, effective products to market with confidence.Who We AreSummit Rx is a cGMP-certified, organic-capable supplement manufacturer with a 47,000 sq. ft. state-of-the-art facility in the USA, built to support projects from startup launches to national retail programs. Our team combines technical expertise with a collaborative, service-minded approach so brands feel supported at every stage, from idea to finished product.What We DoEnd-to-end contract manufacturing for gummies, capsules, and powders, including custom formulations and stock options.Support for a wide range of categories: sports nutrition, weight management, probiotics, organic supplements, immunity, general wellness, and more.In-house packaging, label design/printing, and multiple pack-out formats to help products stand out on-shelf and online.Quality and CertificationsOur facility operates under strict cGMP standards and holds recognized third-party certifications, giving retailers and consumers assurance that every batch is produced and tested to rigorous specifications. We emphasize traceable ingredient sourcing, robust quality assurance, and documentation that supports clean-label, organic, and specialized claims where applicable.Why Meet Us at Expo WestBrands choose Summit Rx because we act as a strategic partner, not just a manufacturer, while offering formulation guidance, compliance support, and agile lead times to get high-performing products to market faster. Visit our booth to explore sample formats, discuss your next launch or line extension, and see how our capabilities in gummies, powders, and capsules can help you build a stronger, more scalable supplement brand.

name: Summit Specialty Ingredients Inc.
description: Summit Specialty Ingredients (SSI) is a premier U.S.-based manufacturer specializing in advanced spray drying solutions for the food, beverage, flavor, nutraceutical, personal care, and light industrial markets. We partner with our customers to transform liquids, emulsions, slurries, and heat-sensitive actives into stable, free-flowing, functional powders engineered for performance.Beyond contract manufacturing, SSI offers turnkey ingredient solutions, including spray dried whole fruit and vegetable powders, juice concentrate powders, and customized plant extract systems. Our portfolio includes botanical ingredients such as Pomegranate, Cranberry, Lemna, Moringa and other antioxidant-rich fruits and botanicals, standardized and optimized for solubility, stability, color retention, and functional performance. Whether you require whole food powders, carrier-based systems, or encapsulated actives, we provide scalable solutions tailored to your application.Our new, state-of-the-art R&D and applications laboratory located adjacent to our Flemington, New Jersey manufacturing facility enables rapid innovation and seamless scale-up. The lab is equipped with a mini spray dryer for process modeling, a high-pressure homogenizer for emulsion and encapsulation development, and stability chambers for accelerated and real-time shelf-life assessments. This integrated technical platform allows us to optimize particle morphology, moisture profile, dispersibility, encapsulation efficiency, and long-term product stability before full-scale commercialization.At SSI, we believe in true partnership. We collaborate closely with customers from concept to commercialization, this includes ideation, formulation design, pilot validation, regulatory documentation, scale-up, and ongoing production. Our goal is not simply to manufacture powders, but to co-develop differentiated ingredient systems that enhance performance, improve stability, and accelerate time to market.As a certified woman- and minority-owned business, SSI combines technical depth, operational agility, and entrepreneurial responsiveness to deliver high-value solutions to our partners.We welcome the opportunity to collaborate on your next innovation!

name: Sumo Citrus
description: Sumo Citrus has achieved legendary status as the ultimate citrus experience.We cultivated the first groves of Sumo Citrus outside of Japan and have been perfecting the fruit for decades. Our standards are ambitiously high. We never release a piece of fruit to stores unless it's sweet enough, big enough, and has that Sumo Citrus taste that fans instantly recognize; nothing else comes close to the original.This year, discover the legendary taste for yourself. Look for the purple bin that reflects our heritage and the iconic fruit sticker, so you know it's the real deal.

name: Sun Chlorella USA
description: One man's journey to health paved the path. Our founder, Mr. Hideo Nakayama, suffered from post-World War II health complications. Doctors gave him a few years to live at only fifty-one years old. Mr. Nakayama had almost succumbed to his conditions until a friend introduced him to Chlorella. Full of gratitude, Mr. Nakayama devoted the rest of his life to researching and spreading chlorella's wonderful benefits worldwide. Sun Chlorella pioneered a unique process that pulverized chlorella's tough outer cell wall, ensuring maximum digestibility and nutrients. This process has made Sun Chlorella one of the most digestible chlorella on the market. Today our mission continues to be carried on all over the world. Sun Chlorella is family owned, with Mr. Nakayama's grandson, Mr. Futoshi Nakayama, as the President of Sun Chlorella.

name: Sun Hing Foods, Inc.
description: Sun Hing Foods began in 1981 selling and servicing retailers, one store at a time, can milk products, and then graduated with more items such as quality premium jasmine rice and beverages. We now sell more than 300 items, on a regular basis, with our organization. Most of which has been built on reliability and fair pricing for quality products.

name: Sun Lovin' Foods
description: We are thrilled to introduce our newest subsidiary, Sun Lovin' Foods, a dynamic addition to the Pacific Date Corporation family. Pacific Date is vertically integrated from growing, producing, packing, and shipping our products, Medjools, Deglet Noor, and our new energy bites. As a company that handles 15 million pounds of dates per year and has been a leading multi-generational grower since 1966, this strategic move represents our commitment to growth, innovation, and delivering exceptional value to our customers.Sun Lovin' Foods supplies Conventional and Organic Medjool Dates and Snack Bites. Our two new brands, Sun Lovin' Dates and Sun Lovin' Bites offer premium quality, fresh produce, and sustainable packaging. Our food safety program is BRC AA+ rated with a state-of-the-art facility and up-to-date machinery and equipment. We offer private labels and sustainable packaging like our stand-up resealable PCR pouch line. In addition to making eco-conscious decisions with our packaging, we have added a new 700 KW solar panel system that supplies most of the energy to run the operation.

name: Sun Noodle
description: Hidehito Uki arrived in Hawaii with little more than a noodle machine and a dream.  He then spent 4 decades learning a new language, gaining new friendships, and perfecting his craft noodles.  Today, Mr. Uki and the whole Sun Noodle 'ohana make noodles for some of the best ramen shops on the islands, the mainland, and around the world - and now for you to enjoy at home.

name: Sun Ten Laboratories, Inc.
description: Founded in 1946, Sun Ten Laboratories is a globally recognized leader in Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) herbal manufacturing, dedicated to combining classical herbal wisdom with modern pharmaceutical-grade standards. With over 80 years of expertise, Sun Ten produces high-quality concentrated herbal extracts and formulas trusted by licensed healthcare practitioners worldwide. In addition to our practitioner line, Sun Ten offers direct-to-consumer brands including NuWonder, Primal Hair, and Vytanutra, delivering innovative, clinically supported wellness solutions to today’s health-conscious market. Our capabilities also extend to comprehensive contract manufacturing and private label services, supporting partners with custom formulation, encapsulation, extraction, and full-scale production. As we celebrate our 80th Anniversary, we remain committed to advancing herbal science while honoring the tradition that defines our heritage.

name: Sun Tropics
description: Sun Tropics is a family-owned company committed to transforming global childhood favorites, tropical fruit, and authentic street food into shareable snacks and beverages with adventurous flavors.

name: Sunberry Farms
description: Founded in 2013 to promote new fruits and nectars in the north american market.

name: SunButter
description: In 2003, SunButter® partnered with the USDA to develop the first-ever sunflower seed spread. We created it as a nut-free alternative to serve in schools to safeguard the health of those with peanut allergies. Our work today is inspired by our start as product pioneers of the first and foremost delicious, nutritious nut-free spread.SunButter’s amazing taste, nutritional riches, and culinary versatility made it much more than a peanut butter substitute. Its use in school cafeterias, corporate kitchens, and countless homes spurred the demand that led to its current availability in 30,000 retail locations. And with a savory flavor that plays so well with others, our six delicious spreads are just the start of our story. SunButter® Jammies™ are the next in the line of innovative products planned to further our mission of sharing the sunflower’s full power. So, dig in, fuel up & Shine On!

name: SunFoods
description: Hinode Rice was established in 1934 in California. It began as a created by the California-based Rice Growers Associate and has since become a trusted name in rice across the US, especially in Hawaii and the Pacific region. Today, Hinode is owned by SunFoods, LLC a rice milling and distribution company formed in 2008. SunFoods is a subsidiary of the Australian agribusiness Ricegrowers Limited, which operates under the name SunRice.

name: Sunland Nutrition, Inc.
description: Sunland Nutrition is an industry-trusted innovative source of raw materials in the nutraceutical, sports nutrition, food and beverage, and feed marketplace. With a long strong relationship with our manufacturers, we are able to provide a complete line of high-quality ingredients to our customers and promise to help build your business. Our full portfolio of raw materials includes Amino Acids, Sports Nutrition, Vitamins, Natural and Organic Sweeteners, and more. Our mission is to bring our customers high-quality ingredients, on-time deliveries, competitive prices, innovative solutions, and excellent customer service. Sunland Nutrition supports and listens to our valued customers and believes they should receive the finest raw materials and services. Sunland Nutrition has three sales offices across the United States, over 400 ingredients in stock, and a highly-trained team to help with all customer requests. Contact us today to learn more about how we can help build your business by requesting any documents, quotes, and/or samples.

name: SunLeaf Foods
description: SunLeaf is always chasing the harvest, so you don’t have to. We partner with growers and packers from around the globe, sourcing plant-based ingredients, consolidating inventory, and distributing throughout the US. We provide custom tailored programs specifically to our customers needs. Servicing top industrial food manufacturers, food service restaurant chains, and food distributors. SunLeaf is committed to comprehensive food safety and quality assurance processes. Contact us today to see how we can assist with your next project.Please visit us at www.sunleaffoods.com or email us directly at sales@sunleaffoods.com

name: SUNLIT FOODS
description: SUNLIT FOODS is all about sustainability, serving up crave-worthy K-foods made with nature-inspired, plant-based, and plant-friendly ingredients "Good for you and great for the Earth!"

name: Sunmoco LLC
description: In the bustling streets of Chengdu, Sichuan, China where the air is filled with the tantalizing aroma of sizzling chili peppers and the distinct, numbing fragrance of Sichuan peppercorns, our story begins. Sichuan is a land where food is more than just sustenance — it is an art, a way of life, and a story told through every bite. This is where our passion for crafting homemade mystic hot sauces was born.Our journey started in a small kitchen nestled in the heart of Chengdu surrounded by the rich culinary traditions, where our founder Ryan and Bei grew up. Inspired by this vibe, our founder learned the secrets of blending spices and ingredients to create sauces that were not just spicy but complex, aromatic, and layered with depth. These recipes were crafted with care and an understanding of the delicate balance of flavors.

name: SUNNIE
description: Sunnie was born in 2020. We were two moms who were searching for clean grab and go snacks for our kids, and found that we could only find Lunchables. We built Sunnie to support families and busy adults on the go with seed oil free, refined sugar free and delicious options for your every day adventure.

name: Sunny Sky Products
description: Since 2002, companies have relied upon and trusted Sunny Sky Products to meet all of their beverage needs. Since the company's founding, we have generated an extensive product portfolio that includes frozen dispensed beverages, cold dispensed, hot dispensed and beverage enhancers. The heart and soul of our company are our dedicated employees, and we know that the heart and soul of a great beverage is quality and taste. We pride ourselves on our commitment to choosing the best ingredients, the finest flavors and the newest manufacturing innovations. We strive to always go above and beyond for our customers. Sunny Sky is a complete beverage solution provider. A leading manufacturer of innovative beverage solutions including; hot, cold, frozen, and beverage enhancer products for all industries. ​We specialize in manufacturing hot-fill, cold-fill, low-acid aseptic, and powder-based solutions. ​Sunny Sky has an extensive product portfolio distributed domestically and internationally​, offering a wide range of solutions including licensed brands, SSP house brands and private label offerings to meet your needs. ​Our portfolio includes clean label and preservative free smoothie bases and refreshers, bar and cocktail mixes, juices, teas, lemonades, specialty cappuccinos, frappes, hot chocolates, cold brew and iced coffee, coffee concentrates, fountain drinks, aguas frescas, frozen slushies, coffee syrups, creamers, sauces and toppers. ​We employ about 600 team members across six best-in-class manufacturing facilities located strategically around the US.​

name: Sunny Within
description: Sunny Within is an LA-based wellness brand making clean, liposomal supplements designed to support longevity, energy, and everyday vitality. Powered by organic avocado oil and grounded in cutting-edge science, our formulas help you feel nourished, radiant, and lit from within — wellness, the sunny way.

name: Sunnygem LLC
description: SunnyGem is known for being a California based, vertically intergrated, almond supplier to locations all over the world.  SunnyGem farms thousands of acres of almonds each year in the central region of California. With great care we sort, process and sell to the wholesale ingredient industry. Providing for the increasing appetite for the healthy and delicious nut.SunnyGem Almond Oil is our first specialty product available to the consumer and to the wholesale buyer. Whether you purchase directly from us or from your favorite local store, you can count on SunnyGem to only use the finest almonds from California orchards. No chemical slop, just 100% virgin, cold-pressed, golden almond oil for your cooking and baking pleasure.

name: SunOpta
description: SunOpta delivers customized supply chain solutions and innovation for top brands, retailers and foodservice providers across a broad portfolio of beverages, broths and better-for-you snacks.

name: SunRidge Farms
description: Formally founded in 1982, SunRidge Farms® formed as part of the early healthy foods and lifestyle movements of the 1970's. What began as a small family business, has evolved to include a product line of almost 1,000 delicious products, including Trail and Snack Mixes, Nuts and Seeds, Dried Fruits, Confections, Granolas, Grains, Beans, and Spices. We offer a variety of Certified Organic products as well as offerings of Organic Fair Trade Certified™ and Non–GMO Project Verified products.

name: Sunrise Chemical Co.,Ltd
description: Sunrise Chemical is specialized in manufacturing and distributing amino acids, nutritional supplements and botanic extracts. Our company was founded in 1999. We have established stable purchasing and selling network based on over 25 years’ effort. We have become one of the earliest and biggest exporters of amino acids and nutritional supplements in China. In order to gain the initiative of the market, we realize we have to develop our business from single trading to wider diversification. In 2003, we invested the first factory. Therefore, we could have the possibility to do customized production and new product development. In 2009, we founded another drug development company, named as Suzhou NeuPharma Co., Ltd. The team is comprised with doctors from Harvard and UC Berkeley. We have 4 products under clinical trials and 2 of them are under Phase II in US. In 2013, we set up an office with warehouse in LA and our business in US market has had a large increase. Sunrise Chemical is developing towards more comprehensive company integrated with production, R&D and sales. International trade allows us stand at the forefront of the market. New drugs represent our value. We hope our company could be a century-old company.

name: Sunrise Commodities
description: Sunrise Commodities is one of the leading importers of conventional and organic nuts/dried fruit in the United States. With over 75 years of collective experience in the industry, we strive to sell only high-quality products at a competitive price. We proudly supply a variety of clients including major manufacturers, and food service distributors in the United States, Canada, and across the globe.Our products :Cashews, Brazilnuts, Macadamias, Chia Seeds, Dried Mangoes, Plantain Chips, Rice Crackers, Cranberries, Resins, Dried Ginger, Dried Papaya, Dried Cantaloupe, Dried Coconut,  Prunes, Pumpkin Seeds, Sunflower Seeds, Pistachios, Hemp Seeds, Almonds, Dried Apple Rings, etc.

name: Sunshine (Tianjin) Produce, Ltd.
description: Sunshine USA Produce Inc. is a U.S.-based agricultural and food ingredient company specializing in pumpkin seeds, sunflower seeds, pine nuts, watermelon seeds, goji berries, hemp heart, buckwheat, flaxseeds and other edible seeds and kernels. We focus on sourcing, processing, and supplying high-quality, safe, and traceable products to food manufacturers, distributors, and retailers across the United States.With strong upstream supply chain control and strict quality management systems, Sunshine emphasizes food safety, pesticide residue control, and compliance with U.S. FDA and USDA regulations. Our products are carefully selected, processed, and tested to meet international standards, supporting applications in bakery, snack, confectionery, and health food industries.Driven by integrity, consistency, and long-term partnerships, Sunshine is committed to delivering reliable agricultural ingredients while continuously improving sustainability and transparency throughout our supply chain.

name: Sunshine Buns
description: Founded in 2024, Sunshine Buns was created by two best friends and their husbands, inspired by a multi-generational family recipe and a bold leap of faith. What began as a small bakery is now a fast-growing national CPG brand, built on friendships, family, and bringing comforting food to modern shelves nationwide.

name: Sunsweet
description: At Sunsweet, we've known about the nutritional power of prunes for over a century – and we've made it our mission to share them with the rest of the world. It all started in 1917 when a group of farmers founded the California Prune and Apricot Growers Association. This cooperative allowed us to offer prunes to the mainstream market by combining our production capabilities and marketing communications – all under the brand name "Sunsweet."Over the years, Sunsweet has become the world's largest and most famous brand of dried tree fruits like prunes, apricots, mangos, and more! We have grown to represent nearly 180 grower-members with orchards throughout California – which accounts for more than 20% of prune production around the world. That's about 50,000 tons of our signature Sunsweet Prunes a year! We call California home to this day, specifically Yuba City – home to the world's largest dried fruit tree processing plant. We're so proud of our heritage and that we have become one of America's top brands, trusted by customers everywhere.

name: Suntory ALL-FREE
description: Founded in Japan in 2010 and introduced to the U.S. in 2020, Suntory ALL-FREE is crafted at Suntory's world-class Tokyo Musashino Brewery, the heart of its brewing legacy since 1963. After exploring more than 400 formulas, Suntory perfected a crisp, light, and refreshing beverage made with sparkling malt and hops — delivering zero calories, zero sugar, and 0.00% alcohol. Designed to complement an active, social lifestyle, ALL-FREE offers a beer-like experience without compromise, bringing Japan's favorite alcohol-free brew to American consumers.

name: Super Coffee
description: Super Coffee is America's #1 Selling Low Sugar Coffee (according to Circana Data for Total US MULO+C L52WK 12.28.25)

name: Supergut
description: Supergut is a leading gut-health nutrition brand making fiber-based solutions that are easy, effective, and enjoyable. With 95% of Americans falling short on daily fiber intake, Supergut’s prebiotic superfoods help bridge the gap to support digestive, metabolic, and overall wellness.

name: Superior Foods International
description: At Superior Foods International, we supply the frozen food industry with high-quality, food-safe products from around the world. As a vertically integrated supplier, we make sourcing easier with stringent food safety standards, end-to-end supply chain solutions, and a commitment to doing business for good.

name: Superior Lithographics
description: Superior is an "AA+" BRC Food-Safety rated packaging manufacturer focused on supplying food, beverage and CPG companies with custom printed folding cartons and design solutions. We understand your business and present solutions that keep you focused on your growth, while our technical support teams guarantee our packaging runs seamlessly through your operations. Located in the heart of Los Angeles, we are set up for easy access and quick service response to the entire Western US.

name: Supernatural Kitchen
description: Launched in 2017. Founded in third grade. Carmel was a kid who loved baking, but her mom was an early advocate against controversial ingredients. By the time she started my own family, there was no way to bake colorfully without throwing all food values out the window. So Supernatural was born!

name: SuperWow
description: SuperWow has been a dream for years, stemming from our family's years of food industry experience in snack manufacturing. This year we decided to create our own brand, SuperWow, to unleash our creativity and launch products we wanted to see on the shelf. Inspired by globally influenced taste profiles and better-for-you ingredients like pea, potato, rice, and mushroom, we put that dream into action. Confident in our innovative products, we are excited to have ready-to-ship snacks that transform the snacking experience. SuperWow is the future of snacking!

name: Sur Nutrition
description: Sur Nutrition was started by a 7th-generation Illinois farmer who loves cycling and science. It's run by, well, runners. At Sur we blend time-tested farming with our cutting-edge science. We begin by asking how nature, particularly plants, can solve the problem and how we can make it even better. Then, we combine generational wisdom, clinical research, third-party testing, and field trials to create products with proven results. Seven generations of farming know-how has its perks. It helps us go over and above in sourcing the best fruits, vegetables, and other ingredients from here and around the world for our products. And we don't stop there—everything is reviewed, tested, and traceable. We never cut corners.

name: SurfSnax
description: Surfsnax was founded to use the finest quality salmon to make shelf stable convenient snacks. We believe salmon should taste as great as a beef snack and is much better for our environment!

name: SURREAL BISKS
description: We started developing healthy ingredients through biotechnology research on microalgae in 2021. In 2023, we realized during our research that there was a gap in the market for healthy foods that were gluten-free, lactose-free, and preservative-free, and that there was a lack of tasty snacks with a strong nutritional appeal that would provide satiety and that were rich in protein and fiber, and especially that were minimally processed, had the flavors of the Amazon rainforest, and were sustainable throughout their entire chain.We started our development using cassava (a typical Brazilian root with a low glycemic index) and beans, which are also widely used in the Brazilian diet (which have a lot of protein, iron, and fiber).We wanted to use real beans and cassava, not flour. So we developed a dough that is the base of our products, in which we cook and mix the two, becoming a product with more than 65% whole grain products. When developing flavors, we are concerned with using the largest quantity of upcycling ingredients (we use beans that were discarded because they were not the right size and sunflower flour left over from the sunflower oil extraction process) and we use dehydrated fruits such as mango, apple and banana, and fruit pulp in the passion fruit, mango and açaí flavors.

name: Suzanne's Specialties
description: Organic & Natural Sweeteners including rice syrup, honey, molasses, Ricemellow Creme, agave, agave inulin fiber, rice protein, rice syrup solids, barley malt, evaporated cane juice, and more. Retail to bulk quantities available.

name: Sweet Additions
description: Driven by innovation, Sweet Additions is reshaping the organic landscape with custom ingredients and trendsetting solutions. Our rebrand emphasizes enhanced quality, sustainable growth, and unwavering commitment to partners and the planet. Trusted by top global brands, we offer unmatched consistency, regulatory expertise, and visionary market strategies. More than just a supplier, we're your partner in accelerated success. Join us in pioneering the future of organic innovation.

name: Sweet Craft
description: It all started with four childhood friends…When lifelong friendships and a love for food aligned to create Sweetaly, now Sweet Craft, only delicious magic could be expected.The story of our four founders begins a long time ago...the 8th grade to be exact! Their childhood was spent in Rome, wandering through the many cafés tucked around the small, ancient streets and eating amazing, freshly made desserts like Tiramisú.Eventually each embarked on their own path, not knowing what the future had in store, but all the while maintaining that common thread of food and friendship. 20 years later, they reunited in California with one purpose — to make fantastic, authentic, natural Italian desserts like the ones baked into their memories as kids in Italy!Five years have whisked by, and we're thrilled to still be bringing you those sweet Italian side street memories…in a jar!Thank you for being part of our journey and from our table to yours, Buon Appetito!

name: Sweet Haven
description: Made in Europe, under the strictest of food standards... you can be confident that every bite of Sweet Haven is not only delicious but has the best of ingredients.Sweet Haven master confectioners searched the world to find the best ingredients and textures that will excite your taste buds, while being both Better for You and Better for Earth.

name: Sweet Loren's, Inc.
description: GET TO KNOW OUR FOUNDER, LOREN.After surviving cancer in her early twenties, founder/CEO Loren Castle made it her mission to eliminate processed foods from her diet. Unable to find great tasting cookies made from clean ingredients, she developed her own.A note from Loren: My story begins with a question: How do I live a full life without regrets? A few things I've learned since surviving cancer: Try new things. Work out. Experience the world. And treat yourself. Living a full life also meant taking control over my health, happiness and wellbeing: beginning with the food I eat every day. I cut out hydrogenated oils, high fructose corn syrup, artificial flavors, most dairy, and anything I couldn't pronounce. And replaced those foods with clean ones. In a very short amount of time, I felt more energetic, more alive, more me. But as a person with a serious sweet tooth, I was frustrated with the available clean-food options. So, I made my own. And Sweet Loren's was born. I measure, mix and knead my heart into each Sweet Loren's recipe. I make sure that every product we make is accessible and made from only clean, Non-GMO, gluten-free and plant-based ingredients. And, most importantly, every product we make tastes incredibly good. Because we all deserve to live a full life filled with yum.

name: Sweeter Collective
description: Hi, I’m Erica, and I’ve always had a sweet tooth.Candy was my go-to whenever I wanted something sweet, but as I got older, those moments started to feel… complicated. There was the sugar spike, the crash, and honestly, candy seemed to disappear in just a few seconds (!!).My mom loved hard candy, but I could never get into it. It felt outdated and artificial, and over before it even got good.I wanted... no needed... something different. A hard candy that actually lasted, made with organic ingredients, low sugar, and flavors that felt transportive instead of boring. I wanted a sweet moment I could fully enjoy without overthinking it.And when I couldn’t find it, I (very logically) left my law career to make it!With my pup Skye by my side, I set out from Jupiter, Florida to build candy for real life. You know, for the car rides, the 3pm craving, or after dinner when you want something sweet but don’t want to unravel your whole day.Sweeter Pops are built for your routine. They’re long-lasting, low-investment, and designed so you can say yes to candy and actually feel good about it.Because indulgence should feel simple and easy to choose :)

name: SweetLeaf & Drizzle Honey
description: Wisdom Natural Brands®, based in Gilbert, Arizona, has been an industry pioneer in natural sweeteners with its plant-based SweetLeaf® brand for over 40 years. SweetLeaf has won 36 awards for taste and innovation with their variety of stevia and monk fruit products. SweetLeaf sweeteners have low/zero sugars, no artificial sweeteners, and are non-GMO, kosher and gluten-free. SweetLeaf products are available in powder, granular and liquid forms, making them easy to incorporate into any lifestyle so that every day is as sweet as the next. In 2024, the brand expanded their lineup and acquired Drizzle Honey, which makes sustainably sourced raw and superfood honey products. Drizzle's Turmeric Golden Raw Honey is a 2026 Nexty Awards Finalist. At this year's Expo West, the brand is introducing a striking refresh of its SweetLeaf® stevia packaging that focuses on the brand’s 100% plant-based attributes and modern category leadership with a unique pistachio green color palette, subtle leaf iconography, and new front-of-pack callouts that notably include “Sweetener + Prebiotic Fiber.” That callout highlights SweetLeaf’s industry-first pairing since 1999 of stevia with inulin, a plant-derived fiber that supports the important role of gut health in overall wellness.Stop by our booth to sample our SweetLeaf® sweeteners and Drizzle Honey. To shop SweetLeaf® and Drizzle Honey, go to www.sweetleaf.com, Amazon, other online retailers and select grocery stores.

name: Sweety Ice Cream - Mochi Ice Cream
description: Our story begins in 1978, when our parents set out to bring their favorite Asian flavors - like red bean and matcha - to their new neighborhood, Monterey Park, California. Sweety, the mom-and-pop mochi ice cream shop, was born. Soon after, so were we. Alongside our grandparents, uncles, and aunts, we spent our childhoods "helping" in the ice cream factory, skimming bits of warm, gooey mochi dough and taste testing all the ice cream. Once word got out, the world wanted more, and soon Sweety was in markets across the country. Over time, us kids grew up, moved out, and got office jobs. But all along, we knew we had been happiest when we were making something we loved, with the people we loved. Just like when we were little. So when our parents told us they were ready to retire, we knew what we had to do; quit our jobs and take over the ice cream factory.Today, Sweety is still the only family, AAPI-owned and operated mochi ice cream business in America. From using our dad's original mochi recipe, to handpicking the most delicious ingredients, to letting our own kids "help out," every bouncy bite is made with so much love. We're delighted to keep sharing our family's favorite treats with you, and we hope you love them as much as we do.

name: Swelly Cream Bun
description: FOODCORE Co., Ltd. is the second-largest bakery company in South Korea, producing a wide range of products including bread, cookies, cakes, hamburgers, and sandwiches. The company operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and holds major international food safety certifications such as FSSC 22000, FDA, HALAL, and HACCP. Under the Swelly brand, Foodcore exports its products to the United States, Europe, Asia, and Oceania.

name: SWISH Cocktails
description: Founded by entrepreneur Elena Breeze and created in collaboration with world-renowned mixologist Rich Woods (#the_cocktailguy), SWISH offers modern interpretations of classic alcohol-free cocktails with consistent, bar-quality taste at scale.Crafted with clarified juices, botanical extracts, and premium distillates, our elevated zero-proof collection brings the artistry of world-class mixology into a modern, alcohol-free experience, without compromising on taste or quality.With manufacturing in both the UK and the US, SWISH is uniquely positioned to support our global clients on both sides of the Atlantic.

name: Swiss Pac India
description: Swiss Pac Pvt Ltd is India's largest manufacturer of printed Stand up pouches, coffee bags, tea packaging pouches, flat bottom pouches since last 40 years. We are specialized in 100% recyclable, compostable, and PCF food packaging materials. Having 6 production facilities worldwide including India and we offer great flexibility to our new business start up customers. We offer very Digital Printing and Rotogravure Printing with low Minimum Order Quantites. For Digital Printing the minimum order starts from 1000 pouches and in Rotogravure Printing it starts from 10000 pouches.

name: Switch Foods
description: The story of Switch began when Edward Hamod, a seasoned leader in the food production industry, was confronted with a personal family health crisis. His child's immunity was severely compromised, and the root cause was traced back to food intake. This revelation forced Edward to reflect on how his industry impacted people's health and lives. Determined to make a change, Edward delved deeper into the effects of food on consumers and the environment. He quickly recognized the widespread harm caused by many products on the market, especially in a region known for its severe dependence on food imports, high consumption of meat, and entrenched culinary traditions. Frustrated by the lack of clean, nutritious options produced locally, Edward decided to take on the challenge himself. Edward made it his mission to create clean-label, all-natural, Non-GMO, allergen-free, soy-free, plant-based meat alternatives. What started as a solution for his own family grew into Switch, a brand committed to providing healthy and sustainable food choices in a region facing rising rates of obesity, diabetes, and food related health issues. Switch remains true to its founding mission: to promote a healthier, more sustainable future for people and the planet.

name: SYNCRON
description: Most performance drinks ask you to settle — for quick fixes that lead to a crash, or formulas overloaded with artificial shortcuts. Syncron refuses to compromise.Launched in 2025, Syncron was created to help you push past possible — delivering energy, focus, and recovery without trade-offs.Designed for athletes, competitors, and everyday achievers alike, Syncron brings world-class performance fuel into daily life. Whether you're training hard, gearing up for game day, or simply taking on a full schedule, Syncron helps you perform at your best — physically and mentally.Because Syncron isn't just another workout drink. It's smart fuel for people who expect more from their body, their mind, and their day — every single time.

name: Synear Foods USA
description: Headquartered and based in Zhengzhou, China, Synear Food Co. Ltd was founded in 1997. With a team of 15,000 employees and covering an area of more than 750,000 square meters in 12 manufacturing facilities, we are one of the largest and most well-known frozen food brands in the industry. Our annual production capacity is over 700,000 tons, supplying over 300 frozen products under 6 categories: Dumplings, Steamed buns, Rice balls, Wontons, Snack food, and Rice dumplings. Since 2003, Synear's overseas market has developed steadily. Our business covers Asia-Pac, Europe, and North America. Our customers cover more than 50 countries including the USA, Canada, UK, France, Germany, Italy, Russia, South Korea, Japan, Thailand, and the Philippines. The business channel covers large supermarket chains, food service chains, ethnic supermarkets, wholesale distribution, and other types. It is the first Chinese well-known frozen food brand to have a manufacturing presence in the United States. Synear Foods USA, established in 2015, operates a 190,000 sq. ft. plant in Chatsworth, California, with SQF Level 3 certification and multiple dumpling production lines. Distributing under the "Synear" brand to nationwide Asian stores, Synear emphasizes premium ingredients, innovation, and family-friendly flavors. Committed to global customer satisfaction, Synear aims to bring authentic hometown flavor to homes worldwide.

name: T FOODS CO., LTD.
description: In 2020, amidst rapid changes in the global market and the restructuring of consumer behavior, we embarked on the brand's entrepreneurial journey.Starting from a core question—whether we could transform freshly made tapioca pearls and brown sugar flavors into stable, mass-producible canned soft drink products—we began investing in product concept validation and technological exploration.

name: Tabanero Holdings
description: Tabañero® is a Florida-based, SQF-certified manufacturer of premium sauces and condiments, proudly made in the USA. Best known for its bold, balanced hot sauces, Tabañero has grown into a full-spectrum flavor partner for restaurants and foodservice operators nationwide, offering a diverse portfolio that includes hot sauces, BBQ sauces, taco sauces, salsas, and a wide range of complementary condiments.Founded on the belief that sauces should elevate food rather than overpower it, Tabañero is driven by a flavor-first philosophy rooted in culinary application, operational consistency, and scalable quality. Every product is developed with real kitchen use in mind - designed to perform across menu formats, cuisines, and dayparts while delivering craveable flavor and broad guest appeal.

name: Table for Six Brands LLC
description: Founded by Dao Jensen, Table for Six Brands is a founder-led portfolio built on family, culture, and connection. Named for Dao and her five sisters, the brand is rooted in a childhood spent in a family restaurant, where food was the center of identity, community, and joy. Today, Table for Six brings that same spirit to the modern kitchen through authentic Asian sauces that balance bold flavor with intention. The portfolio includes OohNami!, inspired by Dao’s Vietnamese heritage and global flavor exploration, and Fresh Zen, founded by Ruby Chan, known for Clean Asian Sauces™ made with better-for-you ingredients. Together, Table for Six Brands exists to bring people together—one table, one story, one meal at a time.

name: Tacodeli
description: Tacodeli Salsas, Dips, Fresh Tortillas and Tortilla Chips

name: Taha Kava
description: Taha Kava is an alcohol-free sparkling Polynesian social tonic crafted with kava root and bright tropical flavor. Born on Maui and made for modern social moments, Taha offers a refreshing alternative when you want something adult, flavorful, and intentional in your hand, without alcohol. Available in Mango Hibiscus, Pineapple Twist, and Passion Fruit, Taha is a herbal supplement designed to fit seamlessly across non-alc, functional beverage, and wellness-forward sets. Sip • Relax • Connect.

name: Tahoma Coconut Products (Pvt) Ltd.
description: Offering  premium quality Organic Coconut Products, carefully manufactured in our IFS-certified, state-of-the-art facility to ensure the highest standards of quality and safety.Our product range includes:Organic Virgin Coconut OilOrganic Coconut ButterOrganic Desiccated CoconutOrganic Coconut ChipsOrganic Coconut FlourOrganic Coconut Milk Powder

name: Taisei Lamick USA
description: Provide machinery and film for liquid sachets and pouches.

name: Takari International, Inc.
description: Takari International, Inc. started with one man. In June 1988, Yuntakari Wiharyanto began with just one mission: Bringing in difference ethnic items to the public to help satisfying their memory and joy; without breaking the bank and live a better life.Started as an importer and distributor of disposable chopsticks from 1988 and was progressively adding new items, such as cookies and snacks in the following year. As of the food items business was growing tremendously; cessation of the chopsticks business had taken into place in 1995. By mid-2000, the company entered the food services & food producers' business by introducing and marketing imported goods, like Kara Coconut, to ethnic supermarkets as well as customers in the West Region of United States, and slowly expanded to all regions in the U.S.As a growing enterprise, we maintain Mr. Wiharyanto's vision, but now, we are able to help more customers than ever by providing difference platforms from online and offline. Today, we are serving thousands of supermarkets and food services throughout the U.S.A. & other Continents with brands that are well recognized in today's market.

name: Taki Mai & FijiKava
description: From tradition comes enjoyment and calm.Noble kava (piper methysticum), is a natural, historic plant native to the Pacific Islands and used for over 3000 years to promote relaxation for the mind and the body.At Taki Mai*, we've worked hand-in-hand with farmers across the Pacific Islands for decades to bring you calm in a cup that's steeped in tradition and served for you..When Founder, Zane Yoshida, thought of how best to bring the traditional relaxation and social community of Noble Kava to others, the answer came from meeting people where they were – with others.Taki Mai was born to give you the option to experience non-alcoholic, non-caffeinated enjoyment in every situation. After your morning run, on a sunny afternoon with friends, or celebrating a special moment.Tradition stays in every drop, every cup, and every sip of Taki Mai. 100% Noble Kava, made direct from farm to you, on-the-go and at home.Taki mai; a colliqual saying commonly used during a kava ceremony to mean 'serve me another'

name: Talking Rain
description: Popwell was born out of a bold vision in 2024: to create a soda that offers indulgent flavor without sacrificing health. Developed by the makers of Sparkling Ice, we saw an opportunity to revolutionize the growing Better-For-You (BFY) Soda category with a product that delivers not just functional benefits, but also the joy of truly great taste.Inspired by the increasing demand for gut-health-focused beverages and a desire to replace traditional sugary sodas, our journey began in small market tests, where we crafted the perfect balance of prebiotics, natural flavors, and low sugar. From those early trials, Popwell proved that health-conscious consumers didn't have to compromise on flavor.By 2025, with the support of passionate fans and a shared belief in bold innovation, Popwell is expanding nationally—redefining the prebiotic soda space and inspiring a new generation to sip smarter and live boldly.Popwell is "Cold Crafted for Fresh Flavor" ->The "Cold Crafted for Fresh Flavor" tagline represents Popwell's commitment to delivering an unparalleled soda experience. Unlike traditional sodas that undergo heat-based pasteurization, which can dull or alter the taste, Popwell is crafted in a cool environment. This innovative process uses natural preservatives to ensure the flavors remain vibrant, true to their origin, and fresh with every sip.By avoiding heat, Popwell maintains the integrity of its natural ingredients and bold flavor profiles, setting it apart from competitors. This tagline encapsulates both our dedication to quality and our promise to provide a soda that's as delicious as it is health-conscious, reinforcing why Popwell is the best choice in the Better-For-You (BFY) soda category.

name: Talya Herbal
description: Talya was established in 2003 in Antalya Talya, the manufacturer company specializing in plant science, beside being the manufacturer of essential oils, fixed oils, food supplements, special purpose oil blends, today it is one of the major raw material manufacturer for the cosmetics, food and pharmaceutical industries, Talya has taken part in the establishment of many associations in the sector since its establishment  and has pioneered many studies in order to utilize our country's richness in plant diversity for the benefit of the people. Talya which carry on a work for marketing food supplements, essential and fixed oils, produced in Turkey to the world, is  also the first Turkish brand established a company in  USA in its field.Talya promotes its products to consumers in America through Talya Herbal LLC, located in Chicago, USA.Talya is registered with the US Food and Drug Administration and holds an FDA certificate from the same organization.Talya conducts scientific studies in USA with the cooperation of universities and private sector. Talya, which aims to reach phytotherapy and aromatherapy products to more people,has been one of the pioneers in the sale of essential and fixed oils in pharmacies in Turkey.Today, Talya products are sold in over 20,000 pharmacies, natural product stores and national retail chains such as Migros, Macro Center and Özdilek. Today, lack of nutrition, environmental factors and stress affect human life negatively. The insufficient supply of the substances needed by the human body with daily nutrition, threatens human health.Talya believes that the way people live longer and healthier is through useful substances that can be taken from nature, and for this reason, Talya carry on a work with its global standards.

name: Tamar Date Coffee
description: Tamar was born from our love of dates and coffee, and has grown into a symbol of everything we believe in - honest, wholesome products made with organic, healthy, and upcycled ingredients. It’s our way of making everyday coffee a little better - for you and the planet.

name: Tangoz
description: TANGOZ - FLAVOR INFUSED ORGANIC MANGOTANGOZ WAS CREATED WITH A SIMPLE BELIEF: WHEN REAL FRUIT TASTES THIS GOOD, WHO NEEDS CANDY?We start with real, organic mango and carefully infuse it with bold, globally inspired flavors for a fresh, modern twist. The result is crave-worthy taste that lets the fruit shine — no added sugar, no unnecessary extras. Just Real Fruit. Bold Flavor.TANGOZ is here to shake up the snack aisle and blur the line between wholesome and wildly craveable — bringing healthy snacking to candy and candy energy to healthy snacks. Real, organic fruit crafted to satisfy sweet cravings, with laid-back beach vibes built in. Clean ingredients. Big taste.Healthy snacking should never be boring — it should be vibrant, feel-good, and full of flavor. When fruit tastes this good, satisfaction comes naturally. TANGOZ is snacking, reimagined - turned all the way up.TANGOZ - SNACKING, REIMAGINED.

name: TANISA FOODS JSC
description: Tanisa Foods JSC is a leading Vietnamese manufacturer specializing in rice paper, rice noodle/vermicelli and proudly supplying to global supermarket chains, foodservice distributors, restaurant groups.Founded in 2015. 10+ years exportExporting to 30+ countries ( USA, Europe, Australia, Japan, Korea…). 100% machine made and dried.Top 2 export quantity for rice paper at Korea market.Certifications: FSSC 22000, ISO 22000:2018, KFDA (Korea), Halal etc Core strengths: Tanisa Foods JSC is a Vietnamese manufacturer of rice-based products, offering gluten-free, clean-label rice paper and rice noodles for retail and foodservice markets.Made from Vietnamese rice and produced under certified food safety systems, Tanisa supports importers and private label partners seeking reliable, scalable supply from Vietnam.

name: Tantos
description: We launched July 24th, 2024 and are the first and only puffed pasta chip on the market!

name: Target Agriculture Group
description: At Target Agriculture, we provide exceptional organic products from Sri Lanka, Thailand, Vietnam, and Indonesia. Our range includes tropical dried fruits, fruit juices, coconut products, spices, and cashew nuts, all crafted with meticulous care and a commitment to quality.We hold certifications such as Organic USDA, Organic EU, ROC, Naturland, Korean Organic, BRC, Fairtrade, and Social Compliance (SMETA), BSCI ensuring ethical and sustainable practices.

name: Tari Peruvian Hot Sauce
description: In 2011, the culinary world of Peru saw the birth of Tari, a hot sauce co-created with  renowned chef Gastón Acurio.With a mission to bring the authentic, homemade taste of Peruvian hot sauce to families, Tari offers a ready-to-eat condiment that captures the essence of traditional family cooking.Made with authentic Peruvian peppers that grow exclusively in the region, Tari showcases the vibrant and bold flavors of Rocoto and Aji Amarillo. Its unique recipe quickly resonated with consumers, and Tari became the #1 hot sauce in Peru, capturing over 70% of the market share. Its success is a testament to the connection it fosters within families, allowing them to enhance their everyday meals with a ready-to-eat sauce full of flavor.Inspired by this success in Peru, Alicorp, the leading CPG company in Peru and owner of the brand Tari, decided to introduce these delightful flavors to the United States. They recognized an opportunity to share something truly unique, inviting American consumers to experience the richness of Peruvian culinary heritage.Tari is more than just a sauce; it embodies a passion for quality and a commitment to cultural connection. It fills a unique space in the market by offering a hot sauce that provides a great and bold flavor without overpowering food. Made with authentic Peruvian peppers that grow exclusively in the region, Tari invites consumers to enjoy a delicious taste experience that enhances dishes without burning your mouth, offering a flavor that they have never tried before!

name: TARIS FIG UNION
description: Dried figs business has always been a traditional business in Aegean region of todays Turkiye since early ages. It was mainly dominated by foreign traders till beginning of 20 th century. TARIS emerged first in dried figs then widespread to sultana raisins,cotton & olive oil afterwards to protect the rights of growers against traders to avoid downsizing of selling prices. TARIS acted as a trading company to increase the sales of figs with protecting growers especially on problematic crop years. TAR means short of form of agriculture in Turkish. IS means business in Turkish.

name: Tash Market Place Inc.
description: Tash Market Place offers Direct Store Delivery (DSD) services for retailers in Los Angeles, San Diego, Phoenix and Las Vegas. Brands range from fresh baked bread to shelf stable snacks. We own a custom built software to keep track of your sales, deliveries and returns by day. We offer freezer and refrigerator storage. We are a family owned business. Our services are personalized to your operations.

name: Taste of Nature
description: Taste of Nature Organic: Embracing Wholesome Snacking, NaturallyBorn from a passion for natural, uncomplicated foods, Taste of Nature Organic offers a range of healthy and convenient on-the-go snacks for everyone to enjoy everyday. Founded on the belief that real, delicious ingredients should be accessible to all, we've dedicated ourselves to crafting Organic snack bars, balls, and bites that celebrate the simplicity of natural, organic foods.At Taste of Nature, we believe that the most satisfying snacks are those made from the simplest of ingredients. That's why every one of our snacks is certified organic, non-GMO, and made with ingredients you can trust like  nutrient-dense fruits, nuts, and seeds that deliver genuine flavor and wholesome nutrition.We're committed to health-conscious eating without compromising on taste. Each of our snacks is gluten-free, vegan and kosher, ensuring that Taste of Nature is accessible to those with diverse dietary preferences and needs. Whether you're hitting the gym, commuting to work, running an endless list of errands or simply need a nourishing pick-me-up, Taste of Nature is your companion on the journey toward mindful eating and natural well-being. With Taste of Nature, you don't just eat—you savor. Enjoy what you eat and eat what you enjoy!

name: Taste Republic
description: Taste Republic was born from a passion to help. Wanting to solve the longstanding – and previously unsolved – challenge to make a gluten-free, fresh pasta that had the same amazing taste and texture as its regular counterpart, one of Taste Republic's cofounders (our resident creative genius) nailed the recipe. His inspiration and motivation? A friend diagnosed with celiac disease who could no longer eat traditional pasta. On the heels of the invention, Taste Republic's five founders focused on blending purpose, passion and pasta to create what's become one of the most popular gluten-free brands. That drive has led to the creation of numerous gluten-free and grain-free pastas that continue to set the standard for what's possible.Today, our goal hasn't changed. Sure, we're adding more pastas and continuing to push the limits, but we'll never sway from our core belief that food is more than sustenance. Food is an experience. And everyone deserves access to great pasta. No. Matter. What. We're looking for new ways to create equity, to ensure no one feels singled out or left out because of dietary restrictions they can't control. It began with gluten-free pasta, and we'll never lose sight of that. But, we're on a mission to do more. As a certified B Corporation, we've taken intentional steps to improve the world. Whether that's helping build a more sustainable and inclusive economy or finding ways to help the gluten-free community, we're in it for the long haul.

name: Tat Hui Foods Pte Ltd
description: Founded in 1986 with the aspiration to bring these humble instant noodles to as many people as possible, eager to share the rich culture and unique character of Singaporean cuisine with the rest of the world

name: Taura Natural Ingredients and Fruit Snacks
description: For over 50 years, TAURA has helped food brands innovate and grow in healthier snacking.We create custom fruit ingredients and snack solutions that deliver authentic fruit impact with consistent performance at scale. Supported by global IC&D capabilities and deep application expertise, we enable our customers to meet rising consumer demand for natural, healthy, and authentic snacks - from concept through commercialization.

name: Taylor Pass Honey Co.
description: Taylor Pass Honey was founded in 2001, as a beekeeping company. From there, we grew into a honey company, having developed our brand "Taylor Pass Honey" which was our way of sharing the incredible gift from nature, that is New Zealand honey.We are a vertically integrated company which means we control every step of the supply chain, from hive to jar, ensuring the highest level of traceability our consumers are increasingly expecting from suppliers of premium products.Taylor Pass in New Zealand is a gateway to some of the world's wildest regions; remote and pristine places to treasure and preserve. Taylor Pass Honey captures the true essence and remarkable flavors of this land. In the crisp mountain air, hidden valleys, kissed by sunlight, hum with the songs of abundant nature, and for brief periods, native trees like Mānuka and Rata blossom and wildflowers bloom. Here, our beekeepers work in harmony with the rhythm of the environment, letting nature guide them. Through respectful partnership and the lightest of touches, they take care of the land and ensure our bees are some of the healthiest in the world. As our beekeepers say, they literally shine! The proof of our approach is in the product. Each jar of Taylor Pass Honey tells the unique story of the land and the flowers that bloomed. Purity, authenticity, and origins are fully traceable.

name: TCHO Chocolate
description: What does ethical indulgence mean? For TCHO, the end result is mouth-watering chocolate that is 100% organic, fair-trade, dairy-free, soy-free, non-GMO, and completely traceable to its origin. This begins with our relationship with farming partners worldwide, to whom we pay a TCHO Quality Premium when they meet our high standards. And when we realized most cacao farmers have never tasted chocolate made from their beans, we built ten TCHO Flavor Labs around the world where we work alongside local farmers and agronomists to improve every aspect of cacao farming -- because better beans make better chocolate. As a certified B Corporation, we lean on our founding values of curiosity and connection to find new ways to use our business to better the world through chocolate.That's why TCHO is Chocolate. Fair & Square.

name: TEA GARDEN COMPANY
description: I started 15 years ago when I lost 3 babies and decided to quit traditional medicine and discovered alternative natural medicine, then I understood that not only the food that I was consuming was making me sick but also the hygiene products I was using aswell. As an arquitect I new that instead of designing homes my destiny would be to create all natural products that not only would have good quality and functionality but be pleasing to the eyes aswell:))

name: Tecton Ketones
description: Tecton Ketones is designed to help you get the benefits of ketosis without the dietary demands. We're the only FDA-recognized, bioidentical ketone. Designed to elevate performance, sharpen cognition and support metabolic health.

name: Tedpack LLC
description: You can feel good knowing that you are partnering with a well-established company that has strong global customer and supplier relationships with our presence in the US market now giving you access to our incredible team.You’re in touch with the leading experts in flexible packaging, and the execution to back it up. TedPack has been supplying flexible packaging for over 15 years. We have a reliable team with decades of flexible packaging experience in a variety of applications. With us, you’re connected to the highest quality inspectors and a widely experienced product/process team of engineers and technicians to give you peace of mind as a reliable resource and partner.Learn more about what makes us the leader in the flexible-packaging global marketplace today. Our in-house dedicated teams provide exceptional service through your packaging journey.We offer a robust supply chain to sustain your availability, pricing, and quality along with the ability to pivot and adapt when needed to continue providing you with a reliable source of custom-made packaging products.We can scale with you as you expand your brand and volume needs. We offer smaller batch production runs using digital printing and offer premium roto printing as volume ramps up. This allows us to offer you services and solutions for every stage of your business. We take your satisfaction seriously and are honored to be your reliable partner as your business scales.

name: Teeccino
description: One morning in 1993 award-winning tea designer, Caroline MacDougall, awoke from a dream with a compelling vision to create a bold, robust brew from roasted herbs. She even dreamed the name of it would be Teeccino. Propelled by her own sensitivity to caffeine and acidity, Caroline designed Teeccino to satisfy both coffee and tea drinkers alike with its rich, full body and its many health benefits. Caroline founded Teeccino in 1995, adding to her repertoire of herbal teas that she had created for other top tea companies since 1980. We are pioneers new trade for wild harvested ramÛn seeds, promoting rainforest preservation and providing income & nutrition for indigenous communities in Guatemala. Today, Teeccino is the #1 coffee alternative and fastest growing herbal tea brand providing rich bold taste and maximum wellness in your cup. Brew just like coffee, or steep like tea to enjoy delicious satisfaction and prebiotic benefits any time of day, without any caffeine or acidity. Family-owned from Santa Barbara, CA.

name: Tejava
description: The Tejava DifferenceOur award-winning black tea is not just refreshing, bold, smooth with a true-to-the-tea taste—it's a nine-time recipient of top honors at the Global Tea Championship™. We start by sourcing high-quality tea leaves from Rainforest Alliance Farms in Java, Indonesia and small-batch brew our tea for a consistently tea-luscious ready-to-drink tea. We do not add sugar or sweeteners because our tea does not need them. And, due to our unique and stringent manufacturing processes, we also do not use any added preservatives.What you get is a purely exceptional tasting tea.

name: Těm Tóa
description: Deep Indian Kitchen's parent company, Deep Foods, was founded by Bhagwati Amin in 1977, and is now owned and operated by three generations of her family.  Deep Foods is the leader in Indian cuisine in North America, and in late 2019, our CEO Deepak Amin launched the Deep Indian Kitchen brand to elevate and expand access to Indian food in mainstream America.The Deep Indian Kitchen brand experience includes a line of frozen entrees, samosas and naan, two NYC-based Fast Casual Restaurants and an NJ HQ-based Restaurant & Innovation Kitchen, opened in 2023.  It has become one of the fastest-growing frozen food brands in the U.S. and the #1 Indian brand on social media with its delicious, authentic, always-made-from-scratch frozen meals and appetizers that are available in over 20,000 natural, conventional, and ecommerce grocery stores nationwide.

name: TemperPack
description: Our vision is a world where packaging innovationmakes a positive impact on consumers’experiences, our customers’ businesses,and the planet we share.

name: Terra Artesana
description: We know the world has changed.We know that value is not the same as price.That true luxury isn’t what sparkles — it’s what endures.And that living fully is life’s greatest privilege.To reconnect with what really matters,we go back to the origin — to simplicity, to authenticity.That’s why we handpick the finest ingredientsto bring you bold, unforgettable flavor,crafted by people who, like you,believe in caring for our environment, our soil, and our roots.Because we’re all connected,and your well-being is ours.Only together can we find true harmony.This is our commitment, our promise, our purpose —and it’s where all our creativity and passion come to life.The best of the earth, transformed into delicious recipes.Every bite a genuine experience, a taste of what real GRANOLA, cereal bars and artisanal gourmet oats should be.Because true richness is found in delighting your sensesand creating moments you’ll never forget.

name: Terra Nostra Organics
description: Terra Nostra Organic LLC is a bulk organic ingredient company focused in sustainable and regenerative supply chains. Our main supply chains include, organic: dried mango, dried fruits, cashews, walnuts, avocado oil, olive oil, sunflower seeds, pumpkin seeds, matcha, chia, coconut sugar, coconut nectar, coconut sugar, cocoa powder, cocoa nibs, cocoa liquor, cocoa butter, juice concentrate and purees, ROC-certified products and much more.We work directly with farmers to ensure our customers receive the highest quality ingredients and source sustainably while working to improve farmer livelihood.
