We work with certifications like Fairtrade, Regenerative, Rainforest Alliance to achieve these goals. Please reach out for a meeting!

name: Terrapin Ridge Farms, LLC
description: The heart of Terrapin Ridge Farms comes from my love of entertaining. I grew up in a family that loved to host parties – our annual Holiday Open House was legendary. My friends loved to hang out at our house and everybody was extra excited when it was Aunt Rosie's (my mom's) turn to host the holiday party. She made it look so easy. Her secret was a laid back style and effortless, great-tasting food. The spread looked and tasted like she fussed for days.I discovered early on I inherited this love of entertaining and ultimately this love is what has drawn me into the world of specialty food. After 10 years in the specialty food industry, I ventured out to buy a small specialty food brand with budding potential. I reached out to a friend of 22 years, and fellow Cleveland native, Brian Coughlin, in July of 2010 and together we purchased the Terrapin Ridge Farms brand. Our brand has grown from a handful of items to over 84 great selling products including savory jams, garnishing aioli squeezes, mustards, dips, dressings, sauces, and now grill and wing sauces. We have developed a reputation as a truly original, high quality food creator. Our team is made up of passionate foodies with the goal to deliver on creating a memorable and positive experience that can be shared with loved ones, turning simple into unforgettable!

name: TERROIR WINE GROUP
description: Founded in 2009, Sandalo was founded out of the desire to produce and import high-quality wines to the US.  in 2012 the import company partnered with Spanish wineries Punctum and Bodegas Albero to become one of the leading importers of organic and Spanish wines in North America.

name: Tersand Foods LLC
description: Our journey began in 2023 with a vision: to harness cutting-edge thermal processing and sterilization technologies to create ready-to-eat meals that stay true to their roots. Every dish we produce is inspired by traditional recipes, slow-cooked to perfection to preserve their deep, natural flavors.But great taste is just the beginning. In today's fast-paced world, we understand the value of convenience. That's why all our meals are fully cooked, allowing you to enjoy high-quality, flavorful food without sacrificing time. Whether at home, at work, or on the go, TERSAND FOODS brings gourmet simplicity to your busy lifestyle.Quality is at the heart of everything we do. Each of our recipes undergoes a rigorous research and development process, ensuring that flavors are not only preserved but also adapted to suit palates around the world. Plus, we are committed to using 100% animal protein, guaranteeing superior taste, texture, and nutritional value while maintaining the highest quality standards.

name: Texture Maker Enterprise Co., Ltd.
description: A brand of Texture Maker Enterprise, Chewco supports commercial bakeries and foodservice brands with trend-driven ingredients, including dry mixes, mochi solutions, functional powders, and ready-to-bake frozen dough, backed by a regional presence in California. At Expo West, Chewco will showcase better-for-you ube bakery and beverage concepts, including gluten-free and high-protein options—illustrating how in-demand Asian flavors can translate into scalable formats.

name: Thai Coconut Public Company Limited
description: Founded in 1991 with a small factory and 12 workers to supply pasteurized coconut milk to local ice cream makers, Thai Coco has been passionate about coconut products ever since.  From our humble beginnings, it was soon realized we needed to expand. In 2008 Thai Coco expanded our warehouse and production capabilities with a state of-the-art 16-hectare facility based in Ratchaburi.  In 2014 after this expansion, Thai Coco was ready to go global and introduced its delicious products abroad. Over 90 countries and more than 30 years later, Thai Coco is the leading manufacturer and 2nd largest exporter of coconut products in Thailand.At Thai Coconut we operate under our CEO's steadfast belief that: "If there is no Thai Coconut, there would be no highest quality of coconut products and no best coconuts to consume in the world." Rooted in this simple yet profound intention, our resolve evolved into a firm commitment to serve. We aspire to be the conduit delivering premium Thai products sourced directly from the finest coconut farms in the world to our esteemed customers.

name: Thai J.Tip Food Company Limited
description: Bangkok Bites is the newest chapter of a long family journey in plant-based food. Our founder family company, Thai J Tip Food Co., Ltd., was founded in Thailand more than 30 years ago, producing soy-based vegetarian products for restaurants, hotels, and the local market long before plant-based became a global trend. I grew up watching my family build this business with dedication and cultural pride, but I also knew there was another chapter waiting to be written — one where our heritage could reach the world in a completely new form.In 2024, I decided to carry that legacy forward in my own way. As a Thai-American, women- and AAPI founder, I wanted to create a brand that honored where we came from while reflecting where food culture is going. So I built Bangkok Bites, a modern snack line that transforms authentic Thai flavors into high-protein, better-for-you snacks made from non-GMO soy.Our journey wasn't smooth. In early 2025, I launched our first products in the U.S. under a different concept — and it failed. The flavors were safe, the story wasn't clear, and the products blended into a crowded market. That experience was humbling but necessary. I realized the future of plant-based snacking wasn't about creating another "healthy" option — it was about leading with flavor, culture, and identity.So in October 2025, I relaunched as Bangkok Bites with four SKUs inspired by real Thai dishes: Pad Thai and Thai BBQ vegan jerky (14–18g protein, low fat) and Tom Yum and Sriracha protein chips (10–11g protein, low sugar). These snacks bring something new to the category — a blend of global flavor, functional protein, and a texture experience that's genuinely fun to eat.Today, Bangkok Bites is still run by me, founder-led and fueled by family tradition. Between Bangkok and the U.S., I'm working to show that cultural flavor and plant-based innovation can live in the same bag. Our goal is simple: make better-for-you snacks exciting, inclusive, and rooted in real culinary stories.

name: Thai Younger Farm. Co., Ltd
description: Thai Younger Farm began with a simple yet powerful dream: to bring honest, high-quality farm products to every household in Thailand.

name: THANKCOME BIOLOGICAL SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY SUZHOU CO.,LTD
description: “THANKCOME is a biotechnology company focusing on next-generation probiotics and gut microbiota research.”“The company is committed to the research, development, and industrialization of functional microorganisms.”Founded in 2016, Thankcome is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the entire probiotic industry chain (R&D, production, sales), and a subsidiary of Perfect Group (stock code: 603059). It holds 105 Chinese invention patents, 4 PCT patents, 4 Australian patents, 11 Hong Kong patents, and has published 63 academic papers (53 SCI) while leading 29 clinical studies.In 2019, THANKCOME selected AKK PROBIO from 200 AKK strains. Its preservation number is CGMCC No.20955 (certified by the China General Microbiological Culture Collection Center).Over 3,000 global studies confirm AKK significant potential in intestinal barrier protection, weight management, anti-aging, and anti-inflammation, with broad application prospects.

name: Thanks! Naturals LLC
description: Thanks! Naturals was founded in 2023 by Harley Sutton, a third-generation, female-owned wellness entrepreneur with deep roots in the industry. Growing up working alongside her family wellness-focused multi-brand business, Harley developed a passion for natural wellness from a young age. After taking a brief break to further her education in Los Angeles, where she earned both a JD and MBA from the University of Southern California, Harley was driven to create a brand that would make a lasting impact on how we care for ourselves and each other.Thanks! Naturals was created to do just that—promote gratitude, self-care and well-being through premium, natural wellness, beauty, health, and self-care products. The company's formulations are crafted with superior ingredients, rooted in Harley's deep respect for the power of botanicals, vegan and other natural ingredients.

name: That's it. Nutrition
description: That’s it., makers of the #1 fruit bar in America, is an LA-based healthy snacking company founded in 2012 by Dr. Lior Lewensztain, driven by a mission to help people eat more fruit. In 2025, the brand delivered over a quarter billion fruit servings and has expanded beyond Fruit Bars into Minis, toddler snacks, confections, and energy, with two new product lines debuting at Expo West. All That’s it. snacks are made with six real ingredients or less and contain natural fiber from fruit. No added junk. Nothing artificial. 100% real fruit. That’s it.

name: The 'Pause Life Supplements
description: Dr. Mary Claire Haver is a board-certified OB-GYN, Menopause Society Certified Practitioner, and #1 New York Times bestselling author. After decades of caring for women, she saw a critical gap in menopause care—so she went back to school to earn her certification in Culinary Medicine and deepen her understanding of nutrition's role in women's health. This unique blend of clinical and nutrition expertise inspired her to launch The 'Pause Life—a brand rooted in science, built to meet the real, comprehensive health needs of women through every stage of the menopausal transition. She's been featured in The New York Times, Forbes, The Today Show and Oprah's Menopause Revolution and, with over 7 million followers, she's changing the conversation around midlife health—one evidence-based solution at a time.

name: The Auric
description: Auric is a global, science-backed Ayurveda wellness brand that makes daily health easy for modern lifestyles.Not a traditional Ayurvedic company. Not a commodity supplement brand. Not a wide-catalog FMCG player.Auric sits at the intersection of three pillars: Ayurveda → reason to believe, Science & clinical credibility → reason to trust and Convenience & modern formats → reason to use dailyAuric is not selling “detox” in the old sense. It is selling: A daily wellness ritual, A lifestyle habit and A preventive health solution for recurring, universal problemsThe core promise is “Daily Wellness Made Easy — with Science & Ayurveda.”

name: THE CASA MARKET
description: Our story began when two Mexicans came together to share the best flavors of their land. Our farmers and workers play a very important role in our history, they are the ones who produce and protect our authentic natural ingredients. Every time one of our products sits on your table and you enjoy its full flavor, our family is present and our proud traditions go on.

name: The Coconut Cooperative, LLC
description: Since 2014, our mission has been simple: make sourcing premium organic coconut ingredients easier, more transparent, and more reliable for growing businesses.At The Coconut Cooperative, we’ve lived and worked throughout South and Southeast Asia to build direct, ethical relationships with farmers and producers. By supporting responsible farming practices, recognized food safety standards, and certified supply chains, we ensure consistent, high-quality bulk coconut flour, sugar, and other ingredients our partners can trust.

name: The Fillo Factory
description: 1986 - The Fillo Factory began.  CEO Ron Rexroth grew up in the Fillo and the manufacturing equipment business and with his passion for the Culinary opened the doors to the original Fillo Factory in Bergenfield NJ.  The Fillo Factory quickly grew into a much-loved brand.   Featuring Fillo Doughs, Puff Pastry, Appetizers, Handheld Snacks, and Savory Pies and Desserts.

name: The Fine Cheese Co. LLC
description: The Fine Cheese Co. was founded by Ann-Marie Dyas. A judge at both the British and World Cheese Awards, Ann-Marie was committed to the survival of traditional cheese-making, and to introducing farmhouse cheeses to as wide a public as possible.However, our love of cheese extends beyond these shores. We also import artisan cheeses from France, Italy, Spain and Holland. (Sometimes the only way to get the Dutch to part with their finest aged Gouda is to go over and get it.)Throughout our history, The Fine Cheese Co. has sought, cared for and loved hand-made cheese. We have also made it our business to know what flatters it and makes it a new experience. Our dedicated and unique ranges of Crackers (made by our sister Company, Artisan Biscuits), Fruits, Whole Fruits, Chutneys, and English Pickles for Cheese are the result.We are a strong supporter of the independent retailer – after all we are an independent retailer ourselves – and none of The Fine Cheese Co. ranges of products will ever be sold in a British supermarket.But you will find them in over 600 delicatessens, farm shops and so on throughout the UK, and in over 30 countries (from Austria to Australia).

name: The Flex Company
description: Periods are uncomfortable because of period products. We have been using the same period products (tampons, pads, cups, reusable garments) for nearly 100 years without question. Traditional period products are making our lives miserable with leaks, cramps, bloating, frequent changes and infections.Instead of looking for better products, we've chosen to blame our own bodies and accept misery and discomfort for one week each month-- nearly a quarter of our adult lives.We believe that periods are natural and healthy. We believe that with better products, women would not dread their periods. We believe that if women did not dread their periods, every woman would love her body every day of the year and live her life without limits.CATEGORY CREATIONThe Flex Company has established an entirely new category of period product: the menstrual disc. We have named our category but have not yet clearly articulated the problem to the broader market. I believe that we are in a critical moment in which we must seize the category by establishing brand familiarity with our target customer.If we clearly articulate the problem that women don't realize that they currently have in the market, and widely establish our brand in the market before competitors, we will become the category winner. In order to do this, we must do the following: Make a product that's at least 10x better than the alternatives Be first to market Deeply understand our customers Build a brand that people love that's synonymous with the category Clearly articulate the problem Articulate our core value proposition in every customer touchpoint Hire the best talent Create data infrastructure and process to drive customer insights Distribute our products in every channel -- where period products are sold today and in places period products have never been sold before Conduct defensible research to defend our claims Remove barriers to product adoption (education, usage, channel, price, etc.)

name: The Frozen Bean
description: Sunkist Hydration and Collagen, launched in 2024, is a new product line created through a partnership with Sunkist, a trusted family-run co-op with a legacy of excellence. This unique blend combines premium hydration with the benefits of grass-fed collagen peptides, offering an instant, tasty formula that refreshes and revitalizes your body from the inside out. Our mission is simple: to elevate hydration beyond just refreshment. Infused with collagen, our products support skin, joints, and overall wellness. Through this collaboration, we offer a product crafted with care, quality, and integrity. As a new wellness product, we're excited to deliver a delicious, functional experience that supports your health.

name: The GHT Companies
description: From the research and development of cutting-edge ingredients to product formulation and testing, to manufacturing and distribution, The GHT Companies are a complete resource for taking high-quality products to commercial markets worldwide.Our partnership starts from the beginning of the product cycle: we vet, champion, and continuously support top scientists who have discovered new ingredients for nutritional supplements and vitamins. With our extensive network of resources, we provide a clear pathway to bring these discoveries to market and into the hands of consumers. We have access to the manufacturing, packaging, marketing and distribution systems needed to turn formulations into sought-after products. GHT’s consumer-facing brands act as vehicles for introducing new discoveries to consumers and making them available for purchase.As manufacturers ourselves, we understand the inner-workings of creating a five-star product. That’s why we also partner with manufacturers around the globe who share our passion for producing leading products. With years of experience and devotion to finding new formulations, we are the industry leader in providing the most reliable raw ingredients on the market. Our manufacturing partners feel at ease knowing that we maintain the highest standards, supplying safe and compliant ingredients that reflect the integrity of their brands.The GHT Companies were built on relationships, and we strive to be a comprehensive resource for innovators, pioneers, and collaborators, helping them bring the most exciting new discoveries to the market.

name: The Ginger People®
description: For nearly 40 years, Bruce and Abbie Leeson have focused their family business around their love for ginger, and created a product range that honors the authentic, innovative and values-driven fundamentals of their brand Today, they are excited to expand into turmeric, a member of the ginger family Abbie and Bruce travel the world to find the best growing regions for ginger and turmeric From farm to market, The Ginger People support over 500 farmers, factories workers and staff. Their focus is on a strong, sustainable supply chain and innovation in organic and natural production— pillars of the company .

name: The Good Crisp Company
description: Our focus has always been creating great tasting snacks that everyone can enjoy. It took 2+ years to create the perfect chip that not only tasted amazing, was free of the top allergens but I also felt good about giving my kids. The current snack options were filled with junk and artificial ingredients and that simply wasn't good enough. 8 years later, it was time do to the same thing, but with Cheese Balls. We are proud to now have a family of Chips and Cheese Balls that we can put on our pantry shelf!

name: The Grain Escape
description: As craft bakers, we want everyone to enjoy the pleasure of eating baked goods. So for those of us who deal with gut health issues, we've created something that seemed impossible before: grain-free, gluten-free baked goods that taste, smell, feel, and behave like the real deal from a great neighbourhood bakery. With a real artisan baked goods flavour profile and a satisfying crust and texture that breaks far away from expectations.

name: The Honest Farmer Co., Ltd.
description: We operate high-standard manufacturing through FSSC 22000-certified facilities, a globally recognized food safety management system benchmarked by GFSI, ensuring a high level of food safety and quality.Our flagship brand, WELLINUS, operates under the slogan “Wellness Inside, Delight Outside.” We develop jelly sticks based on low-molecular-weight marine collagen (less than 500 Dalton), offering a delicious and convenient alternative to traditional powders or capsules.With a U.S. corporation and local warehouse infrastructure, we support nationwide distribution. Our products currently sell over 35,000 stick packs per month on Amazon, demonstrating strong consumer demand and repeat purchase performance.Designed for enhanced bioavailability and modern retail scalability, our products combine functional formulation with everyday enjoyment.We are actively seeking strategic partnerships with national and regional retailers across North America.

name: The Honey Pot Company
description: From our founder Bea Dixon: I was suffering from bacterial vaginosis for 8 months when an ancestor came to me in a dream and gifted me with a vision to heal myself. With her help I created The Honey Pot to solve for what other brands wouldn't– personal care, powered by herbs.

name: The Lucky Ox
description: Kyle and Fane first met right after college while working in consulting. They quickly became close friends, bonding over their shared passion for cooking and recreating the Asian dishes they grew up with. Through their time in the kitchen, they discovered a natural dynamic and complementary strengths as teammates, sparking the idea that they could one day build something together.After moving to Portland to work at Nike, they were inspired by the city's vibrant startup food scene and saw an opportunity to innovate within the modern Asian food space. From this vision, The Lucky Ox was born, a brand that celebrates the resilience and stories of their hardworking immigrant parents while reimagining the bold, authentic Asian flavors for the modern consumer.

name: The Milk Pod
description: The Milk Pod was created to empower latte lovers to enjoy a convenient, luxurious café-quality latte at home, for a fraction of the cost. Simply add a Milk Pod to your K-Cup® coffee machine and voilà, a perfectly creamy latte, made in moments.

name: The NA Beverage Company
description: NA Beverage Co. is on a mission to redefine how we drink, connect, and celebrate through functional teas for social moments, designed for winding down, turning up, and everything in between.We craft lightly sparkling functional beverages made with organic tea bases, real fruit juice, and thoughtfully selected botanicals. Each SKU is intentionally formulated around a specific functional benefit, including calm, energy, focus, hydration, or digestion, using a layered approach that combines organic teas, fruit juice, botanicals, adaptogens, and nootropics such as L-theanine, magnesium, functional mushrooms, and prebiotic fiber.All products are USDA organic, clean label, under 25 calories, and under 3g of sugar, with no added sugars. Our functional teas are guilt-free, refreshing, and designed to fit seamlessly into everyday life, whether enjoyed solo or as a better-for-you alternative in social settings.

name: The National Sales Group
description: The National Sales Group provides brand management, sales, marketing, and consulting services to specialty, ethnic, and natural food brands. We offer an effective solution to growing brands, expanding sales, and managing marketing strategies without impacting time and resources.  We are excited to showcase two of our newest and most exciting brands at the 2026 Expo West Show.  Stop by to learn all about Nocca Gnocchi, a preservative free, shelf stable, delicious quick meal solution AND Hardy Beverages' HTWO Hydrogen Water, a premium hydrogen alternative designed for health-conscious consumers seeking more than just a basic hydration. See you soon!

name: The Natural Growth Company Ltd
description: In 1998, Tom and Toi founded The Natural Growth Company (NGC) in Thailand, brought together by a shared concern over chemical excesses in conventional agriculture. With deep roots in farming and milling, they set out to revive the wisdom of traditional Southeast Asian practices at a time when organic farming was still emerging. Their vision was simple yet profound: connect hundreds of smallholder farmers with global markets through education, partnerships, and premium organic rice and sugar, ensuring quality and consistency every step of the way.From those early days, NGC built a holistic supply chain, integrating closely with local mills and farmers via programs like Soil School and the Innovation Lab. These initiatives promote best practices in soil health, testing new techniques and inputs to blend time-honored methods with modern precision. This resilient model not only delivered ethically sourced products worldwide but also fostered enduring community ties, proving that sustainable growth stems from fair partnerships.Today, as the second generation steps forward, NGC evolves to meet pressing challenges. Extreme weather, shifting climates, and threats to organic viability in Thailand demand bold adaptation. The next generation leads with purpose, innovating resilient farming for smallholders—enhancing water efficiency, climate-smart varieties, and low-emission techniques amid floods and droughts. Through expanded training and R&D, they safeguard traditional livelihoods while pushing boundaries for a thriving organic future.NGC's journey reflects quiet determination: from a nascent idea to a global force in organic excellence. Grounded in Thailand's rich soils, we remain committed to progress that honors our origins and equips farmers for tomorrow. Join us at Expo West 2026 to explore collaboration and partnership.

name: The Neil Jones Food Company
description: The Neil Jones Food Company has been a leading supplier of premium quality Pacific Northwest fruit and California tomato products for over 50 years. Family-owned & operated and located in the heart of the Pacific Northwest, our Northwest Packing facility in Vancouver, WA has been canning fresh, PNW fruit for retail and foodservice channels since the 1970s. Beginning in the 1980s, NWP expanded its operation into state-of-the-art industrial juice processing and has been your source for the finest fruit ingredients ever since.From NFCs & purees to essences & pomaces we are a proud supplier to a variety of markets including: beverage manufacturers, food processors, confectionary and nutraceuticals. Our dedicated Quality Assurance team adheres to the strictest food safety requirements put forth by the FDA, USDA, & GFSI and strives for excellence in meeting all requirements set forth by our customers.All of our products are made in the U.S.A. and are Kosher and Halal certified. Our organic varieties are certified USDA organic. With over 550,000 square feet of temperature-controlled storage, the Neil Jones Food Company can accommodate your needs in 5-gallon pails, 55-gallon drums, or 4,000+ gallon bulk tankers. Contact us now and visit us at the show to learn all the ways that NJFC is a supplier you can trust!

name: The NetMen Corp
description: The NetMen Corp is a design and marketing company founded in 2001. For over two decades, we’ve helped 30,000+ businesses - from startups to Fortune 500 companies - grow through high-quality, affordable design, marketing and clear brand messaging. We are Upwork’s #1 logo design provider and an Amazon Agency Partner, working with both top sellers and high-potential brands to strengthen their image, improve messaging, and drive measurable growth. The company is proudly family-run, led by founder Ignacio Galarraga and his daughters Magdalena and Trinidad.

name: The New Primal
description: In 2012, what began in my kitchen as a personal snack mission launched as The New Primal. With a desire for healthier portable snack options, I went to work perfecting the flavors with the hope that others could enjoy them, too. As our company expanded across the country, so did our lineup of high-quality meat sticks. Today, our convenient snacks pack even more crave-able flavor, simple ingredients, plenty of protein, and ZERO SUGAR. Delicious, on-the-go snacking has never been easier. You are what you eat. Choose Wisely®. - Jason Burke, Founder & CEO

name: The Partnering Group
description: TPG was founded over 30 years ago to strengthen the intersection between manufacturers and retailers—our founders quite literally wrote the book on Category Management. Today, we help leadership teams move beyond identifying growth issues to clearly prioritizing what matters most and activating the changes required to win in market.At Expo West, we’re inviting attendees to access our Growth Diagnostic, a fast, practical way to pinpoint what’s limiting growth across what we see as the three most common constraint areas for manufacturers: Commercial, Organizational, and Operational. It’s designed to shed light on three practical questions:1) What is limiting growth?2) So What should be prioritized?3) Now What actions will actually unlock momentum?Because our partners bring an average of 20 years operating experience—not just consulting perspective—we’re able to translate diagnostic insight into clear priorities and executable next steps, not just observations.Leaders who complete our Growth Diagnostic will be automatically considered for a complimentary Executive Growth Acceleration Session: a private, half-day working session with TPG senior partners to diagnose, prioritize, and activate one critical growth lever (a $20,000 value).

name: The POWER of SLOW
description: At The Power of SLOW, we reimagine what hydration means. We looked past the usual coconut drinks and tapped into its hidden powerhouse — Coconut Flower Nectar. This nutrient-rich sap gave us a beverage that is Low-GI, amino-packed, and naturally delicious. SLOW isn’t just a drink — It’s a daily boost that keeps you moving, feeling good, and savoring the simple, real moments in life.The Power of SLOW grows from the ground up, starting with our farming communities. We plant roots that go beyond crops — supporting livelihoods, holistic farming, schools, and health initiatives. Every sip carries the story of people, care, and sustainability intertwined. Our cycle of wellbeing connects you, the farmers, and the planet, because living well should touch everyone it reaches.

name: The PUR Company
description: Founded in 2010, PUR was built on the founding principle of making simple substitutions to promote a healthier lifestyle, at fair prices and without compromising taste or quality! With a growing number of dietary restrictions and health-conscious consumers, our passionate team set out to create products that everyone could safely consume, enjoy and share! With a great product and a focus on customer service, we spread the word about kicking aspartame with PUR Gum. We launched PUR Mints in 2015, and to this day continue to Kick Aspartame® all over the world.We believe that everyone should be able to enjoy our products, worry-free, no matter what your dietary restrictions may be. Each day, we continue to listen and understand the needs of our consumers, friends and family and strive to provide them with amazing products as we continue to grow all over the world.After all, we can't spell PUR without U!

name: The Real Cereal Company
description: The Real Cereal Company was founded by Tom Binder and Daniel Abramovich to revolutionize breakfast with simple, organic, and eco-friendly cereals. Combining industry expertise with a passion for health and sustainability, they create nutritious, GMO- and gluten-free products that prioritize quality and the planet. Based in Los Angeles, they're committed to delivering real cereal for real people.

name: The Republic of Tea
description: Founded in 1992, The Republic of Tea sparked a specialty tea revolution. Today the brand delivers an unequaled selection of the highest-quality teas, herbal blends, and nature-inspired sipware at an incredible value. The Republic of Tea's collections boast over 350 all-natural premium teas and diverse offerings which include but are not limited to: organic SuperAdapt™ Teas, SuperDigest Tea® collection, Beautifying Botanicals®, Be Well® Teas, Bridgerton Teas, organic SuperHerb® Teas, U-Matcha® and Single Sips®. Further, The Republic of Tea is mindful of how its actions impact the greater community and actively supports organizations like Whole Planet Foundation, Community Link, The Global Alliance for Improved Nutrition (GAIN), Dr. Marnie Rose Foundation and Japan House. The Republic of Tea also works to elevate the consciousness of sustainability; it is a member of the Ethical Tea Partnership, Upcycled Food Association, Climate Collaborative and American Herbal Products Association. Certifications include Demeter USA Certified Biodynamic®, Gluten-Free certification, Non-GMO Project verification, OU Kosher certification, and USDA Organic certification.

name: THE ROOTS NATURELLE
description: Beautiful skin & hair, naturally! With a combination of authentic African tradition and ever-evolving modern science, The Roots Naturelle prides itself on providing customers with the best products to promote luscious, hydrated hair as well as healthy, glowing skin with responsibly-sourced natural ingredients.

name: The Spice Tailor/Sharwood's
description: James Allen Sharwood was a pioneering culinary explorer with an insatiable sense of adventure. In the 1880's James travelled the world discovering new spice treasures and delicacies. Over 100 years later, today's Sharwoods range focuses on easy to make, exciting, global flavors that you can easily re-create in your own home.  We are bringing the latest Asian flavors and high quality ingredients - without any preservatives, artificial flavors and artificial colors.  Just delicious spices and ingredients for a quick and easy meal.

name: The Unscented Company
description: We're more than just a soap company. We’ve created an innovative and ethical business with a sustainable foundation. The Unscented Company has been successfully redefining our notion of clean by introducing a range of effective, natural, and exclusively unscented home and body care products that contain minimal ingredients—clean products from the inside out.Everything we do is driven by our desire to change industry standards and consumer habits to create a better world. We inspire our customers to live a more sustainable lifestyle by offering refill and solid water-free options for all of our products. Our approach is authentic and human, we propose a select number of products for everyday life that help eliminate the use of single-use plastic bottles. For us, being clean means leaving the smallest footprint possible.As a Certified B Corp and Women Owned business, our business is a force for good—and we’re proud of it.

name: The Vita Coco Company
description: The Vita Coco Company, Inc. was co-founded in 2004 by Michael Kirban and Ira Liran. Pioneers in the functional beverage category, The Vita Coco Company's brands include the leading coconut water, Vita Coco; clean energy drink, Runa; sustainable enhanced water, Ever & Ever; and protein-infused water, PWR LIFT. With its ability to harness the power of people and plants, and balance purpose and profit, The Vita Coco Company has created a modern beverage platform built for current and future generations. The Vita Coco Company, Inc. is a B Corp? and is incorporated as a Public Benefit Corporation.

name: THE WAYLONG COMPANY
description: Derived from the pure and famous NATIONAL COKE in New Zealand, we uphold the concept of nature and health to create high-quality leisure food. We strictly select organic raw materials and adhere to zero additives, ensuring that every bite is a gift from nature. NATIONAL COKE, with craftsmanship, safeguards deliciousness, interprets health with quality, and allows you to enjoy the pure and natural taste.

name: The Wellness Company
description: After more than 15 years of leading and building successful businesses, I became aware of a failing medical system, oppressive government health policies, and the lack of appreciation for natural approaches to cure illnesses. I could no longer sit on the sidelines watching this happen, I had to be part of the solution.That solution is The Wellness Company.By unequivocally and unapologetically standing up for medical freedom and the right to affordable health care, our company's vision champions the right to make one's own choices for their body.We strive to build a new health care system that earns people's trust, governed and operated with transparency, and offering the highest quality practitioners who align at their core with our fundamental belief – to put the patient first.The fabric of this company has been woven together by its medical team, whose courage and bravery in their fight for medical freedom and truth as well as their devotion to the public, will help to ensure improved health outcomes, convenient access to physicians, and lower costs of healthcare for our patients.We will never sacrifice the quality of our services, products, or education and we will maintain affordability.

name: The Wisconsin Cheese Company - Wisconsin's Best
description: Founded in the heart of America's Dairyland in 2013, The Wisconsin Cheese Company, home of the Wisconsin's Best® brand, was built on a simple passion: delivering authentic, premium, 100% Wisconsin cheese and meat snacks made with the highest quality ingredients. What began as a small, family-driven operation has grown into the fastest growing cheese company in the convenience channel, trusted by retailers and consumers nationwide.

name: The Wonderful World of Tallow
description: I started with a full regenerative farming concept, organic milk, organic beef, organic tallow and now have a full line (over 15 brands) of health & wellness focused beaty and food products scanning haircare (anhydrous), skincare (anhydrous), lipcare (anhydrous) and foundational functional food platform,    Our gaol is to bring common sense back to a world that has drifted so far away from what the body needs and recognizes.  We are where Ancestral Wisdom meets Modern Day Science.

name: Theo Chocolate
description: Boldly flavorful chocolate that leaves a positive impact.🍫 Always organic. Always fair trade. Always delicious.

name: THONGPAD COLD STORAGE CO., LTD.
description: Found in 1993 with the export of fresh tropical fruits firstly to Southeast Asia region, then increased the expansion of business volume and network in 1997.  Not only supply fresh tropical fruits but also to process tropical fruits to freeze drying and dehydrated methods in order to preserve and retain its shelf-life longer.  Our best-selling products are Freeze-Dried Durian, Mangosteen, Mango, Jackfruit, Lychee, as well as dried longan.  Presently, we supply our products locally through modern supermarket, high-end groceries, selected convenience stores, some specialty stores as well as our international airport throughout Thailand.  Besides, we export our products internationally to Japan, Taiwan, Australia, New Zealand, Canada, United Kingdom, France, Germany, and the United States.

name: Thoughtful Human
description: Meet Thoughtful Human — a plantable greeting card brand (they grow wildflowers!) on a mission to help people make more honest, meaningful, and sustainable connections.OUR STORY:Hey! I'm Ali. I've been on a complex journey with grief since I lost my favorite human to colon cancer in 2011. I've watched many family members and friends struggle with addiction and other mental health issues, and have seen firsthand the devastating effects for everyone involved.Thoughtful Human exists to help people find honest ways to communicate in dynamic relationships and challenging circumstances like these. It's our shared struggle to love, fight, grieve, forgive, overcome, and celebrate — even in some of our darkest moments. It's accepting and de-stigmatizing our differences, and meeting our loved ones where they're at. It's being there — consistently — when it really counts, and leading these difficult conversations with empathy and kindness.

name: Three Point Management Company Limited
description: Coconut sugar  is a sugar produced from the sap of cut flower buds of thecoconut palm. Coconut sugar has been used as a traditional sweetener for thousands of years in the South and South-East Asian regions where the coconut palm is in abundant supply. So, we created our brand for supplying this product to customer globally and satisfy their needs. We believe that Sugar Boy satisfied to their purposes.

name: Thunder Coffeemilk
description: Thunder Coffeemilk is an Aussie-style Cold-brewed Latte. We are brewed with milk and not water, which results in a rich and creamy canned coffee, unlike any other on the market - true coffeeshop latte experience. With 9g of protein and less than 50% added sugar of other brands, Thunder is the best tasting way to sip happily. We use only 5 simple ingredients with no gums, preservatives, and are made in the USA. Founded and owned by local Floriday dairy farmers Ed Henderson and Dave Temple.

name: Tianjin Best Nuts Import and Export Co.,Ltd.
description: The predecessor of Tianjin best nuts Import and Export Co., Ltd. was Tianjin Native Produce Import and Export Group Co., Ltd.It is a professional foreign trade company with a long history.After years of hard work, we has opened up import and export markets in nearly 100 countries and regions on the five continents of the world. Now, our company covers an area of 18,000 square meters, with an area of 17,840 square meters of office buildings, processing workshops and warehouses.    Our main products include seeds and kernels, pine nut and kernels and fruit products. These products are mainly sold to more than 20 countries and regions such as Germany, the Netherlands, and the United States. It has established long-term and stable trade relations with many foreign companies.   No matter if you are a small or medium-sized company with a limited requirements, or one of the larger industrial companies, we will provide the best suitable offer to you.     We are your partner for high quality food  and raw materials at competitive prices.

name: Tiege Hanley Inc
description: Uncomplicated Skin Care For Men® In 2015, the future founder of Tiege Hanley, Kelley Thornton had an epiphany of sorts. Why don’t guys have a skin care brand that reflects the way we live our lives?  Products to help you look and feel amazing, while giving you the confidence to achieve whatever matters most. Kelley and his partners (a college roommate, a YouTuber (Alpha M), and a Chemist) went into business because skin care was too complicated for most men to take seriously. Tiege Hanley quickly became the number one men's skin care routine brand worldwide, shipping over 3,000,000 boxes and serving over 500,000 global customers. We help ALL MEN LOOK AND FEEL AMAZING!Tiege Hanley.  Put Your Best Face Forward™

name: Tierra Negra
description: Founder Ivan Gutierrez is third generation in the restaurant industry and from a young age he became committed and passionate for the food industry. While working at his family's restaurants he picked up the importance of quality flavors and the persistence it takes to run a successful business. As a teenager and into his twenties, Ivan worked his way up from a busboy to assistant manager to now co-owning a restaurant in the Latino community of Pilsen, Chicago. Shortly after, he pursued his business degree at DePaul University to contribute to his professional development in hopes of creating something greater for his career. Inspired by his time at the restaurants and education, in 2020 Tierra Negra was born. In the last four years, he has gone from dreaming up ideas to establishing the business. He's been preparing for the business skills needed to bring a product to market. Incredible resources and mentors such as The Hatchery Chicago, a non-for-profit food and beverage incubator that helps local entrepreneurs and Retail Ready, an online wholesale masterclass, have helped prepare for this. These resources have shown him the importance of leaning onto his community to learn new things such as developing a business plan, creating a brand identity, learning new insights on how larger retail operates, the importance of being ethical and giving back to the community through mentorship and training. Tierra Negra strives to be a reputable brand whose product has quality ingredients, a variety of flavor, is a convenient authentic staple and a salsa that will enhance your life through meals. The Tierra Negra team is founded on the belief that we can accomplish most of what we set our minds to.  We also believe it takes creative, passionate and hard-working individuals to bring a product to life. Keeping that in mind, we understand the importance of diversity in our workplace and how it will continue to positively shape the growth of our business. With our experience we hope to inspire and pave the way for food entrepreneurs to follow their dreams, none which are too small.

name: Tiesta Tea
description: Tiesta Tea has been the fastest growing tea company in the United States since 2014 (just ask Nielsen!), and we are currently distributed in over 8,000 stores nationwide. We were founded in 2010 by two college entrepreneurs from the University of Illinois Champaign-Urbana and the University of Illinois - Chicago. Today we've grown into a strong team driven by passion and grit. We work hard and have a good time doing it.

name: Timbaúba SA.
description: Timbaúba S.A. began in 1990 as an agricultural operation dedicated to mango and grape cultivation in the São Francisco Valley of Brazil. For more than two decades, the company focused on growing, harvesting, and exporting fresh fruit, supplying international buyers with consistent quality directly from the farm.In 2012, the organization expanded from primary agriculture into industrial processing. Leveraging its control over raw materials, Timbaúba developed a beverage operation capable of contract packing for major companies. This capability positioned the company as a trusted co-packer for brands such as Coca-Cola and Del Valle, establishing a reputation for process discipline, food-safety reliability, and large-scale operational consistency.The next phase of evolution came in 2017, when the company launched its own consumer brand, OQ, created to apply the same agricultural and industrial precision to a portfolio of 100% natural juices and coconut water. The brand reflected a shift from being solely a supplier to becoming an integrated agro-industry with end-to-end ownership: from farm origin to bottled product.Over the past decades, the company's progression—from fruit grower, to exporter, to industrial co-packer, to brand owner—has defined a trajectory grounded in agricultural expertise, technical capability, and long-term commitment to natural beverage production.

name: Tip2Toe Global Brands Limited
description: Our story goes back ten years to 2012 when we established an importing company in New Zealand distributing mainly natural products into pharmacy and healthfood stores. New Zealand is known for its clean, green image so working with natural products was a good fit. I enjoyed working with some very skilled international companies in this sector.However, there was always the feeling that we should step out and develop our own brand. The disruptions around Covid were the catalyst to start this process with Tip2Toe and the natural deodorant range being the outcome. We intend to develop further product ranges as the business grows.We are committed to developing safe and effective natural products using ethical and environmentally responsible practices. We firmly believe that successful businesses are founded on strong, long-term relationships and welcome international wholesale inquiry from like-minded companies.

name: TIPA - Compostable Packaging
description: TIPA Compostable Packaging develops revolutionary biodegradable packaging solutions which are certified home compostable. TIPA's biodegradable technology incorporate high performance, durability, transparency, and excellent barrier properties.

name: Tockone Media Digital Inc
description: Founded in 1935 in Agen, France, UPSA has spent nearly nine decades building its reputation for pharmaceutical excellence and human-centred care. From its early commitment to self-medication and accessible remedies, the company has grown into a global player—exporting to more than 60 countries and maintaining a strong "Made in France" heritage.Rooted in tradition but driven by innovation, UPSA invests deeply in research, manufacturing and sustainable practices. For example, it has achieved B Corp certification, a marker of its dedication to social and environmental performance, transparency and accountability. UPSA's ambition goes beyond pills—it addresses six major therapeutic areas, including digestion, sleep, vitality, and women's health.A recent milestone was the acquisition of Sérélys Pharma, highlighting UPSA's deepening focus on women's health at key life stages. The brand's vision—"supporting people through every stage of life"—guides not only its products but also its sustainability model. Through its Sustainable Pact, UPSA actively champions innovative healthcare, eco-responsible production and inclusive local employment.From state-of-the-art facilities in Agen to advanced digital solutions in management, UPSA is redefining what a pharmaceutical company can be: a trusted partner in wellness, grounded in science yet always looking outward to build a better future. With the clover-leaf emblem at its core, UPSA embodies hope, reliability and growth.Today, as UPSA enters new markets and new wellness categories—including dietary supplements like Nourished and Hydrafizz—its mission remains steadfast: to help individuals be well, live well and act well, everywhere and at every stage.

name: ToDo
description: In a world where feeling full often feels out of reach, we created todo. In Spanish, todo means "all," and that is exactly what we are here to give you: everything you need in one drink. Packed with 26g of high-quality protein and 6g of prebiotic fiber, todo works with your body's natural fullness signals to help you feel satisfied and energized for hours. No more skipped meals, no more quick fixes that leave you hungry again.todo is where science meets taste. Each can is crafted with real dairy protein and indulgent flavors like Espresso, Milk Chocolate, and Chocolate Hazelnut. Whether you enjoy it straight over ice, blended into your morning coffee, or spun into a sweet treat in your Ninja Creami, todo makes reaching your nutrition goals simple and delicious.Our mission is simple: make it easier for people to feel good, fuel right and live balanced. todo is not just a protein shake, it is a new standard for fullness, function, and everyday wellness.

name: Tom & Ollie Food Corp
description: Tom & Ollie Food Corp is a food importer specializing in Mediterranean cuisine, while also offering an extended and diversified portfolio beyond the region. Our foundation is built on the philosophy of Real Food, Real Ingredients, with a strong focus on truly grilled, marinated, and fermented ready-to-eat specialty items crafted using traditional techniques and high-quality raw materials.We produce and source ambient, frozen, chilled, and fully finished ready-to-eat products designed to deliver bold flavor, excellent texture, and consistent quality. Our modern production capabilities allow us to support retail, private label, and foodservice programs with flexibility and scale.We offer a wide range of packaging formats to meet various market needs, including glass jars, plastic jars, pouches, tins, and trays. Products are packed in ambient, temperature-controlled, and IQF formats, ensuring optimal quality, shelf stability, and supply chain efficiency.By combining authentic culinary methods with operational expertise, Tom & Ollie delivers high-quality, convenient solutions tailored to today’s retail and foodservice environments.

name: TOMCARE BIOTECH CO., LTD
description: THE CHILICA STORY – THE ORIGINAL TASTEVietnam is an agricultural country, yet every year we face recurring agricultural surpluses and so-called 'rescue' campaigns even though Vietnamese crops are known for their incredible flavor. The real issue lies in processing, which remains both "Insufficient" and "Underdeveloped". "Insufficient" because only 20% of our harvest is processed — the other 80% must be sold fresh."Underdeveloped" because most processed products lose the authentic taste of fresh ingredients — reducing the value of our crops and making it harder for farmers to thrive. Then one day in 2016, I thought: I had to do something — even something small — to help increase the value of our produce and improve its market potential.I chose chili as a starting point. Vietnam grows it in abundance and the quality is outstanding. Chili may not be a must in every dish but it's one of the most widely used spices in the world.I dove into everything related to chili — the varieties, cultivation, harvesting, storage, transportation, processing and study all kinds of chili sauces…But there was still one big question:How can we preserve the original flavor of fresh chili after processing?In 2018, I founded an R&D department. Fortunately, with nearly 30 years of experience in microbiological research and application in aquaculture, we were able to apply that knowledge to chili sauce production — using fermentation technology.We monitored everything daily — color, flavor, pH levels, separation, microbial density, shelf life, and more. After nearly two years of research, in June 2020, Chilica Fresh Chili Sauce was created.It retains the vibrant color, natural flavor, and true essence of fresh chili — all while meeting global food safety standards and delighting taste buds around the world.Chilica: Try it, love it!

name: Tonic Alchemy
description: Tonic Alchemy is an Australian functional beverage company delivering clinically supported, shelf-ready wellness in high-impact formats. We formulate with studied ingredients at meaningful doses, combining scientific credibility with disciplined manufacturing and compliant US-ready labelling.Our portfolio spans performance-driven health shots, functional sodas, and next-generation gummy formats — each designed to meet clear consumer needs such as focus, energy, digestion, and daily cognitive support.We are built for retail. That means strong margins, scalable supply, FSMA-aligned food safety systems, and packaging engineered for shelf visibility and repeat purchase. We focus on products that earn their place in the set — not trend-led noise.Tonic Alchemy partners with retailers and distributors seeking differentiated functional innovation with operational reliability behind it.

name: Tonnino
description: Tonnino is an exquisite gourmet tuna distributed in more than 6,000 shops the world over. It is the leading gourmet tuna in the United States. 100% hand-packed in Costa Rica by Costa Ricans, Tonnino seduces the palate and indulges the senses of even the most demanding tastes

name: Toom Garlic Dip
description: The day of dipping differently has arrived! Andfamily is where it all began. TOOM is 100%owned by a Lebanese American familypioneering a brave new delineation in the snackcategory—not a hummus, but something whollyfresh and original with endless pairings for theculinarily curious…A modern, mouthwatering tribute to theLebanese classic, TOOM Garlic Dips arebulb-busting the status quo—a.k.a. the sameold hummus routine! Snackable clouds of freshCalifornia garlic have a cult following for areason. But don't take my whimsical word for it.See why this different-than-anything-else diphas garlic nation craving the clove!

name: Tootsi Impex, Inc.
description: Founded in 1986 as a family-run cash-and-carry store in Montreal, Tootsi has always focused on innovation and diversity. From day one, we built close relationships with suppliers and customers, sourcing locally and distributing directly to bring fresh, quality ingredients to our community. Known for our reliability and dedication, Tootsi has grown while staying true to these core values.As our business grew, so did our vision. We started importing unique products from around the globe, expanding into organic and specialty items to satisfy our customers' evolving tastes. Today, Tootsi offers more than 1,500 shelf-stable products, from classic staples to exotic superfoods, all sourced both locally and internationally to provide unmatched variety and freshness.While we established strong roots in Canada, our commitment to quality and exceptional service opened doors across North America. Major manufacturers and retailers trust us as a valued partner. We continue expanding with our in-house brands, Yupik and Elan, featuring unique recipes prepared at our state-of-the-art facility. With distribution centers in Montreal and Chicago, we ensure our products reach customers from coast to coast.At Tootsi, we're led by a passionate and dedicated team who carry the spirit that started it all. We're proud of our growth, as we continue bringing high-quality snacks and ingredients to our customers.

name: Top Fox Snacks
description: Top Fox founder and owner Jeremy Zobrist is a fourth-generation farmer who drove his first tractor at age 6 and harvested his first crop at 17. When his wife Sarah was battling Crohn's disease, they decided to make significant changes to their diet. This journey led them to look for healthier snacking options for their family and to venture into the world of developing their own unique line of healthy snacks for others to enjoy and benefit from.As pumpkin growers, they knew pumpkin seeds offered high protein, no sugar, clean snacking, so they began to look at how they might create a delicious and healthy snack from the bounty of their own farm.While farming is in Jeremy's blood, his love of innovation and problem-solving fuels everything he does. He saw a need for a more crunchy, savory and minimally processed snack, and this became the genesis of our unique POP-ROASTED™ pumpkin seeds.

name: TOPPAN Packaging Americas
description: At TOPPAN Packaging Americas, we create and manufacture sustainable packaging solutions. Our customers span the food, retail, and other manufacturing sectors. Our packaging meets the needs of a wide range of applications including snacks, condiments, healthcare items, prepared meals, fresh produce, coffee, and pet food. We are committed to responsible packaging that protects products and supports a healthier planet.

name: Torani
description: Torani is deeply committed to being an amazing flavor company whose purpose is "flavor for all, opportunity for all." Established in San Francisco's North Beach neighborhood in 1925, we put Italian sodas on the U.S. map in the 1920s and created the world's first flavored latte in the 1980s. From the beginning, we've used only the best ingredients, like natural flavors and pure cane sugar, to craft flavors that are vibrant and delicious. Enjoyed in cafes, restaurants, and home kitchens for nearly 100 years, Torani strives to inspire and lead flavor innovation globally while remaining a family-owned Bay Area business. In practice and life beyond the bottle, Torani is a certified B Corp that believes businesses should create more opportunity, and we're dedicated to helping all the people, partners, and communities we touch thrive. Learn more at torani.com.

name: Tortilleria Mi Nina
description: After  years  of  enjoying   freshcorn  tortillas and chips shippedfrom my wife's hometown in Mexico,I decided  it was time to share thisauthentic experience with you.In 2011,  we   opened    TortilleriaMi Niña®, the first tortilla bakeryin New England that authentically produces   tortilla   chips   fromtrue corn   masa.  This  process isknow  as  Nixtamal,  a  techniquethat originates  from  the  Aztec Period. Our masa  is  produced  bycooking whole grain non-GMO corn with  nothing  else  but  filteredwater and mineral lime.  The cornmixture   is    then   ground   byhand-carved volcanic  stones  andcrafted  into  our tortilla chips.We  pride ourselves on  recreatingthe art of masa making and stayingtrue to tradition. We are gratefulto be able to share these  artisanallycrafted tortilla chips from our family to yours.

name: Tost Beverages, Inc.
description: TÖST got its start at some of the country's finest restaurants and hotels and quickly became a favorite of chefs and culinary experts who appreciate its quality, versatility, and style. We started hearing more and more about how much people were drinking and appreciating the experience, and now sell it in markets nationwide. TÖST Beverages creates meaningful and refreshing drinking experiences that are perfect for every occasion.

name: Total Nutrition Technology
description: Total Nutrition Technology (TNT) is a U.S.-based contract manufacturer specializing in powdered and encapsulated dietary supplements. We partner with emerging and established brands to bring high-quality nutrition products from concept to commercialization with precision, transparency, and speed.Our core capabilities include hydration blends, protein powders, functional and wellness formulations, vitamins & minerals, specialty actives, and custom R&D, produced in multiple delivery formats including stick packs, jars, pouches, and capsules. TNT supports brands at every stage of growth, from pilot runs to full-scale production, while maintaining rigorous quality standards and regulatory compliance.What sets TNT apart is our hands-on, partnership-first approach. We prioritize clear communication, realistic timelines, and long-term relationships, ensuring customers are never treated like “just another number.” With deep expertise in formulation, sourcing, packaging, and production, TNT is built to scale alongside our partners while protecting product integrity and brand vision.

name: Toumi Foods & Product Co., Ltd.
description: To ensure our product's quality, TIC GROUP are taking the advantages from the strongest locations of our Both manufactures, located in Sisaket Province (Northeastern of  Thailand)and Pathumthani  Province  (Middle of Thailand), which have been recognized as the supplier of excellent and finest quality of  Thai Rice such as Thai Jasmine Rice (Thai Hom Mali Rice), Thai Long Grain White Rice, Thai Parboiled Rice, Thai Pathumthani Rice, Thai Glutinous Rice, and Broken Rice.

name: Tractor Beverage
description: Meet Tractor Beverage CompanyWe’re farmers at heart, and we started Tractor because we believe what we drink should support the land it comes from. We craft beverages using USDA Organic-certified ingredients, with a focus on soil health, farmer livelihoods, and ingredient transparency. It’s part of what we call Soil & Soul: caring for our ecosystems and the people who tend them.At Expo West, we’re introducing Haymaker, our certified organic sparkling farmer’s tonic and our first ready-to-drink product built specifically for retail.Haymaker is inspired by a traditional farm drink made with apple cider vinegar, citrus, ginger, and fruit, something people historically drank to stay refreshed during long days of physical work. Our version keeps that simple, functional idea intact. Each can is made with real fruit, a full tablespoon of organic apple cider vinegar, just 5g of sugar, and 20–25 calories. Flavors include Apricot Peach, Citrus Ginger, Dragon Berry, and Passion Mango.Haymaker has been named a 2026 NEXTY Awards finalist in both Beverage and Product Design & Storytelling and is Clean Label Project Certified, reflecting our commitment to ingredient integrity and transparency.Tractor built its brand in foodservice, where our beverages are served in restaurants, entertainment venues, and hospitality spaces nationwide. That experience shaped how we approach flavor, formulation, sourcing, and operational scale. Choosing to build trust through foodservice before expanding into retail reflects what we often describe as doing “business as unusual”, prioritizing long-term relationships and real-world use over rapid expansion. Haymaker was developed from that foundation as our first product designed specifically for natural and organic retail channels.Beyond beverages, Tractor supports farmers through the Farmhand Foundation, which supports the hands that feed us, and through our Organic Impact Tracker, which measures the environmental benefits associated with our sourcing. Both are extensions of our commitment to Soil & Soul in practice.If you’re curious about Haymaker, organic sourcing, or how a foodservice-rooted brand is expanding into retail, pull up a chair. Learn more at drinktractor.com/haymaker https://drinktractor.com/haymaker/ or follow @drinktractor.

name: Trade Fixtures
description: Trade Fixtures seeks to lead the package-free food revolution by providing smart dispensing systems that both delight today’s environmental and health-conscious shoppers and create a sustainable value for retailers.

name: Tradin Organics USA
description: Tradin Organic is a leader in organic, plant-based ingredients, from cocoa, sugars and sweeteners, nuts, seeds and pulses, plant-based oils and fats, dried fruits, and fruit and vegetable purées, juices, and concentrates. We combine sustainable sourcing, integrated processing, and rigorous quality control to help brands grow responsibly. Our diverse range includes:Dry Ingredients:Cocoa, Nuts, Seeds, Dried Fruits & Paste, Coconut Products, Sugar & Sweeteners, Plant Proteins, and Grains.Fruit & VegetableJuice Concentrates, NFC Juices, Purees, Coconut Cream & Water, and IQF solutions.Oils & FatsVegetable Oils, Specialty Oils, Citrus Oils, Tropical Oils and Lecithins.We provide reliable, sustainable organic ingredient solutions to meet the needs of our customers worldwide.

name: Transparent Labs
description: Transparent Labs is committed to using 100% authentic ingredients and full-disclosure product labels so you know precisely what you're putting in your body, even the amounts of inactive ingredients we use (e.g. stevia extract, natural flavoring, and citric acid).You wouldn't find any proprietary blends, artificial sweeteners, colors, fillers, or preservatives in our products.

name: Tree Top, Inc.
description: Tree Top is a farmer-grown, farmer-owned cooperative representing more than 700 growers who have cultivated high-quality fruit in the Pacific Northwest since 1960. Rooted in the heart of Washington’s apple country, we bring generations of dedication, care, and craftsmanship to every harvest.Today, we’re more than just apples—we’re both a trusted consumer brand and a leader in fruit ingredient solutions, processing over one billion pounds of fruit each year.Tree Top Ingredients partners with leading food and beverage companies to deliver high-quality fruit ingredients found in top consumer products nationwide. With an extensive portfolio spanning dried fruits, purees, formulated fruit preps, juice concentrates, and custom blends, we offer unmatched variety, consistent quality, and deep technical expertise to support our customers’ product development and sourcing needs every step of the way.Explore how Tree Top Ingredients can help bring your next idea to life.

name: Treehouse California Almonds
description: Treehouse California Almonds provides customers around the world with superior-quality almond products and ingredients that are ustainably grown, meticulously processed and deliciously nutritious.Treehouse is a founding member of The Almond Project alongside Pacific Ag Management, Cappello's, Daily Harvest, Simple Mills, and White Buffalo Land Trust.  The Almond Project is a multi-year, farmer-led partnership created to identify more sustainable farming methods and pave the way towards a more resilient future for almonds. New partners include GoodSam Foods, Pip and Nut, Seven Sundays, Bob's Red Mill, and Daily Crunch.

name: TRIBE ORGANICS
description: We are TRIIBE. A movement inspired by Nature and a holistic lifestyle established in a mission to help enhance people's life experience and leave long lasting positive change on humanity and our planet. We are a natural supplement company that creates high-quality herbal and mushroom supplements based on traditional medicine that help unlock the highest potential in people. Our products are third-party tested and adhere to the highest standards: cGMP, USDA organic and/or non-GMO, gluten-free, kosher, vegan and junk-free (no harmful additives or excipients). Meant to be paired with our healthy lifestyle, our products are meant to enhance our daily activities and help anyone enjoy the biggest adventure of all: LIFE

name: Trimona Foods
description: Our founder - Atanas Valev brought (or rather smuggled) two glass jars of Bulgarian yogurt to the US some twenty years. Using the cultures from those jars he made authentic Bulgarian yogurt at home for many years, until friends and family suggested he try selling it to farmers' markets and health food shops. No long thereafter, a chance encounter with regional Whole Foods buyer at on of those markets resulted in a listing with Whole Foods NE. As they say, the rest is history...

name: Trinity Fruit/Squeezed Juice
description: Squeezed Juice was started as part of the zero-waste initiative of Trinity Fruit Company - one of California’s largest growers in the heart of the Central Valley. To keep surplus fruit from going to waste, they began juicing it, starting with 100% mandarin and 100% pomegranate juices. From there, the rest of the refreshing flavors were created, each crafted from one of these pure, simple bases. Squeezed Juice celebrates the purest flavors and nutrients, delivering freshness in every sip!

name: TRIP
description: TRIP was launched by husband-and-wife duo Daniel and Liv to create calm in the everyday chaos. After Daniel suffered a serious knee injury just weeks before their wedding, functional adaptogens played a transformative role in his recovery, sparking a deep passion for plant-powered wellbeing. Experiencing firsthand how botanicals could support stress, sleep, and mental balance, Liv and Daniel set out to bring calm into the mainstream. Since launching, TRIP has become one of the fastest growing soft drinks in the U.S., now stocked in 15,000+ retail doors nationwide and over 50,000 globally. With award-winning Mindful Blend drinks and supplements crafted with magnesium, lion’s mane, ashwagandha, and L-theanine, TRIP is turning calm into a lifestyle movement. Backed by celebrity investors including Paul Wesley, Ashley Graham, and Joe Jonas, and powered by a community that has generated hundreds of millions of impressions, TRIP is on a mission to help millions of people find their calm in the chaos.

name: Tripper
description: We were founded by two brothers who spent their childhood in Indonesia, where they developed a deep passion and respect for regenerative agriculture and local farming communities. A childhood dream realized, we've now been working alongside our regenerative farming partners in Indonesia for over three decades to provide the highest quality Vanilla, spices, herbs, and botanicals! From soil cultivation to harvest, we work directly with each of our farming partners to elevate their knowledge on regenerative practices, as well as provide them with income stability through interest-free loans and seedlings for sustainable mixed-cropping.

name: Trivium Packaging
description: Trivium’s extensive portfolio of metal packaging solutions offers customers around the world innovative and sustainable packaging solutions supported by scalable production and outstanding customer service.

name: Troomy Nootropics
description: Troomy Nootropics™ is a modern functional wellness brand delivering natural solutions to everyday problems through clean, mushroom-based supplements designed for real life. We specialize in triple-extracted functional mushroom gummies and targeted capsules that support focus, energy, calm, sleep, recovery, beauty, and metabolism. All Troomy products are made in the USA with vegan-friendly formulations and no unnecessary fillers or artificial colors. Positioned as a premium-accessible brand, Troomy bridges the gap between legacy supplements and today’s lifestyle-driven wellness consumer with effective, great-tasting products that are simple to understand and easy to use.

name: Tropeaka Pty Ltd
description: Tropeaka was founded in 2016 and today sits at the pinnacle of Australia's health food revolution!Our brand is deeply rooted in organic and premium quality ingredients and the manufacturing of superior quality proteins, meal replacements, creatine, collagen, superfoods, coffee, vitamins, bars and teas.Our reputation speaks for itself with over 23,000 five-star reviews on our website and endorsement from leading health experts, we are the trusted choice in the health and nutrition space.Ranged in approximately 2500 retail outlets, including Coles supermarkets and independent health food, grocery, and pharmacy channels, Tropeaka is not just a brand; it's a health revolution making waves across Australia on a fast upward growth trajectory!What else sets us apart? Our premium quality products, branding and design effortlessly outshine the competition on every shelf and in every category we champion.Internationally, we're breaking ground too. With exclusive partners in the UK and New Zealand, alongside non-exclusive partnerships in Singapore and Canada, and a US 3PL providing fast, free delivery to our US customers, our global retail footprint is continuously expanding. At the same time, our digital doors at tropeaka.com welcome direct customers from over 70 countries!Certified organic by ACO and USDA for a range of our products and ingredients, Tropeaka is your reliable partner for health and nutrition, trusted across the industry.With a mission to positively impact millions of people in their health and to become the world's most recognised health brand, we invite you to come on the journey with us!

name: Tropicale Foods
description: Tropicale Foods is a family-founded frozen novelty company and a category leader in authentic Latin frozen treats. For more than 30 years, the company has brought bold, culturally rooted flavors to life through high-quality ingredients and time-honored recipes.Tropicale Foods is the maker of Helados Mexico, the #1 Latin frozen novelty brand in the U.S., and La Michoacana, the #2 brand in the category. Together, these brands deliver a diverse portfolio of authentic paletas, bolis, ice cream sandwiches, cups, and innovative frozen desserts that celebrate Latin heritage while appealing to today’s evolving consumer.

name: Tru Earth
description: In 2019, Tru Earth™️, carved out a new category for laundry detergent with its innovative laundry sheet providing customers—who we call #TruChangeMakers—a cleaner way to clean. Tru Earth’s disruptive suite of household cleaning products including fabric enhancements (scent boosters & fabric softener), dishwashing detergent, toilet and multi-surface cleaning strips are ultra-concentrated, pre-measured, easy-to-use cleaners that come in plastic-free packaging.As a multi-national, certified B Corporation, Tru Earth’s business model balances financial success, environmentalism, and social good. Our rapid growth rate affirms this strategy and is bolstered by our global expansion and fast-growing retail footprint in the United States. We are leading the green household products revolution to care for you, your home and your future.At its core, the #TruEarthMovement consists of millions of #TruChangeMakers in 80+ countries committed to Tru Earth's critical cause to make true lasting change that cares for your future. To date, Tru Earth has saved more than 200 million plastic containers from ever being created in the first place. Tru Earth’s global Tru Giving program has provided clean clothes to over 10 million individuals in need. We firmly believe clean clothes are a human right and are honored to contribute to the planet and people through the 1% for the Planet network. As the Founding Sponsor of the American Shoreline Cleanup program in partnership with Ocean Wise, we are proud to support efforts to protect and restore our oceans.

name: Tru Fru
description: Trü Frü is a magical brand that brings together nature's fruit with real chocolate. Founded in 2017, Our unique products have won numerous industry awards for taste, novelty, and our fresh perspective. We have been delighting consumers for less than five years and are still at the beginning of our story.

name: TRUBAR
description: As women who care about taste and nutrition, we often find ourselves in a dilemma of having to pick one over the other. After what felt like a lifelong quest for healthy on- the- go snacks that satisfies our sweet tooth, we stopped looking around and looked at ourselves.Why can't we be the ones to create what we know ismissing? Inspired by the indulgence of dessert, wehandcrafted TRUBRANDS products using only ingredientswe feel g o o d about. We wanted to be proud of sharing our products with our loved ones.TRUBAR is our simple way of promising to uplift women through our business practices and beyond. We truly believe "We power her. She powers the world.

name: TruCinnamon
description: TruCinnamon was born out of my own journey of transformation. I was looking to cut out caffeine, which was fueling my anxiety, and searching for natural ways to support my high cholesterol. That search led me back to one of the most ancient healing spices—Ceylon cinnamon.What began as a simple ritual of brewing cinnamon water each morning quickly became something bigger. I realized there wasn't a single ready-to-drink cinnamon water on the market. Most functional beverages I found were filled with additives, preservatives, or "natural flavors." I wanted to create something radically simple—real, organic, and pure.So I set out to build the first cinnamon water brand. With just three ingredients—organic Ceylon cinnamon, organic lemon juice, and water—TruCinnamon was born. Nothing more. Nothing less.We started small and introducing them locally, but the response was immediate. Within the first few months of our soft launch, we grew into 20 independent retailers with a nearly 94% reorder rate. People weren't just curious…they loved it.At our core, TrulCinnamon isn't just a beverage. It's a reminder of simplicity, of returning to nature, of reconnecting with ourselves through daily ritual. It's health, clarity, and transparency in a bottle.

name: True Co. and SwedishCandy.com
description: True Company makers of True Dates, True Gum and True Mints is a Certified B Corporation manufacturing from our Copenhagen, Denmark factory. We export to over 50 countries around the world.SwedishCandy.com is the original Swedish Candy company and home of all of your favorite Scandanavian snacks and candy. We have been manufacturing candy in our Swedish factory for over 70 years, and bring the broad range of Swedish Pick-and-Mix candy in convenient bagged formats.We are part of Humble Group AB, a CPG powerhouse driving unprecedented growth across some of the worlds biggest brands.

name: True Honey Teas
description: True Honey Teas was founded in 2013 with a simple but powerful idea: to make enjoying tea easier, healthier, and more authentic. It began with an act of love—when Chris's mother gave him a tea blending set as a Valentine's Day gift. He quickly fell in love with tea but realized that honey—the perfect companion—was always messy and inconvenient on the go. From that spark, we created tea bags with natural honey granules inside.
