What began as a kitchen experiment has grown into sharing bold, all-natural blends across the country, guided by wellness, authenticity, and innovation.

name: True Moringa
description: Born and raised in Ghana, Kwami Williams is no stranger to the beautiful botanical wealth of Ghana. He grew up moisturizing with shea butter, cleansing with black soap, and feasting on his mother's famous stews and soups made with local vegetables and spices.His family won the Diversity Visa lottery and immigrated to the US when he was eight, and By 2012, he was living the American Dream having graduated from MIT with a degree in aerospace engineering and starting a career at NASA when a mentor challenged him to return to his native Ghana.When he finally did after over a decade in the US, he saw his home country and the superfood crops that surrounded him through new eyes - brimming with potential to create wealth for Ghanian farmers living on less than $2/day.He teamed up with co-founder Emily Cunningham, a Harvard trained development economist who had worked in microfinance in India before studying affordable technology design at MIT's D-lab. They listened and learned from farmers, scientists, and herbalists who taught them about the incredible benefits of the moringa tree for health, for skincare, and for the climate.Together, they set about building True Moringa with the mission of bringing the superfood botanicals of Ghana to millions of customers around the world in a way that achieves wellness for people and the planet.Our regenerative land care starts with ingredients that work with nature, cultivated on our farm in a way that restores nutrients to soil and brings the land back into balance. We take the same approach for your body care. Our formulas work with your skin and your body in a way that restores nutrients to support skin barrier health and gut health and to bring YOU back into balance.

name: True Sea Moss
description: Our brand's journey began with a deep passion for natural health and wellness. Founded in 2020, our story started with a simple but powerful idea: to bring the purest, most natural sea moss products to the world. The inspiration came from a desire to reconnect with nature and provide people with the nutritional benefits that only the ocean's natural resources can offer.Our founder, driven by personal experiences with the healing powers of natural ingredients, saw an opportunity to share these benefits on a larger scale. With a commitment to sustainability and quality, we partnered with small, family-owned farms that harvest sea moss in its wild, untouched form. This dedication to purity and authenticity has been at the core of our brand since day one.From our humble beginnings, we've grown into a trusted name in the health and wellness industry, known for delivering products that support a healthier lifestyle. Our journey is fueled by a passion for natural wellness, and we're proud to continue this mission, helping our customers lead healthier, more vibrant lives through the power of nature.

name: Truely Protein Cereal
description: TRUELY was born in 2021 out of frustration with the cereal aisle. Everything was high in sugar, low in nutrition or bland "high-protein" cardboard. So we built what we wanted to eat. With zero manufacturing experience, we bought equipment, moved into a small manufacturing facility and began R&D. Four years later, we run a much larger facility and make the highest complete-protein cereal per calorie in North America.We're on a mission to make the cereal aisle a healthier place to shop.

name: TRUFF
description: Originally founded through a popular food and lifestyle Instagram blog called @sauce, TRUFF immediately propelled into social media virality with the release of its hot sauce in 2017. The brand quickly became the fastest-growing company in the hot sauce space due to its distinctive flavor profile, pristine bottle, truffle-inspired cap, and of course the coveted Instagram account @sauce that makes tagging a no-brainer.

name: Trujillo Tequila
description: We are a vertically integrated, world leader in Organic Agave from Mexico, Organic Date Syrup, and Organic Coconut Syrup.  Recently, we developed a range of PPE including masks, hand sanitizers and wipes.We have a strong commitment to giving back both socially and environmentally to areas where they work.

name: TruLabs
description: Founded in 2018 by a husband-and-wife team, TruLabs was built on a simple belief: caring for your body, mind, and spirit should be simple and enjoyable. Inspired by our own health journeys, we create thoughtfully crafted supplements designed to support everyday wellness and help you feel your best.Our core values—faith, health, passion, humility, and fun—guide everything we do. They shape how we lead, how we formulate, and how we serve our customers with integrity and purpose.Every TruLabs product is developed to high standards, delivering great taste and convenient stick-pack formats made for real life. It’s wellness you can trust: simple, effective, and ready whenever you are.

name: Trulean Nutrition
description: Trulean™ Everyday Wellness™ is a daily multivitamin that combines immune-supporting ingredients, electrolytes, and minerals into one simple, 0 calorie, sugar-free drink.At our core, we believe health should be simple, effective, and empowering. Whether you're just starting your journey or refining your daily routine, Trulean™ is here to make the right choices easier. So you can focus on living your best life.

name: Truly Indian
description: Real, gourmet Indian food made in India's scratch kitchens the traditional, time-honored way is our family's business for decades. Born in 1932 out of a humble store-front in Mumbai, India, ADF Foods is 4th generation family-owned and a leading producer of both frozen and shelf-stable Indian foods, with 3 state of the art factories that proudly feed families in 55 countries with over 400+ products. Staying true to our roots and recipes, our chefs' pair fresh, healthy ingredients slowly simmered with layers of Indian spices to bring you the richest and most popular flavors of India, easily accessible and ready in minutes.So, skip the restaurant and enjoy the real taste of India anywhere, any day of the week!!! You won't be sorry!

name: TRUNG NGUYEN GROUP CORPORATION
description: Acclaimed by the world's coffee lovers as their instant beverage of choice, G7 INSTANT COFFEE is passionately made by combining advanced European technology with Trung Nguyen's coffee expertise.Presented in more than 80 countries around the worldChosen to serve at Global Meetings and important events of Vietnam.In 2019, Top 1 most loved instant coffee brand in China (Chnbrand)In 2022, Top 3 popular instant coffee brands in Vietnam (Kantar report)In 2020, Top 5 loved and popular coffee brands on Korean online channels (Nielsen report)Using the choicest coffee beans from Buon Ma Thuot, Vietnam's legendary basaltic region, G7 INSTANT COFFEE has a unique delightful aroma and exceptionally superior coffee taste.

name: TrūSpan
description: Dave Chambers & Trent Hill are the founders of TrūSpan. They have been thriving in the health and wellness space and mindset for several decades. Both are passionate about longevity achieved through a healthy lifestyle that includes daily supplements but goes beyond that to a wider range of health hacks. When they say they want to live forever, they're not joking. They know that the same longevity approach doesn't work for every body, and they greet new therapies or ideas with open arms. But they also believe, through personal experience, that there are some innovative cornerstone nutritional supplements that lay the groundwork for a successful longevity journey. That conviction led them to create TrūSpan.

name: Truvani
description: Truvani was founded in 2018 by Vani Hari (Food Babe), Derek Halpern and Devin Duncan. For years, Vani has been fighting for transparency in the food industry with remarkable success. But the truth is: big companies don't change fast enough. We realized that the only way to make real and lasting change is to create these products ourselves. And because we believe you deserve products that are free of risky chemicals and cheap additives, we created the Truvani Standard. Our #1 priority at Truvani is ingredients. We test each ingredient- before it even gets to our facility. Then, we test our formula in-house and send the final product out for 3rd-party testing. The best part? Since we use the highest-quality, REAL FOOD ingredients, you can taste the difference, too- and we have over 28,514 reviews to prove it.

name: TS BEEHONEY CO., LTD.
description: We began with a passion for honey and a desire to craft something extraordinary. Combining nature's golden treasure with vibrant flavors, we created a line of honey-based drinks that are fun, fresh, and flavorful. Our story is about celebrating the joy of discovery and sharing sweet moments with everyone.

name: Tsan Yu Yen Food Co., Ltd.
Tuk Tuk Go
description: Founded in 2024, the journey began with a simple mission: to create a whey isolate protein that was clean, refreshing, and packed with indulgent yet light flavors inspired by global flavors tastes. Frustrated with the usual heavy, overly sweet protein options, we set out to craft something we'd be proud to drink every day high-quality, grass-fed, and made with minimal ingredients. The result? A protein brand that blends purity with flavor, making every sip a treat.

name: Tulip International, Inc.
description: Tulip International Inc. is a world leading premium beverage manufacturer which has been exporting to over 80 countries worldwide.After founded in 2000, with starting of export 'agricultural and fishery products', we diversify items soft drinks, traditional teas, coffee, processed agricultural products and etc. and export worldwide based on Korean's pride.With achieving exporting records with the awarding of "1Million USD export tower" in 2001, we have been exporting Korean traditional teas, aloe vera drinks, coconut drinks, fruit juices, energy drinks, yogurt drinks, ginseng drinks worldwide with the aiming of premium healthy products for world customers.We have been focusing the cultivation of new markets in worldwide since 2000 and as the result of this pains, we have over 200 global partners in 80 countries which the products are distributed in big chain channels of Wal-mart, Kaufland, T&T supermarket, Carrefour, LuLu hypermarkets, 7-Eleven, Real, SPAR, Pan Asia, NOMIN HOLDING, la comprita and so on. The above is our brief remarkable footprint.

name: TUNAY GIDA SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.
TURBANA
description: In 1996 a group of Colombian producers start their banana company called Uniban to sell their own fruit directly to the market. In 2004 the idea of creating a snack brand called Turbana was born, with the purpose of giving an added value to the fruit that was marketed through Uniban while supporting banana producers with an additional alternative to market their fruit. In 2008 Turbana builds its firts snack plant in Uraba to produce plantain chips. The factory created new jobs and provided an additional source of income for plantain farmers. Then in 2010 we launched Turbana with plantain chips in 6 available flavors.

name: Turks Larder
description: Founded in 2025, Turks Larder creates Mediterranean inspired pantry staples for today’s real kitchens.Tarana® is our fermentation led pantry line, a slow fermented soup base mix made with sourdough culture, yogurt, and real vegetables. Hasho® brings poppy seeds back to center stage as both baking ingredients and superfood pantry staples offered as whole seeds, paste, meal, and butter that highlight their nutty depth. Piluna™ introduces roasted wild pistachio as a naturally caffeine free latte mix with a rich, nutty profile and a comforting, everyday ritual.

name: Turlock Walnut Company Inc.
description: Turlock Walnut Co. is a family-owned agricultural producer and direct marketer of premium organic and conventional walnuts based in Turlock, California. Founded on a commitment to sustainable farming practices with their growers and high-quality nut production, the company oversees every stage of the walnut lifecycle — from orchard management and organic cultivation to processing, packaging, and worldwide distribution.Specializing in 100% certified organic walnuts through CCOF and conventional walnuts, Turlock Walnut Co. offers a range of products including shelled and in-shell walnuts. Organic walnuts are grown without synthetic pesticides, herbicides, or genetically modified inputs, appealing to health-conscious consumers and specialty food retailers across the United States.With a focus on transparency and traceability, the company ensures that every batch meets strict organic standards and undergoes rigorous quality controls.  Turlock Walnut Co. is GFSI certified through Primus GSF.  Turlock Walnut Co. serves wholesalers, bakeries, grocers, and food manufacturers who seek nutritious, sustainably produced walnuts.Rooted in California’s Central Valley — one of the premier walnut-growing regions in the world — the company combines traditional agricultural expertise with modern e-commerce and marketing to bring fresh, flavorful organic and conventinal walnuts from orchard to table.

name: Turnkey Nutrition LLC
description: TurnKey Health & Beauty was built for brands that refuse to move slowly. Too many founders get stuck in a broken manufacturing model where ideas sit in queues, timelines drag, and growth stalls before it ever begins. We exist to change that. We combine formulation expertise, production power, and strategic insight so your product doesn’t just get made, it gets built to win. From the first concept discussion to final fulfillment, we operate as an extension of your team, focused on speed, quality, and scalable growth.What we deliver:• Full-service supplement and beauty manufacturing• Capsules, powders, tablets, softgels, liquids, pet and beauty formats• Strategic formulation and product positioning support• Faster development timelines without sacrificing compliance• Nationwide production capabilities• Fulfillment and operational coordination• A true growth partner, not just a factoryIf you’re serious about building something meaningful, something that competes and scales in today’s market, you need more than a manufacturer. You need alignment, urgency, and a team that treats your brand like their own. Bring your ideas. Let’s build them the right way, and let’s build them faster.

name: TW Garner Food Company/Green Mountain Gringo
description: The Year was 1929."So how is it that a tasty red pepper sauce made in North Carolina happens to be named 'Texas Pete' anyway?" Legend has it that, when Sam Garner and his three sons, Thad, Ralph and Harold, were trying to come up with a brand name for this spicy new sauce they had created, Sam suggested they use Texas, which had a reputation for spicy cuisine. Then he glanced at son Harold, whose nickname was "Pete" and the Texas Pete cowboy was born. Movie cowboys were very popular in the 1930's, men like Tom Mix and Hopalong Cassidy, representing a sort of universal image of rugged independence and self-reliance, the perfect ideal for a family business trying to survive tough times. In 1929, the next in line, Thad, decided to use his college money to buy a nearby barbecue restaurant. Along with the restaurant came a special secret recipe for a delicious, so everybody told them, barbecue sauce.The restaurant did not survive, but the barbecue sauce, made in the family kitchen, survived and prospered. People loved it!  Sam, who never met a stranger, traveled the back roads of North Carolina peddling their sauce. Thad, along with the rest of the family, were helping in the kitchen. Sam, Thad, Ralph and Harold continued in the food business, forming a partnership and, in 1946, incorporating into T.W. Garner Food Company.  Over the years the "four Garners", as they were known, produced a number of food products. Today the company is prospering as it celebrates its ninety-fifth year in business. Members of the third and fourth generations of the Garner family have followed in their elders' footsteps. The current factory, built in 1942, sits on the original Garner family home site in northwest Winston-Salem. And the legendary Texas Pete, proud of his cowboy heritage but also a proud North Carolinian, continues to thrive!Still family owned and operated and on their 4th generation of ownership.Matt McCollum new President & CEO 1/1/25 will be replacing Ann Garner Riddle, who is retiring after 52 years with the company.

name: Twin Peaks Ingredients
description: We made a commitment to transform the SNACKING experience. Our deep-rooted passion lies in assisting individuals on their path to wellness & contentment by offering real food snack options and a nutritous protein charged breakfast cereal with notstalgic flavors! We take pride in delivering delicious, guilt-free, and low-carb snacks that allow you to reach your goals without compromising on taste! SNACK GOOD • LIVE GOOD

name: Twinings North America, Inc.
description: Since our humble beginnings in 1706, our Master Blenders and Herbalists have sought out the finest teas, herbs, and botanicalsfrom around the world to brilliantly blend delicious drinks. Relentless about quality, we set the standards in taste, crafting 50+delicious varieties of tea that taste great and do you good. Our products range from tea bags specially blended to be enjoyed hot or iced, loose leaf teas, and k-cups that deliver the perfect cup with the touch of a button.

name: Twinlab Consolidation Corporation
description: Proudly representing our family of brands - Reserveage Beauty, Twinlab & Metabolife

name: Twins Premium Kimchi Inc.
description: Angela, the mother of twin boys, recognized that kimchi in the kimchi market in the United States was very bad, and commercialized kimchi as the recipe she made for her children. We received good responses from high-end markets such as Whole Foods Market.

name: Twisted Alchemy
description: Twisted Alchemy was launched in 2019 with the inspiration of a perfectly balanced margarita, deep knowledge of HPP technology, and the firsthand experience of a frustrated bartender tired of squeezing fresh limes on premise. What began as a solution to eliminate labor and inconsistency behind the bar quickly became something bigger: pure, cold-pressed fruit with extended shelf life, without compromising freshness or quality.As Twisted Alchemy grew, we elevated beverage programs at bars, restaurants, and hotels across the country, delivering zero-labor, ready-to-use citrus and superfruit juices that raised the standard for cocktails and mocktails alike.When COVID shuttered bars overnight, our mission evolved. We brought the same craft-level quality home, helping people elevate spirits, cocktails, mocktails, and everyday moments with fresh juice kits designed for ease and versatility.Today, Twisted Alchemy is redefining how consumers experience fruit at home. We partner with retailers to deliver pure, always-ready superfruit wellness, right in your fridge. Our cold-pressed juices and non-alcoholic mixers are made from real fruit, nothing artificial, and designed for daily rituals, from smoothies and wellness shots to elevated mocktails and mindful moments.Pure fruit. Powerful benefits. Endless possibilities.Twisted Alchemy makes superfruit wellness effortless- fresh, functional, and always within reach.

name: Two Fish Distribution
description: Two Fish Distribution is a trusted seafood distribution company committed to delivering high-quality, responsibly sourced products to restaurants, retailers, and hospitality partners. We specialize in fresh and frozen seafood with a focus on consistency, food safety, and dependable service.At Two Fish, we combine industry expertise with strong supplier relationships to ensure every order meets the highest standards — because great meals start with exceptional ingredients.

name: Two River Gourmet Mushrooms LLC
description: I am a 20 year High School Science Teacher and went to school for Sustainability and Environmental Sciences.   I also grew up in the restaurant industry.  When I realized that there were no USDA organic Mushroom farms in my state of NJ, I started Two River Mushroom back in 2018.  I started out of a friends barn, outgrew that space and moved to growing out of shipping containers onsite at a restaurant in Long Branch, NJ.  We again quickly outgrew that space and then purchased a 25 acre parcel of Farmland preserve in Historic Millstone NJ.  We now supply about 100 of the Tri-State Areas Finest Restaurants and 100 Retail locations along with many farmers markets and CSA's.     A few years ago, I started on the journey of crafting a Value Added Broth Line.   I saw Functional Mushrooms growing and finding their way into Coffee Brands (Four Sigmatic, Ryze, Mudwater etc.) Chocolates, Drinks and the Wellness/Fitness Space.    I wanted to solve the problem of delivering the functional mushrooms into a space that did not (and still does not) exist...….Incorporating into Premium Family of Broths.  3 years ago, I started working with Rutgers Food Innovation Lab.  Then onto UNCFIL.   Developed a commercial Formula and onboarded with a Co_manufacture that unfortunately went out of business in an overnight fashion.  I Lost tens of thousands of dollars but pivoted and onboarded with the Nations Largest Tetra Recart.  Our SoFi Gold award winning broth is now on track to become a staple in all big retail nationwide.

name: Two Rivers Coffee
description: rom our beginnings in the Brooklyn navel yard, Two Rivers Coffee's product innovation rattled the coffee industry from the get go. Not only did we start getting noticed for our premium craft ground coffees, but when single-serve coffee pods were first emerging in the marketplace, we saw the value in the convenience and dived in. We are the little brand that could! We are a classified small business and were among the first family run coffee roasters to make a name for themselves in the coffee pods space. Our goal was to use our expertise to produce the best coffee pods on the market and have the widest selections available. And we did! - all while going up against some of the biggest k cup coffee pods manufacturers in the world.

name: Tyler Packaging
description: Tyler Packaging are specialist suppliers of flexible paper and plastic packaging, with 40 years’ experience serving into the Human Food, Petfood, Lawn and Garden and other FMCG companies. Our markets are currently the UK, Europe, and North America.Our mission is to offer our customers sustainable packaging solutions, and to assist them in reducing their environmental impact on the planet through making the right choice for their business through packaging.Designing our packaging to be a future raw material, will ensure that Tyler will be around in another 40 years.For more information, please visit our website, or if you would like to speak to one of our team in more detail, please email us at sales@tylerpackaging.co.uk, or call us on +44 (0)1926 651451.

name: Typcal
description: Typcal was founded in 2023 in Brazil with a simple frustration: plant-based products were getting more processed and expensive, while the world clearly needed better everyday proteins. Our CEO Paulo came from the food and beverage industry, working with brands and consumers, and our CTO Eduardo came from bioprocess and fungal biotechnology. Together, we realised that fungi – and especially mycelium – could bridge both worlds: real food experience plus industrial scalability.We started small, running benchtop fermentations in the south of Brazil, testing different strains and side streams from local breweries and mills. The "click" moment came when we proved we could grow a neutral, fibrous mycelium in less than 24 hours, using agro-industrial by-products as substrate. That turned our project from "interesting science" into a real platform: ultra-fast, circular, and suitable for large-scale food manufacturing.From there, we pivoted fully into B2B ingredients. We built our first pilot-industrial facility near Curitiba, validated our mycelium in formats like fresh biomass and powder, and began co-developing applications with food companies in snacks, bakery, meat alternatives and beverages. Along the way, we secured a process patent, attracted international investors and were recently recognised in Europe as one of the foodtechs to watch in mycelium fermentation.What makes our journey unique is where it started: not in a traditional biotech hub, but in Brazil, using local side streams and constraints to design a technology that is inherently fast, efficient and accessible. Today, Typcal is scaling from that origin story to a global ingredient platform, but the core idea remains the same as in 2023: make better proteins and fibres by letting mycelium do what it does best – grow fast, on almost anything, and quietly upgrade the food system from the inside.

name: UAB ,,AR MAISTAS''
description: Our Company products are for an easy day. Out of love for healthier and higher-quality food, the father-son family business 17 years ago decided to start producing well- composed snacks without artificial flavor enhancers. It all started with a simple yet strong idea: to create healthier snacks we would proudly share with our children, grandparents, friends and closed ones.

name: Uchie
description: Uchie is a next-generation functional beverage platform. We create clearly differentiated, occasion-based beverages designed for today’s adult consumer seeking energy, focus, social flow, or unwind moments.

name: Uckele Health & Nutrition, Inc.
description: Uckele Health & Nutrition is a trusted manufacturer of premium nutritional supplements for both human and animal health. Family-owned and operated for over 60 years, we combine scientific expertise with innovative formulation to deliver high-quality products that support performance, longevity, and overall wellness.We specialize in custom formulations, private label manufacturing, and turnkey production solutions. Our GMP-compliant facility ensures rigorous quality control, third-party testing, and regulatory support to help bring your product to market with confidence.From sports performance and wellness supplements to companion animal nutrition, Uckele is committed to excellence, transparency, and long-term partnership.

name: Ultima Replenisher
description: Ultima Replenisher paves the way for healthy hydrators everywhere to replenish electrolyte levels with a refreshing, sugar-free electrolyte drink made with plant-based flavors for a real fruity taste. Every day you use electrolytes and you need to replenish them through healthy foods and drinks, so your body can stay hydrated and your nerves and muscles can function well.  In 1996, Ultima was started by a track coach & nutritionist to give his athletes better electrolyte options without the added sugar and flavors that other options have.  Ultima is made with organic stevia, plant-based flavors and colors, and the 6 key electrolytes your body needs so you can hydrate happily.

name: Ultisana Supplements
description: Ultisana was born from a vision to unite science, tradition, and purpose. Inspired by the proven success of supplements trusted by doctors and families across Central America for over 20 years, Ultisana brings this legacy of health and reliable results to the U.S. market. Built on a foundation of medical credibility and strong family values, Ultisana carries forward a legacy of trust, wellness, and purpose.Our three flagship products—Diaberine, Cogniforte, and Stamina—were each formulated with a meticulous combination of natural extracts, vitamins, and minerals designed to address the modern challenges of health. We believe health should be proactive, not reactive, and each supplement reflects this philosophy by helping people feel energized, resilient, and mentally sharp in their daily lives.But Ultisana is more than supplements—it is a community. As a woman-led, family-driven company, we understand the unique role that the head of the household, often the Latina woman, plays in shaping her family's health. Ultisana is here to support her, her loved ones, and her community with trusted products and science-backed education.Our purpose extends beyond wellness. Through our nonprofit, Friends of Cité Soleil, we have been supporting underprivileged children from Haiti to Honduras since 2011, offering them a healthy start and access to education. Every bottle purchased helps fund these initiatives, turning personal wellness into collective impact.We also embrace sustainability with packaging designed to minimize waste and maximize responsibility. From aluminum bottles to fully recyclable materials, we are committed to protecting not only our customers but also the planet we all share.Ultisana stands for empowerment, science, and giving back. We invite you to join us on this journey: to invest in your health, to trust in the knowledge of two decades of medical endorsement, and to know that with every purchase, you are fueling a future of wellness for yourself, your family, and children in need. With Ultisana, you aren't just choosing supplements—you are choosing a mission.

name: Ulu Foods
description: In March 2020, Courtney Mills, founder of Ulu Foods, experienced a life-changing shift. At the time, she and her family were living in Barbados, navigating a grain-free lifestyle due to her young children's allergies and autoimmune conditions. Courtney relied on importing specialty foods from the U.S. and sourcing what she could from local supermarkets to meet her kids' dietary needs—until the pandemic hit. With flights grounded and local stores closed for nearly a month, her food supply chain was cut off entirely.Desperate for a solution, Courtney began exploring the natural resources around her home. She discovered the remarkable 'ulu fruit, also known as breadfruit, growing in abundance nearby. Intrigued by its potential, she experimented with turning the fruit into grain-free alternatives. To her delight, the fruit proved to be incredibly versatile, and her children loved the taste. Determined to share this newfound discovery with the world, Courtney partnered with Sunbury Harvest, a local farm in Barbados that grows sweet potatoes, cassava, and breadfruit. Together, they transformed an existing sweet potato factory into a GFSI certified breadfruit production facility. Today, Courtney and her dedicated team are working tirelessly to bring the island's grain-free goodness to homes across the globe.

name: Umami Insider
description: Founded in New York City, The Red Food Inc., operating as Umami Insider, brings the best of Japan’s niche pantry products directly to the U.S. Our passion is curating unique flavors that go beyond the ordinary, working hand-in-hand with makers to share their decades of craftsmanship and dedication.All of our imports are stored in our Richmond, California warehouse and ready to ship nationwide, whether by pallet or full truckload. Looking for something unique? Our Osaka office works directly with Japanese producers to source exactly what you need. From retail-friendly packs to bulk sizes and private-label products, we help businesses elevate their Japanese culinary offerings, showcase authentic flavors, and inspire creativity in the kitchen.

name: Unbound Snacks
description: Since the 1950s, we’ve grown and harvested California walnuts on our family farms in Sacramento. As third-generation stewards, we carefully tend our walnut groves to bring you the freshest, highest quality California walnuts, and unlock their deliciousness with inspired flavors such as Butter Toffee, Toasted Churro, Chili Lime, and BBQ Habanero.

name: UnBread
description: https://www.unbread.ae/why-unbread

name: Unbroken RTR USA Inc.
description: The original focus behind Unbroken was to solve hospital malnutrition by extracting free-form amino acids from fresh salmon — a natural superfood rich in essential amino acids, vitamins, and micronutrients. Through our unique enzymatic process, the resulting amino acids and peptides achieve an exceptionally low average molecular weight of 374 Dalton, giving them very high bioavailability, no digestive cost, and rapid absorption within minutes. The aim was to create a highly efficient nutritional solution for individuals whose digestive systems were under stress.Over the years, we have conducted several clinical studies, obtained GRAS affirmation, and ensured that every batch is tested for banned substances under WADA guidelines. Our process uses the salmon's own natural enzymes to pre-digest intact salmon protein, mimicking the human digestive system and producing a potent complex of free-form amino acids and short-chain bioactive peptides.We initially launched our ingredient brand Amizate in 1997. In 2019, after being recognized by doctors in sports nutrition, we created our consumer brand Unbroken (www.unbrokenrtr.com). Today, Unbroken supports people across general wellness, healthy ageing, active nutrition, and medical nutrition.Unbroken contains 25 amino acids, short peptides, and key micronutrients, extracted from fresh Norwegian salmon using a patented, natural enzymatic process. Our philosophy is based on clean nutrition, sustainability, and circular economy principles — even powering our factory with salmon oil from our production.Key Benefits> Faster muscle recovery, repair, and renewal from free-form 9 Essential Amino Acids> Reduced muscle soreness through rapid amino acid uptake> Energy and endurance support from naturally high Vitamin B12> Immunity boost with zinc and selenium> Joint and connective tissue support from marine collagen peptides> Minimal digestive burden, ensuring absorption within minutesHealthy Ageing & SarcopeniaUnbroken directly supports healthy ageing by combating anabolic resistance, the primary driver of sarcopenia (age-related muscle loss). Free-form EAAs help maintain muscle mass, strength, mobility, and daily function — even in older adults.Unbroken delivers the essential amino acids your body needs to stay strong, recover faster, and feel Unbroken — at any age.

name: Uncle Crumbles
description: Welcome to Uncle Crumbles, where innovation meets deliciousness!Our journey began in a humble bakery nestled in the back of a Natural Foods Store in Glastonbury, CT. Frustrated by the lack of tasty granola options, our founder and innovator extraordinaire, Michael Smulders, took matters into his own hands and crafted a granola that was not only all-natural but irresistibly delicious.This sparked a revolution in snacking, and Uncle Crumbles was born.So, who exactly is Uncle Crumbles? Well...HE'S THE BRAN, THE MYTH, THE LEGEND.He's concocted more granolas by 9:00 a.m. than most folks will in their natural-born lives.His granola rolodex has grown so adept, his piles of rolled oats rival the ocean depths.He's tumbled countless crumbles into baked little bundles, all without so much as a single fumble.And yet, somehow, he stays humble. Because he'll be the first to admit: he didn't invent granola. (He just perfected it.) Tolerant of everything — but cautious of gluten — he's prone to recipes both coarse and highfalutin.Because his sense of flavor is keen, and his sense of timing, robust. He's got a bite for every craving: breakfast to midnight, dawn to dusk. He's thinking of every family in need of a snack they can share.So, who is Uncle Crumbles?He's your granola guy. And boy, does he care.

name: Uncle Lee's Tea
description: A subsidiary of one of the world's largest tea conglomerates, Uncle Lee's Tea has been producing high quality tea for over 30 years in the US. Bringing the knowledge of dietary tea that supports a healthy lifestyle. Uncle Lee's helped introduce green tea to the North American Market. In the process, we carved our little piece of rich history. Today, our diverse collection of teas continues in the same spirit

name: Uncle Matt's Organic
description: Family owned and Florida grown, Uncle Matt's Organic is a fourth generation citrus family. We are certified USDA Organic and use a delicious blend of Hamlin & Valencia oranges for our juice. We also have organic citrus available all season.

name: Undercover Snacks
description: Diana Levy (Founder/CEO) began Undercover by making decadent chocolates for events, but soon realized she craved something satisfying that was healthier, lighter and less sweet. After lots of experimenting, she discovered the perfect combination: crispy quinoa lightly covered with premium chocolate!When two of her three chocolate-obsessed daughters were diagnosed with Celiac Disease, she became determined to make this indulgent snack gluten-free and allergy friendly too!

name: UNFI Wellness
description: Leading dist. of vitamins and nutritional supps since 1975. 2 warehouses for second day or next day service in most areas.  Largest product selection with over 13,000 products from 500 vendors. The BEST dedicated sales and customer service reps.

name: Unibioche Food Tech. Co. Ltd
description: Unibioche was established in 1999. It is an innovation-driven group company specializing in deep processing of tea leaves and focusing on research and development of food and beverage technologies.Unibioche has established the Hua’s R&D Center Innovation Base in Hangzhou Binjiang (High-tech Zone), featuring four core technology laboratories: Tea Technology, Flavor & Fragrance Technology, Biotechnology, and Beverage Formulation Technology. The company has accumulated extensive experience in tea biochemistry analysis, extraction and compound formulation of flavors and fragrances, biological enzymatic hydrolysis and fermentation, and functional food and beverage development.

name: UNIFLORA HEALTH FOODS LLC
description: Uniflora Brasil & Uniflora USAFounded in 1992 in Olímpia, São Paulo, Brazil, Uniflora was born from a group of passionate beekeepers determined to bring pure, authentic bee products from Brazil's nature to the world.Today, Uniflora stands among the largest and most trusted apicultural industries in the Americas, combining tradition, science, and innovation to deliver natural health and wellness products of exceptional quality.Uniflora operates under two complementary entities:* 🇧🇷 Uniflora Brasil (Uniflora Nutracêutica Ltda) – the industrial and R&D headquarters, responsible for production, extraction, and standardization of bee products.* 🇺🇸 Uniflora USA (Uniflora Health and Food Products LLC) – the international distribution center, managing logistics, customer service, and compliance for the North American market.Our Product Portfolio;* Brazilian Green Propolis Extracts (liquid, spray, and capsules)* Green Propolis Alcohol-Free Sprays* Wildflower Honey and Royal Jelly* Bee Pollen* Premium Capsules and Dietary SupplementsEvery product is crafted with traceable origin, maintaining purity "from the hive to you."* Global Certifications; Certified by GMP (SGS), FDA (USA), ANVISA, and the Brazilian Agriculture Ministry, ensuring international compliance and safety.* Sustainable Beekeeping Network;	Sourcing directly from certified beekeepers, promoting biodiversity and environmental preservation.* Innovation & Research; Continuous R&D in partnership with Brazilian universities to enhance efficacy and develop new natural formulations.* Premium Quality & Traceability; Full control from raw material selection to packaging — guaranteeing consistent purity and potency.* High-Scale Production; One of Latin America's largest facilities — processing hundreds of tons of honey and propolis monthly with modern technology.* Strong International Presence; Exports to North America, Europe, and Asia, with Uniflora USA ensuring fast, compliant delivery and customer support.* 30+ Years of Expertise; Trusted global supplier with decades of technical and commercial experience.

name: Unilever Wellbeing Collective
description: Founded in 2018, Unilever’s Wellbeing business is a Collective of fast-growing, lifestyle-led, science-driven companies powering a lifestyle of wellbeing designed for a lifetime of possibilities. Comprised of seven digitally-native lifestyle brands – OLLY, SmartyPants Vitamins, ONNIT and Welly, the Wellbeing Collective is fueling wellbeing with a beautiful blend of real science and benefit-led personalization for life stages, not ages.

name: Unipharm Healthy Manufacturing Co. Ltd
description: Unipharm is a nutritional and health product research and manufacturing enterprise, with nearly 50 years of history. We focus on the research and manufacture of dairy, plant and marine products. Our product lines include soft and hard capsules, liquid sachets, tablets, powders, drops, and sprays.Since its establishment in 1979, Unipharm has remained true to its original mission, committed to providing globally recognized, high-quality products made from natural ingredients that customers can trust.Currently, Unipharm in New Zealand operates with 1 food research lab, 4 production bases, and 3 sales companies.

name: UNIQUE SNACKS
description: The Spannuth Family started baking hard and soft pretzels back in the late 1800 's. The demand for our hard pretzels increased rapidly because of our "Unique" baking process. We would let the raw pretzel set to perfection and when ready, the pretzel would be placed into the oven where it would burst open creating bubbles and crevices that were crispy, yet crunchy, and full of flavor. As we produced this split-open pretzel we started calling them "Splits': They were the only one of their kind. Made in the pretzel belt of eastern PA, the 6th generation of the Spannuth family is still using the original recipe. Proud of its quality and high standards of what a pretzel should be by only using our knowledge of the baking process to achieve the finest flavors and textures, not by throwing in unnecessary additives. Through the years, other bakeries have tried to copy our "Splits" without much success. "Splits" are not just another pretzel shaped cracker, they pack a serious crunch and are tantalizing to the palate of any pretzel lover.

name: UNIS
description: UNIS is a leading asset-based 3PL operating a nationwide network of facilities all run on our proprietary WMS and over 600 transportation assets. Delivering a truly unique solution UNIS brings expertise to all fulfillment channels supporting D2C, Amazon (FBA, FBM, SFP) and retail across all buildings, allowing growing brands to easily scale. Our WMS is integrated with TikTok Shop, Shopify, Amazon and most other commerce platforms while industry leading parcel postage rates and in-house consolidation programs to retailers including Walmart and Costco provide brands with additional value on the distribution side.

name: UNiTE Food
description: Launched in March of 2020 we are on a mission to prove that Diversity is Delicious!  Our award-winning bars have been celebrated by both registered dieticians and consumers for their exceptional taste and quality.

name: UNITED FOODS INTERNATIONAL CO.,  LTD.
description: We started this brand in 2024 as a way to begin sale of our own branded products. We wanted to create a group of products that use great quality milk from cows raised on pastures on the coastline of Hokkaido, Japan.

name: United States Sugar Specialty Products
description: U.S. Sugar Specialty Products is a manufacturer and marketer offering a comprehensive portfolio of Plant Based Non-Bioengineered Cane Sugar sweeteners, molasses, syrups, & specialty products. Our R&D team challenges themselves to maximize versatility, leverage technology advancements, and develop new and greattasting sweeteners. From off-the-shelf products to custom formulations, we collaborate with Food Scientists as well as Purchasing Professionals to create new and innovative customer driven solutions that meet a variety of requirements.U.S. Sugar Specialty Products is a manufacturer and marketer offering a comprehensive portfolio of Plant Based Non-Bioengineered Cane Sugar sweeteners, molasses, syrups, & specialty products. Our R&D team challenges themselves to maximize versatility, leverage technology advancements, and develop new and greattasting sweeteners. From off-the-shelf products to custom formulations, we collaborate with Food Scientists as well as Purchasing Professionals to create new and innovative customer driven solutions that meet a variety of requirements.

name: United With Earth, Corp.
description: United With Earth is a specialty produce company founded in 2007 with a mission to bring high-quality, thoughtfully sourced foods to market while honoring cultural traditions and the land they come from. Our company is best known for our organic dates and produce, focusing on simplicity, transparency, and sustainability from farm to table.Products are certified organic, non-GMO, vegan, and free from added sugars or preservatives.

name: Unlimeat
description: UNLIMEAT is a pioneering food company bringing authentic Asian flavors to America's tables. We transform beloved Korean dishes like bulgogi and fried chicken into innovative plant-based alternatives, offering a unique fusion of traditional taste and modern nutrition. Our approach embraces the time-honored wisdom of Korean cuisine, where meals are thoughtfully balanced with plant proteins, whole grains, vegetables, and beneficial fermented foods like kimchi. From savory Korean BBQ to indulgent chocolate mochi cake, our diverse frozen food line presents flavors rarely found in a grocery store. Crafted in Korea with attention to nutritional harmony, UNLIMEAT products reflect centuries of culinary tradition that values the interplay of proteins, complex carbohydrates, healthy fats, and fiber. We deliver an exciting culinary journey that makes Korean cuisine's wholesome, balanced approach accessible to vegetarians, vegans, and food enthusiasts alike.

name: Upton's Naturals
description: Our founder, Daniel Staackmann, started Upton's Naturals in 2006 with the goal of making vegan foods that are approachable, easy to prepare, and delicious. We now offer a wide variety of meat alternatives and ready-to-eat foods perfect for home kitchens and restaurant menus alike.

name: Urban Moonshine
description: Urban Moonshine was founded in 2008 in Jovial King's kitchen with the goal of making herbal medicine more accessible. We specialize in herbal supplements with a focus on digestive bitters, herbal tonics, & everyday health remedies.We have grown from our local farmers market to a national brand, while staying true to our values.

name: Urban Noodle
description: Get ramen ready with Urban Noodle. We've made the perfect base to help #pimpyournoods! Our range of recyclable ramen cups use premium ingredients to deliver you a steaming bowl of flavourful ramen to enjoy, no matter where you are. Simply fill, chill, stir & slurp. Ready in just 5 minutes! Add your own choice of protein, veg and toppings to make your own bangin' cup of ramen. We want to see how you like to #PimpYourNoods.

name: URVI GmbH
description: URVI® was born out of a simple challenge many of us face: in the hectic rhythm of modern city life, even the best intentions for health often fall through the cracks. We wanted to support our wellbeing with supplements that were effective, properly dosed, easy to take - and yes, genuinely enjoyable. But no matter how long we searched, we couldn't find a product that combined all of this. So we decided to create it ourselves.To understand what was possible, we traveled straight to the heart of the supplement world: California. In 2023, inspired by the vibrant wellness culture and the innovation showcased at Expo West, we immersed ourselves in the world of natural health products. We came back with bags full of interesting active ingredients, a deep admiration for the industry's creativity, and of course quite a bit of gummies in our stomachs.While the U.S. market offered exciting formulations, we noticed one thing: the taste and texture still couldn't match the quality of German gummy engineering. That's where the spark for URVI truly ignited. Inspired in California, refined in Germany.Since returning, we've spent more than a year obsessively developing our own products - not vitamins in a colorful shell, but truly smart solutions. High-dose, well-balanced, effective, and delicious. To achieve this, we work closely with physicians, biochemists, and nutrition experts, selecting raw materials with maximum bioavailability to ensure that each ingredient can deliver its full effect.Today, URVI® is proudly 100% developed and produced in Europe. Our journey began with a simple idea: wellness should be enjoyable, effective, and easy to fit into everyday life. And that's the spirit that continues to guide us as we bring Urban Vitality to people everywhere.

name: URZANTE SL
description: ONDOLIVA – A Story of ExcellenceBorn from the heritage and expertise of URZANTE, ONDOLIVA represents a commitment to crafting olive oils that embody Mediterranean authenticity. Rooted in decades of experience, ONDOLIVA combines traditional know-how with modern innovation to deliver oils that are not only flavorful but also promote health and sustainability.Our story is one of passion for quality and respect for nature. Every drop of ONDOLIVA olive oil is sourced responsibly, ensuring full traceability from grove to table. By prioritizing eco-friendly practices and supporting local farmers, we create products that nourish both people and the planet.ONDOLIVA is more than olive oil—it’s a promise of purity, wellness, and Mediterranean tradition, brought to homes and kitchens worldwide.

name: US Greens
description: US Greens is family-owned and operated since 1946. We grow then harvest Alfalfa, Barley Grass, Broccoli, Chard, Kale, Oat Grass, Spinach, and Wheat Grass at their peak to establish a nutrient-dense profile. Our low-temp dehydration, milling processes, and frozen cold storage ensure that our powders are incredibly fresh.

name: US Pharmatech, Inc
description: US Pharmatech Inc. We are located in Las Vegas (NV) & Cerritos (CA), is a nutraceutical and supplement manufacturer specializing in OEM & private label service.We have experienced developing more than 40,000 formulas

name: USIBRAS
description: A little over 40 years ago, a small family-owned company was born in Mossoró, Rio Grande do Norte... This is a story that began when Francisco Assis Neto realized his biggest dream . In 1979, a small cashew nut processing factory was born. Usibras was born there . But like any newly achieved dream, we soon realized that it wasn't enough. And what we thought was the final destination became just the beginning of something much bigger to come. At the time, we didn't know exactly what to expect from the future, but we decided to create a new vision: to be one of the largest cashew nut processors in the world.Today, more than four decades after its inception, Usibras is a cashew nut processor with a global presence. With four locations spread around the world, two in Brazil and the others in New Jersey and Ghana, it's hard to believe that what began as just a family dream has become a huge success throughout Brazil. Do you know the secret to this success? A very well-defined business purpose from the moment of our creation, with philosophies that endure to this day in our actions, processes, and products.

name: Utah Paperbox
description: Utah PaperBox is a fifth-generation, family-owned packaging manufacturer specializing in custom folding cartons and rigid boxes for growing brands. For over 110 years, we’ve partnered with companies in the natural products space to deliver high-quality, sustainable packaging solutions that stand out on shelf and perform in production. From concept to completion, our team combines craftsmanship, innovation, and responsive service to help brands scale with confidence.

name: V. Formusa Company-Marconi Foods
description: V. Formusa Company and Marconi Foods Celebrate OVER 125 Years!Marconi Brand Giardiniera is a staple across Chicago land and the cornerstone of The Italian Beef Sandwich.   The original sandwich topper, Marconi Giardiniera has exploded in popularity alongside the Chicago Beef.  Now available in Retailers all across North America, Marconi Giardiniera along with so many other Marconi items have gone from specialized local favorites to mainstream necessities. In 1898, Italian Immigrant and new Chicago resident Vincent Formusa began importing foods from his native Sicily. Over the years, Vincent expanded his business with his son Peter to include pickled vegetables, Olive and Vegetable Oil, Tomatoes, Pasta, and other Italian Specialty foods.  Peter's Son in Law Bob Johnson took over the business in the 1970's along with his wife Sue, Pete's daughter.  Bob with Sue grew the business exponentially through his years as President and is celebrating his own 50-year anniversary with VFC.  The company moved beyond local delivery and moved into international sales and distribution under Bob and Sue.  Today, Bob and Sue remain active in the company. And while Bob still serves as CEO, the business is now in the hands of the fourth Generation as two of their children Jeff and Joey, serve as President and Vice President, respectively.

name: Vaca Chips
description: In early 2025 Brian saw a gap in the market for tallow tortilla chips. Passionate about clean eating and healthy living, he decided to found Vaca Chips in January 2025. Brian met Josh (co-founder) playing amateur hockey and the pair worked relentlessly for 4 months to develop their first SKU, Original (salt). The Original SKU launched with DTC sales in April of 2025, and it has been a rocket ship ever since. Vaca chips launched two new SKUs, Classic Ranch, and Zesty Lime in December of 2025. Vaca can be found at over 150 retailers nationwide with big plans for expansion in 2026.

name: VAHDAM India
description: Our story is a harmony of tradition and bold innovation. We honor ancient practices while embracing cutting-edge technology, weaving a tapestry of authentic flavors that celebrate India's rich heritage. Our dedication goes beyond just quality; we are committed to fair wages and direct sourcing. This approach not only respects and uplifts the hard work and passion of our farming communities but also ensures that each product is crafted with genuine love and care. The expertly curated collection by our master blenders is a reflection of our relentless pursuit of excellence and authenticity. We invite you to explore our catalogue and immerse yourself in a world of wellness products that embody our enduring commitment to take the best of India to the world.

name: Valley Fig Growers
description: Valley Fig Growers is the premier supplier of California Dried Figs selling under the Blue Ribbon Orchard Choice and Sun-Maid brands. Fig products include bulk, diced, paste, powder, concentrate and nuggets. Kosher, organic figs available.

name: Valley Pop
description: From our garage beginnings to one of America’s fastest growing popcorn brands. We aren't BIG Food. We are BIG TASTE!At Valley Pop, we don't hide behind loud packaging or flashy claims. We don't believe in complicating snacks. We make popcorn the way you’d make it - if you had the time, the tools, and maybe a ittle more patience. No shortcuts. No gimmicks. Just real ingredients, simple methods, and a whole lot of pride in doing things the right way. You can see our popcorn through the bag – and that's by design. We’ve got nothing to hide. The kernel matters. The oil matters. The process matters. So do the people behind the product. Every step we take adds up to something better.Something you can trust, crave, and come back to. Because when you care about the details, the result speaks for itself. This is popcorn made with care, not marketing spin. Small batch. Kettle popped. Clear bag. A better bag, a better process, and some of the best popcorn you'll ever eat. That's what we stand for.

name: Valley Shepherd Creamery
description: We have been milking sheep for 25 years and producing cave aged farmstead cheese. Hence we consider ourselves dairy sheep experts. It is a fact that Greek or Skyr utilize mechanical means to get thick while others add heavy cream, gums or powders.   Sheep milk needs no such help and hence the perfect marriage of all natural best milk+ best package was born.

name: Value Max Products
description: Value Max Products will showcase two of its top-performing natural bar soap brands—Australian Botanical Soap and NUDY RUDYBased on historical velocity, retailer performance, and consumer demand, Value Max Products anticipates approximately 75% sell-through on featured display assortments, positioning these brands as strong, low-risk opportunities for retailers seeking proven natural personal-care performers.Australian Botanical SoapNaturally Derived. Globally Trusted. Made for Everyone.Australian Botanical Soap was founded on a simple but powerful idea: use naturally derived ingredients to create a bar soap that is gentle, effective, and beautifully crafted—without unnecessary additives.Proudly made in Australia, our plant-based formulas are enriched with botanical extracts and designed for everyday use by the entire family—Made for Everyone. This commitment to quality and performance has earned Australian Botanical Soap national recognition as the 2025 New York Times Wirecutter – Best Traditional Bar Soap, an endorsement that validates both our formulation standards and consumer trust.Today, Australian Botanical Soap is sold globally at Costco locations worldwide and ranks among the top-selling bar soaps on Amazon. Millions of households rely on the brand for a premium natural soap experience that looks, feels, and smells as good as it performs—driving consistent velocity and repeat purchase across channels.Why It Performs at RetailNaturally derived, plant-based formulationsTrusted global distribution and household recognitionAward-winning performance credentialsBroad demographic appeal and everyday usabilityProven sell-through in mass, club, and e-commerce environmentsNUDY RUDYNatural Body Care—Without Taking It Too SeriouslyNUDY RUDY was born from the belief that showering and body care should never be boring. The brand brings personality, humor, and bold design back to everyday routines—while maintaining a natural, skin-loving foundation.NUDY RUDY is an expression of freedom and cheekiness, designed to strip body care back to the essentials in a fun, approachable way. Its bold, gender-neutral packaging and quirky scent profiles create a standout shelf presence that consistently captures shopper attention and drives impulse engagement.Brand PillarsGood: Quality ingredients with a focus on natural formulationsClean: Simple, bold design paired with distinctive scent storiesFun: Cheeky humor, playful naming, and memorable packagingNUDY RUDY’s personality is inclusive, relatable, and unapologetically expressive—resonating across genders and age groups. The result is a brand that converts curiosity into trial and trial into repeat purchase.Unique Selling PropositionsGender-neutral, inclusive brandingApproachable, friendly brand voiceHighly engaging shelf presenceSoft-touch packaging for a premium tactile experienceAccessible, charming price pointNatural base enriched with skin-loving extractsRetail Opportunity SnapshotTwo proven natural soap brands with distinct but complementary positioningStrong historical velocity supporting ~75% projected sell-through on displaysBroad consumer appeal spanning value-driven and lifestyle-focused shoppersCompelling packaging and merchandising impact for natural sets

name: Van Drunen Farms
description: Van Drunen Farms is a global supplier of premium dried and frozen fruits, vegetables, herbs, and grains. From apples to zucchini, we offer customizable, whole‑food ingredients that make healthy eating easier and more enjoyable for natural and specialty food and beverage brands worldwide. We provide an exciting variety of organic ingredient solutions that can elevate your product portfolio. We can help enhance your food products and processes with flavor, flair, convenience, and variety. Our extensive global manufacturing operations and more than 150 years of farming experience enable us to serve our customers exceptionally well. We strive to be a go‑to source for inspiration, innovation, and nutritious solutions that help bring products to life. As part of the Van Drunen Family of Companies, we offer a trusted global network that makes a difference in the lives of major brands every day by delivering innovative fruit, vegetable, herb, and grain‑based ingredient solutions.

name: Van Drunen Farms
description: Van Drunen Farms is a global supplier of premium dried and frozen fruits, vegetables, herbs, and grains. From apples to zucchini, we offer customizable whole‑food ingredients that make healthy eating easier and more enjoyable for natural and specialty food and beverage brands worldwide. We provide exciting, dynamic ingredient solutions that can elevate your product portfolio. At the expo, we will be featuring our portfolio of individually quick frozen (IQF) ingredients—from fire‑roasted vegetable blends to locally grown culinary herbs. We can help enhance your food products and processes with flavor, flair, convenience, and variety. Our extensive global manufacturing operations and more than 150 years of farming experience enable us to serve our customers exceptionally well. We strive to be a go‑to source for inspiration, innovation, and nutritious solutions that help bring products to life. As part of the Van Drunen Family of Companies, we offer a trusted global network that makes a difference in the lives of major brands every day by delivering innovative fruit, vegetable, herb, and grain‑based ingredient solutions. We’d love to hear about the innovative food and beverage products you’re looking to develop, and how we can partner with you to help make them a success.

name: Van Leeuwen Ice Cream
description: We started Van Leeuwen Ice Cream in a yellow truck on the streets of NYC in 2008 with a mission to make good ice cream that makes you feel good.Nowadays, people can spend so much time on what's "healthy" they don't stop to consider what's healthy. As far as we're concerned, happiness is healthiness.What could be happier than that magic combination of milk, cream, eggs, and cane sugar (or coconuts, cashews and oats for our vegan friends)? Yes, our ice cream has fat. And that's okay. It's good-good, not good-bad.Good is choice ingredients. Even if we have to go to Mount Etna to get them.Good is simple ingredients. If it's tough to pronounce, it's probably tough to digest.Good is harmonious ingredients. We seek to satisfy omnivores and vegans alike.This is our way. The good way. The Van Leeuwen way. Not just the best way to make ice cream, but to live.

name: Vancouver Freeze Dry Ltd
description: VFD is your trusted partner for natural, wholesome, and ready-to-use freeze-dried products. We supply high-quality freeze-dried fruits, vegetables, and even candy, offering versatile ingredients for snacks, desserts, and culinary creations. Our private-label services help brands bring their own line of shelf-stable, nutritious, and visually appealing products to market, from custom production to packaging and labeling. Small businesses and home bakers can also conveniently purchase our products directly online, enjoying premium ingredients without large minimum orders (https://vfdfood.us).With VFD, you gain access to natural, vibrant, and long-lasting freeze-dried solutions designed to make healthy, flavorful creations easier than ever.

name: VANILLA MOLINA
description: Since 1944, we've been working hard for you to enjoy your favorite, most delicious dishes with an added touch of our authentic Mexican vanilla.

name: Vaquero Snacks
description: Inspired by the legendary Vaquero Bandido—a hero of the borderlands—Vaquero Snacks is more than just a brand; it's a tribute to resilience, freedom, and justice. Known as a cowboy of the northern frontier, Vaquero Bandido's skill, courage, and unwavering commitment to his people made him a symbol of strength and fairness. Alongside his band of vaqueros, he relied on carne seca to endure the harsh desert and mountain landscapes, turning this simple yet vital snack into a testament to survival and heritage. Today, that same spirit lives on in every bite of Vaquero Snacks, blending tradition with authenticity to honor a story of grit and determination.

name: Vara Food & Drink Co., Ltd.
description: Our company was founded over 40 years ago as a family business, starting as a trading firm and growing into a leading global food and beverage company. Today, we remain committed to providing quality products and exceptional services worldwide.

name: VCHOICE GROUP, INC
description: Our Joint Support StoryOur biggest goal is to push joint health forward, so you can do the same for yourself. We believe, when you move, your world gets bigger. So we're here to help you never miss a step and keep connected to all the things that matter. We relentlessly seek naturally-sourced ingredients and combinations to help your day get off on the right foot. We also pair up with experienced partners to analyze varying ranges of movement—so that we can learn as much as we can to constantly keep science, and you, moving forward.

name: Vedic Lifesciences, (Pvt) Ltd.
description: Vedic Lifesciences is a global CRO supporting companies with high-quality clinical and preclinical research for product validation and health claim substantiation. We are introducing a Vedic Elevate unified trial design umbrella that brings multiple study approaches under one clear and structured framework. Instead of offering standalone designs, we tailor the right methodology - classical, adaptive, responder, or phenotype-informed, based on the study objective. This ensures better alignment with product goals, improved study efficiency, and stronger, more reliable outcomes.As women are still underrepresented in clinical trials across multiple health areas, Join us this March 5th as we celebrate Women’s Day at the show - highlighting the growing importance of well-designed clinical trials in women’s health.

name: Veetee Food Inc.
description: Veetee began over 30 years ago in the UK. The company began selling rice as a commodity. Over time, a partnership began a single family inspired to create a value-added rice business. Today Veetee is the largest rice company in the UK, and a top five in the US. The business continues to grow and expand innovation into Noodles, Pasta, Mac n Cheese and even more.

name: Vegan Friendly
description: At Vegan Friendly, we certify products that meet our vegan and cruelty-free standards, proudly displaying our heart-shaped beet logo. When you get certified, your products gain exposure to millions of vegan consumers through our app, website, and social media, along with promotions at festivals, events, and within our growing community.As a certified partner, you'll have access to valuable resources such as marketing support, promotional opportunities, and insights into consumer trends. Join us to amplify your brand, connect with conscious shoppers, and demonstrate your commitment to a vegan future!

name: Veggies Made Great
description: Veggies Made Great is on a mission to create deliciously veggie-packed foods that make healthy eating easy and enjoyable. With a veggie-first approach, the brand offers a variety of better-for-you frozen foods, from muffins and frittatas to savory bakes and sweet bites. With a commitment to taste, nutrition, and innovation, Veggies Made Great helps consumers love their veggies—one bite at a time.

name: Venkatesh Naturals INC.
description: Venkatesh  Naturals  Inc. is an ingredient supplier of  botanical powders, extracts, nutritional ingredients, and we have been dedicated to serving the food, beverage, pharmaceuticals, sports and nutrition industries with Ready stock available in CA & NJ. Our wide range includes. 1. Oil Powders (MCT, Coconut, Palm, Groundnut, Sunflower, Flaxseed, Borage, Evening Primrose, Frankincense)2. Botanical Herbal Extracts & Powders (Garcinia Cambogia, Green Tea, Tribulus, Boswellia Serrata, Senna, Amla, Coleus, Gymnema, Banaba, Bamboo Triphala, Arjuna, Shivlingi, DGL )3. Fruit & Vegetable Powders & Flakes (Spray Dried & Air Dried) Strawberry, Peach, Guava , Banana, Lime, Lemon, Orange, Watermelon, Pomegranate, Mango, Blueberry, Green Banana, Kiwi, Raspberry, Apple, Spinach )4. Nutritional Supplements (Micro-encapsulated, Spray Dried)5. Organic Superfoods (Beetroot, Moringa, Turmeric, Coconut Water Powder, Spinach,Bacopa , Alfalfa, Redbeet Juice powder)6. Organic Botanical Powders (Ashwagandha, Licorice, Amla, Ginger, Holy Basil, Shilajit)7. Enzymes (Bromelain, Serratiopeptidase, Papain)8. Colostrum powder ( Skimmed, whole & Instantized)

name: Venture Pal Corporation
description: Venture Pal started in 2015 with one simple idea: a stylish, functional sports water bottle with motivational sayings. What began as a practical hydration accessory quickly became a daily reminder of encouragement for millions of people building healthier habits.As our community grew, customers started asking for more ways to support their hydration and overall wellness—not just the bottle, but what went inside it. Around 2023, we reshaped the brand with a deeper mission: to make daily wellness easier through clean, effective nutrition. That's when we expanded into supplements focused on hydration, recovery, immunity, stress balance, and cognitive performance.Today, our lineup includes electrolytes, magnesium, mushrooms, vitamins, creatine, collagen, and tea products. Everything is vegan, non-GMO, gluten-free, third-party tested, and made in FDA-registered, cGMP- and NSF-certified facilities.Over the years, Venture Pal has grown into a trusted wellness companion for 10.5M+ customers, with 16M+ units sold and a 97% five-star rating. Our products are available on Amazon, iHerb, Target.com, and Walmart.com, and the brand has been featured in outlets like Forbes, CNN, and Women's Health.As we continue to grow, our purpose stays the same: to support and empower more people on their journey to better wellness.

name: Venus Biscuits
description: Magnifig was developed in the first quarter of 2025 under the umbrella of Venus Biscuits — a Turkey-based snack company passionate about creating modern, better-for-you treats.As a team of curious food enthusiasts, we wanted to craft a snack that blended the comforting feel of a cookie with the natural goodness of fruit. That vision led us to the fig — a fruit rich in heritage, flavor, and nutrition.Inspired by its timeless appeal, we set out to create soft-baked fig bars using whole wheat flour, real fruit puree, and clean-label ingredients — with no palm oil, no artificial additives, and no shortcuts.Magnifig is our tribute to conscious snacking — simple, delicious, and rooted in nature. Every bar is a small moment of joy, made for those who care about what they eat and how it's made.

name: Venus Wafers, Inc.
description: Delicious, healthful crackers and flatbreads are the cornerstone of Venus Wafers – a family owned bakery since 1931, located in Hingham, MA.  Our philosophy has always been to meet the changing tastes of convenience-driven consumers.  Crackers and Flatbreads baked in a variety shapes and sizes; Non-GMO, Certified Organic, Vegan Verified, Whole Grain Council, and Kosher-Approved.  Venus – Simple Done Right®

name: Verde Bioresins, Inc.
description: Verde® Bioresins Inc. produces PolyEarthylene® resin which is a biobased, recyclable, and landfill biodegradable alternative to traditional petroleum-based polyolefins that can be processed using conventional equipment.

name: Verger
description: Verger is a Sri Lankan origin company specializing in premium botanical ingredients and plant extracts for the food, beverage, nutraceutical, and functional product industries.Working closely with traceable farmer networks across Sri Lanka, we source and process high-quality botanicals such as Ceylon Cinnamon, Black Pepper, Clove, and other specialty ingredients, offering them in whole, cut, powder, and concentrated extract formats.Our ingredients are carefully hand-selected, steam sterilized, and tested through internationally accredited laboratories to meet global quality and safety standards. Verger supports brands, manufacturers, and product developers looking to incorporate clean-label, origin-based botanical ingredients into their formulations.Alongside raw botanicals, Verger also works with partners on functional extracts and application-ready ingredients, helping companies develop innovative products in beverages, supplements, and functional foods.Capabilities- Botanical raw materials from Sri Lanka- Standardized botanical extracts- Custom specifications and formulations- Steam sterilized ingredients- Organic and conventional optionsVisit Verger at Booth 1933 to explore botanical ingredient solutions and product development opportunities.

name: Vermont Smoke & Cure
description: Consciously crafted since 1962For over 50 years we've been consciously crafting delicious meat sticks using superior ingredients, spices and herbs. Vermont Smoke & Cure was founded and exists to make delicious, artisanal meat sticks. Chris Bailey, a farmer, chef, and former US team cyclist took over in 2006 and renamed the business Vermont Smoke & Cure. Chris brought a modern approach to recipes, processing techniques.  In 2020 we were purchased by Johnsonville, LLC a privately held, family-owned company with over 75 years of sausage making experience. This marriage of complementary capabilities, culture and values will help us scale up by providing the resources to promote our tasty meat snacks nationwide. Vermont Smoke & Cure will continue to be a team of less than 60 employees handcrafting small batches of natural, premium meat sticks at our onsite smokehouse in Hinesburg, VT.

name: VEROFEN S.A.
description: Founded in 1953 in Paraguay's Fernheim Colony, our peanut confections began as a family expression of gratitude toward Paraguay for granting peace and opportunity to the German-speaking Mennonite community persecuted in the former Soviet Union. The second generation expanded production in the 1960s with custom-built machinery, and the fourth generation industrialized operations in 1994. Formalized as a company in 2014 amid Paraguay's modernization, Kelwá now blends heritage and advanced processing to serve customers worldwide.

name: VerTerra
description: Impressively versatile, stylishly sustainable, VerTerra is the chic all-natural choice for party-ready dinnerware.  Made only of fallen leaves, steam, heat and pressure, this authentic eco-friendly line is BPI-certified compostable, naturally biodegrades in two months after use and boasts unmatched versatility and durability—use it to reheat food in the microwave, bake in the oven, or cool in the fridge.  Perfect for every occasion, wow your guests with this elegant touch of nature.

name: Vertical Protein, LLC.
description: Vertical Protein began with a simple belief: protein should taste great, feel light, and fit seamlessly into real life. After years of choking down chalky shakes and gritty powders, our founder knew there had to be a better way. What started as a personal frustration quickly turned into a mission—to create a clean, refreshing protein option that people would actually look forward to drinking.The idea was straightforward, but bringing it to life was anything but. Dozens of formulations, countless taste tests, and an uncompromising commitment to quality led to what Vertical is today: a perfectly balanced protein water crafted with clean, premium ingredients. No artificial flavors. No artificial colors. And now—no artificial sweeteners. Just crisp, smooth hydration with 20 grams of high-quality protein in every 12-ounce bottle.With only 80 calories and zero heaviness, Vertical Protein fits effortlessly into any routine. Whether you're a dedicated athlete chasing your next PR, a busy parent trying to stay fueled between activities, or someone simply looking for a better everyday option, Vertical makes getting your protein simple, refreshing, and enjoyable.Vertical Protein wasn't created to follow trends—it was built to rise above them. Because when you remove the unnecessary, you're left with what truly matters: clean taste, real performance, and protein that lifts you higher.

name: Verve Coffee Roasters
description: In the early 2000s, Colby Barr and Ryan O'Donovan — founders of Verve Coffee — were captivated by the shifts in the specialty coffee industry. They were drawn in by the focus on sourcing and roasting exceptional coffee, sustainability, and building strong producer relationships and they knew they had to be a part of it. Barr had co-owned a coffee shop in Chico, California, and O'Donovan, after working as a barista there, had experience in roasting, training, and sourcing. The two had known each other in college, and when they reconnected years later, they bonded over a shared love for jazz music and the exciting changes in the coffee world. They initially planned to open in San Francisco or Berkeley, but after doors closed, they settled in Santa Cruz, drawn in by the beauty of the landscape and the surf. In 2006, they moved there and opened Verve on November 19, 2007.From the beginning, Verve focused on building direct relationships with producers. At the time, direct trade was just beginning to take shape, and Barr and O'Donovan, along with their peers, were learning what it meant to source coffee directly from the farms. The process was new, and though they didn't have all the answers, they embraced the challenge, traveling frequently, building connections with producers, and figuring things out as they went.

name: Vesta Nutra
description: Founded 30 years ago, Vesta Nutra is a leader in Dietary Supplements and Contract Manufacturing. Vesta is a GMP Certified and FDA-Registered facility with Made in the USA products. Vesta Nutra provides innovative manufacturing with LipoQuest™ Liposomal Encapsulation and ECO2 Extracts™ Supercritical CO2 Extraction.  Vesta also provides research-backed ingredients including Pearl Tomato® Beauty-From-Within for skin health and Natto MK 7™ Vitamin K2 for cardiovascular support.The Vesta AdvantageVesta Nutra provides expert formulation, manufacturing, and regulatory guidance. We specialize in functional ingredients supporting cardiovascular and metabolic health, bone and joint wellness, skin health, cognition, and immunity. Our science-based solutions and sustainable practices set us apart in the dietary supplement industry.LipoQuest™ Liposomal Manufacturing TechnologyVesta’s LipoQuest™ Liposomal Encapsulation boosts ingredient absorption, bioavailability, and stability. This innovative technology delivers nutrients in lipid droplets for improved distribution and potency.
