Ask how LipoQuest™ can elevate your formulation.Popular LipoQuest™ products include:•	Liposomal Hyal-Flex™ Hyaluronic Acid•	Liposomal CoQ10•	Liposomal Glutathione•	Liposomal Pearl Tomato®•	Liposomal VitaCore™ Vitamins•	LipoOrganiSil™ Silicon•	OEM & ODMPearl Tomato®: Beauty from WithinPearl Tomato® White Tomato Extract supports Beauty from Within with Colorless Carotenoids that help limit melanin synthesis. Rich in antioxidants, Pearl Tomato® helps protect skin from UV exposure and supports overall skin tone, clarity, and radiance. Vesta’s own Clinical Research demonstrates benefits for reducing dark spots, improving pigmentation, and promoting a healthy, glowing complexion.Vesta Nutra partners with you to create innovative formulations. Visit us at NPEW Booth 4310 or at SupplySide Connect. Contact Marketing@VestaNutra.com and learn more at www.VestaNutra.com.

name: VGAN Inc
description: The VGAN brand was created in 2019 most importantly – we make really delicious chocolate! It´s made with premium ingredients, and is organic, GMO-free and obviously plant based. Through superior taste, exceptional quality, and mainstream availability our aim from the start has been to nudge the consumption of sweets towards products with a significantly better global footprint. At VGAN CHOCOLATE, our foundation lies in a commitment to sustainability, anchored by our use of plant-based ingredients.We pride ourselves on being advocates for environmental preservation, actively contributing to the reduction of the ecological footprint associated with traditional chocolate production.VGAN CHOCOLATE's commitment to organic and all-natural ingredients free from GMOs and synthetic pesticides, herbicides, or fertilizers.This not only supports the health of consumers but also the health of the planet.Organic farming practices employed by our suppliers enhance soil fertility and biodiversity, contributing to sustainable agricultural landscapes and reduced carbon emissions.VGAN is deepening its collaboration with ingredient suppliers to enhance farmworker conditions. By introducing an incentive program, VGAN rewards farms that pay fair wages. By choosing exclusively plant-based ingredients we directly contribute to a reduction in animal farming, and its associated ethical concerns.VGAN CHOCOLATE's approach not only benefits the environment and consumer health but also aligns with ethical practices that honor the welfare of animals, showcasing a holistic commitment to positive impact.To emphasize this commitment VGAN is collaborating with US Animal Welfare organization Mercy For Animals.Through marketing efforts VGAN CHOCOLATE promotes an active, adventurous "free-range" lifestyle.The brand holds action sports close to its ethos; encouraging playful engagement, risk assessment, and an appreciation for the outdoors.These activities play a vital role in personal development, particularly for children, by enhancing creativity, building confidence, and cultivating a lifelong affinity for physical activity.

name: Vibes & Roots
description: Born from the raw fire of Nicaraguan volcanoes, designed by a father-son duo, Vibes & Roots is the world’s first high-velocity Black Cold Brew & LIT Latte Concentrate designed to ignite a coffee revolution. A century of heritage, all inside a pocket-sized pouch, and family-sized bottles, delivering a premium, barista-level brew that launches you into the future in 30 seconds flat. This isn’t just coffee; it’s a viral DIY ritual and a canvas for self-expression, inviting a new generation to customize their vibe through syrups and flavors and drink their personality.

name: Victor Packing, Inc.
description: Victor Packing, established in 1963, is a premier Raisin Packer, located in the heart of California's San Joaquin Valley.  Victor Packing supplies all major varieties, specializes in organics and produces sugar-coated raisins.

name: Vida Lifescience
description: In 2012 Aurora Nutrascience was created. Prior to entering the market, the Company spent over 2 years in the development, testing and perfection of the proprietary equipment and the process required to produce our unique products. Working with top engineers, technicians and scientists in concert with our key 'fortune' supplier companies, we successfully developed and perfected formulations that are setting a new industry standard in the exclusive liposomal nutrient transport field. Through the utilization of our proprietary equipment and manufacturing process, we successfully create all-natural nano-sized liposomes. These liposomal spheres encapsulate the selected nutrient molecules, which then facilitate a more efficient transition through the body's digestive system allowing for higher bioavailability into the bloodstream.From the beginning the Company mandate was to use only certified NON GMO, organic and all-natural materials maintaining the highest product quality while garnering critical consumer confidence. Today we pride ourselves on delivering to this mandate with extreme success.  The brand's commitment to providing top quality wellness products  globally led them into a partnership with USA based distributor Vida  Lifescience in 2014.  Working with a distributor that is just as passionate about health and wellness has helped Aurora Nutrascience's growth, and the founders are optimistic about gaining more ground in different countries globally.  Aurora Nutrascience and Vida Lifescience work together with their PhD and lab technicians on product development looking for more ways to grow the line of product offerings to help more health minded people.  .

name: Vietnam Organic Agriculture Association
description: Established in 2011, the Vietnam Organic Agriculture Association (VOAA) is the representative organization of the organic sector in Vietnam. Using our unique position, we strive to open the two-way gate for organic agri-food products, from Vietnam to the world market.

name: Vinasamex.,JSC
description: Vinasamex is a leading Vietnamese manufacturer and exporter of organic spices and essential oils, specializing in cinnamon, star anise, and natural spice products. With internationally certified production facilities and a sustainable supply chain rooted in local farming communities, Vinasamex is committed to delivering high-quality, traceable, and responsibly sourced ingredients to global partners. Vinasamex is an official member of the American Spice Trade Association (ASTA).We pursue a business model that creates social impact, bringing sustainable values to people in the chain and other stakeholders.With 15 years of experience, we produce, process and export cinnamon & star anise to high-end markets that require high-quality standards, such as the US, Europe, Japan, Korea … Until now, Vinasamex has 04 factories, owns more than 7,000 hectares of organic cinnamon, star anise and other spices (ginger, turmeric, chili, pepper, lemongrass...), and has signed agreements directly with more than 4,200 farmer households participating in the value chain in the different provinces: Lao Cai, Lang Son, Tuyen Quang, Quang Tri, and Cao Bang. Four factories are already in operation, located in Tran Yen (Yen Bai - Lao Cai), Van Ban (Lao Cai), Trang Dinh (Lang Son) and Bao Thang (Lao Cai). Besides, we expect to build one more 10-ha large factory in Quang Tri, Vietnam’s North Central Coast region.Email: lisa@vinasamex.com; info@vinasamex.com; sales1@vinsamex.com; salesadmin1@vinasamex.comMobi/whatsapp:- Mrs. Lisa, CEO: 84-336758668- Sales Dept: 84-2867588668- Sales Deputy Manager - Ms. Cindy: 84-986277421 (email: salesadmin2@vinasame.com)- Sales Supervisor - Ms. Snow: 84-325794725; email: salesadmin1@vinasamex.comOur social media:- Facebook: https://facebook.com/quehoivietnamvinasamex- Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vinasamex-spices-cinnamon-staranise-exporter-manufacturer- Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@vinasamex

name: Vinayak USA Inc
description: Founded in 2000, Vinayak has evolved into a trusted name delivering natural, functional, and sustainable ingredient solutions for the global food industry.With over 25 years of expertise, we focus on science, responsibility, and green technology to create plant-based, innovative systems that enhance nutrition, texture, color, and stability... all while supporting environmental balance.Our work is centered on developing integrated ingredient solutions that enhance product functionality, enrich sensory experience, and optimize process efficiency, helping food manufacturers achieve excellence at every stage.We value innovation, integrity, and collaboration, principles that guide every partnership and solution we create. Through technical expertise and consistent quality, we help industries worldwide achieve reliable performance and shared progress toward a more sustainable future.

name: Viori
description: For over 2,000 years, the Red Yao tribe has lived isolated, high upon the rice-terraced mountains of Longsheng. Secluded, the Red Yao women developed powerful hair-care rituals, centered upon the cultivation of Longsheng Rice, that have prevented their hair from greying for centuries. After having visited the Longsheng region and establishing personal connections with the Red Yao tribe, the idea behind Viori was born. Viori's products are inspired by the Red Yao hair  rituals by using Longsheng rice water together with other natural ingredients.  In appreciation of our connection with the Red Yao we invest in community development projects that support the wellbeing of the tribe

name: Virginia Dare Flavors & Extracts
description: Virginia Dare Extract Co.  //  Flavor-First Innovators for 100+ years. We offer full-service natural and organic taste solutions for food, beverage, and wellness applications that span the entire product development process. From start to finish, you get flavor-first innovation with Virginia Dare:Custom liquid and dry flavorsPure extracts and concentratesMasking and modulationState-of-the-art technical centerDedicated customer labSensory center and prototypingTrend and concept forecastingFamily-owned and operated

name: Visstun
description: Visstun works with companies of all sizes to give that big brand look at affordable volumes and prices.  Whether your goal is to get your brand off the ground or exciting expansion,  Visstun can help you get there!Stop by to see our NEW Vanish™ Plastic-Free paper cups & containers which have the performance of traditional paper cold, hot, microwavable & double-poly cups.  It's an awesome product and takes a lot of plastic out of the waste stream!   Visstun’s unique approach to packaging container and drink cup manufacturing enables customers of all sizes to create awesome packaging at any volume. Plus, we make it:	• Quick- Fast Turnaround	• Easy- Low Minimum and Responsive Service	• Awesome- Hi-Definition Full Color Print	• Sustainable- Paper Made with Post-Consumer Recycled Fiber or Vanish™ Plastic-Free CoatingStop by Visstun Booth 1092 to learn more!

name: Vista Hermosa
description: Vista Hermosa was founded inside Tacombi, a Taqueria dedicated to sharing authentic taco culture. Tacombi was born in Playa del Carmen, when our founder Dario Wolos started serving tacos out of a VW bus. We now operate Taquerias in NYC, Miami, DC and Chicago. Vista Hermosa was created when we couldn't find tortillas locally that met our standards for quality, freshness, and authenticity, so we made our own. With Vista Hermosa, consumers can enjoy the richness of Mexican cuisine at home, through pantry staples that are made with simple, quality ingredients, like organic corn and flour, avocado oil, and more.

name: VITA PLUS INTER CO.,LTD
description: Nature's Key is an American brand designed by our US scientists and healthcare experts.

name: Vitaclay
description: In a world where convenience often trumps quality, VitaClay was born out of a desire to bring back the essence of cooking the way nature intended. Our story began with a simple belief: that food, when prepared with love and care, holds the power to nourish not just the body, but the soul.VitaClay's founder, inspired by the ancient wisdom of clay cooking, recognized that the best meals are those that connect us to our roots. With a deep respect for tradition and a passion for healthy living, we set out to create cookware that honors the age-old practices of slow, mindful cooking—where every dish is infused with the richness of nature and the warmth of home.Our award-winning non-toxic smart clay cookers embody this philosophy. Each VitaClay cooker is crafted to preserve the purity and integrity of food, enhancing its natural flavors while retaining essential nutrients. The clay pot's unique 'memory' holds the imprint of every meal, allowing the love and care that goes into each dish to be savored with every bite.But VitaClay is more than just cookware. It's a movement toward a more vibrant, mindful lifestyle. We believe that cooking should be an experience—a journey that reconnects us with the rhythms of nature, the joy of nourishing our loved ones, and the beauty of simplicity.As we continue to grow, our commitment to sustainability remains unwavering. We strive to create products that not only enhance the health and well-being of our customers but also contribute to the preservation of our planet. By choosing VitaClay, you're not just investing in cookware; you're embracing a way of life that values authenticity, health, and the enduring connection between food and love.Join us on this journey back to nature's kitchen, where every meal is a celebration of life's most nourishing moments.

name: Vital Source Nutrition, Inc
description: We started the brand in 2023 and our hero SKU, Fem Balance Gummies became viral on TikTok. They are still the cult-favorite hero of Vital Source, consistently ranked among the top-selling women's wellness products on TikTok Shop and Amazon. This sugar-free, vegan gummy blends probiotics and pineapple fruit powder to support daily balance, freshness, and confidence from the inside out.* A delicious, feel-good treat women actually look forward to taking every day.

name: Vitality Products Inc.
description: Doug and Cheryl Grant grew up with VITALITY. Since relaunching VITALITY together in 2014, VITALITY is sold across Canada in natural health stores and won awards, including a Clean Choice, Delicious Living and Alive Awards, and helped thousands of customers every year. "After going through a health crisis in our own family, we were brought back to our roots in natural health. Every day we are energized by stories of how VITALITY has helped someone feel their best."VITALITY's roots stretch back to the 1940s, when a pharmacist created a B complex for the local rugby club in Victoria, Canada. He understood supplements can enhance performance. From a single supplement, VITALITY has born. We are excited for this new stage with new customers globally.

name: Vitality Works, Inc.
description: Vitality Works has been manufacturing Private Label and Custom/Contract formulas since 1982. In our first 17 years, we developed medicinal herbal formulas in clinical practice, treating patients and learning how to make the most efficacious products possible. We buy sustainably-harvested, wild-crafted and organic raw materials from around the planet—in their whole form (not powders), then process and extract in our NSF, GMP certified, FDA registered (OTC drug), Kosher and Organic, NON GMO, gluten free facility. Every product lot is tested in-house for identity, potency, heavy metals, pesticides and other contaminants at every stage from raw material, intermediate blend and finished good. We stock over 480 finished products for Private Labeling along with 2500 ingredients and 600 packaging options to manufacture your custom and proprietary formulas. Vitality Works is the source for thousands of retail location’s private label products and custom manufactures for several hundred national brands. Our capabilities include herbal liquid tinctures, alcohol-free glycerite tinctures, herbal powder capsules, liquid capsules, nutraceuticals, vitamins and essential oils. Bulk options in various dosage forms are also available.

name: Vitamin Angels
description: Every day, malnutrition puts the health, well-being, and futures of pregnant women and children around the world at risk. Addressing malnutrition from the very start protects everyone’s chance to reach their full potential and creates healthier, more equitable world.Join us in our critical mission.A partnership with Vitamin Angels does more than give customers a great reason to switch and commit to your brand. It gives you a partner committed to working together over the long-term. We’ve done it for some of the biggest names in health, and we can do it for you. Our cause-marketing expertise can help grow your brand, improve employee engagement, and enhance customer loyalty. Partner with us and let’s make a more meaningful impact.Join us back at the ARTIC for Vitamin Angels 2025 Expo West Celebration. Free registration includes transportation to and from the venue, food and drinks, special keynote speakers and networking with some of the biggest brands and retailers in the industry. Register here!

name: Vitamin World
description: Vitamin World was founded in 1977 by a team of health enthusiasts and product developers passionate about delivering science-based wellness to a wider audience. At a time when the supplement industry was still maturing, we set out to create products that were trustworthy, results-driven, and backed by real research.From day one, our approach was hands-on. We formulated in-house, sourced with care, and worked closely with customers through our growing national retail presence. By the '90s, Vitamin World had become a trusted name in wellness—known for knowledgeable in-store advisors, effective products, and exceptional customer service.Today, while our distribution model has evolved, our commitment to quality and innovation hasn't changed.We now offer:Over 200 custom-formulated SKUs, developed by in-house formulatorsRigorous ISO 17025-certified lab testing for purity, potency, and label accuracyA focus on trend-aligned innovation backed by clinical researchOur top-performing categories include:Ultra360 Multivitamins for men and womenNeuroClear™ for brain and mood supportReducoSlim for GLP-1 and weight managementHair Growth Complex with patented Lustriva®Precision Engineered sports and performance nutritionWhile we're not a DTC-heavy brand, we continue to build equity through educational content, digital campaigns, influencer partnerships, and—most importantly—through our retailer success stories.Why retailers Choose UsVitamin World combines a legacy of trust with category-driven innovation. We're not just a brand with a story—we're a partner with a plan.Our retail programs are built for collaboration. We support partners with:Custom marketing toolkits and launch strategiesHigh-velocity shippers and promotionsStaff training and digital amplification

name: Vitaminis, Inc.
description: I've always believed that Food is Medicine, and that proper nutrition will guard against ailments.  A wholesome diet and holistic wellness can open up a more vibrant and fulfilling life.  More than just Food is Medicine, I believe Food is Health!When I was laid off during the pandemic, I was challenged to meet my own and my family's nutritional needs to stay healthy during lockdown.  It's hard to get enough nutrients from fruits and vegetables every day, particularly given that produce is less nutrient dense than it was 30 years ago.When it comes to supplements, I've never liked pills – they make me nauseous and are just plain boring – and my dentist had been warning me away from gummy vitamins.  So many people know they should start adding nutrients to their diets, but they are uninspired by the options or don't know where to start.  I knew there had to be a better way.Hence Vitaminis!

name: Viuearth Water LLC
description: Inspired by Love. Powered by Purpose.Viuearth was born from a deep place of love — a tribute to a mother who embodied grace, wellness, and self-worth. We believe water is more than hydration; it's a ritual. A return to source. With every bottle, we invite you to slow down, sip with presence, and reconnect to your power. Our name is a blend of "view" and "earth," a symbol of clarity, groundedness, and reverence for our planet. Sustainability isn't a buzzword for us — it's a non-negotiable.

name: Vivici
description: Vivici has changed the game with ViviteinTM BLG, a superior, sustainable whey protein from precision fermentation that allows you to offer premium products that exceed the expectations of your customers.Unlock untapped commercial potential with theNew Standard ofProtein, Vivitein™BLG-Break through in a competitive marketplace-Reach more customers, more quickly-Benefit from our unrivalled expertise

name: Volm Companies, Inc.
description: Volm Companies Inc., headquartered in Antigo, WI has been providing the latest generation packaging equipment and materials for 60 years.  As a single source supplier, we offer complete expert packaging consulting services - from package design and graphic development to full line equipment integration.  If you need it, or can dream it – it’s likely we can make it happen. Our Custom Packaging Solutions Team works with customers to create custom solutions that meet a wide range of packaging needs.Packaging Capabilities:We have up to 10 color print capability and provide excellent flexo print quality to ensure the on-shelf appearance of your package and help you maximize brand recognition and impact at the point of purchase.  Our production facility houses printing, converting and laminating equipment to accommodate projects of all sizes.We work with a wide variety of substrates including:• White LLDPE• PET/LLDPE laminate• Polypropylene• Polyesters• Metalized Polyester• Mono and coex polyethylene based films• Nylons• Provider of poly bags, pouches and rollstock• Provider of a wide variety of FIBC, totes and bulk bags including paper and woven laminated (BOPP) bags• Manufacture of Half-N-Half ® produce bags, all mesh L-sewn, wicketed, and tube style bags, Leno woven bags, and baler bags• Manufacture of proprietary Ultratech® mesh as a sustainable alternative• Manufacture of Raschel rollstock and 4 and 5-panel roll stock for Vertical Form, Fill and Seal machines using two mesh styles

name: VOLTRX LIMITED
description: We created the Voltrx in 2017 with the goal of revolutionizing the way we mix protein shakes and supplements. We believe that every fitness enthusiast deserves the best tools to help them achieve their goals, we're passionate about helping people become better versions of themselves, we are proud to offer A product that does just that. We are not just a brand,  we're here to change the game and push the boundaries of what IS possible. We're committed to helping people reach their full potential, and we believe that our electric shaker cups are just the beginning.

name: VRM Media/Vitamin Retailer Magazine
description: VRM Media is headquartered in East Brunswick, NJ. VRM is the publisher of four trail-blazing B2B magazines and related websites which cater to distinct sectors of the health food and dietary supplement industry. VRM was founded in 1993 by long-time health food industry journalist Daniel McSweeney, who continues to serve as company President, Publisher and Editorial Director.Vitamin Retailer (VitaminRetailer.com), the company’s first publication, is the dietary supplement industry’s leading magazine, serving the needs of health food and natural product retailers. VR is published 12 times per year and has been in existence since January, 1994. VR publishes an annual Industry Buyer's Guide, while other special issues include VR’s annual Vity Awards, Best New Products, Science of Supplements, and Retailer Product Training issues.VR has instituted a significant circulation increase for the benefit of our advertisers. This provides an incredible ROI for advertisers in both our print and digital magazine. And because VR is the industry’s only publication that is audited by an independent, third-party circulation verification company (Circulation Verification Council), advertisers can be sure they are getting what they pay for. [Read More]Nutrition Industry Executive (NIEmagazine.com) is the business magazine for manufacturers of dietary supplements and nutritional/nutraceutical products. NIE, which debuted in 1995, is published nine times per year.NIE has instituted a circulation increase for the benefit of our advertisers. This provides an incredible ROI for advertisers in both our print and digital magazine. And because NIE is the industry’s only publication that is audited by an independent, third-party circulation verification company (Circulation Verification Council), advertisers can be sure they are getting what they pay for. [Read More]Natural Practitioner (NaturalPractitionerMag.com) is the business magazine for alternative, complementary and integrative healthcare professionals. NP was first published in 2012 and is printed six times per year.NP has instituted a circulation increase for the benefit of our advertisers! This provides an incredible ROI for advertisers in both our print and digital magazine. [Read More]Sports Nutrition Biz (SportsNutrition.Biz) provides valuable insights, news, trends and new product announcements to natural products retailers. By offering in-depth coverage of sports nutrition on its brand-new website and bi-weekly e-newsletter, SNB aims to be the essential sports nutrition resource for the natural products industry and the go-to marketing channel for both sports nutrition product manufacturers and ingredient suppliers.VRM is a proud supporter of the Vitamin Angels nonprofit charity and a member of the Natural Products Association (NPA), American Herbal Products Association (AHPA) and SENPA.

name: Wai Lana Chips
description: Wai Lana is an internationally recognized yoga and wellness teacher. Her healthy snacks line include Cassava Chips, Root Vegetable Chips, and Rice Crisps/Twists. Gluten-Free, Vegan-Non-GMO. New to this year's show-Sea Veggie Crisps! Irresistibly Delicious!

name: Waiakea Hawaiian Volcanic Water
description: Waiakea® was founded in Hilo, Hawai'i in 2012 as the first Hawaiian volcanic water and triple bottom line premium water of its kind, adapting an unparalleled platform of healthy, sustainable, and ethical attributes and initiatives.

name: Wakashou Co., Ltd
description: We are a fairly new brand which started in 2021. Our mission was simple, to bring great tasting organic potato chips using clean ingredients, to the Island of Japan. As a few years passed our dream of delivering these potato chips throughout Japan had come true, but our ambition did not stop. Our next dream is to deliver our organic potato chips to the world!

name: Wakunaga of America
description: Wakunaga supplements were conceived in Japan during the post-World War II era by Manji Wakunaga, a banker with a unique insight and the strong desire to help enhance the health of his countrymen.In 1954, Mr. Wakunaga met Dr. Eugene Schnell, a German physician and former professor at Berlin University who had immigrated to Japan in the 1930s. At the time, Dr. Schnell had been recruited by the American military to head the newly formed Drug Administration of Japan as part of the efforts to restore the country. Dr. Schnell's mission was to rebuild the country's pharmaceutical industry and provide medicine for its population.In 1955, Mr. Wakunaga founded the Wakunaga Pharmaceutical Company in Osaka, Japan. Soon after, Dr. Schnell developed a unique process for aging garlic that not only eliminated the herb's strong odor but also enhanced the beneficial compounds responsible for garlic's health benefits. The result was a safe and highly effective Aged Garlic Extract supplement. During the ensuing years, the supplement gained wide popularity throughout Japan.Fast forward to 1972. Mr. Wakunaga, together with his son Gisuke Wakunaga, established Wakunaga of America to bring Aged Garlic Extract's benefits to the United States. Originally headquartered in Honolulu, Hawaii, Aged Garlic Extract supplements were marketed to American consumers under the brand name "Kyolic." The brand name combines the Japanese work "Kyo", meaning strong or powerful, with garlic: Kyolic = Powerful Garlic. Since then, Wakunaga of America has become a global force in the natural products market, creating a growing number of supplement formulas based on Kyolic Aged Garlic Extract, as well as additional products designed to benefit specific health needs. In fact, two of these product lines—Kyo-Dophilus and Kyo-Green—have become legacy brands with over 30 years of distribution.

name: Walker’s Shortbread
description: Walkers Shortbread, a family business, founded in 1898 by Joseph Walker with a bakery shop in a tiny village in the Highlands of Scotland.

name: Wally and Whiz US
description: At Wally and Whiz, we have reinvented the traditional gummy and created our own Danish gummies.A gummy made with love and passion. A gummy of the highest quality. A gummy that has the flavor and the taste of the natural ingredients it is made from.We always pair two complementary flavors in our gummies to create delicious taste experiences. And in our never-ending search for new and exciting flavors, we are constantly challenging the traditional gummy-experience.RETHINK CANDY

name: wang globalnet
description: Wang Globalnet is a U.S.-based company specializing in the import and distribution of Korean and Asian food products. The company focuses on introducing authentic and innovative food items from Asia to the U.S. market, offering a wide range of products including frozen foods, noodles, sauces, and snacks. Wang Globalnet aims to meet the growing demand for high-quality Asian cuisine while fostering cultural connections through food. The company is committed to delivering exceptional products that capture the rich flavors and traditions of Korean and other Asian culinary experiences

name: Want Want North America
description: Want-Want Foods was founded in 1962 and has over 50 years experience in producing high quality food products.  Over the year, we have grown to become the largest maker of rice snack products in the world.  Want-Want is a listed company on the prestigious Hong Kong Stock Exchange.Want-Want rice cracker products have been available in Canada and the United States for over 25 years. They can be found in virtually all supermarkets across the continent.A key philosophy behind all Want-Want rice cracker products is that because rice is the primary ingredient, Want-Want uses only top grade Japonica Rice sourced from the most reputable farmers.  The rice must be of top quality and conform to rigorous standards.  Using the best rice will result in the best rice cracker.We truly hope that you will enjoy Mum-Mum products and we pledge to continually strive for improvement so that we can offer you and your family the best products possible.

name: Water Source One
description: Water Source One owns the Nursery Water Brand and is the leading supplier of Sparkletts, Crystal Springs, Hinckley Springs and Kentwood Springs branded water across the country.We produce from multiple Bottled Water plants located throughout the country in small package PET and gallon products.In partnership with you, Water Source One manages all aspects of a successful bottled water program consisting of sales, production, logistics, product quality and excellent customer service.Nursery WaterFor more than 75 years, parents have trusted Nursery® water as part of their babies' and toddlers' healthy routines. Nursery Water is ideal for mixing with formula, stirring into cereal, diluting juices and keeping little ones safely hydrated.  Featuring 1-Gallon and 10 oz 15-pack.Sparkletts Water - Iconic brand, started in 1925 in Southern California.Known for its crisp, clean taste, Sparkletts Crystal-Fresh® purified water is filtered to remove impurities like chemicals and other contaminants.  Featuring 1-Gallon and 2.5 Gallon.Our plastic containers are 100% recyclable, including the cap and label.Sourced in the United States

name: Watershed Foods LLC
description: Watershed leverages freeze-drying technology to inspire new products and categories. With over 20 years of experience in freeze-drying and offering a wide range of solutions including: smoothie melts for toddlers, fruit & veggie snacks, nutraceutical powders, herbs, pet food, and probiotics. We love solving problems with products and ingredients that consumers are truly “hungry” for.

name: Watkins
description: A natural history. From a bluff high above the Mississippi River in Winona, Minnesota, comes the purity of Watkins. Our tried-and-true products have been good and natural through and through since 1868.Product CategoriesExtracts & FlavoringSpices, Herbs, & Seasoning BlendsFood Coloring & Baking Decorations, Artificial Dye FreeGrilling Seasoning, Rubs & MarinadesRecipe MixesBittersSpeciality SaltsFlavoring SyrupsFood Service

name: Wave Group NY, LLC
description: Started this brand and flavors when my wife was diagnosed with cancer. I wanted her to enjoy a sparkling beverage with organic ingredients that she felt confident to put into her body

name: WayFare Health Foods
description: When Founder Kelly Coffin's family faced some life-threatening diagnoses they switched to a plant-based diet. The results were almost immediate! He realized then how important it was to offer products that people would feel nourished by, without having to compromise on taste or texture.

name: Wecare Probiotics Co., Ltd.
description: Wecare is advancing the era of probiotic innovation.By harnessing the power of microbiology and multi-omics science, we are redefining how probiotic strains are discovered, developed, and applied across industries. Our solutions support products in dietary supplements, dairy, food, precision medicine, personal care, animal nutrition, and pet health—creating meaningful value for partners worldwide.Wecare is built on nearly 30 years of scientific leadership. With more than 200 researchers, over 300 patents, 100 clinical trials, high-impact scientific publications, and a world-leading strain bank, the Wecare Probiotics Research Institute drives innovation from discovery to clinical validation and intelligent large-scale manufacturing. Our five core technology systems—WecLac®, WecTech®, WecSim®, WecPro®, and WecCul®—enable development from lab to commercial application. Recognized and certified by renowned consulting firm, Wecare holds leading positions as the No. 1 in probiotic powder production capacity across Asia and ranks among the Top 3 globally in sales. Supported by four world-class intelligent production bases capable to delivers over 2,200 tons of high-quality probiotics powder annually. Our products meet the industry’s most rigorous quality standards, including NSF cGMP, FSSC 22000, GRAS, Organic, Non-GMO, Kosher, and Halal, and are trusted in more than 80 countries, including by leading global brands such as Bayer.Quality Probiotics, Quality Life.Wecare is committed to becoming a world-class probiotic strain company—rooted in integrity, innovation, and win-win collaboration.

name: Wedderspoon Manuka Honey
description: About two decades ago in Canada, our original founders, Catherine Wedderspoon and Sébastien Martin noticed a need in the marketplace. Raised in England, Manuka Honey was just part of Catherine's life. However, when Catherine's mum, Diane, came to Canada for a visit and got a sore throat, Manuka Honey wasn't to be found on local retail shelves. A lengthy family dialogue arose. Realizing Manuka Honey had successfully been in European and Asian markets years prior, the founders set out to bring manuka honey to Canada and the United States. With supportive partners in place and a stable Manuka Honey supply chain intact, Wedderspoon started as a small grass root family business, diligently knocking on the doors of small health food stores and attending tradeshows. 20 years later, what started as a family business, Wedderspoon is the #1 brand in the US of Manuka Honey. Ranging from jars of honey to pops, drops, throat-sprays and lozenges. Wedderspoon is stocked in more than 23,000 retail outlets throughout the United States. Wedderspoon remains dedicated to ethical and sustainable honey production, support of bee conservation and continued transparency. Wedderspoon has the only USDA Certified Organic Manuka Honey on shelf and still works with the original beekeepers.  In July of 2024, Wedderspoon was acquired by Florenz, a New Zealand-based leader in natural health and wellness with a mission to unlock the wonders of nature backed by science to optimize health.  With this new ownership structure, Wedderspoon is excited to bring additional, breakthrough innovation opportunities to the shelf. You might ask, what is Manuka Honey?  Manuka Honey is a unique honey that comes from the Manuka flower nectar gathered by the bees in New Zealand. Manuka (or mānuka) is a Māori word that refers to the flower that grows on both New Zealand's North and South Islands. The Manuka shrub has a very short annual bloom, which means that Manuka Honey is rare and highly sought after. Over 60 different compounds have been isolated from Manuka nectar, including antioxidants and polyphenols. Moreover, its multitude of uses makes Manuka Honey a multitasking superfood.

name: WEI-I FOODSTUFF CO., LTD.
description: Founded in 1991, WEI-I began as a Taiwan floss-food maker devoted to blending traditional methods with modern technology. Our passion for natural ingredients, quality, and trusted certifications has guided our journey as we share beloved fish floss and egg roll cookies worldwide.

name: WEIFANG ZHONGRUI IMPORT & EXPORT CO., LTD.
description: Weifang Zhongrui Imp. & Exp. Ltd is one Reliable and Top supplier of Chinese dried fruits, kernels and nuts . who have rich experiences with more than 29 years. Our factory have advanced equipments and management , certified with BRC, KOSHER, HALAL and Organic ( USDA NOP and EU standard).Our main business scope:Dehydrated apples : Organic & Conventional.     dried apple dice, dried apple rings, dried apple wedges ;  NO SO2 or with SO2;  High , Intermeditate or Low Moisture.Candied Crystallized  Ginger & other ginger products : Organic & Conventional.    crystallized ginger dice, ginger slice, ginger chunk, ginger medal;  Ginger in syrup ; ginger Paste.Goji berry : Organic and Conventional .  size : 180, 240,280,350, 380,500. Organic spicy: Ginger powder, ginger granule, gigner slice ; Chili power, crushed chilli.

name: Weihai Ziguang Youjian Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Weihai Ziguang was founded in 1997, located in the beautiful scenery, "the most suitable for human habitation coastal city" - Weihai, Shandong province; Since its establishment, the company has always adhered to the management principle of talent-based and honest business. The company now employs more than 1200 people, with five industrial parks and two basic centers. With a registered capital of 200 million yuan and an annual production capacity of more than 6 billion yuan, it has become a leading enterprise in the health industry of Weihai City and Shandong Province.Since its establishment, Weihai Ziguang has been deeply engaged in the dietary supplement industry, with quality as the foundation and science and technology as the soul. After years of painstaking development, Weihai Ziguang has gradually established a dominant position in production, research and development and sales in the industry. At the same time, relying on the strong research and development strength of the company, Weihai Ziguang develop functional food, Dietary structure set for specific groups of people, homology of medicine and food. Besides that, there are many other health categories. Weihai Ziguang adhering to different groups to do different tasks, forming multiple processes such as production, research and development and creation of projects, and now it has 656 kinds of health brand and record products, also 402 other health food items. Weihai Ziguang has gradually become one of the manufacturers of health care products and functional food with complete categories, safety and reliability.

name: Welbloom Biotech Corporation
description: Founded in 1999, WelBloom Biotech is a Taiwan-based CDMO specializing in food-like nutritional supplements, with functional jellies as our signature innovation platform, helping global brands transform ideas into market-ready and scalable products.Operating under NSF-GMP, FSSC 22000, ISO 9001, HALAL, and LEED standards, and recognized with Monde Selection Gold Medals, iTQi Superior Taste Awards, and the D&B SME Elite Award, WelBloom has developed 32,630+ customized formulations spanning consumers from children to seniors, and has been trusted by partners across 60+ countries worldwide.We deliver end-to-end solutions designed to reduce development risk and accelerate time to market—from market insights and formulation design to raw material sourcing, packaging, mass production, quality control, and regulatory support. Whether launching with a ready-to-go formula or developing a fully customized solution, WelBloom adapts to your commercial strategy and target markets.Our strength lies in the pioneering functional jelly development. Backed by patented manufacturing technologies that enhance efficacy and stability, and utilizing self-developed proprietary ingredients, we help brands create tasty products that are effective, consumer-loved, and unique in the market.Beyond jellies, WelBloom also supports powders, drinks, gels, sublingual pastes, and traditional capsules and tablets, allowing brands to expand their portfolios while maintaining a strong, differentiated core.WelBloom, where functional jellies redefine nutraceutical innovation.Now is the perfect time—Let's get your product journey started HERE!

name: Wellthy
description: Wellness within. We are Wellthy. We believe in the greater good. Effective, exceptional-quality essentials, guided by integrity, and a commitment to health that supports our customers and our community.

name: WellVine Chocolates, LLC dba Vine to Bar
description: We're women owned and founded. Good friends for decades, Barbara Banke, (Chairwoman and Proprietor of Jackson Family Wines), and Peggy Furth (Founder of Chalk Hill Winery), worked for years with the USDA Agricultural Research Service and UC Davis researching the health benefits of dried, milled and pressed chardonnay grapes. They wanted to find a "higher and better" use for the by-product of winemaking. They discovered and patented WellVine™ - a Real Food Prebiotic that feeds the good bacteria and suppresses the non beneficial. They launched Vine to Bar in 2022 with WellVine™ as the hero ingredient.  We've created the first real trifecta in the category, a product that delivers on taste, health, and sustainability.

name: Wen & Winnie Trading LLC
description: E-BEN was founded with the vision of blending Eastern tea culture with modern wellness. Our journey began in Taiwan, where we perfected the art of kombucha brewing using premium organic tea and pure, natural ingredients. We believe that balance is the essence of health — harmony between body and mind, flavor and function, tradition and innovation. Each bottle of E-BEN kombucha reflects this philosophy, offering a refreshing taste experience that supports gut health and overall vitality. As we expand internationally, we continue to uphold our commitment to quality, transparency, and sustainability, sharing the beauty of Asian craftsmanship and mindful living with the world.

name: Wet Hydration
description: Our founder, Spencer looked down at the floor of his car and saw a multitude of beverage brands he grabbed throughout his day- each one serving a specific purpose.  He had the idea to create one brand that captured the same purpose- to meet the consumer where they were in their day.

name: Whakyung
description: With over 30 years of experience in trading and manufacturing, Whakyung is a trusted global partner for food brands and food-service operators. We specialize in sauces and seasonings, offering full OEM and ODM services with flexible packaging options like jars, bottles, sachets, and pouches. Our products meet diverse dietary and safety standards—including halal, gluten-free, vegan, and FSSC 22000 certifications—ensuring quality and compliance across markets. Backed by a robust global supply chain, we help partners bring unique flavors to market quickly and consistently. At Whakyung, culinary creativity meets manufacturing precision to deliver excellence in every project.

name: When Pigs Fly
description: When Pigs Fly was founded in 1993 in York, ME with a mission to provide the community with freshly baked sourdough breads made from all natural ingredients. Our company believes in baking artisanal breads that contain quality, top of the line ingredients everyone knows and has heard of.​With our 25-year-old sourdough starter, we serve a need by providing health-conscious bread eaters with a healthier gut friendly bread option without having to sacrifice great taste.  We use authentic type I starter and have a unique company name that piques customer interest to help us effectively tell our story.​Our brand is growing rapidly as consumers are becoming more educated on the health benefits of sourdough-based breads, and we've complimented this with building out aggressive sales and marketing teams to further push our sourdough mission.​

name: Where Food Comes From
description: At Where Food Comes From, we believe in celebrating the people and stories behind every meal. We foster trust and authenticity in food production by building connections between farmers, ranchers, brands and consumers all while supporting a sustainable food system. Through third-party verification, data analytics, traceability software and sustainability solutions, we empower those who nurture the land and raise our food, helping them share their values and hard work with the world. Our mission is to open doors to new opportunities through value added programs that expand market access ensuring transparency and responsible practices for a more connected food future.

name: Wherefour, Inc.
description: Inventory Management & Traceability Platform for Manufacturers

name: Whims
description: Five years ago, I embarked on a transformative health journey that would ultimately lead to the creation of our brand.  After being diagnosed with an autoimmune disease, I was faced with a critical decision:  follow the doctor's recommendation to go on medication for the rest of my life, or explore alternative methods to manage my condition.  I chose the latter, committing to significant changes in my diet and lifestyle.  For the next three and a half years, I adopted a plant-based diet, which played a critical role in reducing the inflammation in my body and improving my overall health. During this period, my husband (also my Co-Founder) and I discovered a significant gap in the market.  As someone with a sweet tooth, we both struggled to find indulgent treats that were both low in sugar and tasted good.  Most options were either laden with sugar or filled with other ingredients that didn't align with my new eating preferences.  This challenged sparked a desire to create a solution not just for myself, but for other who might be facing similar struggles. Driven by this vision, we set out to reinvent the nostalgic chocolates that we all grew up loving.  Our goal was to craft a treat that was not only better for you, but also irresistibly delicious.  After countless iterations, we succeeded in creating a product that met our high standards for taste and a clean nutrition panel. Our chocolates are crafted with only 1 g of sugar, making them a guilt-free indulgence.  They are gluten-free, dairy-free, and contain zero sugar alcohols or palm oil, ensuring they cater to various dietary restrictions without compromising on flavor.  We believe that enjoying a sweet treat should not come at the cost of your health, and we are committed to proving that indulgence and health can coexist harmoniously. Our journey from a personal health challenge to a thriving brand is a testament to our dedication and passion for creating better-for-you treats.  We are proud to offer chocolates that not only satisfy your sweet cravings, but also support a healthier and happier lifestyle.

name: White Bottle, Inc.
description: White Bottle is a private-label contract manufacturer for vitamins and supplements, based in Stanton, California. We help brands and retailers bring high-quality products to market with a clear, collaborative process.What we doCustom R&D and formulation supportManufacturing for capsules and powdersPackaging options including: Blister packs, Pouches, Stick packsPowder GranulationPrivate labelingPackaging and labeling support aligned with FDA guidelinesQuality you can count onTriple testing assurance program across: Raw materials, Formulation, Finished productsWorks within HACCP and cGMP standardsSupports Organic, Non-GMO, Halal, and Kosher requirementsCertifications include NSF, cGMP, and HACCPCapacity and facility102,000 sq ft facility24 production lines884 million capsule capacityMultiple packaging lines for flexible runs and faster turnaroundWho we work withRetailers launching or expanding supplement linesBrands that care about consistent quality and complianceEntrepreneurs that want a straightforward manufacturing partnerLet’s connectIf you are exploring a new product, expanding formats, or looking to improve reliability in production, stop by and tell us what you are building. We will help you map the cleanest path from formula to finished goods.

name: White Leaf Provisions
description: White Leaf Provisions is a family-run business, dedicated to sourcing and creating the purest foods possible, grown in healthy, nutrient-dense soil. The ingredients used in our products are not only certified Organic and GMO-free, they are also regeneratively farmed® and biodynamic®.

name: Whitebridge Pet Brand
description: Whitebridge Pet Brands was founded in January 2015 with the merger of Cloud Star, a leading pet treat manufacturer, and Petropics, maker of Tiki Cat and Tiki Dog pet foods.  Additional acquisitions followed which included Dogswell, Cardinal Pet Care, and Grizzly Pet Products.The portfolio of brands allowed Whitebridge Pet Brands to build a range of food, treats, and supplements that brings health and happiness to pets and owners. The product philosophy is to offer a range of minimally processed, natural, and wholesome dog and cat foods, treats, compliments and supplements that are represented in the categories of Pet natural health nutrition, pet solutions, and pet lifestyle living.

name: Whittard of Chelsea
description: Our story began in 1886 when Walter Whittard beganselling the finest tea, coffee, and hot chocolate inLondon with the approach to buy the best. Over 135 years later, our never-ending curiosity to find unique blends and distinctive tastes lives on at Whittard. We continue to flourish, and our ambition will always remain the same – to ensure every customer can enjoy their own Whittard moment, and make each day more special.

name: Who Gives A Crap
description: We started Who Gives A Crap when we learned that 2.4 billion people don't have access to a toilet (now 2 billion – yay for progress!). That's roughly 40% of the global population and means that around 289,000 children under five die every year from diarrheal diseases caused by poor water and sanitation. That's almost 800 children per day, or one child every two minutes.We thought that was pretty crap. So in July 2012, Simon, Jehan, and Danny launched Who Gives A Crap with a crowdfunding campaign on IndieGoGo. Simon sat on a toilet in our draughty warehouse and refused to move until we had raised enough pre-orders to start production. 50 painful hours and one cold bottom later, we'd raised over $50,000.We delivered our first product in March 2013 and have been thrilled to keep growing ever since. Not just because our toilet paper is now gracing millions of bathrooms around the world, but also because we donate 50% of our profits. To date, we have donated over $12 Million AUD to our amazing charity partners. We also care about the planet! Most toilet paper brands produce tissue that's sourced from virgin wood pulp which leads to massive deforestation. As well as having a severe impact on the climate, deforestation is affecting half the world's land surface and as a direct consequence, millions of species are losing their natural habitat. That's why all of our products are never made from virgin trees and are packaged 100% plastic-free with recycled materials.

name: Whoa Dough
description: Whoa Dough is the first health-conscious ready to bake cookie dough that doesn't pull flavor punches. For kids. For adults. For the cookie-dough-craving, bowl-licking kid in all of us. We make real cookie dough with real ingredients. Top Ten Reasons to Love Whoa! Dough: GLUTEN FREE DAIRY FREE SOY FREE EGG FREE PLANT-BASED / VEGAN NON-GMO PROJECT VERIFIED NO ARTIFICIAL INGREDIENTS DELICIOUS LIKE WHOA! Our Ready-to-Bake (and safe to eat raw) Cookie Dough in irresistible Chocolate Chip, Sugar Cookie, and Brownie Batter flavors! This Certified Gluten-Free dough is set to blow your taste buds away with its incredible taste and texture.

name: Whole Earth Brands
description: Wholesome was founded in 2001 to make food better. The highest quality sweeteners that make a positive impact and empower the farmers that grow them through Fair Trade.

name: Whole Grain (Harbin) Foods Technology Co., Ltd.
Whole Herb Company
description: Whole Herb Company is a direct importer of Conventional and Organic Spices, Botanicals, and Tea Ingredients.  Additionally, we offer expert matching and blending services.  A  SQF certified company, our expertise in importing quality ingredients has been proven throughout our 50 years in business.  Whole Herb is a proud member of the Berje Inc Group.  Member of NWBOC

name: Whole Moon
description: Our founder, Jonghoon Lim, was inspired by his father's discovery of how to use the whole soybean to make a better and more nutritious soymilk in Korea. For centuries, tofu and soymilk have stood as nutritional powerhouses, yet their production involved a wasteful process leaving behind a treasure trove of nutrients known as okara. Having spent much time in the US, Jonghoon noticed a need to bring this plant-based beverage concept to the US market. After extensive research and recognizing a need for both people and planet health, the WholeMoon brand was founded in 2023.

name: wholeberry
description: nature  delicious snacks and super food

name: WholeFoods Magazine
description: For over 40 years, WholeFoods Magazine has informed and educated the natural products industry. As a trusted, independent, family, and women-owned full-service media company, we remain dedicated to helping the industry grow through innovation, connection, and strategic content marketing.We serve our community through a powerful multimedia platform that includes:•	9 Print Editions•	8 Digital Editions •	5 E-newsletters a week•	The Natural View Podcast•	Naturally Informed Virtual Events•	The Education Center featuring a library, Marketing Assets•	Move Nutrition Network for the Active Nutrition community•	Sample Boxes•	and more from our trusted content staff and columnistSpecial issues include the Annual Survey, Source Directory, Natural Choice Awards, Ingredient Choice Awards ,Targeted Digital Editions and others.At WholeFoods Magazine, we don’t just report on the natural products industry—we are a force behind its growth.

name: Wholesale Botanics
description: Since 2020, Wholesale Botanics has been dedicated to enriching daily life through natural wellness solutions. Guided by our values of sustainability, quality, and innovation, we ethically source botanicals and craft products with intention. From essential oils and powders to custom blends, private labeling, and premium packaging, our mission is simple: to deliver premium products that nurture well-being while respecting the planet.

name: Wholesome Bakery
description: Wholesome Bakery was born in San Francisco in 2009, out of the vision and hard work of Mandy Harper. Growing up in a Native American household that avoided white sugar, unhealthy fats/oils, and wheat products, Mandy was always on the lookout for healthier sweet treats. When she couldn't find any gluten-free, dairy-free, egg-free, refined sugar-free, eco-friendly goodies made with healthy fats and oils, she decided to whip up her own!Mandy's journey in the food industry began at 15, working every job you can imagine. As a young adult, she discovered her knack for developing delicious treats with alternative ingredients. With a dash of tenacity and a sprinkle of resourcefulness, she started Wholesome Bakery from her home kitchen— with no funding, partners, or investors.Committed to quality and sustainability, Mandy prides herself on using the highest quality ingredients that are not only sustainably produced but also ethically and humanely sourced, often from regenerative farms. Her approach ensures care for the farmer, the consumer, and the environment alike.

name: Wholly Pup
description: When I first adopted my beloved furry friend Marley, I quickly learned that he was a picky eater. I tried numerous brands and flavors of dog treats, but nothing seemed to satisfy his taste buds. It wasn't until I started making homemade treats from the natural ingredients found in my kitchen that I finally found something he enjoyed.I felt good about feeding him the same quality ingredients we feed ourselves because it meant that he was enjoying a healthy diet and nothing is as important as spending as many years together as possible. However, this quickly became time-consuming.That's when I discovered all-natural chews and treats. They were made with high-quality ingredients, free from harmful chemicals and fillers, and had the necessary nutrients to keep Marley healthy. But they were expensive and I knew that many people could not afford to feed their dogs these premium-grade treats.So I decided to start my own family-owned business, committed to providing dog owners with easy access to premium-grade, all-natural treats and chews at accessible wholesale prices. I believe that every dog owner deserves to enjoy their dog for as many happy years as possible. I'm on a mission to make it affordable for everyone to nourish their furry friend with the finest ingredients.I take pride in our products and stand behind our commitment to quality, health, and happiness for all dogs. Our family-run business is located in Pennsylvania, and we look forward to serving our community of dog lovers who share our values. Thank you for considering our products, and I hope to become a part of your dog's journey through life.Anna Senders

name: Wichy Plantation Company, (Pvt) Ltd.
description: Wichy was founded in 1984 with a simple vision – to share the natural goodness of coconuts from Sri Lanka with the world. What started as a small family business has grown into a trusted brand, built on passion, quality, and care for nature.From our very first coconut, our journey has always been about staying true to our roots – offering products that are pure, healthy, and sustainably made. Today, Wichy stands as a symbol of Sri Lankan tradition blended with modern innovation, bringing the taste of nature to every home.

name: Wicked Crisps
description: Wicked Crisps was founded by Phil Kosak, a seasoned food scientist with a Ph.D. in food science and microbiology. Phil's career began with leading chip manufacturers, where he developed some of today's popular snack brands. Driven by a desire to create snacks that harmoniously blend exceptional flavor with health benefits, he established Wicked Crisps. Beyond crafting delicious snacks, Phil is deeply committed to community engagement. He built a company that is people-focused, supporting his North Carolina community with jobs for workers with disabilities.Wicked Crisps embodies Phil's vision of delivering "Deliciously Deceptive Nutrition," offering baked snacks that are both flavorful and nutritious. With over 35 years of experience in the "better for you" snack industry, the company continues to innovate, providing unique flavors like Red Curry Hummus and Sweet Potato Soufflé. In recognition of its commitment to quality and community, Wicked Crisps was named Exporter of the Year by the North Carolina Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services. Phil's journey with Wicked Crisps reflects a dedication to creating snacks that delight the palate while promoting well-being, all rooted in a foundation of community support and inclusivity.

name: Wilcox Farms
description: 1909Founded by Judson & Eliabeth Wilcox

name: Wild Fox
description: With a love for tasty food and clean ingredients, we crafted Wild Fox. Quality ingredients, maximum taste.

name: Wild Planet Foods
description: In 2001 our founder, Bill Carvalho, happened upon an exhibit at the Monterey Bay Aquarium that told the story of our oceans having reached their breaking point. Deeply moved by his visit, Bill changed the course of his original seafood business into the compassionate company that it is today. Born out of reverence for ocean life, Wild Planet exists to transform an industry to protect this incredible resource for generations to come.

name: Wild Society Nutrition
description: Born from two-time UFC champion TJ Dillashaw’s relentless pursuit of peak performance, Wild Society Nutrition delivers clean, science-backed supplements and functional foods for athletes and everyday champions.What we stand forPerformance-first formulations developed from elite athletic experience.Clean ingredients, no unnecessary additives.Trusted quality: Informed and SQF certified.Flagship productsClear Whey IsolateGrass-Fed Whey Protein ConcentrateCaveman Eats Air-Dried Grass-Fed Beef SlicesRTD Protein + Hydration — Lemon Lime, Fruit Punch, Blue RaspberryWho we serveElite athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and health-minded consumers seeking effective, great-tasting nutrition that supports performance and recovery.Stop by to learn about our certifications, retail partnerships, and new RTD launch — ready for distribution.

name: Wilde Brands
description: WILDE was born from Southern roots and a craving for healthier snacks that offer premium protein without compromising on flavor. After 3 years of grit, determination, and development the first WILDE protein chip made it to market.Our protein chips are made from 100% chicken breast, egg whites and bone broth! Real Ingredients. Unreal flavor. It's time for a protein snack that doesn't taste like cardboard.

name: wildwonder
description: Wildwonder was founded by Rosa Li, inspired by her Chinese grandmother's healing herbal tonics. Combining her passion for wellness and food as medicine, Rosa launched wildwonder to make gut health accessible without sacrificing taste. Founded in 2018, the brand marries bold fruit flavors with heritage-inspired botanicals to create sparkling beverages that support gut health and overall well-being. Faced with early challenges, including a significant pivot during the pandemic, wildwonder emerged stronger, scaling into an omni-channel business. Driven by the values of flavor, health, and community, wildwonder donates 5% of profits to empower marginalized communities, staying true to its mission of creating everyday wonders.

name: Wiley Companies/AlaskOmega
description: Wiley Companies is the producer of AlaskOmega wild-caught Alaskan omega-3 and omega-7 fish oil concentrates. The company sources Alaska Pollock from the cold, pure waters of the Bering Sea, a fishery certified sustainable by the Marine Stewardship Council. With its commitment to quality and sustainability, AlaskOmega® ensures that the raw materials used in its products are of the highest standard.

name: Wiley's Finest
description: Wiley’s Finest®, a Wiley Companies brand, focuses on science-driven supplements that make a significant impact on human and environmental health.We launched in 2012 as Wiley's Finest® Wild Alaskan Fish Oil with the mission to bring consumers high-potency, sustainably sourced Omega-3s. We have since evolved our mission with the introduction of our Plant Powered Nutrition and Nutriment Plus product lines, which provide essential nutrients to people with diverse dietary needs at any stage of life.

name: Willa's Organic Oat Milk
description: Our Grandmother Willa had the wisdom to see how real, wholesome plant based ingredients are healthier and tastier -  before that was trendy. We saw how the category was filled with processed, unhealthy ingredients. They don't live up to their 'plant based' promise.We knew there was a better and more honest way.We started with our Grandmother Willa's Oat Milk recipe using real organic ingredients you can recognize.Willa's is the only oat milk to use the whole oat (not just oat sugar), making it richer tasting, lower in sugar, higher in protein and fiber - as well as zero food waste and a better choice for the planet. We celebrate the delicious power of whole plants to give you more of what you need and less of what you don't - in every moment, and at stage of life. With everything we do, we ask ourselves: Does this live up to our values and our grandma Willa's name?

name: Willamette Valley Pie Company
description: For nearly a century, three generations of the Roth Family have enjoyed the privilege of continuously farming land in Oregon's bountiful Willamette Valley.  From farming, to what began in 1999 as a small cannery-style operation in a backyard warehouse, we quickly grew into Willamette Valley Pie Company. Our berries, along with fruit and ingredients from dozens of other farmers, have been filling the family-owned and farmer-operated pie company's delicious desserts for more than two decades. Our commitment to our fellow independent farmers and making pies, cobblers, and other desserts just like you would at home is steadfast. It means sourcing the highest quality ingredients possible: farm fresh fruit, and 100% real butter. We believe you can taste the care that goes into our pies; it is what brings everyone around the table. We also believe in the simple delight of slowing down and connecting with friends and family. We bring people together and build community. We believe pie gives people a chance to step back, take stock and celebrate. It is hard not to smile when you've got pie on your plate.

name: Willie's Cacao
description: Willie's Cacao is the chocolate child of Willie Harcourt-Cooze, cocoa farmer, chocolate pioneer and artisan chocolate maker. His dream of making the world's best chocolate was born on his Hacienda El Tesoro, high in the Cloud Forest in Venezuela, where he farmed cacao for over a decade. This opened his eyes to real chocolate, so in 2008 he set up the UK's first artisan 'bean to bar' chocolate factory in Devon, England with the aim of introducing everyone to the beautiful dancing flavours of chocolates craft made from fine cacaos.  Willie's often dramatic journey from his farm to setting up the factory, was followed in two television documentaries, then two books full of chocolate adventures and recipes. His Willie's Cacao chocolates have won many awards including two SOFI's, and are used by top chefs around the world. They are all made from the world's great single estate cacaos and 100% natural ingredients. It is all about flavour, so Willie uses no soya lecithin and not even vanilla as these hide some of the precious flavour notes of the beans. He makes everything from scratch, even roasting the nuts and hand making the caramel.Being a cocoa farmer himself, he puts the farmers at the heart of how he does business, buying all his cacao Direct Trade, paying a higher price premium than Fair Trade.

name: Win Soon, Inc. DBA Epoca
description: Leading manufacture to make probiotic drinks for everyone.

name: Windmill Health Products
description: Windmill’s numerous and sustainable array of health products satisfies a variety of market needs, including multi and single vitamins and minerals, whole food supplements, greens, proteins, specialty formulas, anti-aging nutrition, condition specific, performance nutrition, and herbals. Our first-to-market products are available in numerous delivery systems, including: tablets, capsules, softgels, chewables, powders, liquids, gummies, chews, instant melts, and topicals. We also offer a variety of packaging options, such as bottles, blister cards, cans, packets, pouches, and individual serving containers; all with unique designs.

name: Windy City Mushroom - Fungitarian
description: Fungitarian was developed to get kids and parents to eat more healthy mushrooms without having to learn to cook them first. We developed five flavors that are familiar to the American flavor palette to make the switch easier for picky eaters. We started two years ago listening to customers at farmers markets who didn't know how to cook mushrooms, or who were busy parents who wanted easy to prepare options on school nights.We developed flavors and sold them in vacuum sealed pouches at farmer's markets alongside our fresh mushrooms. Weeks later when we sold out of packages with hand written labels, we knew were on to something!Over the next year we refined the five flavors and officially launched in July of 2023. We sold these at our expanded farmer's markets, and into small grocery stores and co-ops where we also sold out during demos. We launched Fungitarian into 7 Fresh Thyme stores in January of 2024 where it has already risen to Instacart's top seller! We're also currently expanding into two Dom's Fresh Market locations, and 22 Pete's Fresh grocery stores. We are currently developing other products that use Lion's Mane mushrooms including "Lion's Nuggets", and "Brain Burgers"!

name: Windy City Organics
description: While a healthy lifestyle isn't exactly a top priority for most teens, our co-founder Alex Malinsky was on a different path from an early age. It was his own battle with asthma that led him to make a profound connection: the way he felt was related to what he ate.The seeds of Windy City Organics had been planted, and Alex began his journey as a health enthusiast, raw food chef, and entrepreneur, launching an e-commerce website offering the highest quality superfoods, raw food equipment, and educational resources to empower others. But it was 2003, and there was no such thing as "raw chocolate" (unless you wanted to nibble on some plain cacao nibs ...) so Alex set out to change that, for the benefit of all.Like a match made in raw chocolate heaven, Alex's uncle Mike was looking for something meaningful to invest in after experiencing his own health challenge. He helped provide the infrastructure and resources that it took to establish our very own production facility — a real-life superfood chocolate factory! Teamwork makes the dream work and this uncle-nephew duo continue to lead all of the innovations and operations at WCO to this day.

name: Winfood Co., Ltd.
description: The company will always adhere to the principles of quality first, reputation first, and consumer first, adhering to the principles of survival based on quality, reputation based on service, and consumer satisfaction. We will constantly innovate, keep up with the times, and create a better tomorrow with sincerity and wisdom.

name: Wise Bar
description: In 2017, two best friends from the mountains of Colorado were relying on nature to help their health. They found that food is medicine and their diets were the keys to helping take control of their lives. That, and being in nature. Sadly, while setting out for each adventure, they were forced to pack energy bars in their packs full of awful ingredients like brown rice syrup, seed oils, and "natural flavoring". So they made something that they wanted, a bar made from only the goodness of nature that helped them feel and perform at their best. They mixed functional mushrooms, adaptogens in a 100% organic bar without any fillers, seed oils, syrups, preservatives or flavorings to create something magical. The best tasting and highest performing bar ever made. Be Wise.

name: Wisesorbent Technology
description: Founded in 2017, WiseSorbent Technology LLC began with a simple but powerful idea: to provide best solutions that safeguard products from the damaging effects of moisture.  We aim to ensure your products remain as intended, whether on store shelves, in warehouses, or in transit, free from humidity that could lead to product degradation, spoilage, and loss of value.

name: Wiskind Cleanroom Inc.
description: Wiskind Cleanroom is dedicated to providing comprehensive, one-stop cleanroom product solutions for clients in the biological and industrial sectors. With an office and a large warehouse in California, we leverage strong manufacturing and supply chain capabilities to offer complete and prompt services to factory owners, engineering companies, and distributors. Our founders bring over 45 years of manufacturing experience, supported by three advanced production facilities worldwide. We are committed to minimizing the dependency on manual labor and specialized skills, helping clients achieve efficient and reliable cleanroom construction.

name: Wismettac Foods, Inc.
description: The Shirakiku brand was born in Kobe, Japan in 1921 to embody our unwavering promise. At a time when Japanese ingredients were still difficult to find overseas, Shirakiku responded to the longing of Japanese immigrants in America by delivering canned and dried foods from Japan. We made authentic Japanese cuisine accessible and easy to preserve. This was a small but significant step toward bridging the gap infood culture.

name: Wonder Greener
description: When Taiwan began implementing its plastic reduction policies, Benson, the founder of Wonder Greener, was running a café and immediately felt the impact. Stainless steel straws raised hygiene concerns, while paper straws were not durable enough to provide a reliable experience. Realizing that existing options were neither practical nor truly sustainable, we began searching for a better solution. During this process, we discovered natural plant straws used in Vietnam, which inspired us to explore the possibility of cultivating this material in Taiwan.Starting with a single cluster of grass found in a local botanical garden, we spent years experimenting with cultivation, breeding, and adaptation. The journey involved many challenges and repeated failures, but through continuous adjustments and persistence, we eventually established our own grass farm and straw factory in Taiwan, enabling stable, local production of natural plant-based straws.To us, this journey represents more than creating a product—it reflects our commitment to a more sustainable future. We firmly believe that every purchase and every use of our products is an act of regeneration.

name: Wonder Monday
description: In a world of "guilty pleasures" and complicated nutrition labels, we knew there had to be a better way to enjoy life's sweetest moments. What started as a quest to recreate the perfect cheesecake without sugar or grains turned into something magical - a dessert that's both deliciously indulgent and surprisingly good for you. At Wonder Monday, we believe that living your best life should include both health and happiness - and yes, that absolutely means having your cheesecake and eating it too.

name: Wonderbelly
description: I'm Lucas Kraft, the co-founder of the digestive health company, Wonderbelly. Wonderbelly is focused on developing clean and effective digestive health medicine while also working to destigmatize conversations around digestive issues and related topics.The idea for Wonderbelly is rooted in my past experience of struggling with an eating disorder, bulimia nervosa, from the age of fifteen. While I was fortunate to recover in my mid-twenties, I'd already done lifelong damage to my digestive system leaving me to rely on products like over-the-counter antacids on a regular basis. These OTC products were extremely effective but contained many ingredients that are now being removed from food and beauty products, yet I was consuming them daily. This sparked the idea to create Wonderbelly, a digestive health medicine that doesn't use ingredients like dyes, talc, artificial sweeteners, or common allergens but uses the same active ingredient as the effective products I had relied on. Along with my brother Noah, whose past experience included operating disruptive companies, we put together an amazing team of gastroenterologists and pharmaceutical scientists to create our first product, Wonderbelly Antacid.

name: WonderCow Nutrition Inc
description: Rob, a 7th-generation dairy farmer, and his wife Erica founded WonderCow after seeking a natural way to heal their daughter's health. After struggling with recurring ear infections, antibiotics had weakened her gut and immunity. Rob knew colostrum's benefits, and added it to her diet. It transformed her health, energy, and mood. Inspired by the results, it became their mission to share colostrum's power with families everywhere through WonderCow.

name: WONIL FOOD Co.,Ltd
description: HEARTY SPOON is a brand created by WONIL FOOD CO., LTD., a specialized Korean food company established in 1988Driven by our strict quality control and accumulated development experience over 3 decades, we made it possible for consumers to enjoy Korean food directly at their home in the most convenient way.

name: Wow Bao
description: Wow Bao has been steaming up warm, fluffy bao in its Chicago restaurants since 2003. Bring the restaurant experience home with Wow Bao’s soft and fluffy bao, steamy soup dumplings, and flavorful potstickers. Ready in seconds, they’re an easy way to enjoy hot, delicious Asian street food anytime the craving hits. Wow Bao is the fastest-growing Asian snack brand in the U.S. and is now distributed in over 15,000 grocery stores nationwide. Soup Dumplings are a key growth driver, delivering +215% growth vs. year ago and attracting new shoppers into the frozen Asian category.

name: WTPC INC
description: World Trade Printing has been a trusted partner in the printing and packaging industry for over thirty years. Headquartered in Garden Grove, CA - we specialize in providing fully customizable printing and packaging solutions to the needs of businesses across diverse industries, including natural products, health and wellness, food and beverage, retail and more! With our 40,000 sq. ft. facility and decades of expertise, cutting-edge technology, and a customer-first approach, World Trade Printing is your go-to partner for crafting impactful, sustainable, and visually stunning print and packaging solutionsWebsite: www.wtpcenter.comDigital Flip Book Email: info@wtpcenter.comPhone: (714) 903-2500

name: WZBIO
description: WZBIO is a leader in the health and wellness industry, dedicated to developing scientifically advanced supplements using premium natural ingredients.
