Our commitment to innovation and quality ensures that each product is designed to meet the unique health needs of our customers, supporting their overall well-being. We aim to be a trusted partner in your journey to better health, offering solutions that are both effective and accessible.

name: Xaca Cantina
description: Xaca is where heritage meets innovation. Drawing on the culinary legacy of Oaxaca, we’ve crafted a line of tortilla chips that elevate the snack aisle with bold flavors, clean ingredients, and visually arresting packaging. Every bite is a tribute to tradition, with a distinctly modern edge.Product Line & Key Ingredients:Introducing a new line of better-for-you corn tortilla chips from Xaca Cantina. Made from organic corn, mineral-rich Baja Gold Sea Salt, and Non-GMO avocado oil or grass-fed beef tallow, they’re available in five unique, delicious flavors. Each bag of Xaca chips (5 oz) is a celebration of real, premium ingredients - always gluten-free and vegan.Baja Gold Salt: Made from organic corn and Non-GMO avocado oil. Salty with a mineral-rich edge, thanks to authentic Baja Gold Sea Salt. This is the OG tortilla chip. Each bag of Xaca chips (5 oz) is a celebration of real, premium ingredients - always gluten-free, Non-GMO and vegan.Chile and Lime: Made from organic corn and Non-GMO avocado oil. The fiery, smoky heat of Mexican chilies and citrusy lime dances on the crisp, earthy canvas of corn tortillas. Each bag of Xaca chips (5 oz) is a celebration of real, premium ingredients - always gluten-free, Non-GMO and vegan.Mole: Made from organic corn and Non-GMO avocado oil. A unique flavor featuring a rich, deep cocoa and spice to bring traditional mole flavor to a craveable chip. Each bag of Xaca chips (5 oz) is a celebration of real, premium ingredients - always gluten-free, Non-GMO and vegan.Hot Honey: Made from organic corn and Non-GMO avocado oil. The sultry sweetness of honey meets a fiery chili kick. Each bag of Xaca chips (5 oz) is a celebration of real, premium ingredients - always gluten-free, Non-GMO and vegan.Cinnamon Churro: Made from organic corn and Non-GMO avocado oil. A sweet-savory crossover, made with true Ceylon cinnamon and a hint of vanilla warmth. Each bag of Xaca chips (5 oz) is a celebration of real, premium ingredients - always gluten-free, Non-GMO and vegan.NEW! Baja Gold Beef Tallow: Our most indulgent chip yet—slow-cooked in rendered grass-fed beef tallow for an ultra-savory crunch and deep umami character.No artificial additives. No shortcuts. Just snack artistry done right.

name: Xcell International Corp.
description: Xcell started 40 years ago with coffee creamers before Starbucks created the coffee store trend. We transitioned to seasonings and sprinkles soon after.

name: Xi'an Pincredit Bio-tech Co.,ltd
description: Xi ‘an Pincredit Bio-Tech Co., LTD, headquartered in Xi ‘an, Shaanxi Province, China. specializes in the research, production and exporting natural ingredients, mainly including natural colorants, natural zero-calorie sweeteners, natural preservatives as well as natural dietary supplements. The ingredients are widely used in beverages, food products, health supplements and cosmetics.We have set up raw materials collection and processing bases in Shaanxi, Hainan, Shandong and Sichuan. Directly sourcing botanicals at origin, continuously refined extraction processes, to deliver highly competitive products and services. With over decades of global customer service experience, we have a professional digital marketing team, and our company actively participates in global industry exhibitions, to establish deep cooperation with new and regular clients. Our annual export capability is more than 3,000 tons to the United States, Canada, Europe, Australia, Thailand and other 30 countries and regions. Quality and service are highly regarded in the global market. We have passed Quality Management System, HACCP, ISO22000, EU Organic, USDA Organic, Kosher, Halal, SGS factory inspection etc. Also hold registered trademarks, multiple patents, and recognized as a “high-tech enterprise”.We abide by the corporate principles of quality, integrity and pragmatism, to bring natural raw materials to the world and make greater contribution to human health.

name: Xiamen HUlSON Biotech Co., Ltd.
description: As a professional manufacturer in China, Huison can offer you One-Stop product & Full-Chain Process for DHA Nutritional Solutions, such as Organic DHA Algal Oil & Softgels.

name: Xiamen Sungiven Enterprise Co., Ltd
description: On November 21, 2001, Xiamen Sungiven Import & Export Co., Ltd. was officially registered and established.On July 13, 2011, Xiamen Sungiven Foods Co., Ltd. was officially registered and established.On December 24, 2015, it was restructured into Xiamen Sungiven Foods Holding Ltd.On May 19, 2016, the company was listed on the New Third Board (National Equities Exchange and Quotations, NEEQ)On October 11, 2017, Sungiven Foods established its own-brand (Europe) R&D Center in Hamburg, Germany.On October 10, 2018, Sungiven Foods Canada Inc. was established.On January 1, 2019, Sungiven Foods established its own-brand (North America) R\&D Center in Vancouver, Canada.On March 19, 2019, Shenzhen Sungiven Foods Co., Ltd. was officially registered and established.

name: Xiamen Yasin Industry & Trade Co., Ltd.
XinKailian Biotechnology (Hainan) Co., Ltd.
description: XinKa is a cGMP-certified manufacturer of naturally fermented Ubiquinol (reduced CoQ10) with full proprietary IP and U.S. patent protection (US2025197332A1).Operating a 4,000 m² dedicated facility with >150 MT annual capacity, XinKa supplies high-purity Ubiquinol globally, including an optional Q9 & Q11 free grade for maximum purity.Reliable scale, certified production, and consistent global DAP supply for the dietary supplement industry.

name: Xochitl
description: Xochitl (pronounced so-cheel) is a premium tortilla chip brand known for its authentic Mexican roots, clean ingredients, and artisan-quality products. Founded over 30 years ago, the brand draws inspiration from ancient Aztec and Mayan culinary traditions, using simple, wholesome ingredients to craft chips that are light, crisp, and full of flavor.

name: Ya Oaxaca
description: These moles are a reflection of chef, cookbook author & television host Susana Trilling's 35+ years in Oaxaca, home of her world-renowned Seasons of My Heart Cooking School, where she shares her love of the regional cuisine and culture. Each mole is based on recipes that have been handed down for generations and offers a true taste of Oaxaca.

name: YACHIYOMENGYO CO.,LTD
description: We want to deliver delicious food that is truly made with care, considering health, the environment, and the future of our children. With this belief, we have created "Organic YACHIYO" paying the utmost attention to every detail, without compromise.

name: YAHN ( K Cosmed Trading Ltd., Part. )
description: YAHN is the integration of holistic care and perfumery based in Bangkok, combining traditional wisdom and know-how with regional ingredients to focus on the essence of beautiful living, where health and aesthetics harmonize.

name: Yakult U.S.A. Inc.
description: Yakult is the world's leading probiotic beverage created in Japan in 1935. Today, Yakult is sold in 40 countries and regions around the world. Our company's portfolio includes a range of consumer, cosmetic and pharmaceutical products.Science and research are the basis of our business. We have institutes in both Japan and Europe that are committed to discovering the endless applications for probiotics as well as the use of intestinal bacteria in human health globally.Yakult U.S.A. Inc. is headquartered in Fountain Valley, CA. It supports Yakult's business in the United States and Canada.

name: Yamakan USA
description: We were established in 1977, with the Eastern perspective of "Maintaining Daily Health Management and Preventing Diseases" as our foundation.

name: Yantai Oriental Protein Tech Co., Ltd.
Yantai Shuangta Food Co., Ltd - Follow Nature Inc
Yantai T.Full Biotech Co.,Ltd.
description: Built in year of 2011, T.Full focuses on pulse protein processing and development. Our main products are Fava Bean Protein, Mung Bean Protein, Chickpea Protein and Pea Protein, both conventional and organic products are available. Benefit from our unique technology, our proteins have good solubility, clean taste, smooth structure, consistent and stable quality would support your formuation, help your creation on new food. We welcome all your demand, please free free reaching out to us: ritazhang@tfull.com

name: Yaupon Brothers American Tea
description: In 2011 our founder, Bryon White, reimagined a new industry centered around this magical plant, did a deep dive into its history, and made it his life's mission to bring Yaupon tea back to consumers. Yaupon Brothers was founded in 2015 by brothers Bryon and Kyle White. Just one year later, Yaupon Brothers had their first Yaupon tea for sale on commercial shelves. The Yaupon Brothers are the original pioneers in bringing Yaupon tea back to American consumers after the tea had all but been forgotten. Yaupon Brothers trees are grown in certified organic "forest farms" on the central Atlantic coast of Florida, where Yaupon consumption began at least 8,000 years ago. Yaupon Brothers is committed to making Yaupon Holly a successful alternative native crop for Florida farmers and maintains a partnership with the University of Florida's Institute of Food & Agricultural Science to use Yaupon farming as a regenerative agriculture model because it results in less nutrient pollution, reduced water use, and is resilient to natural disasters like droughts, freezes, and hurricanes. Yaupon is also resilient to climate change! Since Yaupon is grown right here in America, not imported from abroad, it results in a smaller carbon footprint, less stress on the environment, and real jobs and economic opportunities for American farmers and workers.

name: YAWATAYA ISOGORO LTD.
description: Our business roots trace back to 1736, when we started selling shichimi by weight, sitting simply on a rush mat on the street.Our story began on the grounds of the magnificent Zenkoji Temple in Nagano, where we initially offered our spices as souvenirs to pilgrims. Our shichimi became so reputable that a theory suggests it came to be regarded as a de facto travel pass for those returning from Nagano.Today, we continue this tradition by expanding our reach, not only across Japan but also to international markets worldwide.

name: Yaxin Flexible Packaging, Inc.
description: Yaxin Flexible Packaging specializes in pouches for leading food companies worldwide. We are a California-based packaging company who owns our factory in China. We bridge the gap by giving you the opportunity to secure direct pricing with excellent customer service in the U.S. We are awake when you are. Our commitment to food safety is certified by BRCGS, IS0 9001, and our GMI certification ensures faithful color reproduction. We meet all U.S. and EU regulatory requirements for direct food contact. Our new sustainable solutions include PCR, paper pouches and have three recycle ready materials as certified by How2Recycle. Yaxin’s innovative packaging solutions include digital printing, roll stock including cold seal, Pre-formed stand-up pouches and Flat Bottom Box Pouches. Specialties include registered gloss or matte, soft touch and textured dimensional coatings as well as Foil Stamping for maximum shelf appeal. Our packaging is fully customizable. Have your questions answered on sustainable solutions, price flexibility and speed to market, by contacting Jenny Cavallucci, National Sales Manager, at 503-701-7675.

name: Yaygit
description: At the age of twenty, whiles working as a remedial therapist, Zoe decided she wanted to learn more about herbal medicine and naturopathy. She wanted to understand nutrition, as she had struggled with properly nourishing her body in her youth; and wanted to support others the way, she had learnt to support herself. It was during  this time she discovered that the bloating she had been experiencing was not normal for her body. She eliminated foods that left her bloated, nauseous, fatigued, and more. With all the acquired knowledge to pursue other passions; she began to nourish herself, her family, and friends. She later became a certified yoga teacher, yoga nidra teacher, artist, and soo much more.Over time she felt so good with changes to her diet she became curious about the changes in her reproductive health, and how she could support others, and so began my journey of feeding her body for wellness.Life with endometriosis, polycystic ovaries, and a fibroidLiving with food allergies was one thing, living with endometriosis was another. Zoe was lucky enough to get a diagnosis early in her life through a laparoscopy and ultrasounds. With her new found knowledge, she once again became curious in understanding all three of her conditions. She learnt how foods impacted hormones and ways foods could also support hormones. Zoe built a deeper relationship with her gut and it's role in keeping and supporting wellness. She made foods at home with intention, creating combinations of foods to support all three of her reproductive conditions. She. lived a low GI life, gluten free, and found yoga and meditation. Today she lives in Seattle, living a very allergy friendly and reproductive friendly life. Yaygit is a daily part of her nourishment. Focusing on reducing inflammation, meeting macros as a vegan of over two decades, and maintaining a balance in hormones as she gets older. With all that in tow, she felt it was time to share what has nourished her with with those that desire nourishment. And so began Yaygit's journey.In 2022, Zoe noticed a lack of access to healthy organic vegan allergy friendly whole foods in her neighbourhood in Seattle. Being a vegan with food allergies made it additionally difficult to access foods that were not only nourishing to the body, but also affordable. In 2023, Yaygit opened its doors to the public, intentioned with customer focused service, listening to those who needed support, and making sure they were heard and seen. We curated a menu that focused on gender health and wellness, whiles also considering those with secondary conditions, and saw the building of our much loved community, and our brand.

name: Yebo Group
description: The Yebo Group is an all-in-one packaging and printing solution. Whether you're a startup, marketing agency, or a big corporation, Yebo amplifies the impact of your product by providing the most advanced custom printing and packaging options in the industry.As a trusted packaging manufacturer located in Orange County, we work with some of the biggest brands. Continuously solving our customer's packaging problems while challenging the packaging industry status quo.Our goal is to inspire consumer packaging solutions for the world. Yebo has made this a hallmark of our success by partnering with our clients. Simply put, we’re not just a vendor but a qualified extension of your team. We believe that good packaging delivers products, but great packaging creates inspirational brands. Get Ready for Great Packaging!

name: Yellow Emperor
description: At Yellow Emperor, we are pioneers in liquid supplement manufacturing, specializing in innovative, high-quality formulations tailored to meet the demands of today’s health-conscious consumers. With a strong foundation in R&D, contract manufacturing, and product development, we collaborate with brands to create efficacious, market-ready liquid supplements, tinctures, and functional beverages that stand out in a competitive industry.Our expertise spans herbal extracts, functional ingredients, and wellness-driven formulations, allowing us to craft products that deliver real, measurable benefits. We work closely with companies of all sizes, from emerging startups to established wellness brands, helping them scale with precision and efficiency.At Yellow Emperor, we don’t just manufacture products- we help brands grow their liquid empire through science, innovation, and strategic partnerships. Whether you're looking to reformulate existing products or bring a new concept to life, our team is here to guide you from concept to commercialization with a focus on efficacy, compliance, and market success.

name: Yellow Yak
description: The journey in our commitment to innovating the dog chew industry while honoring and integrating time-tested traditions starts in Central Washington. Yellow Yak partners directly with 3rd generation family-owned dairy farm. We grow 100% of our feed and only use the milk from our cows. This process ensures that we can guarantee our milk is fresh, pure, and 100% USA Made.

name: Yerba Madre
description: About Yerba Madre (formerly Guayaki Yerba Mate)  Yerba Madre—formerly Guayakí Yerba Mate—is the nearly 30-year pioneer of regenerative yerba mate [yer-bah ma-tay] and the category leader in ready-to-drink mate beverages across North America. The name Yerba Madre, meaning “Mother Herb,” is a tribute to Mother Earth and the ancestral wisdom of the Indigenous communities who have cultivated yerba mate for generations —a reflection of the values the brand has championed since day one.  Headquartered in Oakland and Los Angeles, California, Yerba Madre sources organic, shade-grown yerba mate in direct partnership with nearly 50 Indigenous and small farmer communities across Argentina, Brazil, and Paraguay. Using its Market Driven Regeneration™ model, every purchase helps reforest the Atlantic Forest, support fair trade premiums, and build long-term economic resilience for grower communities.  Yerba Madre is proudly the first yerba mate to be Regenerative Organic Certified® and the first company in South America to achieve ROC™ Gold status, marking a dual milestone in regenerative agriculture and ethical sourcing. This achievement affirms the brand’s leadership in regenerative business – starting with its shade-grown yerba mate and setting a new global benchmark for soil health, biodiversity, and farmworker fairness. The ROC™ seal debuted on Yerba Madre packaging for Traditional Air Dried Loose Leaf and Mate Bags in May 2025. As an original founding member of the B Corp community and a founding member of the Purpose Pledge, Yerba Madre is committed to ethical business practices across ten key pillars, including climate positivity, living wages, circularity, and inclusion. Yerba Madre is available in over 45,000 retail locations across the U.S. and Canada. To learn more, visit www.YerbaMadre.com.

name: YIAYIA AND FRIENDS
description: This is a story about Yiayia. A Greek granny joined by her animal friends spreads the message of family values through food-related stories andexperiences conceptualized with a fresh perspective and a sense of humor.At the heart of the design project, "Yiayia" (granny in Greek) is glorified in a key storyline as an all-powerful, all-knowing, but also down to-earth character.Through her and her friends from both the human and animal kingdoms, the arts of growing, cooking, and sharing food together along with everything associated with these activities are remembered, reinterpreted, and redesigned for new generations.The story of yiayia and friends began in 2019, with a radical idea: let's create a brand for food products that will not be a food project but, at heart, a design project. It is an experiment testing the limits of how a meaningful narrative, an idea invested with creative illustrations and expressed in a strong visual language, can grow into a flourishing business. Yiayia and friends would probably never have made it through a standard commercial feasibility analysis, but our creative and professional instincts told us it was a risk worth taking.We chose to initially develop the brand outside of a typical business plan, and this gave us space to fully develop the ethos, the story, the look and feel of the brand first, and then make business decisions.Yiayia and friends reimagines superior quality food products, kitchenware, and other everyday objects, inspired by traditional values and reconceptualized for present-day use.

name: YJC TRADE LLC
description: The story of Halva Kingdom began in Morocco in 1947, where the grandfather of Halva Kingdom's founder mastered the art of crafting traditional homemade halva. After relocating to Israel, the family settled in the Old City of Jerusalem, where he continued his craft, preserving the rich flavors and techniques of his heritage.His passion and expertise were passed down to his grandson, who established Halva Kingdom in the iconic Mahane Yehuda Market. Over the years, Halva Kingdom has become one of the market's main attractions, celebrated for its exceptional quality and unique shopping experience. Today, people from across Israel and around the globe travel through the market's vibrant passageways to enjoy over 100 varieties of our fine halva. Halva Kingdom is proud to carry on a legacy of tradition, flavor, and excellence that began decades ago

name: Yo Mama's Foods
description: "From my first lemonade stand, I knew I wanted to start a business growing up," Habib says. "I was always interested in economics and business, and I liked the idea of creating something that you can sell to a lot of people."When he approached his mother with the idea of bottling the recipe she and his grandmother had perfected, she was all-in. And Yo Mama's Foods, Opens overlay — a cleaner, fresher packaged sauce option that would bring people together around the table — was born.Appropriately, the brand launched on Mother's Day 2017. Five months later, Yo Mama's was available on Amazon, and according to Habib, by December of that same year it had become the best-selling sauce on the platform, Opens overlay, a distinction it still enjoys today.Over the past five years, Yo Mama's has expanded its product line to include a variety of sauces, dressings and oils. As the founder and CEO of Yo Mama's Foods, Habib provides some insights on how his business is still able to thrive despite rising costs.

name: YOKUU
description: Do you prefer an afternoon nap over cleaning?So do we! That’s why we developed cleaning products that make cleaning a whole lot easier. Our little cleaning helpers – also known as probiotics – keep working for up to 7 days, so you have more time for the fun things in life.What is YOKUU?YOKUU was founded in 2020 by bio-engineer Joris Jansen. During his research on microbes in the living environment, he discovered how essential good bacteria are for a healthy immune system and a clean home. Instead of fighting bacteria, YOKUU harnesses them as your best cleaning helpers!Hardworking cleaning products for lazy cleanersWith 1 billion cleaning helpers per product, we make cleaning easier, healthier, and better for the planet. No harsh chemicals, no unnecessary plastic waste—just smart cleaning powered by nature.Why YOKUU?* Cleaner: Our probiotics keep cleaning for days, reducing dust, grease, and odors. And cleaner for the planet: no single-use plastic and a compact packaging format that takes up less space.* Easier: No more heavy bottles or lugging around water. Probiotics do the work for you, even after you're done.* Healthier: Natural ingredients, free from chemical nasties.Our bacteria come from the Belgian forests and help keep your home in top shape.Why 1 billion cleaning helpers are the natural choiceBacteria have an unfairly bad reputation. The common belief is that something is only truly clean when no bacteria are left. But did you know that 99% of bacteria are actually good for us? They play a crucial role in nature and have been keeping our planet clean for billions of years.Yet, traditional cleaning products keep killing bacteria with chemical biocides, which can lead to allergies, resistance, and poorer air quality.YOKUU does things differently. Our probiotic cleaners contain 1 billion good bacteria that keep working for 7 days.YOKUU has grown 250% three consecutive years and is constantly trending on instagram. We have found a message that resonates. Our USP remains unique wordwide.

name: Yongan Kangjian Pharmaceutical(Wuhan) Co,.Ltd
description: Yongan Kangjian Pharmaceutical, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Yongan Pharm, specializes in the R&D, production, and import-export of dietary supplements. As a leading enterprise in the M-CDMO sector, we leverage Yongan Pharm's global industrial chain and high-quality raw materials—including taurine and creatine—to deliver comprehensive product solutions and professional services with a true spirit of craftsmanship.

name: Yoopy Sparkling Beverages
description: At Yoopy, our story began with a simple idea: to reimagine the way people connect with nature through hydration. Born in 2024 out of a passion for wellness and authenticity, we saw an opportunity to take the natural freshness of coconut water and give it a modern, functional twist — without compromising its essence.

name: Yoshantea Tea Co., LTD.
description: Yoshantea is a premium Taiwanese tea brand shaped by more than a century of tea-growing heritage. Our story began in 1880, when our family settled in the mountains of central Taiwan and started cultivating tea in small batches, guided by traditional craftsmanship and deep respect for the land.In 2002, our founder transformed the family's tea knowledge into a modern brand with a clear vision: to present Taiwan's finest teas to the world with honesty, refinement, and cultural depth. A turning point came when an early customer-a physician-encouraged us to elevate not only the taste of tea but also the experience, design, and storytelling behind it. That moment shifted us from being producers to becoming true curators of Taiwanese tea culture.Today, Yoshantea combines generational expertise with scientific quality management, working closely with local tea gardens and artisans to ensure stability, safety, and traceability at every step. We champion sustainable agriculture and responsible harvesting, believing that great tea must coexist with healthy mountains and thriving communities.Our flagship products-including our signature Mild Oolong and Dong Ding–style teas-reflect our commitment to detail, from careful leaf selection to gentle processing that protects aroma, structure, and sweetness.More than a beverage, tea is our way of sharing Taiwan's landscape, craftsmanship, and warmth with the world. Our journey continues as we bring authentic Taiwanese tea experiences to global customers through retail, hospitality partnerships, and cultural education.Yoshantea exists for a simple and enduring purpose: to make good tea, and to help people live well.

name: Young Poong Co.,Ltd
description: We are developing various foods to promote Korean food to the world.We directly manufacture rice cakes using rice, and we sell Rice cake (stick, slice)  as our main products. We started exporting because we thought that overseas sales were more competitive than domestic sales. However, it was a product that felt very unfamiliar and rejected by foreign consumers other than Korea. Therefore, we developed and sold Topokki with soup, and we are currently exporting it to 100 countries. Overseas consumers expect to use various rice cakes and produce and export rice cake products.

name: Youth & Earth
description: The year is 2017, and our founder, Ed, embarks on a quest for everlasting youthfulness. Battling waning energy levels and the march of time, Ed refuses to settle for anything less than boundless vitality. Frustrated by a sea of conflicting advice and ineffective remedies, he takes matters into his own hands. In his quest for answers, he unearths two revolutionary truths: the dwindling levels of NAD+ in his body and the remarkable benefits of NMN.Fast forward to today, we want to revolutionize your approach to ageing. Our NMN capsules, alongside a curated selection of essential supplements, are not just products – they are catalysts for unlocking your full potential. No matter how many years you've been on this Earth, we are here to fuel your journey towards peak performance, looking youthful and overall unwavering vitality. We celebrate the potential opportunities for growth and transformation. Embracing the beauty of ageing, we arm you with the knowledge and support needed to navigate your personal journey through life. Our ethos is simple: ageing is not entirely out of your control.

name: Ysidro Sake Spritz
description: 2021, Monica along with her husband Seth and good friend Alex created a beverage that stunned their community with its aroma and deliciously smooth qualities. Born on the coast in Montecito, Ysidro is a sophisticated take on the classic spritz. Crisp and refreshing, Ysidro's bring notes of ruby red grapefruit, tart acidity and a touch of salinity are anchored by the mellow brilliance of our top shelf Junmai Ginjo sake. Sun-soaked and salt-sprayed, immerse yourself in the lifestyle of the Riviera. Drink it, be here!

name: YTR Technology, Inc.
description: YTR Technology Inc. is dedicated in developing and supplying functional ingredients to food supplement, pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries worldwide. We have our own factory on herbal extracts bringing leading ingredients like Rutin, Quercetin, Berberine HCL, St. John's Wort Extract, Turmeric Extract, PQQ and more.

name: Yücebaş Dış Ticaret Gıda Sanayi Anonim Şirketi
description: As Yücebaşfood, we took our first steps to the dried fruit sector by producing machinery, that would process and add value to these products, in the right way.Today, we are providing high capacity fig paste to the fig roll industry with our own production lines.We created a value in the dried fruit sector with the name "Yücebaş Food" today.

name: Yumeals – Vivien Paille
description: European leader in rice, cereals, pulses and plant-based protein.Experience on the North American market with dedicated sales and marketing team.Specialist in ambient products and manufacturer of microwavable pouches since 2006.Expert in secure sourcing from historical players all around the world.Quality focused with stringent controls at all stages or production from raw material reception to packaging.

name: YumEarth
description: YumEarth was created by families for families and offers a variety of organic, allergy friendly sweets. As more people are affected by food allergies every day, our promise is to keep innovating and creating friendly sweets, yummy treats for all!  Since 2007, we have been making products that are free from the top common allergens including: peanuts, tree nuts, milk, fish, shellfish, egg, soy, wheat and sesame. From gummy candy to sour candy to lollipops, we make delicious treats for everyone to enjoy. Our products are allergy friendly, organic, non-gmo and free from artificial dyes and high fructose corn syrup.

name: YUMI
description: When Angela became pregnant with her first child, she learned that scientists widely consider nutrition in the first 1,000 days to be the most important factor in development. She also learned about the lasting impact of specific nutrients, such as iron, calcium, and healthy fats, on a child's neural, physical, and future metabolic health.And yet, the working mom found no options at the grocery store she felt good about.The aisles were dominated by options that were high in fruit sugars and low in nutrition. Together with her longtime friend Evelyn, a former WSJ and NYTimes journalist, the two built YUMI to support parents with nutrition-first meals and snacks for babies and toddlers with enriching content tailored to every developmental milestone.Their goal is an easy, worry-free option that you can feel good about and to share knowledge that inspires a lifetime of healthy eating. They believe it is YUMI's responsibility— and the responsibility of all food companies— to lead with science, to nourish with real foods, and to fight for a better tomorrow

name: Yumkies
description: Yumkies started long before the first cookie ever came out of the oven. It began when our founder sat in a doctor's office and was told she was "morbidly obese" and a ticking time bomb for diabetes. Her doctor said the only path forward was medical intervention.She loves a challenge, so she told him no.That moment changed everything. Instead of accepting a future she did not want, she became obsessed with nutrition and learned how to recreate her favorite foods in healthier ways. She transformed her habits, her body, and her confidence. What started as a personal journey quickly revealed something bigger.She realized that so many people feel trapped between the foods they crave and the choices that support their health. She made it her mission to show that there is another option and that healthy food can actually taste delicious.Yumkies was founded in 2024 from that mission.A clean treat brand created with gluten free ingredients and no refined sugars, no seed oils, and no junk. Just joy, flavor, and a reason to feel excited about eating well.

name: YUZUYA USA INC.
description: January 5, 1978, on a rural aria deep in the mountains of Japan. After heavy snowfall following the New Year's holiday, all restaurants were busy preparing dishes for their New Year's customers. However, restaurant owners were unable to easily go to the market due to the heavy snow blocking the roads. Nevertheless, our founder braved the heavy snow to deliver pre-made ponzu sauce carefully blended with citrus juice to them. This product gained popularity that day due to its genuine taste without additives and his sincerity, and it sold out immediately. This was the moment our company was established as a manufacturer and seller of citrus juice. Since then, we have gradually expanded our range of products, focusing on preserving the natural flavor of ingredients and using no additives. In particular, our yuzu juice is now used in top-tier restaurants in over 40 countries worldwide.

name: Zahav Foods, LLC
description: Zahav Foods was created to bring the amazing flavors of Zahav Restaurant to your kitchen at home. Our first product is Zahav Restaurant Recipe Hummus made with the same simple ingredients found in the restaurant. Hummus is what put Zahav Restaurant on the map 15 years ago and what you are welcomed with when first sitting down at the restaurant. Zahav Hummus is made with more premium roasted sesame Tehina than any other brand in the market and only uses 6 simple ingredients with no fillers or oils.

name: ZANAE -NICOGLOU YEAST COMPANY S.A.
description: ZANAE's story began in 1930 in Thessaloniki, Greece, with a clear vision: to create foods of exceptional quality that embody the richness of Greek and Mediterranean cuisine. From its earliest days, the company has been driven by a deep respect for tradition and an unwavering commitment to innovation, steadily growing into one of Greece's most trusted and recognizable food brands. Today, ZANAE products reach consumers in more than 45 countries around the world. At the core of ZANAE's philosophy stand three enduring values: quality, authenticity, and innovation. Each product reflects the essence of Greek gastronomy — from our signature dolmades and giant beans to flavorful sauces, Greek olives, and Mediterranean ready meals that celebrate genuine home-style taste. Decade after decade, ZANAE has remained faithful to traditional recipes while embracing modern technology and the highest international standards of food safety and production.Our success is deeply connected to the people and land of Greece. We work closely with carefully selected local producers, ensuring that every ingredient meets strict quality criteria and is sourced responsibly. Sustainability and social responsibility are integral to our operations, guiding us in every step — from raw material sourcing to energy-efficient production and eco-conscious packaging. ZANAE is proud of its long-standing partnerships across retail and HoReCa markets, built on mutual trust, consistency, and shared values. These collaborations, both in Greece and abroad, reflect our reliability as a partner and our ability to adapt to the diverse needs of our clients.Our facilities operate under certified international quality systems, including ISO, IFS, and BRC standards, ensuring excellence and transparency in every product we create. As consumer preferences evolve, ZANAE continues to innovate,  expanding its range with organic, vegan, and ready-to-eat options, crafted with the same care and authenticity that define our heritage. Nearly a century after its founding, ZANAE remains committed to sharing the taste and soul of Greece with the world — combining tradition, innovation, sustainability, and a passion for good food that continues to inspire generations.

name: Zaymo
description: Zaymo allows customers to buy products and edit their subscription with one click inside an email. No directs.

name: Zego
description: ZEGO crafts delicious oat-based products that are gluten-free certified and free from the top 14 allergens and corn. We are proud to source our oats from US farms. We’re leading the way in food transparency, as customers can scan the QR code on any ZEGO package to access the latest test results for 500+ pesticide residues, heavy metals, and gluten.NEW PRODUCT LAUNCHES2024: Superfood Oatmeal Blends: Blueberry Lemon Poppy and Cinnamon & Spice2025: Regenerative Organic Oatmeal

name: Zen
description: Zen was founded in 1999.

name: Zetlian Bakery, Inc.
description: At Zetlian Bakery we have worked with major retailers and smaller stores in the last 50 years with a variety of sweet and savory bakery and fresh food products.  We launched Haflé Foods to introduce our Authentic Mediterranean recipes in a fresh modern way to the world.  Haflé means Celebration/Gathering in Arabic.  We would love you to enjoy our food with friends and loved ones around the table or a party.

name: Zetox Technology Pty Ltd
description: Zetox Technology Pty Ltd, trading as Olive Oil Skincare Group, specialises in the formulation and manufacturing of skin care products based on olive oil. The company operations are all Sydney-based.The business dates back to 2012 and was born out of necessity. A member of the founding family suffered from psoriasis, a skin condition that was exacerbated by conventional solid and liquid soaps. This challenge prompted a search for a gentler solution.Extensive research into articles and data revealed substantial evidence supporting the benefits of olive oil in skin care. The idea was further reinforced during a family holiday in southern Europe, where olive oil's use in skin care was both prevalent and historically significant. Olive oil has served as a base for skin care products since the Mycenaean era, around 3000 BC. Preliminary investigations confirmed that olive oil contains essential ingredients for healthy skin, a vital consideration in a world facing adverse effects from climate change.Determined to find a solution, the family began experimenting in their home kitchen. Numerous formulations were tested, often with frustrating results, until a hard bar soap was eventually created. Upon application, the soap proved effective, alleviating the skin condition without aggravation.Word of the successful formulation spread among family members, who also found relief from their skin conditions. As demand grew, the product was introduced at the local Saturday morning market, quickly outpacing the kitchen's and garage's production capacity. The business soon moved to larger premises, enabling an expanded product range that now caters to skin care needs from head to toe.Since its founding, the business has maintained a commitment to producing ethical products. All offerings are made with all-natural ingredients sourced from sustainable resources, reflecting the company's dedication to both skin health and environmental responsibility.

name: Zhejiang Camel Transworld Organic Foods Co., Ltd.
description: matcha matcha powder organic matcha organic matcha powderChinese matcha powder

name: Zhejiang Hengmei Health Technolgy Co., Ltd.
Zhejiang Johncan Mushroom Bio-technology Co., Ltd.
description: Zhejiang Johncan Mushroom Bio-technology Co., Ltd. (commonly known as Johncan Mushroom) is a premier high-tech enterprise specializing in the research, cultivation, and deep extraction of medicinal mushroom extracts. The company has established itself as a global leader in the mycological health industry for over 20 years.Core Expertise & ProductsJohncan Mushroom integrates traditional wisdom with modern biotechnology. We specialize in producing high-quality, standardized mushroom extracts, including:Ganoderma Lucidum (Reishi) / Hericium Erinaceus (Lion’s Mane) / Cordyceps Sinensis / Cordyceps Militaris / Grifola Frondosa (Maitake) / Inonotus Obliquus (Chaga) / Coriolus Versicolor (Turkey tail) / etc.Quality Assurance & CertificationsQuality is the cornerstone of our operations. To meet the rigorous demands of the global pharmaceutical and nutraceutical markets, we have secured a comprehensive suite of international certifications, including: FSSC22000 / USDA Organic / EU Organic / Kosher / Halal / Vegan.Global ReachWith a commitment to "Science-driven Health," Johncan Mushroom exports its premium ingredients to over 30 countries and regions, including North America, Europe, and Southeast Asia. We provide customized OEM/ODM solutions and technical support to help our partners develop innovative supplements, functional foods, and cosmetic products.

name: Zhejiang Minghuang Natural Products
description: Zhejiang Minghuang Natural Products Development Co., Ltd.The company is the leading manufacturer and supplier for the entire tea industry, with products covering all kinds of leaf tea, instant tea powder, matcha green tea powder, herb extracts, etc.--- Founded in 1980. --- Covered 65259 square meters.--- Annual production capacity of 6000MT. --- Main Products: Tea Extract, Herb Extract, Matcha Powder,Leaf Tea etc.--- Sales to USA, Europe, Southest Asia and many other countries--- Global Quality System Certification: ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO22000,FSSC22000,HACCP, RAINFOREST ALLIANCE CERTIFICATION, FAIR TRADE USA CERTIFICATION, ORGANIC CERTIFIED BY CERES, KOSHER, MUI HALAL

name: ZHEJIANG SHUANGHENG HEALTH INDUSTRY CO ., LTD
description: Zhejiang Shuangheng Health was invested by Zhejiang beyond Biotech co ltd. and Zhejiang Shungheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. The factory land is about 53 acres, the building purification area is 15,000 square meters, and the total construction area is 64,000 square meters, including six buildings, namely No. 1 factory building, No. 2 factory building, No. 1 comprehensive warehouse, No. 2 comprehensive warehouse, power workshop, and comprehensive building. Among them, the workshop area is about 30,000 square meters.

name: Zhejiang Tianrui Chemical Co., Ltd.
description: Zhejiang Tianrui Chemical Co., Ltd., located in Longyou Provincial Economic Development Zone, Zhejiang Province, China, is a national high-tech enterprise mainly engaged in the R&D, production and sales of L-Theanine, Glutamic acid series products, Aspartic acid series products, Aspartic acid chelate salt, Threonic acid chelate salt, Complex amino acid and Protective amino acid. The company has established a complete production control and quality assurance system in accordance with the standard design, construction and operation of pharmaceutical enterprises and the regulations of ICH O7. The company has passed FSSC22000 food safety management system, ISO14001 environmental management system certification and SMETA members' ethical operation audit, and its products have passed international certifications such as FDA GRAS, HACCP, KOSHER, HALAL, NON-GMO, etc. The company has the right to import and export by itself, has established trade relations with more than 40 countries and regions, and has gradually established brand advantages relying on strong technology research and development capabilities and excellent product quality.

name: ZICO
description: ZICO orginally founded by Mark Rampolla in 2004, sold to Coke in 2013, and repurchased by Mark in 2020 in order to continue ZICO's orginal mission, to hydrate the world naturally.  ZICO is a 100% Natural Coconut water with no added sugar, sourced from Thailand and using a blend of mature and young sweet coconuts to provide the perfect level of sweetness.We source the highest-quality coconuts from southeast Asia and blend them to perfection for delicious, thirst-quenching refreshment.Expertly-crafted to restore you from those depleted from the stresses of physical activity and daily life. Our people and products are crafted with the utmost integrity. Artificial ingredients or intentions need not apply-Full label transparency-Never adulterated

name: Zina's Salads
description: Zina immigrated from the Soviet Union in early 1980's after spending some time in Italy.  She wasn't pleased with the quality of American food so she began making soups and crepes.  In 1990 a customer asked if she could make salads and in 1992 we began producing salads and 30 years later is what we are best known for because of our process, use of premium ingredients and never using additives or dyes.

name: Zoe’s Meats
description: Years ago, I met Charlie, my co-founder, on a beach volleyball court, and since we both made careers at meat companies, it was no wonder we hit it off and became friends. It wasn't long before we started brainstorming ideas for our own company.In 2007, our vision was to build an artisan cured meat company leveraging our ability to connect and communicate with chefs and restaurateurs. We wanted to give chefs access to ingredients that were so good they didn't have to make them in-house from scratch. Next thing you know, we were delivering in our refrigerated vans to one restaurant at a time, one box at a time.Named after my youngest daughter, the brand Zoe's Meats can be found on hundreds of restaurant menus across the country as we have become ingredients of choice to thousands of restaurants. Fast forward 18 years and now we are focused on building the same relationships with chefs at home. I hope you enjoy our products. Drop us a line and tell us how you used our products in a recipe or follow us on social media.

name: Zolli Candy
description: Zolli Candy is delicious, fun candy for ALL! Zolli is ZERO sugar, dye-free, vegan, diabetic KETO & allergy friendly, gluten free candy that everyone can enjoy & helps clean teeth! Women owned, and cause based. Fastest growing candy company Inc. 5000 5 years.  500K+ Followers on Zolli Candy social channels.  Zolli created the Million Smiles Initiative 501c3 that provides oral health education to millions of students and families.Stop by Booth 5355 & enjoy Delicious New Innovations & Top SellersExclusive Expo West Deals – Up to 50% OFF select top-performing itemsNEW Exciting innovations include:•	SOUR Zollipops, Zolli Drops & Zaffi Taffy + Vitamin C•	Zolli Fruit Drops + Vitamin C•	Elderberry Zollipops + Zinc •	Zollipops & Zolli Drops Vitamin C BackgroundWhen Alina Morse was seven years old, she went to the bank with her dad and the teller offered her a lollipop. While she really wanted to accept, her parents always told her that candy was terrible for her teeth.So she asked her dad, "Why can't we make a lollipop that's actually good for your teeth?" And in that moment the idea for Zollipops® was born!Together, Alina and her dad set off to make delicious lollipop treats that were actually good for teeth. In 2014, the first Zollipops treat hit the shelves: a delicious vegan, dye-free, sugar-free candy. Alina became known as the "Lollipop Girl," a true kidpreneur!What's in a name?Alina's younger sister, Lola Morse, came up with name Zollipops when she tried to pronounce one of the one of the teeth-friendly ingredients. Alina was looking for a catchy name, Lola said "Zollipops," and the rest is history! Today, ZolliCandy — Zollipops®, Zolli® Drops, and Zaffi® Taffy, Zolli Caramelz, Zolli Gummeez, Zolli Mints & more — are available and is the best-selling sugar-free, healthy candy in the United States.Alina's Million Smiles Initiative Inc. 501c3 EDUCATING, INSPIRING AND HELPING KIDS SMILESmiles have amazing powers and the magic in a child's smile is undeniable. But with childhood tooth decay ranking as America's single most chronic childhood disease, children's smiles are an endangered species! When Zolli Candy's CEO Alina Morse heard this news she knew she had to use her Zolli-powers for good and began her mission to save the smiles with the Million Smiles Initiative 501c3.

name: Zoup!
description: Zoup! is a dynamic broth and soup-centric company born from its legacy fast-casual restaurants across the northern U.S. and Canada. After serving customers face-to-face for over 20 years, our passionate team leveraged our restaurant heritage to thoughtfully craft the first super-premium broth, packaged in glass jars and good enough to drink. With multiple broth line extensions, and the addition of Culinary Concentrate™ broth bases and high-quality, shelf-stable, glass-jar soups, Zoup! is today sold in 20,000+ grocery stores and ranks as one of the top broth brands nationally. Our company has also been featured on the Inc. 5000 list of the fastest growing private companies in America since 2019. Visit ZoupBroth.com and follow @ZoupOfficial on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest.

name: ZUTOPIA W LLC
description: Our brand story begins in 2024, when Zutopia W LLC was founded in Salt Lake City, Utah, with a vision to connect global markets through unique, culturally enriched experiences. One of our first exciting steps was partnering with Reckitt, a global leader in health and wellness, to showcase their iconic Move Free joint health supplements to international audiences, particularly in Asia.This collaboration marked the start of our journey. By blending professional bilingual hosts, immersive storytelling, and authentic connections, we've brought Move Free to millions of people across the globe, fostering trust and building relationships with diverse communities.At Zutopia W LLC, we aim to create experiences that transcend borders and bring brands closer to their audiences in meaningful ways. We are passionate about shaping a world where cultures meet, stories are shared, and every connection feels authentic.
